textByHashes.55fe3c483378f6aae7590a10d51e39ed97ece50d: Pleased to meet you, I'm . So, what's wrong with the Council?
textByHashes.44fc41ebda9c5c0bfc5b7c66d43db1441f4c30eb: Interesting. What else don't you like about the Council?
textByHashes.9a565f4292ab1f13bb822445e4cdefa0e189d9bf: That is a bit suspicious, I suppose.
textByHashes.fbca80d814d001fd52e35245c0d687e340088ccb: Not right now. But thanks for the information.
textByHashes.79174858a226b68fab1eac0b30ecc4b1c2ab7c51: Councillor Hughes? I was the one who helped imprison her in the first place.
textByHashes.fd2776e43d7d30c41a3722e02aa6f471cf21e17e: That's quite the accusation. Do you have proof?
textByHashes.200dfacbd40d86b45736f2a64f48b2196ec52650: Hmm... Rather than just waiting for that to happen, maybe I could investigate her escape.
textByHashes.c54c4be3975365b78400342532a35c3baa9cd3d9: Well, I think I'll stay out of this one. Good luck with your protest.
textByHashes.78bbbb05e664f7def311310d6ec3e361b0b468ac: Hey there. Remind me, where can I find Commander Fullore?
textByHashes.6b385bc0c51ad54bffe20f68b0c3d50bc8461aaa: Then you're just the person I'm looking for. I'm . I hear you're the one to talk to about the recent escape of Councillor Hughes.
textByHashes.01bdad44e4ce97127b1edb571696cdc5bd69ba96: No... that's not something that ever came up.
textByHashes.d5320187436006fd4f88f9aa825bf187ed11098d: So I'm guessing you don't agree with his views on the Council.
textByHashes.806042c7dba7a0d5ef72ebf922131fc6f364dd59: It is a bit ripe there.
textByHashes.175b8f7f8c122d1fe79a7799230e096b3c8c7216: Like the escape of Councillor Hughes?
textByHashes.9aa73c5ac007ef94c688e293ff36e3081fed05a5: You know, I might be able to help you with that. In case you didn't know, I was the one who helped catch her in the first place.
textByHashes.6105558692565301699e864020c14cc0cd60d515: I'm not one of his people! I barely know him. I'm just a willing adventurer who wants to help.
textByHashes.7cbf4fea149b595e0da0e4b30adb7dfeb2bbf3ae: Think about it. However this investigation goes, you'll be seen as biased towards the Council. I'm a neutral third party with no ties to the Councillor or the protesters. I'm in an ideal position to help out here.
textByHashes.cdf0ddc0377878a84a29bae20cfc932d96605bdb: Crystal clear. Where do we start?
textByHashes.44c4466462b444d9dbd083ac3df66fe1ec1c211c: But that wasn't you! I did all the work!
textByHashes.83d43e393ca5dcb3a48803c0e799a54cab9a3e54: For someone who supports the Council so much, you don't seem very happy about Councillor Andrews' decision.
textByHashes.661cad33a5da9eaeb7c60493fe0dbaba1438cf80: I feel like you're not totally being honest with me.
textByHashes.c71ac24234b74c9de104164caf2aff06abe79cf7: Fine. I guess we'd better get started.
textByHashes.53eab050fffe0223b960b9aba275e1ea1a8b0169: I just need to do something first.
textByHashes.0807fb884a9348c1cab0780d1e3ebb8eb210596c: So you already have some leads?
textByHashes.d53e2ef47a86d7f9265115ff07fcee4187c71a7e: Yeah... second only to your humility.
textByHashes.f8e24ad18d33492a7331eec0f754f37a7bd45da4: I'll keep that in mind. Anyway, I should get back to work.
textByHashes.51e418341adad288352886beffbbd403b362f6b4: I've found something that might be useful.
textByHashes.2c3381756bc84673d89c605f756dbd4998895df5: Looks like the Councillor might be hiding out at Mount Quidamortem.
textByHashes.cdd82626178fc878b4eabf44632237e11a7ab8a2: I could go if you like?
textByHashes.af854a0573d9e46af3ed1c6fc2918bb7220bdba8: I think I know where Councillor Hughes has gone.
textByHashes.5a85c0d24a2ef359d7d93de449099ee27f4b9083: Well we can't make any assumptions.
textByHashes.1de7e311db48a2aef241c2e9ae72f43ee4271a90: What was the date when Councillor Hughes escaped?
textByHashes.909636e35f627e02970954e8e8ea6bbd1714f217: Hang on... If she escaped two days ago, why are we only searching her house now?
textByHashes.965954c4aab286b65ddd4af4ab4eb94a95b14c88: Did you know there's a demon upstairs?
textByHashes.7f8b36b0b9d0ff45e774bbec4077c778ddff4f3e: Sounds good. I'll let you know if I find anything.
textByHashes.25a9ffcc49d7e18b275b4cc0a833a6edc8c4f120: Hello. I'm looking for Sophia Hughes.
textByHashes.6060b2e37f129c575add6be87c43aa1ed76997be: That's right. I think she might have come here at some point.
textByHashes.57cd27de6c75fe020a335761380f309c565297b0: I see. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.aa42136b029d930f47aa3662651a94aa3a32bd7b: Had any councillors shop here recently?
textByHashes.e86bc1cbe6fdc29dabd0da320b7fda13556b00b0: She's one of your lot though, right? This seems like a good place for her to hide.
textByHashes.0a40b440e0bcec7d04f80dcf7514d95a002f8d03: Had any councillors stay here recently?
textByHashes.63b9084a5774e58be215087bd7e12fed27fc74ce: I'm investigating the disappearance of Councillor Sophia Hughes. I have reason to believe she rented a bed here.
textByHashes.9ef467b3cb1524973e1662800754c1890cf6ab4b: She could have been in disguise. Do you know where this woman is now?
textByHashes.5decab308563c15fd376940fdba0778951d11dab: A ship? She's trying to escape! Do you know which ship?
textByHashes.7d7586c4df8d07d3378ed79083537964b74b6f05: I need to get there quick. Thank you for the help.
textByHashes.2049bf367e540a4e17abe230bcfa8024cab382bc: Ah yes. I need to get there quickly.
textByHashes.1895d03dfde8a2a13beb906d185cc08ffeb3c342: I believe Councillor Sophia Hughes is planning to board this ship. I need to find her.
textByHashes.7b41f9a4ea629fd4994b3d307f2a930312e95e4c: Not a bad idea. I think I'll do just that.
textByHashes.23109db9bb3d2420e888608b74ee61f7079123ec: Not spying on me are you?
textByHashes.218c95c9efbde90685a7e9d449d63911de74f717: That's one way of putting it.
textByHashes.d242db75814f2b04a517c7d062037aee8f4004aa: She booked passage on this ship, but she's not arrived yet. If she's coming, it will be soon.
textByHashes.3037df9cfeab83ef2d4d43cc81193749a6531930: Ah, looks like we might have a visitor.
textByHashes.c33efa72cfdc30f14ed6946b3256f78c600605f4: The only person to blame is yourself. When you play with fire, you get burnt.
textByHashes.976852ea26420503dbe034b8a5d4900941bb6121: What are you on about? What girl?
textByHashes.c0c40488a3503dadbb63f5dfaff97bc15d32fc16: Hey! You can't just show up and start incinerating people. That's not how justice works. How about you clear off, before I make you!
textByHashes.dee64278639b6fc1d4e27a40b45541a0f0135310: Have you managed to work out how Councillor Hughes escaped?
textByHashes.a180c13fc06022c82c4f2a6bbac38b23856d1165: I'm not sure about dealings, but we've met.
textByHashes.a03f357b5c53263cc8a1f24d776777398a353b3a: Well, I am quite impactful. So, what is this ask?
textByHashes.1a8bbbdf25038ad0fb174ce1da4ab64360394d3c: Ah, I see. You want me to convince them.
textByHashes.37b8699b390dcf3950179dd07c0fb27ee1bbf22d: You know that's not what I mean.
textByHashes.d199449763fa1202f46ce19fd3d8ad3689085504: Do you not know? Or do you just not want to admit it? The man and the girl she spoke of. What did she mean?
textByHashes.a5f0eb707da52a0e3752d966f6dee25a7a8e77b0: The man Councillor Hughes mentioned. It could have been the King she was referring to.
textByHashes.b4ddb5addd998fb8d7443f0671c8c08fa748af80: And the girl she mentioned? The King had a daughter.
textByHashes.7d685bac8d92a0f605a2a55802e42f1444388244: The Council. It never went that way though, did it? She never took the throne. Martin said they declared her mad.
textByHashes.6f8a8463f8f9d148faa233a428839cc6b7751e75: What happened to Rose in the end? Where did she go?
textByHashes.ea333458b710932bbb9ee5ef88f5575f938fa0cd: As commander of the 'Royal Guard' your duty is surely to royalty, not to some Council.
textByHashes.6d7dc1ac574094b4c7dc2713016a8ee02c3f33b2: What kind of person would you be if you followed them blindly, even when all the evidence says not to?
textByHashes.798601808961d401a761eb1dadb52d348c7c0fa3: Thank you, Lydia. I know this can't be easy for you.
textByHashes.e147363f85af978865960a844a89aa53bea31c18: Hello Martin. I see your protest is growing.
textByHashes.3e5993e1857b0b876ef7eb17190ee3646f5e4dc5: It seems the guards have also taken interest.
textByHashes.a0494e9c08413449b378a4e4dbb0ad8c85b9a45a: Maybe they think things will get violent?
textByHashes.3ebb09b29db662dc8aee3df411c8efc63e232a8e: There's something important we need to talk about.
textByHashes.3a1a98e04dce0c7c5a37d21881a3518a619bc798: This one needs to stay between you and me.
textByHashes.938acf76fa7e444cfce9b27f58dd52cb6926d71a: They do. But if what I've discovered is true, we can't let the Council realise we know until we have definitive proof.
textByHashes.ad468316888a3b30d1935640538e620206e33637: When I confronted Sophia Hughes, she spoke of things the Council did to a man and his daughter.
textByHashes.13db1a70307ad1783cb7ce311d4fa342e3077d5f: Kharedst IV. The last King of Great Kourend.
textByHashes.ab5e62a4d31875029e0a46c25d6ad4cd4bf934ec: Like I said, we have no proof. The dying words of a cultist are not going to be enough to convince many. We need real proof.
textByHashes.042fde764ddf679b6732ea2d65d2345b2b767e91: The King's daughter, Rose. If we can find her, we might be able to find out what happened.
textByHashes.9c5ea75d4097db612b672867e893a9b48cc0fec4: But you haven't! You must have some idea of where they might have taken her.
textByHashes.80afed96cf4630eefec05de60c55eb1d949e1d68: But how does that help us?
textByHashes.024c30ac03dc6f856e1d51f05b15804e94391403: Ah, I understand now. That does make sense.
textByHashes.2650ab85521019df28be9535e0f1613a11ef89f9: You know, I actually ended up acquiring her father's memoirs myself.
textByHashes.9764a75a5b79e79722224d722ac5e15b6bb965dc: You know, I actually ended up acquiring her father's memoirs myself. There was an interesting page hidden in the book. It suggested that something bad happened to whoever wrote it.
textByHashes.bd314b4d2188af472cccda87115629383a949812: Well it wasn't really proof of anything. It gave no details on what actually happened, and no leads to follow. It wasn't even clear if Rose wrote it.
textByHashes.305332df1ba39437cc7baa1afb293b23777498dc: Well, now you know. I don't see how it helps us, though.
textByHashes.1178c86b194b8f43bc9e35cdce60a3f3bf23ab81: The King's been dead for years. How come the auction only happened recently?
textByHashes.8f6fce8eb5c5b202227f9ed549a98a67bf872e77: Were there any other writings, apart from the memoirs?
textByHashes.357cfccbc982f154460ba01d1c765047976998c3: So I need to go to the Archive and get that diary.
textByHashes.038522a153c562b1ad82c9295bce6b352faceade: To be honest, I wasn't actually planning on asking.
textByHashes.e345c9c680bbb4e12932b9e4af140ae5eaf9f146: What do I need to be doing?
textByHashes.73d04fe7f05a1bfb69abfc3b506f7181f88425fc: I have a question about Rose.
textByHashes.9692df52a813043ec18aeca3c377184acf421fcb: I heard her diary was on display here. I was wondering if I could read it.
textByHashes.1fe3e1ca74c1792fa822a70d3f11619d60eef435: The hidden page from the King's memoirs was hidden inside the book cover.
textByHashes.6f3e8c1cc1a380ee41eb7d45f6d0532dde884cbf: You think this is definitely it?
textByHashes.3fbddc665e5ae5d4bd73b2f5b4867032dbc3e6e3: I don't think there is one.
textByHashes.56c9166a462d98c2eb5673bb373daf47e4225aba: You really do hate them don't you? You know, Lydia told me you worked for them once.
textByHashes.93a565070697da9a76a1fa4a7d732462c3dbea42: Just interesting. You went from working for them to being their biggest opponent. What changed?
textByHashes.140b08f5874d587b3676fdfd1dbc84063aaa9a9a: What do you know about Rose?
textByHashes.5650c11ba1ea5c07a54398c955519b29954989c7: She was 11 when the King died? How old would that make her now?
textByHashes.86f36971e75ebca6f500751a0b1d4e3f066200ea: 31? So wherever she is, she's spent most of her life there. If she's still alive of course.
textByHashes.bf89da3a6ecc753d090916f6b464dface3c31c16: What happens when we find Rose?
textByHashes.d3c17cd5303727a9ddb58cc6bdcbc465057f8641: Okay, but say the Council are guilty? What happens then?
textByHashes.2b9075d6daea448755b34c61d25a510f6ce28f11: And if she's incapable of doing that?
textByHashes.5106aaf51e0a99148f04cfcf92d66605e256b62b: Tell me about Kourend's Royal Society.
textByHashes.abde9f2b92e3bb84919396cc0321d78e315528ce: It's not just about debate though is it? You're trying to spread your views to others with your protests.
textByHashes.b921998e4f9189c0ffcb3dde35f152a325f532f8: It's interesting that you focus on power for the people but desire a monarchy. Surely a democracy would be more fitting?
textByHashes.3fc32e1ba9335e177a0f28d600162783405aef20: Maybe, but I don't see how you fix that with a king or queen.
textByHashes.a444b8a17ff69f4b4aa80a900f7c48ac79292504: King Lathas of Kandarin was raised from birth to rule. I'm not sure he did a great job.
textByHashes.6b6a4bdb0b482c0293760b03ef5159cf8b62fccc: You've been looking there for a while now.
textByHashes.9aced1a84b13bfbd9beaa24f171bd9ab41d4765f: 'Out in a land that's frozen to the bone. A village of statues, not made of stone.'
textByHashes.aac5a96d44f4a9e0946905ca8bb47d1cc15d7416: You can say that again. I'm guessing this panel is what we're after.
textByHashes.0b1dc3190ab6691f4cbc538e0b0973d5f9a397df: We don't know it was the Council.
textByHashes.25d5d695620a916b98b78731f047840b33052b0d: The assassin only named you. Surely the Council would want me gone as well if they knew what we were doing.
textByHashes.13ddfa4ccb8cd62ab36ac786752e752be6886280: Well, Council or otherwise, the assassin is dealt with. Now we need to get this panel open and get out of here.
textByHashes.8cdf02ca0474ae87e73bb9cf564add9fbf97b814: The panel had another note behind it.
textByHashes.0802e0f7e8774a803bdd826415f009893fb7d5c6: 'Hearty drinks are a sailor's friend. Where one long journey comes to an end.'
textByHashes.b11900b1b4aa8df32177b5e87bd5c76172df8de0: Only one way to find out, I suppose.
textByHashes.3cef3250b82602532d256f3d540fc2a6abfb83f9: Rose certainly went all out. I wonder how she managed it?
textByHashes.c6f2dad18fa0a239622efb2e15392c997704b738: Even so, I wonder how she set it all up?
textByHashes.ed9c3d4357ad3f5e6ec9b1fc8b4d78d88181b586: So were you, once. You said that yourself.
textByHashes.ff4c60bd3e9c582796640a109998aff975b75ac1: You know, it was Lydia who sent me to talk to you about all of this in the first place.
textByHashes.233b7ba6057c467a39c91cc1f27f7a852bb85a5b: So maybe she's not as bad as you say.
textByHashes.58e39a694aecfff75edff672c45040c76f75205e: Looks like I'm on my own now.
textByHashes.cae850983b6c39d2b7cd0fad4a9e5c13a28b6443: I could ask you the same question.
textByHashes.2a1724b026f61086412e4c6513219a15a688840f: Well here's the thing: I don't actually care.
textByHashes.16d2fffb82fa0fb3d6d3d0adc7a07d80a4ffa8fe: I came here looking for someone, and I think this woman here might be that someone. If she is, you're in a whole different world of trouble.
textByHashes.e973c4bfdce28c869a7ffa3b8163b9d8ebf57f09: So tell me, who are you?
textByHashes.a0b0222da24bbdcf0e18c5bb46fc6b33722fb727: Yes, I'd very much like to understand. Why are you here with Kourend's missing princess? And why is she just lying there like that?
textByHashes.7879885c8d091f84de75e62722aaddb83c25f41b: I suggest you explain everything. You should probably do it fast, as well.
textByHashes.38cbcba60a72ad3d4c85774e85693f205cd0233f: How about with her father. How did he die?
textByHashes.5975d8290fbb446210d984fb1c6753db1aca92f2: You expect me to believe that?
textByHashes.04760a53804b4240ab1a55e0e031b1794bf4ef26: You killed him. You killed him and took his throne for yourselves.
textByHashes.95a032e1544b53a0ef3ce28d2ce672058a73884d: So you did this to her?
textByHashes.006c4521c0ba6a9395817998aa0b119bef85f8f8: Well, you failed. She got the word out. It took 20 years, but thanks to her, your rule is at an end.
textByHashes.dee3e9f6918c52d27082c6283040f1eca3ab9da9: That's not for me to decide. There's someone who needs to see this.
textByHashes.cf897113cf9d174c55575674455fac1ef43fc661: I locked him in the other room. Didn't want him running off. I'll get him.
textByHashes.7486ae02e76fa71f9b65226c74a0e2aa4ccc67c7: What did you do to her? Why is she like this?
textByHashes.5be590d03d4b52f8ebd6337dff601091525fdf20: Would have been nice for you to mention this earlier! Who was this mage?
textByHashes.a2f1281d810a6a533f519989b758533da6fd5d70: This mage. Have you met him since?
textByHashes.047dcaa80518970bd930b546db7d8f884c542163: I'll go to Molch. If he's there, I'll find him.
textByHashes.56af153a1c69930642a9cb98121500ce854d772c: How are things back at the castle?
textByHashes.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHashes.6ff5b97146d594a314f2f020a1062096ebf3d022: What do you know of this mage?
textByHashes.f4ce56bc9eea192cca877aa82df4401c8c9eff07: I don't know if that's true.
textByHashes.076b944acca7a905060c3857ef2ab0938280f7ad: If you say so. You said he lives in Molch?
textByHashes.83aecd67c172340ca6a21976f7c9aff253144440: A mysterious mage with no name who lives with some lizardmen. He sure sounds like an upstanding citizen with nothing suspicious about him at all.
textByHashes.06a68e480ce3e393181e8ba2c9c9bb6ecd403ef7: I'm suprised you'd even care about lizardman. They're pretty tame compared to demon summoning.
textByHashes.18349ea0e36a242819d20a2fd3e6e73a6128f3b9: Zamorakian beliefs aren't particularly welcome in most places.
textByHashes.b3e2bdfc474af3a2ed169d3a663f0bb664843564: Sure, but I suspect being entitled to summon demons is more up for debate.
textByHashes.0c060d7759e2b7d04006b3bfaed4861a1dbb655f: I guess I'd probably have an easier time believing that if she wasn't lying right here instead.
textByHashes.2c8f8853546d481511de1c3eb1388c5d194aa44c: But why? If it was really all about her, why would it matter what happened to you?
textByHashes.07026767bfcf87a483153db70d8d2cfbb335561e: Did you? Or have you lied to yourself so much that you now actually believe it?
textByHashes.1c75c49c42ee1d72926eed61bd38d53f96ed1cd2: Is what she has now really much of a life at all?
textByHashes.41040119ad4b1b4be4a419fadaa6ce4df97cc85c: To be honest, I don't know if I want to.
textByHashes.ddddf8d9bbe4d58574c0166d9a2459d5a1cd1371: Don't worry. I'll work it out.
textByHashes.43a54f03a6dd9eed90fd9688b2224dca8b555341: I have a question about that door over there.
textByHashes.8078b2e92d35d1e9392dcd9dbbef08e11fc33743: Not got any mages hiding behind it have you?
textByHashes.3d9bc74f86daf767478099950d6007e010493a16: This mage. Where did he come from?
textByHashes.73bbc81b8dba463ef3d4c9d5cf49f181c638e7e8: I need to see this mage. How do I get through the door?
textByHashes.50bf27376ebdd28f05b0f6787046196d7b0e2bc2: Well can I have your key?
textByHashes.b9014908ea0914f39bdd6e1463ad539d35498d59: I could just kill you instead?
textByHashes.18bd5ddeeebc7dc2b871117b78f9026343289ab7: Alright. What do you want in return?
textByHashes.bc20c715bbd9829b71b09f9b6b05db350dd62908: So if I bring you this egg, you'll give me the key?
textByHashes.c92465936d3ded98df35bd190f536d9e094363e6: So, about the key to that door...
textByHashes.4fdfa136bfa152522de71f5fbb02bc947522b607: Alright. I'll bring you the egg.
textByHashes.99c82aed8a048723b5fc02cc1a05a993b320d87f: So, about that door over there...
textByHashes.3549a008d8608294981ea682307218d7c8e746b1: So I think I took a wrong turn somewhere. I'll just go now...
textByHashes.aec941c60bb5c79c5351cf63567ff5d5639ba5e3: Ah. Well in that case... Xamphur, was it? How about you tell me what on Gielinor is going on here?
textByHashes.778e77d2559cd2ae0d049777f6df9dc962ecdbc7: I guess I should have a look around.
textByHashes.a19d4b158de5eca31948f923c3bac683e727823b: Hmm. I should tell Lydia about this.
textByHashes.5ef601b9993b07e31592e9ffa452dc4375daf66a: I did, but he got away. To be honest, he also left me with more questions than answers.
textByHashes.269bf0460867a41fa6147560dbc22e440985f784: His name is Xamphur. I overheard a conversation between him and someone else. They talked about the Council, among other things.
textByHashes.3f9a44acf41ee9354c4be590a2213ed7e42bfbcc: The weird thing is, the person he was talking to... I think it was Veos.
textByHashes.6f8e001111dcdec4d5028dff34db12b2627b2a31: Yes. He disappeared after that earthquake, but I saw him with this mage.
textByHashes.1d3beb8428c81fac44f8828f3a3df8914facd389: Xamphur called Veos, or whoever it was, his master. It sounded like he had been seeking him out for a long time.
textByHashes.8cf9d548babd47687f00ac1584ad8ef076cfaf8d: They talked about the Council and the Dark Altar. I couldn't make much sense of it, but I managed to look around after they left.
textByHashes.3b72ab397a3279b13e9d4f0866682f1650176fc7: From what I found, it seems that Xamphur worked with Councillor Andrews to manipulate the other councillors into killing the King.
textByHashes.a209d8e1c4a0d9dcfdcf3ea01edc3d73377a4698: It seems he always wanted the throne. Xamphur offered it to him in return for access to the Dark Altar.
textByHashes.9f2cf41cc90b94de8b746996c7a1ee08947a0ea0: Xamphur has been redirecting power from the Altar, but I don't know why. It seems his work is what caused the recent issues in Arceuus.
textByHashes.6547fc5aefd61c458a5baad61487de51602df573: Makes you wonder what else he's been responsible for.
textByHashes.6608831ccc725e6d18307aee5dee5238398bf5f7: I suspect Xamphur won't be making her any more potions any time soon. Maybe someone in Arceuus could help?
textByHashes.d0d08cce514c30ddfa954362254920090d06810a: We can still make this right. We can still stop the Council.
textByHashes.765b24e95dc7750ea6b421a94a50f28c931c7fd3: I'm not sure if that's true. The real power is held by the five houses of Kourend. Together, they could replace the Council and take over the kingdom.
textByHashes.e3133ee30bbead72db8c6728e62bd574093d41d7: It's not so bad. It's nice and peaceful. She's finally free from the drama of Kourend.
textByHashes.6a233b9d405a9a6bbb5b57107c06e854d5e410f5: Hello Lord Arceuus. There's something I need your help with.
textByHashes.2e469f46a7aa2a034629eb4e1d2dca85f18f5c23: We should discuss it in private. It involves the Kourend Council. It's also connected to the recent death here.
textByHashes.a1ac8f66eb8a49a5bf3a848e51643c41ac3ef19d: Lord Hosidius. I need to discuss something with you.
textByHashes.b2e1949f6df57ac922f099258ab03ff348791e9e: We can't talk about it here. I need you to meet me at Xeric's Lookout.
textByHashes.df95caf5d7a2c19a4593650a414cadc92afdcdc9: Will you be departing for Xeric's Lookout soon?
textByHashes.dc0f0336164dd78e52b537b4cba4c44d9072514e: Lady Lovakengj. I need you to join me at Xeric's Lookout. There's something urgent we need to discuss.
textByHashes.3a26b823fd3599c5a726cbaf0f71b8675edd4714: That's right. We can't discuss it here, but it involves the Kourend Council.
textByHashes.b7c3b7c81b81893ba4db4e202305aae771fbeb9a: That's not quite what I meant. It's not something to discuss with the Council themselves. It's something I need the house leaders for.
textByHashes.45c07003d49fdde8870fc84913f19788b193d3e0: To Xeric's Lookout. To discuss this Council business.
textByHashes.a428cd1019ed5ad8e576568af42de2db40574c1a: I need your help. It's about the Council.
textByHashes.d4efdfff0c8ad721627f5d996e53e7dc9e63b2bf: That wasn't me! Besides, I'd have thought you'd be happy to see Sophia Hughes dealt with.
textByHashes.abf53d0108cd8c3b74e6ea880234e23b66d08789: We can't discuss it here. We need to be somewhere more private.
textByHashes.a1e5708ff13e80b07989f98db7df8169aa43923c: Well... not really. Meet me at Xeric's Lookout. We can talk more there.
textByHashes.34c7ae3f61179489387d98e583e5eb978cf6ab10: There's something urgent I need your help with.
textByHashes.a2e2e47b23e22c97b6892db375678a7337278939: It involves the Kourend Council, but we can't really discuss it here. Come alone to Xeric's Lookout.
textByHashes.383904739178abc102639a7e2df689881c15887d: I appreciate it's an unusual request, but yes please. All of Kourend could be at stake here.
textByHashes.a21c2e9f9cfb6465690b4f3b32a46b001fb7fc55: Is the Councillor there as well?
textByHashes.e2dac61f0ec6fdcde0a150943f853414d596174d: We'd better keep a close eye on him.
textByHashes.794cee6e6c19f07927240d4443a23a3de82763b4: No. You killed Rose. You killed her 20 years ago. It's time to stop hiding and accept the truth.
textByHashes.fbf69143baed4d5a8515132f20fc440928b5c1ac: The King was cursed so that you had an excuse to kill him. It was never about the people, it was only about the throne.
textByHashes.e77aebde61e3b8419522abf160c4fefeb3ae53bf: I have seen proof with my own eyes. If you think overwise, then you have been fooled as well.
textByHashes.412aed3075c8c2a2d029a03147b9976d05cbd70c: Councillor Andrews plotted to kill the King with a mage called Xamphur. Xamphur cursed the King so that Councillor Andrews had an argument to get the others on board.
textByHashes.a9c3ad192d29504e37c0b37463614bfd4ce4152a: Rose was smart, but do you really think she just happened to overhear you? I've no doubt Councillor Andrews arranged for that to happen as well.
textByHashes.da2ad86f28fa838db37a5184cd1c748ecbe62f71: That's why we gathered you all here. The Council needs to be removed from power. You five can make that happen.
textByHashes.bfe960694e306667b81ed1c5720dea7fd6bc6067: Could there be another member of the royal family still out there?
textByHashes.ff7c2b2e7de9edea176c70499c2f9aec3b97e711: Well that was fun. What do we do now?
textByHashes.13d2482a503eda5d6d9019b8feb280f84d552d6b: For them to all sign it, they all need to agree on the contents. That's not going to be easy.
textByHashes.6886b65c20f17ecf29bd876ff6d506ccae90cbb5: I can give it a go.
textByHashes.c427c7828a29460981d2cf223e0bbc2f24ae2e3f: Alright. I'll go and talk to them all.
textByHashes.1cf29cf73bef8d9ab98803fa13f319a4249f9581: What do you think of Lord Arceuus?
textByHashes.16f402b2893aaffe32c0392abbdd50c9b66ff8a2: What do you think of Lady Piscarilius?
textByHashes.a81e73910b9055ecbb718ecc2638bd5423d9ef82: Maybe there's more to her than meets the eye.
textByHashes.ddc1b83f254e12dc73d5af3dabcea02758726597: What do you think of Lord Hosidius?
textByHashes.955b3bd8a952f1285f437fb02e159503f3dcda34: What do you think of Lord Shayzien?
textByHashes.88702a31d09a27dcc15e952ec479dd246538ae4d: No, but there generally is one.
textByHashes.a9c2e369c76716346789811a8beddaf3daa660ab: What do you think of Lady Lovakengj?
textByHashes.46e27d87c93ad927fb165eafb32427c4f884f4d2: The biggest threat is the one you never see coming.
textByHashes.b75cf0dc3bc972c173195cb433e105a088a13407: That's right. Xamphur was his name. I discovered his hideout in the Lizardman Temple below Molch.
textByHashes.cef8f18f9c4e6f0467e0be680b03a7819ec2b3b1: He was the one responsible for the device that was redirecting power from the Dark Altar, but I'm not totally sure what he was using the power for. That recent earthquake was also involved somehow.
textByHashes.348ac24ec9d2d17b71ae9087ff49cc4b5bee7fbc: He did. How did you know that?
textByHashes.b28208e4fd84ef4b0afa4be59dc959e7e2e49d55: You don't think it's the same person do you?
textByHashes.b292bcd7f584b24dca5d4334000a834d4a264364: There's something else as well. When I found Xamphur, he wasn't alone. I think the other person was Veos. The weird thing is, Xamphur spoke as if Veos was his master.
textByHashes.3f1d1db410b757b35f2f43e86bb27bbda7709a32: This isn't exactly the first odd occurrence when it comes to Veos either. A while back I helped him with some strange client of his.
textByHashes.53ba35247937a2245b34335a048b1455984e77bf: When we were done, this client spoke through Veos himself. The things he said were... strange.
textByHashes.3ab8ae36405e5087f3947eb0043b93bc2dbadefd: But if Veos' client is Xamphur's master, and if Xamphur once served Xeric, could that mean...
textByHashes.706e38f4f053cfd1b7a663080a55254af4cce055: But surely it's an option we should consider?
textByHashes.eabfe5835c0abb7d99185aeec3b93e84bd56795a: And how do we get that?
textByHashes.c6f5300d408830fa3d43e6011527bf55ae53836c: Would they not need his body for that?
textByHashes.294fa91b2cc2228a5e0d564a93a93dcdc06357ef: Alright, I'll take the device to the Tasakaal and see what they can do with it. However, I also need to ask for your support with this new Royal Accord.
textByHashes.3fcda666efa831b8d46322930f0de10c79e1230a: Okay. I'll be back once I've discovered something from the Tasakaal.
textByHashes.ccda7bd1bb42cdec422404fd84a65272e999d0c6: That's right. I assume you won't have any issues supporting it, considering it was your idea?
textByHashes.ba6d8c055384015311472e4cd331fd21513e37ab: Well if it gets things done faster, then I guess so.
textByHashes.3977a220450df578dd9785c21027f66e86568d46: And would you be willing to take on that role?
textByHashes.242b800f6b43559708a08140139e02e88a060a79: That's an interesting place for him to visit.
textByHashes.aae8c27fe37aa031696b75aa1d8de6e0b2dbb61c: Okay. I can go and take a look around this camp.
textByHashes.406a4ab8891f2f131a68a74b954f2e95f05539b7: Alright. I'll let you know if I find anything.
textByHashes.1e4fdbdd05f1fd345aba41a8e256eecc5d156e34: I wanted to talk to you about this Royal Accord. Would you be willing to support it?
textByHashes.18401f5420d11ffcf2e07e3db454ce26ad0d4477: Why can't you support the new Royal Accord?
textByHashes.6427ecce2c5647715e7b34616c76371178450d7e: I know it's hard to hear, but I think he is.
textByHashes.25c76fd11f62f6c4915fba8d2005879ea5efb068: Lady Lovakengj please, you have to believe me! Councillor Unkar isn't innocent in this.
textByHashes.794ccc078d5ca5a673c3661822387060193fa99b: Okay, well how about I find some proof that Councillor Unkar is involved? Then will you support the Royal Accord?
textByHashes.df60ad81cbd0666754cbff816024da7da34cec28: Right. Let me chat to Commander Fullore about this.
textByHashes.017058c6837df3c7f6e50f11805c864b4bca3699: I'm still looking into things with Councillor Unkar. I'll let you know once I find something.
textByHashes.8a5fd647652032af2ad6a58fb95b6a233f993009: We need to talk about this Royal Accord.
textByHashes.451eb8625999d2c53579e7f986963e2f3715f45c: So you'd see the corrupt Council stay in charge?
textByHashes.bdc6e4467053edee279430c6b9c2fb64c3a7faec: Well it seems like there's a clear solution to this then.
textByHashes.0e18c55f987fbf5dafd53fc0dcc27b974e942e3c: For the Royal Accord to be finalised, we can have the people vote on it. That way, they get the final say.
textByHashes.fbb7b8b0d9aeeacc42c88427ae52e28360ed8e18: Only if that's what people want. If they vote no, we come up with an alternative arrangement and let them vote on that instead.
textByHashes.7cca3fc3aa57dfb4b69e2c6d34e453c57b563ee6: Come on now. If you do care for the people, this is the best option.
textByHashes.32d637ec6fd2fd874311306fa5fcf7dd1f78c66a: No... I killed a demon that someone else summoned in your home. You should thank me.
textByHashes.f6b0d7d128a1a4d3f542f470b10bb11f82b7c54b: How about we skip over the insults this time and you just tell me what you want.
textByHashes.68855ba1caf67aaa822838ded5e75575be900147: Tell Lord Shayzien to send the army in, then. They literally live right on his doorstep.
textByHashes.10d9eb6aac2a3282810ec736040222bf4b3b66f3: Thanks. So it sounds like you want me to take on this cult singlehandedly? I feel like that won't go well.
textByHashes.31ce538e110363143a5013b68d9294d9add4ad13: Woah! Slow down there. How do you know all of this?
textByHashes.1c41a7d529693d8b0ef2cd7aa65d5aa66a57456c: You learnt all of this just with a bit of digging? There's something you're not telling me here. Besides, why would you care so much about this compared to everything else going on?
textByHashes.6f0c69f755dc5ff2d2325d89369d428944d6c97a: Do you think the other leaders will support that?
textByHashes.4b11a43c750be72ab917f95816705ac0a56c0f56: Lord Hosidius? Interesting... What is this intelligence?
textByHashes.4af7dea2331a715ea62ab0a66445ff4e79afb398: Hang on... I thought this was about Lord Hosidius?
textByHashes.bde4df42c6bdabd04406502c4f2836c40b08a9d3: That doesn't make sense! Why would Lord Hosidius want that journal?
textByHashes.a94d5d179cd167feb53e99a67cebf5ebfadb10a2: This is all very odd. Do you know where he keeps the journal?
textByHashes.9b4601b251ea67a4f2059cf28ce74891d0074c0f: Okay. I'll let you know what I find.
textByHashes.29ea190b51db35b0052f3cb25c09c8d054a80399: I was hoping you could take a look at this device and tell me more about the person that made it.
textByHashes.788b5ca004934ff62b07680385f69bff5344d21e: Because this device is the thing that was redirecting power from the Dark Altar. The person who made it was also responsible for the trapped soul that needed freeing.
textByHashes.a62bfcc236bd45fddf5bf7278aafb9affa0e7156: Darkness? That sounds like Xamphur. Can you tell how old he is?
textByHashes.bace4fa06337b660d61d4ab4a3efd7199edf2b91: Great betrayer? Do you mean Xeric?
textByHashes.17d209c5871e4a07db30609a472e6a0ae14d6cb6: But is that who you speak of?
textByHashes.8931c263ff03a20bbf3f2989f320cbd6ec49d25c: So Lord Arceuus was right. What of this other person, the one touched by fire?
textByHashes.3cfa659a29d7144b3a86de403bf665d5899c33ff: A Pyromancer? Xamphur is working with a Pyromancer?
textByHashes.628dd2944721465e0d2f300ab1f1fb1e1544de25: Hang on... I recently helped to repair some damage to the Doors of Dinh. What if this Pyromancer was the one responsible?
textByHashes.5e20b3c2cab63198a38b274c4587f82d9a091a02: Well then what's to stop them doing it again? We have to do something!
textByHashes.9cd43bf178854f98b69cbfc0db52f95837b29604: Keeping the balance between life and death. That's your thing isn't it? If the Wintertodt escapes, it will destroy all life in Kourend. That doesn't seem very balanced!
textByHashes.ea05322eb061b51c499225415483109708404209: Well it's been known to happen.
textByHashes.5c84808b1459f5cdbf9521abfac224e735d9c99c: Where can I get volcanic sulphur?
textByHashes.2fcf7f3ef2f99f6e41ac73fa5646e85ebdc48d40: Got it. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.0922d7e94b4fda8cd84fd28f405636cd45a8cf17: Sulphur in a defence potion. Got it. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.5bc7f2735787c952158174a73848403c72b07d9a: What am I meant to be doing again?
textByHashes.07e09f14da810478ec60ca4046a99f4cd948b786: Well that's that done. I'd better get back to Lord Arceuus.
textByHashes.67c51dfa13a169b6fe77f3d1e9c87208bc0de834: I have. They confirmed that this Xamphur is the same one that served Xeric.
textByHashes.112c9c4072f058b83d8cfcf8bc4e3fa071a97b07: There's more. We discovered that Xamphur has been working with a Pyromancer. That means he may have been involved in the sabotage of the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.e344a0feecef11f43427d1a2d29e0a692e6d234a: I don't know, but the Tasakaal themselves confirmed it.
textByHashes.0709aaec1fea955839f9aac53766cbb970f0031a: His master said they'd meet again in the south.
textByHashes.c5b6d108e02585314561c2aa3b471f0e0222ac38: So you'll support the new Royal Accord?
textByHashes.317ebe36f52800ba350815ce74c912cfaebe3e9b: Thank you. I'd better go and speak with the others.
textByHashes.9e5b9d441a4579b8096560177a73888177ea3138: I don't understand Phileas. Why are you here?
textByHashes.10ff90083502d2d7da422379a9846af7e10823d1: Wait! What about that parcel? The one with King Shayzien VII's journal. Do you have it?
textByHashes.68dd3e4b836f7760ea64498df1672e35873e1e60: I'm not sure, but I don't like this at all. I need to speak with Lord Hosidius.
textByHashes.2ca1080419db4fce569b0ddbf7af4091721b3a93: There's too much to explain right now. Now, there are a lot of barbarians outside, so I can't free you at the moment. I'll go get help. Don't worry, you'll be safe soon.
textByHashes.6c358bd2cfbf79e8608f944d90b7d01fe8002293: Not yet. I need to go and speak to Lord Hosidius. Don't worry, you'll be safe soon.
textByHashes.663732b15f0b85141fb2d333274a20593fa9173e: We need to get some people down there urgently! The barbarians have Phileas Rimor prisoner.
textByHashes.bc5898a1096c75566e67fcb5f9413b0017e90a5b: He's a retired soldier from Shayzien. I helped him out with something a while ago, but he went missing. Turns out these barbarians were paid to take him.
textByHashes.d424a4b2557eb600bf6a93fef22b842aa4142bff: I don't know for sure, but I doubt Lord Shayzien's visit was a coincidence.
textByHashes.b8730ed5a724141f7633cff0436624c8f5e64fd3: The thing I was helping Phileas with involved a mysterious parcel he'd received. The parcel contained King Shayzien VII's journal. When Phileas was captured, it was taken by the barbarians.
textByHashes.bfa3ab434fd27086abb5d540f9a2de814ab9cd80: Before that happened, I followed some clues in the journal. They eventually led me to the discovery that King Shayzien VII may have been responsible for the creation of the lizardmen.
textByHashes.e43b8930dec13187ca1480b56debf5b22e9a2428: Okay. I guess I'd better go and speak with the others.
textByHashes.4c276c34ec9e18acc76328fcc91a01ba321e67a0: That's good to hear. Thank you for taking care of him. I'd better go and speak with the others.
textByHashes.917814076f7483f30806659e7406276b25aa3a15: I need some help with Lady Lovakengj.
textByHashes.46f3270472087416c80e4a9302f527a3b4de969d: She doesn't believe that Councillor Unkar has anything to do with this. She wants proof he's involved before she signs the new Royal Accord.
textByHashes.1326410245d135fcded1b7cfd83f0dbac3272782: But he's been arrested. I can't just go and break him out.
textByHashes.8cba8b229db63b8a5951e632a264769d97a06fe0: Fair point, I suppose. If anyone asks, I can claim I'm trying to round up more of his group.
textByHashes.afadb2fe6c1c72679166d445267ad8cf5d6e406f: Alright. I'll go and see what he knows.
textByHashes.66cbeb596e6d9b8609639418b471cbe5a3e561e2: I wanted to ask you something about the leaders.
textByHashes.56a73bf59024eb964675bf6d649362eb57c75ed0: I'll go and see what he knows.
textByHashes.abe7dbac1d449af74b56cc99cfef3d2ab3d6dd04: But I'm here on Council business. I need to learn more about his group.
textByHashes.5c4d1bec2210fd127790622af3ae2815fe72411f: Well I'm glad you're keeping your spirits up. Now, I need your help with something.
textByHashes.51b2e527c4a59585d472aa0f2021a9b1b3a8a019: Don't worry, it's just information I need. Things have progressed with the Council. I can't say any more here, but we're close. However, I need information on Councillor Unkar.
textByHashes.af906f110e94771d1b10a75c5e3ef1e08149109e: Anything that could prove his corruption.
textByHashes.73c7570a3d4c8bd728719afc80985c7f4d9a4769: Of course, but you must have something on him. Anything could be helpful at this point.
textByHashes.0e68c53999becc2c7185949505b93d3a959e93a8: Sounds like a plan. Where does this meeting take place?
textByHashes.515174fdc30e788d43431f0d9566ed3853a84037: Thanks for the help, Martin. We'll have you out of there soon.
textByHashes.a0bc1dc56b2e66f8876a982dee757ed64da65c6f: Hello again, Martin. Remind me, where is this meeting?
textByHashes.16a8caf6f6821ca111ebdbae1df71394b5487e80: That was it. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.193d9663cd8df05d871abc048cd19f2e820e622c: I know you! You're Jorra, Lady Lovakengj's assistant.
textByHashes.3544dfaf28db523124b1315a78e00a4e9203b517: The evening owl doesn't eat much pudding.
textByHashes.ffe88a32b3334f4d3beab71a9d4dde58654dc903: Evil only triumphs when the good do nothing.
textByHashes.2b9a94dc6cbc02054b3822faf6c9b06ed3f74f76: That's right. So you're with the Royal Society? How come?
textByHashes.76ccf142300f5903aefeb31c6725b238eddc0388: But things don't seem too bad in Lovakengj with them in charge.
textByHashes.cc2b6fb5cdd2c02f6bae0220d603a87e50f32029: Do you not get sick of her asking for sherry?
textByHashes.43d3f7beaba706c02c71e5a6339095a3644b84c7: I see. Well Councillor Unkar is why I'm here. I'm hoping you can give me something of note on him.
textByHashes.9d3d86bcb1e3c71ab3d7e8b4ddc8326e7d88ec3b: If tomorrow never comes, what is today?
textByHashes.a6e6d53614447d8ac000b98052aaf3379f2b5055: I have a declaration from the Council that I think you should see.
textByHashes.0d20483cbe904be17553cb734d13f7311dc9f61d: I'm sorry. Do you now see why we need to stop them?
textByHashes.9152856ab4675a1cf3416819e7a7fda339de935d: And do you wish to be considered for the throne?
textByHashes.adfb0249064f5d8873b9928329dba3db2231e5f0: Very well. Thank you Lady Lovakengj. I'd better go and speak with the others.
textByHashes.95a446e9e46949e3e3643bcf83638312633b7ad5: Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHashes.7d8233d5084a3b6efb9bf24c90ff4753327bcdfc: Fair enough. I'll go speak with the others.
textByHashes.55c7a67e62d95fa94b1d9c06775560a02d5ebaab: It's not a problem. Anyway, there was something I was hoping you could help me with.
textByHashes.1429d89efa3ba7c8a2794e526b4af0889a0ab9b7: I have a situation with the Disciples of Yama. I hear you've been looking into them.
textByHashes.75fb87972f62b26f3f77547e7cf28c688654cbd0: What do you know of their leader, Yama?
textByHashes.a01b68e256f73d4cef9e67dec6ac64fe5f9a9f83: The Disciples of Yama once had no connection to Yama?
textByHashes.d7558ba288c048bfe37ad9fb837a085377d7a902: Interesting. So if Yama has no presence among his followers, how does he communicate with them?
textByHashes.c8836e2f59ba9a824de86208a4e49a24f7866175: So if I killed this Voice of Yama, the cultists would lose their connection to Yama?
textByHashes.e6c2806c5c5dbc6e92162b845fff7947cda07621: Ah, I see. So we could use a device like that to block the connection between the Voice of Yama and Yama himself?
textByHashes.cfbcee736a8b3e45177935c0789157421862bd07: Alright. So where can I get one of these devices?
textByHashes.49f1a760558b8caeb1e4a4f4f63a8db27ff7e2ba: Where can I get a dark essence block?
textByHashes.956c40af6e566886a786bf29135b1e3221554b34: Okay, I'll come back once I have what you need.
textByHashes.69f12197c8ae6cb1538a03e4338e956f1cb5e406: I can get those for you. I'll come back once I have them.
textByHashes.fbedff324fe36d6ba76fa5a6e4e2cc399048e343: Not yet. I'll come back once I have them.
textByHashes.2144dd1731a9548c8d324c77b23a6dca37039ffb: Hello Mori. What should I be doing with this device?
textByHashes.b1f92fd912fce7b414a2fc8cd4b4faa25161abc1: Hello Mori. Do you think you could make me another one of those devices?
textByHashes.a3536f12e70c3454a9e6481a892b399018990aa0: Well that's the device hidden. Those Disciples of Yama won't be a problem anymore. I'd better tell Lady Piscarilius.
textByHashes.986521ca5e8cfe7022752cd4398845b7eff4c47c: Absolutely. They won't be a problem anymore.
textByHashes.10e4c6b83580d4a4e0f9c759fe482e84ff6d32e2: So will you now support this Royal Accord?
textByHashes.da18c698d05bac2ffbcd208a997aab714164347c: I don't think you need to worry about that. Now, I'd better go and speak with the others.
textByHashes.790b03467d76e6258ab2fb66b6fbbb11d7c21b1d: Fine. I need to speak with the others anyway.
textByHashes.430594c370092b060cc0f8e85929a10bdc3923a1: I hear your father has an office here.
textByHashes.ff00ef5e4c6f89238e0f344433d3ef25a91ca1ea: Well in that case, have you noticed your father doing anything interesting here in the past?
textByHashes.c17d6f26cccc985141125dde9a6a0729989662f3: More than inspect, by the looks of things. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.3f822fd65cb730ee96e676d85c129cc8860ff78b: Alright. Thank you, Lord Shayzien. I should speak to Commander Fullore.
textByHashes.4e76daf6e98998153c4589b7a3c3aaf4632e4278: Alright. I'll go and talk with Commander Fullore.
textByHashes.85921b3d3eabc0fdcdc09d0bbf1a761a71027b9b: You don't think he was pushed, do you?
textByHashes.ff620359f2cba1845e765d537834996c61d19806: We can't undo what's been done, but we can still put an end to all this.
textByHashes.0d4a7a8295921b3907cef421575d9561c25bc160: Kind of. I think I've managed to convince all the leaders to sign the Accord. That said, I have no idea who they'll pick to rule.
textByHashes.1da79bdb2617852508143281391e8570cc1d5d39: Not yet. Where's Lord Hosidius and Lord Shayzien?
textByHashes.c6c313d27105e4bf39b7f4ef8f378b325d61fe3e: Assuming the people agree to the new Accord, who do you think should rule the kingdom?
textByHashes.6a5163aff2f8581dc069cb8fd2fc741e7718febf: Would you be willing to take over?
textByHashes.5d51cade71b69e218144ee9d7ffd5286613adff5: Are you sure about this Lord Shayzien?
textByHashes.b9d2c785328dd4ad96a2f785d9f53e070f7410c5: Then it sounds like we have an agreement.
textByHashes.1c1b46774db589ebfc1aadd6902bfc72f300b689: It seems we might have a new king.
textByHashes.92af89c4320e42bed76796e19f06c4ec3fd13e89: I think I might have some idea, but I'm still a bit confused to be honest.
textByHashes.22cbaee424601ed0d6ed1521c7721c714b506959: I'll go and speak to him.
textByHashes.917f3a71a6e2ede12757e8fbf84c511e709d7174: You planned this all along, didn't you? That's why you kept the Royal Accord of Twill.
textByHashes.4a76f14d0def3801068dd482db0a78b238351663: So you made sure that you'd be the one to replace them.
textByHashes.89bd54b6efb87ce1058b8500a4e4f854eb840f45: And you didn't want it to be him?
textByHashes.bf97bff695c73c2804c4f0d299baef4a48ad98b7: You really think Lord Shayzien would have declared war?
textByHashes.7ff392d532ac75d48f417fa19b3170c16b693930: I see. So how did you do it?
textByHashes.1e6a6967c81d7b7a6a56ce678199aa4ce250fa57: Phileas' mystery parcel! That was you? You acted like you didn't even know him earlier!
textByHashes.5f2619f306a52063a7f65e01acac9d0e600c2377: But then Lord Shayzien had Phileas captured before he could reveal too much. This is all starting to make sense. You know, he actually blamed you for that!
textByHashes.287568c16f074678f399dba8ca40c2d7a29d2895: Oh I see. You let him pick between supporting you or being exposed.
textByHashes.8951ae4c7edf2e6ea101dc5f345acc35ce597111: So in the end, you never actually needed to discredit him at all. What about the journal? Lord Shayzien sent me to steal it from you, but surely he already had it.
textByHashes.8fa2a7c7da8b88fea290354223d5420ac38fa7fd: And he sent me to recover the real journal.
textByHashes.eefe8036c3ce16cfd956045b93b6711e156d21ba: You really thought of everything didn't you? How about the Accord? That was essential to your plans. I'm guessing it was no accident that Artur found it.
textByHashes.d0ba2e8b77a27a12eef45b9365f8e0b004ca17cb: This is a lot to take in. I don't know if I like any of it.
textByHashes.f7bd4c55f6a5029fbe3f68d2d344eef609947879: Will do. I just need to talk to Lord Hosidius first.
textByHashes.0ddd816d19ac64368eaa6b69f0059fe57dbfffe0: What happened there? Why didn't you put yourself forward to become king?
textByHashes.3cd115e5ed614a6a509e2c9c61ac99169ae5ba58: Actually I need to go talk to Lord Hosidius.
textByHashes.8d3dd906ec474f84c0f9cb5c04a5050263c1f733: Fine. I need to speak with Lord Hosidius anyway.
textByHashes.b1fc2d8b2dc762b437ed4dddbe5b0898648e57da: Fine. I need to speak with Commander Fullore anyway.
textByHashes.8a5523bbcb5b43941dbfde633c6387e655b4a056: It was definitely illuminating. It seems there was only ever really one option for Kourend's new ruler.
textByHashes.d2c51a5f6c9e85c57a61cf0e9510c3829752ae51: Do you think they'll come quietly?
textByHashes.e4226801dae12114785b31c6de912e51158bc075: Do you think they'll support it?
textByHashes.4249fea5d4a077a820cf371533732bca7a52062c: Sounds like we have everything covered, then. When do we depart?
textByHashes.7892721a186350a677885e9077d85d9258555425: I need to do something first.
textByHashes.15a1a404fa5b74de0f77c24cc22d23899c99d374: And is it everything you hoped for?
textByHashes.c36f478fc32991bcd6f464145486c8b1f93356bf: Well the King certainly seems to have attracted plenty of guests.
textByHashes.7603bc7071baceb4d37078658217474937846aad: Are all the leaders here as well?
textByHashes.138a8c8baf41ff9f258c3242a95d7fbe9bcff64c: That's not too suprising. Things weren't exactly straightforward between him and the King when this was all arranged.
textByHashes.e389e021a332480089c8b3b98d97e15144b7a4cf: No chance. It's not every day you crown a new king.
textByHashes.477554863952e988ffb3e7a6c5662b8dbde331e8: On that note, how does it feel to be serving a king now?
textByHashes.b7137f4c1d2523d1fb0bb211674388bf2d2fc8c3: Tell me about it. Had I known how this would go when Martin first recruited me, I'd have probably considered running for the hills as fast as possible.
textByHashes.cfcd5935c8e42b90dd641889f8ce98cb6fa0934f: It wouldn't have been possible without you or Martin either. Have you two spoken yet?
textByHashes.aa5c7250542d78262932ca8b6a21a9b07511d246: Who are the knights with her?
textByHashes.2d27599372d0c7c9b8a1d7f835ed9540937598ad: Good to see you, Your Majesty. Congratulations on your coronation.
textByHashes.37f099ba8de80a48b790c0530508989bbb5e2766: You wanted to speak to me?
textByHashes.cfa721dd0aae4d04d8e0ee141f17a18bea08b3d5: It's not a problem. What did you want to discuss?
textByHashes.df24852e099a3d826333d2635ca6f3a74d158648: I'd be happy to help in any way I can. Xamphur and I have unfinished business.
textByHashes.a1a2d2892512a8ed37682e5d1b53bb85addb00b0: So, what do you need me to do?
textByHashes.82267482fb0c17f21da6872a7d64b239009d0084: Hey Lydia. How are you doing?
textByHashes.0f73e32ddad0d8172d317dc96a155b275b296a14: That's fine. I think one coronation was enough for me. Any word on the killer?
textByHashes.2ad9af86907810fd316c71100959dd8cc0374730: Well let me know once they have something. I want to find whoever did this.
textByHashes.a5a4afdf62e195d8bd5d8a7d0237ec6dd966e4bc: Anything else I can do in the meantime?
textByHashes.dba9ddd0a2244b4135f44c64dec03a618456e5bc: Well you don't really expect me to believe you're just here to embarrass Verzik do you? What's really going on?
textByHashes.ca58f7978e42f8a99d63c7443c688769cfc4b80e: So you're spying on her? Then why are you asking people to go and 'embarrass' her?
textByHashes.9232acf6ebe61bcd3a570d400119d5323eb211dd: Ah, so they're the ones that have been doing the spying. Still, that doesn't explain what this is all for.
textByHashes.364f6a13d5a660edb1d4265e974300b855a55d74: You mean that thing she does where she turns into a spider?
textByHashes.a3121ca415300e4a5c5b9b10b4c805fe9c328907: Right, I think I understand now. So where do I come in?
textByHashes.c85d69d82f1f30fec92ef611486f8df896cf0ed2: How lovely. I think you've safely put me off my food for the rest of today. So you think these eggs are somehow connected to her unique abilities?
textByHashes.50af4edd7a231002f5b6f1b06865fbaf92a7dbe2: And I suppose you want me to look into this?
textByHashes.c51e14703d949a85c926b837cbb3c1c77f30a443: Not to mention the whole turning into a spider thing I guess. I suppose you want me to look into this?
textByHashes.f4cb66310351b4d77478a5010cd2677f0143b1d0: Ah, that sounds about right. Which dead friend are we talking about here?
textByHashes.1d5168851358115f8c287122444aad0a98efaecf: Right... And how's a dead vampyre going to help us exactly?
textByHashes.ead1b9dfa11854409012106130fe4869a2ead131: Please don't go poking through my memories. Also, what do you mean by 'your kind'?
textByHashes.287cbb51495459192cf3d1bf8b567f8271cefd72: Of course. How silly of me. And you want to relive Ranis' memories I'm guessing? Will that even work now that he's dead?
textByHashes.d585d1b9a375045b91be586392aea8b73f3db878: Err... Nice. What's he got to do with these eggs though?
textByHashes.e3c351f40f27cf0f45270aeb13129b899b559668: And where can I find him?
textByHashes.eb3e950f227c78ee9c295578307812580ab882be: Brains are generally attached to the body you know.
textByHashes.b7c38495f8c986ff8d8668c6872304297acf4359: Yes! After beating all of her challenges, she chose to face me herself. I couldn't fully defeat her though. She just transformed into a bat and flew away.
textByHashes.f099e017d76d261cd2b88aae8d75567da31e5389: Speaking of your associates, what's all this really about?
textByHashes.582b60be5355a6d7142f3f2d0f487d345f3e1236: What's this thing you need from me?
textByHashes.41fbedc4147ee70fb94364ea06bfb635933465bf: I think I want to be sick.
textByHashes.2345c3d832a389d7af10523d6de1bf8e471ddf74: Well this is probably one of the more disgusting things I've ever done. Here goes nothing...
textByHashes.baef859f03b484fb79d4824a24e8fc0081960052: Hey there Ranis. Didn't expect to see you again. How are you doing?
textByHashes.090da23cc800e8402f731468b35aeaabb2cf6ecb: Well I think I might be at my lowest point in life right now. I really need to find a hobby or something.
textByHashes.48cf64b27a6ca167efcccc76414807f6ff8ef797: I managed to recover Ranis' head.
textByHashes.448da8c2d514b20fd0d187b567a8b603593f72d2: Well... I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.79b392b37fae8baa3dd4901e7fdb1d7ddc0dd7a6: Why are you making this weird?
textByHashes.1df89bae1a71bd1f2bd73e10e959f8203bb2fb21: I see. So what's our next step?
textByHashes.b48e3362ea3fa2d9ae1bb76b0b6aa1b4fd1dcec2: Perhaps that breeding is what led to the eggs you have.
textByHashes.e9c892657901dd10460e5481659960f2d3545a7b: Ranis said they came from a nest north of Darkmeyer. I'll see if I can find it.
textByHashes.66bdae30e6a6ac8e155ec5de67a4250e152a7c4a: Any reason why you're not able to join me?
textByHashes.161ca8f354e952a369c25349d5c8fb7a9ec9f275: Actually, let me guess. Your associates...
textByHashes.4bb067ad6051cf86bf820b49f1f6ddc658fc0d26: I'm not sure why I asked. I'll be back once I've explored this nest.
textByHashes.4877d7c6104fc05304e388113f36a2f529649078: So what are we doing with Ranis' head?
textByHashes.c73cf8ddce020dd0e00b93a31b2b4ef9dfd39704: Where can I find that nest?
textByHashes.442ce62ec6b060904f8fe81a2f53fd1a01303f20: Alright. I'll be back once I've explored this nest.
textByHashes.9b2378bb34f622c6ce99662bd5e0875aed51a88a: Well I was exploring a cave west of here and I think I found your assistant.
textByHashes.e5676f2b2411cc17f6395595bf1d8ae2dcccb297: Well... she's dead I'm afraid. Looks like the spiders in the cave killed her. Ate most of her as well...
textByHashes.5a1a7e5c2ab4300f1838b0d6a3e0858849e35aba: Yeah... Oddly enough I can't imagine many people will be queueing up to go get themselves eaten by spiders for you.
textByHashes.3c8640b3a7d0ae20f403e3cbfc5c0a1320cadd61: Still, if it helps, it looks like she did find what she was after. There's an egg sac near where I found her. If I had some sulphuric acid, I could melt through it.
textByHashes.bd3888cf67e3cb7068c312b3f0ac7be87332bde5: Thanks! Want me to bring you some of those eggs?
textByHashes.ddfe5d8f40cd67d26036a942f82efd6b02fc7362: I found some of those eggs.
textByHashes.db31ba1fdbb9a77941ba316a76a616707b03f141: I don't actually have them with me.
textByHashes.04e5ef7df1d4337fb5e54dc051dfe1753dd52501: Well that would be nice. I'm still a bit lost to be honest... Then again, I guess that's just the norm for me.
textByHashes.67d0165698635aad4dada39da478568be7ecccb0: Your associates aren't trying to replicate her powers are they?
textByHashes.bf4391febd8b18f71ba1c7b49d88f58974a5a6f4: Is there another memory that could tell us more?
textByHashes.03bdcc1b419774dbcfb430c2f98e15086150615c: I'm guessing this is the bit where I retrieve some hespori bark for us.
textByHashes.1bd10c49802f848762a8c628fe29576d8e416551: Do you know where I can find one?
textByHashes.e6fabf9f3ece87f878db83a718fdac1ec1599b0a: Hmm... I know of a nature spirit who lives in the swamp. He can probably help.
textByHashes.35680ff560b43add2ed1f5b7ddf0ece40ad1b2ca: So we have the eggs. Now what?
textByHashes.3f8289871d42d75063d646fc2745cc9330150697: That memory didn't tell us too much.
textByHashes.f50956882f4cc228d55c0cce609ecc59cd02cf13: Where can I find a hespori?
textByHashes.8461381d118f683f5eae4382a93ffa315862c63b: That's right! He lives in the swamp.
textByHashes.d4460a4a3f0efe99128bb9515459db96483277b0: That's right! I'm looking for a hespori. I was hoping you might know where one is.
textByHashes.7d6ef4220867e0b4b1fb8af25011e9e8ccac54a6: Yeah... I'm definitely not going to damage it in any way.
textByHashes.2a2f2f01c51883b7b618f22b4c3bdb72380e7327: Can you remind me where it is?
textByHashes.72fb9a87c1f90293be47843ea6aee6bfb8e7c114: Can it help us find more memories?
textByHashes.4c5c2097afe922a864e379240c90b0e74f663e6e: That was it? She made a new nylocas, it bit her and it just died?
textByHashes.0dd06e7c76b7703d9b31786750e1afeefa9264bd: But who knows what may have happened after that bite... What if we're missing some key information?
textByHashes.87089b314b5437df6f9d080060f88b62d9a81e36: I've made it through the Theatre before. I could do it again.
textByHashes.a72b0b6ab9263343173450c8c307563775cfa0ea: I've never made it through the Theatre before, but I'm sure I can manage it.
textByHashes.ce724ec6b8fa9539d2310a98b1437c7461500f97: So you want me to 'carry' you through the Theatre?
textByHashes.c109e232b00b38fa2172e20bd5a3e132e7bab638: Okay, I think we can make this work.
textByHashes.76a5a1a65830993d0619812ded49a7529bb09761: In that case, I'll see you in there.
textByHashes.364fa7276466fa46c3b3084fffdacf121b5b3241: Can we use this bark to find more memories?
textByHashes.2e4cbf3bda1c0c1261793a8a5bbe8f2575ec1be8: Do you have any more memories for us to look at?
textByHashes.711d30c50639650d5141bea6dc983d1376368847: This Verzik business kind of feels like it's been a waste of time.
textByHashes.0db6ceb6b2eaec5116caf18d25099b836ac8b820: Verzik made a new nylocas, it bit her and it just died. That was it.
textByHashes.69250d8b7877679d2a7a2092d7e533c497a4482c: What do you know about her?
textByHashes.0b74b3d9ea012e58654f6e94552c9deb6e04e06e: So how do I overcome that?
textByHashes.dc23dee8fa7e576b7c7bdd48542f5e567a499b0a: Did you manage to get any useful memories from Verzik?
textByHashes.d1282392ab08f4e0dd2ffb2dde66e3ccce0b79e4: But does this mean... the Verzik in the Theatre...
textByHashes.299a6dd32b3a349d1ef526c9039808906eefd2e0: Your master? So these associates you've been going on about... they don't actually exist do they?
textByHashes.0e4a794e4d986dcc6d5b2a7aee16bbe911c02955: It would be nicer if we could speak in person.
textByHashes.555b0a4b33c070dc0aa34bc850135e0d523fab98: Right... And what's your connection to Verzik?
textByHashes.6f7589f8c3cb2fe4f41d14794083b1566122eaf8: What about this nylocas that's replaced her?
textByHashes.c783705166933123de41df351f5a0463347a4588: So there's nothing further for us to do now?
textByHashes.41fa8f729aad55fedab0010add5e9a92c98d3c67: 'Damaged roof tiles for sale'... 'Come on down to Bob's Axes'... 'Contributions welcomed to Ned's New-Window Fund'...
textByHashes.e647c5716f5bcebd62af96cbcabee3f651924e5b: This could be worth looking into.
textByHashes.35cf8d0443112c55ba7e4e547128a671a5ce8f7d: Right, let's go and see what Sarah has in mind.
textByHashes.fbc0d256f2a062caf018d8c31616bee2961cb051: Sounds like it must have given you quite the scare!
textByHashes.04d6c05cd4a2bb04f98b4d971cf93ff21a10f819: What did this monster look like?
textByHashes.04dc0a0208d34db1d5c968b411819c1055749f0b: Any tips on finding this thing?
textByHashes.817fa14d911361d06e4dc660761734ed404c5852: That's okay. Crossroads north of Draynor... At least I have somewhere to start.
textByHashes.ac4e165b9ec916b14155c24dd52bfc697060a4a4: You mentioned that Rosie spooked the monster. Who's that?
textByHashes.ba554efdd28dec78962c7f23097ed811d336c1b3: I think that'll be all for now.
textByHashes.bad1b195ef9cefe8fb61b24f34f18936dd4691fa: Weird... What sort of monster charges at someone and then steals a bunch of carrots?
textByHashes.0ee38af1b2aacfdfddf7fb96aa9fd485f65cf586: Would you look at that... Apparently our monster is picky.
textByHashes.d44029465e4b30e86d616bebcd4dc688073e9af5: Something pretty big must have come running through here to knock this over.
textByHashes.f50f509026d63378c9536ea9cdb4da22dd74041a: This looks like the place. It's a long way down, though... I'll need to tie something onto the edge.
textByHashes.d00c64f02b500943f325dee1913bfc31b595071e: Huh... there's a rope already down here. I hope noone else has got to this monster first.
textByHashes.ed3b554c7c55e75ff02cb0c2c5ae802f170d0ea7: I'm still working on it... I've managed to find its lair though.
textByHashes.f4929a257562a5a11414a061b2af2cc8a0baa30c: There's also a scrawled note. It's barely readable...
textByHashes.aabe2aa107b8b1d9526f0439975630fc8c61edb6: Argh! My eyes! The goggles do nothing!
textByHashes.162a43bdf9d86ab6bbb3e8afc8413823eda52e72: I think I find out more about that monster from Spria in Draynor Village before heading back down there.
textByHashes.111aacb4519a92d78ca9ff3c8e3e117292f9fd8b: Who are you? How did I end up here?
textByHashes.08c8e5060f1da70f95b60a6a114013fd1e0991c9: A Sourhog? You mean the giant pig monster?
textByHashes.e80105400327c4c41f57af0ba3a7f25a81f8208f: Yes... It sounded like an easy few coins...
textByHashes.abd8b633e901e9a377847658c7657dcc6f8fb16c: That thing caught me completely off-guard. Normally I can handle myself in a fight, but its spitting attack is pretty fearsome!
textByHashes.958505763557ecd94470c581ffce408055f82b69: So how am I supposed to handle that?
textByHashes.aa25947dbf9099939953f788113fb1c1300fc3e8: Well, I sure am glad you were there to lend a hand. Thank you!
textByHashes.24288cb4a6f50b456448bd46f52bb1c66ad32412: How did I end up back in Draynor Village?
textByHashes.93634dc6f32196a0ffbb41e4812a691562621bc5: You said you were a slayer master. What's that?
textByHashes.1588025d8b96a930d69a624e4579cb92a26db67d: Can I have another pair of Reinforced Goggles?
textByHashes.86ec2bf083ceff88c44d6166955dfe2895531f6d: What can you tell me about the Sourhog?
textByHashes.0e90e0e702c1d4ec5f1480e2fd76a8ed1e3f0e8a: I don't want to go back down there without wearing the right equipment!
textByHashes.a1a90443ad40e748c34110bc51c735cf84399f9c: I don't think Spria will be rescuing me this time. If I go in there, I'm fighting this thing to the death!
textByHashes.ab6cc24e9eb29d8a2483c32491d9a1d81149c389: Before I leave, I should go and collect a foot from that dead Sourhog as proof of my kill.
textByHashes.af93abebc9c61d482720dd3bf97ea12a2f34051a: Perhaps I should go and get something sharp.
textByHashes.493fb47b4b5469d196c741b349fe057b4f7581c3: I don't think that's sharp enough to cut a foot off...
textByHashes.1f348b7db1044195f761e12782ada10738d783f2: I've already collected a foot from this thing. I should take it to Sarah.
textByHashes.758c6991a297329216902f4c9f2782d98c3e31a2: I don't need to go back down there right now. I should take the foot to Sarah and collect my reward.
textByHashes.8ba33adae6172305ea460efebfcafd5d9dfac6bc: I did it! I killed the Sourhog!
textByHashes.7fe44489d385f30716de36ebd0666500941ab8c0: That monster certainly won't be troubling you from now on.
textByHashes.ab7b93cd8783c65d0714e4a4f9dfad615b930e9b: I guess I'll go and get you some proof.
textByHashes.4360737e66c25e6fd39fb4dab363e3d0974236ce: Indeed, the smell is... something quite special.
textByHashes.2d3be5e4f9bd8414c939c7ac24c60bc48faa3159: Perhaps I should speak with Spria and tell her that the monster's been dealt with.
textByHashes.52a3f93cb860db6d80700ed6a537592639ff31f0: Feeling better now that the monster's gone?
textByHashes.c27d810d4a383b9dbc0a979cdab0b72eab0527ab: It was a Sourhog. A giant bipedal pig creature!
textByHashes.bfc1af75c1de8a9a97c8df35677d5ca8992e9d17: Yes, I suppose I should get going.
textByHashes.48da607ca383a709bf85356e100ed34f3732cb06: I did it! I killed the Sourhog and collected the bounty from Sarah.
textByHashes.9fd47fc4830ad820b58bc9a684bc4ced34c203de: What's this big hole in the ground all about?
textByHashes.b7987cc3dd6e8369ba9ef721c02a75b422807ef6: So why is it important to you?
textByHashes.d885f171d59d28ba98ea464f94e90c2db7c22acb: What situation? Maybe I can help.
textByHashes.33390e1ce352b46f96c6fb3b027c881e29a82ff4: Your son, Tolna? I don't know, what does he look like?
textByHashes.c45f1c11fb8302122a04509870d42780e75b44be: You don't know what your own son looks like?
textByHashes.bc8e55d3bbb7cf9fe3e83e5b05c1ffa233f6ddee: Would you like me to go down to look for your husband and son?
textByHashes.07bc0723c6157644ce445536a9c5e4a6746a6b05: Surely by now they'd both be dead?
textByHashes.524218eb73aaa6a37b97161536fa6dc0f65f1d97: Sorry, what am I supposed to do again?
textByHashes.b006a7d7a8a6cd4f1eba7a25ee59da5ada832f2a: Hi, I've been down into the rift and I found a strange room. I also heard a voice claiming to be called Tolna.
textByHashes.85a811987cdbc0b744fe8dd8f05d45ca7810b21c: He said, 'Why should I, Tolna, be trapped in such a wretched place? Feel my ANGER!'.
textByHashes.b7dc47a13cfc989aa637063369f1ae37a1a78f37: It's a very aggressive room. I think I need to defeat the monsters in there.
textByHashes.94b7717c00acfb8f57b00b53db1ca3a3d7779cff: Wow! How did I do that? There's something truly mental about this place!
textByHashes.764d50bf853d3ea67dee71d6c8e05357cc9ac1c0: I managed to defeat the monsters in the room!
textByHashes.b6b7399701edcf6726ade304dc01e08c1c68972f: Sorry, I've yet to enter the next room.
textByHashes.6b752b9749dade496d8c044979a90b3ce876d86e: Hmmm, no light sources. So why can I still see down here? This can't just be a simple dungeon.
textByHashes.2be88b51a44d04d92c883ff9a7b0ac9c7ab167d9: Hi. I've made my way into a second room. I heard your son's voice again as well.
textByHashes.5d8801e7051fc64ccddb1514c479adec2aba72a7: 'It's so quiet and dark. I FEAR I may never escape this horrid place. Mum, help me!'
textByHashes.55e5efe274a16cd3033ec9b3d4cf9a472264b614: I don't like looking in these holes but I must!
textByHashes.dc035db99bbeecb3fdd1da6467e669fb99935f1f: I don't feel quite so afraid now.
textByHashes.3ac34c46ae895fb448fa140cb2c50d609e5542fd: This isn't so scary after all!
textByHashes.fe0703892d253a6e1c8e231f7fce9d11b9f2ff1e: Phew, I don't feel so scared now. This feels like the figment of someone's imagination!
textByHashes.ac04c7e1d6bd9ce33868da509c09579e4df1611d: I've overcome fear in the second room and an exit has been illuminated.
textByHashes.0f0382c79cd5d59dc6c505ddf4c0a7ded6ec3946: Erm, I haven't actually ventured through yet.
textByHashes.c4993471b76196b083bb58926d350b42d9dfea84: Hi, I've journeyed through to a third room. Your son's voice spoke as I entered.
textByHashes.6dfa973373e14ae6a445308dddc908e79a57e1b6: Simply, 'Where am I? How long have I been here? Am I still the person I once was? I hate my CONFUSION'.
textByHashes.e4288b4c73a65f9f6951890de95cde0d1f67f072: Aha! The exit is now clear! This Tolna's mind really is a mess.
textByHashes.eca29ec93fe54ea5a1b8f67dd432b7cc088cba50: Hi. I have prevailed over a third room.
textByHashes.0f1f5696256219cf131f7330b255a339781608b5: I think I may be getting closer.
textByHashes.bd1027127b939a8bb4e46899b8c20b7287811a28: I have travelled through to a fourth room. As I entered your son's voice spoke to me!
textByHashes.a4f21ad470438d5d699a50aca9fabc6f2e40972c: He said, 'What's the point? Why do I defy such HOPELESSNESS? No-one will ever help me'.
textByHashes.45179021d611b026df5903ae1391d7458d586ed6: Is there any end to killing these monsters?
textByHashes.ebe79a9c4e0f5f3a12d48731cc458b7d073fe47c: I've almost killed them all now!
textByHashes.b88eadba9edfe89e8a8647012d8a1202649af34d: Maybe if I kill one more?
textByHashes.c341e9e124c00028201986362a8cd1e4d1e145e4: A bridge of hope! Tolna should feel that help is at hand by now!
textByHashes.6c161949d533d45e7fb34ac97786673ebcc06c28: I have endured against hopelessness to finish the fourth room.
textByHashes.4a88241691fac28c82b457a48f1fa544d1df697a: Only his voice. So far he has said to me, 'Why should I, Tolna, be trapped in such a wretched place? Feel my ANGER!', 'It's so quiet and dark. I FEAR I may never escape this horrid place. Mum, help me!', 'Where
textByHashes.c60138185981a72177e6c0c6db2f4c0e55024ba1: am I? How long have I been here? Am I still the person I once was? I hate my CONFUSION' and 'What's the point? Why do I defy such HOPELESSNESS? No-one will ever help me'.
textByHashes.10344d7513ccb590c20986f0c2fac5f121132366: Don't worry, I will find him!
textByHashes.4c359a2d2851956a4ebc7749ba4dcad51f0a89fe: And your husband, but I'm afraid your son is no longer physically what he once was.
textByHashes.7afdc2980884a4585a8b554cdc74a5ed5870399d: I think I've saved your son.
textByHashes.997a19acd8b5e2411a146e19c8bd1521cac57e98: I have returned your son to his normal state!
textByHashes.dbb7febc529d15ec4bbcd20752122acdb985cc3a: Er, no, sorry. I just came back here to tell you.
textByHashes.9c9fc428cf7f8da3434c4a23cfd89b12175337c7: You've been trapped down here for years. I've come to rescue you on behalf of your parents.
textByHashes.acf5f3f2552ef53c5cf78e6e379d5077f2dc8445: She's up at the surface waiting for you.
textByHashes.bed79a6602e2bf25163fcf1d3b2e239bc5b65185: I'm just glad I could help.
textByHashes.50b7d78bc10844fd1efaa068c14b8288e2077560: What exactly happened to you down there?
textByHashes.7b74b973a6b274104f33ef7c3446a95effb2bc42: At least we have a warning. Did you manage to retrieve anything?
textByHashes.6745c3ed9e9aec9d05ec3d9850206d3d3fe28bc5: Thanks. So what are you going to do now?
textByHashes.19df7bb7b912d3563c9502cee70933b164cdd31b: I do but my cat is in a safe place.
textByHashes.e6ea597443189a255c4cb85d3cb29f691827de91: Indeed I do! Do you have a cat?
textByHashes.47e2c0acdb600f2a362f7ceef356788f73023c07: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.
textByHashes.6619a989adda813966f82addf5cfdff8c2e7b936: I know puss, but he is in distress.
textByHashes.99660b5f67782831427db2a12807a10832300272: Tell you what. I'll help you!
textByHashes.9024167d6961f85980cbc0fb7a0c0b7196d1fcdf: Er... Where did you see Bob last?
textByHashes.e8fefc54aacfae5a8b62e8d588c8287c585eae92: I wonder why it's on a Wednesday.
textByHashes.11fecb2588e8f4fb4ba60a8dcd222f36ac839ec4: I said I would, didn't I?
textByHashes.294f75b0f566b7b6c72f5ca3d7486b73126d9637: Ok. I'll go speak to her!
textByHashes.23ab593f62b85510f12fad4e71d2d7d1ea731339: Greetings Hild, I am trying to find Unferth's cat...
textByHashes.6b81f002f871b6223839184c502c2dc0c159b9a2: You understand what my cat is saying?!
textByHashes.750ca7b2b3e93d16f6071b5dced1b33ab5cb03e0: Ah... good! He could be anywhere though!
textByHashes.41f74fcf113465fa098324808c320957f66d4380: I don't have the death runes.
textByHashes.53681982c40cbb50d8543aa70b2b0eddcbf5e938: I have the death runes with me now.
textByHashes.995fd86c44f462c9d77d7cb0a93baa800e35b7e8: Bob! I've found you at last!
textByHashes.116e0f76a622bd046266dc515fcb226d7afdc61d: Neite...now, I'm sure I've heard that name before...
textByHashes.2f3917c9cd6086270853fbb4ac6cdf5dab900c35: Do I look like a match maker?!
textByHashes.e5156718b2616e3d8cf08eb06038f94b1b847f58: Death runes? No idea.... No, it's not that. I, erm...
textByHashes.a9c9807aa7ed3d6d490d1b48e275352db7fcc7bc: This is going to sound silly...
textByHashes.b002432a2898fd761dee8fe2f5b34dc9715eeab4: Ok... Well... Do you know who Bob's parents are?
textByHashes.b6da7a385920d376e84c87775b6b9b771a0d13f1: No, it's erm... It needs to be taken to the vets, URGENTLY. For an emergency AMPUTATION!
textByHashes.d2bc5684f4b93816cc323e0f665bf9aa36001c43: See, it just can't stop howling. Allergic to cat hair apparently. Anyway, you were talking about Bob's parents.
textByHashes.938ff13861bae1f07f170c9a8b21e875c2b89572: Hmm... Gertrude, do you know anything of the legend, Robert the Strong?
textByHashes.2265665533a347632030a14bf3dafee6841b208d: I have a cat related question.
textByHashes.5c381617514fddf713cc21ab41944575e3339a04: Do you know anything about Robert the Strong?
textByHashes.98993932401aa5d8c2b04fb2111ee4d83517e094: Thank you Reldo, you've been most... helpful.
textByHashes.1d68b6e6127369e9c894ac5324296b96bf40db91: That was a nice tale for mothers to tell their children, but I don't see how this helps Bob?
textByHashes.a6e867979d5617836e4154c35f088c2124663d61: I guess, but he's just a cat... right?
textByHashes.e5b8a9a65e1e4114392ada570a96af40db51245b: Ok, ok! I get your point, after all I'm being dragged round Gielinor by... my cat!
textByHashes.55efff90fb4565ad6675661cdbee99cf8dcd293a: So are you saying that Robert the Strong is... is...
textByHashes.b8a3952581876c9e27a624a6ddc1aa073e9c08ae: Never mind, I've found out enough now, I should go back to Bob.
textByHashes.4a7e35182187d61d974f4e6de4c7a6a12599bf8e: Looks like theres nothing else we can do puss.
textByHashes.fa45f65666d5621b6a61c78cb944ee28f5e2384a: Sounds crazy... guess it might work!
textByHashes.06b75901e4a688ffa02d4edefcd56bed7257d663: Don't worry, we're working on it.
textByHashes.5afd6f5a4495a0267aeedb74cde38ca663595263: Bob is in love with Neite but we need to prove that he used to be Robert the Strong before she will have anything to do with him!
textByHashes.bd70c4ef04a974611b01f5cdedba7c6d53e9e0c0: But Bob has no memory of this!
textByHashes.960efaecef813f2dba6e28d4a4fad96c3045a5a4: Hi Unferth, I'm doing some ch...
textByHashes.6994d4ba8853569a8e5772439341037c37417abc: What do I have to do for 'Tidy House'?
textByHashes.ab8503869b501c060c0953a2a49291696fd62b74: What do I have to do for 'Warm Human'?
textByHashes.6d9bd145fb9beb23a6d15881e29f32366f8698b1: What do I have to do for 'Feed Human'?
textByHashes.8dfb1d72372607b74a10d4274e3dca1aa13e8fc5: What do I have to do for 'Tidy Human'?
textByHashes.cd2b2048d536a172bb4fb78256c2f7988bfe0f69: Do you know where I can get some scissors?
textByHashes.5f3d756769127aeb71cf1003c1c3e0f24dbeb464: What do I have to do for 'Tend Garden'?
textByHashes.08c22e3a680411cdeea3fed57656e287e0f6b293: I've weeded the garden, now what?
textByHashes.d874d5ed21101b57a183fd0351fa5d566184df11: I'm not touching someone else's bed!
textByHashes.da66ff29acb29b5218fa2acd1c4c04b21cb5024b: Hi Unferth, is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.b7434363de663d398d9ba87d107e9ae212069305: We can't let Bob see him like this!
textByHashes.8730240d497611f27572ecb2d1eb84fb8b98c378: Don't worry, I'll get the Apothecary from Varrock!
textByHashes.470c3adfee82238ddac3b5f124a08c1fe8914b41: Hello Apothecary, Unferth has fallen ill. Could you go and see him please?
textByHashes.cd09e064e1f155e2557bcaaa35cb230f89bd78e7: I'm beginning to agree with you!
textByHashes.337c743bc4d045dca48e4c9c6719389ed5f5c8e4: What can I do with Unferth?
textByHashes.8c735c843080bec2046e047f756b4dea1851182c: How do I make Unferth believe I am a Doctor or Nurse?
textByHashes.3c29aa2997d2c3c5752b57c24b10a8dec91a990a: I always wanted to be a Doctor!
textByHashes.5ba3d44f43444864055b01dba6e7f4c3941477f7: That's what I was going to do! Thanks, I'll see you later.
textByHashes.9d1bf398f9d1389e0568b1cdd63309c70a87f664: Hello Apothecary, I've lost that hat you gave me.
textByHashes.6dcce41d94e126539a64fd43d7e7c6a0b9f2cf0e: Good day Unferth, I am Doctor .
textByHashes.c0f4cbccc721b156725ab0a9171342f9c365a88d: What seems to be the problem?
textByHashes.6668a16c897ed965543a88e8c5353641a1fdf919: All you need to do is take this potion.
textByHashes.48a8cc49af4134b59c21b3d0228ebac23763964c: Of course sir! The potion I have given you is the latest technology. It cures all known illnesses, and a few unknown ones. It's what we call in the trade a 'miracle cure'.
textByHashes.6982e5490fe343604dea1cd67e3b2bffb2d124b6: Hi Bob! How's it hang... going?
textByHashes.784c14d0020c5bc2880e1d39ee6c82c2380b9508: So it's a form of entertainment for them? Why do the citizens take part?
textByHashes.c7ef51585541c5ff5bdfbb2383b4a448981a0b6b: I suppose that must be rather tempting to a lot of people. So who's this Serafina?
textByHashes.79a1fd312140044e3cbe6c62d6ca56182a1b2fb2: Sounds like you're a big fan of her.
textByHashes.fb514f1e3d83aaad8f0c4d49ae8ac1ad53ad2ffa: So what happened to her in the end?
textByHashes.4f8da1006c72d1e27974a1acb6e96b1da4e352aa: You suppose? So you don't know for sure?
textByHashes.e63664d2f2e69738b311b64df500060b07a7d940: That was Vanstrom Klause and Ranis Drakan!
textByHashes.aecfc108d3e08e9064d1bf2a50c984d22f28fd67: Safalaan and the Myreque will want to hear about this.
textByHashes.977990a7f9270d0e9b6eb68c0392c3bd9f1ad0a2: Safalaan! I've seen something I think you should know about.
textByHashes.234e44bb3d83edd95b126891139d057dd6c04d93: I was at Ver Sinhaza and I saw Vanstrom Klause and Ranis Drakan.
textByHashes.e82863c131737d75fafd0d16489f18370a62f6d3: I'm not sure, they arrived at the same time and both entered the castle.
textByHashes.89dc43414b447bb5c522c7a18097a116b3c2a3de: What do you need from me?
textByHashes.5734be6746b591ede91c3b2578d8e06de0323180: What do you need me to do again?
textByHashes.897eaf4215f409a68b886e0489e4f96fff88b768: Safalaan sent me. He said you could help me with something.
textByHashes.ef6a3aa9e9afd6446bc4cdebe226b05ba9d3718c: I saw Vanstrom Klause and Ranis Drakan arriving at the castle earlier. Do you know if they're still here?
textByHashes.c5e1a7361bdf1a982d089eda6ee946357d9addc1: I need to know what they're doing in there. Any idea how I can do that?
textByHashes.f3f9cbdec4c6f84ea599fbd93b561d2dabf3e60a: Doesn't look like I'll be able to climb up here with that guard watching. I'll need to distract them somehow.
textByHashes.40287dc06776579c6b696aff3ab71a743baa0d6d: Hello. I was wondering if you could help me with something.
textByHashes.544f1c9a692fcfcaf582a55a7c8306a743b60023: Do you think you could distract that guard for me while I climb this wall?
textByHashes.651f82d70ff11d0e3cb95b7ca1da6ad03f082f99: 1,000 coins? What can you even buy around here for that?
textByHashes.2a0a915265aac629e8436cdbc06f7e5694645182: Fine. I'll come back when I have the money.
textByHashes.35735af89fa42dceac57172fd8e0a6380fffaeb1: Well that didn't sound good. I'd better let Safalaan know.
textByHashes.2c84d02cad6853dc8a29a7a6d1608cf74253ef4f: I do. It's not good I'm afraid.
textByHashes.85f574794aef3551b7088a5d004c5f24a6903be3: I managed to spy on a meeting between Vanstrom, Ranis and Verzik Vitur. Verzik gifted them this strange creature which she said would help them track down the Myreque.
textByHashes.802f5a73d9b69c53892fac15d5c609f560c23bc4: She claimed that the creature could track anyone provided it got a taste of their blood.
textByHashes.a8b4b4eaa02d95bd24ea66c1dc1bf32c251e7de3: I wouldn't be so sure. Vanstrom seemed to think he had a way around that. Not only that, it sounded like he'd be making his move very soon.
textByHashes.46fa01f91a37d0850c35d85ba37515b6acb374e3: Ah yes. So, what's happening with this book?
textByHashes.51b1f7131e099a9fd036c2ecafe5f6d48807519d: Hello there. Safalaan said you were working on translating the haemalchemy book.
textByHashes.2e762b61f74de1a225810e94cabdb03bf5e6f9aa: I didn't know the vampyres had their own language.
textByHashes.cd044cc9110698e541be9b1dc90754e207e4a712: But you can translate it? How's that going so far?
textByHashes.10d670e2e1b882a4f4c52acd18c0f9da38e16753: Hmmm. I might actually be able to help with that bit. I was spying on Vanstrom and Ranis earlier for Safalaan and I heard Vanstrom say something quite interesting.
textByHashes.46e9162943566c4e5df5e0e9efe1546e6eb8f02a: He implied that Serafina had discovered their weakness.
textByHashes.1361df33e9f051b86493f1de01984e35c7bf93c0: Do you think this is worth exploring?
textByHashes.56aa32a6f0413cd37b672c1e1df8bd87e05d0bad: What do I need to do again?
textByHashes.b3ee2e783b449cff778bd0d3c7ddb9704dc1f65c: Hi Safalaan. How are things going?
textByHashes.2f7dcf3ef0e73fbfb827243427052b81ce75fed8: Retreat to Misthalin? But what about all the people here that need our help? They'll die without us.
