textByHashes.c769e26025ba05688061491095a5cf03179a35c1: There must be another way. What about Roald's mercenaries? Can't they help us?
textByHashes.11fe9cf687818a2e9a1d52afbf98bbcea66790ee: Do you think there's time for one last job before we go?
textByHashes.8c3b4ee071791fb9175c26453db303df52900cfe: While translating the haemalchemy book, Flaygian found reference to a possible weakness in the vampyres.
textByHashes.0e923786d388a43695624f6590c5e930ee4d2b07: Not only that, I also heard Vanstrom talking about this same weakness. He implied that Serafina found a way to take advantage of it.
textByHashes.366080f5aea487b31ede2f65cb32b1a27b8ff728: But this came from Vanstrom himself.
textByHashes.812a75b2ce8ab0087ebb01cafeb5c4d3679e75b5: How can I find the house again?
textByHashes.ca3d7fa914c3fe1fefd479d251a44a9889d1c8b4: This looks like the fountain that Safalaan mentioned. Serafina's house must be this one to the south.
textByHashes.2cbb1d9dfbb767483cb11d4828871c55affac0a2: Everyone else I've spoken to looks up to Serafina, but you don't even think she was real.
textByHashes.e21b306a8fdfb8005b5d2f225df8d1195e748072: But why don't they fight with the Myreque instead?
textByHashes.f56086c3de0ce119118cbbd975785e56a6125599: I found a herb. It's not a type I recognise.
textByHashes.82c82629fdbe052db601eee0bd416bc57e232261: I found some ingredients and started making a potion with them.
textByHashes.760acba6ad5f92ba272f3e30dc2a9565c0a7409a: I found some ingredients and made a potion with them.
textByHashes.191b1d466b08fd8942b33f8bd60763daa73e3414: The door has an inscription on it.
textByHashes.cc7a980cea1f5a074f5a8d07cc854b2a45b497f1: I found some ingredients for a potion. I made it and tried using it with the door but nothing happened. I also found an inscription on the door.
textByHashes.6152a0dd6e5dada9856fa67791ee8bd475efbd58: Fine. Next time please warn me before you start cutting yourself.
textByHashes.af202a15b8621c12994916898cc79d9aa118b822: Could I have another vial of blood.
textByHashes.c38b0832502ccadff40c88cac64e5a222461b25c: I've got a finished potion here.
textByHashes.261eed6288c35ea9ca58c3d72f33de3f43aca71d: It worked this time. The door is unlocked.
textByHashes.65a88d4e315c088cc0284c12c833d59994886574: I found some old notes behind the door.
textByHashes.69556d1179c752d61120b290af836efee176a719: That it can track anyone if it has a taste of their blood.
textByHashes.342bd5df664b4d9a18fba8bf91dbf6e21c4f3975: Vanstrom attacked the Myreque in Meiyerditch!
textByHashes.2518e5617d35ba2d6eac52b429b60413bb8f8c5f: The attack is already over. We won but there were casualties.
textByHashes.37b2682f670603939b1bfe9958f6a9a219f703e2: Just think for a second though. The vampyres will probably think we all died in the attack. They'll have dropped their guard. Now is the best time to retaliate.
textByHashes.58b15ab70d7bf0086f24b5cdf30c37463074fb54: I need the Rod of Ivandis
textByHashes.b7c2166d5ea0e7d040ca263c16b4503b4334be72: I was but I gave it to Veliaf.
textByHashes.52f5489a2b14e39a7b7c133958bdd274381d4f27: Hello Vertida. I've finished the weapon.
textByHashes.ccc569e708994e7da8d7940864e06034e1a8f9c3: I was wondering if I could ask a favour?
textByHashes.1287917382c32c8f1860ba0cd664059bc23dadf2: Would it be possible for me to have the Rod of Ivandis back?
textByHashes.27ebbbbd2aa24759ae29ee2918434c4575f8d243: I want to convert it into a flail. I have reason to believe that will make it even more effective against vampyres.
textByHashes.4e9c5cb673f43a29440afaa1b62e88130a738b9b: Oh yeah, how didn't I notice.
textByHashes.06130635627d41f86b05c5e3220c267733431970: Good news Safalaan, the weapon is complete.
textByHashes.3fd22576f2f55bde83a455dfddca1ffa86123a57: I've come this far. I'm not about to leave now. What's our plan.
textByHashes.5b3438dd8f7d197627cab4f12122a4306e0f3c4d: Sounds good to me. I'll take it.
textByHashes.792ec241d1c16b421882bfa5298f0ff13e11db95: That's a bit too much for me. I guess I'll make myself another one instead.
textByHashes.67eb46610a86bb2fcfa9ec0453188ad2e2651934: I don't have that much on me.
textByHashes.d267f87a7e0060dbed7378ce8e30601eac1e6d77: As good as all of that sounds, I do have just a few issues with it.
textByHashes.7810ef3cdbf96854db45b96710d64e0a89c93501: You stand here claiming the Myreque are dead but I'm here to prove otherwise.
textByHashes.971bfb378baae9080db1d72017791c2543516f1c: For too long you have lorded yourself over these people. Today, that comes to an end. Today...
textByHashes.d08ca2d28b5601a52e37c70f22f859e8eae8ca62: Sooo... I guess this is the part where I say something...
textByHashes.90f2280b6983b5c03a11690cc257681b7f007ea8: For hundreds of years, the people of Morytania have suffered under Lord Lowerniel Drakan and his vampyres.
textByHashes.0af301dde661ef56d3ffd0662896612351ad3c46: For too long, they've filled you with false hope. Hope of freedom. All you have to do is follow Serafina and you'll be free. Or so they claim.
textByHashes.1b33fe9aa1760e273a2e35d08538b438d6e2205a: Well whoever Serafina was, she is gone. There is no freedom in that Theatre. No hope. Just lies. If freedom is truly what you want, there is another path.
textByHashes.0c809b1ad9f89533535042eba3070e619d74bd7c: You see, the vampyres are not as powerful as they'd have you believe. Ranis Drakan lies dead before you. Killed by a mere human. If he can die, so can the rest.
textByHashes.d3b362b6636a7e37a2c4ba030152c11ce30347bb: So now, I ask that you join us. Fight alongside the Myreque and together, we will push back the darkness of Hallowvale.
textByHashes.61cc4eacd6c10b114098e9d010fa28086135e1aa: Together, we will end the tyranny of the Drakan family. Together, we will bring hope to all of Morytania.
textByHashes.4a6eca8457e57c9efa95f2b5d1605193f929c9b4: Good news Safalaan, Ranis Drakan is no more!
textByHashes.620feff5431e76b4021a70fe18cd64b22c603e66: I would be happy to make your home a better place.
textByHashes.78f4a3d18cc8baeb95b294c633dde193af4ac4ec: Great, will I be able to take a nap in it?
textByHashes.2d4b205dc1e7e2c4623a1864cd8f9972df9c8754: I'm not convinced by just a vague something; can you be a slight bit more inspiring in your offer?
textByHashes.1320f5b70c2acb715af2126569e90d5a751f9242: Very well then, I shall await my mystery prize with bated breath.
textByHashes.f074b7cea20c1bf126c18e2c3f76712b7f19f3a8: I'm not much into interior design, to tell the truth.
textByHashes.fa5ba6a4eba436b806d75eb334d1229be4ec0656: What's a nice girl like you doing in a place like this?
textByHashes.9f292aabf0bc1e4d4ee3d0a2680cc803ad304fdc: Ah, yes. I helped sort that out; he did seem a bit odd.
textByHashes.b38720b5bf7d473147c11641089d5310bdfbb368: No thank you; I just came to gossip with you.
textByHashes.d43a7e29f61ab2617320695d050cf9e603a9fce2: I am after one of your, er, unhealthier poultry. Could you help me?
textByHashes.3b49c6c17d30c534766040c32dbe35bfcc550ef7: Your animals don't look too healthy.
textByHashes.5ae629d4db76aa7cb10a6fca597554b2d7b80c9b: But you're a ghost - surely you know something about it.
textByHashes.ec27d98e12a36f6a3a215ff4ac59d5793737df29: Would I be able to buy some of your chickens?
textByHashes.caf71ca91772a1ba29e2cd1981a15101485df3ab: Not yet; I've been distracted by the thought of undead cow milk.
textByHashes.beea72b72696be9b57e850581f731a4be9789e3a: I have a message from your husband. He wants you to know that he still loves you, despite his ghostly state.
textByHashes.c17887acb23d8c81377c4b46d67113391782e257: I'll have a word with him, then; magic has its uses I suppose.
textByHashes.1c783890ece1dcb8509762f0f98588b29254e29e: Your wife says she needs the family cash and wants to know what you did with it.
textByHashes.25f32d6229e00c04248c753846961bd709235ffb: Your sense of humour died too, it seems...
textByHashes.6666f498e82b69b9a24e588b4409fa9d84bb43d0: Your husband says he put the cash in the bank.
textByHashes.2e20aadb90bbcc5d26ab287a549de6793860f3bf: Can't you just take a ghostspeak amulet? Then you could talk to him directly.
textByHashes.e1e751256651e5cebabda0bb8cca74ce5877ce69: You may not believe me, but she wants me to find your bank pass now.
textByHashes.9d263bb936a7cd7c30e217a4a01f0d1aa3553816: He says he won't trust me with the bank pass.
textByHashes.3b54709f6ad70eb7073c6250f850dff5689c3613: What if I gave some sort of altered ghostspeak amulet to him - surely that would work?
textByHashes.39c4a4b38e2a311618a6404660d75817663f370e: I'll see if I can find her. Big nose and a monstrous hat, I assume? I wonder where the beautiful young witches hide...
textByHashes.1db8e5bdb1bc7def346e19ef7f56e5f7929713e1: I've not progressed at all, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.eaf4c8c87bf5983f06338b73552cb14416dc78e3: I'm here about the farmers east of here.
textByHashes.f92a1a9c00ac47ab92d02f24de81b0e137185cae: Alice and her husband are having trouble talking to one another and said you might be able to help.
textByHashes.2b7858cc60dd4fa14c1f72421ff419f4647832f2: Alice seems to think you could alter a ghostspeak amulet in order to allow them to communicate.
textByHashes.d7eccbabb68072f7737112cf195f4feb8f47806c: In addition, when I was attempting to thwart Necrovarus, you created a new type of amulet for me. I thought that perhaps you might also do so on this occasion.
textByHashes.c90bf524c1d877a8d5fda677f5476e4a1cc9b95c: I'm here to see if you are ready to do your mystical stuff with my ghostspeak amulet.
textByHashes.f109fc5e9ca6bb8b4090b54d2aa358017483a548: Wow, that was quick and painless.
textByHashes.26680bbc1d10a214d776616dd1d80f282ed6f83d: Would you be able to replace the amulet you made? I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.50621cdcd2593299572435fc14753acc4ce04766: Well, to tell the truth, I just came back to chat with you. Any news?
textByHashes.88b1ddb16afdf5e55d44dfbc490a2b1387b25afc: I have obtained the amulet; I just haven't handed it over yet. So, it's looking good!
textByHashes.5e207fe8c86f8db6e08196dba6dd5375b38e7734: I talked to your wife and thought that if you had a special amulet, you could speak to her and sort out the bank situation without me being involved.
textByHashes.4b255bb7f70090fde0718d4a64b6222bc52fd0d6: Well... oh, never mind. I'm desperate enough for those chickens to let that pass.
textByHashes.d066d14c9ef1ed7540238ebe4bf369c8be9c388f: Okay, you need it more than I do, I suppose.
textByHashes.6ab0261bdc8b08f103616d84b348ade6ffe3d28f: Lucky we had such a brilliant idea.
textByHashes.bf160be89a1ac3cee715327284fdfdbd846b0a8a: I don't think I'm ready to hand it over yet.
textByHashes.4254416069cfb7ad191d5bf8c8cbe15df1330835: I need a couple of your chickens.
textByHashes.d045015f77bcbb6dd4789777368ab41ef8d6ebe5: They look pretty pathetic; how hard can it be?
textByHashes.b08ecb465f19ff905771e00f3a37c63a2522c6ad: Well, that's one way to catch a chicken, I suppose.
textByHashes.eb13248fc5bcd861274a7c25f48c4ecc679feb98: Could I buy those chickens now?
textByHashes.32f460a33f878d97b814ae9411715a5a74948d2d: Can I ask exactly how an undead chicken will help you sleep?
textByHashes.11a2431cd7008f55e3a76f55e015ad5e895c8228: Obvious, yes, but why on Gielinor would you need an undead chicken when there are perfectly good live chickens just down the road?
textByHashes.9b259cae1e0ed8c13590a4feb1eeba6ac4e410c7: Then why do I need a chicken for my reward; we already established that I don't use a bed?
textByHashes.499e5615b5f2023a98863007c870422a5391d60d: Beats chicken slaying or hanging around in fishing shops, I suppose. So, what next?
textByHashes.483763e8b4cf420ed3676507f77f5b29bf5d6e09: Well, I can buy the ones you want but I don't have any on me.
textByHashes.f1f2150b31b7bfd417402e27f9aca4929e3fdf3a: Well, I have this one which I can use to club people.
textByHashes.4c510945ec1d2830e3725b313753fa0b09453163: I prefer to keep this fine weapon with which to smite mine enemies.
textByHashes.53593ad8749fbea4f86955851714d65dd8b23bed: You can take it; it smells anyway.
textByHashes.7902b4b3ea05cdca3d5caaf5368014375c74585b: Here's the second one for my reward.
textByHashes.c7f65e84f98932acf59727be0e8ef408b7f53efe: Okay, okay, you're great. Yes, I'll go and talk to her when you've finished praising yourself.
textByHashes.33ce29d5f73b896367b965d31084819ada876c66: Ava told me to ask you about making magnets. Something about natural fields and other stuff. Sounded like she needed a farmer, to be honest.
textByHashes.7b9ec0373da8d2aeb38da9636ec8b0311d426335: No need to patronise me quite so much, you know.
textByHashes.6ae07a6990a3d98f72cf4049025a9cd15d29ab5f: I have some iron bars here.
textByHashes.771a260f5110c28affe997a6f6bffae1f72eca2c: I've talked to the Witch and she has asked me for some iron bars.
textByHashes.257774c1a94089b19861e4812b739ae1a2dc5791: Er, maybe; I've never met one.
textByHashes.1b69fd305ed5ee2568e5d3b349e58cc26420357a: Toys? Snookums? What are you on about, you deranged old bat?
textByHashes.b4b9d84d828aa2ae19ffb41b06fd46fd82fbeafd: I've talked to the Witch and now I've given her some iron bars.
textByHashes.d3630f3fa1fd586fbd139b3518070ded364a0ec9: The process is subject to some unexpected delays.
textByHashes.65ce4ff70f332f145244a149cbb996d20a99bd42: I've manufactured the magnet; here it is.
textByHashes.76cd05248b99305023274f5cc96e63972baab4cb: I begin to understand your plan. We've covered feathers and arrowheads now; what next?
textByHashes.d0d6cde61336250190bce48503e9526847218007: They will try to kill me, though, and I can't fight back!
textByHashes.1809cc032db483763d736f315f2b773c4672e6e7: Nothing really; I just decided to talk to you in case you have any great advice for me.
textByHashes.022a203afcdbe607e6df18ad1f57d4b294778e6f: Well, I tried to hack the trees with my axe, but it just bounced off the trunk! It did all seem all-too-convenient to work on the first try.
textByHashes.de10246c4bda6874bd8ccb0ea4d1810b7dd7d9e7: I'm not exactly addicted to picking my nose, but I do think I'll pass on that method.
textByHashes.e02b3b9d81b2a2ed898869675b3d388817dfbab5: Oh dear, I hope he doesn't want me to buy one of his ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs he sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.df2fd23a1e11166daab100216502abe9d93ff937: Oh dear, I hope she doesn't want me to buy one of his ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs he sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.465dd6908085b9a0a9d0ada099e206f1e5a9473c: Oh dear, I hope he doesn't want me to buy one of her ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs he sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.f6fa1b23063a45da0d1acd7066f34ab5bb0ce6a0: Oh dear, I hope she doesn't want me to buy one of her ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs he sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.30f9ca9ca2166a5a28ab300ad9f20c33c55c84dc: Oh dear, I hope he doesn't want me to buy one of his ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs she sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.8cb8b692c9ba3c5e0e84aa0d9fef9c77a1178f22: Oh dear, I hope she doesn't want me to buy one of his ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs she sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.54ca1fdb970cb66e38e83dba2293b03e8278e1ee: Oh dear, I hope he doesn't want me to buy one of her ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs she sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.7a2b1242b306721a61e1e9e6292e37644a246f4d: Oh dear, I hope she doesn't want me to buy one of her ridiculous fashion accessories. Those earmuffs she sells make heroic adventurers into a laughing stock.
textByHashes.9e74bcf4ca4c91328a1142fd8a1bfc9e6e4a0481: I'm here about a quest. Ava said she saw you hanging around the moving trees near Draynor Manor.
textByHashes.fa13bde29a8fb1ac5003d9c96e1fd96ba25ea039: I think I need some of the wood from them, but my axe just bounced off the trunk.
textByHashes.08d5a5bfe9e7a60577e41a14b84ca7556ec27eed: Okay, so I'll see whether I can spare an axe and a symbol. Thanks.
textByHashes.96a85adea12e5990821a28a20820462a986a85c1: Hello, I'm here about those trees again.
textByHashes.ffa4826985da8614f69f0265c8a0fec0ac480dac: Turael, the Slayer Master, told me what to do - with no earmuffs, spiky helmets or other laughable headgear involved.
textByHashes.ac65b0b84ddbbc1a67f8d36dfaead5224eeb0fa5: Aya, the Slayer Master, told me what to do - with no earmuffs, spiky helmets or other laughable headgear involved.
textByHashes.ee34b2b36f68612cfe43d99afc32a659561c5c5c: I think I'm ready to cut those trees now.
textByHashes.8f240b6042c3dd7bb237d641332b8f76c0bb1108: I have that undead wood at last. Well, twigs anyway.
textByHashes.eb9172b8b84abff7193ce5dec36f24a9b389f6b9: I'd say they didn't grow on trees, but I guess you'd just be sarcastic about my sense of humour.
textByHashes.1bdaed3f0860dd8b11414de61928303ee2b98f0f: I'd like to look at those research notes now, unless you have translated them without me?
textByHashes.a48b4b31b523881f59ef1dc76e11a32b6af1e25c: I'd find it slightly inconvenient, I'm sure.
textByHashes.187d0a2d73ad2066ef2968946802ee4d81d0e923: I seem to have lost the research notes.
textByHashes.73816ca70b6793828f99ca80bcfc09f4f59274e5: I have the notes but haven't translated them yet. Any hints?
textByHashes.0c92dc96abaa8b8afb1bee9581cd3d82c8092260: I've translated those notes. See? I'm not just a thuggish moron like you seem to think.
textByHashes.8ebfab6513bdb4ce3defe7b591dd074e96675709: I can see why you don't have any assistants; you're not exactly easy to work with.
textByHashes.d27dd8def9bf4a678705989ffbe5832e9dade6de: Really? How would you know this strange detail?
textByHashes.52191bcfd5b1f0ff1dd2ee47d381175a7b9310bd: So what do I do with this pattern again?
textByHashes.e9d2e03cd0baedf6a3be5473bcab213034df05eb: The pattern seems to have vanished from my pack... not my fault, of course.
textByHashes.909c28c4e7116a46d3a12718086f6debc60da4f9: Well, yes, although I seem to have mislaid it.
textByHashes.de32b7ff6b04dde52b659d142445e4b8e6aa89d1: Why do I sense sarcasm somewhere here?
textByHashes.8c78c377ee2a17c3a844b568bfd7aec821e2f17e: I passed my archaeology exam at the Digsite!
textByHashes.c6e45e658ae0496bab56047029054d461868c74a: What can I do in the city?
textByHashes.cf8169eab216c74773613ea57699ac8b24bbb48f: Why did you decide to open the city?
textByHashes.c5b00d9f30dc7a1f70322731019add4e3e431713: Hi Zanik. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.fe7c12006c5512a3bb0a38f38d1fec141bb9a729: Ur-tag asked me to help out with the dig. I have an archaeology qualification!
textByHashes.ba21536fb6ca7de6d4e22ec5d9c71039732ec4f0: And I lost my specimen brush.
textByHashes.5285d72ffb957b738f7a491949fe0d8dbf88d00e: I haven't got any more yet.
textByHashes.bbba271f6072a9bdb05ff1025628c6d522fdee0b: I need to do something else for a bit.
textByHashes.57c2377efa7bd2eafb111ca02416a0064e3e879c: Yes, I talked to the generals in the Goblin Village.
textByHashes.5893ed12954deca1923fa5eac357ee12c073748c: Yes! Now we're going to go to the Goblin Village to ask the surface goblins about it!
textByHashes.52e505991084d0cd6b0557ea71c169aa323cc24f: We're trying to take this ancient goblin mace to the Goblin Village on the surface. Do you think you could help us to get there?
textByHashes.b4d6e9a86b5ca36015a711fead148973729a7dd1: These goblins fight all the time, Zanik. Come on, Wartface and Bentnoze are both in the big hut.
textByHashes.0466a7dc9e4e88dfb58eb68ec8da6d920371bc7c: Can you tell us anything about this mace?
textByHashes.86086b2975fedba46fa50c397aa491d60625cefd: The Dorgeshuun don't have quite the same attitude to the gods as you on the surface do.
textByHashes.15cde55300d1d2d69290cbffd3d612c3237093c2: There are two snipers up there.
textByHashes.98fd8b4bfb2ff3fbb809653efeedabdaa6e65ee9: We don't have time for this! Why don't I take both warriors?
textByHashes.55cfc5fc5f82e59cc743040256d3a22142394453: You've got to stop the train! Sigmund is planning something terrible down there!
textByHashes.be39650f78d63a8c4c316008ea3fcdbd858b6661: He's probably just gone to get reinforcements. He'll be back in a few moments with more guards.
textByHashes.9eb9ce91652cf4675f00fadc4841771261cbf02a: All in a day's work for an adventurer like me!
textByHashes.0ecefea39faced19b3c6a36a277a3346da65d207: I am indeed. Just exploring the savannah.
textByHashes.1d7e98a74dfcf88f703002a64248b8e254d11672: Could I hunt with the guild?
textByHashes.a144cc2f4bf59221bd4a195df6a32925ed9c6d50: Can I help you with anything?
textByHashes.6261ea5fd2a5ff0593571c32e07dfe053b077204: Great! Point me in her direction and I'll get cracking!
textByHashes.9c4da2f6120fb5e24ae54922cef7a960dec93571: I'm not sure I have the time for that right now.
textByHashes.255a8e0627c8cafee1a705e49dadf400f361dca2: Are you free to talk about my quest?
textByHashes.83bd249498452e8b3475980fd741240d5bf97ded: I see. Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.a7eae72ab18a1436363f694173e29f141ba5316f: Well actually, I heard there might be something I could help you with?
textByHashes.497c5ad0b875dbaf20399ee7b3259bb5b77ecf4b: Hi Verity. I heard there might be something I could help you with?
textByHashes.35783b4e796d608f118c8a5c78dfbfa8079712a8: Something a little birdy may have told Apatura?
textByHashes.3f3e65cb47ddd0ed1c23bd7ebe977b0a6c9263ac: Do you normally keep track of the hunters here?
textByHashes.710edc3ee2ec67b5a615aecf8ceb68924363e9a4: Could anyone else have put Fox onto a hunt?
textByHashes.890b043acd220b96ab60bcee4620b3b50652df73: I'll follow up with her then.
textByHashes.b916d1d9912a2423652ad656d33b8087785e9c46: Not yet. I'll have a chat to her now.
textByHashes.ff9abd024ef6a61fac7a1cc456e6ce5f3a2e76a3: They were... It wasn't an actual bird was it?
textByHashes.1d6fe739b406f274c31a022dfc2f48f2560df7cb: That's not quite how I'd word it... but how did you know?
textByHashes.e8543dd82fdc185a0467b99620b25cd2640fac33: Right... So did you send Fox out to do something?
textByHashes.c266bec6324de1b9200622878827cbb6f4a5dff9: Well then I guess the first step is to work out what he went to get. Could I take a look at Kiko's bed?
textByHashes.d16ca20940daf9b12db8d50da7247968020ef5b5: Could I borrow it when I have a free hand to take it?
textByHashes.68126c9c19a4c67e0bca3f93089675252201f1d6: Could I borrow it to have a go at distracting him?
textByHashes.7302a6e47b6841eb42ebfe77bea560caa5a08e31: Not yet. Could I grab that mouse to distract him with?
textByHashes.1fc332970c35fee96282c9e19cfc97421e3815b9: Not yet. I'll get to it now.
textByHashes.b8ac301da724a6abb15908580cca6c59a5e2d8d1: Not yet. Do you happen to have that mouse to distract him with?
textByHashes.c1e1fdd902a96915a200fcdbc84e276db63a1039: I managed to have a look at that bed. I've never seen such luxury material for a cat bed before.
textByHashes.d4ded073d8b6469af248c9ec5852ecec7886137d: I'm guessing it's the actual fur itself that Fox will be looking to replace. It looks like he cut a small bit off. I don't suppose you know where he'd have gone to get that.
textByHashes.0cf4019fc76c7d185fc276139f1cfbf00cd6f41d: In that case, I'd better get out there then.
textByHashes.f8fd460d02df95a0f7a8ff471a32e80b513d0d6b: I haven't yet. You said he might be hunting pyre foxes, right?
textByHashes.00b3b67941c894cf4408f11a619399de230467fb: It seems like Fox is trying to find something to repair Kiko's bed with.
textByHashes.65ffdf20ee3afdb315757ea97a1ef94c9cf82520: I checked in with Verity and apparently Fox has gone missing.
textByHashes.82c8add24ce83e8429391cba156b933afcbaf803: How did you know Wolf was involved?
textByHashes.414c2c56b3b1ecbe0a6272bf6f2a5d8efb43d7f2: That's spot on! How did you know?
textByHashes.a1e6d2c8097269fbf8e283903a3f97e984f2b22b: Are you Fox? Everyone's worried about you.
textByHashes.658ba175c210cb844e5dd18cdded2b41e798d683: Can I help you? Maybe patch you up?
textByHashes.7aeee1925fde49e0cfdf280610580f1551d2905b: Stay with me, Fox! Where are these plants?
textByHashes.ae80e6d986468406aac76f3d2798329be2135137: And what am I making with them?
textByHashes.72bf82d008c037b7c44f418051b18552180bab51: I think I've got them both.
textByHashes.d75b45984d8ac5f21d6a5a7016ec9d2145a7c657: Fox has been injured out in the savannah!
textByHashes.2f3cb9cdfeae0c191943e643fe6c946337799a4f: He said he was attacked by an unknown assailant.
textByHashes.2c4656ad3948f3462323e8aaded8b19792e13544: He should be fine once I help him make a poultice for the wound.
textByHashes.edbd8cafd8318bdf4549e550110f82dacd93c094: I've found Fox. He's been injured by something out in the savannah.
textByHashes.6c11acdd28ee9b668e4b5d6d02813922bd53e2fd: I'm going to do what I can to make sure he's okay.
textByHashes.c627bbe2462e6f6bbc85c7714f7d116f8cc127ba: He's been injured out in the savannah, but I'll do my best to make sure he makes it back.
textByHashes.cff49f8d99af220d7a134827c031b725576aba71: I don't think I need any more leaves from this bush.
textByHashes.6f7794677648bc07072dbac43405e4e875ab88e3: I have that poultice here for you.
textByHashes.ad74573476af7eae14f4b7302e5ccb26c624e7fb: Happy to help. Now, how did you get on finding what you needed to fix Kiko's bed?
textByHashes.a30763807a54a75034bbc756f18cdb6c3479482c: Do you think someone attacked you for it, or was it just an opportunist looting you?
textByHashes.887fe62437e9460ecc5cb071ba9beb81d33bc563: I suppose I could. Especially if it goes towards repairing that cat's bed and getting you back to the guild.
textByHashes.cc4e40643cbfa2ca5ba21657b500ae5bee156a36: Where in the outskirts can I find her? And... what exactly do we need, again?
textByHashes.ff98ce18169153db3e490bae41fb083629931afe: I appear to have lost the sample you gave me...
textByHashes.f87fb4a90c9be70f4d0e99f2fa6873512c44f9bf: Ah. It seems I don't have room for it.
textByHashes.7b16a73549375e1857153430be4b368618efdd85: I don't suppose you've got another sample of Kiko's bed for me to take to Atza?
textByHashes.e8f4aae8146bd8530977b1eb6c9f6157686c232b: That's convenient! Usually I'm the one that's always ready for these situations.
textByHashes.df25091db8a7bd9c8b513996f0cb601efa51c054: We're getting there. I should have everything sorted very soon.
textByHashes.3f7ea4fcb795b8e6b41e02ae6da2f8c52b2cbc4e: He's doing well. He's got me doing a few things for him whilst he recuperates.
textByHashes.679a82350063466d9bd632c0cae8c97886da7c22: I'm still working on it, but I'm getting there.
textByHashes.1ad21ddbcfac7e7fad1cca8a8d68fea51520cbaa: Hi there. You must be Atza. I heard you're the person to talk to about getting some material to match a sample?
textByHashes.b8414f86bd1f3b3b719d60788442b4bdfc518903: Your friend Fox was going to bring this sample to you, but he's been a little... waylaid.
textByHashes.169f28c8e1c030d0bdc2a242964c13c2ec524f43: I don't seem to have it with me.
textByHashes.bb40633f36214d0f80ddfeea3ad5321ec5bc2c62: Shall I just wait here then?
textByHashes.0fece9882f2967d258bce73fb83fd6e3b34bb7dd: That's funny. He didn't mention that to me.
textByHashes.e58141677065c82e5d8070b5b9db88a1486c5ca0: I suppose so. Where do I start?
textByHashes.8c6b200dc7db786696c3700763e475eb1b4858d6: Hello again. I've given Atza the fur sample.
textByHashes.51f5cfadc63eefbd1f7f71ccc5cf0022c2758c05: Not yet. I should check back in with her.
textByHashes.d97eebbbe8c520fd21a18d6a2c9d145419852f98: Well, he actually got attacked on his way over here.
textByHashes.23a9f8d1e270cb250f4b3ea4fcdfc453d7fab37d: Oh he'll be alright. He was on the mend when I left him.
textByHashes.7b0da6070e221c28662e9597de93a0a5987a1ffc: Now that's done, did you manage to find the material?
textByHashes.e4860a0a10cae136c21e501e412aaf585c5e2d72: Could I get a replacement for that fur? I managed to lose it.
textByHashes.653c8974185741edd55b66e30c6bacd2be06f741: Hello again. I got the fur from Atza. She's certainly... something.
textByHashes.5c8f49a66d8c9bbf311aa16806a0dfd96524bdcf: Want me to save the world while I'm at it?
textByHashes.bf75f154026a319c7e97f216c7a298260ea52841: Well, that's just the adventuring way! If something isn't tied down, I'll grab it, and probably lose it at some point too!
textByHashes.cf32b0986c89c50718770cee39ffe5090171023a: Not yet. I still need to get around to it.
textByHashes.33a660c2841f356c3f8adc256cae00ffeb847f76: He's injured, but he's on the mend. I expect he'll be back in here soon enough.
textByHashes.95e07977bd9ab7cc9d186fede7787339d3a140dd: I'll go and speak to her now.
textByHashes.54397352dbf5adae094ad62b01f7cff387eb25af: Just about sorted. He'll be back here very soon.
textByHashes.095a2bfe688352a7ead79868b4a92a94a5acb853: I have. She was glad to hear that you'll be back soon.
textByHashes.569081675643445ea9bb33c8b336eccb59a95d6e: Looks like the Fox situation is all sorted.
textByHashes.7e1445542ed0b4910bda9d4f6760df82847386f4: So, basically Wolf sent Fox to get fur to fix Kiko's bed, but he actually needed to talk to Atza, and Atza needed me to...
textByHashes.072b7217e38e36a8e928a7642131d65a6b1a34d3: Hello there. What are you doing all the way out here?
textByHashes.360ffeb90a59685dfdc59d4cf0c20d4c955a9fa0: A door? I see doors all the time. What makes this one so special?
textByHashes.5da53c10e4aeb270bfad786fd4ffbf78b1b5fb47: Wow! Ancient ruins? Are you an archaeologist or something?
textByHashes.350f87143b66fb033903b113a4a042c3695ad99b: I'm afraid I haven't. Are you looking for a way into the ruins?
textByHashes.90857584cb831623f79bda0f6552f89320be5af0: Oh dear. Do you have another plan to get in?
textByHashes.9b919d25c8ad970c0f8be6893c4c3b5a1c78fce8: A chance to uncover ancient ruins doesn't happen every day! Of course I'll help! I'm by the way. How do you plan to get in?
textByHashes.1207bf58cc8a361317275c144e9eda778b638e69: Where can I find your old team, and how will they help?
textByHashes.dba612a2aee64838f831d066b471a6881f7dc248: That doesn't sound too safe. What if we damage the ruins? Surely it's better to go slower and preserve as much as we can?
textByHashes.5f1efe0eba418fbc7a164cdc32721373e98c5314: I could do it! I'm quite strong myself.
textByHashes.986e62c561359d654abd4d8a765d35c8f2ebf190: Oh okay... Where can I find him?
textByHashes.1f1ee5fbec94e672884310a5225b3d7e59976c4a: You have a rather interesting group of friends... but if they get us into the ruins, I'm all for it.
textByHashes.569fa9bae626d511d398d9f5257eb2a97c297656: Seems like you're in a bit of a pickle. Have fun with that.
textByHashes.45e0f10f8fbb07c0407c49a72c3f9cd09f0418d9: Where can I find the entrance to the ruins?
textByHashes.3f0bd4926de589f3694ae735a3aec791f3f194a2: Hello there. I'm and I'm looking for a man named Checkal.
textByHashes.63e60e6f56e9d29c08007178caf2d77e22635e07: I was told to come find you. Willow has found a new digsi...
textByHashes.949520bf74d98993bdbd953e7c1614abaef87668: But we need your help! She's found a new archaeological digsite and needs you to help clear the entrance.
textByHashes.1c823b6354ee87d794b6ed0f708da0c48bab447b: She said there could be some ancient ruins, even an untouched hoard of gold and treasure!
textByHashes.46f2232d61c7fa79b0610bc70aeebdb75808324a: Well Checkal, I don't mean to brag, but there are few people in Gielinor stronger than me.
textByHashes.45670a2f9185f34e34036fd9d9f229c405a1bfc4: Well that shouldn't be too hard. I'm pretty strong.
textByHashes.c4718be860d4f24f816710783c224e8edad255ae: Oh, I'm not sure about that...
textByHashes.4c7e1dabdbdecaf0a466a2d9dd06f87026dc5af4: How do you know he'll train me?
textByHashes.29ccb32a91923969ee43a2ccac7db06b554076fc: Alright then, I'll go speak to Atlas. Farewell.
textByHashes.986e2427a8748679943fb1bb7297aac6c26e33fd: I seem to have forgotten where Atlas is. Can you remind me?
textByHashes.cb6f4a656f7510350755433bf58cba623fb7892b: I've just come to talk to you. Checkal said you could train me. He said you're the strongest barbarian he knows.
textByHashes.a4eabe857f95356e4ca5834c9d32d5cf947d909e: Well uh, he said he wouldn't...
textByHashes.d99e8e113e319d48aba9a4fcb64607438dd1c9f2: Please don't scare me like that.
textByHashes.0ddb2c4d941ac0fabec56cae21a6c345095da5a8: Oh really? How much would this usually cost?
textByHashes.0ec72e02dfee7785c5aad6842d33d63ac68289e4: That was exhausting... I've never worked so hard in my life!
textByHashes.a69ae6a1cae78ecbbe63614b52eda18135406852: Not right now, I am a bit busy.
textByHashes.dfd5988464b476765ebc68acf9e99c562a9a9419: It was fun, I'd like to do it again.
textByHashes.bc912c3832118d86ed72200eddfe8c0753c5905e: Oh, sorry I was too excited...
textByHashes.6837ce53de7b4b53fe06bb2e6ff4885c01f18076: Thanks for that workout. I can see why you normally charge people so much.
textByHashes.f52c653df6f42c1a2860ca52b602262406df4a74: Just about, but it was a real struggle.
textByHashes.cb9aff5b4a51d035f69f3f58f731f5686d44b440: Fantastic! Willow said she'd meet you by the entrance, on the west side of Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.6d662be1911f8abd682c2c6b0fc5859a3031f04f: What an exhausting workout. I hope the others aren't as much effort to recruit.
textByHashes.20da5660f2e93c34e5fbbbf727f3a3baabe450f3: Well, that's everyone. I guess I should head off the entrance on the west side of Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.e351daf8c6c6e0591e0197b6652c104b8e7deb16: What did you want me to do again?
textByHashes.21ea59b83f5272631c3449435a279123639300d9: Do you think you'll be able to handle all these rocks?
textByHashes.5e816a5e3a90970f33ecc3fa2a26ba1816208ac5: Fine... I'll get you a beer.
textByHashes.8392a80ba0b6f8e1d89f14075609e59c6dc311b6: It just so happens I've got a drink you can have.
textByHashes.8cf42c7f9e27631d49afa629a4ebd4b6e15eba6f: Willow sent me. She needs your help with a job.
textByHashes.c3aa196148d9f123b1d83cd5d7364ee699f06e1c: I thought you were a team of archaeologists?
textByHashes.184ebef467807454e8265c8ba738294e0b51ebd5: Willow sent me to get you. She's found a new digsite and needs your expert knowledge on explosives.
textByHashes.164d5ef3bd888b13d45c6cbfdb0bb494c7e02db0: Okay then... I guess the first round goes to me.
textByHashes.af5f49e9a9c9ead16044922f3bfda37bbbcf51b4: I won! That's two rounds to me, so you have to help.
textByHashes.c4a23cd54d480e5db099bbcfc93516eee69f6559: Whatever, let's just play the last round.
textByHashes.b8ee5c9472fd63046f15c7567279d624eb621314: Are you okay Burntof? I clearly beat you. Check my hand again.
textByHashes.14bec9d16724c4e7357ad349582ec195ffa80d32: That was interesting, but that's Burntof recruited. On to the next person.
textByHashes.b5cde04d685f3579d9bfea5576d2fcd2490673cc: You managed to make your way over to the ruins then?
textByHashes.3976b785bdfdbd37645c214f33a7fd4f3a1af4f2: I thought you would pass out on your way.
textByHashes.69867a62ed032e5cb480d9faf8866cfa09d6e9b2: Are you sure you'll be able to handle the dynamite in your current state?
textByHashes.505c62504e021c728cf01d5e445ca5022a42e6e6: I'm looking for a man named Marley. Have you seen him?
textByHashes.db755e2d65f7e099108ff844f33c01b78f5f9361: Oh really? Do you know where I could find him?
textByHashes.e8ef924a281b4a84dfca4ab2f24093ccb32ab6f1: Great, so I'm dealing with a criminal!
textByHashes.31b2d0fefdc9bf000a8c4d9aad9971d7ae523ce9: Perfect. I'll go look for him.
textByHashes.b150330c53742ae9c46f9fdd715c6a315df1f489: Hey there. Would you happen to be Marley?
textByHashes.920b776e97589eac053507be5a9c784df629d28b: Uhm, no? What robbery? Wizard robes?
textByHashes.9fd1cd9a38f184e0895a18ca19f6bf75dc135e06: Look, I'm not here with the city guard, Willow sent me to find you. She needs your help.
textByHashes.1e51ab6d3acdb7dcab41a93c3c0d440258b2e2e3: Are you sure? She said you were old pals.
textByHashes.8dc98fbbcf200953582db5adc10add6417dec445: You're too hungry... to remember your friend?
textByHashes.5a36959757cb42212e1d87b3926909f1d907f1d2: [sigh]... would you like me to get you something to eat, to help jog your memory?
textByHashes.c3fdd5fff6bdd7e0d418b7098dae68e232718a7d: Fine, I'll be back in a...
textByHashes.0a414ec0e4820b9baf0547bbd66b7adbc0c3133e: Why don't you go and get one then?
textByHashes.71ecf1ffe2589e5b7e8765e6aa039ab99695d555: [sigh]... Fine. If I go get you this sandwich, will you help Willow?
textByHashes.ad45fc27c0ef8bc2dbbd513d6967fc660ad90d92: Alright. I'll be back momentarily with your sandwich.
textByHashes.8768375e34b903d737f8229dd6653f5af22191d0: I'm still working on it. Where did you say you got them from?
textByHashes.9ae871276831a4ef0be1d117deb4b3c2e04f21d1: I'll go speak to them, then.
textByHashes.daca54ff27138a6244c27540ac19c5eb75709918: Hey, Marley sent me in here for a Steak sandwich.
textByHashes.84ce632c46f783ca5d6fcc2dcfb3ecadc3f2eead: Woah okay, sorry! Forget I ever mentioned him.
textByHashes.1b01932ba4de70e94f95455ca90af89b1b3bd69f: I was wondering if you'd be able to make me a Steak sandwich?
textByHashes.adbc2a96f4a249b684166aba30fbf599eb0352f1: Oh... uhm... no. It's for me?
textByHashes.5dba89f6ed064dd186b5062d933582be282a08d3: At least tell me why you hate him so much?
textByHashes.f1bb29e36c9909fa6dbadb74f4ad1589bdaf704b: Well, fair enough, but it's just one sandwich. He's not even in Varrock anymore. He's moved off to Edgeville.
textByHashes.9d3c0f698fb566463b8daef0426295e145e8d335: Please, I really need Marley's help and he'll only offer it if I get him a Steak sandwich.
textByHashes.23d18e2566ef4621285472d31e853b88ef565530: Great! I can't imagine it's that hard to make.
textByHashes.aad1b1555d306cb6b38ced97df8a047c71cadb80: Sorry! Of course it is. What's the recipe then?
textByHashes.b4a82b2ecbf222e9d071000cb47918c1e59e5c39: Wow... is that it? Some beef between a loaf of bread?
textByHashes.25f02109d6175e046eb4bc86ebf6da398adeb29a: I forgot the recipe to make a Steak sandwich.
textByHashes.b8d0b1765e7b74e86ba3d592572d97b1a9fddfa8: I've managed to make myself a Steak sandwich.
textByHashes.0b7acf29b15510f109ba6b2fcd78bee481821167: Hey Marley. I've managed to get your Steak sandwich.
textByHashes.be0c2d5b8e33c304e3a0721efc211f979a062d64: Finally! You can find her on the west side of Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.7435284ba2997cfb16f91ab6c4efa57e8c4787bd: Marley is certainly an interesting character. Hopefully the next team member is more respectable.
textByHashes.3130c76cfbe9d5e146d994c403b56a10f501d3e5: I don't find being your errand boy very funny.
textByHashes.831be879a7cc38300e54056cf6a683943291692b: That's everyone gathered. Interesting company for an archaeologist to keep...
textByHashes.6abe6c1d5c861f444e84b41ba8dad9aba88da7e1: I'm ready as I'll ever be. Let's head in.
textByHashes.7b954eb4a23b0cf90b4020001e73b2915643122b: Wow, this place is amazing. I can't believe this was hidden away.
textByHashes.823514da6c9c780f5650db58850e0008198a5d1a: I wonder how long it's been left untouched for.
textByHashes.871954e562875963ce35ba529bf030d4f5f7fab3: You don't find it exciting? As an archaeologist, I thought you would be thrilled at this discovery?
textByHashes.7040372b8f65725a276784bc6cf7fa942e8cda98: It's not about the money though, right? We've potentially discovered the long lost ruins of an ancient civilisation!
textByHashes.e505a6eed92331bbc9e59e4d6917f833ecb99f52: So this entire time, you've just been using me to help break into these ruins in hopes of finding someone else's treasures.
textByHashes.fe8b6837960338658a426776040824a9ee0a5ddc: I can't believe they ran so quickly. I suppose I should take care of this thing.
textByHashes.34afc7185f0bb5144650a98f577ee99238e21322: I need a little bit more time to prepare.
textByHashes.3570fb423d798b3346a031d479616c559ab8bd52: That monster showed up at the perfect time. I would have been toast if Willow and her gang had their chance to attack.
textByHashes.7e60d72a63091621ae3cd67bb9727a0ba2f58fa8: Speaking of which, maybe they left something behind I can salvage some kind of reward from.
textByHashes.064190b0f58b62934f3962fff624935d20cae7fc: Looks like Willow left a bag behind. Maybe there's something in it I could take.
textByHashes.8db48121bec0c47ff7720cb09686e8ac2f027b0f: What was that noise? Please don't be another rock monster...
textByHashes.ceb1812eb749d61ecee26a4050d53225e389b639: Wow. I honestly didn't expect to see a dwarf in these ruins.
textByHashes.aa7556cca18a889377eb2493ce34d70d78be9057: To be honest, it was all a bit of an accident.
textByHashes.b35fb86a153b14923797486115f456349c0c51fc: There was a gang of... well, I thought were archaeologists, but it turned out they were grave robbers.
textByHashes.1427074946cb59a58811b5f865de244e8ed06705: I helped them clear the entrance to these ruins and we worked our way inside, only to wake up a monster! They ran off and left me to defeat it.
textByHashes.6336d43a06c7b805f8aa0ff4f3bde5eaf956c675: Well Ramarno, I'm , and you have me at a loss for words! I'd have never even imagined there would be a whole city down here.
textByHashes.015c16da500d75309efc1c0bd293a3c8351809bf: I guess I didn't help with that. Sorry about breaking into your home and killing your guardian.
textByHashes.12c49df3ab79d4306cf513861fb24e711e86672c: So this is where you scampered off to after the monster awoke?
textByHashes.984c565d2600f33bbc202d6e64ef2d2ef8631d23: Oh really? You threatening to kill me was just a misunderstanding?
textByHashes.b5e9679ec9b7155316dc2baacf66cd7cfdbfba11: Barely... I had to defeat that monster on my own!
textByHashes.7e16bb700dad561eecd9208251a9072b7fcd3d2c: What are you doing out here, anyway?
textByHashes.def4cfe412c047585a197cd63b20cff6b7dad68d: Ah, of course... scoping out your next grave to rob.
textByHashes.6934c89de708bf83205b661af864666990524989: Hello, Checkal. Why didn't you tell me about Willow?
textByHashes.f59edd96340ace4f4adf49178d1c1247b23c74b7: How you holding up Burntof? Must have had quite the fright when you woke that monster.
textByHashes.6b012697bdb466c9ca1bd146e62948604621ecbc: Well, when I defeated the monster, an Imcando dwarf opened the barred door...
textByHashes.8f1d7a5bfa594489134a09a3c668289548971ba1: Wow, the desert really suits you Marley.
textByHashes.6344720b133b80d9a69e54354888eb9c06298f22: Better now I don't have to deal with you. Enjoying life in the desert?
textByHashes.7cc048eb7282bb94382c7e2e901c0843f16cacec: Oh what a shame! Poor Marley's going to starve as he doesn't have anyone to make his sandwiches... So sad.
textByHashes.e370756473402ea589ab86f750b68c8a9b0a0ec7: Make some room? But I've not even decided if I want this... whatever it is.
textByHashes.70e0991368c690e71166c757c9cb9b11c15e6529: Okay... I'll be back soon then.
textByHashes.18e3a925f45e5e66400da9ddfdaeef283c8888f2: Thanks for the offer, but I'll pass.
textByHashes.8d83cd0070f6311b3a50bf7ccf132fcba07cdb7c: Maybe I should try it on again.
textByHashes.a98da8b2332118be0125cb24a5de95a66596a630: I know you! You're Maisa, that spy from Al Kharid. But you're meant to be in Menaphos!
textByHashes.55273b79b16daccd54a77b7204212b69a6e64b61: But how did you get out of the city?
textByHashes.7d07b7379f547dab692f0dd9cf3a1a260aadaee7: So you hid yourself among them? I see. Why are you out here though? And why did you send me that message?
textByHashes.63a15b554d05e84f8bb7b0bb1cdbb05eee117062: Brave of you to assume that I ever actually know what I'm doing.
textByHashes.692334b3e8e4680c1dd015f139fb95efac7724ee: Right... so what are these strange happenings?
textByHashes.777ed30bfc28fb30f913113abbbb08c3efcd3446: They've been bypassing the quarantine? How?
textByHashes.000ec964d287b40ff30ea191cb27c39a8a5b4662: Interesting. I think I need to see this for myself.
textByHashes.f792da04469542599a1f581d618c964865bf41c9: Look at them! How long have they been doing this?
textByHashes.f216674b1b6caea6ec6662a13f55c60f03bec5e7: How weird. Can we get a closer look?
textByHashes.07048d2e8d7f61b471aea5876792d49f0962cdf0: I'm going to have a look around.
textByHashes.c1e8fdc87810f0f05588e5b90ed1a5dbacd4f5ae: I'll try, but low profile isn't really one of my specialties.
textByHashes.166dbd5377b0f09b89d9ed7b7b800b021b85eff8: What are these strange happenings you mentioned?
textByHashes.96a58bd6380dd8adb1cc9c1a825c0f446416c9dd: Interesting. I'd better report back to Maisa.
textByHashes.b5087540afcbaa1d813ef2ade5dbae8516093501: Hmm... this seems familiar... I'd better report back to Maisa.
textByHashes.b17057ef254b2f82395d8395816965a028512df7: Mistress? You mean the Devourer! This is all her doing, isn't it? I'd recognise her work anywhere.
textByHashes.cba3467f588267baabdbc4ddcf13ef5c5f7c2390: To be fair, I did warn you.
textByHashes.29e30d98c3df9b53a0e51f8c5be5bee509230269: Sort of. I still don't know why these people are here, but I do know who sent them.
textByHashes.71dec14aa34a5b05b1a2c9dca4c0c80568fbd1d3: She has hypnotic powers. She's the one that put them in this trance! I know it better than most. I was unlucky enough to experience it myself back in Sophanem.
textByHashes.99542348a4943ac61305d3772497c883a3f7294d: You were hypnotised, but you're free now. Do you remember anything about what happened to you?
textByHashes.4b569f862a79b381bdcc8fc4f4d22ebdcc956c61: I know what you're going through. Try to think back to before you were hypnotised. What's the last thing you remember?
textByHashes.fa8a6db07837869d671928fac5d71c0352d6cbb4: What does she want from the tomb?
textByHashes.dee3d3eff6f781d750423ec0214154a5d19094f9: That's okay. You've been a great help.
textByHashes.5be0b97552d1ab4d5cdedec4f0a093f25347820c: That sounds like those scarab creatures from the tunnels below Sophanem.
textByHashes.ee7308640f8fe2821818d15c3b19561f3cc8d38a: You sound like you still don't believe me.
textByHashes.5039e2924e8b0c684dc883ebeba3e3c61a378eea: Should we reach out to Osman about this?
textByHashes.17b752e4b333581c2ad9f55b0db2d939bbd3dd34: Kaleef? He was the spy that was meant to relieve you, right? I thought you didn't even know him?
textByHashes.e07026af3d470a3c9269869910f0489c8b8e8be4: Fair enough... so what are our leads?
textByHashes.ca4bde3a5b8449464414954a32743fc8d3ff8aaf: What do you know about him?
textByHashes.3f35f0a2d49e744975aa9db90e3612b00f019cc5: If he's under Amascut's control, that could be a big problem. Do you know how we could get to him?
textByHashes.46282805ffb896df24f3a8cecb9e31c73400f7c5: We'll leave that lead for now then. What about the other one?
textByHashes.baa610d06c994500ab22286d013ca56d55ace92c: That would put the ruins directly east of here. All I see are cliffs.
textByHashes.9bc6f872d3af709c9cbf7b90dfb55fe7cad60cf3: Could be worth exploring, I guess.
textByHashes.73f112a16707f9be593a7f72a19a7d3bfbc3f2cb: Sure, but where do you even plan to start?
textByHashes.2ef5c975e205e225b37bb2e65c7c9e70fc404627: So what, you're going to cure the pox?
textByHashes.1533cea5f293bc36ad773f5c608daf73c3327de1: Surely if it were that simple, the High Priest would have done it by now.
textByHashes.035c4a1989cfc2db88e407c2f376804bf0098a96: Well, they could. But I imagine that would be considered quite rude.
textByHashes.287a74eea0018cc3d1d0760ff854813b1ae96c45: So what are these leads you mentioned?
textByHashes.03319e131de32ad6e2366e774c84dc8a92395290: Hello! You must be the scabarites I'm looking for.
textByHashes.da6691cdd89742dc4b499ae8240731b016775801: I'm guessing you're going to try and kill me now?
textByHashes.5fa24c95595b202b235e698acdf1a9d1fdb6ed68: I'll take the silence as a yes...
textByHashes.fa7bedf0b91d42f833ab67893b4ac1a17249721e: I was looking for some scabarites.
textByHashes.291963d7607cacf1a3d2149d86bb73c504e3c168: Do you know of Amascut, the Devourer?
textByHashes.7703d0c4a42deb4791b32a5c4c7598ec82cd7772: There's an old tomb south of here. Amascut has been excavating the entrance, and the scabarites have been helping her. She's looking for something inside, but I don't know what.
textByHashes.8b00f192036a45149fa92b30aa4e211ba11a65ae: You can help? Do you know of this tomb?
textByHashes.f07f73dd94445a02741d142fcfe03b72af720d8f: And what are the secrets in his tomb?
textByHashes.6a965047e458a024b2711a4e3a0cd0dfaf405e7f: And these weapons can help her?
textByHashes.02145b4734e5bd59465ba88093c2fe0c74d2fd58: Then I need to get into that tomb and stop her.
textByHashes.22945085701af08b866efd37e9a04da10c662b80: He might also know more about what Amascut is planning. I did free a guard from Amascut's control through combat. I could try that again.
textByHashes.82a0ee3980cebee684f954b25873e9ab8e87e9b7: Ah, that seems wise. What's this incantation?
textByHashes.499ce48a7f7ef4da6ed8d6c5dc26dd9f990b9fb0: And your father, Osmumten? You said he was the Pharaoh. What happened?
textByHashes.187c2160bd4faf5913aa29dad8fbabeb773229dc: There's not much left of Ullek now, or the sect.
textByHashes.0e94764c6c564090d63cde3e6b229e2d5c752ca1: What do you know about Amascut?
textByHashes.f29bdf47d85cc9568a7d9dd4182834637ba3d2b5: Okay... but you must have some idea?
textByHashes.2b2bc5549e180f63401e0b037487e961f129bae7: What's that got to do with Amascut?
textByHashes.e17c5868ae27e8c864fc57e8d4dfe90f2318be9e: So you think it had something to do with the Stern Judges?
textByHashes.1f7128b83e7cd31d220b153d49da37e9ec72dbd4: Tell me more about the war you mentioned.
textByHashes.566698a661f577eef709fcfd9d4b74c89ecb4b28: It wasn't really though, was it?
textByHashes.c9be8ba101070cd9b8694c95ff949545d84231fe: So how did the war end?
textByHashes.6cfa3533c6eedecf778cee18d5841f7b6da1a8f7: That doesn't really answer my question.
textByHashes.c87fa7fdd86a8885fc3eb0376cda7bd003a7b2e2: I need to get into your father's tomb and stop Amascut.
textByHashes.55626b370e2db59d6cfe6f49d71322921a09eff1: Hello again. How do I access the upper chamber?
textByHashes.46aaa910b4a6c8c48ab030d4711c456cfe2e4bf3: Fear not! I am here to rescue you!
textByHashes.60ae5f7c6919774721e2d916cb7e02fac053645a: Fine. We'll do it your way.
textByHashes.76ffde3eb7e51325c498aa5fc66e45a8fda213a5: It's alright. You were being controlled by Amascut, but you're free now.
textByHashes.016f2b8b080ca31d2a9a68e5be2c3c2188f24b81: I've been in your position. Don't worry, your memories will come back in time. Familiar places and objects can help them come back faster.
textByHashes.8eff73111f2daba1862b6b97df45ca070f8c5dac: I know the feeling. What did she have you do?
textByHashes.d0e9ae120222e0abb7c8cf7e41e918d4975aaaec: Osmumten's tomb. Who are these others you speak of?
textByHashes.3b2fa42325d81d4955a0d7b04a77cbc8ff8bd469: This isn't good. There're weapons in that tomb that can transfer divine power between beings. She must be planning to use them on the lesser deities.
textByHashes.99984e20d86a4faf07f693e77eadd00e1bd1f450: Don't worry, I'll make sure that doesn't happen.
textByHashes.7e9ffdc23223510bb41ca5e05a32459cc59daaab: I'll find a way. Do you have any other information that can help me?
textByHashes.19666e20bc29b8c0b3e0053aa6fd640e69d44099: We feared as much. Do you know what she wants with him?
textByHashes.916eb4a762d09266ff6a08b88bafc9792893ad8f: You caused the plagues? The cows and the pox as well?
textByHashes.63ea404cf4f14875a6cb31e105f716f17afc31b5: Hmm... what will you do now?
textByHashes.405c395ba0a9bc2a5c0cfe21b5204f14e8bc7c37: So you'll help me fight her?
textByHashes.15b81929e7be216d9277be89777b345ccbcd3082: Good to hear. Now, I'd better head over to Nardah. I have a friend there who needs to hear about all of this.
textByHashes.a86c945e343600bbc604587b9b7d71b1003c28f7: Do you have any other information about Amascut that could help me?
textByHashes.06d18f191c5c858087cd6420675afd26628b5c08: Does this mean you can rest now?
textByHashes.0c30786c4290d8c4a7d6e1b46f348066f31e9ddf: Is there anything I can do to help?
textByHashes.2de4113ce5b03c4b43e3eb4bdc3782cafeb2d3fa: Plenty. I discovered all sorts of things. How about you?
textByHashes.11033bf94e166ea36621b808ee2a1d518a81fb98: Yes! One time I used some to help this young couple. I gave one of them a cadava potion to appear dead.
textByHashes.f6d5f9641a998a0fa285eeb142503d352c41d900: It all went a bit wrong though, and he ended up with her cousin instead...
textByHashes.fbc4ea077c4d5313309baf4b8150cfc86e3a2b49: Oh, and I used one another time when I was helping My Arm!
textByHashes.1317649a2351415298a968c329dad48b0de16a5c: No, not my arm. My Arm! He's a troll! He needed to kill an old man, so we used a potion to fake it.
textByHashes.0b35c2e3343612a36bfb356d6181af7a882544bb: It all went a bit wrong though... again. That seems to happen quite often for some reason...
textByHashes.94565030cb41824b963f5678c985c558a819a15d: Like the spots from the pox! Are you saying that's what caused all the trouble? A rogue cadava bush?
textByHashes.947f91eeb79e467d09ca12c3e239fdf5a2c12e4e: Well that leads on to what I discovered in those ruins. I found the High Priest of Scabaras there, under Amascut's control. Turns out she had him and the scabarites cause the plagues in Sophanem.
textByHashes.2764a1662cde52a893ae9e1392d444d90d353d17: Amascut wanted an excuse to have Menaphos locked down. She's up to something there, but the High Priest of Scabaras didn't know what. However, he did confirm that Pharaoh Kemesis is under her control as well.
textByHashes.27465605d29c109c4eb3cd50120f042b5a565357: The thing is, now that I think about it, the High Priest of Scabaras didn't actually seem to be aware of the pox. I doubt he'd have been able to get hold of cadava bark either.
textByHashes.140049eec31d8b62923cb3c888a95797b1183863: The next bit is worse, I'm afraid. I found out what Amascut is looking for in that tomb. Apparently, there are two weapons in there that could grant her true godhood.
textByHashes.e862513bcc125f188960a9d478c4fa6efa689edf: I'm afraid so. She's managed to capture all four of the lesser gods. It's likely that her plan is to use the weapons to claim their power.
textByHashes.280b28a268c9c288b5e3cbf8129c9dc45934d862: I do have one bit of good news. I know an incantation that can free a person from her mind control. We can use it to free the people at the necropolis.
textByHashes.d88c82e74a87c12bc70ad4933616f9d00e46b600: Anything you need me to do?
textByHashes.a627deef0c8ea57c102074c5b0b37e935bf9219f: And I guess that leaves the Lily of the Elid for me. From the name, I assume they grow near the river?
textByHashes.4712eb1cc9e7d24d6d4e73f543320052f5ae61ea: I found the High Priest of Scabaras there, under Amascut's control. Turns out she had him and the scabarites cause the plagues in Sophanem.
textByHashes.1edc2ad9ce791e816ccf1feee103928cc9fadbdb: Where can I get a Lily of the Elid?
textByHashes.e42bc31ce06dd14953c1e86a81baa13a9829bc5c: Hello there crocodile. I think I'll call you Roger. You're looking very hungry, Roger.
textByHashes.2e1a4f941000e6f00b7d4c37072d29096000d17d: I think I'd better find something to distract you with before I try getting any closer.
textByHashes.d7e00cebed92bbe2411399327c8f963fb7359e82: Can I help with anything else?
textByHashes.722d7f0dafec39345ecd225b70bc2638ef7c8e0c: What do I need to do to this equipment?
textByHashes.28af051dc8b4c95cd65dd4a53a2310c8d35f96c8: Okay. I can deliver it to the High Priest of Icthlarin.
textByHashes.cbc3135907f20a06d4127835edda5413f865cbbe: Do you have that first batch of cure for me?
textByHashes.e26000d206f3113dd948c8e65e6d26a5fabf7471: I lost that crate you gave me.
textByHashes.c2fe81b67d1084f3fedbaeba08df08b51cf40160: Where do I need to take this crate?
textByHashes.c4087f146f5ccb9f95fe8576a707096352b51714: Hello. How are things going here?
textByHashes.8b3cab421a639e4e2fcdaf5dc9a4f3690c77693b: Well, I think I might be able to help with that.
textByHashes.4091a5c926901334896ff710a4e5d49dc26f58d0: Oh... I was meant to bring you something, but it seems I've forgotten it. I'll be right back.
textByHashes.add0b87057500e0570dce8ffd6927ecf05e5a3d7: If all goes well, the potions in there should cure the pox. Sophanem will finally be free of the plagues. This is just the first batch. More will come soon.
textByHashes.14791ad8ed010c56caaddfe7e83217a49d882c50: Well I just found a good herbalist. What did you try?
textByHashes.23c1a5b6270c4904da93443631d07a0a2ddc3c16: Right... Well I have some things to do down at the necropolis. I'll be back to see how the potions are working once I'm done.
textByHashes.15e70dc91a47b5a18ad0aeac1a733352d3f0ba12: I'm sure it won't take long. I'll be back to see for myself once I'm done at the necropolis.
textByHashes.ab6d48752f578cb243cb31ddbb27ccd9c630b4b6: I think so. I guess we'll see for sure soon.
textByHashes.0fbbf329ab89471c64556f2313ca16b3207c0928: It did when I used it on the High Priest of Scabaras, so we shouldn't have any issues here.
textByHashes.a2d3edc07970e89c748b711c24f30266349168d7: Amascut's hold on you all is at an end. Majaan, Manand, Almuk.
textByHashes.f2760c9fea9671bf11db1009dd9d1fa9ca0392ea: You were all enthralled by the Devourer, but you're free now. Things will be confusing at the moment, but your memories will return in time.
textByHashes.d0945bcc8fc25dfdd180633393588aab35eb3bdb: And time isn't on our side. Amascut is already in there looking for those weapons.
textByHashes.d4a9d608e87db425607b41641a87e6be6ea7fdc1: Are you sure? You've already been out here so long.
textByHashes.77ab2069d0dd8809f583daa54acfdaed34143b11: I've only been trying to help.
textByHashes.1f5b9a20d4fb31a798069808060ed42d43489aa7: You know, despite all your spying, Al Kharid and Menaphos aren't actually enemies.
textByHashes.7200587be14857c7849e5082ebb32692b2ae9104: Even if that's true, I don't see why the pox being cured is a problem.
textByHashes.06d08e4a734f934a71b5730d96f92f8b346d8ac5: There are larger forces at play here, Osman. That quarantine was helping them far more than it benefitted you.
textByHashes.6687065fb52a3abdb159ad0bcee1e8eed9e0b6d5: Amascut. She has control over Pharaoh Kemesis. She arranged the quarantine to keep her actions in Menaphos a secret.
textByHashes.7e6a6d5dcc2916383450c1ac0532387ee2fefe8c: That's why we made the cure. We need to get in there and find out what she's up to.
textByHashes.a931fa046be3dfc1d1d01665de431cc918cf83c5: You don't believe the gods exist?
textByHashes.b98891d3141484475ee94b14c6cfeeef694f9cfa: You're wrong, Osman. The Devourer's behind everything that's been happening down here, and the worst is yet to come. She's looking for some weapons. Ones that could grant her true godhood.
textByHashes.6fc239e09d185678164d4977aa8713f57b19521d: No. She's after something else in Menaphos. We don't know what... yet. The weapons are in a tomb to the south, and she's already in there. She could be using them right now.
textByHashes.68a0ba5109a1b7d0644981c2adbbcf5a08feadba: So do you believe Amascut is involved now?
textByHashes.2a98e73db7849688366893e393c2c1885ecc1ed1: Dare I ask for a 'thank you' this time?
textByHashes.25f26e6e9c4010d6d583c33982c28ce1f6257a7c: That's what I thought. Thanks, Osman.
textByHashes.824e3185275d8ad7ff5643ef9ead2a18bd792b2f: He seems to have been somewhat enlightened.
textByHashes.d87bdc3d661e3c4558a6d2b1e2bc807b5681d18f: After you left, we were attacked by one of Amascut's servants. I think they convinced Osman that there's more to all of this than he realised.
textByHashes.19b8f1f5c538ff7efeac7ed8952aef390b7d0771: Yes, the cure. Is it working?
textByHashes.dc9d33c80217e1d8567f1d176c38f35009b7874a: How long do you think we'll need to wait?
textByHashes.cf656731751328036eeb6cbc3b77a46115be9b91: Makes you wonder how much control he actually has left. Does he make any decisions for himself now, or is it all just Amascut?
textByHashes.5aeca48cc953d49f74d8be459f7d04c06f97d591: How are you doing, by the way?
textByHashes.87f360fc9053c3f7fc47735c512aec3b9ac72ad5: You know, the stuff Osman said about you and Kaleef.
textByHashes.32fc86e7a533c8140a993a5f9a2b11855b63b3a5: His way of saying 'thank you' perhaps?
textByHashes.a8d6aff5f0a42ef8b30f1a4b4117b16bd7b3740e: I'm sure I'll be able to put it to good use.
textByHashes.92a19f42c7ec12e7f05134f1263d4daa7347501c: What do you think it means?
textByHashes.ff1beaa378f1b28ca65baa2d6d5ecd30e87b0004: He said it would take some time for the city to open.
textByHashes.ac506465e7883a5e0af1903802d2baf1c27670ad: Alright, I'll see you soon. Good luck.
textByHashes.29c41480f1d07b85633be73e83053b20866dcc92: Why are you firing a cannon at a wall?
textByHashes.bded53f8adf77b510513c45b909569c87cefa3d4: Have you tried taking a pickaxe to it?
textByHashes.e5bf65e0ebf358c0d72281305e5638a59dbd8cb4: We? I don't see anyone else.
textByHashes.fd56b11da12bbdcec21ce4d5562929d559044aea: Okay... so why were you trying to get through the rock again?
textByHashes.47a1faeadf869fee8559a570d10b8fa749922045: No thanks, I do enough mining on my own.
textByHashes.0c197a9dd9bf3f26eee2d11af2cb5bfbbb97a972: Any idea on what's inside the rock?
textByHashes.39eb82003291a17097b67bde2b8d2209fdcbeb2c: Now where would I do that?
textByHashes.0d12479d05e90be4073549378ba2796104ca5b47: And what are you going to do while I go running across half of Gielinor, I'll wager?
textByHashes.af085647898853871e5429e1e5245a042c6f615c: But I still don't know where!
textByHashes.557974b7af119744a8bbd1a677183b28bee515b0: What did you need me to do?
textByHashes.a2563264b869a27d6b3f63584043d541a92b3b82: What do you know about impenetrable rocks?
textByHashes.5109145daad7aba514ed2aee550631c022d7297b: The big one in the mines south of the city. Dondakan's big rock.
textByHashes.191e873ce09796115d3d8b47ca5f8f19c1a6f41d: Where can I find him exactly?
textByHashes.510f5a8487a544a25c16da037ca4579a54473d44: Do you know anything about this rock in the mines?
textByHashes.ba6bd44e68fb8c9b4d45fd96a1ea2b752a9c78fd: The big rock in the mines to the south, with an old dwarf standing beside it..?
textByHashes.c312e612b8e8ba14a766555a2bc72f7f00261a2e: Er, yes, I think so. Do you know what it's made of?
textByHashes.80b362e7df868e2d728ac5d2e4cc9a36d0b77133: So where can I find this Rolad?
textByHashes.3db43bb885839ec13564a4d0a60f3b0b1c48286a: Excuse me... would you happen to be Rolad the scholar?
textByHashes.ca2a204334b9501ab5b2586256b74e5d2cf80f99: , and I've come to ask you about a rock.
textByHashes.8fe9d3c60fc6d45cfc231ee6507094fbd91c3be5: It's this rock that Dondakan is trying to break open. You know Dondakan, right?
textByHashes.96f843102d382956b03ff670cea2d1e44b9222f0: Yes, that's the one. What can you tell me about it?
textByHashes.6b7a7edfa3d043066c56bf776319540bb6a73277: What? No! I need that book!
textByHashes.1aac3cb797a6608659f12da35a3ca35fe1f15735: Okay, thanks, I'll go and look for the pages then.
textByHashes.1b26319e76159745869446fe5c50ab8c01744c53: Rolad has a book that might help us!
textByHashes.f9bfcca2fce5146021ba3f305ac5f8c9273c2621: Well, that's the problem... the most important pages are missing.
textByHashes.d955a73be2388d25752eed4c334fc4842365106c: I haven't found a single one yet, I have no idea where I should be looking.
textByHashes.8922ef1f9a35d53182aa38907f76d590f48d6301: Well, I found the first page, but I still have two to go.
textByHashes.5110f2c769be17d04bc5ea43c26cdb7af7331304: I found two of the pages! But I haven't found the last one yet.
textByHashes.7a39209023da1ffb247f0fd4bdf2ddf4eb07fe9c: Look, I found all of your missing pages!
textByHashes.7ac26997e2da4b6d963d80a5bc399e7210b60be3: Yes, the missing pages of that book we were talking about earlier?
textByHashes.6787998eaf9519b2ea1c1130f8edac5fd814d23a: Of course, I'd be happy to!
textByHashes.1e905f942032b3e947e2f7bff53345070374b46f: Of course... when I've finished with it I'll give it back to you, sure...
textByHashes.8af58c1121ca8c4676288b36fda89d4d72d2c29b: Ahem... errr... I lost that book you gave me.
textByHashes.f02178ebc3e14798514b01aeea687717d94a4576: No, I hadn't had the chance yet.
textByHashes.9860458d92e611bffec832d7fb6a6efe3603288f: Wait, if you had a copy of it, why did I have to look for your missing pages?
textByHashes.06fa1dbcbe9bf6da330642b7107bcd45d5c4d763: That was quite an interesting book you gave me.
textByHashes.b7c787f53976f103fb3ef6e682b78aa7ab6e8dd8: Yes, but I'd like to hang on to it a little longer, if I may.
textByHashes.3eb9caabaa0ae42230581120e767e0188a453047: Rolad gave me a book that was quite interesting to read! I think I know what's inside it!
textByHashes.a51db8d486313b91b83af7e06d15a565dcb44a43: Ehm, well... a demonic spirit for one...
textByHashes.1a3283747ff70bbfec8f741d97bc54af10f0a72d: A demonic spirit! And apparently the inside of the rock is lined with gold!
textByHashes.d596373c8ddeb51628d5e4e6047dffe186dae575: Sorry, the book doesn't say... it doesn't seem to be particularly concerned with actually breaking open the rock. You see, the demonic spirit is being kept inside it.
textByHashes.445c1f685a0e51f47b89080191e9ff16e35e0516: What have you tried so far?
textByHashes.a0b5118694876618bd51e1ea07a56c2bc48c3915: Wow! That must have made quite an impact!
textByHashes.026c7b5d7d81d11a0f5c478beeb37752dc0eb8bf: Nice boots... but what about them?
textByHashes.1b134b476b68e3bc5e3e75d770eec62952c70779: And now I have to come up with a material that will affect it somehow?
textByHashes.d61686d2b1d559f14e6c8af19b296fe315f1acec: Some kind of new material that no one has ever found before but which I am supposed to accidentally stumble upon, perhaps?
textByHashes.794e7ec3ba656dd6663bcfa16e37ad5cfb88c632: Maybe we should set up another cannon?
textByHashes.c6365b4bc53359a43b68f95f7bfc7a0e8a5a4361: How do you mean, that I can find? What are you doing then?
textByHashes.d5dc6575b2506ff947de09b28c1970546868a592: Well... the book does say that there's gold inside the rock, so I thought perhaps gold can damage it as well.
textByHashes.4ed8f564668557526b90832fe1c9932d886a1e7e: I have that golden cannonball you asked me to make.
textByHashes.bde46d36c1f3e512bd90670a79b2db89fc149f60: Yes, I'm sure this will crack open the rock.
textByHashes.a8e0df3d6fc58b8734d9c0421d0ce28062643ff6: The cannonball went right through it!
textByHashes.1098d8b5e9baec560f11c72de81877ec8350361e: But... the rock didn't actually break, did it?
textByHashes.d96c56d0077cc698456026dcebc8c7503ea51e19: So how does this help us?
textByHashes.80bf1c7b1e9a637660da7a73e7ae2134205037cb: Shoot me... through it? Errr... what exactly do you mean?
textByHashes.03c5bf846074c67dc6eadfef8dcfc52da599e11a: But... what if I bump into that demon, the one from the book?
textByHashes.93099a20905b3389a13d0c0b7f49c3e55d1c9070: So you want to... fire me into the rock?
textByHashes.41ccaddf91da583e2032634ce45efd8d0e29836f: Are you sure that it's safe?
textByHashes.e6d84b10674984a3df5a82ab7bca48bafd3001ff: Find someone else for your bizarre experiment, I'm not going to crawl into that cannon of yours! Or have you shoot me at a solid rock!
textByHashes.c25f2269549946b15ab7ea3a9ded77d1c5d5cb3d: I can't argue with that, shoot me in!
textByHashes.bec1432c6ae41d96ce7d461a81457d639f6475f9: Okay, I'll just wait right here until you've made them.
textByHashes.4d562b1fdd5d39aff23a0b693a4d37dd825a63ae: Okay, so you want me to look for the schematics for you, is that it?
textByHashes.5c087f6ede41ef7ad9a76d610891bc9522f92736: Won't a gold plated helmet do?
textByHashes.abcd74522207ff58bb23e7b1b176314362071f41: No no, I'll get you a helmet made out of solid gold.
textByHashes.dbb764049b5f1f7a814bbd6bd75924370e6a64b5: Although that will be a horrendously heavy thing to actually wear.
textByHashes.583b282a89ea4d34cca228d3aa7a1380f15bb34b: That's what I thought you'd say.
textByHashes.bb765d09dba79775ed0b6738065bca28ebc10f73: My head's spinning, I have to go for a bit.
textByHashes.c004beb7038c36ff078551095ccbf0323f78ec91: No, on second thought, I'd rather sell it for a huge profit.
textByHashes.c137b9823098c2bfdd300ae1ac50633397177435: What did you want me to find again?
textByHashes.58d86810b9ed7c1e9dde2544874f6aac8d860026: I lost that schematic you gave me, actually.
textByHashes.66f1641f39aa9ef20358edbfe7cdabee46599455: Sounds simple enough. Any idea on where I can find those schematics?
textByHashes.89566c9eb57331596753842cc42e0a0df0fea90d: I'm looking for schematics to modify the dwarven multicannon to fire a human. Can you help?
textByHashes.d6654981c666643db8dd08a878913b4990648170: Well, can you give them to me? I'd be willing to try the experiment.
textByHashes.85ec8c41595bdd67ab761fc0a7bb3f8517188333: Who did you give them to?
textByHashes.32fad11900f99a27aa666eca2e32ec6f249b63ae: Okay, okay, can I have that one schematic then?
textByHashes.fb1526d1cde0f37bb7c06fac863e731d458dce7b: No, I've had enough of buying drinks for people!
textByHashes.09a6eccfed7a999b92c29759d7b5330f70513ec7: It's always like this... Sure, I'll help you , just as soon as you get me a drink!
textByHashes.50a4928f4a157d75c26c7b935def126dfefae2fd: And more often than not they actually want a very special kind of drink that can only be gotten in the next town, or beyond.
textByHashes.2409c6a27208aa20db8fc465e0d1b3c653af5d00: And what is wrong with all you people anyway? Sometimes it seems as if half the population of Gielinor are alcoholics!
textByHashes.bbfc9ef0aeea0856701cdf8824a9156916ce2685: So, no, I won't do it anymore, you can get your own drink for once, and I'm just going to stay right here until you've done so!
textByHashes.affbc80ec1608a821faa1c2491878f76aa01d188: Oh, alright, what do you want to drink?
textByHashes.34ed28cc75043173530efbb575cda1ad38f6d669: Here, I've got your dwarven stout.
textByHashes.09b75ed80937788b3a6411d65134ebe7ae58c354: You've been so helpful with that book, I was wondering, can you help me with something else as well?
textByHashes.eedd8057f02ea7c9f4e82c162235ecc4d40ddfe8: Dondakan wants to modify his multicannon, you see, to fire a human.
textByHashes.3b59cf90a70aa62a49b4cfaf4095ab3ae3dd6fe6: But can you help me with the schematics? Dondakan needs to know what he needs to modify.
textByHashes.081df55d456b03add54738ea803775087fe76b77: Oh, those will be a tremendous help already, can I borrow those off of you as well?
textByHashes.5c23262479e71fb7eb4c75c5a1c596c0748ec5a0: You are rather a forgetful person, aren't you?
textByHashes.7d44018c216285d9161c57161dc0c652c06ca0fb: Oh, alright, I'll go and have a look.
textByHashes.9dff8b2d9c10eca34112d2a5ada952d8f1160e95: Say, you wouldn't happen to have another copy of that book, would you?
textByHashes.3259dfb188b89ee8bd00ac36dba79a5a3b5b572c: Er, yes, I lost your book...
textByHashes.fdf7d45bb2a92bb647f966f02c42c79ebc0a7864: I can't seem to find your schematics... Did you lose them down in the mines again?
textByHashes.1c637a642b82ce0bc957e612a78247b09d14f31a: I found your schematics! You wrote them down on one of the pages of that book you gave me!
textByHashes.764491ff6035f6694cb4e8b3ecd5052b99699324: Do you have any schematics related to the dwarven multicannon?
textByHashes.a9121544f4f322cfaabbdc993390a80eff723f9b: Dondakan needs schematics to modify his multicannon, to fire a human you see.
textByHashes.4afc506b8e28e116f67207598fedab00bd45d25a: I think I have all the different parts of the schematics...
textByHashes.fcb815a30b480034a5c21f4bff4ca4b9c41d8c32: I have that golden helmet you said I'd need, what else did you need again?
textByHashes.1a4dc4558fb6caa44ccf4da2767482d520e17813: I've got your schematics... what else was I supposed to do?
textByHashes.c70d373cfcbec66de9a86889d093fab227c197ca: I've got your schematics all assembled, and I have that golden helmet as well!
textByHashes.6038816fd90f7b97325ddd626389df047e3d2f58: I'm starting to get second thoughts about this!
textByHashes.677e5beca4946f80494cfc2358250d064fc0b981: Dondakan said there was supposed to be a river behind the rock... but I don't see a river here.
textByHashes.079ce06907a3133a1388a356c8f887a5ea1c5f88: I think... I think... I think I may be...
textByHashes.5866c75e84b443477839c34a99410da51ac031f3: Ow, my poor head... this helmet seems heavier than ever!
textByHashes.a3925afbec600703839fd5533ee0274079def9b6: Err, maybe another time, I have some important business to attend to.
textByHashes.ddb5c5cac732c81ebd263ff1f8163c8ced0f1970: I ehm, also ran into this spirit thing. You remember, from the book?
textByHashes.1e580fc2cb370c04596bead94b5d2e8444c37fe0: The rock... seems to be a lot larger than it appears on the outside. I was actually able to walk around in there. But it was like... walking around in a dream.
textByHashes.bfb779d291ac0e12241370414cad951a7fdd35c8: I'm not quite sure, it all seems so distant now.
textByHashes.30974d523944574fbbc5e4ad66b64fa23530763b: I em... let me just collect my thoughts. It all seems like a sort of distant dream now.
textByHashes.3004d6857a3e4b7a4a1f17637f978e73a3bda768: I think I killed the Arzinian demon thing.
textByHashes.f29f466e1cbf28a4dcd19090d6db6cdda24afb9e: Well, I killed its avatar. I'm not sure what happened to the demon itself.
textByHashes.12a387e9386110bad5c1c7e73fce5601f1ee5250: Can you shoot me into the rock again?
textByHashes.d4c5d8ff53052136641774ec462a17fa690ac88d: Say, are you selling those boots of yours?
textByHashes.54f100bdd2833c68b2f9b906b088acc9d759b08d: Yes, I'd be happy to pay quite some money for them!
textByHashes.d3cf7652b4567c3ba35257d3ac49bf0bd3e9cc7c: Never mind, I don't want them anymore.
textByHashes.5a91bd02bd674c9b445d2931a8bbac1a769b8eae: Not quite, they were retrieved from the corpse of a wyvern.
textByHashes.82517e28b20c71ca7730dd970240a0246e6f916f: I never said I killed it! But perhaps I did, I am a grand adventure after all!
textByHashes.8adae276fed2bedfdd94a281c178563ee89afa52: Hmm, well you do have a point...
textByHashes.073c62dc00ee1b4311e37fe18151f41a922d57d4: That's great, but I have to go now.
textByHashes.7da872dadc5b2765d7040d52617ebe2d8e926dff: Yes, what exactly does that mean anyway?
textByHashes.4df89d1234ea3b8d473e6ed42d2cbdf490b0c198: Does that mean I will have to deal with this demon again some time?
textByHashes.896777cd68450a007cace63ca2bceb9c17ba5be4: I think I understand. You want me to make some arrows for you?
textByHashes.3f47b2dedbc38a167382938e826b926934dcb5cf: How do I make the 'stabbers' again?
textByHashes.75f0d4d725463dd0695dba8938d34ec180d2a1bb: Oh, so I need logs from the achey tree, bones from a canine... and feathers?
textByHashes.c961e476f202a6af67110280f392b149b83529a4: Ok, I'll make the 'stabbers' for you.
textByHashes.91e2c010cca07980fad6a96555e2818abfe87c07: That's right... I'm making some 'stabbers' for Rantz.
textByHashes.cac7758ada937aee44f91de8f1c666197f84291e: How many 'bright pretties' do you want?
textByHashes.17017d23c2175b11ff9ed559a4fc5b4360d065bf: Ok, I'll give you 10 bright pretties.
textByHashes.6dfb70ff7c6feaf23f85f5cd7c1a22ccae54dbb6: Er, sorry, I can't give you that many...
textByHashes.483de95da1f80dad71561fb2952eab1bb2c59567: That's right... and I'm making some 'stabbers' for Rantz.
textByHashes.0632c9e2a4dca00b0ae17bb4abb0da0737704943: Ok, I'll give you 50 bright pretties.
textByHashes.7825fb0c3bbd173bbc3e56d56801e92a9e84ab1b: Well, yes actually, as you asked so nicely. Here you go! Here's your 'stabbers'.
textByHashes.a36f4623dd1fb1469d16047b47b342daa2ef60ab: How do we make the chompys come?
textByHashes.8d6da3dab754a7c176f8828809f2961f8a9712ed: Where do we put the 'fatsy toadies'?
textByHashes.e47142f7c0a41f83830716adf74770b95996d7c2: What do you mean 'sneaky..sneaky, stick the chompy?'
textByHashes.b88e1eae3576aeb17a7a1446b28676d2bbf394de: No I haven't got the 'fatsy toady' yet!
textByHashes.d6069c8650820836fc040705d8aef5aef1fc4a41: Rantz said that you play with the 'fatsy toadies', what are they?
textByHashes.52c9b1de8f284511cd0e9c1abf619a5857259d4f: I guess this is what an ogre would call a locked chest.
textByHashes.bce68f040d52b35f0d5c7cd7b54e89c18659402f: Yes, I have a 'fatsy toady' for you, here look!
textByHashes.8c816eac6f412472797360bc48541ffd1a411709: Where should I put the 'fatsy toadies'?
textByHashes.c719e6a2cd884ef66c05043bea32fc735255cc35: There you go, I've placed the bait.
textByHashes.3158d5ff9b7779b415d17c17dc3dbdb08ee766dd: Yes, I know... stick da chompy!
textByHashes.ca12133220907d468c54dba104f2e2a0cfdfdab0: What? I have to get more bait if there's none there? Does this Chompy Bird even exist I wonder?
textByHashes.7d3c406d8e4a4486ade596a27f6547d7d99b3010: Hey there, you keep missing the chompy bird.
textByHashes.593a9bea5ebff5eacee4df3e8b776eb493669464: Oh, keep trying then... you might hit one through pure luck.
textByHashes.15f5456372d4bddfe1086c728648c989549948f6: Come on, let me have a go...
textByHashes.62d6ee2708edc3becf21583f8097d3a69061c27a: I'm actually quite strong... please let me try.
textByHashes.87aabce8d353bd72a8326997e18566aac5e1952a: Oh suit yourself, you'll just have to go hungry.
textByHashes.1e3100c39e4589b4cfab6eaefe65aefda24a7318: Hey, Rantz, I've lost the 'stabbie chucker', do you have another one please?
textByHashes.780aee59d43034e3eba968ea3480c998692ed34e: What! Now I've got the chompy bird, you expect me to cook it as well?
textByHashes.a93a8ab5346c98f4a01b50c99004b993b15da059: Yes, here you go, here's your cooked chompy bird.
textByHashes.7e6761e1012459e0a4d6a1f7ec715855d17e689b: Of course I can help. Where do we start?
textByHashes.ccac1dc43fa7801aca0b7cefa759eeb3ae14adcb: I'm busy at the moment, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.1c3bf0d9f2c0d90cb508b2ee10af85281ab9573c: I don't need any more bird feed.
textByHashes.271f86ec58e1e3c89181bfc356e4af733e3d9461: Mmm, bird feed! Now what could I do with that?
textByHashes.7c2e7ecf75da26c4af97d4637f1832927fa0b218: Omart, Jerico said you might be able to help me.
textByHashes.19f44ba5f1985e44a233441cd8eab34881f3c80d: Where do I get the bird feed and the pigeons?
textByHashes.ee540d273e6acf511580c565de414ead0b757a60: I have. He told me to ask you about some pigeons.
textByHashes.1e22cda16bb871ecab959760d90d33fa956c7129: Omart thought they'd make a good distraction for the guards.
textByHashes.624f6cad6fad512e703ade64d25d5e1a13ba8c9a: I probably shouldn't waste it by throwing it here.
textByHashes.a04f4685de6a0447d50df4e17662ac08def6f436: That would be wise. Thanks Omart.
textByHashes.28b049cd68958668400751eb08e9f859bcc66eb7: Thanks Kilron. Do you know where to find the Mourner Headquarters?
textByHashes.ef257c9b92b277cad4e4dc00de733c5ba7b13a78: Do you know where to find the Mourner Headquarters?
textByHashes.9e5c419a6aee7b2ccf4787fb71d717b5435604d5: Hmm. I wonder if there's another way in.
textByHashes.7c852a99fca8a175e587179e79b38e9bcd3b7514: Looks like a nice stew is being prepared. This must be to feed all of the mourners.
textByHashes.6c7557a310df740e41a8fc3eabd0839429e86845: What? Is the plague getting to you?
textByHashes.2b9e99bc4068ef105345f2fc74861335484eed25: I was under the impression that everyone here was affected.
textByHashes.14992d3a1928708e02191a8d02df5f0801f63396: Anyone who eats this stew is going to have a bad time now.
textByHashes.35068ebb217489af4aa26f52338f7aa0fb7fca16: Eugh, locked. There must be a way for me to get in. Maybe there's something around here that will help me.
textByHashes.67f060b5df4d8aea715dabecf5a32ca4d0c8cafa: Is there a doctor nearby? Maybe I can go fetch them.
textByHashes.79c8c63eddbd59274d3f0ea4529a361489d366fd: I heard there was some trouble with food poisoning here.
textByHashes.4b5b9ce7f0af165512bbaea81d4ded06e3e23d5d: You should be more careful with your ingredients.
textByHashes.20540dcbc2063a28a648a57317cbbd7302e4c366: Okay, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.5bc781d843813157c36b45614158ca9598b19a74: Hmm... interesting, sounds like food poisoning.
textByHashes.42112767e6e168cd67a99c0933318ace71366391: Just hold your breath and count to ten.
textByHashes.07f4b7bc9b076517ef67a6b819393227ee33196e: Erm... I'm new, I just started.
textByHashes.ec996f3edf399292bb8becf8bf2715cbb4d7994a: The best I can do is pray for you.
textByHashes.20d36d5fdcf15834501cc3c4adaa101ccc1acde8: There's nothing I can do, it's fatal.
textByHashes.c5cdb6ecc32d0d58aa5cf7188c8dedfff9d7a041: Great, I'll see if he can help. See you soon.
textByHashes.c7eb161c96235cf43a19b2102db11b58ea41aa4e: I just find it hard to say goodbye sometimes.
