textByHashes.481ddb66b6f0f6e21b2fba1c427700e92942bc8a: I'm afraid I've lost some of the stuff that you gave me...
textByHashes.de8a60e4c72740701f2e56af15c9340e05d153d6: Great, I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.804b6963f99027c08b286af5f6c1c5d2c343be44: I've forgotten what I need to do.
textByHashes.575c4d42d44c9eec701d36d242d7fc6bd3597144: But I was sent by Elena from Ardougne.
textByHashes.81444dd8fbb8343def07ecd8588d2bebba09630a: She asked me to pick up some touch paper for a guy called Guidor.
textByHashes.26b0d02f08529b7eb5fc7646f9cafe500d6de369: Oh right... so am I going to be okay carrying these three vials with me?
textByHashes.8fe1c285edd6719c7a0f127d14e28295e186f14e: Well that's no good. How do I stop them stealing my vials?
textByHashes.9677c036ed5d2d3811408010b643d174fc3f3886: Okay, thanks for your help. I know Elena appreciates it.
textByHashes.24e3b5464c1b27bc3bc3d61617f344220bcc0373: Well that's no good. What if they take my stuff?
textByHashes.7a8a02b6ce1e1834a536b2924b4b9fa731033b98: Hello, I've got a vial for you to take to Varrock.
textByHashes.8f98c277fb597e89cb67ad9a528ab15660787b7e: Maybe you should ask him for more money.
textByHashes.993dd4414aebade2d34033644843249cad3730e4: Hello, I hear you're an errand boy for the chemist.
textByHashes.0de7afbc7eb56b53daef975ec6cf2ec692969b6a: Good for you. Now can you take a vial to Varrock for me?
textByHashes.a04a71116feac7f9484cca9df4a3bf3e61a3e252: Hi, I've got something for you to take to Varrock.
textByHashes.02a113fe327d9016defd46db4d75e3a472a49013: Well, there's an Inn in Varrock if you're desperate.
textByHashes.2494d91aef51c8c10e9055df7f601652b2cedb6f: Okay, I'll see you in Varrock.
textByHashes.2f1b6b53e9be2e2a9502a4c6143188cc6bb70f1e: You sold my vial and gambled with the money?!
textByHashes.589c23c242cea60d39e963a8d0b02bf81f6eb2d3: No! Nothing could be further from the truth!
textByHashes.5ba0d65f1ba4740fd5ef16fa125cce975f192a8d: You have no idea what you have just done!
textByHashes.a125ac9858126a9912ba4887e030cb2ea3f83ff9: Yep. Anyway, I'll take the package off you now.
textByHashes.2fbb62506bf16270092d873255b970b75e1a681e: I'm getting a bad feeling about this.
textByHashes.208233e02ba06315581899f70f0979ea94fc98da: Just give me the stuff now please.
textByHashes.9f2b7d17fdad6dc7383d58590e55cf3b5c3a9509: You do still have it don't you?
textByHashes.80d84cabe874c8c14a64394a2b984cab3ac37e21: That's great. Thanks to you I'll have to walk back to East Ardougne to get another vial.
textByHashes.d64fe731fb3e764f272259df806c4e74e291f0d2: Well, as they say, it's always sunny in Gielinor.
textByHashes.b73113366b715842ae655223364559cc4133ec70: Thanks, you've been a big help.
textByHashes.ea224aa419b9569802215801e5a34dc366a4cb85: Please tell me that you haven't drunk the contents...
textByHashes.d1f1de40cb8331a68401a1cbe11b65f16e8b7d4e: No, I think you've done enough for now.
textByHashes.34268fafedff23b2efac789de8be4ce562767e77: Thanks, I'll let you get your drink now.
textByHashes.a3894362a4d0914baa93c62b78d953efd2609ee0: I should probably talk to Guidor before leaving the area. Otherwise I'll need to get my vials smuggled in again.
textByHashes.5ff01d12650621de2148bcfebd9a3d0de4f1551b: That's someone's bedroom. I'm not going in there without a reason.
textByHashes.a486900f49877002154c77327b011b7daff6bcf0: I'm sorry to hear that. Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.e243c737adafb2c9f7c1e693829beeec6f2e03b7: Hello. I'm a friend of Elena, here to see Guidor.
textByHashes.3fc3fa665b8ff50c2b898bb45277cae1c02f4126: I'm really sorry to hear about Guidor.
textByHashes.91fbb4c9de582298565ade5e49ac5941b9fa5ff9: But I do have some very important business to attend to!
textByHashes.d68c95337be0e3cc7c8cd371b181b28868a27279: Do you have a spare Priest Gown?
textByHashes.25a91e3ec04cb8e95ebb1bbd06f07efd41529528: I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.0dae0a10209dce24067de3e27842aaa232ed190a: Hello, you must be Guidor. I understand that you are unwell.
textByHashes.abf17334da3f0776bac81d632fbcd1ca11b1e59d: She made out it was something more serious.
textByHashes.9344b59b20838897f94af39013f79bb9b01f664e: I've come to ask your assistance in stopping a plague.
textByHashes.ab33e6ab66a3f90a1f3101099a0aec30bb54220d: That's the one. I have a sample here from your former student, Elena.
textByHashes.132b021f97a1217a5a64f1798382f8b56a70d75e: Yes, she wants you to analyse it. You might be the only one who can help.
textByHashes.81ba4567f3710c4a787795d6abcc4decb841760f: That's why Elena wanted you to do it, because she wasn't sure what was happening.
textByHashes.39f3f5f640aa1f82d3063a57f9f5540cbbcc34c7: Well this is worrying. I'd better go and tell Elena right away.
textByHashes.d19569acb912c4f3e32b824f93e71a40aa06cfeb: I was just going to bless your room and I've done that now.
textByHashes.a916dca55593abfb7f77e9081dbdae471a286089: It's strange, anyway how are you doing?
textByHashes.d1a97545d0c6864b8f1ecddcd916bd714d45bd05: He ran his tests and discovered nothing. The plague... it doesn't exist.
textByHashes.6e7afaddcbf95d1e6a09684718d171a2c6f76fcc: I don't know, but I think we're about to uncover something huge.
textByHashes.70ac39d79296c574a3b239045ae01b16b35dbc08: Well I'd better go and speak to the king then.
textByHashes.bf511547f68727fedf626f32e49d20cba4b5cf64: I assume that you are King Lathas of East Ardougne?
textByHashes.b96d3a321ef4a346285fb55873cfd95e97e7ca39: I get it from finding out that the plague is a hoax.
textByHashes.29ce45cbe50421854c6cec7e59d781210f7cae39: I have evidence, from Guidor of Varrock.
textByHashes.18d3a759be110066e5337050c3a635212eb67d0d: When is it ever good to lie to people like that?
textByHashes.087eb40f4a6d65c5dc12a2732c79e1676a032468: I see. Well at least I know now.
textByHashes.8902d616be3ba0a5f6a7af29541aeaa5987c1a01: But how do we stop him?
textByHashes.3cb688db6b8ffc85bde8ca7db343ec4207794c47: Why don't I get started right away?
textByHashes.ce44197c2b60fb3cd467678cfd7bffc62c81a048: I did, he admitted the plague is a hoax.
textByHashes.9badaf2fb431021b21eebcd41222767695ace03e: He did. He asked me to keep it a secret though.
textByHashes.442f9d76a6e752890f45b2e7c71f24f324c14540: I'm afraid so. Don't worry though, I'm working with the king to resolve all of this.
textByHashes.4666c8b0428db8acee3f3898091af16720924d5e: So do I Elena. I promise I'll tell you everything once this is all over.
textByHashes.913a3b947cd42e4208503f450316c918ac2007d0: Hello again Guidor. How are you doing?
textByHashes.94c3229fae0ca3090b04d13dc33ca99d731c2c10: I laugh in the face of danger!
textByHashes.4cb47f62b0e9db8e74952b3adc38542b2216736c: Can't you just take your White Knights' armour off? They wouldn't recognise you then!
textByHashes.0d8e0f550dac8096ad100b02b30efa42557d9f54: So... what do you need doing?
textByHashes.8ee4737bb048ea55edfc5927863839994ab109ad: No, I'm not ready to do that.
textByHashes.43c2fc6daf36240dd1ae58a9c871e8b201ada705: I go and cower in a corner at the first sign of danger!
textByHashes.f8ef853310a88a3348b5ae52e4268b2ad6e0ab38: Oh. I suppose I'll give it a go then.
textByHashes.ea8d3736ad0f17a39cdb7776e27e0121aefdc06b: I don't, I'm just looking around.
textByHashes.8c7bd900c732cbdf3b46f0ff800a3b470c00fade: I haven't managed to find what the secret weapon is yet...
textByHashes.1c7c054b7e01550b9fd3edaf2ccd63e940d49df4: Hmmm... I wonder if I can make that or get some in the local towns....
textByHashes.9aa801ced480c2cbb409094e44f8ddd32efd5445: So who does it belong to?
textByHashes.67646e20f8d7c0c6db63a79fe36383638749f2ee: I've found out what the Black Knight's secret weapon is. It's a potion of invincibility.
textByHashes.d70b54411912e774f17a27d16ff57180a799e74b: So when I finish this mission for you can I be a white knight? Can I wear your armour too?
textByHashes.3e2614b0ad0e60b67317bbb0c3878e6383429404: I can't buy stuff with personal gratitude though...
textByHashes.91efaebeb4cd7f7d3a1794bbaf564792e8dd4fd6: Ok! I'll get on to sabotaging that potion.
textByHashes.09e84f56060987d7efc267cc7bd76579285add32: I don't care. I'm going in anyway.
textByHashes.a9ee665a1e0f9ba4ef4fb493c5c23fb101c43a57: Why exactly would I want to do that?
textByHashes.dfb7333aa568804c00a04227c3f7c7c21638161e: I'm not supposed to be HELPING the witch you know...
textByHashes.32a89c7d4da4563a20259b66d396b21e4c2f300c: Looks like my work here is done. Seems like that's successfully sabotaged their little secret weapon plan.
textByHashes.af0ab4c448f1939bf258befcce1607329357bdb6: I have ruined the Black Knights' invincibility potion. That should put a stop to your problem and an end to their little schemes.
textByHashes.b5cb87239adcd97f0c76943f1ffddf8a1238ccab: Now I believe there was some talk of a cash reward...
textByHashes.80d804dbf251fc32e46f8e39827030d17cf66a3f: I'm afraid I'm far too busy right now.
textByHashes.44ee8fdeed26e4c52a4887c176603c4218869f2a: Hello, the curator said you could use some assistance here?
textByHashes.6e5764cb82ca7d228835c7beb24048170c412f62: What can I do to help?
textByHashes.f765371ad0f32c8328ed318c24aab11c61298f23: So you'd like me to bring you some of this wood?
textByHashes.3e51deac31328f8cf18835656d345bdd0b30af7f: Okay, I'll talk to the sawmill operator.
textByHashes.9d8730ee91553f8bc7ce7a0edfe8667021baa744: I'm here on behalf of the museum archaeological team.
textByHashes.d8d50ec035a4c724e1bddda01bc08e9c02126e30: So what do you need me to do?
textByHashes.f8e9e8d510b11b7f7bcaa8f4bf7f3aa3ab631d1d: Okay, I'll be back with those signed documents.
textByHashes.faaba4361cb70b88ec8a98d300e6583ca7a3184a: I have a proposal for your guild's sawmill, it is from the Varrock sawmill.
textByHashes.c3a75fe1b153030276cb4127660b57ec2be2c105: Redwood planks eh? Those would certainly make for an interesting building material...
textByHashes.634cf897288932a8b007d7534f2e03cc48d54831: I'm not too sure what I'm supposed to be doing with this document.
textByHashes.3a32fdd6efb153caec690335368bce3ab6c9796a: The sawmill operator in Varrock said you were in possession of some special planks?
textByHashes.54d4e9e7979f4fa20eb738b92bb7765873de5dbf: Could they be used to build anything else?
textByHashes.274b603175558fa560b1430e712de6681debb18f: No, I don't have it on me right now.
textByHashes.3096611b21b29b0998f3ca971ae232da004fc208: Right, of course. I'll be back.
textByHashes.bf0c70d36806ad300b4c6d57003f1a89eeeec725: I don't have it with me.
textByHashes.c9bb62b4b94ec70ade0d0d08888b8e34b1201a98: No problem. Is there anything else you need?
textByHashes.aa35c35298446edbe93373932915f6bdda7a0674: There doesn't seem to be a gangplank... How am I meant to get on board?
textByHashes.a55b05a3e7b81df433629846d14e771d4398b342: Can I go onto the barge?
textByHashes.2907818a474034a2ee248b5281dc68f1caa259c6: How am I supposed to do that?
textByHashes.72c5d176002e1fc0131e63c9f3517adb75755369: Any idea where I'd be able to find someone like that?
textByHashes.5a3c20b160e94761c030ede99489de1b63dffcab: Okay, I'll see what I can learn.
textByHashes.e51236a75cc1af68e7a9c45792adef0fcf22c318: I'm meant to be setting sail on a voyage of my own, but the crew won't go without some sort of 'protection'. I was hoping someone here would know of a way to avoid falling victim to the so-called curse.
textByHashes.6eb679664572ca05f59d40ffeb68e09062ed65e5: Great! What do I need to do?
textByHashes.f4d3e7435309ecf58b359c5bcea868cd3c69b90d: We are heading out on an expedition to an ancient, previously unexplored, island for Varrock museum.
textByHashes.e6f4f45b167acdbd886788f5c79a116eb7b1e080: A lucky charm to do with digging up bones?
textByHashes.1c3898d7e2d4fe674d6085d9ff55fbcfd0af7e6e: Perhaps. What would I need to do to make it through the voyage 'unscathed'?
textByHashes.89984b1668eeb33ace4fdd24c8224e06cd432533: Well, I guess I'll talk to the navigators and offer both up to the crew to see which they'd prefer before I go gathering them up! Thanks!
textByHashes.9729d69b0f48ec193d332f6e4ee45baeacc515b0: Yes, I've got two options, actually.
textByHashes.173b3ba1c154c517995d6ca01f931f329f3c0cd0: The first is to use a good luck charm, something related to our expedition - a lucky bone from an odd old man in Paterdomus.
textByHashes.4bac1575dac31a7e122d9d6758e8a53d03465090: The second is a potion of sealegs, the crew would have to drink it at the start of the voyage.
textByHashes.52b1f7f9cb938f28fdf0c9d3bdcd7865f207dfbb: It's okay, I can get both.
textByHashes.333eedad35c746274255c4071d7db733d11b1724: Okay, I'll be back once I've got the potion of sealegs and the lucky charm.
textByHashes.808e952f20b2e5ffec86581508e9a67a2312298a: Hi, I'm looking for an unusual potion to get my crew through a 'cursed' voyage.
textByHashes.31c0668bfb4098b77e05c8a02c8595c4a7c00862: Then what have you been giving those sailors?
textByHashes.41b5ae5068059a7c92355af299b6ad10be1674fc: Well I don't really have a choice here, I need that potion. What ingredients do you need?
textByHashes.328508838f492021e1f2ab90e82784d122548d75: I lost the potion of sealegs...
textByHashes.56a635815fc5e6d031710068da6003fc20ad6ad2: Hi, I was told you might be able to help me get a lucky charm?
textByHashes.68f660732f890b830deef6ddd5b4c238e35d2c61: Actually, that's not what I meant...
textByHashes.e67c3a98329674b0089fa60d0e733e77fa080343: I'm making a cursed voyage. We're heading to an island on an archaeological expedition.
textByHashes.504c7a0e71291f84fb1611128a1dcd1b33ce7952: That's great, what would you like for it?
textByHashes.21aedbb44794d3143b78c4614e3150eff619eb4e: I lost the lucky charm you gave me...
textByHashes.dcc71ecfdf1175843e950805404495e38c998f29: Well, the apothecary figured they can't be afraid if they're unconcious...
textByHashes.a792f5bd564a1c659965fb12376bf75f0f942400: Aren't you meant to be a navigator?
textByHashes.1c354f1113715bbf719945a4146c6b2b466520a1: What are we going to do?
textByHashes.af607f5c915f67609c152a757754b31e82f13e2a: Well, I've got some sailing experience myself. Hopefully I can get us there without too much trouble.
textByHashes.a78ada6623aabd88034e8d52f20b03dbafe798b1: Okay, this might not be as straightforward as I thought. What are we going to do?
textByHashes.4298e799a59c1ceb3720ec909d8a56be3a97870d: Well it is quite a nice day.
textByHashes.86a5ba1baf6408d287df4d58164b102ca2446cfa: What's the problem? I may be able to help.
textByHashes.b18a60bf034934cdb9ea03e25a31a512efb74938: Yes, I've always wanted to be a pirate!
textByHashes.d04d6cb738950bea7146a1c84a5ab636cc888a9b: Will it be OK for me to go there if I am not a pirate?
textByHashes.292482e1e56fe1cf5b12ef1bf237900f3ec6220f: Worked as a sailor? Do I really need to do that? I've already got some sailing experience.
textByHashes.0993c9885d66efbbe79c9c3baa92cac20fc4721f: How horrible! How did your crew react?
textByHashes.f5c41feafc63130c8ab669edd3da5c75863812b1: Yes, I am a man of my word.
textByHashes.c65bf9bbca9a19f08a958accf35c7e40ef3addd5: Yes, I am a woman of my word.
textByHashes.233724aa168958e442e1a32b6d5b1e570270b4da: You won't...err...I mean ye'll not regret it Cap'n!
textByHashes.bd3ce189ad31505e63b94d8c4616a7dd78ab4b62: No, if it's so dangerous your crew left, count me out.
textByHashes.a2414d26a4ca29a859dbabbbe4f18ddfb6828eb5: No thanks, it sounds quite dangerous.
textByHashes.d71cf8d06cbc74c65c1524011bfcf6797dab9598: I don't think that whoever owns this ship will be happy with me wandering all over it.
textByHashes.10a549a859c6f62be8530db4010e7aaeec12f1af: Don't ye worry about me, Cap'n! I'm the scurviest, throat-cuttinest pirate to ever walk the mainplank! Arr!
textByHashes.c8a82ea109712274b4a563ad002baa7cef42654b: Can I just go grab something?
textByHashes.0e5750de107b16cca77bc97dc4f07e47f3458eb3: Well, it looks like they've found us Cap'n.
textByHashes.450b7c79c08a7836b52823f864446840c0db141f: Arr! I'll hop to it Cap'n!
textByHashes.4b8d359dd110a97e7c75efb620cd90421aa1e8de: Now to take care of that cannon!
textByHashes.cad8893edcaab5d4ce6e5ae0fc4d1bef630412bf: Just to clear everything up, what is it you want me to do?
textByHashes.e353bb890463129bf59763dd15b5ab035fe24bac: How do I make a rope swing?
textByHashes.32c3a6967d4bdc2424094943f1a6d2238cc72ad6: Aye aye Cap'n! One rope swing coming right up!
textByHashes.d28d39e7c09d27ee45ee23ed4c7b8594740ea527: How can I blow up their cannon?
textByHashes.134971044b4c9c1fb04f2425afbae8003a8855f3: Arr! I'll blow that cannon sky high, sez I!
textByHashes.407f3a66e64535988ec8cb3ce8bc5c2077f852ef: Err, Cap'n, can we go back to port?
textByHashes.8563395168d076a5f99476ac94f6d0ac5e8fa6a1: It's not that, I just need to grab something from the bank, that's all...
textByHashes.9cc3236105482023911a29dc5ae8647daf3e2fb2: No, I need to go back now.
textByHashes.fe6e3cdda9f56970602b79a220f28125ed556a21: Arr! I've blown their cannon to smithereens Cap'n!
textByHashes.7cdae195118ebe3a7c7fa339c22a5958ba5ec82c: Will smearing swamp paste on the holes do?
textByHashes.23d427a7f81dfcf6314bcce35c17cf6641f6a816: Arr! I'll have this ship ship-shape in no time! Arr!
textByHashes.3b4ab5fd19c3419bec70ff3709b387182ac62028: Errr...I may well have been caught up in the whole 'pirate' thing, and I can't seem to remember what I need to do now...
textByHashes.9e00b6f338525571fcd10b5905ea59a4dc25aff8: Arr! I be rememberin' now Cap'n!
textByHashes.d3f7d2a35962fbe7670f8032e570643f0cfb9bcd: Arr! I'll plunder their booty and no mistake!
textByHashes.bac76d7007ae9c19fb0288b2145405fe09c0a681: Aye aye Cap'n! One plunderin' comin' right up!
textByHashes.0f5fb0e6c29ec6b8da65f88b694026054a8a0689: So...how many loads of plunder did you want me to get?
textByHashes.812e2a17b69736e224534c502a4e345ab5c8bf6f: What happens if I take all the plunder I find and there is less than ten loads?
textByHashes.b2096953eeda7943b6fa5e9117d36638d43d4cce: Arr! I'll keep plunderin' till the hold be full of booty!
textByHashes.84c2fc0f6cad779f3834a3e9a99c6e487b16e8aa: Cap'n! I've put ten loads of plunder in the chest, in the hold!
textByHashes.290b5c1adff96ae618a87da561e5bd3a5b292357: I even had some left over!
textByHashes.3078028db02d07aa84f06c37f6292ef463b93218: How do I repair the cannon?
textByHashes.0c525878d7f54110e3c269de12323b1c99537b0d: How was I going to do that again?
textByHashes.9e8ce7b443a90c45313df3b11b346a76a2d32794: Yes, but if I forget I'll come and ask you.
textByHashes.0d71a2647bf764a22850a588265327f3e7631ca9: That would help to be honest.
textByHashes.1077d150378e7bde235122a6a986f635fd93bcde: Well, that seems to have showed them Cap'n!
textByHashes.d5a96dfd72e170782f3712d28d2cdf0e01434823: Aye Cap'n, we'll beat these pirates yet!
textByHashes.37b28b7677de08e619db38604addf947e6ed5e3d: Arr! I'll sink them scurvy dogs!
textByHashes.bcc9b4f5b75d322a76d608db566ae5f38396001b: Cap'n, I know I need to load and fire the cannon at the enemy ship...
textByHashes.afaf19e5ba8c9aaf81d2735fc4302042f0bb5fd2: and I know I do this by adding powder to the cannon, tamping the charge with a ramrod, adding a cannonball, adding some fuse and then lighting it...
textByHashes.833f51f8e47626e2bf95fd719d137cdb6f808495: And I also remembered your warning about cleaning the barrel after every shot to avoid the cannon exploding...
textByHashes.3803938b7658b48750e6088a59908c21ad0da13d: But I've forgotten how many times I'm supposed to shoot the enemy ship...
textByHashes.4616d7b09994a4b6ba26b0e4e721eb82e9c0d23a: There is no need to shout...
textByHashes.8cfc675c832df41c0b783268d0cec5e0c6992996: I am still here you know...
textByHashes.6860a34f205cad88d72dae61b361e42b34c8bcd8: So all I have to do is read this book and I'm a pirate?
textByHashes.ffe59b1c5dac18e0395a632cc384983f50fcd8f0: Can I have that gold now?
textByHashes.b1a669313cbfb7f17a02662fcbd2bf1cf5c83669: Well I'm actually something of an adventurer myself.
textByHashes.8cbb1416bdd40164e19ea86cbdf10193b34d5eb6: What can you tell me about Varlamore?
textByHashes.47565a05ba4a5c2990301ea3baa975416d7cf4a3: How come you know so much about Varlamore?
textByHashes.4563558b492d79212986c545e440d3eee35fdca3: Hmm... Now where might you be going with that...?
textByHashes.fe05fcc8b481ca050ab850d8796cb10b6a2bcc31: Sorry, but I need to head off.
textByHashes.da60225a4030b8dce04bfe2333f22b08ffa4bc80: I'm not sure. Doesn't really sound like my kind of thing.
textByHashes.67865d48e9cdfe6f775d94f40f41b08e2da759f6: What are you up to in there...?
textByHashes.de051f1a839a43e82f57baa757fb22a2c7263bef: This doesn't sound good. I'd better let that sergeant know.
textByHashes.c60c16f195068c6e3d2452e8b99bd54841bb49e8: Wait! I have some information that you need to hear.
textByHashes.e98d31548b4e3e111389aa68264ec839108c41eb: There are some bandits disguising themselves as guards! I think they're planning to attack the delegation from Varlamore!
textByHashes.f87cc6f2c9222c4e51a12bd1307c855e4767cc1e: It's true! One of them infiltrated your guards and stole some uniforms. He came right through here earlier with them.
textByHashes.b987fb453c896dd0bf9dca8de092e540295dde4b: So what do we do? Should we warn the delegation?
textByHashes.27bedba6e1dafe5d93338f87dfc0f1a97f9fb29d: Alright, I've pointed out all the bandits.
textByHashes.fc543b2b586332da1cfaaa973fac3964ba755600: Of course! Where do you need me?
textByHashes.7ef6276def57442ab1b2b55fe7e14dd1267751a6: Yes, we have chickens. The farms around here have loads.
textByHashes.0a7bdca488c351bc09a51fcc9c3ab42437d955a4: I can't tell if you're joking or not...
textByHashes.591651ef917dd8c2ecd08143c924b9df08fae012: Not every day the heir to a far-off land comes and interrogates one of your prisoners?
textByHashes.b60b8b341cfccf09db40428c6e81c6172bade958: Have you got any quests for me?
textByHashes.6c9329aa7015294c212ebb4112ad029a20462b73: Sounds interesting! How can I help?
textByHashes.05a955bb11ebfbeea8d87b817710576a22282f97: Wait, wait! I'm not spying for somebody am I?
textByHashes.274a6555a8c59bda5e59723a93e927e501983c1b: That seems fair. Who should I speak to in order to find out more about the houses?
textByHashes.e940815ec6d8c195f96b530fb05b6ae12dfba199: Good call. What about this special quill you mentioned?
textByHashes.93ec5ff64e0e3e0d608138220c78ed1673d89ec1: Right, I'll return to you when I have the information your client needs.
textByHashes.844042dd318e4387a9f05c3d9a03f75eb9264c94: I'm busy at the moment, actually. Not now.
textByHashes.29ae84d88354394795dd3a0034fe69e28b16be72: Can I ask you about the Arceuus house?
textByHashes.967ea8d47a41e1425c6c34b1d3dcbbcb2e290794: A journalist! Yes, a journalist from the mainland. I want to let the wider world know of how this incredible house works.
textByHashes.9eedfe4804add2f57b9ca333a007a05ecc0ff1fd: So what exactly is it the Arceuus house brings to Great Kourend?
textByHashes.96ae77343a8f275d54a19a5a7efa517e53480fd8: How do people start gaining favour in Arceuus?
textByHashes.9e6095eb664234d8bacdb499fd2a155cb540377b: Why should I gain favour in Arceuus?
textByHashes.ad60bccb7ebf20a2ec7a8895f9abe172dfa85291: I must have caught my finger with the quill. Apologies; please continue.
textByHashes.5401d4ff47729ab85a4a032a5df8ca87174d14d6: Can I ask you about the Hosidius house?
textByHashes.e0a204478da57ac63ecbd333de4cd976418de11a: What is it that Hosidius provides for Great Kourend?
textByHashes.8961289c0101b47b873952a65865a8aa0582fcbb: How do people start gaining favour in Hosidius?
textByHashes.d2365f44d056c77052a3586f2c3a609538b38f2f: Why should I gain favour with Hosidius?
textByHashes.4fa0d4fcbec226437fadfe7ab9aea886a8c8688c: Can I ask you about the Lovakengj house?
textByHashes.d9d8eca9f6acafed5503c0d3539f7c89bb601baa: What is it that Lovakengj provides for Great Kourend?
textByHashes.f44e5fe42dcd26863b181e29190d4fd621e26619: How do people start gaining favour in Lovakengj?
textByHashes.0e878b294e0c401c0d5565e89f5e423db8683a61: Why should I gain favour with Lovakengj?
textByHashes.d39ef63c8a82027716ea57f1dc0107a34a3ca806: Can I ask you about the Piscarilius house?
textByHashes.38510033128825228afe66c209a2f373af887932: You're certainly a chirpy woman! What is it that Piscarilius house provides for Great Kourend?
textByHashes.941fe6257bbab3e8cb862908d50792002c72c482: How do people start gaining favour in Port Piscarilius?
textByHashes.b33a413e8af5e79b94d4f9d4206f11823d25c32b: Why should I gain favour in Piscarilius?
textByHashes.4d6fe13d37c722c87d61a328430f315d3080b807: Hang on a second... that last one didn't rhyme too well!
textByHashes.585276eec5ad923c61f88449c3bc9217af4669fd: Happy rhyming Leenz, please! Thanks for your help!
textByHashes.26840ed9854ab2ba32bfb5c4d49b2f51d72b2982: Can I ask you about the Shayzien house?
textByHashes.83faca0739a2d540ba041ad16851606885e9682b: What is it that Shayzien provides for Great Kourend?
textByHashes.edee3078b9e3209c8acc55dfe794fd553f9ffe7b: How do people start gaining favour in Shayzien?
textByHashes.2812e11f9e3e2996bfb5bd0795bc7b99683c1fdd: Why should I gain favour with Shayzien?
textByHashes.bb8a8578e7f8cbd414682186a973ffec5caa016d: I have gathered information from all of the houses.
textByHashes.035f6fd20748c20325791b7324aa43ec43e8940d: I could hear a voice, Veos... in my head! As if it whispered in my ear to return to you!
textByHashes.09d40168e390ea5ca70a7c2606a5f3d1495915f1: That reminds me, Veos! I didn't sign up to this with the knowledge that my mind would not only be entered but that there was a possibility of severely damaging my hand!
textByHashes.e383a43524912f7095638b939b06b5583ad5f80a: If I knew mentioning the Dark Altar would upset them so much, I'd have not written that bit of information down on the scroll!
textByHashes.8305e83e2aa10fa292b2b763940c6326d4396def: Well, I don't necessarily believe I have much of a choice!
textByHashes.3d02b6c76136535598796ff41adb201298067036: So what exactly is it your client now wants me to do?
textByHashes.c2d1c1339a7c1494770eef33203f17684ac48399: Can I ask why I would do that?
textByHashes.4df1c7275ed607246cc1dc76c4aaeab236ef6b38: Well, can't argue with that! I'll return when I'm done!
textByHashes.c932544a264324f980ad5ae161f0ae945461af68: I really wish I would be warned about these things earlier...
textByHashes.ea99da7ac76b77f32890ce201bce0479df1b80c4: Veos, enough is enough! I've suffered through enough. Exploding orbs and burning quills...
textByHashes.91512547b51fe87a8fc466fd48d286e4851472fa: You know darn well what I'm talking about!
textByHashes.bf6aa578643fe440f821ab987d2790999d75fcc9: Veos, this isn't funny anymore... Are you alright? I did all that your client asked for me...
textByHashes.c17c2aae777c7947a68a67b7f0fa7d21c729387e: Who are you? What have you done with Veos?
textByHashes.d7bd447ec6506a954ca9a73fab190c3045c2b021: I have a right to know!
textByHashes.1b2b23f9d0adea651d5f771840f93238b81dc5a8: Why did you ask me to do all of this?
textByHashes.e0bee9fc4eec5de2bd0706c6ada507df3aa2a5d7: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Hosidius house...
textByHashes.e23f435260da2cd2ad9ab33c53ae76ad89d5bb6f: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Arceuus house...
textByHashes.615424e60d40f406daa2c3ab1b3ea09914a46f59: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Lovakengj house...
textByHashes.127e13679905c4400bb063f20b9ca9296b404c38: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Piscarilius house...
textByHashes.6affa897d58286507d25417c44275be8aace249e: I wouldn't mind a boost within the Shayzien house...
textByHashes.0e1e09ab84f1549df15c42c84be0475444916a59: Wait! What if we need to speak to you again.
textByHashes.841197367852beb41e7479d7ae80ff6480eb0a63: That seems fair. Who should I speak to in order to find out more about the cities?
textByHashes.f0e39ed5259fef294d9b43a024c6d0b56c05f917: What am I meant to be doing, again?
textByHashes.8909f8f0e80ba47bd57309797ef46bf64a6199e8: I've lost something you've given me.
textByHashes.6dbda40ed659333422ced230876aa5f02b872ff8: Can I ask you about Arceuus?
textByHashes.d8b9b41480bd15a2becb2346df3dd527aafa7713: A journalist! Yes, a journalist from the mainland. I want to let the wider world know of how this incredible city works.
textByHashes.c166f67042837d5d466d67fc9cd42312aced7dca: I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! I'll be back in a tick!
textByHashes.6223e6080ed914ee0b9cdf2f7e6d9971ee44b694: So what exactly is it the people Arceuus bring to Great Kourend?
textByHashes.dc7290cec6b3ed7e9cfbe38f0a09fab0512605a9: What is there to do in Arceuus?
textByHashes.137d4e071abb1c68e4864200606888a6a27b1619: Can I ask you about Hosidius?
textByHashes.f3244ca1bdae04c48fbea45decca4687aaa15f84: Oh dear, I'm sorry. I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! Can you hold that thought?
textByHashes.77e12c9018e1a5409c615a22d43bd91416e3928b: What is there to do in Hosidius?
textByHashes.61f5e8ae9d3604cc9d617d96cb5a06a8f18f3ae2: Can I ask you about Lovakengj?
textByHashes.22d654a1aec75a1581caffb9949269352956de24: Oh dear, excuse me, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! I'll be back in a tick!
textByHashes.d23d429efeb07f525afe53fa98cbfdc7f44f3027: What is there to do in Lovakenj?
textByHashes.593fb8972b7db23f7d007f70fa5d5f079a820c0c: Can I ask you about Port Piscarilius?
textByHashes.96c27c8326e2f2a620f45399e493184af92baa60: I'm sorry, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! Can you hold that rhyme?
textByHashes.d373f2b24e0ea3ef411304b227312dc252d51190: You're certainly a chirpy woman! What is it that Port Piscarilius provides for Great Kourend?
textByHashes.2c1328ef9394c4a3d20f104a704ba5eb2a575443: What is there to do in Port Piscarilius?
textByHashes.967f16fa022198eefaad42f69892f2f7724d26ea: Can I ask you about Shayzien?
textByHashes.23cb42719d9322c5a6a6ee435812ce099c3b3068: Apologies, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment!
textByHashes.623494c26e0d0f55a4d27d8b4a39c13f099e8e86: What is there to do in Shayzien?
textByHashes.d0feb4201098846aa1b45bfb769fde3dfa01d4ee: I have gathered information from all of the cities.
textByHashes.cd91e6f546f75fc174d554503adb7af749e36004: That reminds me, Veos! I didn't sign up to this! I wasn't told that my mind would be entered. And what about the possibility of severely damaging my hand?
textByHashes.54ab43eddbc19eedf18e5cfa70641f1fe198171d: If I knew mentioning the Dark Altar would upset them so much, I'd have not written that bit of information down!
textByHashes.57a371c1281bcd5bce83bf675ba2de79dd5226d1: Veos, this isn't funny anymore... Are you alright? I did all that your client asked of me...
textByHashes.4bf5fd85251342ed84e4c2ea1829db20cb213c2e: OK old monk, what can I do?
textByHashes.7c1d353b04417b7be368dc9761281c24ccd22422: Right, gotcha. I'll do that then.
textByHashes.a352bb2335c88b17fd576d0bcb6dae6f37ffaed2: I have replaced all the cogs!
textByHashes.27f68e4f682c4d913cf9735404f95e3607089d19: Hello. Do you need any help? I'm looking for a quest.
textByHashes.6f5488758b422ad27ad7e22a5fa6ae95a878a40d: Uh, I'm not sure. Who are they?
textByHashes.ed45d2047381f511dc2ad1ce5bc1caadecfba157: Seriously, what are you talking about?
textByHashes.22230e711afdfed85ee1bf91d5be315352b25b65: Uh...they live in the cold? That's about all.
textByHashes.0c59c04868ab1125f94a74356eaae1ee8459b9f0: What do you need my help for?
textByHashes.c26f5cfc1d1da3a2454ac458f36369abd231f887: Okay, why not! But first, who are you and why are you researching penguins?
textByHashes.1d6ab5722c44e9ab2b0735dddd546d8b1eb8c42a: Ok! Okay then. So, what did you need me to do?
textByHashes.3c0bc9992b9f65f900a1edb493059d058b6e112d: Right, oak planks, steel nails, hammer, spade, east of Rellekka. Got it.
textByHashes.df319a069ded2c6cc70e384230014678b089a07b: Yes, I have them with me.
textByHashes.3c40afb924f27b2a5b74d395474c6a5da1c674c2: What do I need to get?
textByHashes.eba180021bf8b07132f78e7b90e548dc71d60ad3: I have no idea where that is.
textByHashes.7937a2049db0b0b3ef4037dfd8506ad4846e75fc: Oh, I know where to go.
textByHashes.6285e1fc42bb831e176013a7f01769e1c8f960c7: So, how do I make a bird hide?
textByHashes.db648b1ff02fe30dff7536cd1b784bfa4781be38: Okay, I've made the structure. Now what?
textByHashes.54f3d6ec4a6d61b56a9d0aacb7d87f1c3a7bf99f: Can we start observing the penguins?
textByHashes.56d6d65e13f663b71fb05ea6759bf3c294cad47d: It looked like one of them shivered and the other one just walked past. Nothing suspicious there, it is really cold here!
textByHashes.c762734beb8e80101e187fb840ddf2318ce777ed: Okay, calm down. What do you think we should do now?
textByHashes.3f11206111460e02caad1412071a97e8e2df3119: Of course! I mean, those penguins were acting quite strangely.
textByHashes.411ffd546e480bddf9dc2f2a54500df67e945e6d: Whoa there, I don't think this calls for hugging. What do we do next about the penguins?
textByHashes.aa7d7f96f3e6741aec4a586f86c95575d0e81382: How do you plan to do that?
textByHashes.90a3909a6ffec7af2e792fee2f188cb23687a9be: How do you plan to infiltrate the penguins?
textByHashes.7cbe3c90313dc30463f9ca2f4589b531a61be6b8: What? We'll just set it off walking? What good will that do?
textByHashes.568a040403c8ca61214db75f675f0722e7680f7a: Wait a minute, why am I being shrunk? Why can't you get in the suit and annoy the penguins?
textByHashes.52792aaba39c565b1f2961e2f41797e39007456c: Why do I have to make the suit? I'm tired of doing all the legwork.
textByHashes.704e8b8bd6f26ba6f93812fdd5cf6347f0a4fbb9: Oh, sorry... Hey, you told me you were on leave to do research!
textByHashes.60f836360c2274eef7dcd8f4c65a7999588c88e8: So that's why you can't wear the suit? Because you used to work near them?
textByHashes.08cd7a83a4e346a5b6d3adf1da050692f7fca15c: I've lost the clockwork book, could I have another?
textByHashes.562228fe05728fec2900d83737c6d380b76217bc: I'm a bit confused. Can you explain how to make the suit?
textByHashes.bc367da8b01c4a691088d416bc921239c234b22d: I don't think it was the penguins. You can't even make out the prints clearly, it could have been anything.
textByHashes.4f6bf20a9449bd222ca4167ea9d42ca3fcf1779b: It looks like a warning message to keep us away. I didn't think penguins were violent by nature.
textByHashes.cfb098490ecfe598aacc10f8c33a6a5736aa9318: Well, there aren't any penguins around now, so we can't try out the suit.
textByHashes.9ec51e7a9478547d6e4e56d56a9c472f35a39ee3: There are other penguins. What about the ones at the Zoo? At least we can test the suit on them.
textByHashes.991999685be242e40f46066ac543833e1f668218: Then why the whole malarkey with the boat?
textByHashes.536972a8e0dd3234ea5125ec4778c5839dfdf67a: Guess we should try this out. How do you know a shrinking spell, anyway?
textByHashes.97523c33ee9cb394197ebc9433e7a415fc3fa282: Larry, you are one unlucky dude.
textByHashes.1aec4191b2a95958a8928bd9e6d0b13b6e57206f: Seems like a pretty wise old man.
textByHashes.6ddca5f85ef541a0aef4fd5de5c8216fb3b89d01: Right, well we don't have all day. Time to be a penguin!
textByHashes.135f8476caf1d5e6de281ab057035d4b0b24b64c: Right, right. Let's just get this over with.
textByHashes.4fd98a0f089ff59d7ac7d0c6cb4619b1559c623c: Okay, I'm ready to be big again! Please get me out of this.
textByHashes.3ef32bf7dabd2a455a1968562c207fe37604603f: I'm, uh, speaking penguin, I think.
textByHashes.e6a4e93b694eeb681702874c50006366fce0cfa9: WAIT. How come you can speak in the common tongue? You're a penguin!
textByHashes.2157165996906d812e8e39e56702eb168d8a4bd7: Oh, right. Yes, of course! Uh, I was just, uh, testing you. Making sure you're on your toes, claws, whatever.
textByHashes.f22c684f9e896037438b8a5e0b8303b1dedf01f0: I better try and get this greeting right.
textByHashes.fddd8f3c21b169ffa95200fd6141c26113bd155c: *Whew, that was right. Two more moves to do. If I get those right, he should speak to me.*
textByHashes.2cfea2d89b28d26e651b8a9c6392c68fdf956c63: *I just need to do one more move and I'll have gotten the greeting right.*
textByHashes.c909d934b3442b5626564679be76d6c6be3bae48: Uh, the main directive? Yeah...sure, I made progress with it. It was...easy?
textByHashes.c886931815bf6e88e885f68ef8dc2674342c3e22: Uh, yeah. I just kind of jumped off a hill and flapped a lot.
textByHashes.899da9f94a27baf5f3bec5d62847b3e932376e71: I also launched myself out of a cannon!
textByHashes.c3d2732c599ca5c3f8a6ece0f7b8803050dc2eed: Then I flew in a hot air balloon.
textByHashes.ced01d60a467f17ec9d906668e7303b5975d70ac: Why is this so important? I mean, we're good swimmers, who cares if we can't fly?
textByHashes.1706317d64c6a3bda628c90b782d24e98bf1f2dc: The penguin gave me his mission report and told me to go to Lumbridge to speak to the penguins there and then go to 'the outpost'.
textByHashes.975b05ef48182d8ee6057160bd85cb763ff8bc3d: Maybe the penguins in Lumbridge are undercover?
textByHashes.f204ea260f1ff8cf589a04bf6e2775ea0ad94ea1: I didn't find out where their outpost is. I'm hoping the ones in Lumbridge will tell me.
textByHashes.e3bb862c9f645b82a7794ce57619cbe8a7f49cf7: Seems kind of crazy that these penguins have mission reports and operatives.
textByHashes.1bd234b150afa740071a156b96264825f9d256af: They don't even have thumbs. How organised can they be?
textByHashes.b53de4fb5eb1134020eed04aef4add0f01b45d9f: So, we're in Lumbridge. Where are these penguins?
textByHashes.4e749781a78fd25564868e48ea7db50e4ed5113e: I should probably do the secret handshake before I try talking to these penguins.
textByHashes.cb2233e7462df0fb4ff6e2d56de799706aa2d4aa: But I gave the correct greeting. You have to talk to me.
textByHashes.666a8fefc214d19b82c7ecbb308c20a72c4d3bc0: But the penguins at the Zoo sent me. They spoke to me without some phrase.
textByHashes.69fc15f94d56f2292e901e908347601d59c6c047: The penguins won't talk to me without some stupid secret phrase. These penguins are crazy!
textByHashes.ca7fc5c79abd3818b510db36e35fc93643ec6b62: The penguins in Lumbridge refuse to talk to me. They keep demanding a secret phrase.
textByHashes.142df8b2d403e40cadb704e80eafe89a1b89da92: Oh, where all of the penguins...I mean us...live?
textByHashes.f4938d5f13f13f1afa69f01cb47429b833ca9c39: You sound pretty homesick. Can't you go and visit Palingrad?
textByHashes.3c54f33b87f588ff945f0509d3eadcaa382e0eeb: Gee, I sure would like to get back, too. If only you'd tell me the phrase, so I could get the other mission report and move on.
textByHashes.7e730a12bf443f0fe18092b7d88912915eef80da: Uh, I forgot what the phrase was.
textByHashes.1d51317725121898c498f35b183fb3d5f11f9761: That was very careless of you, comrade. But it is your problem, not mine.
textByHashes.3ee4899b5dff45d46da2723bbc9720e7abf2235c: I must have left the outpost before they gave out the phrase.
textByHashes.671945fb309adb86f5860c4707554f6d734f5e49: I need that phrase! Isn't there anything you can do?
textByHashes.85c66fbd4b901a3a9d7407e7744ba7efc45659c7: Hmm, no I'll hang on to it.
textByHashes.835c37659f8def1a4b3c3f778b420a66b451921d: You mean they aren't the same?
textByHashes.251997e7fc47453b33e743872b88c84dd1af43e7: The Zoo penguin won't tell me the phrase.
textByHashes.e957e17816a57f604488b7c2b0924a185ff7767f: I don't think I ever want to be a Zoo keeper.
textByHashes.046d0dd7f56a8e13f939db489a78bae9eebed507: I got the phrase! These penguins are so weird. It's something about a walrus.
textByHashes.746ea6a6e21102d56a516c909a94aef4141de604: The penguin at the Zoo told me to see if you had any news.
textByHashes.13620828764f13927655daf95f75509485f5e49a: You want me to disguise myself as a human and talk to the Farmer? Seems like a tough request. I'll only do it if you tell me how to get to the outpost.
textByHashes.19081e638aaebadb7c75977caab314d2075d1bdf: Are you calling me dumb? Fine. You can talk to the Farmer yourself, and compromise your mission.
textByHashes.59967186c9314ddeb59c960803573eb6b96d21f9: I need to talk to you about penguins.
textByHashes.888ac55ae120601c94232c0316d3bee56e8fb166: Hey Fred! You've been messing with the wrong people. You better leave the penguins alone... OR ELSE!
textByHashes.d130ca07b7d18c5ee77c94c84bb158768001b773: I mean it Fred, I don't know whose side you're working for, but assassinating the penguin operatives is going to get you in trouble. To think you'd even stoop to sending others to try and 'shear' them. Be careful, or you might find you've been shorn.
textByHashes.93949865490fc9074ad5429d538835a8695da463: Don't play neutral with me, Fred. I see right through you. You're probably working for the squirrels, aren't you? I'll be watching Fred. I'm always watching.
textByHashes.5b929056b0b1c9bb09776f3f3fd4c23c47f78b74: You know that 'Thing' out in your field? It's two penguins in disguise.
textByHashes.398d026dc56ad674c0a509e9a223bf5375cc24cf: No really, it is! They're trying to observe humans to learn our weaknesses.
textByHashes.e78a24224f56e85beb99dc1646d990326d24e07f: They probably thought they'd blend in better. Anyway, I came to warn you to not annoy them too much. They're funny little guys but they seem to have a grudge against you.
textByHashes.cf890e415466e53a00af20c87027e682c8fdceb1: Yes, I have a penguin suit and I know the secret greeting. I'm infiltrating them because this crazy guy Larry is convinced they are trying to take over the world or something.
textByHashes.0dcb04d268f3cf2e2aea7863f718db466882d48d: HEY! I'm not crazy! Larry's a little left of centre, but I'm just helping him out. The penguins really can talk.
textByHashes.73ee683ce5421718750643fd6c9b6fb57433785a: Fine. Don't believe me. Larry and I will prove you wrong. Just don't go near the penguins, Fred, not if you value your life.
textByHashes.2dc0b485985740070dd90abdaef07776ae17f46f: The Farmer is definitely an enemy. High ranking too, I think. He might even be the King of Lumbridge in disguise!
textByHashes.36ca76b54d0325ef482ec54e22f181071efbe8d3: Well, that's why he's in disguise. Duh.
textByHashes.72fe761873b205896372d7affbf1562016f82f2a: The Farmer is harmless. The sheep, however...now they seem pretty crafty.
textByHashes.bab58fdbfd7009388cb6f78c25d80f3347b39c5f: Exactly! So you don't suspect them! That's why they are so cunning. Watch your backs.
textByHashes.0d1a26f4ee8e7eec36d6a5988bd9709d17161e62: Hey wait, you said you'd tell me where the outpost is!
textByHashes.41672b2bc1ffaf6b0ccd66a79108160f18ac7131: I just convinced them Fred the Farmer was the King of Lumbridge!
textByHashes.d1bd60f4293f90a6441f1c094016e2a9e10fe7f3: Exactly! They are so gullible. Even if they are organised.
textByHashes.bdab06b64382aaf1e662bdbce6016b4d8f1048d9: Sorry. It was just a bit of fun.
textByHashes.94a6b94eafc2a00a65ccb5fbc7121c3a659ccbd4: I just convinced the penguins that the sheep are agents for the other side.
textByHashes.a083c250fec0aff502530674690aab0d7dac7036: No! They're just sheep. But I wanted to confuse the penguins. Put them off our scent.
textByHashes.432d2573c7e97c73e76c1d4f28f4f5a58d88672a: Larry, we need to get you to hang out with people, not animals.
textByHashes.9d1a5851c7248220d6a771431c8d6f632610cdba: I know where their outpost is! The entrance is on the iceberg. It's concealed by an avalanche.
textByHashes.4be9b8071464365ac0c8a39384ca67edc19e47cb: It's fun for you! You're not risking your neck.
textByHashes.265d744931980e146838ab19416fedab52ebe975: No...I mean...yes. Oh never mind. Just do the spell. Wait, won't the spell wear off once I'm inside? You'll be too far away.
textByHashes.d5249a9780ea1bd585fa714b01f4fd17cbd9ea2a: This guy looks official. I'd better do the greeting before I speak to him.
textByHashes.0c0da5eeec9e621cc436055c61c68dfb9a81ccc2: ID? No one told me anything about ID.
textByHashes.dc390f83cd85dbacae84a850ee0e81e4b8a876bf: The penguin at the entrance said I needed to have an ID. Nobody told me about any ID!
textByHashes.1ed6fd4e2e8f766be9b9cf8826abae95bc668280: Well, I've misplaced me, I mean my, ID card.
textByHashes.23fb4cb82d7686ee8a0218a44d25deec0bdc3d25: Yeah, my missin repor'. I think I need one of them too.
textByHashes.8a03b0e2e13001e85887d2575d04ae9ca975ae23: So you need swamp tar and five feathers. Will chicken feathers do?
textByHashes.fec1d45867def1b1845fd5f8d6e996a188babb89: Tell me about this black market you run. Seems kind of risky.
textByHashes.3b9f125f875cdac2d56075fe53a5f4f1136c8ae5: Riiiight. Fettucine Mafia. I'll remember that.
textByHashes.bd752c78b53a64080bb02b241a216e04f7a5bf6c: It was either that or Pear.
textByHashes.50085faba9db22a87ec3c65c91d6b6bf78f2bdb5: Hippie parents, sir. They had weird ideas about names.
textByHashes.e5660ce0881fd131fc19f974d97db4807b5d9914: Yes, and I have my mission report. I also have the mission reports from the operatives in the Ardougne Zoo and the Lumbridge sheep field.
textByHashes.2e9275764317d7ba90cd2c548afc84349f0ee1b7: Oh yeah. It was amazing. You know, I just...flapped. Really fast.
textByHashes.124e6dd09a87659025a9382c21f9b58bf84ba266: It wasn't too bad. I was wearing a helmet at the time.
textByHashes.648645b92d2e6906da11181f99ff33e8813d893e: Well, it was a sack of cloth with a basket attached to the bottom and when you filled it with hot air it went up.
textByHashes.99473607d979bd848604a62a09bc0fa2ed0e2182: A physical? What, are they going to examine my body?
textByHashes.c7a287bc9bfb0f1fb041644c5f668fa3f7c53110: All those penguins, what are they doing?
textByHashes.2bb1a161aab596736fd35e46cfb896c19ed4a40b: Larry, you were right! There's an entire army of them, and they're drilling and... Larry, they're ORGANISED!
textByHashes.be6778b0b0300caec32efc08dececca5c0b0c92e: I know what I saw! They were doing drills and everything.
textByHashes.ad01327c1895e8253a6376ab503a7d57dcaf3c10: War plans! Who are they going to war with?
textByHashes.160647d3e40df83afa27bc51117bf99ef979ef3c: Keep your shorts on; I'm working on it.
textByHashes.604f8473226279c63832182d2f10ad3f0ff39bc9: You there, let me through those doors.
textByHashes.8f6972b72085e8fd8e6f7f44fc7672741d48759c: You look like...knowledgeable...penguins. What's through those doors at the end of the hall?
textByHashes.ae6cc8f06f9472bfff301945d3ede3441873cd8e: Yes, well, I would like to know what rooms.
textByHashes.272133fdce6d99f9d1f8928a6e8cff8a26528c1e: Who are you? You don't really look like KGP agents.
textByHashes.e42a5d4252e7222f3d4e360fd1c104b6309ba509: Sure, I haven't got anything to lose, except my eardrums.
textByHashes.e19c98694f554778a4ea7e25dcb44cf790da0185: But this room is filled with instruments.
textByHashes.239e8e93a0f5bbd6ab5835c6ad49e73a1b6f837a: What about a cowbell? You don't need thumbs for that.
textByHashes.f2f066e6ed80433cf9e37f91b0d97c5f0cc14894: Wait, why am I getting these instruments?
textByHashes.c213892cd451cf65dc8033dc806d1f97cee41333: I think I have a lead. These two penguin bards seem to know a lot of the history of the iceberg. I think they might know a way into the War Room.
textByHashes.c610f0c6833087d6b77bb2211420f2e65865e7af: Where would I get a cowbell or a set of bongos?
textByHashes.be12126303239fae945561fb7b1dc51734658374: What did I need to get you?
textByHashes.76f93de0b7384a9a12a8ecb92fde16ac62730987: Now might be a good time for me to slip out and get through those doors...
textByHashes.47e364ea7501f89feafebbca41bc14462dd57e43: Pescaling Pax was there, and he forced me out of the suit and then threw me into a cage with the Ice Lords!
textByHashes.9c24dde2ab524013b895dd20db415f771a4c79a7: There was a map of the world and a lot of little penguin figures.
textByHashes.1e812898ee47a8ca5342eb72746bb3c855191634: LARRY! We've just uncovered a plot that could destroy everything we hold dear. Don't you think we should focus on stopping them?
textByHashes.c0b5f0c2345e9ef2f8f8bfd250915d1cf32a79bb: We need to plan our next move, but now they know both our scents and might come after us!
textByHashes.2d95b46534a5da5772dd02835acce8dea4acd05d: The hide was destroyed. It's too damaged to rebuild, so we can't use it to observe penguins any more.
textByHashes.ae42d23bdced5dc8e6098c341768bd61512d9a99: I can't speak to the penguins when I'm not in my disguise.
textByHashes.cf487fc2cadf2ce1f00eb41a9b2af3f43e8de26f: So what do you plan to do now?
textByHashes.4f06b3b5d5d4f4e1a640b8a769d709d942518c2e: That's a very good point. Does this mean you can reopen the city?
textByHashes.346f9ea8aea3e7c2fde29c6c0ea23b85f556452f: But if there's no risk of them becoming infected, can't they open up again as well?
textByHashes.1bc0a5c57398a9ea1d747624ed175f195f7938b1: Well first up, why don't you tell me what happened with Menaphos? You said something about them being willing to kill?
textByHashes.adfa0fde26629f4ba17a15546826e0d0cc7934b8: Actually, I have other things to do.
textByHashes.63e0b976f1fb7ead1649df2478bc7ac3f198330d: So they just started firing arrows at you? They sound like cold-blooded thugs.
textByHashes.70ac260baebcee9baf2055ca603bb86fe960e80d: By old ways, do you mean Icthlarin?
textByHashes.afccd2dde4b2405328b9dd5cadf6a0d062c591bc: Any ideas on how we do that?
textByHashes.cab32bb8e7b52ddfe3d7186d93e57b279fe9868b: What if I disguised myself as a citizen or a guard?
textByHashes.1e6babadb0af1319aa39e2d660bcb40b7501b13e: So how do they get food and other supplies in?
textByHashes.13e3e48e7f2bd6ecf9c9ec4e60d39c2c6fc880d6: I see. Doesn't sound like we can make anything work there then.
textByHashes.d958b3f5ad2b381b8d383f5cd27013b96b45c3e5: Is there any way across the river?
textByHashes.f18789e657b4db4db5c7b8ecd9a129940b6c6ffc: Perhaps I could fight my way in?
textByHashes.54d89454a941b6cee38c2f4bfad467312fb614b5: Is there any way into Menaphos from below?
textByHashes.cc543e6ac34359cc0c8e7e18bfd68a49b351025f: Oh. So there aren't any tunnels under this city?
textByHashes.85c973faa625a8c80cad9ab035b0d7f5dd40db03: And his followers liked to dig tunnels?
textByHashes.c26bd1c0974c1633e3da4aa98b68560fb5fbc0c9: And you don't think there's a chance they might have built some tunnels under Sophanem and Menaphos?
textByHashes.60d5389bd77af4e7bb5643599d1860897dab39c8: Interesting. I'll pay him a visit.
textByHashes.2ca1f39475d3fe2c46f4089dbad8031d3ce6c5d6: I'll have to think some more.
textByHashes.4eaa9210a7ad41232d66e32c73cdc3b696d447f7: I'll have a think about it.
textByHashes.ffe5af3217784db90debd0efc5064875089733a1: I'm hoping to learn a bit more about the Sect of Scabaras. The High Priest said you'd be a good person to ask.
textByHashes.46cc6742963f7f2402e37e705a17c3dfe8074a50: Speaking of the temple, what happened here? The place isn't looking great.
textByHashes.83c894dd85d152072c0c87eb4f481cb03c2194f3: What? Why wasn't the High Priest aware of this?
textByHashes.3941437d6da88b97177dd0416ff829db9533b791: I'm sure he'd have still liked to have been made aware. You say they came from beneath the cellar?
textByHashes.651468b8d9cfca79655158004f1a7782f5665e1e: Well then I think this is just what I'm after. I'd like to investigate these tunnels.
textByHashes.6d299dc9c088337793cda661bef963cf60440612: I'm afraid it's essential that I go down there.
textByHashes.8636e3c12b90f6441eac78da3748a6a9ef7bd993: Thanks. You've been a great help.
textByHashes.7e2936c30995ae78297ab2dfa5eee3ded0d2c3e2: I haven't made it down to the tunnels yet.
textByHashes.0e33f98287b85c272ddeb641bd391f5e6fdbbe64: I will. Thanks for the warning.
textByHashes.62450fff759f782db7f4b1a7350be9f23bd12502: What are you doing down here?
textByHashes.d0404b4cedb7ee34b13dc5ebd1e5e7e5d9cc75f9: That's okay, I have one with me anyway.
textByHashes.af7dbbc41a84f842159e279db320b169592e0a9d: Aren't you afraid you'll fall ill as well?
textByHashes.4be41889894bd4a0d083fce32e36c0b6b8aac3ad: I'll look out for them then.
textByHashes.8e3c0302bab30df398310ff7c0f102729034803e: Not bad. Hopefully I'll make some real progress soon.
textByHashes.0d77e87b0bb764ba55d0e8c729c9a7a511bfc363: Well good luck, and be careful in those tunnels.
textByHashes.ecf46bccbb2203a585bffc69676344577e096c53: No, I'm not, I'm . As for Kaleef, I'm afraid I have some bad news about him.
textByHashes.da76191a84aae0fe2f861d512164245d962fce45: I'm sorry, but Kaleef is dead.
textByHashes.e91eba25e57d9fb90020eb2d52b8d0a0d4489c73: It's true. It looks like some creature killed him as he was entering this cavern.
textByHashes.fec20f9a7777a73dfd626aa8f138a944d500639b: Were the two of you close?
textByHashes.a2c0dad7b093970a92cee4837c7a3f866b5d1b4a: To be honest, that's kind of what I was hoping as well. I came down here to try and find a way into Menaphos.
textByHashes.6e7c65ea9e8f1c87f3fb468b2c61feae27478280: So you have no way to leave?
textByHashes.0230f8ab632957bc1afd11c27ee850d4074a1b37: Hmm... That gives me an idea.
textByHashes.3982169a0154f208e63eaeb160d07bef992ba8f9: The reason I'm looking for a way into Menaphos is so that I can help the citizens of Sophanem trapped there return home. However, maybe I don't actually need to enter the city to help them.
textByHashes.6db452868ea46afdcab4c10c869c0e2f640a84e4: You said you knew of a way out of the city. You could help the citizens escape.
textByHashes.de5f4c6038aa6a50d085204ad0f6b3c552160237: Because if you help me, I might be able to help you. You mentioned Osman, right? I'm guessing you work for him, which makes you a spy from Al Kharid.
textByHashes.c2bf5ee0258695c043e74fd0b47b435b9e43e6c9: Yes. I'm the one who helped him free Prince Ali. I'm sure I could convince him to reconsider your posting.
textByHashes.02f3bd601924365081ba976f0623f8303f7ee209: You want him to come here?
textByHashes.23743a24b83dbac898e4a59d240ba02f0dac0b20: Alright. I'll go to Al Kharid and see what I can do.
textByHashes.0a8b4b12ac2595ebd5f46d230f803e13d2a21042: I want to talk to you about Sophanem.
textByHashes.a54e4227a8830833b94f2bd127ef0d4fa37a071d: Yes. Your help is needed urgently there.
textByHashes.377dd888604aeab76c6c79751f50edbbc76901cd: Maisa wants to speak with you.
textByHashes.4af0a2ec64f2f7851068f83b619b33b832610813: What? What have you been up to there?
textByHashes.03af57c335954ae99add77616829c23622630b2f: You don't need to be so secretive with me. Did I not prove myself by freeing Prince Ali?
textByHashes.aa1f5472073f55ec2754dd73c23ac3467cafc3d8: Oh I see. So one of those rivalries is between Menaphos and Al Kharid?
textByHashes.ce7cd96d18b04bdc2cbc94aa9c9d70bfa3fbae12: Does the Emir agree with you on that?
textByHashes.398dd40a371781e48e9c8055623d103e291eb3ab: Look, this is all very interesting, but one of your people, Kaleef, is dead. He was meant to relieve Maisa of her post in Menaphos, but now he can't.
textByHashes.e493fc884847e7c60c2c345b26080120da23ea00: No. Maisa is insisting that you meet with her personally.
textByHashes.35dd2e063b1256318c91ce00c835db868b404fc2: That's not going to work. There's a chasm blocking the way from Sophanem to Menaphos. Any agent you send won't be able to enter the city. That's why Maisa wants to speak with you.
textByHashes.88ed27a406825b47f8f531d4f22e513ff165432f: But I need Maisa to help me with something. She'll only do that if you go and speak to her.
textByHashes.8f11cab01e9382857a29daf58c934d0b4b4b9eeb: And Prince Ali was your problem, but I still helped you.
textByHashes.a4b173fbdda172ffcfa8b08262bef9ec59b88a32: When Menaphos was locked down, many citizens from Sophanem were trapped there. I need to try and get them out of the city, but I have no way of entering Menaphos myself.
textByHashes.bda7855b50fcfbd8c0b66a9bce23c710cfaabccc: There might be treasures underneath Sophanem.
textByHashes.a69ea492f85ab182bcc7793b160697f3bfb63352: It could drive a wedge between the Menaphite cities.
textByHashes.b5f66627a3b87080fce91231758db2ede8c50330: Menaphos wouldn't be happy if the citizens of Sophanem bypassed the quarantine. I imagine you'd be able to take advantage of that.
textByHashes.2811f105c36932a3331073ed4f68a81fd17f9326: It would give you the chance to spy first hand.
textByHashes.5c629d351b2edcc68c948fa6373c44f4afa74770: What's wrong with using the gates?
textByHashes.3e69bd0296a1ff2ea29e0972111f587013b5b51d: Okay, so maybe it wasn't one of my better suggestions.
textByHashes.a023a7888eabbcd4c9dc1fdbdedafbc24f1386a9: I know of a secret entrance to the north.
textByHashes.1f56c94ba42bbcedef0430411b9299bd9706c9f8: There's a tunnel in some rocks near a camp.
textByHashes.854cb06ae7f6f04b70e9e3edf0633830b9fedec8: What if you injure yourself down in the tunnels?
textByHashes.4cc868d439238277bc05479f4bc1bbb1a2a40549: Osman's been gone for hours. I think I should have a look for him.
textByHashes.4c7592968aaed3c1ef1201f8dc490f741c7c6232: Who are you? Osman can't possibly be here!
textByHashes.48c7e32841442e3c3e15f2490891294590ddc459: So... you're one of his agents then? But you look just like him?
textByHashes.9ae09df30b14679710e31bc03bb5f6239f39b098: Well the last time I worked with Osman there was some business with really bad wigs.
textByHashes.7ae36e0861833f15320a898cf82dfb4406e94079: Oh no! I'll keep my eyes peeled for suspicious looking characters.
textByHashes.5623b13141a03ed6396e2b8afe27a8a840187bd3: Well your two hours ran out a long time ago. Anyway, where did you disappear off to during the fight?
textByHashes.e70ebe2cf291c64313f59573b54a900162e56b62: Right... So are you going to say 'thank you' or anything?
textByHashes.4de12fa4874daafbf8824d87b32db3a091b3961c: That's good to hear. I guess I should let the High Priest know.
textByHashes.7be6f3819cd41fa9bf5581268c43a9dc8db731d4: Disguised among the dead? That's quite ingenious. I'm glad to hear they're home safe.
textByHashes.f815bc591b2c3e18bb5b2e5cb4454a7d7eefc02d: I have all of those ingredients on me already!
textByHashes.0ab8ab4a1845a0fefb948b30fd716db6a36ad00c: Not exactly. I just had an odd feeling you might be needing these ingredients. If I see a cook, I presume there's food of some kind! Lucky guess I suppose.
textByHashes.d8d773da793301b6fb02b0a6cb2b892606c8fe1b: So do I get to go to the Duke's Party?
textByHashes.d1d1711427626542241f4c31496fb8ded91a9027: Well, maybe one day I'll be important enough to sit on the Duke's table.
textByHashes.829531600df51915c394011eff08e9afe211dccd: So where do I find these ingredients then?
textByHashes.e851bf7a428884fcb6d52dd967e82728f3f2591a: I've got all the information I need. Thanks.
textByHashes.6701afd5b1b34349988f2859b5e227451ac5a4ad: Actually, I know where to find this stuff.
textByHashes.a71971128336a8242cfa2d9aca9f91757a1f5ceb: No, I don't feel like it. Maybe later.
textByHashes.93f9fd9c22889e1c8166c05108c3e3f98bdbc892: You're a cook, why don't you bake me a cake?
textByHashes.a1491f76dbde885b44902f03ce4e5f772a9cc1ed: I'd take the rest of the day off if I were you.
textByHashes.78fe57a0747c9cef32b34e88159ca98401355457: Well maybe you need to take a holiday...
textByHashes.efff7f2a6ffde30d703ce89951a6b93d3606c31e: Hmm, why not run away to the sea and start a new life as a Pirate?
textByHashes.142f9f2819d561657ebb46979ac073d94291af7f: I'm afraid I've run out of ideas.
textByHashes.a322da5cf1c6514dcc5daf6f75abb88a1fd219c5: Still, suits you. The trousers are pretty special too.
textByHashes.254a4e816587fb073352e4efc66363936fd8c80d: The whole hat, apron, stripey trousers ensemble - it works. It make you looks like a real cook.
textByHashes.9eb5b3ebce9aa4bd3e72ed87f42bbd4b4c89bd12: I haven't got any of them yet, I'm still looking.
textByHashes.80238609957c25194fef3f0d04b866d0a77bcb9e: Is there anything you'd like me to do for you, sir?
textByHashes.f359313d67ff7a8375dcfe32fe8bea7d122d1943: No thanks, I wouldn't work here if you paid me.
textByHashes.3fb7a251ecb9bef19bc76d4aa8555544eb392c81: Do you know where I could find body parts?
textByHashes.7ba4d76d38882882c0fefe1301cdb4ed77f86f2f: What do you want me to do, again?
textByHashes.43a02d17f8c2294fdf43877fcdd9058878a0706e: Why do you want to make a creature?
textByHashes.f946bfa83e906b9aa24d8be6d14ad53324f19952: Then why did you need to come to Morytania?
textByHashes.54a36b487a55a7a818133bddd96b792b5ada0bff: Will this creature put me out of a job?
textByHashes.7b1b0bcd36133dfe56bf172588b3c09fc4af4329: I must get back to work, sir.
textByHashes.b59058a5ec7dde27aa296b842732ae2b7e183680: Can you tell me anything about Fenkenstrain?
textByHashes.8019ded4c3578383922fa95c0330ade529660af4: Did you see who did it, before ...
textByHashes.406b5f0cd9df799e287ddb1a275cc33d9112c17e: Would you show me where the place was?
textByHashes.97285d176533e9f6ebebb9f91dd8f74fafe9c040: Don't worry, I was just trying to make conversation.
textByHashes.83a037fc175e9d3f9e2c61a6c5a558c494146ce8: What exactly is in the jar?
textByHashes.0372f1ee1113b4d8ea4a8512af61ca35ef25b70b: That sounds very nice, but I'm afraid I don't have enough gold at the moment.
textByHashes.2f386bd7974fbc4fdf6400805e5382d04eb37551: I'm afraid I'm not really hungry at the moment.
textByHashes.d89f59ba834644323a43a564602c6144a4727dd2: I have a winner for you here, Doctor! Look! It's still moving!
textByHashes.d81fc833dadffa93b5f9822fa213e743463e82f2: I have some body parts for you.
textByHashes.4c73f9f7ae074edc2dd50246c6ed3e65f08dd964: Sorry, can't make lightning, you've got the wrong man-
textByHashes.be6a002c373ddc590854856152ef20b5d6e8b20f: Repair the lightning conductor, right. Can I have a break, soon? By law I'm entitled to 15 minutes every-
textByHashes.bb044988e4b8900ee9e1c0efa51bd11b2fc5683d: How do I repair the lightning conductor?
textByHashes.fc566cf566f667b86ae390244f1f778023f621eb: Do you know where the key to the shed is?
textByHashes.e63864dd16606d4fa740416fb52ccd1f14c1e73c: Do you know where I can find a lightning conductor mould?
textByHashes.32af954ee99fd101c0ce4f6ee4664b5b5d6f3e88: So the creature wasn't all you'd hoped, then?
textByHashes.0d70cb1e19bcebb99eaeb83ccf0026aa72ffb2f2: Oh, I see, we're developing a sense of right and wrong now are we?
textByHashes.44bf34544cbe491f5d03beec73444df86cc1491e: Bit late for that, I'd say.
textByHashes.35f164657b3e8ac78e88556517d6f5f606d2fa3f: What do you want me to do about it?
textByHashes.cd6f934e941ed50e06cf8d7e2e18d8e64023446a: I am commanded to destroy you, creature!
textByHashes.812c8ec3df4a14f2e7dfbf1c26b2751964b6642f: You really don't know, do you? Have a look for yourself.
textByHashes.c052f5c6c15f9164b8a193893a53d55dab9993ba: I'm sorry. I suppose I'm partly to blame for this.
textByHashes.109775feb168e63a74875357467779ecc17ecefd: So the castle wasn't really abandoned when he found it?
textByHashes.f31f0b4e941fcca636bc646ae8e04186e74c9f18: I found your brain in a jar in Canifis, so he must have sold you too.
textByHashes.5f98b89acdb6bb4bd8890d7562d71d307f98cc11: That's it - I'm leaving this dreadful place, whether I get paid or not. Is there anything I can do for you before I leave?
textByHashes.6d0067a6a1d2b5f5bfa06be4ce5aac5f94421ae9: Do you know how I can stop Fenkenstrain's experiments?
textByHashes.ecf2dbfd5ca34abc638ddb97b5e4952fb2aad146: Never, now that he has told me the truth!
textByHashes.e525211c25a21ef98d82b4c8a2f59ff738d86ad0: I stole the Ring of Charos from Fenkenstrain.
textByHashes.c64b466186b7eac94036e6f9d021e154d730985b: Do you want the ring back? It is yours after all.
textByHashes.723243b62834e846849473f71b3bcc557b3a5fff: It is all you deserve. Lord Rologarth is master of this castle once more. Let him protect you - if he wants to.
textByHashes.4cb5b9786d089a8326d056f2c450c88641f6fdc7: Anything I can do to help?
textByHashes.5ddd42eca4329b82c79a679e5e94d683caae05f0: Thanks for the warning. I'll head over and see what I can do.
textByHashes.a44aeb055b9f5e531770ae584ded25f91717787b: I'm sorry to hear that. Hopefully you manage to work something out.
textByHashes.365d82bdf1b765d232780d2220450f01fe50c3df: Where can I find the Council Office?
textByHashes.e05f45085a8bc76b8fd5ada823011be577a4d9c7: Hello there. Are you Councillor Catherine? I was hoping you could help me with something.
textByHashes.c0ab74dd40e047d806627afda7bff4f14272244a: I had a question about one of the local by-laws. Apparently non-human workers aren't allowed to do business in Catherby?
textByHashes.e6dbb85cc48c498f12e72a1873590f4fa8d69c48: Doesn't that strike you as a bit... wrong?
textByHashes.98fb4574de41630cd534af308201397f8684d2d9: I see... So you wouldn't even be willing to let Arhein's duck track a few currents? The results would be very useful, not just to Arhein. I imagine any sailor docking here would find them helpful.
textByHashes.31a91b76b6ce59b3ffc9659b616b9ac049e1a63c: Well, yes, I suppose you could say that.
textByHashes.34c47e14da1e3a7bf84bcd90a3d9d15ace8afbfb: But why do I need to...
textByHashes.d5b1f46a1b5f73d043db0e4c680133d9839065cf: Okay... I don't actually really care about the form though.
textByHashes.95b4bb3a23a8a8066220a925864c07c3dde82ee4: That by-law about non-humans... I want to get it changed.
textByHashes.bf2584b217ff49463e8c66fc4afb479691ec27bd: Right, we're getting somewhere. Where can I find the mayor?
textByHashes.a107847354dcc2ccda84bff428cf46a9f985701a: Yeah... I think I'll pass on that.
textByHashes.9dca1b5eae858268e6fdb7be2543b164c2af8a29: I need to speak to the mayor.
textByHashes.8040c944b7dbe7d4e0f414d196c2436d8d50fde5: I need to find the Mayor of Catherby.
textByHashes.7ddb2bdb7c74680bad6a6b2e23495fe8ce35459a: Oh... I'm sorry to hear that.
textByHashes.2f217b85961e4ea4f1175f4c02208526893e0906: It does? That feels like the kind of thing I should be worried about...
textByHashes.3de863bb8fe58c12eaf80f8c9de8e141ea3b020f: Apparently only the mayor can approve a change to the by-laws.
textByHashes.8b4fe623db1d83386de2710792050c599789633f: Where on Gielinor will we get another mayor? And how in the name of Guthix's trousers will Catherine not notice?
textByHashes.a45cedbdf41f4ecb8de40b469d6094e3762aeb41: I'm not sure this democracy thing is going to catch on if it keeps being implemented this badly.
textByHashes.ae793fb229597aa12a67bfd99498836d3fe1abf9: So the answer was a fish?
textByHashes.7f35989af3952c643d1ca6c7c1c68ad350b39b6b: Of course. And as a result, you now need to make sure she doesn't know the mayor died.
textByHashes.16e840475a52ba1b0db18cfa3c1e0c0f9a0a9f79: I'll help you replace the fish.
textByHashes.403f620cc03aa47eb4f417c992f9d2646d77e13c: You know, out of context, that might be the strangest thing anyone has ever said.
textByHashes.f9e358eff1df427dec6dcf43b9e17eb126fdabf8: Arhein said you could help me get a replacement.
textByHashes.74cd2e98813247f94d2f5326f33e21c1792ccc2c: Where can I get the fishbowl and net?
textByHashes.4fb397eb1e329ef61b6a83eea5aa8507c5eba2d1: I don't have enough money for that.
textByHashes.7743b07778f14fdb33143a876fb09b899f42c7ea: That seems like a good idea, but I meant about the by- law.
textByHashes.c456fd26358317855a4e63afcca464b035502222: I'll head over there right away.
textByHashes.80ec35c8e90f527dce99c987b8aaf85beb6417fa: What do I need to do with him now?
textByHashes.17ab0bb35fd5a6a209dc3e753b6a6581da0c99ab: In that case, I'll go and see her right away.
textByHashes.7c0449a633de0f299ca05cfadf71568fab90fcb9: Well, I did have the mayor, but I appear to have misplaced him.
textByHashes.3caa62815b57989ab8de85ac6c508b407ea44584: So, shall we get to work on getting that by-law changed?
textByHashes.464b281189049380b23e7fbfe16e8ddc6c60562a: What if I've forgotten what I put down?
textByHashes.177066fd2a4aaa27db8f1c7acc4c7e8d3d9b2f18: I am shocked that you would suggest otherwise.
textByHashes.0b030989b261a9a76564d96ec1c471d9bf164aec: Can we finally get on with this by-law change now?
textByHashes.9f000a27e4454da2f87a3486406f7c1bb22698ec: Right... How does the mayor sign forms usually, given his lack of hands?
textByHashes.5ab1d1cef19b0d95a8bd58b5454714d5de3f362a: I'm sorry, but I lost the form you gave me. Can I have another?
textByHashes.8baa4ad4faa7044dd43436fc5e3b85353b4ce2e0: Of course. How do I do it?
textByHashes.3ec58eb03c98473b72c491efafd9f98234e47be7: Sounds good. Where should I release him?
textByHashes.14372bee94692f68bea3dd77dffa5de05f433de7: Alright, I'll sail over there right away.
textByHashes.347a2011840022fdfebebae9471321bbcbc70344: I'm sorry, but I've lost him.
textByHashes.c114a60b13de492b8d8fa7d7a9e2d4479083c13d: What do I need to do with him?
textByHashes.1078b85cb15cbde29f53af02d4230b2395127b4f: There he goes! Now to follow him and see where these currents flow.
textByHashes.cf023dda06a34f513f3890ba9bf1b8ea5da5ca28: Ah, on that note, I'm afraid I lost him.
textByHashes.ed3b11bceb2e81e1c1aa3c0bcd6cb5bee8844ba6: Is there something I can do to help out?
textByHashes.e6bf0448d626cb90df7ef96454c4afad214898b8: How do I get into the Sanguinesti region?
textByHashes.adce08a92351ab1c621e4eb701e529da4cbe5cdd: Can you tell me about the Sanguinesti region?
textByHashes.a4e56026aa1e8c7712cc27d8120ff4cabf9e5e3d: Can you tell me more about the Sanguinesti Myreque?
textByHashes.ad7fe63ceecc026154e04a820a4e7b1f231c563f: What will you do here in Burgh de Rott?
textByHashes.68f73bac72302864d6f9038613648194b7a7444b: Why re-establish contact with the Sanguinesti region?
textByHashes.5395376acaf87684978b660dfe2931acc294a4f3: Why ask Misthalin for some help?
textByHashes.4473c845149b8a6f000f554272fc62179da67838: Hey. What do I need to do again?
textByHashes.ce6c10ac21c88c7707642d52e052cd9443b79d8f: Give me your best shot, you evil bloodsucker!
textByHashes.06db209882b89ec603ea38f3aff645a9d3b301f0: Hey again. I've made my way into the Sanguinesti region, I think!
textByHashes.83900b30f90937b2cef328537f1bca98c4e23e62: Err... Well anyway, I have some questions.
textByHashes.2517e2a585c0eeba8d2ca01b5308e0829d52b2f5: Any tips you can give to help out a bit?
textByHashes.4cadfec8ef661187b973ecfe833950aa8bb0b5a8: Interesting... It looks like this section of the wall has been tampered with.
textByHashes.058e84484b730b2b1b2965b3f8022290a93ced3d: Hello, I wondered if I could have a chat.
textByHashes.42e50cbeeff3f553331857e5c4844b08599eb89c: Hey, don't be scared, I just want to talk to you.
textByHashes.9b998e6699c917fc61210aaaf69620b7c7023b4d: Sorry but I need to ask a couple of questions.
textByHashes.aebf4755ac328985896fddff50ce13256dbbb618: Hey, calm down, I'm not going to hurt you. I just want to ask a few questions.
textByHashes.451d57c9c654dc05e83aba24076b286a86aad733: I'm lost, can you help me?
textByHashes.9c3e61bd02107ed417d5bb11c7205a2470e33fe5: Do you know about the Myreque?
textByHashes.3cc25b727feef46c4bf3961efd3d154bf7e12c7a: No, sorry, but please can you answer my questions?
textByHashes.5fa5a60edfe8c09cdfc6d6dc200a5f6360ca698e: (whisper) Do you know about the Myreque?
textByHashes.236329d036c5be91b714cb5e5b06aa5dc768d787: I'm lost... Can you help me?
textByHashes.95caf2fd3f4df550968544f9237b3d7781d73416: I need to make contact with them. Please don't worry - I'm on their side.
textByHashes.a8bfcb749c12c1e63080040c633889db6d82091c: What do you know about the vampyres?
textByHashes.42529ec1209ed12c40d5c2d7cfaaf65c9fcb36a6: What do you know about Drakan?
textByHashes.09211026f47da3f23658c37ddaf47559e1268842: Well, I was referring to the main Drakan, you know, the overlord of Morytania.
textByHashes.67bd60c95bc6555f6ff5947b30cac8b34da24b14: What is there to do around here?
textByHashes.8370e983aff4906c1cf256792d35ba9b806aa44e: I really need to meet the Myreque. If you can't talk to me about them, maybe you know someone who will?
textByHashes.817d9a5b3c30888ababa767f160fb727a6bd0737: Can you introduce me to Old Man Ral?
textByHashes.9ae85883bcdabb951222c74f0a62310282a06f05: How can Old Man Ral help me?
textByHashes.c1701dab3e25ec91c8b33753ea43ab75b1c32aa1: Do you know anything about the Myreque?
textByHashes.fcec7ea8dd40d213eacf13881db342487924ea6c: I just want to help, what should I do?
textByHashes.dda6040b8fd54fa9c0b675fa8415266c5ed173ae: You're answering every question with a question!
textByHashes.bfad8cd8389df192411d4df48ae2f9ccbb1163e9: Someone said you could help me.
textByHashes.a2ae01a68f710abadd7f57c658bfbe670b29f64d: It's true. They said that you were very well informed. In fact they had a name for you!
textByHashes.f290eed535887ccf1e686c5e27a1e30fdc7a655d: Old Man Ral, he's a very good pal.
textByHashes.3443d66dbabb830bddd238a38d9bbfc09066c8a6: No, I'm sure they gave you a name, but it might have been something else.
textByHashes.7cc23da92806f9325efad756526555fe29fbd108: Old Man Ral, the nefarious rascal.
textByHashes.475c31c5f0a3e1046ff19b946f64bcb8551cd254: No, I'm pretty sure they directed me to you. What was that name they used to describe you?
textByHashes.9307ddebc834d341694f305c79a711ad1d4b4180: Old Man Ral, the Meiyerditch snitch.
textByHashes.f7a92f939d7aae9fcc5987725bf44e01855e9296: No, no, sorry, I do apologise. I'm sure that was someone else. My mistake entirely!
textByHashes.14090275fca4073d96e9d2ffc0f77343157e2064: No they did, and they referred to you as...
textByHashes.8de9b9d7785aad5389d55643763bcba8821e8f10: Old Man Ral, the sage of Sanguinesti.
textByHashes.843a4bfe2b4e24fd1198eb9f4b885f71d0e5b98a: Yes, yes, saying you were the local font of knowledge.
textByHashes.21a3d0dc2cecc5de264036f0d136c06e078f99ae: Oh yes, yes. All the time. And only in the most respectful way.
textByHashes.62024e761caceb196af4099b6a4924af9520265f: They said that you might be able to help me find some people... Some hidden people...
textByHashes.3525689e7862037b59c510b2965817634c5444ac: Well, hopefully they hid themselves. I need to make contact with the Myreque.
textByHashes.120d10c63f986281328a98d111521f912691c4e2: I don't think I have any reason to go down there.
textByHashes.e5b9c70d80581740c9442e9fe97b26937bb0693e: Hey. You're with the Myreque aren't you?
textByHashes.4048a2f7d6608e0dc3c207063afd0d318d183a66: I'm . I'm a friend of the Myreque. I've come to help!
textByHashes.5c82f6bbe8febf1c4c3b1d12936faaf85bcc4543: It's true. I was sent by Veliaf. We've just moved base from the Hollows to Burgh de Rott.
textByHashes.02f7ba4ea89b9a27d91ca4a03d77fb84588cf6fa: I was asked to make contact with the Myreque here.
textByHashes.c00c78f5db74c2051d58c411158e53b4a0ba498f: So what do you do here?
textByHashes.6391156a3108e092384daa800ba4db6e0c34a82e: How have you survived this long?
textByHashes.c391eab2e13712246c1975db1b8f60da8b451a8a: I have met with the Sanguinesti Myreque!
textByHashes.cc41b4b60ebc16f57b45396344c6fa4c285c76df: Yes! They gave me a message to give to you but I don't have it on me at the moment.
textByHashes.678f16f4d85c6462ae675ef8c1d4a7f784e3dddc: I have a message for you from the Sanguinesti Myreque!
textByHashes.259e077148fec2a6a0995fdf3162934fa765ecf1: What do you want me to do?
textByHashes.2837769a8d452741a722bec94a1869ed250052bb: Hey there. What should I do now?
textByHashes.5102a9e7fd9b57e47bab9c34754a95554363e23d: What can you tell me about the Myreque?
textByHashes.1c1d90f5b839021e246a29690114d83c7a409635: I'm a bit lost... Can you help?
textByHashes.135bd0d474656aea047540c73f6e4bea5fc73bcf: I must speak with you on a matter of grave importance.
textByHashes.7917b95a881d2639f3916777ad98afb575d3d844: Oh, Veliaf asked me to pay him a visit, actually. I guess I could go and meet with him.
textByHashes.dbf626ef7ccbd31eeab209d58d4f70b273279ea0: Hey, Drezel. Veliaf sent me. Apparently there have been some strange goings on which you need me to investigate.
textByHashes.80e7595eef47f8f9d86e0fd122b2b54001e09f76: Actually, that's a bit odd isn't it? Because in Morytania, strange is the order of the day. I'd have been more surprised if there had been reports of things getting back to normal!
textByHashes.af78a477a976103ded00bdf3d010cbfe66d146c5: Well there's no shortage of tasks for me. Once I'm done here I have to go and speak to King Roald, or rather, Roald. We've been on first name terms for quite a while now. Funny that, eh?
textByHashes.1b4ead231f613db2be3ac233c0de0d2178a6137b: To think, a lowly adventurer like me having friends like you and the king. Still, at least I haven't lost my common touch.
textByHashes.ff111d042d6218a6a8fa91d7e22bd4a68fd25f3b: But anyway, what do you need from me?
textByHashes.9b89aeea41e932c146edc0b6e5a5ee78f6403984: When and where were these noises heard?
textByHashes.a213461c1199aab1cd3da2251bb85a81f95d6608: Do you think the noises could have come from beyond the steps? I mean, from further west?
textByHashes.8dc827a0bd56918cbf968e37771179b2b8d05ace: Did you hear the noises as well?
textByHashes.f1231f83289c70672b78d68b9d9551b47b60a501: So, maybe Ivan was whispering to you?
textByHashes.d5f7fd9a98f5958be6dfbe518e5bd12f2b9b428d: Right! That's different! What did they sound like?
textByHashes.18014e1207e324b0ca7bf51b82402bec6aa09b78: Hmmm, never fear, is here! I'll work this out Drezel, don't you worry!
textByHashes.a15700dbedd44ac48d6be7ecc5fa440aae796779: Has anyone seen or reported anything unusual?
textByHashes.c008ff3cc13bafe0105a13ffa806e43028d2534e: And if it turns out to be more than that?
textByHashes.d475e817ed513d4a8a10e30ad9cb110e9ddeeca9: How is Ivan? Is he okay?
textByHashes.5698213f8ca2191d480c0b049a8768bde553a5ec: It's all so tragic. I wish there was something I could do for him.
textByHashes.e497413ff03ef8f71850ed400289b12cc5096a29: Sorry, Drezel, what did you want me to do again?
textByHashes.042b45890188a60abf56b8ab59514552bc4288fa: Yes. And I have some news!
textByHashes.f33e9d9266b3de306209d9c7b3244c587cda1230: I was attacked near the temple! On the other side of the Salve!
textByHashes.3e088d8aa5220b6eb53d8da7d28ab218a7814cfb: By beasts! From Morytania, I believe. Perhaps werewolves.
textByHashes.695dec3cddaec65993bee6567d160feda93c38f7: Not yet, I'm afraid. I thought you would want to know about the werewolves as soon as possible.
textByHashes.8b87f27b43c88767ddb4f4fc6b5b6d827f80ec8c: Not clearly, but I believe they could have been werewolves.
textByHashes.139063b7c630b52f1317120a1251f990cb06f744: Very well, I'll make my way to Varrock and bid you good luck.
textByHashes.57f40e2f7b02c0839c11cf364ed5de2630bd655f: Not yet, sorry. What should I do again?
textByHashes.5168415d5450d3c915bec21f76f4d1bd3460ef03: Ah yes, quite right. Thanks for reminding me.
textByHashes.2aa2ced8d21071f25aff643fda6ab96664298fb6: I've witnessed a great many terrible things happening in Morytania, some of which could be happening in Misthalin before long!
textByHashes.8e65ee2657a0a8472b961b16101aec858c2197ed: I have been helping a collection of brave freedom fighters called the Myreque for some time now. They've been fighting against the vampyres and their ruler, Lowerniel Drakan.
textByHashes.4ff558e2b7477f5c8785b6db475536071bf52f34: In Morytania, Drakan and his kin farm humans for their blood! People, my lord, like your own loyal subjects!
textByHashes.31256c28c8551a9693faaaceee730424c3af3451: It's not just the citizens of Morytania at risk though. It seems that werewolves have been kidnapping people from this side of the Salve to be used as blood tithes for the vampyres!
textByHashes.599e17763dfaf0f481eaea10e82d11b309c9f66a: I am not certain, but surely this isn't the issue? They are in dire need...
textByHashes.4c070f4eba376d88a61c6ab1ae037f10bd680a5d: But you don't understand! It's not just about the people of Morytania. Like I say, there were werewolves in Misthalin!
textByHashes.d397e2408407f55d9ffa676150642e5a05516528: I'm sad to say that I did not. I had no chance. I was knocked unconscious before I could properly react. Please, Misthalin must come to the aid of the people of Morytania.
textByHashes.62e64df4658c48b4437b388913712bed59bcd313: The Myreque cannot fight this battle against the vampyres by themselves!
textByHashes.52cbc312f7d07118dfd25f24d81b6b17b148c84d: Yes there is! I saw it with my own eyes!
textByHashes.9cf9934f51e1a682b5b9fb9b2daee8d4414c5597: Signing papers! Is that the sum of the aid that Misthalin can provide to Morytania?
textByHashes.79e31dcb1bc83b9c2feffc23c6fda18d21d66d7e: So I came all this way for nothing?
textByHashes.dc22835269f8c8fedbbaa5a4382efbc54cc114ca: Sorry. I had just hoped for so much more.
textByHashes.8c2ed1706831089aacb4fb5f8424db8ce77ced51: Yes thanks. I'll accept the free teleport.
textByHashes.b3726b256ff7ec5873b6452f9d8ede807c021871: No thanks. I've other things to do here.
