textByHashes.a95a8c47449a977acefd20d3b6d003d7824d646f: Why can't you send troops to Morytania?
textByHashes.a510148a61f86ee648d73140763eac3f51da4658: When can you send aid to Morytania?
textByHashes.4bb43118d254b3a897bbbe753202a74bad803224: What part does Guthix play in all this?
textByHashes.894681ec84f8f2798d82192dcba19543bc8a942d: Does your offer of a teleport still stand?
textByHashes.930549c88dd3474c321ac9d940d25c9723b869e6: I'd like to ask a few questions if I may?
textByHashes.896f919d1d17fb8a86853f0377debad4501b57ae: I have. King Roald isn't able to send troops for our fight against the Drakans. Apparently, some Guthixian edicts need to be scrutinised in more detail or else the balance will be affected?
textByHashes.7323c38fc5e21cdf71672760af9304f5229063e6: Can you explain a little about the Guthixian edicts?
textByHashes.b5e8dfdb966ae75dfb80eb18c2a7bb91125ea4b3: So where do these edicts come in?
textByHashes.7676f4a8eab43a250b9b9a25b9eea914f6e72f72: But if the edicts are just made up, what's the risk?
textByHashes.2d76f4eef3aa0957f7d33a01737c10be5dee94fd: Can you tell me why you're here?
textByHashes.a00e605b5f12ee61135b257d82ad3e25d5885ec4: Hello there. What should I do now?
textByHashes.4af1ba58c174f5432e869947f89a0a917ca5a05b: Hello, Veliaf. I have some news for you.
textByHashes.47b0479fc3b02e0d346e7a655e6f907f0b4dda55: King Roald cannot send troops! I talked to him at great length and was unable to persuade him. His Saradominist advisor cited Guthixian edicts as the reason for not sending aid.
textByHashes.3ee5bda83ff0f6bf164c47e419f4d9f76a7fbe29: Apparently a war in Morytania will risk disturbing the balance between Saradomin and Zamorak so the Guthixians will need to intervene.
textByHashes.fc73ef117cbfe6c790adc60bc5612e6ea9c6b52b: The Church of Saradomin is looking into it now to see if it's true.
textByHashes.42dc92ad9b67f1bdb2ad2a1762806ddd989f9c5d: Roald did agree to enact a mercenary protocol. He said it was the best he could offer for the moment without contravening the Guthixian edicts.
textByHashes.0c21fe988e1b2c4729ff604cc634365478391ead: What should we do now? There must be someone else we can turn to?
textByHashes.f9dd8a75c33b375a45c5be24b8ac628602febd0c: What do I need to do now?
textByHashes.18a92c556bc028d5f2ac6f58b086e2e22253eacd: Not as well as I'd hope, Drezel. I'm still working with the Myreque. I just hope that we can find a way to defeat those Drakans.
textByHashes.f896dd90df11cbd7de99c681b5dbeaa6d21dd00e: I have a message from Veliaf. It's bad news I'm afraid. I was sent on a mission to Misthalin to seek help from King Roald. Sadly, he isn't able to offer much support.
textByHashes.758f9b5759b5867354295ad83303ca2fb6cf8fe7: That's not all though. On my way to Varrock, I came across some beasts on the other side of the River Salve! I think they were werewolves working for the vampyres.
textByHashes.b5b125154bd78fba358b1abc4d1d45b6b99a574e: Where is Safalaan and what does he look like?
textByHashes.7bdfcaabd8d408c37403f3be0b162fa297a3975a: Okay, great, that's helpful. Now, how can I recognise Safalaan?
textByHashes.249faefc3c703b74de0c52739046b2001bb18a77: Hello there. What do I need to do now?
textByHashes.2c94bfb6dc5a69faa55a3281b3afbbfe28554d72: Okay, great, that's helpful. How can I recognise Safalaan?
textByHashes.1adc5dc21c29660960611ce6677bd416585b293e: You must be Safalaan. My name is . I come with a very important message from Vertida.
textByHashes.a9ca58f96795d531c238a485c1cea7d5732c1c8f: He's asked me to come and seek you out. I'm working with Veliaf in Burgh de Rott.
textByHashes.45d6c38facc9f5e96e9c229916c827a0e605c292: I went to see King Roald to request support in our fight. Unfortunately, his advisor reminded him that the Guthixian edicts prevent his intervention.
textByHashes.9c45f65ad5d6e40c0e7625840be10aef78f6736a: I'm afraid that's not all. I was attacked by beasts on the western side of the Salve, near to Paterdomus. I think they were werewolves working for the vampyres.
textByHashes.5cb2e763d9e1399848252f3ed9b6f10a911cad3b: Can I help in some way?
textByHashes.b9e53e72130b237e3153ae10862cf6a683b0626a: I can certainly try! Are there any specific details I should know?
textByHashes.c47b54b04efbdb6da6adbe91684982784135b1aa: Safalaan said I could get some more papyrus from you.
textByHashes.94bc9086b89f9e3ae5ecb53e24057e2a978d2bba: Hello, Veliaf. I'm doing some work for the Sanguinesti Myreque.
textByHashes.942f87f6a5c6ad1c339ba7bc731161821118b29f: Safalaan asked me to sketch the north side first.
textByHashes.701066499b48a52e7032aba9ba9a3b3a5ce298dc: What was I supposed to be doing?
textByHashes.352c94807c369613f12f146a15fcebac2e44a4c9: I need to make a sketch of the western face of the castle.
textByHashes.8b39ddb27c7e0db23ce75e9d14c47058b93ea24a: Hey, I've finished at the castle.
textByHashes.bd6ae9cc1debf4fbf48f35f1af246c4e92b648e4: Hey, I've finished at the castle. It was a close one though. I was attacked by Vanstrom!
textByHashes.02129d73fb07320e4cf963e660dbd969bc9605fc: He came out of nowhere! I tried to fight back, but I just couldn't hurt him.
textByHashes.e0f769a2ff9b894c234fe64e8a6767807f629dc1: No, I'm pretty sure I wasn't followed. So anyway, during the fight, Vanstrom knocked me to the floor and I thought I was done for. But then a woman named Sarius showed up.
textByHashes.d23e55a36122422f4d0fe0d72544e2515ad300c4: No, I saw Vanescula earlier, but when I saw Sarius arrive, Vanescula wasn't around. Sarius told Vanstrom that Vanescula wanted to interrogate me. So Vanstrom got angry and flew away.
textByHashes.d600ccb253d80ec5e5ad9ec3ab69f6005919344f: Sarius then told me about a message which was meant for you. Something about 'smoke and statues'? She said that Vanescula was interested in you for some reason?
textByHashes.626a2b29f496f7034c29e1cd5bfb486493828004: That's right. If I remember correctly, she said it was hidden 'behind tiles where smoke is carried away from the depiction of statuesque evil'.
textByHashes.c9d6841e57774abe973f4332cdfe8f0a835823fa: Ah yes. I have it here.
textByHashes.3e6b4aa9a01dd86885afc5710854004b559b84df: Where do you think this laboratory could be?
textByHashes.ccb4e4c8795a42325b348141be76d0b8103ad593: Hey, I think I've found that laboratory.
textByHashes.51a36ee9fe2450231d3938de2306e4eba910565a: Safalaan. I have something you might be interested in. I found it in the laboratory.
textByHashes.a7aa5c03ece87ed9936dc571ecf39ae2ffec4c28: Well, whatever it is, someone went to a lot of trouble to try and hide it.
textByHashes.19801111ea2af29fad950a7372ff8a3e078320ff: I'll do what I can, Safalaan. You have my support.
textByHashes.ec9918b693ec5eb0ee9b5badbebb0d4d2fb1203b: Very well, I'll return to Veliaf. Farewell.
textByHashes.9fa1e699c7d83bbdb94b94de44ceddd070405f20: But I've lost that message. Can I have another one please?
textByHashes.fc93fdd528850aac27f8cf4b6aac0e477f50322f: I've spoken to Safalaan. He gave me a message to give to you but I've misplaced it!
textByHashes.912423a533ed6a4ca956f287ebfdbf80c1e8a525: I have a message for you from Safalaan.
textByHashes.76a7733b44dd71d92d1ee53c84684daa1ae22c04: I've lost my Tome of Experience.
textByHashes.93d1dfa4b865777c833a46770a1cb3e4f6facc72: So, what's going to happen now?
textByHashes.148a8608db2987f43ac4b6f836d4b59fffa405f1: Well you just let me know when you next need me.
textByHashes.eba7498ad94764524cd292ccdb2897a797835a69: I suppose I could consider being troubled for a little...
textByHashes.b28d7885deab524e7a8740600b270bcb15744d8a: Good day to you! I could consider being troubled, for the right reasons.
textByHashes.8605695dc946fb338594818cb8df640fc250e084: Well, just as long as I get to actually enjo-
textByHashes.03e3b93894dd286e6b04ded3d402d6933ee0a90a: So if you're going to this party, would you also be one of Aldarin's wealthiest citizens?
textByHashes.c6fc3e9720cce7681ac0a909513059557f9e2e73: They call me ... just . So if you're not rich in money, how am I going to get paid, assuming I agree to help you with... whatever it is you want.
textByHashes.b9277cdd666bf4f44bc27d1010ef2f6c158e43e7: I suppose I could do with letting my hair down a little. Alright, I'm in.
textByHashes.6aef8e983000df5f20a137356d0adcb640b0a190: So whose party are we going to?
textByHashes.cfbcbe7e2e89a03d22de09307c4766c2d8ba33ed: And yet you don't actually know who he is?
textByHashes.eca2f70b6c5cf35b8182b41575ab53943f2e94c6: If you have her, why do you need me?
textByHashes.c1e4f54b4c8fe0dd35437e7e6cd262f930e2a770: Right... So I don't actually get to enjoy the party at all, do I?
textByHashes.5f3156fd94fe807283c373e2179ac2e62a42b8dc: I see... You mentioned a fancy suit. You wouldn't happen to have a butler outfit in that bag you mentioned?
textByHashes.1b22e3e35579c16481781a6d8cb26879b3f8a9a0: Well, in that case, any idea where I might get one, preferably free of charge?
textByHashes.a3b22d7841be48e06d45aaf23253320554dd33de: Are you suggesting I steal one?
textByHashes.76dd88abf10d934cf198e38f0a1c7e7637f54ec9: And I'm sure whoever I take it from will be overjoyed to have had someone else wearing their uniform.
textByHashes.52361a77e7ae4bed02b096d68d1e43134bf962ce: Right... I guess I'm off to find a uniform then.
textByHashes.5ef3fa0d7f770a104514b09603bfed2319638d44: I'm not really a party person these days, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.cfd402d1cf0860c423e025f717a203098b38991d: If I'm going to be working, shouldn't we be calling it a uniform?
textByHashes.1e964765917ed7b96eff08d99e86fd2ccfed0456: Not quite. You said it was to the north of here?
textByHashes.058a2ce380fcc5fa6ff04b8fba29120d0bb657e9: This person has a lot of uniforms, but I shouldn't take more than I need.
textByHashes.f3ef776482d4aaa476ea628c4029bfd3f0c3b0b3: I probably shouldn't break into a house in full view of a guard.
textByHashes.a89fb30a09a571c0930986ac1bdd69ba47ce48ca: I have indeed. You must have a good eye to have seen them through a window as you walked by?
textByHashes.95674b70a19d2ad45acdb85c5e718b469de72854: Lucky indeed. It's almost like you were specifically looking for them?
textByHashes.658a1b8658f7964567b542e5371f179822c15f87: Given the size of your bag, I'm not sure she's rushing anywhere.
textByHashes.567aab3b90b90a2f5878ae949ad51ffab42b6bce: I'm guessing the entrance is just up these stairs?
textByHashes.73151183016da9221aceea346e683bfc5c71328f: Where would I find said entrance?
textByHashes.f47f5bd9f5d258e75e61c6dcbe8e87c3332da9a8: Where was that staff entrance that you mentioned?
textByHashes.e3d510fbbd0b68793412d38521e67a4680b58224: Oh yes, just give me a moment...
textByHashes.c3852659374b5a5f7035ee26facec787628c6954: Hello there. I'm here to work.
textByHashes.b36a6596c99e72586f3c6726741157a0ba400e3a: Sorry, there was a bit of a hold up. I'm quite new to this.
textByHashes.0377f3c9b895c522d94bedb29e5dd97232f267f2: He seems... friendly enough. I'm still not sure if I'm getting paid though.
textByHashes.bc36bb70d323325687279b59a7c5a1eed0157675: I don't remember joining one. I probably should with the... varied working conditions I go through.
textByHashes.3ee4d31f66a29d26b68368698d9813283cef971b: I think this is a one-time gig for me, but thank you!
textByHashes.070261eae2c3c04acbf0722a35c043a74f269f00: Got it. No taking off my uniform. What's this about masks?
textByHashes.b01aac583d7137123d16e9d76db345fdc8c3414f: Got it, nothing in and nothing out.
textByHashes.1b525de77f8b8090f245171cb7af2b49e878e2dc: I should probably speak to Patzi before doing anything in here.
textByHashes.a10cc11e7c301d5ae6069ee307ae2233c1f4c749: I shouldn't go too far from the party for now.
textByHashes.a0641697a531023b7d4a447eb48208c9af111ab0: I feel like a court jester...
textByHashes.6db0b8e2675c13cbe7d29a9ba463b4a6b28f9350: I feel like a court jester... and not for the first time either.
textByHashes.2b8332e64ab4103975d42549740b992eed602080: Hang on, I'm meant to be an anonymous butler. How do you expect me to get to know people for you?
textByHashes.3bf3eb183c8b54ae6798d735c5b180e66007ae74: Okay... Anything else I can do for you, especially things you could easily do for yourself?
textByHashes.f16380fa5ab84b60b29492da7edb47d5564249e7: I haven't quite made my way around everyone the party yet.
textByHashes.bbe5d732f27b6a18060c0830487ae28405f0257f: It certainly seems to be quite the event.
textByHashes.ad5f46c351795aa16d7af84a71f541ae845dab51: Er... Is that going to be an issue?
textByHashes.2651d4626b3533149d3fc36c7a482a2b675a01af: Oh good, because it's actually him who I'm here with. He was very keen to meet you, even though he didn't actually know your name...
textByHashes.59bbf39d4a335f7a46f284de3074b2e0bef64d31: Perhaps he's new to the island... Still, for an actor, his research seems lacking.
textByHashes.1210f92ff3aa79290e0dc016284c172317d9bb60: So, Constantinius, how often do you put on these parties?
textByHashes.7b97d8ebefe75ad0a9656a6948f59d3f130f686b: How does one usually get themselves invited?
textByHashes.c96cb0c6d07bf8e025e3122e475824d1f0422aa1: Well, I'm actually wealthy enough to be a homeowner myself, but not on Aldarin unfortunately.
textByHashes.eea40584b70ccee4718c8978f17d3f0f50338d1d: And you're definitely okay with me and my... we'll call him my employer, I guess. You're definitely okay with us being here?
textByHashes.19140f879092d4c3637569e50b8c047745b45fd3: Well, I actually own a home here on the island. Perhaps I can be invited next time!
textByHashes.22913728fa7143481202780d47448f6de588a808: Absolutely, Cozyac. You can call me...
textByHashes.c2a3cef455e7529149615dd6d8966400813ca6e6: You can't call me then. Are you enjoying the party?
textByHashes.c17fdfede9fdb02298afde39a7c067244d1f0da1: I can certainly look into it.
textByHashes.fa9ddb83e4bad05fabb264cbda34145b04cd162c: Hi there. How can I be of service?
textByHashes.527f8eae63cd5e6e770a0d944337ecbfd737f31c: Do you have a preference? Wine, or something non- alcoholic?
textByHashes.0c46fe4affb16a0ee66cd1655d6c4627d4ce51e3: You sent me away before telling me what drink you actually wanted.
textByHashes.350fef4bd5a3ba70225b047e76c597b787461a17: It is. How could you tell?
textByHashes.402ee22732adc34ca85b7601cdd20dd8bdf2a23e: Oh, I hadn't noticed I was...
textByHashes.2437c99fee47ab3a40a26a66254077d68840395d: So do you spend a lot of time on boats?
textByHashes.ef1d8cdd5e1fb87641bcb6495112f5e21e949799: Well, I don't typically find myself in need of that sort of thing, but if that ever changes, I'll keep you in mind.
textByHashes.ac4d7c6faf19afa9b8c72de2190d59fcde288463: What sort of things can you move?
textByHashes.ae0c57bba85d505c134f22146520bb2e7d0dd014: : I have no reason to go down there right now.
textByHashes.ea2661fe83b13e08e754d1236b966bfed34363dc: Pavo, the drunk one over there. I'm not sure there's much to them other than their love of drinking.
textByHashes.9948942cc01f0045817fbd9d5c47a9e32d3e5822: Xocotla, who seems a lot more relaxed. It seems that she runs a shipping business.
textByHashes.1aeb1a33d080c583bd7870b9a0f0631dc16abf4e: Last of all for the guests we have Cozyac. He's quite up on the rules of this party, so he might not be happy that you weren't properly invited.
textByHashes.7e7cf6cf8725fb4ac0eb76d276afea92970bf460: He might not, but our host Constantinius does.
textByHashes.3258c99cc9764fdfe8e85edd94345c8951cba76d: Luckily, he didn't actually seem to mind you being here too much. Apparently he's actually looking for a new actor to sponsor.
textByHashes.d4565d43d10e78f0f71f690a663a00049e928abb: What would you like from the wine cellar? A beer?
textByHashes.5f1feec8ca471cc1b8b9cb49a743f067eb75176c: Alright, one glass of wine coming right up.
textByHashes.9e00191af7eecaa32dc6c61145479bf32220e482: I haven't had a chance to even go into the cellar yet. You'll have to give me a moment.
textByHashes.2ff37a87a3d7a173d32ebba95908f6962b9ce954: 'Cupboard, keep out!' Why does it say keep out?
textByHashes.6c475345fd8d1a8c31c1d5a78627ba802c31ca52: I shouldn't return to the party empty handed.
textByHashes.b50a1d578e531648d10d0e7db1273e677dbbf294: Hmm... The label's faded, but I'm sure this is the wine Patzi was talking about.
textByHashes.00bb1ccc47f80be46b61ab17e4d8556ed45594d4: What... Oh, that's going to stain isn't it...
textByHashes.26849ca683e5efaabad170eceda0e14a5c375b33: I think it's probably best if I don't mess around with this again.
textByHashes.732f192cabdb11dca0c969a7f9da6121ed9173fd: I guess I shouldn't leave without investigating that noise.
textByHashes.6783fe299076a87b5cc0951601486411a86b6055: Have you had too much to drink?
textByHashes.1e355a44e520eb3d06bc2996ae81f67faeb34e94: I'm still here, in case you forgot?
textByHashes.b56be3a387a3cbc2e77805135a69ea3f5ec5042a: You found me in a wine cellar and you won't even consider that it might be wine?
textByHashes.35b9637f691e89a54991ac08545e3c66018e8394: Would you believe me if I said I didn't do it?
textByHashes.efa1619ec895f482c067ce19e21ec4fdeb9f3e68: I was looking for a wine. Principum Red? Patzi sent me to get some for him to drink. I just happened to hear a commotion and thought someone may have been hurt.
textByHashes.cc085150c3969b363c1e20cd108a43b2d00eff17: Okay... Well, much like I didn't kill that man, I suppose I don't want to hurt your careers. Maybe I could catch the killer!
textByHashes.17b939b44384d43785522d6a8f817bbdaa765efc: But I'm not even a butler! I got hired to act like one!
textByHashes.f4671e93e7e6c671ac31cd25af22c0821959228a: I'm just . I got hired by Patzi to be a butler for this evening, alongside a lady called Adala.
textByHashes.1e87fcd662203c51fe5e67e6e1c38e9aa1514794: You mean she was only accounted for after the murder took place?
textByHashes.96976c013979f273e05afbbbc9e1d497d89759e4: Again, maybe I could be an extra pair of hands here.
textByHashes.109d5bba5e810a0c5d4de73fe2f0be5d90f882b4: I... promise not to flee the scene?
textByHashes.fe2fce68ff7e2ad44c1b1c9e71fc832225c22b61: Could you give me any tips for this investigation?
textByHashes.f917225682bba040e571716f852651ff3c76e8ae: Are you going to help with any of this?
textByHashes.d0c7fd8690478de37980c308431b60aa9e3862ce: What if the actual murderer is still in the cellar somewhere?
textByHashes.5ed3eece7c7762a9254d95429326fe0c93feebc9: I got arrested for murder because you sent me into that cellar!
textByHashes.9d5dbaa0fd9d53f122a42c9145eabe1a6305e18d: The Principum Red? Of course. Constantinius has a nice large container of it. However, I'm not sure if that's the most...
textByHashes.cfda3ba3add23981d618ebe3c68599bfc828d77d: Are you blaming Livius for his own murder?
textByHashes.297bc9c841d014b7727f3e4fe2787f06d7509155: Was he by any chance the one you mentioned earlier? The one who was starting to get too expensive for you?
textByHashes.0dddc54b29935c751aa5b3f9adba6a5b07211d87: You didn't happen to know Livius, did you Cozyac?
textByHashes.7063358b724d4b2ca68055532c0c494de6444ad0: Did he ever come and join the parties? Perhaps you crossed paths during the festivities?
textByHashes.fb78f8121bca995ef57dad6c305def355b04b215: The plays are that good are they?
textByHashes.12b96360af3ed164c632b859bfc5ed70b7962f6a: Did you drink with him today?
textByHashes.4473c9ddb900a91e4dd558946eea83ce96fbc41a: Assuming you did, where would you have had a drink with him?
textByHashes.f41f2fba39c999a60eb4e02f6c1c52a17d4c1f43: So you admit that you may well have been down there with him today. Do you think something might've happened whilst you were drinking?
textByHashes.8f02a7adec66a32733ecd90112efb7d7414800d6: And yet you can't actually remember if you'd been drinking with him.
textByHashes.5d210bd9898122146433c65aba3ad828662fd646: I'm not sure it's unfortunate so much as a tragedy surely?
textByHashes.eb8a275c09296316eb9b5f3a7331682d5fd8a061: The play's still going ahead? Are we just going to ignore that a man was murdered?
textByHashes.f00838d0b87ab904b2e01e19180712c76c78a909: Okay... So Livius wasn't a customer of yours then?
textByHashes.9ab922644bf0736f112e2ed7a9dd4e5ca55550b7: Actors seem to have a lot of costumes to move around the place. Maybe a shipping magnate such as yourself would make good money off of them.
textByHashes.ea9a5ca51a10db88b35c129e318389ce8d838caf: Why would Constantinius keep a broken stool around... Unless it was only just broken?
textByHashes.cc4935e2209ed0fc82c144b39e5c454a970d8eb1: It appears to be a box full of blank wine labels. I suppose they like to keep things well organised.
textByHashes.29108f20329f27a3d9a68f0181bf681d166f3c7d: A few cuts and scrapes... No stab wound... Poison perhaps?
textByHashes.d765e8ae4d09c1c777101306dcdf55fc0dd0aae6: Maybe there's something nearby that could give me a better idea of what happened.
textByHashes.5403f73a82ee41a70bf84de08fd94963c90a7f83: It looks like someone's dropped this. I wonder if there was a fight?
textByHashes.a0f4d148639294c1f4d0fa6e3e4c9a1b60d2dd3a: It's only half full. Someone must've been drinking from it.
textByHashes.232ae5db6d842b3eee0b86c5a350b082e3afddf9: I wonder why this jug's been tucked away in the corner... Was someone trying to hide it?
textByHashes.48e54d8deeaf5557db9c63e9cad77709c7e4023f: I think I've found everything there is to find so far. What now?
textByHashes.9bf6efc23e582628945f6c24a3efd8d0be16e950: I'm not sure. Oddly enough, no one is admitting to having done it, and given they were all here together, I'm pretty sure they'd be each other's alibis.
textByHashes.3fac18fa16bb5ca4c158795b0024844da22af0e2: Well, thanks to the masks and uniforms, they're all anonymous. It's also very hard to keep track of how many there are.
textByHashes.c525d4776ccdb212e26cd77443b2c517a5c1f8bf: I could try stealing from the suspects? Perhaps one of them will be carrying something incriminating.
textByHashes.50750e5f3ce6848968ca09bd0877e9f51267dcca: Oh, I'm so clumsy! Are you okay?
textByHashes.a8ae7b49537c250dbba8135466822c54fd3bd734: I wonder what these are for...
textByHashes.4fcdc681b04920459c7a5ebace9181b5b3780c18: I wonder what this is about...
textByHashes.637e2f41aadf5bd8c603ac4287cc46edb4f85e06: Well, I suppose that's not surprising.
textByHashes.1e03e61d9aa0c32e576eab65ef9ce67c2030b950: I wonder what this is for...
textByHashes.8f19b4d1e57fd1ed7cde7e5ce226f2abee20c6fa: I've had a little look through some pockets. I think all of the guests might be lying.
textByHashes.f22ec300a17cf64d4bf77eabd3caee372a4c2e4b: Well, maybe not Pavo. They just had this old drinking flask. Xocotla and Cozyac on the other hand both had things on them that revealed they had direct dealings with Livius.
textByHashes.09a53b70297faa07083c02aef8f178394532260e: Here, have a look at what I found for yourselves.
textByHashes.bda1d7bec94b65ddb5d27c4265bfdcc3af2d642e: It's possible I suppose, but Patzi doesn't seem capable of pulling this off.
textByHashes.05c396d640fbdab15da678521f04ca01ab78a65c: We could get them all together. Put pressure on them with some accusations and see who breaks?
textByHashes.15ee7b8d724837df05e4b35444b5dfb28d39d3d8: Only one way to find out I suppose.
textByHashes.a5545abe816444b21f819cca5153763a6d509a4c: I want to review the evidence a bit more.
textByHashes.018b914961ecbc9f0aa050e57e09bbd42e85866b: Constantinius, you knew Livius well, didn't you?
textByHashes.91f9672dd4f15db843edda5326225aec028fb1be: How was that sponsorship working out for you?
textByHashes.995148fc3933596d2b954c6d095a1af5598b98c3: So you'd almost benefit from him being out of the way, letting you find someone new to sponsor?
textByHashes.52dfe6ab6b9a89a49984e2852f717b457f3e9335: Constantinius! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. He was getting too expensive to sponsor and you needed him gone!
textByHashes.b963ab8d22484d4633bd058cf6b7779c648684ad: Well, perhaps you felt a murder mystery would have helped make this party interesting and memorable.
textByHashes.2b36dc6a704a07d289e87baf487c9e53e1af32f6: That's... a fair point, and indeed, why would you kill your lead actor right before the play?
textByHashes.90c203c8c845da9a6172f547c3a241d48b6e7703: Indeed I have. Just keeping you on your toes. As you were.
textByHashes.1631fb5c78e6e6ba6a017cf3895e12e6d698ddb6: Cozyac, did you not claim to have never interacted with Livius?
textByHashes.5c262af75091d0255bb2b6f77d87277464726ba2: A note written by yourself for Livius. Seems you weren't very happy with him...
textByHashes.f90717b2489ffc7bcc5fcca42643cfce76671494: So it seems you did know him. In fact, you had an issue with him, did you not?
textByHashes.d6e174d12a2da5b98093a8a830a526f5d094ab1f: Hmm... An outstanding debt could be considered motive for murder...
textByHashes.98f9dcaf39a503441ee8675ab5104adb70e3575f: Cozyac! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. He owed you a debt and was refusing to pay!
textByHashes.b1357a606734d8b8e75c64f3f9ac272ffee3abbc: Pavo, you and Livius were drinking partners, weren't you?
textByHashes.0d9834afc45191f5025fc9798f1f988133f1d9b9: How heavily would you say you drank together?
textByHashes.6430a39d9cf64d961651980e67f66bce86346cd5: If you were letting Livius drink from your flask, it wouldn't have been hard for you to poison him, would it?
textByHashes.e95e8711e68d6d0c4ade92209c6e1aa7cfe89466: Pavo! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. You poisoned him when you let him drink from your flask!
textByHashes.638d7aa49df034ec4103806d9d75104048b11a97: Well, the flask does still have some liquid left in it. Perhaps we should have it tested?
textByHashes.68d2d35a40a64304c8b4fa10dc2f770097a860c2: Oh... Well, I guess it's not poison then. Thanks for... helping to sort that one.
textByHashes.e66701dd9319e4377e76f416819e8b71d107a350: Xocotla, you've never had any dealings with Livius, have you?
textByHashes.76572a30640e0966bc5c99b1588c2f0de23dcd0a: So he's never needed anything shipped by your company? Nothing he needed to move swiftly and discretely?
textByHashes.b1f65f72315f1d7d112c1ab1271d03fda94b315d: Good eye. Interesting how you yourself seemed to not be aware of it, especially given it was you who was carrying it.
textByHashes.899c7b51932f99933263ad2d8ad6c4697a6f0a0b: Xocotla! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. You pretended you didn't know him, but you lied!
textByHashes.4b62348e3ab417be2bd448da31e8048dbafaa09a: Patzi, Adala. The two of you weren't even invited to this party...
textByHashes.cd64ff757d0bd99cf9d7fae38d1b29f08612ed47: But being here presented a huge opportunity for an up-and-coming actor like Patzi.
textByHashes.8117476c888bde1b1c35dcec510e30b7bf01a185: You already knew that Constantinius was thinking about sponsoring a new actor. Perhaps you decided to speed things along a bit by removing the competition.
textByHashes.8293bbccebb1d2710d640ebe146f2fcfd14734a6: Perhaps, and indeed it is true that you couldn't have been present at the time of the murder. You never left the party. In fact you sent me down into the cellar for you, didn't you?
textByHashes.a97564545d6773529c9a3e76810697125ce60391: Sending me down there made me look guilty! A perfect way of drawing attention away from the true culprit.
textByHashes.0725a799e811e32fe7b56c4119a2c0d9736fbc59: Which leads me on to you, Adala. Patzi was accounted for when the murder took place, but you were not. Care to tell us what you were up to?
textByHashes.7f1c3fea3f8210db445c6843cbe58eaa85a0ad78: So you never entered the wine cellar?
textByHashes.5a3ed8ad7608b19c04153809226ced0083abc684: But you knew a lot about it, didn't you?
textByHashes.96f1c7343c994edb369d816b9f2f5f95969ea1aa: Wine labels from Constantinius' cellar, found on your person. Care to explain?
textByHashes.d8a4edcd9d3c81e1535dd1312fb386ac1ae0f15b: Patzi! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. You wanted him out of the way so you could take his place!
textByHashes.13dcacf38cf6ba5dc6e093be058adbc0bcd6264f: Adala! I believe you were responsible for the murder of Livius. All the evidence is pointing at you!
textByHashes.c861bb0d821c2a9a866af8195cf374ffa0088d92: You were the only person missing at the time of the murder, and despite your claims, we have clear evidence you were in that cellar!
textByHashes.4c5e9673a678808f71c9a59e8d1d421885a15255: What happened Adala? Did Livius interrupt your plan? Did he need to be silenced?
textByHashes.53162c84ce966d390166f8e835328909f127e9c5: Are you ready to confess now?
textByHashes.d2ccee72f2cad9ddcb9bd803ff15aaded0df4499: You still want to go ahead with the play? You don't even have a lead actor anymore!
textByHashes.34c7d44945802c28d5a33b602fcafa627e4ebaa7: But Adala might not have even been the killer!
textByHashes.164a03b81d8cbd0836558e21a030b498ea47cd28: Fine. Where do I find this back way?
textByHashes.da0e3fab32cf867e7c305709931889318ced1f6d: I don't think I should be going up there.
textByHashes.5937bec358e9b59b2a474cd3644a4c5e09d453e1: I have no reason to go down there right now.
textByHashes.42cab84b52b8ca7ed7902d765dc28990596d0b51: Perhaps there's some evidence we missed somewhere.
textByHashes.ba4ebbdae600f31836910c2d544a8772ed989ead: Well then I guess it's time to fix that.
textByHashes.025e56950f2a3dea9d703eda3074befaf70edb85: That's right. So I'm guessing down here is your domain?
textByHashes.f31db5c463748e6c8660795816da07799037199a: Speaking of which, where are they?
textByHashes.cb21a5707128b014594de4b1f031ef6ab12955f4: Right, well in that case, I'd better get to it. I'd like to have a look around down here. Hopefully I can find some sort of clue as to how Livius died.
textByHashes.afeac27acb0e968391277be388bc74463c69db70: I'd also like to ask you a few questions, if that's okay?
textByHashes.a862d2eac314f34d1704d4bb8e56069410026788: What can you tell me about the actors?
textByHashes.6c5a70e90fe148337dac1f386e942a02342ab6c3: And all of them were in here earlier?
textByHashes.c5da527ff19a1c496254629915d248aab89747d6: And you're sure none of them could have slipped out at any point?
textByHashes.eff191f2266f4ff0a4cf2f67f67ef5205e8d1f72: What's the crate of poison for?
textByHashes.69da3c01f9fb146da1efbdc599c455da8081a527: It seems one of the costumes has a stain on it.
textByHashes.7b32df3bbb1f99b971a66b653dbeb60715e6ad3f: Yes, a wine stain. Apparently the costume belongs to Naiatli. Is there any reason the costume would be stained?
textByHashes.7006d2fe00a145cf788f027cd71ed5b21e332490: Do you have any wine backstage?
textByHashes.f83826a8a7df1b0967ce3c4bf0867d451211ed3c: Did you know there was a hidden passage in here?
textByHashes.32f246bd95beb989df96121b5adce0d29ea0a78d: I'm going to keep looking around.
textByHashes.be3006b5f0c2f858b8ef996da195de542d5f1e8f: I think I might. It turns out there's a secret passage from the backstage area into the wine cellar. Someone could have got in and out without anyone else knowing.
textByHashes.91692ce94b85faaf39cf7d84ce3cb8e45eca9efb: Not only that, but the backstage area has had a rat problem recently. They have plenty of poison for dealing with them. That same poison could easily have been used to kill Livius.
textByHashes.a2d20021a42d6d1941f9b6631555c589f6e5cea0: I think you're right actually. Ignore me.
textByHashes.37a772e2bbd7a1f8af944eee437c5f84808498b5: As a fellow actor, she had access to the secret passage into the wine cellar where Livius was having his pre- performance drink.
textByHashes.d4d956a1ba37a15ca00cb5e4e3b80e8b54669abf: The rat poison. Enough of that would easily kill a man. She poisoned his drink so that she could be back out of the cellar before he died.
textByHashes.7a4fbae6f7f4c7c9ec1f9b89fb5fb9ea389a3b4a: But she was the only one who had wine on her clothes. Wine isn't allowed backstage, so it must have come from the cellar.
textByHashes.85a877f9355f3bbfcc8f0c52c3e5e259b70ee0d3: Constantinius mentioned earlier that she had been in Livius' shadow for some time. Killing him has finally allowed her to take on a leading role.
textByHashes.98b60b5b856925705b76b9d8c83ef0757be1066c: I'd say eighty, maybe ninety percent sure.
textByHashes.71f066c7803e39b9f9dfd0f13b61c1f0746f25f4: Wait? But should we not be acting now?
textByHashes.d8134fc184cc050f90bb1b28131535bcb91db102: Well then we'll have to just speed things along a bit. I'm going out there!
textByHashes.126c9ab5c4ee3c445cab40cee1b0b6fd0b73354b: Well, he was one of the few who had access to the secret passage into the wine cellar. He also had access to the rat poison.
textByHashes.77003c80a90b6b216e07f3cd64c6508de7985083: She had access to both the secret passage into the wine cellar and to the rat poison.
textByHashes.9ab3daa612596127e791dad3cd83e9ce79fedd30: Well, she had access to the secret passage. She claimed not to know about it, but she did know about the history of the villa. She also had access to the rat poison.
textByHashes.eae6389815a3a4a145b18c93553705dae10cb654: Well it's the last thing anyone would expect.
textByHashes.37c7f2a9032900c057126f706a33c8ba58aa6a5e: I don't know yet. I need to review the evidence.
textByHashes.d0b8e511ab09d9aeb35bf3a709a963cbe31a74f7: I need go back on stage.
textByHashes.e18514622432096a577be7360c9318df65ed20e3: Villain? The only villain here is you, murderer!
textByHashes.3d86e6fcc104f6d54f877910fc19d48d36cab3aa: Do not pretend you don't know! Your lies are at an end!
textByHashes.d7a15421f754024cb81687f3c975e5515f033bb6: Lay down your arms! Your heroic deeds are fabrications!
textByHashes.97d3fb9e7b1bac2e9744e1f3acff75eb85e812ec: It's all part of my grand plan. I grow stronger with every passing moment!
textByHashes.0ef91415edaac803c440cdd6591394ac93d279f6: And let you live to foil my plans another day? I'm afraid that's not the game we play!
textByHashes.3fa0f85b8fd73fa5b1a8902b33f66497da97c26c: Naiatli, I know you killed Livius. Why?
textByHashes.360f49207d253a9238a518978c754ef6be1a3f1e: Murder is a bit far though. Could you not have just... lightly poisoned him?
textByHashes.1769970f235f60c1fdf6bf48f3f2c77ca3906c83: Oh, Naiatli... Come on, let's get you to the guards.
textByHashes.d40b0d7c3c193f5325bc296972cfec3814d585ea: Stradius, Hutza, it's been a surprising pleasure working with you to solve this case.
textByHashes.ecb3ac22c4620d0b2fa327e62246c30cd902d72d: I suppose I did, but no harm done. I'm just glad we got it all sorted out, though I don't think Patzi is going to be paying me any time soon...
textByHashes.c8a8bbcc9459b275e1a70f33f22459219b4487c3: Are you angry at me for getting involved in all of this? Did you forget that it was you that hired me?
textByHashes.82b27c1a693325316dc2696086cc4cbb078b9916: And I don't think I did too bad a job. You never got kicked out, even though you did bring a thief in with you.
textByHashes.c4f8ce30986e8681319c44dcff4e1d513a72a560: So how about that payment you promised?
textByHashes.5ec891ce2f45073b27f07f8036f41f225427ad9c: I have to admit, I rather surprised myself there.
textByHashes.51ac9408dab2ba0f3ed87192224676ff276eed82: It's a kind offer, but I'm afraid it was a one-time job.
textByHashes.ef5148ac6ebb7a41700220b89b2a7a67ac438c5d: It was very well made. Makes the job of not damaging it much easier!
textByHashes.f549d3dddee18c52c286f8882e5f9ca81d686ec7: Would I be able to get one of them for my own purposes?
textByHashes.853589566d0a1e9e65e8d3f36bb39c832448e0e5: I was going to ask if you had any spare equipment...
textByHashes.78d8023521a026fbc3750b7c8a719ac35a71856b: I may have a need to mask my identity again in the future... or perhaps carry a tray around.
textByHashes.344f3f22f6ed431ae8f185552e7aa6563fc74add: Do you have any quests for me?
textByHashes.64a48582e43d126be1046f6efd04ce8001747eec: Perhaps there is a way you can sneak up at night?
textByHashes.284072d3b212f33ed651343720a317b7eb2845c9: No but perhaps I could try and find one?
textByHashes.ac2ae87a15562b5d977ca490ee65ff800a67b9fc: No problem, what does the combination look like?
textByHashes.9fc54c36c8c2894132700fed93a4aebe8d2811e8: I'll get on it right away!
textByHashes.610fbb80ac86e3fbfe445fc8b59c087bc9afe7f9: Can you remind me of the quest I am on?
textByHashes.613009509a477d2288e31f987f3f774171cde28a: Ah yes, and the guard had lost the combination to your equipment room in the castle on the hill?
textByHashes.df4ae71049c00d59f840df8c33f7fb094160947b: I thought the White Knights controlled Asgarnia?
textByHashes.743a2544f1eb099bc16fa1156f45a21dcb6a2c4e: I'd better not go into someone's bedroom without a reason!
textByHashes.a8a9e3997d408f9f22cc8509aa8158c27bbf8307: I'm looking for the guard that was on last night.
textByHashes.f22bbc11a0767011cccb39b5c8766df01d80c884: Do you know where he is staying?
textByHashes.acfef1ad34c8fdcb88ddc1f1112436f4a4e5a41e: Do you know of another way up Death Plateau?
textByHashes.0d2823ee1e1cf56522b2d929739a54c26c57177b: You're the guard that was on duty last night?
textByHashes.9a03afaf05984c90ebf7835bcbfdbdce1c67c9ed: Denulth said that you lost the combination to the equipment room?
textByHashes.f1c27f11a5550f4a2d439dad05c40035d9576925: I found Harold but he won't talk to me!
textByHashes.6e98d317c8da0cd00162e2a7aa36e9d687314fab: You said that Harold had a weakness?
textByHashes.d0a9f45ac9116dc7b01985bc57f1735dd0f46521: Can I buy you a drink?
textByHashes.e662a52dc6a1e7351bdd829074625295a85d2fea: I'll go and get you one.
textByHashes.49f2f8a3b68a9917fdcfe0d47df1acc7c87b1be3: Where were you when you last had the combination?
textByHashes.e385ba5ea55336d4eaa24217b75a1ff53b2768d4: Have you tried looking between here and the castle?
textByHashes.454191b8c9a4008b4807f9dcbf96312f52db486f: I've lost the IOU you gave me.
textByHashes.35248c329966110d933e65ea10b0f895c72be552: The IOU says that Harold owes me some money.
textByHashes.8ffaa24e7da8fb571d3d0083a519a350ec6dbc1f: The IOU is written on the back of the combination! The stupid guard had it in his back pocket all the time!
textByHashes.0dce229ea17a52f2c9a2301c07394c8a15f5b1a6: Does this noble quest have a name?
textByHashes.795f53fbde5d4e601b94424305ab8298258b6763: I've unlocked the equipment room so I just need to find an alternate route up Death Plateau!
textByHashes.f585450bfbf7b8a1c2b47e1366d4f113d17a9922: I'm looking for the guard that was on duty at the castle last night.
textByHashes.4c968f5192b154605cbc045e062755d836f2875a: Ah... I might be able to help you.
textByHashes.f768f2761787d968cd36dfd1e9cedfb798d0d668: I'm trying to help the...er...humans to reclaim back Death Plateau. If you help me then at least you'd be rid of the trolls.
textByHashes.2e62dbcbe4a579b7a55384410896f8f55e33320c: Where did you say this Sherpa was?
textByHashes.028a147af67aa1af9a1f8e50be525418f3fea844: I'm not the milkman, I need your help!
textByHashes.b36c268ca089091ad8e9cbe2ad29547479a90d8b: I'm helping the Imperial Guard. They need to find a way to sneak up Death Plateau to destroy the troll camp! Saba seemed to think you'd be able to help.
textByHashes.9780731d0e723008305d6ae4ae44c4812a859298: OK, I'll get those for you.
textByHashes.c31f71447d4f513f2a4a083b579ceaca93a0d5d9: I'll find the secret way for myself.
textByHashes.e7056ea947088144b1ffa194aa67f274fd871800: Tenzing has asked me to bring you his climbing boots, he needs to have spikes put on them.
textByHashes.dff849037911dc24fee6f2ed5ce59fa78c3f6afd: Well, I need the Sherpa to show me a secret way up Death Plateau so that the Imperial Guard can destroy the troll camp! He won't help me till I've got the spikes!
textByHashes.3fcd581d0a74605b003820da09e7b1f28fbbfd2f: That won't be a problem as I'm helping out the Imperial Guard!
textByHashes.aacf2203d973b0ee3caf846594aabce2b277f5b6: Not yet! I just need to speak to Denulth!
textByHashes.1d5d310797aaef06848920e8d8307b6923daf5a0: Yes there is another way up Death Plateau!
textByHashes.1428677207bf65ba75f079115b574a97f64e46f1: There is a Sherpa who will only show me the secret way if I first get some spikes for his climbing boots. The smith will only do this for me if you sign up his son for the Imperial Guard!
textByHashes.1f0ba8383f6c0475498ba82560060b322303fcab: Thank you Denulth, I shall be back shortly!
textByHashes.e601e2697f87cb0068d2f4b8737c5482ddb5b114: I'm working on it but I've lost the certificate!
textByHashes.9af1542e1dd4154455f1dce0205d8e52fe35f11a: I have but I don't have the entrance certificate on me.
textByHashes.9615d91b8da89619185dbb105e2a713b177a3d81: I don't have the iron bar or the climbing boots.
textByHashes.6e618f41d272e483d594cd30eee585acfa2651e2: I don't have the climbing boots.
textByHashes.6de2a0fa9a32af52250e81edc85f80d3845d85ae: I don't have the iron bar.
textByHashes.62635cf328759dcd591596b5c6da7b3a13d18eb8: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten loaves of bread. Ten cooked trout.
textByHashes.eb323edf72d6b3c5b93cd1738df67ed9370f8dff: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten loaves of bread.
textByHashes.3cb4668e70991a5460b552c83a76feeee8ad3d63: I don't have the: Spiked boots. Ten cooked trout.
textByHashes.dcc8caaa9317f4722a1e05d136a1345f376b1152: I don't have the: Ten loaves of bread. Ten cooked trout.
textByHashes.793c8db58aea26380b786ff839b1ed51e4ef468c: I don't have the: Spiked boots.
textByHashes.537e7d237addcd7661e2ddf03dba762e941e0ac6: I don't have the: Ten loaves of bread.
textByHashes.f2c536e42364db201ef1f5d34353b8e6705efb87: I don't have the: Ten cooked trout.
textByHashes.83745a4b26b2742a6bd1b4087c3148cd03e2e415: You said you would show me the secret way to Death Plateau?
textByHashes.2faf6054661829d5143e18330ca4340d891b7f1c: OK thanks but I think I'd better check the path. I don't want to send the Imperial Guards to their death!
textByHashes.7ef8c0b9facc1eb770c58c8f0dacbbe42881de2f: I've lost the secret way map.
textByHashes.76ee525bb37fa86ac9195313de7a5d31a59a5be3: I think this is far enough, I can see Death Plateau and it looks like the trolls haven't found the path. I'd better go and tell Denulth.
textByHashes.cf840ae6762d00c364d658a5e3b50b4d8852b5e9: Yes! There is a path that runs from a Sherpa's hut around the back of Death Plateau. The trolls haven't found it yet. The Sherpa made a map I can give you.
textByHashes.ea42834f425bb5cf64458d154ebfb4fa946d3920: I don't have the map on me.
textByHashes.e8fba2598d2a010e7d1335a0233b62cc9e3c878e: I have opened the door but I don't have the combination on me.
textByHashes.c8e0cd93361e5e6517c60407b50718ccfde1164e: Yes! The door is open and here is the combination.
textByHashes.3d55635fa9144c8845010eb85319d7e7f5948772: Where do I get the robes?
textByHashes.3360e171bea832f8f69333f9f15a24327d7cb487: Aren't you scared of the surface?
textByHashes.81e8e73f766eaf53d7a53a7221427ca47d8d9428: What's that mark on your forehead?
textByHashes.3c998fe238d56197702a2f9d8e1963fce939ef5c: Yes, I have two sets of robes!
textByHashes.a1ce032dea4402a3b5d068e39b0cfe1d7282e5a3: Aren't you going to put on your disguise?
textByHashes.b1988aa068c6ef4b2e804da90af2e752b2023580: We are on the surface! We're in Lumbridge Castle!
textByHashes.6be617136efade69a7be02bb07ea03b8d5f7c691: I'd like to get into the city too.
textByHashes.34b9d6391d72dcf4d02bf7e42682a1df27581aaa: Have you heard of any HAM activity lately?
textByHashes.7a22cc824422b4af4739854206fc17683ca58b52: Zanik is the first cave goblin to visit the surface! I'm giving her a tour of Lumbridge.
textByHashes.eed6a8df96675303edc41846226abaadf3b9bcbc: I don't think Zanik has time to help you.
textByHashes.4ef1465d12e8496d89a227da550cf9fdafe6ca52: I'm giving Zanik here a tour of Lumbridge.
textByHashes.bfb26dec0ff659220c2ae10dce4a43bf01b2ec91: I'm taking Zanik on a tour of Lumbridge. She's the first cave goblin to visit the surface!
textByHashes.a02f4cadcc62d4e948994ee415b545369213b3c9: What god did the Dorgeshuun use to follow?
textByHashes.c4fcdb787e0ee526873d10cea4eb9696bf825f90: Not all the gods are bad!
textByHashes.9a123b43cb29d988623a1177de49d5f493e7c4d2: What do I do after smelting the ore?
textByHashes.8c6b092df33345db914c72f5c4f8ac08d1a7206f: Can we come through this gate?
textByHashes.95f22ad60aef6fa66da2b6ae69801627b4783301: But Zanik isn't like other goblins!
textByHashes.a49b1e1812713f39a2e1287a392d0b528df28ab4: The Dorgeshuun live in the caves beneath the swamp. I made contact with them and now I'm giving Zanik a tour or the surface!
textByHashes.c1b14fb65bd9105a7b3ab35eca79bef31eb970d2: Of course not! The gods don't just wander around Lumbridge!
textByHashes.bb41928baa016a0bea7832bd8ee8717890879963: Have you seen enough of Lumbridge yet?
textByHashes.799486aa51b23a4c57db456875a3a7e358e112d3: Will you tell me about the mark on your forehead?
textByHashes.f3a92f3d27fd7ff7f246c6258b6c452e345eed8d: Are you planning to do anything about the cave goblins?
textByHashes.719760dd550d7f1d2a568b014d3157dc7a06057f: You cave goblins must have better eyesight than humans. I would never have noticed it without you!
textByHashes.5c0cb66c23fa1591858f9770007a70e28238ed9b: No, I'm not good enough at thieving.
textByHashes.0add62f3c373c48dbc55a7c8a9b685deceda80f5: Isn't shooting people in the back wrong?
textByHashes.685112be128577112f571832a9bdc2c820b76d25: How did you kill that guard in one hit? I want to learn how to do that!
textByHashes.1c5eff342ba42190b4b6a52861e50a5e1ab69a6c: No, there's a guard patrolling the corridor.
textByHashes.58b6a89a6f4abdba8e7967f5196e4ea2b3d67f71: There are two more guards but I don't know how to get behind them.
textByHashes.837281cd795ee6f1d8b6f9afc9985ae7446baa86: There's no more guards! We've got them all!
textByHashes.e864dc4db5d773c6eb994e6ce89da4c515592385: Did you see what happened to my friend?
textByHashes.9a52a119c6131e37a8135e074066f739b4d8ff95: Oh no! I've got to find her!
textByHashes.000d13269974d44fda661302a9dbc93d56136cde: What did you do to her?
textByHashes.b12716c7a984260d491633b5b2499489ccd2c26a: Juna told Zanik that when the mark glowed again she should go to see her.
textByHashes.94fa5ea38b73241fe326dcce5d7d99ca4f712c9b: Perhaps I should take Zanik's body to Juna. I can't leave her here anyway!
textByHashes.4ea168dbfc3dbea45f18c2ac2ad7df515c788746: But I'll have to free up an inventory slot first.
textByHashes.fe720e82f745b7ba39d4aa48d156c85d9335be2f: I can't just leave Zanik's body lying around! I should take her to Juna.
textByHashes.dd9924e950f565c9f55bd61c8aeb7ff19962a240: You can just bring her back to life?!
textByHashes.8c4213b43b5d10e7eeca25e953d2ff7de62ec291: I want to get out now!
textByHashes.87e112748fe1fa42764ff37300905476fac9acd1: Juna brought you back from the dead.
textByHashes.5ea682be2bdee637407401434c59e68970c9723c: What did Sigmund do to you?
textByHashes.558f2eaa6b6c6effe28a23d006ed5c7d94c6e702: How can we get down there?
textByHashes.10c847a4003ccbb69ef9c094c64182c3e4c92674: Why are you helping the HAM people?
textByHashes.32339bcf95a37d4d17b731f89c9918f095071371: But don't you know what they're planning to do?
textByHashes.6f2d0745140c9b044cad60dbf4516fca2280349a: Hey... if I carried one of these crates I could slip downstairs and stop them!
textByHashes.3f6abdaa76f376fa997388b99aedb795611cd4de: I don't know, what are you thinking?
textByHashes.5ef91de8cf9d3fd28fc601372af2b5aa5eaa98de: He must have had a ring of life! It looks like he got away from us this time, Zanik.
textByHashes.5aad259c8d43dc801038cf1a518d269566671d38: Pleased to meet you. I'm . So you're searching for knowledge in an inn?
textByHashes.f5fcf9144a250681889a2ac46d19d11c7dd65031: I think so. The name's . You're Elias, right? You had a camp out near Uzer.
textByHashes.796f36c0c212adbfe3e3ccc2986d5e559d19f38d: Is that what's brought you here?
textByHashes.9a254858b07de6b94a08f41f358b73523d4b995b: Absolutely! So what was this tip-off you received?
textByHashes.0f1e9a3501fdef8d33741fc04d5ae06586a044b4: Arrav? As in the Shield of Arrav? I was the one who helped return it to the museum.
textByHashes.c99773c9d97a736343567ef1d7ecb7ba8f659dc9: And you think these zombie sightings mean he's returned?
textByHashes.5d57af11cd9b7c0a57c2925f5fbbe2f93869acc3: I can see why you think this is worth looking into. Where do we start?
textByHashes.fcbee734a47d3fe1d1996257206bf094f393b0f4: Follow the tracks and see where they came from. Good plan.
textByHashes.3f60f59bf7270052f7a45bb254fd060acb88bb41: What can you tell me about Arrav and Zemouregal?
textByHashes.0044ba3d7673932e5c94a23064883f0142bddb32: So what exactly is it you're researching?
textByHashes.94ec643e3f85c1f78236b1780aaa173a42851f73: And that's why you're so interested in Zemouregal?
textByHashes.11b38fbc11f5edd88d1d28b44f02d13ae30a930f: If you're an explorer, I'm guessing you travel a lot?
textByHashes.694ec5ed7f9bc246ce6057350660d5ddb0700612: So where do you call home?
textByHashes.cc1d1a34a98ef3c103bd1d04e76a0acb02cab3b4: Sounds like you have quite the history.
textByHashes.aa2f2aa8bf0ac4f853069927c5a769ee9f2fb86c: So you weren't always an explorer?
textByHashes.1d43b1a9d54bfe99d0212658c08b1c4b8f9d9835: What happened? Some sort of life-changing injury?
textByHashes.8c52e632422d91e3ee58a06edd361e9c92e0e4c9: I need to do something else.
textByHashes.29613ec7b42f8eddba04f70ebdb734bbe1b4f37e: I need to do something else first.
textByHashes.6231c0feb2a8371c77c2601bf34c9386865aabf1: Hello again. So what was this tip-off you received?
textByHashes.8d61d44c02ac3ce300403c6d679f13617b6caac3: Do you have that key we found?
textByHashes.7071488430a6c494496147db133f102842e38dc3: Actually, I'll keep hold of it.
textByHashes.645cf0bd5edddeafa1e3ec1c965f0e0e6630b8bc: Only one way to find out...
textByHashes.27050e2fc6194f3a7135cdc46ab06ebd16b0c59b: I should probably fetch Elias first.
textByHashes.2e296072d3a5100b5d38fc4c86dd4f5dbadfa687: What about the rest of this place? There could be more useful information to uncover here.
textByHashes.dfba5bdc4e9038065463c502134e6d00c7d6c893: Sounds like a plan. You head to Varrock and let them know what we've found so far. I'll keep exploring.
textByHashes.b7a0359f5a9dec17de77ec6b6f9562465fdf3408: Arrav? But how are you... Are you fighting Zemouregal's control?
textByHashes.fbc6c739458ca58261d51c57e67d745d6ff583ce: I'm so sorry, Arrav. There must be some way I can help you. What can I do?
textByHashes.3ba4d6e6d070c1ceaf2e06d73e37b5f159ab3e31: This isn't good. I'd better get to Varrock right away!
textByHashes.5fe7b1ecead7dbac78768074c9c20a09cb004f03: Not good. Zemouregal is nearly ready to begin another attack on Varrock.
textByHashes.754ad28d17711c81f04ff41b79e3b5bed1417b7b: Indeed. Zemouregal plans to have Arrav lead the zombies in an attack on Varrock, and he plans to do so very soon.
textByHashes.256b17c04bfd93c3037dc453150261311edd98c1: There may still be hope for Arrav. While spying on Zemouregal, I came face to face with him. He may serve Zemouregal, but not willingly. His mind is still his own.
textByHashes.e8be4e1828ef74d2dc5906600c059c79169268d4: He told me that Zemouregal has his heart.
textByHashes.5f44ea3b2e898cb48da380eaa9156027f06e9883: Not quite. There are still a few out there, including one in Camdozaal. Ramarno is his name.
textByHashes.75d54695f370523511b0be87b1fe14206894304a: No, not yet. I'll be on my way shortly.
textByHashes.b78f6bd11104e242674c8c941683f310ccdc9fb9: I need your help with a shield.
textByHashes.d9c2dee4c18b92dc31939742c23da2c95be821c7: The Shield of Arrav. We've discovered that Zemouregal intends to attack the city of Varrock with a zombie army. It was the shield that stopped him last time.
textByHashes.6a11d40bbd887d2464a0a64754ff08c95cd52df6: But how will a forge help me?
textByHashes.e7f0b6ab0f6fa57fcc65aeee3e90c1418ff1de65: I see. So how do I access this Dream Theatre?
textByHashes.0885d09949a87049154ce2c17a573ebbde69146f: And how do I get imbued barronite?
textByHashes.b320ed4c84f08abf997d0e824a48707bcd6ae3ac: How do I access the Dream Theatre?
textByHashes.8d6bfbfd3303b026881f5a248409adbfa1ff86f3: We don't have much time. I'm talking to you from the Imcando Dream Theatre. I need to know how to use your shield.
textByHashes.aa4333bbd32c6309e717dd6f0d4c9007e2f07bba: You used the shield to defeat Zemouregal's army before. How can we do it again?
textByHashes.5f47d43fb8aeb3c0fef6535a6b578c773f94ebf7: So if I can find his descendant...
textByHashes.65e2b57b047d5f8b2bf934118422f8b58d2c11ee: I know how to use the shield!
textByHashes.8d7c3a19c4e2a760f6c6eca2141a0bd3257d1d0e: Now I need to get back to Varrock as fast as possible. I just hope I'm not too late.
textByHashes.3413d5f4ed13b244c98dfb854d0389e783d1fa57: Oh this is not good! I need to find Elias and Captain Rovin!
textByHashes.912718e062d4eb7ee2fa6e715fd926528cf0b204: Don't worry, I'm working on a plan to get rid of them.
textByHashes.dd8b74587369765c2d873a7e59282a048752c14a: I'm sorry, Your Majesty. I'm trying to get rid of them.
textByHashes.a802bd1a85384176aa24e8d9e3c87b4610237d9f: They're an army belonging to Zemouregal.
textByHashes.01ec6a9ed1f06a2ca5d00f954312fd5fbe68efd7: It's an army of zombies belonging to Zemouregal.
textByHashes.1ccfd70ef70e89e742ceae938156665578f7f5f2: I'm working on a way to get rid of them, so fingers crossed.
textByHashes.4bcb58149204e8db862ed023d77f568664315a24: Not really. Normally they stick to caves and sewers.
textByHashes.c1524488c8b32a2cc077392f9b6ad4184112772a: Don't you think you should try and get to somewhere safer?
textByHashes.2220475ece0ebf10b6326cf59a2b6d03baa4cf30: Sort of. I discovered that only a descendant of Varrock's original founder can use the shield, but I'm not sure how we'd find someone of that lineage still alive today.
textByHashes.00f0932eae368ee8ab4f16f4a0b8adc7caeb1cc6: You can say that again. Speaking of which, I need your help. I must find out if there are any living descendants of the founder of Varrock.
textByHashes.9873ae1595b54dadfbf433c9c9456aa87830a65d: Yes. This information may help us to defeat the zombies.
textByHashes.590ed89eefe5f8a56bc18bd478434dfc04a097a9: Sounds like a good start, but how would that help me track down their descendants?
textByHashes.e4f08fbb17eb0293e51af594fbdd67a02f95d425: Reldo has given me a lead. Hopefully it will help us find someone who can use the shield.
textByHashes.b5f237d5c1c42e95f8a213b3a23b97a029626b80: I think so. I have some potential contenders at least.
textByHashes.9b25d0fc17e39920989520992b7db360c8ad3a93: I have some contenders for the descendant of Varrock's original founder. I now just need to work out who the right one is.
textByHashes.608839ace8db5aeada9e8314ea7b1dff3f47ca43: Don't worry, I'm working on a plan to get rid of them. You might be able to help by using the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.60a76adb4249f9b6f14aef730df3a50e4e3d7895: Yes. A descendant of an original elder of Avarrocka can apparently use it to stop the zombies. You're one of those descendants, although I'm not sure if you're the right one.
textByHashes.ddb64d8376a7c61d92e3c4360b3754736e81566c: It must be someone else who's the right descendant then.
textByHashes.c98f39503bb142f0d2cd823d43b4d922a18430fc: Well your surname is Prysin. It matches the name of an elder called Khom Prysin.
textByHashes.f8f0dbb82f93e1e07e56086d1db4ed8cbb678d52: Interesting... So, are there any genuine Prysins around?
textByHashes.6d44386e0e1c096e4b6d306be8fb60c04819f0a8: As in Dimintheis Fitzharmon? Sounds like I'd better pay him a visit.
textByHashes.83e01ce6b44e0e5a8450f58ea7ee9fa9fb8c2b1c: All might not be lost. You might be able to help us by using the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.28462c572c187092b5798ffe9277c8bade493401: I have a reason to believe that you are descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, which might mean that you have the ability to use it. Here, hold it and see if anything happens.
textByHashes.efcd5c79745395e12b0d6a9f85dd468daa6943ea: Then it must be someone else who's descended from the correct elder.
textByHashes.39f5246c2c70b3710ab0cd702ed9ea7941823a4f: Well your surname is Raispher. It matches the name of an elder called Dathero Raispher.
textByHashes.34a1411cf33865e3eb57c27000eab5addd64da1b: Interesting... So, are there any genuine Raisphers around?
textByHashes.a558ac3465666012dfbc9c68c594c68a8211285e: Well I might have a solution to that. We have the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.4c25c0e558130c75c8ed9d78514304f1b8599c7d: It might be that you yourself can use it. I have a reason to believe that you are descended from an original elder of Avarrocka.
textByHashes.bc5319abfa168fa55f0c975682bb70a7d8f5b5f2: Here, hold the shield and see if anything happens.
textByHashes.7100ece0f6a4c13792e5b4a6ce7c8f689fe09848: It must be someone else who is descended from the correct elder then.
textByHashes.34fcb3ea479effbd20c42b36bc874d6aaedfe687: It's not your skills as a Blacksmith I need. It's to do with the zombie attack on the palace!
textByHashes.66e727cfdf9bbd23f5f45ca8d4ba5cd16d198b81: I have reason to believe that you are descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, which might mean you have the ability to use the Shield of Arrav to defeat the zombies.
textByHashes.a6b3d68a85abe54eb9a68746a465d1e238c8591d: It must be a different descendant that I'm after then.
textByHashes.bd79e0db68c50dc18fec598816f26b5b06752095: Well your surname is Ravitz. It matches the name of an elder called Ramone Ravitz.
textByHashes.00b40c95e82a421bf3158bb488b482d17d2e729b: Interesting... So, are there any genuine Ravitzes around?
textByHashes.05ffee3215da15bcdcc27aabc215fe1d10324451: I need your help with the zombie invasion.
textByHashes.8b6f3f02ef48b1b1b3b532221094de3886036d88: Maybe not normally, but the Shield of Arrav might change that.
textByHashes.329563e3fae19503a92d36bdc6b33d89668ff60b: Well I have reason to believe that you are descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, which might mean you have the ability to use the shield. Here, hold it and see if anything happens.
textByHashes.9550e9eaed97036631a4df0637e491ca4256bbd1: Well, your surname is Halen. It matches the name of an elder called Marv Halen.
textByHashes.7dec71d0e26eee5bf0dba7a98d859c40c423bacc: Interesting... So, are there any genuine Halens around?
textByHashes.b094a32153f854dbfdefd2f211ce75790d9c22e5: Romeo! I need to speak to you. A zombie army has invaded the palace and you might be the only one who's able to stop them.
textByHashes.57ade8d3ec2cae3dbdb58dfaacafa5d2660fd7f6: Well, I'm not sure. We might be able to find out with this shield though.
textByHashes.6d73702bcfc56e0e296992ef0cb322eff7d58be2: I have reason to believe that you are descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, which might mean that you can use the Shield of Arrav to defeat the zombies. Here, hold it and see if anything happens.
textByHashes.8692ebebc77a7cb8db01890ad2b051205ea96629: I guess it must be a different descendant that I'm after.
textByHashes.19e18aaf2ec04b39dd4ca6a8b327c701bc2a9b50: Well it wasn't a guarantee, but your surname matches that of an elder called Ramone Gontamue.
textByHashes.bb46e51e552e072da8154ed11b1084194ad87710: Interesting... So, are there any genuine Gontamues around?
textByHashes.0392371775af687c30c13a51737dacd4f9b0f84a: I'm hoping the Shield of Arrav may help a little.
textByHashes.1729fa2f87c673d9ffacb5bf6c8a8e8c69e80d77: I have reason to believe that you're descended from one of the original elders of Avarrocka, which might mean you have the ability to use the shield.
textByHashes.a6aeb45d71a04270ed7400edffb7f6dcd839b79f: I think you might be the one! Quick, let's get to the palace!
textByHashes.3ae4a2c4296ba9b0bdc396a24a011bfea1d576e6: I think so! Quick, let's get to the palace!
textByHashes.79c185ce0c94ee3202c8a427618f9461c4f80dd0: It wouldn't have been possible without Dimintheis.
textByHashes.8be9bd554df7ad8c8dd4a4630fde7aaccdcb3b5d: Any word on what happened to Zemouregal?
textByHashes.fa91c22b41a5f88df865b6846e517892d35dd9c6: And he'll have Arrav with him.
textByHashes.6c92f849afdceba1c94a721e2720270c5cbf5d89: And you, Elias. So what brings you all the way out here?
textByHashes.379eefddf4924dad0714b6dc8a032d8524a871c4: And how's that going so far?
textByHashes.f3286b6f2ca364cd131fb3fe0bd232d9f0e4fcce: And you, Elias. So you're back out here again?
textByHashes.5a75a798bb5f4706236c4044b4d79ff52d43c52f: Yes, I remember. You said it might contain important information on the Mahjarrat.
textByHashes.1e77858132d7c38761f8e1cd0ef53c44fe0f1459: Sounds good. I'd best leave you to your work.
textByHashes.4d7a8458013cc42577c249c9467c963fa03270ea: I have some information that might be of use in your displays.
textByHashes.ea31f4cd3fd785d775ae5f6c12a5390ac277ca88: Well, we got rid of the marauding zombies.
textByHashes.8705fcc26e05d837fe8742a5c97043bc07636c11: Well, Zemouregal the Mahjarrat sent his zombie army against Varrock. However, we figured out how to stop him.
textByHashes.3d26be204a62d12135187b864da68aeed2cec11b: I found out that the descendant of the founder of Varrock could use the shield to stop the zombie army. It turns out that Dimintheis was that descendant, so he was able to defeat the zombies.
textByHashes.ac9829c8cb9b3b2647c84039e0fa4434b014e327: Oh, random bits of tat, thank you very much.
textByHashes.d46ca986dc6c5a284e5c0eb65fd5c8e8405ed19d: Oh dear. I don't have any money.
textByHashes.d10303f7fe6b0a66edd96fe3d58baf8e826b4f40: How am I meant to fight a demon who can destroy cities?!
textByHashes.a465f768a461a7b391ea7257886ae91df329c7e6: Okay, where is he? I'll kill him for you!
textByHashes.937844245f8f73c0319142cb6a1080dcfd983642: Wally doesn't sound a very heroic name.
textByHashes.5fcff6639004a5a59f46bb85f51220a3022960e8: So how did Wally kill Delrith?
textByHashes.a20a043bc1569d4a78fdca1b97ce44fb96c4c10f: Ok thanks. I'll do my best to stop the demon.
textByHashes.e205ea2cb829fe3d9643d101a815e454401f27c9: No, I don't believe in that stuff.
textByHashes.72f2d2582c0d08a1ab239dec16fb88e41517c264: Ok, but how old are you?
textByHashes.5ae34cbee4ffab8cbf1398122d00a546534c6e5d: Oh if it's in the scheme of things that's ok.
textByHashes.a3ca3f91c743571ea4095852f2c650fa78a86774: Well I'd better press on with it.
textByHashes.78a6d515ea0b1f81634f802b7c1816989c9080b0: I am a mighty adventurer, who are you?
textByHashes.d65d67d430eab61319d0b8eb2074a176718f0dbc: I was hoping you could tell me.
textByHashes.154798c2b219260b33741c957971c2d970483896: Aris said I should come and talk to you.
textByHashes.d397e22eed68d7b45a8d7fc07de9c2d2ecd88567: I need it to fight Delrith.
textByHashes.6520911f28628d49f985286398787897bb291be4: Well Aris' crystal ball seems to think otherwise.
textByHashes.f006d79931f888627975f0e7157f5ccebd5b5997: You mean you don't have it?
textByHashes.40d65de38ab3690945a4d7129664c7aa0fdca7c9: Can you give me your key?
textByHashes.a4e9b077e27b26f652dda2264fe538a7df982486: So what does the drain connect to?
textByHashes.62a1355c93209f306e5ea0c397b4aacd11ac656e: Well I'd better go key hunting.
textByHashes.db7d026bd04a8d189302af3dd67bbd1a1f8e7cdd: Where can I find Captain Rovin?
textByHashes.07aee817cf06dd9f6aae4b79a73387092f356655: And why is this a problem?
textByHashes.674d426e83880c6d4a60f288cad42e3f5c47dfd4: He's back and unfortunately I've got to deal with him.
textByHashes.93d9885e7e6eaacbf1edfc6feca87a2585ecd0c9: Yes she is still alive. She lives right outside the castle!
textByHashes.4d3819089aa5edc507920b6e52a87d71e3239969: I haven't found any of them yet.
textByHashes.3392746a2acee36f2fce45bfb652f686472bb6fc: Can you remind me where all the keys were again?
textByHashes.16fbfff34d18b644443414276c71ea5e6c9fd892: I've got the key from Captain Rovin.
textByHashes.6792909461b238e9db6500184f06d4e539dbad76: I've got the key from Wizard Traiborn.
textByHashes.959052325d336681be1ea3ffb4b1ae21c5b0b857: I've got the key which you dropped down the drain.
textByHashes.9aaec6f4b270682812c9552d7375eab96808f985: I've got the keys from Wizard Traiborn and Captain Rovin.
textByHashes.50df36ce0ac31ac76f41da9a30dd84f0e3a0773d: I've got the key from Captain Rovin and the one that you dropped down the drain.
textByHashes.8c9dce7a773bebb807e064af6a9199389b6b7f0b: I've got the key from Wizard Traiborn and the one that you dropped down the drain.
textByHashes.d372630da9e77d866ff4d9de75d7995b93729baf: Yes, I know, but this is important.
textByHashes.d1f064ea86aa24109d4061cf5a0819b46d80ca6f: There's a demon who wants to invade the city.
textByHashes.a244deda3740f579b61e0e929abfc2d85269e73d: Yeah, the palace guards are rubbish!
textByHashes.3a5d9caa99062205d0bbb72895757aeb90ead5f5: It's not them who are going to fight the demon, it's me.
textByHashes.ef4394bbe92469b37a4c572a94871634c4c77862: I'm going to use the powerful sword Silverlight, which I believe you have one of the keys for?
textByHashes.39916dc049b6f232941643681f0563ab09e934ae: Fortune-teller Aris said I was destined to kill the demon.
textByHashes.ea35485c3383fc4bc86620513090c41bfe7e2e0d: Otherwise the demon will destroy the city!
textByHashes.55822811c567b06c8312eead009541ecc2aa96e9: Sir Prysin said you would give me the key.
textByHashes.72bdb5e66c872430da19f4f4b4f848cc6d0c2682: Why did he give you one of the keys then?
textByHashes.5bc29ef1d9ba36c5b298291bd2bb493ea763fdab: Sir Prysin dropped it down a drain!
textByHashes.d97b219b11979702fc0d5362518501081c912598: Well I'm going to use the powerful sword Silverlight, which I believe you have one of the keys for?
textByHashes.356804ed7484517518f9afe5e27ef23f91dbbd28: That must be the key Sir Prysin dropped.
textByHashes.3881859cbc20042f3c4023b3fe695b79ac1f5900: I don't seem to be able to reach it. I wonder if I can dislodge it somehow. That way it may go down into the sewers.
textByHashes.2582843528f08eff3d0a45e664e3f3ab41c96a25: OK, I think I've washed the key down into the sewer. I'd better go down and get it!
textByHashes.c15a67caaba2f5cf11383fc1c0d294053c8cf1c7: I need to get a key given to you by Sir Prysin.
textByHashes.4106a56fa0f358fcc40a3a740138c699c4c81218: He told me you were looking after it for him.
textByHashes.8e7dd6e0446cf069615fe8e01b02333c665ca639: Okay, I'll go and tell him that.
textByHashes.7c94fcff0544d0ff7e048db52c2835759ee8ce95: Err I'd better be off really.
textByHashes.7a2c6b02f23ba506f345a1ec1afc46ac2d5f2883: He's one of the King's knights.
textByHashes.2418012fc209a441b6495aed826cccf541ee501b: Just tell me if you have the key.
textByHashes.cf7fa42a15be18c4eb94ad082a06fcf173fa52b6: It's the key to get a sword called Silverlight.
textByHashes.548b581302e0945dbc496702357d28908c73dc8b: Well, have you got any keys knocking around?
textByHashes.fe41b55530e0413117298d1e3336ec4582c93ae9: So do you know what ritual to use?
textByHashes.2877756676fba05fd0fe06366364caf876167867: Hmm, that's too bad. I really need that key.
textByHashes.87200918c7505e8713f4330f24859b97694efe7c: I'll help get the bones for you.
textByHashes.f8dc0baf07cb3c98f96670daa770255b7cce7d1a: Okay, I'll speak to you when I've got some bones.
textByHashes.1a0e14b8255eb64422249bd20739419b188427e5: I haven't got any at the moment.
textByHashes.57b276df4bdca417716c6cae47f41b24e3ef5695: You're right. I've got a demon to slay.
textByHashes.ba8687eb6bb34c9c071ade66afa76abfb23fccf3: I've lost the key you gave to me.
textByHashes.9e3df49c6413b03a086a4fb24a3d6e5abd9c1eb5: I found Sir Prysin. Unfortunately I haven't got the sword yet. He's made it complicated for me.
textByHashes.1bc936198ccf3460072d63e888eb6554ad2de8cc: Not yet. And I, um, lost Silverlight.
textByHashes.4c0c2e357e087722a79d2824f18d5605f81fa8ca: I have the sword now. I just need to kill the demon, I think.
textByHashes.1f6718e8f9947616409e2cd034c2e99f03832e11: Where can I find the demon?
textByHashes.5e0e9844df114c763d8425768c51646b8c299924: Now what was that incantation again?
textByHashes.fd029d80c380b4c0bd8c735f013c514fac72dc0d: Nothing much - What are you doing here? It doesn't seem like there's much to do out here in the desert!
textByHashes.1b5fd63987ea08b09b70dad575e0ec0de8ee8700: Do you have any quests? Call it a hunch, but you look like the type of man who might...
textByHashes.91d29c3cc970b0b7814b0fac8ae57763cc991bbb: Sure, I was heading that way anyway. Any particular person at the digsite you want me to talk to?
textByHashes.e959b17dd32c999652a739130f5850fd3a43f696: No thanks. Playing delivery boy doesn't really sound much like fun to me.
textByHashes.250af0bee6edea79eef8391deadd433292a24730: Nothing really. I'm just wandering around for no good reason.
textByHashes.2f92eaea0d9c2343e9c47bb0f4cd0e80b29b3187: Um... yeah... about that... I kind of didn't go and speak to him yet...
textByHashes.caece78f9dc4d1a55a5b6b7aeb95f3caa2222764: Um... yeah... about that... I kind of lost those etchings you gave me...
textByHashes.299c2ed8f93fee8a057432d19e449b627213359e: I had some etchings to deliver to you, but I don't have them on me...
textByHashes.0ba0bca708dbffcbb43334e815d2ee9031170dce: That's right. I was in the desert down by the Bedabin Camp, and I found an archaeologist who asked me to deliver this to you.
textByHashes.87a3f49d3e6ab5859c6690e5eab7bf3480582b39: So what does the inscription say? Anything interesting?
textByHashes.e2aff07046743f486a28fba5918f468abe9ee830: Can you translate it for me?
textByHashes.84eea633797538f3a197255b73e62f7c5423000f: Um... So, can you translate it for me or not?
textByHashes.608be54e9045416c4e392d935aacf1dfac65f585: Wow! You write really quickly don't you?
textByHashes.60a7da6f9af1bf72ed6423c00c13d414bd48b1bb: I, uh, kind of didn't take it to him yet...
textByHashes.e33cce7c9f15f064f59004470a26197a1fdd3c06: I lost that translation you gave me...
textByHashes.a3f1b47050e02b56edf93f2c94b9784847736746: Yeah, he did. But I don't have it with me.
textByHashes.b304bed079a3fdb638cb1e4e3736f57477b27571: Yeah, he did. I have it here in this book.
textByHashes.500fcf7ffdb1e66642c705526cef1dcf33929757: Yeah, I did. Kind of boring really.
textByHashes.0489e1c00c7cb8f21da75c1c6c4c8c88101cfc5c: You want me to help you find some treasure for a fifty percent share, as long as I don't tell anybody, and your reputation as an esteemed archaeologist with the Museum of Varrock remains intact, and nobody
textByHashes.37fb7618cbec3967fec3ad47f6f55cce360e6367: discovers you're actually just a treasure hunter?
textByHashes.93ce21864c96c161631310f3b512965d736a5a11: Well... I guess nobody is really going to lose out on anything, and we don't even know if there is any treasure...
textByHashes.658f8dd518087b47bcdfcb5e1c4572fdb435ca30: Aw, go on then. Count me in.
textByHashes.9b1f614a52387fdf9f6db2e01a571a2999a9dcac: This all sounds very immoral, and I don't want any part of your seedy little schemes.
textByHashes.a2cba57b9fdeb742055f508e44aee90771d13316: I don't trust anything about your little scheme, including you! I want nothing to do with this!
textByHashes.b357664d9e21f674a1adfecc9c986bde67c39e7f: I'm here on an archaeological expedition for the Museum of Varrock.
textByHashes.b05aa510a667de5af1366a19a9f6aabef5714bb2: I believe there may be some interesting artefacts in the area.
textByHashes.295ee0b7b7c6b259fc0be92cd9e92dbdb9f1493f: Hello. I represent the Museum of Varrock, and I have reason to believe there may be some kinds of artefacts of historical significance in the nearby area...
textByHashes.20c0cee572c4902296ff0b3306ec65668ee4c048: Please, if I can just have a few minutes of your time to ask some questions...?
textByHashes.f40d2141b7ac01c608b290843de0f3d60baba0e0: Why are all of the people here so hostile? You would think I was asking you for money instead of just for answers to a few questions...
textByHashes.2e10d727a3cfb5c67e2a3bcc263643beec48a30e: Actually, I'd be quite interested to hear what it is you have to say to excuse the attitude everybody in this village seems to have.
textByHashes.010b202f39d956281a50e4a66746f2891674fa59: So you're upset because of something that happened hundreds of years ago?
textByHashes.90196a47df3820471121891fceaca893fbd0cc74: Seems to me like maybe you should find some closure, and let the past go...
textByHashes.c33a804323f742841349a55e4fb0695947f4e68f: I don't really care what your story is to be honest, there is no excuse for such rudeness or hostility.
textByHashes.aa0967b0076853b003d45577b3c0337bb8fb657f: I have done nothing wrong to you, but everybody here treats me like I have committed some great crime against the village.
textByHashes.f6966fdc88d33b1530b021674774d90a16c76874: What? Just because I entered your village?
textByHashes.9ae047b77be5ac5513fa13d8438e401afe7567f2: Whatever... No wonder all you loonies live out here in the desert by yourselves.
textByHashes.cd9e2cff8ca33ac731ba41ff89cba753c5949e6c: I was wondering if you knew anything about some treasure somewhere around here?
textByHashes.107cabf84f380b44d37026fb10cdab1ff39b46a9: I have some evidence that there might be some kind of treasure hidden very close to this village...
textByHashes.d9c68feecde6d9d49bd98990c1eef396738eb308: Do you know anything about some kind of fortress nearby? I have reason to believe there is, or at least used to be, some kind of fortress very close to here...
textByHashes.05cda27b849f7d1a1bd615cf75baee41ee03bed9: Actually, there was nothing I really wanted to ask you about.
textByHashes.d8f1b139929ae3d6d8fbe259b5df61fc6a5e5515: As I understand it there's some kind of hidden treasure in these parts...
textByHashes.fc2a770b6aec3783a387077b707482112fc82deb: No, Wait! Look, I'm here on an archaeological expedition for the Museum of Varrock.
textByHashes.c810d9b5e02657adcd80ee5fd8e5961a63914bcc: I am only here looking for artefacts...
textByHashes.5828f81374089f7a49491f8909f6d850ebd92ddb: I heard a rumour about four diamonds or crystals...
textByHashes.90d770207e7bbdeb2fa7eb841f2ca6a13e4003b8: Certain things have led me to believe there may be some kind of ruined fortress around here...
textByHashes.f3322b767c39e2892fa568acc86a236257f4fbc3: Tell me all you know about the Diamonds of Azzanadra.
textByHashes.52256f694dcf1be761e186f70eebe33420057e98: So tell me... Did you ever hear of something called the Diamonds of Azzanadra?
textByHashes.faaed8a18f470abd025b6d3ff45d1856c57dd9be: Uh... yeah... So anyway, you have heard of them?
textByHashes.e52d657eb5e713151e81c1afa558cf548fa24fdc: So... do you have any idea where they might be? I have a feeling they will be very valuable.
textByHashes.0d788fefb75d2f4dd7f9b4cf1f207e45e6646d69: Uh, valuable as historical artefacts I mean, obviously.
textByHashes.0784b5344cd0f63b55cf000c9338f0236232a4b9: Do you have any idea how I could track down these warriors somehow, then?
textByHashes.80a60e3da70e30ac403a48a05512dbb83cc01c7e: Okay, but what exactly do you need for this spell?
textByHashes.c023511c4a54c5cc1322fd65682f5ebb3b983601: Quick question; what kind of bones do you need?
textByHashes.e6ca9835766d2cea3ad7ed1f7a74b5daad35f208: It's a slightly odd collection of ingredients, but I shouldn't have too much trouble getting those for you.
textByHashes.a1d767f2d3c64ceb9330caa56ba42fdb174cc2a1: Actually I don't feel like going on a shopping trip for you right now.
textByHashes.63a17f2cb3c30750a7d719b56dd9458379a6b6fc: I have some of the stuff you are looking for with me...
textByHashes.ff2713fe35bbfa91d91bf6ac40d344335c195533: So can you give me any help on where to find these warriors and their diamonds?
textByHashes.569f550608df35b69d6625dce35b0038ae34191d: I don't understand why there are six mirrors when there are only four diamonds...
textByHashes.0c712c733d9fadd9c4e8c082ebd77708c9f9a534: Not as such... Although I think I'm onto something of a promising lead...
textByHashes.3b66d66147471acc5a7808bbee15a1873b16932d: Did you ever hear of something called the Diamonds of Azzanadra?
textByHashes.459f87c48484c55188285707d3b4e0bfe9430c8a: So you have heard of them?
textByHashes.a6078cefdfab6b592329990a72745cc3f83f10c0: No, actually I was looking for something specific...
textByHashes.b44df75e4e1968f3196e0bba51de9d2ec7188f72: I am looking for one of the Diamonds of Azzanadra. I have reason to believe it may be somewhere around here...
textByHashes.a03bf3afc2a3e89cdbd9e68c1adbfa94fc9b40a8: How can I find this 'Damis' then?
textByHashes.97941a5abb156adab889d4a366958734683e756c: How much do you want for it?
textByHashes.6837d6960ad0b12626de7400393e8c7c8cb0e765: Where can I find this Laheeb?
textByHashes.6e3ebbdd6e583d057d19b297fa85fbe81c84da06: Not a problem. I'll be back with your cross before you know it.
textByHashes.e5aae28601af0ced749c97240b13e2b2c71120fe: Sounds like too much effort to me. I'll find this Damis by myself.
textByHashes.5708313d5f2cede04209c2131eec847daa57813f: Where can I find this Damis again?
textByHashes.85e4ea2390f67b098b83cd53c19177c88ae705f2: Can't I just buy your ring?
textByHashes.68fb45970c193163465879d13ba5c3bbb4a6c7d1: I am here to worship the almighty Zamorak! Yay! Go Zamorak!
textByHashes.2f118d8b57e3b48f42b0d8f52e03e34de8175ed7: I am here only to serve the mighty Drakan. Yup, Drakan, he's the man.
textByHashes.49dc001ba1b4297e46cd8240dd50a5444d71a4b0: I came here looking for you, oh mighty Malak, so that I might serve your glory.
textByHashes.14a7de40278c8c7ee0b6d0af53801c4617c19ed1: I am here to kill Lord Drakan, and every stinking one of his vampyre brood!
textByHashes.5a4c515f66086ab58b7230bb67e63f12c512a58f: I am here looking for a special diamond... I have reason to believe it is somewhere in this vicinity, and it is probably in the possession of a warrior of Zamorak.
textByHashes.f623004e937f74ff537b514f66d029dd253ef2c2: I'm fairly sure it will have some kind of magical aura or something too. I don't suppose you've seen it, or know where it might be?
textByHashes.031232fcc5c66283785fe8ffafa143b8b93468f9: Well, what kind of something? No offence, but you're not exactly the trustworthy type...
textByHashes.6dab7dac679758974376887f79cceadfccc70aa2: Well... I can't see any drawback. Okay, I accept your offer. Now tell me what you know.
textByHashes.191294b0a697ca3ab8dcd71f45c0ff06c3bb4030: I don't see exactly how this bargain benefits you... Why exactly do you want Dessous killed anyway?
textByHashes.f0bf8f051459297c10045c44a454729eb7212684: Where can I find this Dessous?
textByHashes.a655972da00a497e5a47d50b096c2b8918577311: And how exactly would I go about doing that?
textByHashes.f41df229f2264c8731ec85b894d9a81affd2d658: So what advice can you give me on killing Dessous?
textByHashes.339f0294673abcf88710532ecbcb343a6729dfc4: How would I go about doing that?
textByHashes.2c9f1cab08a7f5e1f99f24151dd75b01b9fc5464: Never mind, I will figure out all I need to know by myself.
textByHashes.013beadecd45812e8ad70de37bb9fe2ad4b922dc: I don't trust you, or anything you say. I'm afraid I have to decline.
textByHashes.a0f6b8cc5fc1915d8dee6ad5339d842b593d3cf6: How am I supposed to kill Dessous again?
textByHashes.7049b450055df60c0ddced32cbd34bd6b69cd067: Are you an assistant to Count Draynor?
textByHashes.5b23d12534f01ecb7f3d597ff125ccce2f38fd9c: I have a silver bar with me, I was wondering if you could make it into a 'sacrificial offering pot' for me?
textByHashes.4703c5e020ef0624d5af56580057725c6db05973: I understand that you can make me a 'sacrificial offering pot' if I bring you a bar of silver?
textByHashes.06dfc49ecf805e55c67f5dce09d0c28a5c47c720: It was from Malak in Canifis.
textByHashes.6b53532ab4a32e86d2f329f714fef4c5714f71aa: Hi, I was wondering, can you quickly bless this for me?
textByHashes.d7a7e4eaa000c5656402afcb678e152abe720e7a: Oh, don't worry, it's not 'someones', it's my own!
textByHashes.1e02c739656bf235a514882d8e5f0a2f1149ac80: I found Ruantun in Draynors sewers. He made me this pot, now where can I get some fresh blood to fill it with?
textByHashes.06e9ec476eae4046d3c7d3a6e16272f7046bb084: Well that's Dessous dead, but where is the Diamond he was supposed to have?
textByHashes.985be9131e09fe09b46bade13d3e40472599f4bf: If Malak lied to me about it, he is going to pay!
textByHashes.86f87063062e700cdf1fe53274da08ed47b8deb4: Quit playing games with me, Malak. I want that diamond, and I want it now!
textByHashes.425523a447dbc482b9f7fa3861f3425806eed0dc: Where is the Diamond of Blood? I know you have it!
textByHashes.07d69b2cc56827d5d0319ed75ce4f7a2ee49cc84: Hey there little troll... Take this and dry those tears...
