textByHashes.3ba8bfccb3ee4d014ae987ed164d0eb78f45673b: A diamond you say? Listen, I think I might be able to help your parents, but I need that Diamond in return.
textByHashes.ce2eb448055a7f1196e10748287cbb0933fe7010: Absolutely. Don't worry kid, I'll get your parents back to you safe and sound.
textByHashes.731e6393bc3cf83f5f1fe9d9f0c0d13118b6ac98: Sorry, I can't make any promises about that, and I don't think I have the time to waste trying to defrost some stupid ice trolls.
textByHashes.678a6d10bc7e5eaf5e67c196fb0ac0adab85f845: Well, that must have been the 'bad man' that the troll kid was on about... His parents must be up ahead somewhere.
textByHashes.32a17d908cf6866f95d3bf01d01415b1c373c064: He must have been trying to protect his Diamond...
textByHashes.cd8eb7dd8ac87fb853ee571a768277cab991202a: Your son told me. That's why I rescued you, it is very important that I have that diamond...
textByHashes.f52a9a2f28f69ef8cf3f75c4f421da947878bcc3: Wait... what? That stupid little troll kid had the diamond all along?
textByHashes.7d3711f9d23c7acd82af611c0d7c4a5a6ffd2e24: Don't worry about it, just as long as I don't have to go back into that blizzard.
textByHashes.f9e5fceada4bb1a3eb78905062862f101ea4bb31: What can I say? I'm a lot tougher than I look.
textByHashes.1d1abd08d21dd3c3f9a97d49edf76a62a7f17ca7: I lost that diamond of Ice you gave me...
textByHashes.3f21d81205a362d9c0b9aa1168ee2282b9bb4321: I have collected one Diamond so far!
textByHashes.c5bf1334aab4d13a3d06a4673ed66992656f9359: I have collected 2 Diamonds so far!
textByHashes.f3f48fa6fad32922339e5799ef66fb93fdc55162: I have collected 3 Diamonds so far!
textByHashes.d0edbf52e4d5e3de3ada8b9aa18d13466fc21a1c: So I have all four of these Diamonds of Azzanadra, now what?
textByHashes.c50e8a25d7e6928a6849e98992639b05767abebb: Actually, I think I'm going to need them to gain access to the real treasure...
textByHashes.24377c55304895ab1fe999d6482c94f8f18debaf: I used the Four Diamonds on the pillars surrounding the pyramid...
textByHashes.0e02357246dea474a5e70d028c86df873ed185d0: No, it's just... There were these weird pillars around this pyramid...
textByHashes.9161fb1de5ecf84e839cb57eb38f286faa1383ce: They kind of... ate the diamonds...
textByHashes.39afc055c8e01ed4d19558305b484a0a7dadf434: Well, I have this feeling there is some better treasure inside that pyramid, and I needed to put the diamonds in to gain entrance.
textByHashes.8a6de62c0e3a2042fa0b0045e3b37881bb1d8b75: Er... sorry, I've never heard of them...
textByHashes.5ac0713c9c4e081486897ad3f094765c3aee9bf2: Er... He didn't really mention you at all, but he did teach me some cool new magic spells.
textByHashes.595c5dfb08a300693b8eb504bf60d900808a7f91: Have you got any symbols of your god?
textByHashes.4f40638d6671054de12a24a2555287b68be7d043: Hey, I know you! You're that archaeologist! What was your name again...?
textByHashes.1ab0ec1e72303703610ee543a833ee56340e988b: No... sorry. It's not a very memorable name.
textByHashes.8bbae574025d564766d4c645d10f90189643ad33: To be fair, we never really did that much work together. You sent me on a treasure hunt, but you never really contributed much yourself.
textByHashes.177f853a8ac774c02f7ab2ad395ebcffb357e2a3: Well if a partnership with me was so disappointing, how come you're here?
textByHashes.b07974113ae4061c67c1c7834eb42524574d797b: Yeah... funny that. They opened for me because of some magical abilities I gained on our last treasure hunt. You know, that one you were saying was pointless.
textByHashes.b20040d448581aea983a713404730128f0ce8a4c: You don't remember my name either, do you? It's .
textByHashes.9623845d2ec6537f62e9ae6d5f8cf4d2544cfd1b: How about I look around while I think about it?
textByHashes.8bd1d50bbe8b327347b8aeeb61a0d0a669cd03ef: I'm still looking around. I'll decide once I know a bit more about what this place is.
textByHashes.e2269265ad667ecb5e0d8c2409bd443fe4cd28ff: Do you not want to hear about what I've found first?
textByHashes.c6c062c514a9a2db23d9e4ece933641200f03867: According to that plaque over there, this place is a vault that was built to protect the 'mighty treasures' of the 'Empty Lord' from 'the soulless betrayers'.
textByHashes.d075c6ee2a1059427ae9438d61431b29908800ca: I'm guessing it has something to do with these statues. It looks like each of them is meant to be holding something.
textByHashes.7f979c8481f9f1deb744bcd340eaf2cf506137c8: Well hang on there. I haven't actually agreed to anything yet.
textByHashes.457a62a6fdc6496ccd81711070e0b07b299dc328: Mighty treasures that we can't access.
textByHashes.2bc1a2fbc4616bb1cd63c094d9ad233419b88090: We have four names: Vardorvis, Perseriya, Duke Sucellus and the Whisperer.
textByHashes.e84478453a698472a0c2bfcee58773eae84935d4: That's a big 'if' right there. This vault is clearly Zarosian, which means whoever these four are, they're from thousands of years ago. They're probably all long- dead now.
textByHashes.c81cf9b7147b632a7f9af48f238fa75969e165e0: Again, I've not actually agreed to help.
textByHashes.9ae6fddf95b1101f448937abac6aaab07203950f: You know I still haven't agreed to help you, right?
textByHashes.b2490ac4359c535ac3e9ec2dde42c3d2e9dfa217: Pretty good, thanks. In fact, I've come across something I was hoping you could help me with.
textByHashes.21fc1b7b5c9bd6de670700817daa572b561a7c1e: I came across something very interesting down in the desert: A Zarosian vault.
textByHashes.071273be41b790d386de83e3f7f588fb54624fff: Exactly! I'm hoping to learn about four names I discovered on statues within the vault.
textByHashes.a8de9c0030ff2cba3c343b694d5a4ccbb88ee848: Interesting... Where can I find this expert?
textByHashes.a2e8e27e342813d99345158020d10d98c6f53d05: Great! I'll head over there and see if I can find him.
textByHashes.bda2c603f7380640c6ff7e08b9529c5a567988fd: Are you sure? You don't seem very sure...
textByHashes.874d971773ffa8093ca33a31d2eead0afceff11a: Hmm... We haven't met before, have we? You seem familiar.
textByHashes.4dac721ef548f900f7e113e1a2ce67cff2e13b98: I've been told you're a Zarosian expert. I was hoping you could help me with some names.
textByHashes.14ef21f6f3b3a5fd44bb48179d35e0ae483eaba9: Vardorvis, Perseriya, Duke Sucellus and the Whisperer. I believe they were all Zarosians.
textByHashes.02c9d0bcc9dcc2c3a1599503c98447f0280e5de1: I found a strange vault down in the desert, on the eastern coast. The names were on four statues inside.
textByHashes.b55076d9a9410de8a28d97553e33bd9097ec2f3d: I know that Zaros was overthrown by one of his most trusted generals, Zamorak, who became a god as a result.
textByHashes.7a2eb4ce17dd5676a4498232f0928b26981d35b4: And you think this military installation could have information on the four names I found?
textByHashes.1ccfd50badd934d429122b9dc4cadfe6c2c34c00: Well I do love a good challenge.
textByHashes.c1aeae847c92f68367c189c17f375d53911e05c4: Sounds like something I'd be good at! What do you need me to blow up?
textByHashes.7b2ca76ccfa43f967937bda0d660a7d2a83cb9e4: Well, my first major discovery here involved me blowing a big hole in some rocks to access an ancient temple. Shouldn't be too hard to do that again.
textByHashes.49a0aeddbc52bd448a6fd50f31eea6094ba8828d: Huh... I guess I never thought about it like that before. Yeah... now that you mention it, that was really quite a stupid idea.
textByHashes.4b8a25b69a22b01f5322c9528ec95e0121f44458: Good idea. What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.41853588f12689fd84c0ad51c104b517846e64b6: So how come you know so much about Zaros?
textByHashes.cff123c883aa44a3a43a41696c23694925d5a655: What is it you're searching for here?
textByHashes.6d5210cb038fef7204f89bb8eaa7a6dfd42a5b49: Do you think my four names could be connected?
textByHashes.08cba494177a5c4d312429fd490c9b1ea9d8cf47: So what is it you're searching for?
textByHashes.e8b0d77175e2a7b0db0911fb1bfb401f69a67bf8: I'll go in first and make sure it's safe. I'll call you down when you're good to join me.
textByHashes.ad2a1752748555457add4ddf731067cf72d806d3: Not yet. I'll call you down when you're good to join me.
textByHashes.cfbfb459f65c72eec898daf8b696c8572c09706e: Okay, you're good to come down now.
textByHashes.3cb108f8bd16137e4a375b2ec2da813531409ec9: It was some sort of ancient golem. I'm guessing it was here to guard the place. Don't worry, I dealt with it.
textByHashes.9634ecdd78d9b2dfba80a10ccad0521ffd28fa9d: It's kind of what I do.
textByHashes.9afcb5b9d5877d772df6db153bba38d62bb4cf3a: It's very similar. Doesn't look like this one will be doing much fighting though.
textByHashes.7ef756561f2668a46501bca88332275b34c8a600: We'll need to power it up I guess. Let me see what I can do.
textByHashes.7afc89f509786240f1d4163cb5fb7c36f5ee3108: Hmm... This altar could be of interest.
textByHashes.2897b3d5a6d1bb7e202c39a5b8b1d2686f270b91: I wouldn't have expected an archaeologist to be a magical expert. Do you practice magic much?
textByHashes.5450fabc9b0707f9f47e8281e7ce3aa0a336e289: Alright. Let's see what we can find.
textByHashes.f2a3ac79a837bb2c8b8cd136f75a0f1088544e34: I can't imagine there's many others.
textByHashes.5892616181ae6025db2ba5e4e36cf8354200e27d: And unless the Zarosians had two prisons of the same name, I think I know where the entry to this one is.
textByHashes.68f6ad7cd2ec17c44476ed34600dab95a332cb28: A Mahjarrat. I encountered him in the Kharidian Desert.
textByHashes.47584d989f76f82c916ebb242873209c7b96e2e9: I've actually come across a fair few.
textByHashes.85b3f9b4c8d5f5682eaa11fabae82680100ee62b: Well I think that's all the information I needed.
textByHashes.d6bdaa16ea8062ae60cf65059a7e1c59f8a111e4: Do you think that's a good idea?
textByHashes.81017dfa4279c4d493a453d36c757d95df3e5c0d: Well I'll be sure to let you know if I find anything interesting.
textByHashes.bfbf410d1b9a64ee6e10cd06593785430475777e: I wonder what it was that he was searching for...
textByHashes.11e81371418c2f80e97f83ec5fbd4a200d86b4d7: Well those spires are long gone, but I wonder if there might be some traces left below...
textByHashes.e76210f8fc3aefafbdda67ff938ca51eda0ece7e: Camdozaal. This golem here looks suspiciously like the ones I've seen there.
textByHashes.0c1dfb7155fadb2eda1adb2a75d88e281cb0f87e: I suspect she probably didn't encounter this Vardorvis while there.
textByHashes.42829bab0ef0c86b70e17a4763604b99cd519f7e: I suppose there's worse places to start.
textByHashes.875fa7a25e8aa978a3c55897d28b3c7f4b10ebc6: I think I know what it's referring to. There was a great battle at the Temple of the Eye long ago. A rift to the Abyss was opened as a result.
textByHashes.d25f86bca8227486b62874fa566d55cbfb8d14e0: Yes. It's in a dungeon under Weiss. I had quite the adventure there not too long ago.
textByHashes.ffa37df70d30e83dde0aecd59ac94e1379005c9a: I hear you visited Lovakengj recently.
textByHashes.cd19ab882db23bcdce45345f117cbb6b64c4a42e: I'm trying to learn more about a vampyre called Vardorvis. Apparently he travelled to the west long ago in pursuit of someone called Yonrith Lovakengj.
textByHashes.49e39c7e9267f1b92991551e04b18a05809a3e03: Back when Senntisten still stood, it seems.
textByHashes.98fe51bbd5a80137675d1504d05c5b17355edd50: Indeed. I was wondering if during your travels there, you came across any details about Vardorvis or Yonrith?
textByHashes.e165078d86e624d006d92ed1d0f38f41e25281cc: Well on that note, what can you tell me about the Burning Man?
textByHashes.c81db85e38ac5f4943e507a1693e090b22fcd224: So I'm guessing the monument represents this evil?
textByHashes.7886921fae06c7de4f24c4cf328b5ba178cd7aa9: But what was it, and where did it come from?
textByHashes.27e3348c9c40f43de70fc0da53ba73b150fab0b0: I see. What can you tell me about the Stranglewood?
textByHashes.bb33f35da7b4e5a8614ede047b6bb1154dc9f282: Interesting... Thanks for all the information.
textByHashes.c3b15601092e0786dd4a0819a209be58da3d20f7: Hello! Where did you say that botanist lived?
textByHashes.e997e8cd26694ca1aaaaa074b7331540a9578e08: I probably shouldn't just go drinking random potions without knowing what they are.
textByHashes.45ea0840c5e582f12f05d61d3fcb0521dad25cbb: This Stranglewood place is supposed to be really dangerous. I should probably get myself some sort of protection before heading there.
textByHashes.f46cf3fd6e586640a509fc3362dd3b89e22d60a9: I'm just going to quietly go over here now.
textByHashes.c82c0237b1de4ab9378d62f316b81c80b117c3a9: Ah, of course. Those old ruins.
textByHashes.bfaa04da8b487e778bbf069c97b97e8378785815: You mean soul transference? Not actually something that interests me, to be honest.
textByHashes.f7a46c0273033d2134f00b40b1cc939f9d24529d: To be honest, I didn't even know what an Old One was. I still don't really. I was just exploring when I found your camp.
textByHashes.c1c8f2b5bd8bf77b0761d710aaad2661e161637e: As for why I'm here, I'm looking for information about someone called Vardorvis.
textByHashes.7d13158b4ad8162c21a0e2eca6ddeab27d9ec1a2: I don't understand... What are those things? Are they zombies?
textByHashes.aaa07bef0edbdf77ad2cdc9dbf8847cf3f913214: I already told you, I wasn't lying.
textByHashes.c240f3595f1fb39845201b18c33891dc1fb79b2c: With how dangerous this place is, do you really have a choice?
textByHashes.19f2142bcac9f8fdbc564a7e51881f3cae12a4ab: And these Old Ones discovered soul transference?
textByHashes.d1b064dcfb18756e2a8a4bc3d5f0c6799f4565b6: So how do we deal with them?
textByHashes.1d3a63d79f3b5f17dd371924dc6ff3f4e15eb970: Keep my distance and stay off the tendrils. I can do that. So what's our next move?
textByHashes.08c9198427c66ed31f3ab081c90b88cb095520eb: 'Broke in' is maybe a bit strong...
textByHashes.93eae48bbb4a94bb35ee14c077da6e6362724e65: So what ingredients do we need?
textByHashes.db977108a3e335cfe2aa5e6b8b0b49fc99c1deff: Where can I find those ingredients again?
textByHashes.ed65141c74d2b45b6b6164e8896d847af8784d56: Okay, I'll see if I can find them.
textByHashes.91bf4360b1545d2ee4327983a38e839f19e77b1e: Hmm... Kasonde must still be at the temple. Guess I should go and see if he needs a hand.
textByHashes.d0c9117ef252aad0de27d2e3f9cd92b804bf86c1: But what if you end up spreading it to Kourend?
textByHashes.c98c76aba3826c8b64f20c1390d620796388faf6: You can't be serious! We're talking about thousands of lives here! How do you even know this will work? When the Old Ones tried, it killed them!
textByHashes.6ac9385eb6f27dcc15394e814a0d2161fcb50bb0: I'm sorry, Kasonde, but I can't do that.
textByHashes.664825286015e0b3b155aacacff1b1fbeabf5e1d: I'm sorry. I didn't want it to be this way, but I couldn't let you endanger all those people.
textByHashes.5606cf5919fd1f54b265038c51bd055e056fa768: I wish I could have helped you find it.
textByHashes.64fb1486cf08e35b6afc64b5bc0cc8ff33105b97: How do I know I can trust you?
textByHashes.a8c5e81b4341a2cc19af4baee61464e830286f70: This doesn't seem like a very good offer.
textByHashes.6113ce4d07d2becf2b53e4ddcefcc71ed9006b3d: Well... I like a nice reward as much as the next person, but without any reason to trust you, I'm going to have to decline.
textByHashes.554ca088139517741f4cadd6bb2862a753bb7957: I have a medallion that I think one of them should be holding.
textByHashes.cce532bf8f20f1ce9aec0cb7751ad715ae97caea: Once again, I never actually agreed to work with you.
textByHashes.8d0dd927c0df250f2bcbdeb98b03466288f0ad69: Hmm... I was actually hoping to enter the Scar myself. Perhaps I could investigate this signal while I'm in there.
textByHashes.94b871e65c7e8013aa8176ba976590e8b79056d0: But how do you know nothing can survive? Has anyone actually confirmed that?
textByHashes.6c12d0e9dbdb547576247e3524bd6e353152a806: Well then give me a chance to be the first.
textByHashes.13ceb746a779b2a397581008f6dd134e84291f4b: Thanks... I think. Anything I should know before entering?
textByHashes.90acc33433cbb26de8641848ba67225d8a40c31d: So you'd be able to send me right to the source?
textByHashes.ad47da7ccc303c9dd4e75a3f964bb00d9cfc6434: Well I suppose that's the best I can ask for.
textByHashes.080222179b548929892f159ae258c78db990a08c: I already had so many questions, but you keep giving me more. What's this fish thing you keep talking about?
textByHashes.ff8a5628e658e95630e600b1a7d0b3d330dae44b: Well thankfully you shouldn't need to anymore.
textByHashes.30356e6254fa45957e13f7a05ba0a7249ae77ba1: I'm guessing you were responsible for that magic signal leaving this place? The Guardians of the Rift were able to use it to stabilise the rift. It's safe for you to leave now.
textByHashes.d2e2f4476221f2809e73a910543b4f31489076a4: But why do you need to get past this fish... thing?
textByHashes.e9e30e51dd32c2840708bbd0e0c752e96a62fba0: Does the name Perseriya mean anything to you?
textByHashes.f044f74b3be2f4f3de0656fb7ec7d48e46b3bb8e: Well she's actually why I'm here as well.
textByHashes.f07a292cc7668e924ba536873c9540d378817fb3: Alright, how do we reach this ship?
textByHashes.8aa524da0b1e28670a33d8d12c3d0de5213f3d68: It must have some sort of weakness.
textByHashes.3d88a53b0358090d9d7dac8cc4ca418ecb170aa4: I see. So what's your plan for trapping it?
textByHashes.e47f742efcf0bff51fd6082d4fa4a442c6b2dcaf: Ah, I see. You want to set those ships alight. Where can I find them?
textByHashes.2f1b0788236b4eb6d078963b7f9d3f86d1455098: How did you survive in here?
textByHashes.6580d06e11b157171e78199e634889583e3de5ff: The Guardians of the Rift didn't think you'd have any chance.
textByHashes.e1444e0e706b7d152381d4f469af57e707eeb1ea: A group of ancient golems built to guard the Temple of the Eye. They've been keeping the rift under control since we opened it.
textByHashes.afb0174042ebd90885416dacbe031fa323328c4e: Well it was sort of your fault.
textByHashes.a5aba95c47bd90d6f0dea0a60d8614550efd56bc: I'm not sure they'd consider that to be worth the cost.
textByHashes.efe8dbf2e60c5869c4072033de073d064cd5034b: What is it you want with Perseriya's ship?
textByHashes.317896f32856598295b969a186b83c5bd4dfdd52: But then how do you know there's information on her ship?
textByHashes.e8f33d44d737d2f369ede6f0ef6a2c5705254f46: What's with the demons in this place?
textByHashes.b2f966a4cee5ae9ad4dc9953552ef83606341bcf: Not sure if this diving equipment is going to help in here. This... brain juice... is quite thick. I'll give it a go though.
textByHashes.460101f9e7dc2422f7604f2d423359f3af4781fc: I should probably look around and see if I can find anything of interest before I go burning everything.
textByHashes.d36438dec200f1603db0ba29859abb78370beb03: I should probably read this tablet I found before I go burning everything.
textByHashes.5183c60ce5eb1f441be2e947af3586fbb7b9f32a: Before I go, I found something I wanted to ask you about.
textByHashes.872b76bcdd1e62d393a8e843954f0d98bce0fc1e: I found an old tablet near the ship. It mentioned two artefacts. One was referred to as Imperium and the other as Primus.
textByHashes.0e0437905b005c2729b0d8de8f2bd749dbfd441f: Apparently, the one known as Primus was being defended by Saradominists. Perseriya and her fleet were trying to claim it, but things clearly didn't go as planned, hence them ending up here.
textByHashes.dc3bc5e4d3ecf8b337c9041c00b38e9e496e5f98: Isn't it obvious? It must be the Eye.
textByHashes.d74770aa50412ac6304616849466ece06a50d1ad: I think it's fair to say that you're normally a very upbeat person, but whenever the Eye is mentioned, you start to act... different. I think you know more than you're letting on.
textByHashes.c56da3c1cf44c19f3d61cd2877028bd1fccebb1f: Yes, but I knew about it even before I did. Do you remember that vision I had back in the Temple of the Eye? I saw it. I've somehow known its name ever since, but I just didn't realise until now.
textByHashes.3eeaa597780484682d671f608812cc389517df52: Do you remember that vision I had back in the Temple of the Eye? I saw it. I've somehow known its name ever since, but I just didn't realise until now.
textByHashes.87a70217fb793c9ca19ea3ea42077a2370b57a2f: So all that stuff about you searching for a teleportation nexus? That was a lie, wasn't it? You were really searching for information on the Stone.
textByHashes.9424c3990ecb4ac7339c0d54a1e702c058743cef: I guess that does make sense. So is that what you're hoping to find on Perseriya's ship? Information on the Stone?
textByHashes.09f19d6ab0918c22bd63840e38dd493aaac00db5: What do you know about Imperium so far?
textByHashes.d1baba0a96668f14e0d0c53407170aeb6e5b40af: And you think it's connected to the Stone of Jas?
textByHashes.6afb19566545ae637a211cee918e173bca4f511e: There's probably more answers lying around here. I'd better check before I burn it all.
textByHashes.65cd44a22d58de2e87d2fdba510a069f7e9da35d: Not too bad. You might be interested in another tablet I found. It mentioned Imperium.
textByHashes.02b3022dc39a373adcf399365b06bec414b88196: Apparently a soldier interacted with the artefact at one point. It caused another soldier to enter a frenzy and kill multiple people.
textByHashes.67b7421b5079b93503ab984a2c6a6deb84e35215: Yeah... both soldiers in question were later executed.
textByHashes.4e78dc8da151f0a8eff582222b3c9438c995d163: I guess there's only one way to find out.
textByHashes.39ac1c00be3412b8986acf627b645599f5178a54: How powerful do you think Imperium is?
textByHashes.3fa0818097f54fb3d85d4c06f32e3d3633da7006: So now we just need to properly deal with it.
textByHashes.49ac9bc14681e54d0ebf02acc9dc00911f9f2b26: I guess I'll be doing the poking?
textByHashes.d66aaa2c77bbf0bdfb6a85520202361546e0a8a9: Then I guess we should get to it.
textByHashes.1eb05440635eee9339bbc2e8302c369f6813090b: Hang on... How do you know about...
textByHashes.aaff94ad8bcbce041205c57fe9cdc3be412c04db: What's not right about that? Makes sense she'd have kept it close.
textByHashes.1786a6fb0bab17020cca04ee6eec040333892f3f: So it was never delivered? But that can't be right... We've found multiple tablets saying it was.
textByHashes.a12ba8c3f7f9426e8305592c07b8b7f249ce043f: So you're going back to the Wizards' Tower?
textByHashes.ff2e2d185f376dad92d8b0883d8b1a184f37c3ff: Fair enough, but you do need to tell them soon.
textByHashes.8669b36a1538e8a7d732afcc03aa0de6e2bfb482: I need to enter the prison.
textByHashes.d1b1d163767f74892ba6e20be899b7196c76a074: But you're guarding the door because of that assassin, right? Why does that mean I can't go in?
textByHashes.705f577631ecc6533353509d1b19d9629a69a90b: Are you not bored of being on guard here? It can't be much fun in this dingy cold dungeon. Food must be a bit meh as well.
textByHashes.9eed111540430b420f272c8ef401d6169034d4e8: If that assassin were to be dealt with, Khazard might reconsider your posting. Rather than sitting here waiting around, why not let me go in and find him?
textByHashes.161345f94a3dafa21f4a93215b2952e75d76082e: Besides, let's be honest, if I die doing so, Khazard would probably be thrilled.
textByHashes.5ba4408789bd532f8213e3f7cdecf9b6ea37c175: Lovely! Thank you for your time.
textByHashes.8e2d33506909fdfa81fbf634e3726f9a54fad618: Who are you? Are you one of Khazard's soldiers?
textByHashes.678a125f521ad138d615368ff33561a37944f4bf: Yeah... Seems I've got myself into a similar situation.
textByHashes.83ef5ff5a2c374a816738f38b4bd43ad9f6a8074: I'm not sure. Let me take a look.
textByHashes.2c80e465c7ca53388a60dd03a31416ab7b48bebc: I found a letter on a skeleton.
textByHashes.deadb506de9b354e161ccf70499d47619ef733ae: Someone was trying to help some prisoners escape. Might be we can use whatever they left behind to our advantage.
textByHashes.b054006fea30fa9b921a6802cb1b1adda651617f: I am not sticking my hand in there without good reason!
textByHashes.c48ab29e95fac296105f2ce6ae8110f605aa633b: Eugh! I can't believe I'm doing this.
textByHashes.e4443e35a078e855723ef20fbd1c35f3e10166ed: I managed to find a knife.
textByHashes.58fb7462be4f7cb9810494b8006d480be75b4f58: I lost that chisel you gave me.
textByHashes.9e9023bd39d0433b94ead876a8aa7ffb13e6e49a: Oh wait, it's on the floor here. Silly me.
textByHashes.525db979bebb343c46378e824c3febf7ea8f8a3d: I managed to find a lockpick.
textByHashes.8f92115e1874ae841b0ecd1121dfd58f27675bef: Give me one good reason why I shouldn't kill you right now!
textByHashes.249ae988ba8a61e61a5e3dda6a732ce1539d0325: Without me you'd be in a cell as well!
textByHashes.965142dbe075a89154ffef47dc219767bd0d42a2: Well actually I didn't come here for you. I'm looking for Duke Sucellus.
textByHashes.86bcf573c1abe0399674d154a676899200f6ef63: Apparently he used to be in charge of this place. That letter I found mentioned the asylum, which seems a good place to start my search.
textByHashes.29ec846286163ac768f980ffb26ec7e93e3624a5: Jhallan? But he was your prisoner!
textByHashes.420676c8ed37c83e31e7752a5d5b4660e143d544: Did you see where he put my things?
textByHashes.bcbf733cb4ae6229e2eb9fff38fcd629b93b5cda: Why do I feel like you have a proposal?
textByHashes.d7fa3e8ac435338aef1712d1fb3dae3eb4ce6695: Look, I have no reason to trust you.
textByHashes.32c2a2f7f63772098fecaba9e603d49621669b29: Not yet. First, you have to give me some answers.
textByHashes.bcea693838c151bc8e13b86a9f36315476ca9d4d: Oh... well, why are you here?
textByHashes.65bb9f18d437be1ec79d54098f03955e2663568b: I've heard the name, but I don't know anything about it. What is it?
textByHashes.6f569497f08521a415f8b4deb4f4b2e88e6d17f6: Did this person also pay you to steal that relic from Entrana?
textByHashes.895172761b9dcffff3c9c842d19b184194006bbf: And what about all that business with the Hazeel Cult and the Carnilleans?
textByHashes.6016cad92712e2860c35318958ed343c5ef11611: But why have Hazeel resurrected as part of that?
textByHashes.6037a2e0152817a2457b425e603b84769e7c099d: But why try to have Hazeel resurrected as part of that?
textByHashes.8135b5c35a6a8c4bdb0d59a112ec221c54fd8ed2: I suppose I wasn't expecting you to be so open about it all.
textByHashes.d17c35309e7ffd43067c7413e670a288fbc650a4: Why not try to kill me instead? It's not like that's ever been a problem for you before.
textByHashes.00adf7ff02d9921ddbbd15e6528b6f1eba22122c: Are you talking about what happened back in that cave? There was no 'we' about that.
textByHashes.d3792b896ca59cd339b9fc7869d789277c1fc1a2: Right... So how do I distract him?
textByHashes.b340cd95497de6c1a5d7e8a45f81b249becf4142: But if it's not here, then where is it?
textByHashes.f8a33e28437b6625e277a90a574697da6c31e2e6: You don't mind that you failed?
textByHashes.cdb9303391bd86b089d88c4e5af60d2c14b47e1a: What makes you think I'm going to let you go? You have a whole lot of murders you need to answer for.
textByHashes.3de57ce80eae9b93781254a7f307ea532b6b9bac: Have you seen any archeologists around here?
textByHashes.a6fe0e323804dca94fe1c6b3a61f3566b044bc66: It sure is! Not every day you find yourself in a lost city.
textByHashes.0f32332d30a818d4c93641f168d3be1a644eb377: Does the name Lassar mean anything to you? It was an old fortress that once existed here, long before Camdozaal. I'm wondering if there might still be some traces left down here.
textByHashes.6a0fcbae66d5ab248de4494c42d7deed8ff6cf88: Interesting... And if I wanted to go down this hole?
textByHashes.9d0d69b5f4fb80d275d98285b1112a52c60d4e4d: Hello again. Where did you say that hole was?
textByHashes.a9bb66fb040b7d84909bb17e67d330256e686b52: No need to worry. I'm mostly quite capable when it comes to these kinds of things!
textByHashes.ad20530bb55e88359cebf7ee506ca7071cb6fba9: Huh? What happened? Where am I? And who are you?
textByHashes.8f7c301a3eb93cfbe4e719438ffd732af735889e: It? What are you on about?
textByHashes.49062d197193db48a81854cdf9f347ca92ade362: But then why not leave? I'm guessing you're an Imcando dwarf, right? A survivor from Camdozaal? Others of your kind still live. You could leave this place and join them.
textByHashes.a0d6de824b4c21e9ba737dbe216a9de62af01243: Maybe I could help? I'm a pretty good fighter. I'm sure I can deal with whatever this thing is.
textByHashes.31d11968061f6b2676552d8706398af2805a9d01: Then how can we stop it?
textByHashes.0b704773b6ad96e78a58c6a1943283811d779b31: The shadows? As in the Shadow Realm?
textByHashes.1a38da9d1518ccf43523b5f8b2d551bc98669643: More than know. I've been there! I have a ring that lets me do so.
textByHashes.d8b1ccb58914f016fc0903a6792be64df416cd16: Of course. I don't have it with me, but I can go and fetch it.
textByHashes.6ec4e8a44dcacb9d14bb4d70bd545704a6ac99e5: Of course. I have it right here.
textByHashes.289c862d9a81fa189afc99c4c7fa80db8a728e84: A wandering merchant gave it to me. I never asked how he got it.
textByHashes.a6dbea1fb283f71fdec23d6eb375c4cbf515f14a: Sounds like it's worth a go.
textByHashes.dc71cdf3ddc6bc55f2692d6b1c9ac95ea769784d: So what can we do with it?
textByHashes.f19f87958c305efe8f838623274e5d88b2c48ed2: So I can use this fragment to enter the Shadow Realm? But surely there's going to be a lot of danger entering the domain of this... whatever it is.
textByHashes.a38b8b9a0b266d0a1d432349b94ca4eb8c901b4b: And I'm guessing I won't just be able to walk on in there?
textByHashes.cd397ddb1341c521657a554bc1b275193b0c3b2d: Alright. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.177632c2842ce1187a8157640460bfc5b83e8fb7: How did you end up down here?
textByHashes.1179fb4b695050c71e9c00be5fa0b4f82897a2f1: You shouldn't feel guilty for fleeing. Your people had no hope against the barbarians.
textByHashes.eb48e03e9dd08048c5522772fc6c03c98b942f99: What do you know about this city?
textByHashes.c0d481548793e1685635e3dd9033a16a1947ea38: I knew about the fortress of Lassar, but I had no idea a city was here as well.
textByHashes.8fb0f792ccee06955516af0cc56835a0bb5c3de5: I guess that's how this place is so well preserved. No one even knew it was here.
textByHashes.b686ba58dec1220590488658f6ab1cdae4c9d3d0: Can you tell me any more about this entity?
textByHashes.761848f3ef7722054e90569a1615090663394b3e: Followed in your footsteps? But it wasn't blackstone that destroyed Camdozaal, was it?
textByHashes.a3c97fcffba874632eb18ed71a718b9781cc5667: The same totem that's now here?
textByHashes.2d85c465891aeb6439b5c10e0caa55ef2b47d6ee: Could you tell me more about one of these items?
textByHashes.186eee85ae095ac02d014441f9be69ab7c3fe85f: Could you tell me more about the Shadow Torch?
textByHashes.a2c4ad6a517d20ea96955e60063f4f1cddaec51e: Could you tell me more about the Shadow Blocker?
textByHashes.1c9291461bef4f1966b4700bda362a37319f9d31: Could you tell me more about the Revitalising Idol?
textByHashes.42595fb0a16ec90268c94b9ebba4e1389b140243: Could you tell me more about the Anima Portal?
textByHashes.e1f56fb38bad98be8a512bcd49c5af618120f3f1: So they stole the real schematic? Where would they have taken it?
textByHashes.1d41d36ca0eef0c8d61eea4664ec891680bf3336: Really? Is now the best time?
textByHashes.e941569849760684b5fd2c2e738a9fb681bd7837: I'm looking for information on someone known as the Whisperer. I have reason to beleve she was here before the city fell.
textByHashes.aa358d19306185d408566f935ce5d867d84eb3b6: Are you okay? You were in some sort of trance.
textByHashes.e4c5b8fcede609fbdbe1334c8cbdb8750372d34b: Hmm... I think it might be in the cistern beneath us.
textByHashes.15c2c9a43fb190257aa2b3c88a32f31af8e80382: Something I found earlier. However, it also seemed to suggest that some sort of icon is needed to enter the church.
textByHashes.585d1b157fe1bc3da9b1c5f8a051affff0ca1b1e: Then we have to find it. Can you think of anywhere that would be a good place to start?
textByHashes.f6c89609a4ecd6094e34ec267682372912473a95: It's worth a shot. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.d347979942ed2e4965cad0fb0ac7701ec01c765b: This isn't real! I know this isn't real!
textByHashes.d5471bcab6db80293d7d328a0c1207978eb08ab2: Then how did you save me?
textByHashes.63cb835cc889cf7ce9daf05af76306cf417d463a: But surely destroying the totem did something?
textByHashes.5ea97e7014f06a9a625a061458426f60ed72823f: Then you still achieved what you set out to do, right? The surviving Imcando are safe now. You can leave.
textByHashes.d61eb16acf8ee99e70ca34846c0ced51fd5fc0c7: The cathedral is the only place I haven't searched.
textByHashes.f0253d5704137a7c022465599d982abfe4b4959e: Thank you, Ketla, for everything. Whatever it is you're looking for... I hope you eventually find it.
textByHashes.403bbb0458c4ccb00a8c8f7e81cffc17a5941e59: It seems so. Her name is Ketla. I found her in a hidden Zarosian ruin beneath us.
textByHashes.edd6769a77c6cf858ead952bd7145863b3bde88f: She's... okay. Things haven't been great for her, but I think the worst is behind her.
textByHashes.2167cd459eacba42c2cf0a93b179d6f9959d0e7d: What happened to the other Imcando Dwarves?
textByHashes.1c67bc278dc72fafb9d36011d7597640b406a9af: You don't have to tell me if the memory hurts too much.
textByHashes.052ee5033e9b106c76e5fac0dd2b46cf59a3f659: The world has changed a lot, Ramarno. Magic is practiced freely. Those barbarians failed to wipe it from Gielinor.
textByHashes.7c9004e6af04f93c79e8f27d3eeb9194331b16f4: But not the last. Don't forget Ketla.
textByHashes.85acc9a17d1c3e9084489843a2f7feeff1d1549e: But not the last. Don't forget Thurgo and Ketla.
textByHashes.59ebd7c5a5477693dc0a6d6b3502b55f2e8d9f05: It seems I have a knack for that sort of thing. Maybe you underestimated me.
textByHashes.26d228ce1e9e7c5c6cb7be1ef621b2610420ebd7: I assume you have the medallion?
textByHashes.e71dc2248819971cec37b1ea05883b52d15fa78e: And I'm guessing you're not about to just give it to me?
textByHashes.cc119f9303263ec8fb736e9d23d98252e85499a5: Well I'm not backing down now.
textByHashes.a7e3b015d6aba7b41d73264e21fe3ae45d68c31a: Ours? Like I said before, I never actually agreed to work with you.
textByHashes.b48ccd78c0dfbd4672ede41d7abc11d3487403f1: I can't double-cross you if I was never working with you to begin with! Besides, we have more important things to worry about than treasure.
textByHashes.d1ab8f8815627e86d63bbc22edbd95b60e2e43b8: Listen to me! We're not the only ones trying to get into this place! There was this woman who kept trying to steal the medallions. Someone sent her!
textByHashes.cb69c85016d5981ca81eb56b772ede0ad95dc00c: I'm not going any further until we work out what's going on.
textByHashes.c1255d62549d799fa443bc23a49506e45480e1a6: What in the world are you playing at?
textByHashes.dda794f624178f153fa95ee18c431041248961a7: This power... I've felt it before...
textByHashes.484fc448cf4792e8511775aeafccc73567ee7d40: Not exactly. The last time I felt this power, it was something very different creating it.
textByHashes.a57582253534a6855ae6998159a3df87c4e40f2d: That said, I reckon I do have some idea as to what this is.
textByHashes.d03ded9ad8a3259d216f811d624cbcd730cd9e26: The Frostenhorn. I've no idea what it does, but it's a powerful Zarosian artefact that it seems quite a few people are searching for.
textByHashes.3f0e72bdb25e2e9eb71efde0cd5cc59c64642c04: Dr Banikan? You followed me here?
textByHashes.02b0126d37b3352c1c78a05ee395852b20448c6b: But if this isn't the Frostenhorn, then what is it?
textByHashes.21f76d11a7bc9f58b3b6429d6558116a5b76d07c: Hang on... I think I've heard of this artefact. You say it's been known by many names? Was one of them Imperium?
textByHashes.73646c894c4bb235e40401e5e7b1347ac84e5a41: Something I discovered while tracking down Perseriya. It didn't make sense then, but it does now.
textByHashes.cb47480e53e3c069f2c055c2ae008626d462b18f: The one she took east was a fake. She secretly kept the real one. The intention must always have been to hide it here.
textByHashes.21ffb6c232b97937743be6a951fdfb41d4334625: Were all of you just waiting for me to open this place?
textByHashes.ca353fd0a64bd4211226cf6778bfa405c6004d5b: But if you all came alone...
textByHashes.bf52145a85585ef133ec16a297026fc89efcac1d: I'm not your friend! I don't even know you!
textByHashes.471413dbf7fe8b9cc9cdc050e7a0da46a193c231: So... they were never real? It was all a lie? It was always just you?
textByHashes.04dcfb42236ce2a7bcafcedb69df25cf7cae6bc3: You used them to manipulate me! Why?
textByHashes.c575810cd0f9ade8f173e6e025c4bbc67803cf66: But he didn't need me to get those medallions! He already had one of them!
textByHashes.c9a40c4bfef11eb62074541f97b9d8475824c644: Were you just toying with me?
textByHashes.1b71b29e1deb690e127e7ddbb15c3f9d8525bf57: Stop! You're not going anywhere with that horn!
textByHashes.2e6d70b3a533ea92e5632fb033293b462d2070a1: Whatever future you're planning, it ends here!
textByHashes.5ff5ff675d511905f9a864ed97ca8af86e5b3502: Oh, well thank you, I suppose.
textByHashes.63252c3c92ee58a7ad7c8c571ab8e9f0a8cc98a0: Ah... Well unless they were guarding multiple icons, I'm afraid Sliske destroyed that one as well. As for your third artefact, it didn't happen to be on Entrana, did it?
textByHashes.68ed91390ce6a4511a53593752a8c74edca818ca: Then I think it's safe to say it's been destroyed too. Sliske stole it from Entrana while disguised as that assassin.
textByHashes.7fe50244a7c7adc8fdece48b92e891f7cc1e949e: Thank you. Do you need me to fetch the ring for you?
textByHashes.f9f49bead4042585e7a94101fd5b5f3c9a3b77e1: It wasn't the Abyss. I think she might have been dead long before then. The Persten we spoke to was an imposter.
textByHashes.e38cd7523a3618a520f38fcba23821c88025a144: A Mahjarrat called Sliske was disguised as her.
textByHashes.361f09370c908442f023ccbe23c4708e2730d4ff: Hello there. How are things here?
textByHashes.f886b4047d2a572beab6a6d837d3ffaafb6015dc: Well I'm not sure if it will help them much, but I do have some news on that assassin.
textByHashes.e96235c5114bb2c627b5359d2920f3b4b1007c1c: He was actually a Mahjarrat in disguise. I got close to dealing with him, but he escaped.
textByHashes.f66dedc477d175b124de264304235a831284355c: For now, but I don't intend to let him keep eluding me forever.
textByHashes.96010916cb83020d6236635be33740942f28fa80: I have something to tell you. It's about another dwarf.
textByHashes.ea0fa2a6705fd55ec32f31c4b46bad59bd5d9ee0: Yes. I encountered someone I believed to be a dwarf, but it was a lie. It was a Mahjarrat in disguise as someone called Ketla.
textByHashes.91df14010fac9a53c180324a42dca891c53f1ce4: She's gone, Ramarno. I'm so sorry.
textByHashes.d628e17aeab80855a06e75c60d347a1bd2f800ca: I'm sorry, but the person I thought was Ketla... It wasn't her at all.
textByHashes.01df8f87699c32957c9bb086719eb556167b8f28: I have news on that assassin who attacked Entrana.
textByHashes.e564b86636c14eabb091a99274847885dc9350c8: Did you know he was a Mahjarrat?
textByHashes.1ec02da90b2d7da970006abbddf2f71ca2e0c3de: His name is Sliske. Have you heard of him?
textByHashes.30ca479db96c85d160dd46c6a5bd8d837617825e: While your there, it might be worth looking up something called the Elder Horn. It's an artefact that Sliske has now claimed. One that has the ability to control minds.
textByHashes.bfa5f37e35dad66e6444f30c7c62bd05af2cb15c: And to you. What brings you all the way out here?
textByHashes.cd21a041000d0a7a37c26593dc5c64eaf40356bb: Morytania? That's quite a dangerous place for a monk.
textByHashes.f9d8cdcc7d21efd92f6a462317d5f336e3c787c7: I see. Well I'd better leave you to it.
textByHashes.e7c2cac53ba4c1d9224fce1b63d9ee02a078d5c7: Of course. What do you need?
textByHashes.9ddb28f3d2d020d43c8a6d2b6014dc3f1718ee71: Alright, I'll be back once I have this weapon.
textByHashes.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
textByHashes.812667bc8f1c7ab36d0616266e394379f553e64c: I have it right here for you.
textByHashes.95dc94e762d14c164ad7dc9df00e8f3837dd91cb: Hmm... Fair enough. So you want me to sneak this gift onto the island? How do I do that?
textByHashes.3173d9b892b3cb4f8efa448dd8cdb145536fb9c0: You speak of the Abyss. I'm familiar with it.
textByHashes.4209265452fe3d5616bc8105c388fa1a09e2f9e6: The Abyss isn't exactly the safest of places.
textByHashes.7bad4e298f7b3d99d8d140259df11d770abfac1e: How am I meant to get there again?
textByHashes.2d252fac61fcf66c6f8a86b35d808a2966e7670b: There was this monk near Paterdomus. He told me it was a gift...
textByHashes.f38a905e10b0448913a9c34c41115b57efe8efe7: This isn't good. I'd better get back and tell the High Priest.
textByHashes.e59f54f2d4743ce24fdb749a624d7a8ed540f19d: I went back to Paterdomus, but all I found was a dead body.
textByHashes.86bde12fbcab6104f3ccc7a30da9623571b2dc33: It looked like he'd been killed by magic. The thing is, I'm not convinced he was the person I spoke to before.
textByHashes.72adfd02d128d51b1218fbcf87be6d3d8fcdcdcf: Well there was this monk who needed help...
textByHashes.83b1ddc69acb0af8276dd8a17e1ebac5c6832fc3: ... and so I was told to come see you.
textByHashes.5712c4ddb236b404589d1b9ec37956468336c85d: I wanted to use your anvils.
textByHashes.e63b9b685cc35439b7ac43bd4711584b567121b3: Yes, I will get you the materials.
textByHashes.798f156301f77f619e9289831deb202e46f72e93: But I'm not a good enough miner to get iron ore.
textByHashes.01c00203294851f536ddff60544aa0bfc7036912: You know, it's funny you should require those exact things!
textByHashes.389eeedbc5051aab440a033ba7d105a9fc7f4552: I can usually fit 28 things in my backpack and in a world full of quite literally limitless possibilities, a complete coincidence has occurred!
textByHashes.9a467df1c0416175b51e028c6c8a4dcc738d559f: Well, out of pure coincidence, despite definitely not knowing what you were about to request, I just so happened to have carried those exact items!
textByHashes.eb41e027e045abf8d275bcc02adfe87a0de96fd9: In fact, in the exact quantities too!
textByHashes.5fdf1f987ed79488a69782ceb4f60f3f32adf6e2: No, hitting rocks is for the boring people, sorry.
textByHashes.86788055f2ea08107196a3599c6330151bbc0a76: I wanted to use your whetstone.
textByHashes.b8d26697216e235ea7aea1732ca9717057ebc198: I was just checking out the landscape.
textByHashes.f30dcf0d8e9b92569b7fed3dc50bc95e03dce429: Do you have any to sell?
textByHashes.b5a493119f63dccbe7daf881385d5bdf3294626f: Sorry, would it be OK if I used your anvils?
textByHashes.8b6c0d968af6324ba5d9fd46fa32edcb43d459ed: I didn't want to use your anvils anyway.
textByHashes.da07324ad871be95c1e23029e24d11dbf1754b7e: Sorry, I don't have them all yet.
textByHashes.449b699dc3b67d4b6212b7e7b5a4d58cd4d58512: Actually, I'll give it a miss.
textByHashes.0de836cee998013e4dbfe52904a3c9865716d5cb: Okay, I'll go and talk to him.
textByHashes.c456cd05673cb7f22528d452595c9276ca60ff91: Can you sell me a rune platebody?
textByHashes.cd8e2b9b11f3c08e5fe1b9b634f11d49cf8eb939: The Guildmaster of the Champions' Guild told me.
textByHashes.486b726c92596a2de95c3ae7c50669755698bb50: I thought you were going to give me a quest.
textByHashes.1aa0f7c501e3fc7a2d826fc60d264b340f7f7472: A dragon, that sounds like fun!
textByHashes.a890836ac1276c007d0eb568131df013c5c90aaa: But how can I defeat the dragon?
textByHashes.7f9b25ceef6c317befb76636d26a1547298fa988: I may be a champion, but I don't think I'm up to dragon-killing yet.
textByHashes.324107c9c950bcac08bf7a973a35656b666194fc: That's a pity, I'm not a hero.
textByHashes.fe00e9d1addff2102a3734ea973256956b7f3193: I talked to Oziach and he gave me a quest.
textByHashes.867140eab919e7e4b8eb20462d096b9ede75bdfd: What's so special about this dragon?
textByHashes.9aac0f8eac901a03233ca3907dcc6a2d755b2b84: So I just sail over there? Seems easy enough.
textByHashes.cb674cf9eb2d113274a0b539f6e948bcc5caaf5d: Where can I find a map to Crandor?
textByHashes.3fd20ba06ec1fe32924c18bf6f17469467dd051c: What kind of ship do I need?
textByHashes.ee4df78dcd56534982783fa8a1069a332223a25e: Could I not just captain it myself? I have some experience in that area.
textByHashes.1fada4493540dc8659433afb796ef902a2bf74fd: How can I protect myself from the dragon's breath?
textByHashes.bc310b2b27430fb4542109c2f0e1fe77bf7766bc: About my quest to kill the dragon...
textByHashes.250379e678c95f009831f8713720f1cf5f531374: I seek a piece of the map to the island of Crandor.
textByHashes.7375a8d40b214b332b851bfd8955eb4d79635fb3: I've heard that one of your number has got hold of part of a map.
textByHashes.82a920be64511546476524d39af87694f7764739: I believe you've got piece of a map that I need.
textByHashes.304800b33c45616749947497b437e3bc639ae0b3: I'm not going to do anything for you. Forget it.
textByHashes.dfc70268dbbe0e9df8c278b24ee85c98c5533d28: I'll let you live. I could just kill you.
textByHashes.d914d69af3cd32d00e26e96e8cd3917478e3eb18: I suppose I could pay you for the map piece. Say, 500 coins?
textByHashes.0a1c791d9ad02da68b872fc363eb6a9336210387: You must be joking! Forget it.
textByHashes.556dabbe9e533177bc42ddfbb0eb2eeb82d96e27: Oops, I don't have enough on me.
textByHashes.f8436a1ea5ff259b816e990d3d6aae4c9ee001d1: Where did you get the map piece from?
textByHashes.ae05a8263ccda630b9f0e8b668929fba60ce229d: Well, did the stuff belong to you?
textByHashes.9fc08d3f3bb101991f71e232f6af9e0e2dd588de: Well, that would be why then.
textByHashes.7fb287c63326405564009f3c499abb5736e81676: Sorry, thought this was a zoo.
textByHashes.d8e3629c79ae1f205ed7d96c647dba4dd430e3a2: A much better price? What's the catch?
textByHashes.05db24455042d3ffbbccfecda37765249ce112b7: Not seaworthy? Why would I want to buy her then?
textByHashes.bd104e9f6eabf38db282330da0dacc56891e2961: ...except I don't have that kind of money on me...
textByHashes.652441214dd2c6cfec23c64ccb69c6ad2e1f22de: I'm not paying that much for a broken boat!
textByHashes.5272d62e63263c70fd9246f689798fd6e119c8cb: So, what needs fixing on this ship?
textByHashes.1b25cacc7716105ec67d9e6e36a53f7a8f4a80b1: But you said it needed fix-
textByHashes.0328664f127ae6428995406d63497180e40c16d8: So would you like to sail this ship to Crandor for me?
textByHashes.6db14a547ee568cf5ba69c8bcfbf0b29aff1a7c8: No. I want to go to Crandor.
textByHashes.026deda9a717ab29600d4390a7a7498bf2310d4f: What are you going to do now you don't have a ship?
textByHashes.e4c3a03ee6c6b5addd13d68d2b7bbe3588e7b443: Can I board the ship now?
textByHashes.191faf41ae0a4f457711917d552de86b23be180c: I'm ready to go back on shore.
textByHashes.5e222315ff21084c1fe13c5470c13ad36fbeacf1: I'd like to inspect her some more.
textByHashes.331c73df0c09de2d7d0fb8f000724ab9562f7ab1: Can you sail this ship to Crandor?
textByHashes.21def6b09708f4f93d91b046122faa400a703e73: Where can I find a captain?
textByHashes.de9d77f6cc491128b715790307d0be545ce7b12e: Can you help me get to Crandor Island?
textByHashes.ac68879ac82e3d71ccdae193dedf190f22aa9c55: Yes, that's right. I 've got to go there and kill the dragon for this quest I'm doing.
textByHashes.864c2076416f4f02074172b6a5e8230a9071e7c2: Do you know anyone who would take me there?
textByHashes.7f7e1f30468f5939ff1fe6f83fb8d5c613631c9a: Yes, I would like to charter a ship.
textByHashes.65d685e0b4711f7bb94c17b8889687bcf618bee7: You're a sailor? Could you take me to the island of Crandor?
textByHashes.f01f705d8cfeec59a5b4a2eb9210248ffee7b575: Well, I don't actually have a ship yet.
textByHashes.351dccf7d123bf7a13af737ce83bc0e9a16c5d18: It's the Lady Lumbridge, in Port Sarim.
textByHashes.c2cd8294c9b1384876445e8cf3fef574dae4e940: Uh...yeah...about that. I don't actually have a map on me.
textByHashes.66eef6e3107c60012a60cc0eaefab091e87e961d: Will you take me to Crandor now, then?
textByHashes.28dd5293453d33b2bb4d2516a44bb941487d7cfb: Yes, good point. I'd better go and fix her up.
textByHashes.40b5af1df6fc0ec129f36f06b20c430e543d7db4: I seek a shield that will protect me from dragonbreath.
textByHashes.f84aa7bb44e62ca5be7c0d5db3708cdb0316d2d3: Elvarg, the dragon of Crandor island!
textByHashes.253f2cd068328166d838ddc9a5a46f695ce073ac: Why is everyone so scared of this dragon?
textByHashes.4d0a69de3b532be2296c493cf0baf0a67a3b365c: I'd better leave that dragon alone.
textByHashes.dce2d577821367f4364e6f469e5a04cfd0090103: So, are you going to give me the shield or not?
textByHashes.3a7db493da6e209e30be3ce9f565eaa71b2d8910: Oh, no dragon in particular. I just feel like killing a dragon.
textByHashes.bacf3705e07a7e8821b1c9a4d2fca927fa7df844: No, I'm not quite ready yet.
textByHashes.595fb5743ea10125f96dc641bcbca0709834a373: How much longer until we reach Crandor?
textByHashes.4830ce2b36cb656230f6dbbe66e431b2698db941: I thought I saw something up above us.
textByHashes.da30eacf0e1a2985de529361c3aaedbe81a96463: Don't worry about that. I found a secret passage in the dragon's lair that leads off the island!
textByHashes.117fa562f03edf739bb83919d6ea2e0c5304f8f9: How can I gain access to the Guild?
textByHashes.d8a8df7dcb9e263491a87f785acf36ab2c8883df: So what myth would you like me to investigate?
textByHashes.9ff9931ce5c264b03f617d57395e87fa1cf1cf9f: No. This is too much for me.
textByHashes.5b9fbdfca9c17a2b361fd3ea57def70fcf2f15d5: I'm investigating the origin of Elvarg. I've found some old doors on a ruined island, but they're locked. I think something important lies behind them.
textByHashes.65c055a23727f64909b2487e524f92ca360e1117: I'm investigating the origin of Elvarg. I've found some old doors on a ruined island, but they're locked. I'm trying to find the key.
textByHashes.862c581cc59a0ab16d1e4215343a995f3dc1e99b: I'm investigating the origin of Elvarg. I've found an ancient vault beneath a ruined island. I think it contains something important.
textByHashes.a8eb655d93165c9ea5c0ead97a44fc1af3ec6a29: I was investigating the origin of Elvarg but I accidently released a dragonkin!
textByHashes.efdc002f6d879ebfa996f44096c0d32438f46c29: Hello there. I'm . Are you Dallas Jones?
textByHashes.7274feb6bb312d9a016470c730b6eddd8fd98c63: Well I was the one who killed her in the first place.
textByHashes.2fb1fa679c4ee35b5de2c9587dbec380040f478b: Hello, Dallas. So what exactly are we researching here?
textByHashes.fc9b20308e15bba253eae8c561b69a9409bb62c1: I see. Where should we start?
textByHashes.24330722410f3ccdb90f4ef7f269a75f58ca859a: I've found a strange wall that looks like it might have something behind it. We might be able to mine through it.
textByHashes.c4c65d03c098818bb8050a7a7a2b05a54c00639f: I've mined through a strange wall and found a tunnel behind it.
textByHashes.7f1053f54a020672f44719ff669c10469dde6862: It looks like some sort of laboratory.
textByHashes.e3d0c30f4a73b85212a4ebb59a6c5dba92a52ff2: Well maybe we'll be the ones to prove it.
textByHashes.05d52caec83f01197ba1dc5ec782a7cda21e4267: I'll look around and see what I can find.
textByHashes.009ef011cb62e456162f5daedec831c4314d02b9: I've found an old mural. It has lots of dragons and fungi on it along with some strange writing.
textByHashes.aba2c1690f686f3c18970ea1c6f87c0ddd188d9a: I don't know. It looked like a different language. It had odd words on it like 'Lithkren'.
textByHashes.f3b03736e5db4df5d613ffa2df763d1c10821edc: You know, now that you mention it, I think I may have read that book as well.
textByHashes.bc17f36d5dc64a785435ac401940050a8e67efe8: In that case, we should probably go to Fossil Island.
textByHashes.39535524400570050760104b59e8fa35298d0c87: So how do we know which island to go to?
textByHashes.6f475ec984f43ae19d5e849e069dd93fe8fac457: Hmm... So this map could lead us to Lithkren. Most of the pieces are missing though.
textByHashes.7b479393850903a35eb0cf176cad746de195d1ac: Great! I'll have a look around and see if I can find them.
textByHashes.1d77483c43e2775fe8cf3b2d7fa49ef29f5a494f: I think that's all of them.
textByHashes.cd4b390acc329f23993c755a2b64212a8bb85caa: I think you might be right. So now that we know where the island is, we need to find a way there. Do you think the museum can help us?
textByHashes.861be26762bbe5287a88bb079b6b528a0acd006c: Alright, alright. So what do we do instead?
textByHashes.898c4a03fbad2beda723f4e1ecbf5e07ae1add2a: What should I be doing again?
textByHashes.dec83e108ec91bc80f5467a1858feb5c9349c57d: I'm working with Dallas Jones on a research project. We're investigating the destruction of Crandor. We need a boat to get to one of the nearby islands. Dallas said you could help us.
textByHashes.03a42edae46bc255e4e5f3de9fba2cc7db72e540: He said as much. So what can we do?
textByHashes.20019a3ee20a377df411f2b6069d14df8d6c60cf: I'm not actually too bad when it comes to construction. What will I need?
textByHashes.aa2c8e00b3e772e54adc29c50152406dfd3fef5e: Someone's in a hurry. I suppose I should look around as well.
textByHashes.3d9acc61abfe0cd3cdec45beb6547eec68bf51d8: Well those are some big doors.
textByHashes.8cf271358df8f49b888a57f25c1779f391005395: Well a keyhole isn't much good if there isn't a key. We should look around and see if there are any clues nearby.
textByHashes.5b47cac66497a15836fde056452899f4337e23ab: I found an old diary nearby but I haven't read it yet.
textByHashes.057dce4ae050ebfb7ca3cecbc21136dadf37cfbc: I found an old diary nearby. It mentioned a battle that took place here involving Robert the Strong.
textByHashes.c754e0f6f0edabae97727cf21370991668bc071c: Not necessarily. Robert the Strong might not be as dead as you think.
textByHashes.204427bb1ec7e6de94b88dd2f4c633a1a6bbd64a: Robert the Strong is still alive. He's been reincarnated as a cat called Bob.
textByHashes.3089bf319d76a9f8047bd7acfb4337dde0b44af1: I'm serious! Why would I lie about this?
textByHashes.fd8fa2484805495f76f9aab870070e400ae0aa61: I have an amulet that lets me talk to cats. I can use it to ask Bob what he knows.
textByHashes.1769847e4b7ee3fa1c22a4360de8cf4c7c49fc3a: Very well. I shall return once I've learnt more.
textByHashes.b0be0e3e723fb5339afad8f4d2ebbc2245af0fd4: Not yet I'm afraid. He likes to move around a lot.
textByHashes.3fd55910b1cc6e31d5080674f5f809982649c695: Not bad. I was wondering if you could help me with something.
textByHashes.bc32c93158a885a5a9f3d7fa99173a652128fe4d: So you know how you're actually Robert the Strong?
textByHashes.ce1a7dbc77d23cd63c173482671c3da269797f00: Long story, I'll keep it brief. I found an old dungeon with a large set of doors in it. There was a skeleton nearby with a diary that mentioned Robert the Strong.
textByHashes.53e5e32142505535935f98a4114d5b9ec4755b6f: I was hoping you could use your memories of Robert the Strong to help me open the doors.
textByHashes.368e2a319c5a73b20f51458e3169b45f431097e1: Maybe the Sphinx can help us again.
textByHashes.46127f86a3adadbd2578eb643ae6f5befb36aee5: That it did. Bob, would you mind meeting me in Sophanem?
textByHashes.c88bf21d6676a9b05921bbb767b2b9c0e74cee5f: I should probably wear my catspeak amulet before talking to Bob and the Sphinx.
textByHashes.556474dae87bac03b9f442d1cf241aacceb18ce5: We were hoping you could hypnotise Bob again so we can learn more about his past.
textByHashes.ac6885afd2a3e19cb723618a85783481e1990abf: It's about that dungeon. I believe that it was once visited by Robert the Strong. I want to know what he did while he was there.
textByHashes.69fbd6785310f9486f2e52861ddbedade135fd01: I once entered the mind of a guy called Cyrisus to confront some personal issues of his. The Oneiromancer on Lunar Isle helped me do it. Maybe she can help us now.
textByHashes.ecbce227d0620313c0b8292720b8ee6eb7e78fb0: I didn't know you two knew each other. Also, how can you speak to cats?
textByHashes.1f07e33f631599c4ce0a5bbfeed3945d7f2a94d2: We need to unlock Bob's memories from his old life as Robert the Strong. We were hoping that we could use a shared dream.
textByHashes.d24bb7c8e9ec3a1c42375a49fd30a4c8ce5aa745: Hi, Bob! I've finished the Potion of Shared Dreaming.
textByHashes.c4bfbd6b12c55564658f49c025c35531793d760a: I've made the Potion of Shared Dreaming.
textByHashes.790dc8c763269c67128588e1834c8813b6853e86: We're here to recover Bob's lost memories from his life as Robert the Strong. Do you think you can help us?
textByHashes.380f5479d166ef23f2deb623dddfb3357030a491: So how can we permanently unlock them?
textByHashes.cd41d0b75d9d8932e16f159caf0aa035076611a2: Looks like it's up to me then. Wish me luck.
textByHashes.90d98fe27fe2ee7db324eabef63d26c5a1cb9f31: So do you have all of your memories back now?
textByHashes.256b39301bdab848470379bb3622d370dcf3e184: Sounds like I have a fair amount of work to do. Thanks, Bob.
textByHashes.98a675d5f2a059a75fb59834c8785ea93bb47bba: Hi, Bob. Could you remind me where those key pieces are?
textByHashes.9edbc4f3d4fb3dbbd0d67f0d91b7fa5e88b3900b: Hello. I was wondering if you could help me with something?
textByHashes.063bb9a236ed2533a1e0a63d078bb6d2bb1e12cc: I'm looking for information on a Fourth Age hero. His name was Tristan and he fought alongside Robert the Strong.
textByHashes.c97170d85e179b313be658ea8b8aa1eacf916eea: I'd like to learn about his descendants. I know they lived in this area.
textByHashes.d50361fd74a6a400c652868861b85aa122008635: Hmm... It might still be worth a look. Where can I find this information?
textByHashes.1f460b7e7c079e1845abe709ce3b6ddd362a6e87: So what does the book say?
textByHashes.c2b0a26103c4ea87a166ec9f85c61458c4b3786f: Hello. Do you know anyone with the name Corvo?
textByHashes.d30b0fa8fc4716b223282fbc6f1920a821ff7804: I'm on the hunt for the piece of a key. It was once in the possession of your ancestor, Tristan Corvo.
textByHashes.ec8155d016da11155c44b562aea1bc064467e548: But how do I get it back?
textByHashes.b0b68ecd0e5769d0ba25ff28f36c6625e33a8c40: Hmm... I think I might know just the scientist to help me out with this. Time for me to visit Draynor Manor.
textByHashes.3c75d3a8c1a420acfeba12b1d078226148d1a908: Oh, nothing. I'd best be off. Thank you for your time.
textByHashes.9a03ff5d6c7449f797d40c97348a30a30b846401: Nope. Just stopping by to say hello.
textByHashes.9bcb735a1cca88a3fd21e25b635e37fa693b0ab7: Well that was great. See you later.
textByHashes.61c6c723bbf04343b6e0dc57b1daebe98345bb10: I need your help with a key piece.
textByHashes.45630f6eb78f9f9b51d4b607509ea0048a7d551b: Yes. I'm looking for the piece of a key made out of red metal. I know it's buried somewhere in Mort Myre Swamp, but I don't know exactly where. I was thinking...
textByHashes.de275fd0d593e15b8813227726b545b1a1d3083d: Awesome! That's just... Wait... what do you mean unstable?
textByHashes.786b83b1d574d2eadd841859d353bf0c0f532bd6: Er... great? Anyway, before I go I was wondering...
textByHashes.3cf5665baf04a0ca34e4b952a7e338b8817bfabd: Well now that you mention it...
textByHashes.14ba7439e71afb6da7dee7541b1cbc066a8abd7b: Okay... Thanks for the help Ava. See you later.
textByHashes.f65b7dd45caeed29450cd6aabcee6fdf1be94997: I'm looking for an ancient temple.
textByHashes.8bc095aff6ba4e6af25a49e4e761960e5e940deb: It may well be. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.3c2715de797ba09e5dff1f1930148a4c2ab3a7dd: It can never be easy can it? Okay, I'll be careful. Thanks again.
textByHashes.aace0a3953fa0e621095a1e73c44128315a27189: I didn't. I'll look there. Thank you.
textByHashes.b9bcd41b51fb1929d8bf25fd870d1212b5504ed6: Hello, Brundt. I wanted to ask you about something.
textByHashes.c9c77eba4b8863f367d3a0fa1a08fece5c16496d: Apparently there's an island north of here with an ancient fortress on it. Have you heard of it?
textByHashes.d575fe49378e727a957dccb86faf3498ba13decf: Er... yes, I think I do.
textByHashes.e76ca609c47d6ddd8d90fd20252345744ddce6f6: Will he talk to me while I'm exiled?
textByHashes.6b761456473c3a5316d3e5e9f7e3fdb187c53dd8: The chieftain says you can take me to Ungael.
textByHashes.3c98f41055d03957f0d9329be61e36c54998246f: I know but the Chieftain says you can take me to Ungael.
textByHashes.183e4201d9959ce2c637bf45516d0c57039d5f24: Spits fire? Sounds like some sort of fire protection might be useful.
textByHashes.a2e0de603be930fbfc12a135b41bfe6d9529cf61: Have you ever heard of Camorra?
textByHashes.a82654e98849c3aeb3504fe3b16236efe83975ea: She was an ancient hero who lived about two thousand years ago. I believe she travelled here at some point.
textByHashes.dbaf812f5b345084c87802a69db480c65d7a84db: Do you know anything about Camorra?
textByHashes.0d45c75db71079d7ab045116c5855b9a04fc407d: She was a hero who lived around two thousand years ago.
textByHashes.dd781971b6a1bccc3e3748d27b9fb4e0d9f3da97: Hello. What do you do here?
textByHashes.0354837f1e408b9d7666c205ee758a6cfd80a1c1: She's a hero from around two thousand years ago. I believe she travelled to Kourend during the Dragonkin Conflicts. I was hoping to learn more about her.
textByHashes.d62b40effbf65e2f8231c480016160b3fd6e567b: Oh. So you can't help me?
textByHashes.ff8b2b30df9a19eab4c33ccd0102edbe833c7fa6: Great. Is there a particular city you'd recommend?
textByHashes.fa6de1f1656b71ea68843aca9c8531f8519356dd: Where can I find the Hosidius and Shayzien historians?
textByHashes.5a1e13481747b397230305963b2b67460690a00f: Where can I find them again?
textByHashes.9bbfece6c355dabb69e0b51c0cd50c92d211d77b: Hello there. Have you heard of Camorra?
textByHashes.f63c8551791c1080b388911943f9576698d3c703: Camorra. She was a great hero who fought in the Dragonkin Conflicts. I think she travelled to Kourend during the war. I'm trying to find out what happened to her.
textByHashes.f7bb5b6c797f0576bc4b8115366cef6e1491b624: Oh well. Thanks for the help.
textByHashes.05e8feae5aa0e999854ce0c8aa7d376ecef7b0b8: Well she was a great hero during the Dragonkin Conflicts. I think she travelled to Kourend before the war ended. I'm trying to find out more about her.
textByHashes.6adf47847248cb9d35b42536721adac7da485cb2: But you've never heard of her?
textByHashes.8cf06c9da97e90fe906cf039208e276331a9e9b0: Let me guess... there's a catch isn't there?
textByHashes.c23c38ffbdecac0462759bbc63c169ab448cb5f1: Well thankfully I ain't afraid of no ghosts. Where do I start?
textByHashes.0550849901adc7dcb5304d8e9b59848880533a38: We probably have. I'm very forgetful.
textByHashes.1f3302f33fe12d479c8097333db9a320998a707e: Well we'll be finding out very soon. I've managed to fix the key.
textByHashes.8123ce22cd29447f9f7023676715089a270369c2: I've managed to repair the key.
textByHashes.795b437eb5c249b3fe5ab1110620e4867545c475: Elvarg was a dragon who attacked the island of Crandor. We found a lab hidden in her lair. We followed the clues and they led us here, to you.
textByHashes.87443e61827c36d14da449d224212bd35c71df82: Do you really think we're letting you leave this place?
textByHashes.efd7223c248302850cb7497ab1be5fe4d799e883: What do we do? That dragonkin said he was going to assemble an army of dragons!
textByHashes.c1d22bf9ff0fbd3242a82e2815ece9beef706514: Good plan. I'll go see the King.
textByHashes.48a2b4e314b23066e8dbfea4b76ad592a97ab950: I'm here to talk about dragons.
textByHashes.df8d44e07907d9a946ba9cfb1354982425c397f5: Wait! I know what the dragons are doing.
textByHashes.312692874833da941e0be70dd482d295adbc641a: Yes. There's a dragonkin named Zorgoth who has managed to bring them under his control. He is forming an army which he intends to use to attack humanity!
textByHashes.1ef3d2969a64d1ebe8f337eb48ea737d0d730cca: I know it sounds crazy, but you have to believe me! Why else would the dragons be acting so odd?
textByHashes.c9c208726282f36c78ee9e15c275c2105bd5cb2e: You need to gather your soldiers. We have to destroy this dragon threat before it destroys us.
textByHashes.9391c979fa90c378fecafe8aa10cc1f875f4c7e8: I'm not sure if we want King Lathas on our side.
textByHashes.6297b9d66942401ff3d767a66cc529781ad3d5aa: Not yet. Who am I meant to be speaking to again?
textByHashes.4e0fc4b3c35e16e657c88ba95d328c6823892ff2: I do. It's not good I'm afraid. The dragons are uniting under a dragonkin named Zorgoth. He intends to use them against us.
textByHashes.c8baaaef71086b573900d650b322c2d9ee58938d: King Roald is forming an army to take on the dragons. He's requested your presence in Varrock to discuss this.
textByHashes.a3e2f1462ef6a2b192f6eedf7f93f11bd4b8fe42: I wanted to talk to you about some dragons.
textByHashes.db304e3cbcf8b9ad96b7fa5b565d2675d2e83b78: It is. The increase in activity is caused by a dragonkin called Zorgoth. He's forming an army of dragons to destroy humanity with.
textByHashes.738b7d7dfea5daa345cd01a91d5aec9054c25f9a: You need not fight it alone. King Roald is preparing his own men and would like you to fight with him. A meeting is to be held in Varrock to plan the defence.
textByHashes.71dc89edd3a8b1c49141486fc31d78fbad712d90: Great. I'll see you in Varrock.
textByHashes.2340bb6482b28ad303de727b410c49254568b08a: I appreciate you're busy, but I wanted to talk to you about some dragons.
textByHashes.69b97f7699f5edb66f8347e66d20db5942c39033: Hello, Brundt. That's what I wanted to talk to you about.
textByHashes.0b949300559dcc1abad1bbf2bc4eb1df78403c63: I don't plan on doing it alone. I have the support of King Roald. I was hoping you'd help as well.
textByHashes.67ff466e22a1a3fa5c44ee4c114e61f0f79dd77c: I understand. However, these dragons are threatening humanity as a whole. We must fight back.
textByHashes.bbdeee66a0c22c27ad1f461ab3873979ca6f5f3c: Thanks, Brundt. There is to be a meeting in Varrock to discuss our plan of action. It would be good if you could attend.
textByHashes.ed342d09d7334acd9145b9791eb14ca7fbeaada8: Hello, Brundt. Are you ready for the meeting in Varrock.
textByHashes.4afe9e9801650d4d586f345fbf35a45199977f14: In that case, I'll see you there.
textByHashes.68b439429daf64f4106a8142ced8cddbe9792e31: I've arranged a meeting with King Roald and some other rulers. We're going to discuss how to combat the dragons.
textByHashes.abd4bdf91b6c4f4f56b027ac4d350c9a267a9771: Well we still have Roald and the other rulers.
textByHashes.a120ff7818e8b9347c042b265819d084544110d5: Do you have any of my items?
textByHashes.0158dcfe04380435e6595cb20273f98e855756c1: What do we do? We're never going to make it to the island now.
textByHashes.c15f2470134144da87fa8397e2e26df114fb0607: You'll be okay. You'll be fine.
textByHashes.a31432b3f18afc2234654b1143e1ce45d4c7d434: Well, probably not, to be honest.
textByHashes.062d0c2a6eee41e1d1c1d2f61897c01cda8e8daa: I'm going to have to go soon.
textByHashes.46746c31387a1b9856a9c1454f6aca45643cc30f: Sorry, I have work to do.
textByHashes.82621654e5c1a32215d72a57727fe7673219bf7c: No, it's okay. I must have been imagining things.
textByHashes.316321c747374ccec020acec66f14b1888f099a8: You don't look dead any more, for a start.
textByHashes.e472e7674cf68baad3b4fa38fabd93f1df414b1b: Well, you look and sound more lively.
textByHashes.040844f1b4106159bd09c6e5e0230ae5435b1098: How long have you been down here?
textByHashes.6e24c7a3f017f392b7fcfc25a62fd35699e7d9a1: This place gives me the creeps!
textByHashes.db582a803081fed806232aea73a915dcaaff862c: I'm afraid I shall have to soon.
textByHashes.83b97d7490bc0f03db8e8f5b632de744601d5dfa: Are you looking forward to getting out?
textByHashes.2b89efb31a237bb7b595ad0dd7ac1369600d0086: Just take it a step at a time.
textByHashes.fe3c66fb18f5d50ffc1bf3d776935fde19d846b4: Why do you look so sad?
textByHashes.9801e580bfb00c56cea4c5f77299aaa56b4cb324: Cheer up, it may never happen!
textByHashes.062d5c07d199a6c4ae6d22053f931403e170523e: Always so negative. It's not good for you!
textByHashes.405e84f131446fbbc990373d90b75b25d9940e2e: Those are some deep cuts on your legs.
textByHashes.d2eeeff29d9272943414bbe0d2b8e27e80617adf: I think I feel a bit ill.
textByHashes.d842eb2febd36dbfeedb29f1fd827f6bc8cb16d5: You seem like a nice guy.
textByHashes.638b8eb080f61ef0a91d298a40f1c5551cbf66cd: I thought I had better say it before it's too late.
textByHashes.1e9f7eb3ace1d71adb5d35eae175ec0cb939524a: I can't believe how many suqahs are on this island.
textByHashes.defcd53f614007282bd8755543eaed5aa95c790d: Don't you think you should give up being an adventurer?
textByHashes.d2e91ff45f2333fc0968da23676d76a040dc501b: You don't seem to be doing too well at the moment.
textByHashes.f3fbb8059d18ea2d6fb92e7ee70f22055f8986ba: When we get out of here I'll buy you a drink!
textByHashes.ac5df22ef6afd0966f32942365e64474ac7e1fed: Whatever and wherever you want - my treat.
textByHashes.6d32d18dd76c13fe488cf01f2ad5acfb198ee6af: Something cheap. Although it's my pleasure, helping you is costing me.
textByHashes.1d4bbdf80f2cd1e1e2b96d248bfd4ec02bdaf75b: Hope you don't mind me saying, but you smell a bit.
textByHashes.466a615fae24a322c170dcc76922d6bdef1928bc: It'll be a while before we get out.
textByHashes.e3e88cbb58f6019a3a1cb99982e129ec3343144b: Well you have to. You just have to.
textByHashes.414517a21ce01c07d097e29a298f1a24a7050bd2: I'm very impressed you managed to get into this cave.
textByHashes.ae5a54eb0ba6d2df0b3cc4ed443d681dc521716f: I would have given up personally.
textByHashes.3feade0a747596a8a47daa4f197524188ff75772: Good job you didn't find more suqah down here.
textByHashes.c31b5cd5fc9dfffac4e2ab5aad200970c8a11c46: I wonder why nothing lives down here.
textByHashes.e42e90a02c0747d9f64ab4ceae5b8d06fa387f0b: It's probably not very easy to survive down here.
textByHashes.5c898304cbcb2a9dd05b220d41071ba570cf37d7: I trust you usually look smarter.
textByHashes.fdb5f1de6572f5b3cc3013a1f0edff2cf6c16ca4: It's a bit damp in here.
textByHashes.02c181c98127009ff892301ac5c488704abe8b38: Just concerned that it will make your condition worse.
textByHashes.0278d6678a6ea605798dfd36a7cce0814f33cd97: Think of all the places you can visit when you get out!
textByHashes.4de72f40fa10ea0d0ef1cc97051cc22a5c9447fb: Yes. So you must think positive.
textByHashes.719c2af3e18a402081a124860dc9acbd2f5ea4cb: I had better be going now.
textByHashes.f3a707ccb97feb1a4ed109efae6f435719ad1282: What are you going to do when you get out of here?
textByHashes.f04f1e5472805870e89d5ea0257e597da082e3a0: That's up to you. You could travel with me!
textByHashes.bc45fd7499dc63a0639a1cee35ef04fa127b18c2: If I were you I'd stay indoors.
textByHashes.e3870743f4808b9e892c9bc97279aa339b3a4a51: Any chance you could pay me for this?
textByHashes.5c1a14b4a3512e123fb832e2f4bf853c67dbf8d9: No, sorry. I don't have any on me.
textByHashes.32ccb6d0741e3f5cb3edf6aeaf040acfeb32f140: It's a good thing you have me to look after you.
textByHashes.8eaa44c816fec936ec70ec02e18ae521f833a4c2: No, I don't have to worry about anything because I'm the best!
textByHashes.160fa7b39a58d16f13b9431f6eaf7e1a85acea9e: Not that I'm bragging or anything.
textByHashes.950dcc051b5a7e513508d4f6f6389fcf44bd7a1f: What would you do if I wasn't here?
textByHashes.6607c677f6f628c30b3208f47819187122ad7e63: Quite the coincidence that I found you!
textByHashes.cb05d513c0577554be364b512ba659eb08da5441: So you don't know how long you've been down here?
textByHashes.1ac40f1f1ffe33f6744d2d0448d93421d91338d7: Not long now and you'll be back on your feet!
textByHashes.da9d28d9c03e197d79164b97e38447342c6aee74: On whether we have to amputate your legs or not.
textByHashes.98956213e3ff11d155bbe99314aaf6392f746234: Ooops, erm, no I'm sure it won't come to that.
textByHashes.72c4d19cf18858540dd397ca3f19e2c0d029b5df: On whether you mind me helping you further.
textByHashes.bf968ae77c69ad11febeae6217255e05019e803a: Do you think there is anyone else down here?
textByHashes.a238cfd84b7df646a1bf720992b56db02744dde3: You've got quite the collection of bruises there!
textByHashes.d849f38fc018b803a5429508bfc13d3ba62176af: Since when did you only have one leg?
textByHashes.e2190c2be47a65ee40e9e66c76893c94a9731b7b: I'm tired, I think I'll take a nap.
textByHashes.c59489f2355ed7bbb6e769200166389e18c8e430: Do you think this cave is stable?
textByHashes.b29c0aacbd7359417502b4e7f4fd7c69fa1b6ae1: I don't know, hence why I asked you.
textByHashes.a9937141f0346149578d12834ff617a91976ed0c: Yes, much more positive. Which is great.
textByHashes.661b017752d10ab42ba4fe1e6fd705a135c6f47c: But you probably want to sort out the bad breath.
textByHashes.d6f07a15813d8487a41c97a6a2210c6e2c38e837: I'll let you off. But just this once.
textByHashes.8c8c6c38c6ab5cd2d0e691d148bc878bb5f331d3: If you need anything, just let me know.
textByHashes.af7544f7bc53155c6ee3ac3dd8d27ddc0d4bde52: I'll let you off I suppose.
textByHashes.28d020dbbe0c2fd4d02f7a74ba562e7173ea23b3: Half a pound of tuppenny rice, half a pound of treacle.
textByHashes.2119636aafb0ee7a6255f20e665d8f8ad600db54: That's the way the money goes. Pop goes the weasel!
textByHashes.06fbdef2bda3a8739370502911068abae7f9a130: There's no pleasing you, is there?
textByHashes.32eb1ac56f95ad6ee7d4a3cbd0c71fa28202419b: How does the queen bee get around her hive?
textByHashes.dce6bb954ac5af89409f809e215497267f536195: This would probably make a nice home.
textByHashes.553ac48f7bb99df94849ba4d1c5ba1122fea70f2: We could do with something for you to sit on.
textByHashes.ce8b79597098e3f47fa834cc834b69d5dd16f3c7: Well, I just thought it would be a bit more civil.
textByHashes.c378f35f5bd32dd97a472f01392ca8ec4faa36f5: I just thought I could, you know... mines often have poisonous gases.
textByHashes.a1157cf4cf468dcc64ab7b0173de928ab8c6057d: Let me tell you about myself!
textByHashes.f0cd3628a53125db381c83154b32654bdaf1fa40: I started off my life as a simple adventurer, battling goblins, picking up coins on the floor...
textByHashes.c172011a6e3165ef6a9f6474277bbd89d331359a: I remember the day when I was excited to find a thousand coins.
textByHashes.41655bd8aff06e428d47e5009acfb4f5685ab34b: Not a fan of stories, then? Fair enough.
textByHashes.b3a95f9b54e3f724c99267e0fa125c9962b56677: What do you want to talk about?
textByHashes.6ded2042079b3797b67e833b5d07b7bcd0f18392: Is it okay if I talk to you?
textByHashes.18a9d3ccf633b6ca7a4c49c5fd246bb8de2ae39a: Tell me a bit about yourself.
textByHashes.d05f6dbf54652dade3ce2a871789f1cada151412: Sounds a bit boring to me.
textByHashes.2af636af48f982552cb41d7088521c6431612d4a: I'm so pleased you're getting better! You must stay still though. You're not fit to walk yet.
textByHashes.d03c448805279ad8e59a3110106a098362ac9e7d: My name's . You're on Lunar Isle, in a cave.
textByHashes.3f484c95c7dd3e670ae303b97aab8761dca1ed00: It's okay, it's okay. You're safe now.
textByHashes.dd6ff1dbb96c6043a16ebc36c0683df145b6cbe6: No, just trust me, I'll see that you get out of here. Don't give up.
textByHashes.8983e31c258fa3f43cce1e100463ee72cb974165: Hi there. How are you feeling?
textByHashes.b6be319e1f4095e9f59d3cb40ca1d936926ae6ce: Don't worry. So what were you doing on this island?
textByHashes.f3591dee0b29212919280a2cb5c04ece16a977d4: I can relate to that, and Lunar Isle is definitely worth a visit. Where else have you been?
textByHashes.016b3da12313965ed0e4d4c2d7c659e432634c85: Impressive. You must have a great many stories and mastered loads of skills.
textByHashes.1bfd551f37dd0379209d6205fa1f5591cc6c6faa: Wow. No need to say more.
textByHashes.ceec145ca272b015fc6e58984b2843f47a6ca157: But why have you had such difficulty with the suqah? Surely you're a skilled warrior?
textByHashes.5e6a9b724c06274b0cfb85367e32b35836d95ad7: You must have mastered all forms of combat?
textByHashes.3b94c28a7395b046c39e5bc632f6a5c02ad3b62e: Oh, okay. If you wish. So, what now?
textByHashes.50198d4e317baaf8cdf1880fe3a3c6b1d693d4a6: I suppose I could loan you some armour?
textByHashes.c5430e95fcd6908901edc0ca1dd51561dc855f79: And what does he look like? What's his name?
textByHashes.5a31685804b7dc4d1421d53653fa7aa534514257: So you're in need of some armour?
textByHashes.a10ec007a9d0bd4fcced5838e430d9ed7da4f336: I think I had best visit the bank and see what I can get.
textByHashes.074de3eb30d6d914336e0575c26a69ed80ab5a36: Hi there, this may sound a bit random, but do you know Cyrisus?
textByHashes.264753e5ca9b844c95180f784dcdb4901d514a4e: Wait a minute! Now I recognise you; you're the navigator on the ship that first took me to Lunar Isle! The first time I visited this place your navigation was useless!
textByHashes.80e9addc512d27942445fd717bb75ec1af0db8dc: Well, if it wasn't for me you would never have reached this place.
textByHashes.cf0de8b918f9b6e744a2ddc54c8d83ece1735ba4: Stop. Let's not do that again. So, why are you working here now?
textByHashes.87121f1047c26136b6a5dc64424085b642a7228d: Oh no. It's just that the job of banker doesn't seem quite as... 'exotic' as 'pirate'. Seems like a step-down to me.
textByHashes.da1cfdc299424c68e9aafc997f4d42a4a31ff43c: Er, yeah, whatever you say mate.
textByHashes.eb2ea1b6bd7665012c61e0564be0af5ba289ee89: Anyway, as I was saying, do you know Cyrisus?
textByHashes.be750463d7fc0cd580f5be8cee655ab5b3a8f956: Well, he's down in the caves at the north of this island, and I need your help.
textByHashes.32abf076f359cd79ca912b8c94c8f7bb7634c82c: I need to get some items out of his bank account. Is that possible?
textByHashes.f882b0f8e0bb00a6176dfcd8455a91d4116494b3: Hello again. Could I access Cyrisus's bank account again.
textByHashes.57e928311f6be727b88893b59ee99a50a120a871: Well, I'm afraid I have lost it.
textByHashes.fc5002f4484a6ec77b1a77a3b70a1523a112d5ca: Yes, I think I left it in my bank account.
textByHashes.4a959c57a7b9b8ae9f041c70e1c56808c03f86d5: I have got a chest and filled it with some items.
textByHashes.6f28887fe6acc6a06ab9a582123f792edc14d102: I'm glad you know what you want.
textByHashes.e27da8707cc3c8cccbfc9e112e13bbfe991158c6: Hi, I've been to see 'Bird's-Eye' Jack, and I've got a chest.
textByHashes.b61025752baa16ab29cdc6e8f99ddb275b3d613b: I've also filled it with some armour; what do you think?
textByHashes.4e0f46bc87646ca92782497f038549a2eacd0d01: Oh, I won't. I'll close my eyes.
textByHashes.5bb6fef077abed411a6a6546e857f57632b81aed: Why did you have such difficulty against the suqahs?
textByHashes.89f1be33a819b0ce33d40cd229436f894a5749bb: I have indeed. A very strange day I must say, but very valuable! Especially gaining the Lunar spells.
textByHashes.c62ec65b2cbcb50fa98a182b799e56b8b32e225e: Well, I suppose. Can't see why not.
textByHashes.0122b6eb5a87331b67ac819a0592b09e6420dfd1: He's fine now. Back to full health.
textByHashes.eb0dda9b8b224bd7a4b5bacd995670c99892a831: Does it look like I care?
textByHashes.ca76bc344f5b5b47a00c7e532fa52950e3340a89: Not at the moment. I've come on behalf of a friend. You will probably have met him - his name is Cyrisus.
textByHashes.a49220064a13ddebd60eeb7c6114c1adb8c8001b: Don't worry Cyrisus, we can do this. Oneiromancer, how do we make the potion?
textByHashes.0e897f361d300ce14cfd9b8998aa7c8bdab4542a: I'm still making the potion. Can you tell me what ingredients it takes again?
textByHashes.4923bb2091c3fab95042245438182de4f5ee8fb9: Any chance you have a vial you can give me?
textByHashes.ee97c9890c2b11c2c20980a3ebdecf3e863475d1: Apparently so. I don't have any free space to take a vial. I'll be back in a second.
textByHashes.fd32bb6451da85044b21b7adce9058c8b19462f7: Okay, I have the Potion of Shared Dreaming; now what?
textByHashes.5b9ab3b06f99617d5b8b150482119392fc607ef3: Okay, so we need to make the Potion of Shared Dreaming.
textByHashes.45b98ebae4e3bede5131319f138d640bcf5b400c: Very well so far, we have the Potion of Shared Dreaming.
textByHashes.ab08c0adf58bc0e0903750a069acac75893f305f: We just need to visit Cyrisus's dreams and come to a solution.
textByHashes.75de2c8a535c0ffe1df99a2e540dfb5cf30e8d38: Don't ask me, it's your dream!
textByHashes.aefbf3ebd5dee6322d3c690389facd0fb099ce95: You must really be afraid of combat!
textByHashes.f0075c03b6038a1276f68e16705125af093d58d3: What do you mean 'why'? This huge creature must symbolise your fears!
textByHashes.f107a7598e7b5dfdae248a3c2c6818178462d56b: Not bad. We've been into the dream, but we are yet to conquer it.
textByHashes.54fe896c540da4946c6da51da34418a139804921: We're probably going to need more of that potion.
textByHashes.56e324d3a62df29b6c8bcc588fc3fe81eabfa749: We need to go into the dream again.
textByHashes.6e1ece7d536d6d49e297b5b916be9d9124ecb7d2: Now, now, now! Cyrisus! Get it!
textByHashes.e2a60e6ed2ecd37148ac22a4fe2be67cef0125ca: Back to reality, I suppose, and on to the Oneiromancer!
textByHashes.226a354ce21b99e82c7c9f3d640a34da771d1841: Ah, no worries, it was fun.
textByHashes.f6fa06645483f2f6c300a074d0381fa3ae899f95: We beat those monsters well and good, didn't we?
textByHashes.c25a0c38000b9f33bcd672950aff0112a4d21bd4: Ooooh. That was a weird sensation.
textByHashes.d84532b5ee7ec95bb27dbe60e61cbc0147548249: I must admit, I do feel enlightened already. Thank you!
