textByHashes.18c0c705bbd940808391abe725264c11353081d2: What about the stone circle full of dark wizards?
textByHashes.6867df586e2afe542401c6fc0e5ddf569a7d0372: So what's so good about Guthix?
textByHashes.0ae2113cad672f35381d00fd7c6eca66fc3e02a2: Well, I'll be on my way now.
textByHashes.21e2fabc618b6c4dd4e9593e19fa88388bea853d: I'm in search of a quest.
textByHashes.7416071ad96f1fbb2dcdebdf86e9512214ba490e: Okay, I will try and help.
textByHashes.1e70ef466709938589bb7f5d50fe0756faceba59: No, that doesn't sound very interesting.
textByHashes.f10ce2cc4fc91bb9c18bb67a33ffa198a89833c4: I've been sent to assist you with the ritual to purify the Varrockian stone circle.
textByHashes.0fb7fd0d7a1b055337eff5ca92e379bc6a4bd26b: Where can I find this cauldron?
textByHashes.58655bc8d907a553ec6fbe961de4afe461a9c928: Actually I don't need to speak to you.
textByHashes.22f5700502a07fd4c9cef9827b02ea44b3ccbda7: What was I meant to be doing again?
textByHashes.8893ecd2636f0bb8a692f47a13913905a4104dc1: Yes, I have all four now!
textByHashes.4210873997e631cd47e1483f4aa632665e8181dd: Sure, I'd be honoured to join.
textByHashes.c5d82e132dd103ae6fb7441415d2e3233c47e545: I'm sorry, I'm too busy mining.
textByHashes.ca5683021cb4cb0477b77c67a9a8ea23b8c63868: I'm not going to be able to fix this without a new railing. Lawgof should have some spare ones.
textByHashes.317b7528d138dd98c7f56e1d15a95a0ac84410ea: I've fixed all these railings now.
textByHashes.c1e153277c6c3a53b199b2ea7e97fe24d4d0a679: That's better, the goblins won't get past this piece of fencing now.
textByHashes.19e821567aab36680deb1fb60add0ca3d0c0a34c: Don't worry, I'll find them soon enough.
textByHashes.9846fa27af81aebf61ca5b4d4090c591c54c31d3: Great, I'll be getting on then.
textByHashes.e0de00c730ae80959a516db6147541b9c0e6539f: Okay, I'll see what I can find out.
textByHashes.1f6209bedb7fb44fdbbb522b6a05d189d84d1910: What? Carrying one set of Dwarf remains is enough...
textByHashes.bc0bc1107068d1d2a974b5dec84417d9dfb746b7: I had better take these remains.
textByHashes.e8f20d9635767480db778bbcf5d18d37e0737af3: Yes, I went up but there was no one there.
textByHashes.2b36ca5d472dc6fc2db274c3a5003a5709dc888b: Of course, I'll do what I can.
textByHashes.2d499c8f80df1a66cb7481afae35337c9177182b: I have some terrible news for you Captain, the goblins over ran the tower, your guards fought well but were overwhelmed.
textByHashes.a18252be29c896cb3a6eb4733602ced0f2ac0638: No, there was only one body there, I searched pretty well.
textByHashes.38ecc216f93d22f52376d2e70299f202dd39d136: Okay, I'll see if I can find their hideout.
textByHashes.3cb1f27f8166bb573beb9b9bb971aed1ea92fa27: That's right, you get going, I'll catch up.
textByHashes.ff17172b114ff47238c0d5e15ff5d42752ef4c16: Sorry, I've done enough for today.
textByHashes.a980194cdf6aafc0a520ffe5df49640c4d9d39e4: I guess I'd better fix it with the toolkit I was given.
textByHashes.f27788373876ffedad626b73b5250667f5753bda: It's not an easy job, but I'm getting there.
textByHashes.ce92642e295a132289f51241da13affe62585f7d: I'm afraid I lost the toolkit...
textByHashes.db3f4c0e59e54faa3cc6dcf850a2405c9c497c55: This should work nicely now that I've fixed it.
textByHashes.3ccc7dd15603d5c47bf035db29a116ef44747f02: Well, I think I've done it, take a look...
textByHashes.81d3a2bee2548d4cd3669016a8ee853b699e59e5: Not bad for an adventurer eh?
textByHashes.e473ff1e8b07b1dc043e428f134ad645090b27b3: Captain Lawgof sent me. He's having trouble with his cannon.
textByHashes.98f290061084fd6da5c6a31fc20abc50f554d543: Not yet, but I'm sure he will.
textByHashes.e58d8b9f3b3d13ce46481a3f16263f70b8ba2206: Yes, I have spoken to him.
textByHashes.1ea018fe86ec805a7c57adb9626e8820e1827c82: He gave me some items to give you... but I seem to have lost something.
textByHashes.cc443aff3b540c21f9032b0a5e19935b0411fd35: He gave me an ammo mould and some notes to give to you...
textByHashes.2f33493e8326a0dd0636dfcf1eef586452a51e81: You could give me a cannon...
textByHashes.c77bcef387e595161d180d2ea84b5f5bd38e46a1: Hmmm... sounds interesting, I might take you up on that.
textByHashes.1969dad241a43a3b4cade866cf1e35fd61db0b99: Have you any more work for me, to help reclaim the circle?
textByHashes.fb4617781bfda0e562dd5a364d1e1a0f9bd73369: And what exactly do you want me to do?
textByHashes.0f43224d58fa219d7aeedeb8deacf25f76544edb: Actually, I don't need to speak to you.
textByHashes.a37b3fa6021cdea5a736d12054877f1c1769d2e1: I need to find some goutweed. Sanfew said you might be able to help.
textByHashes.ebf4bf1ec85b94b402af6daa4266563330cfb813: Why do you live so close to the trolls? Isn't it dangerous?
textByHashes.6359b636908da3f931856e17926edb19abe96fa5: What do you have to offer?
textByHashes.b20f0c3d2136ddfd7f03e971f089b4f0d0936963: I'd like some mountain goat stew, please.
textByHashes.f6a44e61b5718c400e16473bfd555b6e5ba0a408: Oh, you don't want to eat me! I'm a tough, hardened adventurer, not tender or tasty at all!
textByHashes.449f62bb2cc28e798a44688b096400e504d6d710: I'm on a quest to find some goutweed.
textByHashes.6d0c894564697eb0ae61c0087441d366bc9b5ec9: Right. I'll just...go fetch that for you then. Bye!
textByHashes.2da4614e8ee8d6676ba0955bd6a25373bc05e0db: Erm, not yet, but I'm working on it...
textByHashes.7c4f777d107ba8974595d79c635fb90cad7e40f9: I talked to the troll cook but he wouldn't tell me anything, and now he wants me to find him some tasty human for his stew.
textByHashes.656ad04c5f7b4bd9c3136f526ec1e72558be2d5b: A PARROT? Where am I going to find one of those?
textByHashes.6870ab4d5fc989feee28242dc60bec478f113112: I haven't been able to find one yet.
textByHashes.630e9d8a71b10e5c86b6d3e4bf3957e729e30901: They won't drink it straight from the bottle...
textByHashes.6c094fa458098d0eaf8c6f431735fe5d50f058c3: I need some way to slow it down...
textByHashes.ca181b74ed9b83fe85cdfb68fe17b9169369bd51: Well, good thing I found it! I'll just take it to the vet for you, shall I?
textByHashes.2c56f41f99388ba34f7368f7547d2521d4b52cb7: Here it is! Now are you going to explain your plan?
textByHashes.bf39bae008c4844af8f463a3f2e3296bcc7d0118: How are we going to make it look like a human?
textByHashes.b2681a660815bcfa7fa96e2e3d4f38f01084b19a: How are we going to make it sound like a human?
textByHashes.e16d8029409bad9f1222d00fa4e441edfcdb8585: How are we going to make it smell like a human?
textByHashes.817a96ed6dffadb0c601c3378b1d5a71dedc673f: And how are we going to make it taste like a human?
textByHashes.0609cd355c77cd9f3c36af2157ded780747f83b5: What should I do with this parrot?
textByHashes.4961eb5a90d37298ea4850b41d9724e4164152b5: I don't think it's done yet.
textByHashes.ea91d04d81d3cb1129fe7755bc2c35b337d0d71d: I hid the parrot under the rack in the troll prison.
textByHashes.609914b6e265e17c868ae1e41e3b91e628c52048: I have no logs, no chicken, no bundle of grain and no dirty clothes.
textByHashes.e7eed61a0fd96b725f76697869b82d40613ea4b5: I have the logs, no chicken, no bundle of grain and no dirty clothes.

textByHashes.dc33c8ce02b341e15bfdbaf65988fe86c10af02e: I have no logs, five chickens, ten bundles of grain and the dirty clothes.
textByHashes.3bbe87637d7bad20b77385fe9efaf9b22dd64be6: I have the logs, five chickens, ten bundles of grain and the dirty clothes.
textByHashes.74e501a9a690aa30ddf22ef27826533a2b261634: Eadgar says he needs some dirty clothes for his plan, and he said you might be able to help.
textByHashes.71505fd56e7e666d23d5395b68807124f0a87301: You wouldn't be able to spare any of those dirty robes by any chance? It's a matter of the utmost importance.
textByHashes.6f6a8d4e3009922b4f12b6c00f1b88b872e1b26f: I'm sure Sanfew won't be happy when I tell him it's your fault he can't perform the purification ritual.
textByHashes.4eafd2185520fe5ce0f26448a1d40114ad64c241: You'll give me those robes right now...or I'm going to cut down trees until you do.
textByHashes.5e93e9e3a1aced7c4e4b33ca22d64775a8e511bb: Of course I would. They're just trees.
textByHashes.d7dced07f9bf55cfe8866b822265fa568edabc47: And how do we do that?
textByHashes.b62e038465743ee10e022719167cedd86044eaf8: Okay, I'll be back with that soon.
textByHashes.f78dea56de20ed8cfea0286bbe69bc041b1cc3b8: How do I make the troll truth potion again?
textByHashes.9ff7079ed0767d2546b6e3ac82f513004099d46c: I'd better not mess around with Eadgar's stew!
textByHashes.9f28b7f2a1cc1f91df33be6da9d250c950546f91: I've got the troll truth potion.
textByHashes.6279282db4216d1ff7f4c2029a564ab8c69bc4b8: I think it's probably heard enough.
textByHashes.2593ed744f19b4d36349c3b50a1362a45d49db6a: The parrott flew off, I wonder where it went? Silly thing prefered Eadgar to me!
textByHashes.ae2ba35749b837627a62c54da008de8c2a09d8fd: Thank you... and how's the stew?
textByHashes.c7cd62d816c4ac024bbf858d9051839540e66d30: So, where can I get some goutweed?
textByHashes.29f89380941f447da4c79f1da3d28902ee218147: That's some well-guarded secret alright. I'll just be off on my way now.
textByHashes.909ce32ca4a8454aa2dfb7d08c33a1237dbd31d5: Yes! I can get into the storeroom now.
textByHashes.43bb2fe46219aaac447fda581869de7039b044fc: I have some more goutweed for you.
textByHashes.1910d8d794db968c2386e78ec4706603254eef7f: Have you any more work for me to help reclaim the stone circle?
textByHashes.8f1d4218c8e93995aa34a20e815c1f6851037033: Ah, you sound like someone who needs a quest doing!
textByHashes.efc5c7930ca8c0c018e5affbc555022cb08d601c: Well I know a little bit...
textByHashes.c953f5c995c9ac1c41db05609fc2ee6064ea2855: Sure. Any idea where I should start looking?
textByHashes.64122aaa68417f0cc9d9043b31b32b819a1e5422: Sorry, I don't have the time.
textByHashes.14e4d4f216f5e66413bbb8dbf96a0c154cf79ab5: The Ardougne zookeeper sent me to find you.
textByHashes.66a9b5434cb518a85638fdf63b63a87152f7a863: So it's not that you're trapped then?
textByHashes.e4629a3b903cd1e78518d70460de61ca66ddf63a: That's a good idea. There are plenty of feathers around here. I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.aa4eba8dd1883e976f86ea8f30325ba512ffb7eb: Well it'll give you a lot of time to study the eagles.
textByHashes.25be146d36a5efe318921528d638c527cff9cbc0: Well, I'll let you get on with your work then.
textByHashes.fb8d35ceb6f6188d417807a3ef323e0a2ad09260: Oh, so you're not really trapped?
textByHashes.5d752841403720a5ad9446ae191dbe6a7c66d678: How did you manage to find the nest?
textByHashes.11cfc6c750df2d891f317e26de3aeb15433b9a31: So in fact the eagle found you?
textByHashes.029b6a262e43128a77cc5846b88b80bad3439e40: Amazing, but what do you intend to do now you've discovered it?
textByHashes.1723abd027d8d5fdb4a18215628e1490ab40fd78: Hello Nickolaus, how are you getting on with your discoveries?
textByHashes.28690c5d47a404cb283c997537f42e9b7c35fe59: Well, specifically I'm after a couple of bird costumes.
textByHashes.1b5a2738bf4c1a5a109a3de4a9bba0e40d197007: Wait a second, you have a supplier? But I thought nobody knew where to find the nests?
textByHashes.4bf92a92cd82b34b70bd3c67f31c8d23941e1152: What was it you needed to make those eagle costumes again?
textByHashes.877837fd88a2b6ca030ecb163bc717eb3a5cbb88: I've got the feathers and materials you requested. Can you make those giant eagle costumes for me now?
textByHashes.c866f8faada56b3e852e4cbc9d4d1cdbaf629536: I'm afraid I don't have that much money with me.
textByHashes.ec49a43d45b22589342117e4401623685b6d28da: Okay, here are the materials. Eagle me up.
textByHashes.fb403fe08b6d6130ea439e3b0cb692e464456984: On second thoughts, that's too expensive.
textByHashes.2e2158ef1e3cd34fe9f97483a1acbe519ad97299: Could you make another eagle costume for me?
textByHashes.d68834313536b3b6ef826d280520e01468c74e8b: Yes, I have one right here.
textByHashes.002e412a659c218df4e096326fe278c85ed930b3: No, Nickolaus, it's me! I'm just in disguise!
textByHashes.76a0570a732705a3246dff974f6af121fd08e26b: No of course not. You sent me to get you an eagle outfit remember? So you could get out of this nest?
textByHashes.a163c7a577d7cdf9d55f55a0e902b34e79d37a60: Your mother was a hamster, and your father smelt of elderberries!
textByHashes.ccea5ee8ce25c3e9895554c95ae35dc2bbf57c79: I've given you the disguise you needed, can we go now?
textByHashes.5d8b1079e4aa5fb95b0962ad09d10151e2fc4325: Well I was originally sent to find you because of a ferret. Can you get me one at all?
textByHashes.894bf2c7be668b35644b041a5098d29013ce974c: That sounds good to me. What do I do.
textByHashes.a4717efd9dad587006675028b75e34de474647d6: Okay, so we've baited the trap with meat, now what?
textByHashes.b9c595f5cce177b1690484a67b084576e8736014: But what if I don't like waiting for things?
textByHashes.2d5713e69425797000d23d4285131d25cb796b04: I've not got the time right now.
textByHashes.0e1d0900fae46af9100defd09c06059386c515b8: I was just wondering how you got on with those eagles.
textByHashes.dca25666baeeadd6dd993c6227ac8f7bc2fdd8fe: No thanks. I was just dropping by, wanted to make sure you hadn't been abducted again.
textByHashes.86047620b82db47daaa73d80525f3c725ad32472: Yes I have actually. He'd been abducted by giant eagles, but I managed to rescue him. He's now gotten back to his hunting.
textByHashes.a479d7dc709bd3f7f547adf297088beec5d59b1e: Even better, I have a ferret right here for you.
textByHashes.81ee0d63b9caf8a71af4a6371b1b4fb8c1dcd667: Now to explore this area thoroughly, to find what forgotten secrets it contains.
textByHashes.71d148b6690a18823e34f9f0652351c29973a535: I hope I got that right.
textByHashes.6ae52398f8e4db56f27c15acea22b74d9fa1ebfd: So, what would you need my help with?
textByHashes.cecf4fc407477910cf85056b57a5500f1a998f0c: You'll have to explain it to me as you go along, but count me in.
textByHashes.5bfc9656ef32d28c85f58e3725aee23d60f28ed7: What should I be doing to make your statue?
textByHashes.d8797d71aaa8af902d5cb7e5294da89c4aaef596: I can't mine a block that big!
textByHashes.23b2e48771d810f2e2cc040572934922d7809c00: So, how much do different blocks of sandstone weigh?
textByHashes.9a35e17bc6207d1eb2e8cac13c1d66e6b1c76340: Okay, I'll get on with it.
textByHashes.2611d664e200c60dbc1cc821aaf1567ecc88df3d: I don't know, that sounds like a lot of work.
textByHashes.cc334dadbf045458f5d6725837f16d94129bd2e9: I have some sandstone for you!
textByHashes.32c312f5305c3fa92d6f9627147dd8b513ad8d23: Why won't you take more than 32 kg of stone?
textByHashes.5c036520f5591c1ad2b3f2857d3cc68848cac081: How am I supposed to carry that? It's huge!
textByHashes.be46c3d64c03cb4ea3883660998f426369765c5d: I have this large block of sandstone you gave me...
textByHashes.cc940ce58b2febd139151be137cec804dd412eb3: I've made the base of the statue!
textByHashes.e69b6500d24b3c61a5c94a30d32fdb4609a61192: What do you want me to do now?
textByHashes.9ef1f13a0d58c4e26f90e4533bf1756dc10c9c10: I have this large block of sandstone you gave me.
textByHashes.8da709478568dc2608aeca3488cfb197933fc9e8: What do you want me to do next?
textByHashes.197a8cb15dbd2f9ae98c506456434fa6307a0a0e: I think it should have my head!
textByHashes.fc18ebd1cb10bd698c68db92f54e4b8a350ff790: So I can't put my head on the statue?
textByHashes.ef188c18648eac56518338c7bc0ec4b37f2b8a97: I think it should have your head.
textByHashes.b5d32e9651e5b32f5aff29e9af09d677fe001b80: I think it should have a god's head.
textByHashes.79101c7eaed83347b112ec5bbbf937ed7a9ff88f: Whose head do you think I should make?
textByHashes.fe97f1d8f94e890d4af523e450ad67493c05fcd3: I'll use Zamorak's head for the statue.
textByHashes.936ee76530ad39f56886d28c71c96ae9b50e7795: I'll use Icthlarin's head for the statue.
textByHashes.7b017da5915352e5cc3eb88bc3ffcbe80f88fcd9: Er, no. I just thought it would be funny.
textByHashes.faf3589f3234d67e9cf58d8c7cb2c21ef956c741: You know, I've done something like this before.
textByHashes.e59a2c5ad637878a80687cc921871820220231d6: I had to help rebuild a statue in the city of Keldagrim, and then choose whose head should be placed on the top!
textByHashes.6ede52623b068ef7d8011999e93b53fd797992a3: Can I use the head I chose for that statue on yours?
textByHashes.7098a77ce6b3936ca4214bf1cfcac47c2a549a34: Hmm. Which head did I decide to use for the statue?
textByHashes.466955789ba973f53827b2dec343a612e7ac7d79: Was it supposed to look like that?
textByHashes.98b13a5f78f164d91197a3be688d0624870dac2f: I have a head for the statue, but...
textByHashes.e37f7e3c5839615f0c738923ace4c464c7c4d1af: I'm not sure it's the right one.
textByHashes.5d92d5fb8cd3b95fbae0f92bed12f3aba02d5899: I'm sorry, I'll remember next time.
textByHashes.3ca16cf80ccf2f12ee36edda01587b7b99db1cf0: No, I'll stay with the one I chose first.
textByHashes.20f48944595f073f726bdb982296e39ec8952af8: Yes, I'd like to change my choice.
textByHashes.d49580197b0156526029bed58f8d467ac6160ba7: But I thought that was what he looked like.
textByHashes.45ae889441a298a61772e4385041dcfda73db8d0: I know what I'm doing, honest...
textByHashes.2803853a0c5c865e851d9d9e67001d60bdc6c147: Ow... Lazim has some explaining to do!
textByHashes.be9b8ce5f3ff3172b52d224c1b8a98373d3319e5: We just fell through the ground into some weird temple!
textByHashes.21efe5933d087948ec3b601d15ac7113cc442d81: I don't think you really are a sculptor. What are you looking for in this temple?
textByHashes.88494753d8344131b83d738df8bfe94a23ad66ff: That sounds better. So, where's the treasure?
textByHashes.2ba6101d50e815fcb9d939036730ed5f3d98b80d: How do I get further into the temple?
textByHashes.41d280004ff98f23115c7a63fb06576279854975: Do you know where the statue's head is?
textByHashes.7a6fb11a55bc00d2e69e0c9d097e3e0b7ffa65af: Could you make these stone limbs easier to carry?
textByHashes.3c97f076645d91a40a063f663b45ffbf73e4a979: They're really heavy, and they weigh me down.
textByHashes.77a32f32ae7c02f4cd9daf9bfe9082e04bb22f4d: I mislaid the statue's right arm.
textByHashes.1821b370c80646edc8d4930aa0328db589efd097: I can't find the statue's left arm.
textByHashes.bf1eeeaceb99901e166e16339dcb35f9e828f4d8: Er... I don't know where I put the statue's left leg.
textByHashes.135bb197a8e0b4241a657701da5cf2ff9a3bd125: I lost the statue's right leg.
textByHashes.edcaa3fbcbdbb1b4ee757b031be04f645f5e56a3: Can you help me with this pedestal I've found?
textByHashes.c871ac6c824a2619c4fd7d551bd6eb6f6b15ed31: It's on the floor above this. It looks sort of important.
textByHashes.1d5f4379fae45e618ac4b9d6f0706fe54fe193d6: Now that you mention it, it did...
textByHashes.2ca4abf40ad517bf78150468610d596634b946ed: Yes, and I tried using the statue's head with it...
textByHashes.4205100f0612d112c1ca91ba5be0c2096eb19b5c: Are you sure that will work?
textByHashes.07495fcd4a599a72719a013480058345b0b0da64: I saw some really strange visions. Everything went grey...
textByHashes.ef631fc308f288623772f8ca81429e80a55acec8: So, are we at the top of the temple now?
textByHashes.6215406b2e1808c156d072686ebccf3b50149c16: Hah, that's easy. Treasure, here I come!
textByHashes.7c4ee19822f9907ca594de5fc5be3a8bc48b6a3d: Is there any other way to get upstairs?
textByHashes.8ebb7f76a4f714b90eed0b0202952d75e6903a3a: How will I know when I've solved them?
textByHashes.1cf30cf130e44aae35217c6b2e77903790a552c2: I have no idea what you're talking about, but I'm just as human as you are.
textByHashes.0c6006ec70248fba7d4ec8a337bcab9e1b0ea50d: Look, I'm not going to hurt you!
textByHashes.da20910594396294e70ef1c0934f9061e6d1e21c: I've got some food you can have. It's quite tasty.
textByHashes.95ffd0e3d41d5614ce3d7d47932f48314c91a685: Here, try this. It should fill you up.
textByHashes.9f402a265163d9c9c8048d38d92b37ed69bfdc95: Have some of this food. It's really good, I promise!
textByHashes.07de9d0cac9fd7879b81412e4fc216dba973fba6: Tell me about the room with the furnace.
textByHashes.a796e2f40402a5213a57f49d26c5e99cf362b44b: Tell me about the dark room.
textByHashes.9321d56a7c31a6ce1fa00cbec9dac5dc77831ea0: It's okay, I don't need any help.
textByHashes.046e2bba7b3d5619102e6b2eb1e09267a4955d9e: I didn't do anything to deserve it!
textByHashes.4cfc65a63b2842b2faf6126ab94cc0483f0d49fe: Who's trapped you in this form?
textByHashes.9b2faead9a2e18d133bcbf07e267b9a4631b540f: Yes, I understand, but who is 'she'?
textByHashes.2e7dd58fae479c8b9dcccdab19d60a8bb9040cc9: Of course, I'll help you out. But first of all, do you have any treasure?
textByHashes.80715b7c9ad151e3de71af3929fda991a56fe8f5: That's good enough for me. What do I have to do?
textByHashes.79a1f7a8be329a47a1ccd2f5891dc1ea05e03d7a: Where do I get the stone?
textByHashes.c03205e9b4e16ba4df7eb20a1af48fee15fa909e: How do I build the wall?
textByHashes.aa0dfcfcc6b7293755cb3650282d5338507a8a4d: Could you tell me more about Enakhra?
textByHashes.ffc963a384f9ee1327e780f16e7b5b0911a87936: Could you tell me more about yourself?
textByHashes.bc56bb4656c1399dd1b56c13f1e0a999b5868769: If you're talking about Akthanakos, then yes!
textByHashes.9bad09f7c9707e7a21bc7ed5157d8d71da8d3eeb: Er, no. But if you hate him so much, I suppose he doesn't support Zamorak...
textByHashes.72d82750e1b8d284ba46dfcf042ca370724e1430: There doesn't seem to be any treasure there.
textByHashes.551854c020520dca0f033232e2d5979101fd833d: Hmm... the big skeleton promised to give me something if I helped him.
textByHashes.d6e30a32efa3b1e769d90dde0ab2828019e0fca6: Wow. Er, what does it do?
textByHashes.8954f6665a6b5525f4553c5413e6802a1b75eb70: What? What about that treasure you were looking for?
textByHashes.67b5f5fb5777af42fc1b207fbf44098342907654: Ooh, you're a mage? Can you teach me any spells?
textByHashes.7a88ed4a0b9e0e6b7e5f11816486bcb3f07d58c2: You're not very nice, are you?
textByHashes.75066432301c6b0fcecbfb3de3d25630a2dcda91: That's not very nice of you.
textByHashes.916b2de689b96212acf7e8494a6c2725d5498613: I've lost the amulet that Akthanakos gave me.
textByHashes.1a59e895bd4c106c0b9839f241bc22f15f1c6bf9: Suit yourself. At least I got a nice amulet for my trouble.
textByHashes.0b5281abf711ba0d68fd91046aca64045259b219: No, I don't have it on me at the moment. I must have stored it somewhere.
textByHashes.d28dfa9bea9f530e08199b26874641a6cefdba3c: Why do you need so much money for it?
textByHashes.34f39b84bcb0ed994203c4212589ac24234a8645: Right. Well, I haven't got that kind of money on me.
textByHashes.dfa211ac8bc5649583e3749abf3950e32e760ae6: Balloo-what? I thought only monks lived on Entrana.
textByHashes.7f64a22bcb7c2f57dd8973377be00def636c9ab0: And go where no man has gone before?
textByHashes.9027b603b7574facbe3f3df35b5fd4270734bd9b: Why not take the boat then?
textByHashes.82ff8de2ee9a65b7fc00d9ca493099f75e2d508f: Whoa, ok, no ocean. How exactly are you going to get off the island, then?
textByHashes.0251b3ca554dc59dc21987c243b280eac56666f6: Wait, I still don't know exactly what we're doing.
textByHashes.04562871abdd4d0ad19cbe915deb8a968e01a063: How exactly do you plan to get to Taverley in that? How will it work?
textByHashes.5beab453eea25cb3159e892fa4fc3337aae8863c: You seem pretty confident about this. Have you tested it?
textByHashes.755f5d37ef69f73629ec133f2b92f40ffbc92675: What am I supposed to do with all of that junk?
textByHashes.f11d8c592386f8b12008b60543b6bda00ebf5850: Where do I get all this stuff?
textByHashes.973fae54106c0fe9059f706102b4367efa21f27b: Err, no. I can't see that kind of detail.
textByHashes.ebb445437add898215f5fec39971253618b2a424: How do you make the origami balloon?
textByHashes.a63083564e5f89a62e44f29c8dd3284361bdd91c: What do I need to get again?
textByHashes.585f5829f5d723d7875d7ec8895fbe551bfe1d0c: Did you not see the burning?
textByHashes.d36d519b30ff8112b607706a18ee68d74e231100: Well, that went down like a lead balloon.
textByHashes.a29cc5f230c0811cf8821d1dfd6e4d5f46f070b7: Those peasants...where did they come from?
textByHashes.a608013966ce827b20ceb90a1feeb69ad4310f3f: Was I the ONLY one who saw them burning? BURNING???
textByHashes.538ddb6e481afd1d6a549886d5c16f7147f6630f: Yes, I want to give you some items.
textByHashes.92857b4c06956fb7e1b40dcab477f1913fb5aa3c: I'm having some trouble finding some of the items.
textByHashes.b35b917ef4033c3409e9753675b3c1465a18ef87: I have lost my willow sapling. Can I buy a replacement?
textByHashes.c1eca96fed8f2e6571018dc1440a51c39d96d59c: Wait; tell me what we're doing.
textByHashes.92e85c52294a419460dbb6a123b37fe2c1285e2b: WHAT!? This is your balloon! Why aren't you going to pilot it? And what do you mean 'survive'? You never said anything about me flying this bird!
textByHashes.e6e21adfee17fd8c93f87c204256d43336f15daa: Fine, I will. So how do I control the balloon?
textByHashes.54a0d68935bb9e4a993c417510ba0dcd223c1daa: And here, I thought all the legwork was done. Fine, I'll bring a tinderbox.
textByHashes.fb57b62a01d2a49777591b27d350c79bb814e489: Contemplative? Concerned for your life? Desperate?
textByHashes.fafab2bf3455585e2861e330008741c9e176f7a7: How are you going to get back? What about the balloon?
textByHashes.86b68e8e705e2150b7968c4ba66b4ab72c103898: So what now? How will we get the balloon back?
textByHashes.f189adb079cc0df3c397e91535453d2ae021d0cd: The crash must have really sent us off course; I'm near Falador!
textByHashes.80b07938566170372e5a25e4f67c19b0f8254da5: So what are you going to do now?
textByHashes.d93a9611737aa1da120315819c1ee6a5c4b8d55b: Could you tell me how to make an origami balloon?
textByHashes.178f61cf6223cab69391b975c2ca161e537f091c: Aha, sounds like a quest. I'll help.
textByHashes.c6cb6c3b810efc182eb43e5d630433657b831d26: Ok, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.8110fae1c0375483d33b922e890447ce8c5e0582: No, I'm looking for something to kill.
textByHashes.affb12652790f0c9208b5c13bbae67fc9742eb1a: I'm looking for a guy called Ernest.
textByHashes.d76aa5e293bfd3baf825d75d3cad00c0abba30ca: So you know where he is then?
textByHashes.7276022f6b057242a720d4b34277a986cd1765be: Ernest is a chicken...? Are you sure?
textByHashes.fb29eea0bd204134022bb7ce590b5c8c9d6903ba: I'm glad Veronica didn't actually get engaged to a chicken.
textByHashes.375b9db99d2dded024a6020d7e64e86c83383d0e: Ernest's fiancee. She probably doesn't want to marry a chicken.
textByHashes.e0dd2e160bb359b0a3fe57a766e21112cced25a0: I think you'd better change him back.
textByHashes.270f6c9eb000e29591b5bf9e78bd36f44529ac62: Well I can look for them.
textByHashes.bbb1320556a63cc8c2792aca7018de2ce64fabaa: No no, he's been turned into an actual chicken by a mad scientist.
textByHashes.ecabda89e44f9a39f57a9be27306d33239615022: Well I'm doing my best to turn him back.
textByHashes.ef3667b98e714988c174486f463fac4bc2041b53: I'm afraid I don't have any of them yet!
textByHashes.b09b0a03705e2fb2b42c1196dfaed74311e88f97: There seems to be a pressure gauge in here...
textByHashes.7bbae00bba11bcd114aa7f3efd38b3e13de70558: ... and a lot of piranhas! I can't get the gauge out.
textByHashes.5bbec322619aac3c5d0110bffc67a50d723dee1f: ... and a lot of dead fish.
textByHashes.466d92684cee3f12eecd6cd9978067c7226d2c54: I don't think I want to use that water any more.
textByHashes.879435e4db063e7a4e091a9ceb2cb07e46c993ea: I've only got the rubber tube so far.
textByHashes.3d888962467032bdb02c3ce1f7f28f8c321c9707: Ok, I'll go and look for them.
textByHashes.67e4570e026822448bae03f1eb0024ca6f9cec35: I've only got the pressure gauge so far.
textByHashes.2ddcbdc258d44806633158b5bb474dbe6174d508: I've only got the oil can so far.
textByHashes.0192c84ece9a00677eccc9feaed6374aa493f9fa: I've got the rubber tube and the pressure gauge.
textByHashes.34485fbf8d7b8d7325bb6d9cfeb0490fca70c848: Ok, I'll go and look for it.
textByHashes.e67fdde8f3141f1a0707e7ef5c5b3b0e5f914220: I've got the oil can and the rubber tube.
textByHashes.eb8a0df87b0b975357a909b54386a1f513189c97: I've got the oil can and the pressure gauge.
textByHashes.b3c3dbc3944206abd68d351b435392dc08068751: Well a cash reward is always nice...
textByHashes.520d0e6b81a3d96580f5a4f80a697daba4d15c91: A high price? That'll be nice for whoever can figure it out...
textByHashes.2a5b2f5ceaac93e939bb26bd09cd57b1c43b82f0: A high price? I guess I am somewhat of an expert on finding things for museums...
textByHashes.95bcf5f0a418c916ab073a7c59b0cd4baf42f3ba: Maybe I should talk to the curator to find out some more.
textByHashes.599d6e67b04dbc5e1b32cbc880f37e8694ca024a: But this will have to be a job for another time.
textByHashes.b689c4211a8b7da38afefc9097713ffd4aa09116: Could you tell me more about that empty display?
textByHashes.8eba91e4ae3e0b61b94e711437c91b6b3bec9a21: I'm afraid not, but maybe I can help find it? I have managed to return stolen property to museums in the past.
textByHashes.0619ad6246f84abad59b3acb796510cf1f6c42b8: I'll do that. Hopefully I can find something!
textByHashes.c3f0d7dc42dfc7ed367c02ed6378eab9d656efa6: Not so well. I've not made much progress yet.
textByHashes.302c2f2f94e0bcc6b8fc6651fbbc2fcb4fa67459: Apparently someone was acting a bit odd around here recently. They left and headed towards the quetzals.
textByHashes.0212e4728c757a4f7b5f85dca2ad8f01894d7d7a: Well, it's looking like it could be quite the journey... I'll keep you updated!
textByHashes.c6107633f2b5c694b2c427a9cadafb544930d7a8: I just know I've almost got it! We'll have the diadem back in no time!
textByHashes.9874e3ec5782904ae935e0f48b95bc7264fdf644: I don't think I'm going to find much more just lying around... Maybe I should try asking if anyone nearby saw anything.
textByHashes.4e35c5ae1c5aab316cb69341976b92bfcb8b7cac: I was wondering if you'd seen anything unusual around the museum lately?
textByHashes.28431f8d8975e39d4e601a1627e5ee224027911a: That's a shame. Well, thanks for your help.
textByHashes.bf04122743eb9af653f536182c5e0b91ae51f1d0: I'm looking into the missing diadem display.
textByHashes.368a5cbc762811712c0a9e83f3d7aba7f56c03de: You did? Do you know where they went?
textByHashes.3b2cc9ca5fccc7db47e67ea3e0b66099d674ffd0: Ah that'll be the quetzals. Thanks!
textByHashes.0cfc168587882e231524acd8a059392a8c2e998d: Have you seen anybody suspicious around?
textByHashes.31823a864694a54df0d8acb95fb0c378d4c57c2b: Maybe someone carrying something out of the museum, perhaps?
textByHashes.8a525ec88a45f4decfa5f11c0c1e0f06698dff15: He asked if he could have a go with your bird?
textByHashes.28fdc67c10475e7640b3f2e55cc0bcf8581e5775: To the Cothon... Okay, I guess I'll go and see if I can find some more leads there. Thanks for the help!
textByHashes.48d232e83e8ed02d8138c5aff0b817fd1fd6a3e0: Ah, yes. Thanks for the help!
textByHashes.38c437afb49117d977aeb5fd21d2d92ce77f79d7: Have you seen a man with a case?
textByHashes.5f7303037cc332634402f6da182e9257e7f63ba6: Well, I'm looking for something and I think he might have it...
textByHashes.40b913700407efff8b7b8a75f72f24315cfca6ac: As long as it is just the one favour...
textByHashes.a6159597af0d601b3d7436c9dfee40a6f104af81: I suppose I can help with that.
textByHashes.661ee9b3d53b08c258b143324e668411c840a0c0: Actually, I might need to make some space before I can take them.
textByHashes.2bdacdeb594bfd076fa5012a769dc3f2707baa86: So, about that man with the case.
textByHashes.50540f02b0bdfb5117b2ebba949043bd7f3bfe02: Where was it that I should get them fixed?
textByHashes.85c47570c93104c3419f5f9125ca857c6b1b3cff: I am, but I may have misplaced them...
textByHashes.d03377ae33a235ee09f583a994ee87d6eca703dc: I am, but I think I might need to make some space before I can take them.
textByHashes.494c5e378fdee5ffa5412bafc140445b0342d39f: I am. Could I grab them now?
textByHashes.4ba9c809f011c042d33e723d0c93166b40e8804f: I was hoping for some help.
textByHashes.dfb8a74fe29ec6bba3984e90bc96509a3b8f0f98: I've got these sails that need fixing up for the charter ship in the Cothon. The crew thought you could help.
textByHashes.8a8e560de4e437d5b62b4c131c91c8e8751ab6df: Oh, what a relief! I will be sure to pass on the message when I get back there.
textByHashes.099cfa40afe186b69a8b12f55f8d3c2ec1b1e604: You did, but then I lost them.
textByHashes.d0a973772911eeb17c452edae1d7edf37e14f6cb: Luckily I do. Here you go.
textByHashes.d868ff68b3c035e7323b642cadd1ed86082038f8: Oh, and Artima said thanks for the latest shipment.
textByHashes.e55263ee63adbcdf75a29b090ed489994edf7a69: And then what? Where did he go?
textByHashes.9c16daa889abb9289f354b6ce75cb9f02b9174b4: Have you seen a grey-haired man with a case?
textByHashes.4cf8a8515ffad1d7308db6ea7d0e5a4a690eb44d: That's right! Do you know where he went?
textByHashes.53952608c1cdab1e3f075d3c4349f698b378a4e6: I see... Thanks for the help!
textByHashes.7aa9fe36a75f2aa293af79ae34e146a8da732011: Let me guess, he asked if he could have a go with your runes?
textByHashes.4892ff1755988f7c0613a1abeda55b943c904f9f: Have you got any idea what runes he was looking for?
textByHashes.ccbc77b20bd3ed784617763ea1e1aa1fb2c245e6: Oh... I'd better free up some space first.
textByHashes.f3fd02776e17d99b966985acdaa680bc03d5aecc: Do you have any idea what he was hoping to do with the runes?
textByHashes.636986f2615dbaf1b8c027dffd6648df5564ed1a: Could I take another look at them?
textByHashes.67d88128ce8f04a8c1bb3913f539462e3d97bfdf: I managed to decipher those notes.
textByHashes.bab8bf9e59f692fae8f67c4bddf647d7b085aad5: It seems like he was trying to find the runes for the Varrock teleport spell.
textByHashes.42d610fb571043f770c4edd1d17ef16bcd243583: Well, it's missing from the Grand Museum in Fortis. I was hoping to try and find it...
textByHashes.729adaa87cd39c16f5323793496fd2c4cbc0d19f: Well what do we have here? I wonder what our local curator has to say about this...
textByHashes.7c61fa7b14212d74c41c82ab2bb91ca081381ad0: Do you know where I found it?
textByHashes.32af482bafa6c4964770d2b2f5221fe6f2ed8829: You can't just steal artefacts and claim them as your own for the museum!
textByHashes.1ec80f173605235ae10d6c67c32049fd6909a8ee: The other museums will never trust you again!
textByHashes.eb6cc9e1d62ef083c6661abc33a79b7fe2c9e288: How would you feel if someone came in here and stole all your stuff?
textByHashes.020e8b8f1e8b5fedb85e603209122bdd7c12286b: What if Varlamore finds out what you've done?
textByHashes.a1ed64d33707d2295288321dc0eb5935c8a3f13c: How do you sleep at night?
textByHashes.2c778ccd70ceaf84f62c34393836c655bd70500f: I thought archaeology was cool. I didn't realise it was just thieving!
textByHashes.a5d57ca780975be396749a00005a049d82851267: You should be ashamed of yourself.
textByHashes.d5cdacbf30512ded645324070356ef709bf4416c: A real historian would never steal!
textByHashes.a38763de2361e1016759aebf0c38a642b81c28a1: If you're looking for stolen goods, I can get my hands on plenty.
textByHashes.c24e8ab04fceddb1703909c1593930806b382f31: Do your colleagues know what you've done? What do they think?
textByHashes.ce9eee1ca184e76c30e22efc45f677a7eeb8ec6c: So can anyone just go around stealing and call it archaeology?
textByHashes.ad49ccd4af838cb8ac8a134a5cd5b26c3753e6d5: You're supposed to protect history, not steal it!
textByHashes.75661484c41cd805df0ed02d285bff5249cfae7f: Nobody wants to see stolen goods on display!
textByHashes.69a05c2f8a9a0490342ab1cabd35831d4550dd04: You should give Varlamore a chance before stealing their stuff.
textByHashes.602f68f654b521668141d409f39add0b978c5c52: Do you even have room to display this artefact?
textByHashes.5e1e0c510f38ed46224531dfd803bc2ee1652080: Don't you have enough artefacts of your own?
textByHashes.f0257c4da1fce8b0419487557e253cb121dc55b9: Do you really think you did the right thing?
textByHashes.45b65280fcea0f9473b3ed704e3398f331060cdf: Did you know Varlamore sends thieves to the Colosseum?
textByHashes.6a0410b3132a47022f59c8b07b5af73a930f46c9: What if I came into your house and stole your stuff?
textByHashes.2de87fe3340886d06879e29db909c0f5d7f0a3cd: How will Varlamorians learn their history now?
textByHashes.f8f2fb8bcbd1fd503258c8bc9343a7136eb8693a: Varlamore might never let you and your colleagues visit again!
textByHashes.17a271144572830d8cefb83c79241b0e90b8cebb: You should return all these artefacts. It's the only right thing to do.
textByHashes.536b83b63bd5d63f24a8476f25f86cbbd5747f78: You're a disgrace to your entire profession!
textByHashes.8b6330901c6d6a31fdfcf8c28a305eef4e96c372: Varlamore might close their lands again after this.
textByHashes.c748572d8afd773e3e56b5aa9f397314c3a7e761: How do you explain the other stolen artefacts you have in storage?
textByHashes.cb922bec8e2fb86c6516d6c2d5af19df4ecb026d: You could have damaged the artefact!
textByHashes.9c789de1197f5df7ff2cf982aebe9e5b878371e4: Why don't you just cooperate with Varlamore?
textByHashes.7b56c2754f3e42a2a153617b36ee8af6803248c1: Why should you get to decide who gets to keep their artefacts?
textByHashes.28b3b746eef212a516c78d4ac09f31a613fdbf30: Is everything here stolen from other museums?
textByHashes.b08e32bccd9d6b62ccf787dd6203f4571d23d9f1: You can't justify theft by saying it's for preservation.
textByHashes.1970557611d535311d281abff184754226edc92a: You're not above the law! You stole this stuff!
textByHashes.fd1a46a4223d37099f24a8bd3a2464179387c697: What makes you think you know better?
textByHashes.5421e0986dd4a3b4f3bdba94627681008ebd0393: What if it's cursed?! It could be dangerous!
textByHashes.a26fc9b33843b15896372292800f21787c107aa7: Stealing is stealing, no matter how you try to justify it.
textByHashes.6bdf19d862e78959434628fc491416c922a16f6c: Is the artefact really safer here?
textByHashes.dd19cbb5c2cb77948d72d56b1de451f90e0b79ef: Look me in the eye and tell me you did the right thing.
textByHashes.31969ff5b2023509f4ff0e3c2537aab2395952c1: You're hoarding artefacts, but you should be sharing them!
textByHashes.537dbf974e25d5d904749b7729d1fddb59ba3b2e: Hand that artefact back this instant!
textByHashes.6ce6489e91a8e779a88c29e6772026e77c2f2486: I guess you were just in it for the glory, were you?
textByHashes.56883f267e4fd543090c1caf2de5127c98fe0f13: This is stealing! Thieving! Taking what's not yours!
textByHashes.118890b6ac92e820e3051df3d142e8a74140c2d5: You've stolen from several other museums, too!
textByHashes.a7f668be1d70e336695ddf9012172e7387c2d127: This artefact doesn't belong to you! It belongs to Varlamore!
textByHashes.de21f790c623405ea074fbb1aa8ec9baa63937cc: Have you no respect for your colleagues in Varlamore?
textByHashes.9b5c177acc134e79910f6f7f7feead8f66957dd7: Aren't you embarrassed to have stolen items in your collection?
textByHashes.2e80b1ff4567e4a78707a2a6292443e043649903: You're nothing but a common thief!
textByHashes.e9f28a711bf7a74febe5f79902db67b8758a2c2a: This could destroy your reputation! Everyone will think you're a thief!
textByHashes.91ac089b406a573a1cc1c04ec4f76df5c40e44e6: You've betrayed the trust of Varlamore.
textByHashes.687696bad0ed1fa5d123903744d8f78ff7ce54f3: Are you even a real historian, or just a petty criminal?
textByHashes.840559531e605fda69fd4648a9fad0205f1bee65: You don't even have room to display it! It's just sitting in storage!
textByHashes.c669724bb7932395a6bb8cc046132ecc71dc9a9f: You're not preserving anything. You're just a thief.
textByHashes.dff5022747a006932b157bb0c6029d20dd36c230: Think of the Varlamorian children who won't get to see this artefact.
textByHashes.738cb88fe83829f9f12a545f661ae19cd56a124e: You can't just keep claiming these stolen goods as your own!
textByHashes.3be778b6e5c2306cbbaeb539dc6fe93cb683cbb1: What do you mean? How did you come into possession of Xerna's Diadem? I've heard all about your travels back here with it.
textByHashes.17aa15e21122b27f197478b01608e71e7cf0d2e0: You can't just be taking these things as your own!
textByHashes.fe753e1f7ccf274f78cb0d0d4fb96700d118059d: I'll do you a deal. If you arrange for the safe delivery of the diadem back to the Grand Museum, I'll let them know it's taken care of without mentioning your name.
textByHashes.78ca02ba9f7b4ed8ebd573008fc0e089053b5bbc: Thank you. I'll head over there and let them know.
textByHashes.7a70d6ce5e46d872054d6d53d9f0f9b49ce3e1fa: Well, it turned out to be quite the saga, but I found it! Xerna's Diadem is on its way back here, as we speak.
textByHashes.f522d083689977637c36defae0facbad1bcd4401: It was a little far away... But we'll save that story for another day.
textByHashes.a26e0d53473f7abb2556151c25b375060ad507fe: Oh yes, I better make some space for it.
textByHashes.e62f94b7de0f57b0f407af92822e094f6f986998: Me? No, I'm afraid you must have me confused with somebody else!
textByHashes.ae786a4395b549ecaa35f860901aeb024acf5bc3: So tell me about your problems.
textByHashes.2c2c1fd595afecb29c0fc53e5b3de20462bd3513: Um, you seem to be getting side-tracked already.
textByHashes.a008cf1ab2c46da37a737170ede1c874c896cdbb: You're not making much sense. Who's Mister Lincoln?
textByHashes.cfde756b3f8d5cf818756fa22390e76faa2d32b5: So what do you want me to do?
textByHashes.51786588ffa66db32dab86108e05d36a7629acb1: Do you have any ideas where I should start?
textByHashes.a1491a2b7b850e2d1618e55ea72b5fa85c5c8a34: This doesn't sound like something I can help with. Good luck.
textByHashes.3edae4cc6cb4444023ccfb83c29590146867c5b1: Oh, nothing. Don't worry about it.
textByHashes.4a8b14a61f717426e71909dc1ce80bde81a5328b: Sorry, I have better things to do.
textByHashes.908ef071d63f1d25d04483cf6c01278422280530: No, nothing. My mind is made up.
textByHashes.a2f74bb4cd5e22aa615e88aae52f37ed3bed6a17: No, I haven't had a chance yet.
textByHashes.43b7da9b890a799c34617d97eb8c7b0c12d603e3: Are you a member of the Group of Advanced Gardeners?
textByHashes.3945c9466d3b0b2f2c4b822350f19504de3572a0: Martin has asked me to investigate why all the crops are failing.
textByHashes.c645efcef27afb8a14ebacc1f850e4a540aed07b: I've spoken to one of your members and they reckon that it's the lack of rain that we've had recently.
textByHashes.43a02b891c28607af48e04ed27e51997c9e323bb: Oh, yeah. I hadn't thought of that.
textByHashes.088512092977a9a6d4894a6efc6e0fe251fecb94: Insects! You need to get rid of the insects! They're eating the crops.
textByHashes.891184885a81f5b87ca9a060846f89ff83d43e4c: But...but...they're not my friends! I've never even spoken to most of them!
textByHashes.cab17c82b0abaadbc853f80714c94462568a9e5e: No, I mean yes. There is a heroes guild, but ...!
textByHashes.ca29396f88b9413486bbe308296caad9c5a22a67: One of your members is implying that the gardeners' problems are all caused by adventurers using the plots. I would like to point out that these plots are communal property and that we have as much right as anyone to
textByHashes.cdd9ce6dd16af75617be6a66d3e9b74e169388a0: I don't suppose you have any ideas about what could cause the seasons to be mixed up?
textByHashes.832ab2d323a637bed0a6b1b76086c6db08e64622: Apparently, the seasons are all mixed up. Late summers and early winters. I don't know what I can do to solve that problem, though.
textByHashes.5a05bb14f7a65580d383b657f02c33f76bee164b: You're absolutely right. Don't worry, I'll find out what the problem is.
textByHashes.87e5a8c6e1e00515227f53bd3d2c3a5bf173d9c2: Why not? They all seem to be a bunch of loonies anyway.
textByHashes.84806d5b7427915128a684eef42cefe0dcaaac3c: I've been told that it's the lack of rain, plagues of insects and recently I was told that the entire order of seasons is confused!
textByHashes.aa317b4117a6f0182c093ab42162d7f9e126756e: But they're all different, how could they all be correct?
textByHashes.cede5b77fe900f6d3324084d6da06c774f570158: Oh no! Not another crack-pot theory!
textByHashes.d0bf309b93640901a621fa2a19f9e7692e3de59a: Right, well thanks for your input. I'll think over what you said.
textByHashes.9c54a5c822308de9dada1ce65351419747bd77c3: To be honest I'm worried about the sort of person you let join your organisation.
textByHashes.bb6fb7c6b21354f6a0dd91cd9668d096f81a5be2: I've heard theories ranging from climate change to fairies from your members.
textByHashes.04bb86068a4becabc0497efdebe7d2950d310796: O-kay! You're the boss, any idea which flower I should look under to find a fairy?
textByHashes.6636a8495a95e9e121411ae4df416cd2db6e8256: Yes, I've spoken to them before.
textByHashes.6fca40ea4fdb05c96d58b6d67a63ba5d690b79e9: Who are you? Where's the Fairy Queen? What's going on here? Where's the Fairy Queen's throne gone?
textByHashes.47aa93ba98d79dd23868ddc85e9caba90356923a: Not actually a whole deal, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.dde6a3e1d2e30298f00f370d938af8f43d18627f: Thanks, I'll go see her then. Goodbye.
textByHashes.60be86c91a0ca69e84a83e992ba9e796d4575cfe: Where's the Fairy Queen's throne gone?
textByHashes.307b504d9d3ee5f3e213f62c08b1ee5306727143: I did, he said I should come and talk to you!
textByHashes.b6536c00d53e89c0b698db089cc11322ad36941b: Actually it's more a case of what I can help you with? I told the Fairy Godfather that I would help you find a cure for the Queen.
textByHashes.5f07db612dbda551919946701bf21d287777ad47: Well sort of, I couldn't really understand everything he was talking about.
textByHashes.c6298b3d5f599c8b883c9fdfc45f844f5937a95e: That doesn't sound too difficult, where will I find him.
textByHashes.71a94bbadb962509b368e7629611d5a34bdd107a: No, I'm afraid I've lost the list of symptoms you gave me.
textByHashes.25c4e589b68f8560033623ded8638b0c0eb23624: But Fairy Nuff said you would help me!
textByHashes.55578ad2592b146bd413458a51f54097a120b44f: The Fairy Queen is extremely ill. She was in a battle with a Tanglefoot and her injuries have resulted in her being in a coma.
textByHashes.b0863d15aec779e6df108c84b953d5aca2bbf08f: Fairy Nuff gave me a list of her symptoms. Here, have a look at it.
textByHashes.6c940432abc3b0c1220b3b54e2849e0954df0506: You do? That's great! What is it?
textByHashes.b3621fec7579defde23d9831d1c45cdad6faa44f: Yes, but about the Fairy Queen?
textByHashes.01015393868302b86a502fe978b21351ff6209d2: So I guess I need to go and kill this Tanglefoot and get back her magic essence if I am to help her?
textByHashes.5e6af5b472f562bbf037f9d7e85b4e4446411d93: Malignus Mortifer. Any idea where I can find him?
textByHashes.5bcfb8638d05b583dfdb56c87773ba26da2d3d6e: Fairy Nuff gave me a list of her symptoms, but I don't have it with me.
textByHashes.88028eb35685b330982de7a23937af0fb3243400: I need help with fighting a Tanglefoot. Can you help me?
textByHashes.ace7761409f53eb51771062aed01b110f41d4849: Great, thanks. I was told by Zandar Horfyre that you fought one once.
textByHashes.aff6943c4905bdf3694dd40b819764ec20ac9dca: That's great! I presume you won as you are here to tell me about it, could you tell me how to defeat one, please?
textByHashes.f7781178b725e6efbc68785afc0fb1630932e161: There is a Tanglefoot in the lost city of Zanaris and I have been asked to kill it.
textByHashes.7de60ae086745cf61a5dbf74bea8959575bd020b: What exactly did you have in mind?
textByHashes.8e74a53fe1b10230262f7134bae7797ab36ea809: Actually I have it right here.
textByHashes.8371e739a85d3631088423bad5433cdf9a324803: Where can I get a pair of these enchanted secateurs?
textByHashes.3a453c1b5c4e992b312da79491fff8bc47130b5f: Phasma Phasmatis Natura. Got it! Is that all?
textByHashes.50db9d6704074c4423e267a98be056a9a20071c2: I'll go and get it then.
textByHashes.c21f62a235510eb2af35cf86f4fb7453a578ce54: I was asking you about fighting a Tanglefoot...
textByHashes.e2930fc47b477ac6d97e6df27119e647b9b721c6: Could you tell me how to kill a Tanglefoot again, please?
textByHashes.b15af5d137a72d6565a1e081d724dc561bd39d43: What did I need to take to the Nature Spirit again?
textByHashes.68050fc594228c34301dc7b9d6343cda293cb039: Thank you! I need your help in enchanting a pair of secateurs.
textByHashes.2d661ad0c4e6c792400e4d53a773b99eff9b4b0e: Sure. A Tanglefoot has invaded the fairy kingdom of Zanaris and the only way I can fight it is with a pair of enchanted secateurs, apparently.
textByHashes.d4d2a0b03d8e2426498e26ee25ee751b4d5397a5: Yes, I have everything right here.
textByHashes.0d2b9da651ed48284ad28967ddee717eaf1ed21a: No, I still need to collect some things.
textByHashes.029e96ce5f6bb17bb57dae47b6f7bc55ddd7c6f4: I'm glad you're here. I'm afraid I've lost the secateurs you enchanted for me.
textByHashes.a6e96e790899adc367148a8cc21eb41286352608: What are you doing all the way over here? Shouldn't you be at the market door?
textByHashes.a2584774a32023abb4e48055ea021a5cb630e3f2: I did it! I've got the Fairy Queens' enchanted secateurs!
textByHashes.4c731d7004e32ff5bc33fe3bcb9e535bb7a8b9b7: You needn't have worried I managed to kill it!
textByHashes.ed4856da1c7f9fdf2f5f418b9e6cc68abc3aa232: I retrieved this pair of Enchanted secateurs, I think they must contain the Queen's missing magic.
textByHashes.5050a878da0c0fc9359a81b39de30b3cd7c1e4f4: I've solved your problems! I've returned the Fairy Queen's magical essence!
textByHashes.a4823e1259bd0cc94eca9fb43523a7ebe211c2b8: The Fairy Queen was in an enchanted deep sleep, because the Tanglefoot had taken the secateurs that contained her magic. I fought and killed the Tanglefoot and have given the Godfather the Fairy Queen's secateurs. She'll
textByHashes.101778369c0a14c286f8629b7b902359960296aa: wake up now and everything will get back to normal.
textByHashes.22ee65c460734142bca88bf3572ea0e8a43f05c7: I guess it does sound rather far-fetched. Ok, I'll come back and see you after your crops have had a chance to grow.
textByHashes.0a478b5ab712a88985d6387dfe8f483ac63c6b5c: So, have your vegetables grown yet?
textByHashes.837d256d861fc79d7e62808ec185ba0db47072e1: Hello Martin, you must be the slowest gardener in the world! I don't suppose those crops have grown yet?
textByHashes.93055cff1a7c3da37b4eb4c8fff8a4a5980e8555: What? What are you talking about?
textByHashes.412f9c3483a8c97f5bc5f09ceffe05c7c97fc550: But I gave the Fairy Queen's secateurs back to the Godfather, things should be growing again.
textByHashes.bf865ec7f1b085756cfb9ee08cc27c8cfc7ea36c: I suppose I'd better go and see what the problem is then.
textByHashes.01f4d0d4ee5fba079859c759d8e6e7b5c12cd74d: I've done enough for you, sort it out yourself!
textByHashes.3ec90dba9d2d934602f464957e5ffdb7e9812094: Don't worry, I'm working on it.
textByHashes.314bdcba412eee41684e3deb3dae63af968455c1: Godfather! Where is the Fairy Queen?
textByHashes.a6cd110b1614261698d24ca823f1c5b8633f4bf3: I've just been to Fairy Nuff's cave and when I got there I found it ransacked! Everything has been broken and the Fairy Queen and Fairy Nuff are missing!
textByHashes.8b41c576a02cb88fd2364ef3243f080b80d86fe9: Calm down! Let's think this through carefully.
textByHashes.d725b19dc27fdfafa8b31748fd30352809290688: Do you have any idea who could have done this?
textByHashes.4b98fb8a0aec0958b2efa319d24275e606f5cb6d: Where could she have been taken to?
textByHashes.4be2df0a55836fc7d6d03b688220e0db09833655: Well tell me what to do and I'll go myself.
textByHashes.edc4c55b292fe76cc4275219dc50d9c2150e8dba: Where have all the fairies gone?
textByHashes.9dbedf62f3fd81dc8db915306ff929c9f4dc312d: I am not signing this! It says I am indebted to you until you release me!
textByHashes.6e54cb1681ea40ea5757ab74d3399303558c0bac: No, there's no chance of that happening.
textByHashes.b9341eb78a28bada32aae9015e5faf6a2c636c39: Hi, the Godfather said I should ask you to explain how the fairy rings work.
textByHashes.941575ada90052c038471ab94a3d6be31cfadd42: Why are you carrying that toolbox?
textByHashes.16f24864c497968f41c265415decb2db7e8c08f0: Uh, right. So is it safe to use the fairy rings then?
textByHashes.0d8bf204eb8c6c96c56cc38e7d287546cfebc2d9: Do you know what these strange marks mean?
textByHashes.c3553d46502ea576ed1323eb5e5871911ac67ec7: But why would the Godfather do this?
textByHashes.ca5e24c8502d89f44534e4542b919ccd137a8783: So what should we do about it do you think?
textByHashes.266b9c0a48ae4cdd3aa32d00239c63ec48448d56: I'm sorry, but who are you?
textByHashes.e0fea7c1b2c30c5b200b582252d28b9d38f41330: But that was a mistake! I thought he was trying to help the Fairy Queen!
textByHashes.7c47350802a861f6e00191935f5b380888bcc4de: Alright, what do I need to do?
textByHashes.474d6c3f2358bb68a37eaaf3c5978ffe6ec55519: That's easy I'll just pickpocket them off of him, I'm really good at that.
textByHashes.ba4a61a128f5846d595c640c2e2965275209cd9f: Yes, but I seem to have lost them somewhere.
textByHashes.c6757d8cffbd5be4216f174dd06746accfce157b: You should have seen me! The Godfather didn't even know I was going through his pockets! Here they are.
textByHashes.6c7af200ff64efb120c39f7e0010035144b00e13: Calm down! There's got to be something that we can do. After all, we've given her back her magical essence, right?
textByHashes.ff435c233bc48dfca9f3102ca3eb252bf9209fa1: Well that doesn't seem too bad, what do I need to do to make one?
textByHashes.644eaf0e84fbe07cb61c129b49ebbfcb3fc7b7e6: Thanks for the lecture, but where do I get one of these Star Flowers and where can I find a Gorak?
textByHashes.e1a93d63bd668fa3140ed927dc30cfaffac80433: I'm looking for a Star Flower.
textByHashes.3d60daab2f8523a4ea4fb62e1c412742b04d8679: Thanks for the lecture. Fortunately I think I know where to get all of the ingredients you need.
textByHashes.fa0c5e1fe05f7d77d1a5dd781c8a7696d4dfc68c: I haven't found a Star Flower yet.
textByHashes.83a19e2b3c67559ce48d4368a42a8aa04f60649a: I've half made it, I found a Starflower on this really wierd plane.
textByHashes.9faa193a660b6ebe2e507e39050d1cbb54379138: I've got it, I've made a potion of magic essence!
textByHashes.c82c422176ad267d933926e2ae5de67c8261dede: I'm not really sure how to tell you this, your majesty... It seems as though you've fallen foul of a clever scheme of the Godfather's...
textByHashes.4847f3a3ee4bb0cf0f249ff99114961146af4f5e: Thanks, but I don't have any space to carry it.
textByHashes.27b0f79028c7d69dbe6dcd70a3c90a871734e87b: Why would a nobleman live in a dump like this?
textByHashes.41a2560d322c6852ddbf96f463c73007e604ccc8: I'm not interested in that adventure right now.
textByHashes.1715c2dcc2ff203a379279f9f64535c2ae08e8c9: You're rich then? Can I have some money?
textByHashes.20df50af0f18fed6c9844cf3aa0fb50f3024bbc7: Hi, I am a bold adventurer.
textByHashes.ed959b019a29844f480acfef8333d30e76119bb5: Why are you so desperate for it?
textByHashes.ee2c9f5822470173234ef4862b0d394d6b162e42: Where did you say I could find your son Caleb again?
textByHashes.190a5a16a9123afebe0831d4425c7bcdf5eca679: I have been sent by your father. He wishes the Fitzharmon Crest be restored.
textByHashes.1f32e08492ea4f5153d936dbb3ed0895c945d653: Uh... what happened to the rest of it?
textByHashes.3dba1a00065cae004c4c01485fbd36c1bd590c09: So do you know where I could find any of your brothers?
textByHashes.1cc4580f0f868081ad4a0fde4ed3ad8df5eab318: So can I have your bit?
textByHashes.7073c82231e382f359e527a8a48b256a6bb28e5f: It's not really much use without the other fragments is it though?
textByHashes.40c90b0deafbb314844ea04ceaefde03c60e00fd: So what ingredients are you missing?
textByHashes.33da70acd0ef128caf7864c2ba4e040e3adea8fb: Why don't you just give me the crest?
textByHashes.6e857367bdb5961f19de48f78cd632bfc1cd045b: Nothing, I will be on my way.
textByHashes.c821864fa32cf66a912aa68ce49db127c5903ef4: I see you are a chef, will you cook me anything?
textByHashes.89d7a259feb39ac3dd92762fd95ef8d067e79095: I didn't manage to get them all yet...
textByHashes.9fe21a52d1969c8b99e14d308b026a9a3bf7148c: Where did you say I could find Avan again?
textByHashes.ff736a1dddbc3e1861cad9ac4c32e2b68aca7e28: I am still working on it.
textByHashes.b2cfdcf2b5b369c93eea24d9bd90ce31442021eb: I have lost the piece you gave me...
textByHashes.9946c1c85069eae7d4677b6a64f4976748a8fd21: I'm in search of a man named Avan Fitzharmon.
textByHashes.e7ad0ed5883779270426ca339005895804fd7672: Why are you lurking around a scorpion pit?
textByHashes.d152a4f7c674519fcb24addd30e77d02c4e0fdad: I'm looking for a man... his name is Avan Fitzharmon.
textByHashes.e147580d416d46538170de9a1f85cdc45d24fdde: You have a part of your family crest. I am on a quest to retrieve all of the fragmented pieces and restore the crest.
textByHashes.15e68f7226d7ff189d39cbb095f8ddb8fda387bd: No, it was your father who has asked me to do this for him.
textByHashes.713212dc3ad23e2a11575a45f204ed772b88f9ba: Can you give me any help on finding this 'perfect gold'?
textByHashes.7a49c2ceec442a04410d90b3f8f1761e11e0193c: Well, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.137f84d8a7fa9556289cf0bdcb0145621d8b72a5: Hello. I'm in search of very high quality gold.
textByHashes.22a752ef3ad99ff433c9e50d09e0d943cb54365f: Yeah, great, I didn't want your life story.
textByHashes.fd125cac34ffff5e32ecb39ce35072a8cb26ae9c: I have spoken to Boot the dwarf about the location of 'perfect gold' but haven't managed to make you your jewelry yet.
textByHashes.f56f01dfbdea8d6b530802e0c4eebaf921154384: I have the ring and necklace right here.
textByHashes.19b3c21f303c93f5a8ae52b5bd74c9f5360e1cae: Where did you say I could find your brother Johnathon again?
textByHashes.051b57ba61586a85c411a773d36471334818c62b: I have lost the fragment you gave me...
textByHashes.1fc85c97701f80673423bfb27a43cf3ecb945240: I have assembled all of the pieces!
textByHashes.79cd4243a038e185d00a261ee94db343c5fe2c5a: Greetings. Would you happen to be Johnathon Fitzharmon?
textByHashes.96f5ad432ff6551a39eba068d5854a6bdd4cf688: I am here to retrieve your fragment of the Fitzharmon family crest.
textByHashes.28738cde9634ea017f9eed0ed53b69619a0543b9: I've come here for your piece of the Fitzharmon family crest.
textByHashes.fed943f0982b8f3389de218774a736713f7f71e5: So is this Chronozon hard to defeat?
textByHashes.42aa5eea55e44c380a9c2a5df96664abc7a89104: So how did you end up getting poisoned?
textByHashes.6a94d282e1124a1a07f78a1fc119929d4e986119: I will be on my way now.
textByHashes.44d4ff2d3fb8974c4f890f2be9b9ef762065f419: I'm trying to kill this demon Chronozon that you mentioned...
textByHashes.799191ac22f33448e68917afc1a7c5d283f0ace3: I have your piece of the crest!
textByHashes.f22232e263e72f7d6f9f3e4f600b6c0b6d400b70: I believe your father mentioned you would be able to improve these gauntlets for me...
textByHashes.343665c8326a6bd3b3f201b1d939c1a37e17f1ac: Yes, please do that for me.
textByHashes.6d50f4f80e6e044f17d8c97dff7cc761cb68909f: I'll see what your brothers have to offer first.
textByHashes.d3ec0ed49a5e71bd481bc5d2f833487954d38621: Your father mentioned that you could improve these gauntlets in some way for me...
textByHashes.9fc0f0e8ac596ce4a320bda2ef5f04d92b2f6efe: That sounds good, improve them for me!
textByHashes.cccfb3abf779ce245ed8ccf38a4aaf506b8dfe1b: I think I'll check my other options with your brothers before committing myself.
textByHashes.f1e5d04168769d08b23383e416fc28462c59cee9: Your father tells me you can improve these gauntlets for me...
textByHashes.559eec5269d62f7859d02f4a1bc47f19dc1f4275: Hi there. Looks like you're in some trouble.
textByHashes.5734b7b1f0c4c351e014bb0a3396cb9f9ca6a3ce: I'll try my best to return your family.
textByHashes.46bd4c982acb97c6d0b57d546937c9d119a256ef: I hope you can, good luck.
textByHashes.280c9332f164b9a0cafe9d431cc37e74328c271e: I've managed to get a guard's uniform, hopefully I can infiltrate the arena.
textByHashes.b492405b3f1919104ce7e8987bdc701a95c65db0: Just visiting friends in the cells.
textByHashes.7a8cd0a802acf0a3cdd7b9b170f43f4ad4150996: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.
textByHashes.35b9914ec697341b9bd098670e8e3aad7e8ba100: Undead, maniac, master. Got it, loud and clear.
textByHashes.1991a2f1b0994e7867b6dfc0e637e63c4d319729: This door appears to be locked.
textByHashes.2dc8374cb3935d00b914489b804f8decab7b5de8: Do either of you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?
textByHashes.fc9ebe586884fc06ad2ec101cdb67aed62d93c8d: Do you know of a Justin or Sammy Servil in this arena?
textByHashes.bd7c076df3267a1ea027fa7bcac0c4c1a52ebaed: Do you know a Justin or Sammy Servil?
textByHashes.719b157b57ee55e80bd73817b96bbde918d95591: I've been sent to rescue Sir Servil and his son.
textByHashes.e3ac015499bfe9eb333281faa99bc66f2fb80e44: Sshh. This uniform is a disguise, I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?
textByHashes.09c2395be89e3e2bc348c657b7864861d3958da2: Sshh. I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?
textByHashes.e88bbd26acffdd579539531b13f4269bff60cb7f: Don't lose heart, I'll be back.
textByHashes.93a37145bd706973ccaeb3e46b34ae1b507baf83: Lady Servil, I have managed to infiltrate General Khazard's arena.
textByHashes.a930937101ccdf22019b0476b3ec42f3d6feb830: I'd like a Khali brew please.
textByHashes.a5926018fa394895ef3405ee624614165b0945b4: No, not at all. You'll be fine.
textByHashes.6304e54cb81e3037ebf0e252d37a361f35a5d228: Good idea. I'll look after the prisoners.
textByHashes.5433037b2e9a632bef92874a76048b203a299547: No problem, I'll keep them in line.
textByHashes.170c67a9392da4a38b01ed3882a90439718c6e22: Hi, er.. I lost the keys.
textByHashes.b2b8060ff72a53bd06493f4dcae746c12bc6282a: The gate is locked, but Sammy's not in there anyway.
textByHashes.422b7dfbc1e525fc5a3716ac2a8b2b047d258ae6: Sammy look, I have the keys.
textByHashes.1e147897164bb4057079ffef11d8b59501310bc8: Lady Servil sent me to rescue you and your son. Come on, we have to get out of here.
textByHashes.1687bb90bffaa5b5989a5d3edaaf2f7c9a51d353: Lady Servil. I freed your son, however he has returned to the arena to help your husband.
textByHashes.92e7bc25207562a6761e56095eaf87b73cc74937: Come on Sammy, we have to get out of here.
textByHashes.d09c1dd9219490114268f4123f7d6682d2149a6f: I have come to demand the release of Sir Servil and his son.
textByHashes.5d5cdbb904a44b4cdbaaaa51c76c0a454e821314: How long have you been here?
textByHashes.5fb728a7c6e5e3a54d56bebf496bba7da62d9cf6: Don't worry, I'll get us out of here.
textByHashes.6b3eac09513dd09032ba56a2b206efa2be1f9a37: Come on, we only have to fight a creature called bouncer now.
textByHashes.bb3972b5e6d1804c076a9a901df1173e60358159: You agreed to let the Servils go if I stayed to fight.
textByHashes.01ad58c9c89ae4294c20d7f2b180e2c74ed0cbb4: What does Khazard want with us now?
textByHashes.72c8ce807300cb82d742a0ff31ae21b18435c5d7: You can run, Khazard's interest is in me now.
textByHashes.37b81037caeada2e2e9b7a189fd717f69f9e87b3: You and your father should run, Khazard's interest is in me now.
textByHashes.a889118f58a6663a9008f0196273cfaa6bc2becb: I hope he's not too long.
textByHashes.59323177a967d0937a7d3c42c26b4aec476fdc32: Of course. Tell me what happened.
textByHashes.222310eb53f68b90ecc0010b42740813fcead834: That's horrible! How are they able to get away with it?
textByHashes.3e271225656dbb82d71c5ed367d9065361f2d796: Well they won't stop me. I'm going to try my best to find your family.
textByHashes.feb5e68842326480ba0fa0df8c09c20f0a22c355: Well I hope it works out. Good luck.
textByHashes.dbf1ca6373761b7d598ed9bd6e7510fbcc568051: Oh no! I'll let you know if I see anyone suspicious...
textByHashes.d76d00f1ea245eb3a86a8236dd739334c7833d83: You could say that. Long live General Khazard!
textByHashes.04961767c3fbde01f31f8d234c23640bf4a3ccf2: Do either of you know of the Servil family?
textByHashes.78816e8f9cee44180e0271b5454538c785b35493: Hello there. I'm looking for the Servil family.
textByHashes.ecff5b9acd4c3009dbf7ee34903885ffad4f2186: No one important. I'm looking for the Servil family.
textByHashes.5b4a74f938923b4eec17a98373cf4d8c555b04f8: I'm looking for the Servil family.
textByHashes.6226ba0b5c6eff732d8e282ac208be08fe20bac3: Just checking if you have any orders for me.
textByHashes.b01d81407974f8c00d026da7520e95a714a64c03: Khali brew? Can't say I've ever had one.
textByHashes.548b3a9b03716534fe407ed9ddb3db5c3b5f5519: Not long now until you get a break though, right?
textByHashes.a68f137009a276671112987ebc61d788779d3e11: Don't worry, I'm here to help. Where do they keep the keys?
textByHashes.c5c707b3d1c20d2f818660b9391c42d9c8d5b093: Oh, I don't have enough room for one.
textByHashes.716b5860a3f9dd506192612181cec293461bb1fd: Do you still fancy a drink?
textByHashes.0ca8062eb7bdf8d831f2d14e5c4afbad2cbbe088: Don't worry, I'll keep them in line
textByHashes.96637df50a2feee290c1e4bdaff13dfea2dd1df4: Hi, er... I lost the keys.
textByHashes.0e091c22460aa490097932b3f08ea4df48744652: We'll need to wait for the guards to change shift, but don't worry, you'll be out soon...
textByHashes.6bdf6caefb08a0c24916dac9776b5c9958081388: Now, let's get you out of here.
textByHashes.421ece86b43b94335096e1cefb0144b404a82dcf: Lady Servil, I freed your son, but he went to help your husband.
textByHashes.59cfc81ff9fa6383f11e32632c71957804baa387: And what if I refuse your offer?
textByHashes.5484768fd9fa222886c3a8446bb55250403a5c71: I only did what you asked. I fought in your arena. Now let the Servils go.
textByHashes.bb56965c38c60ef7734d9a58f766aef4d1a1bb34: He tried, but I was able to defeat him.
textByHashes.77245a595e5245b1d8e049ce72393453940e042c: I thought I had at first, but it seems he is not that easy to kill.
textByHashes.322b5257f03c511e3924f93a424d64213f8b1301: I was just wondering what was down those stairs?
textByHashes.91e73a079de7e8ec1c7f74491bc437f983559741: Ooh... is this a shortcut to somewhere?
textByHashes.a41602830176d7dadaf2fbf3c0d7c5272bf7e03c: Oh, sorry, I hadn't realised it was private.
textByHashes.a8475489bb0f9f6e746d28e5def73f68eb896bcf: If you were my friend I wouldn't mind.
textByHashes.a6f61e2cca2f6f72958a4a28ffdac3e09ba2a380: And how am I meant to do that?
textByHashes.9d5943b2d59ac5847910bc33ee57a42aca29cf85: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?
textByHashes.62a1a9bf9ce9376230e8e2f4aee55f2d054eaebf: I'm bigger than you. Let me by!
textByHashes.ae4b0858d0f47a83542bd9633095bc053e08d28e: I was just stopping to say hello!
textByHashes.29d2a43216949b688764772a66c608d817bf7974: No, it takes preparation to win fishing competitions.
textByHashes.b6f1bdc858e20069bdd5723d19d23ec6e960d2ea: What are you sitting around here for?
textByHashes.558e49e39faf42ea0d6748020983770872534c08: Well, good luck with the fishing.
textByHashes.ffd73df9b56df10cfc0ba9f110946447e10468c9: If you get thirsty you should drink something.
textByHashes.a438db08148ee4f134040bd798b92799c223c738: Can I fish here instead of you?
textByHashes.d06c6cc860b22abcea98925b49d526ec5371f1d0: Do you have any tips for me?
textByHashes.b66e65bb0530407ef84a573743fe95df14d95125: Are you entering the fishing competition?
textByHashes.8e308f2b8283d9e275b55c7367fc4382b667424f: I don't suppose you could give me any hints?
textByHashes.937b450d81e2a6b65e9efe9031a26e3714bbd9da: There's this weird creepy guy who says he's not a vampyre using that spot. He keeps winning too.
textByHashes.f14800e92f40540b9fcc88af9397a722128ef94f: That's less competition for me then.
textByHashes.686f7d181185dc61965b43dd36552a1b1f06e967: Sorry, I don't have time now.
textByHashes.fed1a1eff75031eb86f61fb19d8ad9b09abf3f19: Can I buy one of your fishing rods?
textByHashes.dc9e68bc985c3e4a64f0b7ca68f2d47e9f1e53c3: I've forgotten how to fish, can you remind me?
textByHashes.f08657d512b74edda142fefc91b4798fe133e11c: Ok... I think I can get those at Catherby.
textByHashes.9c885951c9264483d0263768e62ae8decef4e03c: No thanks, I'll just watch the fun.
textByHashes.65ea8a837c1fa1a6ffaa3bb4a64e03b1c6fbfbc9: Ewww - it's a smelly sewage pipe.
textByHashes.8cd99041992a5bc9c5b63a91fd01de36707d2652: Yes I'll compete again another day.
textByHashes.2c7123c88b4d9098b5f4a51956f8e1d905ba9193: Actually I'll go back and catch some more.
textByHashes.5b2b87385daaf0e64a001654e06b0499433d3328: I think I might still be able to find a bigger fish.
textByHashes.9ec4f7112db267bbf5a8d0a74e20cc8bed318a9e: I don't feel like a champ...
textByHashes.4ba51b8121f40245091287de94f27aa794fe90f0: I think I'll keep them to myself.
textByHashes.926ac15452d92dc7d227a927568c695518c36727: Yep, I have it right here!
textByHashes.8f41d96a1fd00fa17d46d4186948df9eb8c13493: Excellent. That will come in most handy.
textByHashes.079f185250abba52505724bb15ece092359528ab: Thank you, I think I'll stop by for a beer one day.
textByHashes.132f465c32c0cf8e7405f3b0ca05dab3a938c0f0: Hi there, Veldaban! Have you got any new quests for me?
textByHashes.8d838bea1c4b38d79c0daefa3aca98b579efe8d5: That's too bad, I'm starting to get a little bored.
textByHashes.b6b418bc6afa153d2e78c584870d6b02e93b2ac6: Er, that's a bit of a random suggestion. Why would I go on a fishing contest?
textByHashes.25c29dab5ab30c8e7be9e6136719db21d7c31e92: Why would they want to do that if they don't know much about fishing?
textByHashes.24ebdf68170e1e9e5b9ee2daa2ba58b2551ed70a: Alright, sounds interesting, I'll check it out. White Wolf mountain, you said?
textByHashes.fc93642dc3c9ab5b4454f74445a705e31739084a: You mean, half the world has suddenly become a sailor?
textByHashes.94ee4350f1af4c492b63dab3c6283c19c86773f5: What have those grumpy little guys done now?
textByHashes.d1ed4911db1cb0dea538744850ec070b378c2ef2: Are you asking me to... spy on them? Isn't that treason?
textByHashes.9482c1107bfbf9835764c040e7357ff9f3d98d4d: So where would you like me to go?
textByHashes.9b133eb0ffe88be36fead9f877a8feb1fc5af1be: Yes, I do believe I have. Smashed glasses, wrecked house? Poor personal hygiene standards? Brother or cousin to that other drunken dwarf?
textByHashes.155c0693893ef332e0e71ff561890c5337812f78: Sounds like just the job for me!
textByHashes.2b82177a56d609b439f66f37dc29912e5bc949c7: Well, here I am... at the drunken dwarf's relative's residence, who is also drunken. I wonder what drunken tales he can tell me.
textByHashes.74c1320ab84f549eb70429e683f993570e6719c2: No, I try to stay away from drunken dwarves.
textByHashes.d7b8f446e068487b6dac50461c13892afbc22319: Although I wish they would try to stay away from me too...
textByHashes.3cd17901a28b0925452116428f31511e01936e7f: I need to know about the Red Axe...
textByHashes.78ed2fb8b45a768664031ac2a4d6ebb999c34026: You don't look very sober to me!
textByHashes.7a1b85270bdcb7b998b3cee66f10ebe2a05ebee3: Have you ever considered to stop drinking? It's bad for you.
textByHashes.c6d95137701f6e1f5fe351ce7f548c995247f668: What's the REALLY good stuff then?
textByHashes.df7f1e4154da4f9aedbf256b339ac824f9aa7554: Hey, er, I don't think that's good for you.
textByHashes.073a5f7bfb84751d810fc3ea8442a8af69c56e76: What am I supposed to do with a seed?
textByHashes.e12e301a28a79860cae34bc29f3ce0e9ee105803: Where do I get the other seeds then?
textByHashes.faca829fdf0b54ded9928dd42dc97bbc9ef76830: Right, I think what you're trying to say is... I need to find some other drunken dwarves, collect Kelda seeds from them until I have four, then grow them into hops so I can make Kelda stout.
textByHashes.cd6810b3811a06600fb093fc3281f95b6ee155fd: Maybe that's just because I don't drink as much as you.
textByHashes.9547e2229aef645ca1be9501deec699546641f25: Not yet, no. I'm still trying to collect all of the seeds.
textByHashes.f7b42f78346ce413a4207daa88d2eb4911299365: I'm having some problems with the seeds...
textByHashes.8743c12a6c5d5c49577457b0c6afcb67aaa56831: Not yet, no. I need to grow my seeds into hops first.
textByHashes.a86df6e24314774097501b3c648d50292edbc66e: I'd like a Kelda stout please.
textByHashes.c98e68b223729c02ec25b3d93f5f53a7e0740e00: Hold on a second there, I need your help!
textByHashes.6182460252632d2485cc04bc510763a6190fa4d4: No, I try not to get drunk, it's not good for you. But I do need help in brewing some beer.
textByHashes.e3f76677aa5f31961a4cc3ac40cdbb796465b2d4: I need to brew Kelda stout, but I haven't got enough seeds to grow the hops.
textByHashes.ca3d786a3da2f3c5bc712f7848ae3c33b3a72224: Do you know where I can find any seeds?
textByHashes.f38dbc0176dab11c96540252017fbbded19290ab: But you're not going to just give it to me, are you?
textByHashes.a9388a4fded03871533dee71612e41eb2c8c5c62: Alright then, what do you want for it?
textByHashes.b914e57098bcc625d2bfad5ec5e569ccd905bdf5: What?? Where am I going to get that!
textByHashes.bf9973891c1c3aaee1ebacb575e05133b9d09bf0: Do you have any Kelda seeds?
textByHashes.6119980c607fb7544976e80e0002e4b9dc3c90a1: I suppose you wouldn't ever have a proper job or do some decent hard work, no.
textByHashes.b752b768377d5d9fb444548db98df9133adb77d6: Hello there. I'm looking for some Kelda hop seeds.
textByHashes.75d5b16098005b0cd9d241b70c9f963d5439c581: It sounds ghastly to me. But I want to brew some to help out, errr, a friend of mine.
textByHashes.50f9151f379225683933ae7235324031f053be42: Borrow?? How can I borrow a seed? I can hardly give it back once I've grown it.
textByHashes.1470e515499b92285daea6272a7fd02aeba15efa: What if I offer you a drink?
textByHashes.f1f7a9195039988e1a9eec362feb8f4d350f159a: I just thought I'd save myself the trouble of waiting for you to ask me this time.
textByHashes.5b3bb67ff13a899ac40a50416d1361e72bad58e0: No, but it seems just about everyone else has!
textByHashes.a133ef859a5b35b59c708804ade5964ae9e6c4bf: Now do you want it or not? I'm not asking you again!
textByHashes.e2a3406fe0ecb46d55692fec0bd4bff32200aea2: Er, well, I was going to offer you a dwarven stout, but I seem to have left it in my other pants.
textByHashes.0561de879ba8a0305b86e522689980e2ad19db54: Shtouts are just on the table over there, help yourshelf!
textByHashes.844fa68502f7cc891cfcd9c61f356542ce5acd4e: No wait, I want to borrow it after all.
textByHashes.a55b6b5d4657ecb88b061e536b788d4aaf39a4a8: Of course, of course! After I've grown my Kelda seeds into hops, then harvested the hops and brewed my Kelda stout... sure, I'll give you back your seed!
textByHashes.e09ea731669a27c6a2c1e6738360fcc884de236f: Oh, don't worry... like I said, it's not for myself, it's for a friend.
textByHashes.33557dbcf3cdb0b57641345db33efbc9009470cd: I'm still looking for some Kelda hop seeds.
textByHashes.030073577e4dcd4e9d041063c4ff68eb8ffb0ac9: Oh, I'm sorry... perhaps you can tell me where to get some then?
textByHashes.c06e9abe374e5bc6f08831f8efdd01757ad03ab7: Alright, I'll check it out, thanks.
textByHashes.45fff7a300abc1823245f421b1ce4a6be210c337: Say, you know a lot about beer, right?
textByHashes.f53880db369c33f244f9c938ca4342aea0addef0: Do you know anything about Kelda stout?
textByHashes.729b319ddfcec2ac8368233c746ffc50bce6c619: Yes, that's what I heard, so I'm going to brew it myself.
textByHashes.0e2bdb68ea6ae31a5aa86986392bd9dbc8d19ba4: Drinking is bad for you, but I'll make an exception this time.
textByHashes.fc2a25724049c9609366ffc7e7f74670230ecdec: I don't have anything suitable to toast with.
textByHashes.6d05be21b3b83ca490122d58f8e4f87161e2c77a: So did you have any Kelda seeds?
textByHashes.562c51585b0aec5a3318b50fbdaaf4da616f3a69: I'd better ask the gardener for permission to use this patch first.
textByHashes.314b8c5509da9f9f04512b1a42d8f3ccc4fd769d: I have four Kelda seeds here, but need some advice on growing them.
textByHashes.9b3dc9af8149a2dacef9016c271b441c664870b2: Thanks! Is there anything else I need to know?
textByHashes.baf4157b2106b50d07f086fa0a3f720db4f5e460: Thank you! Your advice is much appreciated!
textByHashes.3341bd076d75bc1f929db85cf1c62091869be767: I think I need some more help with this whole farming business.
textByHashes.8b76dfad38414c9d28362cb698eeb53c32132515: Do I have to wait here all this time then?
textByHashes.f8ec156c008b423feb249bd7181d0ae22415b5bf: You mean the mining companies? I did jobs for them, they're not very profitable.
textByHashes.cf27b28f5752e60d28a10faa5ddea332ac854784: Do I have to do that? I just want to grow my hops and get on with my quest for Veldaban.
textByHashes.8f9d539a46db8c0e914cedfe5447f13d5e5d5182: Alright, I'll deliver that letter for you.
textByHashes.a3c011a9ba405231d2b52dfef1e717e8d8605e27: I'd rather just sit here and stare at this patch, thanks.
textByHashes.53b8c23539cc0f284bddefab4449f101953db9d0: No, I haven't been to Falador yet, but I will soon.
textByHashes.bdd7c85457d2dc9990f2dc02a168543e5c6ad490: No, I've decided not to deliver it after all.
textByHashes.f21b72089949a373c4d1283bb964bc7c6ddc0498: No, sorry, I lost your letter.
textByHashes.a0df70736bbfac4b586640d3d85336bfc88cc136: Well, I've got a letter here from your friend in Keldagrim.
textByHashes.3c346906d5ddd5dce42e8c428b1ac3bea4f26ebb: I've delivered your letter to Elstan, he told me to give you his regards.
textByHashes.97c13eb6d711b4320e48447383a7b0462faf90ae: Hmm, I'm not sure... let me check the patch.
textByHashes.11ac018d242f99beb562174bb031d6527547a318: I've grown my seeds into hops, but I have no idea what to do with them. Can you turn them into stout for me please?
textByHashes.82955480c5d7f8390ef9006b5d83ac75b106d0b9: I've grown my seeds into hops, but I seem to have mislaid them.
textByHashes.8ea0a26466ccba20e9222b5aa1487d69aa3d9a51: My hops still need fermenting, sorry.
textByHashes.1ab27400b47879eb0cb8d7ff6ca6eed77813fefb: I'm brewing my hops into Kelda stout, but it seems to be taking an awfully long time.
textByHashes.ca017c5ad7a7101f5e1b455c3b964374a11fd865: I'm just so angry, my hops aren't fermenting at all. I want my Kelda stout!
textByHashes.3dfe17487fff0dacc3f2d75c58336d7685488d54: This stout seems absolutely vile and disgusting. Besides, I'm supposed to bring it to my drunken, kebab obsessed friend.
textByHashes.0607d7f017e1ca0d672101093059e2651162692d: I'd like a Kelda stout please
textByHashes.357817e814a1e417361238e3f6ae7cc809d80350: Haven't got any on me, sorry.
textByHashes.adc27dd728fa9c12224aa3d91e1b001c11b755ed: I've got some Kelda stout right here. I just brewed it in the Laughing Miner!
textByHashes.56d403bf12265eae370861e51ea42ff24a6ef311: Are you sure? This is pretty bad stuff.
textByHashes.c517ddafbcb207e703a19f68aea9a586cd73d603: The what? The Magenta Accordion? That's not a mining company!
textByHashes.5c7be2db281341e76c9a1b0bb083225fae6c069b: That was very interesting! I'll ignore that part with the pink dragons though...
textByHashes.4351b85d5b18e8a86daff7666bbb64228e5f801d: But I shall investigate that tunnel immediately! South of the cart station, just south of the carts to White Wolf mountain?
textByHashes.ae94c05142b1b1e9b14c3dfdca0917d99b3e9e19: But that tale you told me!
textByHashes.e41fff0322a8c5c5f2ba77ffd9ae904ba52e09f0: I think I'm on to something! Something about a disused mine tunnel southeast of town.
textByHashes.57e8d3234b3aee9f258f7a5590dff6eb4e2e3f54: Excuse me, can you tell me what's behind that boarded up tunnel to the south?
textByHashes.a384d3d8b38455934d8cef98ea7eec17bbd38914: I need to go through there. Can you open up the tunnel for me?
textByHashes.89b9dd893e5988d6a84304d3653430296ca92a08: Then who do I talk to? I really need to get in.
textByHashes.3f27ade241ab3c120741c352f436a45ce51560b5: I really need to go through that tunnel.
textByHashes.c0bbbdeddaf074420a1dd44f796a5a32c2c4b6ad: At least tell me who can, please?
textByHashes.3bb76785984886fe67047445f808a69734f2e1b7: I think I may have a good lead now!
textByHashes.1a979dc5d4eca450b21a23dd6da737347484eb12: But I need some boarding removed, I need to go through some disused mine cart tunnels.
textByHashes.c3392334f2ea4a2e203c202294b5c05af0607089: Ah yes, I'm a member now, they must be able to help!
textByHashes.353c42cf78b6a326476e1bb881905ef74ca71cf2: Can you help me with a boarded up tunnel?
textByHashes.11d89fde5424beaab426fa70aaede271b36805a8: I think it leads to something that might be related to the Red Axe.
textByHashes.36ef64f2cf6a44dbabed58cedfe706c8e9999174: Can you help me get the boarding removed then?
textByHashes.9c23cc6e6e79796c1b22c17658e184d4ab13f440: Thanks! I'll investigate the tunnel immediately!
textByHashes.37042870929499c5600d26cb1384d54d042214a0: I will have lots to tell you soon, Veldaban!
textByHashes.27cb660960ed78d9d3eea0281452620ece3e9e37: I'm deep underground now, but how am I supposed to get across here?
textByHashes.b46e3271bc422e9d81a5ba0b83d0d000ca1b9c88: This junction is blocked. I'd better go back to the start and find some way to make it go left or right.
textByHashes.37dbf14377199e4e7d9b2deae111d40259c877d5: I've come to a dead end. I'd better get back to the start.
textByHashes.ed2a27bf7b648feeb5389103698aa4cec9e36314: Pesky human, huh? Well, I think I have enough info now. I'd better explore the rest of these mines.
