textByHashes.035ed9f9e9e97ec64a31b3f86210a4d077442502: I should stay and listen for a bit longer...
textByHashes.8133752de996696a7896aff2163aa525fbce33f8: Looks like another chasm I need to cross.
textByHashes.0e225ca841435ac63800f5402f2827e2c2ae402f: I should explore this room fully before moving on. I should be able to find out a little bit more.
textByHashes.3dd7fdf78838130b0b44721e274c33266ccc1174: Statistical data, salary structures, shopping lists... no, I don't think there's anything interesting here.
textByHashes.cf779d3e8d358866e801361521c7a873b2ba83b5: What the Guthix is this? Another chasm? And even more tracks!
textByHashes.a4ce662ead0190508e88b2d7bf447b2ba5ef73b5: There's the Red Axe director again!
textByHashes.6b9e9379eeae3b7eb046793bd66d6189df90b305: Er, what? Where am I? Errrrr... I must tell Veldaban... something. Yes... ehm. I don't remember what though. Errr...
textByHashes.1460d6f0d91a3458ed38e96aa60918e473e74c58: Veldaban, I must tell you something incredibly important!
textByHashes.fd48ff894c5693156753085847b4b9c62cda183f: I must tell you about... about...
textByHashes.3615274facf74c04bc1b0c3ce37185a499f28396: ...about my incredible craving for a kebab. Mmm, kebabs. A kebab and a beer, that sounds great right now.
textByHashes.53a6264f791fb54ada4e5f742e7694edb05c6235: Mmm, yes, I'll be perfectly alright... just after I've had my beer and a kebab. Yes. I'll have a beer and a kebab in the Laughing Miner. Yum!
textByHashes.12d76d58db4c43155c3360812f9f420de60ca363: Watch out kebabs, I come for you!
textByHashes.32e3114c8a4c0a54b5826d854076f3f5e7416b05: I will feast on kebabs and beer! [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.665b30d7ebe755e568748fd4a0d18832b2f4dc17: I knew it were you matey! 'Ere, have some of the good stuff!
textByHashes.9302312f2c6f5201be5197114c3e39951d825e2b: Right, these kebabsh, right? A whole g-g-group of kebabs came marching in! I'm telling you! Marching in line!
textByHashes.9d81fe5990e0ef9b4fb3616d2e9a10a94178ce1f: And then, I'll tell you... Then! Ehm...
textByHashes.ddd088358731a8e5faaeb354b934f9e74d0b1a47: I think... I think I must have. It's so hard to remember.
textByHashes.f03fa893a67abf798a4f40afecebefcea519a79b: I don't know, I think something terrible has happened, but everyone seems to think I'm an idiot for some reason...
textByHashes.aae21e004247dd59811f9c7344e212894e1f7a5a: What's going on here? I see a lot of farming patches with nothing growing in them.
textByHashes.9f643d2e2165cefcd15d55759bf7f5a6b97296e7: One? I'm not sure I understand you-
textByHashes.f8acf7af69bbc20daaa2323da89e9679b2eebf85: Ri-ight ... if you say so, my lady. I'll be off then, if you don't mind-
textByHashes.cd1aa6cd947728b547a0dad3167144f6768b3f0b: No problem, sorry to have bothered you.
textByHashes.4699ecde4274acbcffab249603cb935962bd7ffa: Well for a moment there I thought there was a dog around here somewhere...
textByHashes.a7828dd83b4c3dd9bf7472089f4ce9566ac5b6de: Well, seeing as you put it so nicely...
textByHashes.5119109865575cd62d93838103af196c59fb5d86: You'll have to ask me nicely first.
textByHashes.4a795f60f7012f50ecd9c95dade80d5cfec58206: I would be happy to help someone who is so in touch with the people.
textByHashes.f4969385217882157fbc8f020f212c040a2c1396: I'm not sure if that's a compliment or not. Anyway, what would you like me to do, and what do I get out of it?
textByHashes.7e44bd5ef42bedbb762abe5664dfd9afda159627: Thanks, I'm sure. So tell me Queeny, how do I know which plants I am to get for you?
textByHashes.bcbd1f28aee783f0e1ff9cb357850fc78d9f2342: I'd rather jump off the docks at Port Sarim.
textByHashes.673cc84a89194e02f00f67f9381253a0c7c60e42: How am I supposed to move statues all the way here?
textByHashes.68bb166f40f3c4f5bacd4a006c0f76d84699e7f7: What I am supposed to be getting again?
textByHashes.ee804b626bfe2c0399887a0b421d8e8153f14167: Err ... no ... I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.66671b2b7f9b1b5c27731ada81dce84d93f617b4: Will these patches need much in the way of watering?
textByHashes.bfb0706070208279db3c786420b6ce269cfce222: Queen Ellamaria has sent me to seek your guidance.
textByHashes.f9fd5e0be53e741d95a8205edc00252afbdf2043: I'll certainly look at her in a different light when I return to Varrock.
textByHashes.f1fa29646d8bb69844bcd539b7f53e914f93e334: I am supposed to gain some knowledge of diplomacy and persuasion from you.
textByHashes.1c091bd6ac41e83515a94e2a55df11b1b1ada6b2: Charos? I must say the name rings a bell...
textByHashes.a9230e0eab810bbd732113cce1987e2b73571d7f: Yes, I remember! Once, during my travels to Morytania, I came upon an item of magical jewellery called the Ring of Charos.
textByHashes.08e4d27a805784fcf4689852e5b84df635d43831: Yes, I'm wearing it at the moment. Is it important, then?
textByHashes.8faf127c12c2f5f27179e7001a5f7d06b34e8f5b: Yes, I have it in my bag. Is it important, then?
textByHashes.45680e34c7bf747b1ed825a8791084c5dd9ddb26: Yes, I have it stored somewhere. Is it important, then?
textByHashes.b157eb0584f0acde830ed8100463a0acb054e3ff: No, I'm afraid that I lost it at some point.
textByHashes.9e1be8caa8d5f823d7c193e654e2ba8fdfed6162: How can I re-obtain the Ring of Charos?
textByHashes.e2cb92d706896a4c90ef34e01bbe6a88d63065bd: I ... um ... 'borrowed' it from a rather shady character called Fenkenstrain.
textByHashes.61803211d195f908d2efb40fdfa9f00dc3e1e50f: What happened to Charos? And why did Fenkenstrain have the ring?
textByHashes.9b7d4e1d0263bb52dea39bc7bc1d91db1e71623c: So what you are telling me is that nobody really knows what happened to Charos? That he could still be alive? And if he is still alive...
textByHashes.65a4194d5d03c63bdb729613d29029a7895a6283: Still - it doesn't inspire me with much confidence.
textByHashes.98bdf62439439a122f265290884c59b82773cf7f: Okay, I've answered your questions - what's the verdict?
textByHashes.8157cd0f168ec67f7f64ab53e5d3c66d622aabcc: I can't believe that - can I have another go?
textByHashes.ce8b5d039dedb2982577d45e463755f5bca9d92b: Oh well, that's that I suppose.
textByHashes.f646e29d8f3a8aa28ebfcd2aad2f2a419276c73a: No, I'm just a dull-headed moron, you're right about that.
textByHashes.4fb1bc09f18ed1f6708c2a704a08605505bdceae: I think you wanted to give me a thousand coins...
textByHashes.1d67dfdbf53e057ce4fa2e6a36d6ae1442189876: Thanks for your help, wise old man.
textByHashes.c79def8d0b5cbbbf68198de8b95f0fe7095aa7f0: I have returned to you with the Ring of Charos. Now will you reveal its 'hidden power beyond belief'?
textByHashes.677ceb40f5f6e0072afc4ba59044dc6723160081: Er, no - I've stored it somewhere.
textByHashes.f6a32f3cd69e3d1bce76f71c96aae9d998b92768: I thought you told me to-
textByHashes.75f26a83822553afc6aa106d8b9fea247c9a6e8d: Can I retake the diplomacy test?
textByHashes.732dbf2141bf1f45b4f3e9e7c0f268ca52c5f011: I have it stored in the bank. Should I go and get it then?
textByHashes.fe0048006a5a620f5c7a8de139de2bb6ef20f52a: Do you have any delphinium seeds to spare?
textByHashes.318435052aeab9661f35d8410c68b2626eb29831: I'll have you know I'm a pretty good farmer, actually!
textByHashes.9ae4041b7ad1d41ba2494d6e49f4cbac238cb376: That is why I have come to an expert for advice.
textByHashes.d4e9ad2ffa72ac8207067084d9fd0a784ca33ed4: No, I just said that to get you to give me some seeds.
textByHashes.9adcf1b67cb5dacb2517efb981c33327aa6b1a35: Yeah, carry on - milk it for all it's worth.
textByHashes.ab19efef6ae022c9363688d5c30144b2ec076ae1: Not just AN expert, Elstan - they say you are THE expert.
textByHashes.7205ee7a9eb6a657cea598e81e688bb79ba8aead: Oh no, I love listening to gardening stories...
textByHashes.5be6f811144479fc59799733fc73f6ee03324169: Millions? Ah, just what I wanted to hear...
textByHashes.cd3d77bc6f86392f7b1a47ec98029ed58a2967ae: So, a bunch of marigolds then?
textByHashes.b6984cb2f5d9c7527b524c4a01e5bfa4c56ed90d: I have those marigolds for you.
textByHashes.dcdb3e21ed310cc1591a22751f7926e56d02c63b: Okay, I'll grow you some marigolds.
textByHashes.04821e1499b836df30ea2912fed8192d48d504ef: No, I don't have time to do that.
textByHashes.f0f94c1a58babe46e0b669b03bc2d47ac1ec9702: Are you sure you don't just want to give me the seeds now?
textByHashes.605d1b533858c4c977a5d51a31cc73c4812269e7: But they'll be no different to any other marigolds!
textByHashes.f76f792f2eae7fa67ea676d686dd52c22686d742: If you're going to be like that, it'll take more than flowers to make Lyra want to date you.
textByHashes.86e592b80f7fa9a83e03aa26363621fa289250fc: What did I agree to do for delphinium seeds?
textByHashes.9a1b2501cbe39920cb980d95c277fcb9f5d39186: Can I have some more delphinium seeds?
textByHashes.3068c0db0b696756e5b48162cfd274617ecdb568: Do you have any orchid seeds to spare?
textByHashes.3bb895795a841417589d3a26201e6ee776c0540b: Oh sorry, I didn't mean to take up your valuable time.
textByHashes.b3e7f3d0c936232b341225a5769a292996c6657e: If you tell me your problems, I may be able to help you.
textByHashes.9898d1f535a08ed51ac552d5f7f6b7a082fc40b8: No, not really - you fit in here a treat.
textByHashes.dbed999faf8a5a12dfc541d2c7c0645e44abe48f: Yes, I was wondering about that.
textByHashes.c1f8d5b537a9dd20ba141bfbae3b1bab1585fafe: I can only say one thing to you - move.
textByHashes.5634bcd220b2fc43b8082e94f4e9c1dbb6eb6b23: Times must be very hard for you.
textByHashes.211876126122e87a0b4e91e2375fdddbb83aba38: Ah, it all makes sense now - you're a psychopath.
textByHashes.62029dcc3bd28fccd19ccd119fee3e3d9fb92afe: And what is the nature of this fee that you pay?
textByHashes.03be2e3fb9d38ae91eef39bd191a78ebd8937a79: Er, can I withdraw my offer of help now?
textByHashes.555732fcce6ff0a2478570f86bac880b995ba8d2: If not yours, then whose blood are you offering?
textByHashes.2e99eba22fa1b9bb1518d42050511c0bd34ff9df: Something tells me that you actually enjoy it, really.
textByHashes.47f6ea243f491589ba83c789300461c853755fd3: How can you deal with so much guilt?
textByHashes.ee0027684d0582bf35a5b0eacc9f4b783c80c650: Okay, can I have them then...
textByHashes.79e5af07bf8eff8a60e96ca1995f7cfca99961b0: That's a deal – I'll grow a patch of onions for you.
textByHashes.a4a75659f61f560c4b32c04964332c34cbd17a6b: I think not – I've loitered too long in this land.
textByHashes.9b17a91b4ac71b45ee5dcd5d3c502d26ea02d15f: Oh for Saradomin's sake, just give me the seeds!
textByHashes.876b2881567cb23477b9ab27255b0a9529baa875: What did you ask me to do?
textByHashes.73da14edd141778fa6792121f0616c0a224276e0: Okay, I've grown those onions like you asked.
textByHashes.2416c731b99aeb462848c9afc1503abfc4583aed: Can I have some more orchid seeds?
textByHashes.988bd2daba00da5495d401fd49cb432ceee1f647: Do you have any snowdrop seeds to spare?
textByHashes.c421ad991091b3c9f3bfc4e9b3c67e9d30f43f5b: But I was told that you did!
textByHashes.8c8bc0d2dcf2c98a4667b9389111533492f9b28b: You seem to be a little irritable, my friend.
textByHashes.fae54be8187f6d0e67f9e299d9951a89358c9000: I'm not concerned, I just want you to give me some snowdrop seeds.
textByHashes.0232a619b2071e7675dbed8a6dd61d8bb849dd31: I don't like to see a fellow human being so upset.
textByHashes.894395d507a4ca68df56d55f57b33de21c534f06: I can't take it anymore - just give me the seeds.
textByHashes.d9800d6591f3d8f5bbf29770d37b3321fd37de49: So what ails you, my friend?
textByHashes.579da00a986776fdad5e65b7b154efbc183c6d8d: Oh stop whining, it's not like you do it for free.
textByHashes.8f92c0c205c10db851d7bf6309d70fdc62e2d173: Well, is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.9a8c224db2c1c306dc9d4442a228ce72c8d9a96c: Don't let me stop you, there are plenty of ships missing cabin boys.
textByHashes.290467e7ef542a1367b3a6fd31ab67a2d3be3edf: So what can I do for you?
textByHashes.54dd7ed28fd75487596cc7dd19a94d14515c2c64: Cabbages? Sounds good to me. Where do you want me to grow them?
textByHashes.6bd17a5282b58bed460c596fedea46d8a4854f12: That's a deal - I'll let you know when your cabbages are ready.
textByHashes.5b18aa6f04ef2a9841282f49159f7c502e3df050: I'm not wasting my time growing cabbages.
textByHashes.c291a7bd49dae6efd66e29607a97eef40564b21b: Aarrrrrghhhh! I hate cabbages!!!! Give me the seeds!!!!!
textByHashes.699ea613037148167f1ff75e5a7bfd2e676ede0d: Okay, I've grown those cabbages like you asked.
textByHashes.af092305f180fe88fe06eb537d4c287336cf794b: Can I have some more snowdrop seeds?
textByHashes.ae1a1185921d194950e4ba4191fade8690094e92: Yes. They don't look too happy at the moment.
textByHashes.fc4757d2ff8bcb3717e401b509f5a37dc601df40: I could probably help you with that, but I'd need something in return.
textByHashes.e8ac468706e09f5c86af7b42f0fc0a91a02b18ef: Well, I'd like a supply of Burthorpe Vine seeds.
textByHashes.f770db30b46c5f2af9c713a37c60e24078d975b5: But it is the only way that these vines will be cured.
textByHashes.76bb8ffd8efacf128e3fca6bc89f822a77bdcd1d: Actually, it seems like a lot of hard work for nothing.
textByHashes.b722ffec46f4839a4a611fd9b67707efbda721db: I don't understand - it's worked with everything else.
textByHashes.78c2b5dc87f602df8d57a019226b14aec8d3421e: Do you know of any stronger cures?
textByHashes.54a4eef32eedcf9529e252cb79bb5054676adb4e: Why didn't you just go and ask him yourself?
textByHashes.3b73b578915837819da0d8240af71140479e4da0: I need to ask you about strong plant cures.
textByHashes.7d05c2adcca3dd3c75ca6c70e88f2ebc1e97de0a: Bernald up in Burthorpe has got some seriously diseased grapevines. I tried plant cure on them, but it didn't seem to have any positive effect.
textByHashes.df7c3bb179090c0a69d821d61230b988acb8e8ce: Er, I did have some ... assistance there.
textByHashes.9ab9dd4bf12ecc2d3a124f9da5b90987d408a0d9: Are you sure there's nothing you can suggest?
textByHashes.6734e54c0f8486cd8299f2346f5dc0fe7b6780f3: Do you mean the rune essence?
textByHashes.8c98c13b04f1028c11c64666e550f30dd21b004b: Thank you Alain, I will try it out immediately!
textByHashes.9c07938187ab94b149f6daaf6f43758077eb9526: Oh, sorry. I forgot that it only works on the weak- minded.
textByHashes.7a39998bfccb2b82fe8a27d2cbccc67072fa423b: Yes. He has given me some knowledge so that I can make a more potent plant cure.
textByHashes.45e9f552f06a79ebcf004499002b91751cc3adaf: Do you have any more Burthorpe Vine seeds?
textByHashes.08fdecc6664731996bf0dcf9144d6b274048f3b9: How are your grapes coming along?
textByHashes.f923420047578c2007cb42e7982901961d0aed60: Do you know how I could grow a White Tree?
textByHashes.30fa92f2dff82aa04aa457f97c3c624894a57a26: Then my quest is over - I cannot grow a White Tree.
textByHashes.5e2878459d709049ad2613b060067a0303e957f3: I think that there is something that you are not telling me.
textByHashes.4b51966c6b2f79d002a7184a331ab00fe84d2f11: You need to chill out and stop taking yourself so seriously.
textByHashes.6c046a202a9260dd431a39cef1d05a0cbc05b9ad: A secret is a dreadful burden to have to keep to yourself.
textByHashes.6ab47b2c9ec790599b3d144611899a8f71a2a466: I don't see how. Tell me your secret, and I will keep it as well as you have done.
textByHashes.aaf1f53314cd120bf9a3b601219d0a6a4084c2df: I can fill in the rest. So where is the remaining White Tree?
textByHashes.e1f643be4799c7d0af7bb7b65c71832fe7dbe3d4: If I took a cutting from ... her ... then I could grow another one.
textByHashes.f214ce38217fc84fb6ee52e03077eb0919c37744: You should get out a bit more and quit worrying about trees.
textByHashes.e542b9e237b9b6b4de73284ee2b19848578f0e28: Unless you allow me to do this she will die anyway.
textByHashes.60926606251db1f89353e84baf68172eb42dbdb0: Then will you allow me to take this cutting?
textByHashes.8f7667a9f62d3fea71246e09a83ee96feaf84b3c: Here is the shoot that Dantaera spoke of. Everything she told me is true – this tree will die once I cut this shoot. Well, here goes...
textByHashes.284d922b7dbfc112b14dfc925744f418fc696a15: I have already cut the shoot from the White Tree. I should quickly grow a new tree in Queen Ellamaria's garden.
textByHashes.87a3e2d13a45bc7c1b38b7f51736d55a624cbaa5: Ah, luckily there is another shoot here that I can cut. Better not lose this one...
textByHashes.17cba516f968a426626679d5c3376f2610a2c0c9: I have lost the cutting from the White Tree.
textByHashes.45b33939685b3ab433358d883b5c58be993f41f5: Can I have some rosebush seeds, please?
textByHashes.1564248568df3c653ef5c35851ad2fb255eee369: These are the most beautiful rosebushes I've ever seen.
textByHashes.aa89c80a7bd358c7647b0fab39257039f07a702e: Fish in a well? There can't be anything down there except water!! Perhaps I should try some place where I might expect to find fish - a fishing spot maybe?
textByHashes.941102e0311574a200f3eac8edaa741e160886a0: Very nice rosebushes you have here.
textByHashes.60494add001acd90e6f7c7516a4ac39c251809bf: Er ... no ... I was just admiring them.
textByHashes.39c9ede2a8ac4047f8f3bc1766caca90ffe34070: (Hmmm ... better not let those guards see me...)
textByHashes.d998e30bf28503c21c063ff23b8b8839ba36fea0: I'm supposed to be getting a statue of a KING from Lumbridge. I'm no expert, but that looks like a QUEEN to me.
textByHashes.a32ff68dc90a1b8dc61fbd192829325d56433ecd: Really? What haven't I finished yet?
textByHashes.a911f69c24dec67934e8f52b43d2282db3c63ba1: Oh, you want me to go and get Roald – sorry ... King Roald ... and bring him here. Fair enough, wait here then, I'll be back in a mo.
textByHashes.18e2faa99bfcfa4212c7f15234a85c913cf0ed8f: No, I haven't spoken to Roll ... King Roald ... yet.
textByHashes.caecc67c5ade69001895c68ffc1e7ba91cb2c836: Would you like to follow me for a minute?
textByHashes.1ca5ab4c591e55b98efe7fbd7cf53874c6382b68: Well, if you can't be bothered then neither can I.
textByHashes.5ec1f3eea71429c380607c1b5a1791a0f15a8e65: I'm not the one who's arguing, you are.
textByHashes.2821d7ab574fbba87f1ed967a3263fe813ff7ef7: Well, stop talking and I'll stop answering.
textByHashes.15442947ac0323d500e0be31ff60e8ca83f5dd87: No, I'm just answering what you're saying.
textByHashes.ca079424c8a91b88aa2a2b1c77b21e90e7613031: I can't remember, it was such a long time ago.
textByHashes.c5d1c15dd26cac7d222bd4c148f4c7def442d31b: I was until you spoke to me again.
textByHashes.3f7aec6106d06e0f103ec21d9a56ccfc7e18169b: Of course, your majesty - please forgive me.
textByHashes.3abe8e0926ae81ac6449d9d7453e504aaacfe14b: That's it - I've had it with royalty.
textByHashes.69f22080dbf761de33577fb3663a002494e38fb8: The Queen asked me to bring you.
textByHashes.a1714ddfae0274b64224cb8e0ef46be0917050a1: Actually I think I did most of-
textByHashes.b67312d60a7ab1ea52c9403d3e198eb23e32e82a: Can I use this garden for my own farming?
textByHashes.83599e0aa0733ebe2500126bf9b0b77130497af0: All right then, sorry I asked.
textByHashes.e515631c9effe354c20f68cf2276d11159a27a6b: Alright then, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.98585958ceb0713703e3668a1a57118fa2972817: Sorry, I'm too busy to play pet rescue.
textByHashes.aee2c05fd488719dd467e984517d8bd72c8dfcbc: Hello there, I've been looking for you.
textByHashes.492ff19bb37a7d81a00f1c01444adf09405d1c9d: What? I'm trying to help your mum find Fluffs.
textByHashes.3ddb42f5d7f6e91e50109f260941b83a83611c3d: Tell me sonny, or I will hurt you.
textByHashes.e5dce594c4c1cdf463bcda99775c767cdb806c85: What will make you tell me?
textByHashes.d7880a4d73ad9156857e6027f460d0c24e3173c7: 100 coins! Why should I pay you?
textByHashes.940a95e3cf7cd209c668cbd88d88dd484879b00b: I'm not paying you a penny.
textByHashes.ac5938ac4d3f41a8ef637212ec5e38fedd6f41a6: There you go, now where did you see Fluffs ?
textByHashes.4bb2e2cdf8a91aa12a45243e7962d6c07c42b488: Well, never mind, it's Fluffs' loss.
textByHashes.2efb188d07a1542221ca020f88d93bcac60d3a41: Where did you say you saw Fluffs?
textByHashes.6ab2059b7679798837d386a752225feccdb570a0: He does seem quite a handful.
textByHashes.8d5603334bd600e4eb83899651afc950b370cb77: I think so, I'm just going to look now.
textByHashes.c60ef311878909092a6529fb1f5ed2a42d1c2beb: Well, that's the thing, she refuses to leave.
textByHashes.9f9da803ed8264aa64e82a44a92eeefb8f251b1e: Yeah, she loved them, but she still won't leave.
textByHashes.a604bebaa963193aad8cbdad99218886fede3507: Hello Gertrude. Fluffs ran off with her kitten.
textByHashes.27aa270eed37f158250f66d8b625b0234955e9f8: That's okay, I like to do my bit.
textByHashes.9f84ed2057f5dbca682ce430e7eafc36e8c53811: Well, if it needs a home.
textByHashes.cdfa48d21f6ea5dc462c6d864573bef126ab6016: It's a nice farm you've got here.
textByHashes.7d3a599b3c13052895020fddc132176f94a0f389: Really? So you haven't been here long?
textByHashes.2987a90e73d9abdfb2ddc1c42251207ea664999f: Bring back the head? I can do that. I'm good at killing things. Do you know where the beast is?
textByHashes.e80a432ab6f6ebaa1a70dd92560284964be110cc: Very well. I'll return once I have the head of this beast!
textByHashes.244aeaed3c708c9f7d80f159fc4a35af7b373873: Not something I can help with I'm afraid. Good luck though.
textByHashes.a701ef47693aea44732531fcc86616c7422e793c: Very nice. Well I hope it goes well for you.
textByHashes.1ae640b2b6a778583b472aba102269ea2225f66a: Great to hear. All the best.
textByHashes.99ab1bec964228e58723b2f6b3176bd4e9328340: I've been trying, but I haven't made much progress yet.
textByHashes.20a64edeadffd4c09d098f9ce55bc973f6bbbe88: I'm . Your husband told me that some beast has been causing you both trouble. I've agreed to kill it and bring back its head!
textByHashes.cb8dcdf0c9c26c22cf7d56d03c250d6be94f4b5f: Well fear not. I'm sure I'll make short work of it. I do have one issue, however.
textByHashes.714099e16a813cd8f00e88ee2a84c22b6f7c0959: I don't yet know where to find this beast. I was wondering if you'd seen anything?
textByHashes.8bf1bc28c886bff151c1cdf9e33daf3bdac3162b: But how would I get it coated in flour?
textByHashes.7c814737238610565d7b64d8c5a58c5f460daef5: Use my head? Wait... Did you just...?
textByHashes.4c39922ffc46d7f7183dcecd4492966ac909dd0f: I'm still trying to come up with a way to cover the beast in flour.
textByHashes.ccf5b73a7175f2bd5c93eb6b00b72936af632746: Hello. Do you know anything about the beast causing trouble around here?
textByHashes.fad009394844d04a3173b634b9d434ec906c5838: Surely you'd notice a big beast wondering around though?
textByHashes.1bc622ae6f401fd1cddd37e0716ee43e1d1b9ea8: But then who's guarding the farm at night?
textByHashes.b49de282e91b46d0b53b64076cab7fe446c6604c: Fine. I'll find the beast myself.
textByHashes.c392525d32a18091e6a447f8b8404a99781265f4: Just one question. You said this beast has been going for your livestock. Which animals has it been targeting?
textByHashes.7180824f0a47f04bd65b5e9afed6671fc01a5492: There we go. Anything that touches this gate will end up coated in flour. Now just to wait for the beast to come...
textByHashes.7722d86e1bded19dccc9a50967eebbc5ed9d817b: Looks like the beast tried to get in again. Now to see if the flour plan worked...
textByHashes.1d5a50808e8e218306a5803c1b629c00e706694a: Your wife gave me a good idea to help track it down. I'll have its head soon enough!
textByHashes.32d84977319dd161b2c7e0979c2b719b322dc605: The flour idea worked great. Now I just need to find the beast's home.
textByHashes.a0597a7c7ddf52249b94dcb00105b01a7b776cf7: Ah... a headless beast. Can't really bring back the head if there isn't one. Let's hope Gordon is still happy to reward me...
textByHashes.c1c0ef47a741b74b0c38fb6ea2168cd72a356ac7: I've run into a little issue. The beast is dead, but it didn't have a head.
textByHashes.13f3e69efd547026dfd08c71c44761d36cc6c4f0: So it didn't actually have a head.
textByHashes.3d1b029f944e58ad8459f445adb8b693a8869d94: Well actually I do have a head. Quite a good looking one in fact. It was the beast that didn't.
textByHashes.04d2ff8c0cb5734551c24339a2d6f2dcae3f35e3: But I did the job... How am I meant to bring you the head of a beast with no head?
textByHashes.e244ab719002aa96500839731cd496bf14ce5cf3: I don't have the head of the beast. I do have proof it was headless though.
textByHashes.e10688e9981084eccebd60d0604a6c18427e5852: You assume I can read and write.
textByHashes.8910c3f977338ff595cc58389a7bddeb7c1202f1: Well.. yes. I promise I didn't write this though.
textByHashes.de6c7f2b21c4ebf73064aad3d47849907f10597c: I don't have the head of the beast. I do have the bones though!
textByHashes.a19e652a063a4bf89bcb0d39c1ced0446e4b9104: Have you considered that you might be being too picky?
textByHashes.07a02300ad2feac0b06a9521732d592a7fccd891: I have bested the beast and I bring you its head as proof!
textByHashes.f0a154c644a1f749a393f38835ea29b7eff2785c: This is literally the head of a dead bear. What is wrong with you?
textByHashes.ef4d41c3fe203ff533a40bce0ba38a5edf088b35: What? You said you'd never seen the beast! How do you know it wasn't just a bear?
textByHashes.e03a7ef6c6fee8f3ed0541d39576471fb948a80d: Maybe it didn't have any brains.
textByHashes.6c53fdc8aee6d7fc0d8661aeed4fd0a9f69f9c6b: I've run into a little issue. The beast is dead, but it didn't have a head. Your husband says he won't pay me until I bring him one.
textByHashes.a39ffb52e7dd37a5c4bad9ee6b05b6691db04e24: But what do I do now? I can't bring him a head if there isn't one.
textByHashes.3f82bed729b609d419c70852ad0ba46b3f758439: So I make him a fake head! Great idea!
textByHashes.449e7f02eda2c14f7a50034def8623929ad51571: Still, maybe it will be enough to convince Gordon.
textByHashes.38eb8652f4751e0c63c7e9a177f14c9887ea1ff4: I've made a head out of clay.
textByHashes.e582def5a7e8732c20877261967e97cd9ef796fc: Ah yes! A good question! A very good question! A good question in need of a good answer I'm sure!
textByHashes.bf825e93f2b57e779a0686bb8f3f4932ad8d13a3: Yes... well... This is the head of a... a claybear!
textByHashes.162d6cfe1d0f0e54b882bdbfecf481a44f95e5bd: I made a head out of clay. Gordon didn't buy it though.
textByHashes.badbb548956a8e10067b9eaaf560bcb6de9ad4ee: It somehow looks even worse than before!
textByHashes.16acbcc0a8b5419201ad2bab2ebcfc172a56227a: Gordon said it needed fur though. Maybe he'll be happy with this one.
textByHashes.ca3ef2d05b4f006bc4295720f26848b79fe11b62: I made a head out of clay. Gordon didn't buy it though, so I've now added some fur.
textByHashes.7122550b339462f356bb7571cb521c35e247beea: I have bested the beast and I bring you its head as proof! For real this time!
textByHashes.55f78ed400394f30fff3f4da66dd058a21dd74b7: Ah... Yes... Well the thing about this head is that this is the head of a...
textByHashes.60359075b343ab0597804da541384976f2302a38: It's a rare type of bear. One that doesn't have any blood.
textByHashes.eb2ec52ae69040b247a225c6e28e3864f7f2ecab: Well actually the one that named it is quite the intellectual... Very cool as well... not that I know them or anything.
textByHashes.96540cf77af914636343c41f6b6d746fbc2dd5bd: Gordon didn't buy the clay head so I tried adding some fur. He still wasn't convinced though.
textByHashes.8b28a9d165208337de2d93487c598572ce424f27: Well... it doesn't. It actually looks like someone tried to dye a fur covered clay monstrosity red.
textByHashes.b55d6f4f1cd19fb57c4a65c7b8bfe05b05b281fa: Gordon didn't buy the clay head so I tried adding some fur. He still wasn't convinced so I've dyed it red to make it look bloody.
textByHashes.f4cd98278c8d5a0b5de5ccf3e7a09a8ec0efe1e1: I have bested the beast and I bring you its head as proof... Again!
textByHashes.16a64e7d3ca3710b2c045ba70675a22835f0fe91: Yes. Gordon was happy with the head I made. In fact, he was so happy that he wants it mounting in your home.
textByHashes.6d714c30cf8cb6812dfb116c8f866a9ec3c87012: What a work of art! I've really outdone myself this time! I guess I should let Gordon know.
textByHashes.1ad8a320a4a590fa689c8dbbb3f37b4389060612: No, that's okay - it takes more than a ghost to scare me. What is wrong?
textByHashes.60e109a9da9708197b1a06d41a25f6b5e8f8e181: Yes, I do. It is a very sad story.
textByHashes.c42b7e3714b646b87d9087e6be0ed068a8b2fe6c: A ghost is a soul left in limbo, unable to pass over to the next world; they might have something left to do in this world that torments them, or they might just have died in a state of confusion.
textByHashes.f62cd62c05be1369b7cb9e2999c44472d9b39f02: Why on earth would you do such a thing?
textByHashes.3e95c7dc9464f7afe46d41d4e257ca506e5444da: Yes, of course I will. Tell me what you want me to do.
textByHashes.3d497882498f008d71722c364a3f0b5a98dd1298: I'm sorry, but it isn't really my problem.
textByHashes.fe99f7cde99024a2cf75b5a8dfc0befec74215b5: Leave me alone - I'm scared of ghosts!!!
textByHashes.3ea2f2557a80cd5d352979c082ddf068bb5c767b: No, I was just getting to that.
textByHashes.54341c11c895873137134ec393671479986662f7: I must speak with you on behalf of Velorina.
textByHashes.2a855294229affe6117106afd35dc816c16f3b3b: I'm sorry, but Necrovarus will not let you go.
textByHashes.666e5b3a4537ee18465fdbadf4bd5b0e8d51c459: Do you know where this woman can be found?
textByHashes.7e76052a0a7ef4aba20b4ec1da69af3f3ade33cc: If it was such a long time ago, won't she be dead already?
textByHashes.7e979e36321266c88aa5192042d62ee67be19d07: Were you once a disciple of Necrovarus in the Temple of Phasmatys, old woman?
textByHashes.58224aa127d8f78a9a2a6949fdfae7510fb2711d: Is there anything that can help to refresh your memory?
textByHashes.89593da35b4dd4494ca099ed4fd373b111a41b58: Here's some tea for you, like you asked.
textByHashes.c746405aab4c715c515c49eb8fbac0e89fc8f161: I see. Can I have this special cup, then?
textByHashes.46b71ac17c3a41b3702873583b514ed304c39c92: Do you know where I can find nettles around here?
textByHashes.1e7bea2abe3a6c836ef88bcd5802d6d7064654fc: Here's a lovely cup of tea for you, in your own special cup.
textByHashes.e4c0753f7b3d1792bad2d9df75168d79a2570b69: Here's a lovely cup of milky tea for you, in your own special cup.
textByHashes.bcd76e7fef79d5de7bc282b3137e3765c3bc0bc6: I have come from Velorina. She needs your help.
textByHashes.dd33ce92269b2b03ab79dde2a187c2a4925d6578: She and many others want to pass on into the next world, but Necrovarus will not let them. Do you know of any way to help them?
textByHashes.5ea5fa1bc023971df205720f51d9fa5226a41730: Yes, I'm carrying one in my bag.
textByHashes.b369fbb6ac6010070ef6bb26bf6946105cafa45e: Yes, I'm wearing one right now.
textByHashes.1b511b8b43b559df09d26ce4cddfc5ed34ee4405: What do you need to perform the enchantment?
textByHashes.c86dac0cda336694fe9e4c5cddb61ee20d0c0ccf: You are doing so much for me - is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.8abb0ab45b1edd67f9f29334dbe9e6ab425faec0: That's the second saddest story I have heard today.
textByHashes.ba8804976cfcc56a291397ca22cc878ec4a3bb4a: If I find him, I will pass it on.
textByHashes.b5b33dc4be77c262d725850e6c6a6ec43c8a3ef9: Remind me - what can I do about Necrovarus?
textByHashes.605b46a525074cfba3cf9c8b26a05ca3ce0bcb10: What did you want me to get for you?
textByHashes.749f5c4183f7a809ac78806bfc82161afea8e73f: I'll go and search for those items you need.
textByHashes.8272f0e1526125e84220c6b8f127a807106f67b9: I am afraid I have not found your son yet.
textByHashes.15453e3cb8a88925dffac840e195b91d59ee2afe: Do you know where I can find the Book of Haricanto?
textByHashes.46f5b1937cf35714952a8a027df0f690f9fefefc: Do you know where I can find the Robes of Necrovarus?
textByHashes.4431d6e2002c36c685e1a45aff84a355c3966191: I need something to translate the Book of Haricanto.
textByHashes.9682afebd7f13142b7e83d906015682e1c894245: Can I have the key to the chest?
textByHashes.96171c08a6db017005d723eb08656e5d4a24d3d7: Your mother gave it to me to pass on to you.
textByHashes.0e9de5a72efc60b77c1228f8244b02f9bc6fbd34: Yes, in a shack to the west of here.
textByHashes.4588130a584c6fd09991f6be30fe41e63b16d1b9: Can I have the key to the chest, then?
textByHashes.78c4be1476b08159892a5fc671b745141f14bf9f: Good news! I have found your son!
textByHashes.2ee74bb6127e2725a0085d1e51f577eb2bc517b4: He lives on a shipwreck to the east of here. He remembers you and wishes you well.
textByHashes.f574239b398206f542be471a779b56850f71ce79: If I pay 500 ectotokens, can I get unlimited trips?
textByHashes.e94418ce94bb0c5b63dead367aee0402d88c1bab: It's nice to see a human face around here.
textByHashes.06adf246d3320713f95b654da26dd34150082f6e: You come from the lands of the East? Do you have anything that can help me translate a book that is scribed in your language?
textByHashes.4a175335ac9adcf1e10d3f705991b154d59c899d: What would you like me to do?
textByHashes.3b1a1c0f5dc7f442dc71347bca8c634292dab152: Okay, wait here - I'll get you your bow.
textByHashes.801854360d817e2a222c63000462b3965bb2e12c: Sorry, I have too much to do at the moment.
textByHashes.207c56ee751dfbd6c6462153df21fe76bd599298: Have you got an oak longbow that I can get Robin to sign for you?
textByHashes.dc713a6ffdea54f09ffb9bb24ac3b54fe7691700: I don't have enough money on me for a game of Runedraw at the moment.
textByHashes.07d8df08ffbf56f8279660ba2c716a8862d22c9a: Yes, I'll give you a game.
textByHashes.3463d93bb00ab67740d8140e603ccedafa203dad: So are you going to pay up then? You owe me gold coins!
textByHashes.984d88153f6bc5334496e249fce9218e9796e5b0: No, you didn't pay up the last time you lost.
textByHashes.8f24faa1b938cc6e0e1396a3717481c3899faf18: Well done, you beat me. But you still owe me gold pieces.
textByHashes.d5ba68151fc70e87fd019753f4f6387356658b2f: I've had enough of you not paying up - you owe me 100 gold coins. I'm going to tell the ghosts what you're doing.
textByHashes.4720b590503dbdac6012075c6adc3acc1a3c915a: How about you signing my longbow then?
textByHashes.d3b7612dae0f5dc12202a4f8e8379f20bf40d0bd: I have your signed longbow for you.
textByHashes.b6b7355325923a24a8fcebce4d3febc62a1be755: He was more than happy to oblige (cough). Here you are.
textByHashes.1e89a9e19abf6fec0ca70c9c879e302d86357213: I'm sorry, I seem to have lost the translation manual you gave me.
textByHashes.31d4f06c6ec7dbebc2e0340d652cfa74e9a2ef26: Thank you for the translation manual, Ak-Haranu - it may save many souls before long.
textByHashes.26bef24dd906b626cff7ea990b37ae6240f476a9: After hearing Velorina's story I will be happy to help out.
textByHashes.66872f6c89abc4b9af254a3e2345ca8a0b697f0f: I'm sorry, I don't really think I should get involved.
textByHashes.20fdbba399eaf710f788a84dc2cb64fc7341eaba: I'm sorry, I seem to have lost my petition form.
textByHashes.d5eee022ef7ff72d740ed03f6316a18ac6aac948: What happened to the folk of this town?
textByHashes.eb652fdea0acc6355a9853c7903340a249083943: Do you have any jobs I can do?
textByHashes.1ad2ca4a59505e03fa0f804bf9383269d0c9301c: No, I didn't mean a job like that.
textByHashes.796cea719afd1778b15d4496786fa39907ff51f0: I've brought you a clean bedsheet, Robin.
textByHashes.1962b68bb3c178c59dadea9790397dad80a6523c: Would you sign this petition form, please?
textByHashes.2266266f893dd43ab13579d77ec109d6093fca46: I don't have that many on me.
textByHashes.723bffc706e6b296b6a6e2c30dc0e3df427ee336: There's no way I'm giving in to corruption.
textByHashes.33dc97a2287184838f7c7d0604c6f2113d67419b: Thank you for your kind support.
textByHashes.5537188f68c34bc1f1ce8102914c1a950d62b43f: I must let you know, Necrovarus, that I am collecting signatures from the citizens of Port Phasmatys.
textByHashes.6509971cccd04c74b67bf46c561e447107d1d8f9: Necrovarus, I am presenting you with a petition form that has been signed by 10 citizens of Port Phasmatys.
textByHashes.65269a602ed52b7f8dce34abe6cd61301a719240: It says that the citizens of Port Phasmatys should have the right to choose whether they pass over into the next world or not, and not have this decided by the powers that be on their behalf.
textByHashes.474d5b1ff0e3f914a34aeb6c508e7447e20e6baa: So you will let them pass over if they wish?
textByHashes.75f1ad226aed0f8110bd471183fba5881487c332: So, have you changed your mind yet?
textByHashes.b243db0a9e37667b477c38495bdd4d907b7633f9: It matters not that you ignore your citizens' wishes, Necrovarus. Wheels have been set in motion, wheels that will set them free.
textByHashes.f837395e7f261513125d7358cb5cd9f9e4d7bdb3: I seem to have lost my ghostspeak amulet.
textByHashes.4414db4d086b2218daba488fecb28e3f3529e1a3: Actually, I haven't tried it yet.
textByHashes.4f2a1d8160bbf99e71ba2d3c160ec5d99966cd9b: I have had the Amulet of Ghostspeak enchanted, which I shall use to command Necrovarus to set you free.
textByHashes.b1d6d91a0884badbd417b18d6ce4d26af57d9d27: No, Necrovarus, I am not insane. With this enchanted amulet of ghostspeak I have the power to command you to do my will!
textByHashes.6f4b28b6a5a1772ce8a5f80f674f6c8340ad0db2: Let any ghost who so wishes pass on into the next world.
textByHashes.f54fd5a24a381f9322828892b702eb2a22819139: I think we're almost getting there...
textByHashes.fda3d402ce688cfb296238c3446e779671c7bfee: Told you I'd defeat you, Necrovarus. My advice to you is to pass over to the next world yourself with everybody else.
textByHashes.849d1b363011f5da96ee2db6c8d24b3ebeb60591: Quiet, evil priest!! If you try anything I will command you again, but this time it will be to throw yourself into the Endless Void for the rest of eternity.
textByHashes.033f451b666e1e7b80b1fc91af4282ac32e5f3b2: I thought you were going to pass over to the next world.
textByHashes.9df377f8757b373745a03d2ed1d2ae1948f09078: I know, but can I have another one anyway?
textByHashes.59248f44c9214af504d86f00cb2c3f2a84f84d39: Why are you still protesting? I have commanded Necrovarus to let you and your friends do as you like! There's no need for this anymore!
textByHashes.313302ff2e0419b301fd93842c22595fedd0a485: Why are you arguing about the colour of your armour?
textByHashes.e8c8e99ecc151b660185a29cc1ee39f247bb38e1: What is the goblin new century?
textByHashes.a9ab5864d5de22e5c1ad9607f253c10ac1e02a72: Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you?
textByHashes.5a164a3787572063f0e6373856e9ad163fbdb1a6: How am I meant to get orange armour?
textByHashes.9166b9859ba00f874bb6d2f170435025fcb8bb4f: Where do I get goblin armour?
textByHashes.0acfda8e2859f3a79e5d7e81557e5da5d7011446: Do you know where I can get dye?
textByHashes.71b80b81a288e81f9e0b1482901ba96a142fe49e: Well where did you get your red and green dye from?
textByHashes.eee6db2936316c9f61f1118da86e2f0ca4844d18: Actually, I think I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.3834a12965bb64f9ad2ba59ee57d3fe5f4dc684d: Half of them are wearing red and half of them green.
textByHashes.e3423980f850c8ae35c3b859baf6559ac8320f7f: What do you think of this colour?
textByHashes.3522ef248a6701d04d6a809c5dd1ff01c8986628: I have some orange armour here.
textByHashes.4e71bc8cfee34783c1935b5464cb487e390d8ebb: I have some blue armour here.
textByHashes.a5801b147b4262a5bb44807e8a2505419c0f0ce7: But I thought brown was the armour you were changing from...
textByHashes.9b369f3dd27f6652eaf50d44a4960e15cdcc1756: Never mind, anything is worth a try.
textByHashes.b9dca9ac99693b7a6a49a05201a8d946f87dbf28: I have some brown armour here.
textByHashes.922877c19a0c97ec0d2ca54390caa4b01500a8f3: Why would I want beans exactly? I mean, beans are good, of course, but I'm pretty sure I can get them anywhere.
textByHashes.2449233814cdc0e8343a9695c2e63c4c5337950e: Ok then. So what do they do exactly?
textByHashes.58ad71f7e0af11e4f4ff4d947c4d42ed47bdf979: O...kay. So, are you going to tell me what they do?
textByHashes.f917cc094baa7c2a163dde700bc13978c2fbd0e3: So, can I have the beans then?
textByHashes.660a887229ca0318ea266b62a35f23dccef41bf8: So, how much gold do you want for the beans, if I decide to buy them?
textByHashes.c7ecaa3d5a4f996eb5d38f9bf7ce1ccaa16f7cab: Ok, so if I get these items, you will trade them for the beans. Is that right?
textByHashes.d2f46908e824bfe7f5c5726ef130079dc910e746: What items do you need me to find then - assuming I still want those beans of course. Not that I do, but I might.
textByHashes.fda58f6b6c438975f4201decdfe25bd7dcc00da8: What do you need the feather for?
textByHashes.5b044897243369cabbcd462245d81af6df8215b0: I guess. If you say so.
textByHashes.a4b80a47acbf8f3a35eafe8b0121dbfe8710b6e1: How do I find Grimgnash again?
textByHashes.c05d4d24149516ef2eb926ffaede295b99ed7962: Excuse me...say what now? He chews people's bones? I thought you said this was an easy task?
textByHashes.d6f4ebe258dc6e033034142f18d0c452e43dce72: You know, I'm not sure that was even a compliment.
textByHashes.0d26660cc0326bcb61acfc885a1be7b2bfdf0c77: What's the other item I need to find?
textByHashes.98f254e9442c52f60db0fe10f75d8fa55e1d3ed1: Ok. Where can I find him?
textByHashes.ef6798c2ac1346c29894084e77fe3796f24b38c6: Ok, that seems simple enough. I'll get the helmet for you as well.
textByHashes.7490d1407687fb9bcf07be1aceadebcd7c2c0e5a: Do you have any weird items in your collection?
textByHashes.39c87318ab38a07ba99df716942a284d7aedae47: Umm...I see. Well, can you tell me about any of them?
textByHashes.6849ac9df4b479770d89d3be21ce0aa9ca6a1eba: A two-eyed cyclops? Uh...wouldn't that be a normal giant perhaps?
textByHashes.750cbbf48b6c0dbebef28d14dbe0c87cc8fe7564: Umm...no, I guess not. Well, what else do you have?
textByHashes.53968b1afe7056f89be76992fe912a6fefafe4f8: Really? That's amazing! A unicorn without a horn?
textByHashes.ef87cbdbfab31ccbc9dcbbb1e566e907fa3a738a: I expect so. Well, on to other things for now then, I guess.
textByHashes.e343e9f0fee9af4d37d76da04e51698ae669553b: I should be off, I think.
textByHashes.296e68f1ad191008b1b61a061ff7a0b1be6e8901: I have a question or two I would like to ask you.
textByHashes.6f7d3609e2b7621200a03b597054c8c609e5af97: No, wait! I didn't come to be eaten!
textByHashes.66dcce5ae9fcc52d55841966a5588f046eba832f: I heard you were a great and mighty Griffin!
textByHashes.8c96ef92d7be0060c050f6c575fa7b55848ec57b: Perhaps I can help you get to sleep in some way. Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.b980ea889eeac607f4867b899de57b14955f97e9: I have come for your magic feather!
textByHashes.be0a8a83cf9a0b9579bc5a75737bb9105ce9ea4b: No, wait! I was wondering if perhaps I could help you at all. You said you couldn't sleep. Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.f598b83d49524b3e79bf7f5df3b40609d26ea4a7: So you want me to tell you a bed-time story, is that right?
textByHashes.fdd8c08050b4e4d742e50bd681a69e41654005cf: Right, well I'm sure that shouldn't be too hard. I know lots of stories!
textByHashes.3ceefaf6331f601e392c2c2e55e6259bd79d1b0b: Death and fire?...ok then. Let me see...
textByHashes.ccab07678fae5311ed9e97319134836f07b002e3: There once was a graveyard filled with undead.
textByHashes.b9ab83a076b7e9512ec908bce060d48cd53b6242: Uh...yes...yes I suppose they could be.
textByHashes.25d3116c19931d433a0030d921539dc9d0536293: There lived a skeleton named Grimgnash.
textByHashes.b36762ec212905cc2810feeb08e551ca555609f9: Oh, wait! Sorry! I got that bit wrong there. I was thinking of your name. My mistake! What I meant was...
textByHashes.8a4ba1cb9610e423f6071b051861fed74b369ae9: There lived a skeleton named Skullrot.
textByHashes.efa3c2b585b7f6da74b41658ef9d2313c9d827b5: I...er..I'm sure nobody would disagree with you.
textByHashes.d1cba925a6fcbd854dc58f027bc58f3686016fb8: Uh...he was happy because...er...he was dead?
textByHashes.0e79aab0c0776081559ff6ae9f78f772cb2be22b: No, I don't think you understand what a skeleton is, exactly...
textByHashes.3e3800746d33b950e8d2fb9a917f1bd9e3ac48f4: Uh...he was angry because...er...he had a headache?
textByHashes.38910b9113d760b9ab95e5f3cc2fd4e959cb8df7: Ok, then. So Skullrot was completely insane. He was off his rocker. One noodle short of a bowl of spaghetti. Not quite all there.
textByHashes.55476a3dd45fa9f5a6d2c46a8a52328e0d7b2890: Anyway, he was out haunting his graveyard one day when he came across a small gnome.
textByHashes.80c1f39fb2499c6133c2b94d71fd33b2314d7fe9: Uh, I'm sorry to hear that. Anyway, this poor gnome had somehow got his foot stuck under a fallen gravestone.
textByHashes.2b62269ea4f8f6364b058dc7ab35a75627b31340: And the gnome ran away as quick as his little feet could carry him.
textByHashes.9d6978a51b3901bf54409950bfdd0a2b2194375a: Skullrot left the gnome there to die.
textByHashes.eebeb042bc81901b68a02fec5cf35a59dc056b9f: So the gnome, thinking this was his chance, found a log to lever the stone off his foot and he scarpered away quickly.
textByHashes.e3202d9df9051db513d2cf3984470478a62bb05a: No, wait, I got it wrong! Wait...!
textByHashes.6eba5d01d7ab0eaba5fe6c13647b1b37c12e512c: In fact, he laughed so hard that he fell backwards into an empty grave and was never seen again. The end.
textByHashes.2c0e332ade08382fe4bdf838398ae4d1ef5078e6: Eh? Oh, uh...well without Skullrot there he was able to get himself free again and ran away, vowing never to return to the graveyard ever again.
textByHashes.5f6925713ba683a225fc387e3dd0bbad7d415517: Skullrot hungrily grabbed the gnome's hair.
textByHashes.e89f71343892695d61d79f873fccb1d7f8a5c7ed: Skullrot wrenched the gnome out with one hand, pulling hard on his hair. The poor gnome's foot snapped out of the gravestone and went crack as his foot dislocated!
textByHashes.5da0a044fd74024301ab4cc1ec41a1e9fecbfdb8: Well, the poor gnome - Nobby was his name - was in terrible pain and fear as to what would happen to him next.
textByHashes.a19ec119d494ff9dd6c2402d5c914f4c31a3ec2f: Ok, ok. Anyway, the gnome was in awful pain, so Skullrot took him back to his home in his grave where he...
textByHashes.b551ef176f595871e5d34109acafe3baa7d001d2: Locked him in an iron cage.
textByHashes.7985ff28523869df94a7cc45b2964e41287b6607: Luckily, the bars were built for a human sized person and so the gnome quickly slipped through them and ran - painfully - out the door.
textByHashes.05be29c0a3a352e3ff6ee77b150695a88f7d4664: The gnome headed straight out the graveyard, glad to still be alive and never wanting to return.
textByHashes.3850a19c442453f50c2ada5aa90cebc301619769: Put him into a pot for dinner.
textByHashes.f9a09ffcfc0b8eaad08608f9fcafefc14f0329c0: Skullrot was making a stew and had decided that the gnome would taste wonderful in it.
textByHashes.762e7019439d20bb491ea0674b3fc16d7bf972d5: However, Skullrot had filled the pot up too much, and so while the skeleton's back was turned, the gnome swam to the edge of the pot and up, over the side.
textByHashes.c482e8fff29abc1702377e6e58122d330c9f6b38: With a little shout of glee, the gnome hopped on one leg straight out of the door and fled as fast as his little foot could hop him!
textByHashes.0a7637a3e3d671cb95270d29d3423f545a20305b: Started to strangle the poor gnome.
textByHashes.d3f02d5a1a9a160ac0b72dacf8dac411574a7115: The gnome struggled with the cold boney fingers that were trying to end his life until he managed to pry himself free!
textByHashes.33b3677f6a468e6b6e53afb3c74358390481dd57: Ok, it was all the little gnome could do to crawl painfully across the floor away from Skullrot, who was busy getting a pot to put the gnome in.
textByHashes.5a7af5268ea68e94c1061cf61fcd74fa03b57771: Then, when all seemed lost for the little gnome, he suddenly saw something that might save his little life!
textByHashes.3bd9d4e2c87f82ebf54d257bca74fbdad0536323: Ok, ok! Don't worry, we're almost done.
textByHashes.2958d1850ce70b794bf124f758bb3261d8c956d5: So, then. The gnome looked up and he saw what might be his best chance to get out alive!
textByHashes.446fa95c6f1445c14fccb5c0a71fa91002765136: He saw a hole he could just fit through.
textByHashes.8629596628fde996e9fdd7330757f2314837cc2a: As he crawled forward two yellow slitted eyes appeared in the gloom before him. He froze in fear!
textByHashes.e5f14d58b354c2005c9e6a1162a2c76050d73158: Skullrot did not get his dinner that night, but something else...something much worse...did. The end.
textByHashes.c7be92f9385dd82ac10657f418b0e54a49a7e644: So what did you think, Grimgnash?
textByHashes.c04b485c11dbf7f31e083bdaf3c6998cb948d640: He saw a big axe leaning on the wall.
textByHashes.1b1432aabddb5d2b067f976f2193080a64bb34ca: He crawled painfully, oh so painfully over to the axe. He could use it to kill Skullrot.
textByHashes.2c64044c5ce38493ad114de75fad9bb54c981f82: As he grasped the axe he realised it was a lot heavier than it looked! In fact much heavier indeed! He couldn't hold it or stop it falling off the wall!
textByHashes.f1a1f64e8b10f61960d825f0654b8411860f36e8: As the axe fell, the poor gnome could not get out of the way in time and the razor sharp blade fell CRACK! And it killed him instantly.
textByHashes.a738953efac9ef67b8d54b98a5ce9c075c2c33df: And so Skullrot was pleased to find that he had a nice dinner for that night and sat down for a big supper! The end.
textByHashes.d81d01d10e337a3ba64ba30bbee24d048335a453: He saw some bones lying in the corner.
textByHashes.668531ab266cd9d599a27fb075685423c48881c1: He quickly remembered that if he buried them he could get his prayer up and so might be able to cast a heal spell on his legs!
textByHashes.c2db166013119c7dc70119598b0c0c12263ebda6: He dragged his painful body over to the bones and buried them all - there was quite a large pile - in the floor.
textByHashes.4682cd4188dfaed2fb23b8bfce11bf37aec2f89d: All of a sudden, he remembered a good spell to heal himself from his injuries. He started to recite the prayer quickly.
textByHashes.b0998c92adc30127fdfbec6f6c466c4940c68fe3: Just then, a huge zombie appeared out of nowhere and mumbled something about his bones being disturbed! The zombie crunched his fist down on the gnome's head.
textByHashes.d8b8b310be083ea16e2d2643589a34b53a27cc71: The gnome cried out in terror and realised that all was lost! He could not get away now!
textByHashes.0f9b9fde43df668217f29fc3c9ebb401a6b7b519: And so, Skullrot decided to invite the zombie to dinner as he never usually had guests.
textByHashes.2b0a6cf440eda05282cd9896ea00eb686e24e32d: Then the two of them laughed and joked merrily throughout the night with their stomachs full of a hearty dinner! The end.
textByHashes.a68e3ab94bc72cd7a7bac07dbe2e66be30ec6b20: He saw a small sandwich on the floor.
textByHashes.072b586c77342b6c2899a714d40b695453c575a6: He pulled himself over to it. In his desperation he thought to himself, there's a sandwich here. A sandwich! Maybe the skeleton will eat that instead?
textByHashes.c4f6bc2e3e4a10c6cb8ed226d29ffc2829453ae5: He quickly grasped the sandwich in his little hands. Strangely, in his panic-stricken state, he noticed that it was long and tubular shaped.
textByHashes.79b384fe2ea7e71380fad546d16fcc7ae14095c0: What an odd thing to notice, he thought. And then all of a sudden he heard an almighty voice boom out of nowhere!
textByHashes.97fee4e2e6e3fc51989305f795bc0576d1b32dc0: 'Oi!', said the voice. 'I didn't say you could take that!' And with that, there was an almighty crunch on his little gnome head, and that was the last thing he felt.
textByHashes.432fe94fec2904cfe1ab6bfd09894fdfa821b849: Skullrot sat down for the night and had a lovely big dinner, followed by many baguette sandwiches. Not triangle ones, no, no! The end.
textByHashes.c45ed6990997c335da10bc8b33d618fed645c253: Locked the gnome in the attic to die.
textByHashes.ab9d33797dfc5513b173441d9a4e433a2362cd4d: Fortunately for the gnome, Skullrot forgot that he lived in a grave, so he didn't have an attic. Instead the gnome was locked outside.
textByHashes.6900cf73006e07a3386c77084a52041ba3a52d11: The gnome quickly limped away, glad to still be alive.
textByHashes.c2bf8505fcf1adb8aba26509f42da529c8f9fb5d: There lived a skeleton named Boney.
textByHashes.5bfc3ff0de9a204bc0a8ff735453e39631355835: There lived a skeleton named Harry.
textByHashes.2a2262c5cec3ee2bb398db1bdfee8b2da21bbbe7: There once was a king named Roland.
textByHashes.ef092aaebf73b236fb760ebfa5a3350f8e4c5ab4: What? No! Wait, I got that bit wrong! Sorry. What I meant was...
textByHashes.0ab983e9706b0f01e23742ec7b230bbad22c7e17: There once was a princess named Esmerelda.
textByHashes.83976cae5359c5d27f52df3bd88ccdd2238cb48e: There once was a little bunny called Flumper.
textByHashes.62156c02c72aa5041aa1eff7c56f270d0d4e9451: Hi, Sylas. I have Grimgnash's feather for you.
textByHashes.1fc8f605cbe9421c6897054f226a9f4cc6d7b340: Well it's mine and you can't have it anyway. So there!
textByHashes.86ab70989f1bd9f079bda6acd1e322ae7aeb5e74: Uh...no...no, nothing to see here. It was just the...er...wind! Yes, the wind.
textByHashes.2d391b4f7f8da7abfb4b761053b31484be35d492: Uh...hello there! Can you hear me?
textByHashes.f29954193051aa6800b86a8222895a6b1180dec0: No, no. I'm not either of them.
textByHashes.e75008648e80155bb31d7116ec22469b5a065cd9: Ha ha! No, I'm speaking to you through the pipe here! I'm at the bottom of your tower.
textByHashes.bd333562976ce88139368d61df91561e7176e7e4: So what are you doing up there exactly? And how come you talk so strangely?
textByHashes.fe6bf290229f0ca7ad3ffb583f5c5d6e92d36cfa: Hey, you're not related to Sir Tiffy by any chance are you?
textByHashes.cc6b7418a8dd4ca66a9981e5011562ce02a71571: I see. Well is there anything I can do to help you up there?
textByHashes.05a384c2219290814cf5e4cab0c82ea2bdb15275: Why? I don't understand what's going on!
textByHashes.38bb824ef444fabfabf9ccfc17bfbb12df343d23: Right! Let me have a think, then!
textByHashes.dafaf0b4bc221732d8fbca42ae51d84e1d5aad58: Umm...it's me again. . I'm speaking in the drain pipe, remember?
textByHashes.15824866def9f71fdb3019db368ef0a436be329c: I'm sure there must be something I can do to help you up there.
textByHashes.6ebbe0027c4c05bfaa3e7be8aa6825cff85a3621: I think I might have an idea!
textByHashes.fb2574c3ce82d894875af77bc8b1368629bc3cb1: Noise? What noise? I didn't hear any noise.
textByHashes.382093af8314fd0b33e23237bb2a1c4275ca0ee7: I thought princesses were usually kind and loving and graceful?
textByHashes.a701ccedc84b837941f7674e0befd4fbcc05e36f: I see. Well I think I had better go then.
textByHashes.eecfa1aa2c35cb09b630c320fc52830ba1ca514e: You could try and climb down.
textByHashes.2580d866ff417c743883e12633120ab48eb73a53: So you won't try it then?
textByHashes.74cd1ab0e00b265cfaa371af3080cd2d3543b808: I could try and climb up.
textByHashes.c8545603228eda2e91855089b9d16dbec1151f7e: I could try and climb the walls.
textByHashes.343c61dd2c349000b94dcf3b94e226800efd6e93: I'm glad you're able to admire the architecture, but you're still stuck up there!
textByHashes.5cdd6d3735dba78d38ce24e895f37800108cea7d: Is there anything up there that can help?
textByHashes.40df835d2812bd04a69303d1239fe9d467c2bc9c: I can't believe I'm going to say this, but...Rupert, Rupert, let down your beard!
textByHashes.80f1967f828666d3f000277ba32cab7286774bdc: No, I mean hang your beard down over the tower and I'll climb up it, ok?
textByHashes.60d7ace5f0e0297466c5d9fd792887396b2bbb61: Well...er...no, sorry, I made that last bit up!
textByHashes.3efde8a2500504be4eaaa3190c5713c0bfe59b73: Umm, no I guess not. Sorry about that.
textByHashes.c4acb9cf786d5d51411c4d738484cea85d16a7cf: There must be something down here that might help.
textByHashes.319c5311f5214fed6b7b467e2d4f565d2914c692: I'm telling you, it's really not that high.
textByHashes.7243ff2017a16483c85a664fe54982ec7c085e3d: You know, on second thought maybe that's not such a good idea after all.
textByHashes.ed19dae14c61a85fbd39137b40e6f1c7a308478b: Well, I could try and ask her to let you out, perhaps? You know, get her to listen to reason.
textByHashes.ff6248a08796fd1d012a925ddcd37e0b7c3a2af2: I could try speaking to the princess.
textByHashes.b2faf17272da240344d0c17f4d1e6a8991d37566: Well, I could try and get her to listen to reason, I suppose.
textByHashes.d93a3a71be6fe98c71b773a71043965dbf590a66: I could kill the princess for you!
textByHashes.b9a8039af390809191284fdffb962b2b48b2d5ba: Sure, she doesn't look so tough!
textByHashes.8c120e1a9f8cb7fed6307aafd089d6f84d356306: But she's kidnapped you. Surely that makes her evil?
textByHashes.33099d5078d5fa4c2431a146574347549ba626af: But it would have been fun though, wouldn't it? [laugh]!
textByHashes.4d664d1ef2bbbbe1c8df6465713c42de7aa766ee: She would never have seen it coming! Blam!
textByHashes.819e20d2062fee9f193a92bd21d70bb565782b40: Oh, really? Who are you waiting for? Maybe I've met them?
textByHashes.83b7c1ea476ccaa2103209eef2b4d9f006695e12: Oh, okay. Can I ask you something?
textByHashes.6274758ba1d1376d087cae052171dab09901e493: I notice you have a dwarf in the tower here. I was wondering why he is locked in there?
textByHashes.c29040f088bc84ca2ccf57d3faa939bb0ba8f895: But he seems like a very nice person to me. A bit odd perhaps, but couldn't you let him go?
textByHashes.33ad8614045863e16dc221bc365731698a2c2468: Yes, it was quite a climb, but you have a very strong beard.
textByHashes.728e7d40520f4a621574aaac6aebd538ed82ae04: So, what can I help you with?
textByHashes.49f73b38ee7e7d45281dc0cfbedbc03b6ad82500: A witch? Let me guess, would this witch be her evil stepmother?
textByHashes.f31060533a7a2ecefe48e2d42dc14f7138ae69c7: Ok, so how can I help?
textByHashes.fbacc97c4652d2025c659cfd08174bc15b507fd7: Ok, let me go and talk to her for you, then.
textByHashes.e0c0cd6a692c46c1e5e5fd9468fca66ab12273af: Oh, no I haven't had a chance yet. I'll be back when I have.
textByHashes.93aaa60c613e681f2f957898b11e5879417521e2: Pleased to meet you, Princess Miarz... er... Mizaz... Miquipzi... Marzipan?
textByHashes.edb919c4b18762083e663defc88cff4abef93019: That's an unusual name. Where is it from?
textByHashes.285ecd7d33bfd335f083ef9188428bab8540291e: I see there is an embarrassed-looking dwarf in the tower there.
textByHashes.abaab93462aad9502cf418384e852bc83f658343: Yes, that's actually why I came to speak with you. I was wondering if you couldn't let Rupert go? He's a nice fellow and I can't think he'd have done anything wrong.
textByHashes.7e5f0638cbb49189a96cf3ad2e5bd85b8e731f92: Surely there must be something that will change your mind? Is there anything you want?
textByHashes.652a20a40376aeb1c0801aaf67baaf73215fa248: So you would like me to find it for you?
textByHashes.e3f3e0a433ac8c922c754236bd3608de65580b08: Very well. I will find it for you.
textByHashes.c4818770bcaf44ffd1d905093e0739ff180cfb11: Hey! I do know that house! I rescued some little kid's ball from there!
textByHashes.c7c83dea5d348b50747dd6e87f61f1b93e6b81d0: What does your pendant look like?
textByHashes.3342b9493e4ced982591ce2d263eff0a152321ad: Where are you the princess of exactly?
textByHashes.1dc5cf050d4b5911453ae4ad5ce490a3d8fbdc26: I need a key for the house.
textByHashes.8f322d1ea0c5be0feefc2831d98fa026a0bbe10e: What's so special about it? I've seen pianos all over the place.
textByHashes.3db4ded469a35ad57d1246f05966658f3e979c4e: I see. Thank you for that...er...useful knowledge.
textByHashes.9b7a89657169ea7c4ad7dc66fa00ad548db6e4e9: Please can you repeat that last bit? A flock of noisy birds flew overhead there and I couldn't hear you.
textByHashes.e58aff1f35c4459a0226fe436a0c9773a2948084: I just have another question before I look for your pendant.
textByHashes.f6daac32bc935e6bc82188a829f5d88e0845f94c: Sort of. She's asked me to do something for her first.
textByHashes.a8b9eb051d1a35fb4bfa833a681e6638b54ed894: I have to find a gold pendant of hers that she lost in that witch's house in Taverley.
textByHashes.97a1eae57d511ded2ecab0141e683f0593e9bce1: Don't worry. I'll be careful. I've been in there once before, so I know what's there.
textByHashes.9ba9a923e46b2209c4730991ac111e1d18c79bf4: I don't think so. I'm sure I would have remembered. I was looking for a ball for a boy who had lost it in the witch's garden.
textByHashes.ccb3bb683ff08ea9f087740810a7972ebf91110b: Yes, quite. I'll see what I can find out though.
textByHashes.7fb0ea6c2a09a7180f015246b09c68cd3b945efb: Princess Miazrqa has agreed to free you.
textByHashes.7ce7f0819783f1765d68aed0c440c7437442611d: I did, I think. But it's not good news. The witch has your friend locked up in a cage, down under the house itself.
textByHashes.316d815b6d5fbde17ea898fab4f2ce5854f005d8: I found your pendant, Princess Miazrqa!
textByHashes.7a92b9977e8936e3c6d00d9d3fa7f1e1ddeecf7b: Umm, your second-cousin has some very strange...creatures she keeps.
textByHashes.09f580bbc6d87bd7420dd4f41bb7d07cf457a8b0: I think I feel a little ill...
textByHashes.34929b690f016dc7ac6070c6d665ae38674d3e00: Will you agree to let Rupert go free?
textByHashes.cf27cea1a8eb6492a3ec47051ab9b154844b5a3d: I'm just happy I could help...hey! What happened to your long beard? Where did it go?
textByHashes.7b69276fd39fbdef9f6f5f8cd4a8a42ad6eca169: Oh yes! I can see it now. That's pretty clever!
textByHashes.7e3ad83b5ff085ed93834e9b6385e04b523c6899: Please could I have the helmet?
textByHashes.c7d5d5d538dcb750d1839b33e8e0935400d340c5: So what will you be doing now, Rupert?
textByHashes.dcc417bcc760567cffc385262dfee2409d95ef7f: Princess Miazrqa, I found out what your cousin is up to.
textByHashes.342c2593c0a7a2048d8256cbd8ddc67ff6ed23fc: So you didn't know that she kidnaps poor defenceless gnomes?
textByHashes.ad2d6b7b32eb9e181eb5f6b8ecab41838474c6ce: Yes. There is a gnome in her basement right now!
textByHashes.4870cb3c5922814a3a50543cd2bac0de2c9650ef: You know, Rupert - the dwarf here - is trying to put a stop to what is going on. I am sure he could use your help.
textByHashes.60ba0ef1468d1ebfaaabfeebf35fd6ed5ecb501b: Rupert, I told Miazrqa about what the witch was doing and she was horrified by it.
textByHashes.3be939d95be61628a7dee52a88d3b5ed28e0239a: Yes. Miazrqa has said she would like to help you with your investigations and that you can use this tower as your base of operations if you want.
textByHashes.1e52c18e99ef8d57df15c36c5b89ae637e0b8258: Well, I had better be going for now. Good luck.
textByHashes.694a677e789e4155f8430f78d056558c9baa4a6c: I managed to get Rupert's helmet for you.
textByHashes.9f4ac5c09a2721c87603660ae6c08df61795e1d6: Difficult? You have no idea! There were huge creatures trying to eat me, other creatures trying to tear me apart, witches, gnomes in distress, princesses, and I had to deal with them all!
textByHashes.e7a6e8b6e9ce67bcfcc257af23760e9dc62633bd: Yes, that's what all this was about wasn't it? Some beans! They must be worth a lot for this much trouble!
textByHashes.61d37eb6e5f6f574407b979f35c2166cb82b3960: Worthless? So why did I go to all of this trouble for you? I'm not particularly happy about that.
textByHashes.9c3daa5e1b2746807565157357fe866507f8445c: Ok, so then what do I do?
textByHashes.fe3649e1fcdfdf2ed6dac6422cd82771df247522: Our prize? What exactly is this prize?
textByHashes.6f141d177af19d5a3aebffbb26e6d6cbc21c75fc: But surely that's what anyone would have done? Why is that a bad thing?
textByHashes.5d31a2db3d3b7307c770cea624b9fcebf68cb0f7: Oh, I see. So Gubblebak became hard as a rock?
textByHashes.ae5ba5256b8f31b5d17f7bc9efff9c9728d5fd73: So let me see if I have this straight.
textByHashes.db28cf4cb486fc22b85e01c07599f534d39c9c10: I need to plant the beans in an earth mound south-east of here, water them, let them grow into some big plant and then climb the plant to get to a cloudy area, find a golden goblin and bring it back to you?
textByHashes.5a8bd9cec5a57a8bf6215a8840c5c3c7a355cf14: No, I'm pretty sure you didn't mention any giants! What giant? Now would be a good time to mention it if you were going to!
textByHashes.8877dfc46e98ac11ad96a90770018cb24e5f6995: So how exactly do I get the goblin then?
textByHashes.7ecb8fda25c99cdfa57b1b36eb69532d8e04ef98: Ok then, to recap. I need to plant the beans over there, water them, let them grow into some big plant, climb the plant to get to a cloudy area, kill a giant, find a golden goblin and bring it back to you?
textByHashes.5ae310612d5b4ccc84859268ecf8f7719f00a3a9: Thanks...I think I'm going to need it.
textByHashes.0a847a7036f715c02ac8364e54b101930d04a5c1: Ok then, to recap: I need to plant the beans, water them, let them grow into some big plant, climb the plant to get to a cloudy area, kill a giant, find a golden goblin and bring it back to you?
textByHashes.10a7b783b3e661afab0ed3ce0d4fb73ddb1ab574: I've grown the beans into a huge stalk, as you asked. What am I supposed to do now?
textByHashes.9e8c81144c32aa1083fd049cf3190441953ca40b: Umm...what happens if I forget to pick up the golden goblin after defeating the giant and leave?
textByHashes.5bd99892209e9d96b91cbb99c1357dae7df494a4: I'll go and have another look.
textByHashes.a6e4cf14ba14fb68805aa16a55ae4032737e33d6: Sylas! I found the golden goblin!
textByHashes.2d12db0d266f1ec9343923569f8ebf715d2c0737: Ok, so what should we do?
textByHashes.94649df900ada266d3817789c322e8107d890a25: Can you remind me what I am doing now?
textByHashes.3a49e3019390f12f16737930fcfd66f6af20d2fe: No, I just can't remember what I am supposed to do.
textByHashes.3c58aabb9b76032f83ab8081aeadfc80d87f8405: It did indeed seem like an odd item to look for.
textByHashes.43787a3fdd19bf653a9da46362f1c13052e0817e: Not more potions?! I've had enough of potions for now.
textByHashes.1209c0c75570c42f2cd68c912eae3b3e32c2c116: Oh! Well, that would explain Rupert's beard then.
textByHashes.85bda83bb08f8344bde4cbeb6f53177002365974: Hello there. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.b1a2ffb5c4ac18ea204aee2eaa691f4e50a693e9: I follow the path of Saradomin. Strength through wisdom.
textByHashes.2a03d77ba5bca980e29257e5f306ad259bd71d93: I come seeking challenges and quests.
textByHashes.d8311bd90d3030be6be74a6b788ce6a89dc41ed3: How can an abandoned mine be dangerous?
textByHashes.3851210843e9192da95dc0e0534fba716ba9f63b: I must be going now, good luck on your quest.
textByHashes.5e60f588b3bde83e2e0bb3c4a1762f4fe79f8903: I hope it goes well. Goodbye.
textByHashes.af517e632f17ea35be3a3f71e8639a7b4c853407: Ok I lied, I don't support Saradomin. I'm only here for dastardly evil purposes.
textByHashes.b145e03bb92f4388252f895da2ea675acfd820c8: I could ask the same of you.
textByHashes.ec9b840e8ad27e47a82a9d2a4ab994a43c00de4e: I serve only Zamorak. Strength through chaos.
textByHashes.fb920976f7f8ff3bf7620588e05befcea7e22d7f: What is this quest of which you speak?
textByHashes.6bb97d4a7c70cc0121a301850e488b3a431bd1b7: Fine, I didn't want to talk to you either.
textByHashes.47a2f3d9e445951e7864ea153ca0efe0d9a731d9: My beliefs are in accord with the teachings of Guthix. Balance is power.
textByHashes.2f305ebb45e5868cd22861fbc995033ab3e49b8b: And what sort of purpose would that be?
textByHashes.13cee0df6b19651dd13b41bab0a1fd552e076e86: I can make my own choices, who are you to dispute them?
textByHashes.7127ff59d82662f3eb423ac60499d006461eeb3c: Then I shall leave you to your business.
textByHashes.8bd0bcc193c061fdb81dfac0af1d3ae3d9320ca7: Can you explain the history of these mines again?
textByHashes.b0997bde336442d9c47b1af2062bc446d6eef693: Is there any other way into the mines?
textByHashes.898c49336a97d92b211e43cea69ac58aae4454ae: Where is the second entrance to the mines?
textByHashes.e1e880f60a27af604593fc25901f245855f76c1c: How can you be discreet with THAT star emblazoned on your robes?
textByHashes.103ccdfe1a685d8b4699508def8a8fbc7e607114: Even so, you're not exactly keeping quiet about your allegiance are you?
textByHashes.2d0d8ca14cd818d80100770cb587e64dc1547d10: Is that much consolation when you get chopped up into little pieces?
textByHashes.c10b058d2b91d4ac2c8058e2d232a567293bf619: I can't see anyone behind you.
textByHashes.22fd5a7c487f797544e96804a0309789e16b91c9: And I would be one of them. So, can I borrow that key?
textByHashes.e7e71fd7886c9c05bdd1b047da4e0cb855046d8b: You're right, I was wrong to doubt Saradomin.
textByHashes.5fb2cc79f762f9f1c0541dd29b29f3b396c1fbd2: Please? I'll be very careful with it.
textByHashes.59f3956a1c785611f0ab0dcfe26d064afc52ee7f: And you think you'll be safer in the mine than me?
textByHashes.78993c822599bae2885823eb8154cda6b95a27e6: I didn't want that key anyway.
textByHashes.b939b83fd0eac92794ccf149f6b6e80873f400b9: How does a lost artefact that was only legendary help?
textByHashes.e03532b499a5d52f800e91a41cc026356bb2c487: Why was everyone in the mines slaughtered? Surely it wasn't their fault that the crystals formed?
textByHashes.a2c25e39bb2691d239678758716a30cb63f7b1a6: I've found the second entrance to the mine, I've managed to make it inside.
textByHashes.57ceb5d229ce73db0927382fa0876ed3cc287550: Unfortunately I need a key to use the lift that goes to the lower levels. Can you help?
textByHashes.9a09f1fefc0649139028e115c73399a3b0a768db: Yes, that sounds like the one. May I borrow it?
textByHashes.876c301062848622b7c754dd1570f273dbf3d1e3: I've made it in to the mines. Unfortunately some parts are too dark to navigate.
textByHashes.1affc3d08bd2d89776f2eee582307b57200c5fe8: As much as I respect your fanaticism, that was spectacularly unhelpful.
textByHashes.f8d2f0c464968044c11c415e197517fc1f7f14de: G... g... g... ghost! Scary ghost! Machinery flying everywhere.
textByHashes.22e29decf1b12825b6f40c4845f8d47c65c88055: Who did you say Dayth was again?
textByHashes.d6a0d11a172c6a40a113c715854b45ee4c76fd63: Nonsense, he'll be no match for me.
textByHashes.660f945a89760a92e96e2deda0bdad4bb3622e96: I met that Dayth character you talked about. He wasn't as tough as all that.
textByHashes.0c5b9f54b51936d119e9136570eb697ed36b4dab: I wonder if that cart is anywhere useful now?
textByHashes.d87132972aca2ad636f86ee2a53f33760113bac8: It's kind of dark down here. I should probably find a light source before going further.
textByHashes.cad9065196a8ea0265573ab6b0f0af4ad8b7fea9: Hey - my light source isn't working! I'd better find a more suitable one before trying to go any further.
textByHashes.3ea39da4a4e005cea08a68e231cde043f547c7d8: No thanks. I've got other plans.
textByHashes.d67a90d6e6afa76ab8e4108aa70cde679a1a7ff4: Yes, of course, I'd be happy to help.
textByHashes.daa5ad14c4ea354ce2737e9521f6c3996a12cbb0: Ok. I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.4fbc8cba12959e8a4ed31397cc19a26dca561d5a: You seem uptight. I'll leave you alone.
textByHashes.274adadc150409dce2fcd5d2e4f68d576a2ef329: Yeah, well, just unlucky I guess.
textByHashes.d450545000824052d0871900c5439a572c8acc16: Have you any more info on the Carnilleans?
textByHashes.b718796f827e7a7414fc02bfc92d6557e038ec12: How long have you worked here?
textByHashes.06d7fdd8daba6320816337a5b8550ea8a22539fa: Look, I KNOW you're hiding something. I've heard theres a cult hideout down here.
textByHashes.c839ce43f15610ddbd107b0e3f1ebfb3cffe4df4: Sir Ceril Carnillean is a man of honour!
textByHashes.66b5b0daafcb0fd3399a4e030b90e2d27698d605: The politics and histories of Ardougne do not concern me. I have been given a job and intend to see it through to the end.
textByHashes.50e1d900df5b2b9b8dd6045663d40aa202b45b7a: You're crazy, I'd never help you.
textByHashes.7f07edf6f59b11e3cc2f797fbb02add707f64706: So what would I have to do?
textByHashes.698e12aa833f21e819fd9a8b568d0f50a39d5465: I've heard enough of your rubbish!
textByHashes.01d1ea91bf2d1de0d2358e57a0b8de4994bde951: I've come for the Carnillean family armour. Hand it over, or face the consequences.
textByHashes.28faaa2ba0295aed10b2601b414de01b1a415ae8: So the butler's part of your sordid little cult huh? Why is it ALWAYS the butler? I should have known...
textByHashes.b0a3ed3e9b6be4f1a607f3f1f3a0fb4c86039a23: Yeah yeah, I'm on it, I'm ON it.
textByHashes.a30d38f97144496ee9486fc56db451e7a8c4049d: Hello Ceril. Yes, I found their hideout.
textByHashes.f07168efd33aea41f62c02464f5e0530189b0d77: Uh... yeah... about that... I interrogated a cult member at the hideout's entrance, but he managed to escape into the sewer system.
textByHashes.fd20610b0a33156a57d533c29ff3ffd32177ffc5: Seems they have some sort of grievance against you and your family. Something about some guy called Hazeel?
textByHashes.3aa9a69c9855c4224bf8f5f2e32dc92705cedc86: I know, I know, I'm working on it ok?
textByHashes.58ed7cc007784866ccf0b4ed39969152e9e1c5a5: Uh... I didn't get it yet... I DID find the cult's hideout though!
textByHashes.784ab2e9e4b16756837764a9646488203396339a: Nah, it was a piece of cake.
textByHashes.4acbf53ed15b3ad14622c8d00a9f2e20ec1a6e6a: Drop the act Jones. I know you're in league with the cultists.
textByHashes.976963448597a624939e1e5fa532542df793aeb9: Listen pal, I went to your hideout, I heard them talking about you. You're fooling nobody.
textByHashes.5cfae59dd438957efa1428a5a8c97ce6f4b16b4c: I know all I need to know and when I reveal the truth you're going directly to jail.
textByHashes.5884fc08456b14f822d4d37f68b25fe1a2340c88: I'd rather not if it's all the same to you. I overheard the cultists talking, and apparently Jones is in league with them.
textByHashes.4b7bfef0097f113e6e1d497c116be008b36830ed: Not if I can help it!
textByHashes.f647f46fb24ef3e75135efe6faa40f37a8dcb1b0: Everything I said was the truth.
textByHashes.640f3dcc7a8cc35f70b6aa456ea0abb2a90ccac3: That's true, but nobody believes me.
textByHashes.45d393a95bbe70ed03c7450ce5d64d2e81279ff7: Hey, thanks! That actually does make me feel a bit better!
textByHashes.9d8a1913bf5d9b9b30135c7883e87ec73491063c: Look what I've found in the cupboard!
textByHashes.8542835f80d58d082473c70eb65c1cbd4d8e3e96: No problem. We all make mistakes.
textByHashes.bcef287b035b7481dbdf3e19eb4d4277a42a097d: I lost the poison you gave me...
textByHashes.a5bc7976af7070503211e64214c255a0506e902f: Nope, sorry, I don't have sweets either.
textByHashes.ba5b2b1f99c2860f4249e93c2a4134c8b434c2f1: It WAS only a dog you know...
textByHashes.b144cb49ea3fec9e90cf7e25a4a6ca1dd4436ec5: I poured the poison into the Carnillean's meal as requested. It didn't quite go to plan however.
textByHashes.78f1cf815d2d3e2991334888ca168375d3cd7f87: How does this amulet help do that then?
textByHashes.0588953e4e7dac759a19a51a317fbb67f1c1c87c: Yeah yeah yeah, I'm on it, I'm ON it.
textByHashes.6994ac4049cf6a79da5c045c8406b13fde08671e: Loosen up already. It was only a DOG.
textByHashes.959931937bb9212c553ff2ca043d30328ff75bb7: That? Oh, it's nothing. Just an old amulet.
textByHashes.9ded168f879de8f9dbabecaac1884bd8df0c6152: Mark of Hazeel? I'm sure I don't know what you mean.
textByHashes.78caead1b36d9fd219528fdf62da2852b3d12df0: So do you have any idea where the scroll with the enchantment is?
textByHashes.b6b6b2417812c64e4ab8ef21580fca653bd839fd: And Sir Ceril doesn't suspect a thing?
textByHashes.2820327c07462adce0035b95c48069e62c13bb22: Yeah. It's a real mystery, huh?
textByHashes.c456be4980f0f5040fe06dda764247ba5224fc88: Uh... yeah... about that.. I don't exactly have it right now...
textByHashes.012b5502e297883caf1f2c22f34d9df294ca11c6: Gee. I guess I'll just have to live with that then.
textByHashes.d71d026d6e4e07298d70448a6db5ec3caf17b8ac: Get over it, it was only a dog.
textByHashes.ac45aacc97e8ac292b16c8eaadc8ffbeacd75ef4: Yes, it was in the house all along. Jones can't have looked that hard for it.
textByHashes.991fb4929c8bc7fdbb3ca186814faa0ba32ac12b: Uh... yeah... about that... I seem to have, errm, misplayed it somewhere...
textByHashes.e57fa28d7620e81ff9aaffa1f3754fa03de90518: Well I'm . Maybe I can help you with these cultists?
textByHashes.752451f8d6ac58292f8ed502fd871c64b39165dd: Right... I'll see if I can find this cave.
textByHashes.cda3a7763bd7b65ad3b98c59dc85689417348de0: I'm just happy to be of help.
textByHashes.f9779ebf9302482fd8ca330048ddb58df08e76cc: Look, I know you're lying. I know all about your cult.
textByHashes.2c57ee106ab0cb8ffb1dc912b402d9d185f4a8e2: Unfortunately, I have a job to do. I'm not leaving until it's done.
textByHashes.ef1e791024bf5c81dac6fb0da50c82c2f4bf907f: Right... And what happened to this Hazeel?
textByHashes.83f9f0cb51cff5f39830eb22fe5f9076c520beda: What makes you think I care about the politics and histories of Ardougne?
textByHashes.51e42f83dbbdbf181404e3aab62f97431ecd5e27: Before I decide, I have some questions for you.
textByHashes.f5d47c05f4b00885fea0033ba96ad83fc491e125: Why did the Carnilleans rebel against Hazeel?
textByHashes.9f5b987e50c295299ca12aa7454d0f3207284dc7: Why do you keep breaking into the Carnillean Mansion?
textByHashes.1ec17abf1286a6368147510295c8405f8c74c7dd: What can you tell me about the Mahjarrat?
textByHashes.042bd903d70c174aea46496142cdc55eb31e15d5: And Hazeel is one of them?
textByHashes.c0a4db4018539c2fb0ea2414e73c1069cc61af9e: Alright, how do I do it?
textByHashes.15ede8e971df731d629dcf09c11754426521e02a: I need some time to think on this.
textByHashes.48b4aad5f92777a06520db71d22b4f4683becc47: You know I'm going to stop you, right?
textByHashes.8677a32a9661b03f75b6703e277b4df34e821ff8: Actually, I need more time to think on this.
textByHashes.c7e7b164c1ca456f5e2bbd69074680f945f7a36c: So the butler's part of your little cult? Why is it always the butler? I should have known...
textByHashes.3b77e929696429f70fe2b3668ea518d56d9fcbb3: Drop the act, Jones. I know you're in league with the cultists.
textByHashes.138755c1b358291d23b8e63c130310452e132d3b: Really? So you won't mind me telling Ceril then?
textByHashes.31c261a8b7262a3fb1c5466268cf2b57e5235c03: I'd rather not if it's all the same to you. Apparently Jones is in league with the cultists.
textByHashes.2e93e0f8ea9276c27f9c07f15aacd0ff77a29ec9: Well I'll do my best to console myself over your feelings towards me.
textByHashes.881ce2a9f6e627cde3ff18da25e00513142c70f9: You won't get away with this, Jones! I know who you really are!
textByHashes.b7c1b91af933dbc36052ac2c827186940336e140: This isn't over! I will find proof!
textByHashes.281f1e20d897b4096ad9347eab94dea158d88773: It is, but nobody believes me.
textByHashes.829f93e176edb6cc991ac5d544da2b30c5323f88: And what do we have here...
textByHashes.c66a89418b41a4e30c97a4960a053ba9137d190f: Take a look at what I've found.
textByHashes.24f22b4352118fc94e5d5b63b6829a6960ab8bbb: Don't worry about it! A good deed is its own reward. And that money didn't hurt either.
textByHashes.019744ed5783f837619c1fbf8699e7e8baebdab3: Thanks! So is everything all quiet around here now?
textByHashes.36a2eea81dd9b09b5aa35ad1c73f8d77d0eaaa9e: I'm afraid I don't have any toys.
textByHashes.3b90609ec0905d14b3701f2f7d6bbe1d95aeab82: I'm afraid I haven't found them yet.
textByHashes.f09f7454d1cc80a8ab999567912924d71cfd2326: Yeah... Hopefully someone finds them soon.
textByHashes.34ac5679766b77553a44533ccd7e2e93c5c709ef: Your dog got poisoned? That's not right.
textByHashes.514bd8abe61d2482925b888206754b31c5eefd1f: Uh... I'm sure they won't get away with it...
textByHashes.5b263dd34fd678f7e7917a7a64277b8ad3929e2d: I poisoned the food as requested, but it didn't quite go to plan.
textByHashes.eb09612cc2e8abab1cc71f3acd701745cfe68af1: But how will I know how to set the valves?
textByHashes.da8f10d7cabb077f1329d96af50afbd859c117b8: I lost that amulet you gave me.
textByHashes.cdc0da0461f325f436ef3a35196b4e6b8c19a466: What am I meant to be doing?
textByHashes.265661999c5db3f4d3f9f93129ec5fd49ae55d66: So you want me to find this scroll?
textByHashes.f4dc149b3cb9c206d44bf3e3699f703420df4de8: Don't worry, I'm sure it will all be okay in the end.
textByHashes.8ed868e1d3203d45a41c7f26e4f503f60b04dbb5: I'm making progress. On that note, I hear you might be able to help me with my next task.
textByHashes.95529d503d399539697b321e8d41ff6abbe148a3: Hmm... So it must be somewhere they'd have never stepped foot. I'll keep on looking.
textByHashes.0c9058ba97a8196460c4c500898126ebd7ba85f8: Yes, I have it right here.
textByHashes.433fb63530f467c343301570a7236da1c1a8bc24: I'm a hero. May I apply to join?
textByHashes.90adc9d80fe5fe864488a2c424ed4f76429b7539: Any hints on getting the thieves armband?
textByHashes.29f881b53e178ac87e4e51034d4603f10d280deb: Any hints on getting the feather?
textByHashes.d836a9528e97aaeffe143d09eb9fdf7090a7aaab: Any hints on getting the eel?
textByHashes.40c66c7bb48c3797606a179c8cd3dc0f9923ed51: I'll start looking for all those things then.
textByHashes.dd7007e7f404cc70f8460ece2dbdf212c49ea42c: Good for the foremost heroes of the land.
textByHashes.64e089d64587d3ba0e182192e688f5ddd616a744: It's tough. I've not done it yet.
