textByHashes.82cf5468cdeac69b54341593e18b75670c83c0ec: How would I go about getting a Master Thief armband?
textByHashes.8c7bf244fc3093a03921ce545756d9a2a2ae261e: What am I supposed to be doing again?
textByHashes.0c5e1e7576bc9b1db214178e0d9cb34bce1efef8: Sun, sand and the fresh sea air!
textByHashes.3f2036faaff37a45119039b0ab9cf9ebbc72e2d9: I want to steal Scarface Pete's candlesticks.
textByHashes.ca50cfdfa1810e40c0208887c4eacbad3f74aad2: Mind if I check it out for myself?
textByHashes.04c5dcfc86c4153b0a54a49d4ec304ecb9f4956f: I'm a fellow member of the Phoenix gang.
textByHashes.061f2c74650c81523710dba842484239b4b196ca: Would you like your hedges trimming?
textByHashes.90b0a5a502a11a7d32aa2a071bbdef63682b15b5: This room isn't a lot of use on its own... Maybe I can get extra help from the inside somehow... I wonder if any of the other players have found a way in.
textByHashes.4d2bd812b1ca52218b1bba4942d6316187a848b0: So is this enough to get me a Master Thief armband?
textByHashes.0175caad774958352ad0e171bce8762954a5b6c9: I'm afraid I've lost my Master Thief armband.
textByHashes.1e04f75164e1583bc4c7a9cd15c2d636b57f1bd4: Is there any way I can get the rank of master thief?
textByHashes.d14c6e1b86e6e3749886a46079ecd2067438b792: So can you help me get Scarface Pete's candlesticks?
textByHashes.6155e11efba4cc49b6a262549db765b563c6155c: I volunteer to undertake that mission!
textByHashes.2043b01a3d8b68e86f0fc5269046717a3321e315: I have lost Hartigen's ID paper...
textByHashes.b1ef8c8084d5297682a3b7630350bd178d8a22f2: I have lost Hartigen's ID papers...
textByHashes.924ce4fa2b698be8b96319f9ff9eacc7f8cf9d57: Hi. I'm Hartigen. I've come to work here.
textByHashes.70294cb13a8aa4eb1e988ee6aaf9c99c6c3f9d53: Uh... yeeeeaaaaah.... about that.... I must have left them in my other suit of armour....
textByHashes.cb54cb692d3cfd3bf84f54a33860253e6961d329: Hi there. I am Hartigen. reporting for duty as your new deputy sir!
textByHashes.dbb722bdb12a8af66347ab8f12eaae47a67e68ec: So can I guard the treasure room please?
textByHashes.873ef48ccb4d9166e40869cbc01be1c37138e891: Well, I'd better sort my new room out.
textByHashes.9828f2f4fd3c2bb171f0526323128d0792036cb9: Oh dear... I don't have that with me anymore..
textByHashes.7e3f0bb58e20d9ea41a321c6d2eb08e2894b0177: I can't attack the head guard here! There are too many witnesses around to see me do it! I'd have the whole of Brimhaven after me! Besides, if he dies I want the promotion!
textByHashes.fbdfc1756a595e2fe6b48ea1ccb292af1054210e: He won't notice me having a quick look.
textByHashes.f683c1593a5770fcf00bd8d0005b8e9302b9212b: Hello, I am in search of an Entranan Firebird. Can you help me?
textByHashes.24513a89377d8f3d5d36afcb2c84a71cc238d7b2: So where would I find this 'Queen of the Ice' then?
textByHashes.9f4ecd6e075553adf01cc58985d2ef8215fa5783: I want to find out how to catch a lava eel.
textByHashes.fa01be5b32adfc9d40cfecd84d0ef5d91ef3c010: You know... I'd really rather not.
textByHashes.55672c494ea9b348c03e5f4aad3c3b6904f2c8c8: I have a raw Lava Eel!
textByHashes.ff1b055f09992c7e42dc899216cc0f75f21c4173: I have all the required items.
textByHashes.f7f8180172f221fe336a0113046d2f2d1ac8b3e0: W-what? What do you mean? There's MORE???
textByHashes.0ba2fd52247c48cba02c33b2eb051c48fd846bec: Now I am a knight of the round table, do you have any more quests for me?
textByHashes.d8c40a743948595d51cd7692642d2bd04d8cad88: I may come back and try that later.
textByHashes.c9601861ad3349344b4d46a922013865585a5dca: I am weary of questing for the time being...
textByHashes.d0d6e54a3aa8df6f166b97838da234f8a05c29b1: I am making progress, but I have not recovered the Grail yet.
textByHashes.55f6854a72bfbdc6eb78a7c52308b2a5028bbae7: Hello. King Arthur has sent me on a quest for the Holy Grail. He thought you could offer some assistance.
textByHashes.b83321676909c0d5ba677dba8c834d133793ce49: Where can I find Sir Galahad?
textByHashes.b95082c06646daf2af6d7c9e36c81fd9373c0849: I'd like some advice on finding the Grail.
textByHashes.75adad04f0d87ebdd720f0ed65e11a337182d9ef: I seek the Grail of legend!
textByHashes.10af61cd49ba99389f3f9ffdbc25deb59ba63d88: Thanks. I'll try and find someone who does.
textByHashes.f401915f9d2fd13e1a287320655f8b6f53775ebb: I seek the Grail in the name of Camelot!
textByHashes.a47a7da46173b3123fc271815a0c568d17b12a39: Why would he quit being a Knight?
textByHashes.5d0f6b27392d2e2bdb80e9ddc2a770a531213c2c: Any suggestions on finding the Grail?
textByHashes.14c0466ecde5c60b6619892d033e7b0fccc61839: Really? Know where I can find him?
textByHashes.e71d118ffbf7d2997288cb3eb63a8826a88d635b: I am questing for the Holy Grail.
textByHashes.b7897e793ca5bac7d1aeb9b652624ec425319362: Hello, I am in search of the Holy Grail.
textByHashes.a9f371f8fbfa4c355e76c4faf9b1bd8f0eabcbbf: Well I would, but I don't know where I am going!
textByHashes.5843faf59cf811c8a752d5f673d7147bcdc05eaa: What do you mean by the whistle?
textByHashes.743ef2bbf09d9de05730703020a31a665fac6e4d: I'm on a quest to find the Holy Grail!
textByHashes.da43e4cfe24403f9cb39aa2903791685c23b7e58: Why didn't you bring the Grail with you?
textByHashes.677cc643804045a6b6f56caa010e26d5c247742d: So how can I find it?
textByHashes.ce2b650043a09364339b093a003bfe277587a308: Well, I'd better be going then.
textByHashes.de6cc63e72760989f872b47805c0a5cc08f313d9: I seek an item from the realm of the Fisher King.
textByHashes.53d1d433bd87bb0071d7dacb364a21e752a883c2: I don't suppose I could borrow that? It could come in useful on my quest.
textByHashes.18743ec42cb585ca33dbf116294e1ddeefcc0e45: Okay, have at ye oh evil knight!
textByHashes.c45e0a7ab1594dc70f2e3112ad5bb158862423d1: Actually I think I'll run away!
textByHashes.055938b78c8ff92145478879ddc0652d1e053de4: Any idea how to get into the castle?
textByHashes.661eb9c2068e673374a0ab9a97dedce06701b731: Yes, well, this place is a dump!
textByHashes.cafb02940e83fc7a189ff651194366553861ca45: How did you know what I have been doing?
textByHashes.8f41b8ad6841b38bf553eb9be6966a3d929c441f: Any ideas how I can restore the land?
textByHashes.400865fc7f6d7d077d1cb2ef114293718cc2e718: I shall go and see if I can find him.
textByHashes.9604d7c40fc028537e88c39faba87d02e800ace3: Do you mind if I have a look around?
textByHashes.72b33ff74079f63dc7206a236d576f03327202bb: Hello, do you have a knight named Sir Percival?
textByHashes.9330aed71c83858834ccaa272d1815194e127916: Any idea which way that would be?
textByHashes.fa3866757b0ac5bd403f9cb63d8daf5515d07073: How did you end up in a sack?
textByHashes.a16ee2d1ad1355ff3f02b7c3620fddadb90f82ca: Come with me, I shall make you a king.
textByHashes.23b139e32483e4f969e0a3c71bed790da08e7c06: Your father is apparently someone called the Fisher King. He is dying and wishes you to be his heir.
textByHashes.c0b4e2eb2d5a53b34bfa4e958401aff59f0b50ab: Well, I do have the means to get us there - wait, let me go get the magic whistle!
textByHashes.f922025a61209b9b8186e1dcba7a74ca24430c76: Well, I do have the means to get us there - a magic whistle!
textByHashes.6f4464c4810899e24521a555209b61f36b90a19c: Your father wishes to speak to you.
textByHashes.78edd7f2066fc3edf2b4c744623bc2a1f3e61469: He is dying and wishes you to be his heir.
textByHashes.5b5c88bd316014c682fe0cc4b0919327a14a7599: Nothing right now, but I'll bear it in mind. Thanks.
textByHashes.dd7aac20decab0a942e259ba1bcdf8f104021050: Know you of any quests sir knight?
textByHashes.9a717eaf3392e953077185084428e520837a0383: Maybe he just went on holiday or something? Must be pretty boring living in a lighthouse.
textByHashes.a00fdc305cde8149b103cdaa33461a548ffde772: How can I fix the bridge?
textByHashes.69045de190dc202e3de3c4fa08341743eec333dd: Yeah, that's great. Anyway, I understand you have a cousin named Larrissa who gave you a key...?
textByHashes.10b6d94d0535bc354d90a1b8588d858980d35125: Well, something has happened at the lighthouse, and she has been locked out. I need you to give me her key.
textByHashes.d5d45e6693187fc72802d036c55ff4629031fde5: Hello again, Gunnjorn. I'm afraid I've lost that key you gave me.
textByHashes.6b683aafea7ff9a3acafb5b1459ec31043b2e8be: Um... no... I was just... Testing you. Yeah. Testing.
textByHashes.6410df4062ce8f9d142409a9868ef67e8dc9321b: I've got your key for you!
textByHashes.4e0da9b91f5a26d05a74bcde6e0235f6b4ebdb16: I've fixed the bridge for you!
textByHashes.f4f505b6f848a7e49010845486cea1d3433d9392: Okay, I will see what I can do.
textByHashes.8d021dc3749d1ef36310aea27c52cb4788c7b5b5: Do you have any idea how I could do that?
textByHashes.17f33a3277d81540e11ed5f5974cd74290319590: I have managed to fix the light!
textByHashes.966ee705eb5dd0ab1f99725f009873fc0074eb0b: Don't worry, I'm sure he's fine. I'll find him somehow.
textByHashes.ac2033ee4ea734c281166f31fa07957676d6fb71: I don't think I'll get that back if I put it in there.
textByHashes.d8c3bbc4f488da5b2f220caedf0bd254b7a8670b: I guess you're Jossik then... What creatures are you talking about?
textByHashes.4599eb1f7aefed4fad003b419bad909dcaa52665: Don't worry, I'm here now. Larrissa was worried about you and asked for my help.
textByHashes.0af3b56f99763b890033916b518c609cc4b5c693: I'll go back upstairs and let her know that I've found you and that you're still alive, and then we can work out some way of getting you out of here, okay?
textByHashes.528bb7a511a0198b133ef24233e7d50f56edda4d: Okay, now that the creature's dead we can get you out of here.
textByHashes.51d00991d21f7fc7feead3f6ff974a9c025fe38d: I found Jossik! He's in a cavern underground...
textByHashes.2b020a3f22c36554121c9b2647a73f76d2e7c110: Um... well, there's a big monster down there with him stopping him leaving.
textByHashes.497119efc0a60b94737cde70c957a9503dabd913: Okay, okay, sheesh, keep your hair on...
textByHashes.52f544f41faa9d2dc6a9dd5530379d164d9177ef: Okay, it's dead! Let's get out of here!
textByHashes.3baee43f989b2ad4c5cdfd07f41debe6126abe35: Why? What's your problem with it?
textByHashes.cc6524a072caf4802687e0474058ae1a52a1a095: Okay, now where is this passage?
textByHashes.4dc04a54f1904cf097db089ece7efe8e87fb6361: Interesting... Tell me about this Icthlarin.
textByHashes.4202c38feefccd9850f2c0677232c5d93e75327e: So why do you say I won't be able to enter the passage?
textByHashes.12233c033feeb1614f350da144a092b3e9f88f75: Okay. I actually have those on me already.
textByHashes.c7ae179e9b257d202f65f410924352e17c6fad9e: Okay, I'll get you your supplies.
textByHashes.9d8c50dc6670271c7622db1d45ecaf3438e25ede: Sorry, I've got other things to do.
textByHashes.aa5fe228c873ee6fe1566f4a77673d019bc6e60f: Yuck! It smells like there's dead cats in there or something. I'm not going in.
textByHashes.a727f7e8db524b98296ea4fb2e7476d595a880f1: Ah, my poor head. What's going on?
textByHashes.3809677e80b39f1073cea46bfd0b1ec2cc59af0b: How did I get here? That wanderer... This is her doing!
textByHashes.f06006070a5057296d028ccb076b32a6298ae6e3: I need some help figuring out what's going on.
textByHashes.e59a9f2a4c935da4e485b218a519f2c143340330: Hello. Can I go through this gate?
textByHashes.57684ffc8c8e3da670c692f2be51599e44bd3693: But I'm not infected with anything!
textByHashes.99e066ad6e787d72e7b6dafebcd3dc8d61147c4a: What companion? Oh, you mean my pet cat?
textByHashes.c6c64917034035c98c23fd128ef44600ed2224ef: Do you have any idea what happened to me? One moment I was talking to a wanderer in the desert, the next I was here. I also have a cracking headache.
textByHashes.060cdedd01de8bdfa1c470beff89cfccb5861d6c: Yes. She had red hair, and weird red eyes as well.
textByHashes.7de80c396a88c53f04771fec6b8fcb9eaf18d646: But I can't remember any of it.
textByHashes.ff601cc4c61fb234e3afc0362902d5eed36cea0e: I must go to the heart of the pyramid... The mistress commands it...
textByHashes.5a25e0c373ecad5250f72b99dfa79f5840ad55bc: I must get to the heard of the pyramid...
textByHashes.ecb2ccdbaf20380abda94e3ff64c0d69b6bfa41d: I remember! That wanderer, she hypnotised me!
textByHashes.250375c002853fd674b39c9725c6ee77eeaca327: But... I can't remember why. I needed to get... something. This is so confusing...
textByHashes.a79641252a255392c49f1bcbd3c062872b1f5ee5: Maybe someone around here can tell me what on Gielinor is going on.
textByHashes.ff21b70037ff33d59e7beee6f40fc4063334c54b: I managed to regain some of my memories.
textByHashes.4a09e7cd34c2cd544c39a4d0dc085c50c55d6d40: I don't like the sound of this.
textByHashes.de1a983c3daf1fd8462151239bc3c25025d6da26: Oh, come on! You can't take my cat. I've spent so long training and looking after it!
textByHashes.3a2a37748fbdbc549bcf12ac0bc10e49e312e94f: Could you at least help me now?
textByHashes.1084ad59bc8b519b8c3ee11a66dba0f32e94c82b: I don't know. I don't want to risk my cat.
textByHashes.a4b8f75da55176a0941c0f631245986437f60d87: I don't want to risk my cat.
textByHashes.9d775880025d12f2e8bdde49b07cfc2f4dc289a0: But I didn't desecrate any tomb! There's no proof!
textByHashes.16ab4e9750f51ecd50fa118d9384e3ae78039f45: How did you know about the burial jar?
textByHashes.48582c661c247d99680ff99b7be6a9510c20a81c: Look, I don't know exactly what happened. All I know is that wanderer hypnotised me and had me steal something from this pyramid.
textByHashes.c98ad399ae04ccb9074f8af27d0977d6a5553ee8: I... I guess so. It's all still very unclear.
textByHashes.02793c5a9e436982c2ef24168bddb111855536c4: I'll go speak with the High Priest.
textByHashes.df77736d257b75d7dead609977afb92cac5b45de: But you stole my last one!
textByHashes.40008c83eec97789b97cc5567c68141821f2aa28: I lost that token you gave me. Could I have another please?
textByHashes.ac9436c92f0927f95132921100becee31ccec7c2: Well, now that you've told me what you're not, can you perhaps tell me what you are?
textByHashes.11ac3a932ddfba56a72efa4a33c1d1507b249d32: Why would they need a guardian?
textByHashes.54bda2dca18d78818ed674b9149dcb99622429a2: They named her the Devourer? Not great at parenting, were they?
textByHashes.e4421e9f7baf173087a00b2892cb467f6de54e33: So if the Devourer is the bad sibling, does that make Icthlarin the good one?
textByHashes.c2a389f7309818759a6f4b83e92da37471ab0b88: I thought you said she wasn't evil?
textByHashes.dc4453e5356fd0c4b5910d03a512d84023c085b6: Um... no, but it also creates heat.
textByHashes.2dd886945e4ad9735a9aafb7f3cd1b9031d7eca0: Ah, I see where this is going. The cats are used to protect the dead from the Devourer, like you said earlier. But who protects the cats?
textByHashes.aadc735379e9ff11b0a9f07a90aff746b1330b2f: So, then, you are a follower of Icthlarin?
textByHashes.f8dddb22b603640a651dd5b0c3390dc447882bfd: This is all very interesting, but I've got to get going.
textByHashes.cc92cca9cf5c34195016192b6f1131306896d29e: What's going on in this city?
textByHashes.9a835cace6d9e2d5557295859e69540b5c68620a: Well, I could benefit from your point of view. You seem the independent type.
textByHashes.26a518f25cea6861d2147728b5a03a72006d91d4: The residents? There are a lot of living people here for a city of the dead.
textByHashes.fb641e196dde4eb5bc80c3453cff8cda8cedc9e8: The Sphinx told me to find the High Priest of Icthlarin.
textByHashes.9219c863f612279438107328e3b4c6f1c9bba47c: Wait! The Sphinx told me that I should talk to you.
textByHashes.7e23a4558b0e6e64c98a46a94153a03ce72d7401: She gave me a token to show you, but I lost it.
textByHashes.e32ad284e1ccddbdcc85174cbd75f42de4987ef5: I appreciate it doesn't look great right now, but I'm not actually a bad person.
textByHashes.a1dcc4aa28d0922f43bfddaa4cf0b04334d661ce: It wasn't me! Well... it was, I guess. I didn't do it on purpose though. I was hypnotised!
textByHashes.539a532c27e0b7bfd2ea3691dec0302f5b7ec636: Yes! There was this wanderer! She had me break into that pyramid to steal... a burial jar... I think. It's all still a bit confusing.
textByHashes.f3fedbd7bdf908839f4a1b3784fb31339a670cf8: You do seem to be going through a rough patch. Do you know what caused the plagues?
textByHashes.fb2db3a9f96473a535f0262151637dc8c70a2e96: Well I'm not sure if I can help with your plagues, but I need to fix whatever mess I caused in that pyramid. Can you help me?
textByHashes.76c1d801a5c379eafe7e61999b5973ed04ba45a2: I can do that. Do you have any advice for me when it comes to the pyramid?
textByHashes.fc0d54773c4aa2e97fad55bbd2dbea16120e3339: Well... yes. But how did you know that?
textByHashes.e6ba6191803a43ce7925a088fb79af1326e4fc41: I see. I guess that makes sense.
textByHashes.f8ced4186784146c1ea7e10b81c5ddb6ee37c1a4: Oops. I'll make sure I look after it this time. Sorry.
textByHashes.0aaf599523f3dd05853537e28eb06642516b9470: Why is it so important that the jar be returned?
textByHashes.fdd92d2adf71bd8896113fe7330732fb05070fe7: But what will happen if I don't return the jar?
textByHashes.1fe6be12a9fc14025ba812e1254e387e962b0cf0: Hey, don't go blaming me for that. Those plagues were here before I even met that wanderer!
textByHashes.f046e2c7418cb05536a72ca71c87f81ff9289f2a: You really think he'd do that?
textByHashes.02eac5eb907fc44fa8e07fb4d050014ff18567c2: Maybe he's not the one responsible.
textByHashes.11e97ca99ec8f15cb13b199976463458f48e7d55: Can you tell me more about the plagues.
textByHashes.639787426179bf56604a13fb59228a608b8f5aa9: That can't have been an easy choice to make.
textByHashes.fd1e997731f70c58a5b94797426dfb8295555613: How much longer do you think you can last?
textByHashes.853f2015aa31cae0d96284c8b00d11ed27060b01: Can you tell me more about Icthlarin.
textByHashes.da1f5f32919152d9a73f55585d0931ac1ea6cf4d: So is Icthlarin only responsible for those that die in the desert?
textByHashes.55cff38cebefd0386d9a780d58e4d2d6e334da50: I imagine there are plenty of people out there who have a different take on things.
textByHashes.0c42bdd8b6f388dd7f3a2eeb4f8e0dd4842158fe: You seem very sure in these 'facts'.
textByHashes.22d98676a1ebf3cdf887b84c31f6a705419ab83f: Can you tell me more about the Devourer.
textByHashes.b8b4187368abe33328c63a6971101da3cdcdb104: The Sphinx told me something similar, but her interpretation was a bit different.
textByHashes.8c7584e5f7465e6c0cb549c523cc1cf707d61e6b: So is the Devourer still around?
textByHashes.bab2d02578b832fb55998472ba3cc3faca85145b: Fine. Come on, cat. Lets leave the nasty Sphinx alone.
textByHashes.8b8a9110e73a45206222e05c2ed8785036a44780: I think the High Priest mentioned something about needing a cat to enter the pyramid.
textByHashes.cbb97b8d24c5d50724bc59ff5a46cd72d95c4255: Hey puss! What do you reckon about that cat on the door? Do you think you can open it?
textByHashes.02c85e1baeac4c8249ae6e70c0ee85c0efce2ace: Hey puss! Think you can open this door again?
textByHashes.18c31d7c0bed7d26edb51277e157e41cc681bda0: I need to get the burial jar for the mistress...
textByHashes.f1cbd5982a0a27c58dc750fb479523c9bda7c574: So I really did steal the jar. I need to return it as fast as I can.
textByHashes.40f06e0df4784de4e5eb7cd4e967ada95af476e5: I've already caused enough trouble over these jars. I'll just leave them alone.
textByHashes.1beef28465a96bb9d11ffcdf35a3ea76299ddb4b: It would have been nice for you to mention this earlier.
textByHashes.b72a9db72201ee4b5990cbee771383ba3af3e38a: You're the High Priest of Icthlarin, but you forgot a key ceremony?
textByHashes.aa3a8bedad4448e825a3eb39d0d9fae0f4709caa: That's not what I... Never mind.
textByHashes.7d60a1e62857af1f56a6d11293f50773cc1573d0: ... to protect it from the Devourer. Yes, you told me earlier.
textByHashes.f649a6b5a3d39d5740c2476b7976a9743d3e5217: Why do I have to help?
textByHashes.2dcb92eaecd086d27f67a7e1bcaee29dd8e5f77c: I guess I assumed that by returning the jar I stole, my job would be done.
textByHashes.caa60310ee7c6a3e6c3dddad0a8b1b85ac30b44d: And that means I'm best placed to help. Fine. The carpenter and the embalmer, did you say?
textByHashes.d5e486dd071bc2b25164acc321690f6ef7f237f7: I guess that's probably the best I can ask for, given the situation. Anyway, the High Priest said you needed help gathering some supplies for the ceremony.
textByHashes.738ed32957b56ab4b1293652c0045b0ecb103cd8: I've met with the town's embalmer and he mentioned that he needed a few things, linen being one of them.
textByHashes.d8eb9e455e2a227e79f4a4b4f3a4b6e683d2c3f9: I don't have that much on me. I'll be back.
textByHashes.dfbcd087ce343752d25463e8f6a49ab8b5fefafb: Great. I guess I should go and see how the carpenter is getting on.
textByHashes.ba3fc00144bb85aebfc6911b98cc79a5301423d4: Where do I get tree sap?
textByHashes.c92964470de39bd54510a5b999559b1e8a6d0b95: I guess I do still need to speak to the carpenter.
textByHashes.f54a3ab9f2f528085651f4cd2157e2a167eaa63d: That's right. He asked me to come and speak to you about a holy symbol for the ceremony.
textByHashes.0f427a4ce83ef50c1fa96a32168b4698f8cdab87: Is this the part where you need me to get you something?
textByHashes.29971af8645efd44a8473b1aab20d88be51a2e76: Meaning I can leave the city and get you some. Alright, I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.13cb01a2ece3d1425b6c5208ddb91805f197b6f8: Well there's actually no need for me to go anywhere. I already have some willow logs here.
textByHashes.f5d208f4ad6087173f7e9d5bb012e7ff06f22368: Yes, I need to help out the embalmer.
textByHashes.85e7534414c722e400fac8a214410c38cae1f69d: Actually, there's a slight problem with the symbol.
textByHashes.eb1cd26f6d529c10f59a296f8c799ef1b6613772: Oh, I'm sure the symbol itself is fine. The problem is... I lost it.
textByHashes.ab8b3417b057bed2bdaa1598ab333ede2473b221: Can you please calm down? I gave you plenty of willow. I'm sure there's some left over for another symbol.
textByHashes.4df78728452b6362f9b825ca17f55f0e56b40ca3: I need to hide the mistress's symbol in the ceremonial room...
textByHashes.640c6bcaca98db0c5e90ffb2d675c180a9ab40ed: No... It must be somewhere more secret...
textByHashes.e3b249f6131d10ff7580546b3730182e235caa67: Yes... Now the mistress can enter the pyramid whenever she pleases...
textByHashes.0e994dea998cb00433b11c88b93136d10db5ce9f: The wanderer! She's going to attack the ceremony! I need to warn them!
textByHashes.b985a00189d9cb605e4ac400e8f8f8e84ced7021: Wait! We can't begin the ceremony!
textByHashes.f5cc2b9235d750557cd480517fbbbe221e2e2066: I'm not your slave any more!
textByHashes.a1d34865fc8d640b2588aeeca35190508d027449: Well it was the least I could do. After all, it was sort of my fault all this happened.
textByHashes.ec7b4b87f3c6f3993e51fe88834672ad76a8cc03: It seems the wanderer that hypnotised me was actually the Devourer all along.
textByHashes.cd8e2b1f1187276c9e1084791a83cfeed760d791: I'm guessing the reason she had me steal that burial jar was because she knew you'd have to gather here to reconsecrate the tomb again.
textByHashes.423e1f5ee6f143864a24c8b7892886c835ca8ce2: Yes, and she had me plant an unholy symbol here to allow her to teleport right in.
textByHashes.b3ee68935368d3fbff4803e0bf1dde3a4a1bc79e: Here's that holy symbol, by the way.
textByHashes.8cefff993e5be4344b0cf09130233e3cc92672b0: I must do as the mistress commands...
textByHashes.1cfbaf1a7c7ed9286495005a64a495abbcdcb0fb: Well I guess that explains why Amascut's control over me was broken. Not every day the god of the dead comes to your rescue.
textByHashes.57b6ea453cddede5038da74e705c772d89c8cafa: I think it would be best if I stayed out of this tomb after what happened last time.
textByHashes.ed53d68c0f622248d41e7b9bbce7878ab6927fef: Well this is a surprising turn of events!
textByHashes.8142b6e98902259b6fc362d130174b97c924ef44: Well I just so happen to have all of those beads on me!
textByHashes.2bc62e6f16072ce537d45a4af999d69dce3308b4: No, not at all! I just found them throughout my travels and presumed somebody would need them at some point.
textByHashes.8e2bc14ac71d8cd53c71dee8abf0224fd9a6a60c: I've better things to do than chase imps.
textByHashes.38f2075654c43bb85fbbe874ebe6c01270761a66: Give me a quest or else!
textByHashes.e0ca107d1f8384a20e0f8a0611e96fc8cdf9b325: Just stop messing around and give me a quest!
textByHashes.2236290bd0d5f2c150939f03bede071a484c7bcb: I have found some of your beads.
textByHashes.9c12ee5babf43c5b71fedfe3033c629c4623e0f7: I've got all four beads. It was hard work I can tell you.
textByHashes.0839b8e7ea6f75e064a8b25564afea0db0052d34: I went back to the place where I first met Vanstrom. He was gone though.
textByHashes.ce1deb53ea67e7fce3e584c09a4fa79960cce257: Seems like a wise move. What part do I play?
textByHashes.852e30ce89c340c954e57a15274db073fbba3465: And you want me to scout the place out?
textByHashes.25da5cf4b553a401830a6ebdba429bc6ad510603: Maybe. Veliaf has asked me to do some work for him. Hopefully it will benefit you all.
textByHashes.986be951ac3dfd4a94ad3319f6369d7ea1519ed0: What on earth makes you think I want your food or your blood?
textByHashes.17894ffefc91790d1e2807d26c128f7b9ed47c78: Where did you all come from?
textByHashes.48ffbc69955aa319cc6957a4eed8c13b48ecb9ae: Sounds like an awful place! Let me in and I'll help you!
textByHashes.424a406b20183ce1d2597d7174e798b5ed270208: Why would I want your blood?
textByHashes.608b9b32e553139c1329ae084c23d2bef6d6f9f7: Why would I want your food?
textByHashes.945cf73e21e1fcff2e5e7f7140c24d9375d77600: But I don't want to eat your food. I'm plenty healthy enough!
textByHashes.270da7d8775018b0abf14d7d228296d2ba8a89d4: How come you have no food?
textByHashes.7089bc22a7f5fcdafedb2816609517d77e020247: Can you open the shop for me please?
textByHashes.136c66ca1c4c010c2a33b5aa55330c940f060e73: Are there any 'out of the way' places here?
textByHashes.db65d95ad3016ba0fec48632c64df8e66e7b1b8c: Somewhere where myself and a couple of friends could hold up for a while without attracting any vampyre attention?
textByHashes.5cd5b1fdeeee931a856fa26f9a8eebe525b55de3: Not so bad, but it's a lot of hard work to be honest.
textByHashes.85401ca0acf293809cd357b6a25f0493eb65e6b1: Hey there, I'm finished with my project at the inn.
textByHashes.fe54468a5b8339ce1ad73d9400f68bb51e688c93: What do you think of your town?
textByHashes.c5804d0d340012679cfd100bcac346a6c90c837f: I'd like to help fix up the town.
textByHashes.440bc44909efcc1ef6d42aaf6c95fdebf471cd84: Yeah, but I've only fixed the roof and the walls.
textByHashes.38fe1d7b22aeb2e54079cb2b8d8957a7f49662d3: Hello, I wonder if I could ask a few questions?
textByHashes.b2f12cf4dc47fb483c5edd17432eab76b31cb148: How did everyone come to be here?
textByHashes.d85bbc3e55c2950b76f1436a0a14f560cc7bcc4a: Oh! Right, did I? Where was I?
textByHashes.6d7f95dc0254a1db85021fb3fe7e45ada859593a: I can probably look into it.
textByHashes.f87e041e5848645edcc3fdd269096de2ace4648d: Why does everyone stay in this town?
textByHashes.4439d68002b5ebe1cf7a9eb2b38730e593165a84: I don't have any intentions of paying a blood tithe!
textByHashes.3b2bd852d854c9e2952f6e17caf66d8b326233cb: You don't look too well, Gadderanks. Against my better judgement, I feel sorry for you.
textByHashes.a34c1b7650b67cadb96b7a42ccb5c3995ab1a34e: Yes, I do. I understand that you wanted to feel strong, but you took the wrong side.
textByHashes.53533788cf072ead9a82c5e8da3f7fdce626c186: You need to take a second and think of them then. Think of why you did this in the first place. All of that will count for nothing if you don't help us!
textByHashes.d5810b53fc4f0eba6116d68784908c04bbe0dcc2: You have my word. If we find them, we'll take care of them.
textByHashes.cfaf361ab12894dfa70a5505dad84afb90de1a8d: Take it easy Gadderanks. Let's see if we can sort you out.
textByHashes.9eb05a8497457ee3b503f9d26f67e0aced7a6354: Phew! Thanks for your help Veliaf. It sure was good of you to turn up.
textByHashes.b5e052e16c5097e51feb5a6b4dd154f84608f73f: I have. The cellar of the inn here should work perfectly.
textByHashes.20f37c70711d8779bf0fe4118a9dee922141b7e4: The priest at Paterdomus? Yes, I've helped him out before.
textByHashes.06613b5c565019e18edab54c60a7c6f9961f04bd: I'm sure I can manage that.
textByHashes.86bc89cbdb76440c2300149b63167e590214ecb8: I see. And you'd like me to look into this?
textByHashes.eba3e8de72205155b882d50a6f3a4f74f234b491: I'll see what I can dig up.
textByHashes.919392ce8fa9141ef006f674f0d2db85ba516037: What do you make of what Gadderanks said?
textByHashes.5595c1d6c62b5b3340a702a14f33028a048fb4fc: Why does Ivan need to go to Paterdomus?
textByHashes.fbb8ccb8f82aa178c88fd38c2aa5b9c50bba7ac6: So where is he buried instead?
textByHashes.4ea54a301e11f62e8ce30bcfa82f88463a1cbc26: That's right. I just need to speak with Polmafi and Radigad and then we'll head off.
textByHashes.89af8493230514669cd7d255c3c3fd3ad89b2210: Hey. Veliaf says it's time to head down to the new hideout in Burgh de Rott. Could you let Radigad know as well? I'm taking Ivan to Paterdomus.
textByHashes.1b7251229093ab213d02e1ceb102b53ab16da7a9: Hey. Veliaf says it's time to head down to the new hideout in Burgh de Rott. Could you let Polmafi know as well? I'm taking Ivan to Paterdomus.
textByHashes.3d0ed3a1e15531a239ed9bcdba3d6fc6aa7c11ed: You might find this sickle helpful on our travels.
textByHashes.ef904b74b34b3842a1d15e3730281ffff5d3029b: That's right. We should get going soon.
textByHashes.3acbba7c980079093a0192635ae04310c6cdd627: Not a problem. I need to chat to Drezel about some things. I'll see you later.
textByHashes.fbc78452615ebba1c8d6a781f6f5dbd159caacea: Yes, it seems to be more dangerous in Morytania doesn't it?
textByHashes.bdd3e18fc8c52c69f2d7053588dc97c9efbcecc6: But you don't even know what he said about Ivandis.
textByHashes.e2007e2b2bdca6475611f7d3eec14582f2cf6b31: So, you're sure that Ivandis is buried here then?
textByHashes.86344e1266a100500b8b2ef86a329299e05dc0e2: So where did this rumour that he's buried elsewhere come from then?
textByHashes.5f299a2e7beb9b78087ad9c38d0fdf0ee865ae52: What proof do you have that Ivandis is buried here?
textByHashes.b8516935aa2949e43e259a722cf05b7b53de1a45: So you don't actually know for sure that he is buried here?
textByHashes.5529522313b8fa405897830bfb52b99bb1f94d21: What do you know about the history of this temple?
textByHashes.6be094884e3518688a7ab2f86d24f4aed3d30c88: Have you checked that then? Have you seen their remains with your own eyes?
textByHashes.230f7da02ef2d81bc85bad11207cef733bde6fab: Is there somewhere that I might get more information on Ivandis?
textByHashes.7e456323ae7708022c814a65ed37e0c0586181e8: So you have no further information on him that could possibly help me? Anything you know might be of use in freeing the poor people of Morytania.
textByHashes.faa6cf903f873fa1ad6e2c198804ebe6d73c3534: Will you let me check Ivandis' tomb?
textByHashes.785904344d1721d744db46b4e983630b059f38f1: We need to consider every possible thing which could help us!
textByHashes.ad6acbf45d1f4cf79adc4303825e676fcd452360: Why are you so resistant to talking about history?
textByHashes.1b0016c1b1a68d89cc85463631e536b9cb457176: I think you're holding something back! We really need all the help we can get!
textByHashes.63b6503e25f4f5c034a531e18917403a72bec8dd: The lives of those pitiful few left in Morytania could rest on this!
textByHashes.9832a405d836a831d86c898bfb95e6407d3bf98e: I know. So please, help me as much as you can.
textByHashes.36ee6a9434aa02b46a9a092630817ef58a205ed1: Very well then. Morytania is lost to ignorance.
textByHashes.3c7ec092cbbcc98d6673d6c87b856477278e82f0: Thanks very much for your help. I really appreciate it.
textByHashes.958a2114029f48de0447f48ac8006a318f68b0cd: I've found a library under Paterdomus.
textByHashes.0ec6f650d46eaa34b322c91f5aff9f8a41d6a857: Do you know where Ivandis' tomb could be?
textByHashes.0b5a6ae7eddd6f1f429015ccf330c7b8284ce026: Well yeah, but maybe you have a rough idea.
textByHashes.6bd9513439ffc80ddafb582459940b8a32e6ef3d: What do you know about Ivandis?
textByHashes.8ea620e984818debc6661075c5a25c8dda69c635: I think I've found Ivandis' tomb.
textByHashes.9aaf348e8c28ed01fc8e485ab7706b27cc1d6d07: There's just a coffin from what I can tell. There's some sort of rod fused to the top of it though.
textByHashes.0b1d515bf5edadd858cc661f71a88b163f2cbf20: I suspect it is. I don't think there's any way to remove it though.
textByHashes.67d927a226e5b93fafba78ac54ebcc191769632d: Well, there's a coffin with some sort of rod fused to the top of it.
textByHashes.c971205d99f05b03679173cae915010329eaaec2: I don't think the rod can be removed. However, I made a clay mould of it so I might be able to make a new one.
textByHashes.cb9c4850144b8b1564f10fb316756b455471e955: Do you know which metal I should use to make the rod?
textByHashes.55702e13e9b2875f1c96dc855d9ecc7a0456a8ba: Do you know what the rod does?
textByHashes.8f0256d3b506fec2f5cb244939b8f69d1e4b3063: I have brought you the Rod of Ivandis!
textByHashes.32169078fa86806c2f752da148e9b8c60e1f82bd: Where would I find out about the process for completing the rod?
textByHashes.0873aff891c1dc1c1e189cd78969c2199ea281c1: Here you go. I've managed to recreate the Rod of Ivandis.
textByHashes.df15938d3f4d6a1fdf7f33c3cd90c1f9589932b3: Quite well, thanks for asking. How about you?
textByHashes.7003d0349c426a0dffb24a809d8dcb45d3df9469: What does that mean exactly? I mean, I have some stories. I'm quite a hero myself, you may actually be talking about me?
textByHashes.7f62a5b2f7fb770293f723adc9cbd816c7273680: I see. And you want to help them?
textByHashes.cf5b696ee00ff1d607c4bf1b5bd325fa54258362: Well perhaps I could take these weapons to the Myreque. What do they need?
textByHashes.adfdc495b9310d3bbf6c0db155e33b748a0dab01: Right. Get some steel weapons and take them to the Myreque. Where can I find them?
textByHashes.7ecfc9b5a07e33a6cb2120394d43e730df39ec4c: Well I'd better get going then.
textByHashes.eec367de6948c83e84511211bce9d7e023d523f9: What else do you know about the Myreque?
textByHashes.03fa53602af7532b1eed64d0234825ba4f830655: And this group in Mort Myre? They're who the weapons are for?
textByHashes.c6db857b490d1e89d7ac49b25c025f223af75b65: Remind me, what weapons do I need?
textByHashes.76b9fb249d4fa1b666d6bf50c83d167728698fa3: Where can I find this boatman?
textByHashes.98abeb284ff571a23983136a31323045f18f5cbd: And you say he's had dealings with the Myreque?
textByHashes.0746771fff1c3387e4f64e65ed250f67b21bf7fd: I wish I could help, but I'm busy at the moment.
textByHashes.801c2866176b622cc9fdc5d7154f7bc4ac9dcdc2: Hello there. I'm guessing you're the boatman?
textByHashes.0ff5524d0106688ff00171de9ac3aa3b6088c99b: I hear you have dealings with the Myreque. I was hoping to take some weapons to them.
textByHashes.77dc7c219181a3d228ce948c6217bbab909fc511: Come on, I know you're in cahoots with them. It's important that I get these weapons to them.
textByHashes.a3361e2ae062a53130f97ce6e813574b9c89eb7c: Oh come on, you can tell me!
textByHashes.d7532d754684ad817d52bd1ccde05f340a64eda6: Well, I guess they'll just die without weapons.
textByHashes.52d9410b7cddece527abf4e90f9d6ca5d36abda2: Resourceful enough to get their own steel weapons?
textByHashes.9ea49e3874fd73a08c47a832bcd8429a75d35dd6: What have they been up against?
textByHashes.32062780aabc37121ae01f4a6a71f80e9723896f: What kind of loss and heartache have they suffered?
textByHashes.de9e09ed76bb35961a89ad31022ab3bde80ba50e: It sounds awful... Who is Sani Piliu?
textByHashes.948fbf84a2b206e90dd725a5e4377768ff351442: If you don't tell me, their deaths are on your head!
textByHashes.1b5357cc61ae0531dcd40635c7df0b9b2002ddf8: One man's vigilante is another man's freedom fighter!
textByHashes.d13eb4c82a7b1cda969625e79f94a153a5260b43: What do you know of the Drakans?
textByHashes.49652f3a210786eb96db006674ffa5d0c44fba9b: What kind of a man are you to say that you don't care?
textByHashes.940f9221ecd6826910d731269d34ba6396de0ab4: You're risking death either way. Better to risk it and help the cause, than to stand by and do nothing.
textByHashes.fdac5233085161baf5d1546f8bc54a97630d89b5: So you'll help me? Will you take me to them?
textByHashes.9c9eb18d0a0d956d256a0113252d690440262e69: I don't have anything which I can use against them.
textByHashes.687b7f745cc852293f829bbd37249cd4310599b0: I have this druid pouch! This turns the ghasts visible and I can kill them once I can see them.
textByHashes.289c823969079b8141ee0cd9ecd92a45cfab7674: Here are some planks for you.
textByHashes.3fb4826dead115ada3ff524ca01bb165a4c19bfe: Why do you say that this place is forsaken?
textByHashes.b5488b585e9e8bafcde63418418cdc53221f97d0: I'll give you some cash if you tell me.
textByHashes.40af39d1b51ad42956ec89a549f439be50beb2a4: Err, no. I just want to compensate you for your trouble.
textByHashes.e724f1260f9797673f9961390fc6332a401bbe82: I just want to help them, I think they need help.
textByHashes.367047ad503701aa53d5895578f183a6a255f0a9: Then tell me how to find them. I can help them.
textByHashes.da7a3d6222fc8711c01c59f837213c4f1b59acf9: Please. I need to know how to find the Myreque.
textByHashes.73e3cb76648a9191bfc595211bd401110dd5f737: So, will you take me to the Myreque?
textByHashes.e802584107905ca12c36268bf97ba7521a3fc3e9: Can I ask you some more questions?
textByHashes.7c91d73b97282c7e1d019026e2b0b626bba42daa: Where am I meant to be going?
textByHashes.5bdfe0609dc808a37be67682e707371de7bb578b: Tell me more about the Myreque.
textByHashes.41b787f47872e0ff37b17c32b660cac592511d4f: Why are they called the Myreque?
textByHashes.3c99cdc6ad72fb5edbe24b1e3c6e73a7cc0c816d: Tell me about the members of the Myreque.
textByHashes.63c759d866bc7d384216250c86df157f32b67803: I've come to help the Myreque. I've brought weapons.
textByHashes.37f3314cee5c7ff4297316d0096153e5cf93ce53: But I just want to deliver these weapons.
textByHashes.344f4df85e4798012bbb663bd8534a36977495ee: Sounds fine to me... Go ahead, shoot!
textByHashes.283b8840ca05b09f30c9af0689d809b8f7104bb7: I don't have to answer to you!
textByHashes.d582200c8bfe22e8b85747ec98203e3073b4ac68: I'm lost. Can you show me the way out?
textByHashes.98a340af91563329382afe0fdd5d3398f0b16d6e: It's okay. I'm a friend. I'm here to deliver some weapons to you.
textByHashes.3fc32920c37727d7733bdc9857c6c5869c712351: I'm . Don't worry, I'm a friend. I was asked to bring you some weapons.
textByHashes.907785c7ed2a24e050d82d8f9c86236b964470b3: It's fine. Do you mind if I ask a few questions?
textByHashes.31bc8cdb0b7b29f0aab5ca4d9f9166fdc287bf82: I'd like to ask a few questions if that's okay?
textByHashes.a0f049424df3e0ef6cce23b0cdeadedd61f04374: What can you tell me about this group?
textByHashes.084d110bad82e14578e71f56d82a144a643c0b55: What's your grasp of the situation?
textByHashes.2be3b5c08fec2e9866927a58fb169f0911e2bb48: Maybe. I'd like to ask a few questions if that's okay?
textByHashes.f7c49da76976e2cc4e9d9d86f6f62cdb1c45e67f: I'd like to ask you few questions.
textByHashes.20fbb1469df208353df78767dd2162fe802dfd83: What're your plans for the future?
textByHashes.834f5f7c298ff62cfa08ae7cbd5614f99b17b65f: Do you mind if I ask a few questions?
textByHashes.c219e8a29a77fa5036ebd2a6f82e20faecbf5c34: Fine thanks. I'd like to ask a few questions if that's okay?
textByHashes.4b27e367e4708d36f7a60d62ca0174c3be98edb1: What do you know about Morytania?
textByHashes.4f73a899ec948741e6316d2990441469f797cf2a: I'm . Nice to meet you Sani.
textByHashes.b8f73614511f2633c961d697dc8ae57f2a24d4cf: Well, perhaps a little. It's nice of you to say so in any case though. I'd like to ask a few questions if that's okay?
textByHashes.c34c5f1e112b97900240fe41bf404f74e40d947f: Fine thanks. Do you mind if I ask a few questions?
textByHashes.e925672ffd2541071ef956700d73f62348b9485f: Hi there. Veliaf said that I should introduce myself to everyone.
textByHashes.6bee052a859b885d363cc6761129cb6b893a8122: Would you mind if I asked you a few questions?
textByHashes.fcaff7dff17a38cbf0966b4f0028c5751410971b: Fine thanks. Would you mind if I asked you a few questions?
textByHashes.3fa16811c4b3c503b22dbd2726f675749f809b57: Is it really important for you to train as a priest? I'd have thought there'd be more pressing issues.
textByHashes.54cf4e5b3c61b48e7c6c7953f3f44882b694697b: Okay. I'll come back once I have them.
textByHashes.95b3ae6d99bb5e9e6282eb8d1c221040b03940e1: So you're the leader of this group?
textByHashes.b6f8f8ad62ef0e2004473ccb6784b9f23669cd01: Can you tell me about your organisation?
textByHashes.56e04df72769695670135f28bd492339d4caba20: What can you tell me about Morytania?
textByHashes.e8463f0382cef5a20499177612c613d553a32500: What are your plans for the future?
textByHashes.db347b19575dd2d40e18abfa0d14e9305ec38fa6: I'm so sorry. This is all my fault.
textByHashes.c3f033b3acd3155c57808058b0ebff1f4ade9b4d: He was the one that asked me to bring the weapons to you. He looked like a human though.
textByHashes.9d604bde3033331a68acace97a1321468a9dd451: Yes. I think I understand. Is there anything I can do to help now? I first met Vanstrom in Canifis. I could go back and see if he's still there?
textByHashes.b4654122aede456f00210a819abd15e743c8add7: I want to join your organisation.
textByHashes.b3a1ef57c5ea990090279e745eebf148f806d7d7: What do you plan to do now?
textByHashes.56b42f9cc6a7d191a12d336d400a8589fd19ffcd: How do I get out of here again?
textByHashes.1b1ba3eb77513545a76a12f8eaed383d07cb395c: I'm so sorry for your loss.
textByHashes.008797a1bf29e693e7d2ccb1a0aa9b132efc3b60: I'm so sorry for your loss. If there's anything I can do, please let me know.
textByHashes.dd238c69bfff812ff6532991abd127f07363ca7f: Oh, sorry. I thought you were someone else.
textByHashes.c549d56663b87ebec1adaac5fbdda03ee7c9ebc6: I thought you were that dirty murderer Vanstrom.
textByHashes.8f190aad79449043e7b91c3d8541c8de30e6f102: It sounds like just the challenge for me. And it would make a nice break from killing things!
textByHashes.e117426bdca99133dfa3b768f97cdbd7069b3366: Hmmm, sounds difficult, I don't know if I am ready for the challenge.
textByHashes.5be50d358ba3bdb139efbb6211c4a63ff818b808: I am very sorry, but I don't have any time for that.
textByHashes.a72881ba00bf32063d6ef4e25572f73a7dce6fe3: I am sorry, but I am very busy.
textByHashes.d4f13cef539b4ccdb1aea082bb47bca61c08ba10: What does a warrior like me know about peace?
textByHashes.4b04b89d2abad28982383bb14b20f1233290a008: Tai Bwo Wannai? What does that mean?
textByHashes.609ea4fa3de34442c677050c5015fc3e0dc55cb4: It's a nice village, where is everyone?
textByHashes.44039162e1393fd228aac68f69b50aa2747afad2: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again?
textByHashes.20f6237178bc703f916c38c2d11ba1e348f6c569: Not yet, sorry, what's the clue again ?
textByHashes.d2d25584b3423aa6fdff8290c517943fcedf1bc2: You mean they let the murderer get away?
textByHashes.e77e1ea2212bf3af3d1f9ebb5d6bf13488568c29: Anna? Is that who they arrested? I thought...hmm, never mind.
textByHashes.620f6f8de9ec7580413049959186eccd688e3721: So, why is it a big deal that the Sinclairs have left, then? Maybe they wanted to get away from the memory of their father's death.
textByHashes.c342bbe566a82969ec5c3191796b4ceb84b67b6d: How curious. Maybe I should investigate it.
textByHashes.a1e04f78792f8b4f20db22908b77d35d91e76b2f: Very odd coincidence, but I don't really have time to look into it now.
textByHashes.12676de274af436b09c4cc60bed42743ffcf2565: You know, this has been bugging me for a while: Why do the Sinclairs have a dog handler on the payroll when they only have one dog?
textByHashes.56a011359c9dfba7ca268486d4e9642bb4080f72: So I have heard. The town gossip informed me that something was amiss. I've come to offer my assistance.
textByHashes.8c2f10c1876afc312ffe0d2dedcf03f84880badf: They haven't returned to their other realm have they?
textByHashes.5542c5fcaa9522715f3cafdda6864189d6a5bb78: How goes the investigation, then? What evidence have you gathered so far?
textByHashes.ae05bb50812ff4294cbf55ed013191fcc89677f3: Which is why you're happy to see me, right? A rogue party could break into the mansion and investigate further, without the fear of losing their job. Am I right?
textByHashes.f53bcbfa488990be345bcdccbfa51851fc52a7ba: Hi. I was wondering, do you know why the mansion is all locked up?
textByHashes.b3a1f35830658801c7b63b89a1bcd9a88c4b8d06: That's a bit harsh. Thanks anyway.
textByHashes.eca5fa91861b7c2d9fce606f996867a15b1d0e58: I'm trying to get into the mansion. Do you know why it's all locked up?
textByHashes.8aeb055b2478641fe1b1127f6193e32ea6b21090: But you're willing to speak to me?
textByHashes.db910037b5505d0d1e914b69bd409e42a0da0a35: The guard asked me to break into the Sinclair Mansion and search for clues about where they had gone.
textByHashes.24a2836f3199433447ceaf6316d00396520a33d7: that you were a gossip and I shouldn't divulge privileged information.
textByHashes.748e73d860e087e618969d637652eb2918f00dde: Oh, it is, except for that broken window... Very convenient.
textByHashes.e501b5fbe9bc17cdc2063dadeac5fb3047fe08be: Where has the Sinclair family gone?
textByHashes.0b88edadc68aa1da1610d8c18ed09632c701e09f: I think you need to look for a new job. Your employers are a bit scary.
textByHashes.ae88cf84669227367e01a26445ad19dfde606b55: I'm looking for clues as to where the Sinclair family has gone. Why can't anyone enter or leave?
textByHashes.c560ac2c53544b7df650f2e502c3d6b150bdccf9: Yes, that was me. Now I'm trying to find out where the Sinclair family has gone.
textByHashes.e9e35bc562f2c3bb514a5d0a42adb705e0f7ad44: Well, I'd not be doing a very good job of it, if I was, considering you're not asleep.
textByHashes.15bb7ab147617fd0204cb7bbfd9695ec49e485a5: I have proof that the Sinclairs have left.
textByHashes.7d3c66baec2d99c2c8f04a83f8e000eb7956f46a: Don't you see? The Sinclairs have left for good. They premeditated their departure from the mansion.
textByHashes.646068cdfd4083ad2439a23c74dad59c7bf8374a: Errr, I seem to have left it somewhere.
textByHashes.c59207122796c7c9b192f294ec1c3eb75b1db455: I have proof that links the Sinclairs to Camelot.
textByHashes.655eac87b7cc7a2530c42dd768f2b56fd65f14a2: No...It's not camel, like the animal. The note isn't whole, they were writing the word Camelot. They were meeting at Camelot, this is our evidence to connect the Sinclairs to King Arthur.
textByHashes.80d8e43b0f31c6042dbb2c3965145961e4e19131: I have proof of foul play.
textByHashes.48653efb77ffc50a3b95435097df5783acac8f05: Exactly. And we know Morgan Le Faye has a history of harassing Merlin and King Arthur.
textByHashes.3e9d1eb8ba699826f299ce6bc6bc9d8bd39a7aee: Since there is no sign of a struggle inside the Sinclair Mansion, we can only assume the knights were there by request.
textByHashes.61633cf745810c7103c5269a3e448d3701c8fea5: When do you expect to go to Camelot? Perhaps I could assist you?
textByHashes.1de96012a9fa5ef942a8e01f2026f8180fe2e681: A month or more? King Arthur could be in grave danger. Morgan Le Faye is involved and she is not one to be trifled with. One of the Sinclairs has already committed murder, who's to say another won't?
textByHashes.fa159450ebd6fb71d88301df1e4a7ec3f639f2f4: And you're going to wait a MONTH?
textByHashes.f142888b1fe59a638d0d6fa531bd42feea7da67a: That's all the advice you can give?
textByHashes.7971645c0351831908fea666a6072bab8bde9785: Hello again. Can you tell me about the Sinclair family history?
textByHashes.f06398e6177cb7a1f57e5f77428a5de1a8cea4d6: I'm sorry I was rude. You are a vital part of this investigation. Unless you tell me about the Sinclairs, I won't be able to continue.
textByHashes.8817ed0445af6869dc533c63a7829d28e2a404da: What have they been up to since the arrest of their sibling?
textByHashes.4ac249face39f972ac4f85c66fd5f7f39d400c6d: But what is she like? Can she be reasoned with?
textByHashes.3a01cb9d1c0968f3ba0da48b8cf4439a351b5ec1: Could I ask you about the Sinclair family again?
textByHashes.2e5a5bf325e3dddc544c921db5c91ab6c541f2b3: Where is Anna Sinclair being held?
textByHashes.08364d02fc8abc58ca9c78d5ed2c39541d25a4ef: What can you tell me about Anna Sinclair?
textByHashes.c3e543760f9dbf4e2dc9153e70e864934b768450: What can you tell me about Anna?
textByHashes.e50b4ccb1e3dc6c1a66edee85d2838d9b30634bb: I may need her help to get in touch with the rest of the Sinclairs.
textByHashes.4143f4d7699c9f3e779776f79a3d527c40522d3a: Can't you tell me anything more useful than that?
textByHashes.5003b3c8076fed8b06b5896225d121ee432e1684: Because she may be responsible for murder!
textByHashes.1a5bbddf8c6588fa71845f8d13a95935e4123e47: You must have been privy to some of the children's secrets. Anything would be helpful.
textByHashes.ae3cbcc0247a047d480d09630f4a2ccefc53da23: May I speak to the prisoner?
textByHashes.56b758d57ea8cba0ac32057b10c638f227a2e9a1: So he's 'daddy' now is he? If he was so dear to you why did you kill him?
textByHashes.5eece6c61f72da6bcda127869bdbabfaa653352a: But there's hard evidence against you.
textByHashes.90eac21fba5104eff8007c10aa92c8037655fa5b: I didn't come here to just chit-chat. I need to know where your family has disappeared to. I have suspicions they've reclaimed Camelot.
textByHashes.74c6b576a511b9aae70411c67230f8115c033a64: Well, I'll be off then. Have fun spending the rest of your life in jail.
textByHashes.ad9ffc447317341fa4d2e22d0284b44a28592db6: Maybe it's because you ARE guilty. Your sibling offered hard proof you did it!
textByHashes.5f7ccd65d41bf5741256d0a2d87ec309b34fbe15: Why should I believe you? As far as I know you did kill your father.
textByHashes.aded65cab26b4b233f9b33f5920059b7f5a9efe3: So, if I agree to get you a 'not guilty' verdict at trial, you promise to tell me how to get into this secret passage that will lead me straight into Camelot?
textByHashes.53658d4d160af830a226004664558b95f1098e38: Okay, I guess I don't have much of a choice. I'll go start gathering evidence.
textByHashes.b323fb60be70fa270a16f65bb23780d868290580: I'm working on it. It's not exactly easy to unprove something that's true.
textByHashes.b8414cd3d03f5815ac370a057e2410675a51d381: I need a piece of thread from the clothes you wore the night of the murder.
textByHashes.5fbaaa5f57d7768da897edaded529f1cd2a9df4b: I might need to show it to people when I ask them questions about the murder. It's evidence in the case.
textByHashes.a32c8755bd1e92773e5889a06f219a20edb7f4f0: How can you possibly know that already?
textByHashes.453bb5ee5e0e5b153def584da054ca0e6297890f: Well, I'm going to talk to the servants and see if I can learn anything new from them...but other than that, I don't really know what I'm doing.
textByHashes.0b69f37cbacc52aba13ae6d2ee1728c6c16d8bcc: But how do I know what evidence will be presented?
textByHashes.71a3a8fd80c244cb3158ef3dceabcdcf33eb47a9: I'm representing Anna Sinclair as a defence lawyer.
textByHashes.5fc692402456d33d9602f9c3e18c2a0b2eaf47cb: Err, I'm not joking. I have to prove she is innocent.
textByHashes.2a73b91f7796b9474c11457d915197ecd7f2f8ba: One of her siblings claims to have seen that, but who can say if they're telling the truth?
textByHashes.f316b720cb536ed43153340296ab296dfc8799ed: Besides, it's for King Arthur. Anna is the only lead I have on how to find the King and his knights.
textByHashes.b027c9c9c7466f5ca541f8b471e9ecc7687d06e9: I'm representing Anna Sinclair as her defence lawyer. I need to ask you some questions about what happened the night of Lord Sinclair's murder.
textByHashes.d2cf33fcfc2fdc597d5f135470d083efbec0921f: Uh, anyways, I need to ask you some questions.
textByHashes.0c5663dfbe8caba1cb71e1efbb176fb00f7d6474: What can you tell me about the night of the murder?
textByHashes.1203f23b9eac6153b0c00f94a123a73c18ce2ca2: Where did you last see Anna Sinclair on that fateful night?
textByHashes.925cfc44c93029ce4e916bcd9562c726dfa1ab60: Did you ever see Anna in possession of the dagger that was found embedded in Lord Sinclair's body?
textByHashes.167a98523a76b45bad8e73e08e7dcf7c61412d70: So, any of the family or servants would have had access to it.
textByHashes.a7e07c5c3c01d17d6c9bdb595e55d5b07d0e0413: Err, I seem to have forgotten the thread I was going to show you. I'll need to get it from Anna Sinclair at the jail.
textByHashes.c9802905e9392a2d6330be8332050226da995ced: Can you tell me which Sinclair family member this thread belongs to?
textByHashes.bd3593b3f2f6948301efc7686efa335eb77addbb: So, you can't identify the owner of the thread for certain?
textByHashes.ee0f29a0f6660cd77e10c5571aaaa5947f232c76: What can you tell me about the poison?
textByHashes.802ab9986e782521b8c746a7daf815177f468578: Can you tell me exactly who bought poison from him?
textByHashes.7a3a8748d98bc47a3d5fcdd8dece3b3389bbbdb5: So, you're completely certain all of the Sinclair children bought poison? And it would only have needed a small portion to kill Lord Sinclair.
textByHashes.51c0930a327f3c21586039383651d3750290c2fe: That means someone could have used a small amount to frame Anna and still have done their chore. That's great news.
textByHashes.6e5b090d2679a80539e85b72904a997c69b5a3d3: I know, I know, but circumstances... Well, I just need to ask you some questions, alright?
textByHashes.c0b5517fc99b012dd8595ed6c53a6f6d2da466e0: Didn't you hear the glass breaking when the window was smashed by the murderer?
textByHashes.10637fa3b01a322a0fff75bee80a076791fd3e95: Was the dog barking that night?
textByHashes.77bbc15eebad01c29813bc0a81df25cc1c065fdb: Did you see anyone else handle the dagger?
textByHashes.77f87e0aeb9e30522f4e69e442e14e1ae9c759a6: Did Anna Sinclair buy any poison?
textByHashes.b383c97d9962b064696c9763230ed84dc2e46071: Errr, well, circumstances have changed. Anyway, I need to ask you some questions.
textByHashes.64d2078a63ca5d897bb541cd069dd4675df8ab2c: No one else ever touched it?
textByHashes.28ac1afe1ab0930ab9f7c2d638cd71a112e1c0ca: That's wonderful? Why didn't you mention it before? It means it could have been planted to make it seem like Anna did it.
textByHashes.4c01492ce4ca4570946b594a7664c9756adf158d: So, you can't identify the owner of the thread, for certain?
textByHashes.8bf930277882f82f312638a03c446832720f732a: Do you remember who bought poison?
textByHashes.4c4221a330086c2c970f98c70595e73ad7d7f7f8: I'm sorry to trouble you, but I really need some answers.
textByHashes.a78c2d062449c8a0a2728dbd314c3c6402cd964b: So, you didn't see Mary deliver the food to Lord Sinclair?
textByHashes.f4b95dc3ab6f9e95e476a343685e9cc3ec4be8b9: Then someone could have tampered with the meal while she was on the way?
textByHashes.4915c6d991342de332a0dd3230129a87b465b10c: Hmm, right. That doesn't bode well.
textByHashes.8d9894e661da930f3b361edf4d7785dfdd73e044: Did you see anyone else in possession of it?
textByHashes.3997347ca4c4878b6925e0f8cf2182c951b39407: I'm sorry to put you through it again, but I really have to get some answers.
textByHashes.66bd75ed69d8696d37867e8c2ba6388c2cdc50cd: There, there. I don't need you to tell me any more of that. What about on the way to the study? Did you see Anna?
textByHashes.65567bc8f867b13e1b0d2dd9d31cd66db92ef966: Really? So, you can't place Anna at the murder scene, but there was a man there? David, Bob or Frank?
textByHashes.e4ebc2ce53563ce36424ea702936034c91381aac: Did you see her anywhere near the scene of the murder?
textByHashes.5f9207b953ae1f578b977b3bf819657451a6dd60: So, you didn't see or hear anything unusual?
textByHashes.ce44848abc025d2173a12e3da2392aca47e044c5: Really? That's not good. Not good at all.
textByHashes.ea6ab8b77efb85e9116572f124974fe54e5298da: You're certain you don't remember anything?
textByHashes.42b61d2d05fa5fc45a7552c411066f6aaedd2b42: Hmm, I think I'll gather more evidence, first.
textByHashes.4ddf4dabdde6a2effc202eb3a77f827655423831: The defence is ready, Your Honour.
textByHashes.10a2906d4b317d87b432553fdb49d87fc0591076: The defence calls the Sinclairs' handyman.
textByHashes.4de04652fbecacac873b6b3e90d46454aacc8b83: The defence calls the Sinclairs' dog handler.
textByHashes.ebbab988aad0e82b8766d8b559917989aada2b19: The defence calls the Sinclairs' butler.
textByHashes.dca74807329b7656027bf18469deafad2cd55415: The defence calls the Sinclairs' maid.
textByHashes.a9e4a628a9d6b1d4c450963027c95a6b1afd55a7: You are saying that you saw someone other than Anna handle the dagger?
textByHashes.8317ae71940d5f92f5cf890dc0eda15875e049bc: Not only has a person other than my client been identified handling the weapon, but the dagger was within easy access to anyone in the household.
textByHashes.8c21eb0b383856558575d280b28678a80f660bbe: My client's fingerprints could have been planted on it by another party.
textByHashes.deb4c5cd82aa217087533766d64cf5af5a1bfef6: Could you tell us who this thread belongs to?
textByHashes.4e9980c44c15bf5360dc6abfdbbf1cb1e669294b: So, you can't say for certain who this thread belongs to.
textByHashes.5eb13677e2f7a30ba2c912c0b0574c92c2757d64: Then this thread could have come from either of Anna or David's clothes, and they had many of this colour. A fact that would be known to anyone of the household.
textByHashes.b54eb661f551eae2109dd00a392e655152595189: Then the thread could have been planted by someone else to throw suspicion on my client. I think we can all see this thread is very questionable evidence.
textByHashes.803eca96903c967de63ac66828a7a86e603f6a8b: So, only a small amount of poison would be enough to kill a man, I suppose?
textByHashes.e9fdb8f98a6fcd05899059cd6131aa52abaf24c0: Therefore, any one of the Sinclairs who bought poison could have done their chore and poisoned Lord Sinclair as well. Just because my client was too lazy to do her chore doesn't mean she poisoned Lord Sinclair.
textByHashes.352b6a4221d160af9855e9f884f717bbeffe6cf2: Where did you last see Anna on that fateful night?
textByHashes.1b24635648888acda21c8b21af9ccdd349b0bcff: What about on the way to the study? Did you see Anna?
textByHashes.b03232257de2cc7770ca492e65dc21dd30b9c69a: Indeed. Well, if my client can't be placed at the murder scene, and there is evidence that a man was there, I think it casts a great deal of doubt on the case.
textByHashes.56aeafd8fdceca02825ca2ff577633522b27ea96: Yes, but what about our deal?
textByHashes.e9967a39aa18bd0fa91d16917f56a1055eee406d: Well, being an attorney was an interesting experience.
textByHashes.5b2d0a7a4dc8a1d45f3b1f93318144a0e320e0b1: I know, but I needed to get a 'not guilty' verdict.
textByHashes.fe1ad4943ed70d880267c4788b7b58581406840a: Can I speak to my client?
textByHashes.f13b2be8a59bde510f61262014f1662c74235e31: You need to hold up your end of the bargain. Tell me how to get into Camelot or I go back to the judge and tell him I have doubts about your innocence.
textByHashes.da004ad7015a0fc7e8ccd36552bfefd682e943a2: What are you going to be doing? Aren't you coming with me?
textByHashes.ffaef0edcc568e071d1fa1149122598d310bfa97: How do I get into Camelot again?
textByHashes.fd772b31951ea868951d117fb70f6feb060a3abf: I knew it. I knew Morgan Le Faye had to be involved. Where is King Arthur and his knights? What have you done with them?
textByHashes.06cb102fa78ea9e0048d7231bcd838437bbf3212: I'll foil your plans Morgan, just like I always do. I won't let you win. Good alwa-
textByHashes.fc2ad1b5a648355b5c1c2dc2362ead268dc3d5aa: I should speak to Merlin first.
textByHashes.4e8e1222ea87d821fcbf4d739d043a5bcdfb4cc5: How did you let a bunch of Black Knights get the better of you? I thought you guys were the toughest knights around.
textByHashes.8941c9365efadfbcd0ab7bc29a635115586f5997: Buck up, man. We'll escape from here and set everything to right.
textByHashes.ccbb4bb93d4cac907ae7efad5cfeb458ad90cd33: Then why are you in this jail?
textByHashes.bf10d5fd3e2ffe30239cb5edb31ebe47eaa5b02e: Huh, oh no. I wouldn't laugh at the greatest knight in the land.
textByHashes.1ee78deb8041f2821d40ba29496790789154de88: Err, no. It was all part of my brilliant plan. I allowed her to capture me so I could find out where she was keeping all of you.
textByHashes.ee997ba74ac671541a9b1e7dfd77ddb8fd82b591: Hey, why do I have to do all the thinking here? You're the brilliant wizard.
textByHashes.cb426a170566fcb0a63735946ddd4bcfda5acf86: Where is King Arthur now? He's not in the jail cell with us.
textByHashes.0330f24638ccaa28a2c42bae105624fea29958bc: What is the connection between Morgan Le Faye and the Sinclairs?
textByHashes.534efcf8ed92d8c841350a7e38a426b358079992: So what's the plan of escape? Are you going to teleport us all away? Turn us into fish and swim to sea?
textByHashes.f8bcf21c98d0db7e7cfef35b24176ce0924f990e: Well, I'm sure if we put our heads together we will think of something.
textByHashes.03801e789710b70b7af1162e828dbcd3f9274e66: Let's talk about a plan of escape.
textByHashes.8a91d83cd8cc353dcb4a7bbdb1788f944f4c357c: How will we go about reclaiming Camelot?
textByHashes.eb1f4256a2af4b741ab104b6418d67313d6d0711: How do you plan to do that? You couldn't even defend it from them.
textByHashes.0cae47aa8a7c5e95d1d071ad5d3d0fc5212e342f: So to reclaim Camelot, I need to break you out of jail quietly.
textByHashes.ddcd5c64df4d61841059906fcbc4e8ab7e461c75: How do I retrieve the Holy Grail? Do you know where it is?
textByHashes.ae53f8c4ac6f27368326f30f28e0079198d60adb: The last time I was in Keep Le Faye, it was pretty well guarded. I don't think I'll be able to sneak in quietly.
textByHashes.2752c78d26cb80a1166f946d2d9edd9494832a23: So, I need to break eight knights out of jail? That could be troublesome.
textByHashes.812fced22f61e1749818603ec752528c7e57586d: Assuming I can escape from this jail, how can I save King Arthur?
textByHashes.0c6f92909e97de78ade357b712248dc122ba96a7: And how do I go about doing that?
textByHashes.725d5f7e5abfbe5cabeb59f9b9e9c4fc5683f888: Any thoughts on how we could escape?
textByHashes.af97428248a5e4a46aa6e559ad93b01f70805e2e: Have you had any brilliant ideas on how to get out of here?
textByHashes.c7db1ea96e1cfba29e560539bd340c7321226d8a: Any thoughts on how we can get out of this cell?
textByHashes.12ecba700ce084c89606181c8234bfa6f65b473d: Thank you, I will let you know.
textByHashes.83643e2d68f05bf3f5768af85934fcbce197e19a: Any thoughts on how we could break out of this cell?
textByHashes.1932c35c9a01eb9ed1e167482e8595cfcf07ddde: Any ideas on how to get out of this cell?
textByHashes.405e14e28f98c29d3866f9c431a94f43882f5b63: We don't have a ladder...but we do have a lot of knights.
textByHashes.26ffe218500c89e97270d1d7de9da23fd7b07ee6: Hey guys! I've got an idea...
textByHashes.b75e57b5ac2d7cc8b4b19b8c86fe2024f88afe30: Hey guys, do you think you could lift me out too? I need to run some errands. I'll come back and free you all as soon as I can!
textByHashes.34f9569c697f656a316e19176bccd68f6e8d3fcc: I'm not sure yet. Have you got any useful objects in your pockets?
textByHashes.f68daf396a99fabc05690d26c159a104f0910b26: Pie? How very useful to our cause.
textByHashes.8d3171e435fc265377c62639982fb0411e5aa696: We need to get through the cell door, but I haven't got anything to open it. Have you got any useful objects in your pockets?
textByHashes.1dff37a59e877c576e657a903b2cc5b712015ed3: Great, these will be a huge help.
textByHashes.18c884c4bc9f7a1c594363ffb3f2ba2845c0ef30: Gee, thanks. You've contributed so much to my plan.
textByHashes.6d1268f79bcc345ddd64d4c694e621845d0ef842: I'm working on it. Have you got any useful objects in your pockets?
textByHashes.9103a53b2aa7ae688da3f0180211a3b90d485577: I'm looking for inspiration. Have you got any useful objects in your pockets?
textByHashes.e3cb72767fbce67d8cda5d4e59894ee8e6c06376: The quickest way is through the cell door, but I don't have anything to pick the lock with. Have you got any useful objects in your pockets?
textByHashes.0b55a14a48c872a8afc3c9f7f0c94e9c36f520f1: Give me an R. Give me an O. Give me a U...
textByHashes.4980d1be87fd45042f3b52f9dd37e9935cab94f7: You guys deal with the guards, I'll get the Holy Grail
textByHashes.19e87a7867674a1db85cc59bae94cc00acfb90fc: Now I just need to get out of here and see Wizard Cromperty.
textByHashes.123c64de0b41d025d4bd710cf9dd82526969e981: Wizard Cromperty! Merlin sent me. King Arthur has been kidnapped and turned into a granite statue.
textByHashes.deeb62435834a3fae24efe3d45388ba629cb182c: He didn't WANT to be a statue. Morgan Le Faye turned him into one.
textByHashes.f1117bb3b2938b166b905032d64ded7132e6d92e: Merlin said you might know how to free King Arthur.
textByHashes.ce4196b0f376c8d441f201b8489c75fdf608c1a6: Yes, Wizard Cromperty, I remember, I was there.
textByHashes.219afe6c103a934e4215152b2d99dde13ca0953b: That's not so difficult. I already have the Holy Grail, King Arthur's most prized possession, and I know he was turned into a granite statue.
textByHashes.a5932979ebb12c9b2d1b47e29c13ba8c10aff9a3: So what do I do with this spell?
textByHashes.216387c112cf34fcaf7fae820a38d26bdc3a2cb1: Merlin suspects King Arthur had been taken to the Black Knights' Fortress. The last time I was there I needed to disguise myself in a bronze medium helm and an iron chainbody just to get past the door.
textByHashes.5804b360b8e78dacd74824fb10995c0ccf061ef5: What did I need for the spell to work?
textByHashes.4cbca1a62fcaa28c7259c560127e40cc139665bb: How do I get into the Black Knights' Fortress?
textByHashes.3ff2151f09cd211d8d771cf81cfff0d5cd332ae3: Really? Where is King Arthur now?
textByHashes.c8fd6930a549e3d1b0934760c5f67e162d615069: Errr, thanks. Why don't you tell me in your own words how glorious you thought our victory was.
textByHashes.9445ef246c28eaf56d5e396b44a7b94cd5da9071: I don't have everything necessary to cast the spell.
textByHashes.ae5009ed57f1ae0c1f2814caad9ce5b694900acc: I need to bring you some guard armour to disguise yourself in or you'll never be able to escape.
textByHashes.0ca09cd6b150ed7c3ea0e031431fa9b36ac2b4ac: It's no trouble. But we need to get you out of here quickly before any of the Black Knights suspect something.
textByHashes.a1f804a0c3d0e60129afb4022e45bdd99507845c: There's no time to explain; here, take this disguise.
textByHashes.05c539c32df536f81483f82f362bcee5097cb68e: I should go meet King Arthur at Camelot. He should have escaped by now.
textByHashes.435c98af85bf0e0c2c4dc1e64d5c968d7679b1b1: I see you made it back safely.
textByHashes.94eba39f7cac4678f483dc1ed0f88339fbb2e856: I guess we won't be hearing a peep out of them for awhile.
textByHashes.a3a3dbaaa684a29342016a348d0f15d5dc30d679: So how did you remove the Sinclairs from Camelot?
textByHashes.5f60210e6713435eddbf325700c709dd2df5cdfe: How did you get your magic powers back?
textByHashes.535c4c3ad7f3e9a7fdb3b2c8930e128143a15eb4: Tell me about the training ground.
textByHashes.1d243b1288ac992cda43fb4b036894305f3e30fe: Tell me about dying or leaving the grounds.
textByHashes.fa1aef8d819242a9b586363ab4e91e1305dad065: I have to start again? What do you mean?
textByHashes.9578da38aa3f268ff7620518cc178c9be0f7035b: What if I log out during the fights?
textByHashes.c755f0542fda541cc40909d3d87737a956d69b87: What do the new prayers do?
textByHashes.5ddbf066e214d03b894034ea4af3c77fbd2877fa: Then tell me about the respawn - how will it work?
textByHashes.8510ec59bd541f8c45cda454a60fb223b0f9c5f5: Grubfoot? What are you doing here?
textByHashes.2d452e2ee31f12b9bf27eac2155e4dda6a24981e: Mistag, why won't you let Grubfoot into the city?
textByHashes.cf4682239a94e735ab0980fe63713df42a406d1a: I'll take responsibility for Grubfoot. I know he won't cause any trouble.
textByHashes.89c6bbb1535b990f91f23b710bb21f5474f3cdfc: I think I'll let you two sort this out yourselves.
textByHashes.3cad032859fedbdb63e9ae6cca2d4dd9a70ed107: I don't have time right now.
textByHashes.6d6dce7d7fb745ee01ea65ab2c75249140699716: Mistag said that Grubfoot could come in as long as he stayed with me.
textByHashes.b877f54578bd7f2d07b838aa66ef51847df639c0: Grubfoot is a goblin from the surface. They all have eyes that size.
textByHashes.ba300952e3cd7b47136331656de362229def5df1: It's okay! Zanik isn't in league with any war god.
textByHashes.19efd739bed5e72f2aadc433adf2504b9f05af89: Grubfoot, you probably shouldn't mention the Big High War God down here. He's not exactly popular with the Dorgeshuun.
textByHashes.0dd7ad1afcbab088fb41dc3ca901d85d258b504a: Mistag said that Grubfoot could come into the city as long as he stayed with me.
textByHashes.ad47c012da4f37bc229040ce6fd630a326bee4e6: Hello, Zanik! There's someone here to see you.
textByHashes.6a46f715e2deadc92ba510e80cf14991b8ee027f: That's an unusual sentiment for a goblin.
textByHashes.87df09fa1c77435431220dd4d762433520e27bd0: So why have you come to talk to Zanik?
textByHashes.2a3f88f0f67cbfb26d80790dc968f3055bace1e0: How do you know your dream was true?
textByHashes.619621deab60ad7096e476b556ca2a649741c72f: It's just a dream. It doesn't mean anything.
textByHashes.a28c21c8152a2290959e0ce5a16c1319622c4271: I think it must mean something.
textByHashes.41cb771398a4e3ea9ec7db8248dc1e04400fccd7: I promise not to tell anyone where the temple is.
textByHashes.b260039a6b8ebd3945081bcaf9878664250162b7: But you said we could go in!
textByHashes.fd9b928546a81b79b81d5580c6f6038a854629a3: Humans aren't allowed inside. They let Zanik in, but not me.
textByHashes.df3d853f3233ecd8751168fa2da6e363bbe94657: How can I get into the temple without being a goblin?
textByHashes.5564d38e2f3fd6d3669e735dd0882caa57c6416c: What? But you said you had a way.
textByHashes.c016d8a8c4383ef036bcd84ee7683368a60009e8: Can you teleport me to the temple again?
textByHashes.22f1388bb10fc5e9cbadae12cc53dfc8750944f4: I'll have to go get some law runes and molten glass then.
textByHashes.bf0d75f99118a1e99863605765c88528f7443c77: I'll go and see this mage.
textByHashes.f7cb18ae7b5f108f85ac63dff004d0abc665708f: Can you turn me into a goblin?
textByHashes.bfff374da2463f0f4824234d47882ba902adc54c: I need to slip past some goblin guards.
textByHashes.9d4046e29d3364c7fb26c51a3681b5e1b7f82102: I promised not to tell anyone.
textByHashes.d6beb988ac208f6b75b94788c6e636051c3c8613: Can you turn me into a goblin or not?
textByHashes.55b46feb214c7c74a6a55f3d69572f31c4932486: Actually, I don't want to be a goblin.
textByHashes.c2bd673e9db78d62d689d7b92d6c9e7939df481e: Not yet, but I spoke to the Makeover Mage. They told me how to make a potion to turn myself into a goblin.
textByHashes.f0521ae78dbc62bbb7a5f243434380af3fed7661: I'd like to get into the temple please.
textByHashes.a5ab7dacb386125022514a8baa06503296aa8c24: Actually, me no want to go in temple.
textByHashes.56aca73d42656d2e8dd9bcced4f24aeab1e7f16f: How me get into Huzamogaarb enclave?
textByHashes.e04e38914bb02548e9d30037c5afb15abf5754f7: The goblins there have imprisoned Zanik!
textByHashes.154f7a64f1bfc6a4d5c1a015e68e6e9a1b349851: I turned myself into a goblin so I could get in here!
textByHashes.dfc4219eda43960d6e5442a326ad860776e75eb2: Yes... Definitely one of my more interesting choices.
textByHashes.9a45013801930cc17c513881dfe283c6af6667f8: Clearly. Well luckily I have a moving-over-distance sphere here. You can use it to teleport out.
textByHashes.c4268d8ee9cb74c1240dde2abe5401306d31b7f8: Don't worry, I'll work it out. I'll see you back in Dorgesh-Kaan.
textByHashes.eb571922baca9d493f0844faa940b3d7f7246cbe: Clearly. So how can I get you out?
textByHashes.8dedff042c55efdfb1c33f479d3fb5c81aca4da4: I'll look around and see if I can find it.
textByHashes.e28299644def67a194dc6d67a4f58e022d5ce67c: Me want to know about Yu'biusk.
textByHashes.eb63153f862a390ed9d4619290485262fa86cedd: I understand Big High War God.
textByHashes.f3aa6dd1bb0c1f645adf549de0b7d2bc2e90a432: Big High War God commands it.
textByHashes.e099d4819dec79ee4d0528ed3608b598079e8f38: We taught selves to be mighty!
textByHashes.47e57538eebcfa301da66f2d0bcb084621a93ce4: He chose us for other quality.
textByHashes.858e72787f90ff92850cad9292886eb4be59de72: Goblins not mighty warriors before he chose us.
textByHashes.adfd5a40a255d95ac755d7183fdb7e13fefdca39: Big High War God rewards victory.
textByHashes.4a0188f30f1c8f513e85a44fc8d4ff16dc41f36d: Big High War God teaches us to think for selves.
textByHashes.8f3af331da4a95fff0ab6c140b679ed254a348ec: Planning is part of war, and all parts of war are good.
textByHashes.6036c7a86363dbbaeefc937f7a2f5976fc30762a: Lead goblins to promised land of Yu'biusk.
textByHashes.feb37abcb9c266b5a73254016ca2236d5ff8c964: Lead goblins to victory over whole world.
textByHashes.c528b8540767343d96db66c832cdee41021f39a0: Big High War God controls outcome of the battle.
textByHashes.a947422f6f7f60b859a2f71110108a99d3780348: Goblins stupid and would make poor plans.
textByHashes.d130345de092253daa62cb3e42d5a92048c36c2e: We try to convert them instead.
textByHashes.abbb2b2a7b0e2c9695ac4bfbbf8e58bd7744826d: What? But you said he dead!
textByHashes.a94fb88fdddc48d4bcb0d6bcf8df8bc859f187db: Can I talk to old high priests?
textByHashes.0d4814c35753860468cd7edc0f8f6b7707bea6ea: What Big High War God's real name?
textByHashes.c36181c0405ca6ca5f72e637690b237f12aff1bc: Why there only six tribes in temple?
textByHashes.fda8f098341f317898f3686d322328f71b07da21: How me get into tribal enclaves?
textByHashes.8be3fa42ebd40b9ddafde372fde489cf51b8779f: Me want to take test again.
textByHashes.821159eec341e4dd37c2323fb80872e25e8b9c38: Can you make dyes for me please?
textByHashes.71cf167ef6e649cac0a8f7da416828b2156b5441: Can you make black or white dye?
textByHashes.a35f5625f9ebd764b7f55f237ec802912b3d30b1: Then how can you colour clothes white?
textByHashes.707b168d882c23e7e4ae22ce46857e43055a717c: I need to catch a Hemenster Whitefish.
textByHashes.a2e5345651010c623bb372cebbb66aedcb90b748: Could you remove the dye from this goblin mail?
textByHashes.c6db8859398bfc34ad9b5af1bd08e9bcec75d9c7: I don't have that much money on me.
textByHashes.9a8087d6ea55cfb84cce63b0f5dfe0a1d76faa56: Yeah, I was just about to do that.
textByHashes.eec290d852e2d163fbf597d528bf92e52366875c: Oh, right. I'll go and get some.
textByHashes.7eeca7fe6af1c99a6083a30943fb61bc56548c64: Sort of. I've discovered that Yu'biusk is another plane of existence. Apparently if the barriers between the planes are breached, goblin blood will call out to Yu'biusk and create a portal leading there.
textByHashes.1af38d2869609f61fbed210db8d5ef8bb8c4819a: But how could we breach the barriers between the planes?
textByHashes.df9b192f423904c6afe4a16ac005cec88918c62f: Fungus ring? That sounds like a fairy ring. They're part of a big teleportation network.
textByHashes.9191adf4807835bc6697128c32bb223c599db0d4: What do you think we'll find there?
textByHashes.509f7dea2bf749b24eda486f0999c7d628024a5e: Yes, but we haven't properly explored it yet.
textByHashes.db7811e489bd5b566a9c09bfefd6471476f361d5: I don't understand... What happened here?
textByHashes.21e63501322175afe6197c6187606852c3a97b44: I don't know... She just disappeared...
textByHashes.85d8b133647829391b7353ed28ae2453cd4494b5: What are we going to do about Zanik?
textByHashes.b9dae04d7bf5688ed335b4d18220af94f5f82402: I managed to get back to Yu'biusk.
textByHashes.13789349cb3fc207679d1181770fa38aa878c0b7: Yes, but it wasn't how you'd dreamed. It was a devastated wasteland.
textByHashes.cc028c6f3179997fcc9427ca27285bffd15df322: I'm afraid so. And that's not all. Zanik vanished there.
textByHashes.454ba485592f0c61bebd785d9aee22bbb289a640: Yes. A bright white light picked her up and then she was gone.
textByHashes.60276842c3c7a05cd2b87001ab90b206f65c9613: I've managed to catch some shrimp.
textByHashes.1791256780bba281e188e997d2bdecc6021d5a43: Tell me about my skills again.
textByHashes.27cde9ca99b91d4b4aa35de712437b9f29a9f001: I already know how to cook. Brynna taught me just now.
textByHashes.6fc15532457239023807c08c2147e1b7b131f919: Tell me about making dough again.
textByHashes.09d0af5966056863093d5bef27ed2a4ebc617daa: Tell me about range cooking again.
textByHashes.0f4d469fe40cb2b0ab67b3bc726776c36c727aa9: Nope, I'm ready to move on!
textByHashes.9e87d167f490e1abdefd0db6ea545b6d42de23f7: I have a bronze bar. What now?
textByHashes.7f2a344c5a5d76093d2ec91b736fb27487fec94a: I did it! I killed a giant rat!
textByHashes.dcf61ee6dfff2e3ce36ac410948ac3312391cb8b: Tell me about combat stats again.
textByHashes.802161d6576a8b72bab27c5842e2fcfb9ee64369: Tell me about melee combat again.
textByHashes.26f8c91b95c7d54b740b627fb53638871d7653fe: Tell me about ranged combat again.
textByHashes.4229926d52fc00caff8c41dcdb4fbe27891c79fc: Tell me about the Wilderness again.
textByHashes.744a302b257d7cde36ad77e36ac5828813a9f09a: But why would I use a Bond instead of just buying membership normally?
textByHashes.0f0675ac1099c95705f6e32885fa564bb6cfdea4: So if I used my gold to buy a Bond from another player, I could get membership without spending any real money?
textByHashes.42456afde1dc84fd1020280b24f778776a627584: Awesome. Is there anything else I should know about accounts?
textByHashes.59ac64e98ce64f252d4b09943fcb1404cb3c461b: I'd like to change my Ironman mode.
textByHashes.603fe70e3e8c92bda2754ec0c9ffad909dc89d1b: Thanks, I'd better go and find him.
textByHashes.72c67c8d26117381be552bdd5986878f9d53dfe8: Yes, I do want to become an Ironman.
textByHashes.e142c3d88ac5234329e7e16150e6bee8db59db20: No, I'm not planning to do that.
textByHashes.656ab3e537f9819973fee083917c536328dd6697: Can I go on the quest?
textByHashes.3f991bfe93fc660cfa1d171b2d269e74560bc564: Yes, I'd like to talk to Grand Vizier Erkle.
textByHashes.c9f16868fc2fb770e54876e5d3aeaffe68ff8e2a: What kind of quest is it?
textByHashes.fcd71777afa79e155be452eeb00e934f94defb3e: How do I get in here?
textByHashes.93e4f79809c29fd97b8e020ea16df006c2cc610f: Can I speak to someone in charge?
textByHashes.c940c6c04fc9f4bc008a0ff5e2dd43b963046811: Which quests do I need to complete?
textByHashes.624faadbde02ecd18ca568fd45e32218867c2f83: It's alright, but I've forgotten what to do.
textByHashes.ad38619c0af35cce7e0165073b95faa648db07df: Terrible, I lost my map of the Kharazi Jungle.
textByHashes.2bc97b8f20a3dc5551f97dac229d5de0db133422: No, I won't pay for it.
textByHashes.db2090605d60bdf5eab7c6e094852d7f450f5e46: How do I get into the Kharazi Jungle?
textByHashes.bab294c31edb1c1bd57eb99e4b28c5e73c1ce5e4: Actually, I plan to map the jungle myself.
textByHashes.6598be18b77cc73a8f2513d6bf67eb7921f26f0e: Do you have any other tips about the Kharazi Jungle?
textByHashes.eeaa21261516bac48a9c83da972feb7728ce7268: Have you seen any Kharazi tribespeople in the jungle?
textByHashes.c12bdebfd63e7970279b42064dfbecf5e824a3f1: Do you have a Bullroarer I could borrow?
textByHashes.04772fdc77f29c18eeca33ea0d961b4566b942a0: Will you trade something for it?
textByHashes.2955c16684b21e46c8037f862f9575f298ee2a97: You'll give me what in return?
textByHashes.dc9899b23d34a2ae132e7cc1258f3ce77009e3f6: I was hoping to attract the attention of a Kharazi tribe member.
textByHashes.5b5968045bbfd94da2018b49a8a3a4752921958a: I've been sent by the Legends' Guild. We want to develop friendly relations with your people.
textByHashes.b19aa47feedd5e85afde7b63103026487d8ec9ad: Can you get your people together?
textByHashes.e3c3780930b4624227d58eff44022b4d6f850842: Is there any way I could help?
textByHashes.f515bc53eb254a9ecacfc3fc3d90d8aa25914c65: How do we make a totem pole?
textByHashes.9610eebe06b8f50cb3375e7d5e1a22aa2254ce3a: Oh well, sorry to hear about that.
textByHashes.cac22182b0dadf6891e4cf346210caf14e602764: If I find Ungadulu, what's in it for me?
textByHashes.875f13f3f96fb75f1d4828712259df64d8537744: I'm lost, can you show me the way out?
textByHashes.51f66654a80d8d9a45b01ce83cb8a261f91a2e98: How can I extinguish the flames?
textByHashes.fffbdfdc5547a275939d9d943e4bd8daffe8105e: Where do I get pure water from?
textByHashes.b3a597d97579e8c676ba62b12183b8504ce5c26d: How did they summon the spirits?
textByHashes.7ba0682fa864ce5a15668f60e76e8b77823f9441: Hmm... I think I might have seen one of those patterns recently.
textByHashes.acb6cb9014252696b6f905e0c9d76fb2e1a90de5: I'm not sure what to do.
textByHashes.e31ea0b9bfe7ef9c92ba08e369ff850c2ee25520: I need some pure water to douse some magic flames.
textByHashes.5266b92e99eb5ac2bb530e2240fe5100d43c708b: I don't think so. I need the water to help Ungadulu!
textByHashes.8cbc97fb53830688c5bd007d515624fb3f96dfd5: Metal of the sun... what is that?
