textByHashes.f3ea68d8dff5106ffe4cd2179ef42f1fe28669f8: Where can I find this metal?
textByHashes.6ef61ee818e845a32449b459769203ae7a4f4f67: How do I bless the vessel?
textByHashes.4d4c7a38e06d152bd743853991df50e59691c12c: Ungadulu called me 'Vacu'. What does that mean?
textByHashes.1937f846e78b99faf7e068a0d924a5b3e8f90f4d: Can we still get the people together?
textByHashes.c4e32756b7ad7b4335447ad8e727a49990361924: Where is this sacred pool of yours?
textByHashes.e1bb23fc2621298e47ca3ddb2d5d83868e257d9f: I need to collect some Yommi tree seeds for Gujuo.
textByHashes.45d63bdc471bbd3d56af642f0383cae440839211: How do I grow the Yommi tree?
textByHashes.1de35ac76cfc237e8c90e156c8a2240098fe14a9: What do you know about the sacred water?
textByHashes.43780897d8fbe94dd2720ad23a49348459a0480b: How do I get out of here?
textByHashes.731b62f7f6c5a49e61d65a985947c9a7897146b6: Ungadulu is free! He was possessed by a demon and I killed it.
textByHashes.30492856673237c85b117b159ccaffbaeb39e430: I have the Yommi tree seeds.
textByHashes.f77b2da1706a1d7952327ce60cb17ccc5be44481: I have germinated the Yommi tree seeds.
textByHashes.4f1d6c8d6b12c164f55bab0e944290d3a526c957: Where can I find fertile soil?
textByHashes.876b3b85a3e2ff5d6eb629c954f1d99aa4f5826f: The water pool has dried up, but I need more pure water.
textByHashes.f0870e2a42e62be64dee44623949567565d5042b: Does the Yommi tree have to have pure water?
textByHashes.187f1fbd7c151bc7502e1a96acf932246fe9bdc4: Where's the source of the pure water?
textByHashes.b8825c7d81e6fbc8169ccbfa8e8817994d86a1f8: If I looked for the source, could you help me?
textByHashes.fd7234dc2eea187ef2c5d39e9bbfd79ba7362ab8: Where can I find Snake Weed?
textByHashes.3fe7cb4eb78c3cc49698b2f5aad88a8fa0d84bf0: Will I really need this Potion? I'm already pretty brave.
textByHashes.6708e77975d29414b0083a2e2e8bcde268a8cc12: I searched the caves thoroughly and didn't find any sacred water...
textByHashes.22ab70f7094e3a9dcd80dbc614e5fa4c5ee8134c: Where can I get more water for the Yommi tree?
textByHashes.70368200db64d3f999b87edb88d526e6b1a19199: I am on a quest to get more sacred water.
textByHashes.7fee40de55dfc611bc468d01fe94a67f44b5eb21: What do you know about the source of the sacred water?
textByHashes.5e39f796f411802b248b116b534767a9d098fcc2: I need more Yommi tree seeds.
textByHashes.5f3fede3365b97079e87e11c24567185e2b3d210: Something funny's going on in these caves... I wonder if the Kharazi can help me get past this?
textByHashes.8a9d474dedabe2a4272b55d481b4bc3f519e8a9d: Yes, I need it for my quest.
textByHashes.1dfc990d5a15770f5257e1d2352952e940c8029a: Not really, I just wondered if I could push that big rock.
textByHashes.2709d042ec577c58057e3dc645179daab1e9beb4: What can I do about that?
textByHashes.946d8b494ba224018c0d6e0df66404d24a9d898e: I'll do what I must to get the water.
textByHashes.034770904166abdf4e48111cd980646a154e5089: I've changed my mind, I can't do it.
textByHashes.312f840f7abc14f816b26c7e07126e4766c7f533: No, I won't take someone's life for you.
textByHashes.3142376fb99287a1a7a2005b51d221a5507f04dd: Can't I just get some water?
textByHashes.94f006866743722c9832e3b8719d90752725115b: Who am I supposed to kill again?
textByHashes.8b2670315ab47f7165d1f91fb4733d20797886d6: I have found the source of the sacred water!
textByHashes.c5f5d4c16554aa00e52e5f1ea7dcf8f8aa99bdf6: Do you know anything more about the caves?
textByHashes.2f8fabcbe7c10c450581d70a82af0808073f3c12: Can you remind me where the source of the sacred water is?
textByHashes.2310657c28a4336959d547e2468fd0fbbafe3fbb: I've forgotten how I got to the sacred water.
textByHashes.68737afa16e1895aaaa93fa57486d2f4e86532ab: A spirit called Echned Zekin said I had to avenge his spirit by killing Viyeldi if I wanted him to unblock the sacred spring.
textByHashes.07ebdec98f857ca4b87b222e32d903779b564b5e: I met a spirit in the Viyeldi Caves.
textByHashes.a0839801ccd712f5ebe7c6be78df2d3302c38eec: The spirit told me to kill Viyeldi!
textByHashes.15d885235c2b991d05628bfb91d9d0028cc4b9e9: Do you know anything about daggers?
textByHashes.85aeb00ce0cd93deb1a89337290a006aa4104c28: I have something else in mind!
textByHashes.4ea72b0f7d30258bc1e4dc4b941e6b60ec23ca7b: Well, actually, it wasn't a spirit at all - it was Nezikchened!
textByHashes.e749d1fdc2ed5f75e579433d3c29b064d2ca6fbc: I found the source of the spring and I got some sacred water.
textByHashes.eadadce283b73c056538fded8b668665de72ecae: I defeated the demon - for good this time!
textByHashes.3144f7a96a49f9ed25db1ccbbfbe893cd72ba457: How do I make the totem pole?
textByHashes.a3b5b90a0bc5fdc5e1295f2342e94d81d759bf10: I've made the totem pole, now what do I do with it?
textByHashes.b533b1997996f48eb6c8506ad80edd1c073d374f: I've already made the totem pole.
textByHashes.57bb0e6175b27aba28d601a60802580219b972d0: I'm not sure what to do with the totem pole.
textByHashes.20cde238b0838ad9935628bf66ebfdc5f772371d: I've lost the totem pole you gave me.
textByHashes.8e59490ab7b40251dfbc7357840a9ed279e718e7: No, I've got something else to do at the moment.
textByHashes.7ca69affef7992adc039fe679c13a28bad3f5307: What are you camped here for?
textByHashes.cc90567f7da205cb3c25708868767eacb9301cbd: If it's hidden how are you planning to find it?
textByHashes.6e12f9b1571916a07d2a76e2b949d246b62d7996: Well, it looks to me like YOU don't know EITHER seeing as you're all just sat around here.
textByHashes.d7d47243d23b2335584ed73dd7c81e12d38e01ea: So a leprechaun knows where Zanaris is eh?
textByHashes.4a45d60bf27a4642299e69de05bf3661fc0c53fe: Right... Well good luck with it.
textByHashes.675389014589061ce9ee064837a7a6f287aeed66: What makes you think it's out here?
textByHashes.4336bc4a07cb5328240ce5be38b50662776ea84c: Do you know any good adventures I can go on?
textByHashes.adfc2f161e5896cc1a072f7720681fdb0f6413f9: I don't think you've found a good adventure at all!
textByHashes.c63bbb1cc36831fc148436b605ca55bf0e98077c: Why are you guys hanging around here?
textByHashes.a5f130775cb61dbdd7478bc1025ce1afb991f875: Uh... yeah, sorry about that. Why are you all standing around out here?
textByHashes.2f18cc56c414b870625dd15a4b2aaddd96facd55: Why are all of you standing around here?
textByHashes.60f3dea93c68d37aef8bd8ec9c3ac80530144d64: So let me get this straight: I need to search the trees around here for a leprechaun; and then when I find him, he will tell me where this 'Zanaris' is?
textByHashes.1b893ddfea9f26b5fd1ab52cd763506bbb6cc1a9: So I hear theres a leprechaun around here who can show me the way to Zanaris?
textByHashes.773bd591b1c6f62adbd917bb35db13034e398f9e: Have you found the tree with the leprechaun yet?
textByHashes.c5cc292388c5d39e0df75db49d82f100e18debba: Can you tell me about the Lost City?
textByHashes.17ed795ac231faef43858e8664d7c53a831349bc: ...but... I thought... Zanaris was a city...?
textByHashes.4d8ec92bcfe3c071ca916839e23858f89a36647d: ...How does it fit in a shed then?
textByHashes.6bd40b78581c2739ec33e2edd271cb7b9a6b544c: So I just walk into the shed and end up in Zanaris then?
textByHashes.19e99a057bb668c06970c54a44a349cfbf0d798e: So where would I get a staff?
textByHashes.5308b521626b9778ec092a5df9a36a7cabc18a8b: I've been in that shed. I didn't see a city.
textByHashes.42c93ab0882d7ba9e99254038f9a08b72b3727a1: How do I get to Zanaris again?
textByHashes.e6241721bdb1b3c2621a2a98df254f9f70b78490: I haven't found it yet either.
textByHashes.2cad083c5e7e1950dbd6693945957cf09f604229: So you didn't find the entrance to Zanaris yet, huh?
textByHashes.65a9b744d37d5d086f90acb2346a6941a88766b7: Yep. Found it REALLY easily too.
textByHashes.92ef73e3929d9abe058d8355309c0868debeea4a: Believe what you want. Enjoy your little camp fire.
textByHashes.f8565861614498a6162d97ea6cd358f142f82ae8: I don't think I'm strong enough to enter then.
textByHashes.1fca387d37e39b1f14515a0bee07bc5bd3eab671: Well that is a risk I will have to take.
textByHashes.8f9c7af8fdd54da271b293dd309ce75cda884177: Hey! Don't call me outerlander! I'm known as the mighty !
textByHashes.4b3df401120949d38771e45dadb631a13653a216: You don't look like a Fremennik yourself...
textByHashes.2c6ca7867335996f06042e90a1dbe488a0cce305: You've been away from these parts a while?
textByHashes.efae5715e0bb96c91138e011c35758354cfa05c9: Erm... no... That's you then, is it?
textByHashes.a581fe7a8ac5142e9d53aac802d854e5a3f029a7: Was the world good then? Only, you seem to have returned to Rellekka after all.
textByHashes.a600c3d006b381a3de8e8f1c1d113aa8272dab90: I see. So where are you and your scurvy sea-dogs headed to next? Arrr shiver-me timbers!
textByHashes.b6e0dfcda3f5fab20c181c0c4537546b90b6ab4b: Sorry, got caught up in the moment.
textByHashes.54f8f6b72b19c121ee10400a180f3a1370760667: The Moon Clan... I think I've heard of them...
textByHashes.4ab694a762dac535847ac45aa1b62f9182d29650: Why not, I've always wondered what the state of my innards are!
textByHashes.68baff1838356738c63f3f37c5a74031a90e26c0: A Seal of Passage? What's that?
textByHashes.e3773e6c8bf5dea318d9dba0c19ca6b87781d60c: So I have to try and bring peace to two warring nations who have been fighting for centuries?!?!
textByHashes.785f7995b7d72f7e00131222ecf50a3a452929ec: Well I will try. I am the mighty after all!
textByHashes.4a0d33e62b79cd0c78c4a5d85410e4004d581d42: So I just have to go talk to Brundt the Chieftain and tell him I want a Seal of Passage?
textByHashes.4f6e70d4dc7f397b0ef96ac1fdf0a89159a291a4: That's it? Because in my experience simple tasks like that always seem to take longer than I expect...
textByHashes.0dceee69fba07cc062e305951bb475c81ac821d1: No thanks, I'd like to live.
textByHashes.ef489e102353e26e3e297a06161c053043c6bb89: Hi there Brundt the Chieftain. Could you help me out with a Seal of Passage?
textByHashes.a3abe157948ad4e2d440f95a1cb3523923c5e906: Well, I've heard that there have been great troubles between your people and that of the Moon Clan. I was hoping to help. And so I need the Seal of Passage to show my intentions.
textByHashes.402c4353542fb09284de5e17b9ce0f2884dc755b: I will see what I can do.
textByHashes.433f99a36d67866a087a221ece68caf2851d5a6b: Can I have that seal then?
textByHashes.640c39de37982033df21899c33663b91696b925e: I lost my Seal of Passage!
textByHashes.05f49632d719aee99daf687ae4450168e5b7b8c7: Well... I would if I had space to carry one.
textByHashes.9f963dd8a0382f453c525db72328c173a6d81387: I'm glad you're confident in my abilities.
textByHashes.4a8897ace62f556d4fdccf5fbcce83adef9e2966: Uh... yeah... Well, Brundt the Chieftain gave me a seal, but I think I lost it somewhere along the way...
textByHashes.69ce4439ca7c8ca11e9a07608906c42fd247ae3b: Yup, I've got it right here!
textByHashes.97495978d525aaa98ee95a907a97e503176dc2fb: Arrr! Yar! Let's be on our way, yar!
textByHashes.3774d5719ac45cec8537c8e997e7309bb5f1201c: Um... isn't that how pirates talk?
textByHashes.13bfc489abf812f25b0fff83bac330a360ac5138: Do I still need the Seal of Passage?
textByHashes.8a9cbf31259faf7c129cc3f779d6ad8bae08301f: Can you take me back to Rellekka please?
textByHashes.6bfec92cf8d35499d46bc51e474d9b1143db903e: Nothing thanks! I just saw you here and thought I'd say hello!
textByHashes.61a8ca92447e9e44b032267768ca249fd843a335: That's fine, I'm just going to Pirates' Cove.
textByHashes.d691a67423f1b6d9c53b2589b77ab7bee1b42f02: Oh, I'd better go back and get it.
textByHashes.fe3123e94960f3efe73f7fc280eb18776a539114: Lokar, can you take me back to your ship?
textByHashes.630d90bd31db8b5aa8dd89a3525f764eab3d3466: Actually, I've changed my mind. Again. I don't want to go.
textByHashes.79d81060f5d065ce77a1b16602356c9bba00c894: (sigh) NO, I am NOT a stowaway...
textByHashes.bc1268ec0e80862531a798c3349f7c86dcb48d17: And to be honest, I don't know why everybody seems to think I am...
textByHashes.42c96776e8bdd203be04d7c8ac9dd76dc6cd6546: What exactly is it that a 'cabin boy' actually does on a pirate ship anyway?
textByHashes.ad0b9e38212fef23b6a44ba5bb7e3336b38d3dec: Hello. See anything good through your telescope there?
textByHashes.455782ec01e97a7afe9c20e461eba18b7cf46d74: You seem unhappy about that... Wouldn't a barbecue on the beach be fun?
textByHashes.17b0a90a81d6b0c30bef99fe26f3028cd5c1f7fe: That Lokar guy invited me aboard...
textByHashes.53ac0ce1917c90c3e46b429a86dcacdd4213c18e: Okay. So... What are you doing?
textByHashes.e45d3be489e95279e7c2d7e0ef5c69b2bda55853: A few hours late or a few miles down the road?
textByHashes.f47b780cf07592babc17ebdf1a2f7b223160af53: Great. So... What are you doing?
textByHashes.918492cc95b83348e6baeb78f2d49017c98a5235: Uh... something something open, something something food?
textByHashes.71ff9c3d7837a652cd3cafc0083c2249bd97b0a1: Oh, Lokar offered me a journey. He said you could take me to the island of the Moon Clan.
textByHashes.cf86be126ddfefbc13f9bd26cb9b7ee6711a18f4: So... You won't take me to Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.699a4a09b71f328692f1fe136dbb3910d7e1b23d: So... What can you tell me about this 'Moon Clan'? It all seems very mysterious I must say...
textByHashes.891343c66bfe42e26f08e922a6af714126f46317: What were you doing at Lunar Isle anyway? I always thought pirates would be... You know. Out pirating.
textByHashes.fe810ac2f359076d5404deae45800f6173e105aa: So you went to Lunar Isle for supplies?
textByHashes.e360edd1f61a7ab5a1f44bf8760b473b358b72ad: So what made you change your mind?
textByHashes.03a9c5a0c970368936fc122defa66426eec1db73: So you didn't attack the Moon Clan because you were worried you would yourself be attacked by these monsters trying to make your escape?
textByHashes.caa25f7599446071e6e54758b49ab6fb3cdca501: I was hoping you could tell me a little bit about your ship. I must say, it's really very impressive.
textByHashes.c62515b6e6a651a3943246702bca7ed2eb93207e: I used to own my own ship you know...
textByHashes.b96f337d505445ea3d2fcaab320245f4a8a63a94: It was called the Lady Lumbridge if I remember correctly...
textByHashes.12353499cbda0cd9f0f5358676ba871a44ca33e2: I wonder whatever happened to it...
textByHashes.a2c1d364e391ee82cb0a7204b222fd607c5bfbdc: Your last ship? Why, what was wrong with it?
textByHashes.5f07a32fa5820fae90cac973d9d0bf5060280a75: And of course the rest of your crew...
textByHashes.eac9300bacc1484c68bec8517004f2ffebf466bb: Um... no, I actually meant it was a shame that so many of your crew must have died in the shipwreck.
textByHashes.93b61c464cd1ca7943e4d4dd4fa008923cddc056: But I thought Lokar had already been there?
textByHashes.094611ca4784e896a80d3f3980affb6795f09be2: Oh. Oh yeah, I'm a Fremennik aren't I?
textByHashes.6d1e27a73885033bfe7b2879a2653f0f0e9b264a: I probably should have kept that Seal Of Passage Brundt the Chieftain gave me with me, shouldn't I?
textByHashes.0df8bcd3cc44203d2af3841db64b735a168a02cc: Okay, I'll go and get it again then.
textByHashes.7fae4d8e26e563804c5bb46cbfc3b3f0c0dfdd41: Can we sail to Lunar Isle now? I must say, it all sounds very intriguing over there...
textByHashes.c0cdb98c54b3a57adf9cac131b803ed6d259958a: Okay, keep my Seal with me at all times, check. Can we go now?
textByHashes.eb9cec4bb7e8b74f306e984e143a31fc2a36398e: Um... Way to sail a boat?
textByHashes.1edc19b81e7823c585699377925192c2fd069510: No, actually, I don't really want to know anything that you can tell me.
textByHashes.d245489ecf6d6df99eff35cb5937e61f5dbf3346: In fact, I don't even know why I began talking to you in the first place!
textByHashes.8e00ec2fb91c66b6f04da621cd83f0a8e8fa1a9b: So the Captain's a very bad sailor I take it?
textByHashes.c3957f3910cd71fe280541c3b37b4bd6af98ffc8: Alright, calm down I wasn't accusing you of anything!
textByHashes.6dedbd16a261045c90b87ca4bd5a0426c98a5220: I think you should lay off the coffee for a bit, youngster...
textByHashes.a600e42726d6203014d2794a674b690f91afd1f6: Do you know what's wrong with the ship? I've never seen a ship sail in a big circle like that before...
textByHashes.4d47c6eef63756b8d0ab195378e5096e198d93ee: I see... Thank you, that's very helpful.
textByHashes.fa9fd02ba4c6ec68a8966e43e4786f59c1884830: So you reckon it's the navigator or the Captain's fault?
textByHashes.6c8b8c09930762d8cce982b45ced2558d8bc8571: The ship sailing. Or not sailing. Or sailing in a big circle and coming back here.
textByHashes.e3d48e768d3f04c6d1515152f8c7b60d52d3676a: I don't know, I'm not a sailor! But whatever it was, it was very odd!
textByHashes.00a49bfbce147a722ea016101e50a544b6ba88e5: Was the ship supposed to go in a big loop like that?
textByHashes.f636534e56a2001bbd4589c8dd81b883c6d543c1: Pretty crazy sailing you guys got here!
textByHashes.82deebad3b25633ccae74a4c01da79f52d8e4fb5: What do you think caused it?
textByHashes.f151bd7e1233a5626e69524bbf94bfef43453271: Wow. Pretty rubbish sailing just then, huh?
textByHashes.df8ff07cdb486f196c25ae4d9d43a2b0547ed2f7: What do you think might be happening?
textByHashes.7e82a02040a4b8252efdbdaf28c9edf8dbd0e9b2: Uh... yes... But... I'm pretty sure I didn't do anything. I hope.
textByHashes.fccf3b929a387eaef9c375f373ce127457e6875a: I am, watch, here I go.
textByHashes.57905c47d88de34091919deeddf43807368a9606: Yes... But I'm not a sailor. Is that abnormal then?
textByHashes.a3a65bbafd40acd8cbdd4eb6e4dda3bca51b91df: Yeah, what do you think happened?
textByHashes.2255a35b7b789e147550f0d76eccddec698f8cf7: Is someone gonna fix it then?
textByHashes.daa38d8b7928412d9e0c8c285f5e5cc1c526fad4: I was hoping you could tell me...
textByHashes.687edce9ab1bf4f465e5e104f2eb4bf2e83a1ccf: Pretty crazy sailing we did just then, huh?
textByHashes.045ade6abc62942508fd60b236893282d56d7e0e: We seemed to be getting somewhere, but we're right back where we started!
textByHashes.49b7692dd0b8687d7d72631c60dc00092134b98a: ...Okay. I'll just leave you to... Whatever it is that you do.
textByHashes.f82ff3f1564319513aed594ed6cb10e7b51f934c: That was possibly the most pointless journey I have ever taken in my life.
textByHashes.abe20b1b76219147571da83d35c2596dc7c32c99: Think you can navigate us a course on this ship that isn't a BIG STUPID CIRCLE?
textByHashes.7ba141a909fc610a596ad6f2f0e2df63ac9d9df1: C'mon now... If you're the navigator, then it stands to reason it's your fault we didn't sail anywhere!
textByHashes.216f7f5465264abdfe46b8d05c712f13f494319b: Well maybe I will go and talk to the Captain about you.
textByHashes.a44dfcbbe4fe68850574ce0e204e204e836a128f: Perhaps the navigator made a mistake when he plotted the course?
textByHashes.14f4d5f793d3b56dd46747d969ef5d6022db71d8: I'll go ask him what happened for you, Captain.
textByHashes.340c8a40a25ec24a6ed114b5f3f082c383d09919: I heard a rumour that the ship isn't going anywhere because of the navigator...
textByHashes.2a021c81b831b112faa27b8ec24653350e519c13: So what do you think? We keep going round in circles because the navigator is useless?
textByHashes.dcaca64d9058e7223cf03cc1dfc52c61567e6e16: Well, I spoke to both the Captain and the Navigator, and it seems to me it must be the navigator's fault that we're sailing in circles.
textByHashes.464e2938a8271463f8b96b5c02992ea4df98ae84: Rumours say that it's his fault the ships going round in circles now.
textByHashes.4143cb4c50150f5c33b81f1be4918ff07901c99f: Well, the Captain thinks it must be his fault!
textByHashes.8b1a6ebc0c6f1529e84915b4b50d80165e190641: This crazy sailing... Think it could be the navigator's fault?
textByHashes.56276e7d7a89d5e227d07915ff8bafb722f1ba4e: That sailing was horrible. I blame the navigator.
textByHashes.55403114682242ac97638ed33d780d59b076a74a: The captain seems to think that the navigator is repsonsible for the problems with the ship...
textByHashes.bd4d4c20315adc60315265ce787f85ed0652292b: I, uh, kind of didn't bother to go and talk to him yet...
textByHashes.b874877e2d41bb47819d671c4f4c16102a9935f5: Maybe we were just unlucky that last time?
textByHashes.1efde58eec948a21cb8254e415e21add02ac97a3: So... The rumour is that it's all the navigator's fault that the ship keeps going around in a big circle.
textByHashes.284848b89eb40d2827e1e676502cdff8fc313f49: You think this is my fault?
textByHashes.0b002974af95ec622e96c5b33d4386fe8e264fa2: What? NO! Look, I'm pretty sure it's nothing to do with me...
textByHashes.9a2033d0b3a79774aea23fe84b1ae172695f90c0: I'll go and speak to the navigator immediately.
textByHashes.48ec7a75f96bc5aec2f1ad573af153736b54df2c: I bet it's the navigator's fault.
textByHashes.ecbf40b41bc421705391d68fb752deefe68d2f7f: I blame the navigator for the ships weirdness.
textByHashes.9a790dcb39721cc6d6a7ed4203466842d9294688: Hey, think the problems with the ship is the navigator's fault?
textByHashes.fd07f66c4516948b887244943e9776c392a73c5a: Hello there. What can you tell me about the navigator of this ship?
textByHashes.423549b41a8755f7b073be960830b32c0c656513: How can you never have spoken to him? There's only like 10 people aboard the entire ship!
textByHashes.f7f493f3a463b692ae8f1f0b05b63a3369ed0c3a: Do you know of any reason why the navigator would be deliberately sabotaging our journey?
textByHashes.cf838edcc4668fa1f6b7935af17805dc5827cdce: So. Absolutely rubbish sailing. It's the navigator's fault, right? You're with me on that, yeah?
textByHashes.e31a323b8f35071a9857583ce91e2e84771f3a7e: ...and is the greatest pirate who ever lived?
textByHashes.f5fb531c9ddd3142c092c73b6a52fea65e5d492e: You know what? I like you.
textByHashes.719be15ed66951a8e241e7498928d699926d5831: Although admittedly I haven't tried any of your food...
textByHashes.b84785db68875b6896dc88203284df2270bbb7ed: So... Call yourself a navigator huh? Way to plot a course that's a big circle!
textByHashes.1a7ead4a19fbabf954070f27959fa8bb0e1b1fdc: Oh really? What's that then? Wrong kind of waves? Your steering wheel got stuck?
textByHashes.253b45e1ebe4f5d2644d29da23e034a22ce874db: I'll have you know that I am a personal friend of the Captain, and he himself invited me aboard for a small cruise around Lunar Isle along with a variety of local delicacies and beverages!
textByHashes.f37cb658e5dd9969847501577967c245b0c2c188: Oh, absolutely. Me and him go way back. Waaaaaaay back.
textByHashes.e55b6167d515742ca2583e45a5ba116b80485986: We're like... apples and custard. Everybody says so.
textByHashes.242e3edd28f4d004be2acecb93ccbacf5c1dd750: Yup, me and Captain Renney, we're a team.
textByHashes.d9800256b0c2e66cd56db98c21f2c93e023970dd: Right. Bentley. That's what I said.
textByHashes.81086389c746feff4a52c8080b53797682777c99: Oh, yeah, it's like a nickname. Only his friends are allowed to call him that.
textByHashes.f1e4bdc1a04cd16d5ad286bc480b27c9ef67364c: Well, that's all besides the point. It's all your fault and I'm going to make sure the Captain fizzles your gizzard, or whatever it is you piratey types do to each other.
textByHashes.313b68e2e307c865da02588f2df22eea84f50557: Oh really? And what would that be then?
textByHashes.f81049fddab1f230a20fd20074dee6fa0b06515f: And your explanation had better be good, or Captain Renney is going to shiver your timbers for good!
textByHashes.fe576ae053ba6632edcd3322501880737aa31909: Oh, absolutely he did, yes. I just uh, have these lapses in memory occasionally.
textByHashes.94243228549792133489a8a9d3caa5f2145dd5c1: Er... Right. I'd better go find that jinx then before someone else accuses me of this being my fault.
textByHashes.ec5dd9de27e05f728343146ac4dcaf1977791e09: I have it on good authority that there's a jinx on board the ship stopping it sailing anywhere.
textByHashes.21542f50a9d8cadc90dffb84bd56b1fca52d7898: Do you know anything about it.
textByHashes.1c998a96256f4403ef068dc2b0e971fab298ac9a: Don't you have a real name?
textByHashes.7ff5129434e70458a928a40ef84814074aa1eec8: Anyway, I believe that there may be a jinx aboard this ship, and that is what is preventing us from sailing to Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.a70710c14fb9d0a165b4e99c1f56b4b8321fa4cf: I don't think I was actually accusing you of anything there...um, boy.
textByHashes.7084f7d4d3be77d5f6be12bdc3701b7ca976c27b: Well, I guess you don't know anything useful.
textByHashes.49cf89969ca4a7dae8e5a55fa5e6da39018169df: Now, I'm not much of a seafaring guy, but as I understand it this ship has somehow gotten a jinx, which is messing up the sailing to Lunar Isle!
textByHashes.b0b967c52c28fe7383ba2f79aa2db4bc3b8730dc: Seems like the problems with the ship are all down to a jinx.
textByHashes.122984bd526c884631e2eadbeff36a4ef402773d: The captain thinks there might be a jinx aboard. Any help?
textByHashes.ecb69b0e6c9badac8a7551520de1e329289cefcb: I have reason to believe that there is a jinx aboard this ship.
textByHashes.04d6afb836fb7b96f07a380f392f4753e5f51e50: Erm... I don't know. I don't know what a jinx looks like.
textByHashes.e61937da41d32e265b38ba1148d8ccb5cd18ab2f: Oh yes. He tried to hide his incompetence by blaming the ships' problems on a jinx of some sort.
textByHashes.66951db6a77839ed71dc1d431a24c173b91fe4e4: No, I'm still pretty sure it's just the navigator being really rubbish at his job...
textByHashes.da46b3cb6667f832be7a38bb417c2276eb992fae: Right. And when you say 'we' need to find you actually mean...?
textByHashes.8e9e18e78656f16906c596a1501bbce919652e4f: Yeah, I was afraid you were going to say that...
textByHashes.00d3714f072e389aeef407fab08f2e94e3549830: Okay, I'll try and track down this jinx for you.
textByHashes.2857eccbaef703ec01724b076d77a03ba37f38e3: Hey hey hey! Apparently there's a jinx on board. Or the navigator is rubbish.
textByHashes.47ccd02b993eab2b0f5e327014c6ac6726f8cd2a: One of the two, I'm not sure which.
textByHashes.713549cec2071d4ff48693bc1819004ea8b730fc: Look, this calling me a stowaway and a jinx isn't funny!
textByHashes.6c6cc099bd4885eee043a13f7e799f6ef1d1e5dd: I'm going to find who or what this jinx is, if only so I can prove to you that it's not me!
textByHashes.e9b04693b168a2dee08b298dbcdf4aecff0fb493: SO! I've found you, YOU JINX!
textByHashes.690fea0916637f96f6ec52944ff215bbce3685cd: Sorry. I thought you might be, and that I could trick it out of you by shouting it at you as an accusation.
textByHashes.cc33626403868018761fff387e5d1a98432983e0: Well, not yet, no. But there's always a first time for everything.
textByHashes.ba85d212ff1d98b0663207fea9d083c29a0cff14: (sigh) I suppose so... It just won't be as much fun...
textByHashes.79ea5ab432e308af78c206a2e95ccfb6086f5f9f: I heard a rumour there's a jinx aboard...
textByHashes.1d70623dc6a875fbc3944ea96a6386566a8cf99d: You don't know anything about a jinx onboard do you?
textByHashes.01242c07c9acc328fc8ffa76b43098366443cf46: Hi, I'm looking for a jinx...
textByHashes.11fee6baeec88e54a27050662945f3432671dbc9: Well, I think there might be one onboard.
textByHashes.228ba2338d3ecfbd4f3fe167688a95e8a30e8ab3: Do you know anything about jinxes?
textByHashes.fc63e6d04a595ef07eb2de3574ac65045e69e973: Yup, I'd already figured that much out.
textByHashes.92a59f60cf3f3bba264be5fe359c11e43779d34d: Hello there. I have reason to believe that someone or something has somehow placed a jinx upon this ship, preventing it from sailing as it is supposed to.
textByHashes.9b4920264ab68e07839c8923ac5e7a8ff28ea8e1: Um... No, no I don't think this ship has been cursed by a fancy foreign vegetable...
textByHashes.798727b4ef10d3a863bc43dde9d40183d196acd6: I don't think I did ask you...
textByHashes.5ff1b83215321e7af4114702954ddfe1029a3796: Hello there. So, I'm wondering if you know anything about a jinx at all?
textByHashes.921b7f4b6f9d08f2d0f5d06b101e8ef607f6bc3f: Quick question: What exactly is a jinx anyway?
textByHashes.3fe825cf1324b151c8d0988d9104fd7eedc0083a: So why is it such a big deal to sailors?
textByHashes.3b05a7f0657aaa609b1f28e83cfcda8cb6175f1b: Wait, so someone with magical powers can deliberately place a jinx upon someone or something?
textByHashes.87f12b69130aec6e5b24892ab256fe316ee008e0: Someone highly magical like, oh, let's say for the sake of argument, the inhabitants of Lunar Isle, a.k.a the Moon Clan?
textByHashes.e6c1fd827c3a12690210b178f5e4cdc8591f5a4e: So somebody from the landing party must have gotten themselves jinxed...
textByHashes.fd224a4a93cd5d4040ec7a7a62d8f819e1b9363c: Thanks a lot 'Eagle-eye', you've been extremely helpful.
textByHashes.bdbece1edb7bb0cf7015f99406ff67e0d16d1373: I have reason to believe that it may have been caused by somebody who has offended the Moon Clan somehow while on that recent visit of yours to Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.5265b0d1427b565aeaaf4abab98ec1058c65a293: So you don't know anything about it?
textByHashes.ba8f5d6be4c8189e62da3501765cff032de2c1b8: Well, it's like this: Apparently one of the crew was up to something on Lunar Isle that caused the Moon Clan to be offended, which has led to this jinx being placed on someone or
textByHashes.32a64228abdda2ee7a03224f4aa2434999d7f9d6: That's the closest I can figure it anyway, I have to admit this is all very confusing...
textByHashes.776255f90788751825884528d4e3d7bd14851480: Wait, are you telling me you might have had something to do with this?
textByHashes.92e65df5bdfd6727ba70dfd9daac0337f145f4b5: Are you sure? Because a minute ago it really sounded to me as though you-
textByHashes.5f172a9b3d8f6db723c4340e3549d229909cc393: Okay, okay, I believe you, I believe you. There's no need to shout at me.
textByHashes.f695f4af27ec0a25cbe0b9c3a1b48f31d6a920b4: Fair enough, I can understand that. Well, see you around.
textByHashes.17967ea86212fbead669df065cf5a29f25d0c0dd: I feel kind of awkward asking...
textByHashes.354642745f2eec8a54efce4b6506401b3972557e: Actually it's about offending people. You didn't, you know, tick off any of the Moon Clan while you were there recently did you?
textByHashes.80a42c709ff41d1797b80221d58da18fd3221356: And I suppose you didn't see anyone acting untoward around them?
textByHashes.80c4946d2134407141871182363db84d0e0e258b: So... Any ideas who might have offended the Moon Clan and caused them to place a jinx on the ship?
textByHashes.bc5b2864b72b6e2f141d7ed3b8d2c773910ba97d: Anyone from the crew you think would be particularly offensive to a bunch of highly powerful magic users?
textByHashes.f83b64afe9094badabf96c666a311d094c61916d: Hi. I don't suppose you have any juicy gossip about that trip to Lunar Isle do you?
textByHashes.ed753086bb14c665d20d9a0ee48aaf5748d53fb8: No... I was thinking more something about someone behaving very badly and offending the Moon Clan somehow...
textByHashes.f46f276d388bf3c1a2510eafd3e7b5078f9cced7: Hi. Erm, don't take this the wrong way or anything, but are you particularly offensive?
textByHashes.30cd62612b82053a89ddc541d40bc0c8d6c6d521: Does your mere presence at any occasion cause young children to start crying, old ladies to faint, that kind of thing?
textByHashes.e33ded0fba52f5d768e430ca607b1f139d94e0e4: Look, all I want to know is if your terrible disregard for social niceties has caused a jinx to be levelled upon this ship and all who sail in her.
textByHashes.f96213b405fbdf33c99ed28a892b1fb2854efa42: Okay, thanks! All I wanted to know!
textByHashes.427d99c9e34b50e1178b5d7b55e21f7f99aa6d68: I'm looking for somebody who may have offended the Moon Clan on your recent visit to Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.e0d352c9cce98fbb191840c3d3983cabf7026ce1: Oh. I was hoping you did.
textByHashes.096075857342e2ff09fabc5ceb78fb703e344c35: Well... possibly. Although I'm convinced this is all the navigator's fault. I just don't trust that guy!
textByHashes.acd667e5a1fc6f0a6284912a335f3c1b454f445d: Well... I reckon that somebody from the landing party that went to Lunar Isle did something to offend the Moon Clan, and as retaliation they have placed a jinx upon the
textByHashes.cef4485d5b0c210f29dc213f8ccd744f0c622df0: Um... well... I, uh, didn't find anything out about that yet.
textByHashes.311397738766bfb6d3ba859631b24ea1aba3b22d: I have heard some terrible, scurrilous rumours about your wanton and depraved behaviour towards the Moon Clan when on shore leave.
textByHashes.bfe6347c42e34dee87a6d0843a15f9215627133b: Oh come now, we all know what you were up to...
textByHashes.623c2a4ed8cec96d1a7f8d382d231903d05874d3: Your behaviour was so bad that the Moon Clan have brought a terrible curse down upon the ship, trapping it on this gods-forsaken island forever!
textByHashes.4f00fc5d99450d3d4f9caac9934e9ad093485b70: Oh.. erm... Well done. You've passed the test.
textByHashes.e4601cf69e7e9d5a846e60069b08116d6c1d4d5e: Yeah... the, uh, loyalty test. The Captain wanted to make sure his crew were all well behaved on their shore leave, so I came up with this little test to make sure you were.
textByHashes.36167d8d0c999fe31c4821205d0e96e475bb4fa7: AH-HA! I KNOW it was YOU!
textByHashes.e48ba3765bd768cab12bde578a59c418a6f5fca2: Well, it seems that someone must have offended the Moon Clan, so that they put a jinx on the ship!
textByHashes.d4563896adab7c2ab0b3895f441a54854a2d80b0: And from what I've seen you're the obvious culprit!
textByHashes.7aefc3581b465a15409f639312a1005d15f3e140: So... You didn't offend any Moon Clan while you were on their island?
textByHashes.75a7fc19e80c5149a5802ce64676f7c9dcede441: Fine. But I've got my eye on you Mr Navigator!
textByHashes.a87c2dc8d38ed6700f6640775ad6e7ba5dcc7d2e: You know that visit to Lunar Isle you lot have just made...?
textByHashes.d578af7a821ec7729dde1cdacb15ce2ba7e5e1c5: You didn't see anyone, you know, acting inappropriately or anything did you?
textByHashes.3f02fb4ef78292edb731c909de2309d6c33c5029: Um... Anyone doing anything that would offend them?
textByHashes.f752033fdb020b382902677bc7f605cc26511cf6: You didn't... You know. Do anything offensive towards the Moon Clan did you?
textByHashes.b55bf7d9365c184dba7b7ac736767c93edaf4595: Hmmm. Okay, it was worth asking anyway.
textByHashes.0cfedd7c704e5a17e23601c8cea7ac7f652e966b: I've heard you were a little bit merry on the old Lunar Isle expedition...
textByHashes.673cad4c5418765cab01bea755916fd141c21098: Possibly so merry that you did something to offend the Moon Clan and unleash a horrible curse upon us all...
textByHashes.6315f0f4b3e1dd757b790b2cefe1112356e1cfc3: Quick question: Do you know anyone who offended the Moon Clan on your recent visit?
textByHashes.aa36bb5ba2ab0da763b02e9da506ff177d8891cd: Dude! How about them Moon Clan, huh?
textByHashes.b381f1e4b093ca3a1166bf038813d16cd7c1d94a: Wow, we offended them so hard on that shore leave, huh?
textByHashes.51e9d47dda76fdff92e8550fd4267308d74f5268: You, uh, didn't do anything to offend the Moon Clan on shore leave, did you?
textByHashes.6004d52fb7eaf69d22f7b303226db499c598a6fe: And I look like an idiot now, don't I?
textByHashes.d44b7c5cb52aad2c899fef4c005d81d2052d6659: It would probably be best if I just left now, instead of carrying on talking, wouldn't it?
textByHashes.a28f76ea16f5bca84f18f3c10b7e4670a51ab745: I'll go and do that then...
textByHashes.c1de7babef8909fcba82bfc0e52130e8bfa19c55: Actually, I'm not after food, I'm after information...
textByHashes.4dad70a6d54e2a9fc5ce19e9a928b8935211f703: ...Can I just ask you a few questions?
textByHashes.9f0a7b2594ff7dca5b1b37a2aae1fb82f3f393ac: No, that's fine. I appreciate your time.
textByHashes.8846b372b42e45ec1d63ba4772f33dd4b435603c: So... I have reason to believe that a jinx has befallen the ship due to someone offending the Moon Clan somehow... I was wondering if you knew anything about that.
textByHashes.0b4f9911c98d43191c8c6988bd08b3c6a8658cbe: Wait... So the whole crew except yourself were at a big feast on Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.aa25123f4fbfce2d31fb4a0b222c6565a10e3e54: Was there drink involved at this feast?
textByHashes.3d0b311728c0b33e47fd60b8f0b49eb7be4df33d: So a bunch of drunken pirates feasting on Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.b27abf2c6bff370d773d4648b3c308f0e52a3787: I think I have my suspect for when the Moon Clan were offended.
textByHashes.9c317117462dc490cf486519bd50c5af9db30009: Thanks for the help there, Beefy!
textByHashes.68450c0816d00b3ec6c1cd2e92e9fb5b60b3ecc2: Funny you should ask, I have a few questions for you about that.
textByHashes.d3d9dc8fac2c13de0cfcf68889be5b44691e8c69: Oh, well, it was about that feast that you all went to on Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.015f09a2e9c53bc57a18880686b8eff3297dde96: So... Did you notice anyone not there? Or anyone acting very rudely to the Moon Clan? Anything like that?
textByHashes.383443edb92a8c29beea018f40ae8bc4a748994e: Really? That doesn't sound much like the big raucous feast I've been hearing about from other people...
textByHashes.e261c954d130dc61f48f2c8965277c5d02924b90: Hmmm. Weird. Maybe I'm barking up the wrong tree...
textByHashes.cd47f6c633fae68c44c3fcf3e808b004c1d767a2: That big feast in Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.e887bf200337f66b14b463badeaa175d50e3723f: And did you see anyone misbehaving particularly badly?
textByHashes.c917d6de23ee05c3bbcb5061bfde105719d495a9: Not very well to be honest...
textByHashes.ca5178667e585ad02227383a7e3a5312a63ba720: I think I've worked out that whatever happened to cause the Moon Clan offence and get this ship cursed somehow must have happened at that big feast you all went to, but I'm still no wiser as to what actually
textByHashes.f00099e3d8b5322671e6860c37129f5c78eb341a: Actually yeah, that might help give me some clue as to what happened. Please, go ahead.
textByHashes.545a6c379fe34e2a7b8be9e456f399b01991930f: When you say there were high spirits... You don't think perhaps you accidentally offended the Moon Clan somehow do you?
textByHashes.3ea1d9ce339eed6cdf60bf00805fc81f04469d3a: Well, thanks for the help, but I don't think I'm any closer to solving this whole jinx mystery...
textByHashes.74c0785fd1a8c0e422b1468d53e8f42cc3ab2936: Hi. I don't suppose you saw anyone acting suspiciously at that big feast on Lunar Isle did you?
textByHashes.c8758b29653b8797e7bddd72425e65109ce0b990: It was worth asking anyway, thanks.
textByHashes.0864c2f129e2b07847d2075ed1539d47835545fc: Hi. That big feast you went to on Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.7d5d751f4b176188d6a95a79e53acee792b19d87: Oh really? Do you think maybe while drunk you did something to offend them?
textByHashes.d496d0c615b99e990d5db086769315eb1f362014: Erm, this is a genuine medical condition is it?
textByHashes.1286471dad2272caaa1c37d8813f4cd3cf6295a4: Hmmm. Okay then, I guess you're off the hook.
textByHashes.a24b610219015e929586f8db2631b1c93337987f: Hi. You know that big feast you went to on Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.24b7b7228f02232f1ba708acc5663d52f5ab9b76: You were there all night with the rest of the crew?
textByHashes.81f9f37fab6ee0d61a04091f04233eb6286eb4bb: Didn't do anything to offend the Moon Clan, or see anyone else doing anything like that?
textByHashes.0b81596457d7d85a3423032f1310e2a219c05c1d: Not as such, but I think I am onto a promising lead.
textByHashes.7a3bf000db39fb768f8f522f3ed8ac6b0651f8db: Apparently you all went to a big feast on Lunar Isle held by the Moon Clan when last you visited?
textByHashes.cf0e1b9f4565802582f936ecaf1401baffe55f98: Well, I don't want to go flinging out unfounded accusations or anything, but I have a strong suspicion that somebody at that feast did something that resulted in the Moon Clan getting offended and causing this jinx
textByHashes.4bb8c9552f26f3df3d42574d6d9b92492d8ded20: to be placed on the ship.
textByHashes.4f8e551904fe69f0e5cfcd3d20b2c363a652348d: In fact, it might not even be the ship that's been cursed, it could just be this person, or even some item they're carrying.
textByHashes.e4f23c10f71327dcfa4d29e74eba6f00963d94c1: No, I'm afraid not. But with your permission, I will ask around the crew and see if anybody knows anything.
textByHashes.a4af4c339ff72835e98fb37d203de017935980eb: Thank you. I thought you might say that.
textByHashes.7ff8bb4e1325b92fef1eb33d681db87262a52f2e: So let's begin with you: Where were you at the night of the feast, and what exactly were you doing?
textByHashes.c5707c9acddcb17aad30ee207e20856390b1e0a2: No, not really, but it pays to be methodical in something like this.
textByHashes.bfeee654765da185d9b95f50606ff3e8d57bc6f5: So the rest of your crew weren't with you?
textByHashes.d2462e990a29291ea58802655451fefaa0936f61: So you don't actually know which of the crew were present at this feast? For all you know somebody might have slipped away from the feast and, oh I don't know, stolen some
textByHashes.0e49b2f0ffdb6e872152ea554b4728fd08f94a80: artefact of theirs, or broken into somewhere they weren't supposed to go?
textByHashes.d3164ac32a563c6fcf320e5c136b82ec40d281ed: Well, thank you for your time Captain, I'll see if anybody else noticed someone slipping away during the feast, or noticed someone behaving particularly badly towards any of the Moon Clan.
textByHashes.25f490862a2f0096eb4bd96f5528448dbf75501b: Ahoy there! I have a few questions for you.
textByHashes.6ca6d5ec99f46d98850b34e98a7f69b338999766: It's about that feast that you all went to on Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.605fea867d433e1d16f46849d77168b7e78707a8: You had a good time at it, right?
textByHashes.87bf7b60f68d42d78adba643cd551610475a8d21: But you didn't get drunk and start a fight with anyone, or insult your hosts the Moon Clan?
textByHashes.38c4bb00ceac88c7d4917da62062eaf12aa72394: So you definitely didn't insult any of the Moon Clan at the feast?
textByHashes.5c04cb59fe4f2fbdbeab82f8bda38d81d3913825: Hmmm, ok. You didn't see anyone else getting too rowdy did you?
textByHashes.275cd2d8c8e0a7fdfc44f2ea7c55621e1bd27e1d: I have some questions for you about that big feast you all went to on Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.2a99fb557cbc831fba32c0a063b4ce5b967955a1: AH-HA! IS that an admission of guilt?
textByHashes.498fbb4b96dda242e201b0e1ef90241b560ff99f: Well okay then. So tell me Mr Navigator, where were you exactly at this feast on Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.08b9254bcbf19b414a4c1b436d28a28147e41518: So you claim to have been at this feast the whole time that you were at this feast?
textByHashes.121ef3adef0617811d7e38d7aadbb70c732204e8: So you were at the feast. So you say.
textByHashes.4d57eea91286e805859dd990ae220a2337eb1891: But I put it to you Mr Navigator that once you had arrived at the feast, when it grew quieter and nobody noticed, you left and decided to steal something from the Moon Clan, and be very rude to some other
textByHashes.1f65155ce3ab3c29dabd8095ddb511333905244e: members of the Moon Clan on the way.
textByHashes.0bba3e1aac5ca6dc9fa747692f045e1b43afff59: And then you... I don't know. Killed their puppies or something.
textByHashes.0fefa71a38b50ed6d8c6fb977573ff4d142fa74a: Then after you had done all that, you returned to the feast, before anyone noticed that you had left, and then made sure your alibi was complete, and that nobody would discover your rude, thieving, puppy murdering
textByHashes.3d446df4766296c7ab390a1abb9eeab6cc42878a: AH-HA! I notice you don't deny it!
textByHashes.0043ec3616afac7fb867acd87149c1a18f1b0843: Look, this is getting us nowhere, I promise you if you confess I will make the Captain go easy on you!
textByHashes.c079992b828da7bd6d73784ecc5b225832491e74: Thanks, that's all I wanted to know. See you around.
textByHashes.65ae07ee84db5c936d75894d35859007d85b889b: Yeah, I just have a few quick questions for you...
textByHashes.8605bba2b0e599d9df11a81489209cf392fd182b: Well, I just wanted to ask you about that big feast on Lunar Isle you went to...
textByHashes.0190259ed8d359ebff5a3f38495e81b97313cab8: Did you see anyone slip away during it? Or see anyone acting extremely badly? Or maybe you saw someone being rude to the Moon Clan somehow?
textByHashes.ef80af32bcf1d6ceb84375ad778b4345bae40dbc: Okay, I'll have to continue checking around.
textByHashes.18dc4580034c169af03e43dfb4bf201f8186b40c: Very well thanks, I just have a few questions I'd like to ask you about that big feast at Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.c6248a78847d32b4de2d41151dad8a13d3e4c721: And you didn't see anyone behaving particularly badly? Or being rude to any of the Moon Clan or anything?
textByHashes.989fc624b7a4736107d8e4d37b94985a0e2f1aaf: I was wondering if I could ask you a few questions about the big feast you went to on Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.823e97ba992912f9bbdb1bc4db4bce1cc396ddac: So you got a little bit merry at it?
textByHashes.ac394fe729fa6f3d871c10584b7afc26e3808d68: You didn't get... TOO overboard with your fun did you?
textByHashes.367a8235bbc400833d5eaf7046e11aabefafcfdf: You didn't see anyone else going... a little bit too far with their fun either?
textByHashes.c27c5145a45e79fdd73b9aaa57a77d8b017133c3: That big feast on Lunar Isle... You were there right? The whole evening?
textByHashes.9cdbffd1560478817cf20a21a6526b7cfb287bcf: Didn't see anyone being rude to the Moon Clan? Weren't being rude yourself?
textByHashes.a386d27b68f6e2c17de7eeef56551112e784e0f8: Didn't see anyone sneak away in the middle of the feast or anything?
textByHashes.e36603c4569fd98cde1a5854482accd164c4280a: Okay then, that's all I wanted to know.
textByHashes.3a8bc75636b9b7926bfb354e5d493f8f27b16471: Hey you know that big feast they held for us on Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.fd28ee201a34881abae351851bfafef7dcc9f239: Erm, you. And the rest of the crew.
textByHashes.95007140a383c0584cbac500531509c4e190b2df: So no crazy offensive behaviours from anyone.
textByHashes.4401962a9e09f3421b9c91d44264c750acbfe03e: I see... And the whole crew was there the whole time?
textByHashes.d9a49d88ee489d87fa27a778b0258d985fbb521d: You didn't see anyone sneaking off mid-feast or anything?
textByHashes.57981611624a69212683d35d825c36edb1883de3: About this big feast that all the pirates went to on Lunar Isle...
textByHashes.f872771b5ebe14a95c9f4c61ef502801c8e2524b: Yes, this big feast that everybody went to except for you.
textByHashes.2665d80c6aeb62e6d7a369fda0bf516f28834eb3: Oh, just what information you could tell me about it. Who was there, what food was served, what entertainment was laid on if any, where it was held.
textByHashes.258883ae5e7319d6e563dfa5cd13bf6f5a9b4dc9: You know, the little details. I'm hoping I can catch someone out in a lie.
textByHashes.cfba2ddbfc5f52a4691d45189a3c08edd5fef86e: I have a couple of questions to ask you about the big feast on Lunar Isle you went to last time you went there.
textByHashes.5b5a6c8593a08ad688394b48e0de924236cae6a5: Did you see anyone being rude to the Moon Clan at all?
textByHashes.3b21421f9703fe1475e1ec441fb8b54a728aadba: And I don't suppose you saw anyone slip away in the middle of the festival or anything?
textByHashes.a4d65f5b13b5bd8cffa69bf4a231542a063e9361: Okay tha- Wait, you say you saw the First Mate slip away in the middle of the feast?
textByHashes.479e260b226ccc5887ffd8f336a840cded448ff5: Thank you, you've been very helpful.
textByHashes.feb0fcb41d831ac38c6a956c47675e5a9a761405: So now I think that the First Mate may have something to do with the jinx that has befallen this ship.
textByHashes.ba9850e1b58d574b3ac0f120012dd294bb5c04d7: What do you think he was doing then?
textByHashes.e2cbfd978bdd9943887f21d2953d6f76e97c3bff: After much to-ing and fro-ing, I've discovered that not everybody who was supposed to be at the feast actually was!
textByHashes.1945794d3ff345ec7849cf832bce435acec489b0: Well, it seems as though SOMEBODY slipped off in the middle of the feast, thinking nobody would see them do it.
textByHashes.822d0049270c5b0a59e982fb39bf16e8b5734d93: Unfortunately for them, somebody DID see them leave, and I'm pretty sure whatever they were up to caused this jinx.
textByHashes.4a81b326b2681ed9c6ee3e39764ad07bcde83dbe: Oh, did you see the First Mate leave as well?
textByHashes.fb34a77180b886fcbd014d014b3141f38be122ef: That's not what you were talking about?
textByHashes.0a1e1d14dfa44621ed44fa20d596671daae2d7ce: So anyway, I figure I'll have this whole jinx thing straightened out after a quick chat with the First Mate.
textByHashes.5ee580831cbde275ba416f26725122394e417b54: I'm thinking he might be responsible for the jinx on the ship.
textByHashes.d114d13a1976a649f2df18d7609f2d09bb107fee: Well, you know. It's fifty percent baseless gossip and fifty percent unfounded speculation.
textByHashes.ff6353f2b3c6e79f3772ed809357fd5d0fd21bcb: So tell me... What do you know about the First Mate?
textByHashes.a6a5cd8c40f6e9c95db5b96daf788e4a9d1f3e6d: Well, it turns out that he was the only member of the crew other than the Bosun and the Captain who did not attend the feast on Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.aed8d519ee050a93eac25cc4beea0c479567c3ab: Yeah, but I have reason to believe that sometime during the meal he slipped away and did something or other.
textByHashes.299e9c183e7df60dbf480df746eff9a7316a335d: I can only assume that he was up to no good when he slipped away, and whatever he did caused the ship to be cursed...
textByHashes.fe87759421224e7e945033fd9dbdad1bcb6e61c6: I think so... The First Mate, yeah.
textByHashes.228c18288d4cc6a82d8fabb5f3eb04f7a00c8746: So you refuse to believe that he had anything at all to do with the jinx that's been placed somewhere on this ship?
textByHashes.6f3aa9cbecf41982e819be2e532f3893013ee9f9: So... The First Mate. What can you tell me about him?
textByHashes.6869e49e4dbbd8ba3e6e99ea4506543430e5efe7: Do you think he might have been responsible for the jinx that's been placed upon the ship?
textByHashes.61965427ad2239de996b56adf73ce132b031250b: You know that big feast you went to? I have reason to believe that the First Mate snuck away in the middle of it.
textByHashes.368e7d495a5813729928489104d3abe65eb9709f: I am forced to conclude he did so in order to get up to shenanigans.
textByHashes.a2091898abac3057ed7242cdcc4607760f696817: Hmmmm. Maybe I'd better go speak to him about it.
textByHashes.471bde6cda72f9f885273fbd56910e521ba4f7b7: Do you remember seeing the first mate at the feast?
textByHashes.276a80b6ad7d7185f1c4247d6717c5013a5085e2: Captain! I think I've made a breakthrough!
textByHashes.60e4e6805557f62d174dae4c5388230bef95d98f: Well, it seems that while the rest of the crew were at the feast, the First Mate snuck away by himself and was up to shenanigans!
textByHashes.0cbd5401310bb9b91dc33ace8f1854c5ac459574: I'll go and see what he has to say for himself then.
textByHashes.6459fddaabb786f0eef0febddf0f627ed54dc105: I just thought you might like to know, that I have reluctantly decided that the problems with the ship may possibly in some small degree perhaps actually not be entirely down to your incompetence after all.
textByHashes.5c2d2992c9b906ff7a21946c81098a2f3ed87021: No, because an apology would imply that I have done something wrong, and I still think that your rubbishness at, er, navigatorness, is a contributing factor towards the ships problems.
textByHashes.e389ef364a6e53ac3189d1a75f7668a283da83db: And when I say contributing factor I mean it's still mostly your fault.
textByHashes.3937efe86cedfa311fe5926f4c66494fa78c26e0: And let me assure you, if I find out that you were in cahoots with the First Mate to bring this jinx upon us, then I will not hesitate to bring it to the Captains attention.
textByHashes.b225569b66caf0872baef520e78ae58d3d4fb289: Hey, that big feast you went to...
textByHashes.eaedcd35b6ec6e537a1fb0f31cc2ca46af62dc62: Well, that's kind of what I wanted to ask you about...
textByHashes.b9ea031339b177e8c4a6a0a017bbc89b8d458ec4: Well, I understand the First Mate snuck out in the middle of the feast...
textByHashes.56107b22f26aacf8d613a85f24608c14087e595f: So you didn't see him at the feast, and you didn't notice that he wasn't there?
textByHashes.4c831f58a4a641b409d52793d6efaefc46d05947: Hey, you know that big feast you all went to?
textByHashes.650ca27433f915ffb970f7b083b49aef9cb24c67: Would it surprise you to hear that the First Mate was also not there?
textByHashes.ca01b00577f56a67bb9ebcb4104e0a2bf40c4a8c: I have it on very good authority that he slipped out in the middle of the feast for about twenty minutes or so.
textByHashes.2393c679b756369cd4cfdf141e777cb8b4912c4e: Any ideas what he might have been up to?
textByHashes.fbe2d7f6a6e817a83a5f6aef5b541cea6fc0e8e0: That maybe this ship going in a circle business is down to the First Mate...
textByHashes.2a4a22c1dca79dd0fd07301f9fa7037176d2ebf2: Well, it seems he slipped away unnoticed at that big feast you all went to.
textByHashes.ab2181125a18b96492b46e57411ad387d02cf4f6: I'll go and do that then.
textByHashes.19ebe994e44fc3076b88201f0bf65c73b31cd799: Hey, I heard that the First Mate wasn't at that big feast!
textByHashes.ebd063d7de740a659c47f8ea477153280ece632d: You know, I'm getting the feeling that this jinx upon the ship might be the First Mate's fault.
textByHashes.c942b9cab352b64317ffca5c5a592d2e6f1461c1: Well, apparently he slipped away in the middle of the feast, so my guess is he was up to something when he did that.
textByHashes.672e4a397fb38c9168410c4cc1d9a864b4cefaf8: I dunno, my evidence against him is pretty good...
textByHashes.49337a83de826ff419af1844656e32fb236552d3: Hey, you were onboard the ship the night of that big feast on Lunar Isle weren't you?
textByHashes.9fea74a0bbaf7b47ae4491e9434b522a14f4fcf5: Did you happen to notice, oh, say, the First Mate come aboard while everybody else was at the feast?
textByHashes.f074ee5092147324ab100b70e9a7027350f2e1b4: So... Finally we get to the truth... MISTER Davey-boy.
textByHashes.5697b641ec1888e30a1aee45a150bf5fb4c2ac2a: IF that's even your REAL name.
textByHashes.ca05f059bb1b3553031ef834e9c2030484197b7b: No, Davey, this is about YOU!
textByHashes.91289709d07485276a6e3cee044a488b5f242dbd: This is about your LIES and your BAD behaviour!
textByHashes.5163dfdcc1af063ee72822bc50ba692ef8a0ccb2: I know your SECRET Mr first mate! I know that you are a PHONY!
textByHashes.bc116633a89473e8a007ed80d789385264d66ca7: I know that you were NOT where you claimed to be on the night in question!
textByHashes.fa9ead429b6bd030ba7ce7698740ab851d60c9bc: Oh, come come, Davey-boy! It is too late to weasel your way out of this one!
textByHashes.1f6a10b0d60aad21b184430c7a93b64da1ffc07d: YOU know. How you told me that you were at that feast on Lunar Isle ALL night?
textByHashes.a2505a2a1b39c4b52fe899259cf480b29c965993: Well, let me tell YOU that you are a LIAR!
textByHashes.e3af3acca3bedfa6f8517a0c5e99acb577650cdd: I have an eyewitness that SAW you leave the feast, and go off and do who-knows-what for a good TWENTY MINUTES!
textByHashes.7e95def68116fefa1e77b0eaf429383cd212d075: I think it is time to come clean, Davey-boy. I think we should hear the truth.
textByHashes.ac398b96f86b7b4dd219444ec9c2556c7432e73f: So why didn't you tell me this before?
textByHashes.6718b193438fb0366af36f59f211204d998aea2c: Wait, what do you mean it's not one of your usual responsibilities?
textByHashes.4a73a218b3842adddb717835eb68ae741680ba22: Wait, so he wasn't even at the feast?
textByHashes.a52b518d81789c4ad4bcbed1c5e89c4b08d6d8a6: So the cabin boy wasn't at the feast at all? WHY DIDN'T YOU TELL ME EARLIER?!?!
textByHashes.9a29f489ef81293e730cf8bb639cca4bcad9dc55: It's only the single most important thing you've said to me since I've met you!
textByHashes.09712b177aed452c723e7e0e1319f25841c88210: Well, I guess this explains why the Cabin Boy's been acting so suspiciously... I'd better go and have a word with him!
textByHashes.f7a5a79c6c83dad50c2f7303a95f8ed66aaeb0fd: No, I meant, 'Captain? Can I have a word with you?'
textByHashes.0b2f183bc2daa2f4a600f921332599260f37fec4: Captain, I need to speak to you.
textByHashes.fb37a0d8ca2868769f3a3b5a2674c471d0c147d4: Well, I think I may have found who was responsible for upsetting the Moon Clan.
textByHashes.45b1b63ce6f5859829a1f439b71d0d76fabad0cc: Well, I'm pretty sure it was the Cabin Boy.
textByHashes.8df819a905d86c99983a3a65e1bb67aff85dd4b1: Well he seems to be the only member of the crew who was absent without a good reason to be so.
textByHashes.cd7213a5a2c99f5bd8b67bcce654023fb94bc65a: Yes, but the First Mate was doing that instead of him.
textByHashes.1f4d6b063cf67f74e0d6746af490e4635ac6169c: I'm pretty sure now that it was the Cabin Boy that has caused all this.
textByHashes.80ecd9751887865b6aeaede41e284169d6ee7011: Well if I did accuse everyone, eventually I would be right.
textByHashes.38ddf89d450f5435cef1c38e4b2237dc1c5dc3c9: Hey! Where'd the Cabin Boy go? I need to speak to him!
textByHashes.0102f24bf6fb80db687ff063794975c19a2698dd: Know where he might have headed?
textByHashes.74efea409113ffea21087e225bfe57efd0e272d1: I'm pretty sure that the Cabin Boy is responsible for the jinx on this ship.
textByHashes.c7404174c46105d904cceb963d71d8c1d5ab782a: Yes, you left in the middle of the feast, what did you do? You're a spy for the Moon Clan aren't you.
textByHashes.ba55101f531b049e495cd9ed7ac766e24f62753d: I'll go get the captain, a plank and a hungry shark!
textByHashes.9846af7c6a4709fc5bd365f2e27494f182a645cd: What did she ask you to do?
textByHashes.8da30b2ae9e0e8e4db6ac6ae12d74cf46317628c: I dunno. Some people! I will see what I can do.
textByHashes.cd9507bd4791ba4753e775c6240039cb072af3c0: You really can't remember where you drew those symbols?
textByHashes.e38b5673612a23fef77881aa661c3b557408fdca: Oi! I need another lens, boy.
textByHashes.e8c4bd5c191264ec32b994dfacbf68dc5affa2e2: Oi! I need another lantern, boy.
textByHashes.ea6a9cee4f7ca8baf1e41fbe6c6afeee87d578e1: Well it turns out it was the Cabin Boy. I just need to find some symbols he's written now.
textByHashes.ae1af1ffc7a2b3214b9f55ad886cf32d9824afbd: I'm on the search for symbols. Seen any?
textByHashes.c15c84be341a8773948532677d50a13834210474: Yo ho yo ho! A pirates life for me!
textByHashes.4211c25596a3edb45b31b2615a1cf1f56b135c29: I thought it was pretty much common knowledge.
textByHashes.2d37018b9ee978e768c147a109adf7da6edc18e6: I'm looking for symbols. Have you seen...
textByHashes.2244f577a16ce904b613c944d19d04144ab41319: It seems he has been drawing symbols over various surfaces in the ship. Don't be too hard on him though.
textByHashes.3c058b196d1437e9f4c93714a35997ca23326604: Yes, we all remember those days. Sort of...
textByHashes.68e6f266c524251300d1279b9b34fb3332a24aeb: I don't suppose you've seen any magic symbols around?
textByHashes.5a2c2f663ab43d61c21fc7dea9ea93575ed42cce: Actually, that's no surprise as you need a special lantern to see them.
textByHashes.8e19cea94018fe8cbd340629e103c7f93d620d0c: I don't suppose you've seen any symbols around have you?
textByHashes.5175ce54c9e5afc13bed7e67ea2aab5a259bae07: I was just trying to be polite.
textByHashes.7b292376b9cf8e5fa663e82e113d3a85d25a458a: Oh no, i'm trying to remove them.
textByHashes.bdc70f8ce2e943f14fecbd102f5438a9b1effeff: Do you know where I can find any magic symbols?
textByHashes.4adc96065097068ae0fcf5ee9414b5f2276100c3: One down, four more to go!
textByHashes.6ba8a0ebf86102a6b68d5e25f6a7a65074f58b19: Two down, three more to go!
textByHashes.53da8fcff244782afa196a3b7d84d196ce069f5e: Three down, only two more to go!
textByHashes.102f85041a5717537d94b97cf06a086c3aff7f45: Four down, only one more to go!
textByHashes.e032ba5bcdab95aed97d883df263936a15f4cf6a: That's it, I've removed all the symbols, and hopefully the jinx.
textByHashes.2362cacf12d1fdb1e610a81de874352b09d12608: Well lucky for you I found all the symbols.
textByHashes.c2bedaa4b4fc6166298a1e4a157c9cad695fe000: I have discovered all the symbols!
textByHashes.d6574ebefe74007d8ecf13a1ebbb173fcb5b23f2: I think i've removed the jinx now.
textByHashes.b68cb1566f1d2394c6c506a88bbc0321d74873ae: The jinx should be lifted now. You're free to navigate us to the island!
textByHashes.7148917b4798cb54d4c835bdc63300578ad378f5: Well... no to be honest you seem pretty care-free at the moment.
textByHashes.8b4f18dc4fb21d332f5b0cc2e1bb1331f4b1a7c3: What is it like being a pirate?
textByHashes.987904883b356887a187610951d492a28cc0660c: Do you not have a union to help you?
textByHashes.bd70ef32f0c8d65f18858d0ed4ecc7b8179ae474: The jinx on the ship should have been removed now.
textByHashes.c6db29f592484740d1aefd872f8787235ddf7da1: The jinx should be gone now!
textByHashes.e425544c600fcfcd22bbda679626441dbf7d3f2d: No worries. It was all down to the cabin boy, it seems.
textByHashes.f8888e3fef625346b8b91a20bcf614fbdc65525a: Spare me the life story, can we go now?
textByHashes.00cc85b692ef4533473f6d884160d82411c94f41: I think it's time to go exploring around this island.
textByHashes.f53628cd729d7fe384f8da43325905d76c059afd: So we've made it to the island. What are you waiting for - I thought you were going to go see that girl?
textByHashes.1c0b04dbe535bf5a25f2ccd6971d50ae3d258a99: That's probably for the best. You'll need to be psyched up to confront her.
textByHashes.f36bb915ec73faff2241fc7a119cc12f669b778b: I'm off to the island now.
textByHashes.f400eb48e1cb6e412afa79954a1c028b1197bbb9: What do you do for fun on this ship? You know, when you're not doing pirate stuff.
textByHashes.38e090df0b6ffa73d4a9510c50aa464aa0f3cc89: What a life! Wait a minute. 'Walk the plank'? Surely that's a bit dangerous?
textByHashes.2dbb0e9601ac59c045e9ccd88bf226a58d115078: I think I'll stick to Runelink.
textByHashes.2f2bb0a66241b97bf10d9e8eb6b43d7e7f003156: No, it's the smell. Can't you smell it?
textByHashes.e80adf4fee240cac8b8e1b5b6467a8966d1ab915: We have arrived at the island.
textByHashes.b526e8aceb3ab8ee70b7edffe674ee722f9af36a: I can't say anything right with you Pirates.
textByHashes.20a46d1ce9d5c9c4526b19cb35821669483104d8: What does it take to become first mate on a ship?
textByHashes.d2aa65e8106f504ad836c510880b0cfcdbb92494: I had no idea. I always figured it was all about popularity.
textByHashes.618a80707bec55881f035edfa081f033b6e7f9fa: I feel a little sea-sick from this travelling.
textByHashes.ccfb1688ec053b55fba711e6b686414e1e747629: Oh HA HA. Thanks for the help!
textByHashes.20dc9639a4feacc03c96dced632aa269f28c9de5: I'm looking forward to looking around the island.
textByHashes.78da21f2c2c556d5440af2a24088b8d4f0a8bdbe: Don't you miss your family, y'know, being a pirate out as sea?
textByHashes.a2a02e2b8d0470f86a334d28cd344c09ac5157b4: Looks like we have arrived at the island.
textByHashes.55683bbb4ccc409d5aed00acc3b7de556c75ce8e: Should I remember anything when visiting this island? Can you give me any advice?
textByHashes.53487b633ad7474db5d36b9c554c803651f3765f: What does that have to do with the island.
textByHashes.60b216eed2d488e55b6d583230be9e485ddf3678: I think I'll stick to making my own food.
textByHashes.fd9989912918d44fcf19caf1abc7a1f1c11243a4: Thanks, I'll keep that seal of passage close.
textByHashes.796b8d002b1ab37798c4066d2260e418a632ffd4: Can we head to Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.d6fa8e5bd677733813997ece23ca671531ee311f: So you've plucked up the courage to come and confront that girl!
textByHashes.8a9eae67c8db903dcb82677d50016960186a58d3: Really? And you're not sceptical about this? You know, after what she did last time?
textByHashes.f255e40b1b79a1b4efadecde810902b0d6612c7f: Huh? Why are you talking like that?
textByHashes.5f81b8eefb99f09bfc2901c64a5f7d0dae81a6d6: Like someone else was talking for you. Are you sure she hasn't put a spell on you again? Did she wave a watch in front of your face? You know, tell you to look deep into her eyes?
textByHashes.6ed2c7c65f1d2ae679c5afb618a06e15306da610: I think you've been hypnotised. I wonder what happens if I click my fingers?
textByHashes.c816f4b1ba1a9181c9035af6e58132e729ffa767: Oh dear. Oh well, I'm sure you'll learn one day.
textByHashes.8db0a10745f7a28afcf3b651a5f4fc1b5891f6ac: It's a very interesting house you have here. Does he have a name?
textByHashes.385220e9c1a6aec4e9605b3b6a75826bf675c794: Berty? Berty the Chicken leg house?
textByHashes.e0d791a1a079ee347139f5b72fdec0c5789f7117: Isn't that what you're supposed to say when you meet a new race of people?
textByHashes.9126d26b278c490f206a6daff8b9ff52b28b16d3: OK. Is he rich and powerful?
textByHashes.7c0d718ddfa448b5216eff3a86044c56ef0ac809: Great. Thanks. And where is she?
textByHashes.94596b5c8c6eb45f120ab0e752cab4907146c42d: We do? This is going to take some time getting used to.
textByHashes.8d8d77d1659e896325cb7095128628a7c1d3e934: Well, I'm seeking some kind of settlement between your clan and the Fremenniks. I understand there has been a dispute for a great many years and being a member of the Fremennik clan I wanted to come as a
textByHashes.0086b28db34c230e485b2c5305d1c9e926325236: representative to see if something couldn't be sorted out.
textByHashes.726b8eba33ddc1318a75454b629f7317816a2ba7: That's what I was hoping you may be able to help me out with.
textByHashes.b811d7f14f8a94b2361b15a470fb43ec0441dc97: Can you tell me more of why you don't feel your people get on with the Fremenniks?
textByHashes.2196611d979a2a23e63dfda038e6d5e72f1f4d4d: I think you'd be surprised at how flexible they could be. I think they just feel like you put yourselves on a higher pedestal to look down at them. They don't like that and can't see what is so special about you and
textByHashes.ec543cbbd61d7a9dd29d9a4f5faf97c433686d53: Fine. I am always eager to learn.
textByHashes.c7441b10a51aebc19bdfc908e17b15bab278367b: What sort of thing had you in mind?
textByHashes.c8c3b794fcea6c38bed90c584d557801063f2031: I'm not so sure I want to wait years to solve this... Is there any way I can just attempt this ritual now?
textByHashes.3c231643339384a71fba4507ccc935d6796d3554: That's OK. What do I have to do?
textByHashes.d91d039851cfe5b6b2b0b8c50647a6c5a2137f39: Hi, what was I supposed to be doing again?
textByHashes.8779e2d563582da6b8df6dd59f0a4e8e2af23cfc: The Oneiromancer told me you may be able to help...
textByHashes.d2776248117e12d823e9d21c91543a122fdf971a: I don't think I will ever get used to people reading my mind. Yes, a potion of Waking Sleep? I need it to go the the...
textByHashes.7343ec8abb9847e0674aaac0a54a4204d809c63b: You know that's really quite rude!
textByHashes.3ec891618a6e0a999187ec4b14029dadc5f26ffd: Well, I was hoping you could tell me how to make one?
textByHashes.a2a83107271feb821a88b0055038a1ee92781018: There's no harm in trying. Right...?
textByHashes.6861f00779832bd10481d4817ff00f4518485b78: You really know how to instil discomfort don't you!?! How do you make...
textByHashes.f9587f3b7d869c1cf2a97a539af23da26f70ec81: About the potion you wanted me to make...
textByHashes.efac3faf57eb4563040a96f183e5310ec7ed3896: Stop pre-empting what I'm going to ask.
textByHashes.714b9c02283946ba2bad2fe8d82e346163b6a78a: No, not yet. What do I have to do?
textByHashes.bf46e4dc42164b4a6ba0a61a9239ee220983c60b: Hi, could you refresh my memory: what am I supposed to be doing?
textByHashes.6771cbf25c4eb65120848b9de835aefe35476df7: I'm on the lookout for ceremonial clothing so I can visit my dreams. I don't suppose you could help me out?
textByHashes.51cf10adc073875b4e8e5ada8ccd36be3edfedeb: Because you're a kind person and like helping people in need?
textByHashes.25320a5868cfc5b643184d2cf7d11dc2930e40ec: Well you do seem to have a moustache growing.
textByHashes.54ea198d2ac507b6e7ce1e64e744b120e052e806: Oh no. Can't you give me some kind of clue?
textByHashes.1ddad712202310e9d2b126bd7468c5c5b0b2a11b: Woo hoo! Not the most normal name is it?
textByHashes.946a1fa5f571ba00ac3122e3c5e958f832ecb413: Sounds like they were totally insane.
textByHashes.e92ed972549e53e70f4385d20c3c72a2298d4748: Can I try guessing your name again to get the cape? And can I have the clues again?
textByHashes.468f548af24f9be4ddf05cafb9409aca83975080: Well, I've actually come here on a diplomatic mission. I want to try and settle some of the disputes between the Fremenniks and your clan.
textByHashes.7ebb4683775761cc423d9b8c7771c2c0feb0be01: I think they are very eager to listen, but they feel like you are keeping secrets from them.
textByHashes.8233a18d1d67cee4820e9d9463a973791658f7a4: Yes, as in your magic ways. To be honest, I think it is fear of the unknown.
textByHashes.294ccab5a71d4138203e07a557894cf81f3e4c07: I'm hoping I might be able to achieve that.
textByHashes.4e33129a567e240f2378f99166a034cfb12370f0: Can you tell me a bit about your people?
textByHashes.c2cdfbe50e82513edae1c22ab4ec463eb88ebc9d: How about the values of the Moon clan!
textByHashes.e6faed94b7dd307722786d8d5985f2cf4b21f359: Well... I know things about myself. I know I like hot chocolate!
textByHashes.e477f7f9bb2761f4f1ae148e9fafaf42eaeab2eb: It's to go with the ceremonial clothes I need for visiting the dream land.
textByHashes.5310d97013fa56d117b4375d2f713594c7de2bf0: Buried it? Why would he do a thing like that?
textByHashes.a617a82a07a60035aebd518fe3905ebf68640dcf: I'm not going to talk to someone that calls me 'sweetie'!
textByHashes.4f3a25fd777fa59b945fbdb6d018ce8c768497ae: Well that's unfortunate, because I was going to ask you how I might go about getting some.
textByHashes.0bac0fc92f4b2c3c811c62a1ac4b70244bb79297: No, I don't have any on me. Where can I get them from?
textByHashes.2a7f4f4256ea886a7a34ab3b25dc2bf7a24b3ecb: That seems like a fair deal.
textByHashes.522fd87800e46c22d45c843b22198c775f1e76a0: Sorry, I don't seem to have enough money. I'll be right back!
textByHashes.a829abbb1dd4f8182864494c028e482df38c24d6: Hi. Say, that's a nice amulet you're wearing.
textByHashes.a2fce8c5ded2a4415aa8e2680972e6c24e961175: You have, I can see it.
textByHashes.79cb1e08628f9468afd5549e2520d3cfc2ab5d41: Your lucky tiara? What happened to it?
textByHashes.ed41a1f044e79aa86a4af1748e149be2c7923e48: I see wot I cen do, yeah? I mean, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.f51f785c155a21c466d47139b938bcad35f405a4: Not yet! Where did you say I can get it from?
textByHashes.d3feab2e3ede272daf85c21d8798cf294c9b277c: I have indeed, want to trade?
textByHashes.62c88a017d2366b8b3ea76adfe824fb396467dac: I've made the Lunar Helm, but I've got it stored somewhere.
textByHashes.117948625b33501a00d987fae452600d4357e94a: I've made the Lunar Torso, but I've got it stored somewhere.
textByHashes.af81b40f7ab0db527ce8bd701596b5336edae454: I've made the Lunar Trousers, but I've got them stored somewhere.
textByHashes.557dfeff11aca23096bb5ecc231be6a1280c5a9a: I've made the Lunar Gloves, but I've got them stored somewhere.
textByHashes.cc72d99d274106f83ed29bb6e497a955b11514ff: I've made the Lunar Boots, but I've got them stored somewhere.
textByHashes.02bc43f9f7ba646ae2a33b6b810604fffef9093a: I've made the Lunar Cape, but I've got it stored somewhere.
textByHashes.19f50ae29bc47a822abc8f11120c01085c49a39c: I've made the Lunar Amulet, but I've got it stored somewhere.
textByHashes.2a69ef7b3700279d2af849f87726917bb96e12a6: I've made the Lunar Ring, but I've got it stored somewhere.
textByHashes.a7b05181fefec4e0eceafa3ada0b1607d22c7c81: Er, how do you know how much space I have?
textByHashes.a9709a6644bfe1960bedaebca1d6db88e05989ed: Ok ok! I get the picture. I'll be right back.
textByHashes.b90d98cd7fc96601d14b157f12828a6995a9974a: What am I supposed to do again?
textByHashes.29234ad8bae233c51012bd16950a0b0599e2bb08: Erm, that doesn't sound too realistic. Thanks!
textByHashes.b8fac4bbeb3f2ec0859af6d86f02bf077664d7f5: Actually, I'll have to come back when I have a space to carry one.
textByHashes.ba320b96d354ee11007086b79999165abaebc4a4: Unfortunately I don't have space to carry it.
textByHashes.a37578e8cdf9e777240e69faffefa978a42b02e1: I misplaced my potion of waking sleep.
textByHashes.9839b63227ba24d16447e9e05f22c6d1658004e2: Huh? If I dreamt, I certainly don't remember anything. Wait a minute! I have to wear ALL the ceremonial gear AND be holding the staff.
textByHashes.025e1944462df29ce9ecb276f3b424b0256408d7: Let's see what this says... It seems to be my life story...
textByHashes.bbe76c5434e8fc8870c9581f18b74da47386fedb: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started his life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, he began his career by...'
textByHashes.e4a1ac2d33811a1ab7bd2b780af1ed83d0996695: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started her life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, he began his career by...'
textByHashes.a19ca51dcbd2efc43668ad57f235e269df56817c: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started his life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, she began his career by...'
textByHashes.fa612c1f0ad9bf941cce572b0661268133b7c47b: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started her life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, she began his career by...'
textByHashes.99351bea37fff27365f3ec52f970624930e4aa8d: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started his life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, he began her career by...'
textByHashes.1a6b4976311d761ba60354fa3c4f320f9c447108: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started her life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, he began her career by...'
textByHashes.143d5e1c14ae64f23a958759dd858d4dc8d3c33f: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started his life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, she began her career by...'
textByHashes.b19f49053de43772f37426d75a6e71ad4463b3f3: 'It was in the age of the fifth that a child was born of simple beginnings. Even though he started her life with little money to his name, and nothing but a dream of adventure, she began her career by...'
textByHashes.1b2211e376d03c5c51049627dd49748148f7c533: Huh? Was it all a dream?
textByHashes.ae46934b13d655d33870237697cd7b6e841d3485: Well, I didn't really manage to do anything, I left straight away.
textByHashes.ee1986d10e5b47f01e6b7ee03973c70789ca925f: But you can't know you're in a dream whilst dreaming, you'd wake up!
textByHashes.3282636fac2c5d49c00a26f4593bca199dc9a119: Ok. So how do I wake up?
textByHashes.a001db523c93f7a63881ab171a95007712a9586f: What am I supposed to do now?
textByHashes.8fec04394414d50c062e712eec55a675394b26f5: This is the strangest place I have ever been.
textByHashes.1652983cfc673b4e6e1fdbbd6b24f71538537c29: I'm making progress in the dreamland!
textByHashes.78d219a444709b756fac1f1b88638085e5429b56: As previously discussed, I learned the importance of understanding others and my surroundings. That with this knowledge I can learn to help myself.
textByHashes.4bfa7296a1516f7ed65334b829f452ae548119a2: I can still remember the lesson on the importance of knowing your own abilities and having confidence in them and yourself.
textByHashes.087efafd9d6b0aba8319c39a894525911a6f6f6a: There was that lesson with the dice, about appreciating the unknown, and respecting it as opposed to working against it.
textByHashes.430b08a40bbfde550783006029d2861261cc96dc: I remember learning how important it is to know where you are and where you have been - your history. This helps you to plan out where you are going and to progress.
textByHashes.f00c00505d86f0c4de33c30478081ec172aa7c99: I already know the importance of seeing that not all paths are easy to walk, but if I stick at things I can succeed. What harms us just makes us stronger.
textByHashes.aba501ae1d0d71aba32da2597dbf1e6058c2714a: I know that it is important to relate to others and that a lot of understanding and experiences can come from that.
textByHashes.db9b4f1651d0e8da5128352760629debc1494639: They're very nice, but you seem to have been chopping some down.
textByHashes.4ef9dfebc73fabb6551440b95da146fd25c56a26: Fine. I can chop down trees.
textByHashes.49b667eb20b1d68a99f36b2a38935228251bcb39: So I have to chop down trees and place twenty logs in the centre, first to do so wins.
textByHashes.8224d3b5ad78c13c57ea70ba2be9b6b1112b109e: Not one I can use, no.
textByHashes.f355b37036dd40a5848418701a795ef0d0f24065: I'm afraid I don't have any space.
textByHashes.ab40b2a15e45c560d09eb2c3596bfca53991eca1: So you want me to chop down trees?
textByHashes.a2c8d8944b2f6518d110a11633041688750ddc4b: I went to an area where I had to cut down trees as fast as I could! I had to do it against another man, and he kept asking me questions on what I could achieve.
textByHashes.34be86a165e51fbe3d5c57745b61e7249f3f4759: This is tricky. I think it was showing the importance of being able to know your own abilities and having confidence in them. You need this to beat opposition in whatever form that
textByHashes.c28ae0453e61f82f214d77487c7a9c732a2b3527: This looks like an interesting island.
textByHashes.12fcd670b2f7389995b0549cc9d5cfc3e5c17356: What? That's a bit sudden. What kind of race?
textByHashes.c722853087130c3f6f0c874d0b6d5e1d6dd73333: That doesn't seem fair - mine's all curvy and yours is straight.
textByHashes.35c911bc0d6d0d662662dcbe4559b78b8b735edd: You're right, I'm far too slow.
textByHashes.09d99b6c2494ecea7697ba1844fe205a954a6359: I'm just making the most of the abilities I worked hard to develop. That's all!
textByHashes.baf0d86cc53541095d941a14607ff5173a9685fd: I found myself on a sort of race course, facing an opponent. He had a straight route to travel, but mine was weaving and littered with obstacles. He had it easy and I seemed to have the hard route. But I still beat
textByHashes.6d4242a994919a500060b47e6246e10839c8ec1d: I had the more difficult path to travel, but I was faster and wanted it more - I hurried through while he just walked. That shows a few things, not all paths are easy to take, but if you want to succeed, and are willing to
textByHashes.f07f7bf2d17ddcefb0f4600be75669ae11946633: put in the effort you can come out successful.
textByHashes.96ad1006340179e562c35ce534266dc350e02478: Hello there. What's going on here?
textByHashes.3ccadc1b049ff7c413e671e50d9b159506210f18: That's ok. So what is the point of this place?
textByHashes.c402f3f5016cba681742fd4a961cb42d1b008b30: Erm, ok, I can't turn down an offer in this place.
textByHashes.b19b0d32cfb99a01fa43778788631003ede6eba6: What am I supposed to be doing?
textByHashes.6fa27c710aa2736b17e5b9a0c6583cd38c190bf9: I went to this area where I had to play this strange game involving numbers. I had to understand what this guy was saying, but he was mainly talking in numbers. It was most weird.
textByHashes.f5c57346ad5091fd52bb8299decd7abcdb95da04: To me it was about trying to understand someone else to proceed I suppose.
textByHashes.90b9d198ef0501b29913626c6b3af73208e731bc: Huh, wait a sec, who are...
textByHashes.72711303f746857f17a1b59b0d95fbb3f25b8ac8: You're not all there are you?
textByHashes.54972744362cf9aee3ea3582a6aa18450cd89943: Suppose I may as well have a go.
textByHashes.1aa16c97b12b7bed9a62d29ccd414c7038abb3be: I see. There's a lot more to communication than words. Thank you.
textByHashes.bf712e8df0dd3af6d4489a31fdf512f4ec1ec1a7: I found myself meeting a man that only seemed to interact using body language. I basically mimicked what he was doing and before I knew what was happening, it felt like we were friends. It was very strange.
textByHashes.d4d0f8a77d35afcd7ba7251962187579223e8c0e: Yeah, I think it was illustrating the importance of being able to relate to others, and that a great deal of thoughts and emotions are shared between people. We can learn a lot from each other, so I suppose friend
textByHashes.786bbeacc37e26f5ad447cd948a6494071430d9b: What number am I trying to make up?
textByHashes.59ae7981abbd06675d442dbe2d6035e542e9971c: I visited this strange platform covered in dice. I was then challenged to turn over selected dice in what seemed like a game of chance. But I think there was some logic behind it all.
textByHashes.d9540db3cf095bc88c5df54eeaca568962499bfb: Got it! You have to appreciate that there is always a certain level of the unknown in life, but there is always an answer, you just have to play the game and have hope that you'll succeed.
textByHashes.3c95e60098bb4f04889ce32140f2424bbe0cef15: A journey? Don't talk to me about journeys! I'm surprised I have any feet left with all the walking I have to do!
