textByHashes.173c86664cd4a7900d0cd6025ede25139ab03b38: To be honest, I spend a lot of my time not knowing a single one of those things!
textByHashes.22f2babdf1d2679343f55d4c20d99bedd7d0bf02: I think I understand better now, it is very useful to be able to remember where you have been, where you are and where you are headed. I needed all three to progress, unless I worked with trial and error, which
textByHashes.fcc5e90fdea8081bfef1ab7e623b2bd943900c50: you do sometimes have to do I suppose when looking into the future as the future is undecided.
textByHashes.9d7227ebb2f61af8661f437f18e746e6aadd2829: I went to this place with loads of platforms. I had to jump across them, but some of them weren't real and I fell away as I stepped on them. I had to remember where I was on the grid, and recall the route I was
textByHashes.719e5a958ede346747e3c900e191545d04403262: I suppose there is a great deal of importance in knowing where you are and where you are going. Having goals and remembering your past. It helps you make the right decisions!
textByHashes.0cf852bffa94234161e7e312ab9cf2ddad99cbfd: I'm not ready yet, give me a little more time.
textByHashes.d7a8d57246c15709166454e6f0b2f0758b76d52f: I don't suppose you can give me any help?
textByHashes.8ea86a64e9d2bc7d4560fbb01f4858e94e3df96e: I've completed a few tasks in the dreamland! I've learned a variety of things. But I've still got one last thing to do.
textByHashes.dc0b2dc411971a8ee0aff33bf52a4f5e0b8a8201: I did it! I confronted myself!
textByHashes.1f593846e76420588fd6a74b234f727b6dffc3a4: I've done it! I understand now!
textByHashes.da9c503b5e3c889c573ffca3138561540c33a668: To start with, six very important things that I needed to know of myself: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of
textByHashes.af3611f6a5140d29f0dc87c2686b7193ff8757d6: your past and present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown.
textByHashes.9043ed57f989cdeb385177470fd993c52ea99461: Excellent. I think if you make contact with the Fremennik, and tell them your willingness to communicate and share, you'll find plenty of eager ears.
textByHashes.180ef9a4f299df667e2fc8a623ad461c27d72dcc: Already? News really does travel fast!
textByHashes.584b1207931f20c8b764639df64997e823f10c18: No worries. I am pleased I could help.
textByHashes.7b189ba16d88895990c7615bfcd1907e1a051b63: Oh, erm, could you help me out with a Seal of Passage?
textByHashes.8f04a1d2d447d82c0cb90d2966c6e37ade9e8109: Well, don't get any funny ideas! You promised you'd never cook another human if I helped My Arm grow goutweed.
textByHashes.621781f660c6695314bc003ae858daff96fb1c1b: Will Burntmeat reward me with burnt meat again? I've been here before, you know!
textByHashes.dc17e61161695d92fdde4c8e78ccafcb3802dde9: So tell me about this quest.
textByHashes.ab5ca3dda3cf2e36b1b1fba23579fb6a7261351c: So you're planning on sending someone to Weiss to teach them the technology invented by the Stronghold trolls?
textByHashes.2fe988fec4bf2df96cd019c3c4dc2a47ba1f96fd: Why in the heck would you choose My Arm?
textByHashes.c3e52395962486fec4543fc33be7f5eebb593ec6: I'm doing another quest for Burntmeat.
textByHashes.ac1a885da18a696b4c925b761dd0568460d686d2: Yes, he did. Lots of burnt meat filling my inventory. That was Burntmeat's reward.
textByHashes.091cca87c6d3cc846022ca73d17a76d2714648f8: There's a troll town called Weiss, up in the north. They want a troll from the Stronghold to go and teach them about the technology you've invented here.
textByHashes.88c0d4b7b1d9d7eb8fb03348cf95afa5799b558e: Don't you mind leaving your home?
textByHashes.e8c7a4e09ae0851d110c511796296259c644286e: Those nice people might have given you anything you liked, if it would make you stop damaging their village.
textByHashes.c3a41c78d55c7a4a708fde81511f1e5bc667f0f7: So My Arm very happy to go teach goutweed farming to trolls in Weiss. It so exciting!
textByHashes.ae2335f57ab4127121fb1260b3e30d2e0c1b4347: Isn't there anything else you can teach them?
textByHashes.221a2fe44475533a1ffe18fedd2b06d1a0fa4a81: Wolfbone said we should go by sea. Apparently the mountains are too hard to cross, so he told me how to get there by sea.
textByHashes.4dbd81546ffa82e418b328603e8411a2b6123a76: I once helped a guy called Larry with some penguins; he's got a boat near here, west of the mountains, near Rellekka. Come and meet me there, and we'll try borrowing it.
textByHashes.29e631f3479578ddce3dd3c164adcf39d66cceb2: Meet me at Larry's boat. I helped him rather a lot with those penguins, so hopefully he'll let us borrow it. It's west of the mountains, near Rellekka.
textByHashes.bda471060e8fdf27c8ca7a14cabe014e129ed35c: Can I transport My Arm in your boat?
textByHashes.ced3948553d2a22d704832ec9259c1cb02998858: This kind of thing happens a lot when I take My Arm out to places.
textByHashes.2de86cd92f4c1b84e18ca9021615e8df202b5d9b: Never mind, I just need to borrow your boat.
textByHashes.396442d7d29ef4aeff8f1beff8f5ce3d5efe75ea: This is My Arm, yes. We'd like to borrow your boat, so we can visit more trolls in the north. My Arm is going to teach them to farm.
textByHashes.a5e667e0d3871819da3bd034f4a08b4794e89e0c: Um... well, let's see how this goes...
textByHashes.f4bd2e7c5214f7c508dc988d9b274599c7cb0c36: Wolfbone said we should moor here and go up the cliffs.
textByHashes.69bcf73c76d072c12110d04b179d051217b395d1: He might have assumed you're good at climbing, since you actually live on a mountain!
textByHashes.e190cf1beb1d124856bafdd4980686657236eec1: Anyway, I'll have a look around.
textByHashes.ca295b62e3c4a241cc518974df3aac349a7afd55: I can't see whether it's safe to clear the blockage from out here, or whether that would collapse the cave.
textByHashes.3f1a536a2ba132410e17c3f0bfdc30ab3274b5c3: Maybe if I got into the cave from above, I could clear it more safely from inside.
textByHashes.c91369865780c4fc6d8c240c4b5236f5bd11671f: A cave! Maybe I can go down there, and find a way to mine through the blocked passage from the inside, to let My Arm in...
textByHashes.0d09e74f6f14be6d710823f75ecfe5396b74c1c3: I'm supposed to be introducing My Arm to this town as their new friend. Maybe it'd be worth talking to the inhabitants before assuming I need to break into their home.
textByHashes.b1f58626f7c741acb715e2d6ad00c6b57f447118: My Arm has come to make friends with you.
textByHashes.fb91ff41f393f5023d547c0436c68b4f45de9a97: But My Arm's come a very long way for this, and he's very excited about what he can teach you.
textByHashes.83f04d595dff02939522fadce103c4f394d45953: Wolfbone's sent My Arm from the Troll Stronghold.
textByHashes.1e10e583ca0be0d31dabf3e7d409bcdcbd6fbb7d: I'm not letting you eat my arm.
textByHashes.b7923b6a2c75a5076bfc94861da881395453c3c8: You only need to let My Arm in, not me.
textByHashes.a5c3d981af110ebcc32c2ecd77fcedf7860d270e: It's a good thing I got in here before those trolls arrived!
textByHashes.21361a6e6c2b3e20c92ce1d675b4403bf2aea768: Well, there's the cave exit I need to clear. Then My Arm can get into this cave.
textByHashes.7cdf94325a64832ea8a2ab073020b0f6148606d9: The Weiss trolls won't trust me until they can see I've really brought a troll here. But they won't be able to see My Arm unless he walks far enough into the cave.
textByHashes.4c30a1004a90879b20abbfe64330f24c9a8c6630: The water looks shallow at the north end. Maybe it can be filled up with rocks, or something, so My Arm could walk further into the cave...
textByHashes.10dae5f3a87c8b16b5fd0d83e81a7abaea3ecada: ... and those trolls seem to have plenty of rocks to throw into the water...
textByHashes.60dcdd87aef07502ebe0441a15ead3f3838c8294: I reckon those stepping stones will let My Arm enter the cave far enough for the trolls to see him! I'd better clear that obstruction so he can get in.
textByHashes.33c2525fef66f97258f27e66150a02b02debe667: Why are you called Mother, Mother?
textByHashes.0680a2c773b42f072e771711e5ff51e48c5cfa81: Let's move on with the chat.
textByHashes.344b90d96cb1e65f3b8b120f3955523868c5a231: Tell him how tough Stronghold trolls are.
textByHashes.e807e174e77dad15014ab8b5381d6867570264e4: Tell him to show respect to his daughter.
textByHashes.47bb956b086202d48a1aee02bc90c2d917fa3f79: Tell him you love his daughter!
textByHashes.6e1626b4e5f1e4fbd1f06d26ca6a196bb9d3209d: I meant on a more emotional level...
textByHashes.223cf73acc327f2deb8ccc815d3aad7347ddbe4e: I'll get back to you in a bit.
textByHashes.51c95de0becf7e367fd2f5eaac7f3e2a4db385ba: Mother wasn't very nice to Snowflake in there.
textByHashes.bfc7eaab92520d99c044a28ed0286ff107b5a5df: Snowflake, you seemed to like My Arm.
textByHashes.3a102b6f51a393dfa7d4748b8012adb6e855e7e0: Odd Mushroom, why are you here with us?
textByHashes.3592f3613e6bf8454af2b582a04d1b39b0c34119: It sounds like you want My Arm to overthrow Mother for you.
textByHashes.2f3725685e33cefffab3ac6eaf3ad204af82055c: Can I kill Mother? That usually solves problems in quests.
textByHashes.e7307e150e77958dd15dfaf60c7a8fcc1f6d923e: Can My Arm fight Don't Know What?
textByHashes.31c9392bb04c2b1086298812f52f2efe78c8823e: Does Mother respect anything except fighting?
textByHashes.1821410334527eab74c7f772f17cc1239cd4165c: Did you say the dwarves called that human the 'Wise Young Man'?
textByHashes.9dd4da5c22fba9ee5c7b0fd2872161f6dcdf71e3: I know that Wise Young Man you mentioned! I did a quest with him where we saved a fishing colony. He's the Wise Old Man now.
textByHashes.09262ea459fd6879d9422336ad549f6adb32d37d: We killed a lot of trolls.
textByHashes.6d40cf99a7d2b40fff8c67788030c3cdd27af8d2: I did some fishing and fetched some stuff.
textByHashes.d5007c193dca32666aace4f2d01aec8b81680184: No, My Arm can't kill the Wise Old Man! The Wise Old Man is far too powerful.
textByHashes.63708fc682d1131b26977edbb97c8b398b83c6bf: You're suggesting I ask him to let you kill him, just so that you can marry Snowflake?
textByHashes.e9d53c224d28dad1f3c4053d5874385c859cf143: This is a very strange request!
textByHashes.9936a6341c107a92052498977adc5b62a187eac6: I'll be back in a moment.
textByHashes.4b59ea5e34aa3478b28b1b27632e3b49f4c93a59: Snowflake can leave with us. Then she and My Arm can be together, in the Troll Stronghold.
textByHashes.2ab47fe877e9377f4a5e174d9d25ba181447036d: I've not discussed it with him yet.
textByHashes.ee5b70f734bc63941bb8c06b6e4425aa5524ca11: Not my arm, I mean My Arm.
textByHashes.14b1fb603ce18ceb77a654807b3ea8ea72ac56bf: Let me explain... A troll called My Arm needs to pretend he's killed you. This will impress his girlfriend's father, Mother.
textByHashes.e62dc32bddcfe6cd83d0793626ca7e19bf3ac1ee: Yes. You drove Mother's tribe of trolls out of the dwarf tunnels near Keldagrim, long ago, and Mother's hated you ever since.
textByHashes.21544062d905ff914bf542dc5e899569cbd89077: That's right. If Mother thinks My Arm has killed you, he'll let My Arm marry his daughter, Snowflake.
textByHashes.6183c8a11527e6bc61caf0ab090b93449eea3510: You'll get rewarded if you help.
textByHashes.9fc3ac1e8a88e9558275ebf8c3242b17077c4699: You owe me a favour after the Fishing Colony quest.
textByHashes.a82af389f23a87f814eff8c50edc9f665b108d60: Thank you. I'll try to get the potion and build you a coffin here.
textByHashes.46fb145eb896fe7ae6f581d623b7cd0da7f9f3da: I've not built the coffin yet.
textByHashes.6f0695a47ea04a91b94450b3be025940ec920d79: I've not got the potion from the Apothecary yet.
textByHashes.2d745a00fc6eec32d0da4abab27c7c85599549c6: Do you remember the Cadava potion you made for Juliet? Can you make another one for the Wise Old Man? He said you'd need to calibrate the dosage to suit his age.
textByHashes.063a797e0804da2a53065e474f67a390b553eb3f: Oh yeah, cadava berries. I'll be back.
textByHashes.c7129949b25e82944180dfc138345f8fdba1d7b3: Yup, I brought some of those.
textByHashes.c2f45fedf8b7374f8d9db06afd9bf097dc872540: I got the potion from the Apothecary.
textByHashes.7344a55db773cb9160a9b9df82788fbb96ee9ce2: The Wise Old Man has disguised himself as a corpse in a coffin to help you two.
textByHashes.66e8ccf77e2caedd22c34fe581d3de79e77c2fed: I don't remember Juliet doing that!
textByHashes.57bb980d9a2ecd581cd14497805074d0d8855428: So we can't teleport out of here?
textByHashes.303bf378522e709eeb054d0d18669c0bf3ab4afa: That'll be handy if I feel like escaping.
textByHashes.aa0edde0495767ece66324df41a1eb09659c1348: So I can't teleport, and I may lose stuff? Okay.
textByHashes.1b8a326b78a264415e42161b605229d625120cb6: I'm not ready to fight yet.
textByHashes.80baa0180cc438296c772d47aa98f6a899f3dfd1: I pronounce you husband and wife!
textByHashes.957d2e8c40eabf17a927a88e1e985942d2be30ec: You need... one small favour...? I've heard that said before.
textByHashes.d1994c79364b68d680c711c5d9dd2312d03fdc5a: ... yes, as an experienced adventurer, I have indeed fetched stuff for people.
textByHashes.daf677d795cd9ce3cff9399e64c991cbbe5f0489: What do you want with goat dung?
textByHashes.a92b49f8a9c00bf694376d39b07bb17ded0d11d1: This is the kind of thing that's best carried in buckets.
textByHashes.b73ccff721e46f89799b24b0fc994e199d54313c: No, I've not got any goat dung yet.
textByHashes.420654c8fa1e3a9c618af6c4afbd2e58a0e4109d: Not yet. I've got it here.
textByHashes.ea2b787c3f088a09e7ea60901f1430378d616cee: I read that book you gave me.
textByHashes.1f51f091bcbb15b8244b7bf5b8586140d1fbd6d5: I'll bear it in mind. Through the gap in the fence, to the west of the town, you say?
textByHashes.8ddc69fa30dcbf542192f1cbe9d3facc2214b1a6: Ah, I see, a great history. But why will it be in ruin?
textByHashes.22a1704ece82f4be18ff873544caba31ca97fd9a: Does the king not respect the outpost's GREAT history?
textByHashes.6dd3caed2903aa597fd4a2a236a41892b3ab9f3b: OK, I will make a stand for history!
textByHashes.c5624a4ae91f1ba13dead3a12a52570ce90633bb: In what way can he help?
textByHashes.4c2c23d86e98d23d14ad18df8388e81f0f408957: OK, I'll see what he has to say.
textByHashes.ad46ade686cb44b1f38580cd4a47b54ab0fe73fa: Sounds ominous. Does he have a name?
textByHashes.57cacb0f5ae0e42459fc2e0ea3c02379cee87ba6: I've conversed with the dead before, that shouldn't be too much of a problem.
textByHashes.3849c1b6de4cca9b53ad32533e7f7ee426d85e1a: And how's he related to this outpost?
textByHashes.f2750497335774f5f88007d1dc0f216b0144486c: I don't care about some dusty building.
textByHashes.a855af3592e7e8c8ea81e26bba1f2870435569a8: This shouldn't take too long. I just want to ask you a bit about your great Grandfather, the one who lived in the outpost?
textByHashes.1f74192a6ff9872b76f0b29d2d8869297333275e: I'm doing some research for a man called Jorral. Apparently the King is going to make the outpost into his very own alchemists' lab.
textByHashes.04789ae5e3fc4ac7a374e40daa5d8e2c913f023f: It's better than nothing. Will you lend it to me then?
textByHashes.7eafe7791fb9a42bbdcf1f2f0154bee0e1eeeda5: Would you like to see the journal I have found?
textByHashes.24168f9115e492cf2d27119b3cbdabd1012700e6: I was just about to. Do you want the key back?
textByHashes.5180373c17025f9b6d9744112eee7be104791266: Great. Do you know anything about the outpost North of Ardougne?
textByHashes.e5ccb64b4e633a9847170687ff47318b25c4fb3a: You want me to patch things up?
textByHashes.10a21b75ebe7abb80b61c1ba4f5bc2a6d19028dd: What do you want me to do again?
textByHashes.52edc0c0313ad759327a82428dbbcfff7d8405b7: Erm. I think you're talking about Droalak. I believe he did love you and he's very sorry for leaving you!
textByHashes.1fd540b6c893fcd5b16b116fbc07ed53241079c5: If you don't mind me asking, are you Melina?
textByHashes.8c4157e9c94e480a7478560917cd31134a4028a7: I've been talking to Droalak. I believe he left you but never returned.
textByHashes.a8fdc27c11607bb255481676a27e251839640daf: Well actually he told me to give you this amulet.
textByHashes.017c0b21aa7cdbc6278588c410fb69a2791c13c7: I've given her the amulet. She was very pleased and said she just wanted to know you still cared.
textByHashes.6fe54b8546b1d84549010983cb27fa3a4f2d70a6: Could I have that scroll you mentioned first?
textByHashes.07af2fad6756440c1f007c3fee3f401bcd4bad27: Thank's for the scroll, but I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.991f27cdfc7d2f0d075c54aa308b87863330dbe9: I have been in contact with the ghost you suggested, and I've recovered this:
textByHashes.03cea7164f8b6cca812e62678117d6a500eb55a5: Hello there. Are you the brother of Dron?
textByHashes.5676e45c1346891da4890059dc71ef0ccff69a0e: Well I'd like to talk to your brother Dron about the outpost North of Ardougne.
textByHashes.08978a3ec8a802174f17ebefc0c662184aa3ee14: I need to talk to you.
textByHashes.b7e9ab26556562bb7f024d8c7b21f04792e84bab: Erm, sorry I don't mean to cause offence.
textByHashes.4e2b388263c7a3b61d476970c6626c1da3d04d7b: I just talked to your brother.
textByHashes.b0e0c8098dfc0b7fe6308f9904cda1e2012ac90c: Why, you're the famous warrior Dron!
textByHashes.6240b2d0d11fb460c88cce974c604dd2f3b7b483: 12, but what does that have to do with anything?
textByHashes.6810354e86a5dbae380281a8f5182d30b16fa02c: Er, I think you'll find it's 12.
textByHashes.81a6fef63eea930eff536a46c4404999d83e160c: I'm trying to find out the history of the outpost near Ardougne. I was hoping you could help me.
textByHashes.25b90a91714493d218be07560098f385518f1953: Thank you, I can report this back to Jorral now.
textByHashes.c0c4d4c3731239451c1bc56133fb69418732b738: Well, I was wondering how you get the blood stains out of your clothes?
textByHashes.ec08450724ea08d6e50f29eab725a72e23c18c5d: You can't lecture ME on eating habits.
textByHashes.2757dac0e55b25af3a8abc125e1244672fbfe01a: And then I asked him about getting the blood stains out of his clothes, but he didn't like that!
textByHashes.b9d4692e0e283ade8495824cec87dad62a68dbd2: I'm glad to hear. What's the whole story?
textByHashes.cda685b266c00ee98a4441002f1be0790dc6c250: So what should I do now?
textByHashes.0ee151b96e72ab843dfc89a8978c4d41d3138857: Then I suppose you want ME to deliver it to the king?
textByHashes.ba8cb5dde6fa8dea34c213047c760b349e7003b9: Don't suppose you could give me the letter again?
textByHashes.52fd6798b337e7f9a40433b9572c769955b2e4b2: Excuse me. I have been asked to give you from Jorral... Ooops, I had a letter, but I don't have it with me - be right back!
textByHashes.0ae643bfb37fcf054829292671416e20bb293f64: Excuse me. I have been asked to hand you this from Jorral at the outpost.
textByHashes.60c1c81b62054cd9714d67b0d99ffa775fb91341: I am sure he only wants what is best.
textByHashes.c0413e419d6025a5cdb734093a7b84b8b64ecb2b: Excuse me sire, but I seem to have lost that letter you gave me.
textByHashes.b98d084bf2439eca2335c2b12593ddc7bda4f2d9: I was given a letter to give to you from the king! But I seem to have lost it!
textByHashes.2cd7be3799d1195bd802f5dadcb70143dff0008a: I've been to see the king and he gave me this letter.
textByHashes.7519234b22703eefa1f853b4f2bddefeea44e4fb: I have delivered the scroll, you can rest in peace now.
textByHashes.0c62bd1482eb5dfba9a70743405b59dc5b7744ef: But what do kebabs have to do with this business venture?
textByHashes.227db6f31fdd405fbbd7ee58bcebce520ff17b58: So you're opening a kebab shop?
textByHashes.67bfdab3e3547a2f93dee77484ad46405221fdc1: I see. So what is it you need help with?
textByHashes.b6b9fb08acf43e2f5e01d864c7ce7ff1bf34450e: Okay, I guess I can go see where they've got to.
textByHashes.6bf997dab37ae2872fa02a8fe2d08981224f5233: Sorry, but I think I'll have to pass on this one.
textByHashes.c00fb2b58a007d3d47224781bb99d4d86b6c3249: I'm here about a missing delivery.
textByHashes.d51db4da3e5ca31ed37614586fdfb7a4c18aae25: Can't get the box open? How come?
textByHashes.aceb81d0cf8a86e41e937856d6c62f5b87ab6f82: Here, let me take a look.
textByHashes.2044ad024a790102270732bbfb6f7e24880c6ba9: Could I have a look at that locked box?
textByHashes.712c97734c2032369a5bde309608e5daa0a08802: I did manage to speak to the Spice Merchant and helped them get that delivery sorted, it should be here soon.
textByHashes.fe31319b2159e6fa3a57b926d7834a687e867ae6: I'm guessing you must be Alba? Emelio sent me to check up on his meat order.
textByHashes.b791f68187b305a42e1f122f4323c90be8bf02c2: A wolf problem? Maybe I could help out with that?
textByHashes.17ed4ad34a999f140e27846da272c78cbe1dd4ec: Sounds like we have a deal then. What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.afc8d0031f6e01067540625809a9d7b3ec01d519: Okay, I'll head over there and deal with this wolf.
textByHashes.2044cd1bef0c9fee4438c4ba60b6984840b7a972: Perfect! Thank you for sorting that.
textByHashes.945232a93f30d2be5deef0571b54f3a107febaa4: I did manage to speak to Alba and helped them get that delivery sorted, it should be here soon.
textByHashes.03c5d250d4279d73dc1c9f820b1dae01e3974b2e: Where did these connoisseurs come from?
textByHashes.bae6040c2771a0dbfa77569764c15cfd741780a3: I see. Are you sure they're going to give us the most reliable opinions?
textByHashes.468b3e28c9aa10e34f0ffdfb2bbc3f40f4211837: Hello there. I was wondering if you had any thoughts on ingredient ratios for these kebabs?
textByHashes.f6c0383e0e5264aadc08bca62f4518a21b8d0078: Let's try one portion of meat.
textByHashes.c7aded47391355018b8eb777db10a50b14bca7c4: Let's try two portions of meat.
textByHashes.d3ba4d6efab25bef8a8817a9b2a65e59e056101b: Let's try three portions of meat.
textByHashes.c36a75b58e00804466ffa539248192db7e8e1683: Let's try four portions of meat.
textByHashes.2ae00ed582dfa85465ce93489e7197629b7e6dab: Let's try one portion of salad.
textByHashes.d5eac0e01dc77698abae75e21ed062e3edbb089e: Let's try two portions of salad.
textByHashes.9ee6ee81d2ae7874894cccd4510b5bcfcfb4f6c6: Let's try three portions of salad.
textByHashes.a57a6667a91029b4b4555baa282441bf09a764cf: Let's try four portions of salad.
textByHashes.0bb9f5157fdcdc5b3031a1c9f0503352a8ff82ab: Let's try one portion of spice.
textByHashes.6fbce73b46d4ddc6d8315f9435964677ca89bfd8: Let's try two portions of spice.
textByHashes.794bc8cb6fed1e14605b89ee0c956d4b556da3d4: Let's try three portions of spice.
textByHashes.2a6b5084209516fe11ca1cf3b23d71fb62103554: Let's try four portions of spice.
textByHashes.74ab3d63fe37e8115359270a7f2309f98dfeaeaa: Let's try one portion of sauce.
textByHashes.879b01dd2773a2941bdb04067aabbd8e6a5aa9f4: Let's try two portions of sauce.
textByHashes.d74ab8373ebc19f2f5b8b2c86e8c4c6b3f69d3ee: Let's try three portions of sauce.
textByHashes.71d14fb1a3bb68913339c9ee544a1b89b6dc81dd: Let's try four portions of sauce.
textByHashes.2ce411aa5f5483fb3e0abe3ac130c11d102069c3: Actually, let's make some more changes.
textByHashes.f2eea72b2da6ef8c5ab34a6d3d47faf131107566: What do you make of this?
textByHashes.cce7966d49955136414f15d36fcaeea524c5d4e4: Oh. I guess we'd better try again.
textByHashes.bc37a9cb5b81a966f048d15f8f42cee1174d351b: Fantastic! I'll let Emilio know right away!
textByHashes.c871140c8962063e6ab45401c5a26ce05668a958: So are we all ready to start selling now?
textByHashes.186416bbaf465b03c7b31851878f0e03346d4bca: Are you Lelia? Emelio sent me to speak to you.
textByHashes.a2e74b9b0e719b509d8b9ea9a255f2bae9b7828d: Well he seems very confident about this one.
textByHashes.46596be3155e83542532a33f9596aa6bb8f3d6bc: He wants to bring a new type of food to Varlamore: kebabs. We have them over in the east. Here, he sent one for you to try.
textByHashes.11d40ecd4720f5435df746289b6436931eca85b5: Excellent! So how does this work exactly.
textByHashes.7326c93ed90492863167f5fa0f7c55167449324c: And would our kebabs be considered suitable?
textByHashes.037b1fee530e00346b6c87fafbd69b7ecc397822: Great! So, er... What do I do with this minotaur?
textByHashes.319cc0564bf8e85b574ad9b4a39e632c1232919e: Will the minotaur be okay with that?
textByHashes.cb9325d33287254df41253c6f2521cca3fb8ae0b: I guess I don't really know much about minotaurs.
textByHashes.7a39d2dd75d235c0119fec2f22b0d53d202edff6: What? No, it's a kebab. The meat is... buffalo... I think.
textByHashes.546ed5a2b9270f501349518d676d3b0a7fff46c0: That minotaur tried to kill me!
textByHashes.f181074484272dc41e324273288e0dce1d84dc3f: But it could have killed me! You said it would be safe.
textByHashes.07d49798a92706430be8ded99fbd3595519bf632: Well I did run into a slight complication, but apart from that, it went very well.
textByHashes.adc5a52e0ebb06663c649c924405231df4777430: Do I not get to share in any of the profits, given I helped set it all up?
textByHashes.9c7f3da75514a14d70d4921566833d5db6b2f0a8: I want to become a Knight of the Round Table!
textByHashes.2f1948bdefc6f231f9c9b56624205df87e9b0d54: I will see what I can do then.
textByHashes.08476dd3e9af652b1fc0a60e8221dadb113cc7ea: Merlin's in a crystal. Little help?
textByHashes.3c0e06275bb798b73a3f947e964f9733b5859e5d: Any ideas on getting Merlin out of that crystal?
textByHashes.62c7aa5579d93f0f8008f1bb83b7fa9e480d518f: Yeah, that's not actually too helpful.
textByHashes.a2d75dffdc56b149c1512b20390dd230f66ac459: I want to get Merlin out of the crystal.
textByHashes.934541f1c1666cc86e786b6b2f5502c21049cc15: Excalibur eh? Where would I find that?
textByHashes.7f1c0c5831881ca81ba0c3574e1a6ec7e776e254: I'd like some advice on breaking that Crystal Merlin's trapped in.
textByHashes.06ac27c37f03c79cdcd7e13ab29a25ddf4717c28: Do you know much about breaking magical crystals?
textByHashes.bd69940c23b9e75204bc7c436fca6b2693981ade: Any ideas on how to get Merlin out of that crystal?
textByHashes.d6629973d188baa71b10cd3ebd9bf3155dd918e3: Do you know how Merlin got trapped?
textByHashes.dc2a7ccc7de6197ee56684b2186952bef3421ced: And where could I find her?
textByHashes.a3bf9f1f4d5e24ef364471080fb7afd9adfaf086: Any idea how to get into Morgan Le Faye's stronghold?
textByHashes.7c103b15d8f2075e6e52ebf703d0680314958be1: I don't suppose you have any idea how to break into Mordred's fort do you?
textByHashes.f86106e738586dca41d33322ed2c840931c6eb19: Any ideas on getting into Mordred's fort?
textByHashes.fa35ec005af7015729df4ea6f0f9141272810cf0: Good a guess as any right?
textByHashes.34e3552e7127ed655e953fd2ec8c20696ca9458b: I need to get into Mordred's Fortress.
textByHashes.6c9a7697ac4742388a096bbd94136f13cb7a844d: I'd like some advice on breaking into Mordred's fort.
textByHashes.50c3cc6bf2ffc6b118a652ac2c4ce5d238d84bbd: Any suggestions on getting into Mordred's fort?
textByHashes.84aa888398e18defcab3830e583ec143a9659587: Um... Hello. I need to get into Mordred's fort...
textByHashes.eff8b478f93cbd3759cc1b9e9b151dd81311d3cc: Any ideas on how to get into Morgan Le Faye's stronghold?
textByHashes.66fbdf4aa9d56c0791fa8a142410fdaf21e36dfb: Do you deliver to the fort just down the coast?
textByHashes.fc77fb59cebda65f560cd5242027654fbbb98aa9: Can you drop me off on the way down please?
textByHashes.96d84672c0f995f93128bf8e0b1147aaafae2cb1: Aren't you worried about supplying evil knights?
textByHashes.36f078ebeffb4007ce10c060c6e962a55209fd53: I don't suppose I could get a lift anywhere?
textByHashes.09e3e807a7863286e3c788ccb7a94226f2824e4f: Well, good luck with your business.
textByHashes.720c1d81bee37c4ca5494efb660588d685d31802: Tell me how to untrap Merlin and I might.
textByHashes.6ef0ababa56e9f4ccf5e88fdd3d996e2a22edebb: So where can I find Excalibur?
textByHashes.4417352747fa8a0814fbe336f81bf742c08320c3: Ok, I will go do all that.
textByHashes.a78b72539864f215efcabe40c4de58938eb93e5e: Have you got any black candles?
textByHashes.85d16cc1763c137a884a3835e1c13dbe65001765: I will pay good money for one...
textByHashes.0ae3be622072a86891be78720747db373cc9d090: Know where I can find it?
textByHashes.13d694527cb7f489ea0488f7a44bc4263e27485e: I'd like some advice on finding Excalibur.
textByHashes.4b02c8f42ce9c509c5b9079268801dc150bdb052: And how am I meant to prove that?
textByHashes.0749d2986a8b8607deaff42813952e30caccd8ec: ... except I don't have any bread on me at the moment...
textByHashes.f9418073fdcae1b07206baafc620d89374c30de1: No, I don't have any bread with me.
textByHashes.77086397d3268f01918e139214829c0aed98f475: Actually, I'm wrong. I still don't have any bread. Sorry.
textByHashes.0d60262dc3a5230e9882ad182cb14cf1b245af14: Sorry, no, I still have none.
textByHashes.78ea7a731d08ddc370427e5e96fa4be30f88376d: Now what were those magic words again?
textByHashes.82d4a2481108fcfe3680cf423ea7065dc78152da: I wish to free Merlin from his giant crystal!
textByHashes.b86b2880b0f4a65b6824d79e10979c9ce3b48ab7: I have freed Merlin from his crystal!
textByHashes.f5f49004a58fc4b9e9be1b2cc35b860ebb39dcae: I'm not getting involved in this!
textByHashes.76e3a42c8dbbfc50b5c9951cf0166543c0a62877: I should probably talk to whoever left this boat here before rowing off in it...
textByHashes.e24609f896815f33b7d8de3f637e927c4f063e9e: I'll have to find the key...
textByHashes.57b5a97f8387b77d068f8380274beca45d95a536: Gosh, that was horrible and so drawn out!
textByHashes.8bfab45370c03a235c438966c168d540693ee190: I think he is actually dead this time.
textByHashes.849eddd6fb6fb50eabbc44683451db8f797309d4: Who are you? Why are you doing this!?
textByHashes.6a58b196d7fb3fd714c44d651c6de781e9810f4f: Gah! I've got to find a way into that house and stop this maniac!
textByHashes.29387ed615587c532136db06912cf6695ca6a02b: I wonder what it was that I saw fall into that barrel?
textByHashes.d032b5e8d26cc8549ca118132d12caf32cc55531: The barrel is full of rainwater, I can't see what's in there.
textByHashes.f57f90b44544ccdcb36b2d1a0d50042940b94c19: What's this? A note? I guess I should read it.
textByHashes.ca14dd2a9f3b315e91e334e2ad25af5e9f75f758: The fuse is too damp to light...
textByHashes.0a95c697553b7588e9ad78c319bf0e033cbdf2a3: The fuse is lit, I should get out of here before it blows!
textByHashes.9d5f4147121ca67e42ccf56b619374d8fdc2d542: The fuse is already lit! I need to get out of here before it blows!
textByHashes.7db7ac3eb99c8fc80ad4ba716a7e31e22d60cddf: That monster! I have to stop them! Let's see what that new note says.
textByHashes.80186a170fec890c5ebfc056fa9f60062563a1d4: There is no time to be playing around!
textByHashes.92833ca27e08075bdc33edc1a8c4a36ba7fe7446: I don't think that's right... Perhaps the clue the killer left behind could help?
textByHashes.7a8727c68d43c7ad42115faff1a037c667faa0ce: You have got to be kidding...
textByHashes.c5b7ac97995bbfb04399554272420a8e18da58af: That psycho! He was just toying with her!
textByHashes.428be9cfe85e8c8832c8ac73ca83b2364d3331e8: Another note. This guy really likes playing games, but this is going to be a game he won't win!
textByHashes.a45c9d3b0b86b8a3aad82dd57a7e6f2c86ee1902: I don't think that's the right order.. Perhaps the clue the killer left behind could help?
textByHashes.986b70147eb1c7e33c11e8c4f840ea3338c2ea3d: Well maybe you aren't as smart as you think you are.
textByHashes.9e144ab16a0e60d014893cf0597518aec1465598: What are you going on about?
textByHashes.48ca53cb369ee17f91518fa5105be90a00ebfc8a: You've lost at your own game. And now it is time to see who you really are under that mask!
textByHashes.185a71b19cde907e720c7cd0b3ed08bde96740b0: No! You!? But why!? Why on earth would you kill all your friends!? Why beg me to come here to help them!?
textByHashes.8debc41ec042a7140080a285bb188bae4a98e593: Well not any longer. The show is over, and there will be no curtain call.
textByHashes.06107f3236e17fa4863a0ffa43d1383475404823: What!? How!? There was another killer!?
textByHashes.be9897ca17b68d5459248836a936a283ecf54cc9: You!? But how!? You were almost dead when I saw you! I saw your wounds!
textByHashes.d62439c533099640e957bd6a507f3af1621f6d07: But what is in this for you?
textByHashes.54336b4845c562f3d70518dc5eaaa21ce20dc803: This could be my chance to take advantage of the situation...
textByHashes.48f7990c65f146434cdafc8fd49db43d9241d3a3: I don't think he's in a very talkative mood.
textByHashes.f6bcccae70245977af082d2a4059f09ae6488a3f: I'm not going at her empty-handed!
textByHashes.e09e7c645dfd89d15e3e42017aedc0cf9738761c: It would be wiser to use the killer's knife rather than my own weapon...
textByHashes.656f99face0ae8966f9aaa37374b00100874829c: Well thank Saradomin that's over! I should get out of here.
textByHashes.b2be5e4e817b5cb6b02d3040e689930b16443c7c: I don't think she wants to talk to me right now.
textByHashes.95ca929863849cca7b9476f2ce379a3975bacf29: Mandy, how are you alive!? I watched you get stabbed through the heart!
textByHashes.cbdf191033c3e0dd0e7ef94f1b8656aad210cd38: So when the killer thought they stabbed you in the heart, they actually missed?
textByHashes.c4841b83286a771cd3dc2100a9c5be6bebcd2e06: Oh, yes, right! You should go sort yourself out!
textByHashes.296fda063017601c658a8cfc7bed873fac4ec0d0: Hi Mandy. How are you feeling now?
textByHashes.3e083b5da2d08f02cef81f945e3677ba47a79aec: Well we saved the day as a team, so thank you too.
textByHashes.7b56cb78758a18ad720430bf3467db44edb829d7: And you too, King. How fares the tree?
textByHashes.954122b7be0059e1e24bf8f532871a9775882937: Good. What ever did happen to Glough?
textByHashes.1b83441d18ef0a884a129696e0f091e204173dfd: King, you look worried. Is anything the matter?
textByHashes.c5a7a74847665f2815a4bd12b33d93ee1ae5fd74: Yes, they were on the eastern coast. What of them?
textByHashes.ea28635bf2ff3908b4b9fc8f4cda1b68b5f5a2d2: I'm afraid I am too busy right now.
textByHashes.21bf26ba5c8382c78405d7a346ebe9b0e8d2082b: What do I have to do?
textByHashes.79d44b2a441a499cfc5f50633135cd86113b79d7: What am I meant to do?
textByHashes.a2438a01ac25641842f8758472a9856d944dd423: I'm trying to open the gate!
textByHashes.3b7f78f4b858ee550e084f41e4986f5e9a2cc7e0: I am on a special mission for King Narnode of the Gnomes.
textByHashes.3ae1c4c8cf0267a63fb601cc1aa2ad28496a2701: Look, I have the Gnome Royal Seal.
textByHashes.bbceb91c7e5f56247d96f39cb3428d8e6250d6ab: Erm, no you don't know me.
textByHashes.16eefc3604c7ef27f8845838d52e53c91996fc3d: Have you seen any of King Narnode's Royal Guard recently? They were meant to be doing ... some work in the area.
textByHashes.974bf85d2b22ac870da1a6524becadfbbd972e37: Glough? No. He has been forced to resign by the King.
textByHashes.9aaaf5b3a8347fba42912afc3cf6917151d808d0: He was plotting to start a war between Gnomes and humankind.
textByHashes.177c25d516a4a602d62dc7e58ddbc1196aff73cc: Anyway, I am here on a separate mission. I am investigating the mysterious disappearance of the 10th squad of King Narnode's Royal Guard. They were to carry out some work in the area.
textByHashes.9781a99e56f8cdcca3b6f8b492b7802f82224874: You have no idea why they mysteriously disappeared?
textByHashes.7c07ed7c0e59b8d6b02e09c552015428c08da53d: They were to oversee the decommission of the shipyard.
textByHashes.7cfe1ac36586ef20baaa788519a87e2cff5fd533: I met a Gnome who goes by the name of Caranock. Do you recognise it?
textByHashes.c7a96b7b7e9a8d034bda0bd945a6f97deaa97873: He calls himself a Gnome Liaison Officer. He seemed a little... odd
textByHashes.cbed069d9d213cd9dffcb24adce3625bfaa80d9e: Caranock suggested they were blown off course by extreme southern winds.
textByHashes.116dcaa59e5d4da43e717a2fd03a15a7fc8f8ab2: I don't have any other information right now.
textByHashes.4203d5e35601c2cdae04d0c10dde2baade01112c: You know those orders you gave me -
textByHashes.1c1c44f067325fdacd5f33e20d427fb7459c4e04: I am an adventurer. I am currently in the service of your King.
textByHashes.04f63c9d0e7d8678f79c95e944d28cff88da37e7: I have been asked to give you orders from King Narnode.
textByHashes.35d3fb7dd3ff6ed50d95dbe44620806051f3de35: However, I appear to have lost them...
textByHashes.02e5e3ae097cc8c63e8b09b494add09cdd5f4b41: Tell me what the orders say!
textByHashes.7c0faec2f2d30cb8887c2865a98cec7b1c1ae6c4: What lies to the south of Karamja?
textByHashes.a907af93a1b7a2e1aac43011e63b580f70a2e451: Why did the King send a squad of the Royal Guard?
textByHashes.6d8702cf321bfabc604e3da7200e5e882a59d029: So the King worries we have come across an equally formidable foe?
textByHashes.97d4cebcb9b4100e5e321b10be6a679012022b20: Why are the 10th squad so famous?
textByHashes.19c3d5501cd2bbc2762a2532ccdc778e63af29da: What is a Gnome Liaison Officer?
textByHashes.89c268e74896bec0babb64ef90577cab145ced83: I'm not so sure about Caranock...
textByHashes.e7e41ca8bcc73395c68e79beec4aac27c69832db: I do not know. He just seemed a little suspicious. He was very keen to see me leave.
textByHashes.a78730d31dc88978ec60851c266cf4a70099a61a: I work better on my own...
textByHashes.3ab5285e68f0672b37a88450b8759887a4669136: Wow! Why would Gnomes need such a place?
textByHashes.84aea3728fe0f7286449a6daab06fa381032fd30: Why are the gliders folded against the wall?
textByHashes.20400454f112833ef59ac066dd31c490a56bcddc: I've been told to wait for reinitialisation of the hangar. They mentioned your name.
textByHashes.31ac1458954aa32fbd38603481090e546d1e42ee: This is really quite embarrassing, but...
textByHashes.08b28418bc9ab579b9add55d2fa4115d50e6ec25: I don't have that kind of money on me right now.
textByHashes.f068537d9dfc8edcfe76f744d1d68909a8d335f8: Ok then. You win again, Glough.
textByHashes.fdfe3cd08b78b0e4e10d89e868322d59f119e1a9: Indeed. I wish I could say the same for you.
textByHashes.50d86466131a0b1d26994345461144930c75f044: No, I'd rather skin a monkey than take your help!
textByHashes.9aafefa32c86d85fa1195090df633cccfa03ec42: I've had some practice in the past.
textByHashes.99ff494bc80f8874e0ac775dd87435f110c42c2c: Not yet. I'll be back later.
textByHashes.c79dbe9ecb0f83a133a48488502422029293a490: We are on a mission for King Narnode Shareen. I am and this is Flight Commander Waydar.
textByHashes.12df325b9b0dfee82825d1d8c1916c41eb303eb4: We are to investigate the disappearance of the 10th squad of the Royal Guard. Am I right in suspecting that you, Lumdo, are a member of the 10th squad?
textByHashes.84b79c7b6be228da93028c58e618ea88c18cb1a3: I have the Gnome Royal Seal.
textByHashes.b5eac643766e3af5999c1834e3173387b03af435: We flew here on a military gnome glider. Is that not proof enough?
textByHashes.8df73f0cbf00167bd6424cbffeb67ef75e1ba686: So are you Lumdo of the 10th squad?
textByHashes.a40dc1755a13163cb07cb96717a0b0258e688e94: Where are the rest of your squad? Where is your Sergeant?
textByHashes.e3ad1c489e6200ff5fd664f548dfe69eb4dd1796: Presumably you are to guard the gliders until they return?
textByHashes.160a00d5fac231d9ea7d0705dcac3af3c67b8262: You must take us to the island. I have orders from the High Tree Guardian to make contact with your Sergeant.
textByHashes.3790372134f4a38d14d7f402f43528bd94134128: Will you take me to the atoll?
textByHashes.906c3ac2cb3f7cea8657657ac05e5ca938e60a5a: Do you recognize the gnome on the beach?
textByHashes.3b3a288a7773a3110dab915ed4f21b8649312f2f: Can you take me back to your kingdom?
textByHashes.67eb37e10b4a8d65d4130f62926627339d044a0b: My mission involves leaving this island!
textByHashes.9606e8031175684e598b1d9724f32cc66c13ef6a: I cannot convince Lumdo to take us to the island...
textByHashes.414e271011c1cf0252a2f2431b41ce9e9ba7e23c: He claims to be under direct orders from Garkor to guard their gliders until the rest return.
textByHashes.eb232bb1b0a72e11ae85f643045e0e371b3ae58b: Waydar! Will you not accompany me to the island?
textByHashes.a302a7f777ed64cd0b6acae48eb0829cbc432243: But it is your mission to protect me!
textByHashes.eb17581663fa9fe3ccdb7eeb97df0523108f4fa5: Are you sure you cannot come to the island?
textByHashes.19d012348e22ab3057696961dd8ea59aeb57024a: I need to return to your kingdom.
textByHashes.9e86b2c07796f7fa61053a50530f766dc955b3f2: Can you take me back to Ape Atoll?
textByHashes.8209660cd553b8d31849ea75f08c4672648975e0: Can you take me back to Crash Island?
textByHashes.fcf421bf89a968542a36d3f6e15e1f75250bf50f: I am in the service of King Narnode Shareen. I have been sent here to locate the missing 10th squad of the Royal Guard.
textByHashes.3e1595ac715f5b19ed0a0e30605383e1c5f4b190: Well I suppose I ought to help you escape.
textByHashes.4d54b14ac72a4e7532420998bdb358f5646b0a11: Well how do I get out?
textByHashes.822c863eb091e187d8c8554d5689530013af6541: Not before I came here, no...
textByHashes.e5ed3609d5362bf1cdd2027cc5dda4820cff7ff0: We'll get you out of there soon enough.
textByHashes.284c99601004d87fadb1eebaabb4ea4eae67b005: It certainly is ... who are you?
textByHashes.4711e4ef1ebe445873d4e0295268bb4221bf8b68: Is there any way I could be like that?
textByHashes.fa93394c464bdfc15402b249f94ddfc3094138fa: Good day to you too Sergeant. I've been sent by your King Narnode to -
textByHashes.d03d2bae2d00de7c4fc14c5b481fc3c8ed19f16d: Why do you need a human?
textByHashes.e9d53c9580986725e646379f025c7b3745f52747: I know about the guards - I had to sneak out between the change of shifts.
textByHashes.041c2344f5dcd94edafc7bd18aec321ffdcdba3c: Have you seen these monkeys? You could never convince them to work for you!
textByHashes.a4363251c0e8ba2dc199c5ef6d850e1b56261da5: Don't be ridiculous! I'm a human - not a monkey!
textByHashes.23c4745fe8126d4c7103fc24c7800c414ba18bd8: I can't even communicate with the monkeys!
textByHashes.700cdd1db66b55c49c32ee9943d697720235dd17: I am on a mission for King Narnode Shareen of the Gnomes.
textByHashes.114a3e58b3d6ec8d6187a196219913b802f47f01: I have been sent to investigate the whereabouts of the 10th squad of his Royal Guard, which went missing during a recent mission to Karamja.
textByHashes.0af4d67b25c25a9e0c7fd85e8f4aa0edb04a37a0: I am currently in the service of your King. I was the human who exposed Glough's warfaring plans and defeated his demon.
textByHashes.46a6bc1b1f747d47d66b4c593bf4477165fe34ec: As far as I understand, the 10th squad were sent to oversee the decommission of Glough's shipyard in east Karamja.
textByHashes.803835cec80c42f787d8d6470fd387e4bd9413b6: Rumour has it you were blown off course. The King worried as to your fate, and sent me to investigate.
textByHashes.fe1234ea8b802cf9ca0ad41b81b8c2562c7feed2: No, I have been accompanied by Flight Commander Waydar. We flew south on a special type of glider and landed on a small island to our east.
textByHashes.dce7161f2e3c37c89ce7aabd4df69563c0b418df: Yes, we have met. He ferried me across to the atoll.
textByHashes.3db0239ecabed777f6c0b8b129a949c03a8b9118: Waydar ordered him to leave his post. He is guarding the gliders himself.
textByHashes.e0b7ea727676a4c6d791dfead56e8243038073a3: Then you gathered enough wood to fashion two boats. Your Sergeant and the rest of the 10th squad took the larger boat to this island, leaving Lumdo to guard the gliders and the other boat...
textByHashes.9a38f95c59a4fd2ed5e27f2defb694d73be6cd95: Yes. What happened when you landed here?
textByHashes.ddd263704168bdee201ad9a3caa890d5b3000117: Why don't you just go overground?
textByHashes.2534f41c18d283ffdf26b2e47e1adbaea43aa8b1: I have spoken to your Sergeant. He believes that the best way to rescue the rest of your squad with the minimum of casualties is to have an insider - a monkey working for us.
textByHashes.9e6ec39c06cdaa87cec3451950923175b27f0f4f: Actually, it was more along the lines of a disguise...
textByHashes.14d4fa14ca9d9117233921469d958fc29b2451fc: King Narnode Shareen asked me to...
textByHashes.d154ed133e33d97b3ed42c4d2aeebeda76cdfd21: But why a human? Why me?
textByHashes.13d8df64d2d0c1baebd71669e4abe1d7cb3a81e2: Why don't you just transform a gnome?
textByHashes.d60cb6e1b97f1b4cbd2eca2bbc30320373a1a284: Right. What do I have to do?
textByHashes.2b682dc3b38c047c84da541c71120036245c6a1e: What do we need for the monkey amulet?
textByHashes.7806e79c77ea06ecbf9848532b3a80779c84c8da: Where do I find a gold bar?
textByHashes.7faf2fa4acebb6474f2ce9983f3317f6e3b08666: Where do I find a monkey amulet mould?
textByHashes.e1153c11aac4549bdf59ce8e39c08bd6bbd023aa: Where do I find something to do with monkey speech?
textByHashes.43ad16ff2b5999eccc633cf3ce2ded0256b5a819: What do we need for the monkey talisman?
textByHashes.a7d09e3b4098e20c2066de5483e1b51c027efe2e: Where do I find monkey remains?
textByHashes.e5247b3fb027e800e02a6c859314598f80201afc: What if I need to be another type of monkey?
textByHashes.bb62e910e6940c208572ed5ecf25eab3799b71b6: Where do I find a magical monkey talisman?
textByHashes.87b1b6873b28bca60cf5db6e2a4a24829cef9bdb: I have been sent by your Sergeant. He believes that the best way to rescue the rest of your squad with the minimum of casualties is to have an insider - a monkey working for us.
textByHashes.4c37d272e44d8da73c769b34a77ae41b7075919c: Where do I find a place of religious significance to monkeys?
textByHashes.67c235507573df473c3d7249a3b28ec43e27e99b: Well I'll be a monkey's uncle!
textByHashes.3a80c249bd9d1a880c5ed81e1e330b91bff03f71: I've been ... eating more bananas... just like you should be!
textByHashes.85e053c2829f067043b20e4d90e94a72bcc92896: What kind of toy did Aunty say she'd give you?
textByHashes.9afb58ea3a837df3512cb1a277878c88e31b0e84: How many bananas did Aunty want?
textByHashes.7ae6d4878748c898fdc80891134427ba02b54d71: Yes, very mean ... do you want me to get the bananas for you?
textByHashes.716c2fb3098668ab811da7f6f58e426211999a6f: But only if you promise to let me borrow your toy...
textByHashes.80a694900e19094b88ba2cb17536785ae89757f8: No, not yet. I'm still trying to get them.
textByHashes.5df7fd45812b305ec7f996e15fdab44264bbe371: Don't worry, I'll get some more.
textByHashes.6ebf1aef22e2e5dbdb59c4c9516691de959e8da2: Has Aunty given you the toy yet?
textByHashes.c3fc4de15d4ca3f8c5993bb47e3de216ddc71678: Can I borrow it now then?
textByHashes.51899e10a617cdba2dfcc6812279ea300b2b6cb3: I've lost that toy you gave me...
textByHashes.bc95100dbaa7eafd0ba12ec5a89f11259ee8bf51: It's good to see you've cheered up then.
textByHashes.8f9758ee8a30f8f75a1c4a57a3c65295a71d0da3: Actually, I don't really need it.
textByHashes.f4fc98427601ddabc2e03e9c1c81bd116b39b3e3: Can you make another monkey talisman?
textByHashes.4f5c1e0b8d85b556df14e1ba8be7c17b4cf3e7dd: Oh nothing ... I'm just passing by.
textByHashes.fa3645194cfb18bc272db84efe9a7b0bba7ac825: Yes - I've now made an amulet of monkey speak and a monkey greegree.
textByHashes.82c842ee24d4ab77aee34756861c8cbd8064e09c: How do you know this will work?
textByHashes.cc8b4430cb6c38c23f277efa07c285ffd7e990be: I'd like to speak with Awowogei, please.
textByHashes.85bed8d301d429c00cadea459d24f7597a02edd0: Who is the Captain of the Monkey Guard?
textByHashes.4bbf88ce1434dc490525a36d5b180745ff1cfb6a: I have come to seek audience with Awowogei. I am told I need your permission to do so.
textByHashes.f9ef544e9ee581465476cd9cfb8f0385ea2a70b9: I am envoy from the monkeys of Karamja. I have come to propose an alliance.
textByHashes.7984a66837bbe130a2a4a97e0a21b2c61dd7118c: I am an envoy from the monkeys of Karamja. We wish to propose an alliance.
textByHashes.871de36b440e175d8662708bd78d7d7b0300ae08: Awowogei, please consider my offer carefully.
textByHashes.4525f24806cc24a3a20918da6b8658969d865c18: We offer strength in numbers and our island would serve as a northern platform for defence. All that we ask for in return is peace.
textByHashes.60f0f57c2bd7ef79ddb0827039e2549d02f9923a: How am I meant to free one of them?
textByHashes.1eb69946c31ba52828db07ae454b87ec8b5478a4: Very well. I will be back later, with one of the captives.
textByHashes.931f36d9e1dbb6e5ec16dc72dcfaf5287a355afc: How would you like to get out of here?
textByHashes.80e02fdee135652813f5ba7d3628bee802a2e3a1: That's convenient. When would you like to leave?
textByHashes.fec6ae8e117e2f7a0a642a011ad834b9767d1cbd: Erm ... to the happy, sunny jungle of Karamja...
textByHashes.e02290f780162bc5cd7906489d959c1ed6e3f35f: That's nice. Are you ready to go?
textByHashes.7e12cadef9f9831457adafcc0cfca6615d00a83d: No, I only have space for one.
textByHashes.9cd848267713936b7a60f59e0f618f95f4f146d9: Look, I already said no. If you want to come then jump into my backpack.
textByHashes.9301508631a2bb0e88ec23d69f328fd0878e49f1: I ... er ... I don't know! One minute I was asleep, and the next minute I was here surrounded by monkeys!
textByHashes.b10328ff80bb1f83f11e49b166721838d801edcf: What about the proposed alliance, Awowogei?
textByHashes.b2ad91bf954dc0298eac93451e68ce0fe6bc613f: Who was speaking? What was said?
textByHashes.51411ec5353ea4da7fda5ec57867a87cf46adad1: But you will be teleported straight into whatever trap they have prepared!
textByHashes.dd97e1876b06c7f83de2a2689169f558bd6afe24: But how will I join you?
textByHashes.ee0e5ccb0451dc8bae7b9fea0a55a41214aa6ae4: All I have to do is wear this sigil?
textByHashes.5d5def929524d4cbb32a1b8b7c7c5b4ff3d28382: What kind of enemy do we face?
textByHashes.e1abfac1fc2752b58185d6f43ad4da7521e95ec7: Sergeant Garkor has sent me. You are asked to create another replica of the 10th squad sigil so that I may join you for the final battle.
textByHashes.70fec9a9a8bf6ade3392c6b2fac3e6161a08a994: Rest assured, I will do so. How do I leave this place?
textByHashes.9e9010fa71ba0e98f590e9cb89de40e966896b13: No thank you. Who are you by the way?
textByHashes.84e9a11deb6568ccfc398b82e4f8c92c586a9904: I'll ... keep that in mind, thanks.
textByHashes.777646a99df0160d1e2553ddc53c1ac1075c17e9: With all due respect sir, if I told you, you would not believe me. I expect Sergeant Garkor will be sending you a full report soon enough.
textByHashes.6b0e8f4eed37caebf7036f4603c40185b6782bef: They all live - we suffered no casualties.
textByHashes.1de172aa7e6a3da61edea43f72fe3f718857013d: I, uh, I'm part of the 10th squad now. I even have the sigil.
textByHashes.5fbe22e1429bcc75e4484d442aba45ec379fbee1: Where do I sign up for this?
textByHashes.c9051e2c48fb31f731f98aa71ebaab1e3107cdf7: News travels quickly on this tree. I expect you also know that I am to be enrolled in the Royal Guard training programme.
textByHashes.cebcf199045a33e922a4729fdffe53697d584f9c: I need to return to Crash Island.
textByHashes.5f603f6c00d1f982bb5464ae752425db1fcecc5c: How did you get back in there?
textByHashes.561130ec395ec03e7c979d6a4b46cf9d74f16598: I'll help you look for Glough.
textByHashes.2c894cd36e57863e4bcf039e42fa90cae49e3d4c: Any idea on where to start?
textByHashes.9d9ee5eaacbd30b2dccd59f784a2dbc3de9c7bad: What should I be looking for again?
textByHashes.3085ba7351a1cd284e6809e86f25747a901a32c9: I wonder who could have left this in Glough's home? The initials A.A. are embroidered into it.
textByHashes.a5c052ce93d7c8ddde59f6b5a853237791835154: What do you care? He's seeing someone else!
textByHashes.e0fe9d9bf7d1bd2cbe9804419650d289381c676c: He might be in trouble, I could help.
textByHashes.b4fdc61ad332cd4c3589cb634c7c49beb5dc87cf: There's another level to his home?
textByHashes.6312a2ec898d369b6da7cbadcfffbc7929c254ce: The note is blank... I'm not sure what I'm meant to be reading right now.
textByHashes.52e0f8419f49f4ffd8ec56aefd4892a29b048255: I need to translate this before it's going to be of any use... Maybe the King can help.
textByHashes.2fce72c5c458b69c17230dc3c750d407184c14d2: What could the note mean? I should show it to the King, he might be able to make some sense of it.
textByHashes.ee94e52e7c369f22f725ee21f4433770dbd599f2: I found a note in Glough's home which might be of use.
textByHashes.6114716951e9c6ff681b04e346b4d9e0f62b6446: I don't have a copy of the translation book any more.
textByHashes.e23247ed21b80ec7220c86ca7324ce193fdb9098: There's too much missing from this translation book to make much sense of the note.
textByHashes.63f3fb4890ab66f8d35bd773f42fe598425b60d3: I'll see if the author can help translate the note for me, then.
textByHashes.f06e69d6737d387379729d05e72d092ab8096237: Could you translate these notes? I found them in Glough's home, half of it is missing.
textByHashes.5a19dc75dbd2ca9b3afbce6b30fa5037eecc6419: King Narnode! With Anita's help I was able to translate the note... It appears Glough had help leaving the stronghold!
textByHashes.a1393e5b6f0248df0d1e2a402be66c2eba740c2b: What happened to Assistant Le Smith?
textByHashes.0e7534cb6a98d240b50fb492bfeab0cf6c163a31: I'd like to talk about Assistant Le Smith.
textByHashes.15cbd75f7197edb9ce096da88f4b812ee0e91c64: I need to know about the route you taught him.
textByHashes.99032946c48625e7ae2fd87827c4597e17c6163d: Can you teach me the route?
textByHashes.c3d932014caf32945c89109f44bc2d21e0cb172f: I've found evidence that Glough may have headed to Ape Atoll.
textByHashes.a9bfa641a56ecfce0ebe231df786e6efb5d276ae: Assistant Le Smith is involved, it appears he has flown them there.
textByHashes.6e90ec3fd84849708f8f872c44d9e9880ce68cdd: So, what should we do now?
textByHashes.38f16d1f0172ebb5737e62ada2959320059fc708: King Narnode has sent me. I'm investigating the disappearance of Glough.
textByHashes.ef7902a7433e02ecebad8f382c4ff7790e093318: Any idea what they're up to?
textByHashes.39d3271bd174ee75dc5a4452ec3581ace8d8a638: What are you still doing here?
textByHashes.6748546fd2e6743b0ff040cb1a43fe0ebdd6069f: I'll get to it right away.
textByHashes.68f6993e9e24e9f4fa3ee84d5b72354790ee947f: I'm here to discuss military strategies.
textByHashes.fa151a04383991399dd313275d6c2938e4a0d47f: Garkor isn't going to be happy when I tell him about this...
textByHashes.a0e43c5e37a2fd5506e9d8160c0cf250c3aab98a: I don't take orders from you!
textByHashes.f9a9329d39bf1c0210ab59cd3eeeca7f575698e0: Any idea where I can find Glough?
textByHashes.d75fa5febfb323193a975c22e10dab999b88058f: He won't discuss his plans with anyone but his military commanders.
textByHashes.fc9443592d795b6e0e6938519951647102bee653: Well Awowogei mentioned something about a meeting with Kruk. He wanted me to go to find him.
textByHashes.f1018ef46d2525e485ad88843f904c51341011c6: I'm still working on getting that greegree.
textByHashes.a1feda5fb99d012d1ad43b610c0d24a83d41cbc1: The king has sent me with a message for Kruk, any idea where I can find him?
textByHashes.b7ea866e9e57e14263ce08ed0ccec18124ffa6a1: Any idea where to start looking?
textByHashes.9d5c94ebad2efc3e6096cd550d1a13b8dfed034a: And which plans would we be talking about here?
textByHashes.f0db29d8f16d9f8183597bf2ca7a95f125308148: I'm fine, just been very busy thinking over those plans. Could you remind me where we left off last time?
textByHashes.ea7003b9bb9afcf0e1011abde60ec457f3823deb: The monkeys are planning another attack!
textByHashes.fcfdbf7eadf3aa61cbbae2c11affe5eedf4f9b32: The assault is coming in three stages...
textByHashes.f138486bc173acc157ec4cdc37ad7f062ea74ecb: First, the monkeys wish to join into an alliance with the trolls and ogres...
textByHashes.3d7ec36c809ccf03bd0772ced044697fbc9ee644: The monkeys have been building a fleet of battleships.
textByHashes.d8e2f78dc42885ca0ef24a768484c2be366afd27: Apparently Kruk has been working on a secret weapon, I've got no idea what it is.
textByHashes.ee286ed3b729662d65fb8c7fc9e7035b93966fa9: I know about your deal with the monkeys. I'm here to persuade you not to join their alliance.
textByHashes.9f9c1080e616fef9315305d05039cdac68c7030e: You won't be around to crush anyone when I'm done with you.
textByHashes.0e308ee2914df8bc79c0d4744ed25b194ecb2c3c: What would it take to persuade you not to attack the humans?
textByHashes.982524cf20fc6c6946abaf8dfeb6bc826016926c: I'll just be on my way.
textByHashes.aee376c3b57041cae360fdd366561da2da07ab79: I'm looking for the head of the city guard...
textByHashes.192d2f0979d5c6b99dad02371974089837cbdfd4: Perhaps I could offer you more?
textByHashes.ecb1c6d51ce3e58aa0a9ea7b98572792a48959b8: Um... that's not going to work.
textByHashes.8fd831878de0c70067330a599ac008253c5ba173: I offer to spare your life.
textByHashes.b1a123a90bd92ed922a76cc444b23cba51183a0a: I have convinced the ogres and trolls not to form an alliance with the monkeys.
textByHashes.dd6cb3e233ea5510aad70cbb39e329f564b29f8e: Right. He's the one who flew Glough here...
textByHashes.89ef88987561329cc1fb3c6f3eef96ac7c1c7647: Any idea where I should start looking?
textByHashes.686d6fa49ea986f6862b4370030d6111dd9f491a: That's okay, I am wearing my... uh... amulet of human speak.
textByHashes.ae93f969f03d9c052547a2d7a4aeb958e2f17793: I was going to ask you the same question.
textByHashes.c373591b7bb036c2c1301d154317946e760abbc4: Awowogei has already informed me about the battleships. In fact, he sent me here to check up on your progress.
textByHashes.1c864ad3872f2b590a42fb261dfaddd1067df25b: Where is the fleet? The shipyard still seems pretty bare.
textByHashes.a9732a7190e2b8a0e5d1481bf6e71b3baa4cc6cf: What fleet are you talking about?
textByHashes.20653972f631a840ed0b4b355f8247f7950dd3e0: King Awowogei has sent me to find Glough.
textByHashes.ce7775b76261718d86686fe50d359129112eda97: I was just admiring the view.
textByHashes.802d47fe27684909c9d744b03f4fecbc29a92f4e: Good for you, I'll just be on my way.
textByHashes.7add0e7bac5daaedef63415677267944e0db67e9: Um.. I am a prisoner of war here, Awowogei gets me to run errands.
textByHashes.57fada7b6fdd6d2edbb677027a6ee4044efbcccd: King Narnode has sent me to find Glough.
textByHashes.bec7419dffaad675e79a23f5bd0fc9764577f48a: I've spoken to Assistant Le Smith.
textByHashes.0703a7b002d160e43a76369fd57110caaa22593c: He mentioned something about airships being built off the coast of Ape Atoll.
textByHashes.1abf99e2e9197ad37effcfedbf5f6ff9971d073e: I was just passing through. Goodbye.
textByHashes.fd9615033642da683b756451cb2445be61ed441d: There must be some kind of explosive somewhere on this platform that I can use...
textByHashes.4787321a3909ba58f50fd8d216753b8dc68eeba3: That should be enough, now I just have to get back to the boat...
textByHashes.d559e46c593b478568748babb339e3f36c7fe16a: How do you expect me to find a way through the magical barrier?
textByHashes.2300e5c02d4aa1e3a9cec487e5a6aeca02a8ba67: How big is this army of creatures?
textByHashes.03d45c4472eda7014f2ff097f419873959e25cc8: I should check what effect this has had on the mutagen.
textByHashes.a1081d66d88dfd8af118d61aca84ec0b4bc7b32a: I've taken care of Glough's secret weapon, he was working on some kind of mutagen for apes.
textByHashes.461f814aabe3d77d63f06c85928271275dfdac8b: I'm afraid I have bad news.
textByHashes.2ff0697723388bf4f6c68fd627522794d7fbbbd7: The trolls and ogres have backed out of our alliance...
textByHashes.0a43e463e415360c0aaeefcafafa752a58520f7f: The fleet of battleships will not be ready in time for our attack...
textByHashes.c716a4ef2ec62cfe274e564f5f4a9a16638ae8a3: Unfortunately there have been some complications, the weapon is still too unstable for use on the battlefield.
textByHashes.9e6ef22d32c7dd3e9bd32f43a46dc1c94c8ac401: Yes, and he has called off the attack!
textByHashes.8a8c6a4a0ea8a07f8c1eb8c69f08c82e884e6ab4: I found Glough, he's headed for the Stronghold! We need to evacuate!
textByHashes.df63bfa940b533bd8a59136a5b91b790d1655775: You don't understand, he has an airship and army of demonic experiments!
textByHashes.f71966d844032a3e5559e3b201dfd6ab6a8ce2a1: Glough is leading an attack on the Stronghold with an army of demonic creatures! We need your help!
textByHashes.3b6ac2739ef96e21f423c9103b9710f911889dc9: It's a long story, the king has requested that you join me in assisting the troops with the Stronghold's defence.
textByHashes.69175ad1bed33c9787fdd1c8e499528a20d1bb7e: It's Glough's airship - and it's heading straight for the Grand Tree!
textByHashes.ae237ba568416be6d045ba4327427a7f3adc4275: No problem, I'll finish this once and for all.
textByHashes.eae1dec83e2e99402134a5a3d078d73e20eec286: I'm afraid she didn't make it... It was Glough, he injected himself with the demonic mutagen he had been developing... He was too powerful...
textByHashes.b964e234316112b51d718d14ce1be6954463b15f: He's not a problem any longer.
textByHashes.cd287c93f482b977a8dde685604e51d74e288e51: Glough has been defeated, and his demonic creations are trapped deep within the caverns to the North.
textByHashes.00f309990054d2dc743fc8de79c22121aeb32f40: The monkeys were planning another attack, however, I managed to sabotage their plans.
textByHashes.e5f0b9d9efa72e90d4b67229309306effc0d8e86: I'm afraid she didn't make it.
textByHashes.fa17c9ca3f09c2ecdf4690ee13eeb0073359ae3a: A peace treaty... Do you trust him?
textByHashes.2c3de60059ce80427912b2ddb0985dba0b782360: Why can't you sleep, what's wrong?
textByHashes.8fdbd4e0ea6e688d62b431da3727d18b31ae33e0: I suppose that's what kids do.
textByHashes.74a1cd24bf263d9585c9baa91a19c0317805a1b3: I'm sorry to hear that! I hope you find his blanket.
textByHashes.ce43c037d5084c8067f45f89dcf4c79e9ae41759: Sorry! I'm too busy to hear your problems!
textByHashes.6d1a5e04ad7dc57888ea75dc63d78d121b1899b4: Yes! I've recovered it from the clutches of the evil thieves!
textByHashes.7bb7de864d7794cd83272ce9f51c65d8d53bc69e: I've no time for that, sorry.
textByHashes.c0ec9e9c6cc223214fac4584be465fbc09c899d4: Ok, I'll go and find him.
textByHashes.fc25f4132a5daeb3c7952e7fe80c80bb648f2289: Can I come to the party?
textByHashes.ff3d23aeea7850f72894c56c070df1d56abacaec: Enjoy it! I'll see you soon!
textByHashes.d91cecb2fb36df88bdd32632b4a979eca06cdccd: Brother Omad needs the wine for the party.
textByHashes.f47467f38fb69636ac9c56617d750c66cc9bd80b: I'll see if I can get some.
textByHashes.355ac62dd031e193f643f55a8d1b294e289e5cb9: Yes I've seen him, he's a bit drunk!
textByHashes.e2fcbdc9e050058c8731cb99957e6f9dea0f7736: Cedric! Here, drink! I have some water.
textByHashes.b29d8da71629fa6f1550f5abc86efdae85ca97db: No, I've helped enough monks today!
textByHashes.ba1a2fdc0079054e1688ae16a0bc83165dc0990d: OK, I'll see what I can find.
textByHashes.65debe7982939b61c119cbbd21f6273907a995ad: He's having a bit of trouble with his cart.
textByHashes.ae86659abeecf4e8951b0ceccf3950aa9685d25f: Hi Omad, Brother Cedric is on his way!
textByHashes.2ab0a85649cdee4b3eb8654d60df1c7c5c713a9c: And my name is player name, honourable chieftain.
textByHashes.4fa4508c14e0cee48627ac6078985b675472fee6: And my name is Fremennik name, honourable chieftain.
textByHashes.dc8cc1b211800d8f30204adc5e8b8b904ef2658d: Actually, I'm a Fremennik, not an outerlander.
textByHashes.f461db623119a9618b542e75cd7f6791bff2c53a: That's fascinating, but I'm afraid I have other things to do at the moment.
textByHashes.2c8b80fcb125f05318a0a48be747addd51b5a8eb: Why is everyone being so hostile to me?
textByHashes.256546c4b6e9e78f6d0ba7342d19d8f672bad966: So what are you lot all doing up here in the mountains?
textByHashes.112c9198407aef192d34b63e3991a4bece9400b9: And you haven't even seen what he did to his house!
textByHashes.e6d7bea687f11c81b4a7ca43d6ba200494ffca30: So why are you still here?
textByHashes.b1762c29c48133458a73d357b4fb9f1b0cfbfc6e: A damsel in distress! I will search for her!
textByHashes.0164b5584ed7808ac6b1f76c2f14e71b48bb4545: You don't need to employ me! Just let me look for her.
textByHashes.c1b17366f71b1da22bdba88845475fb1930c7489: Great! I'll be back with her soon. Just wait here.
textByHashes.a6b42683fe4a81e7b191addbb636e01b97621a24: Forget it then, you can figure it out on your own.
textByHashes.4c2adf9c4f30c4d434253802380ec0ed629ae6f6: Oh, I'll stop talking to you then.
textByHashes.736db32014e61a1daab15295356402722e656e9c: I'm looking for a quest! Do you have any for me?
textByHashes.c977dfc6db14eb2a91c55e1e86032bc6c8b5a6c5: Okay, I know the drill, where do I sign up for the trials to join your tribe?
textByHashes.cd9ce3563d80e2e34d572729428b234bfcb8bf3c: Uhm... any idea on where I should start looking for your daughter?
textByHashes.e1c5fdcb428aa3dc3c9a96134e96e31fa7bbff9c: What does your daughter look like?
textByHashes.48ca0e9606dc807947119e1576003bac7cfb6aa5: Hello! I'm trying to help your chieftain here.
textByHashes.4c94a7ce1a927f23df85928c1afd2f9b08a6873c: Hello there! Can you help me?
textByHashes.5a21b2a3ee90e1d647c0b616758fba63df80933b: I think I need some help.
textByHashes.091602454e05713cf2a59996599bfe1cae2fce1e: Can you come and help me? The chieftain's daughter-
textByHashes.8049935df80b2966523423ff39fa1a3e13955398: Doesn't look like you were very successful in the last regard.
textByHashes.81ed90a13f07b9c2d1d3b1a82a1f7f537812cc15: Do you have any idea where the chieftain's daughter is?
textByHashes.ab1d61c471a56a5fc8fd5c00c88c46f1baab370d: Do you have any idea where she might be?
textByHashes.dbbbf90726cd005fe04c8519dc5f28d31fdabaf9: So... do you have any idea where she might be now?
textByHashes.72610303846d318f3ca380d44472da444df6b1b8: But... you don't actually have any idea where she is right at the moment?
textByHashes.630fbc7cd1cf0e076e6a32aa602e28bb0b275a4c: What do you mean, my kind? I'm a Fremennik you know.
textByHashes.115cfbe73d5e6c2174d5801b50dc9a580f5ba227: Okay, okay, you made your point!
textByHashes.d01ac7237cd01b4c3d6d3b5d4d76d5615950e592: I think I'm going mad, I'm starting to hear things.
textByHashes.0ccbf7dbf3ec0e3f315eed7c8ba37f50326ec727: Hello! Who are you? And where for that matter?
textByHashes.52e777848e43e0001a799795c7ff9805698c860d: Well, I suppose that answered both questions then.
textByHashes.5a2a2ae7f9a4765037d51e3236d63b51d21ac338: Wait, you're Asleif? I think I was looking for you! Where are you hiding?
textByHashes.77f7db6a2e9632a264b5c81910cdfa4dc918cead: But I thought you said you were Asleif?
textByHashes.93d2da7c1c1cc134e2670529f8b0b4da714e0376: I think I'd better have a lie down, I'm starting to get a little dizzy.
textByHashes.4f6f63ae659abc22135faedfcc0fe8913ad01bd4: So what exactly do you want from me?
textByHashes.566c1e2c648f1527c149e3c4dd40c37c5287c384: Er, I don't think they like the idea of me helping them.
textByHashes.53c3acd438cfceccae8c329d7423b3b4f13528c1: All right, that sounds like something I can do.
textByHashes.f5b309d3edd6ad884349233d8ef1af7fb11cba84: So let's see, peace with Rellekka, and a new supply of food.'
textByHashes.fac6132be5a30b05f2baed862f1a73707247bb3a: I'm sorry, but I'm not really a farmer. You'll have to find someone else.
textByHashes.b2575695e9a3fcacc23b364e276fd81838b4371e: I'm sorry, but I'm not really a diplomat. You'll have to find someone else.
textByHashes.a8e06a0da02da482bc0f213bb9cfe38d4ad744cd: Don't tell me, there's an anthem involved?
textByHashes.88404512b3b6f628e4ae4d9f6e2f9bf0c79c8e1a: Well... there's something you should know.
textByHashes.0fc749c055e38180e71921767919cccdef0683e4: I didn't actually see her, not as such. But I did talk to her, right there, on that island in the center of the pool.
textByHashes.3adb1f7c7f5f694121b6e079852a0252157d6689: Why do you hate them so much?
textByHashes.0fa9e31ba050c60e2c915b5c1a922c95181af059: But don't you basically believe in the same things?
textByHashes.db68e346cc9b97a296215183385dcec4c47a5751: So you've never considered, say, making peace with them?
textByHashes.869093f2ec5f48160fd554215ff033b1258b6060: Shall I go looking for him as well then?
textByHashes.71315b2318d9528e9fb12871cf95087a6933072d: You're all such a group of petty bickerers! I've only just gone and made peace between Miscellania and Etceteria!
textByHashes.5174b3c14e32561536abc18fa7dbdb0cf5f24570: Don't tell me you're fighting them as well.
textByHashes.8d05c99b4729f612be1353f20f8caaf1fad33c4a: Go on then, go on, tell me, who else split off from your little group of infighting barbarians?
textByHashes.e379cdce903fcaab6055e19a54a9e88b22739cb7: No! Forget it! I didn't really want to hear all that!
textByHashes.dc9db86677698eaaa3e75e0b91dc1ae23ce98aa6: From what I understand you're starting to run out?
textByHashes.e0b5caeffb8387dbc1a726038e8110ad7b336423: Er, I just happened to overhear it.
textByHashes.e453117c421cae45ebef8e8dd43741925da1f983: Can I help you with finding a new supply of food?
textByHashes.de9ad5c85a2ff02268af6950519d200fee1bbf65: Are you, by any chance, Svidi? Sent by Hamal to talk to Brundt and the council of Rellekka?
textByHashes.c41e357b07eca169f7f7b833a029130c799dc574: Yes, but Hamal asked me to rescue you from a Rellekka prison. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.99eec0430ed40edc735123e03697ff22ab163430: Why, can't you find the way?
textByHashes.119aa0f4baf38affc0bfbda1777ce72711ffe38c: Nonsense. I'm an outerlander and I haven't killed you either!
textByHashes.e06fce282924151b1c3e7e56b52ad7f3f0145dce: Aren't you supposed to be a ferocious warrior?
textByHashes.8850b6a2e5d2747b662abbdc1db54904a74d37bc: Can't I persuade you to go in there somehow?
textByHashes.a0fc597145e6c33f5d74801a483da69443ceff4a: Do you want me to go with you as your bodyguard?
textByHashes.8e93be77d1e9dde041b17a86310992602e1285eb: What if I get you some kind of guarantee of safe passage from the village? Will that do?
textByHashes.41724c839748e68faef838373066bb2ac93327c8: Weren't you on your way to Rellekka?
textByHashes.774856aa3bb443d6d7c5ab7adc3e5e5065ac4639: Brundt doesn't want to talk to any representative until your tribe gives back some rock or other.
textByHashes.5de0e5c4c149c506a3328161acde9806a8fccdca: The chieftain from the mountain camp has sent a representative to Rellekka!
textByHashes.19781fa0a99e7cae6140852b010cc36e6363038a: Well, that's the problem, he doesn't dare to come into Rellekka. He's afraid he's going to get hurt.
textByHashes.7a1652bf5df70a0073d11295a5b03dd02e5ae1a7: That's what I thought. He says he wants a guarantee of safety.
textByHashes.b905d23fc53559336bde1bf61112999d9c2d4333: Ancient rock? What did it do?
textByHashes.07949506915db4274530a18d2dc3f46958b19cf8: Did it contain vast magical powers?
textByHashes.cc6ff7bc0aff0d38dcffa6de6685357c82cdbb3a: Did it give the owner unimaginable strength?
textByHashes.d7c197a9cdcf16a524409f070f117bc6b3aed858: Was it the eternal prison of an immortal demon?
textByHashes.d26904a329e76facce63ec1dea7ab8e03cd7a176: Why won't you meet with the representative of the mountain camp?
textByHashes.5136c083f550f6343ad06a903be826d54cc94552: Chieftain Brundt says that he won't meet with Svidi unless you give him back some rock or other.
textByHashes.ab9355ff99d43ea6dfc46e336463a4305fb431d8: So I can't persuade you to part with the rock?
textByHashes.2c9dec6375476d28424ef0b2b2e4fe3dfcb772ff: No, of course not! See? It's a completely different rock, it's much smaller.
textByHashes.a08188fcec64167952bcd61c78698c93356b4c54: I've brought you back your rock!
textByHashes.07503b5a6cce6125bca37ebeb7b87aacfd57d4eb: Well, it's not the whole rock, it's part of the rock...
textByHashes.7a7e059c048295ee218dff83109a63dc52a5adbb: Can I have that guarantee of safe passage, then, to give to the representative?
textByHashes.89361165ca0a84cdcad9948e34261ded0a367c32: Brundt gave me the guarantee of safe passage to give to you!
textByHashes.c4f279bacae545f79d00e27c8bdf5e9cff76c0fe: I did it, I persuaded Brundt to speak to your representative!
textByHashes.81501521df23d594b8eb0737b8512c6aef1ab9fc: Well, yeah, I need to talk to you about that...
textByHashes.56a633bbab8e55eb828c9f86fc61f8593defbc9c: Oops, I completely forgot about that. I'd better hurry back to him.
textByHashes.133040dac3d160a6a4ac1c7dfe25ec4d3401d91e: I'm looking for some bushes that carry White Pearl fruit. Do you know where I can find any?
textByHashes.b5a38f244f9a335275ae548269bfccd12ea2fee5: Well, I'm trying to find a new supply of food for your people. Any ideas on where to start?
textByHashes.1bcf0c5f08225023bdb0bf77e4028321730871da: What's the name of the fruit?
textByHashes.1080933d3659bda6374ff95eea6e70fbd69f8e6e: Any ideas on where to find some?
textByHashes.14c3bd45e01dbcc3d4529600b77bf8f65665f9a0: I'll see what I can find.
textByHashes.afabbd3a07da249234a0cc78a76a94dd4a6f7dea: Where could I find that fruit again?
textByHashes.449e459d506760ec9664f80cc8d4b1dde18a8bf4: Look, I found the White Pearl fruit!
textByHashes.23854ef64ef4111ff2ec3c77fde4c8e68da568fd: Here, I have something that might interest you.
textByHashes.ad09cdf5e85c91dc1ae9326b892cc5490e529da7: It's White Pearl fruit, which grows in even the hardiest circumstances. I found this growing on White Wolf Mountain.
textByHashes.867480a1bf4f2b485e46310a2575ddd49fbb099f: Oops, I hadn't thought of that.
textByHashes.ff689a8f3a0a7e5399528192aadca529e26628ee: I've found this seed that may be of interest to you.
textByHashes.45118ccedd6cb143496e552c93813a9ada3bdbf5: It's the seed of the White Pearl fruit. It grows on White Wolf mountain, even in the snow.
textByHashes.5e6cd2d002a4d2ae6f1f8daff37197467c705d34: With luck, you'll be able to grow it here as well.
textByHashes.f609d6e7aa0a377b4a1b76891f77a07c4e850c51: Ah... well, glad to be of help.
textByHashes.d08f22696a6698d78ce113148ee70f0a8af52e8d: Hamal, I'm sorry, but your daughter is dead.
textByHashes.2ac8fa955c91dfcb1af2235f9fe1c9f26daebb55: Hey, ehm... Asleif spirit thing? Hello?
textByHashes.b0c5bfc8f68b5b5843a00becf3356aee3510f815: I did what you asked me to! I improved the relations between Rellekka and the mountain camp, and I found a new supply of food!
textByHashes.19ee1a6cb772ae5ebc175979a0201f4e964e7865: So do you have any other quests for me, perhaps with some bigger rewards?
textByHashes.0186685d2753505ff2a0c20c123305a664a6585f: How do I do that, exactly? I don't think I'll be able to get him down to this little island.
textByHashes.a19c5455ab43a2d5b3ca2ae1a61312bd6a564213: It's just me, player name, no one special.
textByHashes.c5d488a9db3a8f21c4b4f6d2edcaa580daba0677: It's just me, fremennik name, no one special.
textByHashes.c1d173cdc5ddc6f5b228befef48c158af791fb5a: How... exactly do I do that?
textByHashes.8a3c1b43a858df884055a76766e194feb69f921f: Time to go, see you later!
textByHashes.8562f7e3cd03ce928cda78f7fc10f9027622d5dd: You mean a sacrifice? Are you some kind of god?
textByHashes.b9121bc1b185c9918c56154b711c7beb75f72ebc: I seek your advice, oh great one.
textByHashes.1517cc7f3f5bfbf8176eccdf69a1ef678c69e42b: I seek the cowardly murderer of a young lady of a nearby clan of mountain people. Do you know where I can find this person?
textByHashes.bd3c7a9e996a8b02c097febdebcc9b467f67bd71: You look like you escaped from a fairground!
textByHashes.3012cda9d7b078e3deb5221fffc9c96889b0e068: You look like a man in a bearsuit!
textByHashes.a497781a7d15c28be7c18bd9b66d1c86d0168ce0: I said, you look like a man wearing a bearsuit!
textByHashes.db1d71f3ba0ba6cab1552871754808b7e8a32602: I just said you looked like a man wearing a bearsuit, I didn't know you were!
textByHashes.0bac3ec41690b758c344ea05ceb932d58e575968: So what are you doing here, pretending to be a god?
textByHashes.be6d3416f311a9ba4451fb1e9d777a151f9afeca: And do you leave them alone as well?
textByHashes.a4bb31894f8f3f73e3d9875331a36bdb6525ff2a: Did you kill a young lady, by the lake? Just recently?
textByHashes.9efda3d6f1e7a22c2475a27f7b1718d86bab706e: Oh, never mind then, that can't be the person I'm looking for. I'll be off.
textByHashes.b76574c1f19375d564c948c6919ce7733f4e41c6: Can I see that corpse? I'd like to make sure of something.
textByHashes.e4425e15676fc2093d5c3321d606ac17d03b3d40: Yes, she does match the description I was given, it is her after all!
textByHashes.3028ee4a97af3e4e253612bd3a9883316b561f85: I demand that you hand the body over to me! I must return them to her father!
textByHashes.715bf1d39ed32b2478418241f9d2e560126ff797: I humbly request to be given the remains, so I can return them to her father.
textByHashes.87ba2c03f413d0d884d53c7fa0cdaa2678caf4dc: I think you're completely mad, walking around in your silly bearsuit, killing innocent people!
textByHashes.dd7fc1992cb449afecc7e0c354d33f7c945c2be7: It's player name, of whom many legends are sung.
textByHashes.cf81255069a430a1bb7e1346ffd45cf03733a532: It's fremennik name, of whom many legends are sung.
textByHashes.76c41b7a8bdb5872889829b65bd44c4a7a43a309: Slumber? You didn't seem to be sleeping.
textByHashes.eab925df5264ef24b269457eafc7f7d005e4079a: I found the man who murdered Asleif! He was in a cave just by the pool, but I killed him!
textByHashes.a5d9ee7c6741770abac52852d41d5cf1218dbd7d: But she's been missing for more than ten years!
textByHashes.9be2414f2895875a67cc389ee722a0dc30e85f2e: Look, here, I even have her corpse!
textByHashes.1914db4ff69ef6561d4c463f7cf0eaea4a84ca01: I found him! I found your murderer! It was some bear-like man who called himself the Kendal.
textByHashes.035a98dedfc0caf0671f32a5365e3e1c1902174a: Well, it was actually a guy in a bearsuit. But he's dead now.
textByHashes.97f9063f9180cadfec75462c3bcab7d99e940233: Do you know there is a strange bear like thing in a cave near the pool?
textByHashes.abd9d5df72ceb07db58984e37e1675fd68e7d14f: Only the cave is hidden behind some trees, you see-
textByHashes.dc7a28609463983b8a50b0678af38ece086d63bf: What, you mean you know that already?
textByHashes.dfe493ef214945edaf615a308bdc6f23bfff71cd: He's not a god! He's a man in a bearsuit! And he killed your daughter!
textByHashes.b02eb75873b03a0690823ca33e394457ed58538f: And why didn't you tell me she's been missing for more than ten years?
textByHashes.8af2b139278ec15b8752757c676f49ac6f281a9b: You want proof for everything, don't you? Why don't you just go and have a look?
textByHashes.056eff3456d52f6420ca2a300910c02c3d415360: Well... I've only gone and killed him, haven't I?
textByHashes.9e36e169768b83402ef3c04c1a7223ccf208e64d: Well... I've only gone and killed him, haven't I? I'm even wearing his hat!
textByHashes.f28d2496af7a3c27683f181b347357e703198219: I also found your daughter. The bearman killed her.
textByHashes.d4d52fd0e78267d97d334b165d13b7b9414c4ee6: I didn't bring it with me, I'll go and look for it.
textByHashes.db974435ba4451767b28601df42eb78d7a6fc672: So I need to bury her with one of her possessions, and build a cairn on top made out of rocks. So where do I get another one of her possessions?
textByHashes.d2705ed2c997541526d2e12a0190fa1f57b97edb: I killed the bearman! He really was just a man after all, like I said!
textByHashes.39a8806d8feaa4a50cb3fd5b9bdbb9424cb32383: I need some help with killing this bear thing in the cave. Do you have any warriors to come with me?
textByHashes.32c9f8cdf6c65ee25c7d17e78f81ef9bd7e1739d: Well, Hamal asked me to bury her with some of her possessions. But he doesn't have any anymore.
textByHashes.694e23eda4cc8b69399d37854ba9f3c99ae7e0d7: Do you have anything that may help?
textByHashes.4d7ca6f04ebe8ebb63cbc0426738db0c98d1a803: You've been waiting to give it to her all that time?
textByHashes.2699aaa0714cb77421abadb3e302521db637ab40: But that's ridiculous! Don't you ever go out and have some fun? What is wrong with you people!
textByHashes.92ea9e0fddf558c297fd1f74489793360eea0255: I've already got a marriage lined up, thanks.
textByHashes.c68e8aa5830d022e6fa70a92ee8793c8a0231bc3: I convinced your father about your death. He asked me to give you a proper burial, here on this island.
textByHashes.a19cd31e497df726439c99ac6465d94d755578ce: Well, it's kind of awkward... can you maybe be silent while I bury you?
textByHashes.3da224a06961668f428fd02ff40adc03b86e5c93: Oh, right. Well, I'd better get on with it then.
textByHashes.afd7e5a22ddf9221baea7e352fdf2db96e7e0812: Burying her must have really helped! I should get on with building the cairn on top.
textByHashes.a4e3174287633a04fc837b609f3f536f5bb3ed2b: So what are you all going to do now? Are you finally going to move to another location?
textByHashes.13f6a989607d6a46d6fa5a65d9fbbae0ac998216: Thank you. It wasn't particularly easy to get here, it took some work to convince Islwyn I could be trusted.
textByHashes.170f34dabbb1a85a48622aa733158ae9faab721c: I'm glad you did. I hate the thought that I might still be blindly working for King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth right now.
textByHashes.581225f289aca7d4edd56cf2b9db8d27b42ec83d: I hope so. There's a lot I still don't understand though. Why are King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth working together? Where does the plague fit in?
textByHashes.c389cb6d731d2e911e31df0274b9913da29702a9: Ah, so that explains why the city just looks like an empty field.
