textByHashes.369cef9dec7e14e0b28afb0af80bacd5c84beba9: I know this bit, Baxtorian retreated into his home beneath the waterfall and never came out. I moved Glarial's remains into the waterfall so they could be together.
textByHashes.0c943be17056ff6420311ad6860c555ac4f65c28: I see, it's good to have a bit more understanding. But where does King Lathas come into this?
textByHashes.a232d3c99e7be1f6c7d3893246aa8ebceb78e911: But why? What's in it for Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.6811a0301b68d15a15d5210d6e87ed555221f1ab: So you want me to infiltrate the mourners? How am I supposed to achieve that?
textByHashes.a96351c5fa5c9b3daef481974f44fff732784fbd: Alright, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.630e4395645b86f9f0e2a3281f6d0d37df9a7981: I killed one of those mourners crossing the mountain pass and took their clothes.
textByHashes.723065a884833daa0c11ab1992c56243ac07a3ad: I do have a bit of an issue though. The top has blood on it and the trousers are ripped.
textByHashes.943a3dcd5946b84fd2fe09de48e54617ce8122ab: Do you know any way to remove blood stains?
textByHashes.07cb15376e7b6f51d24f713043d2edda3ffb0d89: Really?!? That sounds like just the thing I need, can I use some?
textByHashes.916f0dbb55d341ea7e6d7beadddcea8f29efdefd: Alright can you tell me where I can buy some?
textByHashes.dbcf182b98f69571e86ae227e29fa11c6585e7f0: I need you to repair some elven clothing as it goes.
textByHashes.afc6e8b1b3d45ccb6d31a83b7bef94b62b31801d: What do you need to mend my trousers?
textByHashes.3195cac9bafcba8eb73fdb0be71791b04be17a1a: I have all I need to mend my trousers.
textByHashes.33691526c2e4347610a662c84e1912911368d737: Yes, but I don't think you can help
textByHashes.ca2522e33c72ce12c787652de20554623c408125: Well I'll be sure to ask if I'm in need of some muscle.
textByHashes.451deead698c0a827871469fd1aa8fb3e67f9406: No, I just wanted to talk to a friendly face.
textByHashes.c1bc90472748296cc4407b59731162371657f39c: Simple enough, you want me to give a blue rinse to a load of old sheep?
textByHashes.2cb1c6a00df3c2fad56baf808696e3ede00dfe5a: That sounds a little more tricky. How did you do it before?
textByHashes.fe4b3172f3ecc4823014240ce21872b44e11195b: Can I take a look at it?
textByHashes.b718e1c6b9157b35ec1dbe03efb1652b1ff26fe6: No, I'm sorry I lost the gnomic device and the key.
textByHashes.93393639d94597a1b2efdb28fef158cbd1e29e99: Not yet, I lost the gnomic device.
textByHashes.100c7abd31204315d924d0228d6ba31d6d7ef2d8: I'm sorry but I lost the key.
textByHashes.8775f0d9fd902eaec66824e982bf15198d7cb319: Hello, will you help me fix this... err... thing?
textByHashes.15e478ad0c852ddfe106f5bfdfe7cdf56c0f27b2: Have they tried... err... Stretching your eyelids yet?
textByHashes.b54b7f772c9326729e30911942cb6e051276d7d3: How about... feeding you nail and prune stew?
textByHashes.6c980828cb2c58f23206c03d380f99dea456ae35: Set fire to your nostril hair? Let rabid rabbits nibble your toes? Given you a twisted arm?
textByHashes.44259025a53c96bd7bc41db2d02aa4f801219440: Alright I get the picture. What will work then?
textByHashes.528af6b3852627751d49298bd966b6bd2cec271d: Err... But you just told me?!?
textByHashes.34ee998405084e66c35fea10f773fd1a169c2523: You said about going to the park and playing gnomeball.
textByHashes.ea39387c32bffd5a78c86e7f73b3edd009350b85: You said about toad crunchies and a gnome ball.
textByHashes.e76ecff392dea976d1a01a81bee8f82d5edacf2e: You said about toad crunchies and being tickled.
textByHashes.de082d4ab0e04d352caf48c498e489e1242e0353: You're not fooling me... So you'll help me in exchange for toad crunchies?
textByHashes.4127c99c600a2412e00b91a4f7a691e15d8665b3: You will tell me, sooner or later.
textByHashes.67c5efcf15c3f2ab652d9b80c0f1ce0a5aa96f2c: You said about being tickled and a gnome ball.
textByHashes.11bcef8d528e1cd8412fd49f8afa7af2e6b08836: You said about being tickled and going to the park.
textByHashes.5eaf509bfdac5408c06f5f47bd37aa31a4119e5f: Now will you help me or would you prefer it if I tickle your feet?
textByHashes.b6a4f5e516c5b3590ed5f9f201a8b870d3376e90: I have all of that here.
textByHashes.52ca5d27774ac1fbb863f55935ee4019a3b7857d: I still need some soft leather.
textByHashes.dfd3497bfbbdf71def2243f32508330e93eada9e: I still need some magic logs.
textByHashes.e254c6bff3388689fbfb755c51c85138375d530a: Now will you help me or do I have to tickle your feet some more?
textByHashes.da57e146f038038fd65fc6352f733a278470f264: That's all well and good but I'm enjoying doing it.
textByHashes.298f927672d4e28f3223898c2de615150ce496e2: I need to let him up if he's to fix this advice.
textByHashes.f8b5b6bcfb49314b14bec2b6f06c5749772fe763: Do you know where I can get the dye parcels for his thing?
textByHashes.f3e7c64b732bb6aa76c378191b8d36b4562ae8dc: You make a fair point. Where do I find the toads?
textByHashes.213b6140f4d471ee3d4219820ccbca21c6301529: Ah yes, I've used them to catch chompy birds before. I have some bellows right here as well.
textByHashes.061b2c999855168c228ad080ee4f075049a2d655: Could you remind me where I can get the dye parcels for this thing?
textByHashes.ab3fdd72538ec3ddb1bc05de5530e6a9de1abdbd: Thanks for the reminder. I have some bellows right here that I can use.
textByHashes.db3145f6b419c2555c367f97812523a29e0e9079: He did. Turns out he was lying to me though.
textByHashes.22acd77a149d9ba4e25fcb5ee6592b8539d22022: About his loyalty. It seems the plague is part of some evil plan of his. I still don't know what that is though.
textByHashes.0a6b5057ea5748be2b6567ef19b09afc171ec1b0: Not yet. I still need to work out exactly what's going on. I have some new allies who might help me with that though.
textByHashes.41b17067a7e97b4c9f895af73d78e9e7636928e9: I'll be careful Elena. I promise.
textByHashes.7cb0817880521e1a9513e3f69d8109fdcf67c146: Sorry, didn't mean to scare you.
textByHashes.5b5978d93bb820ddfd0124ed4087a0ab33ec09e9: I'll look after myself Elena. I promise.
textByHashes.1a2b683f8107d27bef24b075b288943da468cdb6: Alright, I've managed to infiltrate the mourners. I just have to find out what they are up to now.
textByHashes.e679adc7fd2a1b75a02f2e45869029747aef0dc5: Yes, it is done. What next?
textByHashes.3e4ea0c39a153cc414a1d23949f06a016c780d1c: Err... But the plague doesn't exist, how am I meant to do that?
textByHashes.ac0429b923363deb3330877615c11b40cb1e4a0a: Let me get this clear, you want me to find out who poisoned you, find out what they poisoned you with, find out how to make the poison and produce enough poison to affect a lot of people?
textByHashes.971176d360cb23e9ee89737ddd30f8fe4ff23a72: How am I meant to do all of that?
textByHashes.25fdb17bd16dfbe99596bf9c073f5292994196a6: Luckily for me I know a biologist nearby.
textByHashes.be28f88cb148ae529477ac2694727fe1827c2a5f: As it goes, yes I have. It's a long story.
textByHashes.10fc8d157050f69722b36bcb851965f068bd3db0: Well I'll start from when we found out that the plague was a hoax. When I confronted the king, he told me that he faked the plague to keep people safe from his brother, King Tyras. He said that Tyras was taken by the Dark Lord while exploring the lands to the west. He claimed that the Dark Lord corrupted him by forcing him to drink from the Chalice of Eternity.
textByHashes.4083bb5a8543dc2cdade2ed99d0c8f751f1119a4: Indeed, but I didn't find out until much later. On the kings orders, I travelled through the Underground Pass and into the western lands of Tirannwn. Once there, I met up with Lord Iorwerth, the leader of some elves that had allied with the king. He helped me kill King Tyras. That was when I discovered the truth. While returning to King Lathas, I was confronted by another elf named Arianwyn, the leader of a group of rebel elves opposing Lord Iorwerth. At the time, I was carrying a letter from Lord Iorwerth to King Lathas. Arianwyn magically broke the seal on the letter so I could read it.
textByHashes.c4f7b114a34c5863cf542e884d0667b6ba3f4ee9: It revealed that it's actually King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth who serve the Dark Lord. According to the letter, King Lathas wants to reclaim Camelot from King Arthur and believes the Dark Lord can help him.
textByHashes.a77130f4d668eaf05da62d7258e34a5a3e5792d9: I'm not exactly sure yet. West Ardougne seems to be key to his plans though. I met with Arianwyn who revealed to me that the mourners are actually elves in service to Lord Iorwerth. I've infiltrated the mourners and I'm trying to work out what they are doing. From what I've learnt so far, there's something important to them in the caves below West Ardougne. I'm currently working with them to earn their trust. Hopefully they'll reveal their plans to me soon.
textByHashes.1a127e204acd56e74705f08e483daa85a87c9340: Well, I was hoping you could help me with something.
textByHashes.2f9f2c0f420a768d0f25acd6431dbc4a2158715b: I've been asked to produce a poison based on rotten apples.
textByHashes.4b96649db412f1d72e1b2058501653405a62f816: Well I put a rotten apple in the Mourners' stew, I'm told that the effect was much like the symptoms of the plague.
textByHashes.5082a8fb1068d052c719a28436c5cb0d8255a059: I need to poison a large food supply in order to get the Mourners' trust.
textByHashes.970d3ee2834d76a2a563cb148db1656a5351588c: If I don't gain the trust of the Mourners, then the people of West Ardougne will have a much worse time than the effects of that toxin. Elena trust me.
textByHashes.621264d1da0c69dcbb71b348e07838c7ca653e91: Alright I'll be back shortly with a rotten apple for you.
textByHashes.e080c6614eb2240a29be6cf8c94feb9d918a6981: No, I forgot to get one.
textByHashes.c30d62acf58faeecaeaf50fe6daa46af253ab69f: Yes I have it right here.
textByHashes.f30683b23eacb59ea29146a1a1092129d2e3a7a7: Well I was instructed to contaminate two of the three supply points in West Ardougne.
textByHashes.8a53e8ee37e6869e312a6d17f881f330a243466e: This is starting to sound a little tricky, can't you make it for me?
textByHashes.1298780d918873cb9ae2f62f4d5b2e76a0e14334: Alright then, tell me the process and I'll get started.
textByHashes.e4d56748d5f0a33ae0beee58f3218d0c938a4b8b: Ah yes, I've worked with naphtha before. The chemist in Rimmington helped me make it from coal tar.
textByHashes.61dda20fe6dcb8e11b6316a1c832d971994f9cd0: And that's all is it? Why isn't anything ever easy?
textByHashes.13e2682bcf7ae859eb2ea497be8d8824703c4289: Not too well, can you remind me how I should make it again?
textByHashes.101d1b618ec95929c1d540c4e5c245bd4f114172: I was just on my way back there.
textByHashes.0ee7fe489bf9da63d4521c679a347a8d2ad13c93: Nothing I'm just talking to people randomly in case it helps.
textByHashes.506b7163baf578ad27756a023e27f4261c6a88a8: The epidemic? Oh, you mean the poisoning?
textByHashes.c0074e5eaaf74a9f2310dc7bf2f875864a5a8b51: So have I proved my commitment now?
textByHashes.35da0e70f9f96e99f1bd5880ac252a7d6018481a: I see. But how close are we to finding it ?
textByHashes.1cc42716b205128a104030e3fc44a073b3308d1d: Do you have the key to the mines yet?
textByHashes.e92ff4d3321ad364ca36b7f9ecda487f99300407: Alright, I'll report in again later.
textByHashes.271afaa691f773c1acc56d0cefd9b844e68fe2df: Apparently they are trying to find an old temple deep under the city. That's what their mining operation is for. The temple seems to be the key to their plans. It apparently holds a great power. I still have no idea what that is yet though.
textByHashes.0e3dbc783357da055ee65a1fdffdc774b719f771: I think I have the information you're after. It seems Iorwerth elves are searching for an ancient temple of some sort deep beneath West Ardougne.
textByHashes.7583d08645fb8d2c3a1e80d3feae4bf3d930992b: Temple of Light? What's the Temple of Light?
textByHashes.9dd78f514ffbc2832e3550ebc11b5e66b8933217: I don't think they've found this temple yet, but they know it's down there.
textByHashes.2cf34d4864ebddc00c8ad8e9b18f0f706a88011f: So what are we going to do about the Temple of Light?
textByHashes.9705ec92b732fd30ea5de394a775aef0850b8b20: Hello Arianwyn. What are we going to do about the Temple of Light?
textByHashes.462df77b097284a6d969191bb1fa6c8a7fa98784: Do you have the key to the excavation site yet?
textByHashes.d278f0e219a4afc32e068ea0491e91f3313fa98d: That's useful. I'm always losing keys.
textByHashes.074db612e8a7811ca19131f92c3b1594ed70ddd3: So... You mentioned a task you had for me, something to do with the mines?
textByHashes.37c57a528689b55b5e8b026c5cd6a8f64b908059: Well this looks like the dig team, and it seems they managed to find the temple. I'd better let Arianwyn know before the Mourners find out.
textByHashes.f61f0fc80002dd5b8463cb09df143ba268421bed: I think I have found the entrance to the temple. It looks like one of the dig crews discovered it. They were killed by some strange shadows though, so the other mourners don't know about it yet.
textByHashes.a3be35e9508a16a4c4d502dc505f5abacab7a1c3: You think he means to use it to summon the Dark Lord?
textByHashes.511effe1d5e0722ec1e1f0921a42742dd7765dd4: Thanks, I found it on the top floor of the temple.
textByHashes.d0ee6a71c7f6baaf5f4a3f8ee721974d7c0e7e09: I have the new crystal, now what am I meant to do with it?
textByHashes.12a2454ffef2c8dc71bc69741e19c4e0853fe8b4: This is starting to sound hard.
textByHashes.52e9bfa37db7352e3f21b4bf85c3f6cc883f9023: Right then, I'll get to it.
textByHashes.72877fcdc2c938e7b55f2ad364e6982050868a3f: Funny, I was just going to ask you the same thing.
textByHashes.018b221aad2edfe09b74e055629ca6b951235cc3: Well I battled my way through hordes of shadows, whilst trying to solve a huge maze that I had to bounce a light beam around. Now your turn.
textByHashes.e4abbb035bd03fc37aaa3b2233f905b92970fce4: You mean there's an easy way?
textByHashes.9851f70dfa566d714ca80e459448d727728d2ed1: Hang on, this sounds familiar. Is the name of one of your companions Klank?
textByHashes.4bd656fc24832761e133e95b93f17418749a9631: He's a friend of mine, he made me a great pair of gauntlets.
textByHashes.b44e17f28d3db7b50c9c8f608e1e8b3d4f737750: That's right. How did you know that?
textByHashes.99174431d0ba42535e1638e4f333699ad0a265db: Right I'd better get started, see you soon.
textByHashes.cc8ae6e596848adc25a00c9287bf20b3da0070f5: I've got some of them with me.
textByHashes.cf90fe7d8f84328ffc445fb6c5e25342bd87634e: Good news Arianwyn, I've repaired the safeguards on the Temple of Light.
textByHashes.0016ee0440dabcdb9f7b491ab1c0b9a2e33dcf24: Erm... not quite. It seems some dwarves have managed to tunnel through to the back of the temple.
textByHashes.d1c9387d4ffeea71c9fac5df9841dd5c1a73d1e6: Yes. They've set up an outpost in the Underground Pass.
textByHashes.9794d9974a7d056d888332784ba2cdc1ad57d6d5: What should I be doing to help?
textByHashes.cf6a48c825038c273fa69f99ab987ac2049d7dc6: You should do your own dirty work.
textByHashes.bf31054c735bcd00ce65cbe8e6337144b22cf96e: It was one of the servants!
textByHashes.0d1730188d397cd282137038b55eba21df9687dd: It was one of the women
textByHashes.94badc99199389ce9c7d0e77ab69d1cf23d4f08d: It was one of the men...
textByHashes.7619ca7c70c6ae07543324e7f7d92cbbffd92653: It was one of his family!
textByHashes.6e6abf41d61c88ba339a64a0ee53a61fa9675965: It was one of the women...
textByHashes.94a144bfc1aecb4a04b4f391a09e03f7ed1ef955: I'm here to help the guards with their investigation.
textByHashes.4037ced2121a82c79c832ff5d36fad6080a6f230: Who do you think was responsible?
textByHashes.2dab12b6d07361c11022d38a2dc1d0a09ae022d6: Well, I don't think it was.
textByHashes.905bca1c85d7110b37499735f54abfdfd6c987da: Where were you when the murder happened?
textByHashes.939a5b084d583bc958e204fc4803d2c6576de7df: And can anyone vouch for that?
textByHashes.fd39d643e7e4018fca09cbd176a6cd2a06d3f583: Care to be any more specific?
textByHashes.f2abc4c9c0ef79fa8ffd973bbaaed13e609f500e: Who do you think is responsible?
textByHashes.94fb07b4ffedae8e97f39d980ff00987a375fa6e: Where were you at the time of the murder?
textByHashes.481309aea5f9df00711161a83b2c9ab6ab59de48: Did you hear any suspicious noises at all?
textByHashes.229209bf6619b435a74cfd6a7838d194eb5093aa: So you didn't hear any sounds of a struggle or any barking from the guard dog next to his study window?
textByHashes.b2cfca7371500d4f1a7b55411f6aae09d8d896e4: I'm investigating the murder up at the Sinclair place.
textByHashes.6f678f97b7de9eded9915df9d7954a4cc0290249: What can you tell me about the Sinclairs?
textByHashes.e5ab0ffb3be5038f178b41941c58ebf58ed48369: His children? They have something to gain by his death?
textByHashes.8e5a6bcd8edfa8fe7467ec1ee9f8a01761ac747b: Why do the Sinclairs live so far from town?
textByHashes.3e8257a1cc9a4d0bc53c5bf8704018e5c7253ae4: What can you tell me about his sons?
textByHashes.a6ad58f4d884538778598c5a5720b1172c690c9e: What can you tell me about his daughters?
textByHashes.43717ca2d46cc255ea01bb0f6fde4ea53f3bcc5c: I think the butler did it.
textByHashes.4541b4f35266a45b72224dbe653d2b04145d924c: I am so confused about who did it...
textByHashes.7a2f066188e5d18dfc335c6b7466623d1dc3afb0: Think you could give me any hints?
textByHashes.d7463bb35797b43f6d597ecb40078b9ee41c0e0d: Any sounds of a struggle with Lord Sinclair?
textByHashes.da2f71f5724f7a4ac1296699ad53cfd4dc4e859c: How about the guard dog barking at all?
textByHashes.1995e1f8a2e1ab440bb0e83795ca84d191651e15: Any sounds of a struggle with an intruder for example?
textByHashes.51d5c02a6572edb5ba9a066311fb3308351edebb: How about the guard dog barking at an intruder?
textByHashes.49c1c9d097d60e8045bed77bade0730bddc46733: No sounds of a struggle then?
textByHashes.96c4fc502d65d64706a44e81401ed44eedb36411: How about the guard dog barking?
textByHashes.a4357bcd4d6d6a79983ad920f6f7bc9442735fc9: So no sounds of a struggle between Lord Sinclair and an intruder?
textByHashes.dbc2c627ab6e6d5401d17971c793526f6cf25a1e: I'm investigating the murder at the Sinclair house.
textByHashes.c562b7544235fcc9f2342d6149ae73d4fcefce41: Who did you sell Poison to at the house?
textByHashes.d85f7febb60a3a89f3b53df5b411682840f80170: I have this pot I found at the murder scene...
textByHashes.f555a40d44c1c62f660edc0279c5798979e5476d: Perhaps someone else put it in his wine?
textByHashes.73ba9ffc6ae24d7ce35ba8e2b8a631373bad3529: Why'd you buy poison the other day?
textByHashes.46767e2b1f8a71b62c805226943735a83528888e: Do you know why so much poison was bought recently?
textByHashes.ac78c56ba200378e604fcfbd0f480fa7dfed19da: I have proof that it wasn't any of the servants!
textByHashes.cea87ccfc660721bd559e0866379b72619a07045: All the servants dress in black so it couldn't have been one of them.
textByHashes.0a9a2c01635583cbedc4642b319631955a34e3ba: I have proof that Anna is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.de0f5257b622a481a2bcd019541cec9737413ab0: I have proof that Bob is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.ab727e49e1a72e3aa974c351baddb3988798b511: I have proof that Carol is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.83931e002fbc8888b8ed5c8c0c2e34774beb8f53: I have proof that David is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.b014920f64eba32926493e0e3908b28b64b40b72: I have proof that Elizabeth is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.ba2d6cc9e0e7844aa84c13dcae89cc369ef76769: I have proof that Frank is lying about the poison.
textByHashes.80e12401e3059dbfb0f4ac33658bfe410eacd612: I have the finger prints of the culprit!
textByHashes.b5a1062216315301ad462df73b6df2b5b596fecd: I have Anna's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.9dea2e61040427cf90d67e60708a2b715e63a78f: I have Bob's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.5858dcf4934e7a6a6f6fde9ced82e7323089bd1d: I have Carol's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.fd7b2bc47b6a9c05774a09334ff6711a43752b73: I have David's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.e75cbc9ab90519011f8fe6a0645c7eb7c4b5bd7f: I have Elizabeth's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.8b19c312e0dc0b40899b7e8543d0bcb5852c54ea: I have Frank's finger prints here. You can see for yourself they match the finger prints on the murder weapon exactly.
textByHashes.3af9fc7ace8ad61efe3b2b6f7e1dfdd1dc5fbf82: I have conclusive proof who the killer was.
textByHashes.32910360b7327e0245ec6a5cce2bdb65c6b02ac7: I don't think it was an intruder, and I don't think Lord Sinclair was killed by being stabbed.
textByHashes.dd1248315f6627cebde1ef850f1f480dfb4bd1ce: Nobody heard the guard dog barking, which it would have if it had been an intruder who was responsible.
textByHashes.1127ec25b298acecea57a63e49d4bc0320f0831c: Nobody heard any signs of a struggle either. I think the knife was there to throw suspicion away from the real culprit.
textByHashes.6a40370d8cf0971055361814fe80b1b0a713364f: Is there anything else I can do?
textByHashes.dfc7956b1805519b41518fe831e4db19c39d0fe1: I probably won't feel happy for knowing the answer to this, but why have you been thinking about me?
textByHashes.8afcdf7e1e047e59573ba6383451c8fc6fca5cad: Yes, you told me trolls had picked it all until there wasn't any left.
textByHashes.2f8de737c9093d20a447d015af621b4dfd9ee08f: Oh? How did you hear that?
textByHashes.c34fa60c104b58cfb3805c62e364409080076ce5: You killed that poor chap! What had he ever done to you?
textByHashes.4a62ae245e7d817dcd1955ce4ab3bd49c21dfbc1: Anyway, why did you tell me about all that?
textByHashes.b5b2af401f4c1bed70400084c2ea8d611a6b032e: You want to become a farmer?
textByHashes.6e17a8253970c5a2c8ba08c5daa3e55663a57eea: Alright, enough! What do you want me to do for this Arm person?
textByHashes.a1c5c3d80ab6f863fb5bd95bc0ddd54ed609390c: Look, you're a vicious monster who eats innocent people! Why should I ever help you again?
textByHashes.a7b75cbc483e1fb78f417c860b22285f85f348cb: Can I have all that dragon stuff as my reward?
textByHashes.caa04daa6d12bbadc14be2d2bcebda8571001145: When you were telling me about the man you cooked who talked about goutweed, there was loads of valuable stuff on the floor. Can I have it? PLEASE!
textByHashes.b714fd62e6d86d63cc19d62078b2f16ba93eb1da: Gah! You're worse than the old man who wouldn't give me his hat!
textByHashes.24f5cf5198e81fa687948aa1e01c08d8dc2c88f1: Alright, I'll lend him a hand. But you'd better keep that promise about not cooking any more people!
textByHashes.683844f5c45853cba04a25212d18560a97bacf84: You're disgusting! I'm not helping you again.
textByHashes.16d5c457e2f8c7540c9a6945fa055b88e41fc9ef: You were about to tell me about some job...
textByHashes.1d0e3baea7a3e20fe2da430d0d2a58c72a010778: Right, you told me the only goutweed anywhere in the world was in your storage room.
textByHashes.4a047704a0e2886222529efaf54450595c688b64: Before I start helping you with the whole farming thing, could you just explain why you're called My Arm?
textByHashes.ff5bb39a82771ce36380efb50094adfc9159f147: Okay, so what did you try to eat?
textByHashes.4a9533981dace4e7a43b7881b1e9bdcb85478b1b: And no one thinks it's a silly name?
textByHashes.3f75094b21233f3be132ee8ffefffd1de52de4aa: Alright, My Arm (snicker snicker), tell me about it.
textByHashes.5f3cc2697d530ff4bc3b84ea5ca4dc1f9e56d531: So what do we do about it?
textByHashes.8502f47f9ac3da71c46081af619bacd8f2213510: There's no need for that. I already have a tuber. Do you want to see it?
textByHashes.9530d4400c15f3c3073c49e351a5bcb2656d3aac: But there's no point in worrying about some weird lump on Death Plateau when I've got a tuber.
textByHashes.406b6319aa54b3615ad8676fbbd97c5ae5017d81: Why do I need to go there? Can't I just get you a proper gout tuber?
textByHashes.88b33ec7fd105d2a515bc463e5e28bd939004e7f: No! Just tell me what it was you wanted.
textByHashes.0fd22d2c59870e3f6a0592c206f505eb36b3c364: Oh yes, how could I forget?
textByHashes.924a8e744d64121b3b82c4d91f864d017ad4e133: He wants me to fetch something from a cauldron on Death Plateau.
textByHashes.019544ec11792d27f113594bef3fd8dc1f199942: I am a navigational genius; I'll be fine.
textByHashes.18c23654fe195b6cc1cee7a80ff7f95e324714e8: This place is a maze - got any advice?
textByHashes.d3e5a14f36c4e0728c79604409f76422d6b38acc: A prison where you keep meat fresh?
textByHashes.aae940039b4a7184749cf5121ffa14c46d13e531: Okay, so I've gone northwards up the corridor, down the stairs, then southwards through the prison.
textByHashes.9bac63b2b763e3358961501ef0ceb130bc50157c: How do I get to Death Plateau if I can't climb the rocks?
textByHashes.bcaf9bd8ff3d38281690cd058423288aaff3899e: Thanks, you've been remarkably helpful, considering that you're a horrible monster who eats innocent people.
textByHashes.ef5a7a4184f2bdc873a0dc9cb4d9246669261c5f: So far he's had me go to Death Plateau to fetch a weird lump from the cauldron there.
textByHashes.ded10116b397dede39e23fe153d792886f8a1c45: Yes, I have it. Here, take the thing.
textByHashes.c52cdfaba78a02e69eb49fc7a23474f698266545: Alright. Where do you need me to start?
textByHashes.2084cebabab831f6ec65f0a281de1261368ee1a5: And none of those things grew?
textByHashes.a94cafdfad16b4ae3eeb2dc7b6e25f669d9efbd8: So did you try getting help from someone who knows about farming?
textByHashes.1e91ef3a0d04a66fc6987b7786783556e33c1788: You're not very clever, are you?
textByHashes.8fbf3adbef004fd8baa3a80b6fd5573896d698e3: Oh, nothing. Maybe I should see where you've been doing all this farming?
textByHashes.d47b9036114caca21d8c3c55116a830137f2934a: So far he's had me fetch some kind of lump from a pot on Death Plateau. I can't imagine what he'll want next.
textByHashes.c696ab65ee6b0edd353a8d7a14cb72af6a933202: It's a bit windy up here.
textByHashes.3af2ad664ebe2603538bb5e80492a421826bda37: So you think you could grow things here?
textByHashes.3e079870e75d68ee279ac86bc74fe27915719901: Where in the world did YOU get a book?
textByHashes.c407ec4c0841915f1255b1a08d5833f66aea7297: Alright, I'll have a look inside.
textByHashes.f4295ecb3c2c4ff8af36485a9568421062939fa9: Of course I can read it! Just give me a moment.
textByHashes.a7d76368f8a9be636ee8a13a67f88cc3f6c75112: No thanks, that won't be necessary.
textByHashes.b5f82448323f108172b5eb933eb2e76a7ffe30b2: Of course; I've been reading it.
textByHashes.1c2cbadb67723d5c2a92cd07e6a45b717f5371b7: There's a useful section about preparing soil for growing crops. For a mountain area, it says we need to mix three buckets of camel dung and seven buckets of supercompost into the soil.
textByHashes.b7af78de4d6d4643e3ef1dfa679d412a937a13e0: Fortunately, I've got enough dung with me.
textByHashes.3c3ceb6a79394b607e7af54a4310d1a06a909883: Have you any dung in the Stronghold I could use?
textByHashes.be468037d8afd2edfd461ef485c46b67ffa63602: How handy - I've got an amulet that lets me talk to camels.
textByHashes.e1a46d07df79746208a4e57bff05da5b06730d6e: How handy - I'm already carrying my Camulet.
textByHashes.565c94b88bb47ac92124f578ebcb684d81140b4a: Okay, I guess it's time for me to dig that old Camulet out of the bank.
textByHashes.0b8b2fcd8164064fd9e650a723be1c05ebf47f01: If only I still had that Camulet I got in that weird temple in the desert...
textByHashes.f8850fd748640371deb5a6a1c2247fd13e3e54b9: Of course, it'd be silly for me to ask a camel. I can't talk to camels. But I do remember getting some camel dung before, in some desert town once...
textByHashes.500c4aebbe3f45144e729bc44d516ef20392c471: No, not yet. I'm working on it.
textByHashes.77c3775eed8c76434841fdb60e1ea76e0c154022: I need a spade to dig the supercompost in properly.
textByHashes.ad783f17558ad40b6b2a3c18d2ab70ff6800babd: I'm not mixing dung into the soil with my hands! I need a spade to dig it in properly.
textByHashes.fac9fd9d76499a30943c331d33521ed9254b7720: Unfortunately the book definitely said SUPERcompost.
textByHashes.c78a8a035f1c708893745d7ac8a580940d2256ef: I don't think that's going to help just now.
textByHashes.034a1613b5d12573e145f096d3e2936a3690cdd5: I don't think it'll need any more supercompost.
textByHashes.3990e71d7bfe2121cf28ee4653e635e649fae8c2: I think I've given it enough dung already.
textByHashes.877dd0b9d081e331c154c729d49cb3895a846dfb: My Arm can tend the patch himself. I'm not growing the goutweed for him.
textByHashes.e42125c8b7d8e8f55a00d3cc28d1351b8c380acc: I've finished treating that soil patch for you.
textByHashes.80dec639406ecfeb8f0100b22612e5b05c906e4e: So what do we need to do now?
textByHashes.5f509f4eb41d02f3e9a714581db9402ec62e754a: We don't need to go there. I've got a gout tuber.
textByHashes.5f4f3f280773f3b392d505455a7d3e10ffd768b4: You really need to be more flexible.
textByHashes.3a326fe25d63c7ace80bb747b1d42b132765c284: It's a long way to Tai Bwo Wannai Village. We're going to need a boat...
textByHashes.998704702397e7e251a176a06af58a63e318495e: That is My Arm. We'd like to go to Karamja.
textByHashes.647fd6b1cae90bc62918ecae610bb60ea0ad2821: He's a troll. His name is My Arm.
textByHashes.dd0d808b0c039178db8fc5b0fc79662bc0e5d566: Never mind that now, we just want to go to Karamja. Can you take us?
textByHashes.d1b03cf2eb8399a5aa0a2fe20227e61629adbebe: Will you take us to Karamja?
textByHashes.fc1884877a81a27bfc6379d16406588a8af4f3ee: Either you can take us to Karamja, or you can discuss it with My Arm.
textByHashes.c40e1923ee475483ba770c3c19b49e3d55f69794: What's wrong with your ar... What's wrong with you?
textByHashes.d3908fb2120cd2a76e5af980324c8759b287dea5: Um... can't think of any just now.
textByHashes.9fdbb0e8d8866bb62f6d97997c206eb1aa7f0e4c: I'm sure I've met some trolls that lived in the sea. There's a Fishing Colony up in the north-west.
textByHashes.a0294ddadbece63439638d80beedaafcd768eebb: Aren't there... river trolls and sea trolls and things? They seem happy enough in the sea.
textByHashes.546347383294a818524407b789c0d477be149133: But they look just like land trolls!
textByHashes.ae6112d0b8a7d881f90a33592bd08c1411658a19: Oh, he's gone. I hope he knows the way to Tai Bwo Wannai Village.
textByHashes.72a55ffb0c460f0e18641f6a8d1ab472ae0a2861: I think I'll come back another time.
textByHashes.85eba63d607a214136ad009bfff8f8b1d561e466: Oh, he'll be fine just standing here.
textByHashes.35667bfd494de95bb501f3c8434936a8f76bdc52: I have to ask Captain Barnaby to let us onto his ship.
textByHashes.1399c6d4d229e96275c874be9eef0aceb1e0c352: Yes, that's right. I've been here before when the villagers thought their village was cursed. I had to fetch some special herbs for their shaman.
textByHashes.9f062bb74c2ed2725d6d1d37e1b30659dd3ba30e: I usually get something. Except that time when Burntmeat made me fetch him a 'tasty human' for his stew. All he gave me was some burnt meat.
textByHashes.def3fdfcc2db034250ee16e00c0efff6c073d516: Believe it or not, I didn't like it at all.
textByHashes.c400ccc486488b8d88332676fcc99f035e03285b: Have you seen My Arm around here?
textByHashes.3d5bccb2c954e990b0f8a6e4673a62ec65a24831: What? Oh, forget I said that! Have you seen a troll around here?
textByHashes.ece690efee6b61de5d5bac0995d06d7ee6061522: Dratted creature - where can he be? He was meant to be coming here.
textByHashes.e3e6ba9509dfbb2c116b0825fa68e322669b17cd: Let's see... I saw him in Brimhaven, but he ran off. He was coming this way to your village.
textByHashes.a7b20e7982c2b2b61de8f82d1d399b8baaae1cab: A troll called My Arm wants a favour from you. He wants to grow goutweed and he thinks you can help.
textByHashes.233a2b521194bdedf1a8f3b65fba91fbf6c5c215: I really don't want to discuss it. Can you help this creature grow goutweed?
textByHashes.f9bfac90f763a0849d9d80055e3ea0907f33e596: No, the silly troll won't listen. He had me bring him all the way down from the mountains to ask you about it.
textByHashes.8cec6d4418a3eff142fe46da1f192ae40d7ff0be: You mean we aren't going to be able to grow it in the mountains?
textByHashes.6af63eaf2a8be1699a370bc0721820a551283537: Oh, wonderful. Can you give me some of those, please?
textByHashes.37a5b922b259de4ebbf934989ece86146f503739: You owe me a bit of favour for the work I've been doing around the village. Are you sure you can't let me have some hardy gout tubers for the troll?
textByHashes.b3faf130eb93fabba087f7a12b166f0db5c89f04: So this hardy tuber will grow like any other herb seed?
textByHashes.bee478991862a5d1df229894c7ebf7c7265ed91c: Hang on. I can't hold any more stuff just now. I'll get back to you in a minute.
textByHashes.1394baa4c363ddb3a516b2190c01e9a7ebebc207: What the heck was all THAT about?
textByHashes.51317bd1730c85c6618ae97cdced4d3b7045bc18: You could have really damaged their village!
textByHashes.f6ba066e4e2df29739602460f54e8225b870ccba: If you ever come to , I'm not letting you into my house.
textByHashes.2b8b66cc5f7fdc2e1ab8518b50c3b05b2bd129c9: Yes, I've got plenty of hardy gout tubers.
textByHashes.d811c974a456b7ab4cb0cda36ec7b93694a31a9b: What do you think I need from the bank?
textByHashes.d4e2351cbdfdf64e09c4e79854b3d7230a2d0a2b: The birds got interested in watching your farm?
textByHashes.1f5c8f3353b9d7f76a9fb1e097f0b261311acfa7: Exactly how BIG was this bird?
textByHashes.da6dbe35007102697130b6f8f97c7591a1f54342: Are we talking bigger than... a pigeon?
textByHashes.2579a0d8a16261d76101300b60f7645897e14051: I told him he'd better take us back, or else...
textByHashes.cb497ecfc85b80aad9f3aeeca9fc4e7c3e17b705: Or else I'd let my arm loose on him.
textByHashes.f5ee1bb31fb6331fc38b3b31c0ad999fe2219909: How are you going to get back to the Troll Stronghold?
textByHashes.94b1bbd1481de4b56d6639aaa7320e84c645ccda: Actually, I seem to have thrown it away.
textByHashes.3c50d7d9de38b6b493c316b5c02b85e88c92f85d: Roughly how much more favour do I need?
textByHashes.0127671f93d8134b9a98b33c4387a92d7c2e63e6: I don't suppose you'd accept trading sticks instead?
textByHashes.377426d59c46ed310f4b2a19c3fcf561e280de72: I was asking you about hardy goutweed...
textByHashes.defba8e8a7fd7556625fa834d61de3b3230f1cd7: Riiight. Shall we get on with growing the goutweed now?
textByHashes.f5f790656b672e29f474e43d2dfb5a020b6fcf25: Ok, I'll hand you what you need, and you can use it on the patch.
textByHashes.fbf01365baf6bf76e8b1dc73b583ef6823839123: Well, you've got a nice crop of weeds.
textByHashes.0b952c8ce9a121d08274ae7dec6a9ca4793a59dc: Yeah, yeah, we'll get to that in a bit.
textByHashes.70b0ffdb97175cce4f8036b960d8183cb3a00c25: We should start by raking it.
textByHashes.fc1d5e2c32aef5a99774694aa1f253f2fc42954a: Oh... there should be more of it than that. Sorry.
textByHashes.d052b79473789f5897d900a62d99e817b5db18c0: The patch is free from weeds, so we could plant a hardy tuber in it.
textByHashes.a6858c2feabe61bd4798aed1c2559b026f66359e: Well, I suppose we could treat the soil with compost first.
textByHashes.ead873d740d5b6105059906f9814a28cb3bb9207: Oh yes, you'll need the gout tubers.
textByHashes.a66105a96e485e0f353717cfd42363dfaf8c958c: Aww, poor dwarfie. But he's sure to turn up again one of these days - drunken dwarves always keep coming back...
textByHashes.00e3707e6313ad829be91a11d3e4a3585fd86340: Yep, you can harvest it now.
textByHashes.ffbf76c71e43a47b5b3ac3c272ab566b88320b67: Alright, I think I can arrange a spade for you.
textByHashes.1bd673840a5569dd7ef37aea39076442407047e6: I think My Arm should do the honours.
textByHashes.0057e9be535d933b01ab503a45e3fb5f352f4f32: I'm just glad the goutweed grew up okay.
textByHashes.1bbb4849587cc300956b2b42594d5848fdb5478d: No, I haven't asked him yet.
textByHashes.40251257295f78fd1242d0379e896180ba2f30e4: We've done it! My Arm's managed to grow some goutweed on the roof of the Stronghold!
textByHashes.f4c46766e3ef1099e8d8cd0811212ef868d3665b: Yes, he's got plenty of hardy gout tubers to grow in his little farming patch.
textByHashes.cfa02edfbd8bcba013a37da27c98482dcc4ec213: Yes, it was very... kind of you.
textByHashes.5b2f22eadf1b931b541b44cfd3efb9418a372bdd: That was the worst quest reward EVER! I get better things from killing goblins! I get better things from killing SPIDERS! Why in the world did I ever do a quest for a troll? I could have been training my skills
textByHashes.57246e50803bffd92f1a5a799b143862dd86fc7d: I could have trained a cat and got a load of death runes!
textByHashes.9b76da7d5eb6c6ea7d2d7eeceb05d86fe4122479: I could have gone back to Pest Control and helped save the universe from hideous monsters!
textByHashes.bde276303767b59ef59eb8892142d6983ca29c1f: But no, I did a quest for a troll, and what did I get?
textByHashes.a88455fc45062b39b9f3a0a23fa38cc1134f40c2: BURNT MEAT! What am I meant to do with burnt meat? I don't WANT burnt meat!
textByHashes.c79ca1d0d0d6de927cccb8ff9a1e9aeb342b9188: No, he jolly well didn't. He gave me burnt meat. Again!
textByHashes.7d65bae3ac236604f7c9301e06c9e8ce491278e5: You said you might be able to give me something better?
textByHashes.74ab14445cef1d3c137850b69367598ab4d465dc: Do you know of anything I can do in Morytania?
textByHashes.6e8c7134b32fb90b5a56c79e5a5d6d7989089f3c: Well, what is it, I may be able to help?
textByHashes.e6cfc59a1e9834fbbfaf1441a97a3e64f2c7c593: Yes, I'll go look for him.
textByHashes.d4dbb61e8961f840f461c84e4e3fb2497fc33557: Don't worry, if he's there and he's still alive, I'll find him.
textByHashes.acd860f3700879bbf7855a1154ac16edb370a1d8: Sorry, I don't think I can help.
textByHashes.978ea592a399d3c4d8d966ddee186f2e75f69c0b: Where should I look for Filliman Tarlock again?
textByHashes.6e40154473008c40e503fa853e17c3eec299f084: Explain to me what a Ghast is again.
textByHashes.385cc1af0a8e203445ccbc5f16459338b5241b0b: What's the story with Mort Myre?
textByHashes.ca3c2be587dc82434c98f90e554e5917ceb34e48: What's the story with Filliman Tarlock?
textByHashes.bf48f42f4150dcabc232e4face728099bf63fcdd: Huh! Now you're just not making any sense at all! I just cannot understand you!
textByHashes.9abb1e8d31031f3cff36321708fc458b397e2bbb: I'm wearing an amulet of ghost speak!
textByHashes.5bde515ecce648348c25dda64ac443cc51fa9677: Ermm, you don't understand... It's just that..
textByHashes.20130b8ae28b45240118e6c88bb7b54aaf39e045: Well, please don't be upset or anything... But you're the ghost!
textByHashes.a9e8821e5d1b31e9dfcfe10230f11b15cda84c0b: How long have you been a ghost?
textByHashes.2530b4dc671c89036478003baff45f27994238db: But it's true, you're a ghost... well, at least that is to say, you're sort of not alive anymore.
textByHashes.b8a6e5bbe00d7c7fccc68804f64bdefd6c0bad24: What's it like being a ghost?
textByHashes.617371a090aa95fa75ec8eacda22d9f7d572e659: But you are a ghost, look at yourself! I can see straight through you! You're as dead as this swamp! Err... No offence or anything...
textByHashes.689994f46f4880f14bf92c6ec4f6b7209d06d7cc: Yes, I do think you're dead and I'll prove it somehow.
textByHashes.e47e10d83779829dc79784f92ceb5a68c1c6c8c7: Here take a look at this, perhaps you can see that you're utterly transparent now!
textByHashes.e0bab368baab2450cd1d8627bc159aafdf964fe9: That's because you're dead! Dead as a door nail.. Deader in fact... You bear a remarkable resemblance to worm bait! Err.. No offence...
textByHashes.b609a24560fc98bd35a38f5d6c3b305fe69a76e1: Here, I found this, maybe you can use it?
textByHashes.104533902fd078862df6a2671538bb5d1bff7a2d: Being dead, what options do you think you have? I'm not trying to be rude or something, but it's not like you have many options is it? I mean, it's either up or down for you isn't it?
textByHashes.c156f3d4ccc96c655c2a6deace6a5087a335283a: I might be interested, what's involved?
textByHashes.51e9d820503517cce550f1ea26ecd06f90d76757: Well, that does seem a bit vague.
textByHashes.cd199859ed72107c0acb0056a21e7257fcccbbe1: Hello again! I'm helping Filliman, he plans to become a nature spirit. I have a spell to cast but first I need to be blessed. Can you bless me?
textByHashes.d87ef08d26f0b64612f1dd9e34393dd27cae49c3: I serve Saradomin in other ways.
textByHashes.753f612e91928133903dbe8951635a251a06117f: Hello, I've been blessed but I don't know what to do now.
textByHashes.5e2764733bc5d59c8053b59be42f85f565865474: Yeah, but what does that mean?
textByHashes.c8f9371200e0572be25c10bbbe8cdfc0fa178ef8: Ok, and 'something from nature' is the mushroom from the bloom spell you gave me?
textByHashes.d7e405f28d79c62bf30e61fa0cdc11c60b499bf1: Do you have any ideas what those things are?
textByHashes.6389df6365cd3d136a569d5bc3fb8ecacf1ab4bc: What should we do when we have those things?
textByHashes.c5ca504148976e9e1241037202702947cde89818: Can we just place the components on any rock?
textByHashes.f30ae4d4c8fad89df52e6b1267894356a72f9b97: I think I've solved the puzzle!
textByHashes.2bf24a4a192d03a0ba678b9cb117147e2c84d5bc: Could I have another bloom scroll please?
textByHashes.33ddff0d02fe86d7226448e994ade34597205bb9: Where would I get a silver sickle?
textByHashes.f9c8a4098eabc656f9a28e535e085feed440f4a1: What will you do to the silver sickle?
textByHashes.933a3e608cefc15cacd3ad1728cb07abc1330339: How can a blessed sickle help me to defeat the Ghasts?
textByHashes.1456824338ea3b0518e30c0b8180cace27c516b0: Yes, here it is. What are you going to do with it?
textByHashes.927dbbc3d41c244efce1f3afd3a9400179ea4821: How do I get to attack the Ghasts?
textByHashes.3ebb56041585deb60b11ef2654a80de79b6c2278: What can I do with this sickle?
textByHashes.3d662faa6c16a3a5db9f5936b946f9274a4c5fee: Yes, I've killed all three and their spirits have been released!
textByHashes.511dedeb768bcbc209368ace65f10c8c3954ab1b: I'm sure I'll find the way.
textByHashes.40224ae9f75a045a2338d10dffcedb06161294fd: Up on the hill? Yes, I've seen them.
textByHashes.3ea13ee564103aeff32fc36cc445fd2b4a7850d2: Sounds interesting, what can I do for you?
textByHashes.526d3a2651f3f1df1ea6bb518f415c64629f0155: Oh, sorry, I don't have time for that.
textByHashes.a50af41eadc669d50b34da8a0b27f0adcf4fdb78: Where can I find planks of wood? I need some for the telescope's base.
textByHashes.d32e95a6226eba4ab7d089152f4560fc0ab4df57: How about this plank I've got here?
textByHashes.4d21c31bf6eaeba1252a0db5e90a16e3f38b0feb: You know, for the telescope's base.
textByHashes.bbdcd8880b62c27c04b796bd9f062bb0fee2e75f: I've got some planks for the telescope's base.
textByHashes.437cd64181ae7b6c2e35ce6c9605a1479262bb0b: Sorry, not yet. Three planks was it?
textByHashes.2a7038d2a5424a810bdd8ada42d0f158878ac02a: I have a plank for you.
textByHashes.580d1ef6c13c0efbf61983814f21bcc8891093b5: Yes, I've got them. Here they are.
textByHashes.adc73d75e834a859050d038d1a1671137414acac: Can you help me? How do I go about getting a bronze bar?
textByHashes.f10e974703884331e47f4e3ae918b28dd4498188: The bronze bar is ready, and waiting for the professor.
textByHashes.eb28aab5407b384310b257791a022b78e6eeecdc: I certainly do. Here you go.
textByHashes.64cca84dd7d816d50b9ac88dbcd1b355952b034d: What's the best way for me to get molten glass?
textByHashes.e0af80d2933e25525a18ad5ffc5860e91438724f: I've managed to get hold of some molten glass.
textByHashes.937c8d0d4ab08df0b2db414bb3c7fa3d34a82e92: I'll have a look - where should I start?
textByHashes.bcf2e29969cbdfce3547e2b9618b23ab0e674c9a: Where can I find this lens mould you mentioned?
textByHashes.518cce80989ef9fde7c91bd1e5605f84f4c7a33e: Well, I don't know. Perhaps some amazing treasure!
textByHashes.4faa67fd28fd3d61d198836bf0da75018175cac1: No, but I found a key.
textByHashes.029bc0ccd6f546993267d040c5a41a27ddbf0b55: You had better be quick, there may be more guards about.
textByHashes.c8c81ed784af3493ba0705075078bfcbe7fd7004: I certainly have. You'll never guess what they were doing with it.
textByHashes.599114c8202c815199eba114bcd1cf25cbada278: Wow, good guess. Well, here you go.
textByHashes.8b53a6714f9e5ec8241d0e234f4468e2dbe73de5: I suppose it's better I don't ask.
textByHashes.e65dd7f8417e4f68beb4d202e10afe5a09ec7f13: Hold on a second. I don't have space to carry it all.
textByHashes.945cddfa663e97d57c9eb95a23fc22b9e1d7195a: How do I make it again?
textByHashes.a959997337892068d7a37f8ab0c0ee82aed38da1: How should I make this lens?
textByHashes.0f5889aa15f0970daa6eb752a0773ae0a3ebf9f9: Do you like this lens? Good, huh?
textByHashes.20dc3e12f7d2e2d324ab259acf0409d4bc71e19e: Yes, that's it! Indubitably, it facilitates the triangulation of photonic illumination to the correct...
textByHashes.b88bf56c18e684dd5be3394a2618b29b43a2cf78: Yes, here it is. You may as well take this mould too.
textByHashes.3c6349e37a0d8fc41c2751a7dd3c3cd19c6b9b2f: How can I get to the Observatory?
textByHashes.020df8246e106a663744fc61e19d34ab0b368377: I've had a look through the telescope.
textByHashes.e2a6c9992840a1795d85693a91f26f84a8cd951d: It's me, . What are you doing out here?
textByHashes.9f5684e570569ae64d3ad64362b47c7999cee2c3: Alright, hand me over the carvings and I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.529839c3cc22e9bb61378d1fb60b4507b2a9b71a: Wow, you must have pretty good eyes to be able to see a single tree from the water during a heavy storm.
textByHashes.ade48e73edc2ad912854bc7688e0ceb291ea60ce: Possibly later, when you don't smell so damp.
textByHashes.ad333a7d210cdc52c7f13666784b24527ff2a1da: Not yet. I just popped back to see how you were doing.
textByHashes.522c9bd6f38832e47155d9a66462bdaace2707f1: Olaf, I cut some logs from the tree. Here's the wood.
textByHashes.d3fa06ebf3d2330fd7dc9213c6b306a8ece73abf: Alright. They live in Rellekka, right?
textByHashes.b577e179eeacb0132d39abd99489b5116ca630ad: I don't know... I've still got it.
textByHashes.5d9f2ad3176a6585b9567d1789ffecbb5bdd29dd: She was very happy with it!
textByHashes.a926e636b1c86f9d2f632e1602e1ba5fec1acbe8: Well, if this plan works out you will be able too, right?
textByHashes.c8de47a354aa63a73cf2e572e7f238d0ac1f003d: I'll bet he will be... but I've still got it.
textByHashes.3b798fe4a984e9fb4349007e505be2f24ec6f60b: Excuse me, but are you Ingrid? The same Ingrid that is married to Olaf Hradson?
textByHashes.2160fcf42acb37b455983f44af199f899783ec62: I am a friend of your husband. He sent me here with a gift for you.
textByHashes.8e5a49597553167d5c0a639f9ff4f142eb8e371f: An expensive, exotic gift from the far-flung and tropical shores of the Island of Obscurity.
textByHashes.91dbdd7c2c8ddb23c73d0fe0696ce9c2fcc5e105: Certainly! Here it is. He sends his best wishes along with it.
textByHashes.8242b7fb7e7826893e44672e4b0b145f9399bba2: It's tribal! Very tribal! I watched the natives carve it myself.
textByHashes.dc8c046b1496990a499fc47be66bc462d82cd444: Oh, thank you! Enjoy your Obscurian Tribal Artefact(tm). It has a million-and-one uses!
textByHashes.8c63fb4a1a97caa8ebfd776aaeae5448e9d584cc: Err, no, not yet. It takes a while for the messages to reach me, you know.
textByHashes.6bd06cd7451cb6a9d8dde596039344fc0a1e40ad: No, but I do know your father. He sent me with a present for you from, err...
textByHashes.38f688838a4cf0f724c7125062eeb53b07f7fc74: Very valuable. Have a nice time!
textByHashes.cb8cfb074ce6aa3f062aee7fc07b517fbb2afdee: Not today, but if he does, you will be the first to know.
textByHashes.7e494965c7323af832a6ca523eb521a4cda6de9d: I delivered your carvings as you asked. Your family would like to see you again.
textByHashes.740a12c834c63c0cadb9a850018eafc41f2f1115: Here, let me get you to the village before you freeze to death.
textByHashes.e14253759f4b937e4860c80052d88a5f2f800c8d: Well, at least give me the map like you promised!
textByHashes.66b6b2bc60e0b6a3402537dea7b44b32eea3e134: Well, I'm glad you're happy. Can I have that map now?
textByHashes.b62436fc0ad5cb8b2de9c7e0593a566e717215d5: Well, thanks. What will you do now?
textByHashes.67401d22642fa0d8353a6a4bf2bd3567d5052744: Olaf, I seem to have lost your map, can I have another?
textByHashes.97ec13f5d2ea42116fd79fe9f69209dad3004c1e: Is there anything else interesting to do around here?
textByHashes.a0a354be4e1c07710301aabd2c11253add2ec525: Nothing, I was just wondering if there was anything else to do?
textByHashes.c6b82ee8363e0ab59f6c1494bb68b2b8015bda3b: Ok, see you in a tick!
textByHashes.50ef8a7e8b2e1c72c224aa14197a1448f23b8bff: Where do I meet this jungle forester?
textByHashes.47013ffaba331ac7a7c5cbd02c3e84b8df60346d: Nah thanks, I've got bigger fish to fry.
textByHashes.a4ddb36bd9d5f03757731ecadb9997400666467c: What was I supposed to do again?
textByHashes.cdb26e34544e2649b44d42a8516a6c80bf783f17: I've forgotten what to do, can you remind me?
textByHashes.35ddb8d832cfe43a21fb43de303496f64c46f4b0: This is taking longer than I expected!
textByHashes.ce5179bddece54ab89b0b309f32a30ccca9372ef: Is there an easier way of getting this exotic wood?
textByHashes.8355b34832d277b88506fbfbe4b6bfd8ffa2e8c1: Everyone is asking me to do them favours now! It seems like I've opened the floodgates!
textByHashes.e4f0c985183159987affb9f74de6cabf2edc5f58: I need to talk to you about red mahogany.
textByHashes.1edeab2c0376fe5d40794accbeb8a17ce5259ac9: Okay, I'll take your axe to get it sharpened.
textByHashes.06d93b1202e2ed38d50441ce97e70868befbf0b2: Why should I take it to Captain Shanks?
textByHashes.b39b84a7249a63f6cd789ca5893779a604e0a1cc: Oh, yes... okay! No, I'm sure that nothing bad has happened to it. I mean, you gave it to me, I'm really dependable!
textByHashes.b568f461eff0e82836cb5f1786e596d2353bc8b0: Who is it that I'm supposed to meet?
textByHashes.31da022c33811d86da08e49845e96aff91e8a591: Do you really actually need that axe?
textByHashes.c48b958c078d0952097041a9d1fd6baf64cfc9cc: I've lost your unsharpened axe, I need a new one.
textByHashes.11215ba83358ae15a63f5ca87b4692b0375f1162: Okay, I promise to be more careful.
textByHashes.e25eed7069650b05212c63b4cc81d5433c2d5505: Actually I have a favour to ask.
textByHashes.5dfd0f8804db84aba3900e2bd2e4719bc6b0a3f4: I have an axe from the jungle forester, I wonder if you could nip into Brian's Axes in Port Sarim and get it sharpened for the jungle forester.
textByHashes.9022d755b1c80d030b69f0730283ce089f8c2cc6: But...I was only meant to do a small favour for Yanni Salika...I don't want to go to Port Sarim!
textByHashes.179765d3f9ee893e2e1c2020d57ab8e3f5683582: You know what! You're absolutely right! I must have dropped it or left it somewhere.
textByHashes.e7b2b684663e2ae32888fae809be6d1f337a7256: Look, can you sharpen this cursed axe or what?
textByHashes.6af9d57a5a3582fcd2e74b3ee34ca9aa7dd5ebdf: Oh, so you want a favour doing as well?
textByHashes.36e87cd2cf8ad1b70c01dcb1182b92e81531d1cf: Ok, ok, I'll do it! I'll go and see Aggie.
textByHashes.0151ac138220a8b7354fa77eb39c42567a4f831d: Is there anyone else who can sharpen this axe?
textByHashes.1dbfd3e1023f109c2842089248ef437a9d7b1568: Oh, right, yes, sorry, I forgot..
textByHashes.9b16196c1ea9a572df087f432fa143e913a5f5d8: Hey you're a witch aren't you?
textByHashes.5084e8b0de1023a3618e40a3ffc56b5663afb2cf: Could I ask you about being a character witness?
textByHashes.2aaffcd95a0c91ea7cc8ba56f123cdf6f1d2dd26: 'Jimmy the Chisel' - what kind of name is that?
textByHashes.755c8bf96fc2cfd5c70a3ff56abc03d2ecbb8c41: Do you have any idea where he might be?
textByHashes.184f49eb0ca54b1675edc524bf713e56784f6fe7: Let me guess, you're going to ask me to do you a favour?
textByHashes.110bb29c9ff62ee138def87fb09dbf3f4b601536: Hmm, I seem to have heard that one before. Go on then, what do you want me to do?
textByHashes.df0259b18ffd5ae1899528af66a5dfa413f3342c: No way...I've had enough of doing favours for people.
textByHashes.acb4aabd3beb87278ab63821a2b42ebdec33a363: Oh, Ok, I'll see if I can find Jimmy.
textByHashes.b633ee8a78145baee392b2d3a5cb04c51de81b85: Where am I supposed to look?
textByHashes.989978dc044fb2b542fde7b02a63608494e78cb6: What am I doing this for?
textByHashes.608c9c8e1a0e1be498bfaeca89910d0293801dc2: I'm looking for Jimmy the Chisel.
textByHashes.c38ab2ab6a39f5d5b41dbf00e683c0f077c42563: Huh, it sounds like you're forcing him to join you
textByHashes.4bf2ce8f8d15acd5cd21669e71a2f99b18984f78: Well, I have to return him to his employer, she's very worried about him, so if you could just hand him over...I'll be getting out of your way.
textByHashes.41baf0677a5236dac3fe47b530db792b5f5ad662: And I suppose you need me to do you a favour?
textByHashes.2c217289d9ab0e7822611f769c8f0dd63bac3303: Ok, just exactly what is it that you want me to do?
textByHashes.2f14fbd02189c32e773203665930248f64d331ea: No way...go do your own dirty work!
textByHashes.3b10bdb12a4dfa300ab0f07c7d95abadf31b8bb0: Ok, Jimmy has to be worth more than a few scrawny chickens!
textByHashes.8df916d772f1bf07ce6bdc4d2b75c274ce6523b4: Can't you just release Jimmy the Chisel?
textByHashes.f2d675429a96964df4d4c5a8e8b395f565a2560d: I don't think I can do this.
textByHashes.f43fc2cadc622e004895983b1c3e31747b8a3edb: I need to talk to you about Jimmy.
textByHashes.88e17efd4ecc1fb042910ffb729120579294f883: He's being kept prisoner by a bunch of fanatics and I need to organise a delivery of a month's supply of chickens to secure his release.
textByHashes.6e88f8af8631a1fc11a0d37c65d96178b84517c2: Yes, it's pretty bad...but keep calm, I'm going to help.
textByHashes.1a9b074d763458ee10f0c9df5d720b30be705a6f: Well, can't you just give me some chickens?
textByHashes.117a3ab0788b257ecfd3aeca7f5f588e739a4752: Well, do you know someone who does have a month's supply?
textByHashes.e246745b1e473b1c1424f22c71e3d3585b40d6e7: What did you suggest I do again?
textByHashes.240e58769c37d65dab2777a84cd324975f2068c9: Ok, I'll go and see him then.
textByHashes.6065030cbfbcf1460ffbc610334b791baf08addf: Sorry for the intrusion, but this is quite urgent. Jimmy the Chisel is being held by fanatics. They won't release him until they get a month's supply of chickens.
textByHashes.90700822681d85e423d8a6a2d9f10eca478d5428: I've already talked to Fred but he says he doesn't have a month's supply of chickens. Is there any way that you could help?
textByHashes.4ad1729a014629b7c90f7596b23e43bee77275d5: I had a feeling you might!
textByHashes.593cff271e2341b0a6a17b24893f5ddf3af41ea5: No way, I'm fed up with this wild goose chase!
textByHashes.3960d465a5102501ca53f0cd3cc220bb6eeb3fa5: Oh, ok! I guess it's not that much further to Varrock!
textByHashes.7216a829281b437a52a5ef3d5c255fa696862bd3: Sorry, but I don't have any yet.
textByHashes.48a1183a36c1becc15acb272ddd65f1f34daf332: Hi, I need to talk to you about chicken cages! Seth Groats has asked me to come and see you!
textByHashes.64d34a81b90dbfc6a432d61295a1363e8cd76536: But I don't have three steel bars at the moment!
textByHashes.bc601fb933982451e2a25581c8d00c5111e74536: Ok, well I have three steel bars here, you can have these.
textByHashes.ab969f70e2e106e71338234b3901c1868cb0a9d1: Oh dear, you don't sound too well?
textByHashes.22c8f56582ca5bd7c184d508c6b56a5f5e641f3d: Well that's a shame because I really need your help to make some chicken cages!
textByHashes.360077b30ff77efa9cf74358141328e63be0a624: Oh I see, you need me to do you a favour?
textByHashes.cb9e3732f26502ad08fc4e50fb66da5c95f0e98d: Oh, no not another favour...I just can't do another one!
textByHashes.de5bfecc553f5ea32a2a0d2b05a7e6cd1c462a21: Ok, I guess one good turn deserves another.
textByHashes.d8e92f52bd3711197b1b39025b7f861f4fc609d6: Well, hopefully, I'll be right back, but you never know, it might take longer!
textByHashes.79739801cd03e36d0424aa815ae4756dd400c1a5: Horvik is ill, I need breathing salts and herbal tincture.
textByHashes.d0993558fdb939a404ee03f145d3d0d946e5c90b: Wow, that was surprisingly easy! Fantastic, thanks very much.
textByHashes.bac4f0418dfe17eebf18344936f8366bd6a4b901: That's ok, just hand over the breathing salts.
textByHashes.070a032b6ff28917a43802a7e958dd09c0e553b9: I just knew this wasn't going to be easy! So you can't get any more breathing salts?
textByHashes.9f248fe453e1fdfeba5d1e5c4fb60f20448f83c3: Where would you get one of those from?
textByHashes.edec4541a74db102f6a0f451ac0b01f13af2b66d: Oh, no way am I going to the Barbarian Village.
textByHashes.b0e9455dbdd1abc1ebe6393059d68448e344313f: I guess I can go to the Barbarian Village.
textByHashes.045839697fe7c35e9f7f142083656d3df5c6fa54: Oh yes...where am I going to get a new pot?
textByHashes.4127783e8a5144cd42e8185642e9daf6bae226a2: I've lost that herbal tincture you gave me!
textByHashes.8909672ea37a6fd113ff47257fc8360d8eb9e08e: What was I supposed to be doing again?
textByHashes.c5dbbfd08e7457e2275b341ff11e1ee69b484f19: Hey there...I need an airtight pot just as soon as you can make one!
textByHashes.1b3c020677c7960c6139003fc4a096aa45a4255e: It's a matter of some urgency that I have an airtight container as soon as possible!
textByHashes.2ec60879c1bb7281ce8ae8e737b2b185e2bd0050: Oh, sorry, I didn't think...what's the problem?
textByHashes.168d8caea4f87e26a2312875fafb82e8fd25d233: Loan shark? Hammerspike? What are you talking about?
textByHashes.8578aab2453e8525299a07d4edfa0f3f13672cbc: But I need an airtight pot...to store breathing salts in.
textByHashes.327815ff5f945a9467a3b4caa9927e09c084b94e: Yes, I'll go and have a chat with him, perhaps we can sort something out.
textByHashes.52cc6a8fa964326a148643ec0ff08c1ebdcea519: That's not a pretty picture you're painting, but don't worry, I'll be careful. Now, where do I find this Hammerspike?
textByHashes.747e65a8de72fff5cf97e781e23444b4dafd2166: No, sorry, no more blooming favours for anyone!
textByHashes.baeb8733323278a9c3b0eb54247a00cc1886cf86: Not exactly, can you tell me what I'm supposed to do again?
textByHashes.c07f97fcf8cdea5d85d1cd7a3fbfb3bea1093757: I'm and I want to talk to you about a friend of mine, Tassie Slipcast. She says you're putting the screws on her for some loan she had from you. Is this true?
textByHashes.e20c35d35037ec372d02b4ee5aec7c0c091536fb: Well, I've come to change the deal!
textByHashes.4ccc3e64b455fb9697a4fff71faf0b52f54621c4: Er...er...not exactly...why can't you just leave her alone? I mean, make a nice gesture, I'm asking out as a favour...please?
textByHashes.0ccb7d8d985be0a550bda63c341a00666f99b8d0: Can't you just leave Tassie alone?
textByHashes.40268bd696974911a13ac95a925cfe0211b68daa: Oh, come on...do something nice for a Tassie. Think about how hard she's working!
textByHashes.66c5372e5c58ddfd166038e763c471ce3d123a95: Yeah, come on give her a break.
textByHashes.cace11c576b11f04c3ac14487215f55fce7d3fd5: I can understand that...you have a lot on your mind. Go on, make a change...it'll do you good! There must be something else that you wanted to do at least once in your life.
textByHashes.f39eaf918e6f017d2364f4bb1bf113945b07aadc: Have you always been a gangster? Wasn't there anything else that you wanted to do instead? Come on, tell me what you want to do...I'm listening.
textByHashes.0e845a9379fc0f3c903e7b5c4882896cbd4f7e8c: I don't think they take dwarven gangsters as initiates.
textByHashes.63b95232bb64b1ec342985cc692ea2d314dacc7a: Ok, another favour...I think I can manage that.
textByHashes.6c722fa4555abf0c5a23b08f7310983d47885290: What was it that I was supposed to do for you?
textByHashes.f68656376fc64a9e0c0221a9445251647bd2474e: Are you taking any new initates?
textByHashes.0c588cc9e173d66bb8d8733cd52ae3e473fb5315: How does someone become an initate?
textByHashes.f421acd75d5944ca942da849a83515f8c7df59ea: A dwarf I know wants to become an initiate.
textByHashes.beaf2d858e07839eca6aab9f7a2a6b510dec0ab9: I've been asked to do a lot of favours recently.
textByHashes.8e1dac4d01c8b367bb34aeaff7d49bb9d532ab10: Yep, it's a deal. Tell me the recipe for this herbal tea.
textByHashes.dacd9b15c5e04aa3c9a1b5fbb39d26cd9b9ba0c8: Mmm, sounds delicious! What's it called?
textByHashes.5cb72acb344aad02f539e4a58652840122f6c5e5: But I can drink it though.
textByHashes.1a966b834dfb28d8d8e2d03672dde3e13f83b334: What did you need me to do again?
textByHashes.c62db6aabeef7ddc87ec8ea5793b1120bf10751b: How do I make the tea again?
textByHashes.762473664c400b03bb22d596db7c6145cb6fa540: Sanfew asked me to come and talk to you.
textByHashes.c47f8d151609aea06f6e4f7f5e7e52e3e9830426: I have a special tea here for you from Sanfew!
textByHashes.d705735f5f9a9d10c43a924d6886b6e68b4dd6aa: Yes, he's quite considerate that way...you know, thinking of people. In fact, he was thinking that you may be able to help him with another little 'helping' situation that involves ogres.
textByHashes.7ed7d4fd62d421d819e45cc8495c22dc5c7265bb: More like 'super-over-grown-gnomes' if you ask me! Or 'overgrown humans'!
textByHashes.c3a1a8c901c8447835d653a16130d6a62ce513f2: Sanfew wants to bring the word of Guthix to those ogres, though I've no idea if ogres have the mental ability to grasp druidic concepts.
textByHashes.fc160497b3dc3b5599729539f3be816822cac151: Well, he wants to know if he can organise a glider ride down there.
textByHashes.466e493eca9c0e0035ced9b75127569510fa5572: TRASH? What the demonikin are you talking about? Why do I have to get it?
textByHashes.22486299330484f11748896fd6b2a0f529e101fc: Where can I get this from?
textByHashes.eeca1d463894e291f9d21df7ffb95497a8205224: Great! So I get to talk T.R.A.S.H with shopkeepers!
textByHashes.e03613b556db1e30eff451699e517812a2f7b178: Ok, I'll go and get you some T.R.A.S.H.
textByHashes.b16b193dbba3da2f8140c3d5f06e4b073b37bd1a: No, sorry, I can't do it right now.
textByHashes.14a42cb4e0d3dc0f6290ab093b3a02cb6a9bccdf: I need to talk T.R.A.S.H. to you.
textByHashes.8fa6ed4a7b6bd526533ae5fe291e07c4d224c1a3: Yes, of course. There's a Gnome on White Wolf mountain who needs some T.R.A.S.H...for his glider...do you have some?
textByHashes.5f4a24fb9d9f06fb94a8f76da0b8af72b2d9e743: Well, I'm sort of doing him a favour.
textByHashes.443db6c547f5dc0286efe26d7e524b00f7c4f0e1: Yeah, I've heard that before! Go on...tell me anyway.
textByHashes.56c5e74a2246e37ab5f050434ef27a3c0c843044: No way...I've had enough of this wild goose chase.
textByHashes.fb97522f26d9f2a0f8cd73542b430235478957b1: Hi, can you give me a weather forecast?
textByHashes.4e2d1730dba302ec2fe4c7e85139175808ead8ae: Great! So I can assume you've been really pro-active and compiled an up-to-date one for me?
textByHashes.93fc3f09914de6832196bca9bbcd69b3f4587508: So, in your case, you have the power of foresight, but you're too lazy to act on it?
textByHashes.8a1fb3d240e5298cc388b3c6adb008497a2e636b: Who is this girl that you're concerned about?
textByHashes.86c4bb0906701140f0268c0da386ab9b14b1a026: Do you have any ideas where that might be? I mean, it's pretty vague isn't it?
textByHashes.d91f4aec642f3138f11e82db8725b8fce07ae04d: What do you think needs to be done?
textByHashes.2faf1535674ba83b42d660d28a0cb86c30759ad6: I'm sorry but I can't help.
textByHashes.930554594e40b5ac5f12af5dfbb94e581f590acf: So, let me get this right. You want me to start poking my nose into a lot of caves where some creatures might be?
textByHashes.578bf7cc8649540720e81df2bdd9e23fefa846ca: Risking my neck for some tomboy who thinks she's got what it takes to be a real adventurer?
textByHashes.b89c9ce16dcba60fac0b2bf7850cb15275da6e2f: No, sorry, I can't do it right now. Or maybe ever!
textByHashes.1f5eec47958aa9ab9e3342b81062663f079ab313: I need to talk to you about a girl stuck in some rock!
textByHashes.b77ae5251b3202e876f23c5f144a274750997e0a: Hey! Not so fast! I've seen a young girl encased in rock, a note in her belt led me to you.
textByHashes.9a6af084f19b891d462bcd5f23b5680494c70790: What the demonikin are you talking about?
textByHashes.a1887d639f519b0bca4272c6eb9a8d9ebf3ec9f2: No way am I going to Port Khazard for you!
textByHashes.671596c1bfc1b7fb7b915526c4dffddd16046d1d: Oh! Ok, one more 'small favour' isn't going to kill me...I hope!
textByHashes.26ee7f8593b25a7364815965609ae29b8e33e7df: What? Are you saying I have to travel a thousand miles?
textByHashes.529839bf61fe7bcc84f979bd75a255ee8a356b63: Wizard Cromperty sent me to get some iron oxide. Do you have some?
textByHashes.c751f4103b7a9b78926e4b1c0cdd84b2e269b7f9: Rust? What do you mean? How much does it cost?
textByHashes.a651180ce0a7bc9567fd0b373ffa4ac423123cfc: So, let me get this straight.
textByHashes.9d26737032b2b362719aee445c4cc32aff043a68: You want me to traipse ALL the way down past the ogre city with some flea infested mattress, to some hermit ogre, who can't shoot a chompy bird to save his life, so that you'll give me a pot of rust?
textByHashes.04113d19c7083d74565522d590f94a8f863a4a76: Sorry, I just don't want to do it.
textByHashes.a844e9d191e4252b91112d72535c708d2da099bd: Erm, I've lost the mattress... do you have another one I can get refilled?
textByHashes.af307f61934a727080348cf4860791db390e41be: Okay, here's 100 coins for another mattress...
textByHashes.ba3d843e2eb77e9424f55f2b238cfd6ae62f2896: I'm not paying you 100 coins for that stinky mattress.
textByHashes.d3f09e884e3a0d401358bd8bb609d87decc25f67: I need to talk to you about a mattress!
textByHashes.f2b94762d4aa786d42570e02421c97ffe75f39a0: Can you fill this mattress with feathers?
textByHashes.b5577264452f612770d93cf6bb999774a6ff76b8: Hello there, what are you working on?
textByHashes.b4ea27a8196fd94ef692975818c8a9bbe1f42dfb: Is there anything that I can do?
textByHashes.de0fabf931d8c5f8293db257810f6ea9c81da404: Rantz said I should help you finish this project.
textByHashes.e9d4ceedb6b650da49150787397fe501943eee7a: Yes, I'll take a look at them.
textByHashes.a34a6d291a6981b4bf5fe7045080ed5f314c1ce4: Sorry, but I've got other things to attend to.
textByHashes.067b8ecedbab6aeb0bc609518dc28a8b50763965: What was it you wanted me to do again?
textByHashes.377bc04a63ea4d2ea577f9acef95db81eab093aa: I need a chisel to fix these crystals.
textByHashes.dd40d7d4e18dd240e41f9e768ad5baec3f2b5aa8: Okay, I'll buy a chisel for 10 coins.
textByHashes.25f87ac155b467263a3cf16ea2486df4ebe463d1: No, I won't buy the chisel.
textByHashes.1c7ff82df233dd2932f7d27befb4df6a71d48df0: I need a new opal to fix the lights.
textByHashes.9b7d232a000d2bc9c3e066c8d53eede101f55a1f: I need a new jade to fix the lights.
textByHashes.1d0a76ccb567431f8113982c7849b5b0c7562b40: I need a new red topaz to fix the lights.
textByHashes.54719e881335c096a077d19558cec8f14c076f33: Okay, here's 500 coins, I'll buy one.
textByHashes.c1394650ef055c1b52199359be16c85aac5b4fff: No way am I paying that much.
textByHashes.47e5ee3b2d0643acaacdc57bfb990de4f297a3df: I know one ogre who'll be very pleased about that!
textByHashes.fb6ab94e42c6cdb39d5553a872bd1df1a0f5d323: Ok, I've helped that Gnome, he shouldn't bother you anymore.
textByHashes.11a20574b0f5f3e61a4e9099eed138fc6fed063f: But I don't have the stodgy mattress anymore...I'll have to get another one.
textByHashes.b2791dc1844ccbf811d26588f0f1ed9ef15deb7c: Great, I think Tindel will get a good night's rest on this.
textByHashes.c6edac060e3f7e11cb4ffcbc699bcb830c32f974: I've lost that filled mattress you gave me!
textByHashes.a02b905618c600e8788a522e01b63ce501d8327f: But I don't have that many bright pretties!
textByHashes.40ab7c066e6dbe60c444a4f59cf043e48a7bc982: Ok, I'll give you 200 bright pretties.
textByHashes.cc690a94b8977649c67fbe0e940349167394d193: No way am I giving you 200 bright pretties.
textByHashes.e5699a7bd101983c2265aade777ca01b61ab8917: I've lost the iron oxide, can I have some more?
textByHashes.514fce5138c1f7f0e829b85fb9cd458e7c48853f: No way am I paying 200 coins for a bottle of rust!
textByHashes.7fd30fd3e727d191e226c40f66838551249d45b0: I have that iron oxide you asked for!
textByHashes.83de89adfaa5e2d7b382f9e3e2d0431ba840a222: I need another animate rock spell.
textByHashes.ca4035e6ace8e84b3f56eaded7fcc50af7975425: No way...I'm cleaning up your mess, you should be grateful!
textByHashes.d87d602c21037fcac2d6cc431952665dc0bf4c3a: Whoooah! That was a bit of a misfire.
textByHashes.59bd00405b97e20491883314d7f5440b18b557ab: Oh, not so long...I don't think...
textByHashes.0756ea4fd2a5a889b4bd0bb06481003a97acd039: I mean...that is... I'm not so sure...at all...in fact.
textByHashes.453ddcb9b5ee08218b315b831a765a0b2adf5d01: Well actually, I think that some of the people at the Seers Village are worried about you. That's how I came to find you here, Phantuwti sent me.
textByHashes.6234676e391cb58b94f8d830041330d6a21afce0: No problem...I'll probably see you back at the Seers Village.
textByHashes.d605c0738ffff8ada4c527f55a650ceae401616a: I've released Petra, she should have returned.
textByHashes.ca39e90006b155e08ae278fc3b084d5edcae7aaa: So, can I have the weather report now please?
textByHashes.fa068d5ba985a66b679a36ae91827129585d7491: Listen you...just give me the blooming weather report!
textByHashes.b3a30286e1becb1ec21e282124656ef0f96d16b4: Why can't you get a clear picture?
textByHashes.1f26ec7b009fc30bcd067d8152022fa301354f3a: I've done my part of the deal, now hand over that weather report.
textByHashes.f58738d1b320095783c788b4134be136359ebbfa: I'll run you through if you don't give me that weather report.
textByHashes.e6d4e2453823beba90230dd99b32e4dbd678197b: You're making me angry! I did you a favour, now pay up!
textByHashes.77f22cfbadf99372a4fc6210c128d0b7ffd4775f: Which special Seers tools do you mean?
textByHashes.c2a573974d8d2af140f732e0941e30d999b91f53: What do you mean, 'special combination of items'?
textByHashes.5ec6f58bc585ff4758aa7c36cc33570b488fafbc: You're talking about a weather vane aren't you?
textByHashes.57cd3ccb07c67d694eed565fb6120e7be421d474: You can't predict the weather because your weather vane is broken...that's it isn't it? Holy Saradomin breath....you can't even predict the weather, you need a weather vane!
textByHashes.5865a20cd1f21631e8a88dd7c58891793e4da9cc: Ok, show me where this weather vane is...I want to look at it.
textByHashes.66eb06571770b52ed3ac2d8815e92eb6673a48ba: I may be able to fix it and then you can give me a weather report...come on, let's go!
textByHashes.f11e9d62b20d0e777e1e84163e273e6de1bb0630: You're talking in riddles, just give me a straight answer!
textByHashes.2cde929e67003aeab2eeb33fc85ff995243fbcb6: This isn't allegory though, you're just avoiding my questions!
textByHashes.6ce27b0084e2484afeb133b6a60f17efb4190bc5: How hard can it be to predict the weather?
textByHashes.923e6b40e6689237f1072bc3b05026303f79f0e7: Ok, what's it going to take to get a weather report?
textByHashes.5837906d13dfd171fc0bdd283b807ea55953d01b: No, sorry, it doesn't help at all, I need a weather report and I need it now...so hand it over!
textByHashes.24f9c266fcb8f63e84010a268db1ba917cfa6202: You're just a fake...you can't predict the weather!
textByHashes.c96e20e37e3cacd567c98af7b8b53dbcb352275c: What's it going to take for you to give me that weather report.
textByHashes.f8dd2854ff637887d68ae738d9acabb091087794: I have the weather report for you.
textByHashes.2e302645a25c654b5637a6320fa5d23d3417f5f7: Hey there, did you get your T.R.A.S.H? Arhein said that he'd send one of this associates up with it.
textByHashes.982ebc3b5a183931e1dcecda3b318c4f714ce6ab: Hi there, the gnome Pilot has agreed to take you to see the ogres!
textByHashes.8023a88332866731546729420f66b4c80d85cd25: Yep and with good news...your life is about to change for the better. I've persuaded Sanfew to take you in as an initiate!
textByHashes.583920b0204780bcb1184b501cfe944e53e3d9fd: Ok, you promise me that you won't bother Tassie anymore and I'll leave you alone.
textByHashes.5438899eb1f2ea05fd2227cec512a73d77a60718: I'll be ready for you whenever you want to take a shot Hammerspike...I'm not afraid of you! You're just a bully who can't fight his own battles.
textByHashes.886b42d4354124bac3228c8806fed345dcf79042: Hey there, Hammerspike won't be bothering you anymore!
textByHashes.8bd93027bab77d3106b4445f278f404a84081d12: Well you could make me an airtight pot!
textByHashes.dfcb141953865a0b6868511aa63bd526c81a5f21: Hey there! I have an airtight pot for you!
textByHashes.ba00dff8d921da53a82fafd3e40195bb0aacbf9a: I have the five pigeon cages you asked for!
textByHashes.a32dc5f377e40c99a7b13a0d68ef84660cb9f7ed: But I don't have a pigeon cage.
textByHashes.1f6898627f604b6b6ecb02fabed53fd680f5ea52: Ok, I'll pay, here's the pigeon cage and 100 gold.
textByHashes.110f9e4809bd8ca3b2a121b843cbde970109199a: No way am I paying for that!
textByHashes.dfe00323aa2e822a1c84f3ab429d3179b8c4bbd9: Here they are! I've got all five!
textByHashes.77e27964f10edc1cb131ce1fb8366e5a7afacedb: Don't worry about Jimmy. His release is imminent!
textByHashes.a139addcf4b4bf1b36e60a548623769c58f179fd: You're in luck, I've managed to swing that chicken deal for you.
textByHashes.a0319f3b717217e16cbc69d253be3773501169b3: Thanks for the offer, but I'm sort of in the middle of something currently.
textByHashes.3175b0da6cbd0cd1c5afbaecc653f9ec40fa9f49: Hold on! Aren't you forgetting something?
textByHashes.83927e6c86ddd73adeb8b1455629b85522eb8175: You said that you would release Jimmy! Are you going to keep to your word or am I going to have to get angry?
textByHashes.833dd11b5a0eb8acf0efd5eaa10f6f85a524ef86: Good...I have things to do and I've had enough of people messing me about.
textByHashes.243317ef11302b6e04b29b876d2c352b3e4e3980: Very well...but if you're lying, I'll be back and I won't be happy!
textByHashes.874215b8fbff12e3f663e0545cdb0021182b5e80: Good news! Jimmy has been released by those fanatical HAM people! He said he was on his way back here!
textByHashes.2d5350e7e6e22bb3a1f2478bf1ce46286dea7276: I've returned with good news. Aggie has agreed to be your character witness!
textByHashes.80a50d48b0d23ce0c78b32d6146d4cad0810e0e7: You have got to be kidding!
textByHashes.3adab73bf775289dc9087ee62ffa219388fa92f9: I've lost that sharpened axe you gave me?
textByHashes.38850a0b462208187887c03cc8acd10250c77437: Can I get another one please?
textByHashes.953c7b9c5ac536ca38e55279fee96352d2f9b0c7: Good news, I have your sharpened axe!
textByHashes.862d6bc87fc9e751a65357afef9fc95aecdc7b76: Yep, here it is... at long last!
textByHashes.56111f9faa3a366333797b68110eb8303df66979: I've lost that red mahogany you gave me!
textByHashes.da61c6c98640f9298d29d8b399e6b06290a8baa5: But I don't have 200 gold coins!
textByHashes.979da304c57ce1e7a4808cdc8f736990135401df: Okay, here's 200 coins for some red mahogany.
textByHashes.67e697e06c152b48008b7af2cc685f8b474d2f73: I won't pay you 200 coins for a piece of wood!
textByHashes.e41b765af74c8dfbaca4221b68adb46967f063b7: Here's the red mahogany you asked for.
textByHashes.95e433d773559fd0ca1612995d872aa78945ce40: What! I've traipsed halfway around Gielinor...
textByHashes.21a9fe295adbae4a2aa688f3a53d9518dd49ce06: I've negociated with fanatics, dwarven gangsters and arrogant gnomes.
textByHashes.2f442ee2a7bff414158bc05d606707a755050959: I've fixed ancient weather vanes and gnomish landing lights and fought supernatural rock monsters...
textByHashes.d76333a914e1190d07e12b2da80a600ff11b4402: I've filled stodgy mattresses with feathers, made pot lids to help cure an ailing metal-smith...and that's all the thanks I get? 'Thanks!'
textByHashes.5b8bb888f11f9c1fbbf9dd248d6f8a269a08fa37: Groan! Yeah, so did everyone else!
textByHashes.cedfee1d612c791a843dc2a97516a9d7c3f0e98a: Thanks... only, you didn't actually mention what the role was...
textByHashes.e1cba6142cee21bd314054dd78d59571e1c9a978: Sorry, but I'm not looking for a job right now. I'm just going to go...
textByHashes.1e6a088be39c45e5e4aab65d00233594c7c9cc57: It's not really that open... We haven't even left port yet.
textByHashes.acd13f39359589fcbb5afd4175ec96bdfb1a525c: It's more of a boat really...
textByHashes.b132452ea9fcac4dab735f9594cf684820998941: Right... So if I'm manning the helm, what will you two be doing?
textByHashes.ba78a3eec6c28c318043d875a63b11937447ceda: Have you ever actually done this before?
textByHashes.fa3e6388bf0c1a1046cdc264624ac969c452e450: And what does this business do?
textByHashes.c1f5512e49fe3b030982e9bba6d25834c67ef068: Of course. Alright then, I don't remember doing it, but apparently I committed to this. Where is our first wreck?
textByHashes.b1d86a4084b6a990b8438e8f2f7e6b79176ef6fa: Actually, I want to go back to Port Sarim.
textByHashes.c297f4406d7195ef38684d665684de69f1746fb6: Hang on... why am I lowering the hook? I thought the helm was my responsibility?
textByHashes.6c80497852779507913b60bb05540ead2af58bc6: Of course. I'll just do everything while you two reap the rewards. Sounds about right.
textByHashes.137e4b6f6eb5903b61b0504bacb796c0714332b4: Right then, let's give this a go.
textByHashes.88e1efc8905384aa86466a311f1fc8cb8d2d1995: What do you make of these?
textByHashes.8cd20eb67498d27cd8e3d00929036fb08802e174: I think I must be having some sort of fever dream... or maybe I'm dead?
textByHashes.0f21f2609289969a1a3a66d6a5791db34efd58ad: Okay... You said words there, but I don't think they actually formed a sentence.
textByHashes.87a31110b8e9583cbd7462feeb2b676d62dc6640: If this is the Pandemonium, do you know of a pair of salvagers called Will and Anne?
textByHashes.bc6afe0d52a421afb574573108866facb00ee433: I see. So you do know them. They claimed to have purchased a map here, but I'm guessing they weren't being totally honest about that...
textByHashes.430b9a2ef8aa225ba70a5dea999f34695d1766b3: Well, I had quite the fun run in with them myself. They had me help them salvage an old shipwreck before throwing me overboard.
textByHashes.ba73e19c032b9d19dbe4096b25e00b16b788ef8c: Thank you. It was the map they stole that led them to the wreck. What do you know about it?
textByHashes.b1e94c35d6af61080238aad45f6a6feac30e96ca: Thanks. I'll go and speak to him now.
textByHashes.21cd01140118e8ea5004e58d1019ba3254a96dfd: I think I might have lost a cup here.
textByHashes.f6c2ab98e8b568f4990c024d7450bb46bbc5627e: A lot of paperwork in managing a crew is there?
textByHashes.b1afa7736d60cffc64e5e3b1bbffde27b5bcff6c: That all sounds a bit much!
textByHashes.50f6ff41d1183de7da1b9d07b00b2dd0883a8b9a: Kind of, I guess. I was hoping you could tell me about Will and Anne, along with the map they stole.
textByHashes.21f7f62379b40457a4742b17d61851a88cdc94c1: And you had a map leading to the wreck of the Kraken?
textByHashes.4de955d152ae2eff33053a4e35aa7aeac008e562: Then why not destroy the map?
textByHashes.ca940c95c45c478248caac56361092338d231219: I'm not sure I quite follow your reasoning for keeping it, but I guess it doesn't matter now. I'm afraid Will and Anne found and looted the Kraken.
textByHashes.5721bf663095849e84dfcef7a7d250f7ce0af827: Now's not really the time for tales.
textByHashes.38630664418df6f6cb6cae4f08a63f7d2003966e: I see. Well, I'm afraid Will and Anne found and looted the Kraken.
textByHashes.4b68263fd783d62004338fbf07683c59ab7352d7: They did. It was actually the only thing they were interested in.
textByHashes.30c08fd424cccd16c9c5752e10f40ea5672095c3: Well, I do have my own personal reasons for wanting Will and Anne dealt with. Maybe I could try and find them.
textByHashes.9a8dafc3d83fac5f6a4b866b68bde87fdbaeb0de: Not yet. I'll go and see him now.
textByHashes.8567ea17d0271e6936920dedc7d458a7ab11c118: I did. He seems to think they might have unleashed some sort of curse.
textByHashes.50ccbcf0713e56176101745faa67cf851cf1f7c2: Well, myths aside, Ribs mentioned you'd put a bounty out for Will and Anne. I'd be quite keen to track them down myself.
textByHashes.a23b4fa2bcdc400ff2f9eb56bf6ff1ae2b5e64cf: What exactly is this one rule you keep mentioning?
textByHashes.05873eccd39866ba824915a90f1b80c922c4b31f: So anyone is welcome here as long as they don't commit an offense against any of the other patrons?
textByHashes.71977d032641028c689dc6da32ba57d41c89c6a1: I see. So, back to Will and Anne. Do you have any idea where they might have gone?
textByHashes.ed0f5eb33d823a663ef68deb504d0acfc6e69afe: Do you have any idea where Will and Anne might have gone?
textByHashes.4ca4c2c1477b96f0be4e62e9913902d38b5f6a2b: And where would I find Old Grog?
textByHashes.89d1ec3949be80c810cb35ce4a447fdf49e77436: But I don't have a vessel...
textByHashes.9e61275b4293a35b0c6e373bce0fd2edcf2a0263: Will and Anne threw me overboard and I washed up here. I did mention this earlier...
