textByHashes.b12d17de954921f4860d6ba96ee9b840b15765af: Alright, I'll go and see him.
textByHashes.5d4c4eea68af8882719bbe48626ade169fade2b5: Steve said you might be able to sort me out with a boat.
textByHashes.41c15c70c4c5c5d77871aff762838775d465f986: Er... I do have this cup I found. Perhaps I could trade it for a boat.
textByHashes.879bbd307ad93bc80bad60f3b1dbe7d647006ce7: I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.aad52497eb64af0d6a312e38e01b01ab601fdcec: Then I guess I'd better go see if Steve has it.
textByHashes.384891743f372d52112f72c6894af2574f49680a: Sorry, I think I must have misheard you. Did you say raft?
textByHashes.c6abc609c76e8f19e1c1deb847209811ffe69d7e: I was kind of hoping for a bit more than a raft. It's not just the cup I have. I'm sure I can make up the funds to buy something bigger.
textByHashes.6cf2b495b957396ab4222e25f58ef922a57ea43f: But I won't get anywhere without sails!
textByHashes.1ca17e01d617e8845cc95915fcf664c3b9ac4e80: I'm here to pick up some cargo for Junior Jim on the Pandemonium.
textByHashes.894b9a014890936019115660c14f16abe452e497: I'm here to drop off some cargo for Junior Jim.
textByHashes.836077bc38c4bd634e0ae5eab331c9a34ce5552a: Oh, I must have left it in my cargo hold. I'll be right back.
textByHashes.b1b74f59b3ea7752fbaea8b612c6abbd59ac1d90: I collected your cargo and left it with the port master.
textByHashes.a5ada6edb28dff0841cd325285199ae3cb27e8fc: I might just do that. Any tips on the best ways to get that experience?
textByHashes.37c32626e674df91d210758acea012b9c3b6c5da: Great! Thanks, Jim. I'd better go check in with Steve now and see if Old Grog is back.
textByHashes.178249677265311e0c30a71f9002110e28b45273: Have you tried asking them to move?
textByHashes.5fde6a890d01ec0464132102b629ba6200971b47: It's not just humans that do those things.
textByHashes.610a436a9d65143aec580ad26e86a977e79978e1: I don't know about cave-ins, but I can handle monsters.
textByHashes.49999bef4f3933a4dbda649798dd21152b0da4d3: It sounds like you need help.
textByHashes.d4efd14025b4256ddbc84a25e2d43b1881ffad01: Hang on, what's in it for me?
textByHashes.2e30fbeba1fc55658d78cc030295de38b7e6ac05: Access to the city sounds nice.
textByHashes.cf9b68400733ea794cbff1459f7b03a33621281c: On secound thoughts, I don't like your attitude.
textByHashes.90438bac19def3902cc4ed85ab6a16b894217f3e: I should head back to Attala and let her know that the aqueduct is secure.
textByHashes.976fda70b1b52fdf01ca0742be85e1e565971dbc: Good work team! Let's let Attala know we all killed it, together!
textByHashes.936ce48dba68ef61df777bd7fa7724536b836542: Technically I helped kill it... Without me, the others might have been overwhelmed... Yes... I should let Attala know the aqueduct is secure.
textByHashes.09e02b815af576a666d8ea7c2dea73a0a8c18505: I've taken care of the... What was that thing anyway?
textByHashes.7e145a1393313778965fc85f33b33937371f05e4: I'm here to help, you know...
textByHashes.88d8507ac26d04b83db8393ac9c214d86080085b: Is it really that dangerous in there?
textByHashes.e6c2b3a3b8681608ccc0cfc0c771d0bf6ccf8d42: The rest of your people don't seem very happy I'm here.
textByHashes.41f5414135a83457a8224cf7ff78d8e5e5f95955: I helped you with the aqueduct. You could afford to show a little bit of gratitude.
textByHashes.754935b6a929cb0549def3b8f64bd72a090c7a9b: Will the city's defense be okay without you?
textByHashes.ff80287f1d3be44abeb8438ddb2d10a4f99be20f: I take it you don't get on well with the humans?
textByHashes.c2dda233f46307c9bc47bc2bf5b95133e339d46f: Why not share what you know with us then?
textByHashes.e8d7990aa12f7d1aa99297e47b1bf49b7c036d5f: Well I'm always open to a bit of truth myself.
textByHashes.9f5384e0fee5b3c31cd7d4e4fc5bfab1ce1f50ed: How did you hear about these ruins?
textByHashes.7882c0090a02f165c508111e239acb9b67ef654b: What are you expecting to find down there?
textByHashes.83360ece303c50816569a084ac1d8fb336beba19: I take it you don't get on well with the dwarves?
textByHashes.60cf4ab186bac29d2b41636f4a748a47482fa8da: Don't mention it. So you're here for these ruins beneath the city?
textByHashes.8bcb9d81226b98fc8f61aaf375027eefd5346fa8: There seems to be a lot of ancient ruins popping up lately.
textByHashes.6c8a0ed839e065de8333099fc8ef46a005dc480a: Can I be of any help with the dig?
textByHashes.bc3c9e31c7a2bf5c4538718efb2a9c648ad65a89: How come the dwarves let you in?
textByHashes.566eaad2cac3c4127357ab4515c5301efda05c51: I take it you don't get on too well?
textByHashes.b931d0074937ab92b1a7251d2363e36ebaee36b2: I should probably speak to the others before I go exploring.
textByHashes.66c73a79bc0ca03318c98738f78bb7c81fb859aa: I'm surprised to see you both in such high spirits after walking past all those jeering dwarves.
textByHashes.8bcff0ce25569499aa6a2a753cedb30ae32690ee: Alright, calm down, both of you. Let's go see what the actual archaeologist has to say.
textByHashes.02aa89074b6a0121871d13b6a5b475e6c38e368f: Do you need me to do anything in the meantime?
textByHashes.dcd375626435f54171657f2d2a1ab3677146982c: Could I help with the translations? I actually have a bit of experience with this language.
textByHashes.981c91a3dd3529f51ca0e717095d9d7293799e00: Speaking of which, what about you? Why a life of archaeology?
textByHashes.a74a0d885cfa6388ef4068b1f2f9bc946ff67477: I see. I guess it was a natural next step then?
textByHashes.2965e9241c61b75e0e4078dccd37682cc82792d3: You should visit the museum in Varrock some time. There's a lot to see!
textByHashes.add5b74e59d4d72668fee0ab9450001a16a8cc0a: Understandable. Right, I should get back to those camps.
textByHashes.6036b5c3332b7003007e668dcb3ce4901bfbe7df: I should grab the camp building supplies before I do any more exploration.
textByHashes.80964773d5726907a307814cb6bae80f2f4b9b8c: This entrance looks dangerous. I probably shouldn't go in here without a good reason.
textByHashes.5c3c097948162d4f6690f570a525b05070c478d0: I probably shouldn't touch anything until the others have had a chance to look around.
textByHashes.0747218717c630cee72712951708358149962bfd: No problem. I hope there's no hard feelings over Jessamine asking me to do a part of your jobs.
textByHashes.a15999e52265f9e26a30edf0f14d1fccfcc872a5: Glad to hear it. Keep up the good work then!
textByHashes.51fc0ce1d63b0dfbdf2ac691f5d7e3c52062fc3b: I've finished setting up the camps.
textByHashes.167d7588cf08c89b37425720419b59b4f4f46312: Well I've only ever had good experiences opening ancient vaults.
textByHashes.4b67d7aac2fe085b86737ffeb0822c4a88c47663: I'm not sure if these disagreements are really getting us anywhere...
textByHashes.a1e3758d3606af98189d13682f21c24a7d8d7eba: What does the western mural depict?
textByHashes.4354e06e8c3ffb959371cdd325b9b8c2d7930e59: So what do you make of it?
textByHashes.f951632ffa6c81f16e8a4018d00fb1fd18792608: What does the eastern mural depict?
textByHashes.3c47182f89f39eb63968c1652f00bf0f51109a7d: Ah yes, I remember now. Very pleasant.
textByHashes.c5faa3c6e58ab28e3f13688b410ecd0a971d0a60: Maybe we should focus on something else.
textByHashes.ef9f2237c1ab99b2d18b5921025ce3211fa889ea: What does the northern mural depict?
textByHashes.80e3b5c4c7e2a51285627011550f734c86423097: Any thoughts on this one, Jess?
textByHashes.fabe796f21b2c6ca6b04db77a9fa487b70c258db: Attala might be worse than a pit of scorpions!
textByHashes.21a0205379c2205786ba78c23108560ad66385f1: So how did you end up getting assigned to these ruins?
textByHashes.9dbc7ad8e04dcef52ae23d33ce8b4f754f4a7f8f: What lead you to be such a devout follower of Ranul?
textByHashes.13cf02c85b94d5025fbb77d8ed20ccc028c4845a: Doesn't Ranul govern over death? That doesn't put you off?
textByHashes.4115b52ee856b11449d37b691538fb80b4e1b230: So is this place what you were expecting?
textByHashes.6d668080b3d38ff95b6f16117f96b78c0afd45b4: Is it because of all the moon symbology?
textByHashes.a1c08003078c5f40dfea67a8a58f3bf4076cdffd: Interesting, if a bit vague. Care to elaborate on what it is you read about?
textByHashes.0e42ba9f7adc974f1b9296b557d517596d2bf70c: Well I look forward to hearing more once you've done so.
textByHashes.f4b43b54b8563db7d25cd800e16c050b176ed97b: Actually, I've been sent by Attala.
textByHashes.e90982ab5337e9e3b6811f8509b6dfdd64c81f0f: We're trying to find out more about a source of magic in the ruins beneath the city. She asked me to bring some talismans to you.
textByHashes.072909a373977246114b8e39802849b3a338392d: Er... I seem to have misplaced them.
textByHashes.a573aaa6dc270ff6bae85a5d48cd7c35ae1002ed: I think I've lost one of the talismans you gave me.
textByHashes.ec5f042efe7f4698728007a72d577c1f2ebca15c: I think I've lost the talismans you gave me.
textByHashes.ad71bf1cb1e2dc2975ad33123f42fa6ca9488f9b: I need your help with these talismans.
textByHashes.78b6161fa194086f4dbbbf1b436f2907af9aa14f: We're investigating whether the ruins beneath the city pose any threat to its citizens.
textByHashes.6ae5c636e429ca871a031861ddd1d6eabf3af799: The owner of the magic shop said something about these talismans detecting... aguatil?
textByHashes.fc98978494d3b7966e8ac043e99637f36a56a8b1: Er... I seem to have lost them.
textByHashes.18672dc58b99c6d7b91d4ebb53b95dd42121fadb: What do you know about magic? Aren't you a blacksmith?
textByHashes.c6b76dfe60ae43d5b59deb1bffadc9f108a778f8: That sounds interesting. Could you teach me how to mix smithing and magic?
textByHashes.253eede9760f0dbabdc7350b1dd2b5bf87655023: Oh... But can you help with the talismans?
textByHashes.27f191936efad66f05527f158471b27fb2f7ec81: I've lost the talismans you gave me.
textByHashes.fd88cba6d2bd322e5634cb7ac368e9e0abbaf834: Yes. I managed to get the dwarves to cooperate for just long enough to make them.
textByHashes.6cb1a05cce728a44025a7edfe547ee75a7423107: Yes. The dwarves of Cam Torum are quite skilled, so it was relatively quick.
textByHashes.e04797e44e3f632ce046a4a8aeed3413d1e88502: You seem to be well known by the other dwarves in Cam Torum.
textByHashes.9342827dd7c6499cb129ae2ede0f2a2bf66b26ac: I suppose I should thank you for letting me in then.
textByHashes.cbff694012b8b3f9b9e09efcc118b1ce4c60ae82: Your friends weren't very happy to see me.
textByHashes.1b931cca6fa58aa7e5245bf2e135c64b9720df23: Thanks... I think. So who are you?
textByHashes.c9034bbb529dde81479aebc6ce4c69b5cc4fd545: Right... And what is this place?
textByHashes.900c4787b762e47467c6c788c2c1403629ef00ad: Why would anyone want to do that?
textByHashes.21a2c02f0ad80f17cf70f9506858a7c985680e72: Did anybody touch that thing whilst I was gone?
textByHashes.0daae78f702e58311f88e625ab2b447023d10939: Isn't it a good thing it moved then?
textByHashes.8c2f4873a56b3d36bd8f44790558d28c495a18a5: Where can I find moss lizards?
textByHashes.e6c7483d5debc623b9824f65129664380e901926: Where can I find moonlight grubs?
textByHashes.e7a3cae8b35a1805cf713436224460ef4b8efe50: Aren't these things like unstoppable forces of nature or something? Am I going to be alright in there?
textByHashes.960b00daa1bc455ce142d76d4317043b4a72fadf: Could you remind me what your glyphs look like?
textByHashes.220386e32036f1883576501f312f4f78fc350546: What should I expect from the Blood Moon?
textByHashes.ed2b5215a8ef5b323b8cdc8ce678792517285ea2: What should I expect from the Blue Moon?
textByHashes.7b1c7e0b436fb65f7d05689f56e4231af36482da: What should I expect from the Eclipse Moon?
textByHashes.09d0909b2d0874adb92ac2ce25fc96e7612d2da3: Let's make sure that Cam Torum is safe before we start celebrating.
textByHashes.46b67c13493cdfcf5364678c6180b6fb10a3d232: It's okay, we'll figure this out.
textByHashes.7f4b6c7f26efb2e4fba6b69aa4c7fc6b2ab5802b: You seem remarkably calm considering everything that's going on.
textByHashes.3390a075d28ec178f885a7bf5ed4c3679cf4c1c1: Shouldn't you be getting out of here if you feel like you're in danger?
textByHashes.b39f23f4fb7b6b0cf411d746e0179356ef25673d: I've done everything I need to here. I should check in with Eyatlalli.
textByHashes.d5d3a820037d4d6e81fe853da4763daee467b2f8: Interesting. Maybe there was some sort of connection between Ranul and this place after all.
textByHashes.2bee6692381ad09a76b04c3d2237d525d456dd8c: Something tells me the rest of your people won't be too happy about that.
textByHashes.9e6572f56293c40acb8c265e92143bea95923c4d: I'm sure it will be a great one. Until next time, Zuma.
textByHashes.39c7c2918b4ac5f5713214a1848135568db3add0: Do you ever get tired of guarding this place?
textByHashes.be3a68404905c8e7e76b77edd051ceaefe1e218f: This place is beautiful. I thought it was supposed to be a prison?
textByHashes.4248958f4609b70f2634386cf2c5e5d715bb7d2e: Even the plants and the streams?
textByHashes.79f9ff5beca5a57e744ecfef6eb343234a4edc3e: Good to see you both as well. How's things?
textByHashes.39bc50a47aa53ce6ccdfc92d8e071479c517a873: Pretty good, thanks. How about you? Made any more discoveries down here?
textByHashes.680b1f536d65f7262f2c42fe1b73e81b7e4e959a: Sounds awesome! I'll be sure to keep an eye out for them. On that note, I'll let you get back to it.
textByHashes.0d33026bb2ee17412bd5e32c2d42a611f0c63028: Of course. Have you tried explaining to them that we actually helped?
textByHashes.0bbce0a24d121861f68262e1fcf124e216283c9b: So how long has Cam Torum been around?
textByHashes.279f4a85710a8942ef2723216ee05f78d1eb44ea: No, but you're the only dwarf here that might be willing to share that sort of information with me.
textByHashes.6bb50048b61c6237326ce14c4ed68d79611ddc7a: Must have been a big thing for them, leaving their home.
textByHashes.498efb807206c933222e05b9d03871a64b844fba: Sorry. I didn't mean to dig up old wounds.
textByHashes.bf6043ab23b28662573d2e4b32d2daf1b5afcdd2: So you still think there is a link?
textByHashes.52c241c8977a3693f5ed2f37d4359fcdd37dc82e: Ok, I will bring you some rum.
textByHashes.db5c0e9c075d49ec60c3e5ef2b751c30b43a71e1: Well I'll give it a shot.
textByHashes.436d7ac37e7b983ffd8d56e5574f5df795b30a00: Well I'll give it another shot.
textByHashes.c427ea8327858456714fedf5f0d6366933e592bc: Could you offer me employment on your plantation?
textByHashes.4477c59f2b1dd224eea9f2d822269d1c0b3de9be: That customs officer is annoying isn't she?
textByHashes.99927557c38bfdf6ec8fa5c1c3794e3d6475f5ee: Really? How interesting. Whereabouts do you send those to?
textByHashes.27a2a0367c5116884c19b8560340ba6f69e20514: I've filled a crate with bananas.
textByHashes.7d05338c4346af08ebee367812489a2346088e87: Will you pay me for another crate full?
textByHashes.74ca292e9b74a9ec442abab3608c6665b8ed85c2: Thank you, I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.0152ce9704de580efbb79b50b2e6b540d48fed27: So where are these bananas going to be delivered to?
textByHashes.b4dac63637713ebb933068278cb7d184674fe792: Can I journey on this ship?
textByHashes.0e27b3ce8a1618abf310ea62026d028f7552e186: Search away, I have nothing to hide.
textByHashes.7ced0b3b13423efb311736411f62145ce9eb6418: This is not the Karamja rum you are looking for.
textByHashes.5f641f883c9fe26107fc0ea999778a2452bba761: Oh dear, I don't seem to have enough money.
textByHashes.2add1d0af28c75c70693a13d9efc47e487f55d88: You're not putting your hands on my things!
textByHashes.93f1f87c65278106add1adf593254986ca25410b: You don't need to look through my things.
textByHashes.da3bd2d8164a69d835d1f49bbea18fa568006859: Does Karamja have any unusual customs then?
textByHashes.41e48c27a62350b286d16b37e2e52aaf4cc9efe5: Can I get a job here?
textByHashes.da1b7bad7a3c69f82be28330c9d99cf4971fd8e6: Where can I get one of those?
textByHashes.bd363acdaa45be9a40fdb7526142650362895f5b: Yes, can I work out front now?
textByHashes.54680a1f9b0fc7f181e11e9cfe30ed8297e824be: Yes, are you going to pay me yet?
textByHashes.7e22d41d3b43d3dfbae8627b147eafd109ea6421: Ok thanks, I'll go and get it.
textByHashes.97e6c0de2695bad432f30d52ecca2510cf1f2155: So why didn't you ever get it?
textByHashes.3e61eaacf3294c8133a704c599ece21598a36df1: Frank, I have some Karamja Rum.
textByHashes.f3761fbc6add58753dafcca587cd33ed98c98f92: I seem to have lost my chest key...
textByHashes.f889a9da1a224192d7ba1e455133d01be8646b5e: I have the treasure, would you like a share?
textByHashes.75897d1c296e5a646350d501a9709e6a5d5f6083: Maybe I could help find her?
textByHashes.0bdde23e52a316db93429b58667ba93ac47ec66b: Where can I find these dwellberries?
textByHashes.230949ffd88387aed0abcd7a0abee1e41567dd89: Okay, I'll go and get some.
textByHashes.658ab9013f109a372d8d4c17b1656569d7320716: On second thoughts, I'd better not.
textByHashes.e719d313df1639156b3a5207ed40d947527b434c: Hello, Edmond has asked me to help find your daughter.
textByHashes.36bc5f8f92a374e4995f2d9d72a24b5c44016205: Alright, I'll go and see him now.
textByHashes.6ce6db664f86f05d141d2e16dfa618c92fdcb2c9: Hi Edmond, I've got the gas mask now.
textByHashes.1a24e0be11923344dd7aeac02545b704550e1713: I still need to pour four more buckets of water on the soil.
textByHashes.12b01e2cc06d1d583cd998b202f810b96d891bad: I just need to soften the soil and then we'll start digging.
textByHashes.8573126370eea7cb7cc3a86c74ba7ae6d9e23b29: We're just gardening. Have you heard any news about West Ardougne?
textByHashes.475a4a0034800a32ea2976e30acb5067d7b7e239: I still need to pour three more buckets of water on the soil.
textByHashes.51c9b5cbdc82999eba85c5bc793cf8666812f349: I just need to soften the soil a little more and then we'll start digging.
textByHashes.15dfa957928874ed22590431591570769dd68f36: I still need to pour two more buckets of water on the soil.
textByHashes.7d0d95f39b09c30d76aea2acae332b233ae7eef7: I still need to pour one more bucket of water on the soil.
textByHashes.3b2c296c73483cfb7a7b70abff1a873630002a52: I've soaked the soil with water.
textByHashes.b30992aa61f10b0897e68123f4b735bf5497b902: Oh, you know about that then?
textByHashes.9e16f24bf147ebad514f94e6d361785c0685c0c8: Have you see his daughter recently?
textByHashes.dbc8fc3b39eb5d0b33157bc5cdf9a16611c472c9: Not yet, but I should be going soon.
textByHashes.ec42f189041c73820230451ce952d9fea2564ed5: Oh no, I love gardening! It's my favorite pastime.
textByHashes.44054130a8ec4d25667b0b2d219944c352beda45: Edmond, I can't get through to West Ardougne! There's an iron grill blocking my way, I can't pull it off alone.
textByHashes.87b97ec5b65818622f9ff4f33bd6be1f0b22cec5: I've tied a rope to the grill over there, will you help me pull it off?
textByHashes.38f67eead79951d49782626ceda6332c96d82cc6: Not yet, it's a big city over there.
textByHashes.4bbd237f03cfd617c7e3be8a1744b4e30a0bb3aa: It's alright, I'll get her back soon.
textByHashes.0deff09eafb32fb2f9d7c3176b900a369b0626a4: Have you seen a lady called Elena around here?
textByHashes.5ea095ee739a9d2af7182565673bc0b4af5ffab3: You should stand up to them more.
textByHashes.ebeb04a9a2673ea1c73c3f4e41cdbc4a17e4a9b5: Yes, living in a plague city must be hard.
textByHashes.636bb8f317842b31f17969886187004e37074b48: I'm looking for a lady called Elena.
textByHashes.12edc442466f6428a282836eab4955188e5ed9f5: I'm looking for a woman called Elena.
textByHashes.440788516aeb20a666e1562564b8377d1af03970: Sorry, that's not what I'm here to do.
textByHashes.6ccf4653e61def30a3b908284c58c5bc0e23aca9: I haven't got the plague though...
textByHashes.76f40bd7c70bb55874efd4b588b6a27c3df4e66b: I'm looking for a woman named Elena.
textByHashes.098276270b4e111b3ae9cf73e2a6e6e789be1a43: I'm looking for a woman from East Ardougne called Elena.
textByHashes.23136b78b9c08b459bf705f3d260a02770d15fc5: Um... brown hair... in her twenties...
textByHashes.7f511b9748db6d9df72e8a91a8cd31794314f7c5: Not yet, it's a big city over there. Do you have a picture of Elena?
textByHashes.76e96a9ed503ee2093b96a5b866d5554c126bdb2: Do you have a picture of Elena?
textByHashes.0050c7b9606c92068011dc41d20c4519f3958af0: Yes, I'll return it for you.
textByHashes.31fc4e2ea2f82958d4e61faaa47584d2920835b1: No, I don't have time for that.
textByHashes.6f99dd2f1ffd5d22760c791507fcf420f05f4f2e: I'm a friend of Jethick's, I have come to return a book he borrowed.
textByHashes.80ffcc3962122c700d5c5034e38eab2e9931cd56: Hi, I hear a woman called Elena is staying here.
textByHashes.8c0b4b887d756d08b07fa335b1906dbd63b9694a: Hello. Your parents say you saw what happened to Elena...
textByHashes.7dba1b44d07d3e9695ed8a1eb66fd51930611843: But I think a kidnap victim is in here.
textByHashes.cbc8e91e2c22a1a3b74890a49e10a31e4028d88b: I fear not a mere plague.
textByHashes.db244254003ab79b98cd25a353bc1c75e505208c: I need clearance to enter a plague house. It's in the south east corner of West Ardougne.
textByHashes.f21c26866a442be9e84c9e86653b8f31657b733f: I've got a gas mask though...
textByHashes.54b03b0d6251aac667adc0df77530dec4f78f72d: I don't have that sort of time.
textByHashes.e8a33addae396fb9b0789da342b21f3fdf626e4f: I need permission to enter a plague house.
textByHashes.35d83ceb1b121d87cbddf0925d1d02339b420b44: Surely you don't let them run everything for you?
textByHashes.1159310c6d6e538a961a6960ffac22b465377895: Can I speak to Bravek anyway?
textByHashes.dd50d26ec4c1b0e4cedef64f9eeba939113e72a7: This is urgent though! Someone's been kidnapped!
textByHashes.2b7635d3267c372ee0500d808cedb4bd4ff5058f: Do you know when he will be available?
textByHashes.95aafb1476f8918a1388003ab046f3703aa6ab57: Thanks, I won't take much of his time.
textByHashes.32fb0e69f3faf74f4f30199ca5f67acbb4b9d0a6: You shouldn't drink so much then!
textByHashes.fad4f8a077df480716676e133913f3ca06e6c363: I don't think drink is the solution.
textByHashes.8a6348a6ff1c0a72a86005fa1d5a21fcbf507f42: Do you know what's in the cure?
textByHashes.dcac563116982ace7ab23776ee65d4b6a70a68c0: I need to rescue a kidnap victim called Elena. She's being held in a plague house, I need permission to enter.
textByHashes.5927d550854718179c6f645af14f5f9fd8121c3e: Okay, I'll go speak to them.
textByHashes.c140be522219517f7b93b7b4fca0daa113a9e053: Is that all anyone says around here?
textByHashes.e0142a92a8f326cd4edf4e381d7b7297d150b62e: Don't you want to take an interest in it at all?
textByHashes.53aba8a088d772727d26b9698cd6463f24727bc5: I see why people say you're a weak leader.
textByHashes.a69ee6674d54ff75dc7561fdac03c6fa7a6942f0: This whole city is a plague issue!
textByHashes.2ffdae8373902e0f236082338702e19d5a797715: Okay, I'll talk to the mourners.
textByHashes.c1011e65dab99f0f06d07a71bd4f2dfe6bb1083f: They say I'm not properly equipped to go in the house, though I do have a very effective gas mask.
textByHashes.4cdcfa14de9fe10c32a9b3358b35185f2bb5d96f: I need to rescue Elena. She's now a kidnap victim! She's being held in a plague house, I need permission to enter.
textByHashes.743cf8df2f6a1037a729d19458e4402421f644aa: Not a problem, happy to help out.
textByHashes.ffd3c65a2d22a12485da9afd55bb270b370c9355: I have a warrant from Bravek to enter here.
textByHashes.bfec17fc8dec6d4bf1d7d8817266dc82c88a4b6c: I would do but I don't have a key.
textByHashes.473aa05909bb9785b42aced631457158d358e2f5: Strange, I was told this house was plague infected.
textByHashes.f4c4cde1b27f3ec5eddc1d68eb209803d875d64f: Hi, you're free to go! Your kidnappers don't seem to be about right now.
textByHashes.45c2759c354a5f8d84968e91f86ca295b0cf27f9: Well you can leave via the manhole in the middle of the city.
textByHashes.cf38b820925ea556f185da6ad924934a25a786d5: Yes, she is safe at home now.
textByHashes.d23adc3cda113058839544f75073139844256b45: Do you have any more of those scrolls?
textByHashes.efc85ff5fd3b0fec062515c31f00c05779aab91b: No, I don't think I know it...
textByHashes.ea6a1d1458dc9c5b5c883320dfbb4d474ce9fd05: Sure. I don't have anything better to do right now.
textByHashes.a910dd2f0b391832b13ad213ff0f0ad88c18d148: Why do you care about Drezel anyway?
textByHashes.1e3663d8008b628859950bdf1c671d2288ee0dac: Do I get a reward for this?
textByHashes.52a8997093ea556ce10601bc03a902242d1ef13e: Soooooo...... that would be a 'no' then?
textByHashes.4d58a2c12e407631eba0ed4536eb00ffdead6e4c: Ooooooooh, THAT Drezel. Yup, I remember.
textByHashes.bd939f99374ef2f3bde0fb88f1b1387d62917f75: Where am I supposed to go again?
textByHashes.aad58cf46c524966b6bfbf601403e0f147cb632e: Roald sent me to check on Drezel.
textByHashes.5ab6289294438e22cb26c946818006cb3aa4e303: Well, as I say, the king sent me to make sure everything's okay with you.
textByHashes.fcc9d07ce13f27522eacc1be285306a18b05332d: I'm not sure. Ask you what help you need I suppose.
textByHashes.43ab194828e51b4bd9e1c83e88dc6b96f3c40ad7: Okey-dokey, one dead dog coming up.
textByHashes.5ceaa52910d2117813f2bddc3d68f95a53629156: Nope. Something about all this is very suspicious...
textByHashes.58ce44d4133234b2a5f9243b8d48680babeaab58: Hi, I just moved in next door.
textByHashes.305b1b18756870d8205c3c6f9c7ede23b2cf6d85: Can I borrow a cup of coffee?
textByHashes.75a7af0960b5a7aadfdbf772b7e061037e596e09: I hear this place is of historic interest.
textByHashes.07c14efb96ee9909b3412cb3d48080c11d0e8d06: Can I come in and have a wander around? Possibly look at some antiques or buy something from your gift shop?
textByHashes.a3782b1f27817102462fbce104c040a9adc15634: The council sent me to check your pipes.
textByHashes.121d6384afa5c17a2a3b2dd5e73909bbdde446d6: No problem. Have a good day!
textByHashes.020f9b714d80e2626ab8debb34586240c584c0f4: Hmmm... From the looks of things, it seems as though somebody has been trying to force this gate open. It's still securely locked however.
textByHashes.42bafe9a06f7f665effa2fa3e65aae117b6ef19f: Well... I went to the temple like you asked me to... and I spoke to someone inside...
textByHashes.cd80863fd706bc5559e5efca9537139ab09b521c: Well... he seemed to be having some kind of trouble. He asked for my help.
textByHashes.3170a042a05de24c2f5ef31e8f1667fa35e96cdb: There we go, one dead dog. I should go and tell Drezel.
textByHashes.afce6b220955edf1ee763d27cc3ee673930b29c6: I killed that dog for you.
textByHashes.03f2b419072f533df0ce05e46b0cfb1b6a679772: Yes, I spoke to the guys at the temple. They said they were being bothered by a dog in the mausoleum, so I went and killed it for them. No problem.
textByHashes.3cea1998b7dda39ba96abe87ea4fc2c38ae5e95c: Okay, okay... I'm going, I'm going... There's no need to shout...
textByHashes.74205463f32c2e69c1360cdd24f39dce07d0697e: It sounds like there's something alive inside it. I don't think it would be a very good idea to open it...
textByHashes.12118c417248db8e7b487b75d0020d6c333b29d4: My name's . King Roald sent me to find out what was going on at the temple. I take it you are Drezel?
textByHashes.883203de7dff8b3b8c63fddc6507b7b10a355742: Why is the river such a good defence?
textByHashes.d2acf86200bde38068c7cc0c9b392e6b0166a7b2: Okay, I can see how the river protects the border. Where do these Zamorakians fit in though?
textByHashes.cff92c8ac9ba730204d1cc924a9db16a1952fc71: I see. It doesn't seem to be posing a threat right now though.
textByHashes.2b90d5901e2ace2f4f9bba271932c213dcfbbf23: Maybe I could kill it somehow?
textByHashes.7cb81bf6d312b964b972c76429d18a71db55ac5b: Right. So, I need to find the key to your cell and do something about the vampyre. Got it.
textByHashes.c0268df331099ddd0ebcb9722974fc2dce669433: Okay, okay, I get the picture!
textByHashes.aed3bd1df05431d1e1d315393015c3e908ee9bfe: Could you tell me more about this temple?
textByHashes.4127633ddb33281a12de94b0ef3e72f9206e2149: Thank you for the information. I'll get going.
textByHashes.7913f303efa7803bbed56b6d4b9acc399549a791: I do indeed, sire. He has been imprisoned by some Zamorakian monks.
textByHashes.b6a82cea0871eeff01a5deeceb7d9af84cbf3fb5: I have this key I took from one of those Zamorakian monks!
textByHashes.4e2340d7bbb72031645312d2289ebf2c56f2293b: I have this key I took from one of the monuments underground.
textByHashes.951c7902da12f13e915eeca8e8bb9577c5b27b2f: The key fit the lock! You're free to leave now!
textByHashes.3c61ba249ad65989408d6bf2ea6991ac29542f77: Do you have any ideas about dealing with the vampyre?
textByHashes.72418a465390e6e0d30a67b4930d7992a584fc06: Well, I found the key to his cell and unlocked it, but there's a vampyre in there stopping him leaving.
textByHashes.f343eb7dd6ce29e113e939ccd147d9b8e9538f80: Yeah, I was planning on doing that anyway.
textByHashes.9270faa870fef6d9eeb1f4274966a7ce3a83c907: I don't think pouring normal water on the coffin is going to help...
textByHashes.798dfdff88718f9bb716fd6a39cf9ed5f16bb2f2: This water doesn't look particularly holy to me... I think I'd better check with Drezel first.
textByHashes.5dd90981c466d330834ecbd4ff3c841c60969faa: I have some water from the Salve. It seems to have been desecrated though. Do you think you could bless it for me?
textByHashes.3837e210eb13cebf3b14a4e96cf067baef45b27c: I have some blessed water from the Salve in this bucket. Do you think it will help against that vampyre?
textByHashes.028c9c06e958c34f8cd6704a57f068445d0c9bb1: The vampyre should be dealt with. I'd still best not risk it though.
textByHashes.522b9773ed8212e7a7930d99b3b2df36545dc619: I, uh, don't know about that...
textByHashes.4e920a759289efa9a82b86c30a01bc50aa07298b: I poured the blessed water over the coffin. I think that should trap the vampyre in there long enough for you to escape.
textByHashes.e0ff6eb6188e2f796d21ed1330a5fc38b2a2068c: Not yet. I'm working on it though.
textByHashes.570dfee4f941a4ee58b39b0eec26b2c042f0492b: What can we do to prevent that?
textByHashes.5aa8ea81293645e3a81ee0d98731facdf0c7a4a4: Couldn't you bless the river to purify it? Like you did with the water I took from the well?
textByHashes.e23f533269867eb53c457471442c18fa1851e31b: And you think we could use some rune essence to absorb the magic they've released into the Salve?
textByHashes.fbaf125827eb8f6f9924644dd9ffc2c4430e75f1: I brought you some rune essence.
textByHashes.a485b391a55c8df02dc4cb8e378ddf2e459eb7cc: How much more essence do I need to bring you?
textByHashes.dfbb5d647e7e715828fe3d14ecf331c93a06e259: I brought you some more essence.
textByHashes.b14253e96b332ef68d2983f8a184e3a885ba9ae2: So can I pass through that barrier now?
textByHashes.b65d379c8ea676e4c689805ae257514c7b0d9eab: I'll be careful. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.3b53030e5aa9cd16d065a8edac04e773e168cf8d: I'll keep an eye out for them.
textByHashes.e2d1b7968f8d210c7464fc35cf1929623a2ebd3b: The chancellor trusts me. I have come for instructions.
textByHashes.29d87b12c4c6d3fe3d4f2db79aa8c8f718ad0b60: What is the first thing I must do?
textByHashes.b36716829851690902d7bc952446fef239c92ce1: How good must the disguise be?
textByHashes.a13620b7006d1362e02abfce6966ac0d0a7baa6a: What is the second thing you need?
textByHashes.b2cf15586dc65afee606939901fc4b1a56dc2a7d: Okay, I had better go find some things.
textByHashes.28227c64044eadefbc6f33927043ee72ed827a4e: Can you tell me what I still need to get?
textByHashes.7e4604330a6d68278c89c1088a4842d32862250d: I am here to help you free the prince.
textByHashes.e4e71e6befef4a5897f0e3fae01c7a93df514e86: I must make a disguise. What do you suggest?
textByHashes.6e9aeea718905c19befc2b4c947b065b12775ba9: I need to get the key made.
textByHashes.3a74969ed069c0d25e289cdb88208c90c1707fc5: What can I do with the guards?
textByHashes.a2f3d5b70fb1b9a2cfbdfa923c9614f2c9fcaed9: I will go and get the rest of the escape equipment.
textByHashes.2639723029db67e5b15c0b3ac0dc647957a395ad: Could you make other things apart from rope?
textByHashes.811cdd5aa4cd29723d57fd76f0c50735280ed33c: Could you knit me a sweater?
textByHashes.614fad6422effbd31dd5f188b3caae3078feb695: How about some sort of wig?
textByHashes.9f08ab9bb33ce774af34c1cc4d9d41c3c0c092f1: Great, I will get some. I think a wig would be useful.
textByHashes.da830d877fecf3dc01e3014af0a81e961f3d13e7: I have that now. Please, make me a wig.
textByHashes.459d78a9d1e1f2cf9e9cbdaeb8cd553e19b5987e: Thanks Ned. There's more to you than meets the eye.
textByHashes.17298ba66c7203744a06949ca969d27f3780e6fa: I will come back when I need you to make me one.
textByHashes.2c9672cd80b3f51399f02afb9574dad787f8f1bb: Could you repair the arrow holes in the back of my shirt?
textByHashes.5e13484ed5d5b1743a9ca599b648fdac7f18fec9: Thanks Ned. Maybe next time they will attack me face to face.
textByHashes.c4fbf187607ee43d66ce4bb68704035635439137: Could you think of a way to make skin paste?
textByHashes.38ec2e7b9377ed30d6be0737de7a240c23d350ee: What do you need to make it?
textByHashes.9fbddff4b477d057331866b7105e6bb34018f7f2: Yes please. Mix me some skin paste.
textByHashes.a31815d4bc95574c598a816c300122609ba0767a: No thank you, I don't need any skin paste right now.
textByHashes.9c5aee419ec1203bfc16318f15ddd33aec4f7a23: Are you the famous Lady Keli? Leader of the toughest gang of mercenary killers around?
textByHashes.e6acea02a53089c08cc06c84b473ece76fc32a9d: I think Katrine is still tougher.
textByHashes.c7128b59c8227e5ede889305ca85d634717df55b: Of course, you need not go into specific details.
textByHashes.b96c9fcf40617beaa450da1f06be2a6e273451b1: You must have been very skillful.
textByHashes.bfb29ed14c800d65d877aa9a948e440fdb8483b2: Are you sure they will pay?
textByHashes.181a9c0f8181349e794faf782e49e4c596a4451b: How about trying something tougher? Maybe cut his finger off?
textByHashes.5df16f824e0745b68b8d13a2cfa4cd0360c17537: Could I see the key please? Just for a moment. It would be something I can tell my grandchildren. When you are even more famous than you are now.
textByHashes.6b61648f7c7dd201745b8a91a3b98a124ea0c818: Thank you so much, you are too kind, o great Keli.
textByHashes.c71b507c6e016d646eb828c9249b4d51c8b022fe: I am glad I know none of your secrets, Keli.
textByHashes.b11c571afbdd614f6ddae4c7c8eb6c65c8bd4475: I do not show respect to killers and hoodlums.
textByHashes.ecb01953687fdf3a286a12cb6b6e705f6c4ea373: Hi, who are you guarding here?
textByHashes.55e584910a060e93a3c1f1c957be352cb64e3b79: Thank you. I will try to find the other items.
textByHashes.be0e2cc3fcab7ad610bac5ba7b8da3c5d750bcdd: I'm afraid I lost that key you gave me.
textByHashes.917f08a6a8d3ca054658ef31c02a0ef4a6bcce5f: I haven't got 15 coins with me.
textByHashes.a02dbca07950384e025a6b54af96ce92ea06e6b0: I have some beer here, fancy one?
textByHashes.e12abf1c4129ca836ff4b778c4ba191320770e0d: Of course, it must be tough being here without a drink.
textByHashes.59a74d444284b505171a0390bcbc6645c9f4c5ed: How are you? Still ok? Not too drunk?
textByHashes.5c9932a4515ade2f174f9018ec6c689cc85e7010: Would you care for another beer, my friend?
textByHashes.d7c16fbe8229942e25d81419a935be29be0b5cf9: Here, just keep these for later, I hate to see a thirsty guard.
textByHashes.98e3a8efebb9c97fc00cfa66949e2f7f14e9db0c: Tell me about the life of a guard.
textByHashes.38c2f5e4b5a2cb7f0c121842e878fce666ed6c21: Hey, chill out, I won't cause you trouble. I was just wondering what you do to relax.
textByHashes.99d7e6c61f5a98c0bae02b550cdb4fb7a33daaf0: So what do you buy with these great wages?
textByHashes.a90c0547ab44bdba4d816da3b34b607564448889: What did you want to be when you were a boy?
textByHashes.f48f3291ee6a7612504e11231f118ae87c6abb4f: That was a strange hobby for a little boy.
textByHashes.943f99163fb222bfe9a6ec473bd6d7e269e75650: No, no, you got the wrong idea, totally. I just wondered if you wanted some part-time bodyguard work.
textByHashes.cf78007f3827051e0a62f5f9054262b801dc2c6e: I had better leave, I don't want trouble.
textByHashes.6bb106275e0f527a149f1812f8033af42c1763be: Hello friend, I am just rescuing the prince, is that ok?
textByHashes.c9397c6ccb255e2edc43473b525207e9b61b7a01: I haven't spoken to him yet.
textByHashes.ce45f193271b72a14f90da939d724ec81a681836: I was going to attack him.
textByHashes.d9e89439a2b0fdbf1fe78d6b86176cbc8f503303: I hoped to get him drunk.
textByHashes.cae7909b2416b33185d2f187b0d9453953dd29f5: Maybe I could bribe him to leave.
textByHashes.8c0682fb65f5fb98dea13cc622bacca483090d2e: Prince, I come to rescue you.
textByHashes.c288a0cd4fe32714d04d700c08afb8110d4280ef: With a disguise. I have removed the Lady Keli. She is tied up, but will not stay tied up for long.
textByHashes.8961cfa16bb66855414651f18447ebd0a8411a45: Take this disguise, and this key.
textByHashes.88968eac37689008c90314f7d269d569e828d92f: Go to Leela, she is close to here.
textByHashes.ec9ec93374737183b4aba4097b242bc047bf8c5b: Hi friend, I am just checking out things here.
textByHashes.14406de9857cfba608c4382020a45c7ba5670671: I won't say anything, your secret is safe with me.
textByHashes.b9ccd653ce1f4976b57cad18ae7fef3f7a15f2f3: Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHashes.cc3a29e2bbfe81b26f83afdf6db136d7ff55582b: Not yet. I'll go and see him.
textByHashes.921cea35c5960fe94a7f4fee2005d8dfff3d556d: Osman? I was told by the Chancellor to come and speak to you. Apparently you have an issue that I can help with.
textByHashes.229f3ca550c99107510939ce9ebc6b27ede8f399: Er... I just asked if he needed help and he said yes.
textByHashes.4f86ca10725a640fdbf5e40887dd302402710add: Fair enough. So what is this issue?
textByHashes.0312607a15ff3ec24700e9b828bcc70be744dee7: Well I'm sure I can manage that. How do I go about rescuing him?
textByHashes.b97c6677de8d65f63547ef0c879df77ad8dc3261: Why can't I just go in and kill her and her bandits?
textByHashes.04096c4552c6570e5d86379a6f7e2c98f42bcee9: You make a fair point. Do you know what Keli looks like?
textByHashes.0aeef281834ae4a55d31c6e3253a79af7ffabfdb: But if she has the only copy, and I can't just steal it, how do I get the key?
textByHashes.8cd946e8de57876755717929f40fadd6b9969ad9: Sounds like I should head on over to Draynor Village and see Leela then.
textByHashes.516c73738f86567f2100308501f2b161184281c8: Do you know why they've taken the Prince?
textByHashes.d3f15d0d2b66f2cc25182ad93b9510cba05367ab: Where abouts in Draynor is Leela?
textByHashes.2074b1b49d68817de1746b1a9d11fc912ebc129b: No. I think I know everything I need to.
textByHashes.b0c2a2283f58c89ac41dcacf72f2f7c62b504769: I have an imprint of the key.
textByHashes.774c62e05308e32d9c9bfa1ddefde1cea206fe4b: I'm still working on gathering all the items I need.
textByHashes.45a07ca9b81c31f3e24aaad353f8bc9bd79178ee: You must be Leela. Your father sent me to help rescue Prince Ali.
textByHashes.816bcb51969f78238ad1b094c839ac3990a68aef: I need to obtain a copy of the key to the Prince's cell, create a disguise for him that makes him look like Keli and then break him out of the jail.
textByHashes.79529ed77132b27fbd3deee142d4232a344cc322: Don't think so. I'll go and prepare.
textByHashes.221116bffb18739fb58734215f7f20acfef9797f: Not yet. I'll go and prepare.
textByHashes.dbf09ccdaf4fbfa5a7a04df4b581a6bb43eeba58: I have them here. Please make me a wig.
textByHashes.bdd66f3b89732021b2f5ef36cecac3ff45973681: Actually, I don't need one right now.
textByHashes.bc095470eaa82f0247de25a9062f00239281a9d7: No thank you. I don't need any skin paste right now.
textByHashes.d292e0154d06d6580bc881271d571c3e0eb80eda: Are you the famous Lady Keli? Leader of the toughest gang of bandits around?
textByHashes.6f1c042a670b78cf5a899fb3c60e0165e8fd01c7: Heard of you? You're famous in Gielinor!
textByHashes.d737d18a3a032b454825af90fec8d1731b305c06: Well I was actually hoping to join your group.
textByHashes.265d652bb89831e1ba19e8c105da8979402ae579: Ah, I see. You must have been very skillful.
textByHashes.ce5a7c5da3d8dc80ae3e8b79ce407675d4fc595b: How do you know someone won't try to free him?
textByHashes.7a3c60390d6156c2e9ee1b62a287de89f26802e2: Could I see the key please?
textByHashes.920ccc2ee7057d5e24b263ec8887fbe0e5fb109f: It will be something I can tell my grandchildren, when you are even more famous than you are now.
textByHashes.2081f7e2fd8c157d60fb897ec12a714129f40a03: Thank you. I'd better go now.
textByHashes.48202dd391f931a6b2effde790a8ade62b4258b4: Could I touch the key for a moment please?
textByHashes.4c3e9c9b82d13253407404c19287f31ec239a95d: Thank you so much! You are too kind.
textByHashes.f4d4ee1e7a1a2ed18e0d8dfe20a681e0ec735d44: That is a good way to keep secrets.
textByHashes.420dce8628181ff168d90a46010429638bee851c: Well I'll be off. Good luck.
textByHashes.10f926f6542eb462b995636c3e20ee9484d273d7: You must have trained a lot for this work.
textByHashes.d1b13b28e1987ad179de8a748bd52fb589d20344: I shouldn't disturb someone as tough as you.
textByHashes.1678dcc6a1233f432cbb44cdbc5cb00f33415487: I've heard rumours that you kill people.
textByHashes.06e62d3b026a449b3be96c570eef49368820005a: No, I've never really heard of you.
textByHashes.7862c695644f8ead1a73d4985a47735a9be0a822: No, still doesn't ring a bell.
textByHashes.880d399acdb90f7e50e2777201496b24b695dd75: I don't show respect to killers and hoodlums.
textByHashes.59d6c82f7880d853332921ce8dea788b90a8d9b5: Actually, I have heard of you. You're famous in Gielinor!
textByHashes.8d586a24c2ac3449674ad7a9af330604fe641541: I was hoping we could talk more about your prisoner.
textByHashes.1a6f2726963323b67b227a2ebbf94046c064bb14: Hi. Who are you guarding here?
textByHashes.78b02016ff85bea254193a4b7f2c65b30b5b1a68: Alright. I'll go have a chat to this guard.
textByHashes.c1c2a449d5c570e6eba766178c0eddee2b545cf8: I have some beer here. Fancy one?
textByHashes.f16210dd59ef10c66a0fbd57d89e254e65b2b9d3: Of course. It must be tough being here without a drink.
textByHashes.387ac6237e772da885720c4b9c0dadc841cf9619: How are you? Still okay? Not too drunk?
textByHashes.64b81eb1d5499aec109eb0610af730cb9d9875b1: Here, just keep these for later. I hate to see a thirsty guard.
textByHashes.da00ae211336e5153d7bb46bbf38b937b1a6338f: That's a strange hobby for a boy.
textByHashes.12f8d5afc5bf4c3c22615ac57f34f4c89bef1ad7: Hey, chill out. I won't cause you trouble.
textByHashes.67cad3958ba3d827fbf068a20b7e70df080921b6: So why do you do it?
textByHashes.c99279e03632bc2f67c68fbbd08b92baa22215f5: So what do you buy with your great wages?
textByHashes.2d1bc538a670c3fa37d374767aaa2bbef9796077: Would you be interested in making a little more money?
textByHashes.7bff176ad311a95feae5f90eb5215e65c2ed8c41: No, no, you've got the wrong idea, totally. I just wondered if you wanted some part-time bodyguard work.
textByHashes.6433e6f7f4be002f4fc8303b1bddef178dc6e478: Hello friend. I'm just here to rescue the Prince, if thats okay?
textByHashes.2a42f8f033de1cf05314e96602db7e3195b84b72: I might be able to get him drunk.
textByHashes.ab5685b36a02eab48972111ea24ba50d54dbe00e: Hello! I'm here to tie you up!
textByHashes.c1a91ba4503f72b74074b4fdad91a63481139af0: Prince Ali? I'm here to rescue you.
textByHashes.130be77e07f45c4e5730b463ef62c5fdcd2bfaf9: I've already dealt with Lady Keli and the guard. I'm going to get you a disguise so the guards outside don't spot you leaving. I'll be back once I have it.
textByHashes.836b8f3b3ec8d82dd351f2fe74a78edbf65a9ab9: Take this disguise. You can use it to get past the guards outside.
textByHashes.fa205c3f01da2378988082ea996b373b50fdd59a: I'm just happy to have helped. All the best.
textByHashes.4d8058faac01cd8e0846bd65fb5f1066fb339620: Got any work that needs doing here?
textByHashes.1d56773569bf67b9c50208056a0df24fabe8485b: Great! So what do you need?
textByHashes.d54b4036ee7ea9f55358e9a2f97441a3f11ca362: Well, I can't say no to a bit of treasure. What do I need to do?
textByHashes.6fb50548141a4a85667b70513b832c4cd004734b: Port Sarim? I thought you said far off land?
textByHashes.0972726e364f4ef828817dc70d810650c81d1572: Okay... but surely if this is pirate treasure, someone would have noticed... Port Sarim is a busy place.
textByHashes.802f55b5e777097fe02cae0b37d2e8b415d47b7e: Hang on... is this actually just a normal cargo delivery? You know there's a notice board on the docks for that sort of thing...
textByHashes.6c7f407761ad1893a355f7446c1b9eb8dde91929: I'm fairly certain they do, but fine. I'll go collect this crate for you.
textByHashes.7d7ee5c195a7e281dc4995de8981e4c6132d9c1f: I'm afraid I don't have it on me.
textByHashes.ea7aad6ae05cf4b4fafcd1e35d6ec94ab9c4b67d: Actually, I've changed my mind. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.c184b5a0e5dce2a5620f3a0bda7acaf6aad6fa2c: About that job you wanted doing...
textByHashes.6fa11f0ea3de03bf2865fac80937317fdcfa9919: I delivered that cargo for you.
textByHashes.fd401d8c392257952825f728e5f0192d5bc8f078: So could I have some 'looty' now?
textByHashes.d8fc125afe1a701b14f4ffd734812257d2e380ec: I get the feeling you're about to ask me to do something else...
textByHashes.cffb0b36e99413ef9a303120f44241366b3a4980: But it is an ordinary crate, Steve. There was even a label on it addressed to you.
textByHashes.a47a231afb1061b0ac841f18500d90328d381800: Right... So what's this special key then?
textByHashes.6e9d02bb1c81fbfbf8653ab8da7e0d8248132bf0: Is it essential that they be a scallywag as well as a smith? If not, I know of a dwarf near Mudskipper Point who might be able to help us.
textByHashes.a5e5c63596b64c87fbc893f94c2194171de9b5e4: Okay, I'll grab a redberry pie and go visit Thurgo...
textByHashes.f59dfda3e0eee5067f7ee86c1bdc337602e664cb: About that crate that needs opening...
textByHashes.45c61531d7037ff0a6468317fd17da4027c62b8f: I need some help with a 'special key'.
textByHashes.01a337d25dbe3f8f75c0c911cae1431bbbcd2fcd: Well, truth be told, I'm not sure it's really a key that I need. I just need something that can open a crate.
textByHashes.e2f7c3fd79aa7bf06b0b8cd7535797b86157d4ad: Can you help me make one?
textByHashes.0b007c3f28f835d3198e5186e1685626d50663ae: I don't have all of that I'm afraid...
textByHashes.31afd838f0cb387540d5b5ae6712a2bcbdd8f98f: Thanks! I should probably see what Steve makes of this.
textByHashes.e95921f3e44ec3b08c51ad4d1c2483f59e234ca3: So, can you help me make a crowbar?
textByHashes.fed192531fd45acbf553a1df61b21d55e0b21435: Can you help me make another crowbar?
textByHashes.a8cf3f79d47c1b3b807a53d9cb01be2b4ac1ece6: I made that 'special key' you needed.
textByHashes.f03180642455c81b36df0399dc7e3c56c8532069: I'm glad you approve. Shall I use it to crack this crate open?
textByHashes.2d550156a0ce743e6cbab6150a118ee0de5bbb45: Fine. What should I test it on?
textByHashes.0886ca528d7aa3ecb326c3b39107609673b4fe6d: Why would I even want to do that? How do you even know it's drinkable?
textByHashes.81d06bc42344cf9c51bcb5bae3cb41e612c1c134: Okay... this doesn't seem very healthy, but fine.
textByHashes.53db001cb3ed10e8b47d58534cbcb2a8a4fe6177: Not yet. Where can I find it again?
textByHashes.a63ad96e4a2ba016433f58a8183e4c6b71544b5b: I have. Did you know that troll was going to jump out and attack me? I had the fright of my life!
textByHashes.77990297faa21426adefd59a550f79ab3f963a07: Of course it does. Right, no more wasting time. I'm assuming that's the crate next to you? I'm opening it.
textByHashes.f6a6cd72d53dd546c355299f3332d92561b6ca1e: Well, err...who are you, and what are all these bones doing here?
textByHashes.d41b76c938b5c5194cf30d7fda65154c11a2f6fd: Well that explains the bones...sort of...but what are you doing all the way out here?
textByHashes.408f51fb1377c7410281a92891fb30f586ff82fa: Yes. I'll give you a hand.
textByHashes.cee18236395c50f470a7b05293b771dbaa8db988: Where do you need me to dig?
textByHashes.ddf6508a7763963986e7fc71dd3f2bf831760362: Well, it makes some sense I suppose...
textByHashes.af741c9359792d81abd7d9bc41b532453b15345b: So you just want me to bring you these bones and that will be that?
textByHashes.c2951a33986ed2db635f63d7b1eef13036feae97: Why do I need to boil them in vinegar?
textByHashes.2835a20c831fdad0b6c87f9c1e10265f8469ee03: All right, I'll be back later.
textByHashes.ecf1e2683022753f08ffdfa4932f74a15e0dea98: Wow, trying a guilt trip much?
textByHashes.6ae85467ab54cca067b2a17e01806977d043c323: Where is that mumbling coming from?
textByHashes.f996262638738d3991e6ed77b2f993fee9233809: I was just passing and I wondered if you still needed someone to help with the bones?
textByHashes.2e7d565f6aa18c28aa0f04b5618fd1f1beb5e849: Sorry! I was told to come and speak with a wine merchant about getting some vinegar, I must have the wrong person.
textByHashes.d9a13e2d02024629d3b61e52f6f319b5a3a63f0e: If by HE you mean the old man with the sack of bones, then yes.
textByHashes.f8ae94e694550ac39bf4c6bab6ff401f57f3d3ab: Not at the moment. Can you just give me a run down on which bones I have left to get?
textByHashes.7a82a12874fbca314d7d21aa98958a3f8094e646: Yes. I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.7805e5fd6947dbb7f6a57f7a830bdf936fc94824: I have some bones for you.
textByHashes.e3e132bacffa3bfd99cb1b6635a860bff1e7a3ba: No problem. I'll be back if I find some more.
textByHashes.b8803d3d7914d9c405b22a779bc2b98e65608841: Well I'm just glad I could help.
textByHashes.a40fd29ade1c69b6cd0150e4ce47ddd2e2632d63: No problem, I'll be sure to bring anything you might like over if I find something.
textByHashes.6c2bd3d3ee482b11fa43fe60b45390bc7d288e52: I can't wait to see the displays once they are finished.
textByHashes.9603b4f55fb2ac103d7c3d3d5b780d8915c30977: So how is the sorting going?
textByHashes.2692e47f84007467016bc6f8d8662c279450a2cb: Well if I see any bones I think you might like I'll bring them over.
textByHashes.8f4ffdc77d4111009816796598fc82a142b54b06: Well I'm glad to have furthered the cause of the museum.
textByHashes.2b31ca0581b0fff40dcc7416e9b3da31eaf91c7e: I just hope everyone will enjoy the finished displays.
textByHashes.89979dbbe422a51361efa1ef830ffd3c1186d61e: I am! Do you have another quest for me?
textByHashes.2e3992a81a2ab730064864665cdefb7309f0da0e: Ratcatchers, eh? Where would I find them?
textByHashes.89bdaca2ddce4d9340cb948129464227d3be150f: I wouldn't have thought you'd have much business down in the sewers.
textByHashes.92db5e872e43e4fd0e77cd76c17f1db5c0d63565: Thank you Gertrude, I'll be sure to have a look for these ratcatchers.
textByHashes.4d423d433914d562cac93e1c5e959b8183f428dc: I'll be off. See you another time.
textByHashes.8fe16964c9850276b0dcccd392956cd921ce690a: Interesting, but I'm a bit busy right now. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.e298fec60eb5c9d940426988ac738e50aa5e918d: The two ladies you said I could find in Varrock's sewers? Yes, you told me about them.
textByHashes.788e67cf26c4f9073df77830ddd988ac7020612e: I'm Gertrude's friend. She said you two were-
textByHashes.d08425498362c907910f3edf4d95f79678374d38: My cat and I are adventurers. If you could teach us a trick or two I bet it would come in handy!
textByHashes.ea884d85f13acf2849f2b2135d32ad80201c1277: I can hear you, you know!
textByHashes.de41642db4f4d9fb06f6e8553ecab079e5203561: I already have this medal that Gertrude gave me for catching 100 rats. Will that do?
textByHashes.9b0ea80c708ba44358a85be998232339b2fb1e43: I suppose so. How will you know that I've completed your task?
textByHashes.3e3a7381cc2d0b257824d017215a8f125c264099: How many, er, 'ratsies' do I have to catch again?
textByHashes.c1d1d41e1582e347665e39006adb6b3fb27b1ddf: Alright, no need to rub it in.
textByHashes.2dadefbb832de6d01284711eab354e3f6e836f5b: Good job puss, we really showed those rats what for.
textByHashes.8adba03220f6e52818670b507126cf7e3584492d: Oh never mind, it's just a turn of phrase.
textByHashes.4321fe19c6d47347f03b673fc7c9d4bb2a0dc644: Well cat, we should tell Grimesquit and Phingspet that we're done.
textByHashes.9580e5b6b921d2815e17c3fb490cdeed1bc124ff: They're not going to be able to sniff whether I was successful or not unless I bring my cat with me.
textByHashes.ac8f4f263410d3bdc4a1f5cda71d587a35f338d2: I splatted the ratsies for you.
textByHashes.0f0da02db0a269115ede846b5ef246c140605839: Sorry, I just thought... won't happen again.
textByHashes.c42ef4cb4cca198d43f9550d6eaad1de5caa5a01: Er, yes, I did... catch the rats.
textByHashes.2376600460ab6e66c2e7863a06814c84fb86bbd9: Can you tell me about ratcatching now?
textByHashes.d8240d5a73ff99f86b906688eb9664e43e0361b0: I'm not sure that's a compliment...
textByHashes.212c36fd2cfa1d9a6f2b6cc602a40dbb0bd3f310: What? So we've just caught all these rats for nothing?
textByHashes.a86e8f7b4d9b6e378638b6d5300714236d7f90dd: Isn't there anything you can teach me? I caught a lot of rats, you know...
textByHashes.c3cbfc072389d0ca9b3094da9a3a1190c1383c6d: Where do I find this... Jimmy?
textByHashes.cc2ac75c1ad0ade4ae7e8b9767aac1c6b7d5c147: Can I have another rat pole please?
textByHashes.42a9e064cff3ea1d66daa8c99a08237a161942bb: Where can I find Jimmy Dazzler again?
textByHashes.338e456120925e2e0507b184369e5b237492592c: I will absolutely not be doing that.
textByHashes.3fd8c05c69f9824fca8307aa680dd98b723dd90e: They said you could teach me a thing or two about ratcatching.
textByHashes.0d63d72352f6feba05b3ae1c5eaaf9c727aed90e: Maybe I could help you out with something then?
textByHashes.1f5b8ec0ec335ea70f67b4caf9ae27246ef97a4b: I am an adventurer after all.
textByHashes.bae28a532f40fa0cee3f563bb19e5edf563998bd: He'd be better off calling a doctor about that.
textByHashes.b71322c49b6b13150620471b71be93a30a893845: So you want me to go to his place and kill some rats? That sounds easy enough.
textByHashes.41b9a156ee2cf9b522ae363e6385bc149b1d6f5d: Oh, I see. So I have to do this covertly?
textByHashes.4bdf9032294796b979a6a00070e98c7ae9b59c7f: Are you going to cast an invisibility spell on me? That should make it easy.
textByHashes.19cbc789640f95c46b96003668ff183fb1da236b: Where'd you learn that spell, anyway?
textByHashes.45b8942cfef86e80d6a2805f41bb785cf390a34e: Do you have any tips for me now?
textByHashes.396b31fa5315eb7bea644e8c92103301533e6036: I've lost the map you gave me. Can I have another?
textByHashes.a9b2456db69e905df46e4839af085289eacb9968: What am I meant to do again?
textByHashes.2d0a7eb00841429e35e953a0afe2dc498fc3fcd3: Got it. Thanks for the reminder.
textByHashes.7aacbce5cdc5885dd16663f016a94b97c99fb827: I think I should have a cat big enough to catch rats with me before I go.
textByHashes.0f743fc69f8132e4bb69bca580a2a9e2247bcd3c: I don't want to go there again. I barely managed to get out the first time.
textByHashes.d899406f0fcf5a2859870274161fcd00ea60db00: These directions are from Ardougne. It would be much easier to find the place if I left from there.
textByHashes.536a9d7aa37e7e233c1a497c2ff85ca9a5181e2c: I think I'll go there some other time.
textByHashes.fdea8331c8014fb800b8d11cc08ae3a2bbafd641: Directions to... here, actually! I'd better hold onto them until I complete Jimmy's task.
textByHashes.ee333ba5ec1815d0a1fdcc4de9622ef29688469c: Good job, Puss, I think that just about wraps things up here.
textByHashes.e42a424e5a63fe79e12e35b5c4501aa6b67ca0de: I knew you had a dark side.
textByHashes.b99c1d2ab2c57ad57b3d99b250e154c721bd3ff7: No, the job really is done!
textByHashes.4d903117ee30a648bb1bdfc6821f2a2f3104cae7: Never mind. So you'll teach me all about ratcatching now?
textByHashes.54443f23cfa6a10cee543a0a34a4a099134e9a8b: He does look good at catching rats. But what about older cats?
textByHashes.a855891e125590fc0c81ea994c741a02ea22eafd: Where do I find this... Hooknosed Jack?
textByHashes.2b511a67a01fddc9be7bfee9fdd780e7a7a0a373: Can you tell me more about the Rat Pits?
textByHashes.7dfd6dd326a6b27c42e2b3cff388a4b0ffb848ff: What goes on in these pits then?
textByHashes.1732632d6313ae12cc8b26b502786c132f03cf62: Jimmy Dazzler sent me. He said you could help train my grown cat to catch rats.
textByHashes.9d1734cf0bc72ba7731f0295429570ca9680f5c6: Well, I'm an adventurer. There must be something I can do for you in return.
textByHashes.fdb2f67f56966a4f5eca64ea74111352c2658413: Well I could be your apprentice! I've already got hands-on experience.
textByHashes.bb8cfaba5fb000abf2bb2a68baa30cfda03e11c3: I helped the Grime Sisters catch loads of rats in the sewers, and I cleared out a whole mansion in Ardougne for Jimmy Dazzler.
textByHashes.719a736494b3fdbd5182cb52b40a27d374d299f5: So what do you say? Can me and my cat help you out?
textByHashes.505f30cb85cf058d25d7585c17766917b53e4c67: I think so. Will any type of poison do?
textByHashes.78465fabb4430d0d5de43a89e18d192d8562749c: How would I mix my own rat poison?
textByHashes.266be9f840e7458e085b218f14e43b4e6076c681: Can you make me some rat poison?
textByHashes.e1296e61e26d1979e23185ad9981e607942e2bd5: No, not yet. What do I need again?
textByHashes.1a8c5303b68ab3eb560dcdc7683b17b4debe7913: I've finished the job. Now will you teach me more about ratcatching?
textByHashes.594783dbd68384084f5dd975e953abb191c0d806: Um... let me think about this one.
textByHashes.6c257eb9ef8f8cf42010e8ede18d1f454c334c56: Putting random things in rat holes isn't my idea of fun.
textByHashes.5172e6ba9afa805993b61c32c4494762bda0214d: Well that's one less rat hole. I had better finish the job off quick before they start to reproduce again.
textByHashes.f5fa175ee1828dcbe8c121b036749e4bb57f058f: Hmm, that should do the trick. Those rats should soon die off.
textByHashes.8c67a9f476a85fe655d0d4767c26481066e08165: I poisoned the rats in the warehouse! Do you have time to teach me about grown cats yet?
textByHashes.f44325cfaea21299b8172d4694c54074a6dac89e: Are you serious? I've gone and done a job for you, the least you could do is say thanks.
textByHashes.a32b33461c89fecd9c3e18c624f754d1ec0ffadd: Can I help? I feel somewhat responsible...
textByHashes.49d22d4480af21fddd3fd04ad10181fd7d97b94c: Putting things in poisoned rat holes isn't my idea of fun.
textByHashes.758e0292fdc846afd457328cfdec365e907fa50e: I need to talk to you about cats.
textByHashes.e23c7079350a5612653c44fa38bcfd3dba937c14: Well, do you know anything about poisons?
textByHashes.0de782b4c4ed797c1c9298acbb54a6ce2a3007a5: How about rat poisons and anti-posisons for cats?
textByHashes.5b44706b3d6c10623ee2e35e1969ae08a0b02b2f: Okay. Hooknosed Jack's cat, Pox, ate some rats which were poisoned with a Kwuarm and Red Spider Egg based concoction.
textByHashes.036b157680a0ea8ca6d56182f60b9735420eb71c: Could you make me another cat anti-poison potion?
textByHashes.c72a4263cfc2bb166bf63b7f6ed3daf350157720: Uh... I don't have all the ingredients on me at the moment.
textByHashes.05f1a7b3ab02f1dc7e06fe0e6157ab1f8af5af3d: I knew I forgot something. I'll be back in a second.
textByHashes.78f4103b9c20686494aa2299db6ee30a7c9b42e5: Yes, I've got it right here.
textByHashes.9494789cd1316ebc12cf88c8e93af80391870299: No worries there, I'd be sorry to see poor Pox come to harm.
textByHashes.1af5b0e8444c97a061ec201d126b31b113561456: I did a good job, didn't I?
textByHashes.c7b3f36412b157b24a5d91b6c4930d2fe0921afe: Wait, but I poisoned all the rat holes just like you said.
textByHashes.333417a6130ac54561970de324b3fc5ce9c4ee71: Well, I'm not scared of big, nasty rats.
textByHashes.7eb3ea699e470483cdfe91be00b23b962ec9c812: Don't worry - we're on the case.
textByHashes.26744c1cd8b5bfc0493aaebbd660f31559fc46eb: Go get that nasty rat, don't hold back!
textByHashes.ca8c668eb4611a2e5cb0f909466476c82353600a: Just barely! I was getting worried for my cat, but we pulled through.
textByHashes.031ba78d753baa71aa20407efea4233ed0c49f97: Yes! The King Rat was holed up behind a wall, so I had to send my cat in to get it.
textByHashes.b946c5632732f33ba2032602e3e79fd139be6972: Thank you so much! I imagine my cat will learn a lot in there.
textByHashes.8d86163846672b73825643a80f210d9935465d10: I could help you. I'm young-ish and my lungs are doing fine so far.
textByHashes.a8e5edea94ee56d3e400a4b70f87fdcded860f36: What's up with your lungs anyway?
textByHashes.27dc65f08504cfdd7c5b99e5de64659d43de8fba: That's right! Me and my cat have been learning from the best of the best.
textByHashes.2fa4c233e389df9e676d075ba9cc1c2cc9802f11: The Sisters Grime, Jimmy Dazzler, Hooknosed Jack...
textByHashes.a5b6a5b1ebdb173b54ffd19ae391807ce5be5ec8: Better now that I've helped them out, I think.
textByHashes.ff74a8074d326d5e796e59f76ad69ed8a2770423: Now, how should I get rid of these rats?
textByHashes.e89b01f762e5dc3102014708ac2e78cfab94e4fc: That seems a fair deal. But I'd appreciate any pointers you could give me.
textByHashes.927a33069532fd61c613f19623acd2f6cc0a8203: Do you have any more straightforward hints?
textByHashes.b6ad1264e934cac6e1e926c60b9e1e1905fc0ca3: Never mind, I'll figure it out!
textByHashes.0f13b4b414b360e5a4911d4357e6763672e1b50d: Hmm... this isn't working as well as I'd hoped.
textByHashes.d977b67c678d0fba2b9fe14d2558f9d9aed38d17: Hold on, let me equip my Catspeak Amulet so we can talk.
textByHashes.24b68311e7645f28ba3c044b48062d06fcba4d7c: Can't you see I'm busy adventuring?
textByHashes.933572c1953ab8b4fbe8e673066a0842e0d0816d: Well then smarty paws, what should I be doing?
textByHashes.bad4ea7f5518cbaf56c0771122a0a0d7581624bf: I can see that for myself, thanks.
textByHashes.cddde24b210d16c5bb5e3f0df5f6d9f27e9c8f29: Great idea. I'll get right to it.
textByHashes.17b940fbcaa1e59a42906ef985565bcfb03269ac: Hey cat, you know the drill, get going!
textByHashes.b905f399e6b14b820c4691d319bd13312f522e2a: Hey cat, great job. What an ambush!
textByHashes.b78d82c68fc49a607f5aaba377e233de573323bd: You know, you really scare me sometimes.
textByHashes.8e4c794cd59ba63dc43ac659e12f75e7b3c89a44: They have rat pits in Port Sarim?
textByHashes.c8a1fe63cc15bd1438f6df779f8c298438fc4f89: So where are the Keldagrim rat pits then?
textByHashes.50b808cf2af0ea430b9ccd05ea524b36a769c17a: Hello, The Face said you wanted to speak with me.
textByHashes.6a0a66517bd7d77c4e00059ec8becf37eed039c7: Well I can't take all the credit, I've had more than a little help from my cat.
textByHashes.4ae05a7731cc28dbf9770943b284e103e3171441: Smokin' Joe said that you know lots about training wily cats.
textByHashes.1c1aa5840aabc3c891157e9be7a2bd9503df7523: So you'll show me how to turn my cat into a wily cat?
textByHashes.7d9f589cff45917b73bf6cc6ecacb013cd8b5f30: Let me guess... you want me to catch some rats for you first?
textByHashes.a7b404f02a4247694f5e5ba9fddeb9ae7f2fa1c9: So why do you want all the rats wiped out at once?
textByHashes.70f4f1de6c57a8d1bac610bc965728ddb981081b: Couldn't you just use some 'creative license' instead?
textByHashes.e1b6db5d5b868f47cef9a248e32f0b6cc911a4e9: Not to disappoint you, but this task might be beyond my capabilities...
textByHashes.21162944fd0cf693218b6536de6ca1ba532d8d07: What do I have to do again?
textByHashes.2cdab5ddece1cef8661efadd30a1a58b7f75c6e6: Right. I'd better figure out how I'm going to do that...
textByHashes.1499f038e8427a6855ae50d723490187dec1a2dc: Yes. Actually, I wanted to ask you about the task she gave me...
textByHashes.d6ce9d783b9655f0e7cc9ab1736b902c73a461ce: That's a powerful-looking cat you have there.
textByHashes.654fdd20e4a1020c5de287a1ecd81c0c9ef8ca7f: Oh really? Does she know any cool tricks?
textByHashes.2e8d6e79963d8400700916adfdfd19bcb8716b6b: I just don't think Felkrash was that impressive.
textByHashes.10f62d74099fbb53a4af78eb8669b088dd47f09d: All the other ratcatchers I've met had loads of tricks to show me.
textByHashes.1eee1bbf721ed7716c4f98b979307a64a2a269b1: In comparison, Felkrash was just... disappointing.
textByHashes.96c12f6bdb509cde74396fc0ab59e5fb845874be: Oh yeah? What's the most impressive thing she's done then?
textByHashes.84394acf36348da5b54cf23695a1af4a22b3d5fd: I don't know. That just sounds like one of her stories.
textByHashes.78a9332c95409421d1e8e911e442d00f31a75d9c: Don't worry, I won't tell Felkrash you snitched.
textByHashes.540a4c5f446c77f830650ac8fabfb1decd7fa725: They charm snakes over in Pollnivneach... maybe they charm rats, too?
textByHashes.7bcbbdc2d7d9b1de4fffe8b095daa22de7f9b6e3: If it makes you feel better, I lie to a lot of people.
textByHashes.98c1f6fa1530b7e12dccd9e2f8e3cb55e914b144: I think I know how to carry out your task.
textByHashes.5014ed9f8b24f900e841953397ece0809818e8a4: Oh no, she didn't say a word.
textByHashes.8f564dcd06b45194ee89fb4b9f2bd84e39cfa21a: I want to talk to you about animal charming.
textByHashes.05f4545eeb439f972fc46bc7fa9df95a25006562: Can you help me learn how to charm animals?
textByHashes.44562442348748cd6454fe802e7e8bea8978ff19: Listen, do you know someone called Felkrash?
textByHashes.ecce2120c2ffd39b26819e8e52ee91e16a6f1fa9: What's wrong with killing rats? That is her job, after all.
textByHashes.59fb8f08d23c10fb66bbd74f62c46a29035ba97d: So there's nothing I could do to get you teach me how to charm rats?
textByHashes.23dda2ecd7f3c4369c76dc81e6a4e3b33e3b063b: What if I offered you a drink?
textByHashes.bfb6bbeeac08b0418ec484fd4db11771daeb1986: So what's your favourite drink then?
textByHashes.30361ae347c9896db059c393fa23102d04f773a2: So will you teach me now?
textByHashes.72cb79e273babbd4872263f037489e318eb748da: I don't have any beer on me.
textByHashes.4d4752e4e3e0e251de74ff2ee504c6632358f9be: What if I offered you some food?
textByHashes.31a5ad15d6c41ca8ad911e2e7fcf757b75dcc33f: What if I offered you some money?
textByHashes.d3f4e146a0846e5ddb43a42da2ce2197f8389f81: How much money are we talking about?
textByHashes.87abf6222f6e09f1fe8cef786631f170fa091fa6: I don't have that much money!
textByHashes.baf5a6764ff74a527d7f24d3f2978749cdc5ee60: What if I offered you 50 coins?
textByHashes.beaccee4498a7a058a027521ccfe0792ab204c38: Forget about it. I don't care that much.
textByHashes.6909fb06ffd05451f05c7e326aa4e18b23755584: I'll give you no more than 100 coins.
textByHashes.6eb42f678934f18fc81a225b76b174665109e5da: What if I said I'd kill you?
textByHashes.e2fd110bbb13b34bebfbbe26bebc54d8c4fe42d8: I've lost some of the gear you gave me.
textByHashes.c4ae403f02c1d8fb5ec835815511ffd756181048: I need a new flute and some music.
textByHashes.6c3b7a0d435712fd5309f61d99a14d40f72238e2: How do I charm rats again?
textByHashes.dee1fa2580f88d47a907923584fe4aedcc523dbc: I don't think I should play that tune here.
textByHashes.fb5acb459dea8b37c99ecfc86e07f52075eeb653: Don't worry, Felkrash has no idea how I figured it out.
textByHashes.88b50135a7b2a84a048ec52a93013a450da9f841: I don't want to play that tune again - I'll have a pack of rats chasing after me!
textByHashes.cded1ecaa7faee551fb3f029ad2b30e46551fa29: Ha! I did it. Did you see?
textByHashes.c1f3f12b272cad2e9f142f10e8d40daa2898c37d: Can you train my cat to be a wily cat?
textByHashes.fab2bd03c53372db0324be97ddd00536f902183e: Sorry I took so long, , it took a while to come up with a name for you.
textByHashes.0ebf7b38229096d739d932f07a43bb0bd7adbba7: Do you have any other quests for me? That last one of yours was so much fun, I was hoping you would!
textByHashes.4ce7d1cc64ee2b75089c9d7fe4f7cd07740c8a50: Yup, that's why I had to go and collect you things to make a cake with wasn't it?
textByHashes.174375d98a8a00c1eda7d90f271760e20139e2dc: GRRRR! Why did you have me running around finding ingredients for you then?!?!
textByHashes.1b6f2da1833f8d131d4dbc8255b143d82cccfec1: So you lied to me to get me to do you a favour?
textByHashes.c1dc86de4bf73021c04110650185c1444a9b24a5: Fair enough, you're not the first, but why lie? You could have just asked me, I'd have been happy to help.
textByHashes.3e7c7f046cb28939e72c6219b16eaa0bea7bc6fa: You need help AGAIN? Well, what seems to be the problem?
textByHashes.04f1af6ce4d4be98bda24c630347c1e875929b1b: Please do. The suffering of others always seems to turn out very profitable for me.
textByHashes.e90b88f43a334cfb0ecf08ad40327f2b8a0f2e5e: And with a name like that, I'm sure I would remember.
textByHashes.ecbb58498b66e95ddcfbe07bd70ef061dc8d5dec: So you have your job because a hundred years ago your ancestor was a very good cook.
textByHashes.25670b3526ce94817d9ef992819605fc24e3e717: I don't see how that's much of a problem for you...
textByHashes.794695b56ae7789e6d40fc07ba80b40df13746ba: In fact I would say you are a VERY LUCKY man indeed. Frankly, I'd have fired you by now if you worked for me.
textByHashes.a83f5a34da6f9b5d63059c15e350f21923dda364: What won't? Come on man, pull yourself together and speak to me!
textByHashes.d5c7b3a2ea30371e89fc2928a5f1a64250115851: Let me take a wild guess: You have the recipe but you don't have any of the ingredients, and OBVIOUSLY you can't just go and get them yourself?
textByHashes.27ce6fbf3f286b50e8d10f804976b73fe0c2465e: Okay, tell me what you're after and then I'll decide if I want to help you or not.
textByHashes.ac47befbe4589ce400c13a56c4ebea797c9bf415: I would love to help you! What do I have to do?
textByHashes.b40489c40ef22dfcadcff274603e14c62291658c: I'll go look for those for you then!
textByHashes.01e28442b40aeddcf9a90a05bf0d2c18c981cd4c: To be honest... I just can't be bothered.
textByHashes.05e6ea5c5b2b00ff0d1429ea61659aac1aa18607: Dunno. Maybe I'll change my mind and come back later and help you.
textByHashes.868c9ab139012c62dd845ccb43e8e3786436d81f: I just can't be bothered to help you out. You'll have to find some other adventurer to do your little quest for you.
textByHashes.83e09b3ca78ad5923d4508e2161d828aea51d19b: I'm curious... How exactly do you still have a job?
textByHashes.19524d48d9a5dbc1e28502c100a23e924d32e7d3: It's just surprising that you would still have employment as head cook of Lumbridge castle, given how obviously bad at your job you are.
textByHashes.ef666442cab92c6e5a3c14deb38c29508a579bba: Well, things you would expect every kitchen to have... Eggs, milk, flour... You know... But you don't.
textByHashes.d3250cd3d219f5d8fe537118435ee2bb090f79ce: And what is worse, you don't even go off and get them yourself, you expect people like me to run around after you!
textByHashes.1d94a7c32aad48bff7bd611e7e05e6164161a4a3: About those ingredients you wanted for the banquet...
textByHashes.f036d3a738f4d971e314802f93f25fe4050769b2: Erm... Sorry, I don't have any of that with me...
textByHashes.bd80db43fd8a2495449fb8edd348fb066607c40a: Weeelll... I have some of that stuff with me, but not all of it...
textByHashes.55c273143c9972a0b659ed2de6062ef0050cc7e5: I'm afraid I only have a with me...
textByHashes.b6e7d3e9960b807370ddfeadc6f0bb4fe88dfaaf: I'm afraid I only have an with me...
textByHashes.e8faabc131210e6c8639e7947c20edbc50486d5b: I'm afraid I only have a and a with me...
textByHashes.5ea5ac565caf26f6cf6a145084f675563f0271f9: I'm afraid I only have an and a with me...
textByHashes.91f250bbac0682bc07f38963c727f3dd42f4d86b: I'm afraid I only have a and an with me...
textByHashes.953fe80a2f5e83d849d2f0fde9713c25de8a4dd5: I'm afraid I only have an and an with me...
textByHashes.bf85a529ef17248e20e51d26d1fc6ee106997e2e: I've got a 'Dirty Blast', a Greenman's ale and a rotten tomato, I just need to get the eye of newt!
textByHashes.fc20368f78fed3d03b927c9d2b8d0809557909f5: I've got the 'Dirty Blast', a Greenman's ale and the eye of newt, I just have to find myself a rotten tomato...
textByHashes.68a87b2170187328ca61c87100bee96a696c26c0: I managed to find a 'Dirty Blast', a rotten tomato and an eye of newt, but I didn't manage to get a hold of a Greenman's ale yet...
textByHashes.6b97fc26d122085ea41675a266ffd3634371aef3: I've got you a Greenman's ale, the rotten tomato and the eye of newt, but haven't had any luck on the 'Dirty Blast' yet...
textByHashes.43873020579821083b35d8161fb83b2b6c7e2d8d: Okay then. I'll get on it.
textByHashes.f7d09227ba0adf285a76aa8568134569163dfd73: Where would I find an eye of newt?
textByHashes.c61be02c4037a5915d321a8b42f50c4339157d65: Thank you so much for that help.
textByHashes.ebb78375b4cf96de370af8e72b7842aa0dcfb38e: Where would I find a rotten tomato?
textByHashes.e1b802b7875ea070fd2e0a38a315762de27b170d: Where would I find a greenman's ale?
textByHashes.111e9b5b4c832086d4919707fc0eafc1b9723f30: Where would I find a 'Dirty Blast'? I've never heard of it before.
textByHashes.05d77f39fa155dfd48b7a40de8eb8bb88866da9e: A Fruit Blast? Sure, like they sell at Blurberry's Bar, right?
textByHashes.dfa5dd745325f914458215a64e54c944ca473f7a: Freshly made? Why did you specify that?
textByHashes.7dcf53ab0292dedce36966caae41cd2be631aefd: Oh. Well, it shouldn't take that long.
textByHashes.3263ebe76e34b767ac9cb82f45da46938b545cdb: A Fruit Blast? Can't say I've ever heard of it...
textByHashes.713a721c1c7e188bd0b68914a02c638bc41230e4: That looks disgusting, but it's what the cook asked for...
textByHashes.64138471a6928d879425250580ecfbbc1f9d17c1: No thanks, that looks DISGUSTING! I won't drink that!
textByHashes.1a0c8f77647b42e932f541c817127a31c371c8c1: You will be happy to know... I have all of that with me!
textByHashes.051ba86c593f9f83351c931461374da1b04de51e: I don't know... I'm just... quite busy, I guess...
textByHashes.5cbdc024cd7da5ace25713c761a0b30e165b54db: I do have a question. A very GOOD question.
textByHashes.6f0eb955c5273c05a40a228de37fa7c9bc174b81: Just what in the flipping hippo is going on?!?!?
textByHashes.cf18ef4a9b17c7ac91d6d0f3fffb62d9c9a0c75f: Yeeeess.... You've never heard that phrase?
textByHashes.1b09166c1927d93ce3bcec85ecf4b874567891f8: Please, tell me what just happened!
textByHashes.ba68fd7caea44d137d7ce7c7ef49b788f64d9903: Yes please. But slower. And more understandable.
textByHashes.99c9d5072e0c08488275fb7d4e9635ea53057f38: You stopped time? And... wait, I have to protect them? Why me?
textByHashes.4a240506ebb64d71e32764912af664f45bedfd46: Isn't stopping time kind of... You know, dangerous?
textByHashes.df0cc1affe2fb8935e286a44e898fe4fce67a953: Wait... so I've already saved all of these council members and defeated the Culinaromancer?
textByHashes.a7bd2dd6c35b44bdd6eba00439c0e99189fc36f5: Not the whole universe! That's where I keep my stuff!
textByHashes.950dcdaa41058b59b27b0bdc993792902cb572f7: But... You said I already had...?
textByHashes.f8fd697c7402183c95829d03b0430fa25866347a: Who's that guy over there? Seemed like you knew each other.
textByHashes.d9d6b129b6eeff07be1cb8d8218694cd8bc0ad2b: Food? What's so dangerous about food?
textByHashes.88fb0afeda69fb4269bbc32b2504f3823c568752: Okay, so he's powerful, but I don't get why he's here!
textByHashes.2096c0702e6729faccb4b0ae8b3c02ba2f1add2f: Yeah... I had a feeling you were going to say that...
textByHashes.548ea95cd6b24b566b92a40cdeda39a755c9cb0d: Who are these people? Seems like quite the random selection in here!
textByHashes.753f75ef78cb467d2867ce03d7a0d195a09adede: I see... But this evil cook guy that just appeared thinks they might be important?
textByHashes.686c43a16eb203e2a51837c0ddc653bd38d6d428: I just don't understand any of this...
textByHashes.d3e782df429ca87dc0c094ee5e95e8a3fef57fde: Uh... Is it me, or did this room just get much bigger?
textByHashes.a03b7f3111525cf459589c0793420de3579bd76a: Um... does that even make sense?
textByHashes.2684cd16e4f6c7477a72b452e33e276f22967207: Ah, forget it, I don't want to talk to you now.
textByHashes.68983a6757da8e54a257f3e38c2c8e1e1a8ec3b4: Huh? But how can it when you're...
textByHashes.8fd37d30fb2d5d3fd013791f4e262d32f3ae129d: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?
textByHashes.d1da4e2ed03e78283cae7e4bb39e323da5b4ad22: I'm sorry, I don't have any clue what you...
textByHashes.5855f3bcc3aa5bb3393074a95240d61c91b0a2c9: Oh. Oh, right. This must be part of that whole time-bubble thing that Aris told me about.
textByHashes.16c354955583dff810601595857b751a10fe684c: So the cook outside of the bubble remembers me having already saved the council members even though I haven't actually gone and done it yet...
textByHashes.6e587e39f261fab77bdc066240f7ee01c9736a94: Gah! This time travel stuff makes my head hurt!
textByHashes.17b3df2064d567086cd6a91fa6ec56d92b6530d2: So... I don't suppose you can remember exactly how I defeated him can you?
textByHashes.735985929f8a2c6b97c81a6d95e9cc3ba5e92bf9: That dwarf... I somehow can't remember how I managed to save him...
textByHashes.b8bfe90ace90f96f098270cc957e9a14078ec1ca: Those bickering goblins... How did I protect them again?
textByHashes.c2b1758ecdd9d1d7e40740af13e915effe728c43: I can't quite remember how I managed to save that pirate...
textByHashes.2eb2c3cedb33c9f01af7382d60bbe4d6e0771ca4: I did? Er... I mean I did.
textByHashes.d6f266942c9f6bad4a123311c542ac7c698a5603: Out of interest, could you just help me quickly with that?
textByHashes.48b165ad75f03155b6b2dd7f5168f1e3f1e2a944: Can you tell me how to make fishcakes?
textByHashes.31a30fa65f69f7e8f5cc7ed222cecb05f6993525: Don't be silly, that would never work.
textByHashes.d7dc4a690df9ef82957f7d6dce0ee408f687b770: Can you check to see if there is a recipe for them?
textByHashes.aa62aaee39b8f0891ffcfd1d3210a8e2c8fffc19: Where do I get Ground Cod?
textByHashes.e4b5e350df4ce88f93de1c4aa91f4f23e72b07f9: Where do I get Ground kelp?
textByHashes.d829d562e4ee6449a6fe44aca12566b406011405: Where do I get Ground Giant Crab meat?
textByHashes.1c9448d23a9c859f62e128f1f2cbf8172b6abef1: What did I do with all of it?
textByHashes.2a147dbd4f5cfcdaad73e23661906b9c36c90cdc: Ok, I'll go out and get all of the stuff and bring it to you.
textByHashes.9c5ede5dc7c84f32d51d8ce4378b7ef94cdfc440: The Lumbridge guide... I can't really rememember what I did to save him...
textByHashes.0a56190ce7e5abd3c0bee22b4eb655d554fd4e52: That crazy wizard at the wizards' tower? Was I not any more specific than that?
textByHashes.f000e4b39be2a80d3a973cffd945182e0985f537: That fellow with the unhealthy obsession with black... Dave his name is...
textByHashes.51578641e001239dba26b27aeac372121fc46379: I can't quite remember what I did to protect him...
textByHashes.63427ffc120004f4c387597442361ac26fbf70c3: Just remind me again how I managed to unfreeze Skrach?
textByHashes.42b6a3462802cdc16f697cb49de9f17fd3c4298a: And how do I get one of those?
textByHashes.ad82e20886d4a2bd5f8bdfeee78d3dd493df9a3c: That white knight... Sir Amik Varze... I can't quite remember how I saved him...
textByHashes.1516d427ae73b0a6f0fb4c917b9b3d3137f75157: but it was something to do with creme brulee supreme...
textByHashes.619c3087a46fb5437c0fb92c41c8b88ef1664d0c: Ah, you did, did you? I don't suppose you could refresh my memory about that?
textByHashes.13247915562e4ed561ae9274b4678148308290ec: Cornflour? How do I... er, how DID I make that then?
textByHashes.cd7e917aedf5233b3718f23f98931dec92b72710: Really? Weird. Okay, what did I do then?
textByHashes.912ffb2dc02199de48a8f06f96087494c7434199: Sounds easy enough so far. Er, I mean it was easy enough up to that point.
textByHashes.e0c962fdcc2cd5917d1ec8cef59192536c2af637: I definitely said that I had to kill some black dragons to do that?
textByHashes.876cb43dd4e13bee080cc57ab0602d063e325d71: The monkey king... However did I save him from the culinaromancer...?
textByHashes.12627a668c707d96586b4a3519cd07dfc5d070e5: So... You don't happen to remember what I did after the Culinaromancer escaped into that magic portal thingy do you?
textByHashes.c6c01128c23fff51fd25ee56ea2efa6f55f2793f: ...Oh yeah, that's right. And it was a really easy fight wasn't it...?
textByHashes.21c930e0509dbea66c5f84c475ecabead3963c5c: Oh. I did, did I? Oh.
textByHashes.a1cbaebcaddc93c26dbe019115ecad382b5cc441: Evil Dave? What's he doing on the secret council?
textByHashes.e11ec364e4bcc048be94b04f5013d0729ca50e5a: So how do I free him?
textByHashes.789401df97c07afcdc524fdaaa5e86354ad6bcea: You mean I need to talk to Evil Dave outside the time bubble?
textByHashes.346121bdb597fcf69b011a5909e69e21a0faa0b7: So... I don't suppose you can remember how I defeated him can you?
textByHashes.237633afa2821a0d5ca861744c91759c03f64142: No, I just want to talk to him.
textByHashes.556e24f8d35db9ea09578854fd18dbe84b7ed596: Can Dave come out to play?
textByHashes.e7ba1f2d0c81d67609f8ba91c17a553cfbeb5837: Weren't you going to give up evil?
textByHashes.fb0c014d88e3b491db29cb3929f97651c07d4508: What did you eat at the secret council meeting?
textByHashes.54da07a232d2678cb18b2fe3086742a1a62baf9c: I need to make that exact food in order to save you from the culinomancer's spell.
textByHashes.14b092eddd35231efd167f68c4274173e0371fbb: Sort of, it's complicated. It works like this...
textByHashes.4f362d5a6fb125b662e15e8ca3de63910ae1ae15: Although you're here, you're also still in the time freeze.
textByHashes.230ef29ec000186702b068cf70684e928682dcf9: I mean, the whole room was frozen in time at the moment the culinomancer cast his spell, right?
textByHashes.e30752aa2a3b75ef2a9b4aa1a4ed3bc009a859b6: Of course you didn't! You were frozen!
