textByHashes.e141e2925bfff50eae1bd960429067bd5a037741: From YOUR point of view I've saved you, but from MINE I haven't.
textByHashes.8d836ff85f331dd0d49195f7691bb275b5d1e4dc: But I have to save you, otherwise you won't be saved!
textByHashes.909c55afe2a2dc311f90112e30efc6463c7eb94d: That's what I meant, from your point of view I've saved you but from mine I haven't!
textByHashes.2daed01df91dc3d73d4c03ef1193dcda7cdee175: I've to take the food back in time to give it to you.
textByHashes.decaa4b08cf56145b0dbf096aa48e28d4caa6d9b: Because otherwise you won't be saved from the culinomancer's spell.
textByHashes.04ccc8f458845ff5869e1be730900776cab7c3ab: Exactly! That's why I know I have to go back and save you!
textByHashes.dabffd4cc2515e95057147cd47d03398363414fc: I can't not, because I already have!
textByHashes.50a952d3d27e621c19157564b500921fd1e36179: The fact that you're here means I already did save you, which means that you have to tell me the correct recipe. It's logically impossible for you not to!
textByHashes.4e763b6d08eda77cb95ee33a6dd106ac6375589a: There will be a temporal paradox and the universe will implode!
textByHashes.e63640e0a34b1caaff5eeb4dd2de24f1b725dd42: Exactly! So you've got to tell me the recipe!
textByHashes.b04470403b04a61fb4198f08ab35f187a5ac5ff8: You've got to tell me because the magic requires it!
textByHashes.6da2da1fe75c0d60b257945ccc7b3fe6974d86fa: The food you ate at the council meeting.
textByHashes.d86bdb77d6eb5b9f43ef2a921ede86ed576957e6: Evil stew? How was it evil?
textByHashes.bcb3e2d935ae1a2d48b60575510958c97eb31331: I think you're mixing up 'good' and 'evil' again!
textByHashes.90439a05895b28ebe2db2057e3407bf80fdf861b: I suppose that makes some kind of sense. But I need to reproduce this stew, so can you describe it in more detail?
textByHashes.eb875e328d3b3888d93e65848bd3c9a8ce998f72: Okay, I'd better talk to your mum.
textByHashes.fbf1421a8f0795a5dc23e5f3ed649df59091b6ea: So have you had any luck with the demon-summoning?
textByHashes.c01f00d767dce441c140bab1b9ff1501c7236c6c: And did you manage to summon any?
textByHashes.03fc98652a458f56a6cd0c1b3f002ff87b13b46c: Let me try to explain the time travel thing again...
textByHashes.50db6f5166616f6781c44a04b28ddc8b84367f0c: May I use your spices for making stew?
textByHashes.87e18a85cd0f58940394327c0c2f0bbc54a8411a: I'd better go and kill some hell-rats then.
textByHashes.4321526a549241f18cbead589c360c59ab56bd03: I haven't been able to make any stew that Dave likes yet.
textByHashes.a2dccf3415852d81f56d8b44ab611ddeff0618cb: Could you taste this stew please?
textByHashes.c5c88cc448aaecacff0875ae5117f75dc78b5cea: Now I just have to go back in time and give it to your earlier self!
textByHashes.8819a554013b1a30be9d780d5aaf3c4921a6bdeb: You've already eaten it! This is the stew that you remember tasting in the first place!
textByHashes.69d8b1d8418402abd6f6ba7a91cf49357f1f8b64: Yes. I'm just about to go back in time to give it to him in the first place.
textByHashes.0c3dfd43f1d824a16644a075a36c0596aa4b55f5: I've just saved you from a buffet worse than death!
textByHashes.4cfd0a71854bee2c67117a9c4f17f7b34d3ecb7f: Yes. Now it's very important you remember what the stew tasted like!
textByHashes.83f420dac6e944f65d855e411f0a044e043f5ca1: Ask the version of him on Ape Atoll?
textByHashes.8a252d7f26db631def14893a26964aeba7d50e4a: Do you have a particular favourite dish?
textByHashes.da820cb26d8d515c771540a02ab7955a224306ff: So you do have a favourite dish, but you don't want to tell me.
textByHashes.02e406662ce482d3cb459214cd656ccfcd494e25: So if I talk with these three monkeys they'll tell me all about it?
textByHashes.3330f7271bff3ca29da442d3e2e1f780d39f7f33: There's something familiar about you guys...
textByHashes.9b0741114a6cae34b9e0093f9b61d972a5ecd23a: So What exactly are you doing here?
textByHashes.db3e5d2db41af39e84d668d3415df42e9f0be802: Can you tell me what this recipe is then?
textByHashes.de8b9aafbb18a4bf99b5a8fd3490562daada3a94: Well, I am also on a top secret mission.
textByHashes.2052bdfd0f53199483852b9d2f8a5087b611f419: Well, it's on a strict need to know basis. I'm sure you understand.
textByHashes.246509ec9675d5891de1a89908c7a8a5b35987e6: However, I think I can trust you with sensitive material.
textByHashes.a07b24abf2a17990fee3e29daef14bb7e5e13960: (You whisper in Mizaru's ear) I've been charged with organising a secret party to celebrate the king's birthday, keep it quiet though, don't let a single monkey know.
textByHashes.2552421081f78847c85447e009f053fae5dde355: Where do I find this stuff then?
textByHashes.a24a30638429556fb432c6db6a6076fe50e07584: What am I looking for again?
textByHashes.1b19b02232d51c8de69824f32bcdb2444a3585c5: Are you sure he's not trying to say something important....
textByHashes.2a23721c7ca12955cf3c8f844fc3e0e1cdb3363a: Is this the right kind of snake, Iwazaru?
textByHashes.c0b465b3427548a0b9ede8ff94cde60c914dbd9c: I think Iwazaru is trying to say something.
textByHashes.f96e62e2bf726ef0304a4f1ab41ed0ea96407829: I never realised monkey sign language was so...concise. Anyway, where do I find this plant then?
textByHashes.66a4ec9990b0405221aec15e49b356d8e65d3cca: Right! I'd better start looking for this Tchiki Monkey Nut Bush then...
textByHashes.16e4f83d506a6a1d43fc6133efa916f7fccd9be2: I think your friend wants to tell me something.
textByHashes.bb48b542a3c8f664755b842b9f70d06b748fbad8: (sigh), I should have guessed that it wouldn't be that easy. A red banana. Don't all bananas taste the same?
textByHashes.d20d7497de718b17178931482ad8a890ece59951: Oh, you mean RED bananas, yes, of course, I've heard that they are the tastiest. Much tastier than blue bananas. How could I forget. Bah, only a fake monkey wouldn't know that. Ahem.
textByHashes.9e731be05799db32d9eabcab1031bdf525a0efc7: Errm I'm not from round here, anyway, moving quickly on, is there a red banana tree nearby?
textByHashes.3fe9924eb54137fa0f6c012417fdffc54c7f5401: Right! I'd better start looking for a red banana tree.
textByHashes.36bb28460ba8847ad8520f040a574ea01a1e6e31: Where's this tchiki monkey nut bush again?
textByHashes.7bc38bd1bd345fa7e700b0b3f23236f544097417: I think I've got some Tchiki monkey nuts.
textByHashes.63785cf1cd52036dff79bcba11f48a4ec709a734: So these are definitely Tchiki Monkey nuts then?
textByHashes.f3825e9a99e7141f295f6ffc6e65b4f2f9fb2e7a: Where's this red banana tree again?
textByHashes.25a7260a9c5641f69080836a879675fe4068a181: Is this the red banana I'm looking for?
textByHashes.5725e4de02499db99952a20bd027eab409dae43a: Wait! I need that, you don't have to eat...
textByHashes.5c83c3bb5dc2a9f5582f0f9653fd4d401d1825e1: Well... is that the right one?
textByHashes.a3d6d1a9ffcdb3f63daf30a3c827de9d328953fe: Really... I suppose I'd better get another one now.
textByHashes.d4fba5720b187cb184e174db74506b1036f3e57c: Err what am I doing again?
textByHashes.a9d0847a008754333dec91f1534e3eeb9c71e0d2: How do I cook this thing, it's huge! It's not going to fit in an oven or on a spit?
textByHashes.971d11013030546f102f561f84148740c99fd28a: Hmmm, somewhere underneath here, with zombies?
textByHashes.76869436d883c0664c9df7a2b7735f4bef18bccf: Somewhere hot, nearby? What's this business about me dying though - that's not so cool.
textByHashes.76939a1e11fa5d614f954bc2705032a5a7cdfce8: Well, I suppose I'd better have a look.
textByHashes.1b7ab3aeaf57fbbf790d3292ac379d72edb9a9c0: Yup, it's all cooked and ready to go, or at least I think it is.
textByHashes.9e2d480bd7c0154e2533c481cbd3c9c798e7218a: Yeah, listen to Iwazaru - stay away from my stuffed snake! I'm not making another one. There was more than enough monkey business involved in making this one.
textByHashes.fd07328e144bd4a1ded3558110c1a25761e40939: Thanks for your help guys! I've had more fun than a barrel of monkeys doing this.
textByHashes.9dc8cc6b7e001983e03779ab6dd6120d80833f22: Though I wish I'd realised earlier on that Iwazaru was the monkey with brains...
textByHashes.8b5e95b11b68bd41adcb84e7487e128937285704: Heh, time to serve this to the king...
textByHashes.2c3c28face020cb36903dca9140aca7727202330: I'm just a wandering chef, travelling from town to town saving peoples lives.
textByHashes.1e426c58482e07a30379979110418cd241444770: Yet again, my heroic work goes unappreciated, I suppose that is the fate of a true hero.
textByHashes.eb29821edb85fa0caafdbd67aefa13a540500d70: So ... I've heard that this dish makes you more cooperative.
textByHashes.2a540ae76de87b45b146919ad9a09b401198bd64: Well, getting to Ape Atoll is quite a pain. Do you have a way of making it easier to get there?
textByHashes.2274a60c473988b862266e4c092dde07982ee0bd: Will you let me know how to cast it?
textByHashes.3471c5a57c8190843480d13520bee8d44c43dfb8: So, what do I need to know?
textByHashes.672a698d6cf1ff7f4027f9fac61f8f67184b8366: Ah I see, so the banana actually has the crucial effect on the teleportation matrix.
textByHashes.e8efc949deb2f2dcc849ac20f05e973077a09b6d: I'm sorry I forced you to tell me the spell.
textByHashes.03a8a111eea7ab565311e7d58acbacd867b93cdb: Yes - that would have been a lot worse.
textByHashes.77058ae76436a827ee47590847a9f77dcdffaa51: You're confused? Get a ticket and join the queue, Your Monkeyness.
textByHashes.e8505c1f4fce4dccb34933b3c322e37ebdedf353: How would I go about protecting this nautical fellow from the curse of the culinaromancer then?
textByHashes.dce51dcc8a2288ca4d79f6411d824920d3d94fed: Fishcakes? What, like chocolate cake with fish instead of chocolate?
textByHashes.f78ad3f1f3c51e4c6d2c9732b482c3c27213d9ba: Um... So how would I make those then?
textByHashes.fac4e637e46d2f76c71e8ff8495ead84e22ac077: Ooooh yeah... I'll be right back!
textByHashes.911cd9ba767917e20ac9496593b03ff8f0976126: I might have, I might not have.
textByHashes.e66bf4bad2a4a346b36e95030f1db1919f3f8047: This time-travelling stuff just has me a little worn out ok?
textByHashes.54be9ef7523b9571cbb6487158129f91b354a0bf: Murphy, what can you tell me about giant crabs?
textByHashes.75c9f72a84bfcace77518a20c526952449f3d243: I need to get some Giant Crab Meat and Kelp. Can you tell me where I can get some?
textByHashes.480a040656d2408026ab2c0df6c3d8c9a7aad1d2: Go down there? What do you mean?
textByHashes.94ef55cc03ca6754d392b3468699961cd2412fc5: I'm sure I will be able to if I put my mind to it, why do you ask?
textByHashes.8b82edbe398913b6dd65baea16e017c1a2716987: I'm still not happy about this...
textByHashes.ebee41af7117e858e094351d30187ed30d629707: I can't tell you I'm afraid. The very fabric of space and time could collapse!
textByHashes.e85ab9dd1966ab7c1261da5dc2da7779758df0c1: Are you sure this is safe?
textByHashes.8a62ce9abb5121cbcfd32a1c242514b2ffba450c: Ok, well I'll just put my diving helmet and diving backpack on.
textByHashes.3a89da83cad859254c7023625d9da142609deeb1: Murphy, can I get another diving helmet?
textByHashes.169e036c20119a228f7742c57cbb56f61accf9b5: Hello Murphy. Do you have a spare diving backpack?
textByHashes.951460030a652bb800334c5c8064dc285f556fc1: You mean you can't make them an adorable set of tiny diving gear?
textByHashes.e3bc470bdb8aa262c437887dbf1d4b0c2f746438: I'm not any kind of fishy, err, fish.
textByHashes.f9647db40b0a9c17dd80e710d253cfebaf19625f: Well I'm trying to get some Giant Crab meat.
textByHashes.1aed3aa49a4ad524b101330f5c360b258e6e4909: You see those big crabs? I want one of those.
textByHashes.ac76a88b2441128424399ed445a7a96c960f5693: Wait, could I buy some of the crab meat?
textByHashes.0ad3e9e9ea63d212d80b0e8a643351719b2b9c41: Seriously, I need to get that meat. I'll do your big favour if you want.
textByHashes.aed9a40306c5d497989ee94191d791c6994b78a8: Nung, I have your giant Mudskipper Skins.
textByHashes.df59892fae579404d2274114e3d93e6b1465cc10: Yes, I have the big skippy skins.
textByHashes.e1064024d5461e4bf9162758ad091b7157485e2a: Great! How much do you want for them?
textByHashes.b326aa7ead0864790b8dbd1335cdaed3978daace: Well I'll do it. What do I need? An item of ancient power? Something from the deepest, darkest dungeon in the world?
textByHashes.347eb02a26df99a0604137e5955cca4e4355dcc8: What sort of monsters will I need to fight? I'd best grab myself some potions too.
textByHashes.30ff743cdecfe2a6282d4f3ce0c65e74a1678e2e: Will there be traps? Should I bring cakes?
textByHashes.ee5d63e37e7d9b2860f4d75086a48c1745d3cfb4: So, all I have to do is bring you three rolls of bronze wire and a needle, and I can have all the Giant Crabs I can kill?
textByHashes.e326a14ac6a62f53554eb1dd0ccab5b327ef22fe: Nung, I have the needle and wire.
textByHashes.071f010bf1b341b7d3223fc5eaed5ede29dcadb0: I just spoke to Nung, he said it was ok.
textByHashes.002cad1854d04df7bc3e2d4a077253940b7cfa2d: I have all the ingredients for fishcakes!
textByHashes.fae36b186cc4245cf2384c46108d9cb580091c69: Well that doesn't sound too hard. What's so supreme about a creme brulee supreme?
textByHashes.3bff04f9a7f1ed853944856dc198d5b6a4b9bf41: The evil chicken? Great. He only ever seems to show up when I don't want him to.
textByHashes.6068214bf2f98be51fdc10bdb20170fb6f533509: Just give me 5 minutes and I'll be back!
textByHashes.7c9debf5d5ab74bd7b65a1ea79aa1db948135e0f: Could you give me that recipe again, please?
textByHashes.1d54e43de345c9280bd2dae1c086df61d976ebc5: So you're a wise old man, huh?
textByHashes.1d9a64dd87b4a21ad152047641df8040365aa2e7: So what's a sage doing here?
textByHashes.5d69fababe6fc9aabd6d9c6e279556ff96d6174b: That's quite an exciting life you've had.
textByHashes.6dc2da91f6d351d634fc2d478fdd519c5117a744: Thanks! So how can you help me?
textByHashes.025f2168dac026244d30b427c42db04e015a0cc5: So you'll help me clear junk out of my bank?
textByHashes.dd9b55f3a82741e38ce139f6c050daccff8e78ed: I'd just like to ask you something.
textByHashes.7a77697fcfaef758f5a9a2b0015f3bef463c6867: Could you tell me about the Evil Chicken, please?
textByHashes.02dedefd8a706081146c8e2055944fa33caa3cb9: Right, so if you were looking for the chicken where would you go?
textByHashes.557146c6ee72d2e8daefdf4297631f324394c72d: What happened? I rubbed that coin and everything went black!
textByHashes.b4375b46c6133533b633f1459e90857f8662744e: I took it from the dead body of a black dragon.
textByHashes.600d89340cb9cf937746b7f9c6dacbb91acac990: I didn't realise what it would do if I rubbed it.
textByHashes.95cfac3f0ff88b0427af5a1e9e4f0958de667c2d: Who, or what, are you anyway?
textByHashes.f746cb2dcb3ab50c04ff450ede5a5d7d378ff1d3: So I can ask one thing of you?
textByHashes.9328aee763c38776227f491392af24a83f0bd139: Please flambe this creme brulee for me.
textByHashes.dae40dbd2daa086752aa30028a813e0f6ced8653: What gloves do you have in mind?
textByHashes.f2479edf8cab7adc3333a86227656c5b5c97cf28: Could I just keep your token for when I really need it, please?
textByHashes.bc52860deae7975be26c953261deabb9e8ab5be7: Can I wish for some xp?
textByHashes.5424dc9c058dcbaf99dbe0f7cd6395ec1d8983f6: And once again, but in English this time?
textByHashes.18978d10d475584adaefb277682420368114e0cb: Yes, I'm sure I can get some Jubbly Chompy.
textByHashes.ca759dd294002ea978e254725d4abc62dc8f7ee0: Ok then, what's involved...how do I get this Jubbly chompy?
textByHashes.263914e5f5f69c693d94d2c0fbc7dc020e48d8f0: Oh come on...it can't be that difficult..
textByHashes.b9c4021bafc9ec01a2fdd7301fc1dc3e8309a8bf: No way am I going to talk to Rantz.
textByHashes.0f355ae78b2385cd8259d4fd6fc4195f21df5d40: Oh Ok then, I guess I'll talk to Rantz.
textByHashes.f3d3d54440801a6e443d5bad33a9593ce094ad83: Nah, leave that Ogre in the frozen dimension!
textByHashes.d698165214823bb5277e2cb59452f89cc5b7e86a: What should I do now to help Skrach?
textByHashes.b9464b032fb73830cd20f79e6250c6a8b4c26811: I'm trying to free Skrach, can you help?
textByHashes.c72b514c7495ab76f803fb428742d0cd17f8e821: Ok, so can you help me get some Jubbly Chompy?
textByHashes.267d2a687d0ba9fa389446a54281609234815b1d: What do I get in return?
textByHashes.adf2f70972d3addc593deed9fb01df87ecce8200: No way am I doing that!
textByHashes.ee5e8daf6acc26e078ada4eeba356cf3546606e4: Ok, here I am...I guess this is the watery place? What now?
textByHashes.12a8961d79b19d669ea248c22f1bae409cfba8a0: Oh, so you want to go to Karamja...hmmmm, it's a bit of a long walk. You'd probably be better off with a boat!
textByHashes.598aae9b04761af3592b1ef685af84107eda1372: Ohhhh...sorry! Ok, for a boat you'll need something that floats in order to make a hull.
textByHashes.a11538642c3a319d0a0fc78da2e559e99a5ec358: Close!... But perhaps a tree would be better?
textByHashes.9a90f10c582daa758455f2dc9ca015e0cc8f9e06: Can you tell me how to get Jubbly now?
textByHashes.d50741eb578a368b63508282129fe94d186f89ac: You can't use that as a boat! The roots are still hanging off it.
textByHashes.c9641d2160aad270a0f1543269ab4d6995e6917d: Now can you please tell me how to get Jubbly?
textByHashes.80a122c6f03ded33f25d0a369eda8e5309859ea4: Well, yes, you've got no space to put anything in there... it needs to be hollowed out a bit.
textByHashes.656f349d0e53e4e801e37f943d86de401a107645: Ok, the boat's ready, now tell me how to get a Jubbly.
textByHashes.d469947260daeab558e7855845540e46fc66edf2: Please, can you just show me how to catch a Jubbly!
textByHashes.cf1c2de110bdb9494e0a8aeb3c6ff4a75aa8f55c: Ok, what do you need me to do now?
textByHashes.87e20600e832403010a67c9bedc125288e2e8c95: Yes please, I'll get a lift back with you.
textByHashes.fd5149cadc25443906d2c6d6baceba41c62d9747: Ok, now tell me how to get Jubbly!
textByHashes.225816e0301bed2ff959f3c16c4bf0a602972cbe: I've helped with your scheme to get over to Karamja, now help me by telling me how to get Jubbly!
textByHashes.984ab0ff3ae1f31c0b91b5308861cdac30d9b705: I saw some large static ogre spits near Jiggig and Rantz. Perhaps I can cook this jubbly meat there?
textByHashes.5c1918bfbc9341da2b0f6b9f6f3db3220af0b462: Which one of these am I actually meant to be saving?
textByHashes.a1e9cba414422a524a76c3b0bb7fecaa8256d66f: Remembering the last time I dealt with these two, that may be easier said than done.
textByHashes.11666319d6a05cbe15ab599378c7bad9602a8c32: Can I ask about what food you like?
textByHashes.75da3c4b319c6d8985ddcf219577ac3670cfd27e: I need to save you from the Culinaromancer's spell.
textByHashes.d55bad6ce018d9f70af9a82e1251e412484bf178: At the council meeting in Lumbridge, there was a Culinaromancer who tried to cast an evil spell on you!
textByHashes.07d5783dc7d4ba1f63f980e43877dea716781f04: Never mind that, don't you remember the spell?
textByHashes.07ec0178820b13f91ead56176b27891c9108ae76: Exactly. That's why we need to find out what goblins eat, so we can better cater to your needs.
textByHashes.e3cf6cb11bbee9ae46ed7693b21e276736c0b0de: But it'll only take a minute of your time.
textByHashes.9edd46048c07253687e8f8bcffc729fc478b3905: Hey, I need your help. Wartface and Bentnoze have been cursed!
textByHashes.7e76588600381c3007e1bfa5a2d148c4e711100c: I need to find a meal they'd both eat.
textByHashes.c2996c2667bd4879c0bf8f346a4d7e5f977ea672: What is this new way of cooking?
textByHashes.98d450cf78f9443c5ff8f3d2e52894fae5225aa5: I need your help. Wartface and Bentnoze have been trapped by a terrible curse!
textByHashes.e9640a942b471de677666d7c6ad83170644a56bc: What do you need? Maybe I can get it for you.
textByHashes.6723881df209ef61a44d52b2816ac0a8acf15de8: I guess I'll come back later then.
textByHashes.171fa8dc3335fb934fe205474e821f95c1ff8e82: Well, I guess I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.a026f6e111b2bbdd63576114c8b565579d9b0e7e: I've got the charcoal you were after.
textByHashes.444779636ff784b1963a50ac965795f53e43fe5d: Are you sure this is a good idea?
textByHashes.102581a902a3df7df54636d56a1e2d376d9efb2a: That sounds like a great idea.
textByHashes.e93e27e6d42e7f05cbb4aaebdef9d9fc33a1cdaf: Er... yes... I'm sure food poisoning was what they were worried about.
textByHashes.27a37723d63203f8f0d9e4f9246943db38b9aff1: Do you think that will sell? Like you said, it's burnt.
textByHashes.2c086092962925e99661b7ab61684d3e72426720: Your leaders, Wartface and Bentnoze, have been trapped by a terrible curse!
textByHashes.a966d92b163423da54e6dc945a9d5bf44aa13069: I need to create a dish that both of the Generals would eat to save them from the curse.
textByHashes.fd4531f74b80a4c7c597f9d6a8bc5e970d03fa7c: Each to their own indeed, but what's the problem?
textByHashes.04ce49dd4be322c6047c05634c92dc1ad7cf1f29: Ok, is there anything other than orange slices and maggots?
textByHashes.c55179d2418dc1f2a395e505eb8ae060ed18b980: Let me guess, Wartface complained right?
textByHashes.c5edad38e041c2effba5368be7755b7d754c46d2: So let me get this straight. I need orange slices which aren't orange, maggots that aren't bland, and bread which isn't crunchy?
textByHashes.535d9516a7343d1462aeb6c638b8b4a6c3d492a6: Wonderful. Well, I guess I'll have to see what I can do.
textByHashes.9343373eddc2c38e8a60e4a2413dd60263dec311: I'll leave you to your experimentation then.
textByHashes.d5975606fadf476afb6a77d3d52a337657c02f61: I need your help. About that dish that both Wartface and Bentnoze would eat...
textByHashes.b5628e74d151c9ff1dbc893c6501f89b8458cafe: What was the problem with the orange slices?
textByHashes.9413c726edd8355109abf4c71ec080e24d9a9276: Why did Bentnoze object to the maggots?
textByHashes.3bcc46e606f7d82dd4343909ecd8c6396b70b378: What did Wartface have against bread?
textByHashes.2c3d26de7b86432ccbb83f221574d139797c8d36: I've got the ingredients we need to make a meal for Wartface and Bentnoze.
textByHashes.bb578d9b41fa2164e4dfefd4dd2e10389998660b: I need your help. Are you sure Wartface and Bentnoze will both eat this dish we've made?
textByHashes.76bb37ae7c25529ba5ea9d011578542f25b6dcd6: I need your help. I lost the dish you gave to me to save Wartface and Bentnoze.
textByHashes.58ebbd59333fa8519a9e9490824cffd7c976e408: How can I help the Lumbridge Guide?
textByHashes.4973454d645f5ae61a6486424f30cf6270a88a96: Yes, I'm sure I can make a cake.
textByHashes.8b2284e1300490be4792fb778cf53dd63a442aa2: Sounds a bit weird though. What does it involve?
textByHashes.38cb918eff0024c77717fb5d79fd7827df5da66d: Okay, thanks, I'll get right on it!
textByHashes.9a72b4189602037492f6e375e989bd67d2d8c9d9: Hi, what do I have to do again to help the Lumbridge Guide?
textByHashes.d936856e466132945f6fa40b8206f6a253a531bc: Hi. I was wondering if you could help me?
textByHashes.7f846b358451fa667ffaab1d4af07f7b59781388: Well I do. I need to make something called a Cake of Guidance, and I was told that you could help me out.
textByHashes.a0d20ada70ecd54c968179241c9d69deb6d57f6c: Erm. No I don't think I did. I need to make that cake for the Lumbridge Guide. He's been frozen in time and needs help.
textByHashes.dca4c198e0a554ae746c81c799cec8d45b385d1d: Not a chocolate cake - a CAKE OF GUIDANCE.
textByHashes.61cd7710725ac69997afc90c8b0c6878b1b4248c: I have. So what do I need to do?
textByHashes.87a54ebe521fb341fbed8e780998573022a525d3: So to the sane world, an egg, flour and milk. No problem, I'll be right back.
textByHashes.c40782d0406edadccc928e84172b4f9dd53298f9: I hope you know what you're doing.
textByHashes.0af3de36253990d1320eb64755b1b27b7dbdff8d: I can't believe you said that, so I will just pretend you didn't.
textByHashes.d0add7bbfc4dd1ef1d854fa827751cd248ef5730: That wasn't so bad. Now what?
textByHashes.8125c2ee4917b7cec5f300ce4c37f6d97bf9faee: So I've enchanted all three ingredients now?
textByHashes.21d160b912d6e33527d1c00c4818592b9b831cde: I've got some milk! Can we enchant it?
textByHashes.abd00403b657c77f661a1646b9a8e675434119c9: You're making this up aren't you?
textByHashes.dee240f04159aaaa9ffa1d1870012ef6249b8973: I have obtained a pot of flour!
textByHashes.6df40ac45dbe9b7f50da5e1efd78b16134fe8b1f: What should I be doing now?
textByHashes.7f7cc828c75bc55b9bfd024ff1de9179281328c2: No I mean in regards to making the cake.
textByHashes.18f2345a18e7a0d4fad074647efccab43c95af4b: I made the cake. Just need to go use it now! Thanks for your help!
textByHashes.4d9aaf09c7fdabd49a298f6f59aa8d25231ecaf4: I made the cake... but I lost it.
textByHashes.1cd2c4ca68e5cff609c6bd2b99497ff79db87d21: How do I protect you I wonder....
textByHashes.cff721e51db66bba0a6585ae863b484a73942bec: Ok. Your son, the one who guards the tunnel entrance?
textByHashes.0bd99adc490bbcebfe579b0ed05bea9cf52c32ca: Well he's at a special meeting and he's frozen by the culinaromancer!
textByHashes.ca4cb441c22bfd0188af2efca85efc0a81e66333: I need your rock cakes to free him from it.
textByHashes.3adcc4a8e327cc677bebfe43c6d14a5dce90a4f2: What can you tell me about dwarves and ale?
textByHashes.1ad7c0084adc7ad1cab61e8b13501c8692fa4f35: No no no... I mean what kind of ale do they drink?
textByHashes.82a892e355e81ad963344d3843c5ab6681f73d00: I could offer you some in return, how about 100 gold?
textByHashes.dd375407b3d4ca9a5ce1839786e9b6f5c51f5ae5: Oh, I don't have enough money on me.
textByHashes.cea6a222bafd428bfe92223196f79337aa3e170a: You have a deal. Here you go...
textByHashes.e384b07ff867f83038675c2e3d1578573a975369: I just happen to have some on me.
textByHashes.d198993766ab0e9262dcb5f607e8d0810618b3da: But I don't have the money on me. I'll have to come back.
textByHashes.be050aa1cb0882ae91fb4491cbc192fbae6b41e3: I could offer you some in return, how about 200 gold?
textByHashes.3f1690c2f79bb35940baceead0c60fcdd21477f1: Oh go on, I'm really quite trustworthy once you get to know me.
textByHashes.a68465558457fee8eed6241a6151bf8dec26cd2e: Thanks, I won't forg...err... misplace it, this time.
textByHashes.7195297778b98a928ac27af0fd40057cd524df21: I think you deserve another pint.
textByHashes.a916ad0b7cc89b56be54082a3355f4dc4679b903: I'm sure another pint will go down nicely.
textByHashes.c9d881e9b3356ae9e630db1e6fce400133644cc2: You're a good friend Rohak, do you think you could do me a favour?
textByHashes.c99b45f1935246d2ee2d750f29fff53d089a5af7: I don't need you to do that ... friend. Just something as simple as baking me some of your wonderful rock cakes. Hmm? For your good friend?
textByHashes.2f4ad0c916809e3c5c5141272eaf5e78e9cd0c1a: Good. I'm sure I have some gold somewhere!
textByHashes.a72fec663a40c1a129cbd7517c5f0037b8092721: How much gold do you want to make the cake?
textByHashes.2713eed60beb3fe663fba04c6a803f18ba68ad56: No, not a dream, you agreed to make me your special rock cake, for a fee.
textByHashes.60d297ab56c78ef02ce8449d17223607e84786d1: Maybe I should have some more money with me, he did say he'd want payment...
textByHashes.0475a0dc977a1646e1543aeff4ad137ae0153d2b: You didn't say I'd have to run around... but ok! Milk, flour, egg, bowl of water....I'll be back!
textByHashes.15f0d71eee7c2a83263624e8174504329573ef1f: Ok, I'll see about getting them.
textByHashes.4ba94c9834f543d3b8689566a68f3ff0d704e702: I have found some of the things you asked for:
textByHashes.aa47fc023d4d0d2d8941ccbf27d7070f0d084581: I have the egg, I have a pot of flour, I have the bucket of milk, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.93c04e7b0457b70f8719212921116f17e6ed863f: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I have a pot of flour, I have the bucket of milk, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.4d409df5702e605b99292ba09edcf60e02528cd8: I have the egg, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I have the bucket of milk, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.8c8e07f513f6edbb570ce1e6e20ce6b0c9c4fe77: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I have the bucket of milk, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.3f21b67737dd28f3dc9f61a63fa7c8eb530c0b25: I have the egg, I have a pot of flour, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.350b2eb1f0e87719998f576c93f16cc09df7ddca: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I have a pot of flour, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.6cd6d31e83de06c20763b5cbbf5069c140cf1bdf: I have the egg, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.e9346af3868233d9cb8772da928f3c9213555b66: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I have the bowl of water!.
textByHashes.fd94e27304a2b776a6b40176056874a471524c97: I have the egg, I have a pot of flour, I have the bucket of milk, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.89b96304ad51a5be509394c673e63bfe334875bd: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I have a pot of flour, I have the bucket of milk, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.f478029a7f69b83d1f91abe429a105892f293521: I have the egg, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I have the bucket of milk, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.0cfe917159e70fa4144c3cff602a4c5e6baf2fa6: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I have the bucket of milk, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.20f53521b7134911f54f5b9f7221078c481a7be0: I have the egg, I have a pot of flour, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.e51c67144b8b34e6eae43eba62ccc42eaae5aa11: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I have a pot of flour, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.d78d8dd5e6369c5c60537ebbdcf878262e540062: I have the egg, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.4699b40d5f4a4d84994510920ddfb9058f643dc5: I don't have an egg, I'll look for some chickens, I don't have a pot of flour, but I'll investigate the windmills, I don't have any milk but I'll check out the cows, I don't have a bowl of water.
textByHashes.5cec426589f0bb490a3ac2495a10932565c3d3f0: Okay okay I'll get right on it! Keep your beard on!
textByHashes.10ffabe41cad508e425ea3f1747275f614c3eb29: I have all the items you asked for...is that it? I could make these!
textByHashes.2eef8d03f8fa8b0b57bdd336fdc0e2ffe6a935c0: Not yet but I will. I'm going to save your son.
textByHashes.7f873f5ee763fca2b8fff77357fb20806190c2f9: I appear to have lost it somewhere, can you make me another?
textByHashes.41049cf3db0e1c3c892d07855b5d127449dd0082: I lost the rock cake! But I have more ingredients, will you make me some more please?
textByHashes.5d6ed1a44fc593c1b60e8f41efbc40bdbfcce17a: Oh, ok, I'll find a way to cool them down then.
textByHashes.24a8c9fe68e943d118821c92d45520ab9d4c364e: Do you have any other quests for me to do?
textByHashes.2c5d88a02efca72605eee667b33609f839af7294: Sure thing Sir Amik, sign me up!
textByHashes.70cd1fa06bad2402bee80d79b4b684b9b34cda0b: Okey dokey, I'll go do that then.
textByHashes.264172ebb76a0b3da85245922559245b73a2e00d: No thanks, that doesn't sound like the kind of thing that would interest me...
textByHashes.b9083f88a17bcba784408059f1d4e3d3b6033971: Sir Amik Varze sent me to meet you here for some sort of testing...?
textByHashes.1239fe7d2807c05cba26afda203a18748f716dd4: ...testing? What exactly do you mean by testing?
textByHashes.db2445901b063c31cfa8bd4c6c3df169b6527158: So... You want me to go kill some monster or something for you?
textByHashes.4f7e40c62a819116299656ccd3d986d30b7fb0bd: So you want me to go and fetch you some kind of common item, and then take it for delivery somewhere on the other side of the country?
textByHashes.ac58fed551dd4b4ef89c2c32e0acc9cd9ed95c12: Because I really hate doing that!
textByHashes.28b8a5c09a5d7e3aea1e873b2f23678fe85ae4cf: So what exactly will this test consist of?
textByHashes.f8e735c33909d10e7d645887d296dfb07b8bc1ac: So you want to test my brains? Will it hurt?
textByHashes.39a7a8ed797fbbea73fef6e764fc19a817650120: What do you want me to do then?
textByHashes.5725c2a855c04e8c77d46709c10fbcca124310d7: Erm... what are 'standard puzzle room rules' exactly?
textByHashes.f794564422b65cfe9558c6844d381e9f2795f2d5: This organisation you keep mentioning... Perhaps you could tell me a little about it?
textByHashes.f62920a46e9cce1da081e87e274ae4a15c10d6b2: No... He didn't really tell me anything except to come here and meet you...
textByHashes.70cb8cb018ddc430bb2ac25ae0e559f701aa3cd7: So what's the difference between you and the White Knights?
textByHashes.b2ce0a73e333b58f918cd9752bda22990c04c9ab: Cool, you mean I get to meet Saradomin?
textByHashes.c2f599be218e53f1b53a1fbd6ae6e95383d39478: Wait... You can order the King around?!?!
textByHashes.a33ad8e4e448e5bbc88b713f1c1375ec0602baff: Yeah, this sounds right up my street. Let's go!
textByHashes.5dba67030b14a3b9d9c3046b83425857cf760201: Well... I don't know... This doesn't really sound like my kind of thing...
textByHashes.e3b6f6281b894094954a89068a497934a00908cd: To be honest, I'd rather go kill stuff for loot than use my mind to work things out...
textByHashes.066459380c95c0dce5331df81cfdb3eb353bedd2: Can I have a different one?
textByHashes.d33d5abb8f305e6085c39be1d51483917f44acf8: Can I have the final clue for the door?
textByHashes.502d9034dc24a64de40d1363523cfb2b20efdd79: Can you give me any help?
textByHashes.b60b143e08122e131c370d4b79ab5a2b167072af: Please... I am REALLY stuck... Isn't there ANYTHING you can do to help me...?
textByHashes.5615d5623f34b1d45df8e45b04a0129d2fe1f740: Okay, thanks a lot, you've been very helpful!
textByHashes.b7c8030ce77ccf035b4072fbc9e167b7d01f8bdb: Hello there. What am I supposed to be doing in this room?
textByHashes.66fb859eaba2d14becafd13d1324a5bc529938b6: Listen, this is really annoying me. Can't you just stop the fox eating the chicken or the chicken eating the grain for me, while I carry the other stuff across the bridge?
textByHashes.ad1a4bf283d1ed6a41e487bd17cf8a96d2d69ede: No, but seriously, please? Think of the poor chicken and grain! Being eaten!
textByHashes.d654d9a5bfefb2a847afa34a81c0e30c0828f064: I really don't think I should be carrying more than 5 Kg across that rickety bridge...
textByHashes.69378c2224f373fcfcb384cd8c65bc630a281fa7: I believe I've managed to pass the tests!
textByHashes.3ad51c76cb43ef2ab8bbd354fefad374279c0635: I received your message my liege. How may I serve the kingdom?
textByHashes.956caf856e83447a98af0d736983e9484e0294e9: I assume you have a plan?
textByHashes.35c52f441981eb47afc0b7ac4233eb2d6aa83890: Elves? I've never seen an elf before.
textByHashes.6bc65bf7a3d437140924fa0910da5a9b80d9f560: So what do I need to do?
textByHashes.4ab34f227da10349fd137528d379122f63b9889b: Very well. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.34e5ad9869b4ed1f693c5e40148bfe87e2f91ee7: Actually, I don't think I'm ready for this yet.
textByHashes.dbd8fefe6ced245284a9c71ba88fa3af777930c3: What's the deal with your brother again?
textByHashes.6d854d5b276d03e244d4f0b5a1cb45b9d6776e66: But now we're ready to stop him.
textByHashes.49812fb2846191ffeae3907a9ac78c32488b32a7: Excellent. Do you have a plan in place?
textByHashes.364862447b9e4c4e1765898eb6833af586b3420f: Hello there, I'm . Your scouts said that I should come and see you.
textByHashes.ce70067bb9802dd97ae9af13ac36ebe9059863d7: I see. I'll need to play this smart then.
textByHashes.6a30ca098e21ced38414e6b5de4c4e11dd147540: Thank you. I shall return when my task is complete.
textByHashes.7101cf35af48e9d63d7793ed83486ab3c55c3f45: No I'm ! Lord Iorwerth said you might be able to help me.
textByHashes.7a85b58ccf7cdc6c2c84d9dceb477aa97c19abaf: Your scout refused to help. He asked for proof that you sent me.
textByHashes.34ace917360708e3e929d523b4a3f2b915b7549a: I need to find Tyras and kill him. Do you know where his camp is?
textByHashes.2507bd73b159f652f761950c47113a0d879501ed: I've found no trace of him as yet.
textByHashes.53f2154db8eae76c5938ba9bdcd2ec8d373543af: I'll take a look and see what I can find.
textByHashes.9343a25acb3c542c59b8c18721f6e43216719d52: I've found tracks leading off to the west. But they trail off into the trees. Beyond that I am unable to follow.
textByHashes.58e3745fd3b6adf05148a5d98b4dee08e0694bf8: Thanks... I'll see what I can find.
textByHashes.0ddfd889e9492b50b68c1ca270b972c834075655: I found it a short distance west of here.
textByHashes.92e67ce51c235cc546ff32c968e39dbd0048de66: I've finally tracked the brute down. His camp is in a secluded bit of forest, almost directly south of here.
textByHashes.a029489da082971ab6e4f3966ab00e8cb5607bad: Well that should make short work of Tyras.
textByHashes.256ef7d151e9b94d8489879a16a4beaae5ac7126: I lost my copy of The Big Book of Bangs.
textByHashes.12dc94ea39a42824f9c7c9af188519ae5fec20c6: Apparently it's made by heating limestone.
textByHashes.e4f994e8ed5db0dfbc50a11718c21404c6cf89fc: According to the book, you get it through the fractional distillation of coal tar.
textByHashes.780e236099ba598d168c2a216e676c603132ca89: Hmm... I know someone from Ardougne who might be able to help. She knows a thing or two about chemistry.
textByHashes.f35c62b074a6fb742867078950689a0218023f8d: Good day. I was hoping you could help me with something. I have a book which mentions the fractional distillation of coal tar. I don't know how to do that though.
textByHashes.f0f4fe86c54fb33d4d7238c671d2d41197edf913: I see, thanks for the information.
textByHashes.69d135a0e9c49a495bc0728601b19089bf5396d3: So what should I do? Plant it in his camp?
textByHashes.55af43ac9cbb6c09f17a1b003d00f772c568bb15: I was wondering what you were doing out here?
textByHashes.5a7b653e0d5a8a1a59cc51cc59a8fe0446ce90a6: I can see how that would be distracting.
textByHashes.d297dcde6aa3c92c2a0d309f55580407207478e8: Well I have one here for you.
textByHashes.f3fef381e4e409187c63622cb04d468c7d0c6722: I was the only one here. I was watching the whole time.
textByHashes.9fdabd35dd87bf76fbf3d7ea82c5b4d7ec11faca: Yes, I've finally dealt with Tyras, he should cause you no more problems.
textByHashes.ef09594b4251b7e1d2202cd7ad1a65bd246dce16: Lord Iorwerth, I have lost the message for King Lathas.
textByHashes.50ac3b06fca3397a874c7c27cfd2243f682956f2: Well you seem to know everything else so I'll not lie. Yes.
textByHashes.6b5c9abce8a013fe507562d00b297028da943ee4: I had no idea! Why would the king do this?
textByHashes.64e5bfaa5a882e6c815a13d6416362cdfff36e1d: You want me to help you? Okay, what's in it for me?
textByHashes.7f4dc0d5cbd56e5a0c106a9a9b38da3e63dcbd19: No, I have nothing to corroborate this.
textByHashes.25536081dc3183836cc077d26467e8cbfe3d5acd: Yes, I have a letter sent by Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.59ca21417d14d908c4467e7bc49e92f4822d03d3: Does this mean we can reveal the truth about the plague?
textByHashes.a8354d5ef5208656dd4738cf537725e54afd074e: Yes, I have seen her actually!
textByHashes.2c1698393faf8babb20d2836ba090e5bcac8b76d: At least, I think it was her... Blonde? A bit stressed?
textByHashes.1c8e45503bfc0f7733317de72f1e4d0800a7b87b: Well, I guess she could be considered attractive...
textByHashes.217ff1f513ac7cea763473b481d477754fc7819a: You were asking me about Juliet? You seemed to know her?
textByHashes.d73879f74ecafbe6e62e010fe662192eb6b64053: What? Surely you mean that she is the love of your life and that you long to be with her?
textByHashes.73414e3308e36108e276b0ff36f80260d2838ee6: Yes, okay. I'll let her know.
textByHashes.f5247db5875d672f8e91376d93dbb90a2e861ca6: You mean you want to give her a kiss!
textByHashes.f4638a6deb43e405fee023ad0cb5e1b56bf5f7d6: So that I can try and find her for you!
textByHashes.7743167cdee36c092db56690652c0b00a1da98fe: What, she just gave you her stuff?
textByHashes.c0116bf65079de67b8e2581aae3077d471536124: Is there anything else you can tell me about Juliet?
textByHashes.c67d990fb1e68e2718186183b1ff74f67ce3c3fa: Yes..yes! Please go on...don't let me interrupt...
textByHashes.f43478e118f4632f87d3798eceb0c4080b1cfdce: Sorry Romeo, I've got better things to do right now. Maybe later?
textByHashes.30e0baa6c9acca571c2eb2cfeacd4b7e5eed08d0: Don't you mean that, 'Absence makes the...
textByHashes.d8036506997c34982828c4330971adfb7f86fa84: No sorry, I haven't seen her.
textByHashes.cb5e05e1c8e88a9006d9631a5cda8784b2900857: Why? Is she a fugitive? Does she owe you some money or something?
textByHashes.d6cfba4e4dd340947a28b8eb5e48801b970b6fe3: I don't know? I was asking 'YOU' how 'YOU' know Juliet!
textByHashes.34552fe927e0c13b27d50e33891f3a8664a11d6d: What? Surely you mean that 'she is the love of your life and that you long to be with her?'
textByHashes.f1a1a3f85112f24562949a22198a9a222be00bab: Perhaps I can help find her for you? What does she look like?
textByHashes.b58cf9a767931c2432d7dcea1942e461f06430cd: Shoulders...right, so she has hair, lips and shoulders...that should cut it down a bit.
textByHashes.2dcce333d5cce6d434399880452d938f7b3d00de: You haven't got a clue who I am do you?
textByHashes.ba07e72e7927e4dc651c4801a620cd841da9b55b: You asked me to look for Juliet for you!
textByHashes.7b6182e9ab1b5783a72547119ed4915806bae277: Nothing so far, but I need to ask a few questions?
textByHashes.a189fca4c4a391fb7b867876d1de2c6d6863820b: I've come to see Juliet on Romeo's behalf.
textByHashes.8842557ed3de9d014f21ca6fca035b0e39fc739e: Well, I admit, he's probably not the sharpest knife in the cutlery draw...
textByHashes.e3e500c3909cf5cd3144610259e74d36f27e6d8b: I've just come to have a chat with Juliet.
textByHashes.ea26e670cbd7ef530deb9a670ca47e57ddf17b97: Err..no of course not....why would I be?
textByHashes.017c53d5d6a9275d4e24e533ea91dea572bcabcb: Well, love is mysterious! Perhaps one day someone may even learn to love you!
textByHashes.88e79f2d1d304be9aac1c7cd29f5835571b5a429: Err...Nothing....I guess I'd better be going now...
textByHashes.eda7a3e83a25be28e225c11ddad39255cb960153: I can see that you're busy ranting so I'll just nip off and investigate a bit.
textByHashes.26f3cf0670c824d42200a68a751e4a4e80024c06: Juliet, I come from Romeo. He begs me to tell you that he cares still.
textByHashes.e2a0eba9385ccbc105eac31ac8853b14bb1c459f: Well, I hope it's good news...he was quite upset when I left him.
textByHashes.c800a79a9eaf36eee454b976ccec3ca99d6d630c: Certainly, I'll do so straight away.
textByHashes.c6bd05a5ef8976305686374bcf381c8ab58ab293: Oh, sorry, I've not had chance to deliver it yet!
textByHashes.2e09b42e8042f53d4076f90b416a961361703445: Hmmm, that's the thing about messages...they're so easy to misplace...
textByHashes.ca75310fac992207267feceee84e443a0d6f90d9: Oh, thanks. I like to do my cupid bit.
textByHashes.22dfe35b23f23b17e70dafbf280e7294b16a1019: Just a small chore for Juliet, you do have a lovely daughter in her sir.
textByHashes.976a0f4c9b10fe75cdb06fa9622b3c32b02b5308: Yes, yes, that's probably why I can't read it!
textByHashes.3b06e546c459b8f7729b5851e2cb2bbd7a065c42: Sorry, I mean, that's right sir. I'm just popping to the shops to get some groceries for Juliet.
textByHashes.8f83458eabe66e198831fd2bc841db0b72074d9f: Right, have to be off now...thanks...
textByHashes.1da05cc55f8479a3df8cd12906642cb2321ce1f9: Romeo...great news...I've been in touch with Juliet!
textByHashes.946b2301293b0d64322378fbef175b0c090358e3: Yes, and she gave me a message to give you...
textByHashes.fd87e0f40f0e8a6ba57ba74b0017cac8da7e8ae5: Yep, haven't got a clue where it is.
textByHashes.bb6faabf8609df908141f9025789f4755a32e594: Romeo...great news...I've been in touch with Juliet! She's written a message for you...
textByHashes.fd6e8d018f35e97db79fa9a5508e58b42e13dfb6: Well are you going to open it or not?
textByHashes.7955c3b666d212e6fbab23948568b400fc857002: Oh dear...that doesn't sound too good.
textByHashes.8f7a64e5cc1f7ece3d9fca0094225c8b9ff15f3e: I have to be honest, it's not getting any better...
textByHashes.b111d60b8b745ce8e06b1dd062c6031589ec3300: ...or you could speak to Father Lawrence!
textByHashes.1307e76e90c5eed11c58ee353fe6853d935fc890: Where can I find Father Lawrence?
textByHashes.c580071c31b48ed7a8476367b32bd02e658c29c4: I think I suspected that he wasn't.
textByHashes.fa1fdda5f03640874947d6a7a697c2cbf2cda13a: Have you heard anything from Juliet?
textByHashes.1c8ab92e51a986f316e04e42e077acc2790c6601: Well, I shouldn't worry too much...you can always run away if you see him...
textByHashes.330c509ee978bfbf841014bbd111410782b617ea: Hi Juliet, I have passed your message on to Romeo..he's scared half out of his wits at the news that your father wants to kill him.
textByHashes.5a1308cc21715419348ac740df1752d777b9fa4b: ...his hair colour will clash terribly with the rest of the decoration.
textByHashes.8fa3596701a164151b92778f6e2427a0eabdd6da: I know, I know...I was just kidding.
textByHashes.c8ddb1ab949fa77127bf97e89d6bff774e9cfe32: Anyway, don't worry because I'm on the case. I'm going to get some help from Father Lawrence.
textByHashes.e26cb1aa560457af950df5b9c377a1ba38d654f8: Yes, well, it certainly seems like you have a captive audience!
textByHashes.fd51dec6dc76e546a9f2c233f912065f92e85e57: Romeo sent me. He says you may be able to help.
textByHashes.b2940438104508d2ebc7a67ac289ea0f07d3d535: Yes, very confused....Anyway, Romeo wishes to be married to Juliet! She must be rescued from her father's control!
textByHashes.4ca896a5fc0a41fbf8ff161f35f3e9641dea930a: Dead! Sounds a bit creepy to me...but please, continue.
textByHashes.16ce121cb4edb5445a166e714fa1ca5b5ef0b0ae: Crypt! Again...very creepy! You must have some strange hobbies.
textByHashes.1dc1674d3d0c88380af13e3a1142509fc1d728e5: Apart from the strong overtones of death, this is turning out to be a real love story.
textByHashes.c46fcfea8307010da7e78784076952ebcd5d706a: He wants me to go to the Apothecary!
textByHashes.8238e77768698aae0d6b7ca94962511dfd299668: Yeah, I think so...but the word potion-ey doesn't exist.
textByHashes.f4f4c5ee32139277b961fa1bd7a576336f0955c0: It doesn't matter...do you know where the Apothecary is?
textByHashes.0d442c67514f31ddfcc6f66d70f4e4b7132d5e5f: Because I'm doing you a favour!
textByHashes.39cf501b70e1511a1caba5b4a404bebfd8ce9986: He seems very keen for you to marry Juliet.
textByHashes.b9f7c023f4adff36cd8aa4ae9bb6c0d24cfaf311: I don't know, but I'll do what I can. It just seems a bit odd that Father Lawrence is so keen for you to marry?
textByHashes.a299e6bad80816348b76688b306606c0de6869f8: So, maybe, he just wants a bit of peace? And when you two are married, he won't have to traipse around delivering your messages anymore?
textByHashes.190022dedf06d89e7df26b67a116cc242c204497: Hi Juliet, I've found Father Lawrence and he has a cunning plan. But for it to work, I need to seek the Apothecary!
textByHashes.3a1450f6869e2514dfe9d855b070841d84f106b2: Apothecary, Father Lawrence sent me. I need a Cadava potion to help Romeo and Juliet.
textByHashes.64367b34431ff8dd29eacc757f2367e326e180ac: What do these berries look like?
textByHashes.add5ed38a40365970c9972c7d85b78b9c9cb1046: Where can I get these berries?
textByHashes.f03eaaadef1d2c02fb99439ae9023e27e74ebb2c: Thank you for the Cadava potion.
textByHashes.96213c271cddf4391e52eff9d8c2d8c9e59232b0: I gave Juliet the Cadava potion.
textByHashes.c7e6130945c585db07d95924d0b8a3457fb74b4b: Yes I did. He's told me I must find some Cadava berries.
textByHashes.7835a1634a91f45665840d352ba5d3aabeaa12d1: Any clues where I can start to look?
textByHashes.770bebf306b216e4812f7b3497f2c8da5bf29684: Ok, that's as good a place to start looking as any.
textByHashes.80b5c8e62f3924a9db834c2926e748d7cc487be7: Yes, he's given me details of a potion which should help resolve this situation. The Apothecary is helping me prepare it.
textByHashes.ac55055945c894520969152de1b622d86f5bb45c: I'm not drinking it! It's for Juliet!
textByHashes.1974184accace3efa6efc62f3e82a7c0afaefe88: Hmm, I'm not convinced...maybe you ought to try some before I give it to Juliet?
textByHashes.035cc10e8fc9de909423be2fbc214afdf83d8e94: Ok...but you know what to do when I've given this to Juliet?
textByHashes.cd274f208d90d85c26f0c9ac24baf8f8f107f7d2: Nothing much sir...I promise...I'm just an innocent friend of Juliet's...doing her a few favours...as a friend.
textByHashes.4eb53c3de3361be5b500ab4bcc3f25c34f7da121: I think I can guess sir...
textByHashes.4fd359888582698fc22a32087e0680ba7fca31bf: Are you saying that you look like an animal sir?
textByHashes.6b4d1725dc7dc7769387c930f632b72dbbeb2015: Err...no! Nope! Not a potion! Some medicine...I have a terrible cough [cough]see?
textByHashes.3e4c9e9ca2ed52e64c8240adf5f8b57bf16282c6: >Except, I can't drink too much or else it makes me feel 'really' tired. One sip of this and the lights go out...I mean, I'm asleep in a minute.
textByHashes.9614168e2e1ab8a068af20db6ff64e3a75975ac7: Sorry, I still have to get a special potion for you.
textByHashes.0ffbd9e68182fe009bd97f559d4d2af44866c690: That must be because you're not with him...
textByHashes.12e674ee428d0ce830eae4cb8051e778e6a0ce83: Well, ok then...I'll set about getting this potion as quickly as I can!
textByHashes.2b87648a97bfa1fe387d5fa3689ef419e3479351: Hi Juliet! I have an interesting proposition for you...suggested by Father Lawrence. It may be the only way you'll be able to escape from this house and be with Romeo.
textByHashes.a6ed660e7fc68cee4a0a502c03b86b7c62d4513e: I have a Cadava potion here, suggested by Father Lawrence. If you drink it, it will make you appear dead!
textByHashes.bb1227deb77802973f03e4d372178872300c4544: And when you appear dead...your still and lifeless corpse will be removed to the crypt!
textByHashes.2ff74131378a909708b509d904296405e40309a4: Then...Romeo can steal into the crypt and rescue you just as you wake up!
textByHashes.36d29b87d1e1a0ee67117e31bd5efa2d5edf5b6e: To be fair, I can't take all the credit...in fact...it was all Father Lawrence's suggestion...
textByHashes.658c241907feabc49706362d26ec62344680f662: You might be more believable if you're not smiling when you say it...
textByHashes.d45d2010e2e29a2082a6072e325f3ce504f66f88: Perhaps a bit louder, like you're upset...that your cousin has died!
textByHashes.ec84bb2dbb0cf87585edf955ad04ea5b3c98f04f: Romeo, it's all set. Juliet has drunk the potion and has been taken down into the Crypt...now you just need to pop along and collect her.
textByHashes.543a1686a49edc40c0444766731254bde8fb6af6: The Cadava potion...you know, the one which will make her appear dead! She's in the crypt, pop along and claim your true love.
textByHashes.3c5542e1e914a28667cf90b807ec7f405b05ac3d: Oh, ok...come on! I think I saw the entrance when I visited there last...
textByHashes.44b4a5ab67aab634bc08175933a62012e0cd78d5: We're here. Look, Juliet is over there!
textByHashes.5fe537f0c5903ada06fe1080654f83af5f136284: You go over to her...and I'll go and wait over here...
textByHashes.4aa4ca4a406b139710dbfd9a376506b4eec74075: That's me. Could you take me to Arianwyn?
textByHashes.49808dd82235c3d1111ac1661ec4e8e1d031321e: Well I admit that I've made a few mistakes, but my intentions were good, I swear.
textByHashes.48cfbace43e1ee184f40c0d0021c8ff5eff7d8e0: Glarial? I know that name, I visited her tomb. I moved her remians to Baxtorian Falls, I thought that was where she would want to be.
textByHashes.35872af5ef3305ffb4d39629ade8e2123f8c9da7: Deal, what do I need to do?
textByHashes.54c2349fb0750798d7c28f7cb53bc59c0822319c: So what do you need to do?
textByHashes.6136e270b29a536f08b32008c6f0b1ce18b6ecf2: Hey there, Islwyn said you might be able to help me. He told me you'd know how to consecrate ground for an elven burrial. I need to consecrate Glarial's new resting place.
textByHashes.abb1771d3bc2bd0d7cfd42c03153de389086a33d: That's okay, I've been there before. It's just south east of Baxtorian Falls.
textByHashes.88c19d94b75bf9b1e98949ef3d1451babdeba0bd: Okay, I'll be back as soon as I have it.
textByHashes.8b0f35b4758a4294c9052082434fe0d5573e35a3: Yes, she told me to retrieve a crystal seed from Glarial's old tomb.
textByHashes.860fe4dc2ddba2afd830501a840c9930e89a2a33: Yes, she told me to retrieve a crystal seed from Glarial's old tomb. I have it right here.
textByHashes.f1dfb51e12b1d1a308b797d22c0b7bda24a5898d: How odd. I can see her lips moving... But there's no sound.
textByHashes.8a1bbe674f596ad69139f4344b4758ab82c9e03b: Hello, I lost the crystal seed.
textByHashes.20375815bc0b0fd25607a217205476889e035d5a: Indeed I did, all I need to do now is plant it in her new resting place.
textByHashes.f45791524442a56e816935a101042507d5690fdf: It is, your grandmother's resting place has been consecrated.
textByHashes.d290417d3c53fb315a7d26efd654b9ea5f7aa958: Fascinating. What do you mean by 'revert to seed'?
textByHashes.4ac83a318206c8cb2bf371e7f7aa215b59a8b1a6: Shields are for wimps! Give me the bow!
textByHashes.9ffd5858927fe90c5fc77459fd1a86743cd8ed0d: I don't like running and hiding behind mushrooms. Shield please!
textByHashes.0c8f4c49e67a314332202620c5fae35f03bd3184: I need some time to decide.
textByHashes.ad90fb8dc9dd2fdcd4de9243ddbeaa1e89ba8bfd: Actually, I wanted to talk about crystal equipment.
textByHashes.1f10c2065c47f800371d7a2989ca6232243cd948: I'd like to buy a bow.
textByHashes.08c5ccfff144cabc8d6d55d5b4902fb795880bf8: Your prices are outrageously expensive! Do I look like a banker to you?
textByHashes.a989d6a484f94462cdeb763e4f5ace26fb9ef775: But that's more expensive than a dwarf multicannon!
textByHashes.e82c24963b2fec9a97cd57db73414ae1f0c63213: Which - the dwarf or the cannon?
textByHashes.886f91037ad5bb108b1f863fe9b7f15ac80e0977: Sadly sarcasm is lost on these elves. Oh well.
textByHashes.7a94f82e942374ae9794e4027dfb7064f04f5d48: I'd like to buy a shield.
textByHashes.90588df50ad7b18ca0808a032d78ae2d0580154e: What should I do with crystal seeds?
textByHashes.b7dd2429d67482679b7118f0992c7c7158a9a032: I'll keep an eye out for her, thanks.
textByHashes.5d30c77d73bc83652f389a37bdc82579b3a44b4c: Has anything been happening in the kingdom recently?
textByHashes.cfb1339b5c244058dd92b424c8bd33ce046d319c: So, what has he been doing?
textByHashes.e5d8159468524c5f94bc98e23e947e797d50ae29: Very well, I'll sort it out.
textByHashes.2d2c4d7841523c5f74e6242d2f3d0b61c8dd9379: No, I don't have the time at the moment.
textByHashes.1bb481592a6074e38f921ecc22e34b32895f0f14: Yes, Advisor Ghrim said I should talk to both of you about recent events in the kingdom.
textByHashes.42d1b2a71c7ce01860fabbc90612a460496f000c: Oh, Advisor Ghrim said I should talk to you and the Princess about recent events in the kingdom.
textByHashes.85ce1d93cc607bd5e61a48b724aa2c9306d9c737: Advisor Ghrim told me to talk to you about the situation in Miscellania.
textByHashes.eb26467525714d95b9a89307cb94806f51cd09e9: What has happened while I've been away?
textByHashes.e7306ca8e3e87e9ebf6e8f6b7ca2411c2aadab83: What would you suggest he do, then?
textByHashes.424fe1d5e652198c46bd80525aee7927762673f8: I'm not sure that's such a good idea...
textByHashes.424781936005972ea49a222548580de72999d7ad: I'll give it a try. But they'll still be angry with each other, so I don't think it'll work.
textByHashes.c66980b2aac83fa593aa698b716483e8a7380ae8: Oh, Advisor Ghrim said I should talk to you and the Prince about recent events in the kingdom.
textByHashes.76b7d4c7339ab2d592b21eb93adbfd146005ceed: What are you busy with, your Majesty?
textByHashes.f7ef8116c6552640b2ff8fd4ad63caf78e66f065: I thought I was supposed to deal with those, once you appointed me Regent.
textByHashes.fd583bf986bcdcafc1cc119c372d2e4753de553d: So you're still helping to rule, your Majesty?
textByHashes.f8ce232066dbf325e84abd6d31ffbaad7a0c5aee: These 'affairs of state' you're dealing with...
textByHashes.1fc64abe5402e41e47be34cca33eaa5bdf6a6ff7: Would these involve starting a war with Queen Sigrid of Etceteria?
textByHashes.86a7bcecde3362a151836a0e98d0b840a8248b99: I'm sorry, I have some other things to do.
textByHashes.9b409e5578ec05966adbc204b9684d3e34cd5049: Well, I suppose I could spare a little time.
textByHashes.b467b4dd15a45742bda10d18f08f07a867bc2ce3: King Vargas tells me that things have been going missing from the kingdom. Can you tell me anything about this?
textByHashes.bc88b63a3271faa0b045c4d8f62f70a52a652ccc: I've spoken to the Miscellanean citizens.
textByHashes.c2e0d1a39e7a2ed9c6deae18602e039485a84e49: They say that the Etceterian army demanded tithes from them, and took some of their goods even though they refused.
textByHashes.4fffae426dfc7a5228a1b1d863d13494a746366b: I'll talk to her right away, your Majesty.
textByHashes.b1e4057a990cb5401b8763cf935b50fb477be0fc: Your Majesty, do you have a moment?
textByHashes.1078e140a5bb8c61b8904eaf0382d8b48d031c38: I hear from King Vargas that relations between Etceteria and Miscellania are none too cordial at the moment.
textByHashes.137a381ba85d5a28324686076589611e308c7f5e: Of course not, it's not my fault.
textByHashes.c0a434ea90d610fdf44ddc07383c10e0a5ecf0e3: Queen Sigrid tells me that things have been going missing from the kingdom. Can you tell me anything about this?
textByHashes.f3583325869d1396a7cf93c233fcf16492b5b57f: I've talked to the Miscellanian citizens as well as the Etceterians.
textByHashes.38e3a8d54b32a93029fd5d925ab71f8bf933a8f2: The Etceterian citizens said that Miscellanian soldiers came to their houses and demanded tribute...
textByHashes.8f9024c88b7bfc0d3116966b0514f9a59e2b40ce: ...and the Miscellanian citizens said that the Etceterian army marched into their fields and demanded tithes!
textByHashes.efdd793595776dffdc3bff033254728e71ad0cc1: I've spoken to the Miscellanian citizens, and also the Etceterians.
textByHashes.caf4610e13bf74c82efc20a9cc5f71da0c902ad4: The Miscellanian citizens said that the Etceterian army marched into their fields and demanded tithes...
textByHashes.14e3eb1c5930c4006b2f273846f98694a1db4828: ...and the Etceterian citizens said that Miscellanian soldiers came to their houses and demanded tribute!
textByHashes.d1b69a0895a1662d266f9ee24382e4b5aeeafefa: I'm not sure that would work very well, your Majesty.
textByHashes.38ffdc6b1a59a0daf787fd52335fe5d57775ee52: King Vargas asked me to talk to you.
textByHashes.4e8fc844ed3a95f72f7ae6e2a8c1e47753ecc5fb: He said you might know more about the missing goods.
textByHashes.d8254b71a35df5cd49aae74787487876c9c9ef3c: Er... that you could advise me where to look for them?
textByHashes.d8cfc7108e331c90adce4c7c08c740cba21af5b8: The King's advisor said I should talk to you. He said there have been some suspicious people arriving recently.
textByHashes.9fe80290cb22b51869f3d9eadb14998e131d53f4: Oh. Has anyone visited the island recently, then?
textByHashes.0ba2ae9f2983833a8278b8c1681eaa77594c0de5: I didn't realise the King kept people in his dungeons.
textByHashes.558b46b8f178170bf2ad210b31cb582bce0a1510: I didn't know Miscellania even HAD dungeons.
textByHashes.64009689866fa5b9c653ef5a0c013c6e55f967b3: So you decided to live in the dungeons instead?
textByHashes.46fb31bb977f4019bdf1ba29b293ab7b128758dd: I'm still an adventurer, and I can't be everywhere in Gielinor...
textByHashes.63726a1a4bc9d072fa911bc942455a25e5f5223f: But I'm the Regent! I order you to let me go down there.
textByHashes.bb366f2608cfcbf7914d7563ea29da1faa10ee1c: What'll it take to convince you that I'm really the Regent?
textByHashes.8dbf1a379b62d7c143218165331549c999464b23: Does he have to shout it from the battlements, or something like that?
textByHashes.b6399b6c41fb5e5bf18eaf828cf3d1b0ee756d09: Your Majesty, how do I get into the dungeons?
textByHashes.27638fde3db8a8a82fed16b47b949f0785166d0c: It's okay, the sailor explained it to me.
textByHashes.8a6295ea9f7943f5434366ab286feb02013c4ae7: He said that the only new arrivals on the island were some teenagers, who came from Rellekka to visit their relatives.
textByHashes.01bbb3dedf9f7cfbc066beb4135584ce56eece12: Those relatives were living in the houses in the dungeons.
textByHashes.1c135d6bb0da3ebee3cb045df8bab731bd597d63: Look, the King gave me a scroll saying I have access to the dungeons. I have it right here.
textByHashes.13b9adc413a01c33de0c32526fbfc38fc8411e51: What's it like living down here?
textByHashes.806ac8cab1d490d179e78add66f1082feb49848d: Could you tell me more? The King asked me to investigate.
textByHashes.b999a16fb41a9fe7d6318f4fc956a6a7d31fb918: I have. The monster he talked about could be in the caves nearby.
textByHashes.01b3bb45765d90160a2fa4e3cf8eb92e679411c2: It's not safe. I need to shore up the walls before I can go through.
textByHashes.4f11eb6cc79915ec8c880327c98ab134bc5318f4: What are you doing down in these caves?
textByHashes.5415a28d743273cf531b72f690951d6e7adc890b: Why not? I thought digging was something dwarves were good at.
textByHashes.fc3934ff8fdbc8ae1f2e4e4e499ee1ebb3c32ebc: Of course. Dealing with monsters is what I do best!
textByHashes.246357a9b7052a5a730fe71aa098cbe3261d7126: Okay, so all I have to do is get through that wall?
textByHashes.ee5ab78bed7c94eb2a364387e79ad726494f9e73: And the monster's behind that tunnel?
textByHashes.fbe5306993f315b41c73fa03ca495e5a047e5fe2: Why bother? It can't get through solid rock.
textByHashes.974491d6670d8c1a1f0ea248246ee5f4ec5be1c3: And you're sending me in to deal with it alone?
textByHashes.740a1bdb106f7b021c9d92c86a52f7d8a7cacef3: I wouldn't put it quite like that...
textByHashes.7285a39c7069141d3eec5b5a9c874cd83a65716b: But I'll help you after all. Now, how do I find this monster?
textByHashes.4ffbc85a80d40cb3364fb8f0b9f2d6d8341f844b: Just wondering if you were still here.
textByHashes.7fdca9009ac7dfb4211d6ab7129ed42314c3a986: I've lost that mining prop you gave me...
textByHashes.0da8683e8e89c62cc2b6744d5167286610ad5dfd: I can see the embers of a fire up ahead. Has someone else been in these caves?
textByHashes.29de4b188816cefd61005d007e20b4a5b5d5ac7f: I should explore this cave more before I jump through any more cracks in the walls...
textByHashes.f53e2ada4257ad322b7671ff59b2540f6bffb519: You can't be a rock. I heard you talking to people earlier.
textByHashes.94251cfa210d913a423b5ba6ee0efb728b195451: Your name's Armod, isn't it? I found your diary.
textByHashes.e80665f19199b78af5ae068732246c4b6ddc2537: Not until you tell me what's going on.
textByHashes.d208ad89bd299acc137a35a1cd1b9e378a59badf: Well, I'm the Regent of Miscellania. The King asked me to take a look-
textByHashes.892f2a1dfffbc9ff0cdb4da0e3c6deaa597d520f: And you five are the people mentioned in Armod's diary, right?
textByHashes.6d09b67eedb95b55167dd118d72a5dac379fa83d: Did you steal those goods from the Etceterians and the Miscellanians?
textByHashes.d991b8d7bf621ad06b96ba36dcd79c460ecf5c0c: Of course. I was going to do that anyway.
textByHashes.eb8e89702211ff06a8e61821ef6469ffac7fc356: I don't suppose you've seen a large box around here, have you?
textByHashes.8ff1f3b402ea4ab3c89a5eb041d55d51cc483a66: Why not? I came up through that hole...
textByHashes.8847496652149e4f3ef904cae00186c15e4d5b5d: I've found out what caused all these problems.
textByHashes.3dba92e738af4445a08c23e1388f975c62ba5469: A group of teenagers from Rellekka came to Etceteria to prove themselves as adults.
textByHashes.32aa0ecd866ec20cdd7b0c6d16db5fce3fc1030e: They said they tried to start a war, which they'd then stop, and be hailed as peacemakers.
textByHashes.63321c45d3e8f80da4cec5a33416dd9cd47b575f: They were the ones who disguised themselves as soldiers!
textByHashes.bbbcbf276ad1dec443436aa2f0b42bf48c84871e: Well, there was a minor problem involving a sea snake...
textByHashes.57e79b68e19a8536ad5fa7f117cfadd62015eeed: But I dealt with it, and got the items back.
textByHashes.d41de6107260c4ceb0fda6ffc22a77313f87dfbf: ...I must have dropped the box on my way out of the dungeons.
textByHashes.04717fdf419d1fd26d1b23d5f2dd7b459066d346: I'll make sure to give it to him, your Majesty.
textByHashes.34e2fe1322a5a841bee5e3417a5739634e4d3fd7: I'm not sure I should be reading this...
textByHashes.e9755b51213830c221b9be2ec654584201c710bf: I won't read that letter. It's for the King, not for me.
textByHashes.f4bf875c5790557014699504ac79c0163c8ac734: Oh, why not. I'm the Regent, after all.
textByHashes.16b097cd0edacf7e92fde8411cc5e5be50a7a384: I've found the people who took the goods from your citizens!
textByHashes.c1a14b7fb07c19d898639045158cbc12ec27645a: They weren't Etceterian soldiers after all.
textByHashes.04b136ff5ad85415968ae4a88879749f18a69934: They were teenagers from Rellekka who were trying to prove themselves as adults, by starting a war and then bringing about peace.
textByHashes.862bf921fe4fe1f436d6f12e72cf331b60aa4926: I'm afraid not, your Majesty. There were far too many for me to carry.
textByHashes.33a456f7d1767bd1811dc6e4728f1804cba8e727: And I also spoke to Queen Sigrid of Etceteria.
textByHashes.ddf560e08ef1480333f514628d8cd5e96712c1b6: She gave me a letter for you, which she said was a formal apology.
textByHashes.64120deee499acc02d813b8ba1b8f80ce5fd21b5: Er, I had it, but I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.8770580ec403afaa0e796ce89670c2bd30144909: Of course, your Majesty. Here you are.
textByHashes.ddbceb322379c0a9a6e308e729c8894653e657fc: Brand's suggestion worked, and I didn't even do anything.
textByHashes.551c430f4495a50a2fce372c388f58590b439abc: Do you want me to give a reply to Queen Sigrid?
textByHashes.576633efdf62eae7f89212427a49c39a9fb5d8e1: Yes! Your uncorroborated sob story has touched my heart. When do we set off?
textByHashes.9afe5f068dd145fa68786b6a1a77c10749afd25c: Of course, I fear no demon!
textByHashes.82832855a5c78b7bfbec1c3aaac96e1fec8b1ec0: Nonsense! Keep the money! I will dispose of this evil half-brother of yours and leave you what little money is left to feed your family.
textByHashes.93b430de9c5f2179974b6b313fced267feab3960: Great, I'll take the cash in used coins please.
textByHashes.f0e8d167edf75d4015318fe9abf19da3cd78a52f: Not a chance, this sounds too dangerous.
textByHashes.99224f4e556c52a6821b34f16ddb17927224e47f: No, I don't think I'll help you out this time.
textByHashes.97524bb66f93ed390888c815250de591a5926f1e: Had any luck finding someone to slay the demon?
textByHashes.4057428ad57a5534a121d3b4b2cb7cc1aa9ce32e: Because I came to offer to help.
textByHashes.92328b83739d08eebff86663ed52b9c694803bc0: No reason. I was just in the area and I thought I would ask.
textByHashes.9d836224613a858ef42e608c7172619ff9abda04: It feels like someone has smacked me one with a bottle...
textByHashes.54f00502c09867c297d36a8cfbd485f72a1de825: What? What is going on here?
textByHashes.bb8c0492c4cdb0004d6a1d9288d5770f36afaec4: I can't seem to remember anything beyond chatting to a man at the docks.
textByHashes.87e2f12ee2c4060adc5321c280085a45d8df6e98: Okay... I'll buy that. It sounds like something I would do.
textByHashes.b34077fdee8fdbd1852df995d26a78fff2dd9fad: So where am I, and what is going on?
textByHashes.789661f092aec25de863b30455970f54bfedd34b: So, what do you want me to do?
textByHashes.3d43184641e72c629e4b8fd6133a852e8b08e24f: What exactly do you want me to do?
textByHashes.217722dde322aa092bf759eee7b351a9837689b6: And what happens if I lose the seed?
textByHashes.d3c64727275af84f442aebd872dd2131c3afd622: Why do you talk like a pirate? Didn't you tell me you were an alchemist?
textByHashes.83bb5405f3f3e8a702c0d85935ca30f5a1970abe: That... that... that sounds utterly impossible!
textByHashes.09ffdbb6060c4dce7e4f7db1af69ca0634545628: So what do you make here anyway?
textByHashes.040a9a38ab7767851b3e79058b8f1ca7d8eca089: No thanks... I think I'll skip it for now.
textByHashes.9623a3b57a231af7ac298bb7d0960e85cc9d4af3: What exactly do you want me to do with this?
textByHashes.1e458c5d6b4398835ad9c443871f840e7e27fc5c: So... how are you holding up?
textByHashes.c516245e65eca5b617d2518533676f65eb885d29: O...kay...walking away now, smiling and not making eye contact.
textByHashes.faf6b669507eed1c54ebff87dc15bc9cfce6386b: Well, I don't know... the way I'm breathing could give it away.
textByHashes.003741547f1cc772d9f2c4588e6b0055ce1693f8: I didnt think this counted as a war.
textByHashes.716a50a15bdaf791355e0b90b0e7b9a9746b83a7: Wow... I always thought pirates were tough...
textByHashes.60d5793cd6455f5b536f48cdf07f127e9d5d4461: Why are you not helping out the others?
textByHashes.cb86758b12938535099a9ca65c365f08c7b8ee27: That doesn't sound all that holy to me.
textByHashes.ed7ff3c635efef3f7bfb9a59fd1e1ea64101124e: Is there any way you could...
textByHashes.6e8ab2aa1fba8c31179b36a7b3d970347a4a0b23: Is there anyone else I could...
textByHashes.22929e3a6824d06b50f7a2edcce223b2282ad8ee: I have come to tell you to leave.
textByHashes.bd16597944719c9af75c27f3b1423cfd984ab776: I've come to ask you what you want.
textByHashes.edfbdd0f56d630f6daad828d7304c2b22023b6f0: So...if I were to give you 'rum' you would leave?
textByHashes.f8a12d5fa50f9e0719f6e758082720caa45567ef: I've come to join your crew!
textByHashes.a24895999e630f65a24216afb2833795614c981f: Arr! Shiver me mainbraces and make them landlubbers walk the scurvy plank, Cap'n! I've come to join yer cut- throat, bilge swillin' crew! Also, arr!
textByHashes.35fb433df00f3f2b38f4d6891e81f3b353048d0e: Yes, for the time being anyway.
textByHashes.cf12b038f5f36299aebef2de9e695ba52fe40693: ...so that you will know exactly what time it is due to the horrible pain in your earlobes!
textByHashes.63f756005fce2cf14d3de7069e5a4a7ea157b256: ...meaning you'll need a dozen Ogres and a team of highly skilled surgeons to remove them!
textByHashes.09ff38014516f371dfd5b6fa54deec956b7f98ba: ...so that all you will be able to hear from then on will be the rustling of the ants walking through them!
textByHashes.6da6289068b69c649349f0a3b0507b55ab70ce37: ...and then I'll use a wrench to remove the handles, so you'll see it every time you cough!
textByHashes.eeb9b6d1f0e2fe0d247ded125f7f121f8625e246: ...and I'll grind up what's left, mix it with lemon juice and throw the whole lot into the ocean!
textByHashes.d3238b3d8626d692d40128703c978b9ac874ee90: ...leading to the eventual, violent explosion of those organs!
textByHashes.4c1bb0e8e00cdfc23a2878f0c9427eb20083c403: Captain... I grew some blindweed but then I lost it...
textByHashes.7e6e30d4516ebbabb87316198a157738c7689f84: And what happens if I lose the Blindweed between here and the intake hopper?
textByHashes.1f50f7ee2e21abe97190bbedf86b53f8bcfe039d: Theoretically, of course, as it would be almost impossible for me to simply lose the stuff in the time it will take me.
textByHashes.b9834cdb330dce8cc09f610dc1fe797efb34cdfa: You had some all the time?
textByHashes.78c67831ce835486c8ce322b17d2d3c5028392e5: Why was I risking my neck killing pirates to grow some if you had some all along?
textByHashes.e520d6f4e1d87e280e9de102a7f9b15f84bcbe0a: Well, that takes care of the Blindweed. What now?
textByHashes.a06241e2fa537c5f0f58da9c2375846078583d38: Where can I get some of that?
textByHashes.e8dd04586312272ed64995ae31633eb5ca94ea27: And I assume the place is crawling with these zombies?
textByHashes.273ec7e206cc7f0c660227299b5429f053b37289: Well, on my way over to the hopper some big boy stole the bucket and ran away...
textByHashes.9530ef8cf2fa257ebcd9d9e574ebb222451bbb53: They aren't related to those Seaslugs are they?
textByHashes.bdae32f39ce6f0cc1544662a61f008428cfb045b: So what should I do with these Sluglings anyway?
textByHashes.44ce7664f27456623f134f463370a3aed9cb5987: What should I do with it?
textByHashes.57251effdd1a57fa92333afe13bf24fd6a6ff083: How am I suppost to catch these things?
textByHashes.f0ec788879d23500720ecdbe798e808d9546d5df: And if I don't have one?
textByHashes.2bd6a334ef26fe9b17d10353e4c6de391b7cc163: The slugs are talking to me... They tell me to do bad things...
textByHashes.fb7827cfaf1f0066225b11d56cc7f00a4f144cbb: How could I kill my sluggy brethren...?
textByHashes.cf52035fddcd8f9b9804a4cc1b1db2efa7ff87d8: Well, how far away will I have to go to grab it?
textByHashes.b88c3614d0d4ecee0ffdefd0f65940c480c94d8c: I said, what if I've lost the wrench?
textByHashes.1e8f8f7142e28c1c413b5243fd6798c929ce1ccb: You used to be a priest, right?
textByHashes.4138a132559415930f3f39df266dee278605e2c0: Never mind. I need some help with the spirit in the brewing equipment.
textByHashes.80581cc14ba2b06856a1617306d8dbe5fdbe57db: Can you bless this wrench for me?
textByHashes.a0242d6b648ef72703bb9efb2f96b142f7a47f4d: Well why didn't you just say so?
textByHashes.1b973fa6ca479c6f1624d680498133a7badee65c: Really? I mean, it's holy and everything, but I don't think it looks all that useful.
textByHashes.9d1f89ab353bb63d0aa025b7810763f8401326bb: Well, no. I don't know what you mean, but I'm sure I'll find out!
textByHashes.2220fdea082c9a738886efb335761577c7493b7b: The power of Guthix compels you!
textByHashes.67bd822f9796451563069752edeb38565aed1f9b: Remind me never to drink anything you have ever made. Or touched.
textByHashes.78b661814d572fb3451184d2a08bd2b28fe35df3: Well, I stuck your spider in the hopper, what now?
textByHashes.6a22f4159f895d32cd4618b8523b81311f7eef5a: Oh! I haven't spoken to him yet!
textByHashes.4e4a826bfcef1124c05d31e70a6dc7dc0b9856ce: So... I take it your boss will be pleased?
textByHashes.ed0d0d09fec87df8db332e81397ac16e9059d5aa: Oh well, I guess I'll have to try again.
textByHashes.4afbbff1048db6bf6b96573c61315067b43463d9: I'm sure he would. Good job you caught me out, eh!
textByHashes.61e9600eb1cb24d7a1802e19efaed1a53e7e5048: Have you any quests for me?
textByHashes.0b4ed137ea4a14b14187475ab66f1ffba90a734e: No, I lost that talisman that you gave me.
textByHashes.7aa8471189d7be9030d7ccba2d35c4d9f920e691: Nothing thanks, I'm just looking around.
textByHashes.71b2ca52ddd27ff0f28bdc685db552f053d52c69: And have you found anything useful?
textByHashes.f245f321c718d53ac6a84ac21998b3c0e9a84fab: Ok, well I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.ec15231f1953d455bec058d57d9885b6fc2567f4: How did you know my name???
textByHashes.ca6bf5eac793d30700032878445848ef3c429ea1: I'm looking for the head wizard.
textByHashes.1d390cfbd760b2fa0b99d3d7d4c3973930976420: The Duke of Lumbridge sent me to find him. I have this weird talisman he found. He said the head wizard would be very interested in it.
textByHashes.49934eb06bd7dd572bbcd5fbff0a7aa2fd33d3d3: ...except I don't have it with me...
textByHashes.d4477135418f9ad903e9141eb4f5dd047e4225a4: No, I'll only give it to the head wizard.
textByHashes.73ff75ef0ab0a1506d44ef8570c9402f5a1ec020: No, I don't think you are the head wizard.
textByHashes.c89c9a22c8fd79e94914cbfa04f249f22389ee3e: ...I lost the package you gave me.
textByHashes.e43b258815469141634ceb7a803d07eb421da9cb: I have been sent here with a package for you. It's from the head wizard at the Wizards' Tower.
textByHashes.60d1d954212742ee4a3f332f5792e827f7b12ae4: Uh... yeah... about that... I kind of don't have it with me...
textByHashes.7396292c150dc234eb4c5283c2318ce2a3efe9df: Ok then, I will do that.
textByHashes.66ca9f6df91faae85ecd3c3936a6602153d2d785: Yes, I have. He gave me some research notes to pass on to you.
textByHashes.05bb949c40560d667f9bb7f05750ae397a112b1a: I'm still not sure how I fit into this little story of yours...
textByHashes.e16a7a760c40e9100588689125defcfefc471dde: So only you and Aubury know the teleport spell to the Rune Essence?
textByHashes.53d8b31fdeb4c1d18e36d0e0fc322f89aa653fc2: Sure, I'll go and get them from the bank.
textByHashes.473f708f884d0ddf849a546128b1feb010dc9d48: Uh... I kind of... lost them...
textByHashes.b0696224b4b83f30209b7cc7d7ba035525e09719: The Duke of Lumbridge sent me to find him. I have this talisman he found. He said Sedridor would be interested in it.
textByHashes.69043afab6afb0475e498107f2cc8cc74ddce51b: First tower? Forgotten essence mine? What are you on about?
textByHashes.871c06c06bb5884f22f67a4248d095e73e363595: If it was the first tower, I'm guessing it doesn't exist anymore? What happened?
textByHashes.a83db962a16575ec0fe7fd959458a2510131ef2a: The essence mine you mentioned earlier, I assume?
textByHashes.b8c98420fbdc1889544a58fd52ed29d76c98d25c: I'm starting to see why this is so important. So you think this talisman can help you rediscover that incantation?
textByHashes.aca858c284801781598c1d2118b83128c57b0caf: I don't remember telling you my name... How do you know it?
textByHashes.23757fcd1d02f2bd6f0daa4fd4b36e11d7282bde: No, I'll only give it to Sedridor.
textByHashes.0cbd5080ae2944bb79e5ca67c70a293385a4c1fc: No, I don't think you are Sedridor.
textByHashes.8be2be3163073037d8eadcbaae67d93608e47f40: You're right! How did you know that?
textByHashes.4266795f9ee4f3ba0f09246f0e4518bc9000e30e: So is that talisman of any use to you?
textByHashes.6976b8db536be6cb0b3cd92991e68b780565e671: I lost it. Could I have another?
textByHashes.c8d489ede06daf43b5fcc4a6e294d7f5024b8d21: I've been sent here with a package for you.
textByHashes.f24928e0ba0b175e7f19fb536f0abf96474fff06: From Sedridor at the Wizards' Tower.
textByHashes.b17b26a262bbcc181ebeb62cb8c43d01c6c0b0fe: I'd love a cup of tea.
textByHashes.13186cde2269710bf8e516b4b657483621da0cab: Aaah, nothing like a nice cuppa tea!
textByHashes.dc985b73f646d7076d23446c70f584b46225b529: Yes, I have. He gave me some notes to give to you.
textByHashes.5e10b9b3bcabb052c3945d1133ece3c473bb66a3: So you'll be able to access that essence mine now?
textByHashes.dd99c17422a3289f6b197ee85f4aa7e31688d432: Err, you're not going to believe this...
textByHashes.9b69642b764e109b6c89d7b5e9103a6185dac2a9: What do you need assistance with?
textByHashes.03075cde486136059dfe81637780250382c52c90: How would I go about catching them?
textByHashes.3017150bce7d16aebd1871d5b707a8100c5ece49: Okay, I will do it then.
textByHashes.5fa440e7615b162d2f9cbbe6b6b1f53233cca22f: I've not caught all the scorpions yet.
textByHashes.1a1f1a2bb3f18b2286147eb5eac1ac9a54a7b3e3: I need to locate some scorpions.
textByHashes.10df004cde2835c471ce6e9181af2cb96a5e1bc6: I'm looking for some lesser Kharid scorpions. They belong to Thormac the Sorcerer.
textByHashes.2a7dd6557fc325d0391f4cba050d3d0c93c91ebd: Where did you say that scorpion was again?
textByHashes.d9e5414ce2a084f97b6741ce0fd4b3585d4f9d57: I've retrieved the scorpion from near the spiders.
textByHashes.9decaf2822ba7f2df22624ecd54fc25602d9e422: I've heard you have a small scorpion in your possession.
textByHashes.8a6c4470a7f19b3246639ee422daa0ed6c3f6c0d: I have retrieved all your scorpions.
textByHashes.a40569e1f491f6beb58d919b23d28bc9d5d525c7: Hello there. What are you doing out here?
textByHashes.f74d565c09899a439525ca2ff3c35bc18c954df2: I see... So, who are you, and how did you end up here?
textByHashes.5315d5191059b2b65b6bcce12d36e8a253f4182f: Do you need a hand getting back to civilization? I could maybe help you out if so.
textByHashes.f5631fb7c06494d761d09d7058fa3f674cbf9a82: Well, I suppose I can't say no to that.
textByHashes.7d02a5c6da1f2feb96fb8bdc3254abcd4645999e: I've got something else to do first.
textByHashes.8b7dc74ba3ae3b5ef2d2acbe0dd4c3789f2ce9d0: Thank you for the offer, but I really must get going... Maybe another time.
textByHashes.b75d271986a3b003db87dad98d8aebb3a40a89fe: This isn't good. I'd better head into town and try to find some help.
textByHashes.5469e027ea0e7bb66b315b3268f6e6fbe7ef419f: Mumpty Rumpty fell off a wall!
textByHashes.8ad8932db2fa4dab7a7600644b30e2e7d954a0d9: The egg that was living at the top of the temple!
textByHashes.2f3884b022ee83306b65cf51d38ca56de55f6390: I'm not giving up without at least trying first.
textByHashes.b510314bdc035341d2e5ce285f52617409e36b6a: Hello there. I don't suppose you could help me?
textByHashes.039eeee0fa48f1c22a69c8a2900e6bb0408bfddf: This might sound a little strange... but Rumpty Bumpty fell off a wall.
textByHashes.64e961289334ec2676b38ad836712368ae7bb301: He's an egg. I need to get him fixed up.
textByHashes.01961e6a91a6e3c67c984b715f3db7a523a71820: King? Okay, I'll try and find her. Thanks!
textByHashes.990aee7b0a291055613176c43ece6383c3e8c7ad: Sorry, what I meant was... are you King?
