textByHashes.c84dd80efbd4f3de647565027845ef71e8cd879f: Yes, yes, the egg. He fell off a wall.
textByHashes.c7f0d7e7cce2a9a9c16042b661619b04edc163e8: It was a disaster! He's everywhere! I was told that if anybody could help put him together again, it would be you.
textByHashes.fc3496577221a7e1fa72d739c6d3e056c237b572: Oh... Well, what about these men?
textByHashes.b7f7246158331f9508a5ee0b908bf06ebc436922: Okay, where can I find your men?
textByHashes.735bff6edcecf5f6c26a3e495704b0bc93d697b2: Thanks! I'll have them gathered in no time.
textByHashes.cce820e386f10b6b566d662bee77f6924a6e88ee: Scrumpty Numpty fell off a wall!
textByHashes.98bf1697f593bdaa8860ca8fbf92adf3ea4f6746: It was a disaster! He's everywhere! Can you help?
textByHashes.b662bfa11d131cc7c7a8db2a5c75a0a19f419ba9: Oh... Well, what about these men.
textByHashes.1afb04f36f5d36f5f6b860aa10eeaceb587fd3e4: Excuse me... Are you one of King's men?
textByHashes.7c55d19e8c8195c94d7df29842672620e76720bb: King said that you might be able to help me. It's about Rumpty Bumpty.
textByHashes.4d56045551a70f804f077ad2cf6afff0c0e73fa1: Yes, Pumpty Lumpty fell off a wall! It's a disaster.
textByHashes.3c2f14fde925a37adcd0231177046ecc0f2c1b6a: Well... not exactly a man. He's an egg.
textByHashes.ef25edaffa34e8b02775109a81140bddc05088b6: I can talk to the blacksmith.
textByHashes.e47eb1eab848b3e81466c1bd2cc65408db79b7fc: I need your help with Wumty Scrumpty.
textByHashes.b3d73abbb7d2154f40e86105505bf77cc1897738: Yes, yes. Egg, fell off a wall, disaster.
textByHashes.386a8697054a24e517d64356eacdc819875504bf: Well, I'm here about an axe...
textByHashes.2e6c747387860940be90382b7fa1b116a7b790d4: I don't want to buy one! I'm here to pick up one that you're repairing.
textByHashes.91bfa637971c91d086ba79d73bb49b3ec3a2900e: The axe is already here. I'm just here to pick it up.
textByHashes.4dd73c5d179d22a8ed412158efe0bfd0407e5e24: Well, what's wrong with the whetstone?
textByHashes.3900875acd85ae588c50cb04f4e507717734efa9: Okay... I guess I can try and fix the whetstone.
textByHashes.7c0026f22626c9cd4d9428293b68651c74a75941: It's done. Now, about that axe...
textByHashes.f1ac69693b662d44c21befce915dc5b6549bb165: Turned out there was a bit of a backlog of work... The whetstone had some problems as well, but that's all fixed up now.
textByHashes.c2e60de7642ead5d4e87ac99d8b2b1ce17c831ec: I have, but it still needs a little work...
textByHashes.963f2beefc3d679848ba99e1553b5460932f3845: Okay, here's the axe. When you're ready, head over to the big temple just north of town.
textByHashes.da3d14010dcd233e0f1dcfbfe2ee8f36e0788583: I need your help. It's Bumpty Numpty.
textByHashes.c48dcad6b5ca7d959fb7bf66a9a650ec018cbdca: Yes. He's a broken egg. We need to try and put him back together!
textByHashes.c734a9ccfc595f7cebe65cb91052669d4fed7311: I can get you some tea.
textByHashes.3de4d88d51eae50367190e32e3d7558624923f63: You'll have to just give me a moment to make some space for it.
textByHashes.ba63ae60938b7b92fa351b630fbe20455ffe4983: Alright, I'll be back soon with some tea.
textByHashes.6f70b4b1cef70d233cd0a5e1c349cd1edfded238: Now's not the time for tea!
textByHashes.0dcbd9070e2b34af08456318da542f9b3570d4a6: I need your help with Pumpty Lumpty.
textByHashes.2c53d498fddaf13139a1854803186ed91e3ff94f: Yes, the egg I was telling you about before...
textByHashes.b3b76c7cef99aaac18b4144e39a89902020e30b1: Could I get a cup for it?
textByHashes.2164712698ce7ca4afb6b70ddfcf0ed5d0d77bae: Oh yeah... I'll be right back.
textByHashes.cab055f9f85e7c845d9eba93a1a6308ad64e7a09: In the big temple just north of town.
textByHashes.ac13a409241b3dbff54ae52f50e06d05f6e0f90b: I've got a very big problem. It's Bumpty Numpty.
textByHashes.9e2999cbe2e67b1375037dac682f4102b07957b0: Yes. He was sat on a wall, but he had a great fall!
textByHashes.91f3eac856ecb21829f0022281303d4c0ebd650f: I'm afraid not. Do you think you can help?
textByHashes.eaa32d4d63682aa2f2bf8776f04fd09c407099d8: I see. Well, maybe I can help out with that?
textByHashes.8b881778879b664e4bfd04670512c20462040bf9: We have bigger problems right now!
textByHashes.0ce5512da43698226607b4ad263e621f1c02aa84: Right, that's the cart all fixed.
textByHashes.27e400da29c8a944353575653dadd7d24ac037bc: Over in the big temple just north of town.
textByHashes.c6ebc8af782ce3b6ce28b200e0a26e6368c47c92: But where would we even get a replacement egg?
textByHashes.b003ac7e66b02219c67bf35f00bf821cc0f053d5: How about we gather a few potential eggs and pick the best one?
textByHashes.4f7ea20f228fb096a57f616534958ca713f6cb98: Okay, I just need to know where I can find these eggs.
textByHashes.3684a60bd0cbeac9f93e8a5df77411d8c5d824f0: Right then. I'll be back once I have some eggs.
textByHashes.b867535b25d01c137cfd2e56e84e07a4df708a79: Remind me, where can I find a dragon egg?
textByHashes.9b71215b6f2c36ff74a29cfb814f899d72bf6bb4: I'll head over there and try to find one.
textByHashes.2e6919d83107f39f540450764131d94b2f28d6a7: Remind me, where can I find a large chicken egg?
textByHashes.d80fadfdb1989194e31138cd5ee10438cffaf2b9: Remind me, where can I find a jaguar egg?
textByHashes.76fa1ca3b4b7848b6e35ce27163d9279a9ba0ea4: I'll have a look and see if I can find them.
textByHashes.1bf0cd421a45b8cb7f9a606e35029931e725fb09: I managed to find a large chicken egg!
textByHashes.06205c82cfa03419de1ac90cadfe204e598727c7: I managed to find a dragon egg!
textByHashes.5e0e39b9aeea04b8875abd1dd015ce151459f306: Hmm... It's not bad, but I think it's just a little bit too small to be Humpty Fumty.
textByHashes.59c43beeb15641ca59f7fa0f0d29bc252ad02298: It's a good size, but the face... it seems to be melting off. I think the egg is too warm.
textByHashes.843cdae0037914f204e829c4bb0b20c8c81a2cce: Well, regardless of what it is, I do think it might be the one.
textByHashes.f208f3c35bf4611c1e5250cd8c1f2d92724c3243: What are we going to do now?
textByHashes.a504d1f884794d88aa81b9833775adce14ec0eee: Thank you. I don't think I could have done it without you three.
textByHashes.d32ad181c90144592112909a07bb2676d3a97822: Er... No. No problems at all.
textByHashes.401df71427ecc882aefd7c9e159b8983cb6cd481: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Mumpty Rumpty.
textByHashes.db49451178671247f0a52c415b46f05e1e1dc9ee: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Rumpty Bumpty.
textByHashes.b4fa3bf664981cdc6322c8bf052e2a595c7c8064: I did. Your men were a big help.
textByHashes.7bb59eff9e1d11a19cc9a413610fd248f3a2916c: I suppose so, how do I get there?
textByHashes.0e79404b76d120ecd819026d30b9e22ba27fa933: Ok, I'll go and see if they're ok.
textByHashes.8a0d9532074105fd5b3d130ca848d1ee5b48dad2: I'm working on it now Caroline.
textByHashes.78da0a99e8508a8fef97b9630f3191b2bb3a87e0: I would like a ride on your boat to the fishing platform.
textByHashes.f7cecc257c4add7f96462f7b7d39a1d7f6805376: Oh yes, I forgot about that stuff. Can you use it?
textByHashes.4bbf8453dfca9510c725848e83b2eb1eab62309f: Where can I find swamp tar?
textByHashes.c928b5d94433ed64c957e7e43f9af303d6c6c976: Ok, I'll try to find some.
textByHashes.1c419cb8ab26c0689794c95d57e2424832687d99: No, I'm going to stay a while.
textByHashes.b0d6c4dd4329db6a1b8ec673272c0dcc0dd0f460: Umm. Not last time I checked.
textByHashes.33d990e972ab22c2c33c7aab75e1312a77ad0ae4: Ermm... So you don't want to tell me then?
textByHashes.d31d01fa9d17ba03c95a25d98dc7eea556992b78: Ermm... I'll leave you to it then.
textByHashes.ccb60a49365bbb42ba82ea5008d6ae09261aafb1: You'd better start making sense Sonny Jim or I'll...
textByHashes.569c655f3810541c3d1b98c79230fa4533ea4a78: I'm trying to find out what happened to a boy named Kennith.
textByHashes.f3657c4529e0ace9f536a9210651282a5a87246a: Hiding from what? What's got you so frightened?
textByHashes.cee4b0489a7e88a17c6cb4d687abdf2e36f354f7: I doubt they would taste too good.
textByHashes.ce05b133b23b49a07a3fca6d9daa791558c4dbe8: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to upset you.
textByHashes.919a19ebe93485afd1a2e8d8e0843b113b0cb106: That's good advice, you stay here and I'll go try and find your father.
textByHashes.da860caa062cf914c9e7b8b5cf6473c669add34c: Holgart, something strange is going on here.
textByHashes.38c38dc2e17c0d9f0f957798f238ed7eb4e1ea24: Apparently Kennith's father left for help a couple of days ago.
textByHashes.91ab65b5fd5e6cb0f9e218debf65a965b98444a8: Your wife sent me out to find you and your boy. Kennith's fine by the way, he's on the platform.
textByHashes.7f4cba3734da8a36b5410a7b40db81923e0cd0da: We'd better get back to the platform so we can see what's going on.
textByHashes.f84b83252a8486d1cb1f91c9b46152dba2857322: They're all being controlled by the sea slugs.
textByHashes.e81085652b5130a147d7c979e3a69121b312a17d: I need to get Kennith off this platform, but I can't get past the fishermen.
textByHashes.7636f5b4492daa72590b892f0f5eade05097f00f: I've managed to lose my torch.
textByHashes.f698cee3d5ded45dc8c7cb0148ff61a1b45e0fb9: I'd better find a way to light this torch, and soon.
textByHashes.9f09031076965559e6a4a2d1585fe65002d563f2: I've managed to light the torch.
textByHashes.247b501c0187123b8ca8fd2069f315e6221efbb3: Don't worry I'm working on it.
textByHashes.ee742f00740892f5936d222be63ff35040cc9e66: You'll be able to see him soon. First we need to get you back to land, come with me to the boat.
textByHashes.5067f22f2a95c6cae62f7ad28a2bea875da11f09: Okay, you wait here and I'll go figure another way to get you out.
textByHashes.21467bb81bce5902d1619815651512e5b4980624: Kennith, I've made an opening in the wall. You can come out through there.
textByHashes.e5d50c57daaa2c9b5889c9ededd62f6b2f4dba01: I'll figure that out in a moment.
textByHashes.a7437a62817f97f0fb1c5e8c2dd792791f75c3af: Are you going to come back with us?
textByHashes.6b78117bc18953c4cf88ac4cf74e87f95e3f6a06: Do you have a way of removing the slugs once they've attached themselves to someone?
textByHashes.09a179eb0818bbea2e126a9a02cb2da0d42b9595: I only hope they stay confined to the fishing platform.
textByHashes.f0529388a575ff2df9023e4b8a84d4f5dedeae36: You're braver than most. Take care of yourself Bailey.
textByHashes.a73c36e8cefc959bc1eef95f5aeb685f17cc188d: Did you get the kid back to shore?
textByHashes.5fbb08a8b0e2324082c8f4d15f64a3498bfe9c96: We found Kent stranded on an island.
textByHashes.10a391d14f92d008fe6865ca0672e68209125841: That's right... he wanted me to find some cultists that stole his armour.
textByHashes.6a3913dc4981bf1c810f5725b6d8eca7e24d01d1: Sorry, I'm very confused. What's all this about?
textByHashes.3380fe65000c23583a7c53a6cf84bef81bab2c2e: Well then what do I need to do to convince you I wasn't?
textByHashes.22935365864e8ca0dee9625b635ad349004beb13: Of course! I would never sit by while criminals are on the loose! You will have all the help you need!
textByHashes.f462f0c7d253770fb5a3d0fbb0e9fb5f70603881: What on Gielinor have I just agreed to?
textByHashes.7f8d79e171426748e4898564d8822412277f1d14: Sorry, I need to get going.
textByHashes.5245928b4f9fc74e8d0d8d661820118f128887b0: Well I guess we should get started right away. What do we know so far?
textByHashes.08a418ae2d8af8845d0ccd678e85b9e18a95ab02: So no one else was in the room?
textByHashes.f47cf7ba0bbbfb620a79238505d0a40b5a36e555: Where was everyone else at this point?
textByHashes.4b162e147e2d785c1f6921f9b131c28a24515e27: Do we have any obvious suspects?
textByHashes.132e850fea7a1eb602bb3743bb13b4fdee7913ed: Apart from Jones, do we have any other suspects?
textByHashes.d5891ed3c72c0b4912f8701afd516a972367105e: Good idea. I'll begin at once.
textByHashes.835e605505c8274c9bcb1464f63211afa58146b3: I think I've seen everything I need to. I should check in with the guard.
textByHashes.a124a031fdfa591f7006389d2ab0c967b7d93b95: Hmm... was someone after Hazeel's restoration scroll?
textByHashes.17d3e323e9b428071b1784d574d2897585fea135: Sounds like we need to find this Evelot and see what they know.
textByHashes.a9579ff63df3927ca1ad5f73b46d3764d1b9bcb8: Should we not look into the Hazeel Cult as well?
textByHashes.d5848741ee62d7d168d468913431a79e6f554810: Why can't you investigate the Khazard Army yourself?
textByHashes.9bb863a79524ee97c1bc73419f05271bb894e333: And that's where I come in. I understand.
textByHashes.6d8ba1aebf467a3ea162cc07afb507b6328feb5c: The window was broken from the outside.
textByHashes.92b554be2c01500c4d45c7e462d6c26f065d4fd8: So it was likely someone who didn't have any other way to access the mansion. We can probably rule out staff and family members.
textByHashes.21ee83fcf4bad76ac6300ef9bf37473792a8b7d2: That could mean there were two people in the room with him.
textByHashes.fa440c496848756cf68162e35fe474cbb410e769: There's something else as well. It looks like the blade used to kill him was unusually thin.
textByHashes.f8c830bca191e75c4b1abf7b155825312b60bfd3: A hidden room above us was broken into.
textByHashes.d20a5d337444f880818e9157cf7dc2c19346ccf4: It looks like it can only be accessed from in here. It doesn't seem like anyone has been in there for some time.
textByHashes.62e7a4a77d68a728649c037373305b412d5a5c51: There's a chest up there that's been broken into.
textByHashes.41c403a8821ce2f4dc6175096ad9e108fd24c63c: I don't know. I don't think so.
textByHashes.8d03f13d68fd6a060c7129a45425a8209ddfa7d4: I think I've gone over everything.
textByHashes.3f0471533ad6a177c2ee4815e526dc02168d43e0: Do you know anyone called Evelot?
textByHashes.146ec0489db37b60e6fc481ffb0d84637ba466c4: Are you sure? I could make it worth your while.
textByHashes.1c5d83b194699cd58b2a772f44188a6c8bba871b: So what can you tell me about Evelot?
textByHashes.4be37c40d419a4a4278dac8936444ced921922bb: I might just do that. Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.953123b5dc34d532815e5059c6401ef5e43ffed5: Alright, I'll come back when I have the money.
textByHashes.388202c3ed720f30adfcadb8a638c11376563118: Ah yes, thanks again for the information.
textByHashes.b00dcc733a22e70bdba111bc62748aabc14d6b0e: So will you answer my questions now?
textByHashes.740e140043cb8609d5ad42c1aaba15a149e0d854: Ceril Carnillean has been murdered, and an amulet belonging to you was found at the scene of the crime.
textByHashes.2d7eb402c472046651d53f9aaf462f2e1842368d: And what did he want you to steal?
textByHashes.a3fe2eb4852c4dcbe0da630a7cbffb573de7237c: Hmm... What about this scroll? What was it?
textByHashes.b48ce722676c9bede1e921c7db77d105a80d0d71: Ah, so it was the Hazeel Cult that hired you. That's not surprising.
textByHashes.e7616e7884152c1effb2dd7601d396ab4bc50f9d: What? But if that's the case, then who hired you?
textByHashes.f6f65adbb9a9b8aba6dad392bf605a80919a6249: Hmm... Say the scroll had been there, what were you supposed to do with it?
textByHashes.37c3b10fbe91c2503fe2a943cbc9456977ea6b07: What? But that doesn't make sense. The reason the scroll wasn't there is because the Hazeel Cult already managed to steal it. Why would they hire you to steal it again?
textByHashes.99f32fc6337804409283ea63d752eb44a348a5c7: I don't like this. Something very strange is going on here. I need to find this person that hired you.
textByHashes.e9318c4214a11dbd8f3178710ce5f7c1b7a0eb7b: Well then I guess my best bet is to pay a visit to the Hazeel Cult. They're involved in some way, even if they themselves don't realise it.
textByHashes.76ea6b6f430a10364f75f82a67aff2b3a5be280c: I won't stop you, but you should consider going to the authorities. They might be able to help you.
textByHashes.8391472912ed3c618f2ef211f7a0c6876baf6c61: I think so. I have a new lead to investigate.
textByHashes.f10e5f419afa04a1e1d529b78e31ddced758e53e: Before you go any further, there's something we should discuss.
textByHashes.bbc233fea5851d6efb22c0c02664b89901cb61f8: Because Ceril Carnillean is dead, and his killer may be trying to frame you!
textByHashes.246842048a2fc05fb9fe8199078a587c34d666fa: A member of the Khazard Army called Evelot was hired to steal a scroll from the Carnillean Mansion and deliver it here.
textByHashes.dd96289983b289c2d576db3a85d4e5ce201e5db2: Well during her escape, Ceril Carnillean was killed, but not by her. Someone else was there, but she doesn't know who.
textByHashes.2b0af1e730c9ac7aa00a5f61a7370c2229b8dcb3: The evidence I've found so far suggests that the killer was trying to frame her. By extension, they might have been trying to frame you as well.
textByHashes.c7f2e397b191d2e78ef6307c83a2bd2f3a9ea19d: Er... is now a bad time to mention that Khazard and I have a... complicated history?
textByHashes.11f6469f429eeaca6bd92b4fdc59ff0e49d00498: Alomone, I need to speak with Hazeel.
textByHashes.e35348123685b75ed14e14c6f9e3618f25a0cf46: But it's very important. Has Jones not told you what's happened?
textByHashes.d6a03abf728502637c51edd74e683954d9003369: Well then I guess I'll be the one to break the news instead. Ceril Carnillean has been murdered.
textByHashes.2050afb2f9e208a8ac354c8e3b9c5943afe314a9: I'd hold off on the celebrating if I were you. Something strange is going on and I really need to talk to Hazeel about it.
textByHashes.1dcb836d53242c3942a616d8ce57e873f8788121: I assure you, this is important.
textByHashes.db9224846cdfeddd698ac97101043c3f96c99872: A member of the Khazard Army called Evelot was hired to steal your restoration scroll from the Carnillean Mansion. She was meant to deliver it here, but of course, it had already been taken.
textByHashes.98cca5183fcd6d16176aedf52f933193b0f09ff1: During her escape, Ceril Carnillean was killed, but not by her. Someone else was there, but she doesn't know who.
textByHashes.5e37d3aa93dec154d59dde894530381e4f8ea59e: He fled after the murder took place. The guards are still searching for him.
textByHashes.4569b6af96ddbc06bb059a769e792264dcee1607: There's something else as well. The evidence I've found so far suggests that the killer was trying to frame Evelot.
textByHashes.4fc385fc89333183e026e429658d59cb9d54d7e0: I'd say it's been pretty thorough. I handled most of it myself.
textByHashes.1176cda3d549dfeb99dfe9014bf9d8627c0524f6: Aren't you worried about my loyalties?
textByHashes.1bef68dd1f77eab471126cd5fb31e1f638320f9f: Can you think of any possible suspects?
textByHashes.0c43e440105743900afd5033abc33d847a1c5e46: What is this ritual you mentioned?
textByHashes.b9071648e5b4fe650960ea0101a5f6887301a310: The more information I have, the more help I can be.
textByHashes.fb9dcc964368c5977c2ecb7ae77379f1ee2d862c: You and Hazeel seem to have some history.
textByHashes.1ae75139c3485c93ec7f28acfbfafb2033e6697f: Hello. I'd like to ask you some questions about what happened.
textByHashes.a19fcecd14e0e5038c629e3c2660953749567b20: Hello there. I'd like to ask you some questions about your dad.
textByHashes.ae7a83b349e05edde487ba98b02bc52005ff2969: Hello there. I'd like to ask you some questions.
textByHashes.b376af6fb57d96e6612bb70f9cb3b7f81907fd81: I think so. I found Evelot and was able to question her. It seems someone might be trying to frame her.
textByHashes.102d95734b1e44f9d81c07558c3bfcd54f83cc0d: I'd like to have another look around and ask some questions.
textByHashes.961bf1856e24660c67a882b0c367fb03c247cedb: To be honest, with what I've discovered so far, I don't think he was involved. I suspect he just fled out of fear.
textByHashes.a0bc261ff06cad03cdcab0ead39a678c692ce6f5: That's what I'm here to find out. I'd like to have another look around and ask some questions.
textByHashes.4c6b33457300aad04852bbed88893e3ce6a1948d: I'm sorry, but right now we don't even think the cult were responsible.
textByHashes.5e3fbb6d76d05db864b04a59282fdc896d3dd067: That's what I'm hoping to find out.
textByHashes.f8826aa6959252188cc6ee9ad3627a3db6398e17: When your husband was killed, did you see anything unusual?
textByHashes.e7af523499fac484661fa1fb04102549aa64f552: Did you hear what he shouted?
textByHashes.9d9d1386794293ae2981f86e5dd6c8e4c6d6a683: And there was nothing else in the room that seemed odd?
textByHashes.140e7ff74018ae8bd643face498523c99024a85f: Okay, thank you for your help.
textByHashes.c16b893b5f7b8bcbe399f35433bcae1fcc484fbe: Did you see any of what happened?
textByHashes.79eb7c8f5bd7e55512cdae5d792f7ebfba6fb0aa: Okay, I'm sorry to have bothered you.
textByHashes.083e6206ea98d205473e6847416931f4ccbc8f08: I know, but I'm hoping I can uncover anything they missed.
textByHashes.d4988947b1ab8d620cb28ba545af2a4783c7d137: What were you doing at the time Ceril Carnillean was killed?
textByHashes.9bd92d2b898bb7e299d17b1ef58262d303bec849: And you didn't see anything unusual down here?
textByHashes.087385fce1d34e4a1b768799f0d242073d81edc4: You're absolutely sure? Not even the slightest thing out of place?
textByHashes.46dff7457632914be41f1ca574c4cd1e367be363: Did you see anything when you felt this cold?
textByHashes.3dde4feba0cef25a7db048ea0fbe41512c49c88d: Hmm... I'm going to have a little look around down here, if that's okay?
textByHashes.b081fbe53e105dd054184feb0cbcf31de6fd5697: I'm still working on it. Could you describe exactly what you felt and saw again?
textByHashes.b35ffff2b3b7183f3817d8f2c5d7f46b97014d72: If it was anything important, I'll find it.
textByHashes.1ce0990267d13bb2f23434551725591a601f95b7: Potentially, but I still need to do some more investigating.
textByHashes.dc6d4f15cd1ec409edc45c3e607ebfc5f7d56b95: Interesting... I wonder what Hazeel will make of this.
textByHashes.13a5dd5738b765b8f5bedcf4491213fcfd11e3e7: I have a new lead that I'm exploring.
textByHashes.aeb042abf9a7c794a9670a57713392cbf1ab30c0: I think so. Hopefully it can help me find the killer.
textByHashes.fe4d42ae82ce319358e37dcd1e2e9906a9d97e98: I found a hidden room beneath the Carnillean Mansion. There was a chest inside with a scroll in it.
textByHashes.130206f7a278dd99fdc82a158b70c78dc2d17e84: Yes. It had a sketch on it of some sort of crest. Well... half of one, at least.
textByHashes.75da6d1476bdd030f923891e9b74e2ab3b8052db: Are you two going to keep talking in riddles, or are you going to tell me what's going on?
textByHashes.4c74b827a023f7d57c71a93d02dd31b87c997371: Maybe I've discovered the ability to turn totally invisible.
textByHashes.7e8f74fc66fd2569f3c12a58bb0384f3da52aee6: What? But we haven't found the killer.
textByHashes.3765d066f96375a87e2f543fbd3f1566a6855495: Ice trolls? Do you mean the trolls at Weiss?
textByHashes.d55178079c58feb91a631eb3798f40c944ece8f5: Oh yes, I'm quite good friends with them. You see, there's this troll called My Arm...
textByHashes.95f96600f29d1bdf6f73b38d5c0fee6e03a6a3eb: I'm meant to be meeting some... friends... Have you seen them?
textByHashes.78d0e1448c580124cf6b1284c4ce951532216caa: Wait... Hazeel? Khazard? Why are you trolls?
textByHashes.450e56b6131ab6842039b09afff96afe18366707: Right... So what are we doing here?
textByHashes.4e203a9a5765ea96372a990c629e4befb972dc2f: To Weiss? What would they want with the trolls?
textByHashes.02126df0d501d2e960683ec9975c3e178b5c817e: Have you seen anything odd around here recently?
textByHashes.23699a3448c809e9186c04948193c6529bf1bd19: A magic person with a bone-head? Interesting... Has anything happened with this stone recently?
textByHashes.abb5cbdf783e566b657550c5e2c7069f86ec9969: Hmm... Probably not what I'm after then. Seen anything else odd?
textByHashes.889970d09099d6db496002053580b2589268b824: I'm not sure to be honest. Anything unusual I guess.
textByHashes.5347dd0f0a2e2828fff80a99693c55a05e5573c4: Ah yes... those two. I was speaking to them earlier. They're harmless... I hope.
textByHashes.4c9d77681084ae26f88a323477c19a09007fd8c1: Interesting. I think my... companions... might want to hear about this.
textByHashes.bc55ef53806920ca1a43959c9fa549edb3496ad4: I'll see what my... companions... think.
textByHashes.72dca27229c568b71934275dc56c0c4c56a2e0a3: What are you two on about now?
textByHashes.43faf58bf3b92bfe633ff8f18bc82bab2557e180: It's hardly eavesdropping if you're having the conversation right in front of me.
textByHashes.59c1871d2d388d0ccf7cafa713ae2ac1fb35e662: I did, but before we go any further, I think it's time for some answers.
textByHashes.9679bd64d0e5b45096e9f94482de70416a012ca0: Well maybe I just won't tell you what I've learnt.
textByHashes.ed42fe130e5f6a99f8e83982f3bd7552c83ab579: I'm done asking questions. What now?
textByHashes.f86a605b5ec9699a5972d4de42d7bf72b1d9e484: There's been a cave-in down in the mine. One of the trolls apparently saw a strange shadow near it.
textByHashes.7ab8e6049a5a4095a28f5dd14c67956d7c40e9d6: The cook at the Carnillean Mansion also mentioned seeing a shadow. That doesn't feel like a coincidence.
textByHashes.f5299d979ccfb508f3e9624936cb382327b0d242: Why would the killer come here?
textByHashes.fc3fa4e97f75cdf14d4195892e8ed82fcda6d6ce: And the killer stole it from the Carnilleans? You think they mean to open the prison?
textByHashes.2ea7cd62a9f5c786f30f9c619419b8b26f79d263: Where's the other half of the crest?
textByHashes.861d86e6400777b9a41faf91c47f5b101249585f: But why would someone want to open this prison? What's inside?
textByHashes.edd03bbaad1290e04a3d8d8a28d458249967a237: What is this ritual you keep talking about?
textByHashes.e1e091c05cefbe0ccecd1b5292912c18096ec3ca: The Mahjarrat? Not a lot to be honest.
textByHashes.6ab5543afd6b56786b5028c25cf302adf75cc924: If it's not relevant, why do you two keep talking about it?
textByHashes.d6f694376da621f8e7cdd38a6175ccce04376647: Well assuming it is relevant, what can you tell me about it?
textByHashes.5a4e9cb9827b7dbb512043781e743603498d35f2: Hmm... did Hazeel and Khazard already go inside?
textByHashes.8b389fc807c27de7edfad3d034a5e72c6144e363: Hey, stop arguing and listen! I heard something.
textByHashes.ffd1927251d5a0798fd8a2c416f8dc3164d97bf7: Well 'knew' is a bit of a strong word, but we've crossed paths.
textByHashes.d47d8582b8d6ab6cf9466731d2c1b954a2862c0f: I encountered him on Entrana. He killed some monks there and stole a relic from them. I... may have been responsible for helping him, but I didn't realise until it was too late.
textByHashes.ce363b82cf02575a9542dde10fcd97cf63728043: You're one to talk. So what was he doing here?
textByHashes.47386a0d2d9476f7b67f1b7f8d4cdeb526f08703: But it didn't look like he could open the door. He must still only have half the crest.
textByHashes.dc1b3fda304d1e95a2835092bb6349f64cb7875c: He's back there. There's been a development.
textByHashes.2fa96aaa50220a4f73f8f4a1536d8c5ed1b2960c: We found the door to the prison, and we found someone trying to open it.
textByHashes.1f02398b08a1d6f4d2221bcc231a64fe1fabb566: An assassin. I've encountered them before, but I don't really know anything about them.
textByHashes.9de6dc94c734ce4b9d3a3af54bfb769ffcd384b3: It seems they still only have half of it.
textByHashes.490b24048ea4770d05ec1715038d747244b03350: Perhaps they didn't know they'd need the other half?
textByHashes.6526cacbd77830a8fee399ab138b9a600a6418e9: So the other half might be closer than we think. What do we do?
textByHashes.0bb9c61143e22ae2969ec43d099a06cb9e8141f2: Why would this other Mahjarrat hide himself here?
textByHashes.6f00d966a1353b46998f299179b417bddb464d59: So I'm guessing this other Mahjarrat is quite a weak one then?
textByHashes.b9515de75934f2d9d40e09b68836a3798095392e: What's inside the prison that the assassin would want?
textByHashes.109c1756997e0d2c1751673dc5278a5872c688ec: And the assassin wants this artefact?
textByHashes.3cd84334c1dd90704ff9129f48569807c9385de7: Which you consider to be a problem?
textByHashes.46eeb98f4b637e627cb63f44885bba802e6080c0: What's the history between you and Khazard?
textByHashes.f5cdb29c2d988fdef77b280b04bbb403931fdbb0: Fair enough. Could you at least tell him to leave me alone? I feel like every time I turn my back, he's going to put his sword through it.
textByHashes.ba959be07d0c2126cdb8697705a5984342b360fe: In my defence, he was doing some pretty nasty things. Not to mention, I also wronged you and you're not trying to have me killed constantly.
textByHashes.7823a6e8e497881a708284b67fcbe736ccd72807: In my defence, he was doing some pretty nasty things.
textByHashes.85cf994bab56d8ad0d37f8811d8e4c0a908b41a0: You seem more reasonable than Khazard, though.
textByHashes.db74489245efcccf8c6e1f1e9e3f0e8583a237ec: I wanted to ask you something.
textByHashes.7feb752b209c36f0693df71765e224c041c97f1d: No, but I have found something... It's sort of hard to explain. I think I need to get back there.
textByHashes.af5bf2e7020b59a255f22a439da65d7cca8dd680: Just a nightmare? That feels like a bit of an understatement.
textByHashes.5b032560fb763f165a9d231804cc70b8b8997b0f: Well I'm , and I'm guessing you're the Mahjarrat I'm looking for.
textByHashes.9ca2ce32e07a9e7e2b82bf75908f9ea3402b51ed: You have half a crest, right? There's an assassin who's after it. I'm trying to stop him.
textByHashes.e48de4fc6c8286e1ee19d5e78b362b586f6fb4f5: Wait! It's true! This assassin is nearby. He'll be coming for you!
textByHashes.b68f12118dc23fce6df7ac121926765d87bde2b6: Khazard... we have a big problem!
textByHashes.56420d508e93541f61182b1e31b746a2e04b0dce: I found Jhallan, but the assassin captured him!
textByHashes.7d392e17c9916f9bf56aa9bf995dece98d67ddcf: I don't understand. I didn't even see anything.
textByHashes.57510a028700429908ac5b785ab71d61b14acf7b: So he got inside? Do we follow him?
textByHashes.b530bc745569979d3b51619e2d481795e7a11cc7: So we're not going to do anything?
textByHashes.0ad1815df103bb7fc57af1854a0bd1cb88ccb601: Is there really nothing else we can do?
textByHashes.44b3c811382b9d2caaf2a53fb34b05c36bf0e479: But there's still so many unanswered questions!
textByHashes.4a5d8bc1ede74773f7382b21cdc82e500c4adccd: I wish I had better news, but I'm afraid I reached a dead end.
textByHashes.1bcc183aa563ceaf6deefc5c61959dec32dc5076: The killer was an assassin. I don't know his true identity, but I previously encountered him on Entrana. He killed some monks there and stole an important relic.
textByHashes.f704b0c1869bc6f6bfdbc6313be22276e60fad63: Quite a bit is still unclear, but it seems he cared less about killing Ceril and more about recovering something hidden in the mansion.
textByHashes.40db6f460ef20b3960d86d3f7d5b177bc0240272: Somewhere we have no hope of reaching him. Hopefully that changes, but for now, there's not much we can do.
textByHashes.8318211d6cfb06f639b53ea1d0d0a3b1d8d4265e: That's good to hear. Hopefully there's still a chance that the assassin is found one day.
textByHashes.fdeccc23bf324c13a9ed407673740aa6a1cbb4c6: Will do. Now, I should leave you to your work.
textByHashes.69312c8330f997253633cd7b8610654b1bb4d531: Wow, you guys seem to be really at the bottom of the food chain around here.
textByHashes.acfcb8f7ec682e9c6edb19ac5c5407f804b1dd68: Do you know how I could make the serum permanent?
textByHashes.99bf004fde70bb29bf9d96c80868fb45259a4c92: What are all these shadowy creatures?
textByHashes.e9aa3f88f249695eee4a6994c3be7e4ca17618bd: Is there anyone else worth talking to around here?
textByHashes.3bf8cea399a3caabb69ba31ab9ef74ba3e092572: Yes, I'll dispatch those dark and evil creatures.
textByHashes.11dbe0099d423b6bfecd07a73d129a79d4931e39: Sorry, not right now, I need to do something else first.
textByHashes.08c09d0b7bc1fc2197f9bd173419719f6af16c5b: Is there anything worth doing around here?
textByHashes.fce65d914a8edbc1de0faddf9b508b5e35ee4c8b: How's it going? I talked to Razmire and he's asked me to slay five shades.
textByHashes.71828ef76f7e68756579957cc09d89e17bb4129f: What do you know about the shades?
textByHashes.250a176b4e3839dde2112ccd4741b9a5100d52ed: What can you tell me about that temple?
textByHashes.16999907e733300aecdfd93a3b0f36c572fe38c5: Do you know how I could make this serum permanent?
textByHashes.2ca4843d1849710d8be32b7c4bfc1cc143705130: Can you open a store for me?
textByHashes.a1d009b28e29a8d60a43f9d72555cadc8518db6a: Razmire said to come and talk to you.
textByHashes.719ed71e3084b682283b3f59a2fb5219463307ae: I just slayed five shades for Razmire...he said that you might be interested in seeing the shade remains. Unfortunately I don't have any with me at the moment...
textByHashes.4110758ebb81ebb44f5a6f7bb037f6e6f71262d0: I just slayed 5 shades for Razmire, he said you might be interested in seeing some shade remains?
textByHashes.c984f9f79de6f864314ca7cdfd994554481f1d40: What did you find out about the remains.
textByHashes.feb6f081b73058832fd20245d81538587213227a: How can we do that? You can't even bury the remains!
textByHashes.18fa980d34f06b4da6fb7c71eb865bc273507032: How would I make some sacred oil?
textByHashes.390d7a087a3b26fbeb3ce14f0bc6f54fd84ddb62: How can you rebuild a totally destroyed temple?
textByHashes.4ad458c874decfd5508eef154ffc08d601f84d87: Hello there, I've started repairing the temple.
textByHashes.653cd32e8af4ff7c1ff7f5df52e1c57853833356: What should I do when the temple is built?
textByHashes.21b7df39c8a316bb22569588e845e1c2170c78a5: The Shades keep knocking the temple down!
textByHashes.13fed69f956ba37ee30ad405d5fe6f29ae83b928: Tell me more about the Shades.
textByHashes.5fdff80f412cbd15bfefa31beab4c523dca15463: I keep running out of building materials!
textByHashes.02dbb65d2760d11dd8fe9488e58519497c2fb48b: Hello there, I used the olive oil on the flame and it gave me sacred oil! What should I do now?
textByHashes.e0d5c2092e835dbcce69cc11828c54859e6f8947: Hello there, I used the sacred oil on the logs and I made pyre logs! What should I do now?
textByHashes.f35804d45f97a7dd138f862bdda67e6d8c917efe: I've placed the logs on the pyre. What do I do now?
textByHashes.521095f1c443a6f15f28aa149dfc3bdc0d2e46bf: Hey, I've laid a Shade to rest, can you tell me where the Shade lair is now?
textByHashes.cd44ab9f396f01f996bb2edb4dc2dd23f9f68a77: I've put the Shade's spirit to rest!
textByHashes.e2bb97370043b66772b7d7786b24eb4caf71861f: The sword I used to defeat the demon Delrith? Yes, I still have it.
textByHashes.ac8a30a57c8a4a6ca65679df5cc2fa03f038f88b: Silverlight! That's the sword I used to defeat the demon Delrith!
textByHashes.56d48edead584ccf885e2aa1617e41819ae138c1: So you want me to stop him?
textByHashes.a16ee434675667b2170aaa05e05dc8cd36f41101: I'll let you know if I see him.
textByHashes.ebfa36b1693704d76084853499162bf0a6bbe0a2: I'll let you know if I see her.
textByHashes.c7416a61b192194357d3bf5f7df6a75e6f341f8f: Do you know anything about the dark wizards who arrived here?
textByHashes.e3ecd1ed0bef8024686c276a18448f823a177be4: I want to go through the portal.
textByHashes.33aade79202c9574b90add6e3a47d60e5fd2a7a7: Where did you get those robes?
textByHashes.a09fc981a875808d22f8182a4bbd3532271ff0e9: Why has he come to Uzer?
textByHashes.6e59d9f03535ae02e8c2b729cf45223f57f8c31d: Foul construct? Do you mean the golem?
textByHashes.c6c0c4562b6f8f6cf487c3ce1d94a0236b7c88e1: But the golem was created to fight a demon! You're on the same side!
textByHashes.adbaed67f53bee587215f6841b9f8e1e29a79c56: Thousands of years ago a demon attacked this city, but the golem army drove it off.
textByHashes.c54ecfa28906effba6116d64283fcbb987f022a5: When I last came here I opened the portal, and the demon was already dead - it had died of the wounds the golems inflicted.
textByHashes.a381addb915119f7507012b87045e8b1e8fc6c34: Well I came here and opened a portal to a demon's realm...
textByHashes.95f1be8f92e5146cab5c8c591f7035733c8f7a70: I'd never take part in a demonic ritual!
textByHashes.12e6c94b200b08eb6808918bab25e59bd8b4b823: I haven't managed to infiltrate the group yet.
textByHashes.2be29ba1e5e04c9f9cfaccd52f20f1fae0607277: I want to join your group.
textByHashes.b4d5a9686e3ae6d981aaf909d9b6f0da924dbe31: How do you know Agrith-Naar will do all this for us?
textByHashes.dfe40e1256c983fb11156e9991156c2b5e447e33: I managed to get into the group.
textByHashes.6e8ead74de58e9ef5acc67922790a83680826ea6: Why didn't you take the magic carpet?
textByHashes.94fef4959e31e16085a0043ed9212ad5b6f6d62e: Why don't you change out of your heavy robes?
textByHashes.896cbd4713b1ec59c8830e5eac1925a73683190b: Perhaps the rules were made in a colder place than this?
textByHashes.a8140b12eb115bc077b032cfda7f4df4153580ad: Don't worry, soon I'll have killed the demon and we can all go home!
textByHashes.83c1fa7e21cd2e2f4fc631d0101cd13aba163cfb: Um, isn't that like what you do when you pray?
textByHashes.e7b8f486473b22376e382c9c1f1b10e43b554225: And that's like you being a monk, of course.
textByHashes.fee8284fb1842d179d6ca195c8bd17038fa6a844: Are you sure Saradomin was being serious about that bit?
textByHashes.4b673147c519659a1cf0adf943dbb82f745b7bc2: Um... Yeah, who would do a thing like that?
textByHashes.7932be8668ac96064a2ed7add011c4fe5f7ba77c: But isn't evil, you know, bad?
textByHashes.68623380ca7e079279d95ee3b17c0823600563c2: Do you have the demonic sigil mould?
textByHashes.85f6fedd4b00a6e966faa5ae9ac85628e7a596ce: Do you know what happened to Josef?
textByHashes.00e6a3ff4633b66c1b7340d89e6f9e5e9187c7e4: No, I don't suppose he did.
textByHashes.a237a5cbd06429c42d84b4a40a1788c398f40a65: Isn't it more satisfying to earn riches yourself?
textByHashes.9172d67e2783c4d181e9ae7bee5c063703845c87: Did you see anything happen last night?
textByHashes.af754b84f7e63df5bedd0e3ec0c93236eab78cec: Which kiln did he hide the book in?
textByHashes.633e1aa5c6da7c81d90a8551156dc62dd12f6610: Yes. The golem saw Josef hide it in one of the broken kilns in the city.
textByHashes.f1eb51760e6cdc002f93f9b178c4aabd1dfc14cb: The incantation in the book is backwards?
textByHashes.97e45e61e9323e2527b0af5c5b807d5dc26e85a4: Don't worry. I'm here to kill the demon!
textByHashes.6b59c01d882418fda14d6b86ac16003b4343a865: But I need find a way to smuggle Silverlight in here. It's the only weapon that can defeat Agrith-Naar!
textByHashes.dd6e1757dc081614526dd5ee1691612a39fcd868: This is the demon-slaying sword Silverlight, the only weapon that can kill Agrith-Naar!
textByHashes.78b115e86b2ccac5f660a181203f064ee9b9902d: I don't think Denath is being honest with his wizards.
textByHashes.12d8d3a494972719858af1dae2b13f356f0646ad: You've got to get back to the throne room!
textByHashes.f74a09c51b9115f031d3de29eb052f0659a53f26: Our only hope is to summon Agrith-Naar again so I can kill him! But I need eight people.
textByHashes.ad22bbe4da4a9634ade459614a7471775746cd61: By using 'evil' as a term of praise you have left yourself without a word to describe real evil!
textByHashes.0762650d7d24af448272bfd857893ad630fe06da: Denath was Agrith-Naar all along! We've just sent him back to his own dimension!
textByHashes.a53da16a47b6345e4a9d0722b6ee93741e827104: You've got to help me summon him again, so I can slay him with Silverlight!
textByHashes.ff554574823a70d0dbc1db400f43833f26a441c0: But first I'll need to get you a demonic sigil.
textByHashes.52603cf3a8834bc9eee0b67d01ed64ac87cad74b: You'll need to hold this sigil for the ritual.
textByHashes.50f5b9b9b88cbbfc3e29485402aeb25941e4a7d3: Denath was Agrith-Naar all along! Now he's back in his own dimension!
textByHashes.e0bb2ef990f7d79c9b29e4c98e986887255ecc51: You've got to help me perform the ritual again so I can kill him!
textByHashes.4cbccb042d81740d79cc611562c0c347b8fbe9fe: I'll need to get you a demonic sigil anyway.
textByHashes.c7b1c6bb501a60eb1a3c2544438ab52861dfcef6: But isn't that what you and Badden asked me to do?
textByHashes.12706d0d4b0f63c810bba941007a83576f12d0d3: But the wizards will all die! Now Agrith-Naar is in his own dimension he's killing them one by one!
textByHashes.eb71ea274e89c274b99e239bb76218c88cb30cdc: Oh, don't be so simple-minded! You'll be summoning a demon in order to kill it, to rid the world of great evil!
textByHashes.805f792c458d755cf2caf59b7b443a749fb68b38: Now take this demonic sigil, and hurry inside!
textByHashes.9d79a0bb120e90091c8c22a49c43918558ea072b: Denath was Agrith-Naar all along! We've accidentally helped him get back to his own dimension!
textByHashes.94fffeb91b33bcf1afc54fb0f8281d6ecd965e18: You could help me summon the demon again so I could kill him!
textByHashes.cb8ea13a686f780ddad7178f55f46c98aa396bcf: But I really need you to!
textByHashes.80a51316856dcbbf3fb8810d7ba8102e5fb08f7c: I could just reprogram you again.
textByHashes.47c4e24e75ee34c2feb4bcc2846dcc5130da7d38: I need to get you a demonic sigil.
textByHashes.c406059835b4dc0cf406a8ade63df4efa206c3e1: Take this demonic sigil and go through the portal.
textByHashes.b73ea583e22ad405b61ce1f431e501b45a793fb8: I just need your help with the ritual. Do you think you can do that?
textByHashes.5ecd2206c034613b292aade428e03f349610e660: What's your problem with the golem? It doesn't mind you!
textByHashes.10084b542dc655de83dd5b6b9079676050573106: Perhaps we can't blame demons for everything that's wrong with the world. Sometimes it's just not that simple.
textByHashes.9b151a83edbd84423be4ae2d03c1c48c2d860b96: Don't worry, Golem, you've done enough demon- slaying!
textByHashes.7f3b39ec20955108d8f37367e37bee5330e6a21b: Hmm... That's quite a few missing people... Looks like some of these have been here for a while.
textByHashes.45250a50c70a38790c10056ffc47c83da7c10b04: I wonder if anyone around here knows more about this...
textByHashes.c3a81b86adbd32acca81378149220140f7bcb5ad: Probably too much for me to take on right now though, but hopefully someone can find them.
textByHashes.c5197b79254212e035ccbd379e982cf5c4c74feb: I should keep looking for these people...
textByHashes.17adb4d756459f7cb4e13da4a92d9be942c2ebe8: Hello there. Do you have a moment to talk?
textByHashes.e5324b059d240541cc26034e887b14d1949056f9: Do you know much about the missing people?
textByHashes.85d1738ce8c8d35d0de1e344d86f6271d541da18: So you don't think it's possible?
textByHashes.89a49256366a90f90a9b85088fc6a39584c57b93: Well, what do you think is happening then?
textByHashes.4a1cfdebd09d42e7e8e9d2c0d6c509c4d28ac2dd: Hmm... Thanks for the help, I guess.
textByHashes.67be257ba1705f47f788f8012c930a4b32630dc9: Hello again. I don't suppose you had any more thoughts on the missing people?
textByHashes.46a7c7bd713a58ae161e7a0cbc40d86a921aeca8: That's right. What can you tell me about them?
textByHashes.dd80214323ed5b45ade4a68018b922d4a177a055: Is there anyone else who might be more... invested in the missing people?
textByHashes.439d572c44a0e57e9a34f1dd8e8783f6c9509e34: And you don't know who that is?
textByHashes.751938337c0a268101416790a756eec57da5bbf5: I'm investigating the missing people. Do you know anything about them?
textByHashes.7adeb816fef2da00a94dcf6527c77b7c6f2560ae: Could that not just be a dog scratching at the post?
textByHashes.de6b46c7a2a88ca474b8c1a61fe9c74b89f63d9f: Okay... I think I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.09679cf8d74fb841971e40302239440d2c16546e: But people have searched the? Are there any theories as to where they're going?
textByHashes.4ff43129ccff12efb67b4ddd31fc57bd53e8d4e7: Well, I'm here to have a look around. I'll see what I can find out about them.
textByHashes.04f99181e8c0270f0e3f139012e68263601cb90b: Hello there. I was wondering if you could tell me anything about the missing people.
textByHashes.ebc176f2885cdf0dcbb245b3ac00b52a285a0ec4: Where do you think they went?
textByHashes.c459bb91785aeb0d1f21b63723fd59fd82ba7b34: Hello there. I was wondering if you had any more thoughts on the missing people?
textByHashes.c2088f69eebcaceb73a6154e2708cddf762381a5: Excuse me. I'm looking into the-
textByHashes.ee1b578e2101510e10c07fa130661caf6619e1e4: But I'm trying to find the missing people!
textByHashes.5982c3829445bdcc37a5b5053781215ef6187581: Well, I know most of the town has given up on finding them. Most are just dismissing the disappearances, assuming them to have run away or had an accident.
textByHashes.830b35841b34a898f11c879de16d056b1c401505: However, there are some who think something more sinister is going on. If that's the case, I intend to find out. I'm and I promise I"m here to help.
textByHashes.d2a34c00c5b41bb46c9a5a90836dfb7b20571bd5: First up, what can you tell me about the disappearnce of your sons?
textByHashes.048c4c8d8ed553404d59cde134bf4dbde63531ea: And you didn't notice anything unusual at all?
textByHashes.2130a8ab50ec2379d0dc1a36eeb51e610f30d8c6: I see. Can I look around the house a little and see if there's any clues as to where your sons went?
textByHashes.ecc5efc8d9e6a502b05c0b575c2b96e4a721573c: There are a few scratches on the wall outside along with this strange red substance.
textByHashes.55051c51c012c4b322564752fe5142a8893798aa: Possibly. It looks like there are puddles of the stuff leading away from your house. I'm going to follow them and see where they lead.
textByHashes.b55efae6adec5c6ff25e2980cc74808888397608: Potentially. I was wondering if you have any clue what left these weird puddles through here?
textByHashes.f7bd34db21ebe17ed8deb186ee666119181e9146: I see. Thank you for your help.
textByHashes.cfcdbb7801d654dbb285be79a1cfc6009e2d2be8: That's odd... There are some scratches going up the wall, along with a strange stick red substance. It's not blood... What is it?
textByHashes.d6e19655eeeb0f4ba9d0aea93691fb354646edef: What do we have here? More of that strange substance. I wonder where it leads...
textByHashes.11301f031d544f47a9f1cc55fe8bec97dc47c547: Hmm... A fishing rod might work...
textByHashes.4e76532eb059d042c3209aeb9bc1185fc5d35e9b: Interesting... I should see if this is from one of our missing people!
textByHashes.f52f9ac4f95fd9ab6e86fe6985d091cb01664315: I don't think this plank can offer me anything else. I should go and see if that fabric is from one of the missing people.
textByHashes.75a6393a6a3d3d7f9d014cbeccc80587a84c45ab: Could this be from one of the missing people?
textByHashes.219b17f643846bf3107a521c5019db9f3d45da34: It could be evidence of something happening here... Surely it wouldn't be ethical to do this?
textByHashes.ad14db54ad9a358d71f52f1228f5c893f621683e: Then again, I wouldn't want to give false hope to those parents if it's actually nothing.
textByHashes.40a0b0176fb82764d7f9eb47c0d1b95c0e453f08: Yet I could still ask them about it, even if I don't have it to hand...
textByHashes.057509f1cbc62ea138b0c1d43b9db66d36c97543: Yes. I followed a trail of... well, I'm not sure what it is. It led from your home to the river, and I found a scrap of fabric. Does one of your sons often wear brown clothes?
textByHashes.94c9daa3b4865225c4fdcdc2c84866e89e0fbbc5: It means I may have a lead.
textByHashes.acbde369a99803e13b165bc6f825809710225004: Up towards the mountains north west of here. It might be dangerous, but I think I can explore further.
textByHashes.da5ade2970762d21eea43fe25231e2574340f65f: It's the least I can do. I'll be back once I've discovered more.
textByHashes.40aa15d00f14431dc1c58917143df22372a7a257: Are you okay? Can you walk?
textByHashes.8b3dd6656bbde0f4dd61afc34d86bfbe8175fe82: That's okay. I should be able to carry him. Now, let's get out of here...
textByHashes.d6ce59908b50792404b910d35c1c37b98bff6d26: I was very fortunate. They were in a cave in the mountains, but they weren't particularly far inside.
textByHashes.2cdbf344de240c608e62b00a323004b44d79622d: That's good to hear, though I am still worried as to how they ended up there. It's not really the kind of place someone visits, not to mention that strange substance I found...
textByHashes.10424accfa94c511d89e50949e8c35e6d5bca47a: I don't think we can rule it out.
textByHashes.39ce96fa81bcc81d47c4d913cb50f09cf4eaa822: First things first, I need to find out exactly what happened to your sons. Do you think I could ask them about it?
textByHashes.24dc4bf49b14e797eac05fe3d9c2f5c50168ed68: I'll go and see her. Is there anything else I can be doing to help as well?
textByHashes.746950759bc81e348d9e431d524c8a7d09a10de6: Let's see... I suppose I could take a look at the wall and see if it can be reinforced in some way?
textByHashes.7754eb2fa1ec3df6589f1023e1338d3ad5fa8851: I'm sure it won't be too much to sort. Right, I'll be back once I've spoken to Captain Ariadna and sorted your wall out.
textByHashes.87488b15be15c90b289cb1854c7b910af020a05e: I've got your wall all sorted. Now I need to go and see Captain Ariadna.
textByHashes.52e69c6d23797bd309b68818cd1e6d10a050d40b: I still need to get your wall sorted. I haven't spoken to Captain Ariadna yet either.
textByHashes.c2cf97bd92cd2d9142b6ad78aab738a0c05b53f3: I've got your wall all sorted. Now I'm helping Captain Ariadna source some new bows to equip the guards a bit better.
textByHashes.71e661d41f27292b6c0f52370def8935f254079e: I still need your wall sorted. I haven't spoken to Captain Ariadna either.
textByHashes.fd12c83d09ee60e8e74ad1466991a512af02e5d6: I've helped Captain Ariadna source some new bows to equip the guards a bit better, and your wall is all sorted as well.}}
textByHashes.eb7e35cabdfba3b97a9effcd6fb8d1736952a188: So I can speak to them now?
textByHashes.6cf96c204ae573b29dee19cb5135de0a1ffbf3f0: Now then... How do we reinforce you? Perhaps some maple logs will do the trick!
textByHashes.772cdfe0091430cab6ac8c0901782dff654c54d9: Now then... How do we reinforce you? Perhaps some maple logs will do the trick! I reckon I'll need four sets in total, and a hammer of course.
textByHashes.176fe3203958e931836338a88e5eb3a8a0bf12b0: Now then... How do we reinforce you? Perhaps some maple logs will do the trick! I reckon I'll need four sets in total.
textByHashes.474cf4ae4b242264724d6a6b6b725ab968780d5b: Good day! I'm here about those missing people.
textByHashes.c9b0f9d5a16afad5d6488ea8919ba69bd5b29548: In a cave up in the mountains.
textByHashes.edbedcbab6e058e8ef809211ce4de7c7689732dc: I'm afraid not, but I intend to ask the boys about them once they've had some time to rest. I'm worried they didn't go up there on their own. There's a chance something might have taken them.
textByHashes.557aa4a4606a89f200a3b7371663a140a25ed6c5: Yes, I must admit, the town doesn't seem very well equipped to deal with this sort of thing. Is there anything I can do to help?
textByHashes.223233fda0a95fc8b43d02bae05dc0098bc02567: I'm sure I can step in as your fletcher! New bows, was it?
textByHashes.15e59b423ee416789bb41315d5bbc0533f5c5910: Willow... Approachable... Got it! How many did you need?
textByHashes.7ccd10e83833a249573635c7309682984d8fca1b: I just so happen to have those on hand!
textByHashes.b90fcfef9fe354a856b2e55483e647dbaa8307bc: So you've got the bows. What now?
textByHashes.8bc4482e64663cb267ff8c75b436406eb6a76274: I have those bows you asked for!
textByHashes.727f5b966d569f6d5bd9cd68cd762f4858693b37: So you've got the bows. Now what?
textByHashes.378128bc6f1f7d9070ec86c214a3a83253c59206: Right... Not quite the solution I was after, but it's a start. I guess I'd better go check in with those boys and see if I can find out more about how they ended up in that cave.
textByHashes.78e2b8dff033396083962c3b7ff6f01d3189be9d: Not quite. How many did you need?
textByHashes.947d4e7e1efc36bcb040890e093c1a7ca137294a: Well, I don't like leaving a mystery unsolved.
textByHashes.508eedaa7ed3f010e362158c68710adfe66585f4: It's not a problem. I'm just glad you're both okay. If it's alright, I wanted to ask you how you ended up in that cave. I'm hoping it might help me track down the others who are missing.
textByHashes.6b2ca525a06b4f1a63de41ff04b3784285fbbd81: This isn't good. I need to get back there!
textByHashes.bff7bd0114995676024b66f34c0e14d60bc6a388: I'm going to head back there right now!
textByHashes.85132bf468f8a9347b13fced590925fa3ab8acda: Yes, but I need to get back to the cave. Apparently someone called Antos is still in there!
textByHashes.2f9bd4001b43213636dec5c4f13f9a181393c1f7: Yes, but I also found out someone called Antos is still in that cave! I need to go and find him!
textByHashes.7ba968f7688b60d521c23425cce0f88dfcb8e527: We don't have time! I'm heading up there now!
textByHashes.1cab3a7a22161bb0ae65d0675ee315d606be6fe4: For now, but there could be more. We should get out of here.
textByHashes.81027b509b449a4607ca6f23fbadd79fb65b05ed: It's okay, Antos. The boys are safe.
textByHashes.34786a3b148a7b2dc1d0de09cdefeb0c3653bf3a: I'm sorry, Antos. We can't help them now, but at least you and the boys are safe. Come on, let's get you home, before more of those things arrive...
textByHashes.b66320939381d31b2edf316f03d741161b3a99bc: That cave up in the mountains is full of some strange creatures. They were the ones responsible for the disappearances.
textByHashes.de4a36ea30e671c23d503bd28e6f0ce8f73b5981: No. At least, no one alive, that is.
textByHashes.e0b8052e5be4cd54157535182d1d1260f28df78a: In that case, good luck with it all.
textByHashes.0027369e74b80c803f18ddd240f6226f7690d2fc: Sort of. I wouldn't call them people though.
textByHashes.9ae9f1a05c2fb4a3f014ab147bed0bf8c2eb01cc: Are you sure it's the plague?
textByHashes.4177965a735edc72d068871ec9fc5d742fdc5b9b: I can do that for you.
textByHashes.37faba8a5b3e356f80fe80b19aa407cef1e0a8f6: Where can I find some protective clothing then?
textByHashes.9606cf4a9a4e22b689271882e11a9405b9cd1164: How will I know which sheep are infected?
textByHashes.57c54d58688608c624afd2184eb37783443cb634: That's not a job for me.
textByHashes.e1fd528d14c1fb5bbab2c2f3c26b37c06869818b: Some more sheep poison would be appreciated...
textByHashes.97e9e744be936a035993cec7031f13c7d549498c: Hello there. I've spoken to Councillor Halgrive. He has asked me to round up your sheep and slaughter them.
textByHashes.d7546e7f7e8d3afa8074d16d888a60b2a3fa8c1d: Hello doctor. I need to acquire some protective clothing so that I can dispose of some diseased sheep.
textByHashes.03feb50c2760bbbc7883f80838129058a60b7741: Oops, sorry, I don't have enough money.
textByHashes.b3d911839c3e283ceb3229f5903d88e64f170df0: No, I don't need any more.
textByHashes.d9d05e4bb33a0cdae4dd44ff73b990494f8d03db: Uh... yeah... not quite just yet...
textByHashes.be0ef86a618bbbccd87026ba9d53ffa014152d30: It doesn't look very safe in there. I'm not going in without decent protective clothing.
textByHashes.1c4578802da8ad9927b487c94e1665f62f0a5e84: I don't think I should kill the sheep outside the enclosure. The councillor was worried that it might spread the disease.
textByHashes.298f322f0048c801ffdc19c75c0713a2fe41fed6: The sheep looks extremely unwell. I don't want to touch it without a full protective suit.
textByHashes.1b5548089ab7029091106d4bea6d7543748855b4: In fact Fred, funnily enough, I actually have 20 balls of wool already on me.
textByHashes.70e4b36ac7b3bd5163f78f577e00991f9ebb8977: No! Well, maybe... They just looked a little wooly! Surely you like a shave once in a while, too?
textByHashes.baf9f441c1cf0bcff689101057f68595e9be3ff3: I'm sorry, I'll ask permission next time.
textByHashes.e12777f071c24f2aa40ddce0186f1a90b5084470: What do you mean, The Thing?
textByHashes.0c269fca34aa40036357a97cc20d3fa2fc64fd0a: Yes, okay. I can do that.
textByHashes.dba9f6fe652a01e0fb113d63378026a85ce281f9: Err. No, I don't know actually.
textByHashes.8b15db55497a27594a070ec0d0fec0a2666f121d: I don't know how to spin wool, sorry.
textByHashes.a6332e876d7bf6e31216b25c84def94dbbfc8fda: No, I'll give it a miss.
textByHashes.d9d717e59fa2d80b9dbafb945e76052c64a288c8: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!
textByHashes.a191f9267c232b4ae446e568dbf30fdbfa89e6ef: How many more do I need to give you?
textByHashes.52e117e7670293476d4cb4695c9a6bdd5e4a79ce: How do I shear sheep, again?
textByHashes.06e36dc49e7908db647c0a3de5839b5460e32ec2: That's all I have to do?
textByHashes.bc23dab8d4abdf784c1281937eb7ed62a96b1e31: Yes, I know how to spin wool.
textByHashes.1f80467f8c3625144b5819826c0e9b36d0c24927: Remind me how to spin wool.
textByHashes.12d318f67a301396443d14429c22fdde749ac07c: I've got some wool. I've not managed to make it into a ball though.
textByHashes.78d8e5911648ef77d3c2bf245021953f9f47524b: That's all I've got so far.
textByHashes.01a055be50f80de1a168d257688b7896f8d7a788: Fred! Fred! I've seen The Thing!
textByHashes.cfc1761bede107e52a4aca81f9f33faacf52e88b: It's not a shapeshifter or any other kind of monster!
textByHashes.e6f24227e1610c5b7de96ab21719324186d416ac: Well ... it's just two Penguins; Penguins disguised as a sheep.
textByHashes.87bb5a7560c16a5f752b302663e6c9218527ba17: Actually, I don't think I am. Goodbye.
textByHashes.f971acaad0e6aaa51815bf3f6a55fabb3eb2195f: Aha! 'The Shield of Arrav'! Exactly what I was looking for.
textByHashes.f29d340cd904e3cdd8b28c2b19e12154a40c1820: Ok. I've read the book. Do you know where I can find the Phoenix Gang?
textByHashes.024eb9626df8ea6205b575100b849d05a8c6b110: Is there anything down this alleyway?
textByHashes.ace426d7d63492201819be043d18e25396ce6578: Do you think they would let me join?
textByHashes.b615af64041f761c96804b31213d2abdf4ccee34: I've heard you're the Black Arm Gang.
textByHashes.4621840a7f6f7f346fdb237a0a0559706dd028b3: I'd rather not reveal my sources.
textByHashes.780cae1a7c8b0a1df9fb9c49fe57021743a3402b: I want to become a member of your gang.
textByHashes.bec90fb49bb0fe26cba24eb286296d892e5d69a5: Well, you can give me a try can't you?
textByHashes.ff8bb31ee26f6991b2b858a8fd321e07cf81a647: Sounds simple enough. Any particular reason you need two of them?
textByHashes.76b9aa111b4fece6e0ecf24be3fb06576da632e2: Yeah, brilliant. So who are you planning to murder?
textByHashes.f6846840dc412a9527c8ec1241a1c060fa900188: Well, people tell me I have an honest face!
textByHashes.a1d9752c37c81af2c009008b33ce5970eb145e1a: I want some hints for becoming a thief.
textByHashes.deb6506c41ea002192c7e4214e9c27e754f73637: I'm looking for the door out of here.
textByHashes.2be012c99048bf0ca49429ffb3bc7bf29f38786a: It was Charlie, the tramp outside.
textByHashes.122bef73a7c382dbaec8d4cdb947312ed52eebf7: Everyone knows. It's no great secret.
textByHashes.f1bd1398eb16d70133933cfcf7291e5ba1649ad7: Oh no, not at all... It's so obvious! Even the town guard have caught on...
textByHashes.8c113897cd23f2f6f7cfcc9ab61e2e64d13559c7: I'm looking for fame and riches.
textByHashes.e94d941d073445995da9ab6d8a2ab0dfb7d9c999: Any idea where the Phoenix gang hideout is?
textByHashes.a3591fd9c07a5fc7e58a1c3531f1c6a568116919: Oh wait. I haven't got enough, sorry.
textByHashes.a561a19e1c22933a741ace12dcf6bda6af191ecd: So where is the hideout then?
textByHashes.9255d7c90608888897499e7f2d4440d8a49e5651: Don't worry, I'll find it myself.
textByHashes.618e2cd4dce071c0ae601aa1153ba893dabda728: 10 gold? That's too much, I'll give you 5.
textByHashes.dc2e475e413c8871e48e1b4624764124ee65e692: You theiving gutter-scum! You'd better watch your back!
textByHashes.261307f709a6981d08c4cc3b7818610a11716329: That's not fair, but I guess I don't have a choice.
textByHashes.c55d5418bb920271435633afcfcfb25c8975b9c6: I think I know where the hideout is, but I can't get inside. Any ideas?
textByHashes.904d856ad0aadea2cfd7e87075e31b32941a9b3a: No, I haven't yet found them.
textByHashes.4bb1518f1a8c1f0cc80abaa46bcad7cf80ed7f95: Who are all those people in there?
textByHashes.d23f99e9f7f0f3ab946a965ca6cf1ca7c0db6dbb: Teach me to be a top class criminal.
textByHashes.c68ea166bd70a1ae2c795407a2065d74604e766b: I've got this half of the shield in my bank already.
textByHashes.11b50349ed106cc734ddef79fe4a7fe467563d21: Can you tell me where I can find the Phoenix Gang?
textByHashes.e30ee1f28603a4457e020652e709ee34b658d903: So DO you know where they are?
textByHashes.93855326ca1b7016ba1bc4e56ad27cd83d1f565e: Uh....oops. My mistake. I don't have 20 coins. Silly me.
textByHashes.ba7fd1b15ac0f55d77baf85cb38178f3b339631b: No, I don't like things like bribery.
textByHashes.b833600d26c77c4ab950d0943a44488f0cea385f: Yes. I'd like to be 20 gold coins richer.
textByHashes.310114e3ac09999b067caa9df1d8d9a5381222b9: This is the headquarters of the Phoenix Gang, the most powerful crime syndicate this city has ever seen!
textByHashes.ac8de30f1fdc237b3688dab2f0ad8a2c3a36a304: I'd like to offer you my services.
textByHashes.e13108ff1593e1456b627067a16ef0aa99a7db85: Ok, I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.b86fa5ce123fb30c971f6b2bcb66ed7c5b69d2f0: I want nothing. I was just making sure you were them.
textByHashes.9e0345c710599336819d0351cb459c297b2d4e43: How do I get a job with the VTAM corporation?
textByHashes.3525296c2013e01fb222c88916d1491040b5f082: I haven't managed to find the report yet...
textByHashes.c30d2f187aba25cd1cacee72c490a1fa78a090a7: I've heard you've got some cool treasures in this place...
textByHashes.5d44ee05d9cdbb5648de93e40632bdc6155fd75e: And the shield of Arrav? I heard you got that!
textByHashes.03cf6bda3ffb393fe7cfee89741c2d191033ce02: Any suggestions for where I can go thieving?
textByHashes.2650dd889df3e26af5986ba52e9ca03c1d3ee2c8: Where's the Black Arm Gang hideout? I wanna go sabotage 'em!
textByHashes.a92c39a43924b9b13cfd933f1edd03f6ba3ea208: I'm afraid I've lost the key you gave me.
textByHashes.0cd2be025506de74c6e20bf24bafa0a9078d16f0: I'm after a weapon or two.
textByHashes.4cb0a437b280ba47a02e5750791b7fbf2f0b8e78: I have half the shield of Arrav here. Can I get a reward?
textByHashes.e385f3b22380731a2c58578352200aa166352dac: Well, I'm here to claim it.
textByHashes.7a2a86441d3ed96bc393d121a01750f345b25561: Can I have two certificates please?
textByHashes.c264abae0996f8d3cc6fecf7dc783c43581f5832: What? I went through a lot of trouble to get that shield piece and now you tell me it was for nothing? That's not very fair!
textByHashes.3c047ea5e41cc4344e95d543abfff70a7cf29196: Your majesty, I have recovered the Shield of Arrav; I would like to claim the reward.
textByHashes.88575c1d0a2eb47cd1900f109a2d8cafa53046d8: Your majesty, I have come to claim the reward for the return of the Shield Of Arrav.
textByHashes.c96aca13497a82fc96e3b94573cff27158985f05: Hello there! The name's . Who are you?
textByHashes.4f6ed1e1e6255e92c64fcd2a13b5724b84404971: Ah, that explains why you're in the library then.
textByHashes.6f9bd1fb3dc65a4e5032afc041a396b473444689: Sounds like a very noble goal!
textByHashes.f60207176d7cd56265e88282ffdb4fd6a0f52cda: About that book... Where is it again?
textByHashes.6e567de81707b690200121a64cbc2c635a1055e6: Aha! Exactly what I was looking for.
textByHashes.3e6096aec519f25e5cbc59496859a40d09889b6c: Okay, I've read that book about the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.bd2474b7c2e32d55167270f77972557cb34a279b: I think I do. Do you know where I can find the Phoenix Gang or the Black Arm Gang?
textByHashes.7d1eaefb582236719eea0f4f5bc9cbc2b28fa267: I'm looking for the Black Arm Gang.
textByHashes.eb74e4c8533ca3107e8f9acfd54537e44bf2aace: I want some hints on becoming a thief.
textByHashes.7569c4ebd2615be8868138d64fa0c040498f37ff: Well, how about I become a member of your gang in return?
textByHashes.8dde24ec6aa8a5a6a49f77cb2d63bbb6cad03532: I don't know. What would be the alternative?
textByHashes.2246a7d90ca5bd4be36ac3a1270dd452a1e947e5: Well, people tell me I have an honest face.
textByHashes.d7ea460baf928ebbdf46123c17e37e6193286fe9: Sounds simple enough. Any particular reason you need them?
textByHashes.e9444c84090e4f911e07d4a52289a648e1ed51a7: So you're planning to murder him?
textByHashes.b25cc482594964b93558788b00c0d821bdd3396d: Sounds a little tricky. Got anything easier?
textByHashes.b65fda0d9cfb539103ba23c21c95153b7b8b0c46: It's a no from me then.
textByHashes.49d03efd9cee6823c88efe7b509018a1016d4afa: Any idea where the Phoenix Gang are based?
textByHashes.8a1f679418ee59c6093497974201796e24a89f9b: Without being a member of their gang? That might be problematic.
textByHashes.1d5c481ff004a96c5164e53a37c360b29239ec74: Ten coins? That's too much! I'll give you five.
textByHashes.86007eab3a85139d362b6751abf54a6913204d57: So where can I find the Phoenix Gang then?
textByHashes.567a65a4f0fe68e82d79d5e5142e8865102f7c43: You thieving gutter-scum! You'd better watch your back!
textByHashes.83fa59fca85560888b8a795a47d82c3dd4c14dc5: Never mind. I'll find it myself.
textByHashes.e6a8eb040eb6b89799834c5f52cfa421afda0fff: No, I haven't found them yet. Do you know where I should be looking.
textByHashes.8910ee3f41c92564cdf83d476a4968b0f1540471: So I'm part of the gang now?
textByHashes.d420ddf8a2802218814e4f7eff41e2231ce1bc16: This must be the Shield of Arrav! Well... half of it at least. I wonder where the other half is...
textByHashes.ae386641a4da8515d3a7bc7f2ef59928e7ad0cbc: I've found half of the Shield of Arrav!
textByHashes.8a8d8a71dddd2b6de4e0a8c88d8027a94c9e50b2: Yes. It seems it was split in two.
textByHashes.22d34bcaefdc87b27f5f9ab3aa3937190d5054cf: The Black Arm Gang had it. I managed to infiltrate their gang and steal it from them.
textByHashes.c772a9d1d3de6b0a22e8cba6467a5e813591a8d8: Well, I did have a member of the Phoenix Gang help me... Maybe they can find the other half.
textByHashes.0c7df561c62ffd897672b314ff594701319b66e6: So I take it that you do know where they are.
textByHashes.5d78a3c1db5aeaabdccf139416a35ae03c6187ef: Uh... oops. I don't actually have 20 coins. Silly me.
textByHashes.37cde1e4728897b3e5a139c5cfa6985063adb05f: No, I don't do things like bribery.
textByHashes.a9dd4d287f8c170621dbe8301b77b318ef1bea33: Yes, I'd like to be 20 coins richer too.
textByHashes.869224adf89e8b756ccb045ea0c7f39cbb942c68: This is the headquarters of one of the most dangerous crime syndicates this city has ever seen! The Phoenix Gang!
textByHashes.ec861aa360161e2bf696fd9364148e467923e2eb: I see... I'm sure I can help sort something out for them. I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.79a18d30ac25f20b35308fdafea597587d0be077: Let me go get it from the bank.
textByHashes.75d28c375f7fc14d8e5dbb94d61162a6066c1f7c: I've heard you've got some cool treasures in this place.
textByHashes.f3ef87997ea31796b3597698c6311709f8fdb091: This other group? The Black Arm Gang?
textByHashes.89612da86d292e476c42b2d6132a48a9aba70752: Where's the Black Arm Gang hideout?
textByHashes.c775fcf08b5f9869c99c00eadcaaf475d5904b83: I see. Thanks for the help!
textByHashes.e37246a3907e03d2dccc315d7356e87314761ca9: I'm afraid I lost that key you gave me...
textByHashes.47490a94f641bcafff73311e67521d8715e029df: How did you know I was in the Phoenix Gang?
textByHashes.ef3b1685c7a7a10026283575acae818ae584f738: I see. So, any ideas how I could get in there?
textByHashes.c471418de3d50b8c4fede429cdf339e2d645770e: Any ideas how I could get in there then?
textByHashes.16cddd0a233d2d0d6f345838a26103c2765ed7bd: The Phoenix Gang had it. I managed to infiltrate their gang and steal it from them.
textByHashes.0c056adcd47a7b0ee1bd61449964df0a816625e9: Well, I don't think I'll have much luck infiltrating the Black Arm Gang now that I've joined their rivals, but maybe someone else will be able to.
textByHashes.89e1af3635d65d2386890907313786bbb33f9c16: Hello there. I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.81ef4b71b417e670d30a0efa195eac0bf5e91dad: I obtained this half from the Phoenix Gang. The Black Arm Gang might have the other half.
textByHashes.cb5bfb9a59a9287b531b306b11ddb3f600c8620e: I obtained this half from the Black Arm Gang. The Black Arm Gang might have the other half.
textByHashes.eeb18a2bfcb1423d891e8ebff1db9eb92e3c6220: I obtained this half from the Phoenix Gang. The Phoenix Gang might have the other half.
textByHashes.8a092f5aa431ecad4811436117c8f854ce5d22cb: I obtained this half from the Black Arm Gang. The Phoenix Gang might have the other half.
textByHashes.38023a0a01569b225831ad4fa3612d7b66b66493: So will I be rewarded for recovering half of the shield?
textByHashes.ee063afdb7d6b14ad5e32cbadbfeaa5199eb1d70: Would it be okay to get more half-certificates?
textByHashes.8fd02f4281386110cc655cf21110d8ae2f01219e: I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.a80b0e55d5c82c7455ea47a32b42a7be77bc257e: Well, I've managed to find half the shield!
textByHashes.a6c739db5be94305486494597825d8cb828e9975: It was quite the undertaking. I wouldn't have been able to do it without help from a fellow adventurer.
textByHashes.c54c1868e41cb076e47d4f9e8ed64c136e42930a: Oh no! I'll be sure to keep an eye out for any of their members sneaking around.
textByHashes.1406b5d8ba94534d7aca617cfa6f6ffa5453e00d: Why do I need to run?
textByHashes.058892b3e194d40493e28a6e4cd02af5479e04b9: Oh, Ok, sorry for bothering you.
textByHashes.bcf4aad0c873e18157618830f1e3eb62b6a3e0c1: Oh come on, you must know something?
textByHashes.0ce0c0f1e1056262c52f4210a5407445a0bde2ae: Maybe you know someone who does know something?
textByHashes.14aa45da84ad992e5df5f94797776227edaed4e1: I'll go to see the Shaman.
textByHashes.3a0dc85dd0d2e24da48ce1025b38717d83a0cc3a: Errr, I'm having second thoughts now.
textByHashes.bdb4dcc1378877a1d21c6e1341e1c439888f5db8: Yes, I'm sure and I'll take the Wampum belt to Trufitus.
textByHashes.52e80bc177019a8370703decb4d7bbf20a14021e: Sorry, but I don't think this is something that I can help with at the moment!
textByHashes.b18f252bb404436f05985e3a4759c9c60e814299: Can I help in any way?
textByHashes.975fd0eece97d7a08916803df91d91b19fecda1b: Uh, it sounds nasty, just the kind of thing I want to avoid!
textByHashes.7a28357aa959c2049f4973a83afa84c5319ad26b: What danger is there around here?
textByHashes.a7a02da885c7b5800a5a603c705ab4b1b848d98c: Mosol Rei, that's a nice name.
textByHashes.72c8d0379d42407c1174e88c57fc97ecc235ca2a: What do you know about Rashiliyia?
textByHashes.45397ceae51ae689b5d3bef2a4382cae7b156dac: So there is nothing we can do?
textByHashes.90a50ab3e6a04288a7d20cc324ffb3295322f223: Should I start to evacuate the island?
textByHashes.504d13b263ff5b55a717ee56bd22af67a2b4a507: Mosol Rei said something about a legend?
textByHashes.e0977e0a27f103af3ff6fa154589b044e213a62f: Why was it called Ah Za Rhoon?
textByHashes.cd1d1b0ad360f848fdbb8b1db440bccfeb7dd2ff: About Ah Za Rhoon and where it is.
textByHashes.b8a4a87979c08495f7c7154dfff55d3236bf17bd: Do you know anything more about the temple?
textByHashes.03573f22cc8ca87f52919bcf8cd1079f9a9a73cd: I am going to search for Ah Za Rhoon!
textByHashes.c45e3713441bb5dd9d2d96adca36a34bb364216e: Yes, I will seriously look for Ah Za Rhoon and I'd appreciate your help.
textByHashes.028c75d65fdd553cf283a57edff85ef333891007: Actually, now it comes to it, I'm having second thoughts.
textByHashes.23299236fa3de6a90efdc09f5d0e3f5af8224071: It's a pity that I can't search for Ah Za Rhoon now.
textByHashes.f2235d32f98f4e85b0f095c3d87fcd023ffa51a5: Will you pack your things now?
textByHashes.2aa5e0be7eaeab0dff170e846ae01b0c1e1ea333: Yes of course, I mean Minions, what made you think I said Onions?
textByHashes.6eec5a86bd6293d614e003d3589d52d4d69175f3: Erm, I don't know where to look?
textByHashes.77d38d830da28836d96de20fb68f7d4ddccca2f2: Do you think it was floating on water?
textByHashes.f6a04f789c1b308a5818545647b804ab534f8a1c: It looks very dangerous, and dark... Scary!
textByHashes.0026c2389576e6d1a29e5ee9cfae6a4927ea670d: Oops! Not enough wood left to do anything else with the table!
textByHashes.1a12e7378212a643091d14fb7416627a4090ac40: I think I found the temple of Ah Za Rhoon.
textByHashes.c7b2f4eae6c3015b66d896b661569aaa8d1e65b8: I have some items that I need help with.
textByHashes.b37843725e8fd995f950d4656e21a468da22b7aa: Is there any sacred ground around here?
textByHashes.37019184b3e325eee5dcf92b1589d433216a0b74: I need some help with the Temple of Ah Za Rhoon.
textByHashes.db493a2f1fccfddad43bc48e6631033fab44fb89: I found the corpse in a decomposing gallows. I get a very strange feeling every time I try to bury the body.
textByHashes.5c414f4bd56b7880d63850b7586eefad9bd5d556: Can you dispose of this for me?
textByHashes.c0bce5e47e810c61797771a1fc6d2974a451236f: Have a look at this, tell me what you think.
textByHashes.855a43f7f1eff3cdc79272b99fe7bebc29cffa60: In an underground building of some sort.
textByHashes.8057156d9ce12d0a8263f033455d4c897f49ce01: Could you have a look at this please?
textByHashes.c52e2a699aec086a759acf958ac055264f8a7a27: It appeared when I buried Zadimus' corpse.
textByHashes.17a712857cfe5d31487ddd7dd793e1b3f6ddfc28: He said something after he gave it to me.
textByHashes.72ad5c6d1ffb882f03a09fa3ef647fb0526dbacc: The spirit said something about keys and kin?
textByHashes.f90c612469d596f319f4b7cc033acca653ae737c: The spirit rambled on about some nonsense.
textByHashes.dd063840b8777f8b76246e8e6011e2e0aa95ab97: I have just buried Zadimus' corpse.
textByHashes.966b6752f883585b21f11b8717a298dc93c2aa31: It just so happens that I have!
textByHashes.78cc014e4d8a5142515c4ac5c08e66772a7dcdc2: I think I found Bervirius' Tomb.
textByHashes.af7daf82ef0ef562c3bfece15fa24e3ba65d7d48: I actually need help with something else.
textByHashes.712f95001923771ff1ddd13c199ff8700cb396c9: I didn't find anything in the tomb.
textByHashes.6ba0e5a965ded2c185fb32ebc19adf358a7fb414: No, I didn't find a thing.
textByHashes.dbf7331e17d077cd77d73560cced4e92ea7f11a2: Actually I did find the tomb, I was just joking.
textByHashes.c958759579882ce2b418686f2e5f58021dea11e4: How do I make a bronze necklace?
textByHashes.85f098b11de40c69e11205e76781ddad5b12a366: What should I put on the necklace?
textByHashes.1816f885162a862322432fdd004a1b71d0d3c9d6: I made it from the bone shard that Zadimus gave me.
textByHashes.d53c5da3eed109c46f78c507d43dca025548bf25: Yes and I explored inside some sort of cavern.
textByHashes.515c553c54de5a657f01ea81420750f1c0f680af: Yes, I found lots of things.
textByHashes.a5a11977175e8fec0daa12985614508e15ac2fb7: I don't know, I haven't tried it yet.
textByHashes.e3030b5b6fdf11c5201cb81575a4da0c6a76cb71: Do you know what it opens?
textByHashes.868c3dc2734fe86adae86d98efd160036d6d558e: Oh no, I'm going to be stuck in here forever!
textByHashes.68190334b460047374aa96726b7cac95befd3d99: How will I ever get out!
textByHashes.7f1d2de858b470c9251178ba58c88ea1e96c3b09: Could you have a look at this..
textByHashes.511a6259c46539be618f4d6032114d083d27dc6c: What should I do with them?
textByHashes.d775bbfc88955e93d75e1181155d1120ad9d6bdb: Can you take them off my hands?
textByHashes.dd9e0a63ec874c3579c580dfea3339920b02e691: Veliaf? What are you doing here?
textByHashes.0bab9ad042fc0fd03912aa21bfafe91d21bd76ff: Actually, I'm a bit busy right now. Maybe later.
textByHashes.9a1a789c60d8345100b6469159f63b4ce9ce29b3: And now the illness is back. You said you suspect the vampyres are involved?
textByHashes.c9ffbf4787d3bafc1d9830414f7a7f2c0f5cb6a1: I see where this is going. You think the vampyres are the reason the plague is back.
textByHashes.fed92e8c191b879c73f15b120172e0152929db43: I guess that's for us to work out. Where do we start?
textByHashes.108dec922d1ccc4c41659d1c35e1ec3a6087a76a: Sounds like a plan. Good luck.
textByHashes.2f686566f2b9753011eb91d595aa18991791a92c: How have things been for you recently?
textByHashes.ec75b616d261e1a305ebdc9598e9c2fb85638846: What do you know about this place?
textByHashes.53a41c88925fd0b9c9ed749a5043c6279c9f1809: Do they get on with the vampyres?
textByHashes.d916c78496a385c0fbbd259ad096ac9b90f15b5a: So why do these people follow Zamorak?
textByHashes.6cd2119900bc411238fc80759a263005878140ff: Can you tell me any more about the Sleeper Plague?
textByHashes.9f704358993cf377e9da6c5f4f607ff25b5b91b0: To be honest, immortality doesn't seem very useful if you're unable to wake up.
textByHashes.030f30356c77133663b493615f0e12aa44f5d4b6: Do you know how he fell ill?
textByHashes.b4ec572e79769d0103d1e12f20c046bf5315e456: Wait... you mean to say you weren't drinking?
textByHashes.f8ec3af62dd2b452308d26539e1a2efbffecd8c3: Apparently the latest victim of the Sleeper Plague was at the pub shortly before falling ill.
textByHashes.69d45a9dfc09c7d0f68c581b4596a93b5e145f5f: Agreed. I'll see if I can discover anything.
textByHashes.b944cf6cae5427722f83f18a7e12f520b8b6cfb1: Where do you get your Bloody Bracers from?
textByHashes.0bbbe6dbeece23e49ae8355b1c46cb853df88956: Okay. But the actual Bloody Bracers you sell, where do they come from?
textByHashes.4878386098bb1b98185201409be39964f628cf3e: Err... Health and safety of course, here on a routine inspection.
textByHashes.35100e4cc5235c17875e59f416a2e941f9593507: Part of my work requires me to inspect the source of your Bloody Bracers. I was hoping you'd put me in touch with your supplier.
textByHashes.52d1b348490f1b1c5e99585451caca3921116b47: Well I might just have a look around anyway.
textByHashes.ab12fbebbdb3e77d2daf1ec77a42f30e1199130d: Hmmm. Looks like Carl is pretty much out of Bloody Bracer. He'll need to collect more from his supplier soon.
textByHashes.de7e5b3069e0cf4afaaad0169a5fcc357df7ac25: Alright then Carl. Let's see what you're hiding...
textByHashes.df1fe8be936a7c9d7f4e395edee1f6549187ae33: The dungeon Carl? What are you hiding down there?
textByHashes.c099e9547d39f12d64cb5d272d5dc9c99af8da5e: Tempting offer. Death isn't on my to-do list today though, so I'll have to decline.
textByHashes.ec73c1099a8b319c56f1fd08062e8c41d95dbfa6: Well that's him dealt with. I should destroy his lab as well. Don't want anyone else continuing his work.
textByHashes.f5e836e2b1d48d21077626fa8a1aad2ba530e7ee: There. That should stop anyone from continuing Kroy's work. I should inform Veliaf.
textByHashes.10387a247f868717569b7e518ccafdb4ceb5bc8f: You were right about the vampyres. I did some digging and discovered that they are indeed the cause of the Sleeper Plague.
textByHashes.3414f9c6368adf69c043c145535fe6f5cb8f87dc: A vampyre in the dungeon called Kroy was making infected Bloody Bracers. The local barkeep was then selling them to the townspeople.
textByHashes.871d9cb642d5a7526242bfeaa8d2439b89dea99c: I put a stop to that though. I killed Kroy and destroyed his lab. The barkeep has no supply now.
textByHashes.5f7d6f5a0e2710e9af8f1524104230a111057d13: There's something else, too. While I was spying on Kroy, I saw Vanstrom Klause with another vampyre called Damien. It sounded like Damien was Kroy's boss.
textByHashes.c5ab1c6a7d0568c5bb35a4e00c932e5c0d863a3e: Well, in their conversations, it was revealed why they caused the new Sleeper Plague. Apparently, they did it to make it easier to take blood tithes.
textByHashes.f1580cc38f881a33e797cf5b066e11e45e011d9a: But here's the interesting thing. Vanstrom didn't seem very happy with this. It sounded like Damien was doing it without his permission.
textByHashes.9634995256157077bb3d5da770533b4ba2b6f914: He talked about increased demand from the nobles of Darkmeyer. Perhaps they have need for more blood than normal?
textByHashes.5eabe1a24aee14b76c36ec73a144a66286f0094f: Maybe. So, what's our next move?
textByHashes.12d896e97e5a8e220ea72f926f9e3940c05c235c: That sounds familiar. I suspect it was werewolves who attacked me that time at Paterdomus.
textByHashes.84e9aef7b151d49fd8d623147427d34758100b9c: So you want to investigate the werewolves?
textByHashes.8fc0d1cb555b4ae7e0a61b8d3e0da4f8c5db580c: What about Slepe? Should we not deal with Damien as well?
textByHashes.0772f079a9d1e924381f3baeb055cf36b4669121: But aren't we meant to help people?
textByHashes.0e071bdec0c502c2448b45809f9711351657ab16: Then why are we letting Damien get away with this? Carl as well?
textByHashes.c10afef1b103c218dd05a639f0051c57074b80fa: I suppose. It just seems harsh to leave these people in the hands of a vampyre like Damien.
textByHashes.841d421c97cf9a9b41da009f02b66fb4e9b7a2e3: You're sure this isn't just because they're Zamorakian?
textByHashes.d3c9b424cda0c6f1eabca001d972c2683c4ad99d: Thank you, Veliaf. So, what's our next move?
textByHashes.b2eb1e68329ab4fbda5c770fd4de142ed9c7998c: You can say that again. Good to see you Drezel. Has Veliaf already filled you in?
textByHashes.6691b54c7c8af0f19d91466cd087576c61cb5b2a: Yes, the Sleeper Plague. It turns out, however, that the vampyres are responsible.
textByHashes.40e91b71d1658523bb52afd3fec38288c3c040f9: That's right. Vanstrom doesn't seem to be very happy about it.
textByHashes.036022754ea374d90a63cec1bd8cde7232a73904: Hmm. Do these strange happenings have anything to do with werewolves, by any chance?
textByHashes.4eb15a21a31659059b28a52bf6960ac3a98c0139: Has anyone seen who's been doing this? Is it definitely werewolves?
textByHashes.2971cca5f14fa4e373ddd03dc215429c7a580bd3: Perfect. Sounds like that's where we should head next then.
