textByHashes.37c3585e89ef0ed1fd7f1abe01114c4efe793258: Ivan is still a member of the Myreque, isn't he? Surely he can look after himself.
textByHashes.11a80c8618f6006277401bc49a1393b05c570f84: I don't understand. Why is Ivan so important?
textByHashes.66145416836a36f6d6a264e76d8f16d92c75a7f1: Ah yes, I remember. So, this is why you want to keep Ivan safe, Veliaf?
textByHashes.467f3c53edf50c71ddc894ac17ba7c604981dc7c: I see. So that's why you want to keep him safe, Veliaf?
textByHashes.ac594d38b2ac3ad1ff9e41b0a31fb9ca4b188c29: Forgive me, but this can be resolved later. For now, we need to find Ivan and see what this meeting is about.
textByHashes.57b650e07a18633201487a24d6f915c5f72e975b: Could you tell me more about the Seven Priestly Warriors?
textByHashes.a13318dfbf08713fa0713e170ba3c27f0e7805b8: I don't know if that's completely true.
textByHashes.e7c0e5bcd097c81c1cec17c9984c84411a648835: Fair enough. Anything else you can tell me about the Warriors?
textByHashes.94c465a5ccd5b55dec5edf926a5a0f2a356b21b1: Hello there, Ivan. Believe it or not, I'm actually here for you.
textByHashes.0565665ba886bbb4de6e1ac9b509488e83d8cacc: That's right. He told us of your discovery about the werewolves. We came to lend a hand.
textByHashes.51fcd6ea85eefcee51d1e7286fe056b871a24a82: Yes. We've been investigating something together. We suspect it may be connected to this situation with the werewolves. I imagine he'll be here shortly.
textByHashes.26c8a714ab8b9524e1e08b6891be102a7275d5c0: But they've been doing so without permission, just like in Slepe.
textByHashes.efc7cc1e56664a09adac29588f43323e8ab043a4: That's a shame. Maybe I shouldn't have bothered.
textByHashes.70626889c9b554c13311ba1bfc24e9be56ea4912: You've made your point Vanescula. How do we get to this graveyard?
textByHashes.9a9cd8867448c04726625c4a79edcc49b1741781: I fear Ivan is right. It doesn't seem like Vanescula has given us any other options.
textByHashes.a53b798054c6778b8b12b709f1b95d9dec244b93: It would be my pleasure. What's our plan?
textByHashes.fc9f5bd9fbe0cd0238709100b2745aa5f7b4cdf2: How are things between you and Veliaf?
textByHashes.f00a2a32613d6431c7014f8a7aa44d2e703fc9c2: He seems to worry a lot about you.
textByHashes.72f2b2aff77e7111d49671b354b447b3148b8fa3: And what of the Calsidiu stuff?
textByHashes.d8a9b26b449543eb0998c0cb3c1bfc67dad51050: What do you think of this Vanescula business?
textByHashes.6634a20f2057d36098ddf3b79d5c7a0bd7e8547d: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way through!
textByHashes.5c0358eb4192f6c90e4b11a57eaaf9d86109eba5: I reckon we can come up with something.
textByHashes.8d4001a4275e5d26d9058a2dda74e72479a4eab3: What of Safalaan and the others?
textByHashes.c7e30953f4ca4634f17f85f1aef375b7c0e6321d: I guess we'd better get going then.
textByHashes.788025a2adb76900b36e9abe6223f5f1b3fdb8dc: Good to see you Vertida. How are things?
textByHashes.5c29d9836c05ec74602116b49f60f59a77f36028: Myreque prevail, Safalaan. How are things in Meiyerditch?
textByHashes.ff995a232c2f3977dfcaed0a149e82eeb6abb239: Thank you. It's a great honour.
textByHashes.a014370cf5172dc043a1254b6931050b0efdd1b4: We could have a good guess.
textByHashes.5aece255d55f4254ff55f5588c01eab9abd340ba: And once inside, we kill him.
textByHashes.fb71c7f1ef6597c33d92fc7464386f2ea87ecdcd: I bet I can get it open.
textByHashes.eeb240c7e100ff72cdd5fc97b76558c465d69c54: Oh yes, I'd better go to him.
textByHashes.886c692ec63f1eb3ffe7a276f2a807cd10db88ec: There's a plaque on the coffin.
textByHashes.75b42f1c772c97a29388d52b22388e939f4c46c5: 'Here lies Larina Hallow. Beloved daughter of Efaritay and Ascertes Hallow and...'
textByHashes.72cb4765476893b47da46d63b8ea0cd4691ccd34: Turns out this graveyard is more than just a quiet meeting place. That mausoleum contained the truth behind Safalaan's heritage.
textByHashes.055eb8bc4ed4babecba1af14e6e709a0fb5bf5ec: Safalaan is the only living child of Efaritay Hallow, the former queen of Hallowvale.
textByHashes.c5d70c5ece95a7ededdc5dc10b5f3c582df98a51: He wishes to be alone. In the meantime, he asked me to speak to everyone.
textByHashes.2c8418a224fc8c3dbb9ec8ca490eb2bea5760c94: Oh. That was easy. I was expecting you to disagree with him.
textByHashes.04286818a29cff7371f8388bdd8b473f76a494db: Not yet she isn't. In fact, Safalaan has decided he wants to work with her.
textByHashes.80ce98ae696ca097b3f2f7bc73cd30cb6209882b: She showed him the truth about his family. That seemed to convince him.
textByHashes.0b8298b71ca0223bed8c51dcfabf092944bbd562: So you don't agree with his decision?
textByHashes.f62752de3d9748baffdc3849a1ec21f86c9cfc2a: So you don't support the plan?
textByHashes.8562593f5441534b9d474e0d6bc79b097d029f7c: Fair enough. I'll see what the others think.
textByHashes.74d2bc76da5dfae41ac33ece5ff6155b7002e542: Hello. I was wondering if you'd changed your mind about working with Vanescula?
textByHashes.6144a38cb36bb16cadf08abdfcc9edcc02994366: Well maybe it doesn't have to. Radigad has a plan of his own. He thinks that once her brother is dead, we should kill Vanescula as well.
textByHashes.29b9bfcf9a4ca1a0fccb9207589896340754be89: If we can kill Lowerniel, we can kill her. He's meant to be the most powerful vampyre around.
textByHashes.534ebfecffb6035317f69f1069a789131c726d93: A pleasant thought. So, are you still against the plan?
textByHashes.4ba46ce4ffc67218ad025eec15d10eb304da1b92: So you're not angry at Veliaf?
textByHashes.292d54e4e68d7d3ffedb20a27c5725393045eb44: Well on that note, how do you feel about Vanescula's plan?
textByHashes.b1d6bab79f7a41fa4b85e4b81fe7be9c8d9e63ae: It seems you're not alone with that sentiment. Safalaan wishes to work with Vanescula.
textByHashes.c5374b70cfbfe9227f9eaf3ea364c0c6be63cd0e: I guess I'd better talk to him then.
textByHashes.6ded1ed37a2f3f1167714f4a72f481a8d7479f38: Let's hope so. Talk later Ivan.
textByHashes.67ebd7cce3f1d5abca918f0efedcbb04fc9bee70: Safalaan has decided he wants to work with Vanescula.
textByHashes.5309558c2a373797d521c53e5ec689d5b6415aa6: I feel like there's a 'but' coming on.
textByHashes.73f885ca8001bfb448bf49ad30259e9160530ec0: You heard what she said. If we kill her another vampyre could just take her place.
textByHashes.647eb1dcb8acb602b5476d29e9a6e8ebf49f421b: You make a fair point. I take it you're happy to work with Vanescula then?
textByHashes.620a34c61308c2fbf103a2e21734631a59393c14: I'm still working to convince the others to work with Vanescula.
textByHashes.7d3a421fde4195fe13a2772db409c7f90cb38e35: And you, Kael. I wanted to talk to you about Vanescula's plan.
textByHashes.7f5013afbcaee7ca16dec3b013900253c34f9a89: We take risks every day though, don't we?
textByHashes.0bd9a829d35f4bacd16175b6da0ff138bf094a14: This could be our only chance to kill Lowerniel Drakan. Surely that makes the risk necessary?
textByHashes.6f5d12994ca985100aa82146576107a0df6eda53: I can't promise there won't be losses. But what of the losses we've already suffered? If we don't kill Lowerniel Drakan, surely they were all for nothing?
textByHashes.50ef09c8cfa7fd880f7ee89374230b3faee65613: He'll regret the day he crossed the Myreque.
textByHashes.1dc82d960ed8ee86bfb35f3d49d6519cd3784e5a: Turns out Vanescula knows a lot about Safalaan. More than he knows about himself in fact.
textByHashes.078510359846554c986657ef313d26567a77a6ca: That mausoleum contained the truth about Safalaan's family. He is the only surviving child of Hallowvale's queen, Efaritay Hallow.
textByHashes.2917db14d46b78b6f6c658d092d52296572e798f: Possibly, though I don't think so. It all adds up. What else could explain his strange abilities?
textByHashes.68702d88c04c432d53199afb79aebaa7aef3866b: That's not the only thing. Vanescula told us that Safalaan's father still lives, but as a vampyre. Vanstrom Klause.
textByHashes.f520126389aed2d94e3eadaace4fa991d71c8013: As well as can be expected. However, he has decided it's best that we work with Vanescula.
textByHashes.786de15f523ea83abae6faef6113134eba944d04: So you won't work with her?
textByHashes.98419ff8826eee67d8e8e6e02960e24aa69d9609: Hello Veliaf. Have you thought any more about working with Vanescula?
textByHashes.6e7d6908eedcdec4c5b7bd2bedaafb955b594a63: You know, all the others have agreed to the plan. It's just you.
textByHashes.5515bf8e981e2b5e1541ca4b4a6c0d029c518c24: They all have their reasons. They all seem valid reasons to me.
textByHashes.69df17334fd2320f94d7018b7b7b12ffa758136e: I think they know that. We do not necessarily need to trust her to work with her.
textByHashes.7e8ea871bf298dec6735cf70baf839435ada31a4: We have weaponry. We have the Ivandis Flail.
textByHashes.ec72fe48537892ae1e12722969adde2c8814600f: Sarius Guile, your servant. Hang on... Did you send her?
textByHashes.c9b2ec42e19b4c08b122e947dfc1c9291c31a780: So you want us to go back there?
textByHashes.b937a2c6d23ce06d2001035ae61518ab6585cf3f: Okay, I'd better be off to the laboratory then.
textByHashes.953cc5d4088c1a62040efa5fe6db27f63f266f98: It's in sector six of Meiyerditch, just south east of the daeyalt mine.
textByHashes.0a4d19c1c7b0cd55b42fadd147b9f0ebc45dabe9: Why do you hate your brother?
textByHashes.c6852dbcd126f024bb5e55a10f8943a8c2f0a355: Is killing him not a bit much?
textByHashes.d1269ffb4dfbd9caee70cbaa76cf736516c2c8eb: And yet you're still happy to kill him?
textByHashes.cbfa268d785dd6e8dbaecc2ae9ac70f5bdff44c9: How did Ranis capture Ascertes Hallow?
textByHashes.d7018a7ee8cc27a85752ea0e097e15fc93efebd8: Owner of the Theatre of Blood? Who doesn't know of her?
textByHashes.ec79d65b5d55c2d10e9b944fa1204d12851f7411: Why did Lowerniel shut down the Haemalchemy Laboratory?
textByHashes.2dc955a3e95b43676a067a142af02946a2ac3c6b: Well obviously. Could you be more specific though?
textByHashes.1a5a581f5eb6836dd70aaef76e6eb4d4304686eb: Ways to overcome blood shortages and ways to improve your immunity to our weapons.
textByHashes.c39001b4826e933bc22347154a0708fc65c7c97f: Which we were only able to do because of you. Why did you send Sarius to us?
textByHashes.e96847f4fc3dbaa8882a80b4d488966f4847d2bb: They are. But maybe there's a light at the end of the tunnel.
textByHashes.1f129d689bccc4702506c5375b5aaafe565aa65c: I guess it's not a bad way to go.
textByHashes.7f7c98bcea605157260824ead7c7ba173b471156: It's crazy to think it might actually happen.
textByHashes.14cd2883336aac0719a9de3d4910ab01841fc869: And then, peace in our time.
textByHashes.dbd9d14c1cf083af90efe1125469a112b0c1c99f: Looks like it. How are you feeling?
textByHashes.325e586088ba64cc0632ecf48b7b3c6da330ec4a: I hope you're right to have faith in me.
textByHashes.34faeee59c2dda3c87e47878717a3d50d0919cd5: The fight with Drakan? Yes, I think so. We killed Ranis after all.
textByHashes.c8a2e046c60188d0fad558d6bde951e959397982: He is. But it's not just me this time. This time there's all of us. And Vanescula too, assuming she doesn't betray us.
textByHashes.094a2cfdf08354d612b8921c5005991349d7bcc0: And you. How are you doing?
textByHashes.a8d0c816cd9f84a8d144225430b1a5176c36d1f5: You have their support Safalaan, I know you do.
textByHashes.e1ab8cd5fa504add594113b6cfe408df7f960ebe: I didn't know you had a knack for Construction?
textByHashes.3b6a6696789f23c092c08d6e8c89ee0dd71ea44c: That's a shame. I'm sure you'd make a great builder.
textByHashes.6c833ef8e1517581ea062c13e6ee1aa8fb91a8cf: I'm sorry. Maybe now isn't the best time for these kinds of conversations.
textByHashes.5f3b13827a1af08b3d5850421c353046ea26cea2: Not yet. I need to prepare first.
textByHashes.de37d31c071ab070ad90453f2b0cab6e865fffd8: We were attacked by some bloodvelds. You used your powers to kill one.
textByHashes.8d56eed90d9cf1e7806ce8ba443938c9515f73a4: Don't be so harsh on yourself. Your powers have got us out of a couple of sticky situations now.
textByHashes.d1f145279cafef88296790cda1746c1e93a7c5e7: Well now that we know the source of your powers, maybe we can find a way to help you control them.
textByHashes.0d5036ac3af2288e4d154d96a208d21ba66c51fd: Well... you are the son of Queen Efaritay. I guess that makes you thousands of years old.
textByHashes.94c78e31881cac100cc6de13014de2e8e8cdd1c2: I'm sure we can arrange that.
textByHashes.e75e214a5239f0da2c3da5ebd66cc39f2383c83d: Oh I see how it is! You find out you're an old-timer and now I have to do all the work!
textByHashes.9a0b3ef8c86882b41bba3ddab52351e7bdbd6782: Okay. I'll have a look round and see what I can find. You stay here, old-timer.
textByHashes.9262b5a9607f1f2477c4698da9bdb58229128979: Do you think we can kill Drakan?
textByHashes.299026c4e3dc59742c5d459113271125bcdf2948: We seem to be dealing with a lot of uncertainties.
textByHashes.edadd91d294ad2da7bc9016787e54830f17739ea: I guess. Losing a card game generally doesn't result in death though.
textByHashes.7763bd4216a30e9c1c7ef3e36855147befdb34eb: What do you think of Vanescula?
textByHashes.8321d5bfcc8aafb7c73b7d4701146ce6d79f60c8: You still chose to work with her though.
textByHashes.c17f676347ef5e7843298faac7fb22af2d4d39d8: That's good to know. I worried you were being too hasty after you discovered the truth.
textByHashes.1a4d5c994d805d90684872f0b1da405cb75207c6: Well you have our support. For better or worse.
textByHashes.963bb476cd96887251efa4fc6eee68f486d5e7f4: Could we talk more about your family?
textByHashes.b73aad1f650acdbe7e4faa4ef6e666cb138ddd05: Yes. I found some more haemalchemy research.
textByHashes.cebdedae4955866e05d49993aae17088f97ac294: I'm going to keep hold of it.
textByHashes.e6c6e31967d195c1b80dc3aaaa7ba27510dea271: I bet they could. You holding up okay?
textByHashes.d7665dd6aebe2135f173ce5db6fe7011df422ffb: So what did they find out?
textByHashes.e97bfca84a0e6d24563330deaab49f00fe392802: Will do. I'm guessing I should take it to Polmafi after that?
textByHashes.b3def7aaa1a1ac8532f0a2f54038449750272030: Okay, I'll be back when I have the disguise.
textByHashes.44ad91fe3cba655908b16f5a2f321f527cf83e73: And once I have the disguise?
textByHashes.68c49b2a120ed2aaf6d386d072c343b2c0faa42c: I need to look like a vampyre noble. Safalaan suggested we use a vyrewatch disguise from Trader Sven as a starting point.
textByHashes.127750bbec5b50bce0b3b00da3b3701a0772e17f: Not too bad. We've managed to recover some more haemalchemy research. We think it can be used to further improve our weaponry.
textByHashes.9bf45f505d5ee20f1d23427b2defe6b65518fe97: Yes, actually. To make the improved weapons, I need to infiltrate the city of Darkmeyer. For that, I need a disguise. Veliaf said you'd be able to help.
textByHashes.96d6246145c72eaee478173bc285829c6a8e7010: Sure. I'll see if I can get one from Trader Sven.
textByHashes.087747ee2f72952c1a0efb4d2e01f2c831beeb07: So I kill a vyrewatch and use their blood to scent the disguise?
textByHashes.655d62f4d2cc8e7da640bbcde346af588e405dc3: Good idea. Veliaf, I'll see you there.
textByHashes.de9072f00c87fc2e6dbd21f74f8644b5cb11a822: I know. Not a bad thing though. Damien needs to be dealt with.
textByHashes.fbef64a52c182bacfe5e091a1b190e9b45df89ff: He may well have tried, but I bet we scared off a lot of his supporters.
textByHashes.9cd0b8843cdaf22ec7d56f1ce85a7cfbb50f7d03: Do you think we should be able to access the manor easily?
textByHashes.9c57f41d6a1745561823442ea6211e1ed3af087d: Oh wait! I forgot the disguise!
textByHashes.7df6f9d5329129a6c05ab5925fcc1f1715fca92a: Do you think Safalaan is doing okay?
textByHashes.6ab0269a57708899912572ad5ca533b703e3b666: He seems to be okay. At least, as okay as anyone could be in that situation. He seems to still be focused, and he's not lost his sense of humour.
textByHashes.a018a9cfa0560977539b5ea9e2ab10a432b61fb6: You're not wrong. But that's for him to decide. He knows we are there if he needs us.
textByHashes.f62f68368fb7dd0d1fccce8721d3c5f8b6f8c11d: Do you think things will improve for him?
textByHashes.20ef7d3684d9d1d214049e4090922926f7b253c4: How are you feeling about working with Vanescula?
textByHashes.058f6e5ce03ff13189326b52f63ef179bb1ef7c9: But you're still willing to go ahead with this?
textByHashes.0b97cb45687f70d5af3837fdd30bb8905c529bb6: Seems sensible to me. Let's hope it doesn't come to that.
textByHashes.8248adf966893ae10f5bde03cc9d20e85d160845: A lord of Darkmeyer? Isn't a lord meant to have followers? Looks like yours have run away.
textByHashes.d469ccb0e08f992c76ef094aeb1dc8d148ca63e1: What do you think this means for Slepe?
textByHashes.bc2fdf59cc874c9bb07ce84ea4e57ce619b98753: You think they are being punished?
textByHashes.5793bba5d54801332b46ea978b49fa19c3fcf622: So do you think the Sleeper Plague will go away now?
textByHashes.0d976163815309af34ad99a31edc159858230f7a: I'll see you at the graveyard.
textByHashes.b124c4cd57529fb352567862afe30ef3b8b7fb79: Count Draynor, he called himself. He wasn't much of a challenge compared to Ranis and Damien, truth be told.
textByHashes.e3d37680d65b545dda5f4183ae03842010b4d5e6: So that aside, I can use this crack to enter Darkmeyer? What then?
textByHashes.8f6607378460d37a45dffa5b676afd6c55573f69: Vampyre, right. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.fc1ea8d41fa4215d09c964851e50966a8a4f02fc: Okay, I'll be back once I have the logs. Wish me luck.
textByHashes.9678864e4baba8f731b40ff64eafe8d85bcee47c: That can't be true. Someone must be allowed in?
textByHashes.e6df1fe6f76e56e9616912e4c3cce924d947ba34: What will it take for you to let me in? There must be something you want. Do you want money?
textByHashes.b2b864fb523b02dbcac02617f19904726b08c18a: Sure thing! What's he meant to be delivering?
textByHashes.dea4e356d07ffcfb48d2c937fa33e5b674dbf31e: He sold your slaves to Alexei Jovkai.
textByHashes.51f9de8006d47c4f885748d0f92a8aaf408affe4: He wants his slaves. When are you planning to deliver them?
textByHashes.71919572e1d5640ccd4162f7811e8a2cb125a877: So you sold them for blood? Did you not think Desmodus would notice?
textByHashes.ee07f43be87889b2730cf71e4d7b26723ef711f2: Look I don't care what happens between you and Desmodus, I just need to recover those slaves. Who did you sell them to?
textByHashes.5a268d420bd6f17393218afc8173bc0563c8a448: We'll see. Where can I find him?
textByHashes.386fef18a4de74779dbfbac1eca91e09f632cf09: Sounds like I need to visit this prison then.
textByHashes.4c20b1d6ecb2b64a683077a0f6364368ada7333c: Remind me, where can I find Desmodus' slaves?
textByHashes.caecc0374ef93a66954f8ff83468cce0a6727368: No I'm not. Are you doing okay?
textByHashes.51fa8b038b462930232e7c0f8edb8b362f87d10c: I was just talking to the... prisoners?
textByHashes.1bd3d3dbf4cd08c323496a54c2230bb321b25914: I'm Vampyre. And I'm not here to cause any trouble, thank you very much.
textByHashes.e4b583a12cc3f3c63bcb169104d240ae2219d1fb: These prisoners of yours, they were promised to Desmodus Lasiurus.
textByHashes.38341cc6d743b81a2d24b0361e0295b92a771c5a: He's a guard at the Arboretum.
textByHashes.6044c61f3d96cf4037959068c278479c41d8002a: It's all dealt with. They'll be with you soon.
textByHashes.22b5a15e56600227b6e98c40efe3a3c3a7612da4: I can go in the Arboretum now, then?
textByHashes.4451d40710e3ce20f49aa6c4f81842cdbe4deae4: Can I go in the Arboretum?
textByHashes.10dc4589b303ea788cb833a92b07b9940e006265: I want to access my bank account.
textByHashes.cb6626954b6a37f1bfd757186131afa5c18de803: I don't have time to poke around down there. I have work to do.
textByHashes.85c2594733d40f6bc8cb8069d6b4284b45ae797d: Now's not the time for searching through corpses. I have work to do.
textByHashes.aa0dcfb6a3c64b70760637924bb0da7ca9343216: It was a bit close at times. But I managed it.
textByHashes.1fe9a03aa6f99e64722175897d0751f0ea57392a: I had it under control. By the way, where is Safalaan?
textByHashes.8e0b7968f7e28be117a65715f4a45f85d682c525: What do I need to do?
textByHashes.7fe992c22681f8c7a865ed6ed3919f94722c5f6c: Right then. I'll be back once the weapons are made.
textByHashes.8cf4276399fd95e162fd7b36709b7e001a47cf9c: A blisterwood flail. I like the sound of that. So how do we make these sickles?
textByHashes.f1e4bd3bd7987b4094542bbcd422b78248b9518e: And then I can attach that to my flail?
textByHashes.b96b180f4920eefa0659eef256574d949f7b10e7: Do you know where he went?
textByHashes.58735b8d800af6f6fd6a78c26047a416d71b75cc: I'll see if I can find him.
textByHashes.7350da83f0a4227855ffc9d71ec1f4674195ec84: Okay, I'll be back once I've found him.
textByHashes.368813514e13572fb00747444120979620fc659f: I guess that makes two of us.
textByHashes.2d562a1296c706b734a8940131eb9dbf0e5375ce: We did. Before he died though, he helped us. In return, he asked us to help his family.
textByHashes.73471fd60f746d2fea1bb4fef5e89df9fd6df674: I found them, in Darkmeyer. They were in a prison, albeit a nice one. The vampyre that owned it looked after his tithes.
textByHashes.94fb32c353c5e72e0d1a14cb0ef9721fb1e1b088: They're not there anymore though, thanks to me. Another vampyre has them now. One that I don't imagine will show any kindness to them.
textByHashes.1bcee1a6fda2b1c697151bdce850e3a9cc3c60a4: Yes. It was the only way for me to get into the Arboretum. That doesn't change what I did, though. I broke my promise to a dying man.
textByHashes.035732376079609fdcff1bd25d51f91e318feb2f: Because he had no other choice. Vanstrom would have killed his family otherwise.
textByHashes.efd3055cce51fbc04ee78334cfd1b3e05636f35c: Yes. But this time we weren't the ones who paid for it.
textByHashes.1d961b56a62482580cb4c59e6e6fce4e818bd156: I need more time to prepare.
textByHashes.01a29c7013f7b445c8d315f7fb4270dfd57bd152: Are you sure? I could take you back to Paterdomus.
textByHashes.9894951942554c0d46a88cf8d7554e544b51def8: I don't think I want to disturb a cave of giants right now...
textByHashes.78f6775d0cf935b03783ae2704060a27b62ec660: You don't want to fight me?
textByHashes.29d923e721be5d0bdc80c236a1f019e07d0fe168: I must be dreaming. Giants can't talk!
textByHashes.568bfa89fe7efa25948123ad651f274e8104e9ef: Okay giant, I'll help you out, but first you need to tell me your name... if you even have one.
textByHashes.6c13209dcce5634b02b85b2c18f3deff2c16d012: Kovac... alright then. My name is . So, Kovac, what do you need help with?
textByHashes.f1f9a915cb615f533c56a0f5b9d0db57ee194171: Hang on... is this a trick? Are you going to cook and eat me?!
textByHashes.e3c68a62f09978d2ccb62895262f583fc2943302: How? Giants don't build, do they? I thought they were brutes...
textByHashes.c69797ddc09d4e5b7bda0fc6e05accdf55c75920: Huh? I don't understand what you mean.
textByHashes.444c7161bcff35f7151bd67caa552dc8096c9aee: You want me to help you by fixing those tools?
textByHashes.eaaa3927a1a4c8df0af43ca7b24218a0c5749c5d: Okay, I'll help, but first you need to tell me what this place was used for?
textByHashes.2ef20c1519e665b911381a4759c1957195b05d24: That's incredible! But why do you want to make weapons? Most giants I've come across already have weapons?
textByHashes.e2ea541389f449645d640b5e32eac548f30353f6: I see. To be honest, if I hadn't seen this place myself, I wouldn't have believed you.
textByHashes.9c9c63e27a57909d10ac23844e46c0e448eb2312: Alright, Kovac, I'll help you out. What do we need to do first?
textByHashes.b360ba942f165844fadcba061d26958b303cd803: No way! I'm getting out of here. There's no chance I'd trust a giant!
textByHashes.bd873b55c2b9ef79374d4d0e16bb06334282aa3a: Kovac, where did you get this chest from?
textByHashes.ced3baf3f74b734b98be5615b38f73baffd802f1: What do you keep in this box?
textByHashes.b96dfbb801dad52799fd8779c5094918761297b7: I can see that, but what's it used for?
textByHashes.cd976e462e3a07f469fad6aeac9fd9b52156b659: Having all this lava here without a barrier is quite dangerous.
textByHashes.0e721ec1700df88087505249940409672ad6e54f: Should we try building something to keep us safe?
textByHashes.bcb7a4417270c3892865ab30a0d15f48b43ac8c9: What is this table used for, Kovac?
textByHashes.67efef38eeed1222d4555743bc727c3e09896365: This looks a little dangerous. Quite a perilous place to store something.
textByHashes.0cbc0317d595d20225107d8d9108d5b9152e7074: Not everyday you see a waterfall in a cave.
textByHashes.12311edf2cedbe496cbd51c76a9818c9b1ad2d1a: I think this has seen better days. What was it?
textByHashes.95990b301a088b2219feaf1330c86ac8c9c7660d: Right... and what did it do?
textByHashes.b413dcad081499bdba2c5dc7e959a37b7263269d: Let me take a look and see if I can fix it.
textByHashes.8cfc32a190ea167265ac5c963a83794271facb6b: That looks like it'll do the trick. What do you think?
textByHashes.e90fb951070b5e7da98a9d52f700660966232b2a: That makes sense. Quite resourceful for giants to make something water powered.
textByHashes.a83442bc0c4f19c5fcadb623913d3ff683309f69: What was this meant to be?
textByHashes.cf89605bd0593d3d04c15fcd0399559893f38e71: I see. It looks like it's lost its teeth.
textByHashes.b333b048a242b3a57904ac4a80baffaea72614bb: Conquer? It's already broken! Hitting it more won't help.
textByHashes.6fc4612b2a461e259d6c21c6b809150f90e464d1: Right... now we're agreed, I'll see what I can do to fix it.
textByHashes.082bbca5c20d0d30b1b79b06ddd4a24168a45f42: Well that required a bit of elbow grease. It should be good to go now.
textByHashes.f7cc01667b658b1877b3174c94e65c2091e6dd6d: Didn't want to try and help me?
textByHashes.b861647368dc212ede0092c0f0cd27988aceb155: Can you tell me what this is used for then?
textByHashes.f302918df40072cb6fcba661cf480c624c1acf79: So we use it when making swords?
textByHashes.ad0a1aad20f7ef6d70f13e77e896010fca2405d0: Okay, what is this thing? It just looks like a wheel to me.
textByHashes.6831e0adeb81203bbf855667ffb34f54c28067aa: Looks like it's lost its soft edge then.
textByHashes.1f34b7cc87496a81566308b26e8141cb699fd2de: Not my finest work, but I think it will do.
textByHashes.2e13f958a4826c6958d6e88bd150c09f5c1137f7: So when would we use the polishing wheel?
textByHashes.aac2babed75406f928ec4284fe27ccce28f7b3b4: That's all the tools repaired. Well... as best as I can do.
textByHashes.54a3cdf52ff17ef4ee76e83224149ec46e308946: I've noticed your speech has been improving over time as well.
textByHashes.9ded23eb99a9835789a7ccaf2d4b1c3b78dd843d: That's alright, we'll figure it out together.
textByHashes.b3941bb59b3e5b9d2d8c1f822e150e50e51147bd: Yes! I'm itching to get started.
textByHashes.bc5222e4f98eb2a4f0c3a73fe1fa6e0fea7e0b7d: Okay Kovac, I think I'm ready to make a sword.
textByHashes.7df669a535cca7be57e03e83a1e9170e1425c995: So what do I need to do to make a sword?
textByHashes.9fe4f6a21eb4b1f751559fd85666c215a9e7f2cf: Okay, so what do I need to make?
textByHashes.cd8f8b5e20eb3385d6ffab1925c67449cf6b98ca: Alright, I've got the metal you said to take from the box. What now?
textByHashes.338a9f37c2a1c0be7ecad25466cc631f591e034e: I've added a few things to the crucible. Is that enough?
textByHashes.f6c04dbaddedf90226437e2a2bcb65a5eab80325: Right, that's the crucible full. Can I make the sword yet?
textByHashes.a3ecbeceefccd69b39cd34ae628f06b088b1efdd: Okay, so how do I go about setting up a mould?
textByHashes.e022505893cc7a89467daf57671c9915b9dc9bd2: Right... I think I'm with you.
textByHashes.69337189a1d14f74c7464296f6afc49d63fb8ab3: I'm sorry Kovac, but I'm not entirely sure what I'm meant to be doing.
textByHashes.2c4a3b6375bacd7b0810624a69766085b7188e7a: Thanks Kovac. You're gentle for a giant.
textByHashes.2e28d6f9b9435b8bb3c1305595c512cb24259bc3: So what was it I needed to do at the mould jig?
textByHashes.d88b99075859efc5611fa94396dfb500410c0bf3: Right, the mould is setup and the crucible is full to the brim. We must be ready to pour.
textByHashes.39395556450e96917fe27f677be1adae3d7d14be: The metal's too hot to pick up!
textByHashes.0390a4b255f4a5cb33d8469523b268d251d40f8b: Ah, of course... How do I do that?
textByHashes.aba45fb3f0e7d8bc4c958b75ac7bd4a49c5bb240: I'm not sure what to do next...
textByHashes.80d25dd0b76ad25d07fdf9d237db733f5bc28419: Okay Kovac, I've got this huge burning hot sword. What do I do with it?
textByHashes.07b69cf25f50e1ae966f7f303ccc7d35e75fbfaf: How do I know which tool I need to use?
textByHashes.702dcf4b9c1b4358d41f62e2283ebbbb528ab93c: Alright, I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.bcf0b05b31aab63e814da9cec17598479fec08ed: I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.
textByHashes.81f3175e663982d06d01c1953bad65ca379cf928: Looks like the sword is finished. I should take it to Kovac.
textByHashes.d31bc5cf1031fffa6a0bf31d6990e8233814a75b: I should finish helping Kovac before I try making another sword.
textByHashes.a0b2919d242103b3cef415573a35cbf66ee65c02: Okay Kovac, I think I've finally finished the sword!
textByHashes.d28f7465fe099c1158c20614ae13407f15359f56: Sorry it's not very good. I'm still getting use to everything.
textByHashes.e11888b4cca35ef8161d74f12fcaa6de6f984520: So what do we do with it now?
textByHashes.39eb4ca9604651c07200752b5c18bca9fd818daa: Great! So what do we do with it now?
textByHashes.af67f8a8f6923be82785bfc8e18c8f0301e8814e: Out of curiosity, who is this first blade for?
textByHashes.45e7311bc13e8823c1dde1b640e51ee6b32752f5: Obor? Can't say I've heard of them.
textByHashes.2498e7ca8e28e5441fb3701174b5b0181c09a65b: Obor? He's just going to use it to kill me!
textByHashes.c5888d5432362d109c66df186ae66c93695d9a88: Well, you're not wrong there... I normally just let myself in.
textByHashes.c479a00ab5fa0d6c412ddd703caa696600dbe349: That's a pretty clever marketing plan, I must admit.
textByHashes.e26fd002d5010e7bdf75018caeeff05946f7451e: Oh dear... This is a problem.
textByHashes.6e7e93afd5173ca23d79e72ec5b31c94dea64474: I'm sure this is all just a misunderstanding. Let me try talking to the king.
textByHashes.8b3cd54409ffed9e66976613cdf8cc9624026af2: I'm here to talk about Elena, apparently she's been imprisoned.
textByHashes.399a172fe53af06b12b255f5dde518ade882fe8b: Right... But you and I both know that she's right, the plague is fake.
textByHashes.3d269cea5aab1d213cd962d1330474b64d4ea98b: But King Tyras is dead, what exactly are we risking?
textByHashes.f08c62cc3a97e8ed25fe07cab47960c067156f8e: I see. I guess I should let her father know.
textByHashes.a716684542ac6ec426869aac484788d1a479226b: Sounds lovely. Can I go in?
textByHashes.bb54040a3b28bb21797a4ef7e5d6e72a88a9004c: He won't be freeing her I'm afraid.
textByHashes.328c83369b662fb97ac8f60eb968ba58f4203a12: He said she was a threat to Ardougne.
textByHashes.9ca58f36dc9a6fe2d316973427c8a73d295a5394: Well... She's right. The plague is a lie. That's why the king had her imprisoned. He was afraid she'd expose the truth.
textByHashes.be4703f008dae4f3777c388725e61cefc32531e1: I guess I have some explaining to do.
textByHashes.d13a26c91fe0ccfc6525b52bac27c5e5199efcc7: Well, it all started after I freed Elena from West Ardougne. As you can imagine, she was still keen on helping the plague victims and asked me to help her find a cure.
textByHashes.43770eb764a877b39465762928149f6582bb0055: We sent some samples to her old teacher, Guidor in Varrock. He ran some tests and found out that the plague isn't actually real. I confronted the king on this and he admitted it.
textByHashes.11e4051030b95d13f11f61da82eda62f2c76e14d: The king told me that his brother, King Tyras, was corrupted by the Dark Lord while exploring the lands to the west.
textByHashes.2ef6ea4ad2ef385d3083bbba57935693a7bc1183: As Tyras was the king of West Ardougne, King Lathas decided to cordon the city off to keep the rest of the world safe.
textByHashes.15f81ee5db7ed4c28d280965fc3edc7ac1731929: The plague was the excuse he gave for the quarantine.
textByHashes.b11ecbbae4f0a19186e39f609f4cff66d680a1cc: Well you're right about that. Turns out King Lathas was lying about that as well. But I'll get to that in a minute.
textByHashes.9d3905a52b7c7b9b8d2a328b4f7adada1cdd12b6: After confronting the king, he recruited me and tasked me with helping him stop Tyras. He had me travel through the Underground Pass into the elven forests of Tirannwn.
textByHashes.fe99197744e7968867ded2924be4f16e8003eba6: Well Tirannwn is full of them. In fact, they're currently in the middle of a civil war.
textByHashes.04f28d451807ef689428e7a534a1643d7b8af156: I met with an ally of King Lathas, an elf called Lord Iorwerth. He's the leader of one of the elven factions. With his help, I was successful in assassinating King Tyras.
textByHashes.fbb366e2f6fee84f169348b89912bc3a40b71d7d: With the job done, I returned to Ardougne. However, on my way back, I was intercepted by an elf named Arianwyn, the leader of the rebel elves opposing Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.b2b78b5ca2927b510ecfdf325475b09557832982: He revealed the truth to me, that King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth are in fact the evil ones. Together they intend to summon this Dark Lord.
textByHashes.20812e0417ba4e7f7e2c2aa520db35f7f4182767: From what I can tell, King Lathas hated how his father split the kingdom, giving half to him and half to his brother. He wanted his brother dead from the start.
textByHashes.47d252998608e19ad25b296fcfb309e64c2cb1ee: Not only that, he also wants to reclaim Camelot from King Arthur. I think he's hoping that this Dark Lord will help him.
textByHashes.8f08dbaa16c3af4e03eda092a874e51a650be610: I think he wants to use the Dark Lord to defeat the rebel elves and end the civil war. Apparently, it's been going on for hundreds of years.
textByHashes.f8b066fc1b2f0875ef487dede503a492bb25b3de: Well since I learnt the truth, I've been helping the rebel elves fight back against King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.2eedce00dd519c9fe080a1256c439f2757402764: I recently discovered that Lord Iorwerth believes the secrets to summoning the Dark Lord lie within the Temple of Light beneath Ardougne.
textByHashes.42031db79233ad421d7f5499d9e5483fff11b0c1: The plague was made up to hide their mining operation beneath the city.
textByHashes.1a9fab0ce94119155bdeaa4bf4756a99ffb19c53: All the mourners are actually Iorwerth elves in disguise and the people who they claim have died of the plague are actually getting sent into the mines.
textByHashes.dd19bb4997d0b2b8ed4f5d3cf4635e5637794a14: Do you have something in mind?
textByHashes.ff8f253a7d3ea40381bac9a96f1b8cbab835cc37: How do I get this disguise?
textByHashes.5c5e0d3100d305512c00a9a5fb7b76cc3a8e9f91: It's not a problem. Do you think you could give me a hand with something?
textByHashes.5fbb3f33344740c81342551629ea1171d7cf18c9: I need to make a Knight of Ardougne tabard.
textByHashes.385e692a4d851b45856ab5a169997a4c56d9e0a7: Luckily for us, I have them both right here.
textByHashes.21f89f6a8c19740377816864fa49c46a3c169ad2: Not yet. I'll go and get them.
textByHashes.44b6cbf641b8b23b83a86a60d3191f89bb44f6b5: I mean it's okay I suppose. The constant fear of some random adventurer murdering you and the fact that people are constantly picking your pockets isn't great. But hey ho, at least the benefits are good.
textByHashes.b326eb91f7fac87e0f59fa7efc51ee7fb5a9357c: Anyway, can I go down these stairs?
textByHashes.91c4bb43eeff595a77647da0e8877def14940c06: Of course, my head has never been better.
textByHashes.31b4640282dc4472203408303ef06cda147b4da7: Rescuing you of course. Your father told me you were here.
textByHashes.ce0e00b84716947d91fee662230ee43fb3bb8ec6: So what happened Elena? How did you end up here?
textByHashes.5beb8aca57e9a59d3c0f6ec6579cfc6528216a32: Well I err... I don't really have one.
textByHashes.04e62f28bf6e8e8acce28815fd8ad0be25ef6ba4: To be honest, I usually just make it up as I go along.
textByHashes.fcba72b36b8e6ba5fff3ca06461773075841aba7: But where do we get the sulphuric acid?
textByHashes.3c7f1269a7b26ecd3ac7a0d1f524f7fd63df1147: It's okay Elena, it's me again.
textByHashes.9eaecffb8159fb5ec301d858baea4cfb58d3eb2d: Now what did Elena say it looked like?
textByHashes.a17815da289c827dc57e4b5971e01257e67da0de: Will do. Good luck Elena. I'll see you soon.
textByHashes.fe122d0c76805fbc11e19afa8857669c5886a20e: Good news Edmond, Elena is free.
textByHashes.6ad6bc9fdcf6275692e6eba0457156d023c1ed8b: Thanks Edmond. I'll go and see how she's doing.
textByHashes.a1a373ffecf0ff83b4d7817f2da5dfeb4035caa4: Hi Edmond. Do you know where Elena is?
textByHashes.f65a563f47e37d976f956633a9de21ff9d4cdb28: I heard. Do you know where she is?
textByHashes.fe1e6c143e227a4c0a28ea8798575724a8686762: Hello. Could you remind me where Elena is?
textByHashes.23c237f13c19f55ff4fa2b6671c148a823c6e116: Elena! It's good to see you safe.
textByHashes.5bf32d18657acb903db9f913e2ad0e113943eeb6: Well I couldn't just leave you to rot. I care about you, Elena.
textByHashes.bd61ae7a294b07301c41c21a39b17529138db6ca: It's all in a day's work.
textByHashes.db4092eb84be7a6e4887e383f2aa0c2ce2c0a9ae: So what's going on Elena? Why are all these people here?
textByHashes.149cd06412df47c5452c003efd902639e072e483: I see, when were you planning on telling me?
textByHashes.ca872946e2a2706e9cf6d20e70ca8d74288d6b98: So is this how you ended up in that prison?
textByHashes.d1ec01a240e6225d3c241d71b9a6ae7f7723b429: Well you've clearly been quite busy. I've also made some progress since we last spoke.
textByHashes.79564160cdeff554e9107469564fdea506289dee: The mourners have been searching for a temple under West Ardougne. There's an altar there that they want to use to summon the Dark Lord.
textByHashes.02cbde8f828c44ba7c09e5cc9caefa63e2cd53cb: Don't worry, I restored the safeguards on the temple so they shouldn't be able to get in.
textByHashes.5170b32f555434539f632cc1b8973c7f004eadd0: For now, but we can't rule out King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth finding another way.
textByHashes.a7f8c221c3e65cc9bb53bf3db20776f1b65fd1ef: But you're a councillor, can't you do anything about that?
textByHashes.b6ce958aea588bfb7343f9c15c16ef335ecb3cc4: But the king is a traitor, surely that's enough reason.
textByHashes.b35d7932648d6d716f525e4e2f7294b485c2f663: I see where this is going. If I upset people while dressed as a Knight of Ardougne, they'll blame the king.
textByHashes.553cab09b3be99f1966f9e450813418f69db9505: I agree, this is a dangerous path to follow.
textByHashes.4d3da4b4f060bf4010c0c5902ee119399d8c29ff: It's not good, but it might be our only option.
textByHashes.ff47b7baa93de62699d729492c054e58a23a8268: Who cares, it's for the good of the people.
textByHashes.aa2b7a8bffe70fe83d8fee0de84cc7a5101defb9: What sort of things should I do?
textByHashes.42d3934c7ce62a0629c99a9c4214148becd992a0: Right, I'd better get started then.
textByHashes.ccbde7ec0e06c8844ce3ba6a9d419750746a2fbd: I need to think about this.
textByHashes.b164662d48ad67d4e839e944165f07b770f2cd79: Hey there. Do you have any suggestions for this uprising of ours?
textByHashes.22254664fd8a8d56d7b1bf49b5edbc6ef01c6e3a: Won't people be willing to accept that though if they think it's preventing the plague spreading?
textByHashes.58ef0172994f697067612021be4b3fbca71caa46: Ahh I see, that does make sense. I wonder if I can do something similar in East Ardougne as well.
textByHashes.526fc5994cb6c500c2e4ca7811d23c88cdb86fc6: Hey Jethick, got any ideas on how to increase hatred for the king?
textByHashes.55477aeecb0dbdb9348bc423502220d7fb4e6aec: Good thinking, what's the best way to spread that sort of news?
textByHashes.47d2c0594f037139a743bfa5e5efebdb9a6ce844: Hey, do you two know of any ways I can cause anger at the king?
textByHashes.c5d54b74cb7b1d51a3884481ade2a73afed028fa: People wouldn't like that at all, thanks both.
textByHashes.3517b9cedb716064900efb7121e410c1d9620f54: I'm here to tell you about some new taxes.
textByHashes.80a5642e6152577632fcf20bcffe3f936c4d0362: Fighting the plague isn't cheap, the money needs to come from somewhere.
textByHashes.92f732218df1afdb1ff6807496da14164715f5b9: That's for you to work out. The first payment is to be collected soon.
textByHashes.4f0a270cef5e8ad6de07836c99d5752905588062: I should probably wear my mourner disguise before doing that.
textByHashes.ce2426854a28b050f752a4ee94cde96e5e2547df: Sorry, but we have reason to believe the food is contaminated. This is for the good of everyone.
textByHashes.a27d2d3f6a8433b82aea19359a207bd34ae0536b: I'm just doing my job. You should take it up with the king if you don't like it.
textByHashes.81bb2cf4f586bf41d34875374c0710498fa8ece9: I have some orders from the king for you.
textByHashes.4041b0b851f56c29fb99ed98b5e6dee691e7707b: Yes. The king is concerned about the plague spreading into East Ardougne. He has ordered that all doctors and nurses retrain to ensure they are capable of dealing with the plague.
textByHashes.ddf474f320f7c693d9c5c652360440adb61ba89b: I'm sure the king considered all of that before making his decision.
textByHashes.c5f6150fe6498e39d3474c078676aa4f3e6f787e: We believe the food is contaminated with the plague. This is for your own safety.
textByHashes.ddf21a5dfd69d58be5530089d3d743a3fcf17cfe: The plague isn't easy to contain. New funds are needed to help the effort.
textByHashes.0e4f5fedc581e4db8bf635c5826f5c9daa69131f: Sorry, but the king himself gave the order. The first payment is due soon.
textByHashes.39387587688cf398f9c37d38b80e8618abdcc529: The king has ordered us to burn this food. It could be contaminated with the plague.
textByHashes.24db8243cddeba4df3f25e31be9a5e8faf40d62b: Taxes on all market stalls. The order comes from the king himself.
textByHashes.5c85faf0fda9c7cf9ecc9064f9039020be37ddd1: Probably not, but they'll just have to live with it. These taxes are needed for the good of the city. Someone will come to collect the tax from you soon.
textByHashes.b0b4362c9b6fa2eb04db533fbd1b60f3fd958fc1: The plague isn't cheap to combat. The king has decreed that new taxes be introduced to help with the funding.
textByHashes.62d473ed32f2f6e5d2cee3fe377283c1a49827f6: Better than getting the plague though. Your first payment is due soon, so you'd better be ready.
textByHashes.6e8f95beb62a756e93878d45b1028b311e10e7f6: The king has ordered that new taxes be introduced to help fund the fight against the plague.
textByHashes.15039056633222a23bdc99960950150d32630926: Sorry, it's needed though. The first payment is due soon, make sure you're ready.
textByHashes.9ea7fe4cd6983c012524084ffebeb47e8d2eac1b: The king has called for a tax on luxury items. Your stall is included.
textByHashes.fc1b4ab643ed9962a7739bdbff004ee516263b5c: As you wish, but you'll still need to pay. Your first instalment will be collected soon.
textByHashes.6cf497e1671839cf356c974d0ce6929c274aedf0: The king has called for a tax on luxury items like the ones you sell.
textByHashes.4fb4d3d12de80d4ed3633932e30956f8700df1a7: I'm sure the king has good reason. I will return to collect your first payment soon.
textByHashes.67ee433eac11da9485bf73fd16b05356d29ed784: By order of the king, all market stalls are to be taxed to help fund his new castle market.
textByHashes.270c4a94f58e55550a731d395a8c0500aaeeec8a: Well he's the king so he can do what he wants. Your first payment will be collected soon.
textByHashes.e497f450a02c035463710e1eeaf682baabea68a8: Taxes on all market stalls. It's to help fund a new market at the castle.
textByHashes.5521b339670e5ea35327e1c0666ad95aaeff5829: Because it's the law, refusing to pay is treason. Your first payment is due soon, so I suggest you prepare for it.
textByHashes.dbb4403401f17e14b98741672c93e74f0f338296: Could you help me tell people about some new taxes?
textByHashes.ca979f876d413096c210fcccb3662ca3a0dd680c: I know, it's the king's orders though. The castle is in need of repairs and more funds are required.
textByHashes.f5eeaa8dc0c0f654abd62d1d4895bc50fac05f44: These are new ones. They are to help pay for the king's upcoming visit to Great Kourend.
textByHashes.417d7e1fa5513b6836d613ecc52d8b274a8e9283: It's an important diplomatic trip I'm afraid so it has to go ahead. The first payment will be collected soon.
textByHashes.998816ab7d2c0910fa09d41f9c09d63a328618ac: These taxes are not included in that agreement. They're new emergency taxes related to the plague.
textByHashes.e11826adbec0de760c539c7b33ed2559c63de5f2: You can do that, but while you're in Ardougne you must pay the tax. The first payment will be due soon.
textByHashes.e7c0d87cb091b5a5bfecf4ce7adfa108649195b6: The king has ordered some new taxes to help fund his extensive collection of gnomish ornaments. Everyone has to contribute.
textByHashes.9dadb12bcc4f06a3933b2f6b824c0ee755688708: The law has already been passed so it's not up for debate. Your first payment is expected soon.
textByHashes.232a503896e2ab878a427509ab0c5e860f7f0e24: The castle is in dire need of repairs, the taxes are to help fund that. They've been ordered by the king himself.
textByHashes.d94591f611e24738c9595fd4a12a3293a39beaf5: Sorry, but rules are rules. The first payment is due soon so make sure you're ready.
textByHashes.d5b428d41f234a38ccaea1f00cb342e531f56566: More funding is needed to hold back the plague. The church needs to help as well.
textByHashes.3483a7abd6d9e54bd9995826ed9cb4ff168627d0: Sorry, but the king has given the order. The first payment is due soon.
textByHashes.8eca3313b40b5ba0cfe769b9422db8a4ca85637d: The king is concerned about the plague spreading. He has ordered that all doctors and nurses in the city retrain to ensure they are capable of dealing with the plague.
textByHashes.c0ec014bca18cb7df6914a21a560d22dbda4e773: Well the king's word is law so there's little point arguing.
textByHashes.d457ccc567914ab2850416c45d20a35f15506ea8: By order of the king, all establishments such as this must now pay an extra beer tax.
textByHashes.81b630b79c8981e401bbe52c2257211415047962: It's also plain disrespect to defy the king's laws so you'd better be ready to pay up. We'll be back to collect soon.
textByHashes.4ff2e5e5f32453f41c7dcc145226b47c6c201738: The king has ordered an increase in taxes on all farms in the area. It's due to a lack of care when it comes to the plague.
textByHashes.13cfb49fe83b2bc1582ca9d990621757b608e987: Sorry, it's the word of the king so you'll have to pay up. The first instalment will be collected soon.
textByHashes.61f52d573b9dab4edf56179b01b354151f43e145: Yes, they've been ordered by the king to help him buy a new throne.
textByHashes.f06149ae5c7a92b5f08b36f9661aa11b22ff993e: On second thoughts... forget I said anything.
textByHashes.d789bf06390e46503afc189885bc2f44e5f15e4d: That should be enough people recruited, I'd better go and let Elena know.
textByHashes.69bd8c972043988797d44a67d917def6f5766eb4: Are you sure you're okay with this Elena?
textByHashes.9cb6dc38d7c3f33870e1b1c34111829799ab9631: A bit of blood doesn't scare me.
textByHashes.062c764d90deee570d849a1be5e550c0aad4db30: So let me guess, that's exactly what we're going to do?
textByHashes.42afb63e768cce877a494a964c640859b795312d: Even if they're not prepared, the castle will still be well defended.
textByHashes.808d26374f81a507aa590284c714d2bc0b4ec778: Why were you helping Lord Iorwerth?
textByHashes.7b3417bfd1859be24380673df309cabf945176b0: Did you know what the mourners were doing?
textByHashes.683f5cd29c8c3c556ebc15db1ea5f7326505df61: So you knowingly allied with a group of Zamorakians?
textByHashes.d42ac6e978c965b846753777c1f4120d2ac499ae: Why did you kill your brother?
textByHashes.dbc64f226324fab809a33ec60fe6e99c868f75a7: We're done here, take him away.
textByHashes.6afb622b56728be0d2d37359818d5d0d391fc41e: Well I'm glad to have disappointed you. I don't work with murderers.
textByHashes.d7ca4f5f8b888b59bbd76cc14ad954aac658dadd: Maybe, but you conveniently missed out the part about you trying to summon the Dark Lord.
textByHashes.1c86a8a2bf7b0b2226a04481b53914bb5b685461: Thanks Arianwyn, I definitely needed it. And thank you for saving us back there, I don't know what we'd have done if you hadn't shown up.
textByHashes.ea74dc96f59a395c4ccae7de9696ba8fd4b3f323: People were dying Arianwyn, we couldn't do nothing.
textByHashes.a079f42e1d8d6010c792d6ec21a59e504a90e8ab: You can say that again. What do you think he meant by it all?
textByHashes.6b6ea258ab0af95bce44f67a3e934c0f10bb6fcd: Arianwyn has called a meeting. He asked me to come fetch you.
textByHashes.6e8a8e4bb9d29a723c75fb8bd6f476c108b49feb: It wasn't an order, it was just...
textByHashes.0947dd35cf983f249916e6d027e81a34444ac21a: I don't know what you mean...
textByHashes.3b737ac32b36613b48325164b4c150a3c23a34c7: Fine. Before you go, do you know where Elena is?
textByHashes.7b96e9e791fd9583a9571aedcb2a58af4b249fc7: So how are you doing, Elena?
textByHashes.ca869ae121e084da5d66073f1f31bf1a54b0b49b: It is. I'm here for you if you need me though.
textByHashes.5d6e007672e2259a8105de78064d2c2c95154b12: Well I'm not like other people.
textByHashes.cd841697ef52bff2ae0aea6543428c738151fd90: Well a reward's always nice, but yes.
textByHashes.fe05bf0e092aa9601d4db318e1aaf84c910139e4: Actually, I think I'd want a reward.
textByHashes.f53054451365c3fd4f4fa5d2b9687671f8d648ad: Arianwyn has called a meeting. He'd like you to attend.
textByHashes.9b3e677bbe2784aa8d256ee85f166e0cc34d8909: People reward me for helping them.
textByHashes.5b943a5e93b6ad03520259e702d3cebbd0df3dae: Yes, the reward is what matters.
textByHashes.7306887ea7e54880577b1682fffb71284c08dca3: Actually, I think I'd still help.
textByHashes.8b40397a48aa7ffc067eab429c71a9c14b3732ce: I need to fix my mistakes.
textByHashes.e2912997655ee383c8c4a474eccf816f08bc17b9: No, I don't think I would.
textByHashes.37e06aa4fe5486ff2d72ca52fd8ff138062505a5: It's my duty to help people.
textByHashes.f6c33469856699af5e84639d7c6c63175f983fd8: Hey, I wanted to ask you...
textByHashes.1bc86cd029eca5740681157e3ef82504e11db2e8: And Lord Iorwerth managed to break one of these seals.
textByHashes.0b8a4c7027f96df14949ef66a0164ac7d0650d84: Baxtorian was king of the elves back then. Do you think he had access to the forbidden knowledge?
textByHashes.34d6fb297bfb5f94e940e2f70e80117f9c1bc70a: You mean Ysgawyn? He is a bit rude.
textByHashes.24212da37dfb9f8b3803987a6d2ffd041e2e024e: I've met Essyllt, he was the one in charge of the mourners in West Ardougne.
textByHashes.ca36524a3c39e65c2efab6cd3a3c1126828d5487: Makes sense, will you be okay getting there on your own?
textByHashes.38603423ed861591cd7bc93fb3ac7f0964860722: Well in that case, I'll meet you there.
textByHashes.16d9f650fcc01411ba4735d9472beb776bcbf6d5: Bit of an angry guy isn't he?
textByHashes.5e23f6a7f73d2b3fb59c6054e2a0ff471ce393af: I find most races are the same to be honest.
textByHashes.ca15294608aef0ad5f501246040daf2f53c711b1: I'm sorry to hear that Arianwyn.
textByHashes.3b68285372cfd121c249661201f2c67eb8d75b02: Do you believe what Lord Iorwerth said about Seren?
textByHashes.052a10152145bc6a49c17ed7451839927c0f157d: You wish you could have met her?
textByHashes.9e4de1d4435f2073e482d02b1e918fa5d5c3fc58: Do you think we'll find anything to help us here?
textByHashes.30126e5571e17ff09b21915edf86008b5e0f59d4: I'd like to ask you something about yourself.
textByHashes.4b7c7a7bd95822865c6628b17be8c6dad78e7567: Why did you seal yourself away?
textByHashes.798104149258693d067532a67763dd79cd957bf4: What happened between you and Lord Iorwerth?
textByHashes.189e84fe2d35ef89d8a9243e647e451b4745668f: I wish I could have met her.
textByHashes.f872ef984bb019111127529f6a6e287dcc0aab1b: Sounds like she was pretty much perfect.
textByHashes.603792a0e3bf9171a45fd609996eefd0d82be382: What do you think of the current elves?
textByHashes.3ca54b4bafa57143b5988d252be2897e65c2f7af: Thanks. Anything exciting happen while I was gone?
textByHashes.c4ebc66756068e7a53e49bafc8bc7b9e751d3b37: Hmm. And you think Baxtorian is like this broken man?
textByHashes.c1696d555e44a549118e6b4ae539fb0951cc55f0: Now's not the time for stories, Elena.
textByHashes.8672595d97c5bb8dea142ff381aec846c9b1905b: Maybe he's not totally lost. He still has Islwyn, and we can still turn this war around.
textByHashes.e25c6c1614d95d3abd0ec26f5fb7c8460ce45fa6: I already have the seed here.
textByHashes.32e86a1dee5f7a6890c15baa23b416ae8faf347c: Will do, I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.8a67f88e23be3f7e77f6e19defc0c11569c18f1b: We've planted the herb we need, now we have to wait for it to grow. Is there something I can do in the meantime?
textByHashes.e02e44137a528b2e0502f26b1847bb461dea9f56: So how do we get past them?
textByHashes.545f5411134faa2bcbaba5414b790191cdf475ac: I see. And where do we find a true master of the magical arts?
textByHashes.fa92a18f58d99b19acb47886e0c9bd25c30c8d76: And where do we find him?
textByHashes.7ce01a95e17c48f78d3d84904427a8e3aab97f41: How do I find Lord Amlodd?
textByHashes.671d8ebc83ffa5cc04362044a6a67f71b3cdb244: I see, anything else I should know?
textByHashes.2020650924f004db091b173c9e011d88f9b2e58d: How do I find Lady Trahaearn?
textByHashes.6b3e3651f982d985353fe96d45f4b114d64fb2f2: I have a seed from Baxtorian that I think needs enchanting.
textByHashes.d2cf97fd9b2d36aa049e3a76a47ea628661acbfd: Thanks for the warning, see you later.
textByHashes.fb42ce5eaadcdefdc8335ef315b8b598fdd959bf: It's the least I can do. I'll see you later.
textByHashes.1fadfeae22d1d9f86b90171e583f38b60ff7bcd9: Baxtorian sent me. He gave me a crystal that belonged to Lord Amlodd. It brought me here, to you.
textByHashes.044804a340138c97de0c6c7eeb8d59ff488502c8: The village of Lletya, in the forest of Isafdar.
textByHashes.369900c3e6e87a245654362eaba2e42a01079839: They've done well to keep up the fight for this long.
textByHashes.04fb63aa5622fdbf37f93ac80a67382b1d76c37e: Baxtorian sent me. We need your help in the fight against Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.8897b445be92d52a71142eebd394602e49e00353: He's in the elven village of Lletya, south of here.
textByHashes.85f957f361d088faf27595f3b47b26345fd0aebc: How can you be annoyed if you're dead?
textByHashes.1c65c5838ee831b9744b5d43c8ec5e5812cf2904: Good idea, I'll go see Elena.
textByHashes.b3af88b2eefeb11dcbc8c7e0c77755c704bf598b: So what else do we need for the potion?
textByHashes.e909ceee2faa2a879bafb807fc6d8aede2b649dd: Right, I'll go see if I can get some crystal dust.
textByHashes.7f3a63dff36f2a374ec0fb2335e32b10ef776173: Hey Elena, what do I need to do again?
textByHashes.7522df4a4e3f952dd41ba758c895e3a3ac0f8b71: I need some crystal dust for this potion I'm making.
textByHashes.909802f036223957309818c23886c422b0e73306: I'm working on getting that potion made. I need some crystal dust for it though.
textByHashes.bf619e39ce270308f4e6b188154d382d76540b31: Hey Elena, I've finished the potion.
textByHashes.46776d8857fad8f30732c3312b825c247b7f88e2: I should probably take this to Arianwyn and Baxtorian rather than drinking it.
textByHashes.90efcdd3787b03d40a86a2bd368971fdac55e043: What do I need to do once I arrive?
textByHashes.3f420a92d97ac45d719c63c9b683b81f66d4fd7a: Do you have any idea how to break the seals?
textByHashes.db943b8a3a865976c2322c3fe56ced3380af9059: That doesn't give me a lot to go on.
textByHashes.e3d6a774534be755d5ceeea6b1d9307a5d2d3465: Let me go and prepare first.
textByHashes.1c0b91e29a3b69a0b5ea9f1bdb5415c281496206: I seek that knowledge, to help in the fight against Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.6b83f358e8fc1949850195139395601ac1a7bba5: So you'll give me the knowledge?
textByHashes.0c7a71f4b0190a845dc0fcc878a67c389a0931ed: So Lord Iorwerth spoke the truth. A part of Seren lives within the Temple of Light. But why?
textByHashes.6f6f67b498845884c42eecc8c633193de152ff30: So Seren split off a fragment of herself, hoping it would help fix her mistakes. That's what lives within the Temple of Light, that's what Lord Iorwerth is trying to summon.
textByHashes.a1555cae7919fe87c3b3c23235834af10af01ecd: I should return to Lletya and let the others know what I've discovered.
textByHashes.1cb282b2fdb595f27c9be656d19d94717ac540bc: Can you take me somewhere else?
textByHashes.3f360be0e1dc42bf881fb091888a37f2cdd51b3d: I did. I think we should call the others.
textByHashes.487e75f5ad44966a61e2a0d7582b3686020776e9: I entered the library and found the seal broken by Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.7e4e171c01c7582ff1c7146cb9f8b5c909029031: Yes, it contained a memory, left behind by Seren herself.
textByHashes.9e69461069269aa86f47b4cc46358a05dbec0f2a: It was only part of something larger though. I had to break the other eight seals to uncover the rest of it.
textByHashes.75f7b2a017af8fbecab147260ef9bc0548ebb9b4: That's where it gets interesting... The memory spoke of a curse on the elves, a curse that Seren was desperately trying to break.
textByHashes.15384987b6def9d620a1cb6eef5f1ba9363cf298: A curse binding the elves to Seren. As long as she remained close, it was unnoticeable, but if she went too far... pain, and death.
textByHashes.0877df70a591418cab5dfdeeb26ed572724c66e6: That's the thing... It was Seren herself.
textByHashes.5f48938de825d8d8f4cdaf6407fd8a8df4288e14: She didn't mean to do it, she was trying to help. She was using her own essence to try and extend your lifespans, it just went wrong...
textByHashes.a1d4523cd7c06b81638b7bc01528bd2e6a83942c: Seren went to great lengths to undo the curse. She believed that she could nullify it by creating a being of darkness, one to counter her light essence.
textByHashes.f560095e2d8fda02bfcd9b1f07ff40a5bbcbb429: Lord Iorwerth spoke the truth. She created a fragment of herself, filled with darkness, hoping to use it to break the curse. It didn't work though, so she sealed it in the Temple of Light.
textByHashes.a3b4debb473b384b039fea71635b5f4407db42ef: There's one other thing. Seren built a second set of defences within the Temple of Light, this fragment of her is sealed within them. There's an orb that can bypass these defences.
textByHashes.8799f0cf7d15599f2bcde261a26b3c9a4d4fbbb3: Yes, apparently she hid it somewhere called Gorlah.
textByHashes.2f0ee569c2b86ef4efa9a1d282844d9601e2b195: So what do we do now?
textByHashes.f2e35e3e1245e4e7cf524d5eaa618b80b36af39c: Do you think Arianwyn will be okay?
textByHashes.bb133448a5b9479cfaa67270a87469aac6a6ae5c: You seem to be dealing with it okay.
textByHashes.f02ddf6b7490fc4be1b835c41fb7892fe9f02357: Arianwyn seems to think you're capable.
textByHashes.32cf96f858ed3a2d03da35f2c4f3ccca3564d63c: Do we know what that is anymore?
textByHashes.ea49b0841022b6721b168c99485f30e7e2c16b24: What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.e08fdaf2ccf26c3ccc3a4ac4ea5716588ce25915: How do I find Lord Crwys?
textByHashes.b2d2769b556c03f119274d21865f0caafe9dd385: How do I find Lady Hefin?
textByHashes.8871aec72a39a904a0a87edabb55a76be074e804: Yes. You must be Lord Crwys, Baxtorian sent me to find you. We need your help.
textByHashes.b5c9037d4812ce1456b444f501c0ec9da630d9ee: The village of Lletya. It's east of here.
textByHashes.dba57200dd8344de631743e76e63209be6809a26: Maybe the tree was your true form and this is just your disguise.
textByHashes.dd7a1e2a6d8b6d7b561e955072a990e20b1946d6: Don't be so sure. I got here by following a clue, a clue left behind by Lady Hefin. I seek her on behalf of Baxtorian himself.
textByHashes.434e6e192d7805f377b4c24fbba441f0c00fc46f: The village of Lletya, north of here.
textByHashes.f7db8c289234ba2224afad32bf561c726c07961b: Do you think we can overcome it.
textByHashes.7d82711f5a74fb7e4b240ac6b7e69ecd1502a79e: No problem. Any news from Ysgawyn?
textByHashes.c9d8c21974d6e7779fc01f59f22a087530df26e1: So do you believe me now?
textByHashes.86972430bd41d95d21ee9906f05a253b3372888e: There is another way into the temple though, a tunnel from the Underground Pass, built by the dwarves there.
textByHashes.b025bcb394cb910bffaa95d4c068d542f4487b1e: I've managed to recover the orb.
textByHashes.65de2084d144ed5ebfe5828c6a55f6fe750c44e3: There must be something we can do.
textByHashes.3703437de2c4736b5583ac2c510aa388a9b991df: Perhaps we should call the others then.
textByHashes.b6b94b7988858d5e34e399002b3dc64b51b088ed: You don't think he'd join with Lord Iorwerth do you?
textByHashes.cf8c0367b9dd79167a78437801be0306b027216a: And you want me to investigate?
textByHashes.b309b664a62a7679d91a62c5ca48e0719dc14716: Any idea where he might have gone?
textByHashes.ef265c19283ebf1a32a70975e3431e0cd9cff30c: I'm surprised it hasn't made you run for the hills.
textByHashes.ff6fe270458fc2e38e8a801e4280648f0e6a069e: Why are you still here though?
textByHashes.b5a1fe34f3629e67a6df5b67704570b808ee94c2: He seems to think his actions are necessary.
textByHashes.a1ca0a451e0a064db6575e218e83b8e49cd182f8: What do you think should happen to him if we win?
textByHashes.3ea677a6217f46c41b57911e9517833091d79644: I don't think it makes you weak, it makes you strong.
textByHashes.60d7144f6c493e46d3f057161644604db26a278f: He needs to pay for what he's done though.
textByHashes.70c290b7ffc2f14ddef2c6c80431708c76e8a5e3: Sometimes people have to die for things to change.
textByHashes.16f702dc9cabd36cf172d7037079362a8e0bc975: Yes. I wanted to ask you about Ysgawyn.
textByHashes.70cbb133478ab3715a32bbb02a3ec8ac52b325a1: That's fair. Anyway, I wanted to ask you about Ysgawyn.
textByHashes.08d7dead690c521e949196e031706d8d4e97a353: Very true. Anyway, I'll see you later.
textByHashes.a832fbc8e7761ff6cc724374e8e433c72af2c318: Yes. I'm trying to find him. Baxtorian said you saw him leaving the village earlier.
textByHashes.630aefcc0c23b3647bb7c41fcd93abe0907618d5: Well well! Meeting with the Iorwerth clan, Ysgawyn? This doesn't look good for you!
textByHashes.eabb0614b3e19973dc623f146707fcdfa966073d: Keeping an eye on you, you traitor!
textByHashes.3a6f5f00ceebd18c774ec9f4421089c50f47bc5d: Well that's what it looks like!
textByHashes.67f7d126518e103368283c848dde9b0156a74856: But... I don't understand. If you've always been loyal, why all the secrecy?
textByHashes.3e7a2d659f4c65817442481bd90c395d5ec38609: I... I see... I guess that all makes sense.
textByHashes.505e9eb430b9d3b7fa94bf075ae4925a5bf9f9fe: Arianwyn told me what they did. I...
textByHashes.426a322c54b62a5f6f7c9975d28ad84bf3046a3c: So what have you been discussing?
textByHashes.e1ef86a631d46eec372d805f3d8c82d30ec69b0b: Hang on... If the traitor was one of the rebels, they'll also have told Lord Iorwerth about the tunnel into the Temple of Light!
textByHashes.6785a608cc1bcf6bd41b45d1a39a8f23c12ab9aa: You have to be brave. Your mother is outside waiting for you.
textByHashes.6df53633313cbcfcc1585e6f35209aeb39d2a862: She's outside, can you get to her?
textByHashes.6dce430e6d050946b8a9a4738db0b6924320e32a: Don't worry, you can do this!
textByHashes.96e3fe89015e2e7c2a3a9b4e63eaadc5fa4d212f: Whatever it is he's trying to free... it isn't her.
textByHashes.4628667da82e8049a24baff9fc100f4fde9c0f7d: So that's why you turned to Lord Iorwerth? To find out the truth?
textByHashes.9b8a35c71dcef253ebadb68fd596b1a837c2011b: And if she is alive? Then what?
textByHashes.7948d77f2521776d19195c6a0f2f5817bef30973: Peace? Look around you Arianwyn. Look at what Lord Iorwerth has done to this village, your home. Does this look like the work of someone who wants peace?
textByHashes.f4a5899820d266d750035fc700d8acd235210b6b: It doesn't have to be this way. Step aside. Let me stop Lord Iorwerth and reclaim the orb. Once he's dealt with, we can find out the truth, our way.
textByHashes.ce697e6f9735ebd6da52350384f18b9ed0bb20bc: I can't let him get away.
textByHashes.edcb064142be936e4c883099e319abbd0c4949ce: Maybe you did fail your people, you didn't destroy them though.
textByHashes.01300a49cb0d9b9818963eecd7d9a2b91e76d3a5: You think this is over? Is that it? Lord Iorwerth beats us once so we just give up? If you truly think that then yes, you have destroyed your people!
textByHashes.b24f2a6779490fa9f529b23e9901bad738549ffb: Do you want to just rot here? Wallowing in your own self pity while you lose the little you still have?
textByHashes.3bda464b08fa469d10a13f62901981dcedbfd3a6: We can fight! Lord Iorwerth doesn't win until he gets into the Temple of Light! We can still stop this!
textByHashes.3612ea1dc8004ff4d4696ad462ac4f1b22c6ebcc: Surely it's better to die trying than to live a life of regret? I'd have thought you'd know that better than anyone.
textByHashes.164522aed7dd1845302652d35c2daf8b84d91508: Oh for crying out loud! You have got to be the biggest waste of space I have ever met! I've met goblins with more of a spine than you! For once in your miserable life why don't you actually do something worthwhile?
textByHashes.ec6c69f9f120388110a976923224e7322120eb7e: It wasn't meant to be a pep talk!
textByHashes.26a03b2253ef01fccf65f7fe3826c024313d0e35: [sigh] Look... Ask yourself this... What would she want?
textByHashes.9b4d813a6370c279779d10fc8cf5eb1ea8a59b54: Then why are we still stood around talking? We've got work to do!
textByHashes.87511452fae8c1c08872c1bdbe6202391eea8665: Lord Iorwerth only has one way into the Temple of Light, the dwarf tunnel from the Underground Pass. We need to stop him getting through.
textByHashes.9a544112bf8878166073b58caaaced48f14582f5: The dwarves should be able to seal the tunnel. We'll need to defend them while they do.
textByHashes.f2c52a07982b3c2607f1db2deb7bfc0d3c03da9c: We have the clan elders, their combined power is an army in itself.
textByHashes.864bbb163a49b241b202316c4bf7f3182e700b74: Well have you deciphered their clues?
textByHashes.2ed981225d75a1a6dc49e10188544a2ba1a9ee4c: That's not good. Did she have any descendants?
textByHashes.d7167e1c613556e99c987dc2b4fd238fcc1e5356: For years? So she'd have been ill when she gave you her clue. If she knew she was dying, maybe her clue reflects that.
textByHashes.1c0cf7159bc0b22fdbcd5ba8a289ca34d2635df3: Knowledge can be passed on. Maybe the clue will lead us to her knowledge.
textByHashes.070198322a384ffb1fecfe86eee97f3ed8e3b552: It's worth a shot at least. Leave it with me and I'll see what I can do. In the meantime, you should take the others to the dwarf camp in the Underground Pass.
textByHashes.69fc8ccaff36924b59f4d03a6773d92f8632f2ce: See if you can get in contact with General Hining and the new king of Ardougne as well. Maybe they'll be willing to help us.
textByHashes.098183adbe76a2c210db9d1cbe2d93747e575a0e: No, but you don't have to stay here.
textByHashes.a6505c7bf42207514eaa1f1ceb6690b96bb80dc0: So why follow him in the first place?
textByHashes.92dfad71012c0f7bc958115468ae59a888b69fb9: I suppose you're right. Anyway, I'd better get going.
textByHashes.6f713a04acb8ad53dc6fcbaa3b3d43ebce9ab7dd: Hey Elena. What are you up to?
textByHashes.524475139633a01d35e4a2b26e96bf56e5063ec4: Very true. I'll leave you to prepare.
textByHashes.0a3ebf5a9d28c3109e273d527d04b5267b1c9253: You're the closest living relative of Lady Ithell. Now you have her knowledge as well. I suppose that makes you the new Lady Ithell.
textByHashes.3f4415363e45d5d77ca42cef051053ee0693c815: We need your help. The final fight against Lord Iorwerth is nearly here.
textByHashes.2130a886de563b44ffb883df1f53ed940f5e3b4f: The battle will take place in the Underground Pass. Head to Lletya first though, Baxtorian will meet you there.
textByHashes.da7d5e6c9562c88b05f475bb3430aa24f03a2856: Then I shall meet you there.
textByHashes.97dc32bb2855699335be35d7420e49561f998a86: What will you do if he does?
textByHashes.57ba1ecfb8e1e781b632bc2954d48ab940516c83: If I get the chance, I'll make sure he gets it.
textByHashes.de21af5244a8cbe7d1dcc0580bed283c7445ad35: They were once, but not anymore. You're one of us now.
textByHashes.4e9510b2a2fe0f07d53a636bd2cb0c85faf2fb82: So why did you betray him?
textByHashes.5f4d6e7a66eb613a4c29c6edb00c05c63d8ea86e: Are you sure you should be drinking? We can't afford to make mistakes here.
textByHashes.745e08be98bb01119c3754b57cbfcd5d37a5b774: They're lucky to have you as well, you're our last hope.
textByHashes.74d15c9a4f05130b9effa2f53f56257cb159bdab: Well that would definitely stop Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.b342cf361bd48ddd7f0d9ea38a9a37b05d1a2df9: True that. I'll leave you to your work.
textByHashes.d70697dec902c1f7d5d1d8db36bc501b94c59844: You'll be fine, you've got all of us to defend you.
textByHashes.80a3b14d8afeec35dadf087e0dcf1a63b6fcdf23: You knew this day would come?
textByHashes.ca1bbe6f4d87a5c362c21559219890e986eaf6e1: Do you think the fragment of Seren is the cause of the darkness?
textByHashes.a8fc6409f87c650e611d1d02dba60fb87fb2c885: I've never really been one for looking backwards. I prefer to look ahead.
textByHashes.fbe7ffba329ee401f262e1a6ad2cc05b014747e7: I suppose. I'll probably wait until we've won to think about that though.
textByHashes.3d04025bcdeb30fd2c453617e8b8efab0e4b539e: I bet. I'd also like to avoid death if possible. I suspect it's not very fun.
textByHashes.d25af34893b31915cab02ff9ce78f8e02c10b608: I guess. I'd rather avoid it if I can though.
textByHashes.3c0deb5afad8dbfe0dc7be92c6f67c566f96f87c: You seem well prepared for the battle, compared to the rest of us at least.
textByHashes.a274aa9dce00d62deab881063f9d32250029c713: That I did. I see you managed to gather some allies.
textByHashes.acb669101bd3ba41642bd04109cb34f95a2671cc: Typical, after all we did for them.
textByHashes.df8429ccd88c579becea33d72007828b27392be6: Hmmm. How are the defences looking?
textByHashes.840d759555fb912c056f39c742d56efaeed8ef15: Good. We may be outnumbered, but the defences will give us a fighting chance.
textByHashes.d7b353a818a831f7df055def57a7cfd7e7765870: We don't need to win, we just need to buy the dwarves enough time to seal that tunnel. Do we know how long they'll need?
textByHashes.8daeeaa031ea4673215b2fc4354ba67207da3a1a: Well I suppose we don't want them to do it wrong, they could bring the entire cavern down on top of us. Do we know where Lord Iorwerth is?
textByHashes.965c227c7f877867ceea74a0ee74fd6bcdfa1fa2: Let's use the time wisely then. Is there anything I can do before the attack begins?
textByHashes.dd6fab664722abfaa4fbc741686d5bcb268b7ad0: You matter to me as well.
textByHashes.90a07c54a36ffe3646ffc685b0a8dfccdab824df: I care about you Elena, you know that right?
textByHashes.b0a0a02d984621f3669c4023e35c3bd6ae8332ba: I... I don't know what to say either.
textByHashes.0ea6440d4f6b2db7e801e617eb3a8beb9e0581bd: Baxtorian said you had an idea to help our defence.
textByHashes.1c374361ea6b5cd9caa72c9e335c44c0721c8d60: Ah yes, I've made good use of it in the past.
textByHashes.765063dd4c761b9294b3c1f4f9ff7a5dbf028648: Hmmm, that could work quite well. Is there anything I can do to help?
textByHashes.a72e322d2e2c526c017c2617555396d528c582d1: That's the last of them. I'd better get back to Baxtorian.
textByHashes.d814556a5498aa6d510b39976cf3bcfdf8af6d7d: He wants to meet? Surely it's a trap?
textByHashes.d86bddb4a0025b3baa6f4ee6c0921d44efcb4789: So what are you going to do?
textByHashes.1cb240ff0815b706bb33baa888b8f9b1ca20aeb6: You think Lord Iorwerth will listen to me?
textByHashes.0867b8b3296656ce777d4ce8c42e3b4d2eb8e3d4: I see. Then I will join you.
textByHashes.4768b6e1bbde9a5b0878d9079bc3389e6389b837: We came to put an end to this. To put aside our differences and stop this war before more people die needlessly.
textByHashes.dffb61e8c5256804dd9e6e759c3669ca91fd8ba0: You have a fair share of blood on your hands as well you know.
textByHashes.5b34ca88db75630b4cb072b36395a1dab7cc9c41: If you're not willing to change your mind, why even bother to meet us?
textByHashes.5c4c3a09c8ec70c12fac60bcf80125274051df29: That temple, it doesn't contain your goddess. At best, it contains a shadow of what she once was.
textByHashes.9dffc7f4011070ae36503a914af79240c2e89546: Why shouldn't he doubt that? You burnt his home, you killed his friends. You haven't given him much reason to trust you so far.
textByHashes.d612a080d29ba6547f596dec4511404bfb4b9e17: Listen to him Arianwyn, he'd sacrifice everything and everyone just to free whatever is in that temple. Is that really what you want?
textByHashes.8c107e8dd120896e65f7d113badd456830ebbba2: What's going on? Why's everything so dark?
textByHashes.78b4e89598dda773d4cf3a25329b1446d2b49bfb: A lot more might have died if you hadn't stopped Lord Iorwerth.
textByHashes.4c7c6301cb1122044884ef2e748e524376a7f355: She wasn't Seren, and she never would have been.
textByHashes.95e69682510b504c184a3079f991d67553ad60aa: Hey, good to see you both.
textByHashes.36e428d17340d76168634e9f056332587dccb059: I thought the city had been restored, I don't see anything though.
textByHashes.fe95568e9a5f14e560d7c92350f7f3806f4b5dea: Well I'll be sure to come and visit.
textByHashes.23082572d84c30b2085d237ffae3b955cf7f1bd0: Now that the city has been reformed, are you going to become king of the elves again?
textByHashes.39a2251a4d61dc3646da311a6bd62d66c75c612a: I am an adventurer in search of quests.
textByHashes.6bdc3e99365137745703c49fecb1c1d9cf509014: A curse? What sort of curse?
textByHashes.d5ce532d4336cbab137daf4bf4a6f3ead6e328e7: So what do you do for water now?
textByHashes.a5bffae7943935324d2953b11e8e026c7828f337: Any idea how you got this curse?
textByHashes.e9b24a16bbb69e868963ad1de21a4c8800d062be: Ok I will have a look around and see what I can do.
textByHashes.04cd67e1cb1a7ad1e4f4998d5a957cb9bfd1268b: I'm sorry to hear of your plight, but I must be going.
textByHashes.6369823c1cde3671fd25be1f33f41d270698d3ea: I'm passing through on my way to Menaphos.
textByHashes.0521240ba95d11bcd84386ed496bd205e2eb9707: Thanks for the warning, but I might go and investigate anyway.
textByHashes.b0d4502a7fa5892242d876acf67aa86bcc188e2a: What was I meant to do again?
textByHashes.c74d51f86f28f9825ebf3d4110a56014a0e14d98: I haven't really had the time to investigate.
textByHashes.56fee16334caa780427e9f2f8ffcd98ffffc4b96: I am trying to find out the cause of this town's curse.
textByHashes.9aaec9a9a6de2d1da4c146396e16bde407199857: So would it be possible for me to find these spirits and ask them what is going on?
textByHashes.672037ed7fa294a7d0e8f04ce7696bb2408c6f40: Thank you very much for your help.
textByHashes.65c80595ffc358117fbc9c8599e0326b55d09f4f: Well I hope things pick up for you.
textByHashes.1348905767dfecdde0ac4c4aba8e3bd72964faa7: Why, what have they been up to?
textByHashes.8f1272d32c37207b4eab06e4cdcde1af7757d4a8: Ok calm down, I'm not going to touch anything.
textByHashes.3b200033ea9c897d4bfe17534fe04e850bd76a53: What do you mean by She?
textByHashes.5e7961aed732f55be1d6c7a309ce06ec612e4804: Errm you still haven't told me what you mean by She.
textByHashes.31f7b7aa52e7ab446e46dd59d2f9f8285ad5e7ea: That all sounds very confusing, I might just call her Elidinis for short.
textByHashes.f61cb881d7131f15482807b9b0be95548ce32cc3: What is that key on display?
textByHashes.b503a724a43fd2cd069cad9b20670a22dc18fe3d: ..I just wanted to know what it did.
textByHashes.36c8082a1024c611440815852dd26eb266676dd0: Would you happen to know anything about the curse?
textByHashes.6751d2e29b81c8af15faceec426fd81b3014dba1: It does seem to be slightly exploiting their unfortunate situation.
textByHashes.e52cfa6f956e435db439cffe07d2cb834d167ebf: Hi, I am trying to find the cause of the curse on your town.
textByHashes.6df76f29814b2eb3ac68ec53af13bbaf1bbaf6b1: Don't you know? The curse that has stopped your fountain working and made all the water dry up when you bring it back from the river?
textByHashes.8063e1e3f792f5bd9926cbd004582d35faae12c5: So any ideas about the cause of the curse?
textByHashes.66cec952b1a7b80a54214452ca5405742bb4976d: I heard the people of Nardah threw their statue of Elidinis away.
textByHashes.996b0ea998c72b5ef1d4eafff749e92d1413edcd: I've found out that action seems to have caused this town's curse.
textByHashes.cc44e8ccaffa3f43f6bec5c511d98dd7615877f0: That's odd. I wonder what I can have forgotten.
textByHashes.0f48661ce9ff104031bf49a53dd5189c31683212: Wow how do you finish each others sentences like that?
textByHashes.3d84892c2a7d84b4ba250339bc0a6f63682244c1: That doesn't really have the same ring to it.
textByHashes.aecc8982f3164726ea83b2ca34c73f40a342a7bb: Just tell me what it takes to get Nardah some water.
textByHashes.08fb76058acd82e7eb4718e164ef965c63f97f7a: Tell me what I need and I'll leave.
textByHashes.f59d5f58fd30a6fb645c2e080599016a1cf42fa2: Look you don't want me to get annoyed.
textByHashes.02b34d8ead2f35d9194c3e49f46032c7ce08fd9d: Oh yes I'm annoyed, now give them their water.
textByHashes.ff36ac49cbb4b5c06357ac59fe40080db66ea204: I haven't time for this nonsense.
textByHashes.78facd847a739bbed6ded6595ca32d553fd2a085: Yes, it wasn't so easy getting in here. Why have you made it so tough? You must really not like guests.
textByHashes.f666b936732be17bb87ceaa12474f72da5ab81e8: I come as an emissary from the people of Nardah. Their fountain has dried up and water they bring from the river dries up. What advice can you give on this matter?
textByHashes.34bca7dc626794b326c5ed7f50cd999d0d43ee04: Was this due to the death of the Saradominist priest as the towns people think?
textByHashes.a9075b41444b17e689952a8f7ad032f2fe352522: Hey you've stopped finishing each others sentences!
textByHashes.62bd18d031f970524605bec7ad83c1ce4203550b: Don't many other towns not follow Elidinis though? Why pick on Nardah specifically?
textByHashes.4d1b3ec107b8463a25f6c8171e9940b60b71d79c: Yes I would like to hear this story.
textByHashes.b829d31ef7459e2b2bb234660a0a60015455c213: Is there anything they can do to get their fountain working again?
textByHashes.685fbe5c19655d35a4068e7534c3be451bf2d7b4: Well that's all very interesting, I wonder what the people of Nardah will think of this.
textByHashes.9f9ed5f7af6409edf97e8e69525fd4e2aea797cc: What manner of beings are you?
textByHashes.c14e9ba298755f90d2b40085309752981c4279fb: Yes, it's nice and cool here.
textByHashes.aedd140b9eefaf8f1a12c3548a9bfed3ce8e4f4e: What did the townspeople need to do again?
textByHashes.abf14d835c078e7238a5d8a1942ce46246e2471f: Yes I have made some progress. It is the doing of the water spirits at the source of the river.
textByHashes.e8e92b53c59a0c22c638aacb3ad2879ac10d11fd: Did you by any chance throw away a statuette of the goddess Elidinis recently?
textByHashes.ff8703cfef29813b84d6862f559202747bfbaf64: Well the spirits killed him for imparting that piece of advice about the statuette.
textByHashes.ca93dbcc87c6a095342e19cdfacd82a8f9765e0d: Apparently this town was brought about by Elidinis on the promise that its people would follow her. People here have been waning in their belief of Elidinis for a while now.
textByHashes.19527eec907eddefcef42e48d43d98280bf272d9: It seems the casting away of the statue was the final straw.
textByHashes.d4bae3f0ea7fce0e4a689699de9c7bfd130aac04: Oh but that's easy, I can pray to protect myself from arrows too.
textByHashes.45fb0bf563cac72f91d94bd47d2ebbd8538ab1a6: Where did you throw the statuette?
textByHashes.639fff48a700bf662cf67e2cad8d0e1ade390e43: Well it's worth a look anyway.
textByHashes.0601aeb48a7c55af4f3c4af6fc595d71b6b8a530: Not yet, but don't give up hope yet.
textByHashes.833559e65dc609395e78b3a43a09f24adbdd9088: Where did you say you threw it again?
textByHashes.0dc9e62b5cfb8666877c79c573d1e5becc07b7ab: I'm told that a statuette was removed from this temple.
textByHashes.c3c5783e8b06d4317afef33e9309b012facc8e0d: ..Ah yes, that She. Well you're right, that would be an insult to Elidinis. In fact it seems that affront is what has brought the curse upon this village.
textByHashes.4bdf55319a5331789c609b7ee3c5f4b4a94d4d8c: Er, why didn't you tell me about your suspicions when I was asking around about the curse then?
textByHashes.cd3c137dedeb6be51f51a07ceed9af5f95191398: Yes some actually. I managed to speak to the river spirits you told me about.
textByHashes.5e02852b87ca0fbe0baf0c4130b097ea2773bd69: Yes the spirits told me that the town is cursed because you guys have thrown away a statuette to the goddess Elidinis.
textByHashes.db9b4e34bd230c32fe529268395c6b9bfc98daf3: I'm after a statue that was thrown down here.
textByHashes.2b62f8a9d5faa4b010b6b1a7c586b4a208d44c17: Maybe I can make a deal for the statuette?
textByHashes.2fd2fb5ac23a9de2beb5393ca658ed96818672a8: How am I meant to remove someone's soul?
textByHashes.4decc4ea29d35de24318854678b66496ef539821: Ok I agree to the deal.
textByHashes.96308828709b18ef28e1b4b12cc4bd74d137db95: No way am I agreeing to that.
textByHashes.fa21f50ae29afdd1caae2b79712a99c233a5514d: I'm not sure they know you're down here.
textByHashes.650f97052322a542da4e3a2ff493244d6d3caeaa: You're a genie, grant me a wish.
