textByHashes.3e9d45a95749862c02b09e2ccce7a41112a4bda3: Erm yes that's what I meant.
textByHashes.5753e16f35a403687175617a3d502d0246b30dd0: Well I must be off now.
textByHashes.57b41d25ab7fb96a65767fe54dcf849323c1c194: Why are you sitting here in the dark?
textByHashes.b252b168277e27032b7db5fd0ce48736795de768: Very pleasant, the snakes are a nice touch.
textByHashes.6e1855cf7d15bf15dd33803749bf78c10de411a7: ...Ok I think I can manage that.
textByHashes.e9f487794f8b3033fca8c16b791c47cad71824b9: No, it's not an easy thing to get.
textByHashes.0736a00f66505f92e7653023e80492b6e5845a34: Err, well I have made some progress. I met a genie down the crevice. He told me that he would give me the statuette in exchange for your soul.
textByHashes.dd873d67ff0627ad53ad08cdc60d1445cdcc5964: Well not exactly, he sort of basically said I should remove it with a knife.
textByHashes.10b05d06c6ca150d0bbf993ca3ca3c34604e7f8f: Errm, I'm trying to remove your soul.
textByHashes.114b46d8bb8cb08c8892c61070f27af3fb4e60e1: It's for the good of the village. I met a genie down the crevice. He told me that he would give me the statuette in exchange for your sole.
textByHashes.2881534e0f4392d2e81e03b5bf47c6726f7b4f6b: So um, why do you need part of Awusah's footwear anyway? I hope you're not going to do some nasty magic on his feet or something.
textByHashes.cf5a0d706bbb9e693c092616404e89936c6a2bfd: I will go and get one then.
textByHashes.a825e7e2afa85b6823b5c8af65b5cc676fe9d34f: Yes I finally got it. I had to destroy a pair of your shoes though. A crazy genie wanted a sole off your shoe in return for the statuette. I think he got souls and soles confused.
textByHashes.603050c1acc6a9e796c54c905df875d84525a668: Yes I thought it best not to correct him. He's somewhat less dangerous than he might be if he's a collector of shoe soles.
textByHashes.ca2168b84473a481a91eecf5af78ecd23d244277: Gosh, I didn't know there were any trolls around here.
textByHashes.c28d8a1e6d844e1b1081a43cd4eaead5a63fa123: You've been... reading stories about adventurers?
textByHashes.8b1b093536335705f2d8954fb1a527d6fd2360ff: ... fair enough, I suppose! Anyway, you think you need an adventurer?
textByHashes.9d2119694ae68824e82128f22ce26312c0d8b59c: I'm a brave adventurer! Can I try?
textByHashes.da62269f7467e170b5f9685b0b5dca76b0e386da: Oh goody, I love rewards! Now, how can I help?
textByHashes.a957138323e4dcd7e73839b59177306dfbb98bf1: Expert adventurer? I'll wager I've had more adventures than you've had pickled gherkins!
textByHashes.24c9c4a9a2dce4dffa5f734c0b03a240a0c96f71: Expert adventurer? I'll have you know I'm in the Guild of Legends!
textByHashes.fc1250def622861f7705ca9097f820a14ad8b3ee: Him? What in the heck do you want with HIM?
textByHashes.7ca00682a87929c9a4cb1309243437bcf9ad243a: Well I've met him. Don't you think he's a bit old?
textByHashes.36dfaecb598d85a6e14dda2b73f2f086e67ea669: Yes! He's mad! You know he smashed his way into a bank and stole a load of stuff?
textByHashes.141d8dad0eb12df92b83dd0a6212e78199438928: And you want me to fetch this Wise Old Man?
textByHashes.38e901f2f5a35cc9ba111f9e74e7aa0bfd4341fa: Right... so you want me to fetch this old man who used to be a great adventurer.
textByHashes.61529aaa3c64ccb03dcb299a9f8013d771a7fde1: I'll leave you to it, then.
textByHashes.dba303b5aaa56e80cf1b30607c3d11b3e153f951: What was it you wanted me to do?
textByHashes.8365243855f15dbeff43166e772fd12fab398cfd: Couldn't I just save it myself?
textByHashes.d996f1955fb75c13893f277139e0bdfeddc9396f: You used to be a famous adventurer, didn't you?
textByHashes.c8350ee753235318499c977bb359f5ba7a2282ec: Does that mean you'd be interested if someone asked for your help?
textByHashes.f08982ea8daf83b26c0ab2114a0274f0db9c3e0a: Herman Caranos of the Piscatoris Fishing Colony thinks he needs you to save his colony from a tribe of attacking sea trolls.
textByHashes.eec7651ea0a469f7a593a6b2894821a9da906309: Well, it's just one man who smells of fish, not exactly the whole world...
textByHashes.d7007677856fcb902ad9a6faaad24087c2a96978: If you're not feeling up to it, I'll leave you alone.
textByHashes.dc423010df46e44ce34b06f70c86c5f180458583: You're going to sing a song and then snuff it? Maybe I should tell Herman you've flipped...
textByHashes.1ecb5d73dfe980448587dedfb430d4f38ed35677: Great. So long as you're not going to sing.
textByHashes.bda7a3a6dd0deb945963d6a0b80204e0028e5313: Oh yes? What do you want?
textByHashes.deafa1fada971cb5862f13cf8de7c806043fa31e: I just happen to have those with me!
textByHashes.139c7e2f1e2a6a5d63a61b2b71a5aa1788c7276f: Right, 5 Blood runes, 10 Lava runes and 10 Mist runes.
textByHashes.a5d3dc91fe699591353c8d2e4d61a69333ea6e2b: You asked me to get some runes.
textByHashes.798e69b86437b1dd5621aab96e3c8e71b76dca4d: Oh - er - good. Well, Herman must be inside the Colony now, so we should probably go in.
textByHashes.849f707f0b1facab9347c68bafb2a4908ee13932: I should go and get ready first.
textByHashes.bd3bab4fe553dc594ca4bbaa2a2aade314be709c: Talking of gratitude, I believe you mentioned some kind of reward...
textByHashes.92a5be2c4124e8cf39f89679339b01c57fb57a69: Ok, I help out, then I get a reward?
textByHashes.e1b6dc7f9c0ba7bcaaa85c1dc0e3039c75ecca0f: I'm on the case, no problems.
textByHashes.74d4865b17c410d1668b96c28b2bf978dcba5719: Herman said you wanted a hand with something.
textByHashes.07f4d8844b8b6f1a3eaf7f6a3931c527564d32d6: Oh yes, I'm quite an expert.
textByHashes.4107c24caea49aeef48fdbc4f0689f9fd043d995: Won't iron go all rusty with all the salt water around here?
textByHashes.d8b511beb4531d201e579d071ab1218e37f8d181: Alrighty. So where do I get sheets of iron?
textByHashes.841cf57b6db1460762b3a87ce73503d5601318fc: Why do I need to heat the bars? I've been cold- working metal all my life, and I've never bothered heating it.
textByHashes.15875d28604eac0e32bb24a395899a297288986d: It's not hot enough to work at the moment.
textByHashes.390a9e7246de1b1bafa4529feb1f52fc156ee845: The firebox is at the other end of the machine!
textByHashes.454219d6a1cd2c8d64c974acf19e29c2f1c1cb01: I should probably try putting metal bars into the OTHER end of the machine.
textByHashes.9e7a59ab8f30253e6819692ae6ccac6a0951098a: I can't remember what you wanted me to do.
textByHashes.9b0e9800848245533d82ac6fe179361c88bbcb11: I'm not putting that into the press! I don't want to break it!
textByHashes.de342cce2e9f8ba19a8976f3dccb0ff61d663327: Well, the press is working now, but I still have to patch more bits of wall.
textByHashes.6efd65b2deaf24031da96882acded39adeef227d: Well, the press is working now, but I still have to patch [the broken sections/the last piece of wall.
textByHashes.12df1547f1ba71c8423012aebefafe77acc70ef0: Also I think I need a hammer.
textByHashes.a0025f7d1b5f987064d246b01957f9f75dbe0c05: I don't think that will help.
textByHashes.2c0dc0bcab9ea2c3168f933f728b2e2b63d62d34: This bit of wall is fine. I don't need to mess around with it now.
textByHashes.1eae99405c192ef1a91ba490398a01d156e9e25c: I've fixed all 5 bits of wall.
textByHashes.42432dc7b15758d3270513a83e6307b821e31566: This is turning into a lot of work...
textByHashes.02ef46430b53300b8c84206ee887f712bbfe3d21: Oh good. Now maybe Herman will give me that reward he mentioned!
textByHashes.fd0b1a0dbc61780172d76cb2dac7e0974f6a1bdd: Yes... Herman said you needed me to do something?
textByHashes.2e6f5d66530c04dcf0b0d0925deeb81085459c74: You want me to catch fish?
textByHashes.849e28020c6c59dd2042bb275d6e7f31e5365aa4: Where do I get fresh fish?
textByHashes.5b3ff6df3af4a11fbc0496f6f13218e368f58bed: I'll need a net or something like that.
textByHashes.cd9654ed0f17e3db5d6bda8df0c2c8b27869db9b: Ok, five fresh monkfish coming up.
textByHashes.ccbef3e4245fe67beb94f2fa281c54699b6c372e: I think I should maybe catch my own.
textByHashes.e529103c3f14098e35479b12fd21046dbcb1a47d: Arnold, I've got some monkfish for you.
textByHashes.c8f379903239e08502b97a379a793ac048b140ff: Oh good, maybe he'll reward me now.
textByHashes.9f108664fa10c5927926d021794d438b244044db: I've finished helping Franklin and Arnold now.
textByHashes.d77a80d7f51c0f6cd4b67d2202d09837cf1b15e3: Does this mean you're going to reward me now?
textByHashes.47bb4a3488d5d146de562a6ee16ca478d71ed6e3: Well, that sounds like a nice plan. One big fight, no more trolls.
textByHashes.24eb6f9e9458b397a6f75edf161c459484549417: Let me guess - you haven't got any forces to gather!
textByHashes.643c549ce704cc530a5fadbb3b21003c6184b907: Ok, so I just need to go see Wizard Frumscone in Yanille?
textByHashes.d802b4b52ff4cc1032415a901f73e0268b0e07dc: No, I'm afraid I haven't asked Wizard Frumscone yet.
textByHashes.5ff488b65d515e8e18a6b467b90c879b3a74e3f3: What was it you asked me to do?
textByHashes.54fca9461814b2cc50accf6a37f889b3a5a68e76: Right, I know it was something like that.
textByHashes.eca5d6303a3375777cd830bf397fc3407bb94758: Hello. I need your help with something...
textByHashes.70c43e581bf0164284817b9c0fe5731f828aa8fc: The Piscatoris Fishing Colony, somewhere north of the Gnome Stronghold, is under attack by sea trolls, and they've sent me to ask for an army.
textByHashes.3e862301ff25da91b6a0179b53b65b458a34011b: They said you might lend us some of your zombies.
textByHashes.3227928a35ba4e941166d2155a35cdeea4e2f1b0: So you can't help the Colony?
textByHashes.4e7f548d61b497805145601b5a43d33d4244144f: So what should I tell the Colony? They've got to give up all their work because you won't help?
textByHashes.6b66b94d940612bed5612341e1c5da0cc9788244: Great! Is he a Guild wizard too?
textByHashes.f9968b02450f03912975b6376229a5abdaac6b17: Necromancy? I don't want anything to do with that!
textByHashes.e602fced6960840573a53972aaf6a7d7d2a3408d: I don't know if I still want to do this.
textByHashes.6cfdef9678f2bdbf476759ce607e6515cd9aff2d: I'll see what the necromancer needs me to do.
textByHashes.506568b7d574314e09592a4317cf1719cd0b0f7c: Can't I ask a different necromancer? There's one not so far away.
textByHashes.59b10c87a3d221982a9097240720d311a5796a86: You said you knew a man who could help me save the Piscatoris Fishing Colony.
textByHashes.a740b06e4fb001008a243835f6350be968c0987e: Wizard Frumscone wouldn't help, but he told me where I could find a wizard who might help. I have to look for him just south of Falador.
textByHashes.4246c2098d7d133beeba779a0027a5f0eb610f0c: By the way, where's the Wise Old Man gone?
textByHashes.9d176b6cb443a09693fd013ca11f88ab30992d62: I need help with saving a fishing colony.
textByHashes.d6af689fbc5bc4ef0e0026d2b419ce22b7948f12: ... um... The Piscatoris Fishing Colony needs an army to defend them against attacking trolls.
textByHashes.e871a49ea1186755c338c9a77d243294c96eff2c: I'm not going to have to do anything... evil, am I?
textByHashes.ccaa3b5b386732f82be5099bd5f8b40bcc506a4d: What should I do now for the quest?
textByHashes.1ede6facfaee3700f1237ad09f399bcfd5030ac4: What was it you said you'd need to help me save the Colony?
textByHashes.a776d4e5ff9e12d1f09c9960f65969ec96999735: Oh yes, how could I have forgotten?
textByHashes.4ab226a339092d043c00b8f23d1b593e0d884a97: I doubt they'll let me in there without a brown apron.
textByHashes.582562553fe1bc7342ce5861945d125a392dd00a: Can you spare me a brown apron so I can go to the Crafting Guild to ask the master crafters about transporting bone seeds?
textByHashes.dc0360159065a630332f436cb122f619f7e11033: What am I meant to be doing for the Colony?
textByHashes.2709ff3b0c7a664079eb52fa98e101ddc1517695: Can you tell me anything about transporting bone seeds?
textByHashes.94a0036abfeb962291a72f0c6a5050043768af33: A necromancer is going to bind the essence of an undead army into some bone seeds for me if I can get a container to carry them in.
textByHashes.7674290bca556d487081959b14d4ce0e0be06419: But do you know what I should carry them in?
textByHashes.5a453a4f88348076b1c971733d3f6c7e32d4fb44: Yes, a woman called Tassie taught me.
textByHashes.6aa71995d281e3445ef7b42a4e3df8a23cd902f9: Yes, yes, very nice. So if I get a pot with a lid, I'll be able to carry bone seeds safely in it?
textByHashes.df8a0599dda3f4d6973fe7758fa94ef7887ed43e: What was it you said I needed for transporting bone seeds?
textByHashes.b926ebc1f9bd8f07c3b18c0a9de4ead35495a86e: I've spoken to the master crafter about a container for transporting bone seeds.
textByHashes.4cb3648167fb57e1df3e646178f4a39a11952685: Thank you. So what do I do with them?
textByHashes.7880dc62698d758c943f543afc18489583dcf12d: Suppose I - ahem - need another one later?
textByHashes.3160a8b39465977bfb21a26ab9b8ecdd5b0b13ce: You learn something new every day.
textByHashes.4c141476c45dc8dfacdee5be49920164fa4f83b3: No, really, the wizard told me he'd put bone seeds in this pot, and when I opened it the army would come forth from the bone seeds.
textByHashes.7bfb361a9e60003f7cf96f0d8d949c0c994720cd: Aren't you going to do the fighting?
textByHashes.214b0190cdd1b3e6ad44a44a830e339eee5acf25: I'd like to get some stuff together first.
textByHashes.0cd513419a97d780d692cf81603c4706b4bb3ed4: Now I've killed that THING, Herman's sure to reward me!
textByHashes.1257e4664dcede631cd8fe8f0668a7621c6804e4: Yes, I don't think you'll have any more trouble with the trolls in future.
textByHashes.83c59772e04377e3e715a5cac5ba0af9ee006ea9: Yes, no more trouble from her.
textByHashes.1f96d6ead527b2e5a42fb1c7d182c37f8a1b6662: Ok, I'll go and see Herman.
textByHashes.556279b890c84056cd95cdda21f62636c5fece61: I've defeated the Sea Troll Queen!
textByHashes.9c58b44a8d9d1c09bf98bcf22aeb16777d573833: Well, you mentioned something about a reward?
textByHashes.39f8bc962d866c645b9c7fa85de3e5bf31537e51: Ooh, goody! Thanks, old man! Um... can I have your hat?
textByHashes.dfcd9bd86cf0f5c0d9506759eb7845c29782427b: Aww, cheer up - we won! But can I have your hat as my reward?
textByHashes.60ce2c91d12f06e349f2a58947ee36b4176fe234: So that's the end of your adventuring? Also, how about that hat of yours?
textByHashes.84c09f838c014575df2ca646a8e2ee79e6381cad: It's been... nice working with you! It'd be even nicer if you'd give me that hat...
textByHashes.31f29d95a6821f677547e4f1096edf6068ed218f: HE DIDN'T GIVE ME HIS HAT!
textByHashes.7170fd1e8706c70a8137a249db4b84cceab4f8a2: Anyway, you were going to reward me too?
textByHashes.25c4f51755025f5448268bf7bcdda0d3bf7f8c92: Why is it better to fish here than in Catherby or the Fishing Guild?
textByHashes.c43e06cfeb3f15a2bf9ca38425d5975bcd71f89f: Ok, so I can catch monkfish. Um... thanks?!
textByHashes.e1e4ee33091431dc2605d82f7b47f367518ef7a9: I suppose that could be useful.
textByHashes.ebeb0be86a07316f3bda06dceb29c98f4f012d81: Maybe if I ever want to do glassblowing again...
textByHashes.e27eebb07c61b9cc3480580eb7c6b9e3b717b592: Who me? Oh I'm just a nobody.
textByHashes.25fa34751313b05ce556fb94fab139228ecd8646: Where have your people fled to?
textByHashes.ef23c7c4a905cd70bd08820941ebd4d4989f9359: Trufitus has communed with the gods. Your village was never cursed and your people are free to return.
textByHashes.392c166cc97a4b5aca0df99e2a4c7e62cb984ebd: Yes, I helped Trufitus gather ingredients for a commune potion.
textByHashes.910a5ad222bb20fc2340a05df3876b05cefb3fb1: Your gratitude is all I deserve.
textByHashes.27cb2b7063b363c127087bd2100c8bea20c5df8a: If I succeed? How hard can it be?
textByHashes.98bb0bf3f1c272ac7ecef78c7c51203aa19e248c: No, I've had quite enough of the jungle already.
textByHashes.141c24c174de69ad1e6d4ea34137b1619b4f1587: Is there anything interesting to do here?
textByHashes.76591fd24b017a95e44be8f24ce8398c99c6242a: I've been doing some work around the village.
textByHashes.8a554af81d611f489ad6659295abca0ec99d6682: Can you tell me more about your sons?
textByHashes.2dca07d54108b3e400acf8d482ff12f97baac75d: Can you tell me more about Tamayu?
textByHashes.8018c10d2241b5d06bede461aadb9569c89107a2: Can you tell me more about Tinsay?
textByHashes.9fb3487ee151726b7afc97a7e16edc04ee0c6165: Can you tell me more about Tiadeche?
textByHashes.d826659096317d3d668f7eaa8913351d4a82225f: Where can I find your sons?
textByHashes.e1eeba1e5014e1f5051b20ed0f814fd4b78d3c68: Tiadeche, I bring good news. Trufitus has communed with the gods - your village is once again safe.
textByHashes.5aa9840e40bcf26fa830a39ebce3cd785b80d9f5: Your father requests that you return to the village.
textByHashes.1c9a2ea7af3941d8e577794a4c3a3913c34a37b4: What would you have me do?
textByHashes.8767cba67f6e7d95bfeb3fbe030cc75eb43d8eda: How are you fishing for the Karambwan?
textByHashes.e55afb1c053e02db759262d47c471faf381f4686: Tiadeche, instead of using your net, try using this vessel.
textByHashes.fd9fc8296e7083fc6c301118eb074dc9ff136660: It has been specially constructed to catch Karambwan. Once they enter it, they cannot return..
textByHashes.b5e3d15e3e48b0f56384d2e58efcf3f6a0259245: I've been told that the Karambwan feed only on the Karambwanji. This will make good bait.
textByHashes.22e636f4a35568f271b5f2235d25d2a96c8f3dac: Also, it has been loaded with Karambwanji. The Karambwan will not be able to resist this bait.
textByHashes.ebd18a71c315b708fb70ddd4df480ae8b4933585: Speaking of your father, can we make way to the village? He awaits your return.
textByHashes.dc064a1f3fa1508863e407fbaf253fcf4d064a1b: I have no need for it, Tiadeche.
textByHashes.65e9958da41215263ca47a8c7402f0bdc6bcf446: We must return to the village now.
textByHashes.72e1b35bf8004eb8854824b871c5214e555dd9cc: Can I have the vessel back then?
textByHashes.21464725b4e875c6f6fefd9cf94fcc1e6c9722b4: I did, but I think I've lost them...
textByHashes.5992bb77334869673409e76d176f47fc96150922: Will you return to the village now?
textByHashes.6905798617e885eef1f9838bf098769b3bba0fc1: I am glad to hear this. Let us go.
textByHashes.0e718e62fdfb852d4d4637520e4c96b28269df3d: Tamayu, I bring good news. Trufitus has communed with the gods - your village is once again safe.
textByHashes.2d75a53dfea56f2483bbd567d7cebda1bb1c5573: You could slay it after we return to the village.
textByHashes.3f177101d46149e82de4605d4f510151d032ceaa: Tell me more of the Shaikahan.
textByHashes.8a82f23365916b6efa2551c6dce1ea07084b8a56: How long have you been hunting the Shaikahan?
textByHashes.b98cbaf77e5731ad4a652d0efc8548194d0cdb55: Perhaps later, Tamayu, first son of Timfraku.
textByHashes.69abbc4d3bd86678033c2abfc0d4c522760af14f: I could slay the Shaikahan for you.
textByHashes.77efbcb118adeb6dcce07e8a2ec947caa677e9f8: Take me on your next hunt for the Shaikahan.
textByHashes.dc6cabe00209d4a12e9f4543423179ff358b7cb8: I've noticed you commenting on the Shaikahan's agility. Try drinking this potion.
textByHashes.41d0738e5926be30aa0f03b6e392cca997617529: Tamayu, I have brought you more agility potion.
textByHashes.81134da989c8af0a104fa74bbc6be80dad8c6c69: Worry not - I am your witness. Shall we return to the village now?
textByHashes.bc43493d84f706b264320661745385ab0ac04cbf: You could tell me the secret...
textByHashes.a58ffc342febc2b3b6f655310b371f78c752f769: So you didn't have many friends then?
textByHashes.43775cb8d4334c531488cb8e4f6fc97dafa683a3: Which other young people come by here?
textByHashes.25c5a0f7bd5252aad61164d3e3ca596222d25fac: What do you use for bait?
textByHashes.ef15ab209a2c09b4fc8668ce5daab8e22af12e97: I could help collect the bait.
textByHashes.2ca6e9993e8b7362a69e88035e22f5cf55a23231: You sound like you could do with the help.
textByHashes.e5fbdc12cac464099a32ba1cd05d8acea6954762: Ok. Where can I find the bait? I don't even know what it is!
textByHashes.b53156a82784d85f0b24078bd905fcf89a83d89e: And what do I use to fish for the bait?
textByHashes.36f6bc66d7279728522f66a9c48c93e51a3e02e6: You sound like you need help.
textByHashes.22047d9777f8fcc3c5eea55d0089d510a21ad1d9: I enjoy collecting meaningless items for people.
textByHashes.b7c8f4c8ccd744109e2c913a3656ee4e1e00889e: You're right. I don't want to help.
textByHashes.28a1ec8b2a7aef05747adcfe2d7bd1f3c1d33252: What do you do with your Karambwan?
textByHashes.ebef7f4ae0514ee6f06efa3fd9a98c90eced8082: Where is the Shrimp and Parrot?
textByHashes.c7e056283dc1cb271174b9d3b17fa6274083168f: I have come for your soul.
textByHashes.b4f10f11b8d2d4e705065912337cc6082843ee42: I'm from the Fishing Guild Anti-Monopoly Department.
textByHashes.2f96180ef70e039f2d5d0d962c573ec5caa9e50a: We demand that you hand over the secret of the Karambwan.
textByHashes.5b42f2dd4462910c6a5778a01effadab336e3d37: Oh, ok then. It was worth a try.
textByHashes.b765f95b7b93ff6b738f7021609f21b004ed0596: Do you have any spare monkey skin lying around?
textByHashes.7443690b8eafada2dbff5bdde895da2e66d002af: Why's that? Do you have any?
textByHashes.7e4d26895c1e92df3b82b6d67e3efabc7fa01780: I've heard something about an accident.
textByHashes.69ab03ef90a594bdd628624fd2f9e5572debe8a6: No, I'm still fishing for them.
textByHashes.8ef2ee1b144cb3a44ad81d80e421108b22b8d714: What do you use to catch Karambwan?
textByHashes.7d65f5ec17a12c70ddd6b69664703edcdd1b2eb8: That's a slight change in attitude...
textByHashes.588e619c292a9bd93b054b44bf03c840afc69fe6: But what kind of equipment do you use?
textByHashes.8ffa91ea2dc980998499478a3248b1b3ab8e4516: I've been catching a whole load of Karambwan!
textByHashes.2c2466e54d047e41423d9c01aa16ed6f96724ac6: Actually, I've lost my Karambwan vessel.
textByHashes.221c24f2e8b734ddcea43bb7f6fc898a3438f1f9: Don't worry - nobody will find it...
textByHashes.42bca66663468f2de3b2414727170030b5f324c9: Everybody keeps asking me to run around and do their errands!
textByHashes.4080268ecbfc75f4d5eef641006c2246b05603d3: Tinsay, I bring good news. Trufitus has communed with the gods - your village is once again safe.
textByHashes.ecf32551608bf88e5dc7331d16fd07bb317823a9: So what are you doing here?
textByHashes.7506e8ea0826e7d529fe471f5f13562de7f5b3bc: And I suppose you want me to fetch them for you?
textByHashes.9ed47e56706c4fef9df03cc458281e3fd48b6d92: You mean you were just sitting here waiting for people to bring you things you need?
textByHashes.603cad739665eaa14cb361246006d81b3b69a0e4: And you don't see anything wrong with that?
textByHashes.529cbbe6d0211e0670b048854b885d2c9271b501: I see. And you're going to use this to repair the statue?
textByHashes.7295a4a80fff2f0d131ec0cac7a00353d9e29ac4: Your brother Tiadeche has sent me. He asks you to study this vessel and produce crafting instructions.
textByHashes.4e19ce303a756d17db99f9b44f7536e17f2ee9c2: Erm ... I think I lost it in the wash.
textByHashes.1fcea7bfeb947d058a32cd8672ec52b9d5899ea3: Uh ... I think I left it in my other trousers.
textByHashes.2e3c7fb25c0f12993ed184a40ff80cf2504814e4: Actually, my pet monkey ate it.
textByHashes.a9dc7a99e97f236ee6abd4b48485d9812f7cde1d: What? I thought you needed that for tribal statue repair!
textByHashes.3c91bfa905c30685d601bc7240277acefdc9552f: Can we return to the village now?
textByHashes.5604cab5d098c8e12efd0b9d357d8175dec73ee4: How do I find Karamjan rum?
textByHashes.6a49d69b7539171b96347adc9d274de387e4d967: How do I convince you to return to the village?
textByHashes.adf68b83b1bccecb8b04a0c6898cc275a6c99e60: Does that mean you're not coming or not saying anything?
textByHashes.470b515eeb1237b4f50fe48f73326fecc838e87b: Jogre bones? Why do you keep-
textByHashes.0fb448672dc4cb23608965f5005195ffac86cf21: ... burnt Jogre bones?? How am I-
textByHashes.874ad62414ca9555cab59b14669b687375ffc658: You're just going to eat it, aren't you?
textByHashes.425729a43fbe899219e2684b17a423b1723503ae: How do I burn Jogre bones?
textByHashes.af73fddfe874f3e69bffa211cd2aa55a760b1d06: How do I end this silly quest?
textByHashes.a561bcfdc045ab6eb660c0a744c207e8d3fa4552: I'm sure Tinsay said to use Karambwanji paste, not Karambwan paste...
textByHashes.6180710174a30dc1ffc8d24a810188959ef49191: I assume you're now able to repair the statue...
textByHashes.8c5e6fc5ea9ad8c4eaab59f98a1e2385789d9ed3: I insist - and so does your father.
textByHashes.9a6d6b4bf4a2346b7c75d29a0e8db19788ab2b72: I'd rather have some gold please.
textByHashes.cfb9c5f83e12ac32f0a8daf0f534624cee8bccc4: You know your sons have serious issues...
textByHashes.fbd28bb89e48f04ec8ee785c58976fd45fe943e5: Yes. It's how I, or rather Tamayu, killed the Shaikahan.
textByHashes.2895be3788cbf684390dd6b52c522d1f86424fb7: I no longer feel a stranger here.
textByHashes.a79cf16d3fe2000b4d8235f58d43177e019c5ec5: Hello, Tamayu, first son of Timfraku.
textByHashes.f81109e0a5aac4b206990c31c99843f5b44c1b9e: Do you need help with anything?
textByHashes.73935f52010a92b42531590f68b32d0aff479d0f: That's very interesting and all but why are you telling me this?
textByHashes.34437e31a659e07053b6848d5a37738f072f63f0: Again, really great and all but I still don't see where I come into this.
textByHashes.b0bbbbda51853d4215c69666cf7b5cb7c9e93fad: That doesn't sound too hard. Leave it with me.
textByHashes.46be14966429ed1201ee3ca24d76229be22982b7: I've got other things to do.
textByHashes.4b3e4ce1d82756f58e4eb5196ae852950aa832ab: I have a question about King Shayzien VII.
textByHashes.1334fa9f0e6aea75e882aed34a79d6939a5cbc24: I'm searching for information on an expedition to Mount Quidamortem during his reign.
textByHashes.c63e45ea08e2546d85f53dc1cd3b49f1913e9b80: No, not really. I have reason to believe that not everyone was killed on that expedition.
textByHashes.77282aceaf5f72216aedb0f5529eb263a8a5daa6: So I'm at a dead end?
textByHashes.39723d8ba0b7d6ad5fc40cd1d0940d83a8e32fdd: I'm trying to find out more about the expedition he ordered to Mount Quidamortem.
textByHashes.9acd41470e5d9eff3019e9bac6afcb1f4786d2e1: Well it's not like I have anything better to do. Fire away.
textByHashes.e996e854c78e52844262de6ea358a7a9669afb86: I see. Would it be possible to visit the prison?
textByHashes.126e29947e104d256dac2f8094d3902eb523d415: Hmm. I should tell Phileas about this.
textByHashes.e5497e43f06eafd2a988caeb3e9538a358531617: So I went to the Library Historical Archive. I found out that King Shayzien VII ordered the construction of a prison there around the time the expedition was taking place.
textByHashes.f6b66c5721307e7b3b116820e04967a4bf22b685: I investigated the prison and in one of the cells I found a strange message.
textByHashes.4d1a576f22b7d3fc49d26a304ba8cb14dc43da67: 'Lizards on the mountain. Do not trust the King. The Altar is a lie.'
textByHashes.194d0ea82c8058e5f8390d43aedc838af3bcec83: But why does it matter? This all happened a thousand years ago. Anyone involved is long dead now.
textByHashes.85fa91ee746898fe7d125c12b64c3b6e63da47e3: Okay, I see you feel strongly about this. What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.f59615b397f823a14fdb68bb1e7c2aeb0f16142c: Yeah, I had a feeling that would be the case.
textByHashes.786f4e36f6c2101eec582f4b2ae1badb7dbe93e1: I guess I'll be on my way then.
textByHashes.745d361769aeb0c23fe36f3ae2e6036caa5172e0: I still need to talk to Lord Shayzien.
textByHashes.2a00e70bf4a759b8abbb6bb683b225f63552356d: I'd like to perform some research on Mount Quidamortem, but I need your permission to do so.
textByHashes.3896627964765cc60998b5bc9a878f5f01e52a5d: Many years ago there was an expedition to Quidamortem ordered by King Shayzien VII. The expedition supposedly ended in failure.
textByHashes.ef094c84591ba5f4273bba3b636b654c3a884fc9: But I have reason to believe that wasn't the case. I think something was discovered on that expedition. I want to find out what it was.
textByHashes.33bb907ef3b8abb6e1d670457ad48d88162e09f9: But surely the library should be made aware of any important discoveries?
textByHashes.24b6ef6da063d31b7344abbb274f9d170a349799: Lord Shayzien told me that you might be able to help with some research I'm doing.
textByHashes.2523929e95acc5a15dd5dc77987a137bbdca7f48: I'm trying to retrace the steps of an expedition ordered by King Shayzien VII. I believe something important was found on that expedition, but I don't know what.
textByHashes.9eb7e3e10c31118b6bdb77ce02aac18e8a6ae4b4: I have a quote which I believe is from someone on the expedition.
textByHashes.d5609b4cd4c4b67c1c9800020f79e0b5884ce394: This must be the crevice that Duffy mentioned. I'll need a rope to get in.
textByHashes.1b303c18073660d8e9132e752bcc51ee5eea9bf8: Hmm, I wonder what that was about.
textByHashes.027beca67d8ee34921f280997208d596bf019762: Oh well, I may as well go and tell Historian Duffy what I've found.
textByHashes.c42e38f26702f91bdf9f359976c6c23528c6db9d: I did. There was a weird looking lizardman along with a strange altar.
textByHashes.c0aea165aa861a37de68b9d91a0c2aba07021e56: Don't worry, I took care of it.
textByHashes.02041e480ffcfdab3f3afd4e652f676adbd154cc: So this is where the lizardmen came from?
textByHashes.9439bf01df6615babb3766edeadb7c6e41a7821c: But if King Shayzien VII did create the lizardmen, why did they fight for Xeric?
textByHashes.1e2d089fd527866775d26df581f2e94af4cf92ec: Hello. Duffy said you'd found something interesting.
textByHashes.ca5ed1d1c5eef15882a884b77c316e7ed4d42cd6: So this altar was how Xeric kept his power after he was defeated?
textByHashes.e7604cdbb3a2793b2604eaded6e4f6a36020f6f0: Actually, Lord Shayzien asked me to go to him first with any discoveries.
textByHashes.a0a5fdf68f2702cd64e7af8e6c16856c7d8d186c: We've discovered a small cave on the western face of Quidamortem. It's manmade and it predates the time of Xeric.
textByHashes.a02f37b56bce2ed82dc6f75a3f0529a39735abdc: Inside, we found an altar. It seems to be giving off the same power as the Dark Altar.
textByHashes.ad892b10874b1ef1ce1f4b36dfe5adab805a9432: We also discovered a unique lizard species, one that shares many similarities with the lizardmen.
textByHashes.a11e506721aea90559d6f1dd3595f998ca60c46a: It seems that this cave was the origin of the lizardmen. The fact that it predates Xeric suggests the lizardmen do as well.
textByHashes.310d5dbdd4b0372258f6809101031a0e54faf3ce: Hard to say for sure. It would make sense though.
textByHashes.149dabaeda3dd790c37357aab0a8c6e7ed03d8b3: From the evidence we have, I believe that King Shayzien VII ordered an expedition to Quidamortem, hoping to discover a suitable species for his lizardman project.
textByHashes.8d5cb9f6d6e384c5ebc19e3080244aa61796b3df: Once the expedition found one, he had them killed to keep the discovery a secret.
textByHashes.8977320b33acbe0182746add5364fcf84d818907: Not definitive, but there's a lot of evidence.
textByHashes.468c789ca44c15a361ed6bb0d3747fa82d59ada3: It started with a parcel delivered to Phileas Rimor. It contained a journal written by King Shayzien VII himself. The journal mentioned creatures on Quidamortem.
textByHashes.b79201c0d35a6a350c01845de13d4d7ecf62297a: Eugh, so much walking. Fine, I'll go see Phileas.
textByHashes.bae244e065632dc7f22ef775e0952f031610dccd: Err, this doesn't look good. I'd better tell Lord Shayzien.
textByHashes.73825956d6e6a331dbddc3577d384f7a559f770a: I'm afraid not. I went to see Phileas but his home was trashed and he was gone.
textByHashes.f4241ce639145494910efb4b152a755a5b909fa5: Actually, I don't really have one.
textByHashes.80c3d6d976ff395fc3f37b11ad2dcc42509fbc6a: What are the Tears of Guthix?
textByHashes.e4fe68a28ec297e81dae86d76d408904e83ec8c0: Tell me about the Tears of Guthix.
textByHashes.4d6d79d01a8c2affed16462a2b12ccf2fc28b266: ... so Ava's devices can retrieve ammunition for me when I'm ranging, using the power of the magnet and the undead chicken.
textByHashes.0dde52da95ecb178da9b579d84a55360c6e508b1: ... and the Dorgeshuun city is now connected to Keldagrim by a rapid train line.
textByHashes.f5b3b45ae97f1c27407aad87b7a18206d9086ea1: ... and with the device destroyed, the people of Arceuus were safe.
textByHashes.139b14ea46e052ff6e535d8ce42e710490612fd8: ... at the end of the day, I wonder what happened to Fox's equipment...
textByHashes.0aca64388177df94bb27bad53083f21fbbe678b7: ... after Willow betrayed me, I managed to defeat the guardian. Then I found the Imcando city of Camdozaal!
textByHashes.9f67e32b67f6c37e437b6df188661adf0a2e9b7f: ... but Pharaoh Kemesis agreed to begin preparations to reopen Menaphos.
textByHashes.b25e2e68ab47f6a29bbf52dafcc15ff1f42df303: ... I had to be shot out of a cannon into a rock! But finally I banished the spirit of the rock and Dondakan could mine his gold.
textByHashes.e3d15e7f1a2a414f2fcea5743b3e5d91754a3b70: ... Poor Rantz was so clumsy he couldn't shoot anything! But I managed to kill the Chompy Bird.
textByHashes.5f94eaead85bb38af6458632ae592bf4b7bf40b4: ... So it turned out there was no plague after all!
textByHashes.5b40c2c196f701bdfa272219655af0237f54ba62: ... So in the end the Black Knights were defeated by cabbage!
textByHashes.7da17aea82357df2c016a6aaa28fcdbfab3ba422: ... and that's how I got the archaeologists to Fossil Island!
textByHashes.544fa4cedb3452ddb9a5bd798665f79cad0f9299: ... So I holed the enemy ship with another cannon shot, and the Adventurous sailed triumphantly into Mos Le'Harmless!
textByHashes.72c048b1071d4f37ea6f95741bc5a2c5d9ec9cd9: ... and that's how I stopped the murder of the Teokan of Ralos!
textByHashes.935c108d9d5fd6302e2d47cf4bb0d83d9e00fb7a: ... but Veos had no idea what was going on. He'd been controlled remotely by his mysterious client the whole time!
textByHashes.6db0753b35f7f6da711c661e96a5713f91dc1d80: ... So it was I who repaired the clock tower.
textByHashes.b2920724162a4a26e5b50d55840142225a87453a: ... so I told Larry about the penguins' plot!
textByHashes.e89b64d9ae068c43f1ef995cc0daf2e6980cb68f: ... and in the end I found all the ingredients, so the Duke of Lumbridge had a birthday cake after all.
textByHashes.0c46b48de1df802fb7c5ada0d587881a1b87db4b: ... and after I'd defeated the giant scarab, the High Priest gave me a reward lamp to teach me more combat skills.
textByHashes.23b0f37b509923a2211bbbc8be4717141cf37c65: ... where Captain Tock thanked me profusely for solving the mysterious 'curse' and killing the traitor.
textByHashes.8b2775a859b0b72f66cac850fe1421434a370f8d: ... But in the end I stopped Fenkenstrain from continuing his horrible experiments.
textByHashes.1bff5ba84f615db5909657a086d217ac03ab2294: ... and that's how I was able to deal with the questionable politics of Catherby.
textByHashes.7ff1667f0f0ff8fbd5fb85c497ea6e85c800abd1: ... and so I escaped with the heart of Arrav!
textByHashes.fb353240902569f02e1ca38696af0846f39c1624: ... I gave Safalaan the book on Haemalchemy, and he recommended me for a position on the Myreque.
textByHashes.41accc182d8b3c465bef1e172d2c62bd98cff395: ... So from then on the Imperial Guard was able to access Death Plateau safely and take the trolls by surprise.
textByHashes.6a8cb57db6a97ca992e67b0ce95c70ac1d1a1f0e: ... Sigmund escaped again, but Zanik and I destroyed the machine and Dorgesh-Kaan was saved!
textByHashes.00096723831ed522301e0339e8416ddea0d5083a: ... and so that's how I solved the case of the murder on the isle.
textByHashes.8eae03f7dc7d675d5cd19b3b55c812f7a3d509a3: ... the Shield of Arrav glowed with lightning, and Dimintheis used it to defeat the zombie army!
textByHashes.008d8c967b8c79681fc1e29e9262e6368a7aab39: ... So I destroyed the demon Delrith and saved Varrock!
textByHashes.50fc83474b8972c4362e0856a0bc716747281160: ... and I returned the Royal Accord of Twill to Lord Hosidius.
textByHashes.22abe0554b03dfa6d32672d6c6c5a1e4673c3a48: ... In the pyramid I discovered a whole new set of magic spells!
textByHashes.c3274275360eeb187eb25563c858818de4749130: ... and it turns out the treasure in the vault was actually the Elder Horn!
textByHashes.e6df97cc28a6478c1da16c2eac76786eedb6d6f6: ... So it was me who accidentally brought a teleport beacon onto Entrana! But the Temple Knights are investigating so it should all be all right.
textByHashes.69a08d578a761f39cae0d8dc8e93c8b592732769: ... and the examiner was very impressed that I had discovered an ancient altar of Zaros.
textByHashes.94f160cbe72fa8074582786fe5604f9c526a1985: ... So once I had got all the ores he wanted, Doric let me use his anvils.
textByHashes.9028fafc114a6a35374626fbd1f443bff4f59226: ... So with Elvarg the dragon dead, the master of the Champions' Guild let me in, and I was able to wear Rune Plate!
textByHashes.1023154052bc3bfc7c972d5faf2ae1190c805c1a: ... so I slew the dragon which killed the dragonkin as well.
textByHashes.fb6b2f1919e535a1d7dc4f19db0002ed7cf6674b: Not everyone survived the fight though.
textByHashes.626e21392cbe5c09a84c57767d90e37ca2a59662: ... so Cyrisus was free of his fear of combat, and he headed off to be an adventurer.
textByHashes.31d28d2aa8c6824b570c815ba800ae4df21fda39: ... So Kaqemeex taught me how to use the Herblore skill.
textByHashes.f71489019f3fb7b09b3b6ab3e009447f9807c74d: ... and that was how I fixed the Dwarf multicannon.
textByHashes.b3b60f5d0188ecf9c9728809ab0bf3232c7d3fbc: ... Eadgar's ruse was absurd, but it worked! The trolls ate a fake human, and I got the herb for the druids' ritual.
textByHashes.ae4c412a13a22cf2fb86b18312a8cbf8eebf8da7: ... so Nickolaus taught me how to catch a new ferret for the zoo.
textByHashes.8ba3ff7392f42a79083f2b51974daad43ad93c29: ... and once I had repaired the Elemental Workshop I was able to make an Elemental Shield.
textByHashes.9b6fea7c0bf90efdfc9a7c282276a2e14572a9ec: ... so I instilled the power of my mind into the primed bar and smithed it into an Elemental Mind Helm!
textByHashes.10e51cfe56df8214e2b6718817ff069c2d6e43a4: ... and then Akthanakos and Enakhra went away to the north to continue fighting!
textByHashes.912f9baab7634f467ee4d4ba4b6dc33f3fcc2365: ... so we landed the balloon in Taverley, and Auguste thanked me for helping him get his idea off the ground.
textByHashes.1784c965305c7fefa73f0e25a1a60335e795ed14: ... So once I had found all the parts for the machine, poor Ernest could be himself once more.
textByHashes.4e85b415eb52008395f88dd9c8a1ab74834212d8: ... and I know they meant well, but I did have to explain to them that they couldn't just go 'borrowing' from other museums!
textByHashes.2af0d738d5f45015eccc3f0f66b00ccc90b12ec2: ... the machine revealed that the cute creatures were actually Arposandran spies! I destroyed them, and King Narnode gave me a crystal seed that belonged to Oaknock the Engineer.
textByHashes.b851de02e0d36feda002db7b17e840327e81e13e: ... So I defeated the tanglefoot and returned the Fairy Queen's Enchanted Secateurs to the Fairy Godfather.
textByHashes.f97f67b1af768a27635eb8486b61c1e83cbc6e17: ... the Fairy Queen awoke, and we realised that the Godfather had betrayed her!
textByHashes.6b8c15715ebd345e08d3e3a0860a34cb037b7d97: ... So all three parts of the family crest were reunited.
textByHashes.0ef96d05abc36195a50ef9b3b204d216af44ff23: ...So despite the failure of my original task, Ali Morrisane was very happy about his nephew's fortunes.
textByHashes.20e6296b4c61f41a23ebce95d8cc9e9904dc5eb5: ... and I defeated General Khazard, and won the Servils their freedom!
textByHashes.05a8f48a72c80c3746175bed10a5d664cd1bed81: ... and so it turned out that the archive was never completed. Everything Metzli did was for nothing...
textByHashes.d2c80ecde40346366fa5b6377ceac06a5e9962e6: ... and after I had won the fishing contest, the Dwarves let me go under White Wolf Mountain.
textByHashes.73b3729eb9939c175fa567098504ced28fa5840c: ... I think I did something with a drunken dwarf... but I can't remember what.
textByHashes.82b50f1455d4aa4db06f5b0afa7b860d8ffc869a: ... and so I took the hammer to Undor and he used it to repair the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.638b2d21e4be92c283c39e4b0d85af5ad880387e: ... and that's how we defeated the Jormungand once and for all!
textByHashes.bd6d2c474d67e337e129b8b30229ba1af56b471e: ... so I presented the head of the Troll King to the Burgher and he gave me his own helm!
textByHashes.16d3676aa15f6ca032dd764848efc9e6abce34d4: ... and that was how I became an honourary member the Fremennik, and was given my Fremennik name, .
textByHashes.0811f99a1738aa0b167563d18cc2235abaaec00b: ... so it seems that in trying to prevent it, the Old Ones managed to cause their extinction instead.
textByHashes.294c43cb9e022ae8257353a5faed93b9fdd51be9: ... So the garden at Varrock palace is all my work!
textByHashes.983fa49713cc5ab63bfed6bd96aaac9022fb2a42: ...I returned Fluffs safely to Gertrude, and then she gave me a cat of my own!
textByHashes.b7fb6e509e279b39f7b60a177f83c5cc7594c566: ... and so I ended up having to make a pretend head. Not exactly how I expected things to go, but at least I managed to keep my head up throughout it all!
textByHashes.3ecdb3126b273e4baa2cd5c62f1bb0f3a927abd5: ... So the people of Port Phasmatys were finally able to rest.
textByHashes.2892558904dc4b5fc0895b0a217fcf8d75600409: ... So the statue in Keldagrim was rebuilt, and I witnessed a meeting of the Consortium of mining companies.
textByHashes.63ad0aa7d19227e3b4491d2a6835d03beec0fe70: ... So the goblins ended up wearing the armour colour they had to start off with!
textByHashes.90592bc87b4c464922a14bfa523e716d26dd3435: ... and I had to reprogram the golem before it would believe that the demon was dead.
textByHashes.65bba9d07cdeff2afa6162aa24ebf31dbb02d6c5: ... Glough fled like the coward he really is, and the Grand Tree was saved!
textByHashes.e7298f01806789c5540eb2bd6d9c02c417331f23: ... so I defeated Mi-Gor's barrel-chested bodyguard, and the monks were saved.
textByHashes.f0716410e9f43ed93a14e6e1b1124f69a9f010a7: ... and once I'd chopped down the beanstalk, Sylas let me keep Rupert's helmet.
textByHashes.24bf6f065fe50edc0a8a4ec748a6ff77917f2b48: ... So that was how I gave Bert a hand solving the murder and returned the wizard's head to solve the riddle of the ever full sand pits!
textByHashes.788a890918cf926ac3da93bd27dd566e6bbdf662: ... and from the legendary crystals I cut a salve shard to fight the undead.
textByHashes.89249914374402b9b00d53d7152bfb0afe153da1: ... So that was how I foiled the cultists in their plan to resurrect Hazeel.
textByHashes.5598047f1670235466e96fefcc24e6a2d62a2d8c: ... So that was how I helped return Hazeel to his followers.
textByHashes.25846fa478e4f34e0c3527c64fab0eab74e6ab32: ... but it all went wrong and Itzla was captured!
textByHashes.fb9a2a5c55fb25379daee5565ddb801a5f19623f: ... So after I had retrieved all the items, I became a member of the Heroes' Guild!
textByHashes.b351ea53c2dd9b50a8c4b95fc621edffbf9f124a: ... and out of all the Knights of the Round Table, it was I who found the Holy Grail.
textByHashes.1a6c6795d31f923aade95ffdd6dc80294d9b0944: ... and that was the end of the horror from the deep!
textByHashes.52bf0dd0743e0165ce0f5fa026288e6ba08ac7fc: ... and with the amulet I received, I could understand the language of cats!
textByHashes.252216b83112597d4b2e863728f87657d973ac02: ... and I was rewarded for all my help.
textByHashes.24fb596a36929caf3efd49091fce26bf786f7b41: ... It took some time, but I finally got all four beads back, and Mizgog gave me my reward.
textByHashes.04dafad9c27cb20e32f2ea24dc4beb8527f7635f: ... Veliaf was very impressed by the 'Rod of Ivandis', and I can use it to kill Juves and the Juvinates!
textByHashes.97612dc7a27997c8848b11a89899193ed632b44a: ... So I suppose it was my fault that the young members of the Myreque were killed by Vanstrom.
textByHashes.baed5a0c94a5cea124f76c5f3ec51ac371012f7a: ... and once I had gathered all the herbs, Trufitus Shakaya was able to commune with his gods.
textByHashes.e1b338b9ca9ef3c109cf0230cfa42ea30792f3d4: ... and that's how Kourend came to be ruled by a king again. It just wasn't quite the king we initially expected.
textByHashes.71b2f1b4c7d92b002ed93b5ec0b25109f0e1e765: ... meanwhile Merlin used his magic to eject the Sinclairs from Camelot. King Arthur rewarded me for saving him.
textByHashes.3d67e468eb4bc63be7ef251bb9fa34855b813f38: ... So that was how I found the Imcando Dwarves and got the Knight a new sword.
textByHashes.d8dbc88122404cd1ff0c65684f4f7203e5c2b273: ... Oldak and I escaped from Yu'biusk before the portal closed, but Zanik was trapped in the box.
textByHashes.92330ffa37587f15f0c0dec195ba480bc52304ce: ... and when I had completed all the tasks, I became a member of the Legends' Guild!
textByHashes.071f358b3b9134029669884687c1c3f422a6e51e: ... and when I entered the door carrying the Dramen Staff, I was transported to a whole new world -- a world populated by magical fairies!
textByHashes.62e2c1e9bfac6e6b8914a7063261bd39bb7587f5: ... So Sigmund was dismissed, and the duke and ruler of the cave goblins signed a peace treaty.
textByHashes.7f52539924571785c4c8a31cb136762af61b40a3: ... so I defeated my mirror image, won the respect of the Moon Clan and persuaded them to communicate with the Fremenniks!
textByHashes.c79e1e2632e67a23e00b5acbffc601386adeb225: ... while Snowflake and My Arm live happily together in Weiss.
textByHashes.804301ed7f924bc91b5f54201121fd08e43824d9: ... so that's how the Outpost was saved and converted into a museum.
textByHashes.a5a422d772440f30af494aff13c783b841075e41: ... and that's how we brought kebabs to Varlamore!
textByHashes.72f7094b4318a304e6b92432193452f6488a01de: ... and when I told King Arthur that I had single-handedly freed Merlin from his crystal prison, he made me a Knight of the Round Table!
textByHashes.2670c279a25b74e223ab4c0f9bf0adc4f0a8f43c: ... but I was able to stab the killer with her own knife!
textByHashes.08d773f2793bcbda2f5db40bd55539bb38e047a9: ... and the monks threw a big birthday party for the child, with lots of wine.
textByHashes.4b899825fd535a865da4bb9411b0daffdbbb4886: ... so I defeated the Jungle Demon and stopped the Monkeys' plot to take over Karamja.
textByHashes.3955d597564e8ef48fc00d3f1bcca0bd59a24650: Well, actually, I was a monkey for a bit.
textByHashes.fca80380ced0ea332d6401bb0ccbd303158d6f44: ... so I defeated Glough in his mutant form and prevented a war. King Narnode Shareen & King Awowogei signed a peace treaty.
textByHashes.a57c946315a87208cce695ffc52e033ad266691e: ... I was too late to save the chieftain's daughter, but at least I gave her a proper burial.
textByHashes.536f7aeb80463194ec90e161f75d59464b91d00a: ... So that's how I found out about the lost temple in the mountains that the mourners were searching for.
textByHashes.15725512dd0e4a981484260d066106c10cfabdd6: ... What kind of twisted mind would come up with the light-beam puzzle in that temple?
textByHashes.c4f445451ad77924faeace14a6a793b1b801b16c: ... and that's how I solved the murder of Lord Sinclair.
textByHashes.e48fab8cc079d8b1c0a705acd350cbecbeb0d735: ... My Arm is still up on that rooftop, growing goutweed in his little farming patch!
textByHashes.e239655ab26ec2ba71d3ff9d9780440338788807: ... My Arm carried on growing goutweed in his little farming patch on that rooftop, until Drunken Dwarf's Leg took over.
textByHashes.bc4b72e2ac55b1463ad9c723c2c38701a472e0fe: ... thus Filliman Tarlock became a Nature Spirit!
textByHashes.b3278c1393984746d5e59b20df76c3a0cb934f1e: ... So that was how I helped Filliman Tarlock transform into a Nature Spirit.
textByHashes.466c29028aab8f0fb1c96e1f0388c8cc6ad86b95: ... and so it turned out it wasn't actually Verzik at all. It was a nylocas!
textByHashes.7b92ca877a7c3827df2a9fea0d1bc27884ac831e: ... and when I had fixed the telescope, I looked through and saw the stars.
textByHashes.3d89b77b77abbaaa8dc099f959349cd9f5044c27: ... where I found a note from Ulfric Longbeard and some treasure!
textByHashes.03c7957e9912d31b19c332f885b43c6750ae4fd9: ... I still can't believe how long that 'one small favour' took me! I ended up walking all over the world doing small favours for all and sundry!
textByHashes.b4b16fa6a46d67f9365195a82f1d3981353a4c47: ... so even though Will and Anne got away, at least I survived the ordeal.
textByHashes.f75fa22a36905ae534034b482f77286dfa462169: ... the room filled up with gas and I nearly died, but Hazelmere came to my rescue.
textByHashes.a6010aeebb07f602577885d8febdd2e9a731e753: ... and whilst we managed to reset the seal, Eyatlalli still needs my help to keep the Moons of Peril in check.
textByHashes.090b88ed40fe045a62acf28027d86cf914a541aa: ... and when I dug in the middle of the park in Falador, I found the pirate's treasure!
textByHashes.74466d9df9572f468a56d2804aaadc1a9d69cd4e: ... and that was how I rescued Elena from West Ardougne.
textByHashes.4951432718ecbc2d1c628cc1f7e5d76b1b592ddd: ... but using my new goggles, I was able to avoid the acidic attack of the Sourhog and I came out victorious.
textByHashes.0f14550063e171f452e13235ab9743a6d200e25f: ... But with Drezel's help I was able to purify the Salve.
textByHashes.c51d28611d6532452ccf42046c3dbeb929dd6022: ... and I had to disguise Prince Ali in order to smuggle him out!
textByHashes.df2d70049f2301e2de5bf6b2233ae13c9ba1e275: ... so I guess I'll never be short on crowbars again.
textByHashes.a05a0b91fe3ec6a916e7afdbbb721427b5327040: ... so Councillor Hughes was arrested, and Lady Piscarilius rewarded me for my help.
textByHashes.3975a908f39b3bb47cfbd524c72dc24daf080dfa: ... So I fetched all the bones the Odd Old Man wanted, and he gave me a reward!
textByHashes.5dbbc4dde05e8d1649203e36ae71237c834981a2: ... So I fetched all the bones on the old man's wish-list, as well as the ones I'd brought him earlier.
textByHashes.0f6953fd337b1e04b3e2ffc31574495c278e47b4: ... Those rat-catchers are odd people. But by the end of it I had caught a huge number of rats all over Gielinor!
textByHashes.9650299d9772908cd8975737f5f5a94986d6afb6: ... So after I had freed all the dinner guests I was finally able to face the Culinaromancer and put an end to his mad schemes!
textByHashes.3e30afdeb9f8b06ccd30204aa53489953e11b86b: ... So I figured out their weird puzzles, and the Temple Knights asked me to join as an initiate member!
textByHashes.a707101429a6c5955185587131b6e931898dce02: ... I returned to tell King Lathas that the assassination was successful, and he rewarded me.
textByHashes.5ddedd2d5414a85c7bdca3827cdded2d5f981c0a: ... and that was how I negotiated peace between frogs and humans.
textByHashes.00da9f57e61e86bb0267f72a78916a0c5af104f6: ... and once I returned the skull, the ghost was able to rest.
textByHashes.563df63d708f483d11d3961d53b5c3d20f20fb82: ... I gave the message to Romeo, but he misunderstood, so they never were together.
textByHashes.eee57ab9b0d3b7cca77d78d8e4137390d55b4c96: ... and when I planted the shard, it grew into a crystal tree!
textByHashes.a897d69e9777d366b28ad5346883668a0eb5e31c: ... So I showed that the war was based on a misunderstanding, and now Miscellania and Etceteria were at peace again!
textByHashes.7bab90cad71cb4e55e8937662d8415e9c39ad4e7: ... So that was how I helped keep the zombie pirates drunk!
textByHashes.18932a09cdb1fbe795fbe0cedcdbeff4768adebc: ... So I brought Aubury's notes to Sedridor the Head Wizard, and from then on I was able to mine Rune Essence.
textByHashes.bd0ab2c4db01e1127668b84b8e75a1f2c237ab6b: ... I would never have thought that three scorpions would take that long to find!
textByHashes.d206fc8024ed464173c5ba799a1a6a2413a4fcd8: ... Alan was convinced by the new egg, but he then may have had a little accident himself...
textByHashes.09feb0a97402122a2fb45fc0bb83a3b55e19b3c1: ... and that was how I rescued Caroline's family from the Sea Slugs.
textByHashes.2c315770532521dcd1d9026e5043706adc4de0d1: ... and so the assassin captured Jhallan and teleported him away.
textByHashes.066a6112c283f9ed9572c4c29cbd7ce07a7658f9: ... So Mort'ton returned pretty much to normal, and I was able to put the shades to rest.
textByHashes.2777c62d3b2a3b63be5fd3a59f14c138316a5e4b: ... So Denath was Agrith-Naar all along! But I managed to summon the demon again and slay him.
textByHashes.7f3deae21fcea71be14ef10d0651b578871a012d: ... and that was how I saved the townsfolk from the custodians!
textByHashes.abd2292252c8f2d04f4c74461e2d724d01ca17f5: ... and I incinerated the bones of the sheep in the furnace.
textByHashes.fdd7e6e2c14a6fcbc71222045d93fa5aa885bb34: ... Shearing all those sheep was hard work, but the pay was good!
textByHashes.231fbb7734fb984936ebcd3f0c3e61195c3fe338: ... So that's how I helped return the Shield of Arrav.
textByHashes.65f556110c1bd4076e4bcd80358225cb3edd3fe4: ... So what Rashiliyia wanted all along was to be reunited with her son in the afterlife.
textByHashes.a5b54d24474d70ce249c36e54c7a7c80065faf81: ... but Lord Drakan was too strong, and we were unable to defeat him. The Myreque were defeated and Safalaan was taken!
textByHashes.f1436ea41f60e71588284ec298243d9943575a34: ... and once I finished making Kovac his sword, he gave me full access to the Foundry
textByHashes.428265e62e3f6ff9b72679c1b770fe325cd53c7c: ... when I told Sir Tiffy that I had accidentally freed the Mother Mallum, he promoted me to the rank of Proselyte within the Temple Knights.
textByHashes.9118a60f391ac98ea42f47f16ad7fd923c8c5c7a: ... and so the Iorwerth elves were finally defeated and the clan elders restored the city of Prifddinas!
textByHashes.ab6042dc616d7679d7fa72d84c628858e5bf3e34: ...So I defeated all the monsters in Tolna's subconscious and he escaped from the rift.
textByHashes.fdb97a3fa4d85459f6430a1162e236e37c85eb89: ... So it turned out that the people of Nardah were dying of thirst because the spirits of the Elid had cursed them for turning away from their goddess.
textByHashes.a09b031d8aaab724c01b90dba0e1ffbb6d612051: ... So the Wise Old Man said it was time for him to retire, and he left the Colony and went home. He gave me loads of XP, but he wouldn't let me have his hat!
textByHashes.2b1d55d11ff6b2b7174d871a61ae71866f687811: ... So that was how I helped the people of Tai Bwo Wannai village return.
textByHashes.3e6fa30371b27911bba040264219d37cf6269e70: ...now Bob and Neite are very happy together!
textByHashes.2ecc43c927d90243a8412ea1c9d15789cf07b7a8: ... So Bob and Neite were very happy together, at least for a while.
textByHashes.1c85a8e29aec0ac570f673d15f55e991a3a7ee6a: ... and Lord Shayzien ordered an investigation into the disappearance of Phileas.
textByHashes.c2cd9f064e2723011cf3801339b2f7c73903c1bd: ... and Lord Shayzien ordered an investigation into the disappearance of Phileas, but in the end, it turned out he was the one responsible!
textByHashes.87b79423c1d61f774b67afbffe5a532451aa3a79: ... and Safalaan rewarded me for defeating Ranis and bringing a true taste of hope to the people of Meiyerditch.
textByHashes.89102619d9c7c59b6bccbbbfcf3a25bfe9e42597: ... so you said you'd look after my bowl for me, and let me access the Tears if I kept telling you stories.
textByHashes.b729881d41c201bbf6ece5d1e0cbf153dcd0949d: ... luckily for us, the Guardians of the Rift are now working to keep the Abyss at bay. I just hope we can find out how to close the rift permanently.
textByHashes.41d8b966cf1c8c0a07d478132e3ec146e6dc6d88: ... I killed Lucien and banished him from the world!
textByHashes.a231b971ce20d0a0efbcffb04f970a65d6dfea3a: ... Lucien said that the Staff of Armadyl I gave him had made him more powerful.
textByHashes.9d35f07ba8df449d6ed15400dba1c3031f40a24e: ... So that was how I became King of Miscellania!
textByHashes.94862dc90fb1e44b37aa1e1e2b3f94c7fef7b255: ... So that was how I became Queen of Miscellania!
textByHashes.e385049dceb50d022e9ea7604f152fb5efaa30e9: ... Ana wasn't too happy to be cooped up in that barrel! But at least I got her out of the mining camp.
textByHashes.299f9717512d152714995d363be528fa61d6b4a6: ... and the homunculus now lives in the basement of the Tower, creating living creatures of its own.
textByHashes.41d30d3adb860abd2b2a7e4f1c2c7ddfe4c23b27: ... and King Bolren thanked me for defeating the warlord and returning the orbs to the gnome people.
textByHashes.0bd659f25c33c2be09a2902e7393cd0eca197820: ... So I returned the totem, and the Rantuki tribe rewarded me for my help.
textByHashes.7f791504cb9bfbf9d33fa474c87cc316d042c84a: ... So Ug and Aga lived happily ever after.
textByHashes.f76cff2125b707d57241bb85f110f0fd2ff8e083: ... and after I had rescued Godric, Dunstan gave me the Law Talisman as a reward!
textByHashes.4fbc68f4fed1ad90160372f351fc8944c949f52a: ... and that was how I helped the tortugans of the Great Conch deal with their gryphon problem.
textByHashes.d05508d46a28f1d1d51b74410b44d42d4720a2e7: ... so I was able to defend the Teomat, but someone attacked the Teokan anyway!
textByHashes.c927a970e288eaf62049e8f7a9ed90db0dd32159: ... I don't know who put all those traps in the underground pass!
textByHashes.549af560a82fcb3bc6b9769e0ff190569a8d037f: ... and once the vampyre was dead, the people of Draynor no longer lived in fear.
textByHashes.4119f2f99f82d6ed2c9778a835a2a8345a5756e7: ... and after I finally managed to track him down, let me tell you, that Solus Dellagar fellow was almost as powerful as he was insane!
textByHashes.5cd053af508627484d334b8deab2989a2fca2982: ... and with the shield generator working, the ogres could never threaten Yanille again.
textByHashes.0a9148bec676815b12b138955cc8b978d52149e4: ... and that was how I retrieved the treasure from the waterfall.
textByHashes.d2a815450ffa45681b28f99899127680c6fb454f: ... so King Roald was freed from Surok's spell, and Rat thanked me for all my help.
textByHashes.bb259d1bf8a5bdcbdf8d6fe6832bf5c572e926ed: ... but Lucien took the Stone of Jas and teleported away!
textByHashes.d3294696c863268629b88707fe46aaf52f313e89: ... All that trouble just to get a ball out of someone's garden!
textByHashes.b92fc2a5f2e00d7dd8ac8366856f4283fd9f130a: ... and once I got her all the ingredients, Hetty's potion increased my magical power!
textByHashes.bd85f35432c81ed54a7bffd5d1001d7b8bcb6854: ... and in the end I managed to solve the clues and find the treasure for Veos.
textByHashes.0fb68d457df0abc3b96a73e4804e701502dc1c4c: ... Those Zogres were disgusting! But I learned how to fight them with brutal arrows and disease balm.
textByHashes.c3b8b8299ac6d68e2188b6aeaff9d371fc111fcc: But I don't know how to reach the cave!
textByHashes.a8f93a02ac232ea4baa32b92671123800b28a505: Why can't you get it yourself?
textByHashes.0e060abb603f2a977d39ce453032ec35b64b0d58: Oh no! Sounds far too dangerous!
textByHashes.ce1ab91c78f138c90727c386e8277d4381ea9a64: I've lost the pendant you gave me.

textByHashes.7985666751c6e25861491311a16f4b387f4bee69: If you're such a great witch, get me over!
textByHashes.36cd14111e2f47e395e63058fc9f88c28572daad: I can do something for you!

textByHashes.424ea31e939c2a6387a208b3d26abc3f3cc23749: Hi again. Could you do the honours again please?

textByHashes.ac2f967679b4ce87cf12d9fe0c95d1ac8486fa84: Lucien will give me a grand reward for it!
textByHashes.7681391261ca1a5981d3781b5bfe86f987e6c243: How dare you call me a fool! I will work for whom I want!
textByHashes.be82b40837c5f0071e61d81ff4ff9ce5bd1a03e9: I just thought of something I must do!
textByHashes.7068b40f698065c23a96c0dc338dd7919a50d0af: You're right, it's time for my yearly bath.
textByHashes.adfa60fd10851c1b5d021a1c6662dda665df6a19: No! I shall not turn against my employer!
textByHashes.e54b61abc54392ca299e1b599ae96cb38cdc3d20: I collect rare and powerful artefacts.
textByHashes.eadb936b24d0d6f2b26f7d5a084b9ae6849e2666: You're right, I will go now.
textByHashes.3119c0592b43c3234913b30394de71e76d49e985: What are your kind and what are you doing here?
textByHashes.d8bb610513e8fa8586efee280f98d4f7cb982137: Someone told me there were only three gods. Saradomin, Zamorak and Guthix.
textByHashes.14ad6770da4353019a608e1a6d37d55b92ccd8ff: Did you say Lucien? It was Lucien that asked me to get the staff!
textByHashes.e159019ca1d3205770ab0bee8a47b86cf20d82ee: I hope you're doing a good job then!
textByHashes.a115f4c910f2beb36315a74fa0d29cddac8472ce: Wow! You must be really old!
textByHashes.189d3efc120281a2bfae690ca0a5f36807700c52: Not yet, I've lost the pendant you gave me!
textByHashes.15542487ed0434348b6e102f949338846094a4c0: Oh, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to offend you. I'm .
textByHashes.e910364df352433fb2b3e42e251355122acf2b9c: Other planes of existence? Sounds exciting!
textByHashes.d8391f06ac8e29da940ed7ba4a0dc312be593712: So what are you doing in Al Kharid?
textByHashes.65b1f81051c989ed26d0dfa97967bec046748811: Er... good question. I guess I just haven't seen a wizard around here before.
textByHashes.06d85d2db4297469246aaf80564f44962f622a5d: What's a wizard doing in Al Kharid?
textByHashes.e4cab53df23157e0df74c8e03fcd367f15849ee3: Right... and what kind of questions are you referring to?
textByHashes.6192796f711903f763423ac463a8876692481772: I don't know. What are the answers?
textByHashes.3deda41d2aac55130b347917024d555820ec5359: So you're in Al Kharid to work out how trees grow?
textByHashes.622c033a81ded11a889f615834a7cd7d2c220915: The Abyss? I know all about the Abyss.
textByHashes.0ee54b34a54a1421068b781dc1b625c11bfceb1b: Well I recently helped a group of Zamorakian wizards gain access to the Rune Essence Mine. In return, they gave me access to the Abyss.
textByHashes.371cc1cc28eb4087791874a93ed76e49e90fc1f4: Maybe I shouldn't have mentioned that...
textByHashes.ef25856df7035556ac95da212cae0b29bf945ac9: A little task? This sounds like the time someone asked me for one small favour. I'm not sure if I'm ready for that again.
textByHashes.ed64e3465ece3ba2b069d706c39d963180bbe07f: Alright, what kind of task is it?
textByHashes.fcf975a287d0abb79c4d7d2509d18d8df9adab07: You're not giving me much to go on here.
textByHashes.b66c979c20ab8c8651c1075852fcc55d98062180: Alright, what do you need from me?
textByHashes.1238aa792477c0fae249de6a1152bbd5845f7fe9: So is that what you're after? You want access to the Abyss as well?
textByHashes.e6d1d06303042652ccd20c4bd272986abaa363d3: So you have an amulet with the symbol of your order on it, but it predates your order by thousands of years?
textByHashes.4c0d9d9010a85b744966ed3360554cfff338f195: It also turned up miles from where your order is based, and is filled with energy from a dimension that until recently, no one had even been to?
textByHashes.ef7d2cd8c736589cb2621a200ab5f845c2718c32: So what do you need from me?
textByHashes.35953bd4d97e655b37385a6ba77288473438216e: Oh I see where this is going. You don't have access to the Abyss, but I do.
textByHashes.3ece8cad884643e01e1d77bd7958bbcd5748044f: So I need to take this amulet to the Abyss and work out where it came from?
textByHashes.8fcf0abf998d6c951132188e65eb64c61d97bd32: I'll visit the Mage of Zamorak in Varrock. He should be able to help me.
textByHashes.2d8de9331da299aaa9bce5649ff8aa9e5b6276fb: I need your help with an amulet.
textByHashes.81b347c28354a0ee755251105801cbc522a409be: Oh, I don't actually have it with me. I'll be back.
textByHashes.b8343abb65d2425f3a329d6bff7322521919b90d: The amulet is giving off abyssal energy. I was hoping you could help me work out where it came from.
textByHashes.0e9695420919ea639d34adf17ccd8218a67844f1: Well I did help you gain access to the Rune Essence Mine.
textByHashes.5b92303acbdb18cd2b3305eebd80cc0843905e42: Are you not even slightly curious about how an amulet with the symbol of the Order of Wizards on it is giving off abyssal energy? After all, they don't have access to the Abyss.
textByHashes.d0a68a4cf3853f63fa3255e0b16e680d9357fe45: I... bought it from an archaeologist.
textByHashes.99104ad0b7301359ec2001ee61547d4e1a58e4e5: I guess not. I just never had you down as a Herbert.
textByHashes.e01ffaa2a3a4b1aed105c4b6e387db4a1a3f2cae: Could you help me with that amulet now?
textByHashes.3e5f9815fe2b725c5b17ba07fc841d1c66a66fc9: Could I have a strong cup of tea?
textByHashes.5dedcba3fc9daa3ec5fa666c887e63e5ffae1f74: Ah yes, how silly of me.
textByHashes.7ddfe46a234c05201825168d08bc1bc53ae283fb: Can't you just teleport me from here?
textByHashes.416ff8a3d850b9ced867f6c10fd82d99180b1426: If someone was watching, they'd know you have a secret Chaos Temple here in Varrock. I reckon you're pretty safe.
textByHashes.ca86ca24b0955d150e3cf67c0bf287c7531d56f6: Hang on... what was the bucket of water for?
textByHashes.192246c991d8bcc6753c17baadbfb1495d89ed4d: So you just want me to throw it over him?
textByHashes.7899c78797db8a1227385122295f5b88bbe1e125: I should probably get the amulet first.
textByHashes.00929682409ac3f5cdfb64f0d6de8bdbb1ba683f: I should probably get that bucket of water first.
textByHashes.d5bd534ade6047e2b76683a031aa70dad6880681: Yes, but I don't seem to have it with me. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.d485310a5d1dd9be441b1e5e2116ecae3713359c: Yes, but I also need to go and get a bucket of water.
textByHashes.18d047b1991e0ca541c4159c106c19277d060402: Sorry, but Herbert said you needed a wash.
textByHashes.737f92d2b3fa771717899d5ad703e897f9b9ba8a: I like my brain how it is, thanks. Now, could you help me?
textByHashes.d6b33e6c3c8b2b1377905c234e364b85b8a97dec: This amulet is giving off abyssal energy. I need you to cast a spell to tell me where it came from.
textByHashes.48f081b647dd24a33388255fe3cd7277a9aede6a: It seems I don't have it with me. I'll be back.
textByHashes.1dce3b556ca29c043e029905b5f7074f620749d2: What do I need to do with this energy?
textByHashes.d7cf99d1b5dc84e99f09693010ca5f3ef56c5f45: I've worked out which order the energy goes in.
textByHashes.82cae410c1ad1436c089176ae01a6890e2373ede: Can you tell me anything about the place?
textByHashes.b7567817afc11ff6243020015c0b6afa9a76e755: Yes! I have an incantation that could lead us to wherever it came from.
textByHashes.ad6edbbeae0fd5b8124cfe3f7183cccd527f9dc3: I thought you didn't care about religion? Why don't you want the Z.M.I. getting that information?
textByHashes.a1a601d50856f55054f1fec4b7f489b18246ef94: Thanks, I think... so where do we get these other wizards?
textByHashes.8c7602463e925ae68f3b8381f72d79932fb5721f: I need your help with an incantation.
textByHashes.58d46fb8f8103b7ada159c772d5667b999da361c: A teleport that could potentially take us to an ancient teleportation matrix. Persten reckons you might be able to use it to gain easier access to the runic altars.
textByHashes.d3d57b6147d8f8375f5d0d3166e738090ac2a026: That's right. Oh, I should also mention that this teleportation matrix seems to have some connection to your order, despite predating it by thousands of years.
textByHashes.c5514a5b2247168ad2ad9d78bdd76324483a4419: Persten needs three other wizards to be able to perform the incantation.
textByHashes.a4301fb06bb7d5b250ed733e37134dfb339c76a8: Oh, I don't have it with me.
textByHashes.755f7c3b6e1c9da7aecef2251fc526e41ec36578: Well since you asked... I... well...
textByHashes.c01c50f57a945dd369aeb4db06643aef0f1c983f: But what if it's true? That teleportation matrix could change everything!
textByHashes.b317681040d1bb0dd4b244ebb211b92329873702: Okay, I admit we went to some Zamorakians for help with the incantation, but they've had no other involvement. Persten has even made sure they won't get anything beneficial out of this.
textByHashes.d8bbb2df12371492227c8353311cf7298fee3429: Can you help me with that incantation?
textByHashes.6cb799e94e3bc70bdcc60df7f184af0ad6203ad7: I need your apprentices to help with an incantation.
textByHashes.50b9b01b4c1c9babbd85f13f8d7f2b4414b3df19: You said you were having a party?
textByHashes.cc76c64b0452d9a8c42dfb82fef54b76a71f77ac: I'll pass... Anyway, Sedridor said your apprentices could help me with an incantation.
textByHashes.18c6443bfe204b3a21592683031008077154f59f: One that could lead us to an ancient teleportation matrix.
textByHashes.0ba241bf5705ca52dc4dca6d7b104399295a9539: I'm not suggesting we move the party there. I'm suggesting that we cancel the party and discover the secrets of this teleportation matrix instead.
textByHashes.c69ede51669a785501502188bd0b444b6a8ab3d4: Alright, how about instead of cancelling the party, we finish it with a bang? What's currently on the agenda?
textByHashes.cb0b5bddcdb209110a0e02f669ba2842ae71cb36: Sounds good. So, what's the problem?
textByHashes.09d388d9581ac3af5a3cb2bfe3155389300beb93: I mean what's the problem they have to solve?
textByHashes.cbd50e97751ecf6d89ace55ed8727ba1ca1f094f: Right... I'll speak to the apprentices. Perhaps together we can figure this out.
textByHashes.f4dc84f6c351ccd6c3ace22b81773bc5767d79e1: I think I know what a thingummywut is!
textByHashes.0a04e8b50b4e8579516759a4ce54dff7df9d58e3: A great wizard, lost to history!
textByHashes.631c76d0b894fb6a5d08575e0abb13c781860a1d: Traiborn said you're trying to solve a puzzle? Maybe I could help?
textByHashes.81eb6e36654a70db1fe0eef7f13e61d32bc79ec9: Oh, I don't doubt you're smart enough to solve this on your own. I'd just like to see the puzzle to further my own knowledge and understanding.
textByHashes.b8a121e0a1bd4ccd381f442faa466c6186229e3b: I'll be honest then. In truth, I don't care about this puzzle at all. I'm actually looking to recruit some talented wizards to help uncover a long-lost teleportation matrix.
textByHashes.2c91211014a0d0159ba3869b23fe31741c65d574: The hope is to use it to gain easy access to the runic altars for runecrafting purposes.
textByHashes.938cc15a8a81b7c531a715b754467712b95fc728: Traiborn said that he wouldn't give his permission for you to join me until the puzzle is solved, so I thought I'd lend a hand.
textByHashes.718d2bb85ec58a56dc0391d552428cd26135267b: Could I see that puzzle again?
textByHashes.62cd8bab32aba40cbb953ad12e3f6c253baa3fc1: Sounds like you're trying to solve a puzzle. Perhaps I could help?
textByHashes.54d167edad7d1e0b70599c58ccc44a7062ecfafa: Why do you think so highly of him?
textByHashes.ba298bad7eab14eff283857adbd7225e96e4182c: I see, and is this the branch of magic you want to specialise in?
textByHashes.9c0ba3618cba9ff4f3241039427562df3e8b466e: Well that's actually not too different to the reason I'm here. I'm currently helping a wizard called Persten, and she seems to be quite knowledgeable on different planes.
textByHashes.3afa2a2ff8ff43e73847202e064f71abace48ed4: She's tasked me with recruiting some wizards to help her uncover a teleportation matrix. Would you like to join us?
textByHashes.3c092fa07b992963ef8ca12d375d806acd590add: Sure, I can do that. We need to solve this puzzle first though. Traiborn won't let you three leave until you do. Perhaps I could help you solve it?
textByHashes.4dbcd3d623296f53942ba5cf31b03118a26d9bc1: What appears to be the problem?
textByHashes.6b5412b33e9720e23ed3d48aa6592644270ab789: Don't worry. What were you muttering about with air and earth? Is it related to the puzzle Traiborn gave you all?
textByHashes.da5973c81750ffa05c6c36e608c03ccaf0174da5: I see. Perhaps I could take a look and help you out?
textByHashes.9373b3f221426d0c6fb2cfab0a7645d04c117a32: Well, I'm actually here to recruit the three of you to help uncover an old teleportation matrix. The only issue is that Traiborn won't let you leave until the puzzle is solved.
textByHashes.4c927eaaf62d58cda51fb0fc7f67f8ba131a6248: Well, I'd be glad to have you along! So, will you show me the puzzle?
textByHashes.28ef539ff608122f55777145a2275d10fc82fc89: What the - what was that for?!
textByHashes.dd6557855601eacc83ef0cc6c7860a1a8cb2777b: So your apprentices can help with the incantation?
textByHashes.18bf26dbb04ef5951b6c5dd7b3ad142a89b942c7: You're inspecting the amulet now? Does that mean the incantation is safe?
textByHashes.30d74d9ad5de087f6a1d919d587aed236a03d76a: So we're ready to perform the incantation?
textByHashes.270af68f24d35e86798584252e855804d4160239: Are the others through the portal?
textByHashes.0b30e7e60c94f64f9a6c44a2b44fa500782fbc52: You know, those plants look similar to stuff I've seen in the...
textByHashes.ca026aa34ddbc8a2b8f7640dcf38091d6c75f3ff: Discovered anything more about these rune guardians?
textByHashes.22954133da1b9ebc855af77be6e233b50e7f5c9c: I can't remember. When I looked at the marks on the floor I had this... vision, but it's all unclear.
textByHashes.b39702328cc2e9fec1a76f0bda7b27092200e163: This 'Eye'... did the book say what it looked like?
textByHashes.eeec1535c90c254779a0ef7d470ac01116900efa: Through the portal! We've opened some sort of rift to the Abyss!
textByHashes.3604b26b4b32b1945dbdd4a95c0341a3cc94f8eb: I'll go and check on Tamara and Cordelia. I'll be back soon
textByHashes.44a7e8c9cd226ffb29f578a009aa794a981018d7: I'll go and see what Felix has found.
textByHashes.75e2e74c2681474d815bce682a8692067d3a2845: Right, I'll take one to Tamara.
textByHashes.a6f0016c19d50b5c7420e621db174925698cdc77: I'll see if Felix can help.
textByHashes.cae7137fdf35daa713ca16e94a599c82cf225bc1: I'll see if Felix can help work out what to do next.
textByHashes.4a75121d786fd062f59e16b52bfb5bd920964aff: Felix, we need to place cells in some imbued rocks. Any idea what that means?
textByHashes.fc1e230398263c46317a28c3ed50d06ef4d09a0b: And they seem to be holding back those creatures.
textByHashes.f3fb89d9d34af8edf6b138999b970c7653ff8efb: Runic energy? Do we need more cells?
textByHashes.37ea103f6b446e9df3d184dd8ba5183715d8e693: I think I have enough fragments. I should speak to Felix about what to do with them.
textByHashes.e621bb04477d1b566dcd5a30270e3b67a68838e7: We need to power up this big guardian somehow, but I need a way to capture runic energy. Tamara said you might be able to help.
textByHashes.daa4490ff8e5d993553f8281177a7971dc652830: I have some fragments from the fallen guardians. What if I combined the pure essence with them?
textByHashes.200f9b2b230df92c5e6d76afa6f86693386d6072: What if I combined the pure essence with fragments from the fallen guardians?
textByHashes.16b715aec050bdc4c7f39a3e2bea7215f1c7fee2: I have some fragments from the fallen guardians.
textByHashes.a2731bdeb58b8b54b7f2ad16e7317dc64cb820d0: I used the old workbench to make some essence!
textByHashes.064ba9bdf8dfdc490a502e80df838d2754887403: Do you think this will work?
textByHashes.14220394490586236e7bf4c7bafcc7b8b78a86a1: Fair enough. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.3f315ac1ff0de682619506a6982302084f4d4c51: Look! This is what happened when I took that essence to the Mind Altar.
textByHashes.837bfbf4e1514465d46168da83aefb50b38f76c2: It seemed to capture energy from the altar as well.
textByHashes.9ed8851d00919bc30a6c614f3328bf961b0f2190: The guardian still needs more energy!
textByHashes.27947f9224567eef3e52a3a13439339ed6033bb0: What should I do to power up the big guardian?
textByHashes.1f437f6d5712b2b6bbcbac77bc0998074b54863c: I have some stones I can use to power the big guardian.
textByHashes.acb37b09113025e5a1fdf9ee8c70e09d6984b862: Alright, I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.a9001458f1a93f27184b31a1da60d2ef552c4f7b: Something odd happened at the Water Altar. The energy in this cell seems different to before. The essence also formed this strange talisman.
textByHashes.8a55de66b94537cc82e146a2cd652803c6c2c2d2: I need to make another rune guardian.
textByHashes.18fa128871baa7c4e99e34dbec9384c202842a0d: That cell made a more powerful rune guardian!
textByHashes.11f34ebfc82d7f67b39e1ec01bbde1b72622f2f9: I have another cell. Do you want me to power up the barrier again?
textByHashes.0cb9254a22f4830e9feb61fc264bc24f34274f60: This artefact... you mean the Eye?
textByHashes.64283f978ec7dfe23d09f47f665efe369497ce4a: Alright, if you're absolutely sure about this.
textByHashes.443e4d4faf832da79ba670abc0e3aec07ae1083c: Then I guess I'd better go and see Sedridor. Good luck.
textByHashes.b782284ca4dddc87b1d0013c14a22090eca58755: Kind of, but not really. The portal took us to the Temple of the Eye, an ancient Saradominist temple built to house a powerful artefact.
textByHashes.0faf8508f0c3e232cfc2e11e0cc9e4ce12e9fdfd: Long ago, a rift to the Abyss was created in the temple, but it was sealed. At least it was, until Persten accidently opened it again...
textByHashes.56f37bbc6429957585c19fbff7965791f1076b43: She was sucked into the Abyss, and all these abyssal creatures came out!
textByHashes.36e1c31a4753b193e632cbf8b7e0b9eeb0c68655: It's okay again, for now. Some rune guardians called the Guardians of the Rift were built to protect the temple from the Abyss. They helped us close the rift again, but they say it will soon reopen.
textByHashes.25bc1f8742dd91560a63fda4c649846ca658ba72: They're safe. They chose to stay and help the Guardians of the Rift keep the rift closed.
textByHashes.2e10d5b104bc17157b345f9f1efbc260afb5817a: I know. I'll help wherever I'm needed.
textByHashes.7f959e0ebdcfd6a13213b8a356e0c286ee6f1be6: Do you think she's still alive?
textByHashes.872ca197e8eab6478968cc60a0d6ec7c9a3f3172: How are things at the Temple of the Eye?
textByHashes.6a7559895e1f81804b402bc22da7079558fe4558: Could you tell me about the old Wizards' Tower?
textByHashes.f58e6bb4ea130024c392f22751f0aa56efc4870b: I've heard a different take on how the tower burnt down. Something about a ritual gone wrong?
textByHashes.44cc822b59a36003175b2e6c173a8bd8b49b671a: About that incantation your initiate gave me...
textByHashes.cf880944002a96b4d83af8063aeb3fcc97f17dc2: Well maybe you should have asked first! Besides, you wouldn't have got anything useful out of it. In tracing that amulet, we accidently managed to open an uncontrollable rift to the Abyss.
textByHashes.7477c176028a6b56ebd12d63b3f815588bbc745b: Oh, that reminds me. That incantation didn't appear to be written on parchment. What was it?
textByHashes.bc545880f097da1d70de174ab79c9fdc2ede2cca: Oh, I just thought it might be human flesh. I'm relieved it wasn't!
textByHashes.2de4e945e4509d5e8d818dd78284c8896ba8070b: Right. Let's start with what actually happened. Take a moment to collect yourself and then tell me everything.
textByHashes.da41cfc85028cc110d8846c2d57ddabcef556a23: Just like that? Was she ill?
textByHashes.8bf18a9c8a7daa3a130cb2f35c127bff2e6b0b2d: We should let someone know about this.
textByHashes.a7a858973889bb325f4b68bbb3659c9d64cdc380: Will do. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.6a6d27a9471e992bc0720d854f149f56accd5ae3: Actually I have something else to do.
textByHashes.707b4ad088c7f51b093984934cbb211ded11693b: There's been a death in Arceuus.
textByHashes.f233ccb8ac51c70ba0a4ca7d9bf9df651dd13c7b: I've seen it with my own eyes. A citizen of Arceuus has fallen. What should we do?
textByHashes.01bda8af5ca34dc51640bc92aba8b8e40e7e81ec: I see. I suppose I'd better tell Mori.
textByHashes.876cf2b474195ee27ba470fcc2dddc8e53525d18: I have. The council won't be helping I'm afraid.
textByHashes.163e48edcb9d1797adac8ecb6c70f5c8fe434969: Sounds like you don't like the council much.
textByHashes.e2c69fc8099bff9586ec05de9bfa63a4b3f1e1d3: Good idea. Where can I find him?
textByHashes.9659b25226e52e725129493ce36b6eaf015f24c0: I need to speak to Lord Arceuus.
textByHashes.a07cf2cf4176739e5b382ddd65036bf7f128863f: But it's important, there's been a death in Arceuus.
textByHashes.af3056dbdef47ea5de89e53b535d6431a534084c: I don't understand. What's going on?
textByHashes.610a918dcfd0a3719afece15f90b03482cd4ffdd: Well I'm afraid I have some bad news which is likely related to this. A citizen of Arceuus has died.
textByHashes.e374ece3c4e591d8d29049dbccd56ebda3479091: Thana. Mori is with her next to the pond.
textByHashes.4e744eab870eb34699ffe5cbb650eb78cfe948a5: I still don't understand how this happened.
textByHashes.db8e180af934ecdf45183fec03c6616dc6dfe67c: And you think they can help us?
textByHashes.b32b39575e47e69cd3b5773cbea0ee64465657cd: I'd better not waste any time then.
textByHashes.740938397026417fe269540a4c01137c35222839: But I need your help! I was sent by Asteros Arceuus, son of Lord Trobin Arceuus.
textByHashes.5c73675daef0853bc2b6bb6dc8c19500411e1c23: You're very confusing, you know that right?
textByHashes.3f17b31f49a51ba650dcc2afa8f8d4ca7c9c19d3: Well thankfully I didn't come here for knowledge. I came here for help. The Dark Altar is failing and the people of Arceuus are in danger. I need you to help me find the cause.
textByHashes.acc47031020eda3ff2f14db5c2ca36e6e7725bf3: [sigh] It can never be easy can it.
textByHashes.8fa6d84ad0325aa7be15889d69b68dd615a482bf: Fine. If you help me save the people of Arceuus, then I will help you.
textByHashes.b89c949f9a2ae62a645392c85f434ff1ee449157: I've done this enough times to know that everyone wants something, even the masters of life and death.
