textByHashes.01520496bd25369c4a1b09ed88bd97cf1165ea69: Well I've been known to have my moments.
textByHashes.71460b78ebf6413caeeb2cea5e2d0b8ce19321f9: Excellent. What do you need from me?
textByHashes.0ca9329e6b00d284261efd9c58646ab9efc43161: So you just want me to kill a zombie?
textByHashes.33c3c19d2a23c7ae4a513d6998ca21da8d110ba4: Hmmm. Very well. I'll go and free this soul.
textByHashes.56a85a482890cc6e8e58c7cec37051006ba4b158: I've dealt with the trapped soul.
textByHashes.bafb37e4f996039326009aae342c3ac16e7364e5: So I just have to go to the Dark Altar, find this device and then destroy it. Sounds easy enough.
textByHashes.133cc9dad3b80fb5e158612250b5dc3849bd0ffa: There. That's the device destroyed. The people of Arceuus should be safe now. I'd better go to the Tower of Magic and check.
textByHashes.8c4bf4970424692431c1f689a4e515a101ad44f8: Your son recommended that I speak to the Tasakaal. They had me perform a task for them but after that they agreed to help. They didn't seem to like you much though.
textByHashes.3eba94328a2518bef97e0016558648f55c9c86d1: They were reluctant, but they admitted that the people of Arceuus were useful to them.
textByHashes.ab236bf6d1b611b7ad394cc8a453a98ba7f3c298: They found out that the power of the Altar was being redirected into a device hidden nearby. I found the device and destroyed it.
textByHashes.bad672a7baabc006de0e55047c39076936ec172c: I'm not sure, but the Tasakaal said it was made by a mortal.
textByHashes.c8f2f833785a2fabc03939bddf7e07b958ee7825: That's very interesting; do tell me more.
textByHashes.c772e949c01dab61eab4aba508163ac5e948d2b4: What kind of help do you need?
textByHashes.986541f69959768be25f03487388c75da624ff5a: Sure, I'll try to help with your curse.
textByHashes.14855cc9b07b769b1ae0a8606c47e59a7c85354d: West of Rimmington, you say? Okay, I'll meet you on board your ship there.
textByHashes.b6d6e5b7edb559ceebec73b4875a4befb4da5ba0: Okay, I'm ready go to Corsair Cove.
textByHashes.f9bc835f2db491adc82dc1121a677aabe1cffe7f: Urgh to you too, with candy sprinkles on.
textByHashes.4eb9f3c36d9c60f1f4ec758537065996aeeb5e48: Yes, I hear you've been cursed.
textByHashes.77f40cf40c15acf8a77c3e52ce635b19759164f4: Perhaps you can tell me about it another time.
textByHashes.b425848c8960d96b7d40d1179cd50d8c02d55afd: Okay, it doesn't sound like you know what's behind the curse. Thanks.
textByHashes.54d334d2e600b7f94af571bc6681b70f453ef88b: I think I'll leave you to get on with it.
textByHashes.6bf38a14d63faf394c0958cacf3bf9af1b290810: I've spoken to some of your crew.
textByHashes.4c319c53caee727733bd12627da5a4559b213e07: I've met him. He definitely thinks it's a curse, but wasn't able to say exactly what caused it.
textByHashes.6cb1b015fe052be0a93e78f6320977e87620ffba: So you were trying to explore that ogre cave, and the ogres saw you?
textByHashes.1d61cf4996b13cf78839d7487369e5878bddb488: Arsen says he gave you a sacred ogre relic.
textByHashes.969e5f344eedd2e1346d04d6bed253ec0270bf2d: He thinks the ogres have cursed you all because he stole one of their sacred relics, and he wants me to take it back to them now.
textByHashes.ced2c00efd4066e75f257d8027f9001d49cdd65f: A man called Arsen told me he'd visited your cave.
textByHashes.e171bde483d15a4a28f3bc6d9c31c67c7d30bc70: Perhaps I should come back another time.
textByHashes.e72144aaf29fd07ca1e9dfc5c2e63b1f797faa52: I've come to return what Arsen stole.
textByHashes.840b3dada49345aff0c5bed835311ac37dc65a04: You're saying this is a tooth-pick? Not a sacred relic of the ogres? Did your shamans curse the Corsairs for stealing it?
textByHashes.220652bda4db517bac0ce9d553b1e482f8befa54: Oh. Well, I guess Arsen will be pleased to hear he didn't bring the curse upon the Corsairs.
textByHashes.ab4b6c6686a65e73e4410769bd46937cdd320062: Their chief, Tess, says that wasn't a sacred relic at all. It was her tooth-pick.
textByHashes.ed685f2a63ed99c8f89cde95de0fdd08e506855d: She didn't care - she's got lots of tooth-picks, and she just thought you were some kind of weirdo when you stole one. They never cursed you at all.
textByHashes.6701b69aad53bb90928a8c744dacabb381fff486: Where did you find this mermaid?
textByHashes.6f00467a469b7d38ebaf309c1e0f1cabbce964f7: Nope, I've not seen any mermaids round here.
textByHashes.40a73fe7ac9d09a377bd9864ab07c331bd699503: Let's see if I can find that mermaid he saw...
textByHashes.ba235586df816204eb6f24989dbca723c8e81eda: That doesn't look anything like a mermaid. That's an ogre!
textByHashes.82a994aa867900d97bc5385148ec7a0985085ff6: That doesn't look anything like a mermaid. That's Bugs, the son of that chompy hunter, Rantz!
textByHashes.36fe5223e5e7648fcbe10132e3d0f9b031f64828: I've seen enough of that ogre already. Colin might be relieved to hear it wasn't a mermaid.
textByHashes.80cc15451ec215a3e97dc12743614765c5316c0b: I've looked through that telescope myself. That wasn't a mermaid. That was a wet ogre.
textByHashes.bbf40c490268e50fea6f736124bdc6a9a0bf60d8: I've met that ogre before. He lives with his dad in the Feldip Hills. He's definitely not a mermaid.
textByHashes.c61b5c0e79760f76909ab0099df18187b3c343d6: Where did you say this happened?
textByHashes.9a425eb6fe2efb2cfe2e5254e10ff106249a6da4: Okay, he said he buried the possessed doll in the sand...
textByHashes.e753599d46eb4b8890c5d1e360ffc9ee26040d8d: That's not possessed. That sounds more like clockwork.
textByHashes.8a7d00ffec0f58ed4a6fddd35e953f3229e4f78d: That's not possessed. That sounds more like clockwork. In fact I've got the Crafting level to make those.
textByHashes.8477109c0c9c3d787a3d874d766846dbdcb65d33: Well, sort of. That doll wasn't possessed at all. It was a clockwork toy. They're supposed to move.
textByHashes.7560820726441d56e100758b657f9ec3c0524837: I've been hearing about what might have caused it...
textByHashes.8085b963492d809fa8939d1ca7476fb42aa7e6f8: Colin thought he upset a mermaid, and she might have cursed you all in revenge.
textByHashes.79ff27b3af2695264b1e83c655880a8078a421a7: Gnocci fished a doll out of the water, and he thought it might have been possessed by an evil spirit.
textByHashes.e3c0faad1a768db1e5c63f0cb10ed6e3125785c9: Arsen stole what he thought was a sacred relic from the ogre cave, and he said their shamans might have cursed you in revenge.
textByHashes.b7c2174d741812f449858ae2c546832abdaded18: I'll carry on trying to solve the curse.
textByHashes.5cbf775f09092d1b00bf53b8781bb7b93538c599: They all have different theories about the curse.
textByHashes.47e0711d9fb29383f3caa32113060c875b627934: I've ruled out all the Corsairs' theories...
textByHashes.baed5d881da7c4d76b30afbcda1014721d206356: Cabin-boy Colin thought he'd upset a mermaid, but there wasn't a mermaid, just a wet ogre.
textByHashes.9ad0b0ce7cf285953afff0a5c862154581b8074a: Arsen the Thief thought he'd upset the ogre shamans by stealing a sacred ogre relic, but it was just a tooth-pick, and the ogres didn't care.
textByHashes.2519884cd986706be3af296c0ac88c25551c5ee1: Ithoi the Navigator said there were lots of things that could bring a curse on a crew, and this could be any of them.
textByHashes.a22b0de968e70674ee7cfe11c38079e16446d826: And Gnocci the Cook thought he'd awoken a demon in a possessed doll, but it wasn't possessed at all. It was clockwork.
textByHashes.9fe4094f4388e51bd22f4ad791f98bbe91e22c9a: So what do I do now?
textByHashes.e20f48934f4b456db73c35b22e4c48f2db1ccd81: I see. You're saying it began after they'd all eaten, but Ithoi felt ill even though he'd not had any of the food.
textByHashes.3af05c1670cbdc7a08e88e80ffe4a1ad843fac24: That meal must have been interesting...
textByHashes.6216115a0b577e8fab5eee1e8c4e6196db9a8679: Can I give up and go home?
textByHashes.ee16899c4126e2dfff618d0be28cd2512c743db7: You said it began after they'd all eaten.
textByHashes.2ae833b52a7dfa89ad955f2ec9ecdc3b727cc318: I hear it happened straight after dinner.
textByHashes.ba059b6cb43e4946be0248b3e88193cac0e5d062: I hear the Captain's thinking of firing Ithoi.
textByHashes.cba39de0f2dc449a3c547cf29c118ac673d9700a: So you say Ithoi prepared that meal?
textByHashes.93fe41698a83d87f7177f59740182062d897d2b6: I hear Ithoi cooked the meal you ate that night.
textByHashes.80f891c61fb61ca4009ccf9e669f067e92115998: What is the mission Francois is doing?
textByHashes.57639a20538d8abcc1cea6e03d5ad779919cc220: I hear you're thinking of firing Ithoi.
textByHashes.39221c526d4348d030b402862de0851208c138f3: I hear you cooked the meal they ate before getting sick.
textByHashes.ff6d0fc767af4a1af71eedb4cf02ca48a4dfb4c2: Maybe because the Captain's thinking of firing you - Arsen heard it from his brother. The Corsairs don't need a navigator anymore.
textByHashes.fd23194ee48fd1101cdb539632a23ea603edc15a: We'll see what they have to say about that!
textByHashes.380891afe864304898222489f9f5426521996a75: Maybe you're just a nasty person.
textByHashes.36db8fdd7d8f3ef67715c4585ebf8e3826d83d92: Ithoi admits poisoning you all and faking the curse.
textByHashes.78aa297cdb0b5d938b906a841c854e59bb43ab57: Ithoi admits he poisoned the crew! He's faked this whole curse!
textByHashes.179c2742d0e1714564f17719a296670a88fc6e24: I know you've faked the curse.
textByHashes.a26fae702fd541ced416bfe6ed6a468d56e200f0: I bet I can prove you're well enough to get up.
textByHashes.9a7417ea02b1236d2f8bcb6797b0807cb56ef57a: Maybe I should try to get more information out of him before trying to make his hut catch fire.
textByHashes.d4abf14415bf9f10317595d63459db17b21be04c: Well, I guess that proves he's well enough to get up! And apparently he knows some magic too.
textByHashes.6386058116629fc97583054a2f4ddeb487143c7a: I saw you running around! You're not sick!
textByHashes.2e47bb927676dba290612f83c5b98163e127dd61: We'll see what the Captain has to say about that.
textByHashes.343b81f79e367a4e41601065402f80115fed9734: Ithoi's faked the curse. I've seen him running around, healthy.
textByHashes.e7f5d05e4ccadbd8871f38816069499eaff56dfb: I've seen Ithoi running around. He's not sick at all.
textByHashes.1b5b137f023d6cd309feacfe6a94ce3e419a6aec: Why don't you kill him yourself?
textByHashes.734e8103aea40a79b29dccbc8e4edffeda4c8445: I don't believe in capital punishment.
textByHashes.e70e9385788ce0cb2630dbe396b8b1792c5de677: Ithoi faked the curse, and I've killed him.
textByHashes.e1bb83c72760065bd3abf5f8efdbf20e831d897f: I've killed Ithoi for poisoning your crew.
textByHashes.0b70644876420af213d406e5dc289b267d839bc6: I did indeed. So what brings us all the way out here?
textByHashes.fb28f48cba57011019c1a8f5cc2d4907d58c10a0: Sounds like a job for me! What do you need?
textByHashes.8a1a9275304e21bd5f88b477325a29254546962b: And you think this is what happened to Arrav?
textByHashes.7114913b9a0f157828ebb9d3c329aa864ce3a61b: But what does that have to do with the mastaba?
textByHashes.569db012b85a0a16fabb2f6e27067f4da0050c64: Ah, I see. Well, if there's any information on heart preservation in there, I'm sure I can find it.
textByHashes.76fcdb49927e4398040a87cf116187427b7b8501: Thanks for the heads up. I'll be careful.
textByHashes.852d751919359bcaa5fb83c59040c4d44c0547ca: I'll have to pass right now. I have some other things I need to do.
textByHashes.254b04f48518f97677a5b2698d797368e6796c7b: What do I need to be doing again?
textByHashes.b428d425848d59c3bcbe4f4e10c02615306657a8: I think I've discovered what we need. We should be able to preserve Arrav's heart using a specially prepared canopic jar.
textByHashes.675e9228810e3ff9acf6e4c32f951b988d045a4c: We need to fill it with three dwellberries and a ring of life. I'll get started right away.
textByHashes.b1ff1ac6818887e9d87af1b59535c97be2249082: We need to fill it with three dwellberries and a ring of life. I'm working on it right now.
textByHashes.ac456323b66f9290581cbd223b993ef628eca73c: This canopic jar should be able to preserve Arrav's heart!
textByHashes.594111f2ec7221f065bee4a0c1688156f254b71b: Have you found where Arrav's heart is?
textByHashes.b322f9b64b3cb5f8589631db7c5df2355edda9f7: Ah, I know Trollweiss. I've been tobogganing there.
textByHashes.b5b3d0b668c6c48a3d5f2a3fbc051ffed71714ce: Well, then I'd best get going. Where can I find these tunnels?
textByHashes.c5a41b365bbe10bc2ca5de779c0537e0e8841b7f: You seem to have a lot of contacts.
textByHashes.d5a60a72a3ec8fd6d7c968727103edf0646145ab: So are they all looking into Zemouregal for you?
textByHashes.45e3ede2bc315f475a2a0352fdcaf9b1bba458d5: So how did you first end up researching the Mahjarrat?
textByHashes.825d9b42c8f1dcbe3ba5fed0ae9db75a8c959bb9: That's a risk I'm willing to take. I'm here to help you.
textByHashes.8b73ea6ec3a0580622b0966c938f5d25e802158c: Not if I have anything to say about it. Arrav, I need to find your heart. With it, I can free you!
textByHashes.317c06d2c9314ac5a07be34debca3a659eff082a: Do you know where it is?
textByHashes.fad62f41f3e24e9331431a383bd506fff08f7c36: It's , and I will save you Arrav, I promise.
textByHashes.cb1393a2c46d6f05e74707232e01aecdc7620a88: I did! The heart wasn't there, but I think I know where it is. I reckon it's in the base near Varrock.
textByHashes.23c223db706dfa4c69655294f89e9119c9ec192c: Well, take a look at these plans I found and see what you think.
textByHashes.99d1412a530fce6283592fc03927c5c82a776389: Well, that sounds an awful lot to get past. It sounds like an impossible mission!
textByHashes.063624ab38c1d664456e964ec260379c5ecc42d4: But what about the energy surges? I don't really fancy getting fried!
textByHashes.99cabef37879f844dd987d88d67c007c1cfa5e36: Okay, so to summarise, I need some sort of insulated protection along with a crossbow and grappling hook?
textByHashes.a9d8ee9040912e8c4358c682d4b34bdb4e49055b: I still need to do some preparation.
textByHashes.2e1b6e382400c6ee74d9ea509623ac48f782595d: You can say that again, though that does leave me with some questions...
textByHashes.41aaf5d788aff97b578ab4077c3228a862860857: Teleporting directly into the room... Keeping a Mahjarrat at bay... Those aren't the kind of skills that just anyone possesses. Not to mention that Zemouregal knew you!
textByHashes.bfbcad630c8fe8dabdda51cb72eb8fb5d683a1b1: I guess... It's just, you made out you were just researching the Mahjarrat. This is clearly a lot more than that.
textByHashes.ea0cb6aab799690d2c95ec3676ea7aeb17b852ca: So does this mean we can free him now?
textByHashes.cd979bd2b89dca3e2dfaf39c8326ea0b69b8bba0: Anything I can help you with?
textByHashes.90c6af62f13f18b5a357f68907aa4fa85699e1f2: I can help. What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.bf2a3f8a9e8029f910584de8e7d19f3b0808f3ea: No. I'm afraid I have other things to be doing.
textByHashes.e374a1f057223bf04e2081d35a390c4ee813120f: Hello. I'm helping Lord Hosidius find his missing son. I was wondering if you could help me.
textByHashes.bfaa90c6f11ebd547ce067606bd0f525435f49f3: Hello, I'm helping Lord Hosidius find his missing son. I was wondering if you had any idea where he might have gone?
textByHashes.8e59ede98a05c8429445c020d0d0ff0bb7230a50: Calm down, you have nothing to fear from me. I just want to help find Artur. Do you know where he is?
textByHashes.403b08100dda9339bc12c566bfd30cd43dd92801: Well don't worry, your secret is safe with me.
textByHashes.5e0ecf3d5773782012a517b4ffff7dd2dd2e3684: Where should I be looking again?
textByHashes.05546b937753f972544f1c52db6db4ce3c8324ce: I'm looking for information on the Royal Accord of Twill.
textByHashes.6f60bb8ddd20a2cb89e4cac4edf095fe52a0a9ac: What if I wanted to find the original?
textByHashes.3325d751cb82d2f0b1bc8efea05ce984d07d6b1c: Do you know where I can find the book?
textByHashes.f2af20571854150dd3d52c75697cc3f611d33be5: Could you remind me where I can find that book on the Accord?
textByHashes.8f196e86e43cad3fffdb792a5103a747b3251745: I'm . Your father sent me to find you. He's worried about you.
textByHashes.6fe49aad88fb34eba75521ace1289a43fd775cf3: Well could I help speed things along in some way? I promised him I'd get you home.
textByHashes.97a9dcc412faed35ad6552b95980b87c431c4274: By something important do you mean the Royal Accord of Twill?
textByHashes.0261ad07dd519509220c0c574549709043e7f063: How do you think I found you?
textByHashes.9fcbbc165cfcd5453059f6e46619dbf3f0986d20: Typical. Fine, I'll kill the snake. Just wait here.
textByHashes.4a51bf2648f7f40a80dfd3dce02cc37b73349684: Not yet. You'll get it once you've returned home.
textByHashes.63e04f4ac748a1011c7557192d839724195757e5: Why do you want the Accord anyway?
textByHashes.89b0099a32d5c326f7fbccdd374545416aa67766: But that was a long time ago. Why does it matter now?
textByHashes.09a6630d4e16ae9e043876aa4fb5cfb6661f84c6: And you think the five houses would do a better job?
textByHashes.dc62bd65e5bad0bd89fe02f93fb9ab2649339a88: What makes you say the Council have done a bad job?
textByHashes.14fed67b3a7cfe1c4fecb0ad64aac29878526a1e: But aren't the five houses partially to blame as well? They rule the cities.
textByHashes.d0fe84ea8dbd6c175148d21618a30e99ab567502: Hmmm, fair enough. Anyway, we'd better get off.
textByHashes.c1f13fef32de7364d3e197c5b25f71375a691de1: Fair enough. Now let's be off.
textByHashes.95be118ceb6b98d6f80d8c80d74f2b768f354328: I won't. Now let's get going.
textByHashes.f6a30a31c0d9ef802bf843bb32bce4b428b34a3c: I did. I don't have it with me though.
textByHashes.b04e07abcaac22dc214af161928b01957b9d3c8a: I did. I assume you'll be wanting it.
textByHashes.9ddc883a4f6a261ddc60bce7f9a64f327edc0032: So if they don't pass the exams they can't dig at all?
textByHashes.3bf2818b133628ea19bfe28e96712ee6cdce08ca: But why are you writing the letter? Shouldn't he?
textByHashes.46a35d1da36ce53ab9ea9840e262fcb86f8aaf6b: Oh, I see. I'll ask him if he'll approve me, and bring my stamped letter back here. Thanks.
textByHashes.c46ff21945a444f688d29745d231156b09e67e74: I have lost the letter you gave me.
textByHashes.9295332cf53bc9dc4ed969edd08669351490e8ed: Alright, I'll try and get it.
textByHashes.75ce6cbf82ecedfaef2c503517851d6161153ded: I have been given this letter by the examiner at the digsite; can you stamp it for me?
textByHashes.14cfb6d10172ed23c7736fcfd1814f87a2be39d6: Ok, I will. Thanks; see you later.
textByHashes.b80bfd0319f850c3903eed3a7276707f24dce92a: I seem to have lost the letter of recommendation that you stamped for me.
textByHashes.16c7da5fe18a819045b0e1ced1b23727ba6aa8e7: I have another letter here; could you stamp it for me again?
textByHashes.88d3ee26fac92abbf9b2a73342a900159c835f64: Here is the stamped letter you asked for.
textByHashes.aef3028606f5d80ed05b6daa9128c8aea2257a3d: The study of the earth, its contents and history.
textByHashes.1f42543a46c67866b8055edf0590f8bba4bbf9de: The study of gardening, planting and fruiting vegetation.
textByHashes.817f748fd791879249966f4aa1957baa55e81ef2: The study of planets and the history of the worlds.
textByHashes.c79358815be937bc937eb2608a8782265ab0e4f0: The combination of archaeology and vegetarianism.
textByHashes.ab80e9c4f45f4348bca481cbcc103d44d96dd8a2: Magic users, miners and their escorts.
textByHashes.fecae602bbca19921b7950a93b386b25218af0f3: Local residents, contractors and small pink fish.
textByHashes.fb7cd5799612d22d12ff9f4582bd471249f53b8f: All that have passed the appropriate Earth Sciences exam.
textByHashes.47d8142a7dbed570895a8f18f910bb3a076817d7: Heat-resistant clothing to be worn at all times.
textByHashes.209e49d33817d52f16806cdcee9fb413fdef6156: Rubber chickens to be worn on the head at all times.
textByHashes.0008ced213f2d8deb90aea126ac9a07636c53b23: Gloves and boots to be worn at all times; proper tools must be used.
textByHashes.41daa5055ebb740af6131296eed07ef9066b1c84: Protective clothing to be worn; tools kept away from site.
textByHashes.16c40afd2a5ea9977650bfdd62efc8e469d92d07: Can you help me with the Earth Sciences exams at all?
textByHashes.083153f270a84f7e37aa16a4f187a7c4b15c02f9: Well, that's not too helpful, there are lots of those around here; can you remember where you last had it?
textByHashes.dce7f1e19e889416a77b36de86b2cfb8bff5fc73: Okay, I'll have a look for you.
textByHashes.0e5308cd7523c02f8b001432cc0052c6581d25b0: I need more help with the exam.
textByHashes.a9deb01fc26d7820cce42bff26645225abc62bb5: Do you know where you dropped him?
textByHashes.20d51b71dd0e3a96612680e188f136b1a13cb608: Leave it to me, I'll find it.
textByHashes.9a4fae00096f0f19cc80f6c15cb8ec56da39a79e: Hey, something has been dropped here...
textByHashes.bc854add677c41fe3e9650d891f42fd446a322c7: I am stuck on some more exam questions.
textByHashes.6fe3362910476a8d248e29a14974672c926695e5: Oh, right. So if I find it you'll help me?
textByHashes.f62bb7815fedb38f477570437e2755825f352beb: Any ideas where it may be?
textByHashes.c23455bfe70bc135f747f719acc4c583a739e206: I'm getting there. Have you found my special cup yet?
textByHashes.65b542a5fb1889f55f1091e6ef59ab2a4a2e3c0e: So how do I become invited then?
textByHashes.555200b76f82919a5b318ccf730824bb38ccd01a: I've some here that you can have.
textByHashes.6a985943b9fae645e99793bec02db43f5e31358d: I already have a full panning tray; perhaps I should search it first.
textByHashes.132452495ad13453cc45e430f27e9b236f4dd1ce: There are more exam questions I'm stuck on.
textByHashes.1514b2845fc998e1817a2a9cdce5f057a6a1b57f: I'm going to pass the Earth Sciences exams so I can dig at the site north of here.
textByHashes.958c96efc6ff0770ae9c2ecdbdb064b4af60400c: Can you tell me more about the tools an archaeologist uses?
textByHashes.f422413661863b4b6e4772c3621a50acbec8e9cb: Okay, what about a specimen brush?
textByHashes.7d84a2002d2d079ca9705dec8145b594286a2b76: Sounds like I'll need to be sneaky to get one of those, then... Okay - trowel?
textByHashes.81b417a3549dd07a8fae5cc4507ccdd1dfd7eb2b: Of course! I should probably talk to those students again; they were very helpful.
textByHashes.c89961472183546002613d02a6822256ed17e965: I am ready for the next exam.
textByHashes.d4186e1d4e556d7d73eb7cb6110e9163a09393fe: Samples cut and cleaned before transportation.
textByHashes.c4bf365c614fdcdb1e8c59d52660d68b881e6599: Samples ground and suspended in an acid solution.
textByHashes.e320fa5e9f378b79211943b488a9cdc51b6b47fc: Samples to be given to the melon-collecting monkey.
textByHashes.7809d054586aca286fca58058b8989e25de63925: Samples taken in rough form; kept only in sealed containers.
textByHashes.58283711fa01f0926b911797fef50e5dbb88096c: Finds must not be handled by anyone.
textByHashes.7c59d9b0318d5469055a8f02e84f6297c798d50a: Finds must be carefully handled, and gloves worn.
textByHashes.9fcef8470b70840752e77c8ba7e7db3bf1ab0338: Finds to be given to the site workmen.
textByHashes.2934dc60c8cdf662dd29b876ded352fe93a8b74f: Drop them on the floor and jump on them.
textByHashes.791ad75cd1ff78331fc3c0f928a4c4de4bb02d11: Rock pick must be used flat and with a strong force.
textByHashes.5d73de6869bd89093767574d64ec0e3e3ea27a0a: Always handle with care; strike cleanly on its cleaving point.
textByHashes.d63964e096a1814421eea93667e495c02348f8bb: Rock picks are to be used to milk cows on a rainy morning.
textByHashes.7bc414b7daa6c82e75f590d652aca9c0a9cfeecf: Great, I'm getting good at this.
textByHashes.7a5692e047463d78b76c4952422f8b7e88f4c407: I am stuck on a question.
textByHashes.e9cd799218589156d0e8dd17c72d880faf22a1a9: Sorry, I didn't mean to disturb you.
textByHashes.0944cf13c337f8b4551418f37145146e39c20216: Hi there! I passed my second Earth Sciences exam.
textByHashes.e189f8b80589c7b0d533d68e64cbd4787fa16495: Yes! Someday I'll know as much as you! Now, where did I leave those students....
textByHashes.ef60c29e881a6e44e434449eb27f86577f2c0324: I am ready for the last exam...
textByHashes.ee259fc39b8f8a415e65d53fd73102f80f5e19e6: Samples may be mixed together safely.
textByHashes.8adda639d1289436cb5773286081c22c7b30604f: Samples cleaned, and carried only in specimen jars.
textByHashes.3d3f74d472bd08e2d7905cbbc8f6679f7ef11789: Sample types catalogued and carried by hand only.
textByHashes.b51ef38b4ed28016e0f7eb3fb4aa839473f76f14: Samples to be spread thickly with mashed banana.
textByHashes.59473a92c9705b931e8e43f508bdda870946b328: Brush quickly using a wet brush.
textByHashes.75927f7ff18a47d45e3204025898bd85c71ffce7: Brush carefully and slowly using short strokes.
textByHashes.cda56e8ff7ad24c3125ce623180161e01358acdb: Dipped in glue and stuck to a sheep's back.
textByHashes.6618ee8c32677232aee468ca4ea0921ab49f4a24: Bones must not be taken from the digsite.
textByHashes.eeee1797ad04675d334b83633e7e80b60eaa8a71: Bones to be ground and tested for mineral content.
textByHashes.c1e46da383511bc2dc1bf98964873542fd61e196: Handle bones very carefully and keep them away from other samples.
textByHashes.916a7700c5b8c90fc7f3b01a5fb709e6bd18d5ce: Ah... Yes... Erm... I think I had better go and revise first!
textByHashes.4855174ee57f66c1b476c07d5733d376edae6145: I can dig wherever I want now!
textByHashes.da104d53032c7cf0225870f0e7c132b6494efa77: Okay, I'll remember that. Thanks for all your help.
textByHashes.9ae14f9b9ffc47e17dd27caac88784e3c27a803f: Err... OK I'll see what I can do, but I'm not sure where I'd get one.
textByHashes.4c058baaf820c457e474452556bc4355573b7080: OK, I'll see what I can turn up for you.
textByHashes.ef0d8d122b74bac8a950ba1fcc969b0e833ada44: Would an opal look like this by any chance?
textByHashes.60ae12f6a13a0d9e291f1ec3101065fb8508afe5: I did it! Level 3 Earth Sciences!
textByHashes.ccd50ce882db372bb10aa40a5522db5bb9a2423b: Well, I'm not really sure; I guess I should see what I can find around the site.
textByHashes.32813674be906331e113baaa1a51beff6aec2877: Take a look at this talisman.
textByHashes.afa9c742879300395c199340ccd5485b1af6f233: Oh, ok. If I find anything of interest I will bring it here.
textByHashes.5b492cd5f7c074f45d198361c49e5289f60b2128: I lost the letter you gave me.
textByHashes.8c6395fed47344d05dd10ef8d0c2848295159fe2: It says, 'I give permission for the bearer... to use the mine shafts on site. - signed Terrance Balando, Archaeological Expert, City of Varrock.'
textByHashes.94223a58c9d9d612a55c3c3fdb27d6a7802d1c0d: Here, have a look at this...
textByHashes.f47c77d9c434e4c38e18ee54b7e33dc204f6ac7b: Hey, I think I could fit down here. I need something to help me get all the way down.
textByHashes.f034740390dc2ccab6585f993e4eed7d48407b60: Hmmm, there's a room past these bricks. If I could move them out of the way then I could find out what's inside. Maybe there's someone around here who can help...
textByHashes.c04c11f742d92c47d80e3a87cc0e823156d94a8d: I have been invited to research here.
textByHashes.7f6aed242f1df2dd3d5552476ff3adf6dbd3c294: Do you know where to find a specimen jar?
textByHashes.5c472e3152ed199257a1d53de6cbd7f1a0e33b0e: I'm here to get rich, rich, rich!
textByHashes.d51191f48f9b1d4f9e54aeb124326a6a5075b3ec: How do you move a large pile of rocks?
textByHashes.1ed48d126c38815ac04bda6049010fde3297502a: It's ok, I already have one.
textByHashes.6151de394cf1c404a3a9fb87efc82757f800d4aa: Mmmm... The lid is shut tight; I'll have to find something to lever it off.
textByHashes.776f97483fc65f4dfe91e2676b7a6d4281fb79b7: I can't pick this up with my bare hands! I'll need something to put it in. It looks and smells rather dangerous though, so it'll need to be something small and capable of containing dangerous chemicals.
textByHashes.ecc3886e42f8898f76ac9deb14eaf5f5cd1e6f97: I'm not sure what this stuff is. I had better be VERY careful with it; I had better not drop it either...
textByHashes.56914e70e6fbc698bbf4a6f55b5d5056858eb2ac: Do you know what this is?
textByHashes.1ddd50ac08febc9ed8050df92563e17bc9243230: From one of the barrels at the digsite.
textByHashes.7ea7b40412de207031159fbb40f74dc04bd60794: Do you know what this powder is?
textByHashes.9f97a2b103143731b604087ac1f1a966a24a74ff: Now, what am I trying to achieve here?
textByHashes.8a76086611bf7b7e186265fcba3f01e35deb7c33: That would be like cutting the lawn with nail scissors! It would take a year to chip away these rocks!
textByHashes.6eaeb26c3617e5ca6cc2d2e70acc3005de48c91c: That was a good idea, but these blocks are huge. I' m going to need something much more powerful to shift these...
textByHashes.c3b7127ea19f3a6bf4e75dd4dabbc4f586506a85: Okay, the mixture is all over the bricks. I need some way to ignite this compound.
textByHashes.50f7a5895f166bc4626404e5e4e7535dd85ff7ef: Whoa! This is going to blow! I'd better run!
textByHashes.593dc58d03a2a64a123b227b48ce6b857ec3baf7: Wow, that was a big explosion! What's that noise I can hear? Sounds like bones moving or something...
textByHashes.78f66a3aa4b2d1c3b295b9cdf7f073df0c5c9db2: It says: Tremble mortal, before the altar of our dread lord Zaros.
textByHashes.36947bf118c1a3fd549e012655a509d774d20c64: I managed to find something... interesting.
textByHashes.2babaf5dccef20b9ee39a070897ee79a0dfd302c: A talisman linked to Zaros, so Terry says.
textByHashes.711cbb183c4cbe48809029cbe4dac6ffa9ad173a: I found this in a hidden cavern beneath the digsite.
textByHashes.0517c2812f178be7e389da822a37d6c0bb0fa30c: There is an altar down there. The place is crawling with skeletons!
textByHashes.c41aed72999f3ee08e78c14f3c931dde3eadc98f: What's that cute creature wandering around?
textByHashes.77e75541c8661f5104dfe4fa34f7bf33bb88c8f3: What kind of creature is Izzie?
textByHashes.5dddcf6dd288dbe814b350986a02528960fc00c2: So, what do you do down here anyway?
textByHashes.29b9ccda9faac4db93ee4c4f3580c8b562a431b2: You study magic then, what kind of magic? I do a bit of magic myself you know.
textByHashes.ebaedb1085b2661bd7fc0927dae800900a8f08c5: Never. How could they think that? Though, I suppose gnomes aren't known for their magic.
textByHashes.964690d30558a4f0a955006c8ddfb353f8674265: Oh, yes I love a bit of History.
textByHashes.71ec5af659d3f785cccfa5fc4602586689cea079: He must have done something very bad then.
textByHashes.afbfa2b70ac0bc98aff510fc68f8e21497e3dec0: It's hard to see what he could misuse light in a way that would get him exiled.
textByHashes.a5584bcc9058980259eb44d94aa0196c6fe38374: Oaknock? I haven't heard of him before.
textByHashes.f408b273c380068f617830971e863b4b964cd723: Errm, not right now. I'd better go.
textByHashes.a09860b3b54522e6246ac5cd05027ca26de05bca: I'm more interested in your researches right now.
textByHashes.7b546b946e3a091a843f4db390abc154ef025fb5: I stand corrected - tell me more.
textByHashes.bcd8af0cd8c07297394a793337db287c6d28113c: Actually, I'm a bit busy right now.
textByHashes.34ef9b370522567cfda8dab034ef1efe1b6aa721: I've had a look in the other room now.
textByHashes.b84083cb94898ee44d62a6d79d22e76510b85a8e: There was a pit with a crystalline looking bowl in the centre.
textByHashes.920c42f5aa710f98b708350558cbb065cba838e2: There is also a large strange looking machine...
textByHashes.2c0e5bea0d9b767cfbe1212fae81c05adf5a8252: Oh I know, you're talking about Hazelmere aren't you?
textByHashes.6b8d0c886cae30715bd99cbdabffb72479ae6bc4: Didn't he help create the Grand Tree?
textByHashes.450d726c61cedc6d9d0065c9fb74bfb8561c27fa: Wait a minute, am I going to have to translate everything he says using that dictionary again?
textByHashes.153f52e994d5e1be887305de5f738b6f9e08ec45: But he only speaks Ancient Gnomish!
textByHashes.e4b70d535e6d73ab9bbe65b4e90a1aadf9014932: Well alright, if you say so. What do you want me to ask him?
textByHashes.523883afe429a343d81d70837fa7e83fc5cac3b1: Right then. I'd better be on my way. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.066c94d98346d7512d4a1875237f60eea7fcab45: Not yet I'm afraid. Where do I find him again?
textByHashes.1a3edade85147428a497e5861dcab19404604a96: Maybe you need some pictures. Though your pot plant adds something to ambiance of the place.
textByHashes.8c17a6f4926db0469ba19a56b73fd512670c3f20: Really? It's survived a long time. It must be a special pot plant.
textByHashes.5dcf54c30f71e65ee434a75449de323f0ea66012: How very odd. Anyway, I'd better get on my way to Hazelmere... See you soon.
textByHashes.40ab8205635d7b17b6a784a7deab4b1fc4f7770d: Brimstail has sent me to ask you some questions.
textByHashes.479659d8c56ed3d11a958f663ecefe3137580dd3: I have some questions about the old days. Brimstail has been filling me in about Gnomish History.
textByHashes.014b52270dd64658de1c1b08f550865c3baa10cf: It sounds like a fascinating time. It also sounds like some important things happened then. Events that we shouldn't forget.
textByHashes.5643cb9222c2778ef6934e7385526a5303bb3e45: He has also found a machine - he says it was built by Oaknock...
textByHashes.f0fbe5840a380d657eddc261c8d10c2d1f16b517: Erm, I'm sorry I don't understand a word you're saying.
textByHashes.044828745e3d083af5fae57c46c096810019f4a2: Weird! How are you doing this Hazelmere?
textByHashes.0d3409cb268883054355eb732bdba9a8169f788d: So how do I do this. Wow. That's impressive. Brimstail was telling me that Gnomes don't trust Mages these days. Can you hear me? Glouphrie wasn't it? He did something bad and got exiled. Ooh, I'm feeling a little dizzy. You knew him didn't you? What can you tell me about him? And what's this machine that Oaknock built? Isn't that magical as well? Do you know what it does?
textByHashes.9a0b755fcab083a47c315688e977523c41ed4a98: Clear my mind? Hey, how did you know my name.
textByHashes.77890eb0e61e631b22cf19efc3f39633e5755992: How do I think about nothing? I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.5170e21fa175ed1d3d4b638ad6e828ce0d4be80d: Hmm tasty lobster. Gah! I'm thinking about something. Stop thinking about Lobsters. Pink Lobsters. Big Lobsters. Lobsters with wings. Wings? Lobsters don't have wings. ARRGH. I can't do this.
textByHashes.27c9b40c1117d36ce03065902df6fb77f6e2bfd2: Hey! Was that you next to the tortoise? You look so handsome!
textByHashes.455c6257b37aac2897892570019fb730e55ba621: So where's this Arposandra place anyway?
textByHashes.5fbaecdcafe5b5680983a384a11348d50febf683: So the machine that Brimstail has found is the one that Oaknock built to stop Glouphrie's illusions. Do you know how it worked?
textByHashes.7f677b8f5d21201080c6e919eccf4b97165dfd47: this, maybe it will help you.
textByHashes.0f84717c79822791465c0bc303a7f3be0b9ee7f7: Well, thank you, Hazelmere. You've told me a lot of things I need to ponder for a while.
textByHashes.6a66efa2ab7177bd6cf645e0d0820f28b10a9809: I've visited Hazelmere, he told me all sorts of interesting things.
textByHashes.72a684719374124a2834a62eaacb19c07f63733c: Right. Well it starts during the Great Migration...
textByHashes.c5b671112aedc415caebb4f337407e0aa55edb00: Oh yes it does have such a glamour. It seems to use crystal discs to work in some way.
textByHashes.ee933ee794078eff61b66febe149b6a178bb355c: What's that? Something just moved behind you...
textByHashes.e228a1cdf13bdd268a299b359052cb619df8cefd: Hmm, something is afoot. I sense sabotage....
textByHashes.a2bd0cbc449bd8a110ec51c958242e4881920328: The machine is broken, I suspect sabotage...!
textByHashes.e383765da6cadf082d96b37c3678f3e6163e1bb6: I'm confused, it must have happened while we were here talking!
textByHashes.6a152d7ee31ced63089d87c478410483bd8b2e3f: I did see something odd behind you...
textByHashes.c06d46b77ec7c03104de80f3ebe730022bf1808b: Hey! Don't look at me like that. The only person I've talked to is Hazelmere.
textByHashes.b774ace5fb3a69f073cc749c5f2e8ad77e08e976: Wait! Wait! None of this makes any sense. There must be another explanation.
textByHashes.ac3acbd55a28bf8867b09942ca951d6c8fd3c14f: The intruder must have been invisible.
textByHashes.6b932f284c00806b6203dedf22b7547562d2919a: Of course! I've seen this before. Karam in the 10th squad used some sort of magic to make himself invisible.
textByHashes.3508695981eff85f9b4aeefd572ee923ed0c9c3a: No, but I think our saboteur must have learnt the same magicks. Is Glouphrie still alive?
textByHashes.819a91a082b300f5a08ffa80471790f9f2160010: So this was done by Glouphrie? Is he still alive?
textByHashes.d9efe399dc435eb88463e8697b4a3db35147f956: You mean the gnomes that went with Glouphrie to Arposandra?
textByHashes.897de4e524833a97236d863a125e25a357b394d6: Because there is an illusion that they want to remain hidden?
textByHashes.8184b59cd2bc925b51678eb9c972e1e016f27f63: Not yet. I'll get right to it.
textByHashes.8dba08ae88cf1a2e0dde253ec55a3de4e22bad5c: I'm not getting anywhere with these 'sticky runes'.
textByHashes.5bb1beb1a4e78ddf7d41ff3ae8662c4a87157589: Runes are runes! None of them are sticky! They're all round and disc-like and definitely non-adhesive.
textByHashes.888aab2c143b003401c242d78ec9899fcee7926c: Oh, all right. I'll give it a go. Well - air, water and fire and earth runes. There's nothing sticky about them.
textByHashes.ddfbe1671b17f289ff0ebc4c03b6f29cf2cf918c: Mind and body runes. Again distinctly non-glue-like in any way.
textByHashes.c6928a66787509246b2840e76a7c1b2df89c95e6: Nature and Cosmic runes. Once more distinctly lacking in any gooeyness. Bah! This is a waste of time.
textByHashes.c2447886895a66ec5b786bf5b657c63c0ed6ad38: Maybe. What do I do with the rune when I find it?
textByHashes.e369dfaef15934d92f75a6c56034c868d72e6f36: Well it looked powdered in the glue.
textByHashes.d5dacb91809dc29797d0b1fe88730c2e612d3978: Well, I'm still a bit unsure about getting this glue.
textByHashes.ff4df231636d051952eb0d3e1bb040414ec16b71: It looked ambery in colour and sticky, smelt of pine and had flecks of silvery stuff in it.
textByHashes.ea9e1d8f354b471faca7d5e720a39a60b1644b21: So where do I put the stuff?
textByHashes.0de5f43718bc7d806cec8770089419646ece068c: Oh, I see - a liquid I suppose.
textByHashes.0f876f856afb0d4ea2faf3f51f28083cf01d45f3: Right. I'll go away and think about what you've said.
textByHashes.a25a29074e5b3888d9f65a4775fc1fbd040a200c: Now you're just confusing me more...
textByHashes.72f65ef5824bc2f6ed81bf67ae43887703eebfd8: I think I've fixed the machine now!
textByHashes.8d31d0d73b3340c0a6c37782ef221cc474bf1a52: Though I still don't think it's actually activated. There appears to be some sort of lock on the front. I think I know what the discs are for though. There's a slot in the front that looks like it might fit a disc, and a
textByHashes.b5aa47cd7fe30e3ed21a4f95e22b8855e8028915: I'm not sure yet. Maybe I should put a disc into the slot and see what happens?
textByHashes.805d94f8ebb3a172cc6aba73b03876b703063583: They also look as if they might fit in the slots on both of the machines. Maybe I should try it out?
textByHashes.91d3bf1604aeada401b5416c22855bb22442bb1e: I've been thinking that as well, I shall ponder it some more.. I'll work it out.
textByHashes.ed235daba37d995927e3efea09b2b2e4eea3a248: Interesting. But how do I work out which discs are worth what value?
textByHashes.93a55db74d7e0208625a5fcd991885bda93022d9: Thanks, I'm sure they'll be very useful.
textByHashes.134ba059449c2adefb76520f5ae26382afd21fff: I seem to have opened some sort of control panel.
textByHashes.ad8ad25f4bad0f8b2d16c660268b234e5c5b2b46: There seems to be more than one slot. Maybe I need more than one disc?
textByHashes.ebc80f5026395ebdd5ccb61ae061271c24cae7fe: Phew! I've got that machine working now. What do I need to do now?
textByHashes.18e6a10df33d3a5bf0e75da409b63c5e1df94030: So this was an illusion the Arposandrans went to so much effort to conceal? A pet. That wasn't cute enough.
textByHashes.cab825214c07dad9640412b7179b0331ba19d2cf: Where did you find this one?
textByHashes.697393732dba7f5061a8dd9dc56b0c6db864cd8e: So he's been keeping an eye on you while you do important magical research...
textByHashes.f91999caa1b5838cb17ec0ba35ba8d6ab4b1f416: In other words all places to keep an eye on what's going in the Stronghold...
textByHashes.97a0084d5d8c92fc4b2684ce2333f201431d95f3: Yes, they must be spies. They are watching us with those creepy red eyes. And they must have told someone that we were working on the machine.
textByHashes.f8e16bbe353d47808a08807dcc68cc0755c66d10: What should we do about these creatures?
textByHashes.4428addeebf9116f68e3cd1198f279f11eb44bb1: Good day sire, I take it you've noticed that cute creature you had in here is looking rather different now.
textByHashes.5a56b7c2bba3d14b312e0957f40bbaf51cd3b505: I think I do. It's a long story but the short version is this. The Arposandran gnomes have planted these creatures as spies to watch what's going on in the Stronghold.
textByHashes.667f6640a6fc45e8e0a2f7c2a5f0690115a73648: I have just reactivated a machine that was built by Oaknock that dispels illusions, and now these creatures true forms are revealed.
textByHashes.15d9090f8db3d011a1b3fd05f0b5da835802c5b3: Well, I wouldn't go as far as that – it is only through Brimstail's and my researches that we have established this is going on.
textByHashes.825a0953764829ac49b246cfe5e848d0283ccf3a: Not yet, I'm still looking for them.
textByHashes.76a2411d67f04adbc353fe1bc8d69c196e175be2: I think so. There were six in total.
textByHashes.68dae189b7b064149f51db6b9a759227fc331154: Help? I did all of the hard work!
textByHashes.56a7045957282e0871890d3b7226c5f54d28d006: So what will you do now?
textByHashes.627e5b888ba7be0e22b0cf5256ad325ef6e0adae: It's certainly worrying, and whoever sabotaged the machine couldn't have been far from here. Are there gnomes here who are also spies?
textByHashes.37bcd6ceca31374b18500afe67b235af1771f0de: If you find out more I'd be willing to help investigate.
textByHashes.1d1c8a7ecaedc22578b8ce16a49e399b2a15109a: Hmm I wonder what it does?
textByHashes.d225006b937387e51e18fd440cfee7099392e72e: If you're the greatest salesman in the world, why are you still selling goods from a stall?
textByHashes.d3a0606269226f262a4b84baf9ca4a60a0badb84: I'm too busy to help. Adventuring is a full time job you know!
textByHashes.8f11375247dc0d3cf9c76f3c3753cf09dcf9e46d: I'd like to help you but...
textByHashes.9a8921890e863fafe75491873f05f8fc47444e24: But you had better become the greatest merchant in Gielinor once I succeed!
textByHashes.5dbfdce2934c26a2019669ea64c35230682e8f39: Thank you. That is one of the warmest welcomes I've ever had! People generally treat travelling adventurers with suspicion.
textByHashes.5d5138b92757f54780354ecc48ba815a01ec45c1: What do you mean by that?
textByHashes.32bf4a89f6ca6bdad8ef6251a8511e88cc40fbe8: I'm looking for someone called Ali.
textByHashes.b5758bf1b5f14f8ea916f10c21da2a7f685c879f: I mean I'm looking for a specific Ali. He's Ali Morrisane's nephew.
textByHashes.64469ec93eba9be09b7f7054f76483373d2f1ed0: So can I buy a camel then? I'm hungry!
textByHashes.65313bbe304086990dc353275fd4765dc4ec918f: No, but thanks for your time.
textByHashes.c058aa6a408b4875098a50ab136a4b660266b287: Why would I want a camel? All they do is spit and...
textByHashes.19ef4a1cb4da5282e88a495675ff91bba2ab6d84: Actually, I think I was a camel in a previous life.
textByHashes.310efb4c90a55c4ac8673882c48193157202c539: So is the discount camel business good then?
textByHashes.5b975c44b2dfcd1f1d1d13bc81a7cc2154709daf: Why don't the authorities stop this?
textByHashes.7c8fad427740956ec9ffedc8fb212d0ef410b6c2: Well the weak will always be trodden on. Why not stand up to them?
textByHashes.46f9db630cd34f11d34ae3f60a1b4bee9f4fc546: You know the politics better than I do. What do you recommend?
textByHashes.739b1be1c28fa2fc3a039ed899664be0a577144c: Of course I know what to do! I was just testing you!
textByHashes.83e3c2976cbbc651fc23a56cea58805f7828104b: Perhaps I should know, but offered advice should never be shunned.
textByHashes.9d6c5cbc6305118e03416bf56cd75fb88c9bcb73: Are those camels around the side for sale?
textByHashes.4b789ee47a6d11ac2bdb2c78e2f65270313674df: I'm looking for Ali from Pollnivneach.
textByHashes.a26958bd6bff3c234c10a3e85a09c3ccebd29f51: Really? Do you have an uncle called Ali?
textByHashes.f30b62bdedb458ad2d8dca45a86764ae9831b60d: Oh dear! Do any of them own a stall in the Al Kharid Bazaar?
textByHashes.64036ac10c40ecd10af12a864554783b945e5ffb: Hold on... yes I can place him now. He has me looking for his nephew Ali, I think he needs some help with his shop.
textByHashes.b27b5dfeaa75c1e05c49d1d9f55c4a9b6cd79025: You wouldn't have seen his nephew about then?
textByHashes.54a6578b0ba83fe6d519b3a3dc194c3742a0a3cc: Tell me about Ali Morrisane's nephew.
textByHashes.768f6ab93438c99b6b83c5782d2da016f48721b3: Do you know where he is now then?
textByHashes.5392455dcf316bd7f4cc8cc361793a9b36e8fa76: Yes, I'd like a drink please.
textByHashes.d174b31883faf15cff4c94fd4b295a956de9a319: What about those two gangs? That seems exciting.
textByHashes.448b56c64da7abcbbb6f7abe229baf5550a1ba33: No thanks, I'm ok. Thanks for your time.
textByHashes.833d0d6ed3b32f0dfc03943993203deda035da3b: Do you have an uncle called Ali?
textByHashes.6810ac0115093d7b4653c5b392f22da82395bc26: Oh dear. Well do any of your uncles have a stall in the Bazaar in Al Kharid?
textByHashes.4120946ae5037fc5f456f366eef6a17fa0828c4a: Well do you know if anyone here does?
textByHashes.a915a1d0339c98ae245ac1c28da014f6edd77c8a: The 'Asp and Snake'? What a strange name for a bar.
textByHashes.a6ecf6b761f28f40a86dba3a686b774b3cdc8448: Yes, I get your point. It's a perfectly fine name.
textByHashes.28fa19f005cf212a70f4f59e1872056a5cd3c3bf: What?! How did you know that's who I was looking for?
textByHashes.29ed88e9a9742031bbb45aeab7d733198337cd00: Hmm. Well go on then, where is he?
textByHashes.27152e00276386c7c1b638bb835c83dd7cbc058e: Yes, I can imagine. Do you have any more recent information about him? Where is he?
textByHashes.f4e2fb30964f91727ae6508a3bf135c27d302d2b: You're right, I'm sorry for beating around the bush. Do you know where Ali's nephew is now, though?
textByHashes.87be7e6de8e92870ee13775570cd7954053ac066: Look, all I want to know is the whereabouts of Ali Morrisane's nephew.
textByHashes.f2fd8ea77c238bf9dd7836a943d0dcaee50afffa: No, no, no. Stop right there. You are not going to fool me into buying you another beer without first giving me some useful information.
textByHashes.7522cfdaeaf32a775f57bc273dadb9eb7718e906: Well if your lips are dry, I'll have to wring you like a wet cloth and squeeze out enough booze to fill another tankard. I'd reckon it would hurt though.
textByHashes.63ff2a6b094fbaaf8ff7c8ab5bb34175d7bde3a5: For the last time, where is Ali Morrisane's nephew?
textByHashes.7df91b17ae239b12604fe3e8d5af1a4163322fd8: I am trying to get to the bottom of this feud between you and the Menaphites.
textByHashes.1d58188d0762d69a0360b5d49434ed1e76f8f0ee: I'm just trying to understand why thieves of your repute would stoop to their level.
textByHashes.941c22c3e96ac87b8bedf79a4aaa9dac5e1f4194: So if they offered a camel back as a gesture of goodwill, would you and the rest of the bandits cease your hostilities?
textByHashes.f8b48a5ea702eebf29b1385966edb2f3c10a6f95: I am trying to figure out the feud that exists between you and the Menaphites.
textByHashes.b4c4f0638f80c859ef680705e1b13f1360a2d8a2: Nothing much, I'm trying to understand why thieves of your repute would stoop to the level of the Menaphites.
textByHashes.6439e02583ab5abc50990df87cff7238c5a059b2: So if they offered a camel as a gesture of goodwill would you and the rest of the bandits cease your hostilities?
textByHashes.eefc6722e876ad756739bd10f58049e37829705d: I am trying to figure out the feud that exists between you and the Bandits.
textByHashes.834ae30e3c078457a215b9650c9c808088067849: Word has it that the Menaphites are also involved in unsavoury behaviour.
textByHashes.dd6fbf87101f8dbb6590be1523dfeac37ace8e86: So if they offered a camel as a gesture of goodwill would you agree to cease hostilities?
textByHashes.a6db2486c406f337d4f514feb626efb480603479: Maybe if I got both gangs a camel, I could use the mutual good will to find out what happened to Ali's nephew.
textByHashes.659d59be5f333df3967c6016705905988581bbc6: Excellent! Although another two ugly camels would have been fine, I think.
textByHashes.6741a8d3f1da4fbbaedeef0d6c292b32660618c7: Can you tell me a little about them?
textByHashes.1b2f6abc06c348bccee4ee17ff7efc8748f04b37: Ok, ok, that's enough! They're camels, I get it.
textByHashes.38bd22183efbd6c6392e464a928efc5f0bca0656: What price do you want for both of them?
textByHashes.e99621290b31ab9b821d5dcc26d851ee73757318: So can I have them for free then?
textByHashes.a0fbc437f49a2ff9cd984dd2febf0fb379126a2f: Perhaps I could make another offer?
textByHashes.7ad8f9c41d8d930bffd41df5eb81bd49db8981b1: Would 200 gold coins for the pair of them do?
textByHashes.13eddb9e65eed03240abf7db7850dbcdf7000ece: Would 500 gold coins for the pair of them do?
textByHashes.a6f25c73bfd04d95ad744091723ac3ad92879ece: Would 1,000 gold coins for the pair of them do?
textByHashes.fee061a35c725677e485dc0a482706d38df02cd6: About those camels. I've lost the receipt, can I have another?
textByHashes.fa9fba48d893e11781754f2d64ec6c7d79c17f1b: No, they didn't. I sold them as Kebab meat!
textByHashes.6dff468010608695beda0fca3d3622b6501eca2c: I'm not really a camel person, so I gave them to a better owner.
textByHashes.495c552648636d1051a7227ac86285e022ecc664: I decided to try and use them to end the hostilities between the two gangs.
textByHashes.5cd935fdc6d0e325c1011c37194dcc77e3aac802: Still working on that, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.1a742a5fd0253bc078066bbd86aad3b7b175604f: Good news, the bandits have agreed to give you a camel in order to restore peace.
textByHashes.2646eb72c841aff586f817184e31bd3416ba69f4: Um... I'll get back to you on that.
textByHashes.5c6bb2a578e43e7e0600a8af0807e241a476b605: Oh no... why do I bother?
textByHashes.0937fd05179faf1817f7ffc8fdbc3174cbeeb5e4: Good news, the Menaphites have agreed to give you a camel in order to restore peace.
textByHashes.b946abe5e407a19b2e2d0037b9afde105ca1eb44: The camel approach doesn't seem to be working. Perhaps I should be more direct and try to join one of the gangs.
textByHashes.570f8742da3593f97b6b56b8684a991b6ca91207: Umm... no. Not yet. Actually I've come to ask about something else.
textByHashes.6dc311e6e999330723ef3e99b17705c9c1727bdd: Yes, of course, those pesky bandits should be taught a lesson.
textByHashes.213a09fd362ffb23306fea5e98bb75d631130f00: Yes I'd like to ask you about something else.
textByHashes.d4203e102d1c67d0d2e283cd0d7d254cbde9ec3b: Tell me about the other people in the town.
textByHashes.7a29a236c08f7271538a975fc48c4b59b10f3e32: So I noticed. Well, he has an uncle called Ali Morrisane, a market vendor in Al Kharid. That's all I really know about him.
textByHashes.47f907414b754368f339389e45f85eb6428c83ee: Perhaps later, I'm quite busy at the moment.
textByHashes.a2f22ce86e6f731784ef0ef74b7d2bbb34805c67: I haven't started yet. I'm still psyching myself up to it.
textByHashes.cf5eed52a7faf57f384c814bbbc9722adfd90ec6: What was that? Are you looking for a fight.
textByHashes.e8474ca0762de49a946b64a906fa9a4a27e105d5: I was wondering if I could ask you about something.
textByHashes.cd49273ca871b219918d5c82ab92640a69e07ca8: Yeah, I could do with a bit of advice.
textByHashes.3f4c44510e588a4c42bc35f2b1d0a25877b93284: Nah no problems here. I actually wanted to ask you about something else.
textByHashes.182668a5574e1429df63484424882dc7b2432c21: I need a little help, do you want to make some easy money?
textByHashes.b92f484ab87f6e3f741bb315d21d125d0b1322ed: Do you see that villager over there? If you could distract him for a bit I'll give you 10 gold coins.
textByHashes.f338e1f7a4bf08b5ad60057c880c4426e0461c3c: Oh, that money! I don't think you deserve it!
textByHashes.ac3037ea0c3dba76823ecb8611d74d6ebd652b4e: Shut up! Don't cause any more trouble or you'll regret it.
textByHashes.dc99fa670844470210af1fb0d14cc2e99b4d842c: Okay, here you go - you thief.
textByHashes.b7be41ae6fd2044e966d83b7d75efd4833047a93: I think I need to try a different tactic. Sorry, kid!
textByHashes.106e256c240a28b0366a1532e942890d61030c1e: No, they seem to have figured that one out already.
textByHashes.21e1c643aa9adc05112e0f304e0ac4d6a5006cbd: No problems here. I actually wanted to ask you about something else.
textByHashes.b899e85cf5b67e589fb89a7d81c2d321f9d4b339: Psst. Come here, I want to show you something
textByHashes.62c06c03e8014bfd2af0d3271c4afb1a2007a0ef: Actually, I'm still having problems getting in.
textByHashes.a04fa31d809573c50dce27bf50efcf141b9643db: Now that you mention it, yes I am having problems with the disguise.
textByHashes.6840de7e65543f974795295a889a7ad95ce0d603: I better be careful, this cactus is prickly!
textByHashes.6aa2f94b8e099666d73466944739e98b1e1502a8: I've lost the keys you gave me.
textByHashes.a7ae92fcd86afed3ca0254a895bd891c1a08b157: I've managed to stake the place out. What should I do now?
textByHashes.2faa6c3aa1abd70cdc99a0da81698c0eb61e45c2: I've managed to break in, but I'm unable to get the jewels.
textByHashes.da5c7dfaf6b98f8321235c37010f9f3119853063: Of course not, although the mayor did leave a number of hints lying around.
textByHashes.cc50e3b7bcd66998e400b51350e29b14d2983dd1: Actually I seem to have misplaced them.
textByHashes.a7484f82a45cf246cc21b31dbd656a3f7ae234a7: You can count on me to find out.
textByHashes.987415cfa0c9170f2a2ddd35d5205e96800e2650: Aw! You can count on me to find the traitor.
textByHashes.1638d426e79ff86e7c51b54d1aacbd020d7b5f8c: I was wondering if you could help me?
textByHashes.3f7c35db0c17f5f57e91539319d2e47a7db0fe40: I've heard there's a traitor among the Menaphites. What do you know about it?
textByHashes.48e0f7457782ba218ce5bf9f2634b56c850f2cd6: Really? So what do you know?
textByHashes.79bf4cb2bc6bb8d6433642468a56b4226b793a58: I suppose the name is a bit of a giveaway.
textByHashes.de787725f3b29a4c5c3a35886c0e897d9c3a6db2: That was a little too simple, are you sure it was him?
textByHashes.494ca577d94ecdef72f0a3fdbc214151408284d2: I see he drives a hard bargain.
textByHashes.b99c26a37b2bf36e3c559ace43d3d23255acce6a: I have discovered the identity of the traitor. It was...
textByHashes.5e1ed41ef03a938fae10c7a84e3331800e10e884: Actually he sold you out for...
textByHashes.cc545938bb706c631a6e25f42deef205f6450ca0: Actually I just want your help to, erm, remove someone. It's simple enough!
textByHashes.cc8a1d510dfe1da4a9699bc13e04e7fb31cbbb89: Don't worry about the consequences - I need it carried out in a manner which would draw no suspicion to me.
textByHashes.b7076407a0ed6a82dc14c602760cebaafb4634ce: Where would I get some snake poison?
textByHashes.dc30d521fcb7d9e6806fb2290a3ee302e1c1f8f9: What I meant was how do I extract the poison from the snake?
textByHashes.8193c13c1302041f864c450c3ddb077218764163: No, I'm still working on that.
textByHashes.c81ba47e5ace613a2fd42d52fa509a696ea01644: I have the snake. What else do you need?
textByHashes.631f27c4c913991d08e41f841f365c34972d810f: Erm, yes. Do you need anything else?
textByHashes.d844bcdd2ce4fda284c1973946ad8ae2d776cb71: Fine, fine, I'll get some camel dung.
textByHashes.3b9efbac4fbf543ce1acc0f99485e850147d9957: Just stop. Thanks for the poison and good day to you.
textByHashes.4aecf48d7d9500a975de3536963ac6353d42f4f8: I was wondering if I could have another batch of poison?
textByHashes.c4c99b879aa9ee11dd7e5e0df66ba9b706341f05: Well no, I was just being greedy and wanted another batch for no good reason.
textByHashes.06f8d2fb83716993685dd3bf665c2945bd1d8107: It's a long and not very interesting story.
textByHashes.182a8f6d985c4f92da94c4bfe8ceb9f78645ec30: Almost, his drink is poisoned. As soon as he gets back, he'll be done for.
textByHashes.d25ae810c22abb98550fb2065ca5b4a05a064117: I haven't spoken with him yet.
textByHashes.6ced1315c1620be854939820f77980893469a384: Ali the Operator said you wanted to see me.
textByHashes.4198f2dbe5f781dc196db60ee2017b12f76a5da4: So what are your plans for the bandits?
textByHashes.fce7bf303fdcca54338ae900c924a27dff585964: Wait, if you're not warring with the bandits, what are you planning?
textByHashes.c92985a0f663445436bb3f64f2d3558d29517aee: Actually I thought you were a ragtag band of good-for- nothing thieves sucking the life out of this innocent town.
textByHashes.15337a282403c22dc04edc580a03f207323ba80a: Sorry, I have this irrational hatred for megalomaniac, despotic zealots! Prepare to meet your maker, you big jerk!
textByHashes.69d82a4840a1e3bdb26828f67e2b69f89588db0b: Wait, your great-great-great-great-grandparents were the ones who killed Osmumten?
textByHashes.06f3b17bb1f161068920765a8cfbe7b55f410c07: You don't even know his name, and you claim to be the heirs to his empire? Come on.
textByHashes.7681c1dc63ff3c5d85ec23d72ab512b7160f5bdd: You're just a bunch of petty tyrants looking for an excuse to hurt people.
textByHashes.4c0c850da9fefcb8bad97182e6e3fa656c526de4: I hope so, because you're about to meet her in person. This is for Mehhar!
textByHashes.bd2df116eb25620f05c0b00c693039c4cf4bc1b5: No doubt I haven't seen the last of you... but what about Ali's nephew?
textByHashes.217d72afcff9b3e6db3edf56d93875b20e7417ab: Maybe the villagers will feel more talkative now that I've rid them of these evil Menaphites. Who knows, they might even give me a reward!
textByHashes.452345e86649f2868d7b8fd191e2b9a21a34131c: What can I say, you live and learn.
textByHashes.d390e57bc579cae5beedec3af793023fa1a80cf3: No thanks, I think I have a fair idea of what is going on in the town now.
textByHashes.4464c3c203cb5193ef31064ac066cc57f694245e: Well that's some show of gratitude! Can't I even get a 'thank you' for ridding your town of one of the gangs?
textByHashes.04cce79f11f2af7523e115439e1fd677de7063d0: I'll set this town right before I leave, I promise.
textByHashes.c97fd9b7b837c54cde401c0512402998231aa2fd: Maybe I wanted to make it MY town!
textByHashes.8ca791178073364e0e667d74b90b31143a4d8f28: Evil megalomaniacs set on destruction should be opposed.
textByHashes.97438c1bf7feb72632cc2c14a87f8f115a2b3a7f: Look, Gielinor is full of power mad evil-doers. I'm sure another will come along soon enough.
textByHashes.41c44d3d7d2d360bfe587eefd177c282c05cda31: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to upset you. Can we still be friends?
textByHashes.5f5ebcb3ebef23ba4331d0fb0a0caea00cef4f84: What?! I just single-handedly took apart one of the gangs that was ruining your town!
textByHashes.f961e66fd925e01be860d52871e9dc75bd3bc2ae: Oops. Sorry, I was just trying to help. So are things really that much worse?
textByHashes.3927231231f092ef69d16206ddde4936bfc5ca9b: You know, this adventuring lark is a lot more complicated than I thought!
textByHashes.5955787ebb6a5e3f043ebcdd2304c85d7acc4042: What do you mean by fix the mess I created?
textByHashes.915c10df9cf977e6de871a53ad3e31b69c26bd2d: Don't jump to conclusions, I didn't do it for you.
textByHashes.0850631049c444e3ad9e386a7bd21a834fbc6167: That's what I'm here to talk to you about.
textByHashes.ef0e4418d86800849bdb792a5e6bea33a404497a: No, I'm here to give you an ultimatum: either leave the town of your own free will or I will make you.
textByHashes.0978cc3bfd74821c6ad75d10e28750a07645f7e8: I have defeated your champion, now get out of town.
textByHashes.1ecb3dbe2626dba9c7158339c129cee887821ff1: Don't try my patience. Tell me where Ali is, and then get out of here?
textByHashes.e1f299133369bd0e0daeb0b1517405819177010e: Ali Morrisane's nephew! I know you gangs had something to do with his disappearance, so tell me where he is!
textByHashes.1700d26f6e781cca62cb2500e259eda265a4e19e: I'll go talk to a villager now, just to prove you wrong. Now get out of here before I really get angry with you!
textByHashes.5ea11aa9a192e47bd796e78f3a314a2ed30360f0: I told you to clear off! Why are you still here?
textByHashes.49af93940e3a016201eab1df39473fc4f3b2dc5d: Don't try my patience. Get out of here, and never return to this town again!
textByHashes.c78b242b01691af52e2fe2db5447cad31209535c: I'll go talk to a villager now, just to prove you wrong. Now get out of here before I really get angry with you.
textByHashes.124cbe2e4a5ce720bf0c41f82aa3b708f6c2286a: What was that? Are you looking for a fight?
textByHashes.05c066f6dbf8ab5c36c965484d9cab57f1a4b49e: I have delivered you from two evil tyrants. Where's my thank you?
textByHashes.3c4765cdd042490b32f5cac6ceb31faa3d54fa4c: I wonder why I bother sometimes! This place has been nothing but trouble and I still haven't found Ali's nephew.
textByHashes.adbd9cd5fb94a01a1a2941dc48d3cf4854879708: I think I may be able to help with one other thing. I heard that your house was burgled recently. If you're interested in recovering the goods, you ought to have a word with Ali the Operator.
textByHashes.729f14353b467c996366f25117638b76a10287c4: Er, let's just put it down to adventurer's intuition.
textByHashes.021c3d8ce85936f63807082c24a795efed9eb82e: That's great! So do I get a cut of the profits?
textByHashes.f2ff923839fd7c7bf4b4d043a01f4f84636cc462: Could you tell Traitorous Ali that someone has poisoned his drink?
textByHashes.4597d44acf14b9c966d152f1ece3360318756043: Thanks but no thanks, I don't drink.
textByHashes.4421870390430e9b1956331438b0e355a59c233f: You could always open up a non alcoholic fruit juice bar. You'd have less problems with drunken customers
textByHashes.0d67420b7d3bbece52de31bdbe3756c510a6a0b8: Maybe! Best of luck, in any case.
textByHashes.1d8dfacae91bde625e8d5eba6fd7090ac36c5ca8: Indeed I do. I was able to eventually learn of his fortunes, although it was a little bit more challenging than I originally thought.
textByHashes.968c32c11e7cc6ed42a6ac944967009ec458fc63: I was able to discover that he is quite the salesman. Perhaps too good. He has roughly forty people working under him.
textByHashes.796cb4b9f5712796e21baeba6e6260d1061d4ca7: Unfortunately a number of people didn't approve of his sales techniques and as a result he is in hiding.
textByHashes.c2be8884440d8d0ec24d2af47bd059e05ade07f8: I've just been thinking Ali, there seems to be a few parallels between yourself and your nephew. Both of you are unscrupulous salesmen, both of you come from the same town and both of you no longer trade there.
textByHashes.11665e2bc46d2e25ed2d6e1a000c59da12b9da58: Were you sent into exile too?
textByHashes.39eb9b2f87476d5db4bdc5b7633d600d33f5836b: No, now hang on, this seems to me like one of the strangest quests I have ever been involved with. I do not believe that a businessman like you would not know of a competitor, particularly a competitor as talented as
textByHashes.da2fcca02e8314de23dd91a052a997e6d474171e: So what was your motive to get me to visit Pollnivneach? Was it concern for the towns people? Hmm. I don't think so, I'd say you would probably sell your grandmother if you could get a good price for
textByHashes.71d188e94de4e7e4cc16bd9e59fdc1eb2c7995bf: Surely you didn't do all this to sell me a fake beard and headpiece.
textByHashes.3c243e2f922cb19220fa5f903c95afc12cedb059: Really? Well I did buy some other odds and ends off you.... no hang on! I get it now, you're in league with Ali the Camel seller, the Kebab seller and the mayor aren't you.
textByHashes.dda0c5c8af963d5a03dc3748c3668a246b4688b4: I must apologise for ever doubting you. You really are the greatest salesman in all of Gielinor.
textByHashes.fbcd706653ec3ab2f2882ffad1868556d0ae6fe7: I can fix this. I promise you, I will find Itzla and I will rescue him.
textByHashes.6a58e4b1bb3fecee5c5bc08bca498e0888ea8880: I will. Where should I begin?
textByHashes.832c718a1a4ea1e480383094b9e01753029b8412: I won't let you down. You have my word.
textByHashes.e2742d587808d1f5dbc1ff3766c857be976c6885: I just need to do something else first, but I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.f835f312db0c84feb49868fa59c87e1942ed01c7: Thank you. We'll have Itzla back soon. I promise.
textByHashes.9e33df100ee1b0cae56f1636bfe96d20e8433ebd: Hmm... They brought Itzla in from downstairs...
textByHashes.b7b1d4a83a5a00878f6033c5b19ab0cd73d42c6f: There must be something useful here...
textByHashes.f6712af91e54099583a04ea6a7b4aef720d7caa4: I do. Itzla was being held at the temple, but they've now moved him elsewhere.
textByHashes.c0456e7af0994c45503ea423afa0fd4164b71d58: I don't know, but I did also find out that they have some sort of plan for him. They called him the key to the Final Dawn. Something to do with him having Servius' blood.
textByHashes.d1de5e9d5b538a50c8b6dab446e4fb35489d6c1b: I discovered that Forebearer Janus, a senior member of the Emissaries, is living right here in Fortis in a cult safe house. I was thinking we could capture him and find out what he knows.
textByHashes.99864c414392eeb3730d21e9d601dd233943550b: I'll head over there at once.
textByHashes.9a41e3176729917053723276c4d978243f907d86: I've found a way into the house, but there's a locked door I need to get past. I'll have it open soon.
textByHashes.1eb5497b40feb843dc634f9d023506cd6dd56d04: Hmm... I don't think I have anything suitable on me.
textByHashes.0b1ff8b2b5fb2ba091e6972e587b3212d02a0a3a: I don't think I have anything for that either. Shall I head out and gather some things?
textByHashes.e6e2e4a457004d2a2365654c471d108ac945f3b9: So you're a Knight of Varlamore?
textByHashes.31616a0010169079f813f3f2436f3c3e054aa408: That makes Itzla your boss, right?
textByHashes.e124c70a25951da8300b84489a8c024b5094d194: What do you think of this whole situation with him?
textByHashes.b868a313a6742fe4afbc5bf33f6751e73e5ef1ec: You mean this thing could kill a person?
textByHashes.6cc6eb4c837686be9140da55b0f5716f16ef2bc0: I made this from a few things I found.
textByHashes.2041e7fceb85ee0230ee4cef0d03062e3e73b905: I think we have everything we need now.
textByHashes.6aca62fc34da9a90c93b8f1b450f2360b00c85cc: Sorry, but could someone explain what the Gathering is to me?
textByHashes.5b784042752f24a1729295fbe046182f59592486: But why is it so important to the cultists?
textByHashes.e1527e9e8040cffac2e103415238930122eda0de: The Tlati Rainforest? Just like the nagua said...
textByHashes.32e85317a3eb19477b95dabb3764d6b1bc8d23a8: Not much. She just referred to Mokhaiotl as the Tlati archive.
textByHashes.9c41fb432223c64e46825f7e59f82bd39019294f: I see. So, to Cam Torum then?
textByHashes.ca7ec7fc3e7da6f830587ce4b18a6f9cc81f934f: I'll make my own way there.
textByHashes.147478ca297ec26d5557e86c25a6c8a831e3fa81: Makes sense. In that case, good luck.
textByHashes.2d4b6d98892e105ca34a7aa7cbcf44552a81de51: They think it hides a path to Mokhaiotl.
textByHashes.26909ca1e92e1bd32cb8e0adf2bae4b416b5ecb4: Okay, let's put a stop to this before things get out of hand. Attala, you said you had an idea for where we could start our search?
textByHashes.26337790e8280e6187cd7c5f5870f9ede27b3a80: Let's start with Teumo then. Where can we find him?
textByHashes.24bca5c3d2712087f3350d61a9f3c347eed00ca6: Are you sure you wouldn't fancy a drink?
textByHashes.f8d23784e44e6124d7af39fc84bbcaba56325c4f: So what's your take on this Mokhaiotl business?
textByHashes.6bfa22d4fbd19b871f096eafdcfc342d61700077: They're claiming that two of the cultists are Ralos and Ranul reborn. They believe that once the two of them reach Mokhaiotl, the world will be destroyed and then remade once more.
textByHashes.024b63f8b34163168177b45b12467a4370399f86: And yet, it isn't just them who have spoken of it.
textByHashes.cca3ae70674c74e333d7b1e636300d1184c90c74: I encountered a nagua who called Mokhaiotl an archive.
textByHashes.8b1acd8c59ac876ece9fe0283d62120760bca3a7: So you don't think she was telling the truth?
textByHashes.c609c26613b4aeecede0a61f826639aaabe3bb6d: But I'm not asking them. I'm asking you. What do you believe?
textByHashes.e949876b815b708335cd64f1fa10ec5990274805: If it's okay to ask, what's the deal with you and the Queen?
textByHashes.8b9945b0ff35c54fde7d3c43ac76b247a3e006a7: Well, you're Itzla's father and she's his mother, but the two of you don't seem too close.
textByHashes.5018863403ab4718fc4ec051392c5cb910da6ce2: So how did it come about?
textByHashes.868b3196d283162b6f80739e4b0be36af22334ee: These dwarves sure love their drinks.
textByHashes.cf5c3333c3aa5066129f559d14c2cfad4780b4d4: That didn't sound good. I'd better let Attala and Servius know.
textByHashes.58ada954793425869ef4d5d23fe94e3a23d0851c: I did. You were right, Attala. Teumo is the one helping the cultists. He's sent them to Neypotzli to find something he calls an Old One keystone.
textByHashes.5445dcced3cd0e6409b6bfa01c5ac05eb666425a: Servius, go to Tal Teklan. If we can't stop them from getting that keystone, they'll have everything they need to enter the crypt. You need to make sure the Queen is ready.
textByHashes.6eba75c5fc636ec15786d010cd6d44b4e3ffc00e: Well, that's exactly why I'm here. I know who these interlopers are and I know what they're after.
textByHashes.b62a69efab353548f71393bcda09fca0b0d93715: They're after an Old One keystone.
textByHashes.fe52ea586b85b78062f360ac3a1c144cb25280c6: There's a crypt in the Tlati Rainforest, but it's sealed using Old One magic. These interlopers are cultists who want to get inside. They think they can do so if they have a keystone of their own.
textByHashes.ab4ffc2515145a2f4f1715cbbce65e5f8855ab49: Then we need to stop them before they get one.
textByHashes.a0ca991ed7b1f1cf8b540943002c5de68bacce7e: Don't worry, I can deal with them. I just need to know where they are.
textByHashes.7f2a1d54dba1687a610a78b3435a615300428118: Thank you, but before I go, there's one other thing...
textByHashes.1f12551591aec8726cde5421a26b9bd5798a90b4: The reason these cultists want to enter that crypt... It's because they think there's a path to Mokhaiotl inside.
textByHashes.c362e131896ce389aac61043a3e6f9ba930dad4d: Do you know what it is?
textByHashes.4efb9d8aca1e9f95898e01bb61cd0da49e4c2498: Call me what you want, but the fun's over. You're not going anywhere with that keystone.
textByHashes.2bf4064b0c4de42471935e596f76bd45911c5e43: It will take more than that to kill me.
textByHashes.84ac99cad13020c6322810dd0af6cbbac1be5ab9: [sigh] Alright, let's get this over with...
textByHashes.17b71b7d5e9122e76dd0b91d21acc93ded99d281: Well, I'm sorry to say you missed the fun. They got away, Attala. I wasn't able to stop them in time.
textByHashes.cfcda911f5cbba55f91816992e21eddb38d00dd8: Meaning they now have everything they need to enter the crypt.
textByHashes.6090bf5a021b85397032aad4c3a01287ffd53062: Before I go, Attala, I'm guessing we shouldn't expect any help from Cam Torum?
textByHashes.55c77a380e931bd01af2f8bafdd46d93dfcdf8c5: So Metzli promised the throne to you instead? Is that it? Seems like that's not going so well.
textByHashes.0b5a7c3b10b5aaa7cbe9220b8f9360085939b7f6: And Metzli's still down there as well. This isn't over yet.
textByHashes.e2c13acce4ad70eafd0bdc32876094ce16dca4bb: You never knew all this was right underneath one of your holy sites?
textByHashes.1787112d2bb921ef08cc15dd4dce884f3b2f4c1c: Any thoughts on where to start?
textByHashes.42aa591349d3ce0f4e43b3f6c8c3f34645f7a46a: Any ideas on what to do?
textByHashes.aa3f49eaf5934751a019d65dca68d62c72a822bb: A clock? But there's only eight points.
textByHashes.f1af6b20edba61e2e4babc4972ee940f35a00b69: Thanks! I'm done translating for now.
textByHashes.c4407e56b9f83fdc234ab157a4dd328c5a45d29c: What do you make of this essence I found?
textByHashes.fcb0080685f659a0494a8faab15a456f8197417d: Any idea what that 'some way' might be?
textByHashes.e1eab00b6f4b2196cf2489038f6d686de37e2f3e: Alright, I'll see if I can work something out.
textByHashes.f80484a569e29a7dcf1937204492168dc7587b17: Any idea what we should be doing here?
textByHashes.55972b9b9bb4c08069b73eda3c5079d27cce04fd: What do you think we'll find on the other side?
textByHashes.24878ef119c040024901894662b54a705a441610: A drink does sound nice, it's just...
textByHashes.565cc20043817dbef3d44a2ef4e9af80718a2be0: That nagua... I keep thinking about what she said about Mokhaiotl being an archive. What does that mean? Could this place be what she was referring to?
textByHashes.3b3f8d603a00ed242114fe6fd62ec91c028af37e: You lied to the Emissaries? Why?
textByHashes.838615010134ea89139ffed9aee6d517720009b5: Look around, Metzli. This place is empty. Whatever 'truth' you're looking for, it's clearly not here.
textByHashes.5043a1bb3201f0be53df003fb906891cbda53184: You go on ahead. I want to take a look around first. I'll catch up with you.
textByHashes.f984bfa7223b49d311a86a99b9e29ba8f9d93e60: No, I think it's definitely him.
textByHashes.ca585c2acd475ad38bbc2518b21e9aabff41ad52: Yes, nice of you to show up right at the end. Trust you to skip all the hard work.
textByHashes.7011b163d01749c89ca37f23cf950cd5ba43d0d5: Is that so? Well, I'm sure you made many useful discoveries.
textByHashes.822c6d19d8431be906dc1acd7edd5e7b034f085a: Yes and no. It seems Metzli was right in a way. Mokhaiotl was meant to be an Old One archive. Thing is, they never finished it. Something killed the ones working on it while it was still being built.
textByHashes.bd014c75e37d208e3f095d28191009962ebb4c05: You don't happen to have another sword do you?
textByHashes.0b284c861893936f9422b97ec4cfc701cc5e9bd5: Ah, I don't have enough. I'll be back shortly.
textByHashes.ffb3da7fd4b1e9a6c4a04eeba721a61658f65367: Right... yes... I'll go see if I can find it.
textByHashes.554ca3beeb499c59a34825d74ce2b419f4d54c1c: Likewise, my Queen. How have things been since the Emissaries were dealt with?
textByHashes.48cbfac544fcc8d76195949d5334f2e5af4df7fa: Given what happened in the crypt, I'm guessing things will be a bit different this time as well.
textByHashes.fe34833f495795c7e0fdf7406ae589a638231e31: Yes, Mokhaiotl. Not quite the centre of the world after all.
textByHashes.dadc313fee665c85c8f9e11bdbbe166ab6ade3d3: I suppose I hadn't considered that possibility.
textByHashes.31bf687903e27f740219fd37452e85ac334dcbc1: Not exactly, though they did find something. It seems that Mokhaiotl was actually meant to be an Old One archive, though it was never finished.
textByHashes.d6ae09b02854aadb506d73a048623dc57262578e: Yes. They won't be a problem again.
textByHashes.b0281e39f01cd33a0107ef509d25517441d9a34f: I thought you'd want to know as well that they did find Mokhaiotl. It turns out it was meant to be an archive.
textByHashes.510c9b98622a7d9bfe25115d5eb4c0a365a1b0d8: Somewhere to house the collective knowledge of the Old Ones. Thing is, it was never finished. Something happened that stopped them from doing so.
textByHashes.59f541e5a402f4e00cc17b74eb650dbb90abc30e: I wanted to ask you about your masters.
textByHashes.df7fc1cad6fc7fad9871ea834473da1606126fbb: I guess anything really. I still know so little about them.
textByHashes.51762860f4ab557c7faeadbd1cdd03e0eef7e1bf: That's still something. What were they like?
textByHashes.f9b9137e37225d7c154785bd47604eb66f72d7f4: I see. Than you for sharing that with me.
textByHashes.78194d04f5256d5f2231d9e8b38e7a6b2a9faad5: What brings you to Lovakengj then?
textByHashes.bf2a64abf4af674c4fcc7b71be4cb29a4ccf716d: What are the Doors of Dinh?
textByHashes.d184b9981c2779450a965d8ef060e37fbfdabfcd: I've been sent to help you.
textByHashes.27a9bb75b50469ed3b50ff22f1f9559b1a5bced6: Well here I am. What do you need?
textByHashes.061a8b5fdb959f21b920ce946a90a9132f4d9b14: But if the Doors aren't failing, what's the issue?
textByHashes.f3ea80de5991ea981736ccd594d32b3a9da8104d: A hammer? Are you seriously telling me that you don't own a hammer?
textByHashes.5a8fe6091e3b381c83b19f9d6f4f0f74cc1856c8: Ahh, I see. So where do I find this hammer?
textByHashes.42023b26ff6ca8f108a44d946a7e9742e0d17a6a: Well there's only one way to find out. Where do I find this tower?
textByHashes.4d8ede1b4b91fd304b6479a5f2588af33bb64f66: Great, I'll be back once I've found that hammer.
textByHashes.ef3fc35460f14dcb9a2b11c2a3fe51a58ad530cf: Not yet. Where should I be looking?
textByHashes.13c34927cd4b4a1658518b8d61e676da280f35b1: Does this mean the Wintertodt won't be a threat anymore?
textByHashes.de7f9c0986a402b37e93c2114696a0ee5c4ed617: But I've done what you asked!
textByHashes.b7c6148461015ac5d152ef6b9311fecfdb7d6ae7: Undor had found some damage caused to the Doors of Dinh. He suspected someone had sabotaged them. He asked me to fetch him Dinh's Hammer so that he could fix the Doors.
textByHashes.bcf1a2b88555901992fdf9c85341ccd2201d1d7b: I found the hammer and gave it to Undor. He should be fixing the Doors as we speak.
textByHashes.b5c4572df758bf3853180c88808d710b9bd59e49: So what will it be this time? Joining warring islands?
textByHashes.cf6a3675d7e052f06a457dd1b26d9c3574b32a96: Would you have me slay a mighty daggermouth? Or do you need my expertise in conquering untamed lands?
textByHashes.9dae8120ad1c70ce4db2073b83c5787578b5b877: Well that doesn't sound so bad. I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.cdcc0ad8666a8d753510bfd29f0b2eb24af3b164: I'm still looking into it at the moment.
textByHashes.340a616d75ad9db85518fd0e19e24e5974494639: I'll get to the bottom of it. Thank you Reeso.
textByHashes.e26dfe0b3d2f0f53c10cd7d5557bd7902c9c51f9: The Chieftain told me that you saw some sort of disturbance outside your hut?
textByHashes.8b752de410738783a5d1b9354a459ee6b554e861: I see. I'll have a look around and see what I can find.
textByHashes.a54bc68f63f762c6c2f9bdba613d183e7093dd44: I still think I'm missing something. I'll let you know when I'm done.
textByHashes.ddf3e1cd7cb995793f6ca0716c89ca57e2c25ac1: This doesn't look safe... Good job my backpack magically stops things from breaking!
textByHashes.fb85a8a24975604cd8698c159079ca59fa174099: This seems to be a small sack filled with venom.
textByHashes.6b52f2e3feb3cfe4c6357b430a0d16f7068b35d7: It's dripping with venom. I'd better make sure I don't prick my finger!
textByHashes.b8c42f577756cc478ca20cb2e5ca9d98499123d8: This seems to be the fang of a relatively small creature. It's absolutely soaked in venom.
textByHashes.36f07ed99049396f0adf20ae079414394d5fb632: Well I can honestly say I wasn't expecting that. Looks like it dropped a letter of some sorts. I'd better grab it.
textByHashes.d6c68f8282cb4206757db7cb59565ec554a75d9f: I think I've found everything I need for this investigation. I should let Freygerd know.
textByHashes.d16a30879ce5c5363fc4d6bc6e86c2c411eda03d: I already have the letter from this sand pit.
textByHashes.82d236f8c7e839d0bec21901e8d0f122855b8629: Oh, that's where that letter went! How convenient.
textByHashes.7103a86f39236152b73d59dc64302f702dcaab71: I think I've found everything I need.
textByHashes.e0011694e6d90b9bce1f70e96a4801dee40b08e5: I've had a look around and found a few things I'd like to show the Chieftain. The thing that made the noise outside your home is gone now, so there's nothing to worry about.
textByHashes.76852f70f287c7c526484e4745f2be74ea51a2de: No problem. I best be getting back to the Chieftain!
textByHashes.2eaebe571fbb0b304f1d59143fad7490540c214f: You didn't by any chance read that letter, did you?
textByHashes.c978740a8a4c0073251cba8b58cf5a2a9fbd599a: Thank you for letting me know.
textByHashes.913b15524da1a10f2a1fdd3e8479b1d29b6ec586: Please, do tell me more about the sand business in Rellekka.
textByHashes.bf4f274e95a5b984c35fe479266d50d39de1a49d: Not at all. I seem to have all day to talk to people. Why else would I start a conversation with you?
textByHashes.bba17d3c8f0b6a9fad788b3e33fcdf4bdb1023d8: Well, thank you so much for all of that information Reeso. See you later.
textByHashes.11d10e582b4c2a0d53d338cdc2271e319559d086: I said it was a basilisk.
textByHashes.b4da00d3983857e57ab75e3e09a6934137e12e82: Well I really must get back to what I was doing. Lovely to catch up!
textByHashes.f72f3d36fbf62489bebff5a68803df0be3c2ceb7: It was nothing to worry about! Just a couple of knick knacks probably dropped by some kids!
textByHashes.d0af17a23ef9296b4fe253790ca6878c37c81fbb: They were probably just firestarters. That's what I found outside.
textByHashes.cea1f884bf131eaa07a5a6da67c45573abf0a151: Well that sounds cheery. You have nothing to fear though, not with me around. Speaking of which, I'd better get back to it.
textByHashes.22cbcf5b42ca5e7de089a54f591acf23384d4cfc: I don't understand. What does the letter mean? Who is the Jormungand? And since when could basilisks read and write?
