textByHashes.efc940afb0008b6a799f678fdf13f83c4f876c44: A magical prison? I thought the Fremennik people didn't approve of magic?
textByHashes.f313479373df3bd67e40895d6919c6c350ac2642: But he earned the right to use magic?
textByHashes.03e81d4a65141be0b2c05a4cf47d9360f517ce45: So what can we do about the Jormungand?
textByHashes.9236391b90dff1f4f041f029500ca647b47cbc57: You're forgetting Brundt. We have the element of surprise! They don't know we're aware of their attack.
textByHashes.57f9a12cfcb3bec8df080b425e5a642920c47ad9: We could have days to prepare before they make their move. We could...
textByHashes.90c2f64467c0f2552e5a49ed4b4ccf221e9acabc: It's true but I did nothing wrong; don't believe them Askeladden!
textByHashes.35b9bbe3da1ddee1a13029b86544ed51ada8368c: That's fine, I don't want to get you in trouble. Can you do me a favour though?
textByHashes.b8af44b71094940ee3850014b2e00dcc6a6dfffc: You don't seem to care too much about me getting exiled.
textByHashes.84d4d4e368a7ed22041732628627148500f943e2: Fair enough. So, do you write about anything in particular?
textByHashes.04b68ce2b9ab50a2dd23963dd9d402a7b2ae515f: You don't seem to be bothered about my exile.
textByHashes.fd55c75b0245321ac6a9b9a6d4da074b823681e3: Heh. Thanks - I was pretty heroic even if I say so myself.
textByHashes.297986e3fb95cd7729eef3c98c01476ab16a69eb: You do know I've been exiled right? You don't seem to care.
textByHashes.128e61579f7cc73a28fbcea4681f12bad6790ac8: Please, I must get to Miscellania.
textByHashes.13fdb22112a01df190056f989f6a81a6f055c9b1: Hello. Can I get a ride on your ship?
textByHashes.4123b991feabb0c45f633c9b3bd097800a9f44eb: How do you feel about it?
textByHashes.4ddf4748397a9771eebcde48296b95c5aa4c95eb: But they're the ones that voted for me in the first place!
textByHashes.0280970ad263065397a5baa1b4ba57eea9901899: I see. And they've used this basilisk problem to convince some of the others.
textByHashes.ce0fa344e313065cbbcf6fb1f43258c2b25e1c13: I don't understand though, they're only basilisks. Surely we have the strength to defeat them.
textByHashes.0b50c4bb2f5e8a04d5f618edc4b218bf58a1b2e3: Well that doesn't sound good. Where do the basilisks fit in?
textByHashes.bbde3e53ec687390336d0918e7d3c2086cba98f4: Then we'd better make sure the Jormungand stays in that prison!
textByHashes.c8a71cc50bb8fe0f125bfe8168ed00e92f631369: Fair enough. So where should I start?
textByHashes.23a2343250d6ad7b5a068fb085f7fb117658f9ea: Where can I find a Fremennik Shield?
textByHashes.8611ab378f8895394d5589b64ccc6d498dd56f50: I made a round shield with arctic pine in my previous adventure to Neitiznot?
textByHashes.b292e66064a38cff97a723dc2e9dfb9dc9d3edfb: Thanks Brundt, I'll keep that in mind.
textByHashes.82b958176ce3343034e12eede9533bd68b041875: Where can I get Lunar Glass?
textByHashes.1b38dca775eaeb366e5e85b6da07e2ac92fb1a21: I think I know just the chicken-legged-house-bound lady to ask!
textByHashes.de1cbe6e1dbb80ecbfadbe96459f7d742741844b: How do I make the Polishing Rock?
textByHashes.2bd90978f302af8080f9f3f59dac9b332abc172f: I know a guy! Well, a boy. Hopefully he'll still be willing to speak to me despite the exile.
textByHashes.182c72c25d621f62796828cfa8931cf77248ef86: How do I make V's Sigil?
textByHashes.247560e6a6a3cbfb71cf26d52677affa6e13806f: What exactly is it made of?
textByHashes.e832000610727b014540ef98b9ee896d0bd9911f: Do you know of such a spirit?
textByHashes.c8e8aeb848d03ace763e3e67f8f29f4ac3ce7329: Bardur, wait! I'm here with a task from the Chieftain.
textByHashes.d514c0b93b62e125f5b26a713d77957f29dd6a9c: I'm looking to remake V's Shield, but I require a Fremennik Shield from a warrior. Where could I find one?
textByHashes.221a416baf2defcf5c0c061db85fc24a54c7a7c3: Maybe I could buy one off you?
textByHashes.d8572c54c91eaf7d78298b8d68ca6910b92a4639: That's far too much, I won't pay that!
textByHashes.0b18f403e52c5d8469f15073276d4cd62a66f19e: I could honour the fallen by remaking V's Shield.
textByHashes.4ac6ba20075d04a61c6b6c8e8c52b6c136d7a7fe: I was wondering if you could help me make...
textByHashes.8f7db03e1a6fe68f6e8ed6e11c86399e2c7ce83d: You really need to stop doing that.
textByHashes.38abb1c1416eb9775970262bfe326c9f69bec775: Look, those are my private thoughts! You can't just go reading my mind without permission.
textByHashes.c5214caaa8d00f637f6952d8f5a32923120f4beb: Please... can we just focus on the matter at hand?
textByHashes.593b134122146b587caff37bc927b3d10e7c9a08: Some Molten Glass? I have some right here!
textByHashes.98e68e8820ddbe30bd75aec9bdb887c2ed2bf2d3: Oh, how the tables have turned!
textByHashes.081a7579a711052a55791d3ca4222afc8333b5d3: Oh. Can't you just do it for me?
textByHashes.0e6c40b300bd5bfc3d85a60f8e608f68fd1f8980: I guess I never thought about that before, fair enough.
textByHashes.22888cc9b2a26c0198a249273bdf87cebecd4e5a: That one wasn't even mind reading! I could have guessed what I was going to say there.
textByHashes.5ba6553de384062369c00415145227f2d6c7f200: I already have some Lunar Glass. I should probably gather the rest of the items for V's Shield!
textByHashes.4b2171333cfd3291d280ce2acd6e79ebef7c6ea3: It might have helped if I'd actually remembered to bring my pet rock.
textByHashes.67e56547b7f316ecd1687929482778db5a78b803: This geyser looks a little small. I'd probably do a better job heating this rock in a larger geyser!
textByHashes.28a4a0106a205d29e195c806ec2acde020c2ffa4: Any second now, I'm going to lower this rock into the geyser and boil it...
textByHashes.37c24abf814fd0969afa54667935a53409ddced3: It's just a rock, how is it looking so sad? Come on, I can do this! For the Province!
textByHashes.80590ce450d5ae9024f39a6707d1a64e8cebbcdd: It's for the good of the Province... I must do it!
textByHashes.df7856d28297669310422426fd8761c50ffde174: I can't do it! I love you pet rock.
textByHashes.cc642b9034f467f5f0e7e9607bffcbd0b349e1d2: You're right, pet rock... Why does it have to be this way?
textByHashes.6a92ea0b2f68de8b88f94ee9cf5bd277c53236bb: I can't do this to you with all of these happy memories!
textByHashes.24dfa373d2cac31f90985fd65eb6b5c45c009ab0: You're right... I'll talk to Peer the Seer. He'll help me forget all of our times together.
textByHashes.c63339e93250da1384165fa827e18d5fcf4dfec1: Please, Seer! I'm on a mission for Brundt.
textByHashes.e352098c9bebf10885933ac96c8d3c8a114509ae: It's a bit of a sensitive subject...
textByHashes.8452df74b2c2ec5eda7b82ec83914240629cd6b7: I can't bring myself to boil my pet rock!
textByHashes.0faa246ee86544fd2a85b98d3d8ff4d09a108593: I know, I'm a horrible person! Please help me, I can't bring myself to do it.
textByHashes.b9290d7e1e21287823da29ffb266f876c06ed5b1: Please Seer, you're my only hope!
textByHashes.c737f1a3ed79ab85c2b97ff09327c2fa487c0d13: Thank you, Seer! I'll head back to the mountains now.
textByHashes.9d1cfe2acc1d66a77be02d31e1458e88ce077d21: I know it's just an act... but that hurt.
textByHashes.28244cca0228a9c8abc5204cb4534a378d9c74c9: Well I don't think that will be bobbing up to the top anytime soon! I'll need to fish it out with something.
textByHashes.a48d2b1dde5e31af26d1a5e905843512dab78cc2: I'm not going to be able to get my rock back with just my bare hands! I'll need to get something to fish it out.
textByHashes.3c4815f8f2544741fb90ed29e84f46dc76a439cb: I've already dropped one rock in there. I should try fishing it out rather than throwing more away.
textByHashes.09db9811ea201ac3e4ea2b3cd9814dad9180d848: Darn it! That rock was hot...
textByHashes.37f1f7f1a3925b09b87905d1e9b1dc956102b5c3: If only I had something that could keep my hands cold!
textByHashes.1713ec92b0accc31da884be07c6148c4c9a026b4: Darn it! It would probably help if I actually wore my ice gloves.
textByHashes.c1668891ba2287dd87b91cf8d2d68408481527da: I already have a Polishing Rock. I think I'm done here.
textByHashes.ffb0c83cc4920e3f791f2f855de2d694a223c82c: I already have a Polishing Rock in my bank. I think I'm done here.
textByHashes.d178097066f54d2f8a8ded725688185fe53a8919: I hear that I can present you with an offering and you will enchant my lyre for me.
textByHashes.cde100d9ed7ada3795bafc45fa25db15c9aeb5f1: I'm currently trying to remake V's Shield. I was told I need his sigil enchanted by a powerful spirit.
textByHashes.4b1e039cb8169ad3c678388af8923a018453b2f3: I think I have everything needed to make V's Shield.
textByHashes.77feba5af12bc0fa28287f41e30f1e5d898d510a: This looks complete! I should head back to the Chieftain and see what he thinks.
textByHashes.3381fdd8933ef5a28b291b98381eeee68bb1f942: Oh, sorry. I simply left it in my bank. I'm such a ditzy person sometimes!
textByHashes.63f49189367a51dbc57548e4ca3f66fdc98b35ff: Do you think this will be enough to convince the council?
textByHashes.64cf2763271029a4915c8cf9fda61f5f09c0fd75: Beggars can't be choosers, I suppose. Let's get going then...
textByHashes.04d4fa5c42c63dc446c350a9c83e73c87e83d6a9: That's a very good point. Carry on then.
textByHashes.a33733cbd80b1b3e46555caf1dcf1f9623c0558c: I should probably head back to the longhall...
textByHashes.a0fac762fdc70e5d60bbd52d9cd3a29009047a48: And you Brundt. You sobered up quickly.
textByHashes.ee9e2fc26d165bc196adc332c0cf1f88e1c27765: Well we'd better get in there and make sure that doesn't happen.
textByHashes.257799f0b60371a31940e2698f6154bb6ffd276a: I'd better be careful then. I'll get to work.
textByHashes.6bbd890c92575f2b280a4a04d10acbdb21afbc3d: Are you sure? They did manage to free him. How do you know we weren't too late?
textByHashes.57afa1983735d0f525874987e9fb7adde27d2455: I'm just glad it all worked out in the end.
textByHashes.875290f208d49c1b721f4b903918ea65987c9e77: I am, but who are you?
textByHashes.e4e4ac3be83e000d75f86edd87a9c24c053a8461: You should speak with my husband. He has been looking for you.
textByHashes.28a73f632b6d77a5ac9d7729c53a9ae055b33eec: Well my name is , but I am known as by the Fremennik. May I ask who you are?
textByHashes.675d3f0f27ca9b61236d664e6e6b15405e25ca95: Tell me more about the King of Jatizso.
textByHashes.f56dc8b496b7d1450fb8f59728f3d116464dacbc: Can you ferry me to Jatizso?
textByHashes.4c8779610e77a306de1ae5027a86640ae3ca4007: I'm too busy to help your King.
textByHashes.abefd912ff1fdc5d8604ae31a59e3e84718f7079: Thank you for bringing me here Mord.
textByHashes.24a9bc7e4251469da514e16888b67d6747e57d6e: Can you ferry me to Rellekka?
textByHashes.2cebc973aadb4b864dd75d5b07e78e71a1a56399: Why not, is yak meat bad for you?
textByHashes.b7313f5c9875d1c7fbc0102f9867a6e39f19e2d0: So why aren't you allowed to eat it?
textByHashes.4ddc79eeaf6a1f1c4ecc2605e863f8bd4ef3619e: That's a little sad. So do you have any cooked food I could buy?
textByHashes.e3aa1ef16a31ad27ed1fe0b82e46f475127b500f: Well, I wouldn't mind a few shark and swordfish steaks as back-up you know.
textByHashes.8c474af9d53b90e0891fa7e41fcf51a3da043645: Hello. What's happening in town at the moment?
textByHashes.22abda7c2eb0221484aedb5788037a584da5c491: What are the dwarves doing here?
textByHashes.a863f09b3c58fc6979b0cd0f8760c03465840b5c: Hey, they're doing their best. You arrived early.
textByHashes.abda75f04c5ccd70c85aee01c965a6a9457a4970: I'd better get a move on!
textByHashes.6de2b3c9732e37f093665927b26ba2de28e399a9: How may I assist your Highness?
textByHashes.c28996bd1317b6dcdbb63f616744a894d122298f: You mentioned a task requiring my unique-
textByHashes.1d0651cc01e0dcd31fd93bd83ab5e4697c58a478: Yes, that's probably a good idea.
textByHashes.853725cfc800233bdb374227118305cf84444096: Oh, I've met worse. Still, I'd better get him his fish, otherwise he'll never keep quiet.
textByHashes.98fd295aea541f957b95df0ce0b020c280fc6313: Here you go, enjoy your fish.
textByHashes.cea8adf6edd8f0435190ca6bc8d9461e6325591b: Here you go. Enjoy your fish.
textByHashes.aec5f57c8088802dc21e13e9cf7e893f335f08a0: Here you go. enjoy your fish!
textByHashes.2039a3a166fb63fad3e7de9888f002beac923fe7: Yes, I have your pet's fish.
textByHashes.962e8ec303b2683304b4a9890abd6aabc395bcef: Wait a minute! I'm fairly handy with a pick axe. Maybe I can help; what do you need?
textByHashes.5b4fe6885e463ad419f412ff1a422bc30ac53161: If I just happen to have the ore you need in the bank, do I need to go down to your mines?
textByHashes.ecc1ef3198a41241874309fb6e1da8da1c2e5fc2: Hmmm, interesting. I'll get the ore then.
textByHashes.729a9ca4d53e33f47f0cab00816056249c6fcc24: Can you tell me where to find the nearest mines?
textByHashes.b138995baaeed8027ef3b59373b2a389d8b19541: Can I have a look at your stock please?
textByHashes.caa1f25e8b7e30f6c34ae54fca2559a1a468a3b3: Can you remind me of what those Dwarven traders need?
textByHashes.948c62b28b1382217d8e97d5f757d354b2907ee2: I have bank notes to the value of the ore here.
textByHashes.fc57294d9b8d1b18df68814c1f5cb29ce678abe1: I have the ore here, sir.
textByHashes.3ba93bbc5ae4bf22357966ad78f5e0838d623cf7: Ahem, I see, sir. How may I help in this matter?
textByHashes.e440231926017c47df118c2cc8a107763e04a3cf: You want me to play the lyre? Well actually, I've been working on a few tunes in my spare time. I have this new song about-
textByHashes.7c4c9536a3dd74b7a747f0aa03c1d99d8088908e: It's a great tune, very catching, you'll love-
textByHashes.3c9ad4023ff509f7ef98290c194e0ef5a0ee212e: So this is a covert operation into Neitiznot? You need me to infiltrate the Burgher's hall, undercover, and uncover his evil plans?
textByHashes.34f678f1989bb0d8fee47855b9ab56c149ed545f: Sounds like a task for an elite adventurer like myself. Mission accepted.
textByHashes.5df6ca852419941e4f88584d00d2c61a2909ddf4: So what is the easiest way to get to Neitiznot?
textByHashes.9851a59c2a019e1485a6c4468761cd75d613331c: Are you sure that's the best way?
textByHashes.3ada4b0137bdcfb7355b1d66b0a29268a5e63947: What sort of password is that?
textByHashes.6f711756ebc3d2b799a33e418e008ed3a21b4877: So how will I recognise him?
textByHashes.20a462d2cc66c46050d11bedd46f065838d55db6: Tell me about Burger Mawnis Burowgar.
textByHashes.f2fa495a07cf85bc31f65f7997a6e00c4e43ee48: Can you ferry me to Neitiznot?
textByHashes.d9ad275993ca62083ce76b8a264dc7c65c608983: I just stopped to say hello.
textByHashes.c86ac4e448bbbd5d63a74f6a35a26141d0b68bd6: Tell me about King Sorvott IV.
textByHashes.ee5cc924ba7f3996421fd2a02d5823cc957d7945: I have nothing to ask you right now.
textByHashes.22acde10c4338740c62a4e55e085176fe086e51b: I am known as by those in Rellekka.
textByHashes.abace62242ad3416fcc46a7a4a999c9ac2567256: I shall return to Rellekka. You have no need to call your guards.
textByHashes.16cbb1b8ceb5d0c088b4873788316a0dd9cb124a: I am no outlander, but maybe you can help me.
textByHashes.9aa92e7adde832b76a33e68ac6fb05f4517819a6: I am looking for King Sorvott IV?
textByHashes.57f58fd11c9300298736fc420cfe94aec475d645: Thanks. I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.db02743f2518ed307743ff051d335e011f9c5ee9: The blue fish leap northwards at dawn..
textByHashes.a4b7093f05648e27fb9941654882751acc4e19a9: The cabbages bloom in the spring.
textByHashes.3ccd5eba70cd332d5898c567455317b25b2346e2: I bought an aardvark from Ardougne market.
textByHashes.6b1d0b646b27aba3db1b3c16af278a37dac47b97: ...err...sprockets wangle burps in the forked flan.
textByHashes.6e998078324b81e6bc37e88ec576e722072b401a: It rains frogs during the Winter in Neitiznot.
textByHashes.c258a993d9015042f83e13ab3ee45e53eae7ed44: Budgie? That's not my name, you can call me-
textByHashes.9516a1703291d8f06faa4c4c9d1f0289654e29c2: Shouldn't that be...never mind. So Mr Hemli-
textByHashes.62c9c4617ddea0b117901b3b3961182b0d674fc3: How come you get the cool name, and I get called Budgie? Can't I be called Operative Panther? Yeah I like that, panthers are cool. Rarrrr!
textByHashes.637d217217a25f8ea775bc70cfd58646f98de10b: Fine, whatever, I don't care anyway.
textByHashes.eb6002a6a50626ecc4c2822f54ae4a559f748ff3: I just need to visit the bank.
textByHashes.1ec4af4506ed461d8548951ff6d0f66ad377f5bb: Not yet. I'll do that now.
textByHashes.f3753a72b3ad5c95cc6710cae1fa8a63d3e68544: Err, hello. I'm an unemployed jester looking for work.
textByHashes.fde67b987522c04f0702114db2a17eb9a6cfe914: That was very clever what you did there - using the double meaning for humour. I've never heard that before. Genius.
textByHashes.98053b6636dcbd7cf2a355482808464847c33211: Yes, I am a fool. Are you happy now?
textByHashes.cf7c6c7fc173937ee9c4f7690e07a87250300f04: Nothing. Are you going to let me perform for the Burgher?
textByHashes.6290d02c305476c3dfbf2e3b4bdf5eddef97fdb8: Errr, hello. I'm an unemployed jester looking for work.
textByHashes.330e1807d029e5603cbe484c116e37586700e635: Well, I'm as entertaining as a juggler with a bag of ferrets down his trousers.
textByHashes.c172b59377c2dd9529c28b8b628afa130eac1f2f: I like an easy, I mean appreciative, audience.
textByHashes.743ea7623def5e106fe510cfdf32f8b1d1ea419d: I hope I can amuse and delight as much as your last jester.
textByHashes.72f3dacf20f67431d3b6d7d761ebb4ff59b6e4bc: I see, a tough crowd then. I'd better get this right!
textByHashes.43b74ddf148983412553e2e9d41e3f269ab67106: Your wit has no end. Or beginning or middle. I'd better talk to the Burgher and see if he wants to be entertained.
textByHashes.4f469852df4e5f26bfc2221489d54b5d6d8fea38: I am ready to answer your questions, Operative Nighthawk.
textByHashes.f1ff172a070320123dd5b8545b5b27808928d97e: They will be ready in two days.
textByHashes.bfd06971a3ac0d3c364b7be61086d26026266aff: There are two bridges to repair.
textByHashes.4a5ade160c1346abfdb38b4134318de035c7bd92: I would not lie to you.
textByHashes.aa70022e219ba2fd0daff277d8209e768fdf254c: 'Big Daddy'? Do you mean the K-
textByHashes.08fbc6866efdcd5e4ce119e22e159ed1c2d6b47c: I heard you had an accident whilst juggling?
textByHashes.ffc045f3d574ed6ca14b1cfa1e784a456651a51c: I need to make a fool of myself again.
textByHashes.3d3f2a581d5dc418e9033089d90b511d1c046671: Right. Yes. You blend right in otherwise.
textByHashes.6d283f5ce6be1391b6361df44c49a1d7f4a53af0: Yes I am. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.873da79ec4cd7fc7a0aa7e0b91c200e5be59b9d3: Thank you for ferrying me here Maria. See you soon.
textByHashes.896689fa16ea3b85aa93ad807cf293b10d6dbafe: The Burgher is both wise and perceptive.
textByHashes.f6f6946f469591ea5cb97ea2349b706e2d04ee5d: Ahem. I am indeed known as by those in Rellekka.
textByHashes.8743e38d1d83f16d72881a0ebe14bc349fc39f0a: If I am the one you seek, then how may I assist you?
textByHashes.47fb82d4c7765b4c2526f74ea8a7fd8500748286: Ha! It is trolls that fear me! I am Fremennik!
textByHashes.f48c5638c94bf26024d06a627c7e36b20014429a: I would be honoured to assist you and your tribe, Burgher Burowgar. Indeed I expected no less. This sort of thing seems to happen to me a lot.
textByHashes.e8c305a33b9350e4478d58b658d5eabfd128bdaa: Is any rope fine for this?
textByHashes.22da92989d518ee1f29642766ce94762d912d43a: Hmmm, the rope I've seen round here looks exactly the same as the rope I'm used to. It's exactly the same isn't it?
textByHashes.4c0708a21df294994f5e9318d39a17030cc8dd4f: Right! I'll just go to the bank and get some rope.
textByHashes.fbb3bbf963d6ec91ec34a4d99a926641db4dd156: I thought rope was made from wool. Not yak hair.
textByHashes.3f0eb6d9c4b3aa0f62b196c221fdac1b14c645b4: So how come Ned from Draynor makes rope out of wool?
textByHashes.35e13e031a066d25177f131fb18fdbad65ee964e: So Ned doesn't make the rope? What a fraud! He had me fooled for so long.
textByHashes.c1b40413f8c5367a09a361874ea1efa6e16655ee: Anyway, so that means that all rope is made by Neitiznot from yak hair.
textByHashes.bfa147ffc5e418ad4d85708e00890d3df4057d73: So if I happen to have some rope in the bank then that would also be made from high quality Neitiznot yak hair.
textByHashes.aa9592a771c6d160b4da03dce7c4e3d61a814dab: So I could just give you the rope I already have, rather than make more rope?
textByHashes.a060bd8f46f8570fe5ee0c4accf93ee7866c934e: I've had enough of strange 'coming of age' rituals for the time being. I'm going to go to the bank and get the rope you need.
textByHashes.012607cd3eb5134b6dd3633c84ea84c8c438e8db: As it happens, I'm carrying a note for enough rope on me right now.
textByHashes.1dd34cde6aaaeb1fef40a53d51b93a93b69a7dc7: As it happens, I'm carrying enough rope on me right now.
textByHashes.1b440258c97f807ce798cac96512d204dafed2d2: Err, no. I had a feeling I'd need it.
textByHashes.deadb691a71b0f056845f7c3beface131897d4aa: No, no, no! Its just a coincidence. Err, I spend my time trading rope. Yes that's right. I'm a rope trader and I just happen to have my wares on me.
textByHashes.56b5185270cb7a8cb50b364839f160c0f953692b: You asked for it! Do you want this rope or not?
textByHashes.fc2e05c8ca2f97338ef5a21458635be65af72749: No, I still don't have them.
textByHashes.e82549f64140a0471ed7d9233022627e738f1438: Thank you, I shall return soon.
textByHashes.1e009b0a2e79c3b59a8dc46766ec188218578210: So, I've done your menial task; what is this secret quest? That's what really interests me.
textByHashes.26279df3b0b41b22255ca467b73b76db557aba90: Very well, what must I do next?
textByHashes.860aa30414eaa85b67914c48ad9ef1b4f4031b2d: I see. That shouldn't be a problem.
textByHashes.bebe04a4f7cae9d0e0dbc29657575691fe9a3be9: I would be happy to help your kinsfolk, Mawnis Burowgar.
textByHashes.91aeaabe5d47350e3a8c2135d5153984572bfa4e: Thank you sir, I shall return soon.
textByHashes.e845725f3dac9be59a7b9791d033be11f96d90dd: Very well, I shall get on with that now.
textByHashes.ec0cc2cde13996b062b8f69c63367b3b22bca9e3: How do I repair these bridges again?
textByHashes.1615d1b0a866a99c6d133c4fc14ab0a219c771a0: Where do I find these bridges?
textByHashes.3f2d247ed90409bfada2e2f4d50e5a9ac562684b: I have carried out your orders, Sir.
textByHashes.fc1e8985736b281637bad72526c39306cebfd7a2: That is most generous of you, Sir.
textByHashes.3e9d537555c0c2434af0b36f66ba6079e034cd4e: I gratefully accept your offer to lead the charge against your foes.
textByHashes.852cbe45ee3bc1a495ced9a9be3dc0d3d5066a5f: I'm afraid that may be true sire.
textByHashes.5065cca63541185f58c48e1010e2681ce6adfbf4: Err, no. I believe I already have all the...contacts I need.
textByHashes.b215593cdb167e756228ece26516dfce3b8b1c24: Not yet sir, but I shall return soon.
textByHashes.b963f00ffee500cfb3ebc72c6bd994858f77b890: Thanks Thakkrad, i'm on my way there now.
textByHashes.da1f2239c1e74a5d92ee320d35ba08b5dc52a40a: Not yet, but I am on my way there now.
textByHashes.d4f2a84b251086c8bb961a8664fdc03e7c716dab: He said something about leading his forces into battle, but I didn't hear the Burgher use the word 'champion'.
textByHashes.ca59082d1f8099e8e3590383507d32554c11b7af: I have, sir. They have been repaired.
textByHashes.3b4f1fbbda44b03e0033abc8e0cfa9f3b4369918: The Fremennik are a very resourceful folk, your majesty.
textByHashes.2e9b2138848cf4463ce4e02d6e4dfc8f2a9b7138: Err, what? I'm not sure I agree with-
textByHashes.784b0b7d5e97cc81a78cec650a3b6833fe0c6626: Why would I want to be a tax collector for a-
textByHashes.fefa5b4f181d8c668fa52e0511a09a5f2cc7fe0f: Thorkel, can you tell me about this taxation?
textByHashes.5743777676a65d65331f90c47fc20b3c96b8b670: Not yet, though I've just noticed that this building has more windows in it than any other building.
textByHashes.229fee9b08497996734fb131ca6b69c96f84dba5: Oh, nothing. I'll get back to collecting taxes.
textByHashes.ec9ae53ea93201cb95ddc35c7ddcc407ae99dcf9: Can you tell me who I should tax?
textByHashes.725caf5e0c29d429d627d98e8c5b62952c3183b8: Not right now. You haven't lived here for a while anyway, and the King seems most keen to tax shopkeepers, so I reckon you are tax exempt!
textByHashes.fa48347ef1775da03a45e5f042802bc0c9cfb321: Not yet. I have a small task I must complete in order to ingratiate myself with King Sorvott.
textByHashes.21ad815a4b5071e6746bda6d3fa5c52543b71bf4: Ah, sorry. I'll be right back
textByHashes.cfcec14051f3a625bea78f4861e40024756225f3: I've left it in the bank.
textByHashes.3dc47a2af14857e750ca596e2061ab9307a00f61: Hello, I'm the tax collector. Got any windows I can tax?
textByHashes.50b57da983fc15cdd7d79207beb7ba085f4e4eac: I need to talk to you about tax.
textByHashes.2c2333eac2cf24627b63067d5eae0006d1ba7f7c: I think you owe the state some tax.
textByHashes.ea164aaeef73f9d662af3941906f309ebd1c38c6: Okay, I get the picture. I'm happy to announce you are exempt from taxation this year.
textByHashes.a3125d8185e371fd1fc61712737e1a3ccd3bc59f: Ho hum, I suppose bankers know how to save money...
textByHashes.e38fee3bb2a0929f8b8cb9225c8c19a8946365bf: I have been appointed by the King to collect taxes.
textByHashes.3c1ca0e2a60d61402fea291802619362fdd7a778: I'm afraid the King has instituted a new tax on windows. It is 1000gp per window. Fortunately you only need to pay once per building.
textByHashes.46e793a2acebb1b529fb0bf4fd0a78986bbdd4a1: This tax does seem a little harsh on you.
textByHashes.8c6905a840c1b8c4e4470385df6e81f9df88dbf7: But rules are rules. Pay up!
textByHashes.060b6502712f90aee17de9d745b9b418830c41eb: I'll think about it a bit.
textByHashes.25f2d6cce70c255e53a09a4675d5a4a308f7761e: I'm afraid the King has instituted a new Window Tax to pay for the defence of the realm. It is 1000gp per window. The tax is per building so only one of you have to pay.
textByHashes.ebbcc37acb49afa60149ff7049e6b13d0b3f31a9: I'm afraid the King has instituted a new Window Tax. 1000gp per window.
textByHashes.1782001eaf011706b1219f4f97b41a17a77be3b4: I suppose I could pay the tax for you.
textByHashes.3f530a5979642806c9442bfb8a6fcad121818f78: I'm afraid the King has instituted a new Window Tax to pay for the defence of the realm. It is 1000gp per window. The tax is paid on a building-by-building basis. Only one of you needs to pay...
textByHashes.17519f142827ba8ed910f8f9eeee5b9e05ab637b: I've collected the Window Taxes as instructed.
textByHashes.b1d1922a9f5ad1bd86fe0690a52a0c923b61ddff: So NOW you want me to collect money from everyone that has a beard. I'm not sure whether to laugh or cry.
textByHashes.8103f69aa653bd9c073b362db71f975a6c949c14: Grrr. Of course you do, sire.
textByHashes.13b9680124c53a08fec42140df05cea591e56734: Hello, I'm the tax collector. I'm taxing beards and I can't help noticing you have a beard.
textByHashes.a6d60ac80ce9bcffaf6ec32d460d3658084601ba: Err, thanks. Maybe I don't need to tax you.
textByHashes.f770a3e95a9f1e0d194c5f3d5c8869c85dda2141: Well, I can't say I blame you, since I need to tax you again.
textByHashes.3799913d9cd66933465b4750d87e6beb9749fd7d: This time the King has decided to tax facial hair!
textByHashes.d5af799b9d8456e599cc495f81b0159d4f4c22e6: According to my books, you owe 1000gp!
textByHashes.960d080cb45fc25cf767bfc6a4ba9cdb8ecab752: You may have a point there.
textByHashes.3ac51d3bbea830748d3bce0b9cce9eee12007839: But rules are rules. Pay up! You owe the state 1000.
textByHashes.b6e0a0108c29042a6b5c3cd7c4a924838970f35e: I sympathise; it's been a very taxing day for me as well.
textByHashes.275e75bca31cd582d861718e4d57e3f2f5ba6335: It is a bit, isn't it. Still, he's your King not mine!
textByHashes.c08a910bf56f56130e184854ecd70d5c0a05464f: Don't ask me why, but this time it's beards!
textByHashes.9770d2f089c12f10f0422dd41f733de1874276aa: I'm afraid all facial hair counts for tax purposes.
textByHashes.149cb6412894b9739a49f45477935d84973932bf: Sorry, facial hair is facial hair and is liable for taxation. No arguments.
textByHashes.b6c28d0423791732cfb567c3977b27a83977ce23: I have taken money from those with significant facial hair.
textByHashes.9c5daa94babdb7c414f3c66dacf7a457c6db3b70: Yes, I don't think your citizens would have coped with another round of tax.
textByHashes.1325bbfebee6ba5f29be5409238ae29cb78f17d9: I had a job to do. That's the way it goes sometimes.
textByHashes.3e816acbcde8087bfee5605de000c48f9f6695b3: But I do feel a little guilty about the tax actually.
textByHashes.ac7e7b27f53841e3b5cdab297c8f6a6b04186d94: Or at least I would do if I had the 5000 gp on me...
textByHashes.746922322bcc6a60c4053967fa28952f1eee7cb6: That King has some very strange attitudes.
textByHashes.7054266f90db32b1f97f6d976a53ffc17f6c332d: That should not be a problem.
textByHashes.a3fe982e9bdb45e90cc5c42a13417a0a2ba47daa: Well, I've got the ridiculous costume on again.
textByHashes.9b5074346acbd2218201cbde1dfd1aa2b305178b: You have a jester and a fool as a Champion?
textByHashes.7a96f8f8f45a0bdfd2db45b362a11070a35324f8: We must both be outlanders. We all look the same you know.
textByHashes.6d078befbba2a53095354d77af27343d5c94f69c: Not yet. I'll finish it off now.
textByHashes.2c2ede4c961a1e3eec01e74269a481e46cd79330: Err, of course sire. I assure you this act will be somewhat different.
textByHashes.122e88c2ab03d56464a31a4ade6916100dee232e: I can recite the epic tale of Beowulf if you prefer. It'll only take four or five hours.
textByHashes.15507e960dc51e6ed0be62211736d81bc7008610: I'm happy to humiliate myself for your entertainment, sire.
textByHashes.cd748fdb94588ed02015bcbab5f50e28d70dae9c: I am ready to answer your questions.
textByHashes.437115ac14cdc0cf42c18d94b9e9edec0621e72e: They are in a secluded bay, near Etceteria.
textByHashes.f2a6428ca842a7f62172ca16a6cbf8c795855a16: They will be given some potions.
textByHashes.0407a2ea5bdff1773f4abb78074c799490451e8b: No, I need to make a fool of myself again.
textByHashes.674575735cbad7ce769e6191bf41f518cf2dfcfa: Hmmm. I'm beginning to think that this spy malarkey is not as cool as I thought.
textByHashes.908eb250e406b7194a5450958ba3ca9bf1087288: I was following your orders, Sir.
textByHashes.c6a951c045c983a32af1c3450437cabc3fae90f7: I was given strict instructions to go along with Mawnis Burowgar's orders while investigating their island.
textByHashes.965dab592dbec218409e04bc5ca392a975305aff: As I told your fool of a Spymaster, Neitiznot's militia are not going to attack you.
textByHashes.e89fd6d4871a391e6f16ad3ebbffcd2feae26939: It is no army Neitiznot has trained, but a raiding party, sire.
textByHashes.94088e407b84a5bfccbe96bda72e22aa41ba0259: Mawnis Burowgar's goal is to see the leader of the trolls beheaded.
textByHashes.81f7b8a6da3aa7b7dd53fbba078db1a0fa5647b4: Right! That's it! I've had enough!
textByHashes.66b7c080635e4af8bd5f72b3222cdb5af75b58a2: No more lying! No more biting my tongue! Do I take you for a fool? Yes I do!
textByHashes.94d2662b97caa1880d807811fd2ed1b03d66ab6f: You are so paranoid about Neitiznot that you are running this island into the ground!
textByHashes.0cbf53dc7d26566a81c48bd2f30e25e775bd13c0: Neitiznot is not going to attack Jatizso. I'll say it again to try and force it into your thick skull! Neitiznot is not going to attack Jatizso. They don't care about Jatizso. They care about the trolls and Troll King who
textByHashes.467833c9d1ce7d8856fc6ae47e39eef5eac88251: are the real threats to the islands. You are so obsessed with your cousin, however, that you stick your head
textByHashes.b7d7a89d2bf144dc32fc821285bb4056fda5fd44: in the sand whenever it comes to the trolls. But I'm not sure it matters, since I think there is a good chance that you will destroy this village long before the trolls get here!
textByHashes.05c782beff615a3f2765ed72acbe4407ea84253e: You do not have to dress in a jester's costume to act the fool, your royal crown is more than enough!
textByHashes.0b7192b1ec523d5ba0b0d3b221e4921796c9fe93: Maybe if they had, you wouldn't be in this mess.
textByHashes.d65f67b2b6fcfc32335bb075e9b56e3210fcf7cd: I'd like to see you try.
textByHashes.d70f2e03ed89c031cb8ed56e1f285c7475eea350: You haven't listened to a single word I've been saying, have you?
textByHashes.66dae5fe866194701f24f168db9b5406b8a31fb2: Do you even know where to find the Troll King? Your warriors are underfed and tired; your weapons inadequate. You don't stand a chance. Join with your brethren and you may share the glory and perhaps find
textByHashes.8912511850472c3cdb4835445ec4dc5b031c0ca5: a way to make peace between your lands. I'm sure the Burgher would be glad of your aid.
textByHashes.d1c55cfd3eabb6cdbf3d49bf855e0ee4599f116f: Fine. I give up. I will do this final task for you. After that you're on your own - may the gods be with your troops - they're going to need it.
textByHashes.a04ad8bfbc7e2c9b2bc2ad74fbf3e328b7e9a249: Not yet, I've lost the decree.
textByHashes.6f52f8bcb017403a56d6b4e348c52d0c7ab728d0: I'm afraid I don't have the space to carry it.
textByHashes.53b09604d915785acfe42191efeb79de4d696399: I was instructed to give you this, err, now where did I put the King's decree?
textByHashes.1c43076404988a1e75d227d78cea55f0426e51f8: I was instructed to give you this decree by King Sorvott.
textByHashes.7d45430f33105e1ce043b9934ceba77a18289adf: King Sorvott has spies that have learnt of the troops you have trained.
textByHashes.ddff96c0d2bc4fb47c4e99d457f6cbcf5d6bc775: Until recently, they believed that you planned to assault their town.
textByHashes.073704dde6188d1a4c8776cc50186c8ac0b807e9: Now that Jatizso's spies have learnt of your plans to attack the troll caves, King Sorvott is raising his guards to assault them himself.
textByHashes.bbef2907580be2d6d6d11c6adcea783b91df2748: I believe he plans to depart before you can be ready.
textByHashes.e8c4ffa1ad0f13b89c5440a98199049e85454804: Very well. What do these rites entail?
textByHashes.3db15874b25d5fbc4b31d54cd970bd7e16188bdf: Thank you, Fridleif. I shall return with the yak-hides soon.
textByHashes.ef6fcce7010e55393f0589150b3ec0f81434b436: I have still to complete the traditional armour of a Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.cbacd0d190d73bb98a5b27a5440b01ef455c9ecd: Thanks for the advice, Fridlief. Where are these 'Woodcutting stumps'?
textByHashes.726d2da77035b35b4e54009ef6915e0361eaa760: Alright I will - if that's the way you're going to be about it.
textByHashes.db75a76a9173ff4dd68e233e4bcd3a56afccb754: Can you cure any other type of leather?
textByHashes.85162132d58e308f09c8e675f279bb73a5498d44: I'll take that as a no then.
textByHashes.a189b42cea5c5ffc1c4a0835982fdd2f611d8745: No, thanks. I'll be off then.
textByHashes.c7a462e94affe0bfa22db9c204449a9b8774c521: Yes please, I've forgotten how to make the armour.
textByHashes.1c0ba5f9aae5eddd3a037310fa678776619c51a9: Thakkrad has helped me to complete the traditional armour of a Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.32b48823084aa164a1729eb7b897b57265c62c32: Thank you. I shall return with a shield soon.
textByHashes.fed1a566bc5d451438667d672d7f910dcaaa17ca: I have still to complete the traditional shield of a Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.5c596a3a843b1d0ad5701123230434fdc8ad182f: Fridleif has helped me to complete the traditional shield of the Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.7863ae50862c9bcedddde48edbd85b7bfba6e1ec: I swear to uphold the virtues of courage and honour.
textByHashes.11662c8ffd030c1575942ad298195583b5d8cf0a: I shall make my way over to them now, so that we may defeat this foul Troll King.
textByHashes.e8465ca3d275a56899f12de8a6c8cf623eac637d: Right, the eastern caves on the northern isle. Thanks Fridleif, I'm on my way there now.
textByHashes.6b75a8716ffbb30b786de747e184a9ba681e3402: Hmm. Left, right, then left again... I'm lost. Best I head toward the sound of the fighting.
textByHashes.d644af691273b7cef7b4a9b78ab90bc9fe2a473a: It was a hard journey here. I trust you all made it here intact?
textByHashes.310e0d2f69feef0c43bc235b80d7670fc11deb7c: I will find the Troll King there, correct?
textByHashes.6739c1253859dde002491df089ef35286b863255: The fact you've saved any at all proves your bravery.
textByHashes.62be4ccf38dbe12e5c00e56c429e25530b8c3fcd: Bork! The battle rages on and we are strong, but I need supplies!
textByHashes.881b01961ddb9d065908883b2d49d7524e65f7ef: I sense defeat in your voice already, mighty King.
textByHashes.d7070278c6bd1dcc958a00fe04072a2a1efd2d76: You and I both know that Burgher Burowgar's forces are better prepared and trained than your men.
textByHashes.72e758db414cd1aba32099856976792c60a4ed63: I think you're right Thorkel, goodbye.
textByHashes.7389e87adffae89572a2cd9828ef35877c37940e: I have come to inform you that you may recall your guards; the Troll King was slain by my hand.
textByHashes.61b94370cecaec8fcedaa4baf666698cf8e0a93f: Oh. Are they still recovering from their defeat against the trolls?
textByHashes.3b28954c8b0b27343de9d0dbce74d2c200dd796a: Very well, your Highness, I leave you to contemplate this...
textByHashes.b731e3683ad9a59b46cd1b1ee635527e0397ba7e: Should you have approached me honestly and truthfully, rather than with lies and secrecy,
textByHashes.65d00734d4f7ac24da0a9080e612c9d2c5fb18d7: then it could have been you holding the head of the Troll King aloft today.
textByHashes.805a13de595fff3370c734a27a9560a8b26341f4: I have returned victorious, Mawnis Burowgar.
textByHashes.277185e650db812398560203a213e6c79ba02722: I offer the beast's head as proof that I have completed your task, sir.
textByHashes.474c3fb63140f88d581bc4f3fb80103119520162: My thanks for the honour you have bestowed upon me, Mawnis Burowgar.
textByHashes.f1bac3fb05fe065a2ccd1c6db6a539adb4d595fe: I thank you for presenting me with such a finely crafted helm, sir.
textByHashes.186626b9a5a5a55dcb22a500109ed69d0269eebc: I look forward to any other tasks you may have for me in the future, Burgher Burowar.
textByHashes.4abd70f102c343dd8850c085bc92f2f97085e2c7: I do not think I can help you with that sire. I don't think King Sorvott is speaking with me anymore.
textByHashes.9e600d9354ea41a10e380e1923866d20677e7627: Fair thee well, kinsmen of Neitiznot.
textByHashes.83a5ba72dba7ea9151351d9146e3041b3a32605c: I thank you again for presenting me with such a helm.
textByHashes.77aa8400f4a6372e7a5323046ca5e0bd896e1db9: Have you got any more of those helms?
textByHashes.711e6b6fb97039976b014decc1b6372594d4a684: Err yes, that one. I may have mislaid it.
textByHashes.22d40b2fbe17fffda111250eb359de5c54eadde8: I don't think I can afford that, sorry.
textByHashes.7ecd213ce57b0a91f509f00dcc078a1b3a4c3c79: It was a hard-fought battle, but we Fremennik prevailed!
textByHashes.3cc75ace200bc6a2e2e665f0e0da646cc91b9ef9: It would be an honour to be remembered in such a way! Thanks.
textByHashes.714ce93334d7ffe3793afbea300ff9fbd19b1778: Thanks Thakkrad. Does that mean I have access to the runite ores on that island?
textByHashes.ed57144e94d37d3e36adbb17d7a0dd741ddbf03b: Actually, I would be very interested to hear what you have to offer.
textByHashes.13547f6a08b0aa6f9ece7460a2f4b015059a33d8: Well, I think I've missed the first way, but how can I get the council of elders to vote to let me join your clan?
textByHashes.669ebe0c9800652336d9e5ca3905cf59fb5e0151: I think I would enjoy the challenge of becoming an honorary Fremennik. Where and how do I start?
textByHashes.074e57c61503c90d250bddde379b087ee0d59a5e: No way do I want to become like YOU! Forget you, and forget your whole stupid town! You're a bunch of stupid primitives, from what I've seen!
textByHashes.4d902b92afe3351b3b08a76fd864b6a4ea50d58d: You're right. I really couldn't care less.
textByHashes.04c0970dd8c402f4318f4ad31d91ce2ffeef0f5f: Why will no-one talk to me?
textByHashes.d362ac4a85f728c90a00047deaa79962740245f1: Then how come you're talking to me?
textByHashes.b2c62f2a3fa1de54bdb153e4c76fa4e8cac437e2: Is there a way for you to authorise your tribe to talk to me then?
textByHashes.532c266bb712fcdc8396bf992da9b83d6b6e935d: I know this is a bit of a long shot... but are you a member of the council of elders?
textByHashes.730520335eb5c47672a30df3f1a0e64b8fb9f9fc: Uh... I'll take that as a no.
textByHashes.3ab193b3bf46ce3570295b08e3119116361f0a1e: Hi. Are you a member of the council?
textByHashes.75cc9ded2149138252b2d0b745b9d832cba05356: Hello. I'm looking for a member of the council of elders who will support my application to become an honorary Fremennik.
textByHashes.06908da67aecbee926823bb6a8d6c5c62dd7c81d: So can I somehow persuade you to vote for me at the council of elders?
textByHashes.b412b86a69ad37cce7ba8ed6471fb872705112cb: But you don't even know me!
textByHashes.ec5c2ebc49f5f89b1baa33fd0004d74645ae628e: I didn't come all the way up here just to be insulted!
textByHashes.aa3709f0c18542188a16c058e864384d056a572e: You know what? Forget you, you stupid barbarian! I don't need your stupid vote!
textByHashes.7effc34559124cd334c326312ecab5d5a22607e7: Hello, are you a member of the council?
textByHashes.9555b89e5c5e25352f23693d5d87ce33c7504a3f: Hi. Are you a member of the council of elders?
textByHashes.08ffdca93dd90e9c6cf50bb63878683f4ff05fcb: That's right, to become a Fremennik.
textByHashes.b3c51ac8a73c0cc7bc9cd17c15c8374a4f4a98db: Do you know any council members?
textByHashes.6c5f042833a09d4a86031424d63068aeba83e79c: Great! Can you vote for me at the council of elders for me to become a Fremennik?
textByHashes.e8b71e7928cf537b8530b968101d0caf38ad6fee: It's kind of mean to trick me like that...
textByHashes.aab1b07c82d5d50e300eb366843e70f2e28a0b51: Are you a member of the Fremmenik council?
textByHashes.171bb1e64291f001e82812c9aa0133722f7814a1: Well, I was told by Brundt that I could be voted into the tribe as an honorary Fremmenik if I could find seven members of the council of elders to vote in my favour.
textByHashes.974452897ee202827b5e92b5cebb72d86afba168: So can I have your vote?
textByHashes.521cadb7e4826f1fff7b1f91619fc2a976977fdd: Um... do you have any estimate on when that is?
textByHashes.4aba6245b376d91532c730aa106439bb4252f7cf: Are you a member of the council of elders?
textByHashes.f86348bb1c89bebc0547a657892daba522042e25: Hi, I don't suppose you are a member of the council of elders are you?
textByHashes.4d1984e6e581e8805ca6c3f525cb4aade47946d6: That's right! Why, are you on the council?
textByHashes.3365fa0fe5befa36063acea46554e9e7d5567f9d: A drinking contest? Easy. Set them up, and I'll knock them back.
textByHashes.f7ec2b918e8c56666f3240bd5c13819ca636bf46: I don't think drinking myself into a stupor is a very good way of testing my worthiness.
textByHashes.2f5385431c4d18baa092678934a45159c09bdd3e: I'm going to find someone else to vote for me then.
textByHashes.71b3d891404ccc25d85eba6284e3d3fad6c228bf: Yes, let's start this drinking contest!
textByHashes.30b2062ed116e08e7f42bf9725d1582839427e61: Ish no' fair! (hic) I canna drink another drop! Alsho feel veddy, veddy ill...
textByHashes.b0bd1d95ddcb2aaf613e13b26a81bf5774f1813e: What do I have to do to earn your vote again?
textByHashes.88e079e7d31d290b9fd44fb4193550e232883ff7: Oh yeah. Okay, I will do.
textByHashes.0e84cc674042477748c9981028747f42cffa7581: So you fixed this bridge yourself?
textByHashes.0ad341d17e5434227b45073da314396c824f768f: Didn't you used to sell poison?
textByHashes.b7161a9275082f48cb2f0c3aaa1adde59ad83432: Uh, yeah, I've already heard the sales pitch.
textByHashes.187a40072a17bf10b532b8f38bf347e56329ac71: So you don't sell poison any more?
textByHashes.9d900c698f66a812ddf0c0bc32e7422a133e0303: So... when you say 'all good stockists'...
textByHashes.042c524debec29cd0ec81c9fb423913fa4e22ea9: How many inns actually sell this stuff?
textByHashes.93a154ba805a850268ee85732599ed7856a8f741: Actually, I would like some. How much do you want for it?
textByHashes.385d419acbb526023de529f7a3470fed501247a8: I understand you have some low alcohol beer for sale...?
textByHashes.1ad1a2a3c7d11e0ab5f97395cbd2eb7b0b5c79e5: I'm going to have to find some way to distract this guy while I cheat...
textByHashes.3d9a17f7e444bcaf5eb0f22744f9c9239d548394: I don't have anything I really want to put inside a smelly old drain pipe.
textByHashes.b76813a1e54ab47325dfebd51fe96cc8ba32a193: That is going to make a really loud bang when it goes off! It would be a perfect distraction to help me cheat in the drinking contest!
textByHashes.f61df54061d8f8f65422c79aa043a70761657cf2: Aaaah, lovely stuff. So you want to get the next round in, or shall I? You don't look so good there!
textByHashes.08bdea7dc3747586feaa15097fedfd4275b8ed4c: So I can rely on your vote at the council?
textByHashes.edde32ebd414a46d31d321504915adb2f964f2a3: Are you a member of the council?
textByHashes.b200b04771fced90085c051e7df5a4fa102b426f: Well, I ask because I am currently doing the Fremennik trials so as to join your clan. I need seven of the twelve council of elders to vote for me.
textByHashes.d56476b0b50b2c8aec7accc65ede93b051b67e1d: So how would I do that?
textByHashes.11c62651a5212da863e1e1237ce6c2096e189fc8: Sure! This certainly sounds pretty easy to accomplish - I'll have your vote in no time!
textByHashes.3f5e6caf02f9696a4f7db592e3ab2c5a0fe50cc3: Forget it! This all sounds like way too much work for a stupid vote at a meeting! I'll find someone else instead.
textByHashes.29fc7d37b1f0552bb386bb41b1b5c77fd364ee6a: So how would I go about writing this epic?
textByHashes.cc925e82a164a7e6ff5159680b15e35dea5f3c73: How do I make an instrument?
textByHashes.672d2758cd825a67609673b934d39b220f2e55f5: Then what do I need to do?
textByHashes.527f3097a2ab25f91dc89bcb992e1fb7f84b6666: So what would be a worthy offering?
textByHashes.bfb80c4c6c0e55e9c46d25544227e4282180471a: Okay, what else do I need to do?
textByHashes.c7e2e3588b6c9ea96e6bb1ae93fde898a40d691a: Can you remind me about making a lyre again, please Olaf?
textByHashes.80ba56a17a79e83bdecb284f509cf02c1d7dbfdc: Can you remind me about getting a blessing from Fossegrimen again?
textByHashes.15f3b08d1b91644fb9e1a49d606724bc91b8da78: Can you remind me about how to perform at the longhall again please?
textByHashes.cf5f6c624fff83c2830949ccc011c6bea083fcba: No thanks, I think that's all pretty straight forward. I'll go and make my lyre now.
textByHashes.e4c37061295987d48afaf8569d479d0d141e2e95: Actually, I'm not after your golden apples. I was wondering if I could have some golden wool; I need it to string a lyre.
textByHashes.2244788ae8c1c47ae4a487a11feacd91aa2f9d51: Yes, yes, you are incredibly clever. Now please can I have some golden wool?
textByHashes.82391435003b141703c6cee43461c3d57faf0241: Other human? You mean someone else has been there and you gave them wool?
textByHashes.de95228332ea0d879cfcff5e71858d9caef3b054: No, honest, you're REALLY clever. Why, I could not contemplate a mere chicanery with an advanced intellect such as you currently present.
textByHashes.356a2b2bda34d8508708289460abc2eb6d2e547e: Can I give you a present? Or maybe exchange you something for some wool?
textByHashes.8c0947a06ceaba799d627cb6eee9985bba6fee9b: Hello there. I understand you managed to get some golden wool from Lalli?
textByHashes.e343b86523c134deed2fae28a27bc4e49ef7cc0b: So how did you manage to get the wool?
textByHashes.989289b02d7776465f2a422bbad5c8cec8c28f8a: Indeed he is. So how did you manage to get some golden wool from him?
textByHashes.ba356460fd5ce231f44030fe4651bdc7fe6b54dd: Do you have any spare rocks then?
textByHashes.186a2c12913c255852d1e1e9972c4f4e1749ec14: So this is the exact same type of rock you managed to sell to Lalli as a pet?
textByHashes.10757e801d13dda7d6e2e2ac187b24edbdffe884: Can I have another rock? I lost mine...
textByHashes.bc731781fdde4339fd022d9fa27b0a7e5bc22b1c: Wait! I have something that might interest you... a pet rock!
textByHashes.03c55a8e361ed654b4b2618a170d53312fdcd04d: Please... all I want is some of your golden wool...
textByHashes.677423351fbf5bd0334a1ce45467c5ff7089bcea: Hmm... So you're hungry? I think I will have the perfect thing for you to eat... I just need to get myself an onion, a potato and a cabbage...
textByHashes.ec0b1962d256726746e8ecd70c0d664f538a6692: Indeed it is. Try it and see.
textByHashes.057e0f1bbbf093dee182c614da20f7e807666ea6: Indeed it is. But I'm willing to trade it.
textByHashes.fe1827e73867c2c1cd8091a4aac7aaeeb0554225: I. DON'T. WANT. ANY. GOLDEN. APPLES. ALL. I. WANT. IS. A. GOLDEN. FLEECE.
textByHashes.bf649ca4d9e6a0b1f4681e935fcd899a64d587e8: I really wouldn't know where to begin playing anything on this...
textByHashes.9308b9a2d7782856df94764c3103b1e6b568c62a: The thought of lots of questing
textByHashes.6598314eb6a1c360135f8e5d00391b871dd80fc4: but I have done my simple best
textByHashes.223d36405ed14323ea92a5c488f3e06c43a99fe3: I hit my share of zeroes
textByHashes.337f2466ecfb7436adcc11358cec1460774b385e: I cannot even start to list
textByHashes.2b16d9f6bf5a217338465370eac4f03be1d53344: the amount of foes I've killed.
textByHashes.6f2934a98d15e6305ff7c66c566b7229505c63c6: I will simply tell you this:
textByHashes.02876058e957ce81c6818e9e0fe4cc0ce9eeed0d: But they just all seem jealous that
textByHashes.4a4272cb3ecd9a22d88bc68b93fadaaabcd9bcf8: But since I have to sing this song,
textByHashes.8f9ac442348512becb3faac5a98c01c6128c0917: I'll just go ahead and play.
textByHashes.a95a9a5ab6d5e794055b9870812d9c32f4c5eb28: So can I rely on your vote with the council of elders in my favour?
textByHashes.e6d226c92c19609ddf8aacac8a61d43fef7d5dd9: Erm... so that's a yes, then?
textByHashes.9cc8ad56a6d5d9b96718c0db6fe5bb2e57662683: I was wondering if I could persuade you to vouch for me as a member of your clan?
textByHashes.95a451ec061f414e20165cdf169b63239bea66e0: How can I prove my hunting skills to you? I can go kill, like, a hundred chickens for you right now!
textByHashes.3437237838065bdfc4e544882151f3b90c2d5feb: Cows then? I can kill cows until, er, the cows come home.
textByHashes.4283c0698bf7a1daba0aa31f686a2ecf5ce19b3f: What's a Draugen? Some kind of cheap barbarian rip- off of a dragon?
textByHashes.963eddfa5fd9c01a73a30e2647c31c9da2e634dd: ...Let me get this straight; You want me to hunt an unkillable, invincible, and invisible enemy? How am I supposed to do that?
textByHashes.9726abc04d3d3c5e7f6a57d812a3060ca7566ac4: Well, I need every vote I can get in the council of elders, but this certainly sounds impossible to do...
textByHashes.759f151fb9192f0ba8a64d1c3753a69612a97681: Not yet... I lost the talisman you gave me.
textByHashes.933e583ce9a795256722e4268669008e5c725472: I was wondering if I can count on your vote at the council of elders?
textByHashes.045833bb07afa95d8ed64ea2c6d68689ebf906cd: How did I know it wouldn't be that simple for your vote?
textByHashes.2198d7db8f0fdc0b0d215a0ed9e8e7380291af12: Well... I guess that doesn't sound too hard...
textByHashes.8ab55a5c66b8df800d012d8ec547f53f352fe860: Okay. I don't think this will be too difficult. Any suggestions on where to start looking for this flower?
textByHashes.aa1d36baf950dced45e7e0ccfffef6344255bb62: You know what? No. This all sounds like a lot of hassle to me, and frankly I just can't be bothered with it right now.
textByHashes.6916c38562767a53600cef9f188dd3651e0b1172: I'll go get someone else to vote for me.
textByHashes.345f9dc8d73ef10ad4e27ccf60122d9124400b93: I'm still working on it... Do you have any suggestion where to start looking for it?
textByHashes.3bcfc783418b512f55a93d88cb24e2945d7764b6: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a rare flower from across the sea, do you?
textByHashes.6d4ab3f9c35054b3017426c48ac752560c39b54d: Can I buy it from you?
textByHashes.2abcb38a1e7d77cbab095cfce2e21da58cf1e7b3: Maybe you could let me have the flower and do something else to impress her?
textByHashes.9fdd1e996f8b3082bfac0b54ed128b6447b2a496: So if I can find someone to write you a romantic ballad, you will give me your flower?
textByHashes.5fc1ac5a50ed6f41b30ca7ace0f7125b8dba4df9: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a love ballad, do you?
textByHashes.c90e4ac60ef2a857e3d4ab0820c0b9427b598af7: Great! Can you write me one then?
textByHashes.1d610b023eb83e063bec0f34cbef6b73797e217c: let me guess; here comes the 'but'.
textByHashes.abf30f9c2136af5e1629e5421252c55e4e9dc359: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find some custom sturdy boots, do you?
textByHashes.7f147c05c9f4d7a6eaf324dc526ec9ee4e97cb0f: They're not for me... I need them for Olaf.
textByHashes.7133c3343df8ab437531bb92f7306442d531735d: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a guarantee of a reduction on sales taxes, do you?
textByHashes.d53309ee1ca8de86898cee2c7966a77227950b8a: Actually, it's not for me. I need to get it as part of my trials.
textByHashes.2e5b578f41d04ffd7c4b9a197f679579d1e16150: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a map to unspoiled hunting grounds, do you?
textByHashes.9a9096b9fa8c5faa663ba934103fafe9e18a3cdf: No, I guess not. So can I have it?
textByHashes.0220230b61e6162ac41e938a90daa5ed90025afc: So where would I get that?
textByHashes.6dfad15cb57188433618439559a333f9c11505a7: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a finely balanced custom bowstring, do you?
textByHashes.2422f0c65185311bf9a006e4b255d2ec0daa1fe9: It's for Sigli. It needs to be weighted precisely to suit his hunting bow.
textByHashes.af21dbb5f69065d4389b43335f2264edc616a636: Then maybe you'll accept something else...?
textByHashes.31e7d85cb086d64b1e53b786bbaccefb8f24e5d8: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find an exotic and extremely rare fish, do you?
textByHashes.08f72b682f1fd36aa0b22aaf99f53738c327f5ea: Er... no, it's the one for you that I'm looking for...
textByHashes.b34680d7dc95dc07a5d932910e9c79950ccc4141: You have it? Can I trade you something for it?
textByHashes.c98b9d8062bb593e36f4f846354e96fe74a83d6d: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a map of deep sea fishing spots do you?
textByHashes.93d2ace0885075fe13a34adf9f758f5c0e375128: Perhaps I can trade you something for it?
textByHashes.d8d617aa526f68b3297e95ce46fba26d90ad9a56: Where could I get a weather forecast from then?
textByHashes.594cdc710d75ee4c2ef89b2c3eeb92838a252df8: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a weather forecast from the Fremennik Seer do you?
textByHashes.7ebb2ebcd4857af6742920b639363769202f3482: Can I have a weather forecast then please?
textByHashes.eab1b0f5d4999bfb4847dcf31843856a57f641a7: I knew you were going to say that...
textByHashes.186f132324d42a3d580a97b0b9312acaf9d815a0: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a brave and powerful warrior to act as a bodyguard?
textByHashes.684fe0beb68bd04605db9bdc820fb6f1963c99d1: Is there no way you would do this for me?
textByHashes.9f0221bf58fce35cb3a17d734d3e80f11dfeec60: So you want me to go kill one of them off for you? Make it look like an accident?
textByHashes.1fb031b1004e4f31c3fa985fdb31937840ff3bdb: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a Champions' Token?
textByHashes.dfaa815602f6b020014b767423b889e7cae2e0dd: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a token to allow a seat at the champions table, do you?
textByHashes.c44c9a010f2a37089a88fd1048fedc7878fb7b0d: Cool. That sounds pretty sweet! So I guess you don't want to give it away?
textByHashes.0d5437c7e15b0b2cb1732dbfd634da17fa51f3e5: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find the longhall barkeeps' legendary cocktail, do you?
textByHashes.593a904e0d742b8dd9545f5416cd336021edf0cb: But you still remember how to make it, right?
textByHashes.f5487a2a4628489bf4bda24c7322aab3ce40be73: And you have all the ingredients here? I don't need to go chasing round the world for obscure ingredients to make it?
textByHashes.044db938411e553531fc299587d3cd64fe221457: Can you make me your legendary cocktail then?
textByHashes.60900a10c33fb8fd4bbe65d0ddeea4bbfa9fc42a: Any way I could change your mind?
textByHashes.dc64569d9c1ca1df31b7404af2c31927e2e7320c: Any idea how I can get him to do that?
textByHashes.c1fd44d19acdcbfaccd443d1059b7829e843d42f: I don't suppose you have any idea where I could find a written promise from Askeladden to stay out of the Longhall?
textByHashes.27d42aa111e431a90abcc38140a68e3970aa35a1: That's all you want in return? Sure thing. Here you go.
textByHashes.5ae3f1c2794ccec30c4af8aa5598531b0977626d: ...how embarrassing. I appear to be short...
textByHashes.1529e0c417a832e159bed1d51b91c681e5d3c358: I don't think so... That's really quite a lot of money...
textByHashes.849fa04bfe5061646b8683626078db38573799ca: I thought you really liked the long hall?
textByHashes.fec4f87d32ce0c70ed106114c5906acc6b6cf75d: Then why did you sign this guarantee that you will never enter it again?
textByHashes.02a2b4e430c47aa91840338d8ac8951aaa14810b: Knowing you, I guess I didn't.
textByHashes.e836802ddcc381cc2fde4ee274f8b3727ae1fb85: Hi! Can I please have one of your legendary cocktails now?
textByHashes.c728c880dcb757968484dc8a8a1addad4d197160: Uh... yeah... yeah, you probably won't see someone called Askeladden coming in here...
textByHashes.d3e4cc8f2f047f743da61c1736cd7887b25f7ec6: Thanks for making me this cocktail. Why don't you make them anymore normally?
textByHashes.caa19ac3fff15f2ed28bae0cd9b78d7022ac077a: Hey. I got your cocktail for you.
textByHashes.c18dbe07fcb364d865144c71d4d8458ec741f8c5: I guess you're happy with the trade then!
textByHashes.bfc69fd704e9ccd71253f49d64a0f2fd510709a2: So it doesn't bother you at all that you just gave up your place here for one drink?
textByHashes.678913363ed61798c8b13226ff0227c753f5309c: What did it taste of, then?
textByHashes.856aad69614cdc36fcea70625fc8615830aa4620: I would like your contract to offer your services as a bodyguard.
textByHashes.4dd76785b786b696e27a7d04c7d3f6710f62ae30: It's a good thing I have the Champions' Token right here then, isn't it?
textByHashes.db3010e095e338049940e057bf503881630fb6cd: You didn't take much persuading to 'lower' yourself to a bodyguard.
textByHashes.9e3e57b8b6a29600d143f27773b0860dc91453f5: Can I have a weather forecast now please?
textByHashes.07382defb75a2ece9956350e756768d11342cd4a: Yeah, I know; I have one right here from Thorvald.
textByHashes.e6f9d2227701708b7dfc02c810a3b21dcf2b0bf4: I still don't know why you didn't just let me have one anyway in the first place. Surely it means nothing to you?
textByHashes.72dcbe385184e5a0490e44e395d23d79bc8c4f2e: I would like your map of fishing spots.
textByHashes.bbc9ae606462b7c6c248176e638cd64680b60ee8: What, like this one I have here?
textByHashes.9180ce4bcd78ef99df855deee75d33540d7853f4: If this map of fishing spots is so valuable, why did you give it away to me so easily?
textByHashes.14015189e16ab61ac50f50743b03d52f11a2993a: Here. I got you your map.
textByHashes.0bda46f7c6f9cd86790dcb48fa187aadf4e22fdf: I don't see what's so special about this so called rare fish.
textByHashes.5d2c615af4c3ae4e1c27f003249013dfde4ee1e8: Hi there. I got your fish, so can I have that bowstring for Sigli now?
textByHashes.c2244843ae2954779e94325b9f24dbc927e9fbc8: So about this bowstring... was it hard to make or something?
textByHashes.956e7ed742029338d25de48ba88a43219fa82daa: Here. I have your bowstring. Give me your map to the hunting grounds.
textByHashes.e2e2df66b50f08c0d1ab269586172b3f9d4a67c9: So you really don't mind giving this away to me?
textByHashes.6274e09c2fa667f82e8b5f4a70a92d62ff1ade08: I got Sigli's hunting map for you.
textByHashes.85f31a7c8d4cd810a15cba76e2947cd5f0138387: So cutting sales tax isn't going to ruin your economy here or anything?
textByHashes.695db529a0f7b2c5b743bb92670ae2cb13b66a7b: Hello. Can I have those boots now? Here is a written statement from Brundt outlining future tax burdens upon Fremennik merchants and shopkeepers for the year.
textByHashes.9cc10738884c15171dc73edca5bbd99a36929c11: Hey, these shoes look pretty comfy. Think you could make me a pair like them?
textByHashes.252c0fe2e736224b2b497f59cc6ac2d9bffa2e69: Hello Olaf. Do you have a beautiful love song written for me?
textByHashes.d03964bb2d79658c6b6fa00d23244591d2b9193f: As a matter of fact - I do!
textByHashes.5932b56a96309fcf3ebdeb763d3c402a9a5c16c9: So you think this song is pretty good then?
textByHashes.658240468567842e9bfdae7ff91c89a4eeef4beb: You'll be glad to know I have had a love song written just for you by Olaf. So can I have that flower of yours now?
textByHashes.3909801b19f26fc1e636c6b031c43c7900424de7: so tell me... who is this woman that you are trying to impress anyway?
textByHashes.9dcf554c24fc550e1ecee76abddcb9d71711ad78: So I can count on your vote at the council of elders?
textByHashes.dccde9cdc80e6f4527ecf21a94ff8f65264b6029: Erm... are you a member of the council?
textByHashes.6113b128f61e311939122d87f6e59e8360bcbed9: Well... I was wondering if you could vote for me to become a Fremennik.
textByHashes.d9fd9038b3bca473e9475e6818e23422a371b46a: So how can I prove that? You want to fight me? Come on then, bring it on! Right here, right now, buddy!
textByHashes.f4241deebd2a6f794d2414e021adac56e7e486aa: Am I prepared? I'll show you what combat's all about, you big sissy barbarian type guy!
textByHashes.61083c93590cbba0cebfaec06ece106edd24f038: Is that all? It will be easy!
textByHashes.deafddd28629c77cf54145880df90842d5ce68d8: No thanks, I'm pretty sure that I can find someone else to vote for me.
textByHashes.de2aece6a306cfbade77456e3b7d0eb8aa344f1a: So what do I have to do to earn your vote at the council again?
textByHashes.16c493327746bfa6b7960e18f31d830039c7719b: But he can't REALLY be unkillable... ...can he?
textByHashes.13751316486c6bff0c0911fcf960815f3ea7289c: I don't really like fighting that much... Isn't there something else I can do to earn your vote at the council of elders?
textByHashes.e7b1d035def232d7418fd715e18589be3bb045c9: Oh. Really? Oh. So I have to pass your combat trial?
textByHashes.53d212c49e770ca0c414c72c94cc3ca8aff7070c: Hello there! Thorvald tells me you can deposit my equipment directly into my bank account for me...?
textByHashes.a7fd92938259784045ea10d0da980fe5adfa425a: No thanks, I'll just go to the bank and sort my inventory out myself.
textByHashes.ee639487ed7f11396401e451521fcc4c16cbe8cb: But... I don't understand... I did not manage to beat Koschei...
textByHashes.eb58455c3ade90f5812be61cc937a1cc16d99328: So can I count on your vote at the council of elders now Thorvald?
textByHashes.3237fbc6d127e522613a57a9bc54b22f9e1cf53f: I'd really rather not go back down there again, now that I have Thorvald's vote at the council of elders.
textByHashes.11ff3317487363e89dbfcd2cd0e76965d9b23d24: Hello. I'm looking for members of the council of elders to vote for me to become a Fremennik.
textByHashes.f3e044091216bf9318eb566b2abc89f998af4623: How can I prove that to you?
textByHashes.5dcf3dd73c375a9780e31828a0b1d072a64abbb8: An intelligence test? I thought barbarians were stupid!
textByHashes.d791a99fab4467b086f458ea1cee0dcf74237661: So what exactly does this puzzle consist of, then?
textByHashes.cf96cf1d2193ce217eb5e3dadee7a1b520f88418: I can't take anything in there with me?
textByHashes.888b22cd2c56a9ab8fc3e3941fbba5931128037e: Yes, I accept your challenge. I have one small question, however...
textByHashes.af4e8160281439d9132f0d5c222b8a79536579b1: Well... you say I can bring nothing with me when I enter your house...
textByHashes.dca7b3192e8f9360083d946c503a5758722a3442: No thanks. Nobody touches my stuff but me!
textByHashes.c5786dfe6ee9ea638a87814a52b01c958dd47147: No, thinking about stuff isn't really my 'thing'. I'd rather go kill something. I'll find someone else to vote for me.
textByHashes.61e270441b2a823c06210e1e12234259ce529ab4: So I can bring nothing with me when I enter your house?
textByHashes.d2e24c64682d111c6f28322011898e8b8adf3a17: So I just have to enter by one door of your house, and leave by the other?
textByHashes.077a01cdcba2a662070f32913d25026ea97bd529: So you will vote for me at the council?
textByHashes.050ff062719d84c912b6f7681e130b832283cef0: I am trying to become a member of the Fremennik clan! The Chieftain told me that I may be able to gain your vote at the council of elders?
textByHashes.ad806d5aed0d6c186f823b2ef97cbf97c895f2c3: Well, how would I go about showing that?
textByHashes.d541453c3fc5fe952a168dc8c49147fcb94e5fa6: A maze? Is that all? Sure, it sounds simple enough.
textByHashes.bb7efdcc1ec8e6a3729d7c70a6d923fbc2c248f4: No thanks. I think I can get someone else to vouch for me to the council of elders, without going through a stupid maze like some lab rat.
textByHashes.993cb3118fcc6b724d5194abd93a5c49ea844a5b: Man, your maze is pretty tough!
textByHashes.daa0a3e46970d7270534756f0bbfc2e4ba6869e4: Can't I do something else for your vote at the council of elders?
textByHashes.1a291f0cac7aaaca98328e06215b0c2a3957aa5a: Yeah, it is really confusing down there...
textByHashes.fe8d38d7766a12d77928b4874c6496fa73708315: So does that mean I can rely on your vote at the council of elders to allow me into your village?
textByHashes.b5047a384cba7a75f80639ece2711e483edff949: Thanks. So I can rely on your vote in my favour at the council of elders?
textByHashes.6b32a2657d3eb16f997de4803f118a4bdac2c983: No way am I doing that maze again!
textByHashes.33f6d196454f1567a65946fcedb30826fedcd9f2: I only have 1 vote so far.
textByHashes.aec2df58e8a88b46d5a756c16c020fa11685ad1c: I only have votes so far.
textByHashes.0bf2f894af039edf2f89be9a70f7933db639ffd1: I have seven members of the council prepared to vote in my favour now!
textByHashes.3715e3081fdd648b78bf12d5d924709db2d26add: Where are you going? Across the river?
textByHashes.500e734e7c29d7d172f77d012ca13094e8b3e3b1: How much will that cost me then?
textByHashes.2592f19566f1d0ccc8ca4ded42370649171e0c38: Yes, I'm ready and don't mind it taking a few minutes.
textByHashes.7e8b5777798490b8799a140950933d81b98928e2: Amazing! And we're going to go straight past it?
textByHashes.1b40337448f4cd155eeb0af842cc0fd5c5ab12bf: What?? I didn't do anything! It wasn't me!
textByHashes.eb49c2768c442329cf7d06118a989e8536d9646e: I err, I'm . I was told I was under arrest. I had a little accident on the way in here.
textByHashes.8a4e6b46cf163e78b966de46c9c6e16ffcd460ad: I suppose so... I mean, I didn't do it on purpose or anything...
textByHashes.d2b8cbc13db8c17961a30db28bf7c1b364cb2aed: I helped your father in the mines south of the city.
textByHashes.290a17f623876c3b48b5fb64799a487c5c372cbe: I'm helping your father in the mines south of the city.
textByHashes.44db7e473e2252963d9c9b2ce0ad6249c4737eaf: Well, ehm... nice to meet you, Veldaban.
textByHashes.0dd1a6bcc24b1c002b20e874c8eff55da12bf1c1: To be honest I'm not much of a sculptor myself.
textByHashes.3671148c3da6bcabce3813e44f51a8e852fc2b64: No, I don't have time right now, I'll be back later.
textByHashes.589346da51c86e089b02c6ef246a4cd7f58953ab: I prefer the mines to the city.
textByHashes.1db37810db90160d1c3d9e4b4803c693feee7686: I haven't really done much yet...
textByHashes.0c9abb4babf6f8dedc8f304bbaa8bbeb667b76f7: Hello there, can you help me?
textByHashes.08880c5deedcbf5012463548dc51807d03205938: What? No, I was wondering if you could help me.
textByHashes.a5cbb9999b36dfbc9502ff2a5de8b0fed642dc19: Excuse me, are you Blasidar, the famous sculptor?
textByHashes.340e761a3c609c29a511e6ab6af2a6cf9481839a: Oh, well, I'm . Veldaban of the Black Guard sent me to you, you see. Said you might need some help with the statue.
textByHashes.4eecd801ad5dd035d64d1d49ca97c8d3fee0a2d9: So what did you need doing?
textByHashes.73b6c2a6c0885336ad036139e6ba62d835380e2e: Not a very artistic race, then, are you?
textByHashes.d28aa7c7e4041033a71b8a7164fae4bac7a0ee90: Right, so I need a pair of boots, a piece of clothing and a battleaxe. Is that all?
textByHashes.2725db1aa329f1535c673fdb0acc14c497b99b38: But... wait, wait, how am I supposed to find all this?
textByHashes.0a42129e3d79d4f6878fc234bdffbe73715f7501: What was it you needed doing again?
textByHashes.d765f1d7c3af6e169a06a46a698c2e76ee4fd958: Yes, I'm looking for some special clothes.
textByHashes.6bd9c2a342e1dc8c1c6efe4d65e13b29c21e734f: I'm helping the sculptor to rebuild the statue of King Alvis. But he wants to know what his clothes looked like.
textByHashes.74a4b497e12e7edd7438b8da854171d0260e151a: But the clothes, do you have any similar clothes?
textByHashes.62e80bfce22c0137db6a679336ce6179aee546da: But I need the actual clothes themselves, not just the designs.
textByHashes.a2980ca34a86bd4cf439f711b648e732eff3174c: Great, thanks a lot, I'll check out the library!
textByHashes.6fb86cae018077874797e89324469338a7af58b3: Do you know anything about King Alvis's clothes?
textByHashes.c02bd2a25335bb0d6723a645d0d66afb85e343d3: I'm helping Blasidar the sculptor to rebuild the statue of King Alvis, but he needs to know the design of his clothes.
textByHashes.b7e78bfe8e27cb12b2db025d9398164882e137ff: Sounds like just the thing. Where exactly could I find it?
textByHashes.07c5ec4426ca0a98bfadf3410af76b4c553b92a2: Can you be any more specific? Upstairs, downstairs?
textByHashes.274689bcf8d8573c27a5f6cd8fcca9ee5b1d848b: Well, thanks, I'll have a look.
textByHashes.1920bc2591da3873d6b3cf986701831fc2067e89: Bah. Annoying dwarven ladders, they're much too flimsy.
textByHashes.83b571591e0f44e3d242038ad25e6eec9ba62626: Yes, about those special clothes again...
textByHashes.4a10f1ea392169998ae9c7614fc242a8f08a3b8e: I haven't actually spoken to the librarian yet, let me do that now.
textByHashes.b94302d30125237394eff4b3b329fcc50dde05a8: No, I don't have them yet, but I can get them for you. The librarian has a book.
textByHashes.5aeb0e6ae181679151ee237680fdee021391bd50: Yes, I have a book right here, have a look at it!
textByHashes.342480f99c6dd6cfe5e0c35e9deccfa4c41187cf: Don't worry, I'll get them for you. Let's see... some coal and some logs. Shouldn't be too hard.
textByHashes.1272a9eac702c7050541012005811141d35a8ad5: Right, and what did you need again to start the engine?
textByHashes.044a74d228fb22be29fd8037e0dd155f4333986e: Okay, okay, I'll do it! Just a moment.
textByHashes.258c148eb92382e92bac77944441e420f10fcc87: Can I have those clothes now?
textByHashes.d233b82ec56faf9bab4d9bc97fa70bc320bb3e12: These clothes are too small for me, I might ruin them if I put them on. I'd better take them to the sculptor instead.
textByHashes.030547314f101e0c42cc0a2e50615cffe0caa7e3: Yes, I'm looking for a pair of special boots.
textByHashes.98f9307fc751d860e6af153026f9159fbe97fb09: The best you have! Boots fit for a king!
textByHashes.7d899a66a68c12061054ab713f3421985a4a49d2: And you don't have anything else?
textByHashes.eec63ddc64f2bbca31857bf8b2c6ed3ad4c4bdfb: Please, tell me! Who did you sell the boots to?
textByHashes.bb30cf85e016f203ed74e3e208cf08e6ad0a83b0: What house does he live in?
textByHashes.d8c7b9671d9066e6b1e273d1ab4e6222052530e2: Oh yes. The old dwarf north of the bank has them, I remember now.
textByHashes.79af89417e9ca971e43c8eeb6c26e634aa39466b: Calm down! I just want to ask you a few questions.
textByHashes.f8ecd07001e76cca96e1df44cd5a7ef863354783: I went to the Quality Armour shop. The proprietor told me you have just recently purchased a pair of boots from him.
textByHashes.c24e4f2c0dc8361e19268935a91746acc48fef7e: You're not actually using them then? Might I be able to buy them off you?
textByHashes.a016b5a76b3762bc0a65f3e7e90d88bdd82686d6: Tell me, how much will you accept for these boots?
textByHashes.9c2c58cab4647355a5b717ed6f869c0ede2faac6: Are you sure you don't want to give me those boots?
textByHashes.993c153e1c0d563a150ff933cd9a32fcf47b3dc6: What, wear just one boot? Besides, the boot is too precious for that.
textByHashes.ec118000e634a394d4afceac5f7a378c04ff7d0d: I shouldn't wear these boots, I don't want anything to happen to them before I bring them to the sculptor.
textByHashes.6550180a422d74d418370089d1df14431abbe69e: Yes, I'm looking for a particular battleaxe.
textByHashes.459a1bf61c6170d5679d94a63a4469c8cfc68f97: No, actually, I'm looking for King Alvis' axe.
textByHashes.19d9d4bf997d99eeb7fced80ae3dc4adfe681d98: I've been tasked by Veldaban, Commander of the Black Guard in Keldagrim, to assist in every way possible with the rebuilding of King Alvis' statue.
textByHashes.b6b2f521bc12b2932db8571a33395110782be6a0: Just give me the axe already, I know you have it!
textByHashes.2930246aa1b0d814d38d48dd378e5793f34ae277: I've had just about enough of this! Goodbye!
textByHashes.a7fff9ac6866ee3094393093bafa226dd37ba1da: Blasidar the sculptor needs it for his statue. He wants a model for the axe, you see, and he believes the original axe still survives.
textByHashes.b55b48c27682a8668099bc101eb1841d1c2b9985: Are you sure this is the real axe then?
textByHashes.3defd6e37ae42344beed5b2fcf588ba8f52b31d3: This is tedious, I've lost interest.
textByHashes.215dd11dbb413c2377f455e09cc0c81af1e4af54: Perhaps I can repair the axe?
textByHashes.e4822ef9744dd66f8d6e6b68a81851234ba4cd37: Perhaps I could try and find one?
textByHashes.0c12c8c409fdeb8305db79695a1c2768065638a4: Oh, I know where I can find an Imcando dwarf!
textByHashes.02a58b9b6f2a912caf54e616aace7489d81307c4: He actually made a sword for me a while ago. I'm sure I can get him to help me again.
textByHashes.45727e52bb1ecd6a8533b00e925f494462b37c74: He lives on a cliff at the very south end of Asgarnia, just south of Port Sarim. I can visit him again if you like.
textByHashes.caac00147c4f2e0fc5216f4d1e6cd9ae48d1a6dd: Thank you. I will not disappoint you.
textByHashes.994d2a2c74391e53e5f8cadbec56dc50cebe18c2: I don't really care for it after all.
textByHashes.d8c139e88ef5f81cbf9fc32b7d9bb06021880758: Yes, but I was just wondering what I should be doing with this piece of junk.
textByHashes.7ac2af92d7dc2daadc4e548e0c7c197be9d55b74: Oh yes, of course, that's what I was going to do!
textByHashes.e4e977d571c8fdc44a2ba602781a7557ef0d71d8: Yes, and I've crafted some sapphires on the hilt, look!
textByHashes.dd64d5fc8d485772ad9fbffad7ffe85d6733a764: Yes, and I got Thurgo the Imcando dwarf to fix it up nice and proper! Look!
textByHashes.2f2e7341958e1ee9c2ea72cdab0cd3d136030790: Yes, and look, it's all fixed up now! I got Thurgo the Imcando dwarf to fix the blade, and I've crafted three sapphires onto the hilt.
textByHashes.07c71ad277592f0d18a693929d7bc6d0ad70999e: I did, actually, I was just wondering if he returned it to you yet.
textByHashes.a71de90370db63ee2349afe80983ca48bee9f2f4: I should be very careful with this battleaxe, it's almost a museum piece! I don't want to damage it by wielding it.
textByHashes.5d9fadbc37695b6bed604c2f0b0c93645ef9c486: Can you help me find an Imcando dwarf?
textByHashes.79fd0c7ac4eaabd0d873c7f6deab7ff11d1cda03: Yes, I need the help of an Imcando dwarf to repair an ancient battleaxe.
textByHashes.da6d60b38c701bf15daa357560e8de9e665ee773: Is there no one else who can help me?
textByHashes.ec5f9335c0b2f9002b3f6c58136d574fe8b39487: Do you think he can help me?
textByHashes.202ac20fd50cc15c0543cbc7c106a389a6a3e9be: What do you know about the Imcando dwarves?
textByHashes.bbb6639bf8b91a4f06b6b381ddb56f6b3782d1d8: So I just go around offering random dwarves redberry pie?
textByHashes.8e6e52762dcab925868b77e450100f92169664e6: Can you help me with this ancient axe?
textByHashes.538ae3ff495967c2d5abcb2e33e55c69dfe3a7a9: Would you like a redberry pie?
textByHashes.bb105ee04f404895244ffbac1ca865cf52298372: Here... the blade of this axe has become extremely dull and brittle. I need it restored to its former glory.
textByHashes.9389649829b5cadd18e61db3c8fce54c03a4d3b4: It was given to me by someone in Keldagrim. I prefer not to say any more than that.
textByHashes.6d6ceeb491539ab2fa2fc417110cb0531bd86481: You don't want any blurite this time?
textByHashes.139b227c88a97859e6cfef94389548cae07f4958: I don't have your boots yet.
textByHashes.09456edb8bf7a60425dc6dfadf360a67f39d73e1: I don't have your clothes yet.
textByHashes.7732d1f086391a0d40a0a5f754025056ac1afefb: I also don't have your clothes yet, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.0c99c54d678b8efa1826cfe68f8febf7aa911178: I had Vermundi make these clothes!
textByHashes.adeaa3d59174cacccf7b1c214048b28f92c8eb8a: Sorry, no, I'm still looking for it.
textByHashes.846048a5a01978549fa2e727766cc6019da539b2: Look, I've got it right here.
textByHashes.b046ff724b5e68b9b811b870f122df53477e1322: Oh, yes, I've got it right here!
textByHashes.fde43a6238cfd34ebfc954f8534f30e5c496e7c5: Don't worry, I'll be back later with all those items!
textByHashes.e6df470ff1e23d4edf807128413616db8ac51fe8: Don't worry, I'll be back with the rest of the items later!
textByHashes.72a0311f6175eab1840e1b455f0c82c6d16db887: I'll be back with the last item before you know it!
textByHashes.cd5df2065866d297f56b43e865705d6d489fe084: I have some clothes for you to wear.
textByHashes.16197bc1049f2a7d416638ad3b0780d202640cc7: I have this battleaxe for you.
textByHashes.15c819cd114eea7b358d115b38f371e13abbc79b: Here, I have these boots for you to wear.
textByHashes.f3cc6908c7e5ade151f103e65aecf8868e514155: And look, I have some clothes as well!
textByHashes.7597afd7610bf0e11a9163c58d65b03447d52149: And finally, I have this battleaxe for you!
textByHashes.85fd042aea38fddd665f197ef0163e000a15dad3: Hey, you're looking nice in that outfit!
textByHashes.bb66af299830f59345db386fb00c73030c727699: So is the job done now?
textByHashes.bbc3825a5992d6049cc4cddd41ec185b6c609449: Care to tell me why not?
textByHashes.70481b3e1803c8fdf5d42b347c13ce15ede73000: It's very tiring trying to talk to you, you know?
textByHashes.dc22f7d49f9e5ff6841a0fba8dca2569fd8f3508: I've all the items you asked me to get you. Can you make the statue now?
textByHashes.34177ada62eadcb2bf2bed63b93c906d6092aa4e: So you need me to find a crown now as well?
textByHashes.9239a7e4ebccdfff02a0f625f4675e3d1797a6ea: So what is the head supposed to look like now?
textByHashes.fc53323d4d8c8d305c88d9a23f463d4a8f6f86ee: What? But I thought the whole point was that it would look like king what's-his-face?
textByHashes.8f6ff496384860e6e56fc3048cf924dd5aa216b9: No, I suppose you can't. Alright, I'll check it out.
textByHashes.85c3276bff21518c5242c70e5e25bd0b6a43805a: No, the directors have not made a decision yet.
textByHashes.5deab5f97be1044e9422f66751e370163d9cd947: I'm glad I don't have to talk to you anymore!
textByHashes.cb1cf62b14d50e1f3303e3b8149af587dbcbaf64: I need to speak to the director.
textByHashes.d4ba1dc84a23111740ba3b956a682fbb37f667b6: But you don't understand. I've come from Blasidar the sculptor.
textByHashes.56397c486846846d8de3be9c428154986e93b4dc: But... Commander Veldaban of the Black Guard has instructed me to do this!
textByHashes.72cb57037db00ce43b7400e2fb145c60e64fa54c: What else must I do to prove myself?
textByHashes.43a5efc1b53a6ea1a4b3102b428d9713c7d1cc2f: I've completed your task! Here is your ore!
textByHashes.581c9e57fb8dc130f38c3519b78537a44ccfc311: Do you have another task for me?
textByHashes.6d480aea24a22437f9c860d2e14921d979e9259a: I don't quite see how that is good, but if you say so...
textByHashes.34221800f14d1f64bfd3a9a14bfb156bb811c795: And this is a good thing, how?
textByHashes.79974b7db0487cf5cfa6edd4e1de3cc029f86d44: Don't patronise me. I've had enough of this.
textByHashes.b63e4e6f6224a76448bbf345d3f5e3df425cc3f4: Ha, I see what you mean!
textByHashes.0cb604149b41b762c8ea76a92d64beb431d26dee: That's a bit drastic, don't you think?
textByHashes.9b90af4d471557b91e435c4100c4ff15ed72d66f: I think I'd better go now, I don't like being insulted.
textByHashes.24f876f9a20d64b541346b372b459dc9e9ab5a7e: You shouldn't say such things to people.
textByHashes.c130b06e9c83dd604a186e51c3805f371c1849a5: It's an honour to meet you!
textByHashes.d2017cb68241e4108108604af96fda1b294275a6: I'd like to officially join your company.
textByHashes.02268929bc9642bad469964a52ca14e00681b57b: Do you have any more tasks for me?
textByHashes.5b82b89414340db83a9cbf9e8b7cfc51c3b46813: I'm still working on it, sorry.
textByHashes.e853afa25e6d672dd1b0302eb5bbe0874e31f855: Blasidar the sculptor has sent me.
textByHashes.f579696350e6a018e9f5f6680b5c942c8f7917c4: He says he needs to know what the head of the statue should look like now that it's no longer going to look like King Alvis.
textByHashes.e404bd895e712745f2b5d932669ddcb92596c2dd: So I shouldn't tell the sculptor that he should base it on him then?
textByHashes.936882d0fbe05d52a684a5e29b2d332565402443: How do you mean, play our cards right?
textByHashes.d8ea7da9db095991e960ad8a514c631638777637: Now you're really losing me... what meetings?
