textByHashes.a8794fce1bae644558e4be6e8851a7fa8162ded6: I need to have a think about that.
textByHashes.d15a9b1cf4551aabbbb2f887db0b76f5bfe60847: I hope you lot figure it out soon. This little job is starting to tire me out.
textByHashes.1ebe2b1080eddb8b75b574655be0514273e0b336: I've completed your task! Here are your bars!
textByHashes.38ba91884fa91437a23f4c6335bb30cc71e189bb: I have told the director of the Company that I will support their bid to be put upon the statue.
textByHashes.a2977bb03b47a8b10c043f8342bd26817648fa51: I want to see the meeting.
textByHashes.33152226fbfe05850a6cdbe0c69d88d392620491: I do NOT want to attend, I don't have time to waste.
textByHashes.d0ace770b84e4d218a3ce914f83d492607d35265: On second thought, I can spare a few minutes to attend.
textByHashes.1763cb9b521a82c8bb40901bb127228448af4986: I just have a lot of smithing to do today, I can't attend.
textByHashes.1d37dc6c7c0e6d073a071df3e1ac602099fd3cbd: Shall I try to repair you?
textByHashes.881fd9ac2213d539f3ebe36968042d234c345b7b: I'm not going to find a conversation here!
textByHashes.9e62524ae579c1443878d1fb4cd8c48b4f8fe4e4: How do I open the portal?
textByHashes.f0cf3e1b5b46a18f0781d7ba952dd89fc5976c82: What makes you think you can defeat the demon?
textByHashes.ebdea1d5d0ae6dbaa8da2aac8cc958332f049555: I don't know, Varrock palace is impressive.
textByHashes.777de8acc0a070ea13cf3dc672ca25fd45a6c8ad: I found a letter in the desert with your name on.
textByHashes.80915bdb18b9e47d2a8bdc91971f677ad509d8bd: Where did you say the notes were?
textByHashes.23f1b51c4f2d7e2f8984ec5f90e884b108ee7664: Where is the statuette that Varmen took back from Uzer?
textByHashes.9fbf908473a9c1017fbb9983ceaefd7c8f670e3b: I'm looking for a statuette recovered from the city of Uzer.
textByHashes.d609b21b29b8c57fc3c9eb6089efd6617425299f: No, I need to take it away with me.
textByHashes.b3baa34125e456db70ff904f3e98c4a12c8fcf15: I want to open a portal to the lair of an elder-demon.
textByHashes.4a1a7303e06a6287d0dc3df517218bb70b562765: Well, I, er, just want it.
textByHashes.35d7b005ac717e9ea31376da87e856936ed8a7d7: It's okay, the demon is dead!
textByHashes.4c4ba8d6b7176691b756bc3934ec1b14f957c612: No, you don't understand. I saw the demon's skeleton. It must have died of its wounds.
textByHashes.a9a2eba2ffb526e89a271d70f502994d0246a2f1: I already told you, he's dead!
textByHashes.b3f5f8d84fcf5dc61108941e6a6dd87a4c89740f: Oh, how am I going to convince you?
textByHashes.e8a13a81fc3441b3e67ed3cbf6f1c94dd798bbbd: But the whole city is destroyed! Doesn't that bother you?
textByHashes.cc5412a66e639be8c2331abbf90044b7ed60e8c2: Hi! It seems to be a very busy settlement.
textByHashes.b2946ca1c9bf40b36f4e7b20e6295cfe1c1737f4: They look like roots to me.
textByHashes.cbabb8dee642eb0be3fd129ca3a686c6b5b9ea0b: Impressive. What exactly is the problem?
textByHashes.6a01d0c5a14dc6797e444ef1159e312d6f76c720: You mean the tree is ill?
textByHashes.c75a43ee7e7c3bb72ddfdf4477d962b978d1d015: I'm sorry, I don't want to get involved.
textByHashes.f614e31964eadddd17629ebb6c4edc082569a10a: Can you write this down and I'll try and translate it?
textByHashes.90f49d155ddd578468201a27a761b5de28fb2836: Yes! I managed to find him.
textByHashes.0d4c7dcf4c0f1815478d7c0f1182ae2fc1a3a4a3: King Narnode must be stopped, he is a madman!
textByHashes.ff3efc70ea3115df4bce207191c51c017a5c1dd7: Praise be to the great Zamorak!
textByHashes.8052a7d53264081bfa8635551f7846c4420c7829: Do you have any bread? I do like bread.
textByHashes.83d6c8012a91a474120b2ca66f41db0838270972: The time has come to attack!
textByHashes.6870b0982807db1abf8ddbc4537d885ccbf54cf1: The tree is fine, you have nothing to fear.
textByHashes.f271d182becdba2f7d93550c9a97fc7887afca38: You must come and see me!
textByHashes.5e682b144aab60bc0da0e69d975440cf209e366f: The tree needs watering as there has been drought.
textByHashes.7e1428a5de93c9142638207487f0b8e2d93e0fe6: Grave danger lies ahead, only the bravest will linger.
textByHashes.3b12ac518e250a48d5060156e00773d427988084: Time is of the essence! We must move quickly.
textByHashes.b6b105a505a0f6472f8cd6d5bf58f3a6e2eda72b: A man came to me with the King's seal.
textByHashes.f403fbad3b6596d944c290f76f8e47a55986df14: There is no need for haste.
textByHashes.0b00cf22ec5ca029d03eb55318b1c77d81742fa0: You must act now or we will all die!
textByHashes.4d89c1b0b9f68ca14ee81c86f778c873b10ed297: I gave the man Daconia rocks.
textByHashes.bd2cb0f6398aab30347de9f42ca3ececfbad6a5a: Use a bucket of milk from a sacred cow.
textByHashes.b6ed713a00681b3acef0058c9dcc430c849617a5: Take this banana to him, he will understand.
textByHashes.58b9227f76d5ce1ba23cdf6dba83292044d021d9: All with be fine on the third night.
textByHashes.c64b7c70ea69b823a29869bae4a34a9b684e0863: You must wait till the second night.
textByHashes.95501ad0570d048ee6e10b9f9c587ce9ac00aaed: The tree will die in five days!
textByHashes.60bdaaf5ffdd4deb990c2f22e092417f44bf99a8: And Daconia rocks will kill the tree!
textByHashes.fb6bcfb5e4b7afe1c58c5126d47231a318048580: The King asked me to inform you that the Daconia rocks have been taken!
textByHashes.d974eb87005444a075c3f3bbc8498bd4ab30cf7f: Apparently a human took them from Hazelmere. Hazelmere believed him; he had the King's seal!
textByHashes.b51347fabf484eb9835e233661c4cbe79fabdd1c: Hello, Your highness. Have you any news on the Daconia stones?
textByHashes.0d944b339f80ed94c38efe84a3f972ab9bf7235b: I doubt it, can I speak to the prisoner?
textByHashes.f154b3caac842ac5395436321a416674463e11a0: Tell me. Why would you want to kill the Grand Tree?
textByHashes.88a8310ee799458bb72f1bf55a88b46fa4bb2803: Don't tell me, you just happened to be caught carrying Daconia rocks!
textByHashes.55e4e98ae017047a3fd4299835a77e16c54746fd: Sounds like Glough is hiding something.
textByHashes.f8cefc0b0f35edbc2217238b26a3d51f8cf02bd6: Yes I did and something's not right!
textByHashes.3c7751a1f4cca27c945c97a3fe94d4ccf60cbaae: The prisoner said he was paid by Glough to get the Daconia stones!
textByHashes.01baf294a961d06c28f51528040eafdde275f5d4: Your highness! I'm concerned about Glough!
textByHashes.912c1d57d0a5a047f93db49b5cfa736800bf18bb: Glough! I don't know what you're up to but I know you paid Charlie to get those rocks!
textByHashes.371a6ad7b7e92d44d353449ec7b7b17c4f4c62f4: I know the Grand Tree's dying! And I think you're part of the reason.
textByHashes.6833e87bf199737c7436dff8fb4ad4664fd41fef: It's Glough! He's trying to cover something up.
textByHashes.2d4a81927723eb3e2885641ccef6174b4515a0ad: I don't think you can trust Glough, Your highness. He seems to have an unnatural hatred for humans.
textByHashes.0b23311fad27185796966f5af200cbf2bf4d540c: I can't figure this out Charlie!
textByHashes.5dfe9b3f3ef9da3befbb9a11db03a1e55020b92a: I'm fine, I can't say the same for your glider!
textByHashes.542746ee7aa2a808599981164309481f003d023f: I'm from the Ministry of Health and Safety.
textByHashes.5221d9e7105d695d4257b91f895e20e21f490734: You're wasting my time! Take me to your superior!
textByHashes.e9db3fd4db1b3d058e292f3af17b996bfddb27c0: Well I'll just stand here then until you let me in.
textByHashes.777ed7c1f3f12789f1b55a88effe4fc292399cb8: So are you going to let me in then?
textByHashes.ec70ccd56aaebdf938345db4c3846e341205f4a4: Alright you win. I'll find another way in.
textByHashes.dc4d22155a186faa2fb71e52d0b37c39c3d26aea: Quite a few ships you're building!
textByHashes.319070c344f26c8b607679075291d15429672ee4: Of course not! You're obviously building a boat.
textByHashes.be8a0193cbedb9b3ac1b686df92c42fa3701b744: Is that any way to talk to your new superior?
textByHashes.b47971c5d25a656355fb8ee69579768f8eba457e: Glough sent me to check on how you are doing.
textByHashes.41ebd050cd182a7014915269e90633ef2a4c7b47: Sadly his wife is no longer with us!
textByHashes.8439e14eb08cf1ebbbcb241c66242ed7dab78d63: OK. I'll head off and give this order to Glough.
textByHashes.c18a2a64d058286b687c38068e78615ff818d4a3: I can't believe they won't let me in!
textByHashes.8689d2b40a72d9e5132cd00e5cfc0fd29b34b082: I really need to see King Narnode. Could you help me sneak in?
textByHashes.ad005e82835875c0c89f39c6cc85974942333f81: Erm I know, but this is an emergency!
textByHashes.9a9c6220662daa819a0c6e6d64b2ba990de3dbb1: I know what you're up to Glough!
textByHashes.0b235bdb07fe9f64e504d29a2e532eb817e668f0: You may be able to make a fleet but the tree gnomes will never follow you into battle against humans.
textByHashes.e6ff4f345008e0ffd9e629ec26e210799385251b: King Nardone, I need to talk!
textByHashes.a8ee155cffbc70dca2e5cf585de54cf565316a43: Your highness, I believe Glough is killing the trees in order to make a mass fleet of warships!
textByHashes.0449b76a0df472f959fe919245d93e288d55929c: His hatred for humanity is stronger than you know!
textByHashes.62cec45806fa4b5cb89dc87c263d1dec9ea96983: Glough has some plan to rule Gielinor!
textByHashes.0a904b385c0405fbb01449000da203f26384a46e: I need some proof to convince the King.
textByHashes.ac838f68f24fd79488fa33d619bd462b82a45bd6: Okay, I'll see what I can find.
textByHashes.54b73eb5f682518556223d61e1d6a1a6805859eb: Don't you understand he's creating his own army?!
textByHashes.a6454ec161f4dc579af93e0b6829a36031c388f3: I'm going to stop you, Glough!
textByHashes.19fdacaed737fa9c096fd97d1eae66f31b0631af: Yes, I'm helping him with a problem.
textByHashes.54885dbc3c2b1355bb9b06bd9e932f2595abde3c: No, I'm still carrying it around.
textByHashes.b1abf7aaba348fa8290f73870004ec2957a5e1f9: You were right! I searched Glough's chest and found some invasion plans!
textByHashes.9ac1b7371bac96244ceb50431d16fcb7cf58384f: Hi, Your highness, did you think about what I said?
textByHashes.01b2229061cb76debb0ab76e7a7a4f4684d88fab: Look, I found this at Glough's home!
textByHashes.1a40496eac290b7236e6b7c2c59c34a1c2366d0c: I've lost those twigs you gave me.
textByHashes.fd141fba4970bd7fa0ca9d4077593d8f790dd996: What makes you think I'll let you get away with it?
textByHashes.364e9cfac5019c1181d4bbecbd5d94dcf2f33dae: Your highness, it's true about Glough I tell you! He's planning to take over Gielinor!
textByHashes.3771d7505e284df4d9c967d969dfe3d022d56a75: He plans to make a fleet of warships from the Grand Tree's wood!
textByHashes.9a69c59c52d3bb37584fbf1188831d0415346de4: It's Glough! He set a demon on me!
textByHashes.97dabb043ed029e2af4b27ff0e00653728d511d5: Glough has a store of Daconia rocks further up the passage! He's been accessing the roots from a secret passage at his home.
textByHashes.54f0e60ba1b4f2dee890fd4be4e1bb3a4a37e904: That's what I've been trying to tell you! Glough's been fooling you!
textByHashes.e351a1d1d14da3bac998c19e7a3256df712673de: No sign of it so far.
textByHashes.b5c977ccc0b9cd8b569b8c792631db50a4fee811: Don't worry Your highness! We'll find it!
textByHashes.6a8221fdb5abe7f9ac75bee6d911e72b972e108c: All that matters now is that humans and gnomes can live together in peace!
textByHashes.0d3c2ec705a8390e0026e2f2f807612f8c7ffdac: I've stopped you before, Glough, and I'll stop you again!
textByHashes.b96f0a8039660d7ebeb1129b916308ab995714ee: Well you've found one... Say, you don't look much like a pirate.
textByHashes.2593b89f3fd0866877a587337a38721e2b9f1453: In fact, you look a little ill.
textByHashes.ea69e7bbc9778e5fc0fd8913e6a856da64e1159b: A little more than ill, in fact...
textByHashes.6d2571e6525b1859ae0a2f63d8682d47d78d886e: This is starting to sound a little bit dodgy, and I do appreciate I'm in a hive of scum and villainy as I say this.
textByHashes.acf658175f72475575d2d81f142b1b8c519d1e70: Is there any part of your problem you can tell me?
textByHashes.48a1ec25345dea95cfdc3fb7a4f649a4ac6d8f43: Undead pirates? Let me at em!
textByHashes.a359ab60c3647d6d083249021f4becb966fd2b8e: I just get this thumping pain in the back of my head whenever I think about travelling to an island full of undead pirates.
textByHashes.4a871da9d3600e9e0a276b578c770fa05994b18f: No, but I might well do soon if it keeps up.
textByHashes.66da488eec7862d8772d896fa6920ccf30beb4b2: Zombies! Back away from those monks now!
textByHashes.bcf70eac0967e9773ff2cc2ba362cec5925bdfaa: Okay, but the first one of you that lunges for my brain will be strung up and beaten until they are dead...or very, very sorry.
textByHashes.e1dd4424449610a61c5df2b7de2c7e96d2240cb7: And what have they done as a result?
textByHashes.bde212ecf19995d3b91753e396fdf800b4b6949e: Called them off? Any idea why?
textByHashes.1b620b0db8ab9d46d27eee7075cd3048d2819ff9: Er, I might have done. What was the problem again?
textByHashes.ff65482dcddbeedfddf5afb46558a506ed452e7b: Nothing yet... What would you recommend doing again?
textByHashes.402a1f06ed0d2dcd354bc196f77a4b4a92c6ab1d: Just eat a cauliflower or something!
textByHashes.390b4a8687f3bb25ab4f2b9546dc627b4707ade4: Hang in there, brother, is on the case.
textByHashes.80cea946d5ca7f22c434db699764e0d140f28bef: I'm working on it, okay? Give me a minute.
textByHashes.e2c79510650254ca3b496da19aec625c388914d2: Likely that's all in the mind...
textByHashes.162787220ef15a24bb9c27d54d6a6da643e36248: Keep calm. I'm a professional. I'll take care of it.
textByHashes.0676bcb9f37f34c72cc48161e5ae38d88da7c182: Sure, although the zombies were drunker, the hostages were less holy and the island was known for exporting swill, not piety.
textByHashes.b9e95493efc2d95e2112c6f09ace237dede24a38: Wow, without a brain, these monks seem a lot less holy all of a sudden...
textByHashes.89ea4030d3dfd017b962074e78a0773cb296fe0e: Sleeping gas! I have to tell the monks about this right now! I only hope I have time...
textByHashes.5901dff5708258ea45159eb8c10af21c375b0c13: The pirates are planning on using some sort of sleeping gas to knock you all out!
textByHashes.dc9d659074210608a4f03e0d55c5f1789cf4a010: When everyone is unconscious, they are going to come in and take you away for brain-swaps!
textByHashes.72f43bc4faceaec33d65f9ca642db583f9e44364: Is it some sort of potion to counteract the poison?
textByHashes.3f2a906edf555daab7bac37d67a07fc2a3efa5f7: Hmm, how come I've never heard of this prayer?
textByHashes.2dbc9ebd50201d809b5cd6d4f81a939e3d0882e4: Yes, I have your book here.
textByHashes.b6710f4bb8b7e361ca2848e2d045be539999aa98: Yes! There were no words! What were they supposed to prevent?
textByHashes.80ec8289f8d33cd54b6af196f4c120a411da23e7: Yes, I have read the prayer and I know how to perform it.
textByHashes.20dc2603ad4b46fa4a5fcea7abcb9c7d3828bce1: No, I need to go and get a holy symbol.
textByHashes.43e06101597f37ab62b7d07bf9d57733886949cb: Yes, I have the book and the holy symbol I need.
textByHashes.55cd0746530a699ba1ad8919e31f99147a848bcd: Woah...that gas is pretty potent... I'll need to wear my diving gear outside so that I don't get knocked out again.
textByHashes.94db64212440275fa58ff604aeb54a12a9e11c91: So what now? Want me to go and kill the zombies?
textByHashes.c9fc5d7cd9d80ddd263e81e34a87856260cb02c0: You know, that was what I was going to suggest next.
textByHashes.47d7f76f160b54682692e3609571302ac9b1c150: So what do you want me to do, scrub up and grab a pair of pliers or something?
textByHashes.fe1caefb51518128b3066f964e1f02a78ddd83e1: That evil, demented, eye-rollingly insane butcher? What could you want with him and his twisted...
textByHashes.3a0ec76c19a03aebfd6892a030f50010de08537d: Well, I cant say I agree with this...but I do appreciate that he's likely the only person that knows his way around the inside of someone's skull.
textByHashes.bc7ea4c35522a42632602744b12199a13d36cc02: I haven't been to see him yet.
textByHashes.d217225d55dd6290f9be0f706964a9e4973b8d81: For all the things you've done, I'd like to pour barbecue sauce on your head and pitch you out that window.
textByHashes.7cd288947ff8cee553cfe45ec811901eb403a825: Instead, I've come to offer you a way out of this castle.
textByHashes.c8c841bf5ed5df85653b5bb524e1b4806da98270: Would you perform multiple brain surgeries on a number of zombie monks?
textByHashes.109c4ade7bec6f5c7cb79bfce744575ec1cf35da: I think you heard me. A number of monks on an island off the coast of Mos Le'Harmless have had their brains placed in zombie pirate bodies, and vice versa, and they want you to switch them back.
textByHashes.3c2a97fb5ac5ae42c58aabe85969fa2c6b30c6d9: Hands up, everyone who is being hunted by packs of ravenous killer werewolves!
textByHashes.7a659440e5351224d2ecafd8d9e07c4eadf02bb5: Oh, why, that would be you, doctor.
textByHashes.8312a33b0d372ffb836207dbdba742db01c2db50: Oh yes, I'm sure that a man that stitches corpses together for a living would be a good judge of rationality.
textByHashes.70af64cc7683a4155a3fde8c9d5fd4395dbd8a46: Yes, I came here to tell you that a group of monks need your services, and that they are willing to shelter you from the werewolves if you will use your medical skills to help them.
textByHashes.e6e41467a836676b47652f44091bb96925329048: Well, you've lived here long enough. Is there some way I can smuggle you past?
textByHashes.9402eb5989f9024812a284c48e44a3e99ea2696c: Okay, that seems sensible. I'll be right back.
textByHashes.3b84816b543448404ed5e113d23ab632c351d679: Hey, Rufus, I heard that you do deliveries of meat. Could you send me a crate of supplies to Mos Le'Harmless?
textByHashes.76c95c2218f07b5eede6b3bb6b912a45bbd29aee: Oh, don't worry about it, I'll be providing the meat myself. It's a treat for some werewolves down there, you see.
textByHashes.670242dea9b1d361dd0ad83a014bcfa0d866e396: Oh, I'm sure that I'll be able to find some good meat from somewhere.
textByHashes.0aed608fe42ed63e4d34f95e47ae7445b535e849: Err, I mean, what do you mean only a little alive? Of course a good werewolf like me will be sending the food live.
textByHashes.06b92db5d6252f9e96274c4b9d05597509468b0e: Well, at least I got him to agree to ship the crate for me.
textByHashes.2ce4ca2c738ca22353f0f9ff9c66ac77ccee25e1: I suppose in the meantime I'll set the crate up in Fenkenstrain's tower where he can get to it.
textByHashes.765f62233fa7613cdbb809a92406f8053a6b2818: All I have to do now is get a load of cats from somewhere...
textByHashes.f9abf299b3bada5d159c307ea6536c144c675233: Of course! I'll make some fake cats from wood and fur!
textByHashes.e83644c1d953f5c7c351c0b6dcea1439a380fe2b: With a little help from the Ring of Charos, he'll never know the difference.
textByHashes.b95993f175656628e748f7755cff779f0f6c3fb8: It's just crazy enough to work...
textByHashes.a2b1af238d52012fb2d532c65863694f8b42f288: Rufus, can I have a wolf whistle?
textByHashes.5b7e4a955c67212e51a76ad61b10241e4eaa2262: Rufus, can I have some crate parts?
textByHashes.be91aa4650e24dc34c0e567c449c5d2717e08a8b: I still need to talk to Rufus.
textByHashes.96455977d50eaf58dbe604e06a28bf92042103b3: I have got Rufus to agree to let me ship some meat, but I have to build the crate and fill it with fake cats first.
textByHashes.f531456359eff161757a1fe320d7d790e9dd004f: What? Wait? What sort of person?
textByHashes.20c47c1fe933a3ddcbddc658039efef69e78eadf: I get the feeling I'm being maligned...
textByHashes.2a8fb3ddc37b2655ea68d4e669a6b92dfd76790a: Fine. And if you keep up these cat remarks I'm going to make sure the crate is shipped upside down, and not give you any padding.
textByHashes.f11c226d4603e7fef37073ef0bcf97e0df1a629a: Be quiet or I'm going to post this thing direct to Canifis!
textByHashes.f82877aa1f9df3a426925652847c1302c156c26d: What is with this whole cat thing anyway?
textByHashes.d17041fea58da39ca780a77da3ae52fd44b94ee1: That does it, I'm leaving some nails in the bottom of the crate for him to sit on...
textByHashes.7131997b3004a40f87e6b784ef9b286d24548f31: Okay, Doctor, time to get in the crate.
textByHashes.d657ca32ff67c4b51229219c34a22c0a54f1a679: Well yeah, but this was the only place I could think of to store the cats.
textByHashes.5fb8d3b8c57c6581215dd0e3f929334bbc09aa1f: I think the meowing point has been more than made.
textByHashes.bf675507400de531eb440c56bb99e4e272269856: I don't, but I'll promise you this is the last time I do this.
textByHashes.ab99d87d9104717b60f269cafeb5b3cdecedcc26: Bear in mind I can still post you to Canifis if I choose!
textByHashes.badf7704350dd75b06a26ffb0028a0d19c547940: It teleported...but didn't he say he was allergic...
textByHashes.b668fe184795c464dd16d34829579f6ae13c3d41: Oh dear, I do hope the doctor's reaction is not too violent.
textByHashes.a09a1449133b1c3d90eff576fd455104c9cae49b: I was entirely unaware of at least one of those teleports.
textByHashes.33c1babda3660d3162e3cdd386a90cf90034155a: Where do you suggest I get these things, 'Unusual Implements R Us'?
textByHashes.c532d3c14e3bdfd814c2fcb8dc41d159ef8f30df: A fair point. I'll pop back through that secret passage and ambush them.
textByHashes.cfdd06096b60215a69ff39ecf247aada813ac06c: Well then, it looks like I'll go in through the front door.
textByHashes.953f343feef679cde0a7e122cfd3c5e80709031b: Wait a moment... That ship has cannons, right?
textByHashes.39807929c189eb583798f58c8b01bee15907faf2: Then I'll storm on board, grab some gunpowder and blow those doors off their hinges!
textByHashes.cb90f9b5a1b337ca83a960e30eb86af1cb8f1a3c: Oh, this is nothing. All in a day's work for me.
textByHashes.3fb4b4b5c60a1a7ec364aec34073313ac8b4bb06: See you later, doctor. Whatever party they are planning in there, I have to go pick up my invitation.
textByHashes.a2f7f644407e6887aedf0d389e5221caa77cd719: I have a hammer for you, doctor.
textByHashes.d7fe593f6f8074e503dfe4c8046b59e333865f4b: I have some skull staples for you, doctor.
textByHashes.994a9197cccf15f63c1302f0a0412638f1e29e04: I have a cranial clamp for you, doctor.
textByHashes.30055a4ba90c65985011d30a0f3a9b05255a4755: I have a bell jar for you, doctor.
textByHashes.86329ac298517b6f5d2d939914ee958df7178cc6: I have some bell jars for you, doctor.
textByHashes.19a3f54fb9d56d711a619fe152e40cf5cc3c2e9d: Certainly. That and I'll be keeping an eye on you to make sure nothing 'untoward' happens to those brains.
textByHashes.634c71ebef47a5f70edd070d2029daf24ac04188: I don't want my eyes anymore!
textByHashes.ffbebb9fbde54b126e52543a1a6137be48bfe9f1: I think I'm going to be sick...
textByHashes.803697441a47b68037ef906f83dc79a44fd4dba1: But, but, it fell on the floor!
textByHashes.6a7c1aa00001da1ffcbbf2bf6ad882fb1997661f: I'm sure that glowing review will endear you to them.
textByHashes.d31d79b320634d9978f5e7e713e13192fc7c7b75: I guessed. Look, I'm going to head out and kill this Mi- Gor joker before he can get his crew together and sail away.
textByHashes.a466f3d5d3cda1d636b01f5768705f80e5e2385c: I think I'll come back when you feel a little better.
textByHashes.2a9f7d7045d9b827731f1b476818480172603df7: That's pretty big talk for someone who can't even breathe properly!
textByHashes.a00b1be01a998350de24f57e12ee11f6eb2eef2d: Hah, I don't care how muscular your bodyguard is. I'll still defeat them!
textByHashes.0b6ed213e2e68bcd377bbcbfecd09120a28eb9be: Well, you'll not have to worry about Mi-Gor any more. I defeated his creation and he seems to have slipped away.
textByHashes.99122080b01e772fb6c886ff1b4a32fe495eaa08: One thing does strike me as odd. He mentioned the name Rabid Jack, which I have heard in connection to zombie pirates before.
textByHashes.314f4c483e1fa6146540052c92257baa15817dd0: Can you tell me who that is?
textByHashes.6ff405a6ba630328406108ac3725e3d6b6db536f: Hmm...I'm sure I might be able to get them to say if I persuade them.
textByHashes.025f7d0aa9c4fb8a756ec798d4e4ac7ce7f359b7: Still, that's a job for another time. After all that work, I think I might take a bit of a rest.
textByHashes.7bdcbad8b1750ab5f66971314f3ce245a94c6d55: Er, time for me to be off, I think.
textByHashes.dd2ac41730198af9b11b9fe1f1459f803d21b426: Not really. I was just popping by to see how you were all getting on and possibly help cull some of the zombies.
textByHashes.63156eb794b7937f8ad9177420a1e1dacc8cd983: Admittedly, most of us don't accidentally trip and sew a bunch of dead bodies together.
textByHashes.f91a679a0ae749c30f95229a2224a2fde2c5cc53: Lose your job? What's wrong, why?
textByHashes.b4d8c41d6f7b7b236475fbb49739ddbf0e36b900: Oh, you found a hand in the sand - that's nice for you.
textByHashes.9ea48463f079b9bba82839dcfe6cd9f9afb6f34e: Eww a hand, in the sand! Why haven't you told the authorities?
textByHashes.627d064fae0e2b3550aaa6bb900375eeacef0bb4: Oh? The Guard Captain is drunk in the pub you say? That's not good, what will you do?
textByHashes.e404751fee43368a09be08014e56f4a116cc4d3c: Sure, I'll give you a hand.
textByHashes.90c9e04e0ac4869aa28704fdfb675d0655574298: I want no part in this!
textByHashes.81561fc2429d8106932d3c1d7af152052b12a5af: Not at the moment, but I will be seeing him soon.
textByHashes.85b868c2f833722b3116503437d5837970077f68: Sir? I have some more beer for you...
textByHashes.1f7ddd6a7f7e53ac5e8dc2b00065390d23dfca17: I've come to report that Bert, the sandman, found a hand in the sand pit.
textByHashes.b5fba0f9bb7321fb2ae445e456cfa1bb68764f8b: But aren't you going to find out who it ... belonged to?
textByHashes.3181955858cf7f467f7d8ad01ed223633b878c89: Err... ok, I'll go ring the bell and talk to a wizard then.
textByHashes.9d0c884a775cd89ab8dbd27a672129350c40bf62: Yes, the Guard Captain said to see the wizards in the guild.
textByHashes.b84756952010a5b6c32409602dc38b434e41ab4e: It seems to have slipped through my fingers!
textByHashes.b44dca5053347c3143be18b27c496b7da3dc74fc: Thanks Bert, I'm off to see the wizards, the wonderful wizards of Yanille!
textByHashes.f1bfa5f2468fa175f0b42570f8894d522c244a3e: But I was told to ring the bell if I wanted some attention.
textByHashes.94a259bdbd1f3cbcfa1741d437ef713c693a3b02: I thought you were here to help?
textByHashes.ff1b2335c3fbc1964fb0cd92b7a28d13f32ccafe: Ummm... Do you have all your wizards?
textByHashes.7654db77d56b8725600c70ee901591f5e8ccd78d: The Guard Captain asked me to see if you have any... missing... wizards.
textByHashes.b3d5d68f7e2908eeba33c1d051b65404cb85e49a: Well.. maybe, you see Bert found this hand and it might belong to.. a wizard!
textByHashes.dc2e87ea61cad276c80ff0b8fc2e5eba25686e35: Do you have any input as to the matter at hand?
textByHashes.61f62d52e7eb48a9780bec8372cbb9d230cd0228: Not yet, but don't lose your head over it.
textByHashes.bc4a61a2d4cc5a4fd9d7e766e7b58da3eb31ca17: I dug up quite a lot about the hand. Can you tell me about your job?
textByHashes.00107140895c7fe5938b145688430b07deee31e2: So you're employed by Sandy's Sand Corp in Brimhaven. Have you changed your hours recently?
textByHashes.44f87d78e6f7cb3ec319767d19d3e9a90e34ed61: Thanks for the Rota Bert. I'll go check for the original with Sandy in Brimhaven.
textByHashes.a9356b2ee559a2beb6ecba1118eef05682fcb138: Err, no, I kind of... lost it...
textByHashes.44831b9c30f22728ad2cda76573db786f6f4037c: No, I'll fit it in my schedule somewhere soon.
textByHashes.b4c6228eac84227398117c72b0d78dc9a3803e98: Hello Sir, do you run the Sand Corp?
textByHashes.1ca48efafff2c361be548e2c8673b8f94998d0f2: I'm . I'm here investigating the possible murder of a wizard.
textByHashes.e582294a4e5e248c79053929c69c2141b8be9211: I managed to get a copy of the original rota. Your hours changed a week ago!
textByHashes.2f7b819cdfefbafb9e4ce89025f1dc0e1b3a316d: What? Give me a hand here, I'm having a hard time understanding how you don't remember changing hours!
textByHashes.5b85c97bfa32cfa632efb496e3b60665b4cee851: A scroll appeared? Can I take a look at it while you look at the rotas?
textByHashes.a97a56c29a2692b144103099fb49190c2ea9a29d: I've found out a lot and will let you know when it's all over.
textByHashes.aec621dc253671e66884cdcf544f528e6e34e6a6: I talked to Bert and found something very strange about his hours.
textByHashes.6a9c365960e447895cad77b5a0cf3cfadc2f419e: No, but he doesn't remember changing his hours, and his rota and the original that his boss Sandy had, are different!
textByHashes.ad933c7dde5fb3577832f25c1183be14e6247ea9: ... oh, and this scroll appeared when they changed - he gave it to me.
textByHashes.d520de95a950732e81bd096533f64706dc17ed34: I took a look around his office. I don't know about a hand in it, I think he has both hands and feet in it!
textByHashes.2ef90e10cf63ca4d88be5c113d2df3e9d7411e64: I've lost my magical scrying orb!
textByHashes.6f1cfcbbede6006348cb63f8cb6e46f5950a47b6: I have a vial here for you.
textByHashes.718ae1c89485c0136cac8e2b11e9322984890d00: No, I prefer using my legs, thanks all the same.
textByHashes.58815669f008ff7aeed85d0b682d092187699ab7: I've come from Yanille, the wizard says you can make Truth Serum?
textByHashes.4138e05facf5ad89698e28fcd224e189b7b2c58a: I'll have to go find one then, I'll be back!
textByHashes.6713e0b9d14f432f038ff15d8ef1a202840590ad: Ok, I'll see if I can find something.
textByHashes.89aa6835813d53d96337b4b1c8095b0ae4b51b83: What about this sand straight from his pocket?
textByHashes.83d1a50ca87bd6ad986007666291948367b69951: Oh! I... see. I'll remember to dilute it then.
textByHashes.c20ab2ab5b001fea6c50bcb2f08555a57d39dd8f: Not yet, but don't bust a gut over it!
textByHashes.235d18494548b2484574fb1b0d9f514190f69952: There's a herd of huge mutant herring about to drop from the sky!
textByHashes.5b31af801b1640f73ba5ff4633c2eb2366b3a63c: But the pygmy shrews have eaten all the sand!
textByHashes.fa38d14d35241f3521607dbb7da0a29b0551bff1: A small parrot with a pink banana is sitting outside your window!
textByHashes.51a4494c0e5f7ea7b3b6ece3508ab62c6bd80e77: Now, I'm going to ask you some questions and I want you to answer me truthfully...
textByHashes.1f1786c71ca6ac7934627422683d63342ee78e86: Why is Bert's rota different from the original?
textByHashes.0abbf8d9c61fc9d9e4356a3b9f5f0ee369612c02: I think I have enough evidence now, you can go for now, but I think you're up to your neck in it!
textByHashes.7febc628a29eb7ad769425b92ac42c2d6e86d117: I got the whole story from Sandy... but I lost the orb.
textByHashes.67542c93a0a37b75c279900a5730e3dab7c1a088: Umm.. ok, I'll get you the 5 earth runes and bucket of sand.
textByHashes.96e09d77ea97047af22067c77f1d5f287a95f2d7: I've brought what you wanted, what are you going to do?
textByHashes.378587c6c761ebf46d68014fe03fa9b03927dac4: Uhh... How do you know my name?
textByHashes.82bb33337fa276ec595f965da33989e57a20afcd: Err.. ok. Well, I've been sent from the Wizards' Guild in Yanille. There's been an... incident... Do you have any body parts?
textByHashes.c88b81e37b8a7b74c809d884b100566468bf0511: Ahhh good! I need to take it back to be buried!
textByHashes.476a2a974eb04065d91f3c30244dd99caf0e2cc5: What should I do with the head?
textByHashes.3d6f2fa1788cc9c36d986f351d890e5fddcbe468: Not yet no. I've been running around like a headless chicken, but I'll get to it!
textByHashes.528aef40bc45de3930596dd17b79d99bf4ea1cbd: Hey, Itzla. How are things going?
textByHashes.3967313e16fdb1f47a7834cd34caca2418e24174: You want us to join the cult?
textByHashes.c2e4516e97769e638cdf9c10c6525930bdd35597: I'd love to hear it, but I have some things I need to do first.
textByHashes.bcedf3e9c5ac182f46df553ac8e680c704c9a379: I'd like to rent the basement room.
textByHashes.c57e3650d54d39e1a0174b3225219a5e837f109b: I don't have that much on me right now.
textByHashes.49114906f6ce50bce7d9688c111f8e87329eb39b: Guess I may as well have a little rest while waiting for this contact.
textByHashes.1e786bab94068a7638d78bf559bfca5152770c7b: Itzla? Is that you? What are you doing here?
textByHashes.569544efb9d8354777167c8ea401425532a11595: But you're the heir to the throne of Varlamore... What if someone recognises you?
textByHashes.cf11b1f26b18c448e23643bfdc441fe85f37e76f: This seems like a bad idea...
textByHashes.1b65d92ddbe6f334026f9bf1de5ed6c0ed9c4e1f: Okay, I'm still not sure if I like this plan, but I see your point. What's our next move?
textByHashes.82b09ce5a1d2660b428156d02edcd8ceb7e00e65: Ah I see. They have people like this shopkeeper using charity to attract people to their cause.
textByHashes.01b332e40f7b4b7cf94b8504c25720aff91acaa6: Right. So this shopkeeper... If I go to him and pose as a potential recruit, your hope is that he'll contact the Emissaries?
textByHashes.cf57270ce0decdc24e6d034a41dac067d75c2ee4: The Queen didn't seem very happy with you.
textByHashes.cebe1bb27401bb0b5e1d6c947d9d70a60133db1a: You think she sees herself in you? If so, maybe she doesn't want you to make the mistakes that she once did?
textByHashes.32d5f95cb7bb17e82627e251d6a358719a0c2c8d: I suppose that makes sense, but I'm not sure how I feel about you learning from your mistakes while we infiltrate a dangerous cult together.
textByHashes.62de4a8215036f9c38d78031880c415460765944: Do you really think Metzli, Furia and Ennius are traitors?
textByHashes.577f8d116305c814fe8f069c8f0ff439740eca4f: If they are guilty... what will you do to them?
textByHashes.a6abc55ec02d9646a8e9fcbc4f9657d27818bacd: What happens if they try to attack Servius again?
textByHashes.1f9f0edccb3a769428b859bf8fe3fd8cf905cdde: So you don't consider the enemy to be competent?
textByHashes.f4a78e70982ed6cc7952692ebadea8186f8e3afd: But if the enemy isn't a threat, why are you here?
textByHashes.9fab726c6c605bc0ec467c84010f69c9d17c5348: If this isn't an enemy to be taken seriously, why do you feel you yourself need to be the one to deal with them? If they're incompetent, shouldn't anyone be able to handle them?
textByHashes.77ffffb5bd2f14ea626bf322248857b4aab60eb2: But if they've managed to position some of their members in very important roles, surely they can't be completely incompetent?
textByHashes.1c22ee2433d0386ea5e1aa46c75b0473f0a48c03: I guess I just still don't know you that well. If we're about to infiltrate this cult together, I'd like to understand why you think it's important you do this yourself.
textByHashes.60f17a6a7615549a8185674565e964f64e4b3811: I'd better go and speak to this shopkeeper.
textByHashes.e6cf888e1de61b6b2a637ee61f7deeec9a8340ed: I hear you can offer help to those in need.
textByHashes.811e9e4b7c8181ab187f171825cf560ef2c693bc: I'm not sure if I should be insulted by that, or flattered... But anyway, you misunderstand. I'm not looking for help myself. Instead I was hoping to do some helping alongside you.
textByHashes.45dc63f3e8cdee795bfae07375c36f2724d2d94d: Are you sure? I do also quite like death.
textByHashes.fc0984e69cedd9742d7d5d3cd6d6731f5cd7a529: You know, end of the world, holy fire, final dawns, that sort of thing.
textByHashes.d6bbf3d184b565aa80f2c67fd65e3238e46fcad9: Look, I'm not here to cause problems. I just want to help.
textByHashes.b10496548d0eeae05c79fa2a7e78f2365fd48974: Fine by me. I love tests!
textByHashes.cba930088561f732b1024cd839826d8f8fc9c11c: Okay, not quite as fun, but I'm still up for it.
textByHashes.be84fe1042deabcaad5bdca7eecb8db8e7403f3c: He's going to reach out to the Emissaries and let them know to expect us at their temple.
textByHashes.07ef24b6560144ac898b7d47017dba5641a4aa10: Sounds good. I'll see you there shortly.
textByHashes.d34d4a0f073a6617576b068aa307f44efa62bc15: Okay... So what happens now that we're here?
textByHashes.2be4cc2c3289a1554ea6fc133c7e15b1f31ffa6e: You think they might know something of note?
textByHashes.ac4552e587fb1055a5da0791fa62bf87aa232e82: This whole place is very fancy.
textByHashes.d27a1498332e8ec456edbd4902f68f8c029dd6cf: Did they build everything here themselves?
textByHashes.01c39b1519456544782d75800a59fecefe366e9d: And the Emissaries eventually moved in?
textByHashes.bdd69e632195332845bff591799abd3efbd57dd7: Interesting... I wonder what the cause was.
textByHashes.a020abddb25f42426de352b6e369551f7459a315: How do you know all this? You're not even a member yet.
textByHashes.220478e0b1cc47c660e37b48ef15566f74e35d0c: Well after I heard about all the good work they were doing, I could hardly say no! What about you? What made you want to join them?
textByHashes.e791ced496b0a4a2f1ecf4574e54ac50ab2dd548: So you're quite eager to see the end of the world then?
textByHashes.5d3d496034150606db9380d9f190378f6d15b78e: Well I'm glad to see you're so excited. Good luck with the tests.
textByHashes.06dbba2a43587f12549571c3690af8844187671a: I'm sure it will be fine.
textByHashes.43388fee5612bd8ff3ee70825f1c7f472fb7f216: I had a chat to some of the other recruits. One of them had something rather interesting to say.
textByHashes.e172f5a7283e874fbbb52bcfe8f734a288da3783: Apparently, the Emissaries gained a new leader recently. They refer to her as the Augur.
textByHashes.f826b1aff6b45517d309dc8373cbbb07e79c017e: Apparently this Augur will lead the Emissaries to Mokhaiotl. Do you know what that means?
textByHashes.a4021dce53ddd21ab02ce93dc09479b2f3acd6a4: Could you remind me what Ximoua is?
textByHashes.1b06584f4d350b351be8d7124fa6e8ece8f31aaa: Ah yes, I remember. They see it as their duty to make Ximoua happen. So where does this Mokhaiotl fit in?
textByHashes.f6830c2e8ae18a9371576456b8f37878e7d2ea8e: I see. Given that the Emissaries see it as their duty to bring about the end, I suppose it makes sense that they'd want to reach Mokhaiotl themselves.
textByHashes.ae3a5fdc21c7d662aac867f17f9ec3f37af62929: Not quite yet, but I'll have it in no time.
textByHashes.f7cfd09a8318eaafd6687333420b424c114b3b34: What are we meant to be doing again?
textByHashes.5b7f051a60c6bb0b4ef0576633c1d00e164eaf79: I have this book that might be of use.
textByHashes.4487e6bb52c1e021e298fbb7574a4c8ade72b2e7: Do you think you could help me translate some words?
textByHashes.5168b8544dcc953f988d831f0fee96dfcae65506: I think I might have the passphrase.
textByHashes.edf26fd74810f5b18839a4b408e3d3c6a37b4d26: I guess I'd better keep searching.
textByHashes.b2fcdba0a19ab36ddd62baba0f0471da61950941: Can you remind me what this trial is?
textByHashes.fd7d021b46f77b4ebeb22e727e2c4afc207d31c9: So we question them about that sort of thing? I can't imagine they'd be willing to be truthful about that.
textByHashes.2a7b6fba0e44d8c4d4066a03d2520ede95eb2d4c: You know, it sounds like they plan to kill whoever is guilty.
textByHashes.65f139eb275546e1d83b6a1403f693efe638875f: Do you not even have a little bit of sympathy for them?
textByHashes.9092bf4b970234c7d6ec450deaee75b0849f02c6: Fair enough. I guess I'd better get questioning.
textByHashes.1cc48c6ef9f7644f123842dbd3d70ca8e3dc9016: What do we know about the Emissaries and their beliefs?
textByHashes.9212c9c70b49c90a2ad6d9bef93b9e8d8059af56: I see. Thanks for the information. Hopefully it will help me work out who this traitor is.
textByHashes.200a05326c41cc7fa44b72b99c545b4416018294: I still have some questioning to do.
textByHashes.17397b6bb1e9dba768cf5f7f78c5e8ea08ba9445: Why did you join the Emissaries?
textByHashes.7fcb3e6a6f2710aef13bf32bd37c29f9aa397adb: Tell me about the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.1073c2da96761bc9f9f04aeca3bd027d04062114: I choose . This is your traitor.
textByHashes.0596c23690cb7b31a791595e033ef124f290782f: I'm not sure if you should be so...
textByHashes.b156d8da988c6810097985b34382c0badab73ba2: You're not allowed to do that!
textByHashes.11140dba95693fe5097f72f667da433075cd6849: You know you're not meant to be enjoying yourself, right?
textByHashes.33cc61be731227a2ca040bde12bf975b2b7245c2: I suppose I liked the part where I beat you.
textByHashes.d9edc2fd39e1bf5f00db076df2af529f60b8448e: They think Ennius and Furia are Ralos and Ranul reborn...
textByHashes.48cffc5fcb0e101535c6fa62794b0ad7290546b5: I'm still confused over what their plan is... They want to reach Mokhaiotl, but why would they need to kill Servius to do that? And why the whole set up with that Knight of Varlamore?
textByHashes.61f361a9a8790ef15ab4bad36956b81a385df760: When Furia and Ennius set that knight up, it was so obvious. It's like they wanted us to know it was them.
textByHashes.3c184e606a93fbd04302bf3ba23bccddd551ef62: Should we not leave? We know the cult is guilty now, and we know Metzli, Furia and Ennius are part of it. We have everything we need.
textByHashes.ef982127153f561eb05799833a8e320a988edf7c: So if there is a trap, you'd willingly spring it?
textByHashes.61aa773c75038cb12d4246fcf9acf29c55be2d00: What would you have us do?
textByHashes.1fe01a2b824135c71ffb9b15c885eec2c5924996: Did they never teach you how to do a bit of hard labour back when you were young?
textByHashes.7512bb6ba4232bafd42565abdc17e97d2a19d384: Clearly combat wasn't either given that performance earlier.
textByHashes.9067a47fd5a966b43bbc864953e2c7d24704ffd7: I can't see any way over to you.
textByHashes.809183cc5199009c83fe6aeb8660c2b110194d3f: There were a few obstacles in my way.
textByHashes.d4f0e5c5adf2b91f042ad770f898b37f3676afc5: Hmm... I'll have a look around and see what I can find.
textByHashes.7fd3418bc45a11c73769c5fcdb5494c2b439f580: Could I ask you about some words I found carved into the wall?
textByHashes.8b71a8f37a342a780d583ff219f43de90c848619: Not to worry. I'm sure I can still work it out.
textByHashes.2912d1c4fe3ad215e874100e81b2f761d7e8426b: What do you think Metzli found down here?
textByHashes.4d69e674b13340dd27012a59ad1c6c39bbd66e51: On that note, I guess I should get back to the door.
textByHashes.8515778e35f9de5f22aa24455d8471170c79d4af: Er... Well we're looking for information. The cultists in the temple above apparently found something down here. We need to know what they found so we can stop them.
textByHashes.52e6f293e4de4b44148cd027fcb4c6aa110c1ac2: I need to get after them!
textByHashes.4148c1890cfd34e1a3b3f6343f3d547946f4af3b: I'd better get to Fortis and let them know what happened!
textByHashes.d1dbcd3a7546308fe717e95fa1af49ef79a9b5a2: I need to get over to Fortis rather than going in there again.
textByHashes.9eacea5ae8196ee76bfad6a187a4953619737920: Servius? I wasn't expecting you to be up so soon.
textByHashes.b8d3999e93a7ee6850a82076d63d33637feecc24: Well I'm glad to see you're doing well, but I'm afraid I have some bad news. Itzla has been captured!
textByHashes.a180ffaf9687a4c61cd2d91ceb9f7d306a550a9f: We infiltrated the Twilight Emissaries together. We discovered Metzli to be their new leader, with Ennius and Furia at her side. She's claiming the two of them are Ralos and Ranul reborn!
textByHashes.cde5c81fd296690b8eb9e6470c02df019d2fa3bb: They have. I don't know where they've taken him.
textByHashes.1a461302b02f9123409bdf4ca7b22293000b2e4a: The cult are apparently trying to reach Mokhaiotl.
textByHashes.13d2846f2d7e8a2f889f11d3eb700ec17451e2f1: I don't know... Something isn't right about all of this. We encountered a nagua in some Old One ruins. She called Mokhaiotl the Tlati archive.
textByHashes.e96ae4cbdd227d8ae46c873a7bd6722c5b07212c: I'm not averse to making money.
textByHashes.6d378c0d3af1073b671a4af763134bfe895a6f95: I can't say I've thought much about it.
textByHashes.d1f75a486fff831b2ea33ab71cc0eac6c1d905ff: What am I going to get from thinking more about... milk?
textByHashes.46f2b923716ff7bb1c70ba419f49241f36de0ad6: How are we going to be making that profit? And who even are you anyway?
textByHashes.063bd3ca163cbff74eb355ccb460dfe6df522d89: How do you intend to make an empire of milk?
textByHashes.d01d0b4b6bf987b30a124b05fe9c807fc0c0407f: What use is it if I know everything and you don't? Couldn't I make my own... milk empire... with that information?
textByHashes.a308694312434c30696526b5862ae24a79ce5ceb: If anything I should be cutting you in at ten to fifteen percent.
textByHashes.1e23891713ad7325f019a3719e5908ae7b521530: Right... I guess I'll go and see the Groatses then.
textByHashes.9b27b5e357265237dc10919cec6f487c92ba6e94: No, I'm not sure I would like that, thank you.
textByHashes.772286ea6acb70076a5b0c2557887dd037c47278: Releasing the bull into the cow pen is a bad idea.
textByHashes.0fe845e19afd8d802026e0693eb968de1ba763d7: What was it you needed me to do again?
textByHashes.2f5506ce286848ccba809e9bd4ac2a86aaf95dbc: Can you share what makes your cows so productive?
textByHashes.a051044283bc9654c1de767ff65dc62238384ca8: That can't be everything though, can it?
textByHashes.68ce49f34909e1b8525fe53bbb0a9c9856a76f22: That would be Seth, wouldn't it?
textByHashes.cb9fd07bd8bfc0bb18663e1d35eeaa35c332453a: I'll go and speak to him now, thank you!
textByHashes.17624d26986206fa4bbb00003e8754c4c01e1d9c: I've already had a chance to talk to him. He did indeed have some tricks to share!
textByHashes.eb7f41cd645bbe49c21a7b0b7dc95a0def250119: If you think so, then I must be. Thank you for your help, I'll make sure that knowledge is put to good use.
textByHashes.b7a9276b471dcf8482189dbefc5e907c9fc48e1c: I was wondering if you could teach me a little about how you're so successful with your animals.
textByHashes.ac74b2ba9fe7a937a97af13b823b8a576a962420: Great! So where do I start?
textByHashes.2d39d90e0b33892aca4f5e8d2811c26aa16399a1: I don't think I've ever paid any taxes.
textByHashes.b7fa7504c09869857ccc15893aee25672e5d4a70: You've found a way to get around the taxes?
textByHashes.68e12242e6ad2d707812bc663f904fe896235d24: Okay, thank you for the help.
textByHashes.06ccdddd8574b96509dd8cb2b7b28b80ed15252e: I've actually got it here, I'll take it away and give it a read somewhere a little more peaceful.
textByHashes.142914c8640221194fa2679339408872d7d19e5b: I've learned a lot about how the Groats family care for their animals. They say the secret is happiness!
textByHashes.411bed0e2de1242075476de42ca25653c9f5a760: Now that you mention it, Seth did say he had a book that I... don't have on me right now.
textByHashes.d4520923d2558b906cd2b29209f08ffd83f74951: I have this book from Seth. He claims it's got his principles of animal husbandry in it, if that's of any use?
textByHashes.fdb413530837cb8dbe1d038ba9432435ca652b42: So, do you think this is enough to start our milk empire?
textByHashes.84bdf163a24e56933440c07354239c6262a9ce3f: I don't think I have, no. You already have some milk?
textByHashes.11d095e8e07dc36b417e9e7af2e9791afe7d62b9: I've managed to lose that sample of milk...
textByHashes.117006079bcda3c13de16b71e1f836b19ee3c085: It wasn't what I was expecting, certainly.
textByHashes.b042d658fb11e119b7e007000d026d814756ec44: Shouldn't you have got a permit before making milk?
textByHashes.71f0a7cbd592617d226c551fd49708f4c61465c1: Fine, where are we going to get this permit?
textByHashes.e85c4e06cfc934b2128da6b41195dd72e7b11652: Are you sure having the Duke drink our milk is a good idea?
textByHashes.ce1d5728259b06dd31cb8f0f8385c6c0ccd97cec: I don't think I'm ready to drink another vial of this stuff.
textByHashes.09262180abdbc622a14457f6bed23418a5aa0fd8: I should find someone else to give it to.
textByHashes.3f148141d7d5b481a7e3ae11ac5a27171ec96bd8: Not yet, no. I could do with another sample of milk though, if you have one spare?
textByHashes.0248949fe52b845f9af00dc9da27deb0e312b4e1: Not yet, no, but I am working on it!
textByHashes.9a27bc6e6c2b7c267982c41bcb630718ea8c8236: Greetings. I come seeking a business permit.
textByHashes.b4a03a4b28fe648880f46a67a193e3e94f4f518a: I'm looking to get into the milk trade!
textByHashes.ba5f383a4e143bb934474eabe5447d1c792adecb: If you'd just try this milk...
textByHashes.0db369c72b06b44d042b9ea60b5f846f1f956921: You're the Duke. Couldn't you just grant a permit?
textByHashes.b9eabb086e24f32c0767078e9245a1d16f00c999: Aren't you the highest power in this land?
textByHashes.fb61694cba6b24b123c2caba7cd71bba322623be: But you're the Duke, you shouldn't need the approval of a business entity to grant a permit.
textByHashes.ca54a9bb4f3f97bed57b2567d7bf2b4f1f572739: Not to mention, can't they just refuse to have any competitors?
textByHashes.4a7d27a3ec9ae3c6352c4c9c01a4bd550aa534dd: Hi, what did you want me to do for the permit again?
textByHashes.36c2607829d5ca88a5539fb516f66dfe0712cbea: I did. I've been trying to secure a business permit from the Duke, but he said that as it is a milk-related business venture, I should speak to you instead.
textByHashes.f5615dca4c526ec43ee1a66f3c8081ee76cd8e90: I can prove we wouldn't be if you could just try this sample of...
textByHashes.16c47069c08cba7638dd015a5b79394051fb21c3: I seem to have misplaced my sample of milk. I'll be back when I have it.
textByHashes.e7af4f01e760d265546176d0beab7a0d007de999: I think if you were to try this sample here you'd see we wouldn't be competing.
textByHashes.468a624bc61f7521556cefa4bb7f8083800eab0d: Well, it's not mysterious, it's milk!
textByHashes.d20fd19c9c71760983c5b956de7494de708b8e61: Would it convince you to help me with my permit?
textByHashes.a7bf6ac3b378a51d721f1d2a5507d7c595c0d2fa: Not yet. I really don't want to, but I guess I must.
textByHashes.366f454c6e75b4893bc385208c441358bdca80ac: I shouldn't drink this unless I have Gillie nearby.
textByHashes.e61db48e6eb73152faf331bf53a56fd5c1950984: Oh, that's worse milk than before.
textByHashes.acc9f05172af82cb37d9d66172904c8eb95a5625: My business partner, Cassius. I don't know where he gets it from originally though.
textByHashes.6afa52519addbc6ca911df26ff10625ea1bcc017: Nothing, but he apparently has enough of a source to start a business. I'm mostly trying to be helpful.
textByHashes.b32e80f22f5d1644b5276664d998340e9f9d92cc: If the milk's bad, you're not going to recommend us for a permit, are you?
textByHashes.87a73c0a544f32afc2da7844344c3d4c6fe07dfc: Is there anything more I could do to convince you?
textByHashes.5d91509f8ab1ff213e93b457cf83002db48c4208: I'm getting there! He looks quite tough though.
textByHashes.077626e37bea502cbf0424285b79cbf64e2fa890: It's become rather complicated, but I am working it out!
textByHashes.6e2a513ad88ff5dbe7fb36cbe858280e384700be: Brutus has already been dealt with.
textByHashes.a3e136b15d2165740e95e770e521b794d4a3aba5: I don't think that's going to be necessary anymore.
textByHashes.56a0021faff426098af88f16b8fb123f1a9e2698: That bull was Cassius' other business partner, Brutus.
textByHashes.48d2d021a7e29774a68edb4d4a868d8dda086a69: I'm sure he won't be feeling particularly friendly once I let him know.
textByHashes.34b40f9a05f158ec8d7ad94aaa94f2fb5ca97fec: I'm starting to think Cassius doesn't even have his own herd.
textByHashes.34bfdba85bb60ce186e23e07bd8945434f50332e: I'm not sure where else he would've been getting it from.
textByHashes.7054658bb3a6a879b59df93438c2d6c6a72464db: Cassius, I don't think we'll be getting our business permit.
textByHashes.ac28c3b74ca8c654d1368a5d19ba2b6ef11631a0: So the Duke asked me to... and then Gillie said that...
textByHashes.6a2d7ef04cde6acc3ba830985bb79df301d34b89: In my defence, I had no idea that was Brutus! You made it sound like he was a business partner.
textByHashes.158152ca6b389fbc6a409b0cc7f9ac6be99237d0: Not to mention, apparently his aggression was ruining Seth's herd's milk. This should be a good thing!
textByHashes.dd280cd3e88ce84541d9acfa917692331796bda6: Wow, thank you! I'll make sure to check it out.
textByHashes.dc9324666504215f9a63a636162beaf2d59b767a: I've lost that amulet you gave me...
textByHashes.aaaccb3e1330f57287c552eb995b184e8e0938fb: And how is life as a squire?
textByHashes.fc092441666631fb93ba2547a41899bdd01d88d3: Do you know where you lost it?
textByHashes.9ed6d7a09e13957f9f478e98764fb3a88846f23d: Well, do you know the VAGUE AREA you lost it in?
textByHashes.c6a0142465c38c9bfb953f1b5cb9f93c0edd66da: Well, the kingdom is fairly abundant with swords...
textByHashes.2f69625545fafca3cd3da176970e6494161995cf: I can make a new sword if you like...
textByHashes.b2bb852a5ec98489d32da519c2318d61b179be47: So would these dwarves make another one?
textByHashes.b3a8d6bfe2fd81e5fdce58e2a689dae2c8b7efe9: Ok, I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.44d0c157123b926b7e10a2d9741aea1b3fd456b3: I'll help, I know an Imcando dwarf!
textByHashes.37511a9fac2a1711dce1ce146c2554c33a1f4e72: He's living on a cliff at the very south end of Asgarnia, south of Port Sarim. I'll go right over to him.
textByHashes.a4af15ebbbb5310ceca0dcfe59aaf76d4b9482a7: No. I've got lots of mining work to do.
textByHashes.52e9da653ac69c439b454e7d3e301491a89e16d3: Well, I hope you find it soon.
textByHashes.d46cf8f3c864cad87720a6333db7fe1996f9738a: Wouldn't you prefer to be a squire for me?
textByHashes.0c6e66cb1eb7389c80942e4e272b26f55b0b24ee: I'm looking for Imcando dwarves to help me.
textByHashes.995f503aacdb1aaf1fa732ddccb6855ca19cd468: Are you an Imcando dwarf? I need a special sword.
textByHashes.e11a6c1b665db24dae134dbd85953d82337af5f0: Can you make a special sword for me?
textByHashes.592d9cac56bf06753127d3ca126992fe5ea4adcb: I need you to make a sword for one of Falador's knights. He had one which was passed down through five generations, but his squire has lost it.
textByHashes.5e97c35e6a7893fd11fa0fb5cc2b11dc148e8ce1: So we need an identical one to replace it.
textByHashes.dc47f444d92cb113b496083ec3417ec41f95cee5: I'll go and ask his squire and see if I can find one.
textByHashes.20f67b531947950669d24e477848a7b6f4f41934: I've found an Imcando dwarf but he needs a picture of the sword before he can make it.
textByHashes.a77d127aac2225f2640a30966a63787afb8590b5: Ok, I'll try and get that then.
textByHashes.0f9bde80b1ef7517a5c77061b91da5db7bcd2bf5: I didn't get the picture yet.
textByHashes.f9f1c5d025a574c4664cf4dbb95ab26e8d5c7686: I have the picture. I'll just take it to the dwarf now!
textByHashes.d217d085fd96d36cb927bedbd5cf056b159ac034: I have found a picture of the sword I would like you to make.
textByHashes.a2598d78c065407ec916b6dc9561d96acfd1ae8d: Okay. I'll go and find them then.
textByHashes.e88877a0268d3eb6c0a290e2d6d5acf06d8f0872: I've found a dwarf who will make the sword. I've just got to find the materials for it now!
textByHashes.71c7a25c7dd17c8f7e999e28e6423306b3f91d46: I don't have any of them yet.
textByHashes.49f9d752a4a66bd7945a19bd0406f67a5b906169: Can you make that replacement sword now?
textByHashes.e2ef06cf31f1c5bef3e167a6b05fc0cf66ec4edf: I don't have any blurite ore yet.
textByHashes.5bbada539084e8749a71f0f91af6493cc8bc32b5: I don't have two iron bars.
textByHashes.9d735bdcd97cc45c49f9b375bc8e7c8e500e118e: Thanks for making that sword for me!
textByHashes.131dd4d2086f30091a606257016d6b2998b350bc: I have retrieved your sword for you.
textByHashes.8867cc63457e320bdbcccd748dc968ebed559194: Do you know what happened in the castle cellar?
textByHashes.0c39e0e157ff4ec69290ff794c838ed47d6e5176: Bob says he saw something in the cellar. Like a goblin with big eyes.
textByHashes.582075e87b5231f3f90617187d2b5b5de66d4030: I think we should at least investigate.
textByHashes.d3071faaf9d81e177e1ad4c31e5cc1e68ef84b0a: I dug through the rubble in the cellar and found a tunnel!
textByHashes.c0d37359ac6f4d13f3b93e255f64c38c35c2425e: On the ground I found this brooch.
textByHashes.f49506ce79195ec28a7ac3952a26ea3b9a38f15a: What can you tell me about this brooch?
textByHashes.aa81b73283695387da1ecefd758cf616c1df813e: A goblin might have dropped it.
textByHashes.53ce3fb69e7fd9631a6eebd975583cb51e67e417: 'A History of the Goblin Race'. This must be it.
textByHashes.004d35fb3fe377cddac8e7a1edd1cff7c850fc24: Hey... The symbol of the 'Dorgeshuun' tribe looks just like the symbol on the brooch I found.
textByHashes.3fa077f58b64e442cabf8457307b451c46059634: I found out about the symbol. It was the symbol of one of the ancient goblin tribes!
textByHashes.5d9d2c8cf694f7587cc920fcb078a033c1a9081c: Have you ever heard of the Dorgeshuun?
textByHashes.61b5e740b15d455765e634b43b493f39b3bcf6bd: Do you want me to decide for you again?
textByHashes.0f0f90c70487ec8365fe8173c414d93d0a60c2b1: It doesn't really matter. What happened to them?
textByHashes.54a928defd615ed694052733d1f8a72186d80cc4: What kind of god would punish them for refusing to fight?
textByHashes.07c25ebae217090dc70386b99bb2b39c05f5ad3b: Well either way they refused to fight.
textByHashes.a7e0cc82d753f34aa8e28b52b04829d744948199: So do goblins make their own tunnels?
textByHashes.6d88bba9b05b0b2a8e6ffd48095a773a1055d56c: Well I found a brooch underground, and I looked up the symbol and it was the symbol of the Dorgeshuun.
textByHashes.b31608ca9228e3be5361116176e95896a8df80c2: So why is the Dorgeshuun tribe underground?
textByHashes.c3acceef195382f4c782eabc4d8435850428715a: Wait, you say YOU won the big wars?
textByHashes.9460564bd653f0933dabe2af95be319114be2861: Well why not show me both greetings?
textByHashes.e883402a1b3bf4d868cfb75e3ebf44fe8b64dc6d: I spoke to the goblin generals in the goblin village. They told me about an ancient goblin tribe that went to live underground.
textByHashes.6213d44be681e5a0dede3cd961a84f3020e01cf5: Did you break in to the castle cellar?
textByHashes.0d92f1db1596c061e101b3b144d250a02b79120b: May I mine the rocks here?
textByHashes.902d9c6ea5eafafcad2d3df5f1b0c045a1072f5d: Can you show me the way out of the mines?
textByHashes.9823198c9ce17153b0e4795a1f5ae017ec59c43b: I've made contact with the cave goblins. They say they were following a seam and broke into the cellar by mistake.
textByHashes.e6cd53353be6299788ac106f5580db1a0d5b61a8: Well, they seemed friendlier than most goblins, and nothing was taken from the cellar.
textByHashes.0e435a7c74dc6f829adf5968172f8fa506ca6f63: Tell me about the silverware that was stolen.
textByHashes.9fffcb96716d48c9dd89127c709c79295f50f03b: So why did no one notice earlier?
textByHashes.b2c38f7ae54dbaea8ee5510c23012ceed5735757: Some silverware has gone missing from the castle, and the Duke thinks you stole it!
textByHashes.85e63c50b73b5f2e7d980f7ed72f2a4a99d240ff: Where's the silverware you stole from the castle cellar?
textByHashes.a645cf1f970f02f615ef0506c4cf2240bac6d958: You expect me to believe that? Perhaps Sigmund was right: you're just thieving little goblins!
textByHashes.1569f4691cbe43c4bea21b5b8581dfd129273db0: Well, the Duke says he will attack you unless the silverware is returned.
textByHashes.660b93ff297ae02024215e77bb3172a7e8d8093b: Sigmund must be a member of the Humans Against Monsters cult!
textByHashes.19e8f673eaecd725ec1e494091408acbde6e30e0: You're a H.A.M member, aren't you?
textByHashes.bb3e1a3cb66234ed887da1c66cc28b61e979099c: Did you know Sigmund is a member of HAM?
textByHashes.a104cbdf1265bc27484e17f7331b963d71f0841b: Actually I have found it! You put it in the H.A.M. cave!
textByHashes.1a95ef7f9cccc486e8adb935dd16afd060cf900e: I found the missing silverware in the HAM cave!
textByHashes.87dbbb540862a5df4e1b93e68b68e84aea36051e: I have a peace treaty from the Duke of Lumbridge.
textByHashes.a85677dfa87be6854ed73f4ef90c106e3f813da6: No. As long as you stick to the terms of this treaty there will be no conflict. The Duke of Lumbridge wants to meet your ruler to sign it.
textByHashes.9ca5b2a30f889c17a9a2564a765886f8bc4ce0a0: Your grace, I present Ur-tag, headman of the Dorgeshuun.
textByHashes.6075eb3af67711915f55e5d43db4e610c87f9924: I see you have a new pet.
textByHashes.976134eb9532d6fd24eb8ec51270c0eb4dc0ea43: Dumpling? I suppose it looks a little bit like a dumpling...
textByHashes.2b0c0c9b7cfe01039acb2ff5bc7f592295e9c550: Look at it! It's clearly evil. It has six legs!
textByHashes.382323b296bc9ac0bf4ed506911a409d35aaecaf: And those eyes... those black, black eyes... If you stare into them, you can see into its black soul!
textByHashes.446a3c8425a722e1abda52ea6cf16e9d61eb14e2: Ahem, anyway, that's not how I know this creature is evil. I've seen one before, and I'm afraid I have some bad news.
textByHashes.fe648b55a6a88aa8fdc728ffe712e157e9fb4fdc: I came across some creatures like Dumpling at the Gnome Stronghold. They're evil things created using dark magic.
textByHashes.2a958f59e299244697aaf1ea02ca0cf7b634ea2c: If this is anything like the situation at the Gnome Stronghold, then Dumpling was sent by Glouphrie to wheedle itself into your affections and spy on you.
textByHashes.5f295fd5cd13e90488404ab05391936b233efbf0: I'm afraid so. The creature is shrouded by illusion magic to make it look like a cute pet, but in reality it's this horrible... black spiky thing.
textByHashes.afd28ccc437ffdea0db3741fdfcc2a5ab07b0851: It's watching you all the time, sending details of all your secret dealings back to Glouphrie.
textByHashes.4fd96f13792bb3c7ca80af6ff255a67c0b7cfe07: Well, what if I were to prove it to you? I unmasked the creatures at the Gnome Stronghold using a machine created by Oaknock the Engineer. Maybe I could do it again.
textByHashes.5290b6635929e838c82256ad99854d5792df7104: Oh it will be solid. I just need an anti-illusion device... I don't suppose you have one of those around here?
textByHashes.9b2c1ed7578bbfe1eda22dcbae564c1b2c74dd4a: A big machine made out of wood and crystal.
textByHashes.e691ca5e66f7cb8ae310ff70d4922d6c3f1872ce: So perhaps there's a device nearby. When he was here, where did Yewnock spend a lot of his time?
textByHashes.10f6590ce26c1d6b475814347fed54239ad8d9d3: It sounds like I need to pay Golrie a visit. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.ae60149e2dce65f4763ec8d2db664c02a190e97d: Not yet. I'll head down there now and see if Golrie can give me a hand.
textByHashes.b7e89fa048e48ccbbd8b7dab0c9ac70e1ed7d924: I need your help with a device.
textByHashes.ee0ae67868f310bc90fc70c6c125ba90d92d2bf9: That's right. One made using elven crystal.
textByHashes.b3670261d7612201e0fefdb293161022e2d6d4e5: Why do you have so much? Are you some sort of collector?
textByHashes.58f3fe6bf39c8806c814d0fcc2a9a458259e20aa: Storeroom? Could I take a look?
textByHashes.bdbcd85c597a2f23555e9dc87e5aade3d156ad71: I'm still working on it. I'll let you know once I've made some progress.
textByHashes.80dbc7b6ec61604f0d00174a271c10fe2034c69f: I managed to find that device.
textByHashes.5dfbc21af6e01a4269e7976f87ed95dc37498e9d: It counteracts illusion magic in the surrounding area. This one should cover the whole of the Tree Gnome Village. It might be useful for someone to remember that in case it's needed again.
textByHashes.45dacaf8a4408b622e5aff3c8d91503662127bd8: I found Bolrie's diary. Do you know anything about it?
textByHashes.e275918d7c8dfb021b46b44bad585ccfa427c960: Bolrie... Golrie... I should have guessed. You seem to like giving your children similar names, just to be confusing.
textByHashes.fbe361c097510f1000c701f62e403e3a5ca49d22: So that means you're King Bolren's grand-nephew, right?
textByHashes.1fa911051204b12519c0f8d02e41bba868ad35c1: Does that mean that you're in line for the throne?
textByHashes.15d3b33156933baa0356e2304547b04e543d1686: Oh, that's unusual. So you've never thought about being the King?
textByHashes.4736c49a5918e43342b0bfd4c0f99cd72caf27e8: You're very well informed for a gnome in a cave. Most gnomes I've talked to have forgotten most of their own history.
textByHashes.4ee1f414c845050c130db87a1d335b81e2c1bd58: So have you heard from Bolrie recently?
textByHashes.7b5e55793ad76acb98b3d856eb66d67cda7e37fb: Where did that crystal bowl come from?
textByHashes.d6d308a0d08f0e7f967caa1d147507357b1d3aa9: I don't think it's meant to be used as a plant pot.
textByHashes.1184eeb7934825a9c199bdb2e2dd7117e91aac2b: It's a singing bowl. You can use it to shape elven crystal.
textByHashes.490a80e346655ef9f2d480fdc99a9394e2b5a873: I have a question about your storeroom.
textByHashes.65b83995feb6a5a5a34810cca2e06ba436f26c8c: Maybe he thought it was more important to spy on the Gnome Stronghold and Narnode.
textByHashes.92ac3593f39af55d568b2465070f7de229ed6de7: So you want more evil watchers?
textByHashes.05b580e7a4fa9778fba06702659789b4cea63f14: Right... Well, maybe we should start by trying to find him.
textByHashes.b83c36d6020fc555f44bedd782bd924a15925188: And nobody knows where Arposandra is. Not a great start.
textByHashes.6196260ea73457c39c0fa54d3a7bc84e27ab83b6: Did he offer any suggestion of where he thought it might be?
textByHashes.f8e53f1e8d7909d17378918ffe3d64dfaf2c2b76: But how would I find him?
textByHashes.6eae96be9a48353fdcf442aa801824ad778e06e5: Sounds like the best option then. We just have to hope Longramble didn't end up finding the edge of the world and falling off.
textByHashes.aa7c5153d6bfce77918a29aed2318ec7fc3be207: I need your help finding a certain gnome.
textByHashes.9e5f41db0a89be0de3907eb12c332a453debd61f: I'm looking for Longramble, the explorer.
textByHashes.ed8a136f227e76322e2f7e497bff1832ef94ebc4: So you know where he is?
textByHashes.b762151b6686f76daf57b47f0227171830f50b8c: Right, I guess I'd better get hunting. Sounds like I'll be needing a sextant, watch and chart.
textByHashes.031433f0008a64ac20579605bcd2b26c66fbebce: Could you remind me of Longramble's coordinates?
textByHashes.88b527454fffbeb1b44a4e9960f76833d99e4b4d: Trouble speaking? You're not one of those gnomes like Hazelmere that only speaks in ancient gnomish, are you?
textByHashes.786f0e12e9fcd9aa8853bd793c5c5773fd6332cd: Well, it looks like you have some new company now. I'm , and I've been looking for you.
textByHashes.088b0d7fcfb1601691fd9c01d91b711052589676: I'm hoping you've found something that I'm also looking for.
textByHashes.9fd11845010b01a184f121042588459ae7800a82: Edge? Are you sure there's an edge? I've heard it goes on forever.
textByHashes.f39430b3fc2e458560a4786ca3415578a27edac9: If the world is spherical though, you'll never find the edge.
textByHashes.21197b9de361a3e77ad8a2ab32943825a87ed987: Maybe the world is round, but there's some magical force that makes us stick to the ground.
textByHashes.22c9235324f2d9a8833449dbf8880fea52c958c3: Right... Anyway, that's not why I'm here. I thought you were looking for the hidden city of Arposandra?
textByHashes.1e26e22e278a818e489eaebdba8ce2a09fa1626e: And have you had any luck?
textByHashes.3cb7a9770f8436e395cda3591788b85c68e9e03f: That doesn't mean it's coming from Arposandra though.
textByHashes.d2b07beb5345ddbf21d9bd65605e612c5b10f481: Okay, that sounds a lot more promising.
textByHashes.adda2b5e853b5d4c18935bc0322e1c84ce309e63: Tentacles? That's more than unwell, that's... warped!
textByHashes.3c7f99a56a3b3fe651356599a9d9d64f9b18b3a2: Hmm, I'd better have a look myself.
textByHashes.03debb549d0e45334a2b8d0096466af07d248b97: Hello again. Where did you say that outlet was?
textByHashes.07eecc16bf65013eedc46c3a66f26772c0fe21ec: I think it's going well. I found Longramble, and he was able to point me in the right direction.
textByHashes.034f68595eaf296372743bf70669b7082682aa76: Er... hello... Was that you calling me?
textByHashes.710234df760fdd18567b7d770727373cdaacbbae: Er... I don't know. Can't anyone just speak to you?
textByHashes.3dc87aadba06a50b2032c00c8fb6098f0979953c: Well, it's true that I have spoken to the odd tree in the past...
textByHashes.dc8e33e38540e05e05c1549bd1467d2187ea587d: Oh, wait a minute, this reminds me of something. Hazelmere did something like this to me a while ago. You know, talking using the mind.
textByHashes.27bb5528ba5bf4526a98e5bd3bf52c57a160b1ed: Maybe I could help in some way. What exactly is wrong with you?
textByHashes.a32b972ce181a1d3f33ea3244ab34474e1886506: Hmm... I'm sure there's a way to fix this. What would Hazelmere do?
textByHashes.620a4ad06d2588dfe5586512df3c0cac731de684: It's good to hear you're still as grumpy as always.
textByHashes.b1d54e9cd01a06b36d63b3738aa4550885c71450: Fortunate? You didn't warn me of any risk before giving me that nightmare!
textByHashes.c45e1b47c6b945f0134dca26cf583026b2b42fd1: I'm not sure I approve of your low regard for my welfare.
textByHashes.fd7b4dc35f4e422b537dc2467f61b996292573ac: So how has this caused Incomitatus to become ill?
textByHashes.871d3726393289d25cb274bca768928baf9ae2dc: There is a huge evil-smelling swamp of tar just to the west of here. Is that related?
textByHashes.a0dfe491c7066dd8e4193748faa4718a7b1643e4: Is there some sort of antidote I could give to the tree?
textByHashes.e37146bd70f2049fb82659fc8e08eb3e47418f25: How do you know what I'm carrying?
textByHashes.0d1791fb09f37a8983eca9d65f85879bcc8e2152: Right, I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.f959fa308940ab03130249afcac677fb88357017: How do you know what I've encountered?
textByHashes.974bafc29d7d17cfe25c7351f12ad30646dcbe37: How am I meant to do it?
textByHashes.94812740bb865a7daa161f4fc5b9a3808620740a: You know there's quite an ill-looking spirit tree over there, right?
textByHashes.e0357aa467784d64e9a1987cf0f86de28c981d2f: I ended up getting a bit side-tracked thanks to that spirit tree over there. Where did you say the outlet was?
textByHashes.e571c1fecd5ab4f60dfcbbc9cc86d11e49ccdbd5: Feeling dizzy... I can't think straight...
textByHashes.7d167f1c795ea0d3ae0036a92a54b80222a3cab0: This is it. This is the end.
textByHashes.feef92f3d6abb6774ef386319e197a04c86c8737: Help! Someone, help me! I'm dying...
textByHashes.5e3d65695329bbf9bfafe26a475abc95824f57da: Are you Death? You remind me a lot of a gnome I knew when I was alive.
textByHashes.d28f09af0d250fa5a79c0ef2157d12b97b7e9a54: Phew, that was a close one! Thanks for saving me.
textByHashes.49f915fbbbc65f7d32f0c10fe32465f5e9133505: Hang on... you're properly talking to me, without using a mind meld. I thought you only spoke ancient gnomish?
textByHashes.2ad7e9ff0b67fb16eaedf937eb71ddd177c2edd7: That's unusually kind for you. Not going soft, are you?
textByHashes.f3ee3bf35b87aeb9720365a819c129aa4c8b32e2: Sounds like you have been having some bad dreams, or you've been reading some terrible stories.
textByHashes.370aed651765dd4a98de49787c216ddf12fe932f: But you can't die! You're a mighty wizard!
textByHashes.a330f8f9b1b639c90034ad9cc5f7df3fcccb0ca2: Guardianship of the spirit trees? I wouldn't even know where to begin with that!
textByHashes.eda40b14686a42254ad6f46b8599589037141e7d: Ah, good old Hazelmere. Glad to see you're back to your grumpy self.
textByHashes.dca9963c697f4a71581b0980555715b87c810a46: I just wanted to have a chat. You know, just check how you're doing.
textByHashes.a56ec738481149db5ac85ee0dc876fb686c3c682: Sort of. I think I've worked out where Arposandra is, but my attempt to enter didn't go well. There seems to be quite an extensive set of defences.
textByHashes.be6230d0cc7159e2cb3f672e45477d7366acd7fa: I think I've found an entrance to the city, but it's too well defended. There's all these traps, and some talking terrorbird guards!
textByHashes.b3a276b99cc9a09bd78c3d96d378c411e8c2ce41: I don't know. I think I've hit a dead end for now.
textByHashes.a75599bcd6a57fbc4457c94f0b212079c7d481e3: Nice name. Why doesn't the ruler of Port Piscarilius do something about this?
textByHashes.3d4ebf6391e373603aae5add4c10afbeb3725867: Fair enough. So what do you need me for?
textByHashes.bfbc4531c93ceae56d013f1c7018a61333c32198: Yeah not sure what that's all about. You clearly fit right in here.
textByHashes.1546da907e59105dd4518aceee25f162c55702de: What are you trying to say?
textByHashes.bdae4564cef5eccf57e7352d054531ea73564e9c: Hey there. I'm looking for the Saviours of Kourend. Do you know where I can find them?
textByHashes.8b8e61a783c9b77306ee0cdf017e4f5d44fe162a: Oh sorry. Do you know where I can find them though?
textByHashes.4ea00123f09c036ff9dac188f57a80a0eb3248d9: Where can I find Robert O'Reilly?
textByHashes.35d2048961e0bcde8dfc8a8ee98844b7dc46053a: Hello. I'm looking for the Saviours of Kourend and I was hoping you could help me.
textByHashes.1647a34a8c57c2196915749617d8e939efb8e7f4: Where am I going to get some stew?
textByHashes.9395c43c2f09acf54a21be76107c6493a19d4434: Very well. I'll return when I have some stew.
textByHashes.69c1a574c64fbf0be0ef15a28aa669245e77dfae: It just so happens I have some stew right here.
textByHashes.bd54743ac076b75a747bb4f35c2c81a93a7ebdde: I know right, what are the chances?
textByHashes.a2d4c42d8666e8255a5908a07fc2c5c42f95df67: Thank you for your help. I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.82a7f8ede325f3635df7eda1ed133d67752d39c7: I haven't found the Saviours of Kourend yet.
textByHashes.84cb64be940ff90a08cb453a1d6308039f7fb1c3: Hello. I'm looking for the Saviours of Kourend. Do you know where I could find them?
textByHashes.26824971b70a7e85eefce8d6cd7610e3645e2ebd: I was hoping I could join the gang.
textByHashes.d83c9f5f77d068af854cb4edcb210a0f7de4d2c5: And how can I do that?
textByHashes.3f99e6805dfac6e8f628e7769044c66a5787c17b: You want me to kill someone?
textByHashes.0149c293d8cac80de13731edad733ce605020b4e: As in, kill them, kill them?
textByHashes.13f2ec698e029b8a42341ba1167357641b002dbc: I don't think I can do it.
textByHashes.25389ac9c9f6cb0a9199c014445dbac286347f2d: So can I go in now?
textByHashes.598adf0dd6e9796b2d7d593ac1bfe82f15656846: And neither will you. On behalf of the Kourend Council, I'm bringing you in.
textByHashes.53e58566a7d380aa93a862264331d2d2e0a4a2a6: Yet you call yourself a queen. Bit ironic don't you think?
textByHashes.69f6c271d110dcae93e446ac0ccb938e9a084d4a: Hang on... you're part of the Piscarilius family?
textByHashes.47e4024a4415a7d30f38f6680499f2ff12ecbea8: Okay, you've got my attention. But how do I know you're telling the truth?
textByHashes.70223019e79cceb668500ff7457fb00a7a96c9bb: Fine, I'll give you benefit of the doubt. But if you're wrong, I'm coming straight back here to apprehend you.
textByHashes.768a2de90d715d6c2a366753f718aca291a2f3a5: I'll let you finish this time.
textByHashes.3c313c82dfc5c07c079cb35bcce8c1056c41d146: I haven't had any luck finding the Queen of Thieves. However, I've come across this letter which you might find interesting.
textByHashes.cae6a91a5121c8ef894186ef4ea7a6c610c7590a: Great! So can I have a reward?
textByHashes.ac48aab8b77293a034d52c6829c0fca44b7ae9eb: What do you know of the Disciples of Yama?
textByHashes.890707e2446e40abf0fbabb8d7b0f62d5b578035: And Councillor Hughes is helping them? That's not good.
textByHashes.00ce8330d7b821b3fe3de1656f33de89c9076666: So can I have a reward?
textByHashes.0ed75df10f1774fb28590592bbd3eb1b3e20d85e: You know, you're really not a nice person.
textByHashes.c3dfa64c1d3339c54bbf0ac9a2c076eef62acf58: Sorry, I don't have time right now.
textByHashes.38e5ff5a526dd284e6fda63e1bf46b12288e3ff5: I can't find Father Urhney at the moment.
textByHashes.765fcbe5aa28b14df373e6495576d61197aaaba9: Okay, okay... sheesh, what a grouch.
textByHashes.488a9885522fcb9852eee91be4da459ea77bb219: Father Aereck sent me to talk to you.
textByHashes.9b0de96d08a48f67658e05e6952da489fb698b11: He's got a ghost haunting his graveyard.
textByHashes.68b8c82b3c7ad57b86deb3a59c53cf39d8933173: Thank you. I'll give it a try!
textByHashes.65abdf0cbaa039ae99a05db5ed171360e980da6a: You mean he gets himself into lots of problems?
textByHashes.b753015dd0b2f9e4a6353406b0481923cb74803d: I've come to repossess your house.
textByHashes.36bd83ee919e6c6c63e16ba2f4e169548709ee96: Sorry. I must have got the wrong address. All the houses look the same around here.
textByHashes.07f837f76f971f13333e75eeba8c459b00dd15fa: I don't know. I just wanted this house...
textByHashes.24da4490e64b7ab02182866bf36b42169db52aa8: I had a talk with Father Urhney. He has given me this funny amulet to talk to the ghost with.
textByHashes.895dadd0f66444d82674da0e90d5c80f2adfee1f: I've lost the Amulet of Ghostspeak.
textByHashes.6bb7bf541363f797dfc8cf2c6b32fd773f9805e6: My brother had EXACTLY the same problem.
textByHashes.fe340dfb70b88ded6c022475bf2950bf5121b5d8: You'll have to give me the recipe some time...
textByHashes.f1650838efdffc94373adfaec57f00a820af17ed: Hmm... I'm not so sure about that.
textByHashes.a1d4882ba949fa91d6b32c9eb317588abbabefc7: Ah well, better be off now...
textByHashes.20c2a843ec1561470f8d7ad485e8dae27a17cbf2: Any hints where I can find some treasure?
textByHashes.241e05b3f1b962bf38cb6a33c66c0860227e039b: Thank you. You've been very helpful.
textByHashes.60b7144f716d96277eb3f2c0f29fd54fb4699370: Yep, now tell me what the problem is.
textByHashes.9dfb5879cee90e3bd4289d48f8bee8a633e58c94: Ok, Ok, I can understand you!
textByHashes.bd4fab575138055ffd7d95c2057cec74606091e2: But have you any idea WHY you're doomed to be a ghost?
textByHashes.4467e0e7acb52efcc18ea6249b8759b628b980f4: I've been told a certain task may need to be completed so you can rest in peace.
textByHashes.0a76986003e9e3409214c7cfea3cb288cc8ded77: Do you know where this warlock might be now?
textByHashes.7511b4f8985196cf198aedda3664f556ae0acfff: Ok. I will try and get the skull back for you, then you can rest in peace.
textByHashes.a8603536a630f6c9deeba59e4b317d20933ed48d: No, you sound like you're speaking nonsense to me.
textByHashes.5284b6509f0b07bf9835dcfb0adce05ea077611e: Yeah, it is a pity. Sorry about that.
textByHashes.0f0e637b13665252a253618e572306cc5cfd0cb0: Yes, ok. Do you know WHY you're a ghost?
textByHashes.0c39d024e45bd3872c6a0207845e34ea174f9b2c: Sorry, I can't find it at the moment.
textByHashes.5dab2de4352cf43aacd8f53c8a7d21a8c6b3af5b: I've found out that the ghost's corpse has lost its skull. If I can find the skull, the ghost should leave.
textByHashes.7052ed3c581bfd8550b939396b53b77bd5e6a085: Yes, I think a warlock has stolen it.
textByHashes.f488b0a97b23241d08d1ad2c11bab2df5ea145d6: I've finally found the ghost's skull!
textByHashes.d0678f75ee45afb8b70eecd904099c7dc15926ca: Frogs? What are you on about?
textByHashes.d1e17b1209cbdd9ebd3b221df045192f7d06adaf: I promise I have no idea what you're on about. If you explain, maybe I can help you?
textByHashes.2ce56ad31caa782229c8f0de5fc6ab904d655dec: I see... How about I head over there and take a look?
textByHashes.3bc003dd9f140ea031ff98754349c5646af1ab6d: Okay then... Well provided that doesn't happen, I'll be back shortly to let you know what I've found.
textByHashes.7a0d3d080d26b193d22696bed1990e8cc54e2279: I think I'm just going to go now. You clearly have some... issues that you need to get on top of.
textByHashes.1882f2aa0afcf2701c3470df76337b686951fb60: Okay then... Well assuming that I survive, I'll be back shortly to let you know what I've found.
textByHashes.7dcbc8bccaf58c2e455e95cdecbf94d94c17ee24: Well I guess I'd just never considered it before...
textByHashes.d6960056f120480fe6003c838abd3556a4d95b72: Well when you put it like that...
textByHashes.374932bb472c10c735e79884d59b6a1912b06ba8: Well there's a guy over there that thinks you're all evil.
textByHashes.a5167fc5b19c872b1c316ea76bd4f8cd8e2e9c29: But... What do you do? What are you striking from?
textByHashes.5be6a02e6cbfd834098aace9fffe31ce166cea60: Actually, he never mentioned anything about work. He seems to think you're out to overthrow humanity.
textByHashes.dc3c70960fbc8122152b0b77f53e1fa311d78b66: I'm not too sure. He did mention at one point something about killing you all...
textByHashes.d528162d62cdcd0c61d88d6eaf3071f6f7cc94d5: Right... Well how about I go and ask him what conditions he'd be willing to accept.
textByHashes.5dc36367d9b9ddd5fe1a3a14b562fbb7b606e407: Well I'd still like to give it a good go.
textByHashes.461cec61a010a0f2922d7f92ca0c36f0c142e261: Well I had a chat with them, and they're open to engaging in some peace talks.
textByHashes.75df1c7918071ca7bd9ca0699be236860330c714: Okay... But what exactly have they done that means peace isn't an option?
textByHashes.8f06337628ed661df1c73dfc5857bd0865083c0c: Yes I'm starting to think that's where the problem lies as well.
textByHashes.555fc99bf5616f2a800ccbf85c02308ec90fec4f: So you'd be willing to negotiate peace in exchange for your... brain?
textByHashes.31f2814088ad4a766bf6a3b8ab06bfe65faf4915: I don't think they're monsters. They actually seem somewhat friendly.
textByHashes.3f1ec038eee634b0294bdbc35663e6494c914cfe: Every day I find myself further questioning my life choices. Fine. I'll go and ask them about their leader.
textByHashes.6eac36b5e73c398b685f12e21cfbf5588ab7788c: Sort of. He seems open to the idea of peace talks, but he will only negotiate with your leader. Do you have a leader?
textByHashes.e3cbdcdc37983d26e187c953c1e5c8402ba65428: Well would you be interested in having a leader?
textByHashes.3efd281c9eba799d975ac65351aef3c96ba254c7: Do you have a process for that sort of thing?
textByHashes.9a8a6e10cf1f9ec5ba39baa5e0a65149306b42a4: I see. Well, I don't, but for the sake of my sanity, let's say I do. Shall we call an election then?
textByHashes.b937de60ae27e2825e2e43a5cc7c9d345ec51ce0: So you're saying Cuthbert can't win the election?
