textByHashes.c812860d058fdad88903b6da562b7e793cd1d1f7: Which we very much need to avoid! So how do we ensure Cuthbert can't win the election?
textByHashes.6b6e7dadbb19c56ec09979ac416e07e4a079e36f: Okay... I guess I'm off to sabotage a lily pad.
textByHashes.ba7e96217bdffc64dbea46f03c6824f0bfe84b86: That is definitely a word that could be used to describe this situation. Anyway, speaking of the election, I need to inspect the lily pads.
textByHashes.88f37252cb31ba28b9aa294c4f4fd285bacc918f: Of course not, but don't you think it would be wise for a third party just to give them a quick once over? Besides, the two of you deserve a break.
textByHashes.fb4c558e450aecc034a17a214082e6d64664ecb1: Hmm... You said you were hungry? Out of interest, what would you fancy? For when the election is out of the way, of course.
textByHashes.b3d1ec57d220d5964180a787b16d74b20cac5a7d: An orange? I didn't know frogs ate oranges...
textByHashes.20892ada603eedc318c648a744dfd05e581874d6: Where do you get your oranges?
textByHashes.0613d4ea2e223d51920918f272e2fe6c5de23d32: Remind me, where do you get your oranges?
textByHashes.5dd5b33b0b5f8494d07d74e1aafd5ee2745ea53d: A frog that never learnt to swim? Are you serious right now?!
textByHashes.3b8e2abbf496870edfa9922feae812a7874a03cb: I can't believe we killed him...
textByHashes.135a14923b022dfd5dad817eddc7c4a6a805f529: He thinks you've stolen his brain and would like it back.
textByHashes.e3ccdb75cfb16bdd811ee256e9c512c88f690dcf: Well is there anything else you can offer him?
textByHashes.6cf46222e9533a03b1e9ef7cc9dc5dc7cf968970: Well maybe we can still work with that. I'm sure our friend doesn't like flies. Maybe you could deal with the flies around here for him?
textByHashes.bbb4d79b81ec449acb60b387ec6d89254d1fb24f: And how would you like to be paid?
textByHashes.2bb90d6399317f48fbd2a14f5778967150525fec: From the tap? But orange juice doesn't...
textByHashes.c5b8f718e0b397771f023343526aa16559175f3b: Actually, never mind. Let's not complicate things further. I'll take these terms to him and see what he says.
textByHashes.9fde0b55eb2ec97ef76d16c6983613defbd55b28: Yes, the frogs have selected a leader and she has sent me with her terms.
textByHashes.6f086026fbbf67692003d8c803880815a593f746: The frogs will kill the flies around the oasis and in return they'd like you to pay them in oranges.
textByHashes.96ef31c6616fc8d8868e3c0d987cdd5f523398c3: Well don't they spread disease and eat your food?
textByHashes.0ef8d8d7970a5810f94214ee48f155290827ac63: I don't know! You seemed convinced the frogs were out to get you before, maybe the flies are as well!
textByHashes.14ec0d822b17df8b014c4bcafa1193dd548168d5: You know what, sure. The flies want you dead and they plan to do it tonight.
textByHashes.5a1b9edcd7cbcb1d2050f8174855df49904c28df: So are you willing to make this deal with the frogs?
textByHashes.161f0b980e631cc33a92af0362bae5420c87d07f: Maybe my whole life is just one big nightmare. Fine, I'll find this proof.
textByHashes.12cd91ebc2d085f53cb8aec7bb66f8cad839b1a3: He's open to the proposals, but he wants proof that the flies are against him.
textByHashes.8d8bba5a661f1c6e1fd51703639e96896403456c: Oh good, now we're adding theft to today's crimes.
textByHashes.2bc65355b171676a4bee471e93c95f3026796dba: Yes, I have a plushy here of his.
textByHashes.33666443ae54a327a98cc738d5c9d9202cbfcb8d: It's all done, but I do now have a little problem to deal with. I'll be back.
textByHashes.567818df8a4786689e80bf412cb8dea699ca0d31: I think I do. You see that big pile of dung the flies are gathered around? I'm sure I saw something belonging to you in it.
textByHashes.92b9a28d936b4038ffeb34fa3da2d1180d29ceee: I have good news! The terms have been accepted.
textByHashes.db8bb3fe669572f13bac20c205921b3f8b8ebcc2: Oh, and it turns out Cuthbert was still alive after all.
textByHashes.91444da5ff90c3698b25ec25ef3525015609acc2: Er... no. He's now properly dead.
textByHashes.1fd010d56b62a1d75d423b396c827b5a4846c815: Thanks. I only wish I had the ability to scrub the memories of all this from my brain, but as I can't, I guess I now have to carry them forever.
textByHashes.4755387218a16cc3ddfb4947572da339f342b94a: Hello again. How are things going?
textByHashes.207135b32e0e01464df5fbe1caa4e40e9ed1db85: Okay... So when can I start doing missions for the Temple Knights, and get some better Temple Knight armour and weapons and stuff?
textByHashes.f762e6ed954dfdb52b38d459c7e12c75a21676d2: And how long will that take?
textByHashes.61203e13f88c0b11047de934e9f7615b099d6762: Really? Great! Am I to be flung to some far off and exotic land to defeat some evil genius?
textByHashes.b62dd325f67b524c0f979b697ace65e8bafdcfc8: I don't know, you were about to tell me.
textByHashes.25cd17ed9bf810223b4a492fa758945f100ff876: Are you sure? I mean, you're not a little... senile, maybe?
textByHashes.db6702e045da505114207421f5ad9c7ea103dcd1: You know, I'm still not sure this isn't some giant wind up.
textByHashes.0453ce7323a12b70930b661d565eccc93ce69f2f: Hey Tiffy, I lost my CommOrb...
textByHashes.9ea4d4a8ae807077a7b74854ff546e6807c3bb8c: Not yet, sir, but I'm working on it.
textByHashes.0f6a32233eeebefab19ea97ad510f2a121e334c3: Hey, Savant! Good to speak to you again!
textByHashes.aeb80ddb74591bdb24d74583536d37b8d32534b3: Me too. So, do you have anything you can tell me?
textByHashes.8f77539ab708debcf782c8cf0b587788fc788c88: Thanks Savant. I know I can count on you.
textByHashes.43c77d8a5cea26c47007cb77c15c446c9e913362: Excuse me sir, would you be Col. O'Niall?
textByHashes.317b21f5258a9647f0824ee58ee930788f78ca58: , sir. Sir Tiffy Cashien sent me.
textByHashes.a341bc48670dc29b12ce2f1b08f0e06b15ac39ea: Umm... In Falador the geese fly backwards on Tuesdays?
textByHashes.0004212dafafe775ad07961993820df4777f62ed: Uhh. I thought it was a Temple Knight, secret code phrase.
textByHashes.119282e4ad298f1a7b2d1ef17a2390d8ee31d5a8: Whelp? I am a full member of the Temple Knights, sir!
textByHashes.e176ba0debab7674761d3349e88be0c0ef4f4b89: What, like surface to air ballistas, intercontinental exploding fireballs and quasi-futuristic henchman uniforms?
textByHashes.7923b5bd5642e4e2ba33609f4d208b6156473381: The essential tools for world domination?
textByHashes.e1e552a8651adce019e9522e7b385f26d25ffb79: Okay, that sounds suspicious. I'll look into it.
textByHashes.6fce3c999376310b8db886b6a35fd9eade0b3336: Are you sure they're not just getting drunk?
textByHashes.869ca4dec37777afaf99dc5cc1ff245e78cea37b: I noticed it's a bit run down.
textByHashes.79aba9eb2af288becfd4bb6bf6019176b6e3b872: That's very sad. However, you can't stand in the way of progress.
textByHashes.201a45dabec82a8578c3f2646addcc19f8d1319d: Who are the important people in Witchaven?
textByHashes.29752817e2275405e2a5013d2a687d5209139f18: Holgart, oh yes I've spoken to him before.
textByHashes.9d3204c58957dedb4c20e87fafcd1597d0a3987d: Will do Col. O'Niall. Thanks for the advice.
textByHashes.10e7c21f7ab2a7d245ccbd45ab731eec40b00187: Excuse me Col. O'Niall. I need some more information.
textByHashes.b87a2ea5d7e3e111eec4f758a772aef82196c779: Busy as always. Is everything okay?
textByHashes.a1176ea1e07cf3c55e1d2890b91058cd77edf5e6: Oh my, that's terrible! What happened?
textByHashes.d9d0c503b2364c8991c9674c52b418f6fddaa046: I'll do that Holgart. I hope you get your boat back soon.
textByHashes.9a5ab64eaa71956c2b94cfbd9f98e4f6d7995fce: I understand you can take me to the Fishing Platform.
textByHashes.ae1244bdddd67f39540618a1a3fe404c233774e2: You mean the sickly looking lobsters?
textByHashes.fe1498aa530aaa9f525ef6f7a871e66bd27dc15c: They seem fairly peaceful so far.
textByHashes.8a974545e5d5a1b38198563dad273120e74af845: This sounds very serious. Hmm, I'd best get back to the mainland and see where these lobsters are heading.
textByHashes.6d67f4a346b055d4b8d784b1d9bfc909944ff01a: I can see why that would worry you. Do you have any idea why they would not attend?
textByHashes.abe8e4de17a5d6963364b0280c88c4f0373d1f19: Well, that would make sense. Hmm, one more thing.
textByHashes.beb5191a5f2de3943893b3e36bc827334ccde6f4: Tell me again, what's worrying you?
textByHashes.aad3227b4b5eff4b08530934677f053bcb43d518: What can you tell me about the shrine?
textByHashes.5a0c9f46436309cfdd51982c0abaa6d2f7f3c2cb: You must be pleased that the Mayor is renovating the shrine.
textByHashes.5b0e85c689c1a97ac5d1012fb431acd4b4ee1a8e: Tell me about the people of Witchaven.
textByHashes.46a259519c03be10c4e8412fd5012d33d2c96774: Perhaps he thinks the shrine could bring new interest to the village?
textByHashes.f738c5fbff1fafcf87c155090ff62cf3f491fb0a: Good day to you, Brother Maledict.
textByHashes.dac61856f27171f0c897d9fa10dc3549d11981f4: Good day to you. Would you be the Mayor?
textByHashes.89666043caa5de8578f4efc943d3acef6bb47464: Are you alright? You seem a little, hazy.
textByHashes.a823c2a724e2ad961a4ce2909df153fafa9afc4e: Really, what are you working on?
textByHashes.6726a9d9965b90ab48fc6feefcf179abe0432047: Well, um. Yes. Indeed. I'm sure Saradomin would be pleased.
textByHashes.0f9a7f7dc574c111fcda3d3876321dafe5f10f03: Like I said, I'm here to...
textByHashes.60116806170d8592bb5e714f78a4c54a2542d12b: Well, I'm also here to visit a friend, Jake O'Niall.
textByHashes.fb6d358308d1afa6fb57832403c58765290ba5df: Err, how did you know my name?
textByHashes.fba16bd110543409cad4c88cd13eff932eb41d28: What can you tell me about Witchaven?
textByHashes.edc246b299f7318e3ff7cb8b9ac4fe5bc8bbd2b6: Are you talking about the Fishing Platform?
textByHashes.64a97d16e470f1f534de7b0c6bf2f2624d0ac395: I thought it took away all the trade?
textByHashes.773aa7262ea0ae19b7f11817d3f655a99f52c26b: Hmm, and I thought the village hated the Fishing Platform.
textByHashes.0cd7d29d6709d3025562a54a36bbf1f8d115571b: What improvements are you making to the shrine?
textByHashes.888e2c17979767ea1ce6d02190d36ccd71ce42c8: Wow, the whole of Gielinor? I thought it was just some old shrine to Saradomin.
textByHashes.b23297d4c25c60e9f3364914044f20b47337e0bb: Sounds like a very interesting place. I may have to take a look.
textByHashes.dc6de91c304cea1da6b877e7251ba6f1d91770e2: You know, you really are a strange person.
textByHashes.6ef436f1ca0f7cf93c665380af843a6a27abfe07: Do you know you look very ill?
textByHashes.2b05fd05853cd280c610f5db42ec436bf3047276: But you've turned a slightly sickly colour.
textByHashes.78a34050eb8aaf0010b8b795ae660b08bd38491d: I've seen food poisoning. People normally don't look like... that.
textByHashes.17644c26ccfa3644c2fa39539a55f2899153f36c: Well, I hope you get better soon.
textByHashes.69aa2f06af652e13fea424c24c1bdfa93bf76df1: Something is definitely very wrong here.
textByHashes.5af716aa25b6152bb5407b2cb4f4e8b63210e0c0: Mayor Hobb has confiscated Holgart's boat and given it to someone else.
textByHashes.76b95ee5447ba28f4b15f29c12f96525cb4b16b7: As well as this, there's something very... fishy about him.
textByHashes.e6285ede0081061c12f3c5035f3057a78a0a814e: Yes, Brother Maledict is worried that his congregation is being led astray.
textByHashes.9142aea8c20ebb011356b05e60450c4d6823c97a: The shrine to the west of the village has been consecrated to Saradomin for centuries.
textByHashes.3c7b0c50f73848b226e5bb46579a74974bee7f09: However, last time he was there, there was a very definite unpleasant feeling in the air.
textByHashes.93fbfbaa4586001380ea3ece58dd28a3042e2442: I was thinking the same thing. I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.8b55d2b17a0fc065001455dd2c4c2c89e02155a0: I'd better carry my CommOrb so that Savant can see what's in there.
textByHashes.588cb8a208073c5e23a9f34691824a845f06e7bf: Nothing thanks Savant. I was just checking this thing still worked!
textByHashes.85fab6e531fd4b86c210b58a04ecc3e664d56718: Savant needs to see this. I better get my Comm Orb.
textByHashes.1d5b397142f46dd0a2bea59857d59f473d92abe7: Um... So how am I supposed to show him the glyphs?
textByHashes.b234b6a884d152a9d104d34b7202231aeb520eb0: Fantastic - I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.d168ab63f6495dbc7a34a9c89f765f36a677610c: What did you think of those doors? Spooky hey?
textByHashes.2914e0ab994a9d255b35f9921033230df04d52de: They did look really out of place. I wonder who put them there?
textByHashes.db63aec9fad90357d1c317f924794083f57d0c16: I only hope that Jorral can translate them.
textByHashes.43caae4e3b61e23f90458c02f0e0105a273c81d9: I understand that you are something of a historian?
textByHashes.7b72742cde7999b5a4da86abb81641bf31f07f31: Great, I was wondering if you could translate something for me please?
textByHashes.08becbd413e974b5fd35ec2191a8a481e567e359: Hmm, how much are we talking?
textByHashes.7e2eb125313b16b4f4cc3efdad8ec84e98712bc3: That was a bit longer than I was willing to wait. Can't you fit me in anytime sooner?
textByHashes.a837b5faf065c6d3c636dec4afa7cdf3b024811e: I, err, am working for a wizard who is giving me telepathic instructions.
textByHashes.f7f25b82b97d668faefe5b6d005aadae3a3ad261: Apparently, I'm working for Petmel Books and this document is from them.
textByHashes.80d2018bb58919b58e80c4bd35cc12faf18c87a0: Um, I don't appear to have it on me.
textByHashes.aed2130c2ea89da985ecc3ad0aacbe4fa2ac6859: Yes, yes I'm sure it's very interesting but what does it say?
textByHashes.d6cd654750cbb71ca04df2259983e8b3ed419268: Well, thanks for that. You have been a great help.
textByHashes.0f4beb4b9a60b56675ee14ca8de1aa93daa2b005: Now, why doesn't that surprise me?
textByHashes.c5b8aa064c95fd7698267ba6176b6c92689a1f52: Great, that means we can free those poor people who have already fallen.
textByHashes.c3f61aeccdb30ed1245b058e64ccb2925d9d905a: It looks like she's breaking free of that prison.
textByHashes.9a2286e8000cf679793fab3b5b43dfd987a21368: Did your research reveal how she was trapped in the first place?
textByHashes.fe6fa8b88ec1115621d1ccbb5a177cef62ad94fa: Righty ho. I'll get to it. Thanks Savant.
textByHashes.412b80f49dc894c20000ad9e1d6e1d484a6d48e9: So, Savant. Can you tell me about the Mother Mallum again please?
textByHashes.6795987788e1defd44c9224ed20be7ab2b881d2c: Col. O'Niall, this is worse than we thought.
textByHashes.ead7cdf4c47d68b189be2c909d0657268c73f9bd: There is something trapped under the town of Witchaven.
textByHashes.57c4efa2d4fc9ffc96680d078b078a2821fe1952: Something the Temple Knights fought in ages past.
textByHashes.e76341b83b73128e68449398ccf4325d884e72e7: Something ancient and very, very evil.
textByHashes.78af955cff2d994b5166c190a9820c2e61e2be03: It's called the Mother Mallum and may have some connection to the sea slugs.
textByHashes.d782f09989ed935e1bb86d737394b698a9092395: I agree, but what can we do about it?
textByHashes.37a823f9f452e10886b07084e3299c6041ed02f7: Of course! The temple of Saradomin has had a shrine here for centuries. I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.f0f0c2d557a790ecec03f4bf12b92d6f92e48328: Not yet, but I was wondering if I could ask you some more questions?
textByHashes.c0bf14ab23538efa5fb467f01bc83fe81b8270c9: I wanted to ask you something about the Shrine to Saradomin.
textByHashes.ff935d3edd057fe0829927c6a13d4b1a85002aaa: Well I have discovered a hidden passageway leading to a huge pair of double doors.
textByHashes.edb29c427e3e767d6103b3d47c9d9e1c80c0b83b: And I thought you might know something about what is behind them.
textByHashes.bcf68d1a0dbf1c51acd72fc1e015a93d55d85d29: Great! Can I have a look please?
textByHashes.509677efe82786de9a07652255ec7a88164493ac: Again with this no business. Why not?
textByHashes.80fefd94baa3fb3f0421ef424146e74abae90823: Ah, right, sorry. Would you like me to find them for you?
textByHashes.6418616a815ac95bcdd341277001222743d6c69a: Well, I'm not sure. Brother Maledict has asked me to find some pages that were torn out of his holy book.
textByHashes.0996d8f5e9213c2261bdf2b1ae5fdefab5ae1897: Yes, just like that, but I can't seem to find...
textByHashes.4247bcce059a66b192f2f7410fd7104d32b8f413: Where on Gielinor did you get that?
textByHashes.b4e32bf98c99c6b65507c04709e0a88276ad7f18: Strange. Do you mind if I take that?
textByHashes.e840435c02b0edc721ef21b8c5cfcb92113a4ea8: Hang on, I'll just make some room.
textByHashes.f7c0616221e2a979f1327adcff3c22a003dad8f2: You know, you sound just like the mayor?
textByHashes.f565880b56723ee5a3ca5ccd6bfcf6d1b3604d36: You look like him as well?
textByHashes.60cb7c86eab59b68d1bf0481a445945b94aadb5e: No really, what with the unhealthy skin tone and bulging eyes. The resemblance is uncanny.
textByHashes.10227fdeea543e742413acec2521c55bbf889cb7: Anything's possible I suppose. Wait a minute, you mean you've always looked that odd?
textByHashes.896723a49a51933ff7025dc8bf7196696afe0f3d: You are a bit too strange for me. Bye.
textByHashes.2bd836ffa4b30e97b93980f6e3fe0ed4f32a36fe: Jake, I hope you can help me out here.
textByHashes.a9db4a4fc2ca1a951621ab407fd9d811d651b2e3: Well I... Hang on a moment, you're looking a bit sickly.
textByHashes.88da77a78ce29c561abd21035e941d1ee5d632aa: Oh no. They got to you too, didn't they?
textByHashes.5fdd3e8a7301e063c403ac3710b3da808b908a4b: Well, I don't know, but how can I trust you?
textByHashes.fad55d5c81fa542326dc5ab7577ec5658912d256: I'm not so sure that this is a good idea, but yes, I'll take it.
textByHashes.30f55bc82d2cf578434a927853164de8f3f45ead: Great, another complication I didn't need. I wonder if swamp paste will do the trick?
textByHashes.6615dce1f3f4b4685968b066ce5e539cf7deda63: What? I'm only trying to glue these pages back together.
textByHashes.0529e8766717e718e7a01591329ab1b4030bd2bc: So, how do I stick the pages back together?
textByHashes.246bfb2d9d4f3ce0e3e37859acb7f1db5ebb73c0: No problem Savant. I'll snap to it right away.
textByHashes.508dab764e8043ea9569dafcab49afd79f54023c: N-No problem. It was just a surprise that's all.
textByHashes.804f9cc561c848d42f9b0f3c15638340233bcbd7: Well, I have something that could help you out.
textByHashes.e5d3c463b49c4b4c7c2967fc9ff7d8244c395fa9: Well, I have a page that should give me the instructions on how to eliminate what could be the source of the sea slugs.
textByHashes.a766368624241e2e2e456732a4b4881d15ab9320: It's been torn up into three pieces.
textByHashes.732a617c99e34437dfaac93d653bcea3d6c3acc4: I have it on good authority that you may be able to help me out by rendering a dead sea slug down for glue.
textByHashes.82519939d31d8a072c1773d6ea8f144648749836: Wow! That was good timing wasn't it.
textByHashes.424c1cf344e91c32ab954b156cb6b5a740b439dd: Ah. Um. No, not at the moment.
textByHashes.273da5ea1f21505c4423182ca4b211f8fe9280e9: Thanks very much. I'll get right to work on the parchment.
textByHashes.aef44e5b61af68382204039e7dd7e9b7c60137c9: Um Colonel, I lost my CommOrb...
textByHashes.206ad8996e8b062e928006f80663bfc2ae65f0e1: Ahh, the penny drops. You got me to do your dirty work for you.
textByHashes.d81e29e0ced6e09e7a49ff7e94fb063419d6acd1: And what are they? What are your plans?
textByHashes.3a85f6cbeec8ace1c7bd989b7892f24c842dad68: So this is the Mother Mallum?
textByHashes.1779affa8b4f4f858a000b75fed0a9f8eefba1b3: Yes. I have destroyed one of the great evils infesting this world.
textByHashes.7e1926c2691d7317d4826f690e4525b29b8efdba: Never! I'll never serve you. I shall fight until my last breath before giving in.
textByHashes.0c52cb18ae2c7b990ea692e36eedc85a657fe973: Savant! Help me, please, for the love of Saradomin!
textByHashes.93ddb94076b25477de1795da80980e07003b83c1: Savant, now would be a good time!
textByHashes.030530f1602a0f6e1bfda7192be80f84c9238e3d: Phew! Yes, Savant. That was too close for comfort.
textByHashes.6e9b54f0ceaffe7604c0aeaf66b00ff7ee9d005e: Indeed. I'll just get my breath back first.
textByHashes.a666ec0645221d32a41d755111a605ecd277e5e9: Sir Tiffy, it's all gone horribly wrong!
textByHashes.8dee1339d239a1718e6c7a09386c8bf9f58ecd91: The town of Witchaven has been overrun by mind controlling sea slugs!
textByHashes.85ad2852a66f54577335bd2ff223498e3fee54fa: Well, the Mayor of the town was first, then brother Maledict, and finally Colonel O'Niall.
textByHashes.c229eb5b422d6dcb2acf49f6ea323c306c7e8fd0: Well, they tricked me into opening the prison that kept their Queen imprisoned.
textByHashes.18ace239b5254c6948b8461c3c525903363ee069: Well, it isn't all bad. I did manage to kill the Prince.
textByHashes.d031a227acaae77981bd2ead1a5d181844a13e21: That cannot be allowed to happen! What can we do about it?
textByHashes.b3ead8cc25dc0f20b32c51b1452399a734ee49b7: If you think I'm ready for it, Sir Tiffy.
textByHashes.b9b98223c62c32881785e39f7b00a0f1c3f93cf2: Yes sir, I'll keep my eyes open for any signs of sea slug infiltration.
textByHashes.faac0f33f4706f64c4b5d76ebb78ea2163f3d63c: Right, no problem. Well, I'll see you soon.
textByHashes.283670a3d32b61974b2b7b901dcb4828d005b973: When did she go into the desert?
textByHashes.591fbf112a486a2153ebd12e822a75cff6dcdb29: Do you have any ideas on where she may have gone?
textByHashes.d8a221c9471b4e499ca0ca37f0e66b7103b8d656: Oh... Well I hope you find her.
textByHashes.0a5dff68287662d8d7eda05c95f9a4255e9cbe3f: Cheer up, it might never happen.
textByHashes.d3d072b9f477474cc7ee9206249a06a7e28610ac: Do you know where Ana went?
textByHashes.7d131ea12f45d9dbf481646d8ecadb921d73491e: Is there anywhere around here that she would go?
textByHashes.b4cd2fa8e3b947d89104ca90c87073bb02b58ae2: Where do you think I should start my search?
textByHashes.8847522c9bbf776ce9c88a120e5fbb20f0b7b18c: Perhaps five gold coins will make it my business?
textByHashes.229f826379a05484ee2d3bf929050eb4e59a2f90: So you could almost say that they got their ... 'Just Desserts'
textByHashes.78ef5f56f990c4f0108bd1ba2c87310b88aa8993: When they talk about 'the silence of the desert', this must be what they mean.
textByHashes.cca0b761ea65511681759f072897df9a55242555: Can I take a look around the place?
textByHashes.b0fd5f9e7191a7ee5356a1ada0a15a415c49efff: Where would I find this Al Zaba Bhasim?
textByHashes.d338e17fde81f7e48af3cdee42abf07e7ad32f1b: Is Al Zaba Bhasim very tough?
textByHashes.bff1e2a3e4eaf5aec70a53e55ff1fea92ba5a9f6: Does the Captain order you to kill a lot of people?
textByHashes.945d479659f5f057e5db56a0a8bb2d38df483b12: Not to mention the senseless waste of human life.
textByHashes.d479007ae905b5c7c83c2b6a84515fc73ccba819: It doesn't sound as if you respect your Captain much.
textByHashes.b250ddbe7b56004522448245fbf68c195de84578: And how could I trick him into a one-on-one duel?
textByHashes.e1b1a5bd117b81fbf6dedb8605743441f5c96e13: Can I have a bet on that?
textByHashes.f09efc9083319e9de4441268d78f3b5403b623b1: I'll bet 5 gold that I win.
textByHashes.e0b193c0fbea7767eb438648c49d88119528bc27: I'll bet 10 gold that I win.
textByHashes.066f249429a38da7e530496f0fbe9adac45eaadf: I'll bet 15 gold that I win.
textByHashes.2f788aa114abf18b8bbc6e3b01bb308e6d669c89: I'll bet 20 gold that I win.
textByHashes.ca60ab17282160091f805e605c7b04e10f616923: Perhaps five gold coins will sweeten your mood?
textByHashes.34157698a968d0002dcb755c24f02d5a7d9ed06d: I'm looking for a woman called Ana, have you seen her?
textByHashes.3b1334fc110cdf2e6fe2679e70d4748610a91e79: Perhaps five gold coins will help you remember?
textByHashes.bd7647db546ff41cf60c98f964c1e19447b6c999: That's rude, I ought to teach you some manners.
textByHashes.36e85a32ca6c6e1702349613c80f5102404e3ca1: With my right fist and a good deal of force.
textByHashes.9b40c7f01785a8ace4191469c3a1d9daa94dafb0: Err, sorry. I thought I was talking to someone else.
textByHashes.fdba136f78eeffc76fa0f697d4c20b6782518d75: I'd love to work for a tough guy like you!
textByHashes.1932d3c7b2b5d10584082be2f41cd03dd0a74a7f: Can't I do something for a strong Captain like you?
textByHashes.868e7a236b1c76ae61bbdf1762f93f55d7f8ec0d: Sorry Sir, I don't think I can do that.
textByHashes.835a4095e5d4818eda98ab43f3c9c7b4bde1671a: It's a funny captain who can't fight his own battles!
textByHashes.d73746477090706016afb05aa5c9bc5413369891: Okay, I'll be moving along then.
textByHashes.5037386129c2a1afd4b974136ff0878152aa44f1: Do you have sand in your ears? I said. 'What are you guarding?'
textByHashes.8c37fb22004b3f76636e235e460e35e17dd0269b: I am looking for Al Zaba Bhasim.
textByHashes.abdccb0d5493cdf186186572bb5da86b3c0d3e0f: I've some information for you about Al Zaba Bhasim
textByHashes.b18568ecf8983f2a3a55c6339536bdeb936814bb: Al Zaba Bhasim is a figment of your diseased imagination. Go look for him yourself and waste your own time if you think he still exists.
textByHashes.a961ea3641ec0348fe7643603b6b0310c165adda: Hey, I've come to collect my bet!
textByHashes.d649214a8fbeddbe22cb3ad0a942fe389a9bda94: What are those big wooden doors in the corner of the compound?
textByHashes.5d3d9fd8277d965c8390b7930509f9cbadf14ef2: I can try to undo them for you.
textByHashes.07b69d2a59e1364a45b980305c65252bb00655f8: It's funny you should say that actually.
textByHashes.1e0bc271af3318386e44f5765cdb01dc5bd6c994: If I can get the chains off, you have to give me something, okay?
textByHashes.e1b032dc5e7f7d2c08abb253061794693d976115: I can dress like a slave and gain access to the mine area to scout it out.
textByHashes.70b4da64b99b8fb9913d7da9c35f0b02cb1324de: Still, 'worse things happen at sea right?'
textByHashes.ec4ac90d5492e200757ca9f9b156982b3f65e29e: Well I suppose I'd better be getting on my way now...
textByHashes.49a7903bb268c8d6afc7a29bf305620e431544b9: The guards allow me to clean my clothes.
textByHashes.5fb2088a13a4ddf94aa2dc555605c716e57edf5a: Yeah, okay, let's give it a go.
textByHashes.9ecff6584fe7e1069bdc6024fda407319d8ca272: I just want to try something else.
textByHashes.c66a9dbc508dfde68086a7e5be9fae33ce6ee920: Yeah, good luck to you too!
textByHashes.8279749b3bbd03e75cad9e678ae0eb2f3e2390be: I need to do some other things first.
textByHashes.06dc8fe8ed80032ecd5962b51c41aeed49ff0f54: I'd like to mine in a different area.
textByHashes.3d6017fa8b5fa0713a3f045de27b7279126bc9d7: Huh, fat chance of a rest for me.
textByHashes.6c0eebd7223b6ec8eba4e1292b3e311e0cf8481d: Yes sir, you're quite right sir.
textByHashes.447741c89d070687d2c398f95d4a57d25e7cbc78: How am I going to get some pineapples around here?
textByHashes.c9213261896f2359c56f165e740dd238d4cd2a6f: Yes sir, we understand each other perfectly.
textByHashes.e1aab78debfd89b89c9fad12d686b28f553137f0: Do you know where I could get a tenti pineapple?
textByHashes.6aecab75656b3ceebac4a078f9b8fd1abb60b186: I am looking for a pineapple.
textByHashes.0a5f54f3f5613500ebf99135641e8848d89cd71b: I wanted to have a chat?
textByHashes.b41e08b469bb70e489665de72863e591ee0f93f5: But I just need two minutes of your time?
textByHashes.a90d009d06912de27802f6353f734f40a4146c18: Oh my, a dragon just flew straight past your window!
textByHashes.d836622eda8b58337a1c7a928eae92699209f465: You seem to have a lot of books!
textByHashes.828f54fdf6ab7baba78a5dba96870663b466bc5c: How long have you been interested in books?
textByHashes.985769d5771fa23b4833d94c990ee5bc3c34a43a: I could get you some books!
textByHashes.d84730ffae24385258b0a6bf7c7988d14cfd8e44: I could tell by the cut of your jib.
textByHashes.b700068ae9ab37797cea14b17ac078104d885846: Not much sailing to be done around here though?
textByHashes.4665b4677518e371b8f663f5e8934cfdbec9c78c: What's it got to do with you?
textByHashes.2b1ec63021e5cb001622b6ef25965ba917812f2e: I'm here to take your plans, hand them over now or I'll kill you!
textByHashes.b957d3a6a074963b0b5ab677cf51f2c07a768786: The guard downstairs said you were lonely.
textByHashes.44da5223e7ad6c9e2b6fdad1741c83fef94be8f4: I need to service your chest.
textByHashes.8b4b7a288801eed61971c3b0d07970a7caa949a4: I need to service your chest?
textByHashes.b7b14070008fae390a89eec1c8d3e7ce4f50d2ad: All the slaves have broken free!
textByHashes.396a6cd6b3b6dd66cc8f15e998b4c41f384d35d5: It's down in the lower mines, sound the alarm!
textByHashes.92fddcded9aaa3d13a3e7fb09a882af37f3eb6b5: I don't know where the alarm is.
textByHashes.6269a5e205836af42f1af6ccd9e351938daf3b70: I was so concerned for your safety that I rushed to save you.
textByHashes.df80453475387a76272abc71f75daa36bd94542a: Er, no, one of the slaves told me.
textByHashes.cc4719798dddde77dd03db8800b5c49df875f39d: Oh yes, you're right, they must have put it out!
textByHashes.1fadf17aa8cf99ca6be06f8a7e22b4f7cd43983f: Al Shabim said I could enter, here are the plans!
textByHashes.3056d81e8a1346af9c7c9a434d6b5c6589e0269e: Hey... I have something for you!
textByHashes.07ba7402e71600a6a8a08516f178651b2502fa69: So, can I go through now please?
textByHashes.ec5bc005c1d49e06492f086f11d3cf51dff6fab2: You must be joking! The last one I gave you cost me double shifts working copper ore! You should be grateful you got one at all.
textByHashes.4e69bd680fa823b0a4ea89e56387d0b11ff74c69: Nothing thanks - sorry for disturbing you.
textByHashes.86940f45ba62f2f04075fd6185ceb85e4f9acfa3: Okay, I have all your rocks here, let me out now. -- The guard unlocks the gate. --
textByHashes.0cc1ae0ebd76ce07ca5abdd0b38b74cfb085ff0a: Do you get into trouble with guards often?
textByHashes.79fe2dfb6b60c3df50ea2652af312a77c3658fef: Do you enjoy it down here?
textByHashes.51797a4c8a1901f4c3e5c6141827b94b36ff73e4: Do you have any ideas about how we can get out of here?
textByHashes.3d58c326b7366de320e9373d4ba2fa8a69145482: I want to try and get you out of here!
textByHashes.bae16c971eb014f8c880bc5ce67e001d3adb2aad: We could try to sneak out.
textByHashes.4d51d9907519dfbcabcdc0dcc7d62246db98b062: I managed to sneak past the guards.
textByHashes.a36302bb746a286eded8c865a338c2fee421517d: Huh, these guards are rubbish, it was easy to sneak past them!
textByHashes.a7b6f812a60545d6a62e897ff2055f3dc1772ae8: Okay, I'll check around for another way to try and get out.
textByHashes.3ff7d382610137c90aa64fddd792ec94f76d20b1: How does the rock get out?
textByHashes.d43f639bd55921a11d4dbc721d053e8879179891: Maybe? I'll come back to you when I have a plan.
textByHashes.9725d52da1f1a5cc9ebfa0e2dc56ba0a82559c84: Where would I get one of those barrels from?
textByHashes.d4058a78a3a6a71022edca90a05855632d97cafd: Well, we'll see, it might be the only way.
textByHashes.26ab497e1bb059834003cce68c758c190d8c6f12: I could try to sneak you out if you were in a barrel!
textByHashes.8effbfae5f298be8aef43d306f114aa2b2321bef: What kind of surprise did you get?
textByHashes.a4732272d7b7dd3e55d940c4380a6be0a4d6cf70: Do you want to go back to Al Kharid?
textByHashes.09be24dab7f65ee5177406eab7faed4b1f6e33db: Not yet, sorry, what's your name again?
textByHashes.d4c53e7c89600b91114d0c7785a059b2996da00a: Well, I'm working on it, have you got any suggestions?
textByHashes.9e7ce110ebbb9e00c71af89fa73e6ebd3965058c: Not yet, have you been in any more trouble with the guards?
textByHashes.d69ed2b4efd7a100836e47c5ee00ef4ec53525b9: Shush... It's for your own good!
textByHashes.8a890125ee98c92d353c49086260f48e2033815d: I said you were very gregarious!
textByHashes.a0ca8a32becbc3bacf3e27bed26800a435f1253c: I wonder if you could help me?
textByHashes.4a54dd6641d4415273a7a94b76b96eb001617aa4: Can you get me the heck out of here please?
textByHashes.19d906ff8b9c68c4cc2f322feed4cef93a3ead5d: One wagon wheel says to the other, 'I'll see you around'.
textByHashes.de30d3f26cf8aa657086c38e55173f2dd58a4d2e: Oh, I'm not supposed to be here at all actually.
textByHashes.9815348c2c674e165cdde93ad61c9b378e9af2ea: I'm in for murder, so you'd better get me out of here!
textByHashes.aba140ec391a87033e7a6f00d5bbd6df1f7ecd83: In for a penny in for a pound.
textByHashes.5c8a41607a987521409283812cdbbb26c1254ff9: Can you smuggle me out on your cart?
textByHashes.5f077b2f6c4cbc7560d36becab1d248b4b28dd92: Can you smuggle my friend out on your cart?
textByHashes.027f3f75dcae165035b1dac02e28d9c58600c4d5: Well, you see, it's like this...
textByHashes.24da52cd77fc3ad16f01e98bd0c1bfecce9e36e4: Prison riot in ten minutes, get your cart out of here!
textByHashes.66f26f43f399e086427507631c0d3c403ec6c4f9: You can't leave me here, I'll get killed!
textByHashes.dc200119c009ee96eea5c2cc3de25ff6599f82be: There's ten gold in it for you if you leave now no questions asked.
textByHashes.907bee10a5750e11159102773c5c00db4680a9ff: Can I help you at all?
textByHashes.b592a05f94c821f0ddd3c02b5e3d138e69df423b: I could help, I know a lot about carts.
textByHashes.9b92f4fe380cd874c96d140fd267a4bb87a7f2ba: I should find Ana before attempting to escape again. She must have been caught by the guards.
textByHashes.06546815f502c54ef21bb1b8b854993815a63903: My name is , will you not let me through?
textByHashes.0f63cb070503a05276a16c8522b64bf5c29532e7: I am a member of the Heroes' Guild; does that not show my worth?
textByHashes.bf4c8a6f3699598d5e99d4398b83bfb9ebe9979e: I am known in these lands as , Your Majesty. I come in search of a quest.
textByHashes.0ba85ae50e16cade6790f38834cede739f8462a4: If I may be so bold, Your Majesty, I think Miscellania would rest in capable hands with me.
textByHashes.1dd96fc1a1e21bce9d3c8ffb68d63d54974193de: Then do not stray far, Your Majesty, for I shall soon return.
textByHashes.49503ac0c4c2045cb249f1b2cafcd09427f20066: I would like to choose Prince Brand.
textByHashes.8fee04e988c2dfc8ebaa6c2aa47f5c623d468822: And you say this is a mere formality, Your Majesty?
textByHashes.638a7ff32f86ea95d4310f467533094bb13532a4: I would like to choose Princess Astrid.
textByHashes.1babea61265a4b801149b1393a66120086999247: I'm afraid I must decline, Your Majesty. The call of adventure is too strong for me to accept a sedentary life.
textByHashes.a1999fd88add9b6c8662ef1398f53e9d3096afdd: I want to earn Prince Brand's approval instead.
textByHashes.69b4e90d5c6afc522f2480d07828ec77208e665a: I want to earn Princess Astrid's approval instead.
textByHashes.1d892202d8989a4620029cb5cb830b9b47200ada: How do I make peace with Etceteria?
textByHashes.af532eb21c85f99fd53be5e14fab86e17375bd2f: How am I supposed to gain the trust of the Prince?
textByHashes.d7fce7523473dd7ae45e0734f42c0383ab089ae1: How am I supposed to gain the trust of the Princess?
textByHashes.ac655aadfdd56b8fef620d696ef5bc1e100b2c64: Is there anything else you can tell me?
textByHashes.363426e7287b44222696757e193974e3b9a5ad55: What can you tell me about the King?
textByHashes.edd438155635d349b1676184f225071522d8a091: What can you tell me about the Prince?
textByHashes.2ead3c1b53a11a423baff545296ffd5d070486c7: What can you tell me about the Princess?
textByHashes.8600dcf4d9fe4660da48e1cab8655eb6467cf970: What can you tell me about Queen Sigrid?
textByHashes.60b1537d67f43e87a52ca186ab3772a3e81d275d: As I'm sure you are aware, your father the King is seeking someone to rule the Kingdom in his stead. I have put myself forward, but in order for me to become ruler...
textByHashes.130d3d1177b5c7a13cca134d87d29c4da3cac559: I think you may find I know good poetry when I see it, Your Royal Highness...
textByHashes.274c4ded1e909d79ba8979bed83da8086d1a645a: I am surprised you do not have hordes of admirers vying to be your significant other, Your Highness.
textByHashes.03eb26ae92c1c5c76794b03430912cc91e7b0b86: They don't understand your poetry as I do.
textByHashes.99e1dec7cd8500101fb17ba469e717d193ca4a0f: So, you practice the harp? I see you have one over there.
textByHashes.2914d20cb1dc4f0dda14ad09203b4bb337eb53de: You should listen to your father.
textByHashes.82ed203b6db7b824d11d4d313c5f0aa71e2fd966: You will be the greatest bard!
textByHashes.5da5787db2b8b8b66684fa88925002f276692ca6: Beards? Dangerous, flammable and make you look mad!
textByHashes.49ecb8a93369fc8be015f9160049e89edb6b550b: Care to sign my petition for pet frogs?
textByHashes.dcb36d712e2f89b8dff5fab2395012856598872e: Cattle prod? Weapon of choice I reckon.
textByHashes.21f904674322c3c5e75a5b4b46a88f9ba600fdba: Don't threaten me with a dead fish!
textByHashes.3b07cda32a2d5e10df338f1e2793cd44a26d8635: He is clearly 1 cup short of a full service.
textByHashes.3d596a7b0c190a4f8f88fe6180436863b5091d71: I'm a little teapot, short and stout...
textByHashes.015190790e7467eb9a91da3d6f60bcd120441fb7: Look over there! A King Black Dragon!
textByHashes.d7ff74408f0207de864b9805394144c22e0edb5d: Lumbridge? No, I wouldn't be seen dead there.
textByHashes.894411b5bac9b9b6435463357460cc0125a5f4f6: Nah, that Kalphite was weedier than your garden.
textByHashes.a6e29396227bc309d110a8f19494c0fc0f4fefea: What level do you need to cook cats?
textByHashes.fc8dacb9c2cc57fa09425122954c73e8d8825516: No, I was just showing you.
textByHashes.b7a691c98e0a76d82b2b8bd731d37b966cfa9790: I'm flattered to hear you say so, Your Royal Highness.
textByHashes.081dcbe5f9b53402c5a2b5a6391f2a0ac6517593: So, why did you decide to become a bard?
textByHashes.9620a8fbe6234f79bc5a10a4d0fd89f3653e2fde: Wait, are you the moth or the mage?
textByHashes.eff8a885cde9cfa6c9e1cf87a5d013cc19d4a7a0: I don't know if I have time for a whole saga...
textByHashes.719b26f0d9dc1a24fdc468d784a460436682ad00: I think my ears are bleeding.
textByHashes.9cf14099865c173e6755ba313cfc236b8aade4a2: What would you do if you became ruler of Miscellania?
textByHashes.31ff934e46430db3ec3cd8ce58e8ff824f4ce5e6: A much nobler pursuit, to be sure.
textByHashes.d4b7c4063de3d1d094b07037eeeb990919c8d4ca: If only you were any good at them...
textByHashes.d1ce2bdf93249c7e3d33908d6a0d21da20eff1c4: Could it be, my Prince, that you would consider trusting a crass adventurer such as myself to run your kingdom?
textByHashes.7c53fd0a1b30aa11c7e00c40852290d211289f5f: I wouldn't presume to have the skill...
textByHashes.705dcb35e933941ff5a9972901deece05c60d6ee: Not really, but it can't be that hard.
textByHashes.16f80953de016af651f848bc6b49b5706f1e8fed: There once was a man from Varrock...
textByHashes.4808feb89055d5c52f84cbbe72c8f15d6140612d: What do you think of your sister?
textByHashes.c57c5b366ef6238b77dcc83aa1efe6d21ec230cd: Yes, a gift fit for my prince!
textByHashes.2cdc30634115515d08b30ca3edb73188f8e4fa95: Prince Brand, will you marry me?
textByHashes.8cb2a936c6f715c58897fa05b6b2e5d069cf7b46: No, my dear, I was just showing you.
textByHashes.a83306aae74eee9f22d7c01ab7cf8d418a820f58: I'm having second thoughts about the wedding. This marriage would change things, with an increase in responsibilities and duties you were keen to avoid.
textByHashes.1d140622fb8ecc4c0d5d693aefc2e6827473175f: While I want to support the kingdom, I don't want that to end up impacting your life negatively. Maybe it's too soon to make this kind of decision.
textByHashes.44ba6ff630a80d25a7d14a4ed9e731f659cfb8b4: Yes, I think it's for the best.
textByHashes.69bc93c0f455e58939e66cc61b49dda087035ff6: Maybe not. It is hard, for I am so very fond of you. Let's leave it as it is for now and see what the future holds.
textByHashes.c49eb6f414d214960ad300d1e0ee4f1758076bbb: I take it you are not especially inspired by any of them?
textByHashes.f09705dbe34d3623f11816b21fe0bcfbfc47515f: So, you practice archery? I see you have a bow mounted on your wall.
textByHashes.a069ea31863d0b09d40f842bc838a77a951527b5: So, tell me about all these other admirers you have.
textByHashes.db0482567b26c25a863d48c2cd89140a6df5c137: I don't know why they bother...
textByHashes.958cab93ee3c43c11db6be080a6d835c3ef64c57: I can hold them still for you if you like.
textByHashes.10fa0e1cee1ec726fd8fb935eff34aef9af9e1f8: I have confidence in your skills, Your Royal Highness.
textByHashes.e15d4a6e153afe8b7a5d3d5e3b2b65d03431e670: What do you think of Advisor Ghrim?
textByHashes.29a9fdb517551633494827a19685d806120a9547: I think he's far too grumpy.
textByHashes.5e22a3dd3db5ca555a7293ca6b7a5c65b46843b7: No wonder you turned out like this...
textByHashes.1fdbe5558777d7b706017d1c48b192e008c4054a: If I may call you Astrid, Your Royal Highness.
textByHashes.512341bfb7a1905d3442e4989e5eea89c496f0cc: What would you do if you ruled this Kingdom?
textByHashes.89751ef0527a575b2cfbeca56a67e278d6dc4496: That sounds like a good idea.
textByHashes.6cefa8b42a47238c6d9ec8b80d0a89f1991c53a9: What a silly idea! As if anyone would be interested!
textByHashes.d55abc7ab71daf700baabceff6ab50456c18861b: So what's the history of these islands?
textByHashes.7cf5ffaa5398864f5718ab6e5d70a7c9ed24bf45: So why are you so interested in archery?
textByHashes.ea588b292b06d8e45611e06dd975c767465f44bf: I'm quite fond of it myself.
textByHashes.fe9fe968d39ca750e109d35bf644f698c4ad808a: My, could it be that I have succeeded where so many before me have failed, and finally earned the trust of the Princess?
textByHashes.639af74f5c50212a30f5bf317ac05fcbff0be15c: What do you think of your brother?
textByHashes.3dcd5e323e33886f5bc07265a0e3a8118a61861b: And what a great bard he makes!
textByHashes.66c9b367760ad139f6400e298e0c27a1ab70545b: Do you go out into battle often?
textByHashes.f7a3d288c401d0ea777060629d3cab5f725b179a: And you call yourself an archer?
textByHashes.1d966b613cfb298cdb67b2c50b28a671214bc278: Hunting the mighty rabbits outside the castle? Slaying the foul fowl that terrorises the town?
textByHashes.c2e846c165727c987ab4bc138e99a2fcd377aecc: I suppose you don't have much opportunity to.
textByHashes.e80d745a109004a3e3791ff9e2a03432dcaca7e9: Yes, a gift fit for my Princess!
textByHashes.e69464b778ee1db91b5dfb426818396d7c47923b: Princess Astrid, will you marry me?
textByHashes.63c2c1b16c64729b6f6faeef3d396dc0c6f74e89: No, my darling, I was just showing you.
textByHashes.fc10f32dead3b9a8c16346128e787441340ffc46: I'm having second thoughts about the wedding. This marriage would change things, with an increase in responsibilities and duties that would overshadow the activities you like.
textByHashes.fa4dacec5e1c7078087d93fe66d8a5e0d5702fb3: While I want to support you and the kingdom, I don't want that to end up impacting your life negatively. Maybe it's too soon to make this kind of decision.
textByHashes.293473ed495ae1d9ac0a1030e3f4d8fe5df8ba84: Maybe not. It it hard, for I am so very fond of you. Let's leave it as it is for now and see what the future holds.
textByHashes.a713c2e408f18e0c63d394b9d406f98ecf7c26e8: I think Princess Astrid would make the best heir.
textByHashes.98e5d5638ef85981a47be568a452f574e5595dae: I think Prince Brand would make the best heir.
textByHashes.6f210f91b26de851df88f8144858af5602c04d8d: I have been sent by King Vargas to negotiate a treaty of peace between your two great nations.
textByHashes.0d5d2822c1b2e6c3396a422bf4d2322af627bb80: I shall go ask him to officially recognise Etceteria.
textByHashes.4e0392f633dcd5134cf5f29fd6972a16984552e2: I have, Your Majesty. She says she will agree to peace as long as Miscellania recognises Etceteria as a sovereign nation.
textByHashes.6050611b9f8c0b9aac6ecdd4e9b1bb5eb3a3f2d6: I'm sure I can convince her there are better anthems.
textByHashes.96fc5a4b6576787887e2827366473252d630bfac: I have, Your Majesty. He says he will recognise the country when you change your anthem.
textByHashes.62afab817aa293a69a9e86e1ff8d80a37c602f4e: I'm afraid he insisted, Your Majesty.
textByHashes.aa9f8b7cdc1d81d236d2dcbcfc0fa2cd51235532: I'll see what I can do, Your Majesty.
textByHashes.1af1a9d07eb4d700b16a3741a8e8a1161b6989bc: I need someone to compose a new anthem for Etceteria.
textByHashes.2f94daa64e3d074e3d2fd64f9bcda146f69adeaf: You can take your time, really...
textByHashes.0697057cd5b3c8988f59e91cd9949a9308df194b: I lost my copy of the [clear throat] theme you composed...
textByHashes.9f4f82c54c3497277a1be107b8f38d6db211fb3d: Yes, Your Majesty, but I'm afraid it isn't very good.
textByHashes.09ef1b0efe99403f8c417118d3661d058f61946d: I got Prince Brand to compose a new Etceterian anthem for me, but it's awful!
textByHashes.76974beff127a98933d9602495e93e87f505fe7a: I lost the corrected anthem you gave me.
textByHashes.820d355a4b5b55a08ad75c2e1f1c6fbbece0da47: I'm afraid I don't have one.
textByHashes.c0d79f3d6f843bd69b6cd6d12781c327554cddbd: I'm afraid I lost it, Your Majesty.
textByHashes.70ebcdb990e7a405eb5c4f63d8c7d71b160441c2: I have here a treaty awaiting your signature.
textByHashes.998c182f8517313052e7ed7638e6e62561f3b95b: I have a slightly strange request...
textByHashes.cf3f8d9e2981ceb729378add2ab4d020e9c0bd2a: The King needs to sign a treaty, but is unable to because he lacks a pen large enough for him to hold. Could you make me a nib of the right size?
textByHashes.c5d356022a84da6a4121bf1edada682dcb97297d: About the size of a helm should do it.
textByHashes.bb31e4a8621200506c478bedec7c651b1fbc3a35: I don't have one with me.
textByHashes.64304083ca591e7d10646d705682b6b4960b7fad: How do I gain the support of the population?
textByHashes.b924d60b730ae7930bc923ccfaef9afb864cf326: Have you found a priest for our marriage yet?
textByHashes.682a922c06835630282f9fc91d3dffb7d1e74c7b: How do I manage the kingdom?
textByHashes.6bc85260c0cac008a96ea1be8c4fc067cbd431fd: Hi. Interesting building you have here.
textByHashes.ba2428487db0dba00033186587a249edfa143c48: I see some builders over there. So I assume it's not yet finished.
textByHashes.1f24d70801cb8429116019af67091a4acf07bb86: They don't seem to be building much.
textByHashes.61d3a46057f5b3f3440aaf78fe06dc7614b6a627: Calm down. I'm not making any promises.
textByHashes.632da77efe78280d73fa663756d7c73718ca7969: Nice to meet you Effigy, I'm . Hold on and I'll see what I can do!
textByHashes.727c1647128a63bcaa4f013893e3da4139915319: Ah, yes, it's now a small museum. Jorral's looking after it. He's really making history with that place.
textByHashes.ace238cb4ce54a381f291a263df8ce3a156ffb80: Ah, yes. Shame. Got to go. Bye.
textByHashes.e146155b97f341b12abb238c8a500522f9cafbc7: Best I go sort out this tower. Bye.
textByHashes.9153e852252b86419eadad6d9139f606126b98b1: Sorry, feeling a bit ill today.
textByHashes.2d6cabebd77695063c90156b727e51c903f92bb5: I'm not sure about that, but I'll take a look and see what I can do.
textByHashes.bcf0b27d2847721bd45611f09dc7cb973abc4952: Hi there. What is this place?
textByHashes.e60e5e92ae037e57bd34c03082ec44d32776e819: Well, I think it's a positive step in my career as a courageous adventurer.
textByHashes.67046959ac62953018d3661ea823585d9a6d0307: I bet they love you for that.
textByHashes.f888d23fd8d9910a397d4e59b975e8503d620a94: Hi. Sorry, but why do they call you 'Currency'?
textByHashes.91bb2b963fc3d70eb5fd1b157073d92a2043e46d: You must be pretty rich then.
textByHashes.17aa49585c53ec9c2f398167fe04bf801ae18aa7: I'll bet! It pleases you, then, to know that I have just become a builder and have been granted permission to go mess around inside.
textByHashes.f83412e96ea1ea0a33469815c10f40413f05cb65: Are you Bonafido by any chance?
textByHashes.be0a4ddff763ff5b77817bec4b4b1625afc80955: Well, I've just spoken to Effigy about this tower. He tells me he hired you to work but you're on strike. Something about an extended tea break?
textByHashes.18a9d4acd01326dd09005bc2da665652ad1cd643: Well, he wanted me to do something about it.
textByHashes.3de5f4ecaf3cf85ce22e66c947f983ff04d74b2d: Is there no way I can convince you to continue?
textByHashes.102645203645110992ecad2d58c0eb45f46d0057: Well, can I at least have a look inside the tower?
textByHashes.b190e278ece21961f95a99ea09637b355cbfb941: I take offence at that! Give me a chance; you may be surprised.
textByHashes.d94208f2344372be2e1e5f2dfa53748665772fae: I was just wondering if you might be able to help me out with one?
textByHashes.f3eb42ab3f6a17b3bfe51376b0e421c6ee7ad2d9: Wait a minute! Is there blood on this helmet?
textByHashes.d718ba484e6a1d5e7a2131a2c545bb670fe98a37: Hi, I'm looking to get some kit to look like one of you guys.
textByHashes.110b8f4a19ce0a84aa52fdbb42e591059fd7a988: Anything you might be able to help me out with?
textByHashes.ee01038c049c9d8677a95bc216a271cf74d8e5fa: Hmmm. Has it been cleaned? I don't want some sweaty hand-me-down.
textByHashes.76d15249f03a4e267d8e1e434cb0c44f56eb1657: Well, that sounds good. Can I have it then?
textByHashes.04eea4d1cb4077035c19e4693ce75df1f3dd1846: Hi! How's this for some booze?
textByHashes.a70ae1439b49730931f996c219cadbf70f17c0c0: What do you do when you're not lifting logs above your head?
textByHashes.8e57105e8ccddf551539ff8d0c14c1b80843329a: I can honestly say you're a very original guy.
textByHashes.650e2dfb904d74303a7a2fdc230746fd698688d0: Ah, come on. You know you want to give me free stuff.
textByHashes.d5d9f145d01762bfede7832aff78117267467282: Likely story. Sure you weren't skinny dipping?
textByHashes.20fefdf33d5d81f48f47788824c4aa2bf0285c99: Hello. I was just wondering... I don't suppose you have any spare clothing you could lend me?
textByHashes.341bdff9d6cbdc50fba5af14d6b668b96cfa12e3: Oh, but why? I could pay you!
textByHashes.d391e38775eb8afd86f22ab45ad9d9ad2ac56716: Nope, not at all. I'd best be going. Have a nice day. Bye!
textByHashes.59c8a5565ab37ff123e287705a84149a594a3e4b: Okay, what do you want me to build?
textByHashes.57f051edbefce4e99169f619774a7309c678d079: Why thank you. Do you think I have what it takes to become a famous whistler?
textByHashes.a003d8325b7a6577cef891871215ac1c8ad1150d: Your legs are getting a bit cold?
textByHashes.b11a5cac59f371a0ee28a7623c80fbae230e93e6: That's just what I was thinking.
textByHashes.1936fd145ee5c751507a7d480ae91f952bd1f092: Suppose it could get infected then, but that'll just impress the lads all the more.
textByHashes.72a0afa5b2a86718b8f17b4042bf08bcffe91b3c: They're ripped and full of holes.
textByHashes.7037ba38aa58358d177ff74eec8072ca815f83fa: The colour is starting to fade?
textByHashes.42137eb93c3c82016b40f391ff7f7f94aef402ed: Not yet, I'll go when I'm ready. I'm taking my time, may have a quick cup of tea first.
textByHashes.817caafebf64138a9f07e0be729838e23585a268: Wow, this place looks special. Best I look around for something to fix.
textByHashes.566e863e6dff47feaf94ed342ad9168fcf79f114: Heya, Bona. I had a look at the building. There's some complex machinery in there! Going to cost someone.
textByHashes.2b067bebbaa4d894931e5ae8a5a6b6475c1de9f1: Well, I agree now they're up to something. The question is what...? I don't think we're going to find out much from the alchmists, though.
textByHashes.19bdac8d66754e8cc83b0e866129512866bed4ca: I shall see if I can't fix it up and see for myself what is going on. Should be able to get a good reward from them. But don't worry, I'll make sure your efforts don't go unpaid.
textByHashes.e8b2f7791dd68af554d4d9fc16f4cbd1fb27144f: Hello again, Effigy. I've had a nose around the tower. There's a lot of work to do!
textByHashes.b4ed200b2b67c7803bbe10cbaa1c00c4155c60ae: Why fantastical? What are all those pipes and machines in there? What are you trying to do?
textByHashes.bc2c042f43a121cb9ab956684770f940184c792a: You'd best pay me well for this.
textByHashes.7068f304d2c5da6f642dac2602784d61f9c64684: I must say, the inside of the tower is really something to behold.
textByHashes.3a58509f2ebff344025b39d4a250f2f0b3f606d3: Hi, Currency. Got any spare cash?
textByHashes.5dfd0f02a385810001d42b66f5512f7de646c34f: I'm going to stop before this gets violent.
textByHashes.50266e6d31654f2d335a909755bac38cea3eac69: Now listen, what does it all do? Why are you-
textByHashes.bc54e5a53d2f37444c3d94a826d11b5bd899821a: Why does nobody listen? Best if I follow them, I suppose.
textByHashes.b3817c171cb758a3e02a01d9034f66a2439fe993: I'm really getting annoyed with those alchemists.
textByHashes.ff1fc62e561ee3425aa49d5429fe9f0f0aacfff7: Well, I completed the tower and I still have no idea what it does, and then as soon as I tell Effigy of my hard work, he doesn't say one word of thanks and legs it off into the tower!
textByHashes.9fb0f632b67ff565afa0d8578f517f995b82cd95: Don't worry, I'm not about to let Effigy get away with treating us builders like this!
textByHashes.098b60ba0041d7f86763a3ea28369b8122c1a678: This is terrible, you must do something!
textByHashes.625f55dedfe8a29385edd07a73d39e595e16ca3c: I don't want a reward, just let it go. Can't you see it's in pain?
textByHashes.d468fa10ce1e57859c447c5726b3a0a0b1979909: They've run away. I must go confront those alchemists downstairs.
textByHashes.dc7de7f643969c7a165f19675969bcbe50c602cc: You won't BELIEVE what I just saw!
textByHashes.e4fa627d47ceab00f2fcab5d3462ab162f028390: That tower is... a tower of life! I just witnessed with my very own eyes the creation of an homunculus!
textByHashes.f39c13dfc8f46048fceb165bee5e6afaeaa5bb67: Homunculus! They have found a way of creating life itself, but the creature they have made is not a happy being.
textByHashes.9a460dce03fe07353e9694adade69e897aa64072: Are you listening at all? This creature is very dangerous, it needs to be stopped! And fast!
textByHashes.6dfd0ee3203494d132024eeef566e470e9b8f782: I can't believe what you guys have done.
textByHashes.2d13286f77b9f2852e942aad04ba9f3e683b34d0: That is one very sad creature.
textByHashes.f7f65a8dfab2353ec3160f7b2185c0352e876115: Why am I suddenly glad that you're not responsible for sorting out this mess?
textByHashes.d9e24260997e89a126503b87d74bab3e6eb1ab94: I hope you learn from this.
textByHashes.ea91641e14a399fa9e515146e434b8e2ba00b9b5: I'll just ignore that. So, what about that Homunculus up there? You can't just leave it.
textByHashes.610234efd6e47de97992a82447150a1bd38cabb2: Why do I get the feeling I'm doomed to go face that creature on my own?
textByHashes.31fcd7a7665dc9e3715a0db5e296d47d66cd36f2: Oh well. They do say that experience teaches fools.
textByHashes.806cfa3520257fd4e9781952f8e90eb858bda09d: I haven't spoken to it at all. Give me a chance. And please stop your overuse of adjectives.
textByHashes.f8d36904aff5c3558c495d76590ba675480cf9bf: I swear you'll get a knuckle sandwich sometime soon if you don't shut up.
textByHashes.24c394288d66fdce4d5b774920bc2551cabec94b: I'm off to talk to the Homunculus.
textByHashes.e460d6025bdaefbd9584c2baaad2782e5d6cbc40: Thanks for the support. How about saying something encouraging.
textByHashes.99877ec9f73be372a60b4f84beae03a620dda030: I don't know. How about 'You can do it!' or 'That Homunculus is in for a surprise'.
textByHashes.00bfb86473a45d2676d634d96692727c07b7722f: Okay, I'm going to go chat with the Homunculus.
textByHashes.07c4727abecaa466ebe0e4a5fa2a3d5fdd175a97: I probably have enough on my plate, but go ahead; what?
textByHashes.4f5c7c3a556ca47451c1adf7dce17662d29c086f: Let me think how I can phrase this...
textByHashes.cf64b712152a33dd51470342d8b2b04ee177360b: It's okay, I'm here to help you.
textByHashes.6d039d549bac7c5ac38b3b806c531adba8cc9831: No, honest. I helped the alchemists, but I had no idea what their plans involved.
textByHashes.2f1bf942e035edffd9616ab9d56d26e952114812: Hmmm. A creature created of logic and magic.
textByHashes.f4c249b566412ad13761143a52685890628f188f: Don't fear. I shall fix your mind!
textByHashes.679eb815f58251b318a946a8a261e8f5dc6dc834: You tell me that you're confused, so ask me some questions!
textByHashes.6c3a0d6eba7a9cc7d57adeb7a1a1898a92c25bd8: I decided to root for magic.
textByHashes.f82e5a9c4fb0feeeeffb0a945e2f68403855c8b4: Sounds like a good plan. Can you get out of that cage?
textByHashes.00fd2c505ff2a1581f966db797f33f2c3c82d134: I'm not sure I understand, but okay, I will go have a word with them.
textByHashes.a69b716fd71ec77dd617235a5c8ac13662be9638: Oh, I wouldn't worry about it. There are frequently new buildings required around Gielinor. I'm sure your services will be called upon again.
textByHashes.fbfb8cf9dc1a3fafb56a04f25959c31f4c04edfa: Well, I've sat down and had a good chat with the Homunculus.
textByHashes.87081b1fb88bec54a0261bcc3934bf836260fd87: The Homunculus is a bit better off now.
textByHashes.12a329dea209a92cdee38288894adfc00345b1bd: Effigy, I need a word with you.
textByHashes.98d3a6a467be1c80731944850fad18e9201bf0da: My pleasure. So what is this place?
textByHashes.c285974ed17c5c3e3a38be54dadd89fd92f5dc4d: Oh dear, but you're okay now. You have this place to reside in.
textByHashes.99801f42a63dd818a3b8b83559d064caa280ee7c: I would be glad to help.
textByHashes.960396ed8f7fefb9688406dfefc709c4dc9f0f56: I'm sorry but I won't be involved.
textByHashes.9838a51f466bd5870c38e5b82bf3c11c65ee7125: I'll leave you to it then.
textByHashes.29e70a1666d19fafd3d8f13b64ed6efe714c498f: I've been sent by King Bolren to retrieve the orb of protection.
textByHashes.29b8e0f9fb8e8724b1a0b7b6fb01eff29d157238: Sorry I no longer want to be involved.
textByHashes.6b4735b3be38bb559fc3ccd09d19e6cc3413093e: I have some here. (You give six loads of logs to the commander.)
textByHashes.f67f70b816219fc0c7ac859556008e775580506f: No, I've had enough of your battle.
textByHashes.139cc5b6cdc4a765b8cad19db2ef64d4195e205c: Do you know the coordinates of the Khazard stronghold?
textByHashes.708ece3501b1e9c6213e4814359e2d23e4ba12e6: Do you have the coordinate for the Khazard stronghold?
textByHashes.6b957895739b91b2883cfeb101b0f9b2e05db3b5: I'll pray for you little man.
textByHashes.8020d58bf3c1845ed9ab426f4fa2268f4c106db8: That tracker gnome was a bit vague about the x coordinate! What could it be?
textByHashes.86b568c2d04c8ee8fde3ddcdf4e83ccaf330b3dc: Evidently that wasn't the right x coordinate.
textByHashes.fbbf81de9cbd0e68bb3e6b4e1f5a2605a76ff4c4: I have the orb of protection.
textByHashes.66a1953886b86e44928f31ba8f1dabb12e86ff22: Hello Elkoy. I have the orb.
textByHashes.87f1fb873f6abb305b312f2a35433a3058c38021: Can you show me out of the village?
textByHashes.2f64bcc664eb0073f541fa2499b26a8587083dbf: I will find the warlord and bring back the orbs.
textByHashes.af87692745d2bdbb8bb2c73238618bd508239281: I'm sorry but I can't help
textByHashes.054552d29ac01867450d8e0b8dc8042d00216a89: They're stolen goods, now give them here!
textByHashes.9043a95933b3d631a8301281d770cd83611d5e0e: And what are you doing in Brimhaven?
textByHashes.58fd2bbc30451b5fcf99b20e7a7ea2c0adc76932: Ok, I will get it back.
textByHashes.5c57b69f6610c9a5a174e70f7637e54ce581d1bf: How can I find Handelmort's house? Ardougne is a big place...
textByHashes.32fc89ca9f8ac2d473d3e942c0a5a1463f962877: So... do you garden round the back too?
textByHashes.e1ea74ee59176ba260054efe1cdf3d8f8d36a1cb: Doesn't all of the security around the house get in your way then?
textByHashes.0888aba5fff916c303066e83e7e56ac13ff04d3d: So where is the other block?
textByHashes.469a49ef0f32257158c9939348be2414b921aae5: Yes, that sounds good. Teleport me!
textByHashes.97a63709cc74e50805cc5ffab5dd919d82e60986: That sounds dangerous. Leave me here.
textByHashes.c5764b82deee5689d44a2bcb9b6ba7d5e2c92c11: Now I just need someone to deliver it for me.
textByHashes.8a4e2824ee989d707fb79d76f715fc4f5efa6963: So, when are you going to deliver this crate?
textByHashes.4769e7ef3e2d00976763fd310d4b40536b3bcab8: Thank you, it's interesting in here.
textByHashes.47aca5e44935e1feae9e7acaeb3b2fb420565f70: Awww, you poor troll. What seems to be the problem?
textByHashes.fecde90820468484e3649a657284093a863b396a: Don't worry now, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.cc25f6b8d3275d0dcbf908082fb3ae320f88e0fa: I will go and talk to Aga.
textByHashes.4330c2ea55d1298156d5d512613ef2a78e26ab47: A crying troll who's in love?! This just gets better and better!
textByHashes.b8f551d3698d483bdaca2b33fff0806a34a12188: I bet all the other trolls laugh at you!
textByHashes.7e9b062c4d878b2cb2eb4ab8d494f94b5b0d3f7d: (I can't believe I am asking a troll about her love life!!)
textByHashes.813c0bfc87b9ad5f668b45383455859a842e8b91: So... how's your... um... love life?
textByHashes.b585c4b486c6543d6f3aa6415d559fa2f4a696b8: (Maybe trolls DO have a romantic streak!)
textByHashes.ef36719ceb38c737cb592087a4b5fd7ae64ef630: And Arrg said he would get you the flower?
textByHashes.21e83b8a93de7b71f07288ee9f06dd67dafa03e5: So... what do you think about Ug?
textByHashes.7d111d7122ed763e2cad891ce9578cf388d72b2e: You know that wimpy, crying... nevermind.
textByHashes.32729e6285c2bda963ec12a733045bb3f2ae5485: Ehh, Excuse me... Mr. Troll, sir,
textByHashes.b45616456b31859bd0744a76fefb75834c981ebb: How did you grow so big and strong?
textByHashes.b13bb6a2068ad69ee5afd5c8b572c72292e31f6a: Your girlfriend said you know where to find Trollweiss?
textByHashes.867cdccaf75849a94cb602df4300f5162de880ac: Yes, yes, you're great, but what about the Trollweiss?
textByHashes.013f995f5094669b26297b842ff40acb7af9c204: So you don't actually know where to find the Trollweiss?
textByHashes.0bf45c0267278d5e836f0fa98856b02e99925dba: Yes, she said that she really wants a certain flower! Trollweiss, I think she called it.
textByHashes.83a90959a1d34c779473e81f3c5f5c5304c0cf48: Don't worry I'll find it for you!
textByHashes.8c90291431e35e447b321a1e6025e6f63feb60ca: Do you know where I can find Trollweiss?
textByHashes.89057b1cffe7fc858e0deef8695305d51d6eae83: Nothing's impossible, if you put your mind to it!
textByHashes.c4498b6587e0b66e0d59910e5f254e0497d32b5f: Spare me with the lectures and tell me where to find this flower!
textByHashes.a52c65553c0d2738263fd1bca6ccd3cf3df769b4: There must be a way to get there.
textByHashes.93820023a8c8357e96e8b6f20b6e5da15d6508f3: That doesn't sound like a very good idea to me!
textByHashes.3ca39e5a85fd3da01ea50b9f10028b9994c77c34: What would I need to make such a sled?
textByHashes.34f24bf94d7fdd55c8730860738927e48334fa70: Thank you very much for the information.
textByHashes.2851b6196ab5ef5864be75a4a10f8940e9a71b84: I need the sled to get to a certain location in the mountains.
textByHashes.a5567f4d2debb9488edb192b3912ef71f79e2d73: No, I actually still like rolling around in the snow.
textByHashes.b161ee5bacfea12f3e5cf886989b8ec35b4025d0: No, I haven't got everything yet.
textByHashes.f429eeaa4039a861b8f656bd33736a612f1c760d: Yes, I have all the materials for the sled.
textByHashes.71872b19d8de683669f5ff0af8d95752f54823b2: Where can I get wax from?
textByHashes.ec26d7dbcb33f8113421a2deb9dca37a90f52ef8: Where can I get swamp tar from?
textByHashes.e6038157b0cef5535853d5a5f5da29d3082b2e15: What? So I have to get rid of Arrg as well? After all this trouble I should be the one getting the girl...
textByHashes.0c36514740906b373a32678d2de1331b80214b72: Ok, I'll tell Arrg you said that. Shall I tell him to meet you here?
textByHashes.893d1f9c25fee66f9869760e7d574b2215c6e16d: I suppose I am a bit of a legend. Ok I'll do it!
textByHashes.3246e80bd56f1ea38c4ff793bf5348b029848608: No, not yet. Something like this requires careful planning.
textByHashes.0f6b90149998739ac538cb6e074b7fa8b54e5996: I am here to kill you!
textByHashes.a0ae5944860bc39c23f143d0607e30f8daf18184: But not in front of the lady, let's take it outside.
textByHashes.278369f16a346dd47d476fde016e63958952ed24: Looks like I'm going to have to teach you a lesson in 'love'.
textByHashes.d1bb308a54df7f1486fb4b5266b86c9c76a070c7: Thanks, Ug. So, now you can go and speak to Aga!
textByHashes.8627b50b59f11c08130c047308ab2c713629c82c: Has anyone ever told you that you are a useless troll? My grandmother has more guts than you and she doesn't even have her teeth anymore!
textByHashes.b837cf0abf5b7c03b3422b04abfd0ec7522b25d6: How did it go with Aga?
textByHashes.546dad773c0191e34df63d15741f5675921293ec: What?! I went through all that trouble to get a snack for a hungry troll?
textByHashes.6e7b1f8e01ed8903ef82c31e6bcc9e93ba7c0795: How goes your fight with the trolls?
textByHashes.be2fce20ebce830cc5c88b86c2402624ea022a58: I haven't found a way to climb up yet.
textByHashes.8155efd199f8f6ab956da1311187973a2993a83c: I don't have the money on me.
textByHashes.fb1f2510a0bbe8d7fca9cb37f7e174fc6ab50daf: I'm not done yet! Prepare to die!
textByHashes.1fb9489148562dbd9a20931aebbfaf58cdf010af: I've found my way into the prison.
textByHashes.45404d2f4b750ea77c1c2e7eaa9832a8fe25f495: Hello? Are you okay? That's a pretty nasty looking injury you've got there...
textByHashes.ff081706c34bcb6452a3a990971a57e4f969ef62: Leave you alone? Look at you! You've been badly hurt and need help.
textByHashes.988d3c0363e45708ac454885ac4e6068db05d771: Now look, there is no way you're going to be able to fix this on your own. Either you let me help, or you die here. Is that what you want?
textByHashes.a81fd96d82443fcd566ef8badf82cb0661cef2a7: Then what can I do to help?
textByHashes.8d9efd2e72dca38fb0f9184daf9a2989ef658f0d: Right, you take it easy. I'll get your bandages sorted as quick as possible.
textByHashes.927d0d6ffcab4b7f32e7443f1a3232fd11f26682: You're definitely not okay, but I guess I can't force help upon you if you don't want it. I'll be on my way, but please, you really should reconsider.
textByHashes.fba2d58b6076692c22571531294fe8dccb97e312: You're a terrible liar, you know? I'll get your bandages sorted as quick as possible. Seaweed and a palm leaf, right?
textByHashes.3b9aacdeb0ccdb4181a5d2351607b1d908d4aa44: Okay, I've got those bandages. Let's get you sorted out...
textByHashes.c41ca0d37a93bd62b040e369173171fc2a0d9514: Of course! Did you expect me to just leave you to die? I'm not a monster!
textByHashes.772a51158b5b01f51d05cf0ee6a3d400c38de77f: Don't mention it. I'm . Pleased to meet you, Floopa.
textByHashes.94a0e125a646969ac47a57517c727ca33eea753a: Now, those bandages should do the job for the time being, but we need to get you some proper help.
textByHashes.c80c9ee2ae567532bc6e20c16cacfd23091c2b0a: Can you? What is your medical background?
textByHashes.c4330e1fc6de8cf078a8a42771939e3b40734e92: Floopa, I understand that you don't trust me, but I promise I'm only here to help.
textByHashes.3e2e3d2a78e6d90216a9863093a945c9639d1798: Well, those bandages aren't going to last forever, and unfortunately I don't think that book of yours can help... not unless you use the pages as replacement bandages.
textByHashes.3b7b0a42821bc8fb6feaa5255b7916b9b922d1fd: Please, Floopa, let me take you home. We can use my boat.
textByHashes.b5f0bcf9e72e500b8dd634b6891dfb864194774a: Thank you, Floopa. So, where is home?
textByHashes.8ee2e6f3efe536192c11187367cadc65d67ac3a8: Where do I need to be going, Floopa?
textByHashes.b20093dfc9f55960a8b48821bf0101d316732bc3: That's right, though she wasn't overly keen on coming.
textByHashes.b1426427831d227d473a150226b63a4bf178d430: Do you think she'll be okay?
textByHashes.c8a909134e9676aff3119ba17b7c5e0e85958bbb: No. She seemed reluctant to tell me much at all, to be honest.
textByHashes.51ddb7fd09b50e440c00b5a2db015527a57da281: Actually, would it be possible to stay? I'd be keen to make sure she's doing okay.
textByHashes.439e2eb5d6f11d1ae8644ca22c685e301e1d0c38: Interesting... Well, let's do this tourist thing for now and we can worry about what happens after that once Floopa is doing better.
textByHashes.cb080e253ba1455e916b25da59aa51a9b06c19f2: Well, your friend on the docks gave me permission to stick around until you were feeling better.
textByHashes.27fdd2659a19455ced956251b52b885582005a35: It's good to meet you. I'm .
textByHashes.063702f34c546da8c4048e8276340b51c009969e: If you need help with repairs, maybe I could lend a hand? That way you can focus on looking after Floopa.
textByHashes.b80310f432333ffaa5c7c60d63e098eeebc9c570: It's not a problem. What repairs need doing?
textByHashes.3e32e319fc48ccf594ed29c55d47cd60e6b946a5: What sort of materials will I need?
textByHashes.962aa5ad2335a3187bda64ac5e6bc880fdcf18ba: Great! I'll get right to it.
textByHashes.af476d69093c24093162df190fae5fe060eddcc9: Could I have another list of the work that needs doing?
textByHashes.2fe5c09e756bb5d2cd86aef163def1e65b9e8500: Thank you! I hear you have a couple of things in need of repair. I've offered to get them sorted.
textByHashes.ce89a641258319f96f65474bebf09e0c5a2d8343: That's me! I've offered to help out with some repairs around town.
textByHashes.a5be72795bec219ff6d58a77eb6201da72241da0: Actually, I'm here to help you. I'm sorting out some of the repairs that need doing.
textByHashes.55651c5d991683255744c5007ad14d8a2728f3e4: I think that's everything. I should head back to Raley and Floopa.
textByHashes.706f050ac90b2da3dde32a50847b43021e79994e: Good news! The repairs are all sorted.
textByHashes.524466b5ff406dbf453d9b33aeed9fa2f55caa9d: I'm happy to help as well. Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.c6d5eaf99e64343b83348e9e344623e141e88fc1: I'm sure I can track it down.
textByHashes.640072d6537419c727c5459a883b6d948cc3cd99: Will do. I'm sure I'll have it dealt with in no time!
textByHashes.195f87cebc1a9819da4425016574c606ddb03543: Why are humans generally not allowed here?
textByHashes.3255cba3a02829c840c8a0761e9246679b662e49: I see. I guess that gives me another question then. If the adults aren't here, where are they?
textByHashes.9c5a29d08f96daa013946d6a300d9a5724c30b84: Ah, so that explains why Floopa was reluctant to return here.
textByHashes.6a60e7720e252d23d33e2cbb3ae85b74372306d9: It sounds like a good balance.
textByHashes.9429ff8b8abdda62916750913d179f8c44b6ef7d: Are gryphons a common problem for your people?
textByHashes.8becfdf5c73872b2bc0deda24a351286ceba6ce3: I'm sorry. It can't be nice living with that threat.
textByHashes.ed950e74e60028cf3ff393402d1e6bcf7d41157a: Trial by Water? Korel mentioned that as well.
textByHashes.dd698b402671026e495d2cf82fcb277e83804afc: I'm still working on it, but I'm sure I'll have it dealt with soon.
textByHashes.3c9c7df74e0b7fa293a7995a6a16e99225ad9d51: Okay, I'll grab one of those shields and set off right away!
textByHashes.365a0ebc5365375fc062d8e051e6360d179669cc: I need a shield to protect me against one of the larger gryphons. I'm afraid it's quite urgent.
textByHashes.b85d81ae30b4734e873c0d3cc71da44d22d248a0: I'm sorry about the ones that were lost.
textByHashes.30541109d0fd73cdf6ed42a0f6b3f6958c39ce9c: About that... It may be nothing, but when I arrived here, I saw a ship with red sails sailing away from the island. You don't think it's connected, do you?
textByHashes.b4a2533fe3eea4c4d93107cce8222f65358fc11d: Alright. I'll head back right away.
textByHashes.23e0548c2d092f40c35718736b9e28965234a7e5: The gryphon has been dealt with. The eggs are safe.
textByHashes.cd491d62dfb42236cfa522707493e5d9e1d0695c: Possibly, but it's hard to say for sure. There was a ship near the island. It had red sails.
textByHashes.81d6585865ea11a9da6aca98d037662db9442c41: This ship? Does it have something to do with your old crew?
textByHashes.93964d415cfbe39d6a6a85e716161236e5e666e1: I might just do that. Thank you.
textByHashes.aef9ae7325efc34309a065fff3291db8538b6f01: Hey I recognise you two! You were part of the delegation to Varrock!
textByHashes.f67e228cc484bd985482ce8ee5d38d03919ddf22: Where do I find this temple?
textByHashes.7e23d702daeb8f84f5b0c7a28f75b0ca40001361: Okay. Guess I should get going then.
textByHashes.36901396b840485ea98dae927dd1e48d19d7a7fc: Er... I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.53fa07719ff0d32031c2dad8940d8d012e9eb513: Er... I think you must have me confused with someone else. We've never met.
textByHashes.3a096f61a6273eb9257634323aad68b87faeff7b: Your only companion is death? You should probably get out more.
textByHashes.137369ee7e8621260774732aaa60f90ac0679eb9: Well things got deep very quickly. Is this how you normally introduce yourself to someone?
textByHashes.5468cfe64860baf1c35e51c4a9ed36b9db8a1ebb: Right... So who actually are you?
textByHashes.21b1b4793cf913753cecabdf77facbeb0d20b602: Teokan? So there are two of you?
textByHashes.3a3eca46090ea8df72d96494a345099a95953543: I'm meant to be meeting Prince Itzla here.
textByHashes.66cc3fdb7547dfc0f98ba1028c0646ed07ce7fb9: Could you tell me more about the Church of Ralos?
textByHashes.e07b896abef1fcfe8cb722528acb87dc583baae2: Could you tell me more about the Sect of Ranul?
textByHashes.ed97912659e138487e0fc5ad3f36ba811e0340b3: Your father? I didn't realise you were related.
textByHashes.aa6de2b093a98c713e6c3559e770a84344926933: It's not a problem. Although, I did have an interesting encounter on my way here.
textByHashes.d785974d03468f712bc3efd86d28ec4ee27d3bbc: Actually, I was talking about Metzli. I met her upstairs.
textByHashes.8bc32041bc06cc100dd9e5dbe7c689a08fc4b634: A Varlamorian who had access to the mainland before the treaty was signed. Surely that limits the options a fair bit?
textByHashes.01e2f456d5c1626d989414c4f577a609ed16e87c: So that leaves the Tullus twins and the knights.
textByHashes.1b1745253eb8ed9dea7d00d021d173191824444e: You two are quite the pair, aren't you?
textByHashes.718f3e8b0ee9b1669ddd195afa7dfcb262662f94: He's asked me to investigate the knights who were part of the delegation to Varrock. He suspects one of them may have been involved in the plot to kill the Teokan.
textByHashes.186ae84e5f23e2f4aa51ec74e4aebdf396915aaf: He's staying with Servius in case there's another attempt on his life.
textByHashes.b996097ed84747f9b7e4e0b66f9cd710c4bac69f: What if any refuse to come?
textByHashes.c5189c9afb041cd22531983c4798b0f45a977cdc: Where can I find the bazaar?
textByHashes.4aa31a98be525829bce0f17aa01fc44336aa05cf: Where can I find the cothon?
textByHashes.2dfa22b9b0775f16ecc73fc28846905233904210: Where can I find Outer Fortis?
textByHashes.d7b50ce0a899b9c12d146def69b4fcc139eb8842: Where can I find the colosseum?
textByHashes.6bacddca063e7ecec7ebbded3207b0e57ae74890: I lost that crest you gave me.
textByHashes.650443dc420d77ca6303739bcb200e6adbab8988: Ennius and Furia Tullus need you to return to the palace.
textByHashes.23c8015027b37036c1871464e22e467b3b127e1b: Well it just so happens I have this.
textByHashes.1c334d021775d94c9e8447762d0e32a78b890a4b: I can do that. What do you need?
textByHashes.6e6deeffc00d19f284a29df849c81758f47910ae: Well this doesn't sound totally orthodox, but fair enough. I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.ef7e22160cb0553d0d097b2813f4665de2160ed8: I have it right here. That man in blue over there had it.
textByHashes.b5c2f6f968888f718f85f4b2303ae850e63d7ffb: So you'll return to the palace now?
textByHashes.f369ddc7e6341a94dbc4667aff939f6f37e23f87: Hello again. Do you know how long it will be before you can return to the palace?
textByHashes.d3d7d9092f1c0ee353e74ddc213ae2a206f1d040: Hello there. I'm here on behalf of Ennius and Furia Tullus. They need you to return to the palace immediately.
textByHashes.0df1e2e990f526857e8091c085463305f885b03c: What is it you're doing? Maybe I can help get it done faster.
textByHashes.0dbfc09a33b45c217ea2a0b53b57706f2a82f117: Good to know. I'll get to it and let you know what I find.
textByHashes.74b15487b4b2a6cdd724bea934705b2213e6cd77: Not yet. Could you remind me what I'm looking for?
textByHashes.049cd2208344f46b7f9631c3b49ccef16d93aaef: Yes, I found it. The ship it's from is called The Fortis Spark.
textByHashes.3e6c29d7927eff9d582d07eeaeeeced2730f0d66: Well you might need to meet with them some other time. You're needed back at the palace.
textByHashes.44fa40ef6cd3b7a3a2ffad0aeb8367a6cb59d1a5: I'm working directly for the Prince.
textByHashes.e3f73034c4480a6691825af4d64ba21662a04b5c: Maybe, but like I say, you're needed at the palace.
textByHashes.27503a5f0f3af30d01a923afd6b5cf3a17bf8b6c: I need to go and prepare.
textByHashes.64ed6163d43d17ce318bf5d5001e6eaf29afdde1: Right... The two of you have been asked to report to the palace as soon as you can.
textByHashes.b73c2dd8d784948a795154563ecfdb79860d6ad9: Okay well... Oh... I was going to show you a crest, but I seem to have lost it.
textByHashes.ef8bdf2fcfe02c6017ff4f15659b62e120703372: Sorry, but I have this crest here that says otherwise.
textByHashes.d7d62d701cf0a985e62d2c0f788679cdb304c38c: Well there's nothing like a little dunk to sober you up a bit. Azali, come with me.
textByHashes.38f63aae6b7534b814518173f76cd89813095414: Well it will have to do. You're needed over at the palace.
textByHashes.01e9a164ff866f0b5eb986bae123b3f86c0a3260: Yes. They should be here soon.
textByHashes.7b0d7595ddbb7e56d22f5dac74aca77c799a4f78: Well I'm going to guess asking nicely won't work.
textByHashes.1961e33afa7bfc3da561fb4f575723a23e724ae9: I found a letter to one of the knights, but I haven't read it yet.
textByHashes.248c6003ddb0b93797182206f6fe261dd1ddca48: I found a letter to one of the knights. It seems that Velam is our traitor.
textByHashes.db1328467ed05ac3019ae5da3b676cfaf739c76e: The letter directed him to arrange the death of the Teokan. It also mentioned something called Twilight's Promise and something else called the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.91c4987eecd4244c079d10846663bd433114b0bd: We should have questioned him! Now we have no idea who he was working for!
textByHashes.dcea27335ea1cd1513a9ba02966d53cb8a82ed71: Itzla and Servius said they were going to something called a Teomat.
textByHashes.a647b17d72950ad6520e1b3447accd039e7ca9c7: Alright, I'll go and see Regulus.
textByHashes.73aa0f86c1f2f3b83aa6573706ea726a5e470df9: I was told to ask you about getting to the Teomat.
textByHashes.5ff3944bee7163a5021bbdeda777ea20466e2688: Hello, Renu. I have something for you here.
textByHashes.962e1a31e91ede312130a8ace75339ae7eb7b02e: I'm still looking into those knights.
textByHashes.c3ba24c4b90127f2f1ea30bd0ceb48e9130cb700: I found a letter to one of the knights, Velam. The letter instructed him to arrange the death of Servius.
textByHashes.1653d37e323ec45fa357b443e04b85a986d9bbe3: Well there's actually no need. Ennius killed him as soon as we found out.
textByHashes.92f016dd73ae4ab309c517dfbe7764ffa9cb47b1: But Ennius killed him before we could even question him!
textByHashes.240b9e5bb4c79c415c8f8a95fc21d9d1f65d3dba: Does it not bother you how quickly Ennius killed him? Is it not a bit odd?
textByHashes.b976d50acbec0794767c17b5dcd02df04e2d7e50: But do you not find it suspicious? I find a letter perfectly implicating one of the knights, but he's then quickly killed before he can be questioned.
textByHashes.98f3a0b477698716bc74eed4cb09c992576480cb: Seems like a pretty good way of covering things up, don't you think?
textByHashes.81b2a8752462922d1528a8ca06330fc65599548f: Right... And you don't think that might be a good reason for her and Ennius to be traitors?
textByHashes.1db56fe0dfd8365f52fe51a91f40b696ff8352cd: The letter I found mentioned two things: Twilight's Promise and the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.8d30a180a67ca0ec51dc57902bb036fa5ee24de6: And the Final Dawn... What's that?
textByHashes.ab9b35ba61c4fe351bfea6c68dc5c301100d54ee: Hmm... Where can I learn more about the Final Dawn?
textByHashes.8e57b94f9a9d9c96f712a2ddfde7d505b4aeafab: Right, I'll go and see if she can help me.
textByHashes.8e33fdc1b60c6796e362aef0c3f71643653cef28: Alright, I'll see if she can help me.
textByHashes.ef0e4f22b4860cc456b8c4785a10b478b5b4ee6f: I was hoping you could help me with some information.
textByHashes.c6e60a79d62ebd91c8fede8eb4952515d2151b7a: Yes, what you're describing there is a book. I'm familiar with the concept.
textByHashes.19e558a40dcc60d02dc42ad3acca09b0015e57bf: Okay, well before we go down another rabbit hole, I'm looking for information on the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.396affd3ef5724e23667c4412057ce3e599e6026: You speak of the Old Ones?
textByHashes.7757bbdef37f5927783df688333e3a9de55fbcda: So you think the world will one day end? That's quite something.
textByHashes.bceb3d20b109d25f3a0e47de91451e8801f34ca7: But you said it yourself: Knowledge passed down can be misconstrued. How can anyone know the truth for sure? It's not like there are any of these Old Ones around for us to ask.
textByHashes.cadb706f91e08699befa84c9114e8ee2f68fb1ef: These people... You speak of the Twilight Emissaries?
textByHashes.46ecc1e7013e09c40015df27858f49301f840836: So what's this plan you mentioned?
textByHashes.b8d4410bce133044416ad3af51aa0dc472d90a57: Fair point. I'll be back once I'm ready.
textByHashes.2cbd3437a7e26d7f034da27c369f86d10a5988d0: Well that doesn't sound good. So what do you need from me?
textByHashes.4edbb83dcd5b48660437684577b2dd81371a1aff: There's only one way to find out. Where do I start?
textByHashes.7b10f6944a7a7bce1062ed90afdaa4c097931cf2: It sounds too dangerous for me. I'd better prepare more first.
textByHashes.1a426da6e82ad29c735b1895cdf282beee190a70: Hello there, you must be Koftik.
