textByHashes.eaa1776660137c422f64c258e85b4f3fe21ea438: He said we need to find a way through the Underground Pass. Shouldn't be too bad, I've travelled through many a cave in my time.
textByHashes.232396b4f055abced028ec07207890114d5a0fce: Hello. What are you up to?
textByHashes.0274f25c524e3b9d52c98bbe5f07486e8905ba83: Do you not know how to get the bridge down?
textByHashes.5d7ddcdc86284c7cbc7a519c9b73226217258a2c: Charred arrows? They must have been trying to burn something. Or someone!
textByHashes.19b0eee0cafa59828915342f6801589c795a6fa4: Koftik, is everything okay? You're getting me worried.
textByHashes.4cafda43814bc34696bffc1994a859638fdd1b05: It's too heavy to move with just my hands.
textByHashes.edf1001a153126cf8a1e2716bb627193976d9f40: Hello Paladin. I wasn't expecting to see anyone else down here.
textByHashes.1a862bb5e0bc01a91ae5dc223968ab198c5a76f6: I'm looking for a safe route through these caverns, under order of King Lathas.
textByHashes.0a3ef7012a6ddb5a99c340390f2c2ad66ca8695f: Koftik, you're still here? You should leave.
textByHashes.40d7b2ec14af3b7857297c9e400a6490f8299dba: Koftik, you really should leave these caverns.
textByHashes.c433d163749591df34416ba8f21266ceb97a206c: Well I'll just have to kill him then.
textByHashes.375b70f1705a43cb12a1fde1fbd37ed083310f1c: Oh dear, I haven't enough money...
textByHashes.094291f0ba63b733c25c27c77b3084f8d09b8bce: No wonder their breath is so bad!
textByHashes.21440db8d66628f2a3de112f0b11b5cf5462e366: Not really, just trying to lighten up the conversation.
textByHashes.7064aa36953e09748926b38ba87bb25063448d0d: That witch probably won't take kindly to me going in there. Maybe I can distract her...
textByHashes.f6f9c5b05dad120fba6b8d15276f05813f55b9d8: I found a strange doll, but I've lost it.
textByHashes.38148948b605dfe05d66fd4910d8e5acb0bdd74b: Niloof, I found the witch's house.
textByHashes.13c2b31b8cd89ca75079e2aee9f8e1727f9d9862: I've still a few years in me yet.
textByHashes.23f38674069db7c2eab416072576b46387578b69: Okay then, I'll take a pair.
textByHashes.1a72a183cf2c3843db8c1e70b787a09c304b5719: Oh dear, I haven't got enough money...
textByHashes.7707d15f88b9fe7d2047553b15e3b275ee95bc26: We were losing you to Iban's influence...
textByHashes.3643c40fce70e5db57b5b84ebbc2f5a6cb987d63: At last! I've had enough of these caves.
textByHashes.b2f7185c5ce484c5d9a3482c72935fc07efe9e90: Thanks for showing me the way out Koftik.
textByHashes.fd116ffa5b501fe33e2cf26626fd6af9eda8de62: I've still a few years in me yet. So what are you still doing down here?
textByHashes.4dbcfff675123c2e9e2fc9a244d66e76a46f9823: Fair enough. Well you take care of yourselves.
textByHashes.e309f82934e7b93fb8be3098361fba1b9c7709c1: Indeed, the quest is complete. I have defeated Iban and his minions.
textByHashes.8ed4185e8d9ba8bc1d40a3ce72f3f1a6929769b0: Not quite. The portal through the last section of the pass has been damaged. It will need repairing.
textByHashes.3895df75d7ad4275f14d8d0392e72563854dec0e: So how long do you think the repairs will take?
textByHashes.7126b51df3d30b266e0c9768412075832c98b810: Good day my liege. Any progress with the Well of Voyage?
textByHashes.d14d7c9c43a70ebc79ddfa624957ee1134e7d068: Okay, I'm up for an adventure.
textByHashes.08ca02943f5291ad863bc1df7401226598683a96: His village is being terrorised by a vampyre! He told me to ask you about how I can stop it.
textByHashes.0b5be3f9ff2b0c3c0aa3a4a44b1bb11591b94fe1: But this is your friend Morgan we're talking about!
textByHashes.cd719093e63c94468218eedb8df290b01125033c: I'll just go and buy one.
textByHashes.b6c03b3d89e770952db4ffe382ec7c2e81300f9d: So tell me how to kill vampyres then.
textByHashes.d28a03065e1ca3d14ec010a87e36f697481c3f69: So Tiffy, now that I'm a Temple Knight Initiate do you have any jobs for me to do?
textByHashes.ddd4a373f5e9d8a1c492f7a0d8a89c90281b0d22: Do you have any quests for a hard-working adventurer?
textByHashes.19f1631b0350ae068eee9cfc89443dc477f26cac: Problem? What problem? Er... and you have a dossier on me???
textByHashes.1bb4ec17c12ff91d2f3d3207a37160bf315e30cc: Um... okay... So what's the problem?
textByHashes.4767c1faa14f8df37b39fc5950594f3064066492: What? But I am a member of the White Knights! I went and did that stuff with the cabbage and the potion!
textByHashes.757be65999b47329f361bd9cd35f2cf2d7be770e: And I've already done your stupid little mind test thing! You can't get rid of me that easily!
textByHashes.83c5e254b803f7f61f26706118c0fb75a9b1a851: You want me to be a squire for five years?!?!
textByHashes.77f696f9d5fbbaa0b4a15ca1af08256cdc3c818e: I'm still up for joining the Temple Knights, I just don't really feel like spending five years running around shining peoples boots for them.
textByHashes.683899fdab698e992c0a1309ff37a14db07b474c: Well, you don't need to worry about the details, you just do as I tell you and it will all work out for us both, what?
textByHashes.a296e15161ac400c6a946b6c6f89ffd2bd19d55a: I guess... I don't really like blindly following orders though...
textByHashes.90b5c857ababe6ff8c8dbc4e9cc44917d0191fa7: No, to be honest I'm getting sick of all these excuses and procrastination. Plus being an initiate was nowhere near as fun as I thought it would be.
textByHashes.554fa6a4586527aff0c1e9fa7fd9aeb27f7b2df3: I'd rather just go off by myself and kill stuff for cash.
textByHashes.3701a4293d518872e7e748be0b74566c8e7185ee: So what exactly do you want me to do?
textByHashes.300fa28f47abbec8ceed858489ae8643643854d7: I don't exactly understand how that will help me become a White Knight...
textByHashes.0b445b2a752a5d2f1f537525acb40a4c5e697449: But if deputisation's only temporary, and I have to be a 'proper' White Knight to then become a Temple Knight, doesn't that mean that I am still going to have to squire for Amik for five years?
textByHashes.6d571d042eddbf1ab90950329b7fead42928cb62: So I get to be a White Knight without having to do five years of pointless busywork?
textByHashes.3ec2b4b007b3e92ddbba298149ea423d5b413365: Okay, I guess that makes sense... But we're not in a time of crisis, so doesn't that mean I won't actually get deputised?
textByHashes.01075d87bf64139eb862569eec6ce981ef6f7543: But... Do I really need to quit the Temple Knights
textByHashes.de4ff6649d6feabc1a09d15dce5f61e2f24df25c: You seem pretty cool, and I really like the armour...
textByHashes.d446cf7ef283a8929d1e4714995efed776928b6d: got any jobs for me to do today?
textByHashes.4b5399bbc4ecc4e8754aabecb98810705e39507c: Can I just stop you right there?
textByHashes.60dc77f9be6e83de3f1609d39755e5bb0b538bc1: I am no longer a member of the Temple Knights, I have entirely renounced my application because after many hours of soul searching I have come to the conclusion that I desperately want to become a White Knight instead!
textByHashes.bee79c2f1b5c9bafca5e1da33fc3a2de58be5056: So? Did you hear me bad mouth their armour? The armour is cool, I kept the armour!
textByHashes.997e4b3c4ae9c6ce5858caa24031d0e65c6dc9f5: And this is definitely not some kind of elaborate hoax to get my application processed faster.
textByHashes.5d805ebaae3e7a9275072f9acdc2f6d6733c5487: No... Not if you didn't hear it...
textByHashes.146fca9c0083d3cd96ef4dde958489cc08d851a9: So what exactly does being a squire consist of, then?
textByHashes.eae596f0367217b7d74539efb92a4624e72af511: So... No killing stuff for you, or anything fun like that...?
textByHashes.9366ad82299de7bf1d8073bb73d6e96823f5c654: Yes please! I would LOVE to be your squire!
textByHashes.a8a29184ec13c1ec56cf78ad5ac7f7df5cf778cd: Wait... Didn't Sir Tiffy tell me to decline...?
textByHashes.c5abe374095927d2bb14848df95e04a7a217d94b: Um... As tempting an offer as that sounds Sir Amik, I am really not a fan of waiting around...
textByHashes.47bbc1bedbf8f3be4d764340bcd1199fcc3d5743: Now I heard from some completely random stranger that was definitely not Sir Tiffy Cashien as part of an elaborate ruse to fast track my application into the White Knights, that I could be deputised directly as a White
textByHashes.063fefbbe03dae257e190f9c5ef2e222b21e3e67: Knight, and entirely bypass that while boring waiting for five year thing...
textByHashes.255555ab940cc6a952f499fe44d39a1efef755ac: Right. Well, Can I do that instead?
textByHashes.ca87f3d40836f69f140ac66433d48425e57d98f8: All is well huh? I'll be right back, I just have to go ask...
textByHashes.40b629d525056e35721d56adaecaf2dd2af30a88: nobody in particular if they can organise...nothing at all to happen.
textByHashes.5b643ffc1511cc6a281db3b438fde0bf231ee29a: No, not really. So there isn't a crisis yet?
textByHashes.4be465e2d6e51ddf5d4eda225f8c04e79d429a1d: Right. Well, I'll go and see if Tiffy can fix that for me then.
textByHashes.01256683b203d461c58667a4174bef284940ad63: Er, I mean: How fortunate for us all that nothing terrible has happened or is conveniently about to happen.
textByHashes.8e25093c3321f1551d63f79b071d8a5356fa5c4f: So do you have any squiring for me today Amik?
textByHashes.893038b706a46f4face06b8f082eb86828fe9a41: Sure thing, boss. I brought you a beer.
textByHashes.5a97cab7e9845c04879c9663368f32f57fa16cb5: I did it Tiffy! I became Sir Amik's squire!
textByHashes.9379a6517d9ea95a52d70616770b3128318dba40: That means in just five short years I can be a White Knight!
textByHashes.7f6f4f0abf2b89dcf4450a88543519284abe8d5f: Yeeeesssssss.... But I thought it would be more fun to do this?
textByHashes.ae0e657df9df21186de5e2653395cf88db8588cf: Hello again Tiffy. I've just spoken to Amik, and he says he's fine for me to be deputised as a White Knight, there just needs to be a crisis first.
textByHashes.a99bee53832593e495975baca74b60b4eec0a98a: I assume you can arrange a small crisis for me?
textByHashes.f064b15125dcd07c0191acd43b76d82b413db4b9: You know... Is all this back and forth strictly necessary?
textByHashes.388a1dcfe64797b10670bde49e77a885d0fe5aec: I don't mean to sound ungrateful for the help you're giving me here, but you could have just got this sorted out before sending me off there in the first place!
textByHashes.036b498c164eaf564b5873674cf11d071b8278b4: And stop calling me bean! I am not a vegetable, I am a human bean, er, being!
textByHashes.081d87d1eb755dd39686b0296a42c473c03edd79: I guess... But this spy stuff is a lot more boring than it sounded at first...
textByHashes.63515216751389a1e52c0fcae230f3d3550f996c: Hi Tiffy. What am I supposed to be doing again?
textByHashes.375be073d9ab1b2ca283f9e889d5c8a234197d9d: Solus Dellagar? Who - or what - is that?
textByHashes.03fef0de94dd169ec7cf0f58639f3c52d5267e53: Exiled? Why didn't you just kill him? Or, you know, imprison him or whatever?
textByHashes.5e01815675d06124720620c4ab1444aed115c35b: So if you can't imprison him, and exile obviously didn't work, you want me to kill him?
textByHashes.f4da92179ce2cc9bf0cb4a060bcb63cf4fcae117: Oh yes. You've made yourself very clear.
textByHashes.d1a469ae17548f08026d3e026487f442a7ffe7e2: So what will I get if I help you out against this, er, solus doolalala guy then?
textByHashes.caa91e9eceb7624aee85dfc606d589bcdce5ec5b: Yes, yes I see. So...No monetary compensation or other actual reward then?
textByHashes.8a6dbc5e5d25f64898fa809c4f07e598df146fdb: So I don't actually get anything out of this then?
textByHashes.a1f865ee54ffdc86097d877022e0984d844977d2: But you can't buy things with a warm glow...
textByHashes.4ef6d26fd2c06d329fee730453330d8503e91dae: Hey, there's nothing I like more than fighting! Deputise me up, and I'll go get this guy for you!
textByHashes.e4d090d679fcbc05fd0f40791ce8aed5940c7619: So where should I start looking for this Solus guy anyway?
textByHashes.cbfed34de169b5d2a01744c2fcde9fd79cdacbf6: A scary mage huh? Sounds like I could get KILLED!
textByHashes.59a50e27598053adbef9980ab09a0e56fc3b8b7a: Forget that and forget you! No way am I risking my neck unless there is a big fat reward on the table for it!
textByHashes.211a3ceee802d44f5bfd8feeca1ab3c45ec1ab9e: Any hints on where he might be?
textByHashes.54348675ebb6c64300a4f770be1f047c2ba1f7a5: Hum. I wonder if Sir Tiffy might be able to help?
textByHashes.28b32049be0dec8eab5f66071fab083419279863: Tiffy, it worked exactly to plan! Sir Amik deputised me to take care of this Solus Doolally dude, so let's go get him!
textByHashes.dbfbbb3b0722fb11e66bdce49688de9ec27dfd7c: So... Dragonhide armour and an elemental shield and I'm laughing?
textByHashes.8ae401fb8c9f44211b68cd767f0e5df08ae4df61: Riiiiight.... So I'm just going to scout him out for you then.
textByHashes.e9a8070461318b73cddb496d3c9edfa30278b4f6: Any tips on how to find him?
textByHashes.14510bda93db0603f0b4adfd865300986458f0bd: Oh yeah, I got your money.
textByHashes.e6a5be0dbca69f15e29bb95d7abfaa92abb1b0b9: I don't have that kind of money with me...
textByHashes.bbe1dd54fe202523a2915e25fe188834e8abfaf7: Can I give you the components I have with me now?
textByHashes.d9031c87bd67e0c68c45835a889665d2f0a7e873: I have all three components for you to make me a Communication Orb out of now Tiffy.
textByHashes.a5340e873c63780ba107a86905b180a2d0008449: Yeah, it must be very useful.
textByHashes.cdb10eee7b3693d2db1c10ffcf35ed2bc60b9666: Hi Savant! I was wondering if you could give me details on my current assignment?
textByHashes.580a1c47138a018cf7b05151c058123e461d4c53: Oh yeah! So any information you can give me?
textByHashes.a0542871fbcbdae8e40baffca9b59ca69c0c2c59: So, how would you suggest I go about finding him?
textByHashes.b981ae421f5f14f2666b294851bb0b8112e7eac6: So I have to just wander around the place looking for him?
textByHashes.efcca0b8e2d08e1183e3cbdf645f1b2973e2fe87: So where would I find this Lord Daquarius?
textByHashes.199d249197592591e0adcc07702371ea8babcc57: So... Savant... That's an unusual name...
textByHashes.b47bb3bfd5837afc7eb71078ddf4be2535bec3e2: So what exactly do you do for the Temple Knights?
textByHashes.87c41b16bb9c7454b568c8f77e7e8452b45d76d1: So how did you end up working for the Temple Knights?
textByHashes.578e65ab7ea63aca31ffb37e901acb0dc2efa7ee: I would have thought someone like you would have ended up researching at the Wizards' Tower or something instead...
textByHashes.fe9bd04ad83e33d5ce84d86abdbf0ff64c47a0b7: Ok, thanks Savant, that was very interesting.
textByHashes.b592cc81416651135871f9d2f7b666a8d6cfe1a4: Hi Savant. I was just wondering if you could give me a little information about the Temple Knights?
textByHashes.365b9c0839e4c06f861c9d0b48037169c6bfa26a: I've just realised that I really don't know very much about them...
textByHashes.87b6f9cf4ce9857cb4a5e1afdbe0e9d3393aafda: Well, that's better than nothing right?
textByHashes.8e32d29e1586309715db2433b3c6094bf353eb9a: I am here on behalf of the White Knights...
textByHashes.00ef27bfc814c07464c80ecbba5c16a5c2b169eb: Now wait a minute, this concerns a friend of yours....
textByHashes.4ea369c8d2abaa70cd6592c20844c253ca885ee2: So you will help me find him?
textByHashes.bf7fd34e91b251d7baf1bc3da068c254aca838e6: You know...I'm sure I could MAKE you tell me where he is...
textByHashes.3b88051ccc2131c057a8ff083b9354daef93a2ce: I still want to know the whereabouts of Solus Dellagar!
textByHashes.eec54ca4dde1d9defacc76b9abfc6df9843d538f: Ok Daquarius, you tell me the whereabouts of Solus Dellagar right now, or I will put every Black Knight here to their death in front of you!
textByHashes.fefea29d01b3580385894184d02344d3eaf84dd8: What king of fur? Dog? Wolf? Bear?
textByHashes.64ef1d8b888043c5a97e75a1159c89b910a7e2f9: That's it? That's your help? You'd better not be lying Daquarius, or...
textByHashes.26d6d875f8f8501cbc78baaebaeb428f0596f204: So this CommOrb thing can work as a lie-detector? That's pretty useful!
textByHashes.704e03e4fbc44decfd11a5a10c435f3fda707e29: You mean that Zamorakian mage in Varrock?
textByHashes.99cbc75a480f3f8931c2f9a79d2ab809d1ddd797: Okay Daquarius, tell me all that you know of Solus, or I will kill some more Black Knights!
textByHashes.259309d42fc48e602ab9fe4ed81810c13e252414: I am looking for information about a very dangerous man... I believe he visited you quite recently.
textByHashes.7d379a0fe4363a95104efa497552b13aecf01cb7: Yes, him. I need to find him and make sure he doesn't come back to these lands.
textByHashes.046fa751d15daa22fd4b914afb3e4f33f47c8e81: Sorry, I cannot trade you my Communications Orb...
textByHashes.4950f47354388d320a48bd7f7b12cd9639f7057c: Then perhaps you will be willing to trade something else for your information...?
textByHashes.5cdb541e70616eb0abee9263ea2dc4a5308a58fd: You mean Solus robbed you of all of your money?
textByHashes.2dca964126a66ee10d787f8b1457953f278ac28c: You want me to pay you for information?
textByHashes.87568e5c0aabf1c68026c9bac38681885d3fd5cc: So you have information about the whereabouts of Solus Dellagar?
textByHashes.cf2ed19f0023f8534565b7fc60457b6758941190: Okay. I'll go get those for you then.
textByHashes.2f3b75d89baf7439b12fbc0eb044ffa4352b0b23: I have some essences with me, if you would take those...?
textByHashes.b629a954297ed77bd385483176ce50b1e1b1e368: Okay, I'll go get those for you then.
textByHashes.78f64e6bbb6891743eb51386f54ed1c2459daa13: I have your essences right here, take them.
textByHashes.99136d86a8b965674932a37e9bf79c82613d04c3: Okay, now you have your essence, give me my information.
textByHashes.f753ea6a45ac5815ff9e84bed7fbb9839b5a3b4e: Get on with it, I haven't got all day to waste.
textByHashes.3dec3527ab8ca3936a4ba19e3b798cdd02ad27a1: He went East. That's it? That's your 'information'?
textByHashes.a6419dd441933dfa24384d18f468734e5153f950: Hmmm. Wolf fur... and the East... I know where he is.
textByHashes.6c2269d23feeefddbf71aaf34402d804407ac881: He will be in Canifis. He must be.
textByHashes.41c65843a441de1e7976cf3563271cd675380fbb: Well, that Zamorakian mage mentioned that he had a strong magical aura, perhaps that is it?
textByHashes.59b4b60d4aab2377b27edc20280a1843194c3df3: How is teleporting really slowly particularly useful?
textByHashes.476873f2a5dedcf4d6188aece95ff1ed92b1ac03: But you abandoned this research? Why?
textByHashes.438e4156ac3bcad545eff2ce62f1ad17e0e67223: But this signature you are finding is the same as this 'slow-teleport' experiment created?
textByHashes.885d60664a64b5f40da52d701d1e8484efefc034: Well, I can see how that might be a cause for concern, but right now our priority is Solus, right?
textByHashes.7b4fecfde8b7d5f269cf6b8f6d12602ba8a528c9: Because he is invisible and in three separate places simultaneously?
textByHashes.e6668cc192b7269b44d60d103b58baabdd02a3c7: Well, we have nothing else to try, right? What will I have to do?
textByHashes.06bbaa733494fb75f0cf47b2b0006851ce38b4bf: So I should try a scan here in Canifis?
textByHashes.bea1d0d9138922390245688d6bb93bfc24f8b191: Hi Savant. Where am I supposed to look for Solus again?
textByHashes.5c6fd6ab76edbaa195b9aa1b54e3c09283792513: Nothing thanks Savant, I was just checking this thing still worked!
textByHashes.664bd413ba4cb22ec8f9d01b57977cb6332899a3: So what can we do now?
textByHashes.29319c016a51ff607b97ddf6b7e08f31ea645642: Well what are you waiting for? Try and get it!
textByHashes.5225c796c8a855a5fbc232abd5df3e011964e2e2: I doubt he's getting drunk in hiding...
textByHashes.73509ec661a570a6d0ffa413c6f490f546df7cc7: So he is improving his dress sense you think?
textByHashes.59cc5c7f8464c72d554f6c907326b13c8f7429fe: Why on gielinor would he be wearing those?
textByHashes.ff889963ed017535ef4d9eb63c2b92de20cabc09: Goblin armour? Why would he wear that?
textByHashes.4992d8cad5175337abd1e67f44ac62db5dc862ef: What the...? You think he is in disguise somewhere?
textByHashes.f2b77a62b278822bd3c2c64f97cac3058576132d: Fur? How does that help us find him?
textByHashes.d7db630d429a6d837cd9ce4800e4c6d1e629f928: Do you think he might be injured?
textByHashes.124e7b574ed28034ba85e780bde097769727b0e1: How does a hat help us?
textByHashes.0124b9944e788212e9ec849adc2e3ba03a536e0f: I am sure I have seen tickets like that somewhere before...
textByHashes.2ad8bb84346798b0cf2c84bc942623b20087f3df: Very stylish, but it doesn't seem to be his colour.
textByHashes.899c171553c2088c70dd7b88e3ba181247700313: What a weird thing to be carrying...
textByHashes.a5ebf60bd3da5b2d6de10c1127b9f29901be9ff6: The frog those came from must be huge!
textByHashes.2b98d236dad323b20b24c08d88a28579f769a854: The symbol of Zamorak? That tells us nothing.
textByHashes.516df784d1d2fe356e8253ee15e930c4ac929052: Maybe he's doing a little fishing?
textByHashes.c2b3669c52f7f258ceb009ca1a34dfba3708531d: A banana? How is that a clue to where he is?
textByHashes.88cc7384a586735ef959ba1689183697f52eec63: Okay I'll head off immediately. Let's hope we're not too late.
textByHashes.71afce7eba59b3937a648bd38ca9e4bc2d07b5d7: Solus! I am here by authority of the White Knights of Falador!
textByHashes.88d0af6a72ac71a2f70d64a4238d979a3ddacab5: That doesn't matter right now Savant, did you get a reading of where his teleport was coming from?
textByHashes.80452bf80d52785b2a326019c16e1ae9e7a628cc: More than you might think Savant. This type of cape used to be called the Cape of Champions...
textByHashes.19db390b1a3d4c0fbe210f0f33a39d375ae481d7: He threw some kind of smoke at me or something...
textByHashes.07781688bf63350eced397230636f69a4f8cccf1: Okay, I'm on my way. This Solus guy is really beginning to get on my nerves!
textByHashes.ffaeffbd52ff0b3bea494cab7ae186a98cb9bde7: You can't threaten me old man...
textByHashes.a702545ac0712141fdab844defad1ca473dd4b69: Dead or alive, you're coming with me.
textByHashes.9afea8ffabfb282f659696fdcacedc7b9cefa1d0: I don't understand though Savant, you said he could only be in a few places simultaneously...
textByHashes.5e2b8a955ce5a5c10f739dd32c16d92d8900f3a9: But he keeps getting away! And he keeps moving around!
textByHashes.a33d1917cb080340549ba24f42ab636940152e23: So he isn't going to shoot me like that again?
textByHashes.6d5238a10a6ff58a9e86b528a33f30c1d1bdf214: You're right about that, there's no way I'm letting him get away with treating me like that!
textByHashes.a769b5ecdc35161b8710f73aeb629a6d4c502646: So did we get any clues to his real location from that last scan?
textByHashes.07f94f63fe7b61f988f56604eaa763f849219e3c: It's the type of spear used by the Dorgeshuun goblins.
textByHashes.cd6600f61bbcaebbdb7b5f01f399a3949db9ce35: Okay Savant, I'll heal up, then go looking for him amongst the Dorgeshuun.
textByHashes.316dd680ca6b89188e61c179e38643c60d02da72: Did anyone get the number of that wagon?
textByHashes.0781e15296444d6dd7ac323ce63943d1ded2305a: Please tell me you have a reading on his actual location by now, this chasing him around the houses is becoming irritating...
textByHashes.15fc427379a8283c6c05e6afb238a08c0a75e470: Uh... Out of interest, what am I going to do with an insane super-powerful murderous mage when he's cornered?
textByHashes.b5c7c173ef6be837cf081a9452d07b9f064f8c84: Well okay then, where should I head now?
textByHashes.6db9b0e2a2cb31f89faa308157525e06e9dcdfd4: Okay, I'm on my way – and Solus had better watch out, I am up to here with his annoying tricks!
textByHashes.015d1f600d4f062e79aa57b21bf54fb45cc9736a: I am here to take you in Solus. You can forget your little tricks.
textByHashes.e87768c65a45f5cc13d9eedd775a47cf1c2173b9: Yeah it is, which means I know where he is, and how to get there!
textByHashes.79be798e985ad7055e241cb28f6c2f81c3a22cfc: It's a mine for Rune Essence, but there are only supposed to be a few people who know how to get there...
textByHashes.fe67df85f8738136ad29297339c5ebcac5a5593d: In the name of the White Knights of Falador, and of the Temple Knights of Saradomin, I am placing you under arrest!
textByHashes.88d8ec4ff7696cb908eae2684969cd2af57fad88: Hi Savant. Where am I supposed to be looking for Solus again?
textByHashes.ec7dc9a9e012a98f54250d73e8c43a5d2c5f0701: I did it Tiffy! I brought Solus in for capture!
textByHashes.6001f6919a1cce4f707de0db336aba8c54d01353: Yes... But I did all the legwork...
textByHashes.14690c03bf056c9883e25cf5e0a2a3d3bda00f9d: Okay Tiffy, I'll be back in a jiffy!
textByHashes.22694ee44265b29bc5558a428efaa07375631a7b: Well of course I do! I mean I did...Look, I lost it okay? Stop hassling me!
textByHashes.071dae7a2f3758f50daaa7122a63f05b526a2b2f: Oh man...I think I've messed up...Maybe Savant can help me out somehow? I'd better speak to her.
textByHashes.19e8e37a0f7cf23fc961fb1ce67232a35f22067c: Well of course I do! I just happened to think it would be a good idea to leave it in the bank for safe keeping.
textByHashes.1bbe661b2fd0a2ffdd15434cb8f07fe240fcdd74: Well of course I do! I have it right here!
textByHashes.97b0b88866945306fb39769b7ddfe2297a6ed2e1: Hello. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.d7205f2cb5352fde3ecca360269c33110f321677: What do you mean it isn't working?
textByHashes.0799cc7556f58e415d3a2abd87ded18b34fdf7c5: So how come the spell doesn't work?
textByHashes.8c3920c501dd6f7d131ab575936de7f75169b136: I'm not interested in your rantings.
textByHashes.503ba4fffdf752468c0b94418989e8a07170f520: I've got some questions about the search for evidence.
textByHashes.31df00ec3604adf39006e51963f4418fe49c694e: What do you suggest I do?
textByHashes.7a2f73d773c855c5bf883bdd9d745ad156b7fd1c: And how do you know that?
textByHashes.ea2c0c9190309d4de623761ddd0ab83366fe61b2: What do I need to do to get into the city?
textByHashes.83829fc8a8faf1a97fb131a6919c3bb70920ad43: Aha! A robe. This could be a clue...
textByHashes.eb06b221f54335fecaa849a6a6f20bcefc122683: Here's some armour; it could be evidence...
textByHashes.436c2f09be8d0537c608176bcdf9254d176a42f3: Aha, a dagger! I wonder if this is evidence...
textByHashes.61e276408620e3f2743a5aa369a93d7c33a62216: I've found an eye patch; I had better show this to the Watchtower Wizard.
textByHashes.7550b8c2b324091c2bb0ebbe92b459ec7142777b: What's this? Disgusting! Some fingernails. They may be a clue though... I'd better take them.
textByHashes.020b63fa81ed0191d00162aa24d40b413e415235: I have already searched this place.
textByHashes.67fea0df9fe4ebd92af61b21107940d3557e892a: I've got some questions regarding the tribal ogres.
textByHashes.57854122d1094dd98b2a4c94ec20788db7b69882: I am having difficulty with the tribes.
textByHashes.2f8f10b5c5e0d3fccd3616311cc4f59f142fa86b: I have lost something the ogres gave to me.
textByHashes.2d000b2c78fe894bb2eca599a38ba7a4373a5825: I seek entrance to the city of ogres.
textByHashes.7427427858d84d1a7fd3b7061ea6e1676a3dabaa: I'll find a way, trust me.
textByHashes.220e74df9e6debdf0c282f27858677f731c57276: I could do something for you...
textByHashes.71fa2e7ffa4fb87921ac04469f1a14028592868a: I don't have what you want.
textByHashes.343019c26db104a69e0d842d8312f6a186dad30e: When I say I will get something, I get it!
textByHashes.c721073b754717f4cbb4203ad7798217e7f7b8e4: I can't find the relic part you gave me.
textByHashes.6794815e1071bdf9a2cad244b5cff170739f1bef: I think I need a key of some sort.
textByHashes.dfa9e6f35bbbb9b5dbc7f98bd2dd3cc100e7474e: What can I do to help an ogre?
textByHashes.c4d84c69a58181732326fcca76d6a2186d38a98b: I have come to kill you!
textByHashes.942cd289e06f1771c020344f7307a60ebf7122ae: Oh yeah, I've got it right here.
textByHashes.1df85f1d1b6b4eb836aebe7dc9722d16d11ffb4a: Do you have any other tasks for me?
textByHashes.049a95d316e63bd4873f20e1e18bcfce0bbb917b: I have lost the relic part you gave me.
textByHashes.91e317d24cf420ac6b0b934f16f877f563a6d418: I want to enter the city of ogres.
textByHashes.900df8bf907465ca53dc3ae62018cac611873052: Don't eat me; I can help you.
textByHashes.2d843122d2ba06e7681ed3025b5c783fa97888c6: I am a mighty adventurer, slayer of monsters and user of magic powers.
textByHashes.9cc3f86b0729635b667c4251afea841f640a280d: You will have to kill me first.
textByHashes.bc2c5568ab1b48ff3cbfdabfe7975498824ea7b4: I've come to knock your teeth out!
textByHashes.532aa07e89326ffeb8bfa428ecd14de1985a2fc5: Can I do anything else for you?
textByHashes.01d1ae0656d9c0ae508da494b3b186aec3e4d88e: I've lost the relic part you gave me.
textByHashes.22661c31a311e71131a93115d756d7f2da5c1a7c: I've lost the crystal you gave me.
textByHashes.e00936d169ad9f87a5328bd10cf13e8cee5ff56b: An ogre called Og gave me this...
textByHashes.01e5324f2f2cd4c22eff10e43ceb4ccc7ed197ea: An ogre called Grew gave me this...
textByHashes.a8a805d296c87f2a4c525d7292e884083960e123: An ogre called Toban gave me this...
textByHashes.7e85a18be00c026186bede3d2a05edc2e157176a: I've got some questions about the ogre city.
textByHashes.49406bccccc74b94b36d8da2c9f66fa9d0c861c9: I had a feeling you might say that.
textByHashes.f59521c1f3cfa3729a1b68383a0758f99ccc8e7c: I can't get past the guards.
textByHashes.2aa7ad49e45b069f0e849e31cc3af20aab292fe4: I have lost the relic you gave me.
textByHashes.696e78c992e7bab4260acbd8bf22afbb988b8fa2: I will find my way in, no problem.
textByHashes.31efac46e5fe82464b5d63d9b3949374de1d059d: I've made it into the ogre city!
textByHashes.891eb71d6978776f902cdf4d29ff6117b4272b55: It's like talking to a broken record.
textByHashes.58c2ea6f703a6f3b5fed7b82e90a6b330be8429b: I have gained entry to the city!
textByHashes.71f98b7a61badb524f7dd4fb099e3aa818999fbd: I still can't navigate the skavid caves.
textByHashes.d3d13afa82c5d20c87ee1a05465a20594a4e7c15: Okay thanks, I'll go and find out.
textByHashes.6c34e45326484f99f7ecead3b5ac9421a1263cb8: But I am a friend to ogres...
textByHashes.660d175ff47d7fb18e03a1aa06e8c4f3273b5d1f: Not if I can help it.
textByHashes.de263b55dc2112c3b0665cf1a3e5db0e584d9502: Um... is there anything in my backpack that you'd want?
textByHashes.9684242412bb9ba869b3d4468504804ef8f08b13: You want me to give you 20 gold pieces to let me jump off a bridge?
textByHashes.03c3daf92b12825fd67cd3637971998654fbab3d: I am an ogre killer come to destroy you!
textByHashes.c01a9985356b6e1889540946d4772d504afe376a: I seek passage into the skavid caves.
textByHashes.3130205f0a9949c82bc3ff5414485ba373607645: Can I hear the riddle again?
textByHashes.d577ed103fa471d591af0861a828b3e12de338a4: Do you have any other riddles for me?
textByHashes.02892c84b3c4774f2e437144eb779227f8fbf4c2: I have lost the map you gave me.
textByHashes.24e7cf2fc7372ef9ff053981c719ebd1dba01a5d: I'm glad that was easier on the way back!
textByHashes.10c006630be6726123d6d9f89c78dc704f744c8e: I've got some questions about the skavid caves.
textByHashes.9d8a394d6157ca35a5b5ef019a98e8d8d9bb90c7: I have worked out the guard's puzzle.
textByHashes.9586c0c1bbbcd3aaf6f32074b2830ed9b9a0647e: I am still trying to navigate the skavid caves.
textByHashes.0a38cde005a5a114e2d7fb62613084d8edb024d5: I am trying to get into the shamans' cave.
textByHashes.ad7ab144864038c1e9b39b45bbb724456834bb5b: Stop moaning, creature. I know about you skavids - you serve those monsters, the ogres.
textByHashes.26c64f63d3cbee92a1ed73c224b000a4fbe203b5: You have something that belongs to me...
textByHashes.0ce4a1ff83ba5542abbd0bf691cd345262548dbb: Somehow, I find your words hard to believe.
textByHashes.2e29599e86395317e8c8a284ad79f6cc96d6b4fb: I don't believe you, hand it over!
textByHashes.c7d5a94e1e8a9fddcb52583d0161e9f3cfae7b03: Oh great, I'm not getting anywhere.
textByHashes.f997abac9043eefdf38674872f5e295ebd5aca22: Okay, okay, I'm not going to hurt you.
textByHashes.cafb305ec669abdd19d1fd5b16a168d6c1253fb5: I am studying the speech of your kind...
textByHashes.e8875510ab8d54d45ee7750a6e92aea590316932: I have gained access to the skavid caves.
textByHashes.8f45c4cbe808360b6ae37167af057cb90ac82bc4: 'You'll have to speak with the Watchtower Wizard about that.'
textByHashes.e981623d59788981a7d6103d55abae86afc1edfd: I'd get more help out of a-
textByHashes.07a99861c9150c7288463125b21913496203e736: It goes well. I can now navigate the skavid caves.
textByHashes.98b737f133ca06bfb0ae94048ba7c805a39a02d3: I had a crystal, but I lost it!
textByHashes.a93bb2ea9ed678459fc68c6d0c1f46237bce45bb: I am now ready for the shamans.
textByHashes.0e78fe9d58293e7de55439522762d3d7cac3bd7b: I want to go in there.
textByHashes.4d3ee6a89c43fd0c08c9abab9da49ff38e42ee6a: I want to rid the world of ogres.
textByHashes.7b75fd22867ec6834d30ce5f5ec595e21e08b517: The shamans are too powerful for me to attack!
textByHashes.ea8fe6802cf7651331affc3ab0031af3ada8df28: I have found the cave of ogre shaman, but I cannot touch them!
textByHashes.b7c63a35bc5ea7f0859f02bc7304d06389b3a081: Can you tell me again what I need for the potion?
textByHashes.4fb9deca815c56724c1d77004077c08d04816ef5: I have some bat bones; how can I grind them?
textByHashes.181d6b24a217f1608afe85b10aadbfa67e95e403: No, I'm still working on it.
textByHashes.a9565576e2d0613ee13d40c6cb5e369bc7a83377: Any chance of advice about this potion?
textByHashes.2c72078c5428ec98e6c269bbefc5f2b33f3b67bd: That's five! Only one more left now...
textByHashes.f850169e223ada7ca7c195f1a89444f05be36fea: I already have this crystal. There is no benefit to getting another.
textByHashes.9119221b156b4f11eb82fde891fbb3cbe6b2398e: Indeed it did! I wiped out those ogre shamans!
textByHashes.81c601f3e0e289b40b73b6971b93dd2a3f68d26d: I had another crystal but I lost it.
textByHashes.120314c14596e22213f074685d9d758b863ef850: I am looking for another crystal.
textByHashes.104c9ddf74a1f6cade4139da73ded081604a2cbc: Okay, I will go and have a look.
textByHashes.036064ee4f315cb845abd9f0691099881a93a127: Do you have any more quests for me?
textByHashes.4c4b2b34812dc8812d635093b2ec003c3f1c928c: I lost the scroll you gave me.
textByHashes.52d9cb29acd45d0c2eaa1f35e97f25e7d532c236: I could go and take a look for you if you like?
textByHashes.04efaea4730607131ee58d5f95589bc877616c6c: I'm afraid I'm in a rush.
textByHashes.7963850a88b9d690d177e16467183be636b855c6: I'm afraid not, but I'm sure he hasn't gone far.
textByHashes.71415e430a18b686e97d54408f59a11f344d49d4: Have you seen a small boy?
textByHashes.4865ee499979ff8786f0df8e8c13d65815cc9dd2: Hello son, are you okay? You need help?
textByHashes.2f8200953eceac445d45158244eb3dbaadfbe29a: Your mum sent me to find you.
textByHashes.b286c7e3b5765ca270d467476863abc6e0455921: Where is this treasure you talk of?
textByHashes.d162cb38b6b95773455bb10b440070758ecd8595: Hmm... I wonder what this treasure is.
textByHashes.4a46d4653769ce6aa1966c2865e96abe89fcf607: Interesting, is there somewhere I can learn more about this?
textByHashes.90720f6ecb0a49029a8910542e5765e1fb1247ef: I saw Hudon by the river but he refused to come back with me.
textByHashes.de2df91305b3cdf21ca2ef6f478da1e26b417f31: Any ideas what I could do while I'm here?
textByHashes.c65997827c6080ecb474c46dec5260a57742dee4: What treasure are they looking for?
textByHashes.a4e62e1f541065827910162fd01568c7aef7b053: Can you tell me what happened to the elven king?
textByHashes.e6f834bdc8323bc1994e7142511777fd2a86e215: Where else is worth visiting around here?
textByHashes.d6c39650741eac9d1d6af164a556b7b8ddb3d10f: Is there treasure under the waterfall?
textByHashes.3ca6b027d67c50c801264fa8cf26a649ead227de: I didn't know it belonged to you.
textByHashes.19bd7f3eb66c39174f1b0eea2b2e1b334f2b3ad6: Okay... I'll have a look for a key.
textByHashes.1ff263710991cbbebebb56eec7ff204a9e38460d: Do you mind if I have a look?
textByHashes.4d0e66c25ce6e3bfa75c0f2b9a85f3ba23aebae8: Could I take this old pebble?
textByHashes.7ed0efb0b876c6f1632b6e179f576aa10b09ddaf: Do you mind if I have another look through this stuff?
textByHashes.46f2b959460ae5126a0ac38f12624824b57de112: Well, I wouldn't count on it.
textByHashes.401ad7755b3b9857a96383d699c4a3ca0512abfd: I'll make sure it goes to a good cause.
textByHashes.13229f2cee3521c78d6f621e8e60d42a4774a0e8: Of course. Sorry to bother you!
textByHashes.d98c03c4e9edf1de8fe3c13d5551753ac8e129b6: Why, what seems to be the matter?
textByHashes.724ee03ad0fc8ceca0ed73e40732e7f33ea2ba7e: That's awful! You're lucky to be alive!
textByHashes.be7280bdc5a9a8e0a2e3cfae031c57eeb9034754: Of course! Tell me what you need me to do.
textByHashes.9e0642d9187002597bd6c75f6920200ac0f8bd4d: Don't worry, Ratty! I won't let you down!
textByHashes.67f0a56d9eaee090b9f7720d9412ab4c4c3e544d: No, sorry, I have to go!
textByHashes.5ca0118845341919a4e7053c89511ab90cb6b56e: Uh, are you guilt tripping me?
textByHashes.407febe7fe240366d1a22ba704a3690265589cf7: No, that's not what...oh, never mind!
textByHashes.de3a73036fd1d73893820fa9aa1d47c85671d90a: The papers were the only valuable thing you had?
textByHashes.cc8189a32bca10bd618c252f9ec98314fbb1a6b0: So you don't sell anything worth having?
textByHashes.65c9dc07ca555ea23fb0fcafd257f392f4cf20ac: You're not much of a trader are you?
textByHashes.566d0611ea08a29d96598833aee4989128a0d246: Shall I get them back for you?
textByHashes.187f84c4fed902cf4a4f6eb3716c6ef15ff3623f: Oh dear. Well, I hope you get to Varrock okay!
textByHashes.20959633901319fe81597b16f5e2e5ed92dee077: Sorry. I'm a bit busy right now.
textByHashes.6ad12062ae76cc02d4db6bd3db82025741fd3c72: No thanks. I'm too busy right now.
textByHashes.8e5450488d381c78ea9467b6c711417641e796de: I can't remember what I am supposed to do!
textByHashes.64eacacc9248ddec373191300cedbb751a37c0bc: I lost the folder you gave me. Do you have another one?
textByHashes.460ab4ef5981d8290ec0636ec4c694eeb3e570f0: My account? Am I in debt?
textByHashes.b0c33b343886ace588fad9a505de9dae18989e61: Hey, Rat! I got your pages back!
textByHashes.a64058b240b76424d3b7f2aed3df3af2cdbb66ba: Wait! Wait! Let me guess! You're actually a rich prince in disguise who wants to help poor people like me!?
textByHashes.343f242cf10c13526843dffdec64b6cb38b5270d: All work and no play makes a dull adventurer!
textByHashes.7404d061288e24283978d94b30adbe0c164ea9b0: Letter. Wizard. Varrock. Library. Got it!
textByHashes.1a67d8b9551704ee2e9cf983e177f5bce288ff56: Rat, I think I lost that letter you gave me!
textByHashes.20debe5f10ea25388149e5fc1e5288cf6f76b3b3: I didn't come here to be insulted!
textByHashes.16b1eba5d98038c9a83c8639ef3bda75661196b7: No, look. I have a letter for you.
textByHashes.9999395fb43d1201d8a4f286ed307e8d5a1fa211: Oh. I had it here a moment ago. Where is it?
textByHashes.bfe10182559ddbeedfea07ce37d6e08c2e787319: I'm very sorry! Let me go get another one!
textByHashes.5e7d9a82219c0f4c9d52a26b6bb525ffda735378: Why did you destroy the letter?
textByHashes.d37d5dbbdeab0ae6d8856241de827f1126729800: Yes, there seems to be a lot of them going around at the moment.
textByHashes.34089722c5b5e72429ec30b4422c2d899a706272: How would I get something like that?
textByHashes.00ee2a7a9ed6be8d5b25f4b9371e20a9411ad76c: How on earth do you know about Runecrafting? I thought only a few people knew of it.
textByHashes.2288aac00d8728d7e23f4d98abf78cd8459bd813: Where can I get a talisman or a tiara?
textByHashes.95cea557aadf90d3d7477fa04220c9e29875a0a7: No thanks. I have other things to do for now!
textByHashes.3da6e0e8fc1d14a04be762c39e59a1db96ce1d3e: Uh, why are you repeating yourself like that?
textByHashes.bd32f92cd026da3d7883081f22300ffbf1fce39c: Remind me what I am doing again?
textByHashes.e73cc38ae06e6d556731a94f7eae8ae9b6d1c38b: How much gold will I get?
textByHashes.06ea0085d20b810f6fda70c131be3a79d09dab59: Can I ask about the diary?
textByHashes.790ce45c7f406f0bfa1f9f81430f778a22ee38e0: Hey, wait! Isn't your last name Magis too? Are you related to him?
textByHashes.4cbb617538ca16d3c7bb71f09d4c9759cee57ec7: No, really! It's okay! You can tell me where it is!
textByHashes.3a1e735ac20db13fd2ca256418d279eb37ae4b85: Yes, I seem to have misplaced the last one.
textByHashes.747542cb7b2e6f8f68c5c80cb938d5711e2b8c6b: Never mind, I forgot the question.
textByHashes.fd22db8da252b3671f1a7de97059327fe675c511: Where is that tome you mentioned, again?
textByHashes.20d51f1d3abb869687a8ebd806435f4287aae309: That's right! I did your leg work. Now, how about a reward?
textByHashes.c8a86fc1bb8fa3d0581a9f58dfe7bf2015fc1603: A bronze one? Why bronze? They're pretty cheap and tacky.
textByHashes.4bb7113793b76fba13a0a59c6ba3cad0035abc55: I see. Well, thanks for the help.
textByHashes.a6791a084a41dc82ea57bd0c92a4f6f644f8108c: Thanks, but I already have one.
textByHashes.4aa15d1c66e157e05c05e9bcdff5bc4d9b2c757d: Oh, I see. Well, what can you tell me about it?
textByHashes.3c8257c5a6c214eef527564c29d9fc2fbd9634df: Okay, I'd better go and train some more then!
textByHashes.658ab4e967dadea13e6fe4ec317e82be4b34f7ed: Right, well, I better see what's down there, then.
textByHashes.c70cd486c9a1c419d0b16afb1b74a7301a45f35e: Aren't you going to go inside?
textByHashes.9d92e3abb897095b5451607f7316a515c5a08ff1: Okay, then. I'm going in to have a look!
textByHashes.c9987023ad09cd0f41d7be672c0e062c8a1fd9f0: I can't tell you. It's a secret!
textByHashes.5dc93d81967b7d60b7e1dde0d09a5789b9786ca9: I made the wand that you asked me for, but I seem to have lost it!
textByHashes.1341aa7ad87d8bef5f665eab86100628dc63e04c: I have the things you wanted!
textByHashes.5743484f657649cde9a4de520e97103366710216: So...about this gold that you're going to give me?
textByHashes.ffce029be40629e530e3677abb327601fc01caf2: Okay, but I'll be back for my gold.
textByHashes.67df007726e9326e2ee4d8e2dbd3157ed28496d3: I seem to have lost that letter you gave me!
textByHashes.343a1172518002a18b63ce96cfb0ba0d860cd8c7: That letter was treasonous so I destroyed it!
textByHashes.4c31d69f5a4b3a9ecc8de239e968090475a3354a: So what's in it for me?
textByHashes.f8af5fac1a6b902cb72f86d7dc297635b339c748: Not that I'm complaining about the living part, but I was expecting something of more...er...value?
textByHashes.d84eaa63918d497b1d67c2b8a0af147bb9b513ec: Fine. I will deliver the letter, but I will be back soon.
textByHashes.8097d519f4bada237c4cf4e0e0ecaf3537fc1671: Do I still get the gold?
textByHashes.168cef0d048d402fc3193bcf325ce0bca7112ff9: Your majesty, I think that you should see this letter.
textByHashes.5884081714dc9f74c4e23f7ecc233cc1412f0d9a: This letter was delivered to me by hand, your majesty. I think you may be in some danger.
textByHashes.6a72f06b6cfbef119a49d73495cf36dee2bcab87: I'm trying to save your life!
textByHashes.62bb3c140e80f0fd9732f8d61a0bbd4f75c3c0d7: I'm just saying that the letter is real.
textByHashes.1d5e8c101a13cf4309974fa3339e9a5fc0e727cc: I...er...I reckon it's a fake! ...I guess...
textByHashes.c3f2a9eae3deef0b4e009ca9c5d060c28d4754db: Yes! I have a letter for you.
textByHashes.37f7954a5d05727c65af5d9d78091b3614412261: Okay, I had a feeling you weren't a real trader due to the fact that you had nothing to sell! So why the secrecy?
textByHashes.4f91d577e5ef4e675a5a6474da872edc6a48375c: I think I can believe that. Surok's not the nicest person in Misthalin!
textByHashes.c311ba04a5d53f087d53c2435808fc48a50b103e: Uh oh! I think I may have helped him by mistake, here. He promised me a big reward if I collected some items for him...but he said it was for a spell to make gold!
textByHashes.3aa4d2edf5b82f192f98746e08be952d64b5b596: Thank you! How can I help fix this mistake?
textByHashes.b61652686b291c3d9e04e3a5f85dd1476d31db58: Yes, sir! I'm on my way!
textByHashes.380fcd29548943a57d8c59bd3d29fd16a168fb93: Yes, and you have some explaining to do!
textByHashes.a67941618459838ded7f31462165ecc40e6195fb: This letter from Surok to you implies that you're involved in a treasonous plot! I should tell the guards about you!
textByHashes.1ae08468b48e7f3f791899e1fa974d9b48ea4ef5: You have? Who told you that?
textByHashes.e96a4f581302c06bdfe282b15691b5331f40049f: Do you think we can stop Surok?
textByHashes.18f6665792484d695fecc3dbe903360a3058a25e: Do you have anything to trade yet?
textByHashes.83f388c7d78eefb5f9d5c4bb81f781dda06f8ec0: You know, your cart IS kind of small!
textByHashes.f36494a2ad7874871ec6649bec79781ca749fb09: I've been told of your foul plans, Surok! You lied to me about the gold, so I've come to stop you!
textByHashes.5ffac572459157bd48949b2615b1d40f4450e289: I'll fight you if I have to!
textByHashes.5e7ed0e6a5ac9a3d6a32732cee60786c4899f78d: Why must I summon you? Can't you come with me?
textByHashes.8654993bf2d6cb2c249569a856a105f7a9358d9d: Okay, so what do I do now?
textByHashes.5fcaf1d78793709e93886d25716f1c3cf25fd04a: Won't he be disinclined to acquiesce to that request?
textByHashes.9dfd979ad81ff9f2593edac10e591698aed1336b: I need to ask you something else.
textByHashes.eecdfcb5a7364504fbb84c9734db14969831e3c3: Can I have the instructions again?
textByHashes.8a1d7eaf31f672b5620027af0200736c43709a90: Sorry, I was just testing the ring.
textByHashes.984f4b279de06766baaef9cb8e12ed35ed896852: I have been to see Zaff and he has told me to go and arrest Surok.
textByHashes.f2771ac972c90958d586b41f66dc3d66363207ae: Oooh! Do we have adventurer's insurance?
textByHashes.05291dc0d26b0d788c661a83832a435fe033cee5: Oh, well that sounds just as good!
textByHashes.f75e881b314fee1e0eef3b3f7794e027228f13a0: Can you tell me of the Dagon'hai?
textByHashes.90dbddea5cf2e597623ad49fd7c6fb1f40a76722: Surok gave me a diary that spoke of them. Do you know anything about them?
textByHashes.3a99f81a6b5f79840a1b9eef5ea21ec7412630ef: So how do you know about them?
textByHashes.466168bc07d8e3460c1dcbe587a8ae9d755646af: I've lost that ring I had!
textByHashes.fb6cabadc735dd25aa2ece558ee34fb96f457bb7: Uh, yes, sorry! I forgot about that!
textByHashes.8b9b108602101fbb9c6b69938075701215b4ebe2: What benefits do I get in the VPSG?
textByHashes.00aa1b9127e4ee54fca8b48c980e9d7bd40d26bc: So I don't get the secret spy-pack then?
textByHashes.6da20edfcf04a275bf1529ea9d59f66cb2c6484b: Surok!! Your plans have been uncovered! You are hereby under arrest on the authority of the Varrock Palace Secret Guard!
textByHashes.45ad013a37ccc945eb92d0841d489ab4cc2adc21: The place is surrounded. There is nowhere to run!
textByHashes.541f015f813aea28f0da15604bb81be4f236f57e: Uh oh! King Roald looks evil!
textByHashes.cd36d8fdc964fcecbae693166ea94352436cbbd1: Why did you teleport us? We were winning!
textByHashes.dd4b14639c1c2df2b5c5b35b482dd6659ac8dcc6: Yes. Let this be a lesson to you.
textByHashes.4f85c73b9bb3547fe8481172600c1645e001ef71: We did it! We beat Surok!
textByHashes.6206be96f1a2be85839c10324d6028b18e6342e2: It was all in the call of duty!
textByHashes.cd8e4aa47f879a425fc21cb38bacae57bc50a902: What will happen with Surok now?
textByHashes.cb505d54cdf925b27c41a8b2c9abde63e8f78056: You should have been there! There was this...and Surok was like...and I was...and then the King...and, and...uh...ahem! The mission was accomplished and the king has been saved.
textByHashes.9a202be863f35f116c4f91683c4ee8fc48d3f7cb: You know, one thing bothers me. He's now stuck in the library, but wasn't that the reason we were in this mess in the first place?
textByHashes.a9fa7b154c6afd9e6e96b45d18ba9cbda6f0ef58: So, do you have any more jobs for me to do?
textByHashes.b706170e41ee772e804529d4ea1bf1bf2beb7ffa: I did, but I have a few questions...
textByHashes.61ef0ed92f333fa92b2c514a3fbc45db51432f71: Hang on... Did you say Lucien?
textByHashes.72579373a3819d241b436be819c9f567fca80459: I think I'll pass. This is all a bit weird for me.
textByHashes.0cb3b93fbb2fa306a538d1bf7ded1a00911ebf31: Hello there. What do you do here?
textByHashes.948b1cee9eed04a45844399f5d2621529a51c388: Sorry, but I'm going to need some explanation. What's going on, and what does it have to do with Lucien?
textByHashes.ce4284d846c2cd6229d5a99a0613189aa82498d7: But I never received any message.
textByHashes.d1413fcddac0902ca82a8b636d5d35ed178008f7: Sorry, but I'm going to need a bit more of an explanation on what's going on. The message I received didn't have too many details.
textByHashes.02461d73dfcbbc46a4785eaf287309ff74ba1e9b: Safeguard? Doesn't that risk conflicting with the peaceful nature of being a druid?
textByHashes.62435055a0aaf940fc3795223284ec44e1969bdc: Lucien must consider you to be quite the threat to him.
textByHashes.af6baaee29f8fcf973c350de4b9b08360fe7e049: You think the assassins were targeting me?
textByHashes.fcdf7d0c3a4887c66fa641e3afbc3b07057cc18a: And you'd like me to join this alliance as well? Even though I helped Lucien before?
textByHashes.800a25e6403c5ef469c6ca9c01f593878c17771a: And you'd like me to join this alliance as well?
textByHashes.835b3848ebd8e85ff6de9aa9f7991a6c7ebfd134: I see. So what would you have me do?
textByHashes.4e2f409d198796669958e7b367addba9e8b805a9: Movario? What can you tell me about him?
textByHashes.9f71062668328bc11ba478d0a91ebd7deecf6eb1: So he's a bit of a history buff?
textByHashes.2eff49c3d8b73bcba8eef558ffbb7a8228897c97: Any ideas where I should start?
textByHashes.0cf0806be6c4c7df3f527f229cb65e558a1ebfe1: Is there anything else you can tell me about Movario?
textByHashes.1332d6d96c80e0c10c8dbd5975a775f782f3a7a6: That doesn't seem like a lot to go on. How can you be sure he's involved?
textByHashes.c5a078bf4d021294f7ae63bf199a31f655794156: I see. Anything else of note?
textByHashes.2e21ce8f3813eeb67fcb3cb68461d10cc2e304cf: That's... concerning. How did you find all of this out?
textByHashes.b8e4731254fdb830fa8a0160a6f2c7677057b1a1: Reldo? A local librarian was the source of information on a master artefact hunter working with Lucien?
textByHashes.41a19400ba157fe9056d757acf4ab2dcfa318e39: Do we have any more information on what Lucien is up to?
textByHashes.634cb85e8bc1537670a0fa51f83340e1802007d7: There's no shortage of necromancers, especially in the Wilderness. How can you be sure it's Lucien?
textByHashes.fbeacc801043678fdbc702cf01817d5dcae5b701: I see. Sounds like we need to learn more as soon as we can.
textByHashes.31a8111b2d576329c1999d0260835a423fae7493: Could you tell me more about Crux Eqal?
textByHashes.7d2776675550b67892c8b45936c04ba542d94545: I hope you don't mind me saying that druids are not known to be the best fighters. How are you ensuring that you're prepared to take on these threats?
textByHashes.c1580407d492b875a891501b101ebb5fbf8fa9dc: You don't happen to know anyone called Darve, do you?
textByHashes.672e115f5e5107363cbd8f69aa7f3a63bb56b4ef: Do you know anyone called Darve?
textByHashes.80f5175319e6f7a5dd5431bf72fa09920365ad7e: Well what about someone called Movario?
textByHashes.fe522605635b978f233532424c6e3a390c147515: Well do you know someone who can?
textByHashes.968e1bae357db3a3e36ddb4fecb6e0ba8d59f8b8: Right... Anyway, you don't happen to know someone called Darve do you? Or maybe someone called Movario?
textByHashes.93fe64ab336fb9a9a1bf524ab2a2b3c8c5fb452c: Okay, I'll be back shortly with the money.
textByHashes.b570b271e4fb500bf5885c941cefb5637b5d0ee6: Now, what can you tell me about Movario?
textByHashes.81433c1107945317e45ec698b3fc895aa101b4dc: So does he live somewhere nearby?
textByHashes.8b162d3f9c3ff89727751bec7860d65a8acc204b: Hmm... I need some way of tracking him down...
textByHashes.eaf6692a8c4f688e1c2fc795bf376450ef54cd9d: Hang on... What was it you were saying earlier about those broavs?
textByHashes.67a56d20007373cdc7e0c0a63308e2d1de5ea7bf: You don't think I'd be able to use one to track Movario, do you?
textByHashes.4e57190005a26c2ff941aa3bb41bf6503338b3ff: Surely you have something he won't miss.
textByHashes.0341195c8e0b37844706f502a44dd00b0eb2d471: Thanks. So how would I go about getting myself one of those broavs?
textByHashes.cb84d8098bf0b8c9215e4e39f572026dd80b3eb8: Perfect! Thanks for all the help.
textByHashes.eb0edf449174498e6715367eb13e52c1d008a3ae: Great! So what can you tell me about Movario?
textByHashes.d069cd853688eefeda071ba30a572381ee44875d: Hello again. Could you remind me where I can get one of those broavs?
textByHashes.04820b8ac23ed9bc806f13bf1bfba285d5213bcc: Do you think you could help me with broavs?
textByHashes.e31bf4397f15deedbc13d7bbba8c03bfb2249f4e: Training? How do I train them?
textByHashes.54c9f8b9614fce645da6e9a8f97050ef76deb570: Oh, okay. So I just bring a broav to you and you can train it?
textByHashes.bfbd9108a2706c93c96f7823ca110918bfa3f02b: Mort Myre? That's quite the trip.
textByHashes.230eaba124dea27a95ab167a58268cd013b9da48: It's alright boy, take your time.
textByHashes.9e05c11f94e750ef55b1bc826e8b6c23c0829cd3: Slow and steady wins the race...
textByHashes.6e0eeda0a2396cea47965cce95e5482f2f670116: Okay, this isn't going to work. I think I need to take this broav to a hunting expert to get it woken up.
textByHashes.1588595be1b5f0a59f36748a5744d0a055a336aa: Do you think you could train this broav for me?
textByHashes.c745ea72c353f3284282d7a71bf6d1b927fb34fd: I've found a hideout near the Fight Arena that I think belongs to Movario. I've already found a few interesting things inside, but I'm going to keep searching and see what else I can uncover.
textByHashes.62699387cd42e6357349391cc062fda026334f70: I've found a hideout near the Fight Arena that seems to belong to Movario. I found these interesting research notes inside that I think might be of use.
textByHashes.90d1006a83b6d947ebdc25699c9ba203ff10224e: Thanks. So what's our next move?
textByHashes.051a2ec4caca5d3be7f4b90279bc778495edd225: Sounds sensible. So are we heading over there now?
textByHashes.821814aec917d5839c578b716be25df9dcb71099: Alright, I'll get over there right away.
textByHashes.efe5f046afe33e30d378899b1640fc8fcca0febd: Alright, I'll go there right away.
textByHashes.ac0d680fe9d47595fa6d4b8dc66cdfc65aebf87f: Sent by Lucien, no doubt. Thaerisk suspected something like this would happen.
textByHashes.9d80967aee4f781335e8ae8c7bb0eb815fd307fc: Well that's why I'm here. I intend to fix that mistake no matter what. I hope that means something.
textByHashes.70570f528bc717fd66d55272a8fbe42e02b92185: The Temple Knights have agreed to join the alliance. They're establishing a headquarters in the White Knights' Castle for us to use. Thaerisk asked us to meet him there.
textByHashes.ef980f09736d40ce912c743abf0abe5ecbd0c5e4: Not exactly, but I was there when the Temple of the Eye was first uncovered. I had some sort of vision of the Stone. I've somehow known its name ever since.
textByHashes.a571e27470033a892f7cb5f2a52cae1c77d7268a: The Wilderness is a big place. Too big. We'll need a more accurate location before we can do anything.
textByHashes.9df2d77cd7392b3a2efe0009458213e5b154cf86: What is that thing? A commorb?
textByHashes.425a8c275237ad902802daf15fa218a8fb65083c: Alright, where can I find these spies?
textByHashes.269f4d9f2984a094a50fc34f8254fdcb8a754203: Tell me a bit more about yourself, Thaerisk.
textByHashes.db112dcd840435cbc9268b75a73e651debdef8d6: And that's what led to Crux Eqal?
textByHashes.c71795dd5e6b0b1a4f67f197e6b8f08cbec74c29: What do you know about the Stone of Jas?
textByHashes.b609eca0b0358f31f72dcd7971f04ae4357dda34: And you don't know where it was hidden?
textByHashes.c5207406971c8fe9fa26db31da27f4137a6375fd: What do you think of Akrisae?
textByHashes.18ab215a5387c0b1e89fcceb4dd4d7b1c40c46f5: What do you think of Idria?
textByHashes.51926572b181c9e7e1568a47c2b4f672f1a6bed7: Well if all goes well, they'll be avenged soon.
textByHashes.0ff7e6854ebc44c58fac1823119d40fa357c9733: I've managed to plant the orb!
textByHashes.ee8d0cbff98e25ebb0b32731bfa4e595469366b7: Do you mind if I ask you a bit about yourself?
textByHashes.09b517912f389fe9c1f5118668598dd057982444: But do you not think it would be beneficial for us to know a bit more about each other?
textByHashes.0f0a95f6cc5b0305609da146e5e1beff992ae3c9: What do you think of Thaerisk?
textByHashes.bfce59e73331cff5b9b3f03dec3d8ac2ac062ea2: Could you tell me a bit more about yourself?
textByHashes.73cb2e9b2524084eed98e52f2586a9308c7fa74c: It would be useful to know a few details though, considering we're now working together.
textByHashes.ed3006835a65e1047291fcc5b06a0cd307861b98: But it seems Saradomin wasn't the only one to use it.
textByHashes.1ce8aaa5c5f8418ff4b58d9378097ca0e3133f31: So do you not believe what Movario discovered?
textByHashes.1ad49f34d5923db0aa6d837d5d0adc0c8c3bed0e: It's quite something having the followers of multiple different gods all working together like this.
textByHashes.59e861f7d348bbaf7573d45bc1b4f7fdcd4d27f3: Alright, you've all made your points, but we're not going to achieve anything like this. Thaerisk, can we make more of this potion?
textByHashes.56f4a28dbe8199028e4e4dc9ceff0c2d291b69a4: Could you teleport me to Port Sarim?
textByHashes.5e552c3406ebd83e4e807ba2c3cbdd4b028e8ba3: I'm working on getting us a replacement truth serum.
textByHashes.75780e6e7ef4cc652ef2813acf26ccbb5bd02454: Don't worry, Thaerisk and I are working on it.
textByHashes.542e28a747c54906062e7c8c3e67c62a4ec640e3: Could you help me make some enriched snapdragon?
textByHashes.2fce65d143e999002e98c9b764097899854ed7f2: But I don't have a rose-tinted lens.
textByHashes.ae6712d98407358bd94b22c02dbb35b06568d9f5: In that case, I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.a8ff0733a170e3fdbeb3d5ca0663d747ba772a25: I see. I'll have to ask Thaerisk about that. Thanks for the help, Betty.
textByHashes.468e7a2a5ae7952b58533785eabe654b56dea784: What do I do with it now?
textByHashes.d5c7cfc8c0071950d72df666666f9dea1c956a74: I have it right here. What now?
textByHashes.90b4df17403c73ca831f1bc077aa40ed8a2b169f: I take it you have some people in mind?
textByHashes.62b38d246be4203e8dc1efd7e36a19eb5d68f0a4: Ah, Cyrisus! I'm glad to hear he's considered a great warrior now. Back when I first met him he needed a bit of help with that sort of thing.
textByHashes.61e915e5304182d7af5a263eb3cf38b321dbba42: I need to talk to you about Lucien.
textByHashes.37faf79c4de9031143609b41893952ee623ecc5c: He's a Mahjarrat who's growing in power and is trying to become a god! We're forming an alliance against him at the White Knight's Castle. We'd like you to join us.
textByHashes.ad904a89ca832641badfd0af689b8fa33d14bd56: That's great, Turael. I'll see you in Falador.
textByHashes.3a05a6945f1aa3099dfcc6276bc46bd57f68335a: Who do you think will take over from you?
textByHashes.f12398395fe87e3d02499c8a7d7522867a9da55d: And what happens if you end up getting bored of this new retirement?
textByHashes.eae8fcd521a99df81154e1aac33141e191f35540: Well if it takes off, I'll be sure to come and try some samples.
textByHashes.6bd4e2db89e07e20607af079a011591c73739f93: So you're filling in for Turael?
textByHashes.6fa88611ba65f915ff76d5a6c19389e3c5de6c97: I'd be careful of underestimating him. He's managed to claim the Staff of Armadyl and is quickly growing in power.
textByHashes.f437c7e6a2617389f6fdef4ee2db03f1492fd46a: We've formed an alliance at the White Knights' Castle that we'd like you to join.
textByHashes.51217fabfe2b920636a184507dcd872bf7ef2621: I guess so, though I have a question for you: Why do all Slayer Masters say 'ello so much?
textByHashes.843effffe9728cdc0ff5e57419c53206574ac2ca: You don't know the reason? That seems a bit odd to me.
textByHashes.d4933094a2af7997e88a2e6891456a31aa6263dd: So you're filling in for Mazchna?
textByHashes.3e8e05cfd87f5b485cb53179af52be8f3e44cc37: So do you know Mazchna well?
textByHashes.d9f9636cd1c16ba30eab8a8c9bd266859bda79d8: Yes... but how did you know about that?
textByHashes.1bc8f46c5208f98f362f0baa8bde19268b262426: I see... Well I'm hoping you'll be willing to join our alliance against him at the White Knights' Castle.
textByHashes.202f62a69f7fb138c1a767be3745cf536754ae42: You mean you weren't permitted to leave? Who was stopping you? Who could stop you, for that matter?
textByHashes.8841b1a0034b736561d2a041c8c4e3f94761f277: Now, this is getting interesting. Do tell?
textByHashes.86e3423c26a22a15b1a6c471df065561c2bfc932: So you're filling in for Duradel?
textByHashes.222e941b9222c4d2cd87be68b8b91607b9c13004: Daughter? So being a Slayer Master runs in the family?
textByHashes.705a780f81f320b3b23974854c4a4799033737e7: Sounds like a lot of hard work.
textByHashes.539b5b3a6410b68f0abc1f09e998fb9504c6f39d: Hey Cyrisus, I need to talk to you about Lucien.
textByHashes.319d7770edb013dd3dbff9082190b3fada9443b6: He's a Mahjarrat who's quickly growing in power. We need to stop him. Would you be willing to join a small party tasked with doing so?
textByHashes.ce3aa82771c027f4d25aecba6ac474953f26043d: Great! We're gathering at the White Knights' Castle in Falador.
textByHashes.71c5d3db89b8ec36ff94e5108ca5353fafdc5967: Right, that's all the heroes recruited. I should probably check in with Idria.
textByHashes.9028e191793d5effdfc5b8058a509f0ffad758b0: We're happy to have you along. You've become quite the warrior.
textByHashes.bc8178e848466edd192ef8ee1b1bdb0eca303a41: Hey, Idria. I've recruited those heroes. They're all quite keen to take on Lucien.
textByHashes.2a97926df76fb56091f650ca4a9e9bf74f0d707a: I reckon the enriched snapdragon might have grown by now.
textByHashes.bb7545f116c332803a074f3a4a6e22ed27187ee2: I'm nearly there with that replacement truth serum.
textByHashes.99006e1b68dac91a88d660bd094366fb8a6c3814: I lost the enriched snapdragon I harvested.
textByHashes.bcffbf68ca59cba1a7cddfe19f67c2392b2bdccc: Yes, I have the herb right here.
textByHashes.399201b7cbbad27405a83036bcc466f19fe4c579: I still need to make some.
textByHashes.0f766bd5905006e158f443d006cddc52627fcc01: We're nearly there now. I just need to prepare the serum.
textByHashes.eee8e2e16f3d6aa79374b46c0d51c8bdd79bb2bd: I have the replacement right here.
textByHashes.6ae41fb6975a6dc200ae68adcf4621661baa9270: I have some replacement truth serum.
textByHashes.6794a307d0f6c6b6cb89ca77a6e98f2f6b8514ed: Right then. We've tried this the easy way, so now we're doing it the hard way! Drink this serum or I'll run you through like the dog you are!
textByHashes.c03857f9d928935199e590ff9c3d3eb7f2f0c0de: Okay, it's time for you to talk. Where is Lucien?
textByHashes.b7f108b3211f054cc6ced96c8b648e576190919e: Then who gives you your orders?
textByHashes.82c9bc41fe9ab915dd58a51b93b182ba424f685e: I'm going to need more than that!
textByHashes.3021d3d2ffa11ea5922a8032aa7eed65d1831fb2: Alright, let me grab some things to sketch him with and I'll be back.
textByHashes.801b1ce1d4a3f8dbca5b2933ab899d0d36968d34: Right, tell me what this Dark Squall looks like.
textByHashes.bfd2c6c8c8b5555883c632ffc44f8b15abff2b3c: Remind me what this Dark Squall looks like.
textByHashes.7e9ce8ede8464820c6c3c744b28aa8f8bd2774bc: He's willing to give me details on a person of interest.
textByHashes.36ac1b74017aac83cccfd3c7b834bde848607f81: I've given the truth serum to the spy, but I need to make a sketch of a person of interest.
textByHashes.da9397227148ad2039d55be0fb5e08ef3c249559: He's prepared to give me details on a person of interest.
textByHashes.61c61e26a4123a3162635ca19695bf1a19031e3f: Right, I've questioned the spy and he gave me a description of someone called the Dark Squall.
textByHashes.4ec9cffe54c88a86190c1db90fa170c55a1adcaf: Apparently the spy works for him rather than Lucien directly.
textByHashes.e6cc4800e97b7db8b39d7e549a719931648433c2: Yes, I made a sketch of what he described.
textByHashes.8f5fa08afedd62fca1a868f862511aa49c3e9f23: Who are we after this time?
textByHashes.308ddee751ec8278613832b392d7b776436b4eac: Yes, and I made a sketch... though I seem to have misplaced it.
textByHashes.568371cb7b9fd3a9501693ca821374d84eeae763: He's a powerful Mahjarrat who's trying to achieve godhood!
textByHashes.e8d14c3ea74db7cf3730850a980c1f146890a25e: I'm working with an alliance of people who are trying to stop him. We were hoping you would join us.
textByHashes.9c93099a1f697f9233ff49a92dfa7de99fbcdb51: Great! We've established a base of operations at the White Knights' Castle. Join us there when you're ready.
textByHashes.7b591bc08136e4581dbb501ef3b7b347cb56e8a4: We're not ready quite yet, but I'm sure it won't be long.
textByHashes.18a55d678f727670733b81b647ff78e7e57c33de: Well I'm afraid he's grown a lot more powerful since then. He's managed to claim the Staff of Armadyl and is looking to ascend to godhood!
textByHashes.c86ca24c154609bf711a39365965578b373f7885: Yes. We've formed an alliance that's trying to stop him and would like you to join us.
textByHashes.52e3e9b6fb896c9348e9c50ee95a1c231620cb56: Thank you, Harrallak. When you're ready, head over to the White Knights' Castle.
textByHashes.d0e6f6853bdd59f316f7848a2656099a18dc4e45: You're not apprehensive about the dangers ahead?
textByHashes.96338a7ddd33f5c5565d3120f617dd909170c39a: Then you know the danger he poses. He's stolen the Staff of Armadyl and is trying to ascend to godhood!
textByHashes.521ed3f47c5162b9a31694588cfa72535c7a23e6: Well we've formed an alliance at the White Knights' Castle that we'd like you to join. I warn you though, it could be dangerous.
textByHashes.14348f48b0912ea211c927b39053dad345e2b50a: Glad to have you with us!
textByHashes.f9afa108c77d266562fa14bc41097dd45f030fe1: Right, that's everyone recruited. I should probably head back to Falador.
textByHashes.7c8a51e470b064fe15e0b9133472c5579ac62bf2: I'm not sure, but I don't expect it will be long.
textByHashes.f61268dd62a2466aa3acff97f8c1b9432c97964a: I don't understand... What are you doing here?
textByHashes.0ed8daafb577cfdad268d43ef87d257719245984: Are you sure about this? Lucien is extremely dangerous!
textByHashes.8c0bd0c1e64e2f05092ddacc55b7691854287522: Ah... yes, sorry. This is Hazelmere, one of the gnomes who created the Grand Tree in the Gnome Stronghold.
textByHashes.26c1110872f144525802cca9286204facf621e00: Ah, so that's what that looks like from the outside.
textByHashes.e812944461af5ceb6984874def7bf66b77c2414d: Hazelmere can mind meld with other people, allowing him to speak telepathically with them.
textByHashes.8b0edabab1ce80bcbb0aaecf5901d6d4c2d00ec5: It's not that he can't... He just chooses not to.
textByHashes.63f0a870cd665cd645571bb2b6d760c01bc0d711: Yeah... that's Hazelmere for you. Anyway, you said there had been a development.
textByHashes.0bd2c4036719705fac4f0a2a057cf3c35c97893a: I'll go to the fortress. If the Dark Squall is there, I'll find him.
textByHashes.bbae9f1e7dd173c8f92b7239e9b87dcf26e623eb: I'm still trying to find Silif and the Dark Squall.
textByHashes.e43ebef1d632417c0f9a1953ee3d68dd81b650e0: Oh come on, it's not that bad!
textByHashes.35ccb2ec304e9b151a4ab592cb28a413c996a955: Do you have better things to be doing?
textByHashes.55932e89f36a50be16112dae025970092a2d8d20: Then don't be so impatient. Maybe try socialising or something?
textByHashes.998cbbb08f9d2c798fc1e8ae84f66ae618cee067: I'm going to get you out of here, Silif. Any suggestions?
textByHashes.de63f4d7dd64384c5f8e6267cb1b5e36bc1f32ff: Don't worry, I'll work something out.
textByHashes.1e06be259326f04122e3f3c8cdbbf3d0371a34a7: It is. I'm still working on getting you out of there.
textByHashes.e5884f872e888973192e512785429a6210613736: I'm back, Silif. I've managed to get the cell unlocked. We should be able to get you out of here now.
textByHashes.95d1aff21097809c5338ceb5960206e903bd6b4a: Hmm... Some food and a restoration potion should sort you out. I have both on me right now.
textByHashes.112e8e14d4fec9eae6b94d28bb9b2f01fa95a9f2: I'm back again, Silif. How are you doing?
textByHashes.fa1886513137833054bdb43488a5e669a1f96281: Well I have some food and a restoration potion for you. They should sort you out.
textByHashes.ed566d129999a5c81a94d75c3865e7b8fe9fa42e: Well I have some food, but I'm still working on finding you a restoration potion.
textByHashes.fc987c9778a3446769f7837053bf89ceabfb6d22: Well I have a restoration potion, but I'm still working on finding you some food.
textByHashes.dc5beb521c77248206136141b787f8e1e7fadf50: So you need me to feed you?
textByHashes.a076570e9851397a1d9eeb275c4ad04355230916: Okay, Silif, do you think you can move now?
textByHashes.4522bb77e2b6bcb9c1a5b29a0f0228a2c7e72a1c: Right, then let's get you out of here.
textByHashes.59fa160f7de6ba25eee9439da51af5698807f097: A few moments ago you could barely even move. You're in no fit state to be worrying about your mission.
textByHashes.50d3762da1b7bc06bef2abde1b04c4a0f3db8fc6: I have some armour here that should do the job.
textByHashes.9eb368067b894b3eac8508db79c90e6b593588ae: In that case, I'll look around and see what I can find.
textByHashes.f7ef1d7b0de2c6cc7dfbb2be6914ccb1b0b775e6: I'm guessing you had something in mind for him?
textByHashes.1de3af0bed24e10f4c8b5b9bd5aec23a45439acf: Of course you didn't, you meathead! I simply teleported away!
textByHashes.21608fb1227ab2dcdd7dd142ba6d70ca5a721f39: Of course you didn't, you meathead! I simply teleported away! Now drop and give me five!
textByHashes.82ffc708ff340a000a5bc3592ea0a189f5ec6bd9: Ah... Well... I was sent here by Lucien to be your new... apprentice?
textByHashes.4b87daccc00fca83c19a9fc4298bbdc861790487: How are you doing there, Surok?
textByHashes.2acb8d83520acb6c23b94b470395059c0139b4d3: Here, you can look after this for me...
textByHashes.1805b3d1e192859fab524bfd6c0e8808813dc1c1: I should probably get back to Falador before he recovers.
textByHashes.6ddad4703bf47064cf1bb1ff5a84f5059cb7355d: It's probably best I don't go back up there again.
textByHashes.cc5fea1f533c83f5ed5f331d5e2f072fe7e94349: No problem, Silif. I'm sure you'd do the same for me.
textByHashes.923457b6dcf6f4ce6b23fd49c49de32593d0e037: Well that's not all. I was also able to discover the true identity of the Dark Squall: Surok Magis.
textByHashes.19d7e3b71898c54f15bf344956ad603344cfda6c: Well when it comes to Surok, we might be able to deal with that problem fairly easily. I managed to plant a teleorb on him.
textByHashes.64cc15491382a940015d4b50156a5d7ba68fe8cc: How do we find out for sure?
textByHashes.498a65516c71e45ae0c5b593aef97965ab51f536: So how do I get there?
textByHashes.9560def1f51e5d8708d2045287853afb6fd3c1af: I have an orb here that I found while exploring those catacombs. I'm guessing this is the one he uses.
textByHashes.f4d8d90fbf231bf14c75bcc52372a6d2f88d882a: Where can I find this orb?
textByHashes.16363b1f3eefb716ff4c8cff8ce8629bd99dfdad: And once I have the orb? Then what?
textByHashes.ee47d3de0a12bbdb9d7256488b4bf1f036754918: Yes, I have Surok's Dark Squall robes with me right now. I can use them.
textByHashes.44dde91fba76def1c70635778f08c542b93668ec: Actually, I need more time to prepare.
textByHashes.243c2b374cad89a458fb85ecf90e681c2ba73214: I'm still working on finding Lucien.
textByHashes.e8ebd3704a0382bba899e1c34e62ef575b998f8a: Get out of there! He's too powerful!
textByHashes.b5cabf0bd3f01fa0354ed23d765d5df2fa595085: Hazelmere... Cyrisus... What have I done? Lucien will pay for this!
textByHashes.4e1a084eb32f8834a24a663f7d4f98b7d338ff28: They're gone... All of them... He killed them, like they were nothing!
textByHashes.87afa4a7fa547b2f0fda081416871583f141c94a: He can't be allowed to get away with this!
textByHashes.33247ca64026ac0f0cb09b30c7fc0c2eea74f56e: You don't think the Stone is down there, do you?
textByHashes.ca9c57bd0b63a04b5e306b133e595db9ea22682a: Hmm... I may have an idea. I could use my Dark Squall disguise to approach Movario.
textByHashes.aae6e5c8543803e9da69eb93dfefd005f8c8306a: I can find out what he knows, and if the Stone is down there, I can hopefully reach it before he does.
textByHashes.3ea77cb92d03f3b2c92ab1efba9ac7eb33c79267: Akrisae, do we have any information on where exactly in these caves Movario is?
textByHashes.a016b36247f3ea207e4250695d51c17245b12237: I can work with that. I'll head over there right away.
textByHashes.f8161e0bcdc3bf83cad96fe0d5cc407b276f9ed5: Statues? I think they'd have liked that. Thank you, Akrisae.
textByHashes.0e59bb169309f3f1132e09d3a2feb123d84ca7af: I just hope we can stop him soon.
textByHashes.1b83217f2f303f92d12efc7c82b536266b11717b: It just feels like they died for nothing.
textByHashes.df12d369184898011c60cb1883288b7eceda1c60: Thank you, Idria. That means a lot.
textByHashes.cc211468e1e01743675cca84468fde2de7a5552d: Lucien has sent me to check on your progress.
textByHashes.6a6edb39e3ea31ad5ca2deda2fe8cffe7db03a08: Then allow me to expedite things myself. Time is now of the essence and Lucien's patience is wearing thin.
textByHashes.bdbf677d1d63e8924e19747fad26d4b07b073256: While Lucien has asked me to oversee your investigations, I am not unreasonable. Believe it or not, I've actually read much of your detailed research myself.
textByHashes.07ba3065baa240e7cb810d9959dfa539545891de: You are clearly an expert in this area, and I am open to letting you continue to take the lead, provided we are able to quickly conclude our work here.
textByHashes.4acafe40c5e23d740b74192933a62de03e8d1cb3: Now, please share what you know with me.
textByHashes.cf5065b86c165be8f49811453ab14dd2bbc00771: I am all too aware, but all this means little given you have still not found it.
textByHashes.7fe5dc2d569b508a1c4f76464992060358b5cbc6: Right above it? Surely you don't mean the chasm?
textByHashes.159211acd7aed8b6da08ee8dc510336c13eb5491: And what about the light creatures? Are they of no use?
textByHashes.55e43e6c0553d5b6222645b779ec672f6f33fd4d: Allow me to explain. This isn't my first time in these caves. On a previous visit, I found that a special type of lantern with a distinct blue light could attract the creatures.
textByHashes.4024d23d0223c9d9e22d8825a35450501c471e94: Once attracted, they'd surround you and carry you to the far side.
textByHashes.108e26b4737f5d01ef295bef9fca50a94b995f14: No. I assume the lantern isn't bright enough for that.
textByHashes.07f480524507dabe35e0ab4b783e6190e12528f5: Your finds? Is that how Lucien would describe them? What do you think he will do if I inform him of your lack of cooperation?
textByHashes.4c929f953b2bbc2d711bbb53b501f26c96520d4a: Remind me what I need to do.
textByHashes.4bf4f5d3453a522b865c56f717e9c0ed06732540: I'm here to speak to Movario.
textByHashes.b0eecd75e54bb8b6f15bfbc25752730ebf8dfb55: You mean Movario? Don't worry, I'm trying to stop him.
textByHashes.675aec021833b5bdd636692c9df6fdfdb45a46ac: I promise, my only intention is to stop Movario and Lucien. I won't let them find what they're looking for.
textByHashes.7226a8ed221ee83fa0808e977bc5e7d223bcb1c6: I won't let them find what they're looking for. I promise.
textByHashes.2b65a6e37c511d2d2090ed81621537307aa95581: Interesting... Some of the the light creatures followed me! I doubt I'll need that light spell to navigate down here again.
textByHashes.afa8b1b9671380938e0a3675341614f6082d3cc8: Oh, it's very dark down there. I can hardly see anything! It's going to take more work for me to get anywhere.
textByHashes.c991c7f313e5ab7d2b936703327ffbf2f05d5bd1: I'm not sure. It worked fine for me.
textByHashes.dca1d2dc00dea619940e286bd5f44b66f7f3cdf3: Nothing much. Like I say, it's very dark. Now, I'm sorry, but I've answered your questions. You should let me get back to work.
textByHashes.2718a7661b5c40abdfb3e24c95c7be7019e1bcba: He thinks the Stone is hidden in a chasm deep below the rest of the caves. I've managed to get down there myself, but I haven't found anything of note yet.
textByHashes.854dfb6a2f08816962060c126851d858e8d1d1d4: He thinks the Stone is hidden in a chasm deep below the rest of the caves. I've managed to get down there myself and I've found some sort of Guthixian temple.
textByHashes.5f74f5ccd378bee31b99d073a6c72648f14ee5a2: I've found the Stone! It's in a chasm deep below the rest of the caves.
textByHashes.665cc2e751fc9b2c4f78e61ae214b1b55654f659: Movario thinks the Stone is hidden in a chasm deep below the rest of the caves. I've managed to get down there myself, but I haven't found anything of note yet.
textByHashes.b6a3fbd31d519a1aa001a30ff9d7f22b60601799: Movario thinks the Stone is hidden in a chasm deep below the rest of the caves. I've managed to get down there myself and I've found some sort of Guthixian temple.
textByHashes.7849de699108b14ddc1b4679704aabd00aa891ec: I don't know who you are... or what you are for that matter, but we don't have much time! The Stone is in danger!
textByHashes.082aff0b7aa24e4693af1cf73cf1c9872d116db2: Then you must have seen Lucien and his power! We have to get the Stone to safety!
textByHashes.25b9c1056a2edd34be591b7efda1cf32b7507f0a: It was V who first found it, deep below the ice of Lunar Isle. A single touch granted him the power of the gods. The power of limitless creation...
textByHashes.6f7dbada0b3b2d77276c8b7ea367a01100e652cb: Over the centuries, it changed hands many times. For each person who'd use it for good, another would use it to destroy...
textByHashes.f42431ab0a4977f28b52445cbc8b1e7f14cd0781: They were bound to it long ago. To use the Stone causes them unimaginable pain, and grants them immense power.
textByHashes.eb73b50fd1f35606fcf864f1735f06f8b17a41a5: And let you take the Stone? I don't think so.
textByHashes.dac07c7f6397d198141ebbab2817a64593dfb306: If Lucien gets the Stone, the world burns. I don't plan on letting that happen.
textByHashes.f80b0b408a0992f6cf1c3f5c9be9c2221cd8adaf: You'd be a fool to cross him. He'd wipe you from existence before you could even say a word.
textByHashes.0db801375b1805bcdf33c09b1dddb2d050b7c951: Except you don't have the Stone yet. You'll have to get through me first.
textByHashes.a3d80563889ff9271f6878041854dcf61839c1f7: I wouldn't be so sure about that!
textByHashes.9f459435cedd21248697d415ec09e89c9b9db903: You'll never have the satisfaction of killing me, Lucien. No matter what it takes, I'll make it my mission to stop you.
textByHashes.35a424660340da8f8a5ddbc68ee7560dc471ec19: You can bestow as many titles upon yourself as you like, but before long, no one will even remember your name. You're just another monster, craving a power you'll never have.
textByHashes.3b956ec25130ef4c14c5910e0538291f675b8d41: You think Zamorak will just stand by and let that happen?
textByHashes.827e9352fbd5da48bf2388b7cdb565bf1adbfb33: No thanks. I'll make my own way back.
textByHashes.a2de85646b2b676a9971761205510db7f1bab1b1: Not exactly. I'm sorry... I failed. Lucien has the Stone.
textByHashes.8a180c69d94969cbcf045bcc080210800066b361: Hey, Idria. How are things here?
textByHashes.5792695b095ec57a9aa9af4f9df9ba45c57465f9: What do you think he's doing?
textByHashes.01fc55caa35c963099fa3b792eb8f1334666e275: Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.2c144b0e4e79484dc03672dfd2213598cf564855: I might just do that. Thanks, Idria.
textByHashes.35ba3253ef111c9f9bca0ddb057eb82213aed3d6: Thanks, but I'm not sure I feel the same way. I wasn't able to stop Lucien.
textByHashes.60b6f9b897e4e53e46482934a38603e7842cf01c: You make a good point. Let's just hope it will be enough.
textByHashes.1a88674db873ea3e626e62e826124fbd48fcb9c2: Hello there, Thaerisk. Any word on Lucien?
textByHashes.f249c53ccd6458009d2309328c390ff921036990: I lost those robes I was using as a disguise.
textByHashes.46741a3477c8b37cd77272bc35047f6629a25dde: How are you enjoying your cell, Surok?
textByHashes.f1337d3a0e32674db3f975f2a5f2eea3e5e696c4: It's nice to see a little justice around here!
textByHashes.ae46912cdd58a7a340d2ebc8f5b41c8fd39175d7: And that something was me. I'm sorry...
textByHashes.ddf85612ca03e868caf6ab0fca816bc9477bb72a: Of course. Sorry for bringing it up.
textByHashes.7e0591a97d2eacfdcda61a3cd23d9860e9651358: Why are you wielding a tree branch?
textByHashes.9eee7073d38e5a0d2334434b84e7129542952db4: I see. That doesn't explain why you have a tree branch though.
textByHashes.5b08fc27a7405db0b17edbde77b31e5fd1df1ee8: He wouldn't want you to get yourself killed as well!
textByHashes.9660829c1426e625beb3a4dba29bb93f4309b7da: Those sound interesting. May I see them?
textByHashes.90a6b35a25d7ee49b8e17e6f1e2e027148fb104a: Speaking of those notes, I seem to have misplaced them. Do you happen to have another copy?
textByHashes.01bf1f9ba5b723a5317417580bf5f6d4e59ccb84: He died fighting for a good cause. He'll be remembered as a great hero.
textByHashes.da50a5ad500dfdeb78a09a4abe27081f3ef9f227: Well if you're not going to answer, I'll go.
textByHashes.2c2c50639d6670255b5bcfa210873b7f857a1f11: Strange... I can't see any kind of lock or handle to open this door...
textByHashes.cc607a7405a249a0f682e737a5a49922e0e1fc5c: I'd better not go in there yet... I think I can hear someone inside!
textByHashes.cac602cc2407810f96fb2f410efbbbc6a6e31aa7: Hi, I have got your ball back. It was MUCH harder than I thought it would be.
