textByHashes.b250a4855066a4474b7f4baf5943e8d8a0a89972: I am in search of a quest.
textByHashes.14512a14ad7118e0865b4693279c4264f53af0ef: Yes, help me become one with my darker side.
textByHashes.bd8381ec301eaee723a15dac5d8d884e3d0d704c: Great, I'll go and get them.
textByHashes.2b301ec7eef79a2d37dd145cbfb55d9669e49275: No, I have my principles and honour.
textByHashes.d045b743e6d8a63fa40c29251209a0a90bf377eb: I've heard that you are a witch.
textByHashes.e350e734d4833207a39567f4af5bebd3fa54ccfb: I've been looking for those ingredients.
textByHashes.daf2e91cca9d05be9830f3acb8003bca3f6ba7bd: I'm afraid I don't have any of them yet.
textByHashes.ca834f5b170eb05db99bd9d5227c52bfb4ac7091: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I don't have any burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.bcbe19ef4a5e8c22046878ac98a78aa59ab66df5: I don't have a rat's tail, I have the burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.f3c9f8456fcb2fca7196df2b5c41d4f320908184: I don't have a rat's tail, I don't have any burnt meat, I have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.2e866bcb75e97dabe744cb9625fba52570fbeb8e: I don't have a rat's tail, I don't have any burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.805811dd2f0f1169af077be5b2ac43b86ea68bc8: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I have the burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.471c29e34ab879000ffc28955091d858da98ac12: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I don't have any burnt meat, I have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.97b3eb25a79116baa537c07b1450803c1f6cc1e6: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I don't have any burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.ede2189dea3cd9f7c41c1b8610fba9a9cece9cfb: I don't have a rat's tail, I have the burnt meat, I have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.62e1c926b36072c5ebb0230fd5485a769c44c195: I don't have a rat's tail, I have the burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.406b79fd43e1b721572b5fa1fa30c2fd3df545e8: I don't have a rat's tail, I don't have any burnt meat, I have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.acd2e56803ce1e01d0fb251a8324471408a7c0e3: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I have the burnt meat, I have an onion, and I don't have an eye of newt.
textByHashes.6794fc8cd347b468c004c962947696c438a189ed: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I have the burnt meat, I don't have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.e5075f3c6969b597d343449a4c95554274dc2447: I have the rat's tail (ewww), I don't have any burnt meat, I have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.b6687efbcf44ec0bd993e9bc476c5da17b62dedc: I don't have a rat's tail, I have the burnt meat, I have an onion, and I have the eye of newt, yum!
textByHashes.36fcb20a95ed28ed9ab83c878e452c546dc5fa13: Interesting. So what brings you to Lumbridge?
textByHashes.60f47546ff4036af6f5dc34fa4bd19ba5d7bb0ff: Sounds good, what should I do?
textByHashes.db2b1541072d49cdb65d6c223e6eaf2e315b8762: Awesome. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.fc7ee04e2f822494497ad8549d93243c43412f02: Hello Veos. What brings you to Lumbridge?
textByHashes.f72a05fc78fa4fc774282d8f3c56a18e2e15aee0: I could do with some extra help.
textByHashes.bbaeaf39ee9a608e68e5ad1a9576dc7dadd85df9: Hmmmm... Must have been the wind.
textByHashes.ed353616647fd388ba071407dff08df32859afbc: Anyway, this must be the treasure that Veos is after. I should take it to him. If I remember right, he's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.
textByHashes.154ceef9fcbb3854fa0397d37638b842386f017f: I don't think Veos would want me to open his treasure. I should take it to him. If I remember right, it's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.
textByHashes.ec95ce9dbb8706cda2f099c244aa3daca0ddaaf9: No problem. So what is this treasure anyway?
textByHashes.c229e3297f7be4767ed683c1e2c5c555655af9ed: Hello there, what's going on here?
textByHashes.3c477f8b6398e9ebfbdd8601d2f5e93dc825220c: Oh, so you want me to find out why the Zogres have appeared and then find a way of burying them?
textByHashes.04d51fcd19f17ccf2c2e02645177f48bae89e681: Right, so you think there's a good chance that I can get ill from this, so I need to get some food and something to drink?
textByHashes.2713a4b8bf3c2b5eff7a8573205229b58d2ef2ae: Hmm, sorry, it sounds a bit too dangerous.
textByHashes.c81a0d554117f5a8a681c0f32566933116f31151: Hmm, is it too late to reconsider?
textByHashes.541eb20460899c73ad3cfd3f5faf8a1791e88de7: Ok, I'll check things out then and report back.
textByHashes.2ec24ff1664dc034c0e2fe2e59302b9767516e7d: If that's your idea of a pep talk, I have to say that it leaves a lot to be desired.
textByHashes.8d7344e27528eacf30ed1156f7331b26191f8ee8: Yes, I want to help you out and find out about the zogres.
textByHashes.b92a2534a53008764f987cabe84e5a7f838ae0f3: Nope, I haven't figured out why the zogres are here yet.
textByHashes.62ff8eb11bda7107df8d4f0c3efe7e6599a30119: But Grish has asked me to look into this place and find out why all the undead ogres are here.
textByHashes.36bf65dd66e1b705374e95860a6340fa573f9e32: I found this tankard in the tomb, have you got any suggestions?
textByHashes.f4e4e89acfc085eb9df1610743670213472c144d: This torn page was on a lectern in the tomb, do you know why?
textByHashes.38a3a999ab115fef45cdfa3b18975634f3277a2f: Hey Grish, I found this in the tomb, do you know what it is?
textByHashes.69beab63e1d46c9db1592b79c29521db38217689: Hello there, I found this tankard in an ogre tomb cavern. It has the emblem of this Inn on it and I wondered if you knew anything about it?
textByHashes.d5ea9ca8ee8e9cff67481fa91a9e87281d24bb87: Brentle you say? So you knew him then?
textByHashes.94e60c6f276e58bce64fa3d609ff763524b87b1b: Hmm, I'm sorry to tell you this, but Brentle Vahn is dead - I believe he was murdered.
textByHashes.bedeed58c623497da7d16f38b5d4db244b5b8368: Hello again. Can you tell me what you know about this tankard again please?
textByHashes.e3d4ef993b5d7539b381ad7142e8591ef2eb6cc1: Do you have any clue what this might be?
textByHashes.0f841f805de10a7a9c018f22f2d676a3329379bc: Hello there, I found this black prism, I wondered if you knew anything about it.
textByHashes.90e05dfb95b611b2b5a5699d8896caf016e79ecc: Alright, alright...keep your night cap on.
textByHashes.b5c6bd94c74afb531fbd3fd19aedf0a77dbc967f: Hey, what's this then, can you explain it?!
textByHashes.d0debeea4e1b5d59c9436eabefe3db52c876ccf4: I found it in a place called Jiggig where some undead ogres happen to be wandering around.
textByHashes.abb80d4b0970ea8ce7ec86b12d4b55deccca9997: Have you ever seen anything like this before?
textByHashes.ea6de115b50c64b492ad346843ae2184bc4332a0: You should be able to read it, it's been torn from a book on necromancy and you're meant to be a specialist in the subject.
textByHashes.a40251391807fd0ecf3048d0749a7485f6d0f324: What about this then? Guess where I found this?
textByHashes.619cf9b74e2ee278c9765bf35a9485050f6e624f: Aha! But I found this in an old ogre tomb! I suspect it's a clue which will lead me to the suspect.
textByHashes.a17b9ad7c92aaa3e7783a198f2b26072afb0efb0: Erk! I'd better not start rifling through peoples things without permission.
textByHashes.c7befb370ddbfd29656d6d65027437208202e81a: There's some undead ogre activity over at 'Jiggig', and the ogres have asked me to look into it. I think I've found a clue and I wonder if you could take a look at it for me?
textByHashes.7d1b5a319a275e91ff65770df3ff65571f0c08bc: Sure...I mean, I'll try if I remember.
textByHashes.0240846b9e910991e3fe115aa8311de856171fec: There's some undead ogre activity over at Jiggig, I've found a clue that you may be able to help with.
textByHashes.5647c101ba2e2cf79894972581fc8cbc744308c4: There's some undead ogre activity over at Jiggig, I've found some clues, I wondered if you'd have a look at them.
textByHashes.c0dfaccb9d2101108e12994495d74c8233c9e342: I got them from a nearby Ogre tomb, it's recently been infested with zombie ogres and I'm trying to work out what happened there.
textByHashes.8db45cc81d2cc78b909deb46eb295ec4363baedd: Do you have any leads on people that I might talk to regarding this?
textByHashes.16681322ad40c9f48476c85536de9162f976d9b2: I found this black prism at Jiggig where the undead ogre activity was happening?
textByHashes.d57f858ed53e9ebd7a3fc670eb885db2851ca142: I think I've found a clue from the Jiggig area where the undead ogre activity is happening.
textByHashes.280feae14e66f507064345e74c6c232a35d6dbf8: Zavistic Rarve said that I could come and talk to you and ask you a few questions.
textByHashes.1eff258e452e2b918122a99cb9b9a2c77d10fc30: Do you know anything about the undead ogres at Jiggig?
textByHashes.ffb0140c80504e9aebac9e846a0a1293ccc368e5: Very well, if you don't know anything about it, you won't mind if I look around then?
textByHashes.51753ab9c358e10b4d456e3b54ff9d95307e437c: The lost arts? What are they?
textByHashes.bd25f68641a8761549dc4537bf400d6c23a9bf6f: Hmm, well I guess I must be an ignorant person then, because bringing the dead back to life sounds very unnatural.
textByHashes.fadd5299f0db95623c8ce927f0b729766f322f6d: Do you mind if I look around?
textByHashes.3e6013e48e1f0c47920798d84e233ee5ab888d6e: Well, I'm going to have a look around anyway, if you're not involved in this whole thing, you won't have anything to hide.
textByHashes.bce1a23fd111fd1a0dc99bec427047a6888615c3: Hmmm, Sithik must really hate monsters then, I wonder if he hates ogres in particular?
textByHashes.d579b562fc4c0f55e17fa58934960aaf7cf67cb2: Hmm, that may be true, but I don't universally hate all monsters, whereas I have a sneaking suspicion that you do...and ogres in particular!
textByHashes.e3e19e13a935a8a4fb54426c5a78c65015fbfd94: Hey, I've found this, do you know anything about it?
textByHashes.e4fadca5e45b3efb99ad5dd065747e89556f6147: Aha! A necromantic book! What's this doing here then?
textByHashes.dbc5c4b63234ad28cda9b5c932f5a7f8780aa693: I found it in this cupboard! What do you have to say for yourself?
textByHashes.02800e503af8ef8e680c64087958f9ccf3fef921: I found this torn page, do you know anything about it?
textByHashes.6d6f80adf2facc28c6a5c89fea37cb639974b154: No, it wasn't actually, I got it from somewhere else, do you recognise it?
textByHashes.1b5b0e0eb8217ec78d31612e7df9b15b344220f1: Hi, do you know anything about this book?
textByHashes.14681bc1b9db52c1e14661b5ea1b6924fc61eb23: Well, I was just wondering where the book came from actually and try to get some more information about it.
textByHashes.b67ff34612c2665bf0d68fe0d79bc5ae98c38f11: Here you go, what do you think?
textByHashes.867f90fe571df96a1ea2722a2a806fd86ae759c8: Look, I made a portrait of Sithik.
textByHashes.009ca6724ea48ba281a4faf2c79629425001c37c: It's a portrait of Sithik Ints...don't you recognise him?
textByHashes.cd7967592a816b2679b0c655b4395bfeac7b0e9c: Hmm, you've just identified the man who I think sent Brentle Vahn to his death.
textByHashes.03fac530d9a74052b2a1a1d9a1f3fd591c405d8c: I'm trying to bring him to justice with the Wizards' Guild grand secretary. Do you think you could sign this portrait to say that he was talking to Brentle Vahn.
textByHashes.d4a5d3c39984635ad69ac8704255842b1d9e644d: Many thanks for your help, it's really very good of you.
textByHashes.1996fc8137752a30a86043534a9607357d81fe15: Hey, what do you think of this? I'm going to show it to Zavistic and you're going to be in trouble!
textByHashes.1c8a66cf8cf52d5524d0a763df8cab4d49fb5ba7: I don't think so! This is a signed picture of you, someone recognised you, you're in deep trouble!
textByHashes.5e8f09a1ed6aabd9333dcbf246a5395baacd6ab2: Oh...erm...well, that is a lot of money actually...er....
textByHashes.b1037eeec8e54d0aef1926c642f45049bb4351b2: No, I won't take the money, I'm going to bring you to justice!
textByHashes.053d50552a49675ead37fa56ccbc655b88bf3bb8: Ok, I'll shut up for two million!
textByHashes.072a50a91f71b8b79767ccacb2001ef556751bd9: You're a mean and cruel man Sithik, a mean and cruel man!
textByHashes.f1708a1706e1685dea74083d0c91ee7bfd952a74: What did you say I should do?
textByHashes.7df884c0591357fe408990d3e2064e59ca460db3: I have an item that I'd like you to look at.
textByHashes.2635ccf5d401c8a85a9f66afca82684657996d7a: I have some items that I'd like you to look at.
textByHashes.61c221edf30baae7ba6f4e62fdfc38e65d31eb5c: I have this necromancy book as evidence that Sithik is involved with the undead ogres at Jiggig.
textByHashes.59add6557bbc2f9d1f7edac91584791f055410a2: Please just look at it again...
textByHashes.526179042f632c2f1bb8725937b45a89aedf3d4e: Yes, but if you look, you can see that there is a half torn page which matches the page I found at Jiggig.
textByHashes.afa504f3e86432efe45c0db4804c20c53f0d4a80: Look, this book proves that Sithik hates all monsters and most likely Ogres with a passion.
textByHashes.084d0147feb6bd281bcd5be727b0192fb48a88c8: This is the tankard I found on the remains of Brentle Vahn!
textByHashes.d92a7184048ec712fed2a970aa95c867aa96df6c: This is a portrait of Sithik, signed by the landlord of the Dragon Inn saying that he saw Sithik and Brentle Vahn together.
textByHashes.68f1cd03d94a4225a9f699c5d1adae2dd5a6fb01: Well, actually, I've lost it, could I have another one please?
textByHashes.75f700ee6459e088797d75f291509571c1741146: No, not yet, what was I supposed to do again?
textByHashes.942fe60171931f6c4fabb587a974a14b5dfe91ab: Hey there's no need to be rude!
textByHashes.49dc554496bca029836e99fbe6119784dc49015a: Why do you spend most of your time in bed?
textByHashes.5f08e7b93a753557aa9d699ac900ecfc70ce8c9b: Here, try some of this potion, it'll make you feel better!
textByHashes.755ce8bfc257f681fb3cb5a6eaec8bc2650178e1: It's your own fault, you shouldn't have lied about your involvement with the undead Ogres at Jiggig. The potion will wear off once you've told the truth!
textByHashes.853f3f404313183a081cf4f301b04b0d2ad57d9b: Ok, that's a start...now I want some answers.
textByHashes.a7d4721386b0755947cb0b16fe615c839e9c9591: How do I remove the effects of the spell from the area? The ogres want to get their ceremonial dance area back and can't do that with undead walking all over it.
textByHashes.bcea2ffc802974a541be3629423966b16956032b: You're an evil man and I'm going to make you pay for this...you can stay like that forever as far as I'm concerned.
textByHashes.b6c18716843ddb258ee58182b7923c0ef22b9593: How do I get rid of the undead ogres?
textByHashes.e898cb8d8721045355a2ee2af26eedad73a72301: Yeah, clearly so what should we use?
textByHashes.ccddd90ceb3637a543ad8121288573270246b26f: How do I get rid of the disease?
textByHashes.284fbb81f4bfd728f6a67eab8993a5eec956df3a: Just tell me again or else I'll never turn you back into a human!
textByHashes.faa9d2e7700f9ddbb88a5a8847e9ec0984e83904: Just tell me again or I'll turn you back into an ogre.
textByHashes.f40390b6068d919878d9cace0765abd47f5b9300: I've got some questions for you...and you'd better answer them well or else!
textByHashes.8582fd143e7d64dbe0ec34dcdb6e31f6ece051b1: Thanks for your help with all of this.
textByHashes.9bbb9c8488c36d2127f46927d49a5ee47d876a06: Hey, here you go! I brought you some of the potion which should cure the disease. You said that you would buy some from me.
textByHashes.5e754caa34a737f0823c1a94af4ddaf21b9bb02a: I found who's responsible for the Zogres being here.
textByHashes.a83cd2bf1a5b90f85f95e01f85f05f5a5c8345e6: The person responsible is a wizard named 'Sithik Ints' and he's going to be in serious trouble. He told me that the spell which raised the zogres from the ground will last forever.
textByHashes.47f6e462e5d16dc65feec9443133955fa39d0baf: I'm sorry to say, but you'll have to move the site of your ceremonial dancing somewhere else.
textByHashes.361bad72f07becee20deb1b1fc92bbb113a3132d: Yes, that's right, you'll need to create a new ceremonial dance area.
textByHashes.379053b8b7ef6b0975f47fb50c54d36874e4ed03: Oh, so you want me to go back in there and look for something for you?
textByHashes.d4079fe699dc2a301c75b9d9e0fbd5ccc7b2dd16: Sithik told me how to make Brutal arrows which means I can kill these zogres from a distance!
textByHashes.2a63c8b7c059471a33cec0ce719e7ecaa99bdd13: I know how to make large arrows...you know, 'big stabbers', to kill the zogres...they're bigger and apparently do a lot of damage, only thing is, the normal ogre bow I need to fire it is quite slow.
textByHashes.59ac5a0cf0872ba78cfd7f602b81f82e8c1cafbc: I also found out that the disease can be cured.
textByHashes.69b15beaa353ac2d6a0ed305adc7584a2359bc45: I have some other questions for you.
textByHashes.2ea3f850670050f838d72c4afc4617dd9a3f5129: Why are you much nicer than the Shaman in Gu'Tanoth?
textByHashes.1d5a918f610bd40efc019d05da8794309141ca23: Oh, well that's a relief! It's good to know you don't eat humans...
textByHashes.8cc67aab75c91e320fcd4a3b71ab458e2863288a: Why doesn't Rantz live with the rest of the Ogres?
textByHashes.80321a38aaf6549778f8b0582510631ddbf751cb: Why do you call this place Jiggig?
textByHashes.65c5d48e702ae1e027b9b5e5cf557d522edf5201: I want to talk about the quest
textByHashes.7bcc3fb31aa9502f88f217f9f20e6715ac550c47: I've lost the key you gave me!
textByHashes.31a5aaf9fd50d20dbc6590b4d9ffb2d7329c6b8e: There must be an easier way to kill these zogres!
textByHashes.aa0a17db9f52a2e1da9e4dce26472f5ca4e44440: There must be a way to cure this disease!
textByHashes.c829781238002ec9f98bd4e4305b4341d5b39c06: No sorry, I don't have them yet.
textByHashes.53a5d68fa76370787ed3583c40106020f59e8190: Thanks, that's very nice of you!
textByHashes.ac1582e012fe614f5c19f85b012eb4d8d0d8c5d3: No! Get out of my spell!
textByHashes.88f187d9954cc4c1881729dcead9839fe8b65907: Ranked or unranked? What does that mean?
textByHashes.dc3310f77be495873032910c2af60162d80e2342: How do I get invited into a Tournament?
textByHashes.4fba92c0816c20ca5839f2fb349e39290574527f: I want to organise my own Tournament.
textByHashes.b2eb3b82d13977987c787ab761b0f66fd69d3351: Is that how you got so badly injured?
textByHashes.ea4d7be62e4d00940687844c5f22af1385f47ef6: Wow, that stuff must be very valuable!
textByHashes.4a54effdc6338a6b58b874a1d0525e2154435b6f: I'll soon have you out of the way! Burn!
textByHashes.54a9e73363e794e2568a052c958e5c79a900d75d: My world is an ocean of paaaain!
textByHashes.54baf7a4439d760aa183946dd6f63296306db72f: So what is going on here anyway?
textByHashes.41e12038dbd94d2d2b0e2186841760169da5c339: No Mr. Luke, I expect you to die!
textByHashes.5b9d5fba728c3083510f30e79b557bcc4abab50b: Egad, outsmarted by the man with the wooden brain.
textByHashes.ef2823447d313b9e38186a606dd93dde913fcd69: But seriously, what is going on here?
textByHashes.c2bab85e50f5e776d9de0ceb3b0ef0b821495b9a: Well if you can't tell me, perhaps you could show me through the medium of Interpretive Dance?
textByHashes.9db16e69a1a894ca17d920e8c812ddd23e156094: Who's that making faces behind you?
textByHashes.fca74207851f42f2d80b5b6821236e3e10e96af7: That is the most amazing thing I have ever seen!
textByHashes.75d4aeb38b1b70778d5098768b5fb4283a9d6017: Oh my! Is that a genuine 3rd Age Diversion?
textByHashes.a16967256ce2fc11fd568c3175fb90842a6fe271: I was... looking to be healed.
textByHashes.f839c8d37b27865d098d7d2c57faee4c59d1a5dd: Do you see a lot of injured fighters?
textByHashes.fdf6c1fc48db7ddb340f9f1c755c6cbadca2c728: Can you heal me? I'm injured.
textByHashes.5e94367cf3083cba3eb09271180d37bb014acabb: Isn't this place built a bit out of the way?
textByHashes.cfb9b58509c497757045b65176d62540359dec2b: How do I get further into the monastery?
textByHashes.cd83978a1216549591af043b8cd5ff385c6c12f2: Well can I join your order?
textByHashes.fcf1d244e3ca04bebc0a42dee7a7b82e3e7d9666: Can you remove the sigils from my spirit shields?
textByHashes.242efdcbeae7a5477db14c7b7dc3a6ebb33b808b: I've got a message for you from your friend in Draynor Village.
textByHashes.8bb7e471812bca5205b850b3792b62b0aaeb5710: Who are you and what are you doing?
textByHashes.393f37c0ed9841c12ef15ab03e99b072ca542f3b: I'd like to look in your scrying ball.
textByHashes.3f2b1a8a1f31ee38edc48fb96c327fdee0df65d2: I visit the abyss all the time!
textByHashes.cea2164ce784f94df68495b6be42784c5125af6c: I have to run through it quickly or I'll die!
textByHashes.332f129d5c372b83d648b8a5551890ad8cfbb093: The abyss looks pretty ugly to me.
textByHashes.b800a055b3d93af4acd5eb2bf1e840ab9a77e94e: I suppose fear does heighten the senses.
textByHashes.47435f11278188811ff5c88a404352609b5d9730: Could I get an abyssal whip?
textByHashes.efacfe2d66383b7778584ef83bb2c20db4307307: And then will I get an abyssal whip?
textByHashes.bd0b14666a8f4d6dcdc2bdf4c69fed56728dd221: Hello there. Thanks again for helping with Bumpty Numpty.
textByHashes.64e8d0f98078187c09d1c888f04b843a96e6f64a: How can I keep my account secure?
textByHashes.0ab7d78e29237d30cbb7c8b663f0a477eb818833: Tell me about securing my email.
textByHashes.65abdf26bb50c526f5dd95bc4fd1e27a4d7de3f5: Tell me about securing my bank.
textByHashes.88a25d0c3efb1ea23afc1896f4060b552d3b7cc3: It seems I don't have one setup. How do I got about setting up a bank pin?
textByHashes.974885bfc744f26f8bdd2b1a243b10c7b4358481: Thanks, I should go speak to a banker right away.
textByHashes.1ab0d6a04ba2591aa452b9d8d8b5cbadbfcca589: Good thing I already have one set.
textByHashes.0b235015c93eabcb70d6bf5adc1d057957a064f3: Tell me about the Stronghold of Security.
textByHashes.3f27ddf9a7b3203124a4fb51a1ae543019086e27: Can I have a Security book?
textByHashes.5473d66bed67b2cae6efba6d611d563a056ea66d: Don't I know you from somewhere?
textByHashes.72806fe08353a2e8f3909fc4344eb96d8b0b7b53: But don't you give out security books too?
textByHashes.cafb4df37c423999660669e8d09f30fa175a3e04: That's true. Maybe I shouldn't be too quick to judge.
textByHashes.8edaf5b6ffc06381264c0fa552a74ff9208b6eb5: I'm a hero - may I apply to join?
textByHashes.73d5db95e79bddf4d5faa3c3f79ea951870b9893: Actually, I don't think I want to go anywhere right now.
textByHashes.47a0e0935fece52ef6344ff7855a93fe02234ae2: I see. I'll keep that in mind.
textByHashes.cdaeb4f7245688e19559af52fb556b3ba7266e1d: No that's okay, I'll take a task from you.
textByHashes.de82b9f10d2765c39b8e2f9c0d33447ad219eed2: Oh okay then, I'll go talk to Vannaka.
textByHashes.450c89b36250e174d63df66cc18b8cecf4fd2fdd: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.
textByHashes.28df6e64cd5162b58adf24ebed34ea6151434db2: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?
textByHashes.4ea15504c1e9ee28d230511e0a20d0aa8a4644e4: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.
textByHashes.520187c592d5de7658371be573f3cabe271b059a: That's fine - I can handle any task.
textByHashes.8150f5b02e3223a27f1d114e09eaccd89e38e88c: In future, please don't give anything too tough.
textByHashes.eee3535ad6849627012b167b30bb365fa0c84e4c: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.
textByHashes.15cb05aad0d10e2426659e0cd9e46da31103ab63: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!
textByHashes.7753f9a86861ced4ba21a67bf047748ad9758cfb: If you don't know who they are, why tend the grave?
textByHashes.1e070bdf78b72a3152403a87bd2d53887f8e7fd0: I see. In that case, I'm sorry to have disturbed you. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.5d0a91c5558d11b3c8636c067855a4b296ff0c45: What are you waiting here for?
textByHashes.88680dbb971b2acdc42af197e468bb715ee8c070: I see. Well, I've never really had to look for an adventure myself. Personally I find I just stumble into them instead.
textByHashes.2ead9fd2a9a45ce527549e0249856626e5814538: I'm sure it will. Good luck!
textByHashes.84418c3ac32921dff91072984d8e6b376024a7be: Sorry, but I'm still pretty new to it all. I don't think I'm ready to be hiring a crew yet, but I'll let you know when I am.
textByHashes.96f5f9c8ce1cb8bfc8a9129ceafa00a6af8592bf: I'd definitely be happy to have you on my crew.
textByHashes.8dac9065ba7a0ea28b113030988e4cd7ee34378f: Sorry, but I'm not really in a place for you to join me right now.
textByHashes.aaa6f0cf31c51e4bb3cca20f18712ac9b028b56e: Hey there. How are you enjoying being part of the crew?
textByHashes.66b0ab94dbfafd7c6be7850597aec3a80c68fa09: Well, that might save me a bit of time on my captain's log.
textByHashes.0a48192ea158325d17b53f1df3fd8bef409ab582: Are you prepared enough to fight the evil down there?
textByHashes.4754ddce26a0af79c18425bc8c5682511b0bd862: But you do realise that the vampyres in Morytania are immune to everything except silver?
textByHashes.296b2fd990e7526080882a2706a020d670600c22: And if we happen to run into some vampyres on the journey down there?
textByHashes.b7e6863a406538c7968ce28d60bd1035a545f350: It can be pretty difficult, actually. But you're right, I'll be your guide so I should be able to handle the situation.
textByHashes.33f6c03cbb48c804ae4ce23c9af229b6f9e6c63a: Why do you want to go to Burgh de Rott?
textByHashes.0991910def6fd3cb044f296a6fd24e8a492e77d4: Could you defend yourself if we met enemies on the route to Burgh de Rott?
textByHashes.542a8477bb7e1ecdd5fbf6d676b10048a648c128: I can take you to Burgh de Rott.
textByHashes.df651ddb18699bb08ac75bb31f66598eae8ea132: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way!
textByHashes.bea6daca909a1ce8c8acd237f74fbf39b8420115: Do you have any Adventure Path starter kits for me?
textByHashes.dd2a56ea56ba95769aedbd1e9c017c4d9476f163: I'd like to claim my Adventure Path rewards.
textByHashes.db4248df441ed85aaffd6587c8592ac10da47307: Can you show me some Adventure Paths?
textByHashes.a8596b234dd8425ad1e9f11a5852a9566587274a: I wish you luck on your next adventure.
textByHashes.7a440a9d563600ad9d1a436c6fec7395ff9ce87c: Thanks, it's my first time here and I'm not sure where to start.
textByHashes.811ace34045d810c4de33ab0e7e72f739d62b8a1: No, sorry, I've come to the wrong place.
textByHashes.d7d4ac6753e2d263b5336f67545f8ff88cb260f7: Special advisor on spiritual matters? What does that mean?
textByHashes.5125061cef870e5eacb67f13500b128855267465: But surely the King should be able to make his own decisions on what's best for Misthalin?
textByHashes.ff01cd0aecc900e1e13f2045d6445554a5418f45: How did you come to be an advisor to King Roald?
textByHashes.040771ffaa3438c3754d9e9567300e271afce630: How come he doesn't have an advisor for any other religious denominations?
textByHashes.cea67945f90e97d75987478f0def47bfce1f78d9: The guy at the information kiosk?
textByHashes.74fe5f051f5657bf30b87ce0c4572c9b18560469: What could you make for me?
textByHashes.78515d3f2192361c67dda8caa384f3eb4eaa8849: What do you need to make red dye?
textByHashes.723ed2ac1c7c3701cf7505d78e57bd5d1f4e64a6: Okay, make me some red dye please.
textByHashes.ddbbdb514838ebac20401f5f7f07df33bbf5b0b6: I don't think I have all the ingredients yet.
textByHashes.207c9b253b536978e63251dcafa6b466223205bf: I can do without dye at that price.
textByHashes.e4663925be2635894d55823e34dbac51cddb70a6: What other colours can you make?
textByHashes.6c00c48d7a845009a6b66107471be1ac90b832da: What do you need to make yellow dye?
textByHashes.04df8a57ee96a98efb85ef6d229b140bd2feb329: Okay, make me some yellow dye please.
textByHashes.164b6ef0c999dcbfa04f2c019f1125bee656a533: What do you need to make blue dye?
textByHashes.684ba4113141fa7e56789e12b8cbf5c5c45f6243: Okay, make me some blue dye please.
textByHashes.111f501fc97ce3b365ce22c475f7ad0681106e11: No thanks, I am happy the colour I am.
textByHashes.671fb9b4d1853a146411451fc5ecab0d0462c1af: Cool, do you turn people into frogs?
textByHashes.c4f79edcdaf70f772164455eb837baa6aec0f451: You mad old witch, you can't help me.
textByHashes.a30e66554b3598c91e463285db098fe5f664fbe8: How do I use the agility course?
textByHashes.e6fe7e59066c2711d10010b8b6a66175c81704b6: He doesn't look like he wants to talk right now.
textByHashes.f9dae8ecb40ab0e8ed053d9b02917d4b2f7292a6: Oh, do you get humans here often?
textByHashes.0991fd5fa2146542810ee830a8627749287001b5: Why don't you make bigger clothes then?
textByHashes.9e8f6556b9ceff149f82e6eeea755eb39e29e2ec: The sewers? Your sister lives in the sewers?
textByHashes.88c517a4d8c37b7b00d95244205004a5b9f2571f: So do you have any quests for me?
textByHashes.a8e5bcf8ac606fcac8f7409e3a5404335659457a: Oh, just anything to do would be fine.
textByHashes.626d5a2f233441d18bcc79ab8a17174fa91a425e: What do you need help with, exactly?
textByHashes.6a491291f23ee9821d0d799eee0ed14dbe672975: Hmm, item in minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.652e7a4e1fe3027df01b1f50152eeb2ba2805a41: Hmm, pieces of copper ore in minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.00646049201831548900e0d8d47c36cad7ec9c65: I've had enough of this lousy job!
textByHashes.5d2cc11d119f4794704245235f962819255dbee9: Actually, I'm still just looking for your item.
textByHashes.3e280aca62c4bf36d8ce6a3016b880248de94abf: Actually, yes, I do have your item right here.
textByHashes.e77da3ae1c36673933b2e1e738699111d0786272: Look, I've got you your item!
textByHashes.737975cda783803645b632f4fe9a3939406dcb68: Nothing thanks. I just fancied a chat.
textByHashes.a305ab21c6cfad6cbc4fec64ab1d722d8e130466: That's okay, I didn't really want anything.
textByHashes.8cec53ff59ef90b3b1b1f9e7bcd0be3b9d080831: I'm fine, thanks, how are you?
textByHashes.da522530212d26e048835e87145494ef15c610e7: Are you going to sit there all day?
textByHashes.83a3e2bd5f75dc6c81edce92009f7b54cf22a937: But I can see both your legs!
textByHashes.be71111b53eb7e0b19ba7a0dad7e7e24d6e49dab: Well, I do have a ship that I'm not using. It's the Lady Lumbridge.
textByHashes.6d736bf26eedc0ec3510e76bf34a236f853e0f5a: I had to pay 2000 gp for that ship. Have you got that much?
textByHashes.23cf524060c36461c281978656b710f6ab2ebde5: Hmmm. And can you afford another ship?
textByHashes.754743ae9658c226a78f5e978b503d4aeb3d205c: So you're actually asking me to give you a free ship.
textByHashes.4ac33e08bec99d60c5fa60a4d145314bcbcd37f8: Do you have anything for trade?
textByHashes.5ba73bc7c989fde3d99f9ebbef71506936541bb4: Can you tell me about skillcapes, please?
textByHashes.c36a9559cf0ae670f0793ea0abe028370a826d6a: Black Knight? Why are you here?
textByHashes.9228177374cc9b16a00ca3f35e2fdddc7baeaf60: Hmm... well if Harrallak trusts you, I guess I can.
textByHashes.f135ce3cfdbf488f1c006d5da8d39fce3be72925: What's the Dummy Room all about?
textByHashes.ca7ff7862d22cd0cba73b3b67c0216b0a8595bea: So how do I tell which one is which?
textByHashes.3f9de1638b06325afe579d91a929d56320af01bc: May I claim my tokens please?
textByHashes.d39c10d1cd76119cf47d9d760f9a22e2fac1fe8e: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.
textByHashes.3fdcc6b32c61f0946481038c085772d11c8de40d: May I buy a Skillcape of Attack, please?
textByHashes.9f7239b79413b260e14b4fc5b59529386f9bf814: I would gladly pay such a paltry sum for a splendid cape.
textByHashes.f7f8e865bcd0d3d09ad27632af965774cc6778fc: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.
textByHashes.1844d3b18720ba25a4563662eafe3d7b12afa470: May I have another hood for my cape, please?
textByHashes.97747f928444191da19f0577ba43b2c3d944ac7e: Thank you. Nice to meet you too.
textByHashes.49a216d09c17b11950127573a0bdaac7c519a160: Wait a minute. How am I talking to you without a Camulet?
textByHashes.70f936a28a94bac75c4c52cc216fbee2f20e0e6b: Hmmm. I suppose this spell must tap directly into your mind. So, there's no need for language to get in the way.
textByHashes.27583971a1944cf9b072c24806a1a6c21458c5bb: I'm just using one of the Lunar spells.
textByHashes.c12a132830aa93c70cc90ab994342cc8de5cbb42: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?
textByHashes.787bb847a6615bff0b04b3de7b0fc22a6d6ae358: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.
textByHashes.587e78ec8ccae51c9edf53b6d7410cda799f4872: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.
textByHashes.428b659a9ca9664cd8ac7a0074903970551337eb: I wonder if that camel has fleas...
textByHashes.6fee0692f7f96a52eaac4b46985387990b034675: Oh yes. If you'd be so kind...
textByHashes.05cf92c1e238b4f8913e8a645051cb031703bac6: How important can a camel's problems be?
textByHashes.256f31f598b2ef8a81c53b9375c46c0d09b9a37f: Look, I don't really have the time to...
textByHashes.5f98ee7efd2e160830b672b2771c5f6c5c0a1750: That's six too many. If I really want to hear your poetry, I'll tell you, okay?
textByHashes.d5711c3707d01f3c79419df01747aa6cb78343f3: What does Elly think of your poems?
textByHashes.d7a5678f37a701c8ad300ca7fb8720616d1cd12e: Why not tell her how you feel?
textByHashes.8bad5156fe55b24dc242e325dd2fdde027c71e85: Well, best of luck with that.
textByHashes.73b6068b396e0c7e632f7777f6602d48b534a8b8: Would you look after my crops for me?
textByHashes.5ff4a787752aebabd04f4895860d5bc37a0282c8: I'm afraid I don't have any of those at the moment.
textByHashes.10aa0117ea687e9fb6578363563a026ab1d83a0f: Can you give me any farming advice?
textByHashes.29607689e0027c3bc64ec90fef3da76b335b9cf7: Yes, that sounds like a fair price.
textByHashes.5419882260ec71dc9165f57893664568a9375a8a: No thanks, I can get that much cheaper elsewhere.
textByHashes.b3bab788aaeb159059b8646b3930cff33716daf0: Forget it, you don't have anything I need.
textByHashes.f48711962fdd3b7d5b0e4001a0d25bcd4b9d8252: What do you do around here?
textByHashes.0634e3913c8b1632f99c881db5fa50ad52dc1889: I feel like there has to be a better solution to that, but good luck anyway!
textByHashes.1eadc0ba9a287cbe1e2694e8031923b76a6b6847: Thanks! I'd better be going now.
textByHashes.92c97608d8173229236dfec9afecf6680bb2b86d: No thanks. I'm just passing through.
textByHashes.2741c525a38f0e7234d3c879281a7823f82cd9fb: What do I have to do in this room?
textByHashes.39fe0c6aadc27873d78e525bca95895e82fc87ee: Got any tips that may help me?
textByHashes.6dbbb837a2749910c77167daf8c66aee893aa755: I'm investigating the origin of Elvarg. I've found some old doors on a ruined island but they're locked. I'm trying to find the key.
textByHashes.a96379d52926f6cb1716251f95366fe5441a21e7: I'm investigating the origin of Elvarg. I've found some old doors on a ruined island but they're locked. I think something important lies behind them.
textByHashes.a0e316d1d02838bea7efbf7e1d6e8fe4df91b248: I was investigating the origin of Elvarg but I accidently released a dragonkin.
textByHashes.4d2f10b61c87dc8f664383b239314560d549062e: Ok, let's see what you've got!
textByHashes.a89f0e9d12ec6833489adb8ee13d02886ec29db9: Nope, I'm just as lost as you.
textByHashes.29fe9552407b72429713ee1663d97cb281c180bd: Here's 2000 Coins - chop my tree down please.
textByHashes.b87ec5ae77727fabd9ce3dfdff33b067cb503d09: I don't want to pay that much, sorry.
textByHashes.e774c403a97a7fe481b81ada6f6e6004522c291e: I don't have 2000 Coins I'm afraid.
textByHashes.48acd53770aacc631215346e3314bd76178f85da: Oh! Er... I just ate one is why!
textByHashes.22220c47d70942d8c8a0ddef1a44d60eafd3f1f3: Where do you get your Karambwan from?
textByHashes.53cd660304fc091b6c45e51585bee6bb5c71814c: How does he manage a monopoly?
textByHashes.e2052232f5a63052dcb29746b6210e01b3a350cb: Hi Ali. Not bad. How are you?
textByHashes.7b0e624b671beed62616af927f0005516782d755: You have managed to get them off?
textByHashes.10102deda76ef82f4a2d092e9ea68c7b55f48ebd: What do you mean by 'not exactly'?
textByHashes.d5262ec29af577dc600a13b1131aa42c57ed8c45: I think I'll have a go at opening a small casket of runes.
textByHashes.e0dc43e2d1d53979a6715a04c10b722910a637f9: I'm feeling lucky, let's have a look at opening one of those large caskets.
textByHashes.9364e075631f1dfdfc1208fda004bbf73a5ca9c6: Hmmm... This lock looks like it may be impossible to prise open.
textByHashes.2d693e41bf442a566c8aceab1c72b3d3eda664b7: Hmmm... This lock looks like it may be impossible to pick open.
textByHashes.85a0c4a2e16e2e99e50d29ea30b11a1aa7e00f03: On second thoughts I don't really need any runes.
textByHashes.cabf8888919db2a6355e2b2d5f2fe504c2078291: I hear you're planning to expand your business here...
textByHashes.4b5c690a7eb15bb5512cff836dbe24e2bdd97848: But your men are threatening the other shopkeepers!
textByHashes.20df7460acc7f4c301c9f0ae510e192baf64e971: And the gnomes don't sound very happy about your magic carpet business.
textByHashes.b0ae69be26320bc9b25c0cb1842b9d063802b958: Aren't you going to do anything about your men?
textByHashes.588df4f977451b083e551b3f31cc2354ee39350b: But they're threatening to hurt the shopkeepers if they don't cooperate!
textByHashes.c637abd0865684419bd0c5de9ebb92f6e24a938e: Are you planning to take over all of Al Kharid's shops?
textByHashes.3e1830386665dc8defe20121265341b5e979c0e4: What will you do about the gnomes?
textByHashes.2ab2516c79f2693383ddda6c15bee7b281ddd949: Hi! I have this money off voucher!
textByHashes.d59e7b81f65b256f0432d32f290bf54012e04dd9: But I only just got it from Ali the Leaflet dropper!
textByHashes.91c631a33d7f8f00c3eb72e85504736fdb3f47bd: But you're the one that had them printed!
textByHashes.e648b6c310dbc18e03a5bb8e7e9eece3131a3de8: So that would be why they're all out of date then?
textByHashes.c0e92ad6715f17cd9152c623abf49a10c825eb10: No but thanks for your time.
textByHashes.cdc54768921440c36e85862c90c3ffabbb74e422: That beast would probably bite my fingers off if I tried to pet it.
textByHashes.e20b8b62d016571ee2e263225881a72ba96a38b3: I'm not going to pet that! It will probably bite my hand off, that filthy beast.
textByHashes.2e1df0b5ce59118d70f550e566814331348bce8b: Mmmm... you'd make a tasty kebab.
textByHashes.d41b9e68a0f625c4b73ea1564bf71e31777f223b: I'm not going to pet that nasty creature! I might get fleas... or worse!
textByHashes.6e537f38f6334169fdf226ba8ee7482ab70df057: I think I'll give it a miss.
textByHashes.87f9df4fc3f6cb9910040bb3668a35bcfcc7ca3b: Well it serves you right really. Taking advantage of people like that.
textByHashes.f07853cac7e73b33c182ab8733944bff9b7c4911: Wow! look at this place, it's so colourful.
textByHashes.01f77dd5ce2779f4732cded6393751a614b6e8e2: I take it by the clothes you are wearing and this room that you are in the dye trade?
textByHashes.3529cdae7c063f49e4384bd3a2256c035aa7a197: Ok make me some red dye please.
textByHashes.ca274940dd40e659efa700df70b7e178fa8688cb: Where would I find a redberry bush?
textByHashes.522a0ebdbb72ac6f304304896de2a0907a6a3f53: If I didn't care to grow my own, where else could I get some?
textByHashes.25b0c9f7042c8d1df0b539dd4273d489f5c604ed: Ok make me some yellow dye please.
textByHashes.8fc971207482f3520e8414963aad11e244b763d3: Where could I find some onions?
textByHashes.2e669fa9206dab524fa933cd04c481342bbbb4d7: Ok you have me there but is there anywhere around here where I could get my hands on some onions?
textByHashes.a5de7bf9f621768f83df3e2fe7ee7f7a8266b7be: Ok make me some blue dye please.
textByHashes.490c49aac40bce6a2806a0fe17af38505586f7ae: Where can I get some woad leaves?
textByHashes.95dd4ae193f8f927d24c1a6f7262af391f79dd74: On second thoughts, I don't think that I need some dye right now.
textByHashes.3dd256563c4d95d4db7d522879e02381380fa271: How did you get into the colour business?
textByHashes.b2fea8ef5cd83f4f3d169f8da97ec6e7b41ad17b: Umm, what's a drysalter, it isn't a medical condition is it?
textByHashes.5bd3a2097697abd0cd86a15316400893560e79bf: Hmm yes, about the worst I've heard today at least.
textByHashes.9d187fb148f89f7c4e62b41f39448678182bb21c: No thanks, I'm just having a look around.
textByHashes.1076d5e278b63d11bb106e701a61f30c4a836d61: What can you tell me about Al Kharid?
textByHashes.4ef6e3bd216156c389ec5a9019fa6299d852525e: Can you give me any advice on farming here in the desert?
textByHashes.23d09cc2448bf3452a34953415fb39f3091d895e: Just tell me about cactuses, then.
textByHashes.acc45c67cb458abae0e52b68f46a4db04e1e9eef: Can you give me any other advice?
textByHashes.b886cb86fe6471aab3be5161d0b5ee4642bd73fd: Well, can you at least sell me any gardening tools or seeds?
textByHashes.ae35787f1717797a06d51bfd89c21a146c63958f: So, what do you do here?
textByHashes.ddf35263fa978fef808e2cbe07ea01632b19872b: I hear you work for Ali Morrisane...
textByHashes.a65e0d6e0716d83d8fbcb9f2c163ff661d095781: Maybe I should talk to him...
textByHashes.4c0032365f67c1b3242b6eef062c4bba891761c4: I hear you've been threatening the other shopkeepers.
textByHashes.7e56734a938009581f78f44f43689c9ee621f06f: One of the shopkeepers told they were threatened by a man with a rake...
textByHashes.cf302ff844a197054ae4afbd51c50a482fc106b5: Why are you only guarding those buildings?
textByHashes.afdd51eb6f39cb8efe0a5fc635528b12d018622e: Why, what did you do back home?
textByHashes.ecd26026794554f7fd5ffa5d9ac198ef46677098: You're not going to deny it?
textByHashes.6644550619ade6c466b41028bccf51abecd45406: Does it happen to be... Ali?
textByHashes.ba7b589c7513b1ecd2cf6d73e320af2015caa4ae: So can I call you Al?
textByHashes.7f1d61f5570b23923b6d27f6b89274f617550f23: Actually I don't want any of that stuff, I'm new in town and I wanted to get to know the locals.
textByHashes.5304572928a8a0cec525b6f46bc4eb862fcf16cd: Sorry! I won't let it happen again.
textByHashes.b872236d77de5cec714b6209258512e48191d559: I don't know, what can you do for me?
textByHashes.dcd3006af99255a7e709cce763fddc4f9d92e770: Well then, what kind of kebabs do you, er, construct?
textByHashes.a6da2818f417ba5978212ba91641b6871b7363df: I want a standard kebab, please.
textByHashes.c8af11105db9012363ad019af60aeb0b58bdee84: I seem to be short on coins. Sorry.
textByHashes.8127bee32655d58fbdf2d8e0712380f24cb16fac: Could I have one of those crazy hot kebabs of yours?
textByHashes.0e5be67a5f8a25cf7776bbf54a6429ab59ea4d07: Would you sell me that bottle of special kebab sauce?
textByHashes.8a61b461a9c924c88a3b3b668936293182b2ad6c: Don't worry, I've no intention of setting up a rival kebab shop.
textByHashes.67f486668d4251c907867c7058e9d3112a6833ce: I don't know, but I think I could have a little bit of fun with it.
textByHashes.f1c626cb132806a732cbf14b64c75b5d0c1530d6: No, that would be a bit cliché. I think I'll come up with something more original.
textByHashes.c2e94cf9853746178cc7fcd39ea09502615542f8: Actually, I might get back to you on the sauce. I'm a bit overburdened as it is.
textByHashes.0252bd84384f9daae7e46c36cf085312d9956f18: What is the difference between the standard and the extra-hot kebab?
textByHashes.e500efa79fb0884517006e6f283c987d9da59c20: So there's no difference except the sauce you use?
textByHashes.e5a321bf2f0b1acb60e4bbf358b3a84c5dcae1af: Listen, I've got to run. I'll catch you later.
textByHashes.ad2c1444e6c19b43bf1e9608ddc376b847e96f84: Were you paid to say that?
textByHashes.0b1ce11e882260cfe392485ca8960e0ad175dd75: What is there to do round here, boy?
textByHashes.bbaf1edfa14ac1dfdc86e94fb6ff36b0de096701: I don't want this! It's out of date!
textByHashes.e832ccdce67869745004d3103ec11b2c8167089e: Yes, I spoke to him already. He really had me going with his little 'tourism' trick!
textByHashes.e52205cc634954ba00ca13dddd1d4662605b6483: I'm new in town and wanted to get to know the locals.
textByHashes.89898c60043496c7c3929d0881aaab78b3556243: I've discovered that. Well he has an uncle called Ali Morrisane, a market vendor in Al Kharid and that's all I really know about him.
textByHashes.0c535d44d1da541546dbfaa040923af51fe536d5: Indeed. Um, I have to go.
textByHashes.aba6645b627a496cf3a31a8beea912955dd5db6d: Well, one of the shopkeepers told me a man with a large hammer came to threaten them.
textByHashes.57b815c8a9875001f46aa29ef49ae7decb1a7400: Wow, a snake charmer! Can I have a go? Can I have a go? Please?
textByHashes.1eebeba6ea682b52b69156e9f36ceb1efaeea1c6: Can you teach me any more about animal charming.
textByHashes.1ccf6a4847d572ccf1a60ea223f1522d88cf6760: Wonderful? It's hot and dry all the time!
textByHashes.5fd5e912c7d3740355ef09288221132ce2704dd6: One of the shopkeepers did say they were threatened by a man with large scissors...
textByHashes.c1264a40b5d5035e8b884d3acf0bb9d373e27619: Hmm... Could I get some tea?
textByHashes.886e607ea1168fb6a8407f60b7fd669e2b8a076b: How's business here? Seems quite out the way.
textByHashes.2e7e956f8d9191ab17dd4c298bf6751e899b626b: That's awful. If I see any shifty characters, I'll be sure to teach them a lesson.
textByHashes.4443a406c38b895b8257079badda565b9030a71c: I'm pretty tough. I think I can handle them.
textByHashes.757a029d92fd42ad65cb4cff583c1a88e2d7bb1e: I've been waiting quite a while. Perhaps another time.
textByHashes.b5896c31c656c1ee5bffa4f4061e09caf73725af: Well you never actually made me that tea...
textByHashes.bcfc160f1da64ae795558fa494356bed2ed2b7c2: Are your masters those men called Ali?
textByHashes.52ac218a0028eee0c72bb88322d2b395367eaabe: So, what's it like working for your masters?
textByHashes.d9ec895dc3988fe16bda6375ff7b2149ba806008: Really? That's very cruel of whoever did it.
textByHashes.8e8341ab000c000f9ab8a44071f990bd4404daf1: Oh no! Is there anything I can do?
textByHashes.c916171c788b8ff6738ab894fb19bea784178dcb: A bird helps you to fish?
textByHashes.0ee5da2182cec77f397a129785f4dccd7e151826: Could I have a go with your bird?
textByHashes.46baf2a1b1ee6bd4edf3c147445a660a3d36d1a8: I don't think that's for me... I'll leave that to you.
textByHashes.cb2396e8238d1240f45e72333c9449e4e6fd130c: I'm interested... How many pearls are we talking?
textByHashes.065d59e303af886b90b6997aa57460bf993baccc: On seconds thoughts, I'd rather keep it.
textByHashes.6ab3fc7486e137ad6109b9623052594434d3bb12: Not yet. I think I'll keep trying.
textByHashes.5345d95a52c74a41f9fa8fa3df6db3df5ba50e6b: I'm not too sure about toad's legs.
textByHashes.f5aad05589739bcde7b04fa784dc6c0f9cb9c958: Erm, I've not quite finished it yet.
textByHashes.0cca1545c60d4f22bcbced307a55266be8a33f39: I'm afraid I've lost the crunchie tray you gave to me.
textByHashes.039219bca8df31c72f61fe27e2333fb874333502: Ok Aluft, I'll be back soon.
textByHashes.b7d1b3df2d8db8d998af2284a98a919ff0795617: I'm afraid I've lost the batta tin you gave to me.
textByHashes.1c32088a499344e058c1136fbc6bff88a73dbae2: Here you go, that was no problem.
textByHashes.596dbd96cfffd8264604d639d7b5f6ab9ccfa06f: Can you move my house please?
textByHashes.4ea0e38ce7e6941eb269196daba16b1118ec52e1: Can you redecorate my house please?
textByHashes.ae325367c65bc555acaba3ddea7c496cb5c1b1ec: Could I have a Construction guide book?
textByHashes.d08d93215431bd9c83cf8127a05e6c7a2d35dbe1: Ah, so that's how everyone can have a house without them cluttering up the world!
textByHashes.9e60a19469a1a68a1b2965b3201afe2b2d717038: Tell me about that skillcape you're wearing.
textByHashes.b0998b6b04830a11f959160f246fa2b1c8610e8f: Can you sell me a Skillcape of Construction?
textByHashes.ba7a2ef622cdcac40ab19487fd69483c67d3e9cc: Hmm, yeah sorry about that. Speaking of carpets, ever thought how strange that there are carpets beneath the stairs?
textByHashes.b366a439a63310fb675b3b9c75fcd3e80c63a21f: Sure... Cut to fit... Not an oversight at all.
textByHashes.7ea97768156b2d313aa900dc8efa4505a4150d4c: Are you the Alyssa this entry mentions?
textByHashes.cb80c743e05baf4c58054b15465ba3c6ef65f2fc: Got anything to say about it?
textByHashes.0483b6b7d24bf8873da178e300bd236eb3354269: ...Most people don't know when to stop sharing. I guess you have a point though.
textByHashes.f681b8f4c4a64ac2186a5511495e92fccd25de10: Alright, sorry for disturbing you. Bye.
textByHashes.9d30f26ad0c32018a53718e890079876cfeb0cb4: ...Most people don't know when to stop sharing. It's probably worth mentioning that I've found all entries of this memoir.
textByHashes.f13aef9af5ebd9d9f912c997ccc0754244a54a98: Honestly, I've never really questioned it. I do things for people and they give me things.
textByHashes.454b7662b817772e1623b1139de3fec1cdb6752b: Fantastic! I've got to say, there's some great little gems in this old book. I think I'm unravelling a great mystery!
textByHashes.0358453589e989501e0dff3402dd24c9cb394740: What if I were to say she's still out there! Read this entry that I found hidden within a secret part of the memoir.
textByHashes.691153b22d603d46f9c506f5309d509c6ff83fa5: Ah, you do make a good point...
textByHashes.0c10a1c9740ebabba014856e4fd3752353d61f48: It's certainly peculiar, but it should be investigated regardless. Y'know, just in case...
textByHashes.4b9f32ff6ba6d0b8e1ebc0bbcba9ee83fda0473d: Don't you worry! I'm a brave adventurer with a damsel in distress to rescue! This is my bread and butter.
textByHashes.8fc3fdd2ca2ef98ec2c48150a9c73f7e176bce8c: Oh, of course! Thanks for chatting with me Alyssa, I'll see you around.
textByHashes.dfa137f092317dc80b75d942b889a46dc7636c0d: Hello Ambassador. Are you here visiting King Roald?
textByHashes.8d0ca6d62afb8b9db536e98dc95e712ea3961756: You don't seem that upset by that, though...
textByHashes.3ef1cf3144a389b1178bf6f486a4a476985e43ca: Well, he's clearly a busy man.
textByHashes.0fd7f2bd20729ba1a3616277689c4434f4dd01c2: Well, it is the White Knights' Castle.
textByHashes.f38ee117fe885d513610e9f8abdf4607de0310fd: Yes, but then they'd have to become the Dark Green Knights. Doesn't really have the same ring to it.
textByHashes.0d2c1b7a59977544d5be0349aed8a3062328fd74: Yes, but then they'd have to become the Pink Knights. I think they'd have problems recruiting then.
textByHashes.6511ff66bad2b97cc9e27f53ef489d1a18379ac4: I think that may be worse...
textByHashes.182ab46919967f7b01354dd50eaa409ce6eb4b6a: Nope. Just thought I'd say hi.
textByHashes.36b27699653a456711d3005c50d54e1d2a967185: Let me guess. There's a catch isn't there?
textByHashes.0e8b0c5f7892b3f06cbc43a0c906e835ac5edab3: Well thankfully I'm afraid of no ghost. Where do I start?
textByHashes.2b4c8cd1c9968b4ed95a4943a66650a846768b8d: What do you have for sale?
textByHashes.a559ccb05c5071defd956e0f3ec0b959cb9de5f8: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that.
textByHashes.2fc161067fd338566d7484c399ff6417915348ca: In that case, I'll leave you to it. Sorry for disturbing you.
textByHashes.95b6509423df4690f745ed9c0d85c605ab8629ff: So people contact you for help with their homes?
textByHashes.fd1bba39b7a93e245c450264e4fd753fe48a6299: That sounds quite enjoyable and satisfying to do, are you hiring at all?
textByHashes.71a20b0b7341a75c54c1958a45fcc4d2030136e3: Could I have a beginner contract please?
textByHashes.e12ae7f8436ee6baf79f66d86ddca88398c6fe76: Could I have a novice contract please?
textByHashes.424369240cfc185c088dfb756a9467f0eb7e49cc: Could I have an adept contract please?
textByHashes.ec465b36b27daab1676ac7b64ad711824068c78b: Could I have an expert contract please?
textByHashes.4836591263f046d54cfc2d0f89e1352854fafe48: Yeah I've noticed that they seem to keep breaking hatstands all the time too, I'm not sure how easy it is to break a hatstand...
textByHashes.f5f11133f89c03e2a62b06c953c439d7e63e2341: Why don't you have a construction cape if you're a master builder?
textByHashes.86c6f8aa4d9773db418ce8c2038b99579314361c: The teleports on it are really handy.
textByHashes.90bc93010990306a73164761a22411ae0d8d4713: That still only counts as one!
textByHashes.efc991ff7207fc31bf80292ab05fb18e34f0f7e9: I hate to say it, but I don't think that's true. You're dead.
textByHashes.5cc7d3bd6ab253e00c94b920c0c2dda113a4c3fb: Do you know who you were fighting against?
textByHashes.f486a4fe46a7888bca65e887a3d09a68df0ec06b: Well I hope it all works out for you. Good luck.
textByHashes.168c2db1eb310a6862cfcf0f874df5ab2d45ade9: There's no Big High War God here.
textByHashes.edec41f4a5ecb19a0ad4f955755b466b5587be32: Sorry to be the bearer of bad news, but I think this 'shiny' might have killed you as well.
textByHashes.daede18cc8a71cf4b7505ce6d4290e7dc1fa86ac: You know there's normally not this much talking before dying.
textByHashes.b500a046c62c50c18eaf9ccdacb4be19c8c4a171: I think I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.ef6dc33388a49016176185646738c1d159ad65bd: Oh, I'm trying to help out around here.
textByHashes.4425a7d41236a7f165bb758a6c01b184bf5f4149: Is there anything to do there?
textByHashes.2a3630a76d4c1767f5ad8604bbde105e522836f2: I'll give you 1,000,000 coins for permanent access.
textByHashes.4d7f90ff3cf586e861d34bf3f5ad4131f20865d2: No. I don't have that sort of money.
textByHashes.a33698b7d492d012cb4f899fcb04bf4e5cce40b5: No. That's too much for me to spend.
textByHashes.04d0a323c3b002e035fe3bf13fdd0bca2bd5d64c: Is there anything to do around here?
textByHashes.ffa79c0e1c714a59f01aa43ba9563e391200051e: Andros Mai? Sorry, but I can't say I've heard of you I'm afraid.
textByHashes.478f1ed66ae283a383a478b0ae6e4e716b8a4835: Nothing, but I have a feeling you're about to fill me in.
textByHashes.c0980f4b9e88b3eb2010946b06e89cb4e29dfe60: We've crossed swords in the past, I can't say I'm too keen to do it again though.
textByHashes.b935c2b4d17c30e3787a5c679c821ab8c7ead295: But why do you ask? What do you want with Vet'ion?
textByHashes.13bcd2e1ecf636af8a33ba7bc95a383661acb487: Then why are you waiting here? Seems to me that you don't want to face Vet'ion.
textByHashes.504e56f40fda354efd10a939f7403451212941db: It's okay, sometimes I pretend to be busy when there's something I don't want to do, too.
textByHashes.ea0c041768b70ff41496afbf9d715881069ae172: Hey. Do you know anything about this?
textByHashes.bea6be77d229f20fdf09b3364566cdac0ecc9a94: And? Do you know anything about it?
textByHashes.d6abc317e5e78fe7024c5941693e52a472a7e4ef: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for a powerful enhancement like that.
textByHashes.1b08c85a030ca6e210fb4e39c1238b115a4c8582: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for that.
textByHashes.559e5322edc39e966cb27c0d09a6ca1b1b63a06b: Surely you could consider it... For the right price?
textByHashes.f43b4c19969150c25adb994894cab63339d48b39: I don't have the money for that.
textByHashes.ba585fb7635aed4d30f8a3bb4af4bef90ec73c26: Fangs indeed. Rather useless it seems.
textByHashes.83b276f9a3a30b41be7a56e94e6546c31b2c4737: Wait! It seems to still contain some magic. Surely we can use it?
textByHashes.82011eca7e64a1523868fda5aff9bb6d03c0bf17: Is there really nothing you can do to help me with this?
textByHashes.d093b179c94ff6cd0484dc38a75308af84049208: Oh. Do you know someone who might know more?
textByHashes.04ebf3fb4727dea13aec4f90da7c1c1c27b6e643: Oh wow, how can I get involved?
textByHashes.0f79cf3509c3ff8b4a14aee7daa5e9683c0c16ef: I'm sorry about what happened to Glough, Anita.
textByHashes.8635a28c0aed6e6ea1b15a56effcf0b3a4e1458a: No, I know where I am.
textByHashes.833d9952e91b4cc5853c4c33ecd9984bcd29a32c: I was hoping you'd give me some free stuff.
textByHashes.6218dfc5980d751449c8b65385d7fd6f9a2173da: I promise I'll stop bothering you!
textByHashes.1e4fb8375d61a489b74586852c10d9c0f66fab28: Pwetty pleathe wiv thugar on top!
textByHashes.e6fe5a802b902223ed64514c664a64b61c590a27: Hang on, I thought you were looking for your husband.
textByHashes.15f36b62cb776eb3d56cbea637354a2c4055c201: So how do these rat pits work?
textByHashes.a5547ecb82fe8d8b5105fc51b66fee8829139b07: That sounds simple enough so far.
textByHashes.dd4046abc944e4e9eeec1d4b25c226e6bb864e89: So then how do you win the challenge?
textByHashes.706eb044a7014485d4b30c7e385d9f170edcb138: It sounds a little dangerous for my cat.
textByHashes.557f4a8d35ea8ef4c701fad74b561d59cfef99f5: Oh how terrible. Is there nothing you can do to save your cat?
textByHashes.40e304959e8cba59cd2e4adcc4be3110bb9cf06b: Is there a limit to how much you can bet?
textByHashes.c48de2a2f46beaced5d6afcc42c52bc1cc99a72e: Hmm, that sounds like a silly amount of money to bet on a cat fight.
textByHashes.705919dabd545e2083452c49d6d6e321e26956fb: Can I challenge you and your cat?
textByHashes.387a985c8ac1cae65f31103d870b74e370193e40: But I'm not an outsider, am I not inside in the pits now?
textByHashes.4bbffaeae9818ab5f5a709eba3664e88edde7dfe: Sorry! I didn't mean to pry!
textByHashes.f0cdf48ab8242b297f330a61f18fd02bde67fe60: Oh. Do you work for the Varrock Museum?
textByHashes.f4e36a37c6f147d6e18c4fc3392e02398e63ad59: Okay, so who are you investigating it for?
textByHashes.2ca693df67d2b6a812f37278e55f3a411d713559: Okay, so is there anything you CAN say?
textByHashes.5cab4a7355609e3f9f62adbe229f3b9a645640da: Okay, I think you've said enough!
textByHashes.0396089a9419059ea44b1d6e6a8f5749e8d65bc6: Uh...I said I've lost my anorak!
textByHashes.baa1417db313c83e5dad47217cdc088a8bc01491: You are? But you're just sitting there.
textByHashes.afc0675ee2d0a032acd10b00d0455dffc594e237: Oh, I see. When does your break finish?
textByHashes.b64b76f8005bcf630b73e82ab36f7f9e59a0f770: Better than expected. It's a lot...nicer...here than I was expecting. Everyone seems pretty happy.
textByHashes.85cdadbfd1fbedcd755aef271000655e80ca1d47: I think some of those Jatizso citizens have got the wrong idea about this place.
textByHashes.6bb8d89bbd33329ac0f81f658d9a9189a7d0e4b6: Looks like you have a good selection of weapons around here...
textByHashes.1c9c273de4b6820fad31b8aeb138dc2936311b96: How about I pay you nothing at all...
textByHashes.f4d4ef2c09b676045e278a40dc4e050c794f4fae: Could you tell me more about this place?
textByHashes.eeabb5bdd6ab131de75baa82214859f40721873f: So it was a family business? Do the family still own it today?
textByHashes.221929fcb8581983ff40b8545647e41524115574: I'd better be on my way.
textByHashes.428b7c6e979433fa5b0b2237ac6e2f50e9b6a2fa: Well, I can't blame you for that. All the best.
textByHashes.b29f0d75c10fb4c31b73d2da19f0ab50f1078991: Hello. I have some fine silk from far away to sell to you.
textByHashes.6af0769d5646272d3ba8a00ef0f26db1f38af316: I'll give it to you for 60.
textByHashes.eb38e4846d4bac6558eebe693b59a4b92a6f5db3: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.
textByHashes.b9a92a343b22100cdba737fc44e06f2a46cfa660: Can you make potions for me?
textByHashes.46716caa016c4212e91977d4d562d62a9cbe777c: You wouldn't be able to make any other cat potions, would you?
textByHashes.858c0aba19e381fe7c53fdd067117e0635da78c4: Have you got any decent gossip to share?
textByHashes.f109d2e023a7f1a82cdc4496fc6b9c38bfaec6b9: Do you know a potion to make hair fall out?
textByHashes.c64966a5b9a3737133f15f0ffc200cec41bba7e5: Have you got any good potions to give away?
textByHashes.5274de1ecc0d071464ad99ad099fa3d061631d19: Yes, I'll trade it for herblore training.
textByHashes.8f4f22c8d7a42ac72c5516813bca66190a94342c: No thanks, I want to keep hold if it a bit longer.
textByHashes.3eeb96cee483f7279742bd757a6b4cc2af0c50de: I was wondering if you could repair my pouches.
textByHashes.14b1e3f56ae43402f4bfc36f3b6c3b3c3ea98bf8: I don't have enough abyssal pearls for that, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.34c1d41929635ad39862eeb11bac8f69b2580ce1: Do the wizards not use them in the fight against the abyss?
textByHashes.2da053ab10a4e69b1ea65e41719be7163d607c5c: Could I have one to aid in the fight?
textByHashes.9ca08000353366f121c54ab15db83025bcdb97fe: How committed does one have to be?
textByHashes.6a4caf0683b4c265bd2201f1fcf5519f742a8958: Ah, I don't have enough on me right now.
textByHashes.a0f328dbf4a14aff5f3993f5b0982b541db0b218: What's that rift guardian doing over there?
textByHashes.76516d9421cb4c77eb59c898002dfe43628fdbc0: Why are you selling things here?
textByHashes.715c27dcf403205eb7ff3812ecb356613d7c070f: So you sell things in exchange for abyssal pearls?
textByHashes.ee5b98c8d0bb7fcca39de4bec3528a3710164373: Could you tell me more about this place.
textByHashes.74e7dc07d49c4736c639dad457afed71bb7a645c: I found this dye in the rewards rift...
textByHashes.90400f3c8dd0db797e836a99fab418ef62913b5c: Well, yes, but how did you know?
textByHashes.152469d1ed1a4c54f414bbb3317109e3e43dfde8: I'd like to swap my abyssal red dye for some abyssal green dye.
textByHashes.751bcbd075c2c69cc22f18e1a74036a122cc1430: I'd like to swap my abyssal red dye for some abyssal blue dye.
textByHashes.6ad842b699a8454cee20c9ae1f98683ab493ed5f: I'd like to swap my abyssal green dye for some abyssal red dye.
textByHashes.acc5eedf187b0ee31669ee28ecd36866f6f710aa: I'd like to swap my abyssal green dye for some abyssal blue dye.
textByHashes.0e8622e570fa87b0c2e2992744d9833c059f0e3e: I'd like to swap my abyssal blue dye for some abyssal red dye.
textByHashes.c0d56d2c7fcfa6ffc6f5798c0d24cc53c3819d80: I'd like to swap my abyssal blue dye for some abyssal green dye.
textByHashes.13d707688c0c228b69fe0ef4d5176ace451dd667: No, I'd like to sell it to you.
textByHashes.c6a096a30dcf454df2307293e1705d7df934dbf1: I lost an item from the rewards rift.
textByHashes.8c0d2c6b78e39fad0e98df055329cbdb74106f2f: I'd like to sell you something from the rewards rift.
textByHashes.c83756d3439db7e032922a3f01df046111976653: On second thoughts, I'll keep it for myself.
textByHashes.4f4c5d2ef534deebb8d1150cdfdf7e322bb9da9b: I was wondering if you could do something for me while I work to close the rift.
textByHashes.7549eed397ad793f648298b5b20ccd03bc2e6210: I was wondering if you could close the barrier so that other adventurers don't interfere with us closing the rift.
textByHashes.8399895e77950b203029df885b14ba4740436171: I believe that we already have what it takes to close the rift and I wouldn't want any other adventurers getting in the way.
textByHashes.98a76f3b2fd780536238eb80a8ac6d72a4d6f0ee: I've changed my mind, we should allow other adventurers to join us in closing the rift.
textByHashes.74fc413fe2b642016fcc6602bf63dd7bc06b790e: I could cast a Water Blast or a Wind Blast spell to hurry things along if you'd like?
textByHashes.706e297566c96ebddd697b8326a2ea8d00cbae6c: Oh go on, what happened to them?
textByHashes.607f4615735584e17769303bd94e8135a0c6d139: Oh, that's too bad. I had better leave you to it.
textByHashes.a5649260f11312ec54a4f98d563cbc3a68ac487f: Surely there must be upsides to the task?
textByHashes.d1caa877fe41afa981e37b720a9a39e7561f2cd5: Oh, you can talk to me. I can see you're having a bad day.
textByHashes.a9374b930a35f5239336e80d365586df087edf1b: I can't blame them, all you do is whine.
textByHashes.46a32e9c7f7bf4cc2161b68581a74e774bab74ec: A sympathetic ear can do wonders.
textByHashes.3d48d5d4e41bb9fe481dbf53c489e7a68820a60c: I don't know. You were whining about something or other. To tell you the truth, I wasn't really listening.
textByHashes.57d98ff9fc82d65c88286fed50e834f837f2658d: To tell you the truth, I wasn't really listening.
textByHashes.547a11bd8563837ec2769436afedaf8d174c9469: You mentioned something about the garden.
textByHashes.be0bb436f6060e804173895eea835b532a71cb87: Oh, that sounds interesting - so how does it work?
textByHashes.165d3606af38de3dd86b64a4bfa3a7e1f0de7f8a: Fair enough, but tell me, how do you get to the garden?
textByHashes.8bf36575b79532055c3e1c82d168cef0a6be77cd: Wow, cast the spell on me. It will be good Magic training for you.
textByHashes.1674277a6f1795dd125699d46e5fceed49141033: Of course not. I'd be glad to help.
textByHashes.13d6a9a59dfc40de701d42589b7a7bac79a2dd1c: Oh, that's nice. Well it's been great talking to you.
textByHashes.ecc07832f8c942bb442927fa6c5d5b91d7cfa98e: Hey apprentice, do you want to try out your teleport skills again?
textByHashes.1e0dcba41bde7c1f6ead67d33b4133bc37ebd639: Tell me more about this archive.
textByHashes.75e395f9ddd3b00fb7676460b5dd3b7d21305db8: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence Mine?
textByHashes.f586795f66cf39026103fdac1871453c2d490325: I don't know if it will be much help, but I found out its real name. It's called the Stone of Jas.
textByHashes.a4538dd9724229b34f93c1c3bf887e863e7920aa: Were you able to find any information on the Stone of Jas?
textByHashes.3c613065bcd2e8fe5f6aac5ed556d3bf7d0cd176: Who else knows the teleport to the Rune Essence Mine?
textByHashes.1a49497436422bda1a3fc7feab3fccebd0c5c013: Well it wasn't easy for sure. You wouldn't believe how difficult it was to overcome some of those traps.
textByHashes.f9f58a1da79ddd94e3c4cc832f124b148d50ba08: Why did you need the safeguards? Surely they made it more difficult to do your work down here?
textByHashes.3e0c17a087fb2df6c2fc1bca5fc0edcf73126e6c: So... about that. Hallowvale no longer exists. The Hallowed Sepulchre is now beneath the vampyre capital of Darkmeyer within the lands of Morytania.
textByHashes.b15b6be35f7929db74b33e40753cd1df77a30277: You buried yourselves alive? That's... horrible!
textByHashes.bddcc100c638979e22f04b350b5d0511a0633c65: Well, at the very least you succeeded at keeping the vampyres out of the Sepulchre. From what I have seen, none of them have been able to enter.
textByHashes.add88b6ca4ee714480eb0417068f88426d46fd11: Oh, it's your ring? I didn't know.
textByHashes.c9d7ce6909b5a90f5e60a157a659a38c7ba6ede8: Why did you try to destroy it?
textByHashes.90d1cebc3d1668d3526f5da5b668de0f246df189: Tell me about the Calamity Coven.
textByHashes.6db7679bb2b6ccba4693889927384e875f2c0f7b: Do you have any tips on how to win duels?
textByHashes.247442852e5f5d25d423d70d0682b3fb2169475a: But I can't hit that hard!
textByHashes.d4d61012a35e6ffa2520accf040aa529bf3028a3: Do you have any places you like to visit around here?
textByHashes.5d20c1fe4c5013df7f38067727a5423cd9601dc9: Do you work out a lot?
textByHashes.71e4573afd3e7514bfb8e4ac2374448e4dce073d: Do you know where I could get some food around here?
textByHashes.d0d024879af6884d112c3444af9ed96fc0b54252: Could you give me some merching tips?
textByHashes.185b9effebcea253411a1bc66299b67542e0e9b8: Could you come and help me with something?
textByHashes.54104642977ff22123d726a07aeb7f307817cdbb: Why are all these souls here?
textByHashes.25f50337c845e88a90f9f35f1a58b3370bd573de: I've been reading your book: 'The Journey of Souls'
textByHashes.a2587b0b0bb86702af9abbaf53a3de485aa757bb: No, I don't want your smelly soul bearer.
textByHashes.e0cfffdb0371e931415f94131bbdc3fc99146c91: About the soul bearer again... I got it repaired by the Key Master. Thanks for your help.
textByHashes.7dbb36e49594a0402ba3e2ad21276b476cd2bc1a: I see. Well, I'd best be off.
textByHashes.979deef61482990df7ee20dfa48dfc98ce72c7bd: Not bad thanks, any news on Lord Iorwerth?
textByHashes.4c3cf65ba73cd8a6df2ec1680a175f119060e3bc: Oh okay, well see you then.
textByHashes.38717ae1d49f6af2226e3a88b357565e831fb8f8: How do you know I killed it?
textByHashes.807f171e00fa65a16c9b7d1e47c43292deadce5a: There's just one thing I don't understand about that whole time travel culinaromancer thing...
textByHashes.b6c6466b5882764f15bb1328584c95f14293fc62: Yeah, I guess... I just wish things made sense is all...
textByHashes.27d92945cac7b95ebc30575fb12b3e166b24d91d: But how did you know what I would ask?
textByHashes.9042621d9e704b50916f05612d406db9ddfa09e7: Yes, I want to know more about the desert!
textByHashes.5873705d23d84cd0bf9eaff30ed6d55125d60efc: Tell me about Enakhra the Mahjarrat.
textByHashes.9dd3a0ad636562ddbb31b4ef5981105f0b61f0dd: Tell me about Akthanakos the Mahjarrat.
textByHashes.5c540db76e76656d8a9ff545736f05859dfd37e8: Why should I care about what happened thousands of years ago?
textByHashes.e7252c8aeded21cbe29934c79be51d693470411d: I'd like to see what you sell.
textByHashes.9f4682f12dc0fbee45342f641c095a14aa1f4bcf: Can you tell me about your cape?
textByHashes.5bac7554449964349c92522d97e07d6121e43840: I don't want to find Hespori seeds when farming.
textByHashes.4780b2d90547e8b3f08aa50215bddd668c9cd170: I want to find Hespori seeds when farming.
textByHashes.e854ad357a3d9a978ece6fb915ee63febd9c4148: I'll come and collect them from you.
textByHashes.dab23b9d84fda045791e9982c2c407c55885846b: No, I don't care if I lose that stuff. I'll fight the Hespori again now.
textByHashes.38dd76ced849908b9cea7c0613ac4fbc5e670e9e: Nothing, I just came to chat.
textByHashes.7342316e3a29323c116ba561faeb67a27f8e41b1: Can you tell me anything about the castle?
textByHashes.6a86470da1757402f449a1eda13c4534183e95b4: What's it like being an Etceterian?
textByHashes.6ea5e30d055a5f0bde3fcf181fcf8c68f9c09baf: I did! Thank you for the reward.
textByHashes.78120ce0f2a1f5c87efcf99a50bc5aa900d71e43: Looks to me like you're the only one.
textByHashes.80fadc1ae1e1b143d3abddcdb8aba8d4c9562ae9: Er... has that been approved, or are you just dreaming?
textByHashes.ef921793041cfed923213ffe74124cd330dd6b11: And look at the use of shade and contrast - isn't it just magnificent?
textByHashes.df9272c597426484756f08e181974154155916ab: Uhh... Has that been approved or are you just dreaming?
textByHashes.66e0b86ec3d32de9308467bc0b8f26680f2a8811: That was nice, what did it mean?
textByHashes.a9341317a9fb5d0144ad1248cc9db44d5da0034c: That's powerful stuff...and yes, I see what you mean about the painting inspiring you to remember that poem...
textByHashes.3f75473b45bf9f0b1db54df50ed21dc106892348: I didn't like it, but I still like the painting.
textByHashes.4cda5effaf6ca9a566dd6d9294f2a06129fc3f16: Hey Arthur, can I stop receiving clues from vessels? They're clogging up my backpack!
textByHashes.f9546d6e205796115d8fb67a01fd610c2363d6f7: Yes please, I want to stop receiving vesseled containers.
textByHashes.c96e984fc569f3290032ea9977ece8c3a932870f: Hey Arthur, can I start receiving clues from vessels?
textByHashes.6362db1f006c2324be34158b1746e4e68efe6468: Yes please, I want to start receiving vesseled containers.
textByHashes.236bc23623fbb439dd1cd75f99d5c3de52fac826: What kinds of items do you stock?
textByHashes.d1df919b1213414e074739404da8c5eafc43f677: I'm not in the market for Hunter equipment right now, thanks.
textByHashes.f22a5fce7997310648f6a891852c03a5bc3c0c8e: Hello there Artur. Actually... I guess I should say Your Majesty now.
textByHashes.59427ace6a403002206d949548aeee5e9ab55613: I'm sure you can as well. Anyway, I'll let you get on with your work.
textByHashes.c92f8ae3540ca666eda5a04fb4fabf5321836e54: I am a wandering hero, I come here in search of adventure.
textByHashes.05180caab8ccc1e7de0d93ea22110f62ea6e58c4: Unfortunately without people like me, peace doesn't last for long.
textByHashes.d8dcac2067e01474ddad74d8a17784872b2f4104: You've got a point there... Hmm...
textByHashes.e56f17b9980282119226fe001b7f3cc1fdd0861e: Hopefully this war is over soon.
textByHashes.0d3747d6963f895fd996cbc8a1972931d8d93c54: Well... not as such, but I unleashed a powerful demon from its tomb in return for unbelievable magical power.
textByHashes.11b216d34611aa171c6c39d9db7adbd158990728: Not as such, no. Sorry about that.
textByHashes.8e2a32e9cea7f4ed49edb917ce5404bbbe600484: As you are a big famous archaeologist, maybe you could spare the time to tell me a couple of tales of your exploits?
textByHashes.8ce38eb9b485caf6c8f052ed3a095a72fb7525eb: So... How exactly did you get into this line of work anyway?
textByHashes.7ae9d73ea1f1ef9cabdfab9951cc0189615f86e3: It seems an odd choice of career for a man like yourself.
textByHashes.068b8309d7a0ca33a788f7298e806124a14edd65: Well, I'll see you again sometime maybe. Sorry I couldn't get you any treasure...
textByHashes.23051404e530189cdc3f8b61c4493426007799de: Can you tell me how the kingdom approves of me?
textByHashes.10093e057cf1d3efde380bf90624a28ced7a809b: So how did she end up here?
textByHashes.be01fb099237ed49ee91c6ca954b36730f5e0a55: But she wasn't frozen forever, was she? You said you were fooled into freeing her.
textByHashes.ac320b29923b0b633913c1be081e6b67cc62c6f6: But I'm guessing that's not how things went?
textByHashes.e78665b7379df0c6128ecd2485f2a38e67adcd1e: And that was exactly what your leader wanted?
textByHashes.b905d2abdf64c053eb3f6bf4b06304e74a7a2745: What of the one that led the ritual. What came of him?
textByHashes.142defea7705e4b3ee4cfe8573c9b93e8e4ed079: I'd like to collect some items.
textByHashes.3edfd4260a4a85ce4b1ec7a527f15353c89c2977: Can you take me to see him?
textByHashes.ba0a6c3fb97eed09d700103b3fe02d6962769032: Well, obviously he did. So what are you doing up here?
textByHashes.a3e4bc58868a3d3ca97c2ec2587eb2a34b0f101a: No... I don't have anything like that with me...
textByHashes.811cea920b000ab7e4d57f31b4f5467f28fe6424: I don't know... Seems a little off to sell alcohol to a child...
textByHashes.8bcfc992ad6f159bba0da70c323ead79f34cf7ac: But I don't have any kegs of beer to sell...
textByHashes.d715a584e61de44f943c1497fdcd08d9c6a00387: No offence Askeladden, and it's not that I don't trust you... Er, actually it is that I don't trust you.
textByHashes.be3a73115e112a31b73d0243863e73f0cf86de49: So, Askeladd- sorry, Larravak; What is there to do around here now that we are both Fremenniks?
textByHashes.c4e8ab85623521def3b22d0da13d4c1ca8b9f640: Can I have another pet rock?
textByHashes.0514dcce6e5b138c7fc936b44f8c7f6f0643c5a7: Askeladden, what on Gielinor are you doing up here? And by the way, the name is .
textByHashes.e6eba8c079e8ca232f60fbb2b0cec900bdbd32c7: Um... Aren't you a little... ...young to be drinking so much?
textByHashes.e00033c0f6220a79815978c0f4ee4ad3f5cb411c: Can I have another pet rock? I lost mine...
textByHashes.9441461ea990cd1dabc3df3dc61023e1efe1dd12: Help? What kind of help do you mean?
textByHashes.b826f1f13bc4d25cea311dc6e9e313e3ce9d3c38: Hello Asteros. What brings you to the castle?
textByHashes.3f4923a318bce0e9b841c071b761da7960627dc0: I see. I'm sure the King is glad to have you here.
textByHashes.e6d57785beab2a9370978bddc9459504db9e26fe: What brings you to the castle?
textByHashes.1e64e6857517501c3e1e565725cc86c58e75efb0: Okay, let's see what you've got then.
textByHashes.d95df3bfad8c65f43ae396722ba7c1294c5ca31b: I think I might just leave the perusing for now, thanks.
textByHashes.3e633ebba92aaa564c74fa3152540e2653e361db: Can you make clothing suitable for hunting?
textByHashes.9546896ad66ad5ade35b77686edf2ce1b060464e: What sort of unusual materials did you have in mind?
textByHashes.5a112a1153f4f751af0d40fe89f68f25955ad966: Ok, let's see what you've got then.
textByHashes.d93a4399178ffcb237ed8bb30971c4339585a9ca: Nothing. Just though I'd try to strike up a conversation.
textByHashes.723644759681e5396424f3c60b98c166eb7e78cd: He was. You found the perfect match.
textByHashes.ed432dd4380817616317657a80fe4995b7a5589d: I'm afraid I don't have enough of those at the moment.
textByHashes.96569519ac2e78fca198f0853e9d18ea0238937b: I don't have 200 Coins I'm afraid.
textByHashes.cdc42bd590c27864fbee56f13624a1a708c54c9a: Here's 200 Coins - chop my tree down please.
textByHashes.a01dfb38be08ee3b6030f303ee92ef7c0029fc6c: Oh, it's a rune shop. No thank you, then.
textByHashes.6458a93c2e5a1ec919d8a8b4488c0610fbeb26cd: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence?
textByHashes.baad4085683151eb3de394248a7a5e24bdaf0e54: How do you like your town?
textByHashes.f4c62d83337ce68e7fd7cde7077d44538e0210df: Is there anything I can do to help out?
textByHashes.be41598756169a537ca8540d1f0cd9be3abca770: But I don't have 3000 coins on me?
textByHashes.8c32b3b33edd0529146197ed2534c1d368e3a667: Oayk, I'll pay 3000 coins for the hammer.
textByHashes.e915f31912dae7ebfe91e4dea12e53e13c1edaf1: No thanks, I'll leave it, 3000 coins is too much to pay.
textByHashes.002215eec9302b742b5811001486649ae273f6a6: Why does the hammer cost so much?
textByHashes.7297541ec16e766f65fcb27dde50c664a1bf4161: Are you preparing for a heist? You're only a kid.
textByHashes.97653685cca6d11a12e6bf53e52f8aefb9997fff: Any tips? I'm not having much luck myself.
textByHashes.543a8fc6410eb637f5464c0911b6c1b0008d9362: That is sneaky. I'll keep an eye out for your... distractions.
textByHashes.8e91efc9feab3e84169d6b9eb5205daaf588c5f7: What are you doing out here on your own?
textByHashes.c1bda691be0c1c549576161fc251a2a9b688d702: What do you mean you run the streets?
textByHashes.b68d711d0881f263a8c0eebb1d520279cddb1ef0: That sounds risky don't you think? There are guards everywhere.
textByHashes.8262a9b97b6a0bde394c819cb1f36335adaae263: I could do with some information on houses.
textByHashes.a6902237a4d3795570c9c3700781c477e1486cdb: Can I have more locator orbs, please?
textByHashes.f2515675a211473e3b1a8a80f77aac2cc261ec88: I'd like to see your stuff for sale, please.
textByHashes.4bec8baa1fa28e8b65fd9f71e9758f0250546991: I'll just head off, I think.
textByHashes.6d3f4f953d26d86cc9833f194d79fd2ea9e78b38: Mind taking a look at this quiver for me?
textByHashes.f06c276ae24e7cdab1c0f4e1a205905f6b333281: Wow! Really? I better go and grab one.
textByHashes.ffea469a5f8da2ef221afae502aaf02419b7b2e8: I was wondering if you could maybe make it... better?
textByHashes.234c6346859219d43e17fccf6afea22327789e2e: Mind taking another look at that quiver I showed you before?
textByHashes.d0348cd8513b0f725c2fb521c71f7e10be3e09db: That's right. I was wondering if you could help with that?
textByHashes.c7666e4aed7275e182ce2544e7a4a0deb1ce103b: Can you change my gauntlets for me?
textByHashes.7a89d2124e07106eadb1365d5eba947ea18597e1: Could I have some more goldsmith gauntlets, please?
textByHashes.d2b25506b965f65c6fdb596b16acc699ec84cef0: Not really. Just wondering what brings you out here?
textByHashes.dcc818b5f1ba9c319d5b6e17fa5021b3a5449848: And is the trading going well?
textByHashes.72c8a55c2a760d5f03a0d9d013e457deba07520d: Ah, well in that case, I'd better leave you to it.
textByHashes.f3e749efe849c60c23ba2e754bd8a95b04c78710: Far from here, deep in the Kharidian Desert.
textByHashes.c3ed107da857d5311ed35fe39aafae025864ec64: Oh okay then, I'll go talk to Chaeldar.
textByHashes.c1d8487ff81636f47c94ff3d2053d06da9977a80: Hello, I'm here about the blessed axe again.
textByHashes.94437c6f9f8fab8796fb92bd573cae8a01edf9c9: There's a lunar spell in my spell book that I can't use. Could you...?
textByHashes.9a2ca44e9a47afcc0dae7c32423f903bc441d30f: Okay, I don't mind hearing sto-
textByHashes.26e02024b823f2b56d2bf5cf2458dcab006cc4d6: Of course! I am a great diplomat, aren't I?
textByHashes.25bc6ad271dfb2db1e62e420b286bc42a6267d68: Errr... You couldn't see eye to eye about magic, or something like that.
textByHashes.137db1485c09375fb7027c104cc7a4daac6e591b: That's all very interesting, but what's it got to do with this spell?
textByHashes.904184c14bb6e8d7c1a308eaa6d2179b46831488: So, will you teach me the spell?
textByHashes.67e744250a16fa0a531360bb0a419805aa8a3be2: Why do you ask questions if you're going to read my mind anyway?
textByHashes.4c6283912ed662c9c774d30e2120f47a57c94b34: Nothing really, I'm new to town and wanted to get to know the locals.
textByHashes.f68fad1024a607cd770eb89182169537fb06eccb: Oh, does this mean you won't let me go in?
textByHashes.696d78a44c4aca02ae9ec0649bf68e3676e54e43: It's a deal - here's 5,000 trading sticks.
textByHashes.e9aa121958054fea010a293a3366ffc8ff696297: Can I climb down that hole now?
textByHashes.d8d29974797343978a4f18fff46f088218c707cc: Why are you waiting by this hole?
textByHashes.8c7d80595f573d5572485ab9299d2b01eea7f5d8: I didn't expect a camel to be capable of standing up to such a strong enemy. Aren't you worried for your safety?
textByHashes.53cf7c72753e3a6cd2bb395fc19569f7076e0c13: I'm sure I'll be fine, but I appreciate your concern.
textByHashes.184b5d0d93ec56e72b092bbd740f1497e134ffd3: How did you get all my stuff?
textByHashes.baf9ebfaa570c040fa6c955f840c5a48c37c653c: Oh yeah, I don't use a bank!
textByHashes.cc5fda74c11e13b4f9da0021e3a70375411e4d98: But you're a camel. I didn't know camels could train to become bankers.
textByHashes.0f1fcadc9829e3fe4b4b9a017ae845358fa94dfa: I suppose when you put it like that...
textByHashes.d9dbe1952ff406616c36b4b30444166b8ceab0f4: So, what do you make of all this?
textByHashes.1be611c8f600700c006faee2eaceaa9935655129: I mean everything that's been going on here. It seems like a lot to take in.
textByHashes.ae96902a55aed1fdd65a016481b5eeebb53b8d92: Well at least we're fixing it now.
textByHashes.948fe0a02e7aa1641b75539d21dc7e255f5b88f3: I swear, I'm only here to deal with the Devourer's corruption!
textByHashes.747a936075340917a2f587266cabd0a7d2ff7605: How can I prove it to you? What is it that you are looking for?
textByHashes.7c8c6efa847e6fd0a3253a6f48f213be99bb1d26: I want everyone to like me.
