textByHashes.281c881a6b504b09de4cf3554a6ae541afe2ec55: I want to prove you wrong.
textByHashes.5ab817fe3a81063268ae7f1ef09774daabb89a1b: It seems to be important to you.
textByHashes.c3686382687fe7ada455ce666573d779d990fa2b: I do, so tell me, what can I do to show you that not all adventurers are the same?
textByHashes.b9667c0e2f89f17b8fcc2e7509a83b73da1c81e8: Restore what was lost? What do you mean by that?
textByHashes.f4ad716cf8ccf0dd566f6877e45f30c1528d365d: Yeah, you're right, I'm here for the loot.
textByHashes.487cdc53200c6ccb28e5747a5a4b45d2ff288adc: What did you ask me to do again?
textByHashes.101c83318fc5e88606d31d60645fcbbecb37749a: So you want me to restore what was lost?
textByHashes.67279d391f03e6b6eb3248fb88b84bd592a9351f: Well, while us adventurers have been doing our best to fight against the Devourer's corruption, we've been neglecting what has been lost to achieve that goal. Namely, the four guardians we defeated along the way.
textByHashes.3189c787f7619c9cde4afaa21de3b0d0d4a4cfbf: Ba-Ba was a proud baboon who wished for her troop to flourish. To honour her, I made sure that they won't be forgotten by telling their story to the monkeys of Ape Atoll.
textByHashes.5f0cd9bf257c2523c360f1424173791324e85490: Akkha was cruelly denied death by the Devourer, so I gave his ashes to the High Priest of Icthlarin to give him a proper send-off.
textByHashes.14d5d17d7b2865073188d62d65f8a03dec0a4888: Zebak was fooled into leaving his home and confined within the tomb, so I took his fang and buried it on an island surrounded by crocodiles.
textByHashes.e7bc940f5583e93eaa709f69c42b5b3fedb04673: Kephri was promised a future for her race, but it was all a lie. I found a scarab egg within some of her dung, and I gave it to the High Priest of Scabaras to try and nurture it.
textByHashes.d1029119ca4b1f9c4f721fae736b3648b4c2b0f2: I just wish there was more I could do.
textByHashes.0fd29c4f144c95a3396172d22add795a64dac3b4: Well thanks, I guess... You know, out of all the camels I've met, you're definitely the strangest one.
textByHashes.e0f52601f1380f713c1e6bdfc2dd5e1b6e16bf11: I've lost that key you gave me.
textByHashes.a353df43a729940bfec1a49fd3ef77f8de467e2e: Well, nice to meet you, Cam the Camel. It'll be nice to call you something other than 'the bank camel' from now on.
textByHashes.97d95679a628d919df820d528988443766d35ccf: Can you follow me into the tomb?
textByHashes.cf55471b1f9fa47fd041c7518995e4906b20ca7e: It would be very helpful. Think of all the supplies I'd have access to if you came with me and followed me around like a portable bank.
textByHashes.b8539c8a7fe358a544c4344ca5df32629e7b3e53: Well, I can't stand around here all day. I've got some things I need to take care of.
textByHashes.1b23ad1fe7f94010ef50c1ab0c64b214c25d2639: Jokes on you! I don't have a bank!
textByHashes.deb3dbd7834fd53c4653f514482fc68deedc6162: Wow! A needle in a hay sack?
textByHashes.d2cdf030355ae3fb57e5f576328296d1caeba51a: Wait, isn't it supposed to be a stack, not a sack?
textByHashes.537a0a2ad3d276a0c94abe9c99036252d619d6d6: And now that I think about it, this sack is full of grain, not hay...
textByHashes.19cc5872199497a727968ce99aeeffbc32615e6e: Well, I'm not entirely sure what else I expected.
textByHashes.3e70ba46fb0e2e1bbddced6ff43c10993b85eb5a: Hello. Can I deposit my stuff here?
textByHashes.4fef6a8ca19ded37827b967528287676312937d6: That wall doesn't look very good.
textByHashes.2261a4304479b29c264ce0ff26d91262da68f1ab: Are you going to tell me what happened?
textByHashes.643739c5745eccf20c9986b5d7b36bc7dbe90bb3: But... was anyone hurt? Did they get anything valuable?
textByHashes.6ddbd801ba694cecab0fd0c981a03fc3e2c68ec9: Oh, good... but the bank staff got hurt?
textByHashes.57085eb59bdf3b2c00d162979edb51f472b2f761: Anyway... So, someone's robbed the bank?
textByHashes.33293fee0a10fc62f22623a980e6b710edf3ce0d: Do you know who did it?
textByHashes.e7ad2e30b3fb40a2ac4f05ca86e4f453131d12fc: That's ok, show me the recording.
textByHashes.c4103ebc87861c7a012a4450bf6e70d6ed415da8: Alright, I'll stop bothering you now.
textByHashes.c580d38d1a70f94102c2768a0d9a4b2bbcfd5149: Do you have any idea who robbed the bank yet?
textByHashes.52176c83c9274686c8caa4f2bde1a2ed651c4d87: The robber in the recording looked familiar.
textByHashes.caa8be359bfdbb1722291c248d145c9535728fca: Yes, and I can tell you where he lives.
textByHashes.aff811f1048ea0ef1a5fbcdc9b1b13928f3873fd: Yes, and he's admitted that he did the robbery!
textByHashes.a9cdc08a0f3ab65cd2754ffe9d4e16629401fe19: So are you going to have him arrested?
textByHashes.e1904ef6171512179d6a1d41984610a88dd64351: Can I see that recording again, please?
textByHashes.813a761a27b48225330d34e0c62524dac57ad787: Ok, you can take 50 gp from my bank account.
textByHashes.1dc5832d3a7068f44cfda5656b14e498aaf8d658: I'd like to buy more bank slots.
textByHashes.b65eda71414b9096ed34c67c3611fe387ed28bc2: Oh... I don't seem to have enough money for that. Never mind.
textByHashes.eb0e9691e7f9911ddd4b8d4b842ca979418f447f: What are you doing out here?
textByHashes.77f0bbe269c34e85c3cc6a2c0f422847e000ab20: I want to buy more bank slots.
textByHashes.7220bd4316561255367d7a3660a62f05eb03e1dc: I'd like to access my account, please.
textByHashes.7dc7e957597ef2eb89512153b6ee00859dd50424: That doesn't sound very fun, but you're doing a great service for us adventurers.
textByHashes.71ee7e262725e8bc040868ffab997bbe56550017: Are you with the Bank of Gielinor?
textByHashes.821b6ebd9f123de968a51ddc107e474a7452632b: Oh yes, I helped to open that up you know!
textByHashes.9cb4f2a4bac504c590c181e3db0765853bb73c41: I'd like to access my bank account please.
textByHashes.fb3ca39f18cacca786c94668c99578119d708337: I'd like to collect items please.
textByHashes.0f3b7eee6726949520b47bab7bf504669282dfd7: I'd like to access my bank account, please.
textByHashes.1cd5e88c0ab531c09e5d9363f31009bf4c8678f2: I'd like to check my PIN settings.
textByHashes.262ddb3205ea82b5388e53f8082ec284679c23f6: This is quite a small bank.
textByHashes.93c79f04807d139a1d2b5f1a671f0e7de128e143: It sure is cozy... though it does beg the question, can you actually get out?
textByHashes.b52665280d5729846cf518ce284bbf65f197b9ae: Using the bank itself. I'm not sure how....?
textByHashes.6a66e2ffeb083b74b579a778d0dc23157473bf0a: Using Bank deposit boxes.... what are they?
textByHashes.48da95d5df6bc20970991efbd40a745f6af04d07: What's this PIN thing that people keep talking about?
textByHashes.550b3ff2dca9ea17701f2be4aefa48eaaa6815e9: How do I set my PIN?
textByHashes.d5edd02c1ccfa7a95a2a46159b8d91ee1048b7b8: How do I remove my PIN?
textByHashes.56494972502c27fb938d3597b71e9cb1d417518a: What happens if I forget my PIN?
textByHashes.8b408a2074b18f5c712420159f7737c47a3d0604: I don't think I'm ever going to be allowed in there.
textByHashes.3e19f98fcca3d0c2081f383d9f7c2dd7e85d8377: No. I don't like things like bribery.
textByHashes.1e78bb03ae27520a3e73b7ea48e9aeabb9575034: Yes. I'd like to be 20 gold coins richer too.
textByHashes.6fa0b59e131e4ce951c4d6c3f97643c76279817a: Can you sell me some furs?
textByHashes.577205a8cfe9b9cbe4641000e85cbb954fe45d4e: Oh dear, I don't have enough money!
textByHashes.b022008f448e4c55e331a4f31532dc0e18d9e594: Oh dear, I don't have that either.
textByHashes.47232b99684b641e7f578b5313b8209389b2c002: Hello! I am in search of a quest.
textByHashes.5f65112b1af5aaccf9664426153ff862b5e0413c: Would you like to buy my grey wolf fur?
textByHashes.df3c4e2c28b97ae52ff50da62e569a30fe6ccab4: No! I almost got my throat torn out by a wolf to get this!
textByHashes.34182ab7bfe1579a44a3d8de906d586e22b1aac0: Are you sure? You don't see quality furs like this too often.
textByHashes.4bba48855896a3036b5ccfc968749a5a0ca30279: Would you like to buy my fur?
textByHashes.415e2ac4123425f560b582a1579b6fbcb8e8a72e: I think I'll keep hold of it actually!
textByHashes.e9a4bb30d81bb8b7f509d73e5f60d465287f9e4f: Hey, I'm your contractor from Mahogany Homes, what did you want done?
textByHashes.7f8d62ff60020bea3c603ebdf8922e4afbc49fd7: I've finished with the work you wanted.
textByHashes.dcbbb72d6be5f16eb2c22e889000a26ca84a45e8: Aaah, nothing like a nice cupppa tea!
textByHashes.703aeb96ee5c0c79a18db2b2329d783944ee5143: No thanks, I better be off.
textByHashes.ee73ff8f0726747d8162e0e4b20b26d45b1861f1: What a lovely pub this is!
textByHashes.72176224a273fd46a7fac768c40ba7172d272b94: They seem to take it very seriously now.
textByHashes.4534620f4ee9002dd615b898c0a443e609a40f4d: I want to come through this gate.
textByHashes.2f8ef547b4c969d4bd4777424b7e9e0b750ff2c8: Hmm, yep you've got me there.
textByHashes.4743d6caeef456a55b4290e27cc4597ef417a590: Looks can be deceiving, I am in fact a barbarian.
textByHashes.196de61c121d79834bae0378e3f5ab9e156623ee: I tink I jusht 'bout done dem all... but I losht count...
textByHashes.d7a887d27030070e26216fd70837d0c0fddafbd2: Yes please, I want to smash my vials.
textByHashes.720d2f3d6fc9506c2e1377ac68ecfa606a70fc3d: No thank you, I'd rather keep my vials.
textByHashes.2a47798dc3991cc7ebd58f3f375bd7332d2fc472: Yes please, I want to stop smashing my vials.
textByHashes.b39e26829be93efbfa6e448c72232dfd0dde3e1d: No thank you, I like smashing them.
textByHashes.9fcc24c8fc987196eeedc5641380089f13cc82b2: Hey there. What are you lot doing out here?
textByHashes.cc348ae176ae9191947f7e273a8bcdb89d7c9af3: Well I hope it serves you well.
textByHashes.a7e700bf65051e924103d34e82241a98fb662510: Hi there. Are you enjoying the view?
textByHashes.3fc2a2db870a34b0f6faa101bafed7f4a1217e3f: The ferry? Is there something wrong with it?
textByHashes.e49642db538fa422c4708e502310b5882cd4cfed: How urgently do you need to get there?
textByHashes.81466e44cb61df025ece89f29a0c23c24fcfda99: Oh, you're a bard? Could you sing for me?
textByHashes.f4b294c640b9c57245b8a90c23d84545d69118f0: Sister Songstresses? So you're a group of sisters who sing together?
textByHashes.0c76102092eef79cbaaf5121150bb955c015177e: Oh... The name did suggest otherwise...
textByHashes.460df6a373fb606261ebd569d3027d4401db7e3b: I'm not sure if people wanting to hear it makes it entirely ethical.
textByHashes.67869d6b2e9613cc2ed5a8240b16eab70fbcae96: Now that you mention it... no of course it isn't.
textByHashes.cf247dac7a012a59a6e0189d3b113e204913ceb9: You seem a little down. What's up?
textByHashes.ee386a0862fd9869efee50622bf3f0b269643de5: I'm sure you'll be back there before long.
textByHashes.b6180fb1c38b5d53f30c9facf25c81f3b3dcd7d7: It doesn't hurt to be hopeful, does it? Not to mention, hope can be a great inspiration!
textByHashes.9b5aa1dc1d85438f6d6186e257315f49dde2352b: Oh... Well, I'm happy to have helped.
textByHashes.974d3335f7e06e8f5cba72c89866e45931b49033: Erm... okay then. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.bcdd275373b2a896e6c6fb4584c1dc0cb3552ad6: Hello there Bardur. How's it going?
textByHashes.a7c09e845606df8eb9abdd88441cfa50e0a26b2e: Can you tell me anything about the caves down here?
textByHashes.6c1c3bfe242837e7243804754eaa45d1303b1edb: Okay, thanks Bardur. Do you have any food with you?
textByHashes.ef5d8923645b955440b120525d8849739a242a60: Don't worry about it, I understand! All's well that ends well! How've you been?
textByHashes.9b54b93ba86d97223c12c25b9e761ed331d3edfd: Why are you not still sailing?
textByHashes.437f2181f29c079feb6c072ce703144aa2d6034c: What are you up to now then?
textByHashes.a122d5eaaec6e9941fa37d164345f095595f50b9: Could you teach me about canoes?
textByHashes.ed0b66f3cf4bf0b4ec9d8d95e3cfb4927d054e7f: How far will I be able to go in a Dugout canoe?
textByHashes.00582496467bf40554566986a2732f6c662e01a8: Can you teach me about canoes?
textByHashes.b7d66e6b1e8cea20e7677c822e3f2042d04ed9ba: Can I get off the barge?
textByHashes.81912021f2c7e02bff33ec5757e1cdd24f6ad9e6: Then how do you stand up?
textByHashes.6335611adae7f437f9c53a7312cc8dcbbe58d89e: How do you stand up if you have no bones? Shouldn't you collapse into a gelatinous blob?
textByHashes.45e64ab0b2926ec1016db806bf97b36512d348bc: What do you need bones for?
textByHashes.c552563244463fb30241b4cf03b428c7f6802f2c: Will you buy anything besides bones?
textByHashes.445e6751654fb62c85288bd2c99d5b904f28fa2e: What kind of bones do you need?
textByHashes.0230c2812c4107445308d6be94c5c42903cabc6b: It's a giant battle tortoise shell!
textByHashes.28c5d95de2515a37a77d5514d8faeb41a043b9e0: Who is that man walking around outside?
textByHashes.9f8e442fa2d7c3ec0c73306f38f894fd68a52082: I mean the dwarf, the one with the sign.
textByHashes.69d706544fee155084ca12af1673d3e621b786cc: Sorry, I don't have 2 coins on me.
textByHashes.054788d2364a9c39d0ae9026e23781584be6aa2e: Sorry, I don't have 20 coins on me.
textByHashes.6f33e6056f5f9389d49274b48359c06c44ff6e69: I'm trying to do Alfred Grimhand's barcrawl.
textByHashes.136907c0f5afb18dd73d8b1f32bbe2f889c9110f: I was just wanting to buy a cocktail ingredient actually.
textByHashes.ba49e47369257087c6049b39593c187128b09e5e: I'm sorry, I seem to have run out of money.
textByHashes.4bb9a0013b235e2908e33a27f0273388774e36d3: Yes, how can I help out?
textByHashes.10bc9cec7113fe9058c45c4f5b8858a3172fab50: That would be good. Where is the teleport to?
textByHashes.5f76dccbb175f44cc20f791316953a9e7afbf641: So I just make a ruby necklace and use five fire runes and one cosmic rune to enchant it.
textByHashes.ebacf38b1dfd6ea9c5337f7a9c3847cce2913a99: I've cleaned this old coin - is it of any use?
textByHashes.1d31a468c6cf451da82b83ea2c39b2699e10741b: No, I'll go do that now
textByHashes.8e769492eb395cbc45c71d95e7cd5bdb6c58dde2: I found this really old coin - is it of any use?
textByHashes.eeec9767dddbbeb72a0fb12432bc8ceb3b5a2061: No, I'll go do that now.
textByHashes.1ef5ebe2212c30e21e846a5eb791b00a62e3ac72: I found this crumbly old decoration - is it of any use?
textByHashes.1dd846b9a5305a74f86050cc9a0e87c0bcfc87e3: I found this really old decoration - is it of any use?
textByHashes.f697f954d4f5e6efe5d3b76bd9aa2d07f6c811bb: I found this piece of pottery - is it of any use?
textByHashes.c0c79ec26c3381174e764bc130cf4c9b45e63e3f: I cleaned up this old vase.
textByHashes.82ae225b4d8e20353b105112e49fed3453cbbcfb: Err... I seem to have lost it. Sorry.
textByHashes.ef1618699643fa6e4dd3e589e615898d4161f4dc: Don't worry, I'm sure you're up to the task!
textByHashes.ade9c8a1dab746b0b45cfb7fe519493d6825c680: Are you worried I'll break your furnace?
textByHashes.07a3899f77bedae3d84b46bcfa03b2f6ad4a7f96: Alright, calm down! I won't use your furnace. To smelt ore.
textByHashes.89cbdef4c04a5a23d49009df8f44f8e1e26d4623: A glass of your finest ale please.
textByHashes.854581ab5c90bd892d1cbf811586164e74626b78: Oh dear. I don't seem to have enough money.
textByHashes.08c6f0d6db6e1a99b98b2dec8b95efe4ca092cb3: Can you recommend where an adventurer might make his fortune?
textByHashes.55708a1c88775865d75fd485dea2fa49fafac93e: Game? What are you talking about?
textByHashes.28b2343073b32e3482a59dad06c070cb365ccd68: Nope, still don't understand what you are talking about. What does 'online' mean?
textByHashes.be84f1522433651763787d5dc61edf4a338b724f: I give up. You're obviously completely mad!
textByHashes.86a2c0137631667f668eeed3cbd5a41f789cea69: Do you know where I can get some good equipment?
textByHashes.7e7ec1c53a638bf04e1c601b03c52a89c7b9664a: I'll give it a miss I think.
textByHashes.4fc96e3820032511e53375f0930bc9385d429372: Can I have some Greenman's Ale?
textByHashes.44720c4a374971c0b6e1aaa06fb12c449e30976f: Could I have some stew please?
textByHashes.8abaf87ee3b43f9c166bfe8de7ad9205b7e1684f: I don't really want anything thanks.
textByHashes.10defa2b2f241d0f6e08df6f3d672a32b9625ef4: I'll have a pint of beer please.
textByHashes.430a556f9bbd92f5d6b8a4da3f94a178b3a2de05: Any hints on where I can go adventuring?
textByHashes.bb63dbbf02d3b9511a9869c3f60c3e840b70b5a8: Sounds like a bit of a shortsighted decision.
textByHashes.91104235d97202c92dbc852fb5b0f1440b187036: Could I buy a beer please?
textByHashes.1bfab8b732a4fd96c7e430e21164d374f4fc1f19: Have you heard any rumours here?
textByHashes.b775a1bac3d88a8eca6112f40e635f8e8d069aa7: Well if I have the time I'll go and see if I can knock some sense into them.
textByHashes.2ea5d160b603834a9b11ddbff07b1ee9a02fbbeb: Just give me whatever I need to drink here.
textByHashes.2a197b9c87b6f2f6dac0fa59771849258035d704: I don't have 8 coins with me.
textByHashes.ee223c85d98a7475e59e1be5705d74a2d22f2237: I'll be on my way then.
textByHashes.1d7d54f9b0c8eb17bfc15637ff3dca82f2a1a868: So I'm guessing they care a lot about this place?
textByHashes.05406d3da0d5c407a8b0b102d0b1c0d05130f746: What's with those big gates out there?
textByHashes.ae833575dd8cd3f167d72e9a34c9224880a69494: Well I hope you keep enjoying it.
textByHashes.09e081e17661a3ac56d8982d7c6bfc4faec801f2: I want to apologise for killing you.
textByHashes.b1a7d286bc4b9dc180083829b30eb27ccc25deac: I'm, um, very sorry I killed you.
textByHashes.366da497f4fdcf8faf9ead8eb8220468472d093a: I promise not to do it again.
textByHashes.70ab8d8966545b565890d4d1d5abaf9123239597: That's why I won't do it again! There'd be no point!
textByHashes.83231cedf50afc6ce314630b6606c257bf8b4e37: But I won't do it to any other basilisks!
textByHashes.a29d2dfb1a8337a92ddb5449cbdd28595d22cc73: I just wanted to check that you're okay.
textByHashes.c0a7382ee9bde45db4ac1ad566ffb975368f8b9c: Uh... yeah, apart from that are you okay?
textByHashes.b1f499e38ee0ec26586d16584090db0660620e15: Couldn't I just take one off those tables?
textByHashes.d8dc925be78e70dfa0896277b5ddf1be86c76700: Could I get something to eat?
textByHashes.76af35296ea57e290e25bdad3ca064f12b50ac0e: Oh... You're right, I don't have enough money.
textByHashes.f5840152a63f8d8e68b444ec21899374ab33d466: I'm afraid not as I've something to attend to.
textByHashes.203c6d382d383cd004f38dec329e401e7efdf013: So how's life as a pirate?
textByHashes.012b70473860c71d2e57ddd2950740e0cb6c7ee5: Mostly killing things for money and delivering items around the planet for people.
textByHashes.eeca6856b117468566d7acd7ff4fbf0cc0b3cfad: Aren't you a little short for a pirate?
textByHashes.b5a2107fddb476c5a34b6e97f3d3f25076f9abfc: More info than I wanted, thanks!
textByHashes.93313807dc0394aa4801ff898fcf77c17efdfbc5: I'm not a stowaway! I was invited aboard!
textByHashes.6fa34185580f275cd46e2557699c9cc938c55c82: You know, I've always wondered what life as a pirate actually entails.
textByHashes.cd0318d63dcd6bb53893df660eec9df8dadf9c1b: I'm not a stowaway! I was invited aboard! By Lokar! Ask him!
textByHashes.f282ecf5a5d8c145191958a628c4f7c794ea7bb7: No, Lokar offered me a lift in Rellekka actually.
textByHashes.4e226c1fd88a4a0100f77ffa8a73f5d0333cf3cf: Well... I kind of am, and I kind of aren't. It's a long story.
textByHashes.7004f9eabc884f454318832b2be80dff0532e9ad: Yar! We be pirates, yar! Avast, ye scurvy land-lubbing lychee!
textByHashes.03b09fc2fa4496deb451863a3b7dd1dca5613484: No! I'm not a stowaway! Honest! I was invited here!
textByHashes.55907beb6fe822138035057c36fe5e5c7d7648f9: Why, what do they usually look like?
textByHashes.1ee0beb792c658109310ca0cfef8cdd6f413c22b: How's that working out for you?
textByHashes.afdabe01c8a842310a21885accdabb47a14c4d95: Well, I was planning on visiting the Moon Clan, but I have to say your ship is very impressive.
textByHashes.7f2c1d92b62fa019c5b70fbb75454b60ab08d2ad: Yes, she's certainly one of the finest boats I've seen on my travels!
textByHashes.45c08921ea324a50377c3240645d45ecf1541498: Ooh, a bee hive. I'll help you.
textByHashes.de59b3b6d839bc2816a0716ee90ba793bccc51bb: What do you expect me to do?
textByHashes.99aee30a00adab06ae67bd6d1bcb1ffcf15c32ef: Oh, very well. Let's take a look...
textByHashes.2af0cae1dc95a1d2f7f60073c0a4b9d774b6db98: First remind me of what I'm doing.
textByHashes.005f37f0d467cb9f61713882a557831c8e17362d: Yeah, let me get on with it.
textByHashes.ec24748f28093574c8712b15f4fde1060796e137: I'm looking for the Easter Bunny.
textByHashes.b56e15aeb7a2f7599d76dc835d46fae10bad9ffc: I'm trying to cheer up the Easter Bunny, do you have any suggestions?
textByHashes.8d6dea958397370e03a12e019bc6b36808ad7252: Bowling? Where can we do that?
textByHashes.1a037db011b3650e908f0a1f7bfdf1bebf1adc96: Really? Wow! That's fortunate. Where is it?
textByHashes.a08ddec470b91d2c66376771145d2f5a9209b94a: Alright, I'll have a look for this bowling alley and speak to Bowley Moley. Thanks!
textByHashes.f87f7d7fd8c888fa0706c32f72c0ded0c450479c: Oh yeah, I got outplayed fair and square!
textByHashes.e325ab85a6250e470a55147b5b37c1449fdd390b: I'm just glad to cheer him up a bit.
textByHashes.92229c175c094d7f7d9d47600daff2944c84b9a0: That would be fun, though I'm quite busy at the moment, and in the near future.
textByHashes.73f0c0449963d33383c04bc461375dc7ab275c13: Oh the far future is looking very busy for me.
textByHashes.154f10a52e0b6b929fc30ce59d26071dbbca33c8: But if I find the time, we could invite the Easter Bunny too! We'd all have a great game I'm sure.
textByHashes.c81ad0941d619fa4b2fc00f26d3df886337520dd: I'd like access to the cave.
textByHashes.2172494d93cc9bc0d1a9e45c79657cc403836c52: I don't want to receive minerals.
textByHashes.13a8a8aecdd45172196aa4bd297a8b2123d6ca78: Can you combine my mining gloves?
textByHashes.e8d521cccf1726814f7d02a382c2d46b687849f5: Can I have a newspaper, please?
textByHashes.2ec86d717f8b57c4eb47e5ee220a6bd048fbe998: Maybe when I've got more money on me.
textByHashes.3d4e518916d2e933385c990352a3444dd6b3bce8: How much does a paper cost?
textByHashes.8be67d12539e229ac84cf3125a30e4a70b9c26bb: Varrock Herald? Never heard of it.
textByHashes.61aa7abb658257d4a1bb53da25d1963a54b10e85: I'm sorry, should I have knocked?
textByHashes.d1a725ccce4e9bc9717a90c15742d2917d4346e2: Where do you do your mining?
textByHashes.c98fd486f44c157258b1b23f3a400e0c8da7950e: Can I do a bit of mining there as well?
textByHashes.a95921e984f55604a830692841315db30c28abf8: They arrested Sandy for the murder of a wizard and the sand pit now refills itself!
textByHashes.2045e8d68fdfc154f2c3d0bd7094819588911e26: Don't worry, the Wizards are going to pay you a large pension so that you can retire...
textByHashes.2e7b127a46f79b8380d050e88ae7b344a6df04f3: What will you do with your day? Well....You could build sand castles with your own two hands!
textByHashes.121280a5d2317e2cf66f14fae54f099cd88f3846: Wow! That would be great, buckets of sand direct to bank everday you say? That's great!
textByHashes.ba4b141faf9ae6278f457343f9e8c3895c8de4cd: Can you deliver my sand to my bank, please?
textByHashes.cfb75ad66467ea0d91bb475413db9b0f391d5105: Hello Bert, could I have my sand today please?
textByHashes.04391e3a1ff032eddda1acaceb1dceb892e6f4d2: Hope you're having a good day!
textByHashes.0a5996ce57b2abaa57ef97f58e792c3a4ce31218: Ok, I'll make some more space in my bank and come back!
textByHashes.412540a83fdbd9957e615e0256c954a093899c7f: Did you already give me some sand today?
textByHashes.c07636cbddef84fc65ccfa640e35b14966879ce8: Please don't notify me when you deliver sand.
textByHashes.ee767070a0a37eabfddd064a532a2a95f0940060: Can you notify me when you deliver sand?
textByHashes.283890d7dd3a9d57dd767acf4b436c50fd86dc3c: I no longer want sand deliveries.
textByHashes.a8a18f1312198dcbd2bfe055c1d5ef9ea8d7c5bb: I'd like daily sand deliveries again.
textByHashes.ec2a2548bc7e556e63140d6f2cab37fb8100afd3: Could I buy some more pink dye?
textByHashes.4a31526dd43e45fffc590f0553fb4f8cf802c74f: Oh, I don't have enough room for any.
textByHashes.d0387889cc35c7f49886812d3ca80aa1aab612d1: Hey kid, what's all the shouting about?
textByHashes.522666d28062e32928ac06e3834bdf9554a49145: That doesn't sound right, are you sure that's really what he's doing?
textByHashes.9df0014a230823ca0fb52bb02e5ecd13e22480ba: Something seems off, maybe I should go talk to Santa to find out what's happened.
textByHashes.9637796cab426cdfb53219424ffb890c8106048b: I'm working on it, I'm working on it.
textByHashes.c766be5af7f995375531f3b4f14063a0b5e53ff6: Why are you still here? I saved Christmas, you can go home.
textByHashes.cf15346a52f7ab24e7c8dbcd03e18549f1d92aaf: Have you seen any dark manuscripts?
textByHashes.02bf8014a1f5a8fcccfc031631c45fbe584d0ac5: What do you mean by 'overseas'? Karamja?
textByHashes.b6c956c92e998f12d6843f1257a17dffc62b9ce8: So... You would give me a clue scroll and we would split the loot once I find it?
textByHashes.7e78bcfdc9a7e96e766d63be64cf8ed56f4456e9: Why don't you do the clue scrolls yourself? Wouldn't you make more money?
textByHashes.878bfd5ee4507c3bbc696ac5f78b91c10fbc90cb: Not too easy, not too hard.
textByHashes.7d04defd5f3dc638067c71b8181578cf1fafc70e: I like a challenge. Give me one to wrinkle my brain.
textByHashes.7be5b95c4144896ef6514d785139a7eeeebbecca: Give me the hardest clue you can get your hands on.
textByHashes.70e00ba1e90a1b74d58e2cc3fa65249cf015fd56: Forget it, I changed my mind.
textByHashes.77675b54f7e018f7d4b1ac81fe45049e4a4f5952: Can you exchange some banknotes for me?
textByHashes.f465742441f7effbc4f74c5cdac3e274d1a0ee86: So that's the name of this island?
textByHashes.6481d7e8487a0fa8efd1a526d2603b673403ef11: Right... Well, good luck with... the kingdom.
textByHashes.195eaf936be661eda9c65842b694341207747746: Cap'n, I lost that book you gave me.
textByHashes.774a071a0e91227d58c5797513fd9f456378f618: Yes Cap'n, I'd like a lift. If you aren't busy.
textByHashes.3861b9b2ec38da7a658a38d1cab66e8d1c538ba1: Um.... okay. I'll leave you to your drinking.
textByHashes.5ea89ae0466f5b78c335440f57d60c146f4967b7: It does look pretty impressive, but what are you doing hanging around?
textByHashes.4b7d5a1b9a7e7a00acc12183dd0fa91e9205ec91: Naturally. Not sure why I asked.
textByHashes.a2dd11df7ed68f399c8841950d627a95f5d3e531: You're the official blacksmith? Does that mean you can sell me some armour like the knights around here wear?
textByHashes.c4267a0be6429c360dc4ac57b4e6746be1da37b2: Can you repair something for me?
textByHashes.d5ffde0ceed25debcf7963a4fb9b5469bf70b932: Hello, I wonder if you could help me on this whole brewing thing...
textByHashes.9c7d3fa36a38991a17bc663e26185adacef4db61: What do I do once my ale has matured?
textByHashes.8bc896a46ba51c0e9210a42110d42be5ef285ee3: Do you have any spare ale yeast?
textByHashes.c5805ec19a0602fad6a245fde4c765a468353fca: I don't have an empty pot, or enough money I'm afraid.
textByHashes.b9e52758117335254f2af33412ca385c6d112852: I don't have an empty pot I'm afraid.
textByHashes.10b287073741b3f8b46bec7214c5da6042f85e2a: I don't have enough money I'm afraid.
textByHashes.26aaf2a4ddcf6254402f86a3c87ec138475e46f3: That's a good deal - please fill my pot with ale yeast for 25GP.
textByHashes.452b1a801af5b171f38f48d6a70d436318a75f04: No, that's too much I'm afraid.
textByHashes.58980100752388cad7df47b01fb7a8d943f30c8b: That's all I need to know, thanks.
textByHashes.d8c87ae8ea93b911d95b3f5e5f12c097a1665662: That's one less thing to worry about.
textByHashes.e9a749f2535ba85b3ed524620feec0b898638050: Say, I was wondering, did you do the statues down in the mines as well?
textByHashes.1f058e95cd124ed01c5703b2b2268dbd5fcd21a4: No no, I'm sure they weren't there before!
textByHashes.211a3f06e2dbf5eba20c6673f1e714dbc15eb7cb: How can I help work the blast furnace?
textByHashes.6f86bdf50a8c28bab808cba7ee682dc4521844e1: So what do I get out of it?
textByHashes.e0b682510de9828df5313e01a7f0db4cb4a96058: So I don't actually get paid then?
textByHashes.7951559f7d5de1446d7a14f0f4eb332ff2f88d40: No wonder you have a labour shortage if you don't pay your workers!
textByHashes.dc680625fe23e91e121ff6acb8d3301a07230559: Can I use the furnace to smelt ore?
textByHashes.d64b14fefe5e60655ae41f939cb5f7ffa3803858: Actually I don't have enough money on me.
textByHashes.7577d8147bb615a689fdadd1f921bc0286136c5d: How about I give you 1250 coins and I work extra hard?
textByHashes.d124640dc975ad18a1fdfb2d4dd870b809da1c48: I need to borrow your blast furnace.
textByHashes.daef3a79db96e50e770f6a5ec5ebbe9846ed4071: I'm trying to create an ingot of chromium, and I need your blast furnace to do so.
textByHashes.8152b92cd4d19481c6ec449674903539a824995e: Well, I'm pretty sure it involves a blast furnace...
textByHashes.be945cea259e5533234cb82852e43ba1e91b1586: I had to get sloshed to figure it out, but yes.
textByHashes.27f886f0ac0e60f109e1feeeb05e726d7b151c58: Okay, I'll need a couple of hours for each chromium ingot. How much is that going to cost me?
textByHashes.6bb4c3c9b8f8adb3d57f5d67d8e5bf46ebfd7716: I have the money right here.
textByHashes.bf0013bc44811d73926e8869a27a41ae1e240ca2: That's a bit too pricey for me.
textByHashes.f75bd8aa0711b993c2b4e7d517d1d21b057d8a12: I don't have enough money on me.
textByHashes.078b1054037678d40b6416d4e4f9794b9ebea4bd: I have no idea what you just said, but good luck with it anyway!
textByHashes.51ba3761aa1c545e74e1f02636f64d54ec8a96f0: Hey monkey, your mother was an inedible seaweed sandwich!
textByHashes.785a66c36b87ca606ebadb72ea19056779389a41: Oh noes, my worst nightmare come true...
textByHashes.b086f062384c4f699c9d0373ffa310c9c7a8da5a: I'm sorry for insulting you. Is there anything I can do to make it up to you?
textByHashes.54354207eadb3c16ecbcf91ba246612868cfe96c: Hey monkey, take your time getting the nut ok?
textByHashes.84616aa12de3670b9f3895e763c6c1dafdaf0515: That depends, do you think you can reach those bitternuts for me?
textByHashes.d6b3161a3182c4000280637fdcf8ddb41387b72e: Look, never mind about taking your time, I'm sure things will be ok.
textByHashes.3e4ace2bd84b26bfcc2d2fc5807cc23665698668: Cheers, I'll be nearby to catch it.
textByHashes.5df3de7d233a825f450d23c7215159e60fc1b7b0: Anything else of interest in the palace?
textByHashes.a53213a34f1fec14918d5ad2519640c9a7b58cd1: No thanks, I prefer to stay this side of the bar.
textByHashes.844a861270e9385a67e59a2e9c46dafd1c54d592: Ok then I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.50340e2a71ce2b0264f50f656290c0ce92a16cd3: I haven't managed to make it yet.
textByHashes.765c03ea9b97a5dada6be9d6972f082670ce53fd: Why do you keep killing boars?
textByHashes.3d247859e8a7d71132162fa2efdf85e8b833f016: Wouldn't it be best to go steal cakes for food?
textByHashes.432903eced3ae140b41b3941523483b96d87ec50: Are you at least killing the boars on task?
textByHashes.3f4dc9a65ff86adc85210834c93527afaf938021: Erm, no. I'm all set, thanks.
textByHashes.78a67c9301f85a7a21ac8888973cbd28b4427b7a: So what do you have to sell?
textByHashes.792e01ab1db8b77b99fc03d1c4dbcd4d67c92493: You don't really look like you're being so successful.
textByHashes.ee58b1aa188f5c2ccaa154c8fb6ab779571acb95: You conveniently have a response for everything.
textByHashes.8d7b6a708ee895373a20d9e4b499b39593c03dff: Can you show me the prices for potions?
textByHashes.7524ac17c9a62e09d0131a2566ac5ecb591f56fa: I certainly can. I am wearing this amulet I got in Sophanem!
textByHashes.16609c3b69551dbf5c61a5a57f7a55f75c17f2f9: Wow!! You know the plural of Sphinx!! What else do you know?
textByHashes.0d9e26baa24c8b72b371acc309551797db32ffb8: I certainly do. Share your wisdom Bob!
textByHashes.50446501f0cfe92cab1cfe2506da458ede214169: OK then, how about a joke instead?
textByHashes.e5577e924034b20e4ca28f6dc6cfd128c200e0e6: No, you don't understand. I wanted to hear a joke.
textByHashes.5e870f0069cd383a65cadd928307a8b151be41b3: Did he? Wow. What about this joke then?
textByHashes.fb382b168c939bc5ec846b34e3b6ecab7df2829f: No, that's your job isn't it?
textByHashes.d2bcdd1fe838a59a1d1078061f3132310cbfbcda: An Eskimew... That's not funny. I waited all this time for that? Sheesh.
textByHashes.7b14bf5c346e2ef7880969d816a870d9b04c5256: Speak to me, Bob! Give me some wise words of advice!
textByHashes.1a43e33501db0c687d110c98fc06eb61fbc9473f: That would be fantastic! I heard you were very very wise indeed.
textByHashes.c1d2d5fa4eb5ff509271d8073124091074ddb159: OK, bamboozle me with your intelligence!
textByHashes.3608ce6eb6655e1b6b903841f9d2c0ec20e9710f: Do you two know each other?
textByHashes.8e8b4684e09aee32df4220ab6b02b30e5584ad16: I think that's about enough of that. I'm off.
textByHashes.7e0667073f3b26da716ace2383def7f0374f82f8: I thought it was too dangerous to bring it out with me.
textByHashes.15d3deaaf85393bca70d03a1a0edbadf150bd4b9: Or, I could let the poor thing get butchered! Is that what you want?
textByHashes.00754a4d9cc64628d458a327c6d197ec8b0be672: Weird. I thought Gnomes and the Dwarves were the first ones. Oh well back to school for me.
textByHashes.1c27521e29080953478bae6c1c09da6951e9febc: Hi Bob. I didn't think I would ever see you round here. Long way from home isn't it?
textByHashes.7c8d5d489c40dadc937ab904273c267f9a130d1a: Ah, I will have to ask him for the recipe then.
textByHashes.cbe03058b1011348abd168206eb93d1ff218be8c: OK, I shan't bring it up with him. Cheers for the chat Bob.
textByHashes.0817e87b4508566576f59704351aa8c828511865: Hi Bob. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.933e98c734fffde121800bb6d5f9ce7e3a0b06c7: Hi Bob. What are you doing hanging around Varrock?
textByHashes.733da4ed3a2bf5adaf09156333c72b49224f8e12: Oh sorry Bob, didn't mean to make you jump.
textByHashes.e17b8c3df84ef24a1208dad67e185b83c3b4fd5d: But Bob, you don't have any thumbs!
textByHashes.e55242df72373978c6e956f79a4047d6e90771c2: Whats up Bob, lost your favorite toy?
textByHashes.c6b944dbc85c7bb4428399cd8d268db9ec9ba92d: Doesn't sound like a waste of time to me! They deserve it!
textByHashes.13912c67362829c9dabf4fa7d76f429fce391d49: Back then? How old are you Bob?
textByHashes.cb1ab61e2ed25e1ea50fe3f1d5a04b7401b35aa7: I see. Cryptic as ever. Cheers Bob.... I think.
textByHashes.ac9b2201d9acd3cd1c959e16e4c429c1c9f58440: Are you really just a cat Bob?
textByHashes.67d32c1fb8b700dd0428853eef7f8bfaa0e1e2f6: Oddenstein? I am sure I have heard that name...
textByHashes.890b18a62e09a6e7b4e34a2e6cf9dd8fc063a043: Is this really all true? Sounds a bit suspicious to me.
textByHashes.ddbaa8912a1c897a8188be05786c4b50c2abc787: Flawed? So it isn't true... so, erm, eh?
textByHashes.eea0d742989a9d05ebc73c22eaf70666bd466074: OK. Your secrets safe with me Bob.
textByHashes.5cf2bb9af4661f82d356ff379499b860c4abfa5c: This is a long way from Burthorpe. What you doing out here?
textByHashes.e93dcdbbd8fe7f68d8540d178bff01239861f09f: Wow. Could you be any more vague and sarcastic?
textByHashes.4ff6677f2bd0282fbc6cf1aef97e328fe880bc89: It's not safe here Bob. You should leave.
textByHashes.b35855baf760054a036f933c7529e66054fe45e7: But there aren't any mice in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.aadf8a7c5d07518b35f525b17d81bace704d7404: Hey Bob. Got any wisdom to share?
textByHashes.d248d2f8a2744c35c4ea28e7409a344b883fd501: Your territory? This place is ruled by the Grand Highmage Gower and his minions.
textByHashes.e8c697e420d9c9a0d36000b131eb1ca165696d8d: So what you're saying is that if nothing interesting happens to me, then something interesting is happening for someone else somewhere that IS interesting?
textByHashes.17cb26809c7e446ec1da6e7bacd90f954c2c6b28: Must be all that washing you do.
textByHashes.1ebdccc126acd562cac63916ff6b6990cc4721a1: Bob, you're a bit messed up really aren't you.
textByHashes.b56bca79e59f677d438ab0382fb80573838cc1f9: A joke? I doubt the dogs are laughing.
textByHashes.5a74d935b0634c027d41cd34c6b3e85bfbd54824: Yes actually. I heard there are a few wild dogs about here somewhere.
textByHashes.03b934d7c7d135ff80517315a3e0dfc485f2784f: Do you like all the monsters around here?
textByHashes.2c120c3e138576327876b38d6b2ecd0f97d000ba: That's a bit cruel isn't it?
textByHashes.78c7269de1fe039a452ce5f930e2a4dc152ce5a3: Hi Bob! Do you have another one of those mouse toys? I lost mine.
textByHashes.155d3a24d0d6d26d8eb0b81f96ecebc4aa9fb842: You know, a fake mouse on a string.
textByHashes.ef6f2ddb035067ef82380e56d852161249b1c205: I don't have the space, one second.
textByHashes.38091b33fb90166e8931ffef89a34d900e375a04: Can you repair my items for me?
textByHashes.798ba1a9fc8eda72b3d052f7c191653afb718d3f: Are there any rewards you can offer me?
textByHashes.08983df8a8b08dc6928246d7e15489f5281d360e: Could you tell me how many laps I've completed?
textByHashes.db44168c2f889e585a94462100369dd35b9839f7: That's neat, what can he turn into?
textByHashes.0406d849d77cc508f4e7566d6e059aa90c6e1376: Hey there, how do you do my fellow monkey?
textByHashes.8d2dfe4179fa001a25f6c32006d4e1f85d2afaea: Are you heading into The Nutcracker?
textByHashes.447da845ae4873468774e4d64602e54f4f4e397c: Woah, you're very big for a Gnome.
textByHashes.d06035a5608b4333ca80b688eb6c5b700ea05b59: Yes, do you have a challenge for me?
textByHashes.e58c2393097325dd47f8c108c9db5065fdd10b2f: So why are you here if it's a dump?
textByHashes.bc6cba60950c77d35fa53217a54aa062bd5b0764: Can you help me to make Zamorak's wine?
textByHashes.1dfefd00f0cae0dda423f8f6cbf6209048dfdb8e: And do you think I'm up to it?
textByHashes.220bc5d275f6da46b33fa235d57cf71e42e4748b: You said you can make Zamorak's wine from grapes.
textByHashes.850e09df58d8782d5048fcc2d1425b2c42d6ca0f: How do those blessings work again?
textByHashes.be604a74d4aee6b6e4fe8c0896bde8523a79ed8d: Tell me the story about yourself again.
textByHashes.398a181b058fb8cc6b03374739fd3d2f23f16476: You still hangin' around the tower?
textByHashes.f00251a19bb4e17bd67878c818d02207940507a4: Just wondering what brings you out here?
textByHashes.93054874ea16dcf8aac84386661702136f045e6e: I see. Would I be able to enter?
textByHashes.8e4710ba2daebdc56df06a3a9a97e31cb785ecd9: Can I come through this gate?
textByHashes.8c277ac3e4f5de3b8b0d06a7a071a2cba153e2a3: No, thank you. I'll walk around.
textByHashes.4107f07dbef8e5d9d608f31279d7a0a2d84b6036: Who does my money go to?
textByHashes.f7dababa48992626e1178ba350f8aabc04776905: Oh dear, I don't actually seem to have enough money.
textByHashes.6b6acc1c9a2668fa5596b6ddbb59edfc6da81af3: But Zanik isn't like the other goblins!
textByHashes.cb2c07ff049456a3961b7da27462286f62f1b852: Well, at some point I hope to be hiring a crew of my own. When that happens, you seem like you have all the... qualifications... needed to join.
textByHashes.21567aae3554cc36faafe48aa0373e2fc89e7433: Given your... skills... would you like to join my crew?
textByHashes.3a451e5e12d13679632a96c77e5569b3e91df243: Well, good luck with it all.
textByHashes.764aedac2a7fb63138d04a318aed44f23ed75d85: Hello there. How are you enjoying being part of the crew?
textByHashes.28dd2b026ba051376bef0abee6c1716f73c27342: It's fine I suppose, thanks for asking.
textByHashes.ce2b7e17750101750579f219ce65901244c1d9c3: Hi! What are you up to?
textByHashes.8500eed994499c69bd70dddce20de7182ad77020: I don't have time to water flowers, I have people to save!
textByHashes.60ba38d63b9b7a0e34db708ab7c8e2db727e01e0: I have a seal of pass...
textByHashes.0eee25017d7cc713acc0ba4a2bfb399ecc338dbb: Ooops. Suppose I need a seal of passage when I'm walking around that island.
textByHashes.afb2222664d2e0a02295e3a1ce4c221618d7cd5e: I'd like to ask you about magic crossbows.
textByHashes.bca13d8106e735fb8f8d698f4acd907e87a63120: The dwarves don't work with magic logs, I'm wondering if you know how to make a crossbow out of them?
textByHashes.1c967a3cdb7b48fa2775f8fa21000309ee4709a5: Ok, perhaps one day in the future I'll get to make magic crossbows!
textByHashes.ea3e0057e071ede17b613b6f94125895dbdffd9a: Alright I'll leave you to it then.
textByHashes.17dd8fda099e8e3cd1157521875a40518355e08d: The Easter Bunny is looking awfully glum this year.
textByHashes.68b52a7601498aef3b5edb2b8c7c2c24540ef849: Perhaps we can help raise the Easter spirits?
textByHashes.49272f806e0f6744190f9e610ba200b18a7b12c2: No no no! It's just a figure of speech.
textByHashes.d69be66d4fffd3f97665977e9c69d1918a650646: I just wonder if we could do anything to help.
textByHashes.3cf2e8cb09d1b20a5338200849319fa4261e7723: This is strictly a humanitarian effort!
textByHashes.87bec567298687a643339224b226e843efc932e9: Look, I just want to get Easter back on track.
textByHashes.f603c7ccc363c0ea8ad1d757d084340091b3fbdf: You can keep your hustle going, I just want to help the Easter Bunny.
textByHashes.f9db834b9aed0102e1874bd1b6e2f72d58a89eae: Well, Bowley here let me in on your secret. Bowling champion three years in a row.
textByHashes.cc90220e2052f9745287018825b2c2d689b2b105: Nothing to worry about I'm sure!
textByHashes.b52b9bce8b56591cbf4e7d918e8afc032876f40a: Chin up bucko, I'm here and ready to challenge your rule of these alleys!
textByHashes.41a738d32d3009be5a95c25490938dd9c274564f: I'd better shape up or this will be quite one sided.
textByHashes.7d48b5505364c05a2a3769e834bba379ea1e50fe: And that would be no fun at all.
textByHashes.49f5c35c39ea268eaef92aaeeb0751ef77254a7e: I could do this all day.
textByHashes.aad14bde3bda2c8b47d82618b42e0054083fe6dc: Ah you know me, the most modest adventurer in Gielinor.
textByHashes.6f679a6ea32ab78b154f6c777b1f8c9e3b2d7b12: It was a close match. How are you feeling now?
textByHashes.b87f5a3df8ab3cf869285b9c0511c1a373a1c042: We may have gotten away with it!
textByHashes.49f2a16fc80f90c32fdb06f28ce5e4595ebd6547: Don't worry I'm sure those excessively large ears are just for show!
textByHashes.56ebf27afc16ff004c7432f947f5df91969b18bc: He seems to have more of a spring in his step.
textByHashes.e1bdaaf9bccec92ee23e900a145aa05cab6d4f17: I'll see if anyone else around here can help.
textByHashes.8246d7cab00c7af6d44527cfe3645effda19f899: Hello Bowley, I didn't expect you up here!
textByHashes.b72383a7c9701f45497eb55dca621aca68f58788: Oh it's just bright is all, we don't often get moles here on the surface.
textByHashes.3c88c0eaa02130aa9214044b53e2a4b35dfbf9a6: You're a long way from home, what are you doing here?
textByHashes.d0cfdadb5662652d5811f9f7820c07260d80c0f0: Still, you seem to have drawn the short straw here - there's nothing but snow...
textByHashes.c95355fa6fd7635170e4c43ed64802f5312f8096: What does this mint cake do?
textByHashes.254ba7aabdbccef702b4fdf88e4ca436f1e35d99: Ooh, that might come in very handy. Do you have any spare?
textByHashes.194e7046396b29297a0f4f4ba1fd7cc1736c0cba: What does this seed pod do?
textByHashes.8d90d88d1c93da95fd4e6fc9ecb7494450f42416: So what are you here for?
textByHashes.f31eae7448360d0d2fae47793469440510cb6bea: I'd like to talk about your cape again.
textByHashes.e9b3bf3764db624fa60a592276c713c9ebfd1eba: A small price to pay for such a fantastic cape.
textByHashes.ce5be96e92a206e66151c996ed2182d6cf0c98db: On second thoughts, I've changed my mind.
textByHashes.b338cd1fceabbc2614c80c1ea2648a3f683440b2: I think I'll leave you alone.
textByHashes.4ffb46097164091574839bbc213b49273bb30ec5: All in a day's work, think nothing of it.
textByHashes.872d7c7598375c1b009f22d0784a25e20ff56572: I may come for it later, you hang on to it for now.
textByHashes.75e974c380772c2014c0a3f6a1be87f1f148c7b4: Well, no, but they are a lot calmer now.
textByHashes.b44b42ed036d6a62bcd5084d7274c6296365a99a: In your case I would say relax.
textByHashes.e9c03302bf1d6ad90cebbb9e1cf1cfa4ecdab1cc: I'm not any form of undead!
textByHashes.4717221117f6a5df66005c359f31df87888c687f: So...what are you going to do now?
textByHashes.947e9897c89c364a96bd651c01da9c3b6a2c3fd0: Excellent! Since I get the feeling I don't want to know why you said that so oddly I'll just go over here!
textByHashes.a756a9813a42d8a545b2f5fe7e78be3bfe15e28e: Actually I think I'll pass thanks.
textByHashes.04fad96ece4ac4524441418ffa9e0f22fd8c571b: I want to try the maze again!
textByHashes.229d344e0917e63fd88ac1ac14a92f445540975d: No thanks, I've got all the archery equipment I need.
textByHashes.584a74ce1a4275ac333440a4eaf6a5f656e87c19: Do you get many customers here?
textByHashes.064ee0dc961df81d97643b590e887b59f3cb1eb2: Sounds like they're lucky to have you.
textByHashes.fa6e7325a62c63d85f50bc1ff1771ebfb97c204e: Oh, yes - I was wondering where that had gone...
textByHashes.604fa216e5704754c9bcce0d2ee2ce51e4f7fa10: Oh, not so bad. I'll let you know if I find anything I think you'll find interesting...
textByHashes.9f7b515536885e2bbaf8b42d3c3d2e0af66abebd: Where would I find out how the thing works?
textByHashes.6b8c1c85ee291419f1d21a63f4ab0a9901999bbf: Excellent idea, I'll do that. Thanks.
textByHashes.4e5c146801c00b356cbebf969b25389c1b987300: It just so happens that I have some with me!
textByHashes.b8f9f2a52434c59ffa31984a21186b01f3008bbf: I'm afraid that I don't have any of that type of food with me.
textByHashes.3cf0d21e704b5c44f31d4304de61ac2a2bdc7d40: I'll see what I find. Although, I've never heard of Ralos and Ranul.
textByHashes.acade78cfde9300f9dd34e11af1aef09770019c6: Why didn't you decide to run back the way you came from instead of running further into the dungeon where there could be more dangerous creatures?
textByHashes.e52610c2b24ac29b0cabdb06d2bc8a0f07698b91: You've been trapped here for a while! No wonder you were hungry!
textByHashes.4c0252f5ce7acf4b525edd52765e4374985d753c: I found a strange creature possessing an adventurer within the dungeon and it has cursed one of the altars. Do you know how I can remove it?
textByHashes.1528c9efbea201a6d5b63d4ecae5d838afe7460f: It was a dark black creature with a white skull on its head and curved horns.
textByHashes.2075622873a8b0f85ffb2244c15029d8b484c0b5: What kind of sacrifice should I offer?
textByHashes.d7ee48a25f20b66bd5c6978726b1a3bcd6085d1c: Thanks. I'll have a look around.
textByHashes.02d81b649f8a63e6841d2ae6051c44a5b1868486: I received a key from the bone burner but unfortunately I have lost it.
textByHashes.63820628780e65873fe7324586430ccb124a30d1: I have some spider silk for you.
textByHashes.40224c20841ec31f9dfc9b5048ee50ae0119a632: Actually, I believe they're used as supplies in potion making, they might have some use.
textByHashes.a7aeea1e1edfba8b75bd101e167f69585cfa2943: I see what you did there.
textByHashes.fd7168891f01a3787d6ea93d5b3df76b8469f196: I'm not sure myself, though I've heard some people like to display items like this in their house.
textByHashes.e96ff8621cadc9d3dada12ab14dac5cb079ac25c: Yeah, I killed Sarachnis and she started following me, I think she's cute so I've decided to keep her around.
textByHashes.f266fb40bf0f53a6285c0622c6155bca5580b692: I'll have a look for it. Thanks for your help!
textByHashes.8dd5b9720f4753d3ce1bee1b7353ec651e36b84c: A fellow adventurer I met within the temple had it on him. What should I do with it?
textByHashes.731612cf160fe8a1ce1c7ffd9d3c499947911bf7: Where do you think the missing pages are?
textByHashes.c4e3e01f5cf2998d3b9dc74f3a595b859a8dda1f: Hello, brother. Could you help me with a quest, please?
textByHashes.f1bcb0c2ae75ac5e078a383664b9447642e4a13b: Okay, thanks, I'll bear that in mind.
textByHashes.6402f7b5f10089c03b62664827666583e86e3796: Hello Brother Jered, the monks in Varrock sent me. What is going on?
textByHashes.4d28acc143a82d9d50a9344a7812f684dd3d2eb1: I see, I can give that a go! What should I make the scary noise with?
textByHashes.0278eab5db8d6f22ee5ffe45f31ad8af333027d4: I'm sure there's a perfectly sane explanation why.
textByHashes.9accb52e8fb6abd41cbdf56e07d4b4fd2bc76e98: What can you do to help a bold adventurer like myself?
textByHashes.e1f8b1017316ea0a5bc7148dce05244b46ca8779: I've lost the bottle, can I have another one please?
textByHashes.8454b81ca13155201c0c7a2c6c938ee88bb89ce7: Could I have another wine bottle? I dropped the other one.
textByHashes.d8832426f2dea3cdc2f007945718d45d0674facf: No! He said one ghost wasn't enough! But I have a plan...
textByHashes.3d5ed44a9c0e164663fc201005eb327e811341b8: Yes! ONE ghost wasn't enough. We need more than one ghost. We need TWO ghosts!
textByHashes.7ae8dba4c1b2473d0125d316a4887ef313de8056: Will you be my accomplice and be the second ghost?
textByHashes.a0b6295d6ea457afb870b3232695781efda4efcf: Are you sure it's not all the wine and food?
textByHashes.5b510ef495da24ce151faa2b54075b60527ddd76: Nothing! That's okay, I hope you feel better soon!
textByHashes.5db074be198aa4dbb39a3f957532e316bf0fe004: I need to find an accomplice elsewhere, then. Do you have any ideas?
textByHashes.04358776d0762aed8ed2ea178cd6f91ea53875ed: 500,000 coins? That is quite a lot!
textByHashes.9b7bfc1c75c4700f8de0a7ee6c88464d1a321f7f: Thank you! You had me worried there that I was going to have to find 500,000 coins. I'll go and place the advert.
textByHashes.1b62c92be9c92605b73eb0e317a3c63604569bf0: I've lost the coupon, can I have another one please?
textByHashes.062ceac1b0a622a654a97b71ee1a5087653a7202: I'll go and do that now!
textByHashes.afea71ddd83b59190c4e638d1173b8f069565c57: Could I have another coupon before I go? I lost the other one.
textByHashes.8a784d2da9dd02b75b975ba8e227436db7636bd9: Well thanks, I've just placed the advert in the Herald.
textByHashes.da8c8660bef7073278c86d04c388596f54daf773: At the Blue Moon Inn, I'm going to head there now.
textByHashes.1ab98807d15543b566694e8a0c070dea81643a29: That sounds like Iffie, she is my accomplice! I'd be careful calling her an old lady!
textByHashes.e12506f5dc96a560e42b7ba7f68b4984779c5ce9: Iffie? She helped a lot, I need to go and give her the reward I promised.
textByHashes.2c57636e7933f22d289176610e00bbd0fd89e632: It was really no problem, if anything, it was rather fun!
textByHashes.6e4020e0bf3fac795eeaee188ef20474d4c26d55: Is that... a ghost, inside? It's haunted?!
textByHashes.4cc7cdc47dfb053167f9faa340ef63630dee03d7: Thank you. What do I do with it?
textByHashes.39127347288aab52f2dbc110bd05b7a6347a0328: Tell me about the Skillcape of Prayer.
textByHashes.fd92ff1e199ac8a9ba3306fb9e7ae9743dc2a532: Yes, please. So few people have Skillcapes of Prayer!
textByHashes.fac1c1a3cf7f1be8fe4a36d4a92f4a7d808bd28b: No thanks, I can't afford one of those.
textByHashes.3c0a020585e5179d167a5ed4cb98c7e74a77ab56: I am always happy to contribute towards the monastery's upkeep.
textByHashes.7c8a29b8a1643c76c649e30f44a14e84135c2ff8: I'm here to help with Oziach!
textByHashes.b5345a9f5c817b121e6cd4567e357bf1e67a9fdc: I will do that right away!
textByHashes.163187c3f175ddd947ac2674a186c00abd4c487d: I'm trying to learn how to be a navigator.
textByHashes.00ce96c8c4ba85c1d4b506dabfef9ba7019f276b: The professor from the Observatory says that I need a watch.
textByHashes.53a3bf8f8f0b369dc42fff151a7c749c7aa108cc: Could I have a starter pack?
textByHashes.85e2c418487f0a5d59cbbe9c59f31ce1bdb5f3f1: Let's talk about where I respawn when I die.
textByHashes.2129b0a3e7b53dc257c723125a1c33a0e79cf2c2: Yes, I'd like to respawn at the Grand Exchange.
textByHashes.7a7d97541eadcba40059916c00a03d5ff63c8b7e: Can you tell me the price of an item?
textByHashes.58202314520dfe9fabf6f0ecc988b00ccbefa018: Why do you call me outerlander?
textByHashes.16529b601dcc41b5c523964cb44b921bb9a95cf6: I seek an army to destroy Asgarnia!
textByHashes.456cb843531e8377b2c576c0b9cec1fe6c32ba3a: So how did the meeting go?
textByHashes.f96ecb57183f056a8a9c0ed50fd0ce03528f5439: That's a bit too much I'm afraid.
textByHashes.ccb90aefc7e71452a9fe15df15a4ef0fd06da7fa: I just came to say hello.
textByHashes.355560d09ae6c4949799ed762551b91672775464: Can I hear the history of your people?
textByHashes.0cf5dacab2a16edcc2b89fea58012106ebb0a96c: I'm interested in finding out about that mysterious warrior I fought as part of Thorvalds' combat trial. His name is Koschei I believe.
textByHashes.86a9141c65b4d1e81e65694e12927c11a4505d7d: So how exactly did you find him?
textByHashes.29ff53daa119540db4bfc40d7d72d28607d62656: I would like to hear of the lands across the ocean to the North.
textByHashes.4a21f84a8d5192d7844d5731382a67dd20fe112e: I would like to hear a little of the history between the Fremenniks and the outerlanders.
textByHashes.7b40b2ac8176942c3c7a0289708e7a69dc2b7d54: Actually, history isn't really my thing.
textByHashes.2402b3926da2e8c9cad69a90d91ca67d0fdedab3: Could you explain this place to me again?
textByHashes.c6bfd8e45b5a55ef53289c171c8f4ed23984e7ed: But how do people fight without their gear?
textByHashes.860b98ae213d8bc4fa0d5732f44bdaa8641e63ea: Okay, I think I follow... But I thought this was all about combat, not just gathering my own equipment.
textByHashes.72c7b8aefc7a5ffa524873eed6f6ea7fc0a90002: And what makes it so dangerous, if it's just for training?
textByHashes.c1f6ccd94ac7ff2e376d71ac8f342efb85b926c7: Okay... I think I've got it.
textByHashes.074cac148ed43e2a5a6ad0a6c24da6493a069ee6: I'm thinking of giving the Gauntlet a go.
textByHashes.1a53d2dc306849edf2755a2601f48b0bd84e47ee: Maybe I'll check it out at some point!
textByHashes.ac6107a174b8b955f32846ac6194fdbcac281a4f: Oh, sorry. I didn't mean to turn you into a... Hot cross bunny!
textByHashes.c413fbfe70a7c01dcb5e763813f935588eec6f75: You make a very good point.
textByHashes.6896c4f625d9ad364d4ce42a6f4d093977be94d0: Can I go for a ride?
textByHashes.54991e57f9c349ad354536f4ad7d6e78d3f64516: How does it feel to be back home?
textByHashes.7e7e9c255b9bd89746b7300896a45156374bb2a6: Glad to see you enjoying yourself... I guess.
textByHashes.7f1a7dfc7b4cf297f04253b676beb3e19e775af3: Maybe, I'm not sure I'd be very good at it!
textByHashes.dfbb19ed801e771d5330aa3beac1368c9db53bb4: I had a chat with your dad. He's super busy, so he's asked me to help you build a snowman!
textByHashes.5c76485cfdba9e567f316998fda0615964737a08: Yes! And I'm going to build whatever snowman you want!
textByHashes.ab1f04ca77f87a71bc15b7646b465129c3bb7574: Okay, okay, wait a second. Why don't we meet in the middle. How about four snowballs tall?
textByHashes.4588addb073433b7d6901e5782fcd7967abb32b7: Great. Now, we need to pick what size snowballs we want for each tier. Why don't you take it in turns? You can do two each.
textByHashes.f8f2cfe4c867600c9efe6d65c63af2da07b20113: This is working nicely, we're half way! What about the top two parts?
textByHashes.ed3c22d1ee065d142b8e8c1a694315aac56253b5: Okay, okay, wait. This clearly isn't working, and I don't want you two to fall out. It's Christmas, we shouldn't be arguing!
textByHashes.c157c9e2c72054ea73ec299e22413ff6190de08f: How about I make you both a snowman? It can be whatever height and size you like. One each!
textByHashes.7f25051b40781b6ad5a6972f5c6aae195123e4a5: Yes, I'll make you both whatever snowman you like!
textByHashes.6a863148a4b4d4db6e71c689195e0966b30bacc0: That's two very different snowmen, I see why this didn't work before!
textByHashes.a6ad961e61348ca8aab0ab14fc2d0699edf6b319: What do all these different sizes mean? Humongous? Normal? Little? How big are those?
textByHashes.8bab834c1bfe0b3f91c543dc0113428dcb53855c: Right, thank you for clearing that up. I'll figure something out.
textByHashes.20b0d8dd9bb9565f6c07f63649161b9dba06d776: What are you two going to do for decorations?
textByHashes.6c484031a53d4059548aa22448907a266a435123: Why don't you guys find some decorations while I build the snowmen? Then you can add them once I'm done.
textByHashes.1c67717f31623eda9c4eb626ff7264188ac86217: Well, that seems sorted. I should speak to Larry again, and see if he has any advice about building the snowmen.
textByHashes.ac617fa378440045e917ad07ce8c6df64431fd99: Maybe I'll go talk to him and see what advice he has.
textByHashes.60f8f4e9172cfb03998b3fba696ecce4fa874923: I should go and speak to Larry. I'm sure he has some handy advice for me!
textByHashes.07cc3ec9c94d4bde971bdf943c98e6fc2a56be88: Of course you can. Are they what you wanted?
textByHashes.d4d4d975ebc37128039e04b0ffc21d8baada3f10: I am happy to hear that. It was harder work than I thought.
textByHashes.ef8aa14c37cc0d26c0b9277fc9d6ad1aecf0e3b7: It was no problem. Merry Christmas to you both!
textByHashes.2d576cd528e8895944c73e71c1645e3c72a16b61: I should go and speak to Larry. Hopefully he has that festive white wine ready for me.
textByHashes.9f7022186ceea5fa3dfc01ce86edf6bb01ef7b18: It's really good! Reminds me of something actually.
textByHashes.8597b5a2d372f6a6eca5914150a2b5aa6caee0cc: I like yours too. They both remind me of something!
textByHashes.7013b4f31bf5a5f8a57392580c1d2946decc5c23: They're both amazing! I didn't know you guys would be so good at decorating.
textByHashes.71511a6b7aa4a75ae0fe9019d2f45144dead749e: What... really??? I'd like to have seen that. Those sound even more difficult than these two!
textByHashes.45f95d1c52a655d4773831e55e84b3261f47c51e: How do you know all these monsters anyway? There is no way your dad would let you anywhere near them!
textByHashes.cf3ea59a6f15c3d865ed516e7b3e63d259337cde: You must meet some interesting and cool adventurers!
textByHashes.8286ef8b4dd910ec7b0d8cd6e524f3154b6c3da7: Well, you're welcome. I really enjoyed it. What are you guys going to do now you're finished?
textByHashes.a2cb8e32edbdfdd552b17924e907bf97e9fd87d5: I sure will be. Maybe see you there!
textByHashes.f8f96286bcf3561f8808cb7600c993db7d7bf5f4: Snowflake and My Arm are ruling the town together, and now I've built them a special fire, they can grow goutweed there.
textByHashes.09149450dbddc92a21947f4d9d2563ee53d36dc3: I think you have had enough.
textByHashes.20ce358cfae60112a2b8b77a81a4fada6bb2b322: I see. Well good luck with it all.
textByHashes.79db78b93c5fc7778ca78f57393bc7e7a5445307: Tell me about your previous jobs.
textByHashes.44c90b5731a16cfc75c436627812f36a150368f5: You're hired... well, I don't have the money on me, but can I owe you? I'm good for it, honest.
textByHashes.ee29eb68aada1238df84f0503ccc56ba61390431: Can you fetch something from the bank for me?
textByHashes.f86a8f59a1d17aae8686a1894b64748eb42f07d8: Stay at the entrance and greet guests.
textByHashes.e6345deedefadeeebb2b516367dddde9f5842e7b: Oh, that's unfortunate. Are you using a lockpick?
textByHashes.da13605538241ea317a100091c37b0032208cb5c: Oh, that's interesting. I'll keep my eyes out for one.
textByHashes.f1dd2d37973848bd8d3db309e14a938ef389ed9b: I see. If you don't mind me asking, you already have dark graceful so why are you still looking for hallowed marks?
textByHashes.69d1c1bccf58fc712bfd723db35096f8cc704311: Wow, I didn't know that! That sounds pretty cool.
textByHashes.2344b3a4c6b8605ac46f005f2c1b670100788eb7: I see, well best of luck. Hopefully you survive long enough to finish your goal.
textByHashes.0a619e6b72af729d39d10c21bb4af852045c1963: Yeah, I ended up buying one myself and fed it to my Giant Squirrel. It took a while but it was definitely worth it.
textByHashes.a939de39ce60a1a53e7597e689f286c7a8e16866: Long enough... Still, at least I feel much more agile now than when I started.
textByHashes.0886a86ebacd5e7d70ab59cbdddc72a866d524a3: I already have one. I was just letting you know that having a lockpick helps when getting into these coffins. You appear to be struggling.
textByHashes.2159c6b04552d56009a26d616b761d5a20920cf9: I was just letting you know that having a lockpick helps when getting into these coffins. You appear to be struggling.
textByHashes.39441107129c4f0cb8902e0a55bdbc70fe625a89: Yes I'm serious. Also that outfit you're wearing doesn't help you get more loot from these coffins either.
textByHashes.5fcc9255a3485c16fa72d52c9c2489711aa5ba15: At least you look cool dressed like that though.
textByHashes.09e5c22dbc357e63122c017c8c992c2c4a01f398: Each to their own I suppose.
textByHashes.b0c8568d2541405fa596fcfa75f7a8e2387760fc: Please take me back to Rimmington.
textByHashes.69f7d2a5589fa7521271ab27f101edbc578ab560: I'd like to travel to Port Sarim, please.
textByHashes.a52b4563f37605b16ef83da8642decd36aa16792: I'd like to travel to Port Piscarilius, please.
textByHashes.73be3a3d41fb15dc0c94f9393e4918d66b38c0bc: I'd like to travel to Land's End, please.
textByHashes.97c8f686cef7b8c26fcd16cea0c89dc565040313: Actually I'd like to stay here.
textByHashes.3b1eda6ca0d3f2ec05b0ba47a8af6c156c9830fb: I'm sorry, Jenkins, but... why are you here?
textByHashes.b40d269604dac9dbdbeb863a1107d84d7a8c42aa: I hope you find it, Jenkins. And you just let me know if I can help you do so.
textByHashes.a2f91ecc874b8fc7395b62fff32d75be74634602: Hello again, Jenkins. How are you doing?
textByHashes.e60908932f496df40c97392ebc8aa111b0b16f99: Well, I'd love to let you sail with me again, but I don't think I'm ready to hire a crew yet.
textByHashes.d1c2094b7d9828877bc0b0b6425730087e4ed479: Maybe you could join my crew?
textByHashes.e2d6016f947325ac7a70b7b59b712dc37ea6f38a: I hope you find it, Jenkins.
textByHashes.511d81bfcb5813d5690c61ccadd28f1e693e8a54: But at least you are still with us I suppose?
textByHashes.9326033cf35fd2e438156f7b816da408c771bd6f: How could you possibly know that?
textByHashes.c9038475fb2c02ee71c7114c0d7f75700d6b31d1: I think I'll pass. But thanks..
textByHashes.e4dff061cd20ed5383eaba99f0f12775ef029375: I don't think so... I've just got one of those faces.
textByHashes.d0c73e322c4119fd155313b7aa40710781ae7c0c: Not sure I've got enough coins to do that.
textByHashes.789c0dc7aceb0d9e13fb3bf68fedf9b0adaec557: No, sir, I'm a burglar. I burgle people.
textByHashes.af2d56c172bb33165165ac6e4bb3b283264f8dbe: Not at all. I just want to ransack the place. Honestly.
textByHashes.5b3215c1257c96346970b6c03fe87e61d908856a: It is quite nice out here.
textByHashes.8f3788d5734b578fafed4a18452e61936060de9b: Enjoy it! Take as much time as you want!
textByHashes.530fbcd1b8e739160d0fc8b3af61256b50b8eb65: I see you are a chef... Could you cook me something?
textByHashes.4f67b7f205afcdcb0a58060143beb434ea00c2ed: Caleb! As an adventurer, I am ready to help you with whatever you need... again! What can I help you with?
textByHashes.21685241747812cca409909981c969977c63879d: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that, my mind was erm... elsewhere.
textByHashes.98ee0504e74e67e3e259529331d6e3882d8e913a: I'm sorry! Please let me help.
textByHashes.8765d4b6d4325c83e962a9da177069a25beadfe7: Very well, I'll go and see if your other brothers need anything...
textByHashes.cce81fd57c12d18ff7cfc96f2482a6a40da90474: Are you sure there's nothing I can do, a chef can always do with help in their kitchen right?
textByHashes.7aad10c34830f77e5b667d8afcdc722e1e62134e: Could I have some more cooking gauntlets, please?
textByHashes.5a0dbc524196d6c3be9c849558377a06bf81ca44: I thought camels carried their own water in their humps.
textByHashes.d59ddd52aa8f1be0ec99488e60502592bb27b500: Well, adventuring's thirsty work as well.
textByHashes.3e2b6e9d6629ec134899d7048b60510475952b6f: Your pub looks a bit rough.
textByHashes.67473e18cad6383ce9e5e239d8bf5d20b1456481: And that's what you offer with your broken tables and glass covered floors?
textByHashes.08cd2d3bedd8f40d379eb5ec8d1b0c43840a24c3: But I don't have that kind of money on me.
textByHashes.f7680d8a431d591671fdad29e5669b59ca30309f: What's so dangerous about a naked flame?
textByHashes.81b99edcb347064c8acf5430056b68fed5be4883: All right, you win, I'll buy a candle.
textByHashes.68997fc403edc85be93c1ef0799817ae3079943a: No thanks, I'd rather curse the darkness.
textByHashes.4360d0b23cadc71fe3f62758b6647a2b01af849b: Thanks for the information. I wonder if there's a Draynor Draynar out there.
textByHashes.e2a226d5d5f51831a21f4086a91d8c2e2c17b9a8: What do I do in the arena?
textByHashes.3474c212ab94496a7f12f9c67eda35535778ea6f: I'd like to use the Agility Arena, please.
textByHashes.abb1b1df7382596bcaafa4a15e9ff72ae292d23b: I don't have the money on me at the moment.
textByHashes.5954d09cfc4b3538d4c6d5859fe49bd831571f94: Can you tell me a bit about the Skillcape of Agility, please?
textByHashes.94c109c35ae1f14639eae700c28fc1aecaf29247: May I buy a Skillcape of Agility, please?
textByHashes.60a9589cbfde6f808ff25c4382d138088d4cc8e5: I'm afraid I can't afford that.
textByHashes.870b34e4f5c79e1c04ffe511227da02f476ebf6b: Well, I'm here about a treasure trail...
textByHashes.d290a5ed2eccce8fc6731a6bdd208d58e9a069be: Yes, I'll help you unlock your chest.
textByHashes.e4b5414d6f26c942e2306194d00d64a09a609ccd: Sorry, I must have misunderstood your instructions. Could I hear them again please?
textByHashes.ed182449a08ee2e433e0433268ce6fe8ad5122e2: I'd like to go to Rimmington.
textByHashes.5bce72aeb6f609cd8d20c1caf75efe27e0ad1045: I'd like to go to Brimhaven.
textByHashes.fb1fccc228c92ad52c31ef74095c7af34194806d: Or I could pay you nothing at all...
textByHashes.3abbca20de562b0e4905c331d20745e592d69c4f: I'd like to go to Ardougne.
textByHashes.16bbcdaca49f693335e3942fc7096d591d3d5fdb: What do you mean by real airline?
textByHashes.6d36b7354d8354a39bb28d1d3bd9336a744238cd: How much for one-way to Varrock?
textByHashes.e8e5f85dbaa9643122d8ff7fa5eab7f6a1f5405d: Can you take me on the glider?
textByHashes.f672745e81712d0ff87e3bae62062f610184bb2a: Why are gliders better than other transport?
textByHashes.3d64255ae4c394f34c55b7b1eafeb51408ed256d: How did you all manage to build such an established network?
textByHashes.7ab3808baa0c83d852bb78435097f689f00f88d9: Sorry, I don't want anything now.
textByHashes.4b9b6acb58cd1e9cba62a8fcfc0bb41ad755c4f3: Interesting. So most people in the army are still from Shayzien?
textByHashes.b150726bdcaaf54f2548718e2779524dd7feef5a: Exploring, captain. Looked like a chance for combat, sir!
textByHashes.1b0b731b36d19c4286171533ec96a30267a4cef9: Let's skip the training, I'm an expert already.
textByHashes.534a2cababdf9786cc9219cc9118ded61fa2e591: Maybe next time, I need to go wash my hair.
textByHashes.ad4dd59295ed56d31b96550fee62efac3c1f229b: Sir! Could I start at wave one again?
textByHashes.36318cdcbbc3592fe870f834160485d7b382e5f9: Sir! Can we do some training?
textByHashes.7899a3f036abfd5d8c117db2fa4fbde0e8d4d2dd: Yes, reset my wave to one.
textByHashes.4adcbc8aa685d72cde47bc4d9f33cb23462e81f9: No sir, I want to stay on wave .
textByHashes.a898631a41ffa79a82ff028966e2a50c339cfee3: But then why did it happen to yours?
textByHashes.2161d3bd791cef3826245fd09d514b1163979b58: And as a result the front of your ship fell off? Was your ship not safe?
textByHashes.2bb311183a9ab3e02dcf806a552a6b323785edeb: Well, you said yourself that this is quite a seldom occurance.
textByHashes.3e10ca5ff9bc37ad4153a0b98600fea74cb04bac: I see... Well, good luck with getting it all sorted.
textByHashes.df572d3ad21148dcc65babb18bad8c3b1aca91bc: What do you define as worthy?
textByHashes.d2368930dd87e73d5577d07ff04000c27b04a31b: Can I use my slayer helm instead of a Shayzien helm?
textByHashes.1d8169bd6f00e4f65589b3922578ba469811635e: How do I prove that I am a friend to Kourend?
textByHashes.ff346ddd8f394084bbbfde03ef69af0b81f413bd: I don't meet those requirements. I'll be back when I do though.
textByHashes.53bcdb73275edef8639f9705353b0a943e9bd9fa: I have that completed! Can you show me the special technique now?
textByHashes.e32abe40a866baef82b2574605d0b93bf69b53cf: What are you doing here? Shouldn't you be looking after your glider?
textByHashes.fcb48d2956e6fc61e19a6dcd1985a2926154b8f2: You're watching the duels then. Are you going to challenge someone yourself?
textByHashes.a0236b5e14ece1f585334769d5ab40dff6e33d70: What do you think of Ali Morrisane?
textByHashes.8c12dd2aa18ddaeabec6473eb82b7544672c96f9: Don't you mean clap me in irons?
textByHashes.b3cc5de914f752023479286691bbe5b63c4ef9ac: Ok, well it's a good job that I have some over here isn't it?
textByHashes.0ef1a29f7d60f6d81f161be3373260600d721cc6: What should I watch out for?
textByHashes.2526e56fd7ec55cd276bfc52f2f017af52bb623d: I'll get on with the fighting.
textByHashes.4cbcc754ec665f40a0a3ed6162a21a59347f35fb: Please tell me about what you're doing.
textByHashes.5c9d5f1259ed3e6134d2721fd2fdd36272c95eec: You sound busy. I'll be off.
textByHashes.68664acb762fcde12e429c5d63fb062da8f18638: Do you know of any meetings now?
textByHashes.cfdaad99e7c6eb93768b8393bb4af3794144bf44: Remind me, what do I do for this?
textByHashes.8344fd3653a234996c7242dd6174f4aec74f052e: That's a bit weird, but okay.
textByHashes.025175dac9ed3061c6bacb4c48f5430802deb0d6: How long have you been a soldier?
textByHashes.00db3846b0f0be867cb4f8eecfb56a8807e46970: And people just let you get away with this?
textByHashes.6c1c0d8f5afb73679134811b722bad09a2baa60c: I'm not sure I have the time right now.
textByHashes.f9328121dd91be4917ac4afd3a62a97c98dbd855: I'll get to it right away, boss.
textByHashes.f332ccfa58e32f6c97deff2e482f87fafab34ec3: Can you tell me about the local area?
textByHashes.f5c35344cd4ebf3d2b03939d15e9ee573b9eb9c8: Well I guess that's the best I can hope for. So how are things going here?
textByHashes.10d4bc9af43d84c9c0a7ed2f56c3b84105617a1c: Hello, what are you doing here, so far from home?
textByHashes.a57f804e17db5fab6bf44f5c4429fc77000bb7d6: Looks like you've enjoyed more than your fair share of hospitality.
textByHashes.cfcd2b3f483f9ebfd09997e047148c91051f6e2c: I'd go easy on the dwarven stout if I were you.
textByHashes.65b4b78d20c3e48af196a8eb0b6e1f6a7333035b: What happened? Did you have a glider crash or get attacked by huge flying birds or something?
textByHashes.ed4695997b587a410b913adf1891550042954e81: Ah, I can see that would be a problem ... You should keep an eye on your drinking, though.
textByHashes.b5f7782fa43474c7d2aa51b7c6da14e3491acba7: Tempoross? Spirit Anglers? Who are they?
textByHashes.65295c5c01ba53594d2e241bde02304ebc6de1a1: Oh that doesn't sound good at all!
textByHashes.71e592afbe15a91b72b56499d4b457d97740df88: Oh... Well, I suppose I can do that.
textByHashes.9486e43db8f5f65b95e4b576d3262ed1e95a517e: Will I need any special equipment?
textByHashes.5401a54595d5e9a8ecd53aa5e0f6aeee46f26e9d: Are there any benefits to helping the Spirit Anglers?
textByHashes.fca4b79c4d9d5706504880cc362d9e207e35545d: Can you remind me what to do on the island?
textByHashes.cee5d55d128b3a24a190ead7a14d0e966fde4782: Can you tell me more about the Spirit Anglers?
textByHashes.30cbbcc6f09f5f30195eaa613224c298673b2739: Yes, I really want to leave.
textByHashes.d8bab124ee729d4ff0a99d7bdfbe6e85569240ad: No, I don't want to leave.
textByHashes.f70234f20a5c813f9e7c1bfbe06f0a3a5734cc41: I'm a very strong adventurer. Would I be able to help out in the battle?
textByHashes.b4eacee84d8363a280691ee6ca565b0d4e364a0d: Can I have a cape like yours?
textByHashes.f1fcec890b2fc5ac611394b94a71835ecde428ce: I am one of the palace guards.
textByHashes.fd5f01496415bf1deee2e9318c8b81b11e500386: That blows that story out of the water then.
textByHashes.fc4f2156b28cd35ac66a9df64cb75e670f4f89b3: What about the King? Surely you'd let him up here.
textByHashes.42827a11434b51fea772543606803e99698c0073: The castle has just received its ale delivery.
textByHashes.24a45dd55b18d4830b3ec9886d763fdd48eb4f0b: Rewards? I'm in! Hopefully some brand new armour or something.
textByHashes.5289f4136e4b6e09f22dd8a5ce525e9248ce24cb: Yes, I'll buy a ticket for the ship.
textByHashes.40aba79cb6f90ea447a524a22a32216b94e87bea: Nowhere just at the moment thanks.
textByHashes.7f6d899d856b2838c76f612889340de4ef9a6a83: No thanks, not just at the moment.
textByHashes.71edb7ac946d3bd4c7dc44b6980f30bcd4b6ec61: How is the camp holding up?
textByHashes.022bba1c862cac7125f934b767d8eaa05945ca31: Why don't you leave this camp and join my crew?
textByHashes.9d6104d6edd8236ff1d5eb0407fce71097014716: I'd like to go to Musa Point.
textByHashes.d4b681cb6b738f52fb8bfbcd111f4fd402fc122c: I'd like to go to the Pandemonium.
textByHashes.4d1f3b1cf450766d3ed039b28945625b354d5163: Actually, I don't want to go anywhere.
textByHashes.1b3727681463d6c4182531eed471434e0c58c49f: What is there to do here?
textByHashes.3a26b7cb47a064e5023b6782ad35c9f5d63b0fb7: No. Just thought I'd come and see how things are going.
textByHashes.df253d20f1be1306f8144ad96e9d93bf7b34fb79: Well, I'm glad to hear all is well. Until next time.
textByHashes.1131abf065dc4c0ea15e0547d1a56c8bfee9da40: Oh yes, they look very fit.
textByHashes.be57bd7503dc933bedbe9cb76624e8e376987aa3: Oh yes, they look very weak.
textByHashes.bd1e4e323b0d4d662c0a2e5cb086172eb2252c76: Can I have some armour like yours?
textByHashes.1d518d08d3f99327c3ec7eb4375815982c1ec6ac: Well, I could become a guard of Varrock.
textByHashes.84f47abbcc0fcf214e41e9f207c3821cc923fea4: I could repent of my evil ways if you like.
textByHashes.3ea841238da695c3a637471551dba3b66c325587: Alright, one Bloody Bracer, if that's all you have.
textByHashes.e641b75f8c3a3eb47002eac21f4093224c4d7bbf: Sorry, I'll come back another day.
textByHashes.ab95815559b6e52cfdbfecbd71cfa4ad8d23943f: Well, I guess I shouldn't shoot the messenger.
textByHashes.5328a684e22a2f47c3baed9ed00b37dbc102497f: What can you tell me about this town?
textByHashes.f9285f22ff75e85c55c3d793a89bcd5828902e16: What happened to the previous barkeep?
textByHashes.b9cce5cd5c01c1b63bba240e69090add4d5a9305: Oh right! You see, for a second there I thought you were talking about vampyres.
textByHashes.26a9a96bde59316f10aedf6f2cf5966ec3cf110e: Again, I'm sorry. Life can be harsh.
textByHashes.2d1b2eb9055de482e41ff50a8db729a3999a03c4: Where did the plague come from?
textByHashes.0e9259cd8e67a727992f2b4cdbad0ab65342a36a: Have there been many victims of the plague?
textByHashes.086b4c1c2fdcf9537a69c31aa1771571c3b7d22b: It sounds an awful way to live.
textByHashes.daefe8e98498a9f4c539fa5789c660e1e368cf4e: I hope things get easier for you.
textByHashes.3fe701015b8d97a14b991bc39e4a3e4533823dad: Hey Carla, how are you doing?
textByHashes.1d0bdccfdb3327034cd59348dca4e3d28080cca3: Good day. What are you doing?
textByHashes.dd0804763aab56ba7a22148843a59631678c2452: Hey there. How're you holding up?
textByHashes.20580be84c37e0fa9b1a18a7004306dc5fec5d41: That's great to hear! All the best.
textByHashes.a031612f42b75992da2f57fe6e5b712b3d9e7e92: I thought this acne potion might help ease your spots.
textByHashes.c84ed0fa3d4c3c2f481a57a8759df59c3fdef63a: I was just trying to help.
textByHashes.e9e8ce3ddbe402fb2c052d2ca3059effee8965db: That camel looks vicious, it'll probably eat me if I go too near!
textByHashes.3e66642402c3f0d1931ef3629e1c329052aa81f5: I wonder if I can catch something from that camel?
textByHashes.daff9a81f5d81a0abf837f43cf36cb4cdc5cdbe2: Oooh, sorry, didn't realise you could hear me?
textByHashes.8c09e951ba3b3bf560434e9d3874f466a023fa93: I'd like to buy a ticket.
textByHashes.ee2fe34a8d9392778e5a0083806332fc7cefc461: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.
textByHashes.e12d76ba87a18825e728f19cafc3a1522b739682: No thanks, I changed my mind.
textByHashes.252e1867b6ba94c34fd1180eb8164e3ee220570f: Oh, don't worry. I'll pay you another 75 coins for the next ticket I buy, alright?
textByHashes.b5e4edae367f7a07677cdc6577bf27af80ab6226: No it's not, you're seeing double from all that drinking, remember? So it's actually 100 coins.
textByHashes.3f8d193ec7c17689c4fe74d3682d3841bdb32be1: Cart-station? What goes on here then?
textByHashes.e544faf9ffadf868db4770066393fb7ea72cd873: Amazing! And what powers the carts? Magic?
textByHashes.b412df404ca6a3ec0d7dbc29d19802b8e1201c83: I'd like to buy a ticket to the Grand Exchange.
textByHashes.907586762075f4163fc39d2524671fff650bdc0b: I'd like to buy a ticket to Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.de359f8069efd5f380061e8eeb36a28ba0ae06b7: I'd like to buy a ticket to White Wolf Mountain.
textByHashes.499a260bd495f292688539a67ee64d46f1effa07: Now that you mention it, yes.
textByHashes.527c26e7a8f8e5847e5db120e634552d34fd2b02: That's a big barrel of wine!
textByHashes.3bc1efad6f9a9201d0fa8dc3ca610f860b87286c: Quick, climb aboard! We'll get you to solid ground.
textByHashes.e67eb3941a919c76d43c1e604dbcc53b7e3057df: Well, I wasn't just going to sail on by! When I get the chance, I'll drop you off at a port.
textByHashes.0f7fa96f3cbe7fec776a9b090a57237fca3b0d9a: Don't worry, friend. I can get you back to dry land.
textByHashes.1e4869d448e443fe2a9a1613b71ebcfe30d287cb: There, there, buddy. We'll get you to a port!
textByHashes.e2cb8ecee919719d45365434a91dffae8d437c58: I'm sorry, I can't take you with me, but I will help if I can.
textByHashes.53bc7bc1ca66aaa5a4a47be1640d4773ad02b689: Why yes I do have some tuna.
textByHashes.ca62c2e05c1c8e1696fc044f18f8560a4c17da86: Isn't it through that big door?
textByHashes.639ad241283eb640120600331e7f06b5799798b7: But I thought I was allowed into the city now.
textByHashes.0f344b8109c26ed9b6190b4e394c03b558347a57: Where do you take all this ore?
textByHashes.2e71915469d421adf75ae92577f1b8787c9dfa43: Why do you use bones to build with?
textByHashes.244717b8ea655d80dda6c22c8533c24b205b7cf2: I'm not going to hurt you.
textByHashes.69fa93a035c51252b01322a914392028aaa8d0b0: I'm going to slay you all, you evil goblins!
textByHashes.5b8419326934bb978622d8286ab823432fe0a57f: I'm not going to tread on your feet.
textByHashes.5b6cedc5ce72905aff3b2c2e0209e891973f1a0c: But you live underground. The weather is always the same!
textByHashes.4cc3e032a5c5089886fd68331b30cb625366d3d2: You know, out of the caves, in the open air, with sunshine and wide open spaces!
textByHashes.eb3ace236429a9f31f1b7035680e874a0267a48e: Yes, I think I've killed a few of them as well.
textByHashes.08a73af77d9977fcf4733066a522fd52b911fa9f: I see, thanks for the warning.
textByHashes.b0fe83c7fc85687c91a51d9309753bb64a28072b: Well, I can hear something now you mention it...
textByHashes.36980c45f9d050dd709cc58ec808d68a414412f9: Err, all right, I'll get right on that.
textByHashes.962766bf9be206f60f0cc432936f7b163db164b5: I might well give it a shot.
textByHashes.9680e353444b546c72b212f8ff49032bcf1ad98b: Um, yes, very nice. Lots of... trees and stuff.
textByHashes.1adaf0049b2379adc9e51097f96ae8ace88d5df8: Sorry, I have a strange urge to be somewhere else.
textByHashes.e532b16a0ac44a13cba3658adc0ef86f2e099e91: No, I'm not interested in that.
textByHashes.a98deb96ee78ec091a59a6d7be5cd9b81f184601: Maybe. I could just like swimming around.
textByHashes.83a0370e15be80c05342d0d3236de05fb436f6b8: I'd like to enter a private instance please.
textByHashes.9bbcc1da179412d89680ff7d6fba309f5b450037: Can I pay for permanent access?
textByHashes.4a7d7c66cbe35eb61e8bb3d7269042b3765e720e: Shouldn't you be with your people or something?
textByHashes.2fe7d4212d1ec69d1f703483cc8b8ac2008950cf: How do I catch fish here?
textByHashes.7aa9bcea8071ea89678ee84cea4e480b07dc2c17: Yes, usually we use jute on a loom.
textByHashes.a4c14434f36b10cde291a380f1f8c0a14142673e: I'm . I'm using my magic to communicate with you.
textByHashes.67aa4cd1f3ffa1aba8c865a099679f9fc5b7dbc1: Hello my friend, Kolodion sent me down.
textByHashes.936b4b58c69efa40d986b5840015b848f7548ab1: I'm afraid I don't have it with me.
textByHashes.4d151a3d88b91d62099aef6559e5dc8cf15b24ef: Tell me what you know about the charge spell.
textByHashes.ee364fa31c50d0ae217b77c50068537cbedf1185: It's just too hot here. How can you stand it?
textByHashes.e2d852d0006b6faf30134c237c93741eb2a2faa2: Do you mind if I just kill your warriors?
textByHashes.ef8966f9de84a6cdcc303daa58b7ab4447f55044: I'll take that as a no. Forget I asked.
textByHashes.7f5db89334d51b37612ff65327bfa08ace9bb0d2: I'll just be over here if you need me.
textByHashes.25981fdf36ec17c75334ed488b7dbc37c2029043: Yes, but I don't want your fish.
textByHashes.3555fb0f38806b5a10e69cfca6a85719c6c55e5c: Possibly, do you have any quests?
textByHashes.5944634449c3e0548c9bc4113bc1d676f88ea9ae: A quest isn't a type of fish!
textByHashes.d27a4a669767100f6e62ae54099468115ca5a5c2: No I'm not! I've seen some freaky stuff! I can take it!
textByHashes.6ad7502d097e9561574394edcd8cea5276b72696: I think I'm gonna be sick...
textByHashes.3f2618f63505af39689bee335287e2e9b233de0c: Nice to meet you Charlie, my name is . What are you doing here?
textByHashes.d597bf5fd4b8be1ae953d100a08799800c5a52d7: If you're searching for luck, why are you dressed as a monk?
textByHashes.7e47951e044f270430be873dd258213ff970d184: God of Luck? I don't think I've heard of such a God...
textByHashes.cc012ada41f8fb3f898b2ba0a5735a41c9e52228: That sounds a little farfetched to me, luck isn't a thing. Hard work is all you need.
textByHashes.53266fc577c105d6a6b4dbb134e0a9a8f0bedc81: Hmmm... well good luck Charlie. Good bye!
textByHashes.3cb28642c3cf6b79c1784eb617b5c8443855b14d: Maybe another time, I must be going.
textByHashes.95cce57cf55f90bebe853bb9192d9f5f6198e0e3: So...don't I get some sort of quest hint or something now?
