textByHashes.0c85ab9a4c0375a028b2e1a31fade0cb560d5c55: Oh wait. I haven't got any, sorry.
textByHashes.595965ff1457116588929d09235cdf628d0fb820: What can I do for you?
textByHashes.f012f48f3202fd6bc024b6a916bfef19e25a511e: Sure, I'll be glad to help a person in need.
textByHashes.1d09316cc24c3bed6220de35e229c110880d2563: Where did you get the animals from?
textByHashes.8797a271b80ac0631362d1522c6f47efd59d2acf: Where on Gielinor did you get that scary looking Cyclops?!
textByHashes.6fca8b7537ca13ab460a861e2e00fc791b273f0d: Hi, how are you getting on with that ferret?
textByHashes.175d9120786b67ca5101695e87efff96b6f11c88: Hey, I've got another ferret if you're interested?
textByHashes.2443474a7406dd8cb5cf3443240357c33e389fca: You're lying. I can see right through you!
textByHashes.e951cfd1fe8baa0b5c3872b88798a7ecd49aa29e: Well, I can't really see YOU.
textByHashes.7e2413537278504356f07a14beeaa9219807af96: Junior Jim told me that you might be able to help me out with sea charting.
textByHashes.2cd5c49bf964629491a9a7eea22374a5c51982dd: I find that a little hard to believe...
textByHashes.f9a97e91ade6235796602c6077315287360c3cea: How do I go about charting the sea?
textByHashes.0ac44026d7cea6d975f86e92951ff15dd3b637ac: You say there are a few different things I might want to track. What are they?
textByHashes.c4c52f036f6142705a78f15e24eea12dcbac9794: Can you tell me about charting smaller points of interest?
textByHashes.c57c23d86e8dfa87730a03db405d5a62dba478b5: Can you tell me about charting larger points of interest?
textByHashes.587c9c505f7df309889b187b3a0d328ee18b03dd: But how do I know where a good spot is?
textByHashes.08237dc617907cd198b3369e9365aa31ffdda80a: Can you tell me about drink crates?
textByHashes.7f558e02d740c3695697ed46cd4bc35329090d97: I must admit, I'm not totally sure what these crates have to do with charting...
textByHashes.3c2ab0feabd5d79ae4058f67ad13b571ff0c85c9: Can you tell me about tracking currents?
textByHashes.a09811e0b8a963cb402be802f441f4239fc338d3: But once I spot them, how do I track them?
textByHashes.5c2351ee0fb51fd5ff4302a66420f2eedce1c5d2: Is this really the standard way of doing this?
textByHashes.7a4b5bb4fe67632230eaa7de6fd729114df92b36: Can you tell me about checking sea depths?
textByHashes.fbf9e4bad90fde31212fa0709ac55d54fa02f9db: Can you tell me about tracking weather patterns?
textByHashes.88bb088903f719e61875a2b98d415fff2d04fd82: Where can I find one of those?
textByHashes.28ab0417b79f2ee82fde95c90c7245da29408b25: What do I get from charting the sea?
textByHashes.5d224a8442f95669fd6533956b6a207078afc6c4: Can you offer me some training?
textByHashes.617c9a67d61dcdf4ed0777f902cf07256935daf1: Can you tell me about these shortcuts?
textByHashes.f370f3dd73bf6cdde6fa3e491c5207dd151701ad: Can you tell me about these drinks?
textByHashes.f1dc0694b13c633013da17ff20b10522b66a33da: Actually, let's talk about something else.
textByHashes.83ace53f3b7e75d739396a30e840a3f1ed79774d: Can you tell me about your parrot?
textByHashes.4cfebee389916afd89c12e4aa358c242f1526945: Hi, I need fuel for a lamp.
textByHashes.5ee29bcabb287ff941b6208e3e8159662bbcdf7e: Well I'd better let you get on then.
textByHashes.d41143bf1cea26a7f01788c3647bb086cc974c6f: I have a slightly odd question.
textByHashes.8bc5ce1e6988bb3ad2810874b584d1d0e68af0a1: Do you know how I might distil a mix of anchovy oil and flowers so that it forms a layer on the inside of a butterfly jar?
textByHashes.b613fc7987a3fb0c0ed7040f57b6161d12aaea2c: Apparently, if I can make a jar like this it will be useful for storing implings in.
textByHashes.8ced77c2d330b2efbf47a13dccfdbfc09fc82eb8: So, how do you make anchovy oil?
textByHashes.593f70cc36b1d6f0bbb7d167937fbee4a84e05cb: Do you have a sieve I can use?
textByHashes.28db42844cac938e1455b5992556f9c39a6aba21: Err, why? Actually, on second thoughts I don't want to know.
textByHashes.5abdc57bf7b3a0c16deecded9fb1357ab02cc04d: I'd better go and get the repellent.
textByHashes.ae2eaba297841ac90b1c53792b4fa798061552f1: Hello, what are you doing here?
textByHashes.cc10a50cecc987f4ac093d862b934f948e4e5eab: What brings you to Great Kourend?
textByHashes.aa8cf83de6a8127c308ff86175ee2cb3b2b97034: Would you look after my coral for me?
textByHashes.591f325c88af8a63ce2e951292dd0a480a6521de: I'd like to dismiss my servant, please.
textByHashes.5182d04f1860e8f912ab4897c4931e9c558e3d0c: Yes, I want to dismiss my servant.
textByHashes.0c18f106c2892f2a6284bf32e67d4096d408e62a: No, I'll keep my servant for now.
textByHashes.5ab85757eed0f935a6fd4323569e64a8d349fe0e: No thanks. I don't have any hides.
textByHashes.21de46a0650bdc34f466b4bc67cc5cc124b73388: Who are you and what do you sell?
textByHashes.5cfb26a38b795dd294c954779f1cedbd56080c75: About items that break when people kill me...
textByHashes.1ccec00434da27c9ba26bfc3b74fa01487db2d42: Can you stop them vanishing in deep Wilderness?
textByHashes.112753c96fd51af33ce4850e0b918f2877c0a6b2: Why would wild creatures be carrying magic parchments?
textByHashes.79f6f401086ea8f1bac1e3db5a7268cafa7bc312: But I just wanted to smith on it! It's right by a bank-
textByHashes.c06aa1f2d15883f36358fcfb1754ccee137b1376: Do you think you might leave the Realm?
textByHashes.557a643d5b9be2e6343da1e84fe65d90cd304312: I seek passage into the skavid caves
textByHashes.7bfd5638e48c8725b34e5e0c1b87a878e80cf10e: No, you're right, you don't see many around.
textByHashes.79357544baaf51b18b65239f402783af253e8ca6: I have a cat that I could sell.
textByHashes.fd903854a5f8de3eee5ad566bc0944844f797977: Say hello to a real mouse killer!
textByHashes.e852c786e5d1c360337eca53eb23fa99dcd43a94: Nope, I'm not parting for that.
textByHashes.ee677057ce219ffd39518a40528f1ad8cf572211: Ok then, you've got a deal.
textByHashes.3b982c330e2a7a1bef6e526f05a409222954503c: Nope, they're not easy to get hold of.
textByHashes.72b5d3ca305a2c7e9d859a5baed0be4685f2ad54: You must waste a lot of time?
textByHashes.78ed9c01c9055dffa12e2d68542ffd71a8a69f1f: So you do things differently to the druids of the mainland?
textByHashes.0c271de4f5bb54c3b38b1416a9bf01d274ca548d: I wanted to see what was down these stairs.
textByHashes.a5f3c65925c22bbe5d12980aa8dac07bebc61bf7: Oh... I think its best that I stay away then.
textByHashes.e3374b6971791cb17af579df60b0734e13e625c4: I'm actually quite skilled in Herblore. Would it be possible for me to join?
textByHashes.26a9813d563bb829e883bab3a448ba1af6a1f9a5: Don't worry, golem! You've done enough demon-slaying in your time.
textByHashes.2cd89f29e9f2ba3207e616d2e7649a99cd30a255: How do I join a clan?
textByHashes.cfa671a9223bafe501ff2372b3c9b3b6c808fbb7: What can a clan offer me?
textByHashes.f7c72e3e61d9b4afe358b92878d3c0d75327a794: Why would I need a Clan Hall? Can't I get a house instead?
textByHashes.60e3264062ec24ede0345d7cd6f151641b63ce73: Sure, but why are you here specifically?
textByHashes.f31fd58513bffc3198ba189e2dd50ef235f22117: I suppose this usually is a crowded place.
textByHashes.77d1b1248052d227bf95c5b41a0efa22c0acb1b1: I'm in a clan. Can you give me anything?
textByHashes.fe08d0a034e29bee3e1544ebdaffbbb5a5a37264: I suppose I'd better free up some space.
textByHashes.7a5ded8df110146a455e6f139a0185dacd037a68: That's alright, I haven't brought any.
textByHashes.20852bc47810f7add54eddd45322a6a4a9aa4914: Hey there. What brings you here?
textByHashes.acfe57c85d14fa7081e5bd42db903cb5e19f51e0: No, sorry, they can't have it.
textByHashes.c8507f2c0160539246d5194c2493e4cfb35bedac: I think I'd rather not wake him.
textByHashes.ef5286a90279f738667f4d2956536aaa8c774d5a: Why do you have an orange on your head?
textByHashes.5861103d14292091b43ecdd8a2150b24574e79b3: Er... Because it's not an item of clothing?
textByHashes.82eb70f2bf71ee99b48c863ff2147f8b04fb17d8: A slayer master told me to.
textByHashes.812bf7296ebc2ce50c878ada03169ed6f1232565: They pick on lots of other creatures too.
textByHashes.1a877f38502aafa7971a454b8e2e6b3b9a58739e: So I could mount your head on my wall.
textByHashes.da223c536cb3a8a9e460f96fd84a9c9fe56bf6bf: Don't take it personally! You look good on my wall!
textByHashes.8475fd4103856c4c4517fba387f72cf73cfe5003: You're dead, cockatrice. Your eyes are glass beads. It won't work.
textByHashes.1567cdabae692567bc004b23258f7d0aed37a549: Why is this town so heavily defended?
textByHashes.92db88c8f9aaa6bd3269f2d18fc87edbee8bbcac: I believe you might be able to reward me for my progress in this arena?
textByHashes.6ff20dadde182321f08bb595e68a8340d17cc20c: Can I trade some of my points?
textByHashes.eeb0b720416e5e45cbc54d08afb5c9fcceeae38e: What points do I have so far, sir?
textByHashes.90add19329b10d8265fb7672c564c37136a99489: Could I have a Queen Help book?
textByHashes.a800039da76ded04660b1fe116b30b1307858cc1: Oh, no. Wait, I don't have enough space to carry one.
textByHashes.e042e759223b5a19df8aeaa2a29791d926247d61: Could I have my current wave reset to one?
textByHashes.d9bafe7fa4e0f4dba020f435ce6a9ddd02f688af: Are the Royal Guard part of the Shayzien Army?
textByHashes.88beddbc109b6cbc3d4ed8f836ed489a96aba33a: Who's the current ruler of Kourend?
textByHashes.dad8d0338dcc06b65a988c3cfd4114844cf89fbb: Hey Lydia. How are things here?
textByHashes.85424df85584803fcc8138addac54082fc63b52d: Any news on Xamphur or the killer?
textByHashes.ca23bf6e91898569d995d84e23e406b32e197389: Thank you. I'll let you get on with your work.
textByHashes.58bd7b336fa6a0f7831f42e2002930e815dabf2a: It feels like there must be a bit of overlap between the Constabulary and the regiments, especially the Intelligence Corps.
textByHashes.5c76bc506976e1d2e721b3b13a55227312c447f0: So the Shayzien Army are also responsible for running the city?
textByHashes.038655429bd5705d636cd6e7ca9f297d71dc622f: Sure, I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.f59c4ad3da0c7bdf2303ffc34a2e77cceadc0c8e: Oops, I don't have enough coins on me...
textByHashes.0aa3db7ae27d7f58cc5922d0a2acd49a3e6fb5bc: How am I doing so far?
textByHashes.335fb9728b449f7f6c669feb57194fb18195138c: Excuse me, you don't look very happy. What's wrong?
textByHashes.724dbccf85a8be78f7db042ca6cc8a1dac4a1fa4: Fair enough. Now that you mention it, I would have expected the Easter Bunny to have turned up by now. You're sure you haven't seen him?
textByHashes.a3a0363305bfff5999b80ac5a814dc24716ed21c: Crates of carrots you say? Woods to the south?
textByHashes.fc2068f0fd18ce1b399373bf03070ec51cc1ca70: You wait right here sir, I've got a hunch...
textByHashes.0411f87b08822903de62f9d9effaae2fe7927fb4: No, a hunch. About the carrots.
textByHashes.8e5493628e0d063496a7cfb3e4efcb866f4b0c48: No... Just... I'll be back later! I need to investigate some rotten vegetables.
textByHashes.4dad8744755ec835b28c86976b799fb67b44bf92: Wait, what was I thinking about? Oh nevermind, it's gone. Can't have been that important I suppose.
textByHashes.b205d8f7f0282ca02a50f57d94e45d7a07d00433: I'm a bit busy at the moment.
textByHashes.255720c62f1fab03ee12a2846022bc1ba0ae72ec: Yeah, where did you say that crate was again?
textByHashes.a865f8e77501e11de2091ab0b5680bf824db405c: Great. That was all me you know.
textByHashes.5d47089051a3f01e3c2e7ce7878638083fa5c147: I'm still too busy to talk to you.
textByHashes.12f6e3e8bcc33096738519d5fe00d4edc0c1d91e: Well, that's not something you hear everyday...
textByHashes.57e7df1e3063b5d6f06e65213dcd198d79a40183: Could you tell me about crystal singing?
textByHashes.c131d791ab127ee8ba8d0e28364ea569818d19a2: Wow. Is there any way I could do it?
textByHashes.e143c93cea827fd4c28ed7eac8cb0638fbafd385: Could you do it for me?
textByHashes.fbd31101ce081cffca4817e21882e28c840c59b0: Could you sing a song for me?
textByHashes.7fb815ba22e82645fa78321930a5bee827ced354: No, thank you. I'd just like to hear you sing.
textByHashes.9332add9abb0e656a8378da15659af8674bf7822: Can you sell me any food?
textByHashes.57190e649fa77b3a92090f4d7eeaabbe5006b597: Oh, I haven't got any money.
textByHashes.550dd729f105d7a99b04220f6c2e7d42a7a8a544: Oh, I haven't got enough space to carry it.
textByHashes.72d9fdc108aba676b941c73b0fa51962ac1dac76: No thanks, I don't like cabbage.
textByHashes.3ac32d2dbd6816f151eb55239955424a33492596: Can you give me any free food?
textByHashes.58cfb0a23945481bd7eb4aac88e0f32aae63fa6a: Why should I give you free money?
textByHashes.9c515beee1acb3e39b030f9388640383ed2b8f9d: I don't want anything from this horrible kitchen.
textByHashes.250d6100481c3ac1034e04d05cfa6c5179c6aeae: Well, you're meant to be a cook. Why can't you cook something for me?
textByHashes.00f7a999a2497a9b42937afe1b3b3a1272d93f6b: You're not a very nice man.
textByHashes.f3458af6ecfd7b18042490fc197054031d6841fa: Good point. I should stop that.
textByHashes.0e797156ce4335316a057534884c0856a94dfd8e: Maybe you should think about moving to a different inn.
textByHashes.e3114ab8b453562dee4a0e84655bd7216260e174: Can you tell me any good jokes?
textByHashes.450fcae9e4846704885b3a79a5f175e86c6fbbc9: I am getting strong and mighty. Grrr
textByHashes.55e617ad5728605c3a8eea6d3214fc9e4df9211d: Will it mean my food will burn less often?
textByHashes.ac714bd46c0e40e80fa8c22156c80a8135a2b053: Can you teach me the basics of cooking please?
textByHashes.005443d71ae9c4597deec7929a214fd511651af8: I already know the basics of cooking. Got any tips?
textByHashes.3ad63f4d72b9cc1401987f9f4b1da5d6e5677ec4: Any advice for an advanced chef?
textByHashes.c19de6ef4327d16f52fd8e3ffe203686f73be90e: How can I train my cooking?
textByHashes.6ec0d362870769bff435ec1b9f7aa79c4e9dcbdf: What kinds of things can I cook?
textByHashes.504a644c3082e98211169ad5606fca6c201737f6: Tell me about Fish and Meat.
textByHashes.404e10822d96ad2553102941fd9deaf4484fc384: Tell me about Pies and Pizzas.
textByHashes.c64617dfc27047f3c97a5067b37cdad056607a53: Hello to you too. You must be Weasel then.
textByHashes.34dc07fdb5325112d8d96bab13364a2153ea7bc4: Is that why you're down in this hole?
textByHashes.b28da8ba7ccce90d08cd9c1a45b473fbef39c565: Good grief, this is going to be a long day.
textByHashes.37a41c0e6ab6fa860ec1dfc4b38f151e5b321864: I said Wheeler told me you might have some extra nice carrots I could use?
textByHashes.ba2f94ceee2faa2c1a99b24140a2572289b52665: I want to make some special carrot juice for the Easter Bunny, to try and cheer him up.
textByHashes.a69352396716aff3a474eff064ebdc8ba81349d6: I need another carrot, I lost one.
textByHashes.7deda55f9d770456ba29696883922067e362a2d4: I need more carrots, I lost some of them.
textByHashes.f6b57ed9bd7b39bac2ea177e1781768f36c6fcd3: I need more carrots, I lost them all.
textByHashes.59df78ae4ae2fb8abffcd69b48b21943e0c00858: I'm sure I would remember eating such a delicous, sweet, crunchy, orange, juicy...
textByHashes.0627b81cf0c29fb3fdf5e910fa2da2b00560ed56: Oh yeah, oops. This time I will make the juice. Promise!
textByHashes.b9a25f8f3d49273c63c1d3341e8894338cc78aad: Not only that, I drank the juice!
textByHashes.4d57e3ba3eb527620ca1874c231b8d06e5512e83: Good news! The Easter Bunny loved the juice I made with your fancy carrots!
textByHashes.c4916caa249befd1fa11179edeb0f5159d6c54d1: I don't want any carrots I'm just here for eggs!
textByHashes.3997d89ad6a36d8e039d7d4c16b50a94cdecd158: I'd like to learn the rules of combat in this arena!
textByHashes.b349706ac763aa434f88d71de6fcbb8ffdaf41d8: Can you explain Bounty Hunter Points to me?
textByHashes.4b7f285521543d6dc7c4157e5edc02a038ca06c1: How do I get bounty crates?
textByHashes.0708d85fc2b12773385a7b6c299dfad4d189c2cc: Can you corrupt my Ancient Warrior armour?
textByHashes.33708e5f0e3a8d745c0ebfbc198a1fb643d1761c: Do you know anything about Bounty Hunter hats?
textByHashes.1bff78418341bd99f4757cb7a5bee7ba9635d620: Oh wonderful, can I take a look?
textByHashes.f4f9de8259e992f0e6b2fd827ca7018579a212e3: Can you tell me my current EP value?
textByHashes.8032901d912309ffd02edafd675a613d8e7c5b57: Can I access my Bounty Hunter coffer?
textByHashes.92e917b31845c7184413617094b1639cc17f280f: Mysteries of existence, eh? Like what?
textByHashes.a4687b55916a722a570989b05cc8331c4551f2de: Aww, what a cute cat! I better not wake it up.
textByHashes.2e8257960bef6c98edb9f2248f4c08b980fca189: I certainly wouldn't hand you over for any runes, you're too adorable.
textByHashes.e1cd9e77f4422a4d068b1950d86b398fba6dadaa: I wasn't planning on it, no.
textByHashes.71d494f8fd42264d5c20cc8754d69b9436931848: Tell me about the Kourend Council.
textByHashes.3443d903b1400cd75ade0f3dbc0995ce98847fe6: So where do the five houses fit in?
textByHashes.21a212a684748569d53c8bb8e09203af03c5f3c1: Well I do enjoy it when people get what they deserve.
textByHashes.d07847581401539fc9fad5315b535a4171923e9f: You never had any power. You were just a puppet. You've always been nothing, and that's all you'll ever be.
textByHashes.6952e83516ada9960985b795fb37d320eda7c062: Enjoy your cell, puppet. Won't be seeing you.
textByHashes.8d3e5b7d5fe604b98eb4ed4fa8f6edbffc3a8fea: Do you need me to help again?
textByHashes.0f5ebb83d380d0a8638fb6e039dbe939c837bfcc: Not that I know of, sorry.
textByHashes.505be18919fa4f66159ffefdb2681ce393f869a1: Well you'd better get used to it. This is where you'll spend the rest of your life, however long that ends up being.
textByHashes.ecced0ee436efe950f45ef3b4ce66ef3d6daa9f1: I'm sure they'll be just fine. If anything, I imagine they're better off without you.
textByHashes.6db35efb3f78b235730f5060461c2f2204bc70a4: Something you're all too aware of, I'm sure.
textByHashes.d5e55cba7559f3f63f143fa291de2c6b40566041: Can you give me any advice?
textByHashes.03847cf0d8216fbd378358ffed9419e47d0011ac: What's that got to do with THREE?
textByHashes.ba0be684358578bf546c23e13cd230226216966d: Where can I learn more about security?
textByHashes.f66d96708858bdaca36de7d850499b726a61b74a: If you're a vampyre, how did you cross the Salve?
textByHashes.5af8d39bac283113d8273d7c3452be6168750590: Well, not a ghost, but... well... you're a vampyre aren't you? Shouldn't you be in Morytania?
textByHashes.d016063f5cbf6dc373ac22cd1ff860386bda76f9: Terrible news? Peril? I don't like the sound of this. Is there something I should know?
textByHashes.149a725e0ab7749ae50aeffe246e70f7dd76723c: Can you check to see if my account is secure?
textByHashes.3bdf78bdd2b21683f09b03258b8244cde5317678: A unique password that I don't share, and 2 step verification on my email... got it.
textByHashes.24fcb1a1967caac0520e0d87d9a7b54476f0f927: Is there an easy way to remember all these account security things?
textByHashes.7edef1de30f3a1942a770c995affb17a194b175c: Is there somewhere I can learn more about account security?
textByHashes.9a509ee2e70ea034fa3e023e7815aa802bc7bd3f: How can I train my crafting?
textByHashes.75c338256fe95c3681c1355569d4f4f48b283372: What kinds of things can be crafted?
textByHashes.13b7d5a7a5f2832c39259d1a81ef4433a7bcbb4a: must be pretty handy to have slayed that!
textByHashes.8b5764a2444d8446bd197d44099a5682eec94cc3: Hey, I was going to make some furniture, do you think you could lend a HAND?
textByHashes.d4a732bf4005fec6295da29dba77c05df9923c11: Hey, hand, do you want to know how I slayed you?
textByHashes.a40e2bb37368c8fabfb520e94e511362ec5c450f: Because you're just a hand! You're ARMLESS!
textByHashes.6d2570aa64bb7ab856cb7eeaec80fa935aa2e632: Hey, you're just a hand, right? So what do you eat?
textByHashes.95b73932fc8d6ee1ad4ba7bd207a61c0b285c262: Where did you get that lens?
textByHashes.442a0509cd21dc35c365639b15c7b43e8ee98a8d: Ah, well, I suppose it's of no use. But, still.
textByHashes.c1dbb71956d188d05284fdb6ea4160fdee94f24c: I'm not sure I want to manage a crew now...
textByHashes.672d8e76fb37b0c39c4f035d2e68bc4557f49fe7: How are you getting drunk on blood?
textByHashes.ae9774b2e172031ef33e6730e72d9acd63ec0cb8: What is it you do here?
textByHashes.6a9744ef762e0f09963c0283a4f4f4df57790ee9: Seven? That's quite a specific number.
textByHashes.9b4f801303979600c2898a474edc9b160032610c: Hello. Nice day for a walk, isn't it?
textByHashes.beba556cab0eea00fb3ea25af7041d6bf12b0690: I'm glad you're just out here for a walk. A more suspicious person would think you were waiting here to attack weak-looking travellers.
textByHashes.8e5dd469b8164b989a44992d50ee48c0022a9d48: No, but I can't imagine it pays well.
textByHashes.621e355cd229606b1ee9145be2ca3a58f6f616e3: Sounds like a fun and varied routine.
textByHashes.63eaff9a29eabc9d8592ddbdf66be7b67242d170: I've got some questions regarding Fossil Island.
textByHashes.0e3bc53621d5293ffe9019b2d629c88e15dfdb3e: What can I do with fossils I find on Fossil Island?
textByHashes.c63aa1e839b4b0e5205463ec019f819fcc6faf05: Do you know where I could find any treasure?
textByHashes.358ab7302026910c39fcb2cfa9a7f2e7135eb6f2: No, I meant treasures for ME.
textByHashes.20e5be8d02bbf0039c1ab9c3540fce2f6802d88a: I have some relics you might be interested in.
textByHashes.004a0a9f7e2aca16ae4a01f3855d4c94566c9529: I found them in some ruins underneath Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.c9d0b8a6896bd453a30c32c0b57d5706687a82c9: Just one person - an Imcando dwarf named Ramarno. He said the city was called Camdozaal.
textByHashes.697aa205499ee56c78b84c93cf55ebf35e8334db: Not on purpose! It's a long story.
textByHashes.9554a3df414e95de31c3b5248423da33ba16dc5f: I found it encased in ore. I had to crack it open and chip off the hardened parts. This was underneath.
textByHashes.7db55ee71e9a18da655d1216808db1e696bb501b: I found a strange relic while salvaging...
textByHashes.d6accf9c343d8f3e84b4694c19c7953a9bd680f6: Actually, I think I'll keep it.
textByHashes.ba6cfe34cd14546b2411206fa1b4dfeeaccef094: Do you think they're all connected somehow?
textByHashes.35046280d3c87f059f0e77206a698f3de7b83b1a: Are... you sure? You said some strange things a moment ago.
textByHashes.b037f2b80559ddc1fe1b5121bf12382ed9f2f55b: Could you tell me more about the early history of Varlamore?
textByHashes.e5d4812c0c74e70c98796c2fbd21c5859a8a4e92: Was there any friction between these groups initially?
textByHashes.87cc8e713adbb8b0ecce0e1f0296de7f716a4a73: But that's not the case now, right? What brought them together?
textByHashes.f49cc65d4e8d140653cf8217ffc10e56a681329c: So are there still distinctions between the Talkasti and the Pericans now?
textByHashes.e4444f17d52eabe9d89b834246bdc6da21558519: I see. So where did the name Varlamore come from.
textByHashes.13d9978c6727af98fbab1cf08714f9db14a89d3e: That was all super interesting! Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.5e82f49b656ae8b94841cdff09a01f7c7081e693: I'd better get going. Thanks again.
textByHashes.2a7beb364c8a2ef9bf44b45fd11f97e2b6846627: Could you tell me more about religion in Varlamore?
textByHashes.2a040c218af9ada13f5d5f555a54072b5549bd9f: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks.
textByHashes.ec5d4eb75e5429212f3cc7f9842c0f79a35fa967: Could you tell me more about Varlamore's recent history?
textByHashes.c0423a39377c62892a0fdf3ce460af7e9d369f83: I'll have to keep an eye out for them.
textByHashes.b0ff8c5e33f1883d266fbca301f93efd66b14d67: So how has the kingdom changed since Imafore died?
textByHashes.82d4693fcba9d7285cb4fe5a113d71ed70025efb: Well then I should be very thankful. Without him, I might never have been allowed to visit!
textByHashes.7d42ca2b6783a3f2f4fa2643da979151f4102a52: That definitely sounds much more fun. Thanks for all the information.
textByHashes.22dd1e088480ea68f916b3f51a7b2dd650c5cc3d: Thanks. If I have any questions, I'll be sure to ask.
textByHashes.ab3469058ad6f7f72e66975cad4ebb8e9e1fee89: There it goes! Now to follow it and see where this current flows.
textByHashes.608f2ba5f5ec8779ad3b4d00e24162b111f0fe2a: But I just want to ask you something.
textByHashes.f6aaf5e283a0c3da195951e4ead72fe5f39d0481: I think it's mostly fame and riches I'm after.
textByHashes.7d14a70bdffd1e315ecc22ee9b3bfd892349618f: Or perhaps you could let me travel for free?
textByHashes.8e6066d7b3b143852a907f544dabbe6388746c71: Thanks for your help in finding the Myreque.
textByHashes.8c12c44c717e188e819a769e61027c2457c2208f: Hmm, yeah, I know how you feel.
textByHashes.2f4cb348ef7ec1796af939ad1fa167b6fa2519e7: Yes. I'll pay the ten gold.
textByHashes.b025fb7d7cfc7c87c4caca8374a6bcc0611825b6: No. I won't use the boat.
textByHashes.90012b0883fadc54a1bb578c1d40b58cdf5e71a3: How about you let me use the boat for free?
textByHashes.d34788fc1f14b060efac7c75a8222613011f8927: Hello mate. What are you up to now?
textByHashes.291073927a3d32bc378289cc9e9f94f979161831: Ooooh, I bet you're travelling across the seas. Or maybe you're visiting the world leaders?
textByHashes.3f0583f134bcf63dbe0b6db58188408348cf0417: What adventure are you now on?
textByHashes.f8dff33f809a89507ef747e9d11af27af23b6aaa: I should warn you, you'll need a team to take that beast on.
textByHashes.c75c13c2e45542bf6d0bc5c19b5aa4824c22d260: Wow! I wish I could witness that!
textByHashes.9625a28e9e2026498a1b1a88d2d728977945849a: I suppose I have. What issues are you going to be discussing in this meeting? Who will be there?
textByHashes.9dd2b96cf43e7c6b40adc2566c8fe4900a6c22e1: Hey there, where are you now?
textByHashes.60a5108810cd5cbd64b78b8dec5b61a4bdb50241: Watch out! He's going to attack you!
textByHashes.b10fe24fe84f6907ba802e45a97f466e3ea6e55f: They're in a clan, they're going to fight you!
textByHashes.8c0778fac656149a06cce6c5f900af79d7432850: Some kind of life extending potion?
textByHashes.d367692fcfc159e043677d8f7d94d6abfafc794e: Do you think you can recreate this elixir?
textByHashes.e160ebe10a064df1fca0e1f5ec8662b2ee484317: Can't say I've met anyone that springs to mind.
textByHashes.4f3c61d3cecff3875e13cbc39beb23e6d601d532: I'm world renowned at herblore. Perhaps I can help?
textByHashes.21a46998e4275b2106b1a0b1e72f8677640a4be1: The one roaming around lighting candles? He doesn't seem totally with it.
textByHashes.c7b588bc24bfc56a59f8871211747efea537d445: Well then, if you do find the missing notes, I'm always happy to help.
textByHashes.6d1d92d79f5226bf0886d248c485749a3d9a431c: Do you have any Dragon Scimitars in stock?
textByHashes.cb55d19362cf5d81b466e643b47c4b9c8f8ad6c8: Err... Nothing. Just checking that your cowbell was working. Don't want you to get lost!
textByHashes.4a976c2ecf690eace2d7e48409a3d8175429b3a7: I don't think you'll believe me.
textByHashes.d88a0f3be45be65c21153e547db5bf0af87f27c7: Fine. I need the bell to trick some penguins into helping me get into their secret lair.
textByHashes.d5937b588875983009d601f497dfa98c924e1022: I was wondering what this place was?
textByHashes.82afd6750afdae8cdde2134a198a4c62c9d8b082: Why is the tunnel so short?
textByHashes.bfcf0a3c0e191fd8bb5cebdbfffdb3cd2c2f682e: Oh, I think I see. So it is like a magical alternate route?
textByHashes.d9adcb256eeb3a8fcf721bc325943c9289dafcdf: Why are there only three of you?
textByHashes.f5d63d5caed70cd262f15b9b6c5bca381a2b4305: Where are the rest of you now?
textByHashes.52c7f0e9e84b2e5c8e2696b86a94bcfd473b5b61: You seem quite nice for a Zamorakian.
textByHashes.bfdf38fe4e1fb3ba8dcca53df14660e4a0bb1fbc: Why do you want to go to Paterdomus?
textByHashes.ed1dbb079787b128fd452a4cb2ad17b6258bd2cd: Could you defend yourself if we met enemies on the route to Paterdomus?
textByHashes.dcfed3a6ab505a2eba59245e908c2bbf8671c589: I can take you to Paterdomus.
textByHashes.a599e90a3e0734201065d04ca233679f85b3840d: That sounds like hard work, what's in it for me?
textByHashes.72a8ef089be010e2c451a051d8f593215c5252a6: Thanks for the information, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.5fb60effa0084d06136f908ab353392e4f33cb7a: Sorry to disturb you, but what are you two doing here?
textByHashes.2300cda60b57c80fd0c0d42d9c0e05e58218b725: Clearly. I'll let you two lovebirds carry on, then.
textByHashes.7e9a79e257802292730104ab9ce620a641f55fb6: Why do you sell this stuff? The Crystal Bow is so much better.
textByHashes.b17940760b31a6f90922ff0fb25f7c2ed2b9beda: You seem to really enjoy that painting.
textByHashes.76b3b61b73aaec7ba27e4be80ef5b063d7335917: Ah very friendly I see. What's that coffin on your back?
textByHashes.02f16a8b99dc07204bfafcd044e41c0c9900b2ff: Woah, don't tell me you have a body in there?
textByHashes.ba78277fec85d58e3cc9d237682b1d5bff70c441: Oh, you carry the remains of shades in it? Could you give me one?
textByHashes.d02e0573988e44bfd84eeed76cb74a2c72ae4945: It's broken? What am I suppose to do with a broken coffin?
textByHashes.c5d3f921f60b16e15993818f28a84c1875ffd114: Right... Guess I should head into the catacombs then... see if I can find any of these 'locks'.
textByHashes.15feac9e64f78706eee082b7635cc6f65ba00c3e: Ah, as cheerful as ever I see.
textByHashes.6e3575706d0572ad6a44c8a76f9bfd46bcf58e06: You gave me a broken coffin, what am I suppose to do with it?
textByHashes.0e6e9e416d77fc248dd36ad6395d4fa70bdd75e7: Right... and where am I suppose to find such locks?
textByHashes.fd43d8227c82f7d0f6b1cc050d464d02d41ef05c: I found one of the locks you were talking about, I think.
textByHashes.03f206aa66bfecf8ffb012d1886339343b16e613: No thanks, I'm going to hang on to it for now.
textByHashes.39b9037f39dde030bc442c89ebd9e5076db78754: Could I get another of those coffins?
textByHashes.f2cf67cff8a4c196150a6a9b28862a4a8fa229b0: Nothing, I just wanted to chat.
textByHashes.dbfc3c9bd552d9d36cfcd920f4278a4794065fb4: Can you fix this for me?
textByHashes.2ebddcd913233ae33b1aa598585d2bddae40f79c: Hey, I found this lock in the catacombs? Can you do anything with it?
textByHashes.d4f40fa2ea7c640de8124db73944eec14167673e: I think I'll pass on that.
textByHashes.cb25fac147f55904cb253337136035870b27a670: I need your help with something.
textByHashes.f8793cf2260bc8a8abfe1283c04396be24af523c: Can I have another Abyssal book?
textByHashes.c052def0e8edb818e0d969d3d432148df937951a: Can I have a new essence pouch?
textByHashes.1e248bcc8706bf866b6673eefdf37c11cb3cf7e4: Actually, I don't need anything right now.
textByHashes.6bb0bd5963638e31fad194d0a40e5ac85b183976: Can you recharge my Staff of Iban?
textByHashes.ff1292605a8ec58ddd4464fab69a92c8d7843c75: Can you upgrade my Staff of Iban?
textByHashes.c6691c742e04eec9f29d1b5702dd53ba21562d87: Thanks, I'll bear it in mind.
textByHashes.40fb73da69e323de90158da6c6efe46cb6ab3701: Can you repair my broken Staff of Iban?
textByHashes.2a1bf13bb548ac75c319646ff4dae82a3195175d: Here's 200,000 coins. Please repair the staff.
textByHashes.188123f70c7169f59d742e85d91e01597e67ef9e: Can you make it hold more than 120 charges?
textByHashes.d71b2518043254ead6e6d67bd8dc61eedb132989: Hello! What are you doing here?
textByHashes.2ee8b067794ce14a2162b645fb8fee3eb9c8adfe: What rumours have you heard exactly?
textByHashes.993da3c7aff26077a61354479365b4a00125ff42: Do you know where in the mountains these ruins are?
textByHashes.ab04c92a4c6c752491173f9856602f98186b6891: If you say so, good luck.
textByHashes.6e636c4a65b026eb4e77b09c79a34411005cbce8: Would you like me to give you a hand with that?
textByHashes.21f3eaceec865b364259cfe40486738683c26308: Why are you searching this coffin?
textByHashes.33279d1c94e6403fa02a5ed624c9360c2da1a84c: 100 seems like a lot. How many do you have so far?
textByHashes.e6aae5c4d7b95f1e3c0587efb62622c4af510ae8: I happen to have 100 Hallowed marks on me. I can give you some if you'd like?
textByHashes.abab7bfe30d648a42e739d743d979540af18da1a: On second thoughts, I think I'll keep them for myself.
textByHashes.da296e57e2160d12113997934fc03b43607a585c: Sure. I'll probably find more while I'm down here anyway.
textByHashes.9dbe1bae65ffd2487dd60ffcbe4d3e2d5dbc3d79: It feels nice to do the right thing.
textByHashes.b3ce501981dce8f950c1df46d84f12803dbdc4f5: Wait, why are you still here? I gave you the 100 Hallowed marks you need to escape.
textByHashes.b853a53f10b3d12289d35edd2f0f66283214c3b2: Can you show me the way to the mines?
textByHashes.bd4ad48c3fcdbbb058ace7a0cd6f62ee31911fcd: Can you show me the way to Lumbridge Castle cellar?
textByHashes.ef2ffd1b1225db8ae25ba28640fa5b2ec5ef9ee8: Hey, I'm one of you guys! See this pendant?
textByHashes.1308d22eb6b2d2c31705c6bcdd20547f43847481: No one sent me, I'm just nosy.
textByHashes.b757da3448a706ed39dc92429bb1a2171db3cb2b: I'm sure you're a much better bodyguard than me, but perhaps I can help in some non-bodyguarding way?
textByHashes.9022a809d421af1d54889ba2fb7aac0fe9068ac0: So, what are we looking for?
textByHashes.c2c5d61b2dec3e5a61154ab17de654536f2bf80a: Okay, I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.1e5f39c1a4ccd40cd29c4feb18fda92f47589e6b: I don't think I need anything.
textByHashes.207b2561718f9a61035540b65ea0fc65a6f8e838: Good! Everything seems to have worked out ok.
textByHashes.f25335c89d578354966308e56336c14a774a9961: What? The Holy Wrench? But I lost it somewhere...
textByHashes.18520f9800cd681318f509d46bb16e1d670305b0: You must be really tired from the journey, you did so much.
textByHashes.048e98e3c3e42e01c11c470a069f8df908b688c8: I guess I'll get building then...
textByHashes.7e93b26023e4468192f02a10e0eda59fd2697277: The birds here are a little exotic, apparently.
textByHashes.b58e11d12bf4475ccfb5c83f699ad1871d6c04a9: What if I gave you a box?
textByHashes.fe86be78d5e81bc93a6adbcfcbdd73034b965fbe: If not a box, then what about a fox?
textByHashes.2c3b1d229e17e71a613870a0f9d1ffd89a9e6fe1: A mouse, a house? Would these change your mind?
textByHashes.57b5889f7685804692d12c947915c67f1405c7ec: I will! I promise! Just try them and you'll see.
textByHashes.86492e1d9caeb9eacf48f25d0c9b1b3552e6dda1: Where do these fossils come from?
textByHashes.bea8c3fd282c25e40f115d137389cb28bb7a4241: What can I do with these fossils?
textByHashes.aff04902ff31a881a3477018e26c96355882fd56: What can you tell me about some of the fossil displays?
textByHashes.ceed46a0bb68388629e4864b7f07025559915703: The one that looks like a great leviathan.
textByHashes.90baa91147a32bb46a18f5ba54e17372a1bfc1cb: The one that looks like a foot print of a mythical animal.
textByHashes.cd9be3d164c20e2eaca6542f2c0654d8df737aa8: The one that looks like an imprint of a posterior.
textByHashes.de22423083ddc8b570c643d3584af00c2ae0ca0f: The one that looks like a zygomite.
textByHashes.f68ede310c60a7f2a9cfea6ac179f674896ada7a: The one that looks like a snake in the shape of a hoop.
textByHashes.6d79d078fa43f8265d170e159b2f9cf9eaa48222: The one that looks like a clam shell.
textByHashes.fa5f8378c1b97673611effa98e9ef8da8d8e24af: The one that looks like a 'big' foot print.
textByHashes.a3195cc3e7487c4763144c8b8c503ee213a53a61: The one that looks like a crab shell.
textByHashes.8302b03c0485eca895c4c59464d8bccce0346bce: The one that looks like a cyclopse with two heads.
textByHashes.32dd7442d892492fc53952e0467192733c7cbd8c: The one that looks like it could be used for fuel.
textByHashes.3cb0656f7876ac8d7b0c0d77fa9a4dbbe8aee744: The one that looks like a tar creature.
textByHashes.5389a1705d2af4700086908769a6b10838a4b6be: The one that looks like a giant dragonfly.
textByHashes.a02c0046eb5ef91c4427daf4346503e5502f5cb5: The one that looks like an ancient cave painting.
textByHashes.d9b82eaf1bc3c115d88a5cab08ed245163b1200a: The one that looks like a person with a fish tail.
textByHashes.311deca62a472ce8b75ec33cb2b79080f3fb1ed6: The one that looks like a lava creature.
textByHashes.015a3388ba7ebed5d5bff5b236d701866afb59e9: The one that looks like a pufferfish.
textByHashes.0480044e61be21b0958a5477fe20b6412d921814: The one that looks like a dragon skull.
textByHashes.1f21bc484c35ae4689ed4de178dcbaf024edc4d9: The one that looks like a squirrel with huge teeth.
textByHashes.097d20378ad38a11564338eb463fd938fa09a350: The one that looks like a dragon egg.
textByHashes.058f8be855806b63f501686bd08e9562ad561298: The one that looks like a cross between a mushroom and kangaroo.
textByHashes.9325271dc866576d8fd2d3b8cbc7109f28f0afa8: The one that looks like an unusual lobster.
textByHashes.0cdc339529cf9d43039f86e1950d67554a55dc25: The one that looks like a creature with a giant skull and small body.
textByHashes.4c5ecc7338995d2c9dc5581256382f69ec5a1b8a: The one that looks like a tree sized mushroom.
textByHashes.58bd999fdaafae2f72e4aaa653b17b2bd4ea5a5c: The one that looks like scary mushrooms.
textByHashes.64f72a0cd5134fb5d00e40e88cbfd75912622020: The one that looks like a tortoise with a mushroom on its shell.
textByHashes.6b24d3abec7a8f3f45a299569859e55a5431c85f: The one that looks like a huge pitcher plant.
textByHashes.63bee2f3598f8df5bd39969150e2de87464bf60a: The one that looks like a cross between a dark beast and a shark.
textByHashes.f6001e1d44ab99c0e32898de36e337254ae83810: The one that looks like a merfish with legs.
textByHashes.2616160108bece5696aa28fb949aef6db4daa1f9: The one that looks like a plant with a stack of mushrooms.
textByHashes.69bd41026237efcf7ed2aa864828dcb66fe4bcdd: The one that looks like a big mushroom.
textByHashes.871e2bd7a22f0e02ef2f9bc16b42b9547bee742b: The one that looks like a toucan with two heads.
textByHashes.88e0d4b998206333a2571f8d5162dc30f2bbdbd5: The one that looks like a bird with a snail shell on its back.
textByHashes.7456b57955af80b259163a71b26a1395bd03c624: Do you know much about this display?
textByHashes.9ffc2dc157c1e270bc2a6096f1bd7330f8835c7f: Aren't you going to tell me about the display?
textByHashes.8e12b2f073122c4f0ecad378f5759771d6af481c: Why don't you ever restock some types of amulets?
textByHashes.4eab2d8ad419fb9e29468d66a6aaeeee1451b0b2: Your decorations leave a bit to be desired.
textByHashes.4d4aa7148bb9d6635d9d701137359b6f3dbc442c: Yes, have you got anything for me?
textByHashes.af778da7b1360811446d4bcf314d0be92cc3e70b: Can I choose a different-looking gravestone?
textByHashes.5158d26e491521fa888af3d48b3ee81bc0d802f3: Yes, I understand other people won't often see it.
textByHashes.63252c75fd1b4d9d8e916c85effe75abcfef8027: No thanks, it's not worth it.
textByHashes.1d7f09f9c00224ec5b048642349fc11403c644d0: Yes, I want the basic gravestone.
textByHashes.3c3d2dbc7f860b5dcf2eef4576774b9b6d3ef467: Can I change how I die?
textByHashes.c4042bb55473fb98bf17c66d90754d8e424ba72b: I lost items? Can I get them back?
textByHashes.1ab6aff6ad3ad4b371ae97c613d5780632c9f7a8: How do I pay a gravestone fee?
textByHashes.9e1c982ab0587fa71c3f8758146fa32fe3745509: How long do I have to return to my gravestone?
textByHashes.88f2256d26fa714294620638df2fde747d684976: How do I know what will happen to my items when I die?
textByHashes.3e142d05800c46e81983cf4b657d4ea34cd357f1: So what can I do here?
textByHashes.15ae66e967873a031f971f22e4b9d74b79a27b32: If I remember correctly, it was the High Priest of Sophanem who gave it to me.
textByHashes.d24a57d0b670512d4090f472288b01c164cc1c8d: What are the creatures inside the gardens?
textByHashes.de25137dd7bf1242d21725efb969f34ba6b13ae6: Thanks, I have another question though.
textByHashes.0b206288fd5bf071b35963ca3e1a753c4e2f0848: How do you get into the seasonal gardens?
textByHashes.8d101ab1f2f0d3cdf60bd5be07ef94209f298ed9: How is it that the gardens are in different seasons?
textByHashes.6aba4dbd7bf032590248ef1038193e6df232782a: So you've been stuck here since?
textByHashes.996ee46398fc4d05a89047c62e1729463917d5ed: I think I know someone else who may be in a similar position.
textByHashes.92dd598776c57a5ba2bb706c51fe9d01dca5bb4a: Are you a famous adventurer who was turned into a cat by a vindictive mage?
textByHashes.18ab569f12a475326e7ee911885bf0fe23414f38: In that case, can you tell me anything about sq'irks?
textByHashes.745c9d2261b1a1120caafb8a8c10a325d445a08f: Excuse me, I just want to-
textByHashes.7f2ccebb41db2a7417e642858cacfda00cc5e11c: I er... well, who are you?
textByHashes.b1a0a20f2d855455980bcb6031be31acac0c24eb: So, can I ask you dwarves a few questions?
textByHashes.f9e8fcb1b8591400eca6cfe4b6fabc45fe493816: Just stopping by for a chat.
textByHashes.7350746f0db84a453bbbb44cb3471c5ee02f991a: Any good spots to fish around here?
textByHashes.dcd4063d7208e0f9e132701159181ebea721ae38: What are these mines used for?
textByHashes.3605829c2618abf3472b3fa3d523bdf56b873393: Mining companies? Where are they at then?
textByHashes.da83b769776b774ac72f13a724a1064f7ccad947: Can you help me with this rock down in the mines?
textByHashes.4256547000ff6fe37c18ebd5ad1d6f676ff10167: It seems to be unbreakable. I need to know why.
textByHashes.ab89b52df2f49835752bf3c137d4cfc3ef900846: What material would break that rock? You know, the impenetrable one?
textByHashes.e394df1c248029866cecf553d0472e6edfba3699: Do you know anyone named Rolad? Some kind of a dwarven scholar?
textByHashes.1c1adc0504fd9fd359982e44dec1be76188a024c: Do you know where he is right now?
textByHashes.87cffb562b4f7a71caa8c39e25f4825e9edcefba: Dondakan wants to shoot me out of a cannon!
textByHashes.44ea700e8cc49f270200490d82e6d910b39f83d9: He thinks I'm actually going to fly through it and land on the other side.
textByHashes.f1bb417e1bf44f799f7e71e32e0fdd86dcd873f3: Any tips on how to defeat an evil demon?
textByHashes.a8fc4177248a1c309168f4a067c63c070b3675da: I defeated the spirit of the rock!
textByHashes.ecd15d8e84191758572b432890d4f2a320867f34: I need some help with this statue... King Alvis' statue, to be precise.
textByHashes.c18e3f7c31dad814080d6a5bc3f05854e4fc4a90: This sculptor has got me looking for a lot of items, you see.
textByHashes.12ee476568ecec994c39e53f6dff0d8a05154f59: Well, the sculptor only needs to build the head now. But I need to get the Consortium to help me with that.
textByHashes.5c79ca835ed553835d42a14037c399c29379470a: I have rebuilt the statue for the Company!
textByHashes.17f77813328517f83b9cb209896797b894c6d883: Do you know about this drunken dwarf...?
textByHashes.c4c954562a752b3f8abd1b6f1f76d80a70a38292: The one I mean is his relative, living in the northeast of Keldagrim. I wonder if you could help me with him.
textByHashes.57faa66f986d4b11af706db215817a4066a94bf4: I have this unforgettable tale to tell you!
textByHashes.d6b1d045778c2cc5fa928228c075f40414ced281: Excuse me, do you want to hear my tale or not?
textByHashes.db2409d3fbefe0e67f836962bb71ccdfc4e9f234: I must be off now, thanks for the chat.
textByHashes.8f9787fcf505929f5ce969628155e5baa3fc99f0: What brings you to this place? I can't imagine anyone coming here by choice.
textByHashes.73288559457ee1c6c86586ddbe835d31a536ce4c: Vengeance? Against whom? Did someone take your gardening equipment?
textByHashes.284ecb2fcb55de5eb711dbb8bf18a22216fb394d: Okay, sorry, I was just trying to lighten the mood. Care to tell me what it is against then?
textByHashes.52d9fd8f44d41dc3b44a52c4fbd7590dc1e5b4c1: Can't say I've come across it before.
textByHashes.1524ba58821b374aab882822aee0bcfb4041df54: Ah, I've had a few run ins with him myself.
textByHashes.0add8c1f93a301f0053835844751e16e11f51e6d: I'm stronger than I look, I've seen my fair share of monsters.
textByHashes.2a5389d881879a093df1c0c8edbee410aaaf17e9: Why are you so intent on taking him down?
textByHashes.a97931bdbdb9017a28bc866f4449b0620d84dc1d: What happens after? When you do take Callisto down that is.
textByHashes.52541d0bcebe948a07d51135531d092ae221b0af: You seem like you've got a lot to think about then. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.10c9a1889ffccdd4c9b2f7d9d9a7a8c8d39d6f83: Do you know anything about it?
textByHashes.bf81cf1b66210f90f02e24ce3e9c65a1d7a897e7: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for a suitable bow.
textByHashes.587a45663d1233b4339a91ec36a2529dd5b48349: Yeah. I got them from a really big bear.
textByHashes.38b170340f455b00853f76b1580f39b30cfa76b8: So do you know if the claws would be useful at all?
textByHashes.1ddaeb75bd15058b30bee1a696b5040804186045: It's mine. I picked it up.
textByHashes.4416443916251d00bc8f89624ac3d54a52e917be: I'm trying to find out if it's useful.
textByHashes.9d14406df6af8dcb278a7a2ed7aaaf3e82245dac: What have you done to deserve that?
textByHashes.8fff3beea3b2b39ad1aa7107da593b4d771f0010: How are things going for the Colony now the trolls have all gone away?
textByHashes.9b08446d36aeb580d9321ce814b1d3720e629c6c: I was just wondering what you're doing.
textByHashes.16a9cc7d5e7c15eca8717307e7e9e69c4d8bc3a2: I'm not surprised - iron sheets won't last any time at all with all that salt water around.
textByHashes.706d23f5becc94867e4d05bf143a0ed5ae85cfe6: You know all your doors get stuck open?
textByHashes.2850155d0d9b9b2e26c5fa1df7019c980cce1b12: Well, I guess you didn't say.
textByHashes.d0a2c3559c1f356e9ad5537bc1d31c4366ef260b: Yeah, I don't want to brag, but seriously: I am SOOOO rich....
textByHashes.e6b987ca7ec3b2ce8e21d8368de4fcb1cb7b4ec3: Yeah, I know they say money doesn't bring you happiness, but sometimes I just like to open my bank account and look at all of the stuff I own and just think to myself:
textByHashes.8fc87f232658b7c508eb4d77fc541b8f97afb09f: Well, us rich alive people don't want to waste all day spending time with you poor dead people, because I'm just sooooo rich I have to go now, and very possibly make myself even richer.
textByHashes.16e99e0bcabce1ef5416ac2b9421e65a4b9e5fec: Yeah, I heard about that, ha-ha-ha!
textByHashes.68bb58e355951e9b54d8358d35dc772ef0bcd98c: Well, it was fun. Let's do it again sometime.
textByHashes.d7c0670faea05afa1dfc65638fde96cb58f64a78: I know, but what are you going to do?
textByHashes.fdfe75bb81becd61b926c1bbd6f565cb4676ce10: Well, I guess that's always true in the long run. See you around, weird invisible dead person!
textByHashes.6f15672ed3206814effb93dd9d3d45800b00b830: Yeah it's not bad, but I prefer cooked chicken.
textByHashes.17d5ae8ac33e8b44d997066686b916dd34c9816b: Maybe, but nothing beats a home cooked pie!
textByHashes.305068d0ac2978e504014745f71f58575b2cbea0: You don't say? I never knew that. Well, I must be going, see you around.
textByHashes.72f59e432676eb07bd2c9eaa48411525b625cd87: Somebody set up us the bomb!
textByHashes.267884315896506aef7d95f9cd88081fa551ab4c: You have no chance to survive make your time.
textByHashes.3c718fd3bec369c2fb60f3b6ac293998a7f0fb53: All your base are belong to us.
textByHashes.6f62e2af98a900183c50a49d6119ca1809ef97a7: Hey, don't think you can talk to me like that!
textByHashes.37ceacc24e492d00e757bf8dafdc1e4a1463a944: Just because you're already dead, doesn't mean I can't find a way to hurt you ghosty!
textByHashes.57768d873d24df86b0879a54e842ab9c6235ee41: No, I've never been there in my life and CERTAINLY didn't steal anything when I was!
textByHashes.71bf4a0bfc663bb78add862a87317be15f513e64: Are you calling me a liar?!?! I have never stolen a thing in my life, and I resent the implication that I am the kind of morally depraved individual that would steal someone else's hard earned
textByHashes.66f0936f41bda953f11e3c63c9680c1c88b437a4: Or cakes. Or fur. Repeatedly. For long periods at a time.
textByHashes.f6f1ba81c1cdf510db9c6ee4d4682fd54fa1bf89: Well if you are going to take that attitude, then I have nothing further to say on the matter, and bid you good day!
textByHashes.d9d9091c45e3acefc795f44c1512b22327724e3a: Well, I don't mean to brag, but I guess I am with my level 99 magic...
textByHashes.ae4f13ecaa2004a16d5e57753218ca72168002e9: But that is besides the point. It is not I who has trapped you here as a ghost.
textByHashes.8952c9b89a94336d44e302182e82b5876940ad29: Lennissa told me about you, and where to find you?
textByHashes.7ce3b5a6a65f836b50d92f0394e58522c810fcb3: Look, I don't want to force you into telling me, but perhaps sharing it with someone might relieve your guilt?
textByHashes.3d5a364451c60da511921571efd7d4266b41ab6a: Well, she told me that she was working as an undercover agent of Saradomin amongst the followers of some 'Empty Lord', and when news of the theft of a god-weapon reached her, she passed the message on to
textByHashes.06e17c9dffe1c5a6c515727df17987f3b9e5214d: you instead of taking it to Saradomin because she was scared her cover might be blown.
textByHashes.f5d0d05a7f7cb3a978cc9713b887133c7dc5e138: But I don't understand why you didn't take her message to Saradomin?
textByHashes.3cd65880a62489977be0dce650d6f2ff60a48af7: So why didn't you pass on Lennissa's message? As I understand it something happened with that staff that could have been avoided if you had passed her message on!
textByHashes.0203fe401f68016535abd17e46449a95a0467abf: So that is why you decided not to pass the report from Lennissa on?
textByHashes.db729706c971d9baebe7c3d8ceba8eaa79ea246e: I'm guessing you did something about that, then?
textByHashes.9013068ba83c0e036165dcf87e545cda90c88def: I'm confused. What exactly happened with this staff anyway? And why have all these various random people been cursed because of it?
textByHashes.bbeca891c853bd7491d13352d4457e09312076ce: Where would you suggest I look for Viggora?
textByHashes.7246feed1c13bfc6c083acf00da4b00329c1a1a8: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.
textByHashes.2cc713c8ff5ce02f11601ec4bf45f19a7d8c1cc5: Well, that's all fascinating, but I just don't particularly care. Bye-bye.
textByHashes.7ecd3c690410a64920ff717298e1f4b0e0032d3f: Dhalak, where can I find the swordsman Viggora?
textByHashes.41039de72d4a879d8aff4ecb1f36723d3c01bd68: Could I have more of those ghostly robes you gave me?
textByHashes.bb6a23eec5cda4d4e3bbe863f76841338a69aeaf: Hello there! You look like a hunter. What are you on the hunt for?
textByHashes.1836d1d235be6544f6e313b53ddcdb22c533a97c: I see. Made any interesting observations so far?
textByHashes.b5c40db135504e06e56a9b77d55752e9198aad5a: Yes, I'd actually made that observation myself. I imagine being incorporeal means they're somewhat harder to hunt?
textByHashes.3437e4a0b0996eeeed4dc21c941be8bb2acebd65: What about the ents? Anything interesting to note on them?
textByHashes.c80b0db150acd831401c519538b6d0a524968d24: Interesting... Well, if you need any help with any of this stuff, do let me know. It wouldn't be the first time I've dealt with guild reports.
textByHashes.20a0a63497e7ee3aa0cbe11c90c761801d3cc30f: I've helped out a touch here and there.
textByHashes.d86803e558c0e2c34225bd8ae6edb5637701d1e1: Interesting... Well, if you need any help with any of this stuff, do let me know.
textByHashes.a5ff885e0860930dfb1c45194a30f529521738a4: I'd like to check holiday items please!
textByHashes.db1eaa15aec2fbdfc34d42cd07a541172b0443f3: A hat? What sort of hat...
textByHashes.38478884495475268917cf28b7e83de5e7be01ab: No thanks, I don't want it right now.
textByHashes.0141afc23cc047d0457469ebc3c0359061bf4538: I... don't worry. Thank you for the reward, see you around!
textByHashes.ccdefcfe56905d01d17f5d5b0178148cebd0a6ec: I am already skilled in digging.
textByHashes.d827fa4cdcba1d8f472d69d7d6f7bbe9f7e84824: Do you have any quests for me? I really want one. I really want to help out!
textByHashes.1b68077818b7d3d0dbd87ef35050d95d89647cc9: There must be SOMETHING you need help with. I am a great adventurer after all.
textByHashes.da773cacaf33e51653277b50e9096a3b9ce73fc1: I guess money really does buy happiness.
textByHashes.173eb831f62f3791a522d346ede8e1b8131a77f0: Oh come on, surely there's something I can help out with! I want to help, however menial it is.
textByHashes.ee88aa30ff53a6e8f125e936d4a545f4e36bf65f: Fantastic! I'll get straight to it!
textByHashes.9bd40fc2781461911102236a7bd43bf2e08b8c76: Do you have any gauntlets for me?
textByHashes.71ab43b440cc704ef9203d1cdebd498d00c99461: Could I get some more gauntlets, please?
textByHashes.8a516c4c9ee17d1c11088bbee09eefc028fc1fdf: Yes, I do want some steel gauntlets, please.
textByHashes.7bb72400384d8f81ffe9c5e01b13d854b5cfc44e: No thanks, I'll ask your sons instead.
textByHashes.4cce40c40d7a3c8e3553f804294d7d9772127618: I thought these gauntlets were a family heirloom. How do you have several of them?
textByHashes.b179566dcabf7e1c042490a876a41f9f275bd7a2: And you still think that these are an acceptable reward for what I have done for your family?
textByHashes.45d1b497f75018458eeca482f5111b2bcbe31815: Very well, I do admit, they are useful.
textByHashes.56f2a822dc60d8ed55543d2b4305f78c51fc2da5: Yes. High Priest and others be stupid to not see value of Goblin League.
textByHashes.3f9be31bcdee7ebc9860bb9b7b59e310c6b7c047: Uh, I believe I'm still using it.
textByHashes.784c6dbb7202e3110993b03383c4241c672226b1: Could you remind me what ways those were?
textByHashes.25c13ef8f89adeab805a8b54af0f5f5cef9ac66e: What kinds of rewards would I receive?
textByHashes.4d49afb17e3d997c6560ca10889a871d43966d59: Your new master, that would be...?
textByHashes.e7ea298aecefab3c63ed92f835e60590b74030db: That doesn't sound like a fair trade...
textByHashes.46bf1da21c01945fc5ae9d7c2a7e5d6a91886174: Perhaps it's a good thing you can't see...
textByHashes.8345d5a03e4eec3946b9efd997a934d19d700536: And at what point did that blind you?
textByHashes.021e740336b1f2ccf09db698fea66ff229d64b86: I guess the fire was pretty bright.
textByHashes.dff94e5a8976e64397c063d42fdae95217ac0cc9: Wait! Did you say human sacrifice?
textByHashes.a914da3c796da92ba4dfd003d60af2ba1ef63798: Well, I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.1f49dd6380d9008822968ebe32406bfe7537c7dc: Yep, the demons won't slay themselves.
textByHashes.48de5439304ff96fd06e37ada4e8d61d8025abaa: Is there anything I can help out with?
textByHashes.aa4be381a1314692b2aec79198c090858dc9bb68: Sure, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.6be2ddbf90e3362b85650ce4c48fd55c13b04f6b: I'll let you get back to work.
textByHashes.05b7e4f40b362c1d54d9f2d9141c481e92a320a2: Sorry, I was just looking around.
textByHashes.5bca1371fcd6f9ece6e62993e8beca8f17ecf49d: No... not since I was young.
textByHashes.92a9b0c8462b4674ad653509ff228015c5a4200b: Why would I be looking for him?
textByHashes.3392caa53a3d643107f6ce119e644c0b6e301116: Mr Oni...Dom, how did you get that name?
textByHashes.3c8381d24a25d54e4317e278d973588c87116f96: Can you tell me about the dreams?
textByHashes.1fbd55fc3e44a63e10a03121df4ba55ccec22a35: Are all dreams the same or are there different options?
textByHashes.8a91f163dcce7f2de62fa56792f40e44bd2b72b8: I want to change my dream.
textByHashes.af1dba38d617fe19eaaa2017f511179848149e79: What's the giant tree stump all about?
textByHashes.476f641283b041147915a6776856c6cd3a109c1f: So the battles that took place here... Is that why all these animal spirits are here now?
textByHashes.ff487e6ec59eaa9c025b40a8e92bbe267df978fd: No thanks; I've got all the Crafting equipment I need.
textByHashes.4e0456309ce947f5dd2c9a1a2666a1b1bb50997e: What do you know about Ali Morrisane?
textByHashes.9c3afdbe01a77416c34f5b888dc8538cc78fb5d6: What are you going to do, then?
textByHashes.bcf8e0a79b8d3a6fcbaf908d203ec95d7ed58bc2: Hi! I have this money-off voucher!
textByHashes.5f5153d721b3906daa1a3a935b7c151c3ef546c9: But I only just got it!
textByHashes.e2095f0c97fb410156714bf3b8834ad2c7255723: Isn't there anything I can do that will make you tell me?
textByHashes.d4a558b7a2312527f17a5cd43835bff79d0afa00: A fishing competition? What are dwarves doing in a fishing competition?
textByHashes.f6fed0deeb8a17d6122ae11b910c029996804aef: Doesn't look very secret to me, standing out there in the open.
textByHashes.5ad7f2edb1c35132b89f2e845dda9495d7d1a887: Do you know of any quests I can do?
textByHashes.bac523422a4bf940440d0ce1b0823d1deb11aa61: Thanks for the tip, perhaps I will.
textByHashes.6c7bad5ce346732df74236b46310e4771115be49: I've already killed the demon Delrith. He was merely a stain on my sword when I was finished with him!
textByHashes.877dcbdd8cd06082a2ae6068f8ae555d4dfebb82: Oh I have already killed that nasty blood-sucking vampyre. Draynor will be safe now.
textByHashes.350bbb337c9ca2bddbb38612e1716182766a311d: What! I did slay the beast..I really did.
textByHashes.aa05df77ca83dd7ed5a6fa8665e8d47103544d18: ..Huh.. But... Hey! I did... believe what you like.
textByHashes.ddf30fd3bbcde5fe12fc554ad604c361ea4f7629: Small.. something small would be good.
textByHashes.889acf86a21fa79cad25639cd0c6549b6787d9e1: Yes it can be! There could be anything from an evil chicken to a poisonous spider. They attack in numbers you know!
textByHashes.dbf815abf7c4c67ae281caee55ffe2d325696a81: Yes I know of Mizgog and have already helped him with his imp problem. It took me ages to find those beads!
textByHashes.93902c81b63bb4b761d337c45858e32f53be2acc: Something easy please, I'm new here.
textByHashes.45a5e60b54ab2f3daaf6a753d3d4b6bf4ab686dd: Tell me about the Lumbridge cook.
textByHashes.65d08d79c548298545a2ac3305e47282e9e3705c: Thank you. I shall go speak with him.
textByHashes.c81088417ca955b70839f941620853dc9ead526e: I have already helped the cook in Lumbridge.
textByHashes.1ded8c33162a2e0971f59146bd4b3c030d221922: Tell me about the Duke's strange talisman.
textByHashes.5066fa4ab19f7262efb22a2689e29bf80f1307ae: Sounds mysterious. I may just do that. Thanks.
textByHashes.4cad89fda58bf07e4ad4075efa92a24fb7534810: Yes, I have already solved the Rune mysteries.
textByHashes.11dfbd86a4a9ea59b433d22bf48edc8aaa4f6a97: Tell me about Romeo and his girlfriend please.
textByHashes.7b4572ac9442eda46b43e4bf48fd6a4eaa7c6204: Right, ok. Romeo is in Varrock?
textByHashes.c340a0659f771330d8b4fdd49cf26a8bc500081b: Oh yes, I've already helped Romeo in the best possible way I can...
textByHashes.7e171c3ef7e48b03962313438c7c7544f095db7a: I'm a thinker rather than fighter, anything skill orientated?
textByHashes.65e7d5da5dec514f0152f4c3a5fa53b24c1167ff: Tell me about Fred the farmer please.
textByHashes.2840cdd6cbca1a96d00c907a6454bd55cf7b6460: I have already helped Fred the farmer. I sheared his sheep and made 20 balls of wool for him.
textByHashes.a3681f435399fd1dc862eacc8917b554e9afad51: He wouldn't let me kill his chickens though.
textByHashes.a17a345b0d4bc41d0c9920b489d749b1f046d8f5: Tell me about Doric the dwarf.
textByHashes.c239e3bd7c6dabcb53ee882d457a7e8747349d2f: Yes, I've been to see Doric already. He was happy to let me use his anvils after I ran a small errand for him.
textByHashes.c432cbc48e68d96223d18aea573bf34bbb874f1a: I want to do all kinds of things, do you know of anything like that?
textByHashes.af81c331ff39585ece687eeb566cfd79ff53fb6a: Tell me about Hetty the witch.
textByHashes.43d4fe0e99dc0a2bb08cff318b30a3adaff3c1fe: Ok thanks, let's hope she doesn't turn me into a potato or something..
textByHashes.9feabbae7cc13d1262e9499e5f97a08afdaf83d4: Yes, I have already been to see Hetty, she gave me super cosmic powers after I helped out with her potion! I could probably destroy you with a single thought!
textByHashes.2fff0c16fc7da73b084e71242e531645283c4f0e: Sounds adventurous, I may have to check that out. Thank you.
textByHashes.657e8feb2b087a8566350d5dc6a33b74132f54a6: Yarr! I already found the booty!
textByHashes.f8d130f5218813444598137c84e18d9300fc0ab3: Sounds like fun. I've never been to a Haunted Manor before.
textByHashes.1a0a4b2e01c26ad97851da23245bfcbe9afcf53e: Yeah, I found Ernest already. Professor Oddenstein had turned him into a chicken!
textByHashes.376f834c387e64761c971423d685d53f5304a048: Yeah a chicken. It could have been worse though.
textByHashes.b1a996d0dac698013bb216817c3bc87bf760207d: Where can I get a haircut like yours?
textByHashes.dd8b7f8c9c77d9f16fba9a68eedc8aee81293e6e: Really? Show me what it can do!
textByHashes.8cfe23a90e9aae72f8d46c3d1dbf5ef6ee071715: Do you have anything of value which I can have?
textByHashes.e41aec608808aa4ac54117254a1bde0854416f6f: No you're right. I have nothing to back that up.
textByHashes.f389a2298158a0ca1453b04c3ed657ee7ef931ee: Is there anything we can do about this doom?
textByHashes.d01b614fb814ae9ebf377858d99cac877447db0b: But what if I want to see the warnings again?
textByHashes.8967c1d7c177611b1cbd49a383c93de66204cd04: Thanks, I'll remember that if I see any warning messages.
textByHashes.d54d8049fa6a4dcdd932b545b7720a0d5ec97fbf: How am I doing hunting those breach monsters, Doomsayer?
textByHashes.5b93b0321958cd1c9507a67a782d9493eb93ee4b: I'd like to remove my PvP protection.
textByHashes.3b5633d1fafc6a941743bc386352360016ecf640: Yes, remove my PvP protection right now.
textByHashes.07829625061ad52d4500c30e8f09609837a57917: Yes, arrange for my PvP protection to end in 1 minute.
textByHashes.3ec5372fe33192acd046f43ab6c086e24d8658d4: Hmm... It seems to be locked.
textByHashes.cba03d4470d5a55aac74b7879f224683d161dce6: What's it like living so close to the wilderness?
textByHashes.64153e3e6df2d3f745c266510f00013e606acb32: How did Dave come to be evil?
textByHashes.9694fc31b85c2d0e5e19e06dc52e4157cad4fb09: No, I like it this way.
textByHashes.fc49fa4b9b53eb23faab5c6ee1e3021a04c3d4b1: Hello, I need some yeastier dough, do you have any?
textByHashes.5ff3c485be6666ce37551b16f4f6a28461504955: I think it's just particularly yeasty dough.
textByHashes.7d02fddbcf68f03c611ecdffb0b946b0ee79309b: I'm making some Easter Buns to cheer up the Easter Bunny.
textByHashes.ca2eb5fc68dc4df7d86cf1a7b432d24ec89e8fe7: Thank you, that's very kind of you.
textByHashes.c434ebae6dae62d76a28c0793c771a1340c63d92: Okay, I'll talk to you later. Bye!
textByHashes.eb5b101f7ad682cafe0ff12e1a2d6ce2fdbf2fec: I need more of that yeastier dough.
textByHashes.5d4eb52c39f4bae2b1db5e597098a85e00624af3: Though thinking about it, I don't have enough space at the moment. I'll come back.
textByHashes.169cac3e970be1bb37836507ceb5d8aa45853099: You look like you are, all covered in flour.
textByHashes.5e08900c4fd2180d9c89cae4e19fa1ec08c9e470: Why are you out here on your own?
textByHashes.c2d5f500f713de5fe796eca780e3c424c14b22a6: Uhh... what voices? There is no one else here.
textByHashes.f5b7250745ce11740304d81b30265c588525daf5: Well... alright then, I think I'm just going to go and leave then.
textByHashes.d31aa3c758c2cb489efdd811cb43e79e5acbab15: What did you do before you worked here?
textByHashes.c6eb64ca5a392136320a5e656d2dec1978dbb62f: How did you and Sandstorm get out of the mining camp?
textByHashes.a7184b0929b0b937d499d0ef54baaa16f93ef307: Nothing sorry. I have to be going now.
textByHashes.c069e44e9b7c529a2d1d9b94f722583efd440e4e: Hi there! Filliman says I've completed the quest!
textByHashes.17dd4497877bda7ae1a3096ed5a3b37ab33a34a4: We've managed to create a new weapon to fight the vampyres with. I used it to kill Ranis Drakan!
textByHashes.692bb2217130f7e11846b63fbd3564dc4219a51c: As well as they could be, everything considered. We lost everything, Drezel.
textByHashes.753f3a200366e0e38ebf8619060f49527944b013: I'm familiar with the idea, yeah.
textByHashes.a77f0a46d8f1c9a00d05b43ed59ce0fd380cd762: Why don't you ever restock ores and bars?
textByHashes.3995975854c38811b41e66ad20c015414610ec56: Alright, alright, I was just leaving!
textByHashes.30d59533e8bcbf2ccc7d7a351440a693f8b7ba7c: Don't worry, if I find out who did it I'll take care of them.
textByHashes.fa3655d45bfec1f063ee0f6d5ca1fc3e35454994: I didn't know dwarves kept cats.
textByHashes.e77b61e692c47f0ebeb11ae8e5d36db408b66b2e: Hey, you look vaguely familiar... haven't I seen you somewhere before?
textByHashes.ccf20ae9b0dece7dffe6bf68c1d2a20123386dfd: And where is this... family member of yours?
textByHashes.5817e35f50ef8aa7086e9b1bdbf1cbf0facf06c1: Hmm... I wonder, I may have met him...
textByHashes.a949ae99daaef9f9bb1bc5edeae04c9e6f86b77a: Er, yes, well, I think I should be off now.
textByHashes.522144b063b79ed43384701867186c8ed0195dc1: What are you doing here anyway?
textByHashes.d08958ff45982cd808cc2b9f982cd8732e6e7552: Can I have a copy of that book, please?
textByHashes.8e33d4a57ef3f239fd87543e3c6eb6ff1779cb1d: That's Drunken Dwarf's Leg's problem now!
textByHashes.d22beffad9811ab416a4132da94e5792ad1b1d8b: There's only one of me, friend.
textByHashes.3c89d954b1f4d85c0bfd4ade04bdd7a1fcfc93da: Just passing through, thanks. Are you feeling okay?
textByHashes.278678b701017a1e599e4669d78d0d1a7101d37d: Just making sure... You seem a little unsturdy on your feet there.
textByHashes.f6cd317dced14bb09a28799625e80a81efd6a735: How do I get invited to a Duel?
textByHashes.a7f1bc9f2f3e4fa8e0f7d6965e666d73fa6f5435: I want to organise my own Duel.
textByHashes.e9571ff2ca7487a23884a84c3c6aa389e3b76cc4: What is going to happen with the monkeys?
textByHashes.677b3355f11a7c4364fbada82285fbd65894650b: That explains what happened, I suppose. How did you find all of this out?
textByHashes.5b041296ff0661735919e38d77ba71ea417587d3: Thanks. I'll go enjoy the party now.
textByHashes.3c72991dd979dcf563e166bc17a5d3e95f370bed: Can you give me more reward items?
textByHashes.50f3eee048b64343c836af9b91f26cd7c10e63d3: No, I lost that air talisman that you gave me.
textByHashes.71e13d5033dbf2e4cbeb6be5a9c07bff795f9602: Uh hey, are you the Duke?
textByHashes.768a1bb99854af2d89ac96bd4bd131ad7e707e89: What do you mean? I was told to come here.
textByHashes.5c0125485634ffc044863760e348fc55329c29fe: What is going on here, why are you talking to an egg?
textByHashes.5301dd2bb26b512e5fcf1ad8b069fd6f20153fc8: I'm not sure, I was told to come here when I stepped out of the portal.
textByHashes.7181cc2a910fceb78de6fdc2453660940f294622: Uuh, I mean, I was told to come here... after I hopped out of the portal.
textByHashes.b4b8f7a810d46af958d51fd5a0a637610174fbb6: Are you talking about that egg on the table?
textByHashes.b5f21374fdbe2fdda0368d9b9301e6fae27e7122: Maybe there's someone more reasonable I can talk to.
textByHashes.c706f195ff870e71b82f43a46212dab7689bccef: Maybe there's someone more sane I can talk to.
textByHashes.7ec3e83150f1b2304c7c87d39e074bb761e0a44b: Paws is probably the best person to talk to right now.
textByHashes.a7b0f60ebc5baecdc2ca5c9b182567cdfa36af16: Your Dukeness, I've discovered a revelation!
textByHashes.a08cd2bd0f296c1694b5b5dd8f87036b3c4a6004: That egg on the table... it is a fake!
textByHashes.a96781d3a79b21e395ba08e0bb604ae71328a100: How do you know? Someone could have easily swapped it out for a fake one.
textByHashes.775e9165fc1a12ab765192abb97377ab9d401114: Oh, I uh, found it in a burrow underneath the castle.
textByHashes.9b7a3b998bcde512375cf374c6355e568cba8b9d: If you don't trust me, why don't you ask that egg?
textByHashes.292068799d535532c09235fc061fa1600dc5dea4: Phew... see, I told you it's fake.
textByHashes.e0774fa26e6c887bab668b2b7358758dde720fca: I'm glad we got that sorted, feel free to ensure it works properly.
textByHashes.7c59f2a9e685a9de80455132d75380e9d196f39a: I'll uh, dispose of this one for you.
textByHashes.ff8431cf1f6fe09cb4fd968b9a47a2d19496c3b8: Oh, ghee thanks, I'm not sure what to ask, maybe...
textByHashes.ca727791804a210a4c2d2bece79dbf48defed44d: Egg: Should rabbits keep jumping through the strange portal that no one knows where it leads to?
textByHashes.1042408af8e43756937fbce3f2b3fffbc44a9f07: Great! I should return to Gelt to let him know what has happened.
textByHashes.07e1c9dda11559f3aab0f2f48f11bb47fdc79957: How do I use the furnace?
textByHashes.4fc0ee035dc73dc5b5d8ea45f6d792ad6eb8eaf8: Gosh, you're a remarkably big dwarf.
textByHashes.ad81031b36e6862d5e644ab3ec4b12ddef1511a1: Are you sure you're really a dwarf?
textByHashes.542b0f65971083a32bba2d66a318d78abe04a1a4: I'll let you get on with it.
textByHashes.62c40f61daa7af106081afb41988737896c049fc: Can I have another law talisman?
textByHashes.2df2e97fcb81e27884df3e8e7b3944090906a94b: Can you put some spikes on my Climbing boots?
textByHashes.9bf58ee5274e7ddf13c15b7fb8fa70b4d0039cb7: Yes, but I still want them.
textByHashes.7ecc936f4ed1323e9f82328288be9413909ff971: Oh OK, I'll leave them thanks.
textByHashes.e115fd981718ae1c470a6ad617fc1e49ff68ac58: Can you make me another sled?
textByHashes.705882b4d277e12207f6808d537b9664b40e054c: What do I need for the sled wax again?
textByHashes.179a804ce9b29b8e7e9eeadb89d6eb1d955f288a: How is your son getting on?
textByHashes.66fc797c39d9b9096c42f77e8e2ac6f72fee6ed4: Is it OK if I use your anvil?
textByHashes.1104cd89dffdac31f89df14c6e8bd21b6d4aff29: Tell me about your skillcape, please.
textByHashes.6d22d5a308ab6920a6dc655543b8570595c1ad90: May I buy a Slayer's Skillcape, please?
textByHashes.ac3ac522200205d93ec18093b3e2cd199fd0aa9f: I've changed my mind; I don't want it.
textByHashes.3f7740f92916a1c60147c9188fdd2557a4bf37d5: But I don't have enough money on me.
textByHashes.80e4719d54e56bdb2b86c02747f438bdd3ea07c3: Why are you selling things in a cave?
textByHashes.8e48538cf8f1731cd6a45f25157dd1768f6223e9: Where do you get the things that you sell?
textByHashes.ccdc2cdbbfc44ab2edb740dea9440010ee4f4ada: That's not much of an answer.
textByHashes.8ded8e2467ed02b629faa74456af4a2191045287: Well... yes. Otherwise why would you have said it?
textByHashes.64494a2cef1e44ba5e56ae8add609cb06d1c0788: Is that some sort of existential question, or...?
textByHashes.9e621081e483feba53bc0d910e7a7764592411fc: If you're not here for ore, then why are you here?
textByHashes.dcbfb39c50696a559467af86f45a4a8eaa97630e: That doesn't sound like a great job.
textByHashes.2957e8c07392140848414cc38e4558c94303a4c6: Can't be found on Gielinor? Where do they come from then?
textByHashes.b2e44f2d410679333459cfd12e8754e44cdeaf3c: Oh yes. I've seen those before.
textByHashes.e954daba35991ce5c29f76c7537050d827f178af: I have some here. Can we trade?
textByHashes.e98623e0f66ff23ee8c851e183092db2aad361db: What can you tell me about shooting stars?
textByHashes.4c8f0f3cf78e4e952b3df41c44be40089d9b562f: What have you got in the guild?
textByHashes.fc57d384b0373687fd0c856fc55b254047144d09: What do you dwarves do with the ore you mind?
textByHashes.c47b725dcd40e1d941bdacbe4dc64ebae854d976: I don't see many dwarves selling armour or weapons here.
textByHashes.ef37cf67ceda593d72a770ffba021ac8f879a22e: I don't have any, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.e1b93176e82756f177939fb2297901dbea214195: Well, I have this one piece of ore...
textByHashes.29a7bf570a0cb9d825a66ed9f865379ce234e6e5: Yes, please take my gold to the city. I've got pieces of ore right here.
textByHashes.a6d75da68c829fe218726c08199938089e77d90b: No, you're right actually, I don't.
textByHashes.d3aa5c1458786bf9aeee228542c8a63a0bde5453: No, that's far too expensive for me.
textByHashes.9fa6a082a48f7c34983a339d6deb0e4ecaad7377: No, I'll hang on to these myself, thanks.
textByHashes.9de28594a298a2440079f84d77382bec9b000e6a: It all seems a bit expensive, really.
textByHashes.e7a5d9bfc304d5b001959f5e617e8cd9ef9105e3: There's plenty of gold coming from that rock now, surely you can lower the price somewhat?
textByHashes.ca02cb4615d156f6781ef9d3801cf50e26088979: What, on your ship? No way.
textByHashes.3e9fd2f591e6eb8167d3ff4e27ab571a53fcddcc: What, on your ship? No thanks! I don't want to crash into any more things!
textByHashes.f0b923e4eecb680686e1a561399cbe445740b34e: A slight accident?? Thanks to you I have to rebuild this statue you so carelessly knocked over!
textByHashes.6f44c6f759778623cc2940d6de3dddb60f4d97d1: A slight accident?? Have you any idea how much time I spent rebuilding that statue?
textByHashes.104a843daa0edf2c13a0a2e2899599c7c52a3fbc: Well, I'm sorry to hear that.
textByHashes.802d794b3262937212e97d02b5484ec14dd7b14e: How much will that cost me?
textByHashes.df9159fe35a916f117dd6457fece6a029dcec37c: I'd like to go further downstream.
textByHashes.4bd7ecb09cfa61b6917e5e27f8eb3b294ef14e60: But... that means I'm stuck here.
textByHashes.a2989afb01d35cd1879c2ae990d4f0ae8c1fd634: Oh... Fair enough. See you later.
textByHashes.10f43e6a6b51ba98587ca5615ba672121ce424c1: Nice to see a female cook.
textByHashes.13b091236e226b6b347a056678a363820f91d824: I would love to help you mix up some more fuel.
textByHashes.64f6701d7856823d14298f26c37950bf91963c36: I'll get right on it. Be back soon.
textByHashes.4f37e1eb16bdbeff2de469e100cdb735f80a27a5: Where do I get the Dried cocoa?
textByHashes.2638ddf6ad4b146721364eba46759ab4a7c03e2a: Where do I get the bottle of Hosidius milk?
textByHashes.43127da3b3d499183c972af75a2fe9f9703e79a7: Where do I get the Special spices?
textByHashes.4d0d511178b104b7f924501da1c445ac630d4f21: Easter Bunny! I knew I would find you here.
textByHashes.7a55e1ebed556453b9f3290fdcc2a6519b3955ef: What have people been calling you instead?
textByHashes.58b9bd3c55a74b31720801ea98fe3bf52b035dcc: Do you think perhaps they weren't talking to you?
textByHashes.404dd33e6844e789c2059020d897a04e298d39b1: Oh come on now, what do you mean?
textByHashes.e00064d7af4b94fdfc64e05ae12d6ac6c976f5ad: Hello Easter Bunny, how are you feeling?
textByHashes.545d0ac8bb17357f4c8317ab8fd390015d7805c8: Hey Bunny, would you like a fancy carrot?
textByHashes.075a19561f0302e58b7d0699c21973803e9b5f9a: Hello! I have a surprise for you.
textByHashes.43b0ba1e327593739576af7adf53c9120ed8cc94: Oh no, it's something quite delicious actually.
textByHashes.66f3bbd940e131db5b386240512dcb36fbbee6f3: A lovely mug of carrot juice!
textByHashes.33516c0c9450b28778d0a78fa80ebbca5f914a62: Don't worry, this is fancy carrot juice. I made it myself with some fantastic carrots.
textByHashes.a923de40ee5b0a89cde6c80f388a5aa03aa0817b: I made sure of that. Go on!
textByHashes.5e26b51b560d9b769b164328f6a29e4ddbcf43f9: How are you feeling now? Any better?
textByHashes.57acdb61e58e7cfe06622c42b77d997805eeab58: I'm sure I can help you remember how wonderful it is.
textByHashes.27503f8d827e9cc924bf9c2a4190c19c2f947d77: Hmmm... I should check in with Eggus before I give one of these buns to the Easter Bunny. Quality control or something.
textByHashes.72d0c05b4d1fc532dad95ae50a61b40d81826c6f: Hi! I'm back with an Easter treat, just for you.
textByHashes.54b35c5189879b83eefbb103b124a13a8448d3c3: Here, it's an Easter bun. Fresh out of the oven.
textByHashes.a3fb10b58fb89546c1c3a02216b439d9124695e9: You are most welcome. Do you feel a bit more Easter- ey now?
textByHashes.ca170c416ac11c32708aa06f216174fb61ad1c50: Alright, let me think of something.
textByHashes.3da51930011ca90ba9e27d7d690c340c39d4a74f: Well that's sort of nosey, but go on.
textByHashes.4b3ad27f8316653c2621d6cecba8ec587a1b1b25: Well I suppose that could work...
textByHashes.a126edea83c497de20e196e0b0ad02534023eee4: I wonder how Fry is getting on with that performance...
textByHashes.6048ce916e8af217ec3bbde613b217a2fdbacf91: Oh, nothing. I just need to talk to Fry about something.
textByHashes.12ef71cef4313a7d21140bf88a1f66a637001ffa: Oh it's always my pleasure to get these delicious eggs!
textByHashes.5ace69667743d7d3bfb6359839afd12f80c50996: I mean... to help out a friend in need!
textByHashes.a5f76a96e65bbcc82ff9b16151538dbebdf68bc0: Isn't it strange something always happens around this time of year that needs me to come and save the day?
textByHashes.8921a0d78961763eb4aa2410ad231cfaf8daba3d: Oh well, I expect I'll be seeing you again next year.
textByHashes.f026a6c04250e9747a9819a949de4faa849260ff: You're coming back here, whenever I do?
textByHashes.3f59861d17a4595ee31bcc805e43504708d9e3d0: Er.... He didn't really mention you at all, but he did teach me some cool new magic spells.
textByHashes.f4eaca985ac12c0730615e94eaa30b0b863c8a33: I found this weird icon. Do you know what it is?
textByHashes.ee3c9c323902caed1d8aedc2a09dc7fc3c9b8be6: And you think that somewhere is here?
textByHashes.4f19cff07c3ac10f0d1bb5c833e8be0fbc9909ad: Hey your hair is on fire!
textByHashes.0eebaa28637629f026fa269d8d81ba0f7b395892: I can't tell you that. It would ruin the fun. You'll have to work it out for yourself.
textByHashes.16ccd5759ac236ba8f434bdb051219e95cd68e98: What are you doing all the way over here?
textByHashes.b5eed68f3f6c7857f6ca0561305c1362f6057103: That's a nice set of armour.
textByHashes.10f6d34bc1d9a5a9036056a5b0b6a7f0becb8015: What's so special about your capes?
textByHashes.d9fb80936781fce0e235480da4e64a25aaaf3bf1: I think she might be the one looking after me.
textByHashes.6bb68a6e7d4629f2e4596437e1797aa4d81ac151: Possibly, do you have a challenge for me?
textByHashes.bc950a585f444a9d94302593cf817243851c1fde: No I'm fine, I'm just wandering around.
textByHashes.c6a1d70555c29f1261aa3eee131fa6669aa6244b: I'm not a great hero. I'm just an ordinary person.
textByHashes.f7c6535f92c039228eb2b55605277cc6639daf0d: Yes, I'm trying to advance myself.
textByHashes.9a952ae7a41df12dc1f197dfa73e2dd4c12bfa9f: I don't know. I'm not very ambitious.
textByHashes.958f6f6566fbae39b449f49e9289f846c839f7de: Actually, I've only got two legs.
textByHashes.bf46988d9cbb1f3e70e0b99511b9edb9f7cfe1fd: They're probably long gone by now.
textByHashes.8157302f7c52b08592a9982d2ab5f3b857bef0ec: You can't use it. It's broken.
textByHashes.7ddbdf3bf9efee64e0ca0934689724a298ebc718: You still look like a spider.
textByHashes.fc53bbf2c80cd4b23c35bb02f6876d2ed6c875d5: No, I'm not scared of spiders.
textByHashes.8a36b6d0bc649219bab5acd78277d87e499db030: How are you going to fly?
textByHashes.a875385bb5dc44cd88fa3e91b6d592d037ce288b: Nothing, really. Humans are pretty ordinary.
textByHashes.ce62072ad88a15a24b02f310c2e1a391dd1bb696: I don't have that much on me... Maybe later.
textByHashes.c338dda921167b14984f5b84b9103260aa7bd6c0: At least? Do you not know how long he was in power for?
textByHashes.0ca4594f8eb13d1397fb016b2ae766499af3c018: So King Shayzien VII was resurrected as Xeric using the Dark Altar?
textByHashes.184bf0b020c55a914c67252fb5f4ad4b332faa00: How did Xeric have so much power?
textByHashes.df078836e30329e0822238c3f92156376783ca0c: Do you know why he created the lizardmen?
textByHashes.3bab00d4d775fd913f961c51e500ee4f01539f8a: Do you know why Xeric needed the lizardmen?
textByHashes.726b62bbd6cf06027a9afac8b5c329926092532b: What happened to the lizardmen after Xeric's reign?
textByHashes.da15ef44408cf2ae8289ac9482d6b1f62fe51b57: Why do they keep fighting? Surely after a thousand years they must know Xeric is gone?
textByHashes.f2642e1ede9e1846d7aeab6cd6cb681078ddb80b: But if they are serving Xeric, why do they attack the kingdom?
textByHashes.7b4d422f665bf29ad042e707f36c861ed122763c: Why did the people suffer for so long?
textByHashes.7adb6664d5899e4df6ad25f46e71c4fcbdd1d41d: Do you know what he said?
textByHashes.a857df7c40b56d1291ab0ea60fcd640914bd0795: So no one knows what really happened to him?
textByHashes.8e820360f7c076c0fc00345d6b5b572f2bf673d2: Good riddance by the sounds of it.
textByHashes.ca5e34d183b09415dd5f6bdeca214e1f2d3bcb53: Got any good books to recommend?
textByHashes.921e9bd483f8c57d754d5e4893c1395bf90dc335: I have a question about my Achievement diary.
textByHashes.d049a997e8a37a40fc6155f125caf22acce962aa: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!
textByHashes.98d9eef7cfb1997d36ef4bd078793e9c8d3acae9: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!
textByHashes.cdd49d2f0e338ee324c3cdf6a34369e62165b464: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!
textByHashes.778f99cd80a8add9e85df5cbe7f19be36d04c861: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!
textByHashes.8f337214e2c1898029ee6efed74fbe92be856035: How do I claim the rewards?
textByHashes.ee830e3cabd1bd7536ba287745be156d5bc26fd4: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Western Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.230c98bcb85a5625ed5408da2a3864718058646e: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Western achievement diary!
textByHashes.e6646cf77f36ecd1154e7704cd964e8e84cb152f: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Western achievement diary!
textByHashes.e6ef6283d39e8d93e1751b4177fcef12353ee83a: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Western achievement diary!
textByHashes.38414c988ca0e087957c8d6f96c1bf37be9047c3: I must speak with Awowogei on a subject of great import.
textByHashes.0b13d78994f53a392dcde2c008b5e8c81ad4166c: I would like to leave now.
textByHashes.84be3556d9ce88a1090b6f001e05e63156b18d7a: Hello there. What is this place?
textByHashes.a6339645876b893f352e6edbdffaaf81303ac850: Hello there. Did you manage to find out any more about that gryphon?
textByHashes.29918fc04dc9311dc459d33882056f3b749ba7eb: Do you often sell to humans?
textByHashes.35f32d825db9b2c083a77080d1c621507d41466b: Surely business is quite slow then? There aren't many humans around here.
textByHashes.b86b52e0c45a251311f868131861aa4f10c57381: Pleased to meet you. So what brings you out here?
textByHashes.3cdaff81c8662eac9c182fc66c52d73f81803cf0: I see. Perhaps I could help with that.
textByHashes.203c0a967e3289adfac00124862105eef17a9bb5: Hello there. How are things with that gryphon?
textByHashes.623c22b42e62fb9eb37d7577a727e607beb16fcb: Do you have any useful statistics for me?
