textByHashes.3cbd5394c771c621ca5b681b19d33de307f61990: Can I come in if I have a clue scroll?
textByHashes.d96fff485a40d17660f5fa31f69df2cde570c08c: Okay, I'll come back another time.
textByHashes.811addca428e93d2d9aaa7bd72edf3787623fbc0: Do you have anything for sale?
textByHashes.d45ee06b5fcde6249dd58c9aed572e8729eebde4: Not a fan of living in the town?
textByHashes.8e5fed225d09ace5da40b99a654c5199b7caaef5: I might just do that. So, have you always specialised in coral?
textByHashes.3da47f8a7e2f589b6814110f645463ff434d4c50: Hello. What is it you do here?
textByHashes.aaa92f03e050f34596fec22146e2645d298f0b2e: That sounds like quite an important job.
textByHashes.9015248a214e79415bcbc86cac92f31c0d0dd6a7: How will you know when it's time?
textByHashes.ccf33dcba9594f398dad8e5b6ba94377a3d93121: I see. Thank you for the information.
textByHashes.eaf1994f84a67bc9c564463ade1a08306d7dc6cc: Shame about his father though, right?
textByHashes.9e313e837b9666f8003d94d30842892636a0c755: I know. I'm working on it though, by the time I'm done we'll never have to worry about any of this again.
textByHashes.d25e053438b0295fc6ba73c71a7a08f6bb3e014a: I'll be fine Elena, don't you worry.
textByHashes.2f81a779fd890da00676af8cfce0a220f51f8571: What brings you all the way out here?
textByHashes.03a94c58b614f74067852e1c93792ef0b6d7f402: Are you searching for something here?
textByHashes.8122c72e852f20da130bd3c8f589fb3c43042ba8: And you expect to find something here?
textByHashes.e113b7730a35bf0c2c957bc401a35ae86466698e: Well if you ever need help raiding an ancient tomb, I reckon I can be of service.
textByHashes.7727a6f5fe14b7e4441d84be8384762d6802ba35: Hello. Can you give me any farming advice?
textByHashes.175bc6181bf68b1d967a81b724a6b7939e1d6b42: Oh, sorry. I thought you might be able to help me with farming like other gardeners.
textByHashes.59073acf338624ba6b180e8bdf0d8d91f539f859: Can I have another Rada's blessing?
textByHashes.edd546bfb90f1cb41332093bc87c7b0d9c673750: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please.
textByHashes.c8c9ba83857bec7e22566783d4d0f06b0f7b7faf: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please.
textByHashes.1954e8926c518cbef73a23893434b3f5e93b77bd: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please.
textByHashes.45a8aa85ac5b0c7f1533e0ef94a472fd352027f5: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.36b28e1e8fc5ab69e7ea59704ed2e44b348ba482: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.490bda4c0720410b9529bd0928b8967760e15143: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.e6761369b0e20286e9664f29e1e8f80c895f84a2: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.1e86a2744e2dbc9266294d609564f3a684462e4f: Do you have any more paint?
textByHashes.f6d595f5a40384d32e17931d4ec9c4ac477542df: Hey, I have something you might be interested in...
textByHashes.d1f2de7275356f4d3ae77359f163ab2dc24c1401: I'd like to claim some trophies.
textByHashes.00761ce640ded37486c310a914fec38587045ad4: I haven't heard of your sort.
textByHashes.55e08756a7e8430eb27652927b2a7dfc8b11fe84: I haven't heard of your sort before.
textByHashes.3a6a15ea31f05b8020af0a4023f0dc6389f7f880: Can I buy some leather then?
textByHashes.7661e928549fdb878c0dae7c02da4adeb55dbefb: Er... he just looks like any other camel to me.
textByHashes.97bb6bcc60e66ec03e548bd93e57098a5c6049b8: You're a camel, I'm not. Maybe you can see these things better.
textByHashes.24ef724effe9931209ca1c4ca32adaa99a0e9e3f: Why would you want to do that?
textByHashes.9a0f97f97c021c30585fda07b1598164d014ec70: I haven't noticed them do that.
textByHashes.be83c8eac18f89b545111044e226ae452e3c3273: So they feed off our desire for things?
textByHashes.8e756572f6b700ff1feffcbe6b50a496734480f5: So the more experienced implings have the more desirable items?
textByHashes.ce2c1d99015c512ac0354ae94b248024f74fa71c: Can I catch these implings, then?
textByHashes.1232537976b560d7b53e8e3ebe9b31a83f08b125: I've heard I may find dragon equipment in Puro-Puro.
textByHashes.a118a1bb8c8bcf40e5245422df171a78b688500c: Can you remind me how to catch implings again?
textByHashes.1d5d7f0197d7cf6ffabdae4dd2d32734c1d4dfe2: How do you make anchovy oil then?
textByHashes.13a348d49516b87ce80a8d2be25712f24aeca420: Where do I make these jars?
textByHashes.0ba1630aa7adfc6df57ebb573b1dca4dd1955db5: Is there anywhere I can buy these jars?
textByHashes.15375958b00bbe6c8ec8f49a97e928a06fbf7163: Tell me more about these thieving imps.
textByHashes.60283fb1003db81ce8652733a3dbc2cb830047d5: So what's this equipment you can give me, then?
textByHashes.16aa12692ff51550fafc8c7b30a0b488b39368fc: Could you store some equipment for me?
textByHashes.7c320dabac1942430b08c04d4cb5aa23e6444ec9: Can you tell me about the wheat?
textByHashes.2309bc285e6fd5fecf6187bffb845791d720d24f: What if I didn't want to become stronger pushing through the wheat?
textByHashes.9c519d93fc2639c4196737f67f2a42d71368fc1c: You gave me oil to stop me getting stronger. What if I changed my mind?
textByHashes.26835fad5152e58d72fb204d8688af11641d4a7a: Can I buy a few impling jars?
textByHashes.dc1a0804b5b5e61037767ed81d5015d134666a6a: Can you tell me a story?
textByHashes.2ca745533215e48f0b39f87311570e32ee5ca959: Can you tell me how to get rich?
textByHashes.d1749f0333a01813da6ebf1fcf1c52d45d7233e7: Thank you. I'll leave you to your knitting now.
textByHashes.d2732e358654284213d6173d37ec741837ba658e: No, keep your hands off my tea.
textByHashes.cfbccfadf4ed85582ce72246a8da62bfb4c64e70: What a lovely name, he sure is handsome.
textByHashes.eec10b3d4afac108766bc4c11a5e123662af3b02: Before I go, I think I heard Santa saying you aren't allowed things on your back in the games.
textByHashes.85c1bdb58a928f8ce7b995595efe082972ecc6ad: Hello, please can you open the gate?
textByHashes.075bd84acf1475d9a40bd7caea8344cc7fcfb6a2: Hello there. Where are Islwyn and Eluned?
textByHashes.35e672bcb08fee7910a2b5d3383c26c7f2ccb3dd: But I need someone to re-enchant my teleport crystal.
textByHashes.da1e3aade8156cc55620fbf5b4add62dbe738e7d: I have this potion which I thought might help ease your itching.
textByHashes.fadbc24307e989e0b201cf40f19fffe71404d5a2: Sorry... I was just trying to help.
textByHashes.77f01ec41b0b45ca11809898ee7b7405d5dea4c1: Can I have a PK skull, please?
textByHashes.9f8e51a49599f2339ecd9de6cfdbd7a1ec0b9d1f: How do I play Bounty Hunter?
textByHashes.89826b3b3d300b5f52a0266287e9845dd95e4908: What level Targets might I be assigned?
textByHashes.f239c9e3fe450f3fdd2ec82928a7fdc0b6dff9bc: I'd like to manage my Coffer.
textByHashes.84a54d1a5d3f0cdeb38d95f58bfa0fa0af499be9: Can you make my PK skull last longer?
textByHashes.de671ccbdc6cec13006eb1c061722da04181e193: What do the different colour skulls mean?
textByHashes.b974d3ea9065c067fb619e5aaef6c3f136401486: Yes, but can you show me my PIN settings?
textByHashes.f0007703f36b3b3e770bdf32503b7c065bb069ac: Yes, but I'd like to collect items now.
textByHashes.224795cd9b9675e102606d1063a340972ab857fa: Yes, but I'd like to buy more bank slots.
textByHashes.9936b05bc670ade4cb175006c5f66c6037b52137: Yes thanks, and I'll keep hold of it too.
textByHashes.be71583df7de19cc12ab9c78bb04d26f53f7570b: Can I have a Dwarven Stout?
textByHashes.4ac5c59249911f68f61eda851723a0c8f9ca130f: I don't feel like any of those.
textByHashes.3577db85697f3d5f11b96f07e1573cd79da398b6: No thanks, I like empty beer glasses.
textByHashes.003a2ffaedb98af4d4c2529d8aac9797829dd7ae: What's this about the party room?
textByHashes.495a516f2f7ca1e15fc04d1ce4ef4e6262a99b03: Actually, I'd like to ask you about something else.
textByHashes.b53742b9f6b4d310591809daf23a8f5cb104e777: Does this aggressive business model always work?
textByHashes.f57e96ec9952c6b22deed28cf5f4c445a2b7df57: I suppose there are. Have you always been a hairdresser?
textByHashes.3bec3f8789ae9c239c4f09e06cf51035d7ea27b8: Who is that girl over there?
textByHashes.bc9ee9af23638690220f83302dffe4c4e138b342: It's sweet of you to help her like that.
textByHashes.e5feb67616fa913145fb65eb8d14b13840829eb5: If you work for the bank, what are you doing here?
textByHashes.46cbad1bcea4aed52531ea9b23a6f45b0955ade9: Can I access my bank account by speaking to you?
textByHashes.b16e9ea46e24ff35e19df64b0c1625da373c1e42: I don't have the runes on me. Let me open my account and then I'll give them to you.
textByHashes.bd738a2a042bbd8da6c072049584262b941c1c27: That's preposterous! I'm not paying runes to withdraw my own stuff.
textByHashes.a622b0fd112d459e1fe4c720ce0f4f0f177cf632: I would like to set up a quick payment deal.
textByHashes.72a511d2038ec03d02b9bc8e80b96536668b22c4: What if I don't have enough, and how do I cancel this deal?
textByHashes.906acf852d51bef5b07ea23841f343c89d9e07b4: I need to talk to you about our quick payment deal.
textByHashes.05b1585a088e806ac75ef96524e67c23191ce30d: I have forgotten which rune I am using for quick payments...
textByHashes.906892e751162aeeaff46dad7fb95e5b09bbd332: I would like to cancel our quick payment deal.
textByHashes.7738546b4f90f893341c012b46e0fe3f9b8aee3f: I'm new to this place. Where am I?
textByHashes.e035cbffccef3b92c32ac684cda3fe478521f679: Interesting. So what can I do here?
textByHashes.7b983724a3a442f5128507280ce5dc4461a88ff8: How do you record the points I have earned?
textByHashes.352d1fcd669216248222080f4eafd855d36315a1: Can you explain the different portals?
textByHashes.da0c2edbd936373391ccb6d001f42f59ead3acc9: What will I be doing in there?
textByHashes.617ab7301ea0dab7b67958da4f5ec31e833c42e8: What will I have to do?
textByHashes.4ea6358c2cb11ded8e0892e16f28ecfae85e60cd: What's the difference between the shapes?
textByHashes.6cfce43f30f100258278148759d84d61638d6470: But what do I have to do in there?
textByHashes.d7ef0a1fb463fd3d9e13c726a4189433d866b808: What else do I get from this besides bruises?
textByHashes.1f9d241d502e6fd476a03c0702d676647d738a83: Can you tell me about this place again?
textByHashes.674ec98d1efdc253295f9ccba841620eed858add: How do you record the Pizazz Points I have earned?
textByHashes.5fd1eb2fc760629a73197883e8193c1dc6a40e2c: Well, it turns out Olbertus was corrupted by the coin he stole, I managed to get the coin from him and returned it to the relief, he should be fine now.
textByHashes.6d7830a4b41865088decfd79ef4e013f654a443c: Now that you're free, why don't you leave?
textByHashes.4dadf56746b78934e56672a5bcef3bef88596f0c: Oh, wow! I can see why that wouldn't help business.
textByHashes.dac3049268707f10b2e22e1f011d8e1ad61d7457: I would like to buy some equipment.
textByHashes.be454683ebed9e219ab308aa13d9732d97bc53bb: Uhld? I've seen that inscribed on that big old statue down below. What's that about?
textByHashes.4da0472a78234e4c4e1b3efce09c674d1d3ce531: Perhaps they expected you, a descendant of Uhld, to fill me in on the matter.
textByHashes.db93431008bd40cecf40bf4ac3d4118e2c5446fb: Thanks for the history lesson, Erdan.
textByHashes.61481ae2a19e64d7b42e726fe131845d23eccbb8: Looks like you need a bit of a rest.
textByHashes.5c90fc8db8ca0cacf760888e09888af4b23cd0fc: How can I get a house?
textByHashes.2995b1f399b7d6b7cfa5b8f96ed2b9f063b9a0bd: I haven't got 1,000 coins on me.
textByHashes.fccc694def65b8e419ac61640a6e06a9f2136dd5: Looks like an angry snow storm to me...
textByHashes.3b76ca8c4e423eaaccef6268266dde57cc243519: Tell me about the Bruma tree.
textByHashes.e92b0634e1e26d74a77bf69157f72befd6898896: Is Xeric really such a bad guy?
textByHashes.30f7f3b084bb81df4931868f2dcc57ba32641d8c: You never get sick of partying, do you?
textByHashes.9a8aa7066fcd08e7442957ac7e5b8800c1a4ab81: Can I kill the dragons up here?
textByHashes.90c441e29bc7c82d8783e3f5191c2cb3fda04732: Why are you dressed like that?
textByHashes.37e49cd36b9d542cf51e36e46b07703bd01daa30: Well, maybe you'd want something to help you fight the dragons? Wizard boots don't sound very useful.
textByHashes.6ffa3e14fca71604c837d44922b3d15d0fc5c550: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!
textByHashes.754687ba4766c1e144c778618b13aa47d9490032: But I wan't to leave now.
textByHashes.1f8e6eadefd6a83a520569b349e61c8c04569d35: What gives him the right to lock me up? I demand to see a lawyer! I know my rights!
textByHashes.0a934c067b60a6c8ff98d1392598515d776d2120: Let's get out of here before that cat notices.
textByHashes.51fe75fd3db60cfc737cbab7159ff36deab6dbc2: I am not a slave, I am a free person!
textByHashes.f586be53494d124539dc9cd4b013d0ebb1e5ab61: A slave?? I will have nothing to do with you. Is that clear? Absolutely nothing.
textByHashes.5c8f8de0c57711eefe6e1495c0ba25b32bb8e4ce: I will not make any deals with you. I'm a human. I will not be pushed, numbered, meowed at, teleported or enslaved. My life is my own.
textByHashes.e9a3ed44b3b7d1f396ccf99ff5fd58cc1d492de3: How is it possible that you're talking?
textByHashes.2e5abe71f0dd96a70f4902883df861525105201f: Meowing?? Why would I be meowing?
textByHashes.85549f66360526c4d0e1deff2a9bc3e4a5ddb1cc: I think I'm getting a headache...
textByHashes.f741f8608228856a832d63e17151c2863ce1c5f6: What did you do to Bob?
textByHashes.4e6f8c30bd4c72c94f3b4ca6f5c905dc5951f64e: What, you mean this is... like some kind of mirror land?
textByHashes.e323339b4b4e4ac2be5380c5d669ea1c7749f5a6: How come it's so far from Hosidius?
textByHashes.9c37fb663364a1fe21f458ed84a329027e785ba4: Yeah, I can do some cooking. Well, my level's , anyway.
textByHashes.6a955e131654f2eef9b4091021e5a8d3a1400725: Yeah, I can do some cooking.
textByHashes.840b25f7f37d2ccc85b8545495f79643f667f377: Hello there. How are you doing?
textByHashes.e08bdb4c1870fe26f87dcecdefd3bb628ba7be92: I hope you're not considering mutiny!
textByHashes.903e3cad4cffd0f3c9ae25af31b64294ccb6b45a: I lost my weapon fighting the Blue Moon. Could I have it back?
textByHashes.acc9a8de281a669e52d20af554ffea9284c08cbb: I found some essence whilst fighting the lesser nagua.
textByHashes.164c1106b0572d5f064481bc396ad65a6eacf513: Yeah, about that... I don't really like this one. Could I have a different one?
textByHashes.fcf55bcc9fdcb96704bf59336fd0765b5e45e206: Oh... Can I have it back?
textByHashes.9b1f9006ffd80a30af517b70a0e698df20c02446: This is the same thing I just gave you!
textByHashes.cf780d4b829438bc7ca38453fea19ae493867798: Actually, I don't dislike it that much. I think I'll keep it.
textByHashes.5e217878300442415ca1d4a1b941c2791a95bbf4: I wasn't able to stop those cultists.
textByHashes.63c5c958ac5fb6bdc78243471b593c50abe18352: That's true I suppose. I guess on that note, I should get going.
textByHashes.e8eca4a907aaa12ded57565aee0fca541c95e16f: Interesting. Have you been doing it long?
textByHashes.ca5181b85c7ced5f82771afe445ca7c602de3cd5: Hmm, yes well. I'm sure it's all fascinating, but I...
textByHashes.5b1609bd35bc040512f5d238ca229220c7294b86: Yawn. Oh, I'm sorry but I really must be getting on. I think my giraffe needs feeding.
textByHashes.5c8cba4e3f9682b264e2cadc09a4279bc57b3249: Giraffe. Sorry, but he gets cranky without enough sugar. Bye now!
textByHashes.000d873fc6965bfda872d1f4f2cff2e206cb75f3: Can I buy some fishing supplies please?
textByHashes.efb17b8a8bfefbbc307d9d004441f57add83ec3e: What's going on here? Where is everyone?
textByHashes.245f7323148e409ebcdc7872d05cbe4484dae64e: Were you expecting to meet someone here?
textByHashes.287ea7bb4eccf1e9fdf0ea76c425ac89bf9ae7e2: Why? Is she not particularly local to you?
textByHashes.2b223c658c174acccbcf9155f80bcdbb82543d86: So you never really get any privacy?
textByHashes.63f52aacb507fb09da6a13f3db82e301589084f2: Not at all. Sorry if it seemed like I was.
textByHashes.d6e2b6f0d30a470fe8edccdea35a1782cff39960: Do you think she's just running a little late?
textByHashes.ec431b0ef1215548f3455dfe282422bb6bdfd84d: Could she maybe have considered another tree magical?
textByHashes.64dee5ff3a0c87b2a3859bb0d33d28840cc20188: Well, I'll keep my fingers crossed for you. I'm sure you'll be able to find one another soon!
textByHashes.3a10189e36011fc6fcfaa2f3e61666ed6cdacfe8: Hang on... I think I might have met this Xilo.
textByHashes.011984a7d340672c88ac60ca6dda1689447c2b02: By a tree to the north of here.
textByHashes.7f3823cd795d8c8c86d70c9dec5fe9bf5a7288ff: Well, I'm happy to see you together again. Now, I'm sure you have a lot of catching up to do. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.b20967cce75f0429f7d519fb51b7c64cb95f4244: No, I can't... can I go into the factory?
textByHashes.d7c92c0cae3b9e079e1e570e7657d0daf646b63c: I'm sorry, I'm looking for the blast furnace?
textByHashes.124f0ea01a208eddad7bdccd084a663b6ba7f797: No, you look like a hard-working dwarf, but can you please tell me where the blast furnace is?
textByHashes.50c1284a840583c22cb462861868fde31fb17cad: If you were any shorter you wouldn't exist.
textByHashes.f01bb3aab4f3fed39ac6eaf56bb66affe3a8a727: What are you dwarves doing in this factory?
textByHashes.018cdf253aa1f476c31940b65c453516286595a1: But what company? I thought there were all these different companies?
textByHashes.a965527d1ad0b4ba2e00fd8efcf4359d1750a804: And what exactly are you doing here?
textByHashes.5c4da78526a9792233e196bfc548d6c3a63f4597: I'd like to access my bank, please.
textByHashes.c9d6e820f7bea0d5af27a46f255f56dc8025a48b: Sure, I'll buy some rotten fruit.
textByHashes.4b62ae803a5b006a0d3527b7df7a4d4ea49f2357: No, I'm not giving you money for rotten fruit.
textByHashes.14fb2981e2263c80720a6e7f13a71f8a3af89c02: Hello, my name is . Who are you?
textByHashes.2d70010a53aa1ead728c5928ca25fb7deeb54467: What's that crop circle thing doing here?
textByHashes.45f1f8ef18129ff62847b70739c5a9b80da61663: Oh yes, thanks Aery. It didn't go anywhere in the meantime, then?
textByHashes.faf6d0e7c1dd31b62dafc8c16be8f14282f65063: Jolly good. I can come back and visit Puro-Puro whenever I want then. Brilliant!
textByHashes.0530c2a9f4e274a25bad809b9e594d361f4aab05: Well, most of us prefer lobsters to be perfectly honest, but there must be something interesting there.
textByHashes.95fa0914a6298e88675f2715f371e9446159d5fb: Do you remember what his name was?
textByHashes.d1201320c3bfca82cb428866ebb7ba5469bc7e6f: Right, thanks! I'll have a chat with him when I go. Maybe he'll know what's going on.
textByHashes.3b681ee9a74095b6f98e08f84934cfe952839db7: So what are these implings then?
textByHashes.dabc8c831c1e965aa2f41e00210147d54658961f: So how would I get hold of what they are carrying, then?
textByHashes.1f6ce76072a97964554d56399f8d2e160db554a9: Well, if they were carrying something useful. Maybe I could catch them with a big net - like butterflies.
textByHashes.1de2cf8a291b1a3bba398b8e69bb5bd2fa8e4d80: Can you be any more precise?
textByHashes.e47089d882688e7796e4ef65e4ff4b4ab14d8a4b: While I'm on the subject do you have any dragon stuff I can have?
textByHashes.ed80e4310475b6ad5f9b5407c8c87bbe1a9a49ee: Oh, sorry. I didn't realise it belonged to anybody.
textByHashes.f7fa306ef2cfde4d618dffac4d25bf8017379b5f: What have you got for me?
textByHashes.28886a2e23b40b43b8d86b1a842313038be01120: Err, Godfather, I can't help noticing that there seems to be Orcs wandering around Zanaris.
textByHashes.2689b76bb0df48a8716dfb24a1bf1f427f716354: What about healing humans? Lots of adventurers must get hurt fighting the Otherworldly beings.
textByHashes.9ee8eb1678c1e9ecd51a810813943fb87c85a773: How much do you charge to heal someone, then?
textByHashes.bcb0715b7ede2af71662d6c31f5235745d7685e7: Only 11 hitpoints for a diamond? Doesn't that seem a bit steep?
textByHashes.fc084bdca144496cc4fba02efd99e659f2b098c3: How is the Fairy Queen doing?
textByHashes.3fbc4680a57c3a0a822210e566de9f8833b70006: Why aren't you in the war room with the Fairy Queen and her advisors?
textByHashes.fab6414c87f4a123bad34da42aa7da26186e2ab3: How do crops and such survive down here? Surely they need a bit of sunlight?
textByHashes.78c06deace99e35c34f7934d2e0c4e42f53c6e87: What's so good about this place?
textByHashes.acfb38015dbea230a54f3a99e972cab4a82ad650: Have you managed to work out a plan yet?
textByHashes.9d9e06d63335f33160de7f90e79617040c101e25: How goes the council of war?
textByHashes.435acff7e80a2f68f8a2abae2c216db92253ec9b: I think I'll stay down here a bit longer.
textByHashes.4d59880fc148e03e83d926b9c1d3f1105b8997ef: No, I don't know that either.
textByHashes.e8314c7d3819090f7ded224eda63a6edd0a203d9: Do you write about anything in particular?
textByHashes.48454c44a981069dbc60f17135ebd343cb50f603: Surely the lyrics for such a song would be enough to help you remember?
textByHashes.af251a7389057fc0736aa1bd05afee33c305e4d4: I'll keep a look out for them! Goodbye Falo.
textByHashes.c7d11d6c02686fb14f751d86d065c3dbfbea8bc1: Can you sing me the song again?
textByHashes.6de2376fc754c4c0f7ed08844507ca8cc9fb0662: I'm glad to have helped, hopefully you'll never forget again!
textByHashes.5fc542a2abd0e1c1e1d8f11c04d9c9219426ee58: I would like to join your crew.
textByHashes.d4254e90657b6b1ddf5cab4325aca47272306672: No, that sounds very reasonable in fact.
textByHashes.9741b6a726049bd5042b714b159d4764fabe106d: Who are you, and what is this place?
textByHashes.fe174009fd6859643ca67cbaaa2ea0fc6b408cdc: Yes, of course, any pirate knows who you are.
textByHashes.06f9e2c6fae03a4b8375b5afe0b0613157fed2c1: So with two stills you have plenty of 'rum' right?
textByHashes.c71235688f6c1d133aa7edd179f0319847b902a5: How do I help you brew 'Rum'?
textByHashes.9b2cd58ef9e831e8b2f008406014e97f9e798743: Send it up the tree? How does that work?
textByHashes.8eac1c15c235a7c01a3582967f83dba15b0438e8: Can I ask about something else?
textByHashes.33ecb70137f0799896b78a93571e17472b4112aa: So...how would I go about sabotaging the enemy still?
textByHashes.b4b88f49fecc7595fee604824cc7296186cf7c58: Where can I get Scrapey tree bark...and why do I get the feeling I won't like the answer?
textByHashes.da8da48e840933a709ed5cd5b05e6f8e435ad6da: How... how can you drink this stuff?
textByHashes.fd69267eefd73e5fe2679665d81e17bc9bdcb09b: So where do I get these grubs from anyway?
textByHashes.f13e60d3aaae5e1e41d0401980dae5ec211d70d6: And here was me thinking that nothing could be more disgusting than Braindeath 'Rum'.
textByHashes.eb583bc9d3047a337d2c74fa8b9c032422ce2891: Wait, no, that question makes me sound like I haven't a clue what I'm doing.
textByHashes.ab5cfed881ff4400072504804e94ee5a6213a8c6: Where can I get buckets in there?
textByHashes.31e287bbeaa34721729559b75aef88d1cccf1327: Hold on, do I have to add anything disgusting and/or potential lethal to the water before I pour it in?
textByHashes.df9b353c92cb73a77e5f9faca1d0a383c8af4539: What sort of coloured water are we talking about here?
textByHashes.5e87c59672bebc5c2109b4774d942a0e6538273f: So I just empty the kettle into the hopper, right?
textByHashes.7c6f1eba6dc2ea02bb7cf8beb70eb663fd5faf62: Use it on a monkey...of course.
textByHashes.490df06eb757436558e4ac7a8e01dcc51b437562: How do I repair the still?
textByHashes.1546d04665633fdc3c671193677a552526fac75a: How do I repair pipes and the pump?
textByHashes.c293e8a599c2e8223f91160bcd4d0fb6e3ffa902: Is that going to be a problem? I mean, I can jump across I think.
textByHashes.ab3ffa4a53d8b9a5282dacd89bd4a8fa3fbe5391: Where do I get all this stuff anyway?
textByHashes.68cb9f77c13946f711dc6c3d3eca3ea8a66a5ab4: Ok, I think I've heard enough.
textByHashes.d115a019b7428bc16331310bb5a16370865d1401: So what will you give me for helping out?
textByHashes.51f7892b19cf1a0d27a20968fde1469be539c651: What can I use these pieces of eight for?
textByHashes.31483c026f2fdcea6bde358785d98b3cd6c51d6e: Well, I can, err, cook a bit...
textByHashes.582ff9b5213c98ed90aa0145aef30b7b8f2dd5be: Is there anything interesting to do around here?
textByHashes.0390aece9b879a168242784d8df7d6a29e43f676: What's the problem....oh, I'm wearing this big scary mask! I'd better take it off before I start talking to the natives.
textByHashes.7770b083fcb2dcb5b0b073494b92a655593346ac: Then why are you here and not him?
textByHashes.4861bc9a8bc6d48f303bed6349a2598b0f19b840: And you're up to the task? What a grown up boy you are! Mummy and daddy must be very pleased!
textByHashes.5719e90543e0a2b77453caed45f8f1093472f28f: Can you show me the prices of ores and bars?
textByHashes.74df0ab4791551939215127b082088f028d7967c: I best go and speak with someone more my height.
textByHashes.73cea09c4528e0e4da18dae12705cad5e819e14a: Well, I hope things start to look up for you.
textByHashes.411c56b97ea909fe52fc98234df182517a39097c: Hello there. Sorry about your sheep...
textByHashes.a0d058f66de6b99367896020b63ff0d8c65ac595: Oh... I'm sure it was nothing.
textByHashes.35da8d182d5b677b1d786f6c930a441bf4e68c2a: I'd like to work on your farm.
textByHashes.49a5f282e1c7c5307f1fd6ccd1ce93ce5011986c: I'm here to do some tithing. Blood tithing.
textByHashes.c5cf0c3313700a17d894c4f612e961bae8c9c030: Are you the 'Gric' this entry mentions?
textByHashes.d4ca4374e4110fb229f5bdde9cd0b4fe84b3cd40: Interesting, so he must have waited a while before having children?
textByHashes.4e6587d94d2948abf4fed1b8eddfee4ea884abaf: Oh right, have you seen Rose recently?
textByHashes.447baf365a5b523313b8c1f1292d73af2b096753: Thanks for the information, Gric. Perhaps it'll all make sense once I've found the other pages.
textByHashes.658e5cde740cfd0ea6e351fe8631100ebee0a670: Yes, I know what I'm doing.
textByHashes.a35f8debbbabbd71ef8638783d56bba1292e833a: I'm an expert - don't ask me this again.
textByHashes.e7361a233e3d5bd21635dc7f11f3311a9b0a2339: You look like a farmer. Don't see many farmers around here.
textByHashes.1ba9edf5632385fba7ff18641de038ba716c1312: You travel all the way out to Shayzien just for a few beers? Don't you have a pub back home?
textByHashes.51ebe8f5d9ab5066f9e44bd1332dcc09874e2d99: Well I'd better leave you to it then!
textByHashes.fd2b2b0142e2c9f6c636cd6202953ad891e17923: Greetings. It's nice to see another adventurer here.
textByHashes.cbec13262c71f415e149d82a9d4796a7dc4bd297: Yeah, there are many different giants here for sure. How did you manage to get this far? Those giants are quite hostile to visitors.
textByHashes.fdccdf276347ee96382fc8a813792ab5464a5af1: So what is a gourmet chef doing cooking for bandits?
textByHashes.99ef8d90dcf9eca9b8dc99e829b4a7b978680759: Can I have some pizza too?
textByHashes.27cae6377f02fbaa2dc9e3c3360aed499474db0d: Oh if I have to pay I don't want any.
textByHashes.8af4438fe7b44290b024ed9457eb50970982409d: Okay, I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.4abd7bf5e6cdb7dd39e5c94c60fafd27d4607af3: Yeah... I, uh, thought you said something else.
textByHashes.1195a1a35d808e07d114370a3aa4572f0085f2e6: Oh, sorry. I'm not from this world.
textByHashes.2f0b7d1c6a777e8589c5159d80b90a90d6fd3682: You don't understand. This is an online game!
textByHashes.a982d912737b8ccc6a5601091528edea6c29a063: I am - do you like my disguise?
textByHashes.0f1cb53be12801c647ee39d5dd31e64ea8c4fafc: Ok, ok, I was only joking...
textByHashes.63d6d3d2a59e3d6c9c3921822ddae345024b8ec7: I'm looking for a new quest.
textByHashes.619cde407317427fafd98845a533507b16e43d4d: The Wise Old Man of Draynor Village said you might reward me if I brought you this.
textByHashes.878bad18a66a4e87447294e221071f197a595dcb: Calm and Peace? Sounds like the quest for me! How should I start?
textByHashes.e0176a61bef1db487610a1c4dfe8b34886c1725f: Do the people here mostly worship Saradomin?
textByHashes.d3feb6161f75eb050fec2503e8e8eedb44cb1ae5: I am always looking for a quest.
textByHashes.a19f8cbfe5d55e64b44a21323d626f51afc0f8ea: No, I prefer just to kill things.
textByHashes.271309296702add30b3b4096f542d2c4c0584c0f: Can you recommend a good bar?
textByHashes.53fc8ca2ed4df87b938758f03d9a8fc812b2cd4b: The Wise Old Man of Draynor Village sent you this message about your drinking habits!
textByHashes.f7d88a8cf2b7190949c24dd5005a825d48b681f1: Stop sitting around in a house in a swamp and go and do something useful!
textByHashes.a36aeec5b8f6b69ac8df32fbbeeb3a3d671ac99b: Would you chop my tree down for me?
textByHashes.241bb83c1120bd880acc7a9b6697372d3eb1fb0a: Yes, you're right - I'll do it myself.
textByHashes.c56e8c5c76e878d6aae4e78ed3582874234e7ae4: I can't be bothered - I'd rather pay you to do it.
textByHashes.5d3f21d81f8dac229195a2b11154f51fbdfdbe3d: So cat, what do you think of the name?
textByHashes.2b387a6a4e411d5258c7fd8c073e7ea028842ea1: Can you tell me more about wily cats?
textByHashes.185e98796b9096d065f855d2fa6ce7d2b85d57f4: Can you tell me more about the pits?
textByHashes.97efc8ef21fa59e79db85012d7cb26ce90e47cfe: Do you have any pointers for me and my cat?
textByHashes.62b8cf7dfa6c7a5a56b2f5d9dbab7742377170b8: What would be the best tactic to adopt then?
textByHashes.6fd68051724cf3ba19b1b53b242e13a1832b54e5: I will not risk my cat's life.
textByHashes.27d9683ad44b276c8c886c63423541fce2d758e1: I think I would adopt a very defensive strategy
textByHashes.bf432fcbd572e80645cb96c0520d1b842e7e6b9a: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.
textByHashes.d3eefeb7f0d30af31876c79fc6bdd3deffc88400: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.
textByHashes.ce9e7a76e4c19df7cb06617a0c717a308066c391: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy.
textByHashes.2681a87b20b1ebbc5b137d9075aaeacccdc92a9c: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.
textByHashes.8f7e83afa3e8520582deb59e4ad34a5f79d0baaa: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?
textByHashes.d04931081989806d2bd4583a96bffd12791f594d: So are there any drawbacks to owning them?
textByHashes.39c6fb0586e54047c48b6c7ac7efad3b54538094: What's the best way to exercise them?
textByHashes.1351bd2ddd1fafd700dcc1897cfe392bf9e420a5: What happens if I neglect my cat? Not that I would!
textByHashes.2e070f2412bad939bb5c1c7c5a06b6531b92963e: Can I retrain my lazy cat?
textByHashes.661d3bd0f81129ef83b8c9e464dc941accee14ec: Hello, the face said that you were looking to talk with me.
textByHashes.b4f3baf337d7e0db29dacd1e0d6eeeff4fd922aa: So you will show me how to turn my cat into a wily cat?
textByHashes.9b47d512a336f91e63c932579749c6715ceb409f: Well experience has taught me to expect as much, what must I do?
textByHashes.75c34d8e0781b23278dc96686ef410b38c65821c: But why? Why one stroke, why not a slow eradication?
textByHashes.a5b84613a0461e8cfc69b5479fa6aac6f928cc67: I am touched that you want to write an epic poem about me, but why can't you write the poem about seagulls or daffodils or something?
textByHashes.b48d1bc6ea44343615e5354f46210f739b0b74d9: So why do you need me to repeat your most heroic of feats?
textByHashes.15c62d27e6ddb3845658e81043434c24283e5a1b: So can you tell me how you went about achieving this?
textByHashes.0bf12f64e693062547d422511f434f4bc4023d05: [sigh] Why does it always have to be like this?
textByHashes.3db87bae6a087e80316eedebf2a455e026efd3d1: I'd better get to it then.
textByHashes.cb7dbef6adb56f61d84ca0b792ff95d0b1f301f4: I think I know how to carry out the task.
textByHashes.5ad899d378c83d72b7aea7cc82f8017976d17487: Ha! I did it. Did you see me?
textByHashes.5f1b15082b526f1fc769e91f3780ff6ff388697e: Can you show me how to train my cat into a wily cat?
textByHashes.c59697bca687c98dd9b6dbf678b5a3088d5c527b: Sorry I took so long, , it took a while to come up with a name for you.
textByHashes.7bcd337e0b88f6ca621385272054601b770ff73b: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy
textByHashes.f125761f3e26234a0fc96202e1cb8af6ab215cbf: So is there any drawbacks to owning them?
textByHashes.8105a176555eae0a2ed24b6dac9e3a3f1a2fae75: So how do I look after them then?
textByHashes.da335b05a6a93c0b2a564916c04e32b219d60fcd: What happens if I neglect my cat.. not that I would or anything?
textByHashes.25652d92662442ee2d19b20ea748e50c1fead65f: No, but thanks for the offer.
textByHashes.91ad8c32ab6873009f2ae7dfe83e1e0143c12cf3: If it's a ruin, what's the point in being here?
textByHashes.57dc388f5324d0d07e8d7afd1bf54951a62dba12: Quite a dangerous place for a town, don't you think?
textByHashes.e511b24d4d04d0ea2cc2162363455b986432ee43: Thanks for the information! I'll take a look around.
textByHashes.4d92939adb1d148dbee84379fb75392bf1b80833: What can you do for me?
textByHashes.1cd152638143b68019dc8dbbf01d738bc09cda2e: Okay, switch my respawn to Ferox Enclave.
textByHashes.33444a66d4926cdc9a7bda06eb112f6a6dae95bb: Never mind, I'm just looking around.
textByHashes.69af8011b934f0ccda5ccdc77294a9ebd03a7318: Can I talk to you about my respawn location?
textByHashes.a3e678e6de6b061979182085a519a2882db74f15: Please switch my respawn back to the Enclave.
textByHashes.01f92a3eafa38b6018cb95c4985be0c39f9047a4: Yes, switch my respawn to the Enclave.
textByHashes.e92ed9cd625c2d2a492195be0541a156afc246a8: No, I don't want to respawn in the Enclave.
textByHashes.9b463adb1a0d3d15593d121c8d56e0a444948d9e: Please switch my respawn back to Lumbridge.
textByHashes.f4f2fe6e470ce3d19b85cd55fd167e47e0762ef9: Yes, switch my respawn to Lumbridge.
textByHashes.70dc94074dc88fc28f1779121308dde713d43958: No, I'll keep the Enclave respawn.
textByHashes.398fdb776013e81930e4be834f261d143db4f001: It's working for me so far, thanks.
textByHashes.33c5b909c06b7783c6c95f6fe4c897a98a6a684c: Hello, where does your ferry go?
textByHashes.b8f7b55875f759377084f490753808a0996fd6e6: The Spirit Anglers? Who are they?
textByHashes.22f2a29010844fc46d088b5bb986f6e38547bf10: That sounds important! Can I help?
textByHashes.b3960d9c48ed3fbc9d8a6692a654647677fa9b10: Do I have to pay for the ferry?
textByHashes.8ca5e4c7f832200e23b0674fb964f2e503b30abc: I certainly did! How is the fight against Tempoross going?
textByHashes.d1e313332c54bd8566dfd7a93a8e084ffbb68fe1: That's good! Can you ferry me to the Spirit Anglers?
textByHashes.32c7bb386374acec045e1b963c4af344e210dcb6: Can you ferry me to the Spirit Anglers?
textByHashes.4626db2253073d16c83eabcbcd0bdb214eeef2f8: Why are your prices so high?
textByHashes.7cea8b21af5ef95bb58e9414cb92010f5d66e30d: But all your stuff is overpriced junk!
textByHashes.57b990179d23abe630132904526e9927b0be3989: Very nice, thank you. It's a remarkable island you have here.
textByHashes.21c40ab424185e93df40b3409771ce9b87e85593: Well, in that case, I wish you good luck.
textByHashes.fe8b57858a5731068269793f85190769b62b50f4: Yes please. What are you selling?
textByHashes.7d4c7fa57aa7b4b25d23e44afeeb255fe23354ea: Do you mind me asking how much you have won?
textByHashes.6a252adfb3c197067dd457d51f01216e5a8ed9e4: Sounds like there's a story here?
textByHashes.2f7ec39e6d58c108124c573e4789ef2de7f99380: So he crashed the boat and then decided to open a bar?
textByHashes.693ef5c3ed24f7493460218fd5af654a44e5b169: Where do you get your fish from?
textByHashes.fba3b4471124bab56e62b3c211294a4b48e84658: Thanks. I'll let you get back to fishing.
textByHashes.52fc745f4e67c12494e984df0fc394fd414d48de: I'll let you get back to it.
textByHashes.f9e3951ab6c28c38f20bd5bedcab8b327dd9814b: Can you teach me the basics of fishing please?
textByHashes.152c035e56c4ac465c9ec71c0485e8faae65391c: I already know about the basics of fishing, got any tips?
textByHashes.8de966c74c4d20691eee5fc6db0033e5053a022f: Any advice for an advanced fisher?
textByHashes.f5342c964462f68471d3c30f802565d465f990a0: Where and what should I fish?
textByHashes.acb18e6e431e7770188ce751694591e7d88d9467: Oookay...sure, a parrot, on your shoulder.
textByHashes.8decf4aac652298565e316595c8aaaff34954435: Wow, are you okay? What happend to you?
textByHashes.b5cc3d05f5b626aeecd3b063f1f42c63dfd2d6e8: I'm fairly certain that if I did that, it would fall off!
textByHashes.04113d802cf052bdf0caaf379b151cb267d2b1bd: I just made sure to prioritise looking out for the arrows. The fire was fairly easy to get through if I just made sure to take one step at a time.
textByHashes.8b6f3c2cee6b8228c54b96fb96be47510e2f72f5: The place looked magnificent, gold lion statues, coffins untouched by anyone else and plenty of Hallowed marks compared to these floors. Although, the traps were significantly harder than the one below.
textByHashes.acbecaa0f5ed72ba4420eef091ada0922d45bc90: That's very true, I wish you the best of luck!
textByHashes.a668df3d81f5d0160f441dc9a9ff06346208ccb4: No one has cleared it? How hard can it be?
textByHashes.3e774ea22209ebee56a7d9dd632d2a6873bb9df4: Wow, that does sound hard. Do you have any tips for me?
textByHashes.3e71e822ee77cfe50a1bcd78a8b623ee40c472f0: Yeah... I'd imagine having an aerial view of the situation would be pretty helpful.
textByHashes.6db6704c8c74c2d16b9e6452bbbafff73aefb4a4: I didn't actually bring flax banknotes with me.
textByHashes.ca202a0d535ea42547dea6ff57debaf312edb569: Err...what am I supposed to do here again?
textByHashes.f777118048fd0915001587b8459943145ff01a50: So I have to poke the pillars that are flashing?
textByHashes.8fcc507df680ce04e49a8ff4c49f30d5170450f8: So...I'm free to go now, right?
textByHashes.0492cfc56e659970f132c7d18f87c5e6a27703f8: Yes, you're right - I'll find something more worthy of you.
textByHashes.f37f100248c80469db0b0243aff930468289bfad: Can you enchant my lyre so that the enchantment will never fade?
textByHashes.37c7fe61baa805a896122475ab6e4d24f1f9c8b1: I will come back when I have an offering worthy of this power. Goodbye.
textByHashes.3d5c3b00d116181bbf31bcedd064b59244927cb6: What have you got for sale?
textByHashes.c46137f8119017880d05b1205f8d1240d615cb1a: Hello. How's the repair work going?
textByHashes.676c63e66b2f9f6c5b39cb23733f83cdecc46254: I have an egg for you.
textByHashes.6234f720ca14efdf6a0d8dff65bb7599e7d2d21b: Okay, I'll help with your pheasants.
textByHashes.8b7bc4c632ad393429455b0a80ecba8b31ba6913: You keep a pet bat? That's a bit odd.
textByHashes.e9a60bcbf41aea7e6b52b2cefa4d44b1e121998d: Well I hope he keeps you 'mused.
textByHashes.ea301da58922f60f136390e711b8f7cd71fd2b43: I'm looking for something to kill.
textByHashes.bea4abcb7c24fb6502a2aa436a7e18dd9f10bc75: Oh me? I'm , an adventurer... I guess.
textByHashes.dfd5e81935470fec868daaf49cb184cddb6db19b: I may have killed some dragons.
textByHashes.b3cd142049eb8c96d5ce49d0a82479239f53c5b8: What grand feats are you known for?
textByHashes.f3ac29584b650e529a1f895b375fbf0990852783: None of that sounds at all boring. I look forward to finding your book.
textByHashes.14edfe0d3404662291f38939404755f6bc541ba3: What? I've literally defeated a group of dragons that threatened to kill everyone, I think I'm ready for a boar hunt.
textByHashes.c4c3060b365b492cc4722cfc1299cf676548c2c6: Just a bit. Is this the original text? It doesn't look that old...
textByHashes.3ba8dc301d7912e17e47784d1da94cb2191f0fe2: Imcandoria... Do you think that's where the Imcando dwarves originate?
textByHashes.917378314912a0519066893e6a1e95b256969f9c: That good? Everyone around here seems a little depressed.
textByHashes.d5976e9b2498eede3bbcd65694c6c23786784253: I'll leave you to your sighing. It looks like you have plenty to do.
textByHashes.4ad6b17fa1e99b9ddccfdf5250482cc1ce225fa7: It's a bit grey round here, isn't it?
textByHashes.37e242b8a3f82aa1ff546b8cce949e63168d917d: How's the King treating you then?
textByHashes.94eb0139f7fc493b81ba4d556c406b7133bb3488: Cheer up! It's not the end of the world.
textByHashes.f96c10e2c65fc534aebd9de2b77fd46dc7ac68e7: Whoa! I think you need to get out more.
textByHashes.23664edd96030d632ecedc674fbaac6ab9880434: Way of the forester? What do you mean?
textByHashes.0754cde3f4dad6dcfe7f32b0362b08b8f7717330: Sounds interesting. How can I get started?
textByHashes.fb39c78c6843c8f6871abaf9a099eb5892d43a8e: I'll do that. Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.cca19ece2d14c1a56e3bf7b9ee242e34ef44f7de: I'd like to trade with you.
textByHashes.7a6ef5de51e948add26e794952d993c675de2adc: Could you tell me more about forestry?
textByHashes.3aea5968a8d1d38c73ada610190a9d59f18b361a: Yes please. I'd be fascinated to hear what you do.
textByHashes.175cb6d45213b7cf3e66bf1d79c59eb936dae85e: That sounds good. How much will you pay me?
textByHashes.ab15415e17d2125a96707231b49dd6fd6a3e18fe: No thanks, I doubt I'll ever turn my hand to glassblowing.
textByHashes.8e4232dbf429cb4d47d40047559ea797e8d230c3: Are you mad? I've run all over the island to make this glass.
textByHashes.970035534c6d7053d836dddfaf0285c6f453461e: Sure, that sounds like a fair price.
textByHashes.17197bfdc2b19d0556101fe7ff4f0b71a936bc96: Well, actually, if you don't mind... question then.
textByHashes.c4538a82fb987ecc709bcb04399cadb5d53a7b75: Could you tell me how to make molten glass again, please?
textByHashes.9f9d22b720ebda2c4bb13437c2740e1c4432f6a0: I'm afraid I don't have that bucket with me. Could you give me another one, please?
textByHashes.4ec760d52630453ac7c7dba509363a66e3d2fdf9: I just thought I'd drop in and say hello.
textByHashes.65b8d912aecd0a210d5cd2b90f7f27d93d4898b6: Well, they are magical. Valuable as well...
textByHashes.f3fde0a09e67a10df744028383b1ba5a78e331ff: Well, that does seem to be a common career around here.
textByHashes.63558bb8a1e4b5411ca300f2f481c9b5fe1489cd: Well I had to crawl in here through a hole, do you think that's a factor?
textByHashes.bb6af316ba525af1f47fa082f43ec9452f54d439: Hello! I'm trying to cheer up the Easter Bunny, do you have any ideas?
textByHashes.db436a195f14799a37f2f97e61e80af193487ead: Okay, I'll come back later when you've worked something out.
textByHashes.4c9f1b161574b5d8173362eb03b1f54af4806792: Well, as long as it's not just me.
textByHashes.37ba87424eb19fb36bb0f87bd9a4eda33908970c: Hello again Fry, are you proceeding with the performance planning?
textByHashes.2d260276fb21bc8cd3a0aa8e2518df56ab1614db: Yes, we'd better have a go!
textByHashes.af1057047db403a89664baf6e0906d8a80f77acf: See you there in a moment.
textByHashes.bfbc73032c63c43e74fa923b7fb3ea75ae52a786: I found some old costumes we can use.
textByHashes.d7ead65164bd20a32f6b8d87bd44d6c7606141a8: I've found an old script, but I haven't read it yet.
textByHashes.3ec7db3a9abb53fc0d636f02190b268197785fe5: I've found an old script and some carrot costumes!
textByHashes.bb127b3f30f0c53f7ef5a722b2b7c9b158a7cf8a: I would show you but I seem to have misplaced it, I'll go and find it again.
textByHashes.126ddda49b23adf96089c7469b4a805c5d5bbe57: You tell me, here have a look. It seems like it's all out of order.
textByHashes.bc2228f8bd8989e4534d3a9a94ad9c316c1745e5: I can give it a go if you wash those disgusting carrot costumes.
textByHashes.cc90acfc18f3feae2f97a806ed722b6ebbe075f1: It looks good to me, let's put on the performance!
textByHashes.8f89d88bf272a5e9417b43f65dfc603ac8d593dd: Sometimes you just need a break.
textByHashes.079ef90fa39bd39396ae763504fad9112fb9c78e: I don't want to talk about my pleasure.
textByHashes.3ccfc33f573e746decc5ae21e3cfbac99fb4d0ad: What sort of things do the local villagers like?
textByHashes.e3ba43174160dceebdc4d4f1804000eb975d535b: How did the villagers ever get to try any gnome cocktails?
textByHashes.8f3db0dfec53867e7e5b9e340b117a45b37302fb: Can I take a look at what you have to sell?
textByHashes.0cdcd6466e4a74319bea7bae006b918f512c69b1: Why do you only take one sort of Gnome cocktail?
textByHashes.66223aea176c1413d677e7b6510c67c574511877: I want to ask another question.
textByHashes.9b9edd5cd93693820f94d06a8ac86cb76d7c0480: What do you dwarves do with the ore you mine?
textByHashes.1d0db52baa62ebe71e7ffb037885a25d6071f86b: Can you tell me about your skillcape?
textByHashes.150b1a2b06b696364f753f4b727ac011880556dd: I believe I can buy a Skillcape of Mining from you?
textByHashes.2a729b077d74c3d1b9dcac4e421fba8e86b2af8c: Are you any relation to Sir Galahad?
textByHashes.aa523c9235f8eb17fdce0ada97f70ebc397383f2: Do you get lonely out here on your own?
textByHashes.6a045e22b5251ba92e53682ba9eea650c7bf1eba: I think I should leave him alone. He seems a little upset right now.
textByHashes.c4d8ca35b737745eb244572e2e569590ff540999: Well I hope your luck improves. I doubt it can get any worse.
textByHashes.2f227db281312a669bfca4031b462d6a36098268: I really think you should try hold on to them.
textByHashes.fa12757ce7853aedd4a08a3d06f884be4b2d384e: I was just wondering what you were doing here?
textByHashes.37f955069b514ab45ccedaf06a7be0238e09f3cb: And do you ever come up with an answer?
textByHashes.2f794b7b1fef123f137aaf7c1cd8d32ce88455d1: Nothing but good clean family fun.
textByHashes.d916ee00ecf32ade8e49f11510d926793d25700c: That's not a catapult, it's a large crossbow.
textByHashes.57358ba9fe3809467619a958a07dabf0cf8bc140: May I have a shield please?
textByHashes.8768c38dac894f5fe62e6856bf7d9a42ae792bce: No, how do I do that?
textByHashes.fe18db3e3eee45f5b383629f50b0e093ed09aaa8: How's life now the curse has been lifted?
textByHashes.189b4a037ced6898fd01bf90d905eeb6616d8bbd: I'd like an iron sickle, please.
textByHashes.204cccf38b3f4d7dd93c85b0fef4144576b61f71: Alright, I was just trying to be helpful. Why are you so angry?
textByHashes.381d2809695b7f9e080eeff2eada10fb22700b7f: Hey. What are you doing here?
textByHashes.b414372f41a89a1234fdf4a0b37ec18c3a5c9fa9: You could really live off the land here. I can think of worse places to do so.
textByHashes.9d2e2990890e2320bf3bbfa269eee583976faaf8: Can you tell me about this castle?
textByHashes.8e17a16ded902969696e343ed8b11e9a9f5a0f37: What happened to the old man who used to be the doorman?
textByHashes.f459f39b04e28e7678d661348da290e7bba5805f: Your father! But you don't look anything like him!
textByHashes.5330d455f4121e36b83136818bedb69e0c99be77: So how much is the tax?
textByHashes.335641f59145e9765580c21065cb3b717850918f: I haven't brought my diamonds with me.
textByHashes.e4b766ce1dc6b24d7b7424920576033e40c2804f: What do you do with all the diamonds you get?
textByHashes.e5fd8d0bc49c5109905fe1e33426fb8962cbb2ff: So you're telling me fairylights are made out of gems?
textByHashes.c94e7098a813f52ec55484969ccae68cc34761ef: Well, I have this jug of wine...
textByHashes.575d27709dda65a00837787b92b6a79540286ceb: Yes, give me back my coins
textByHashes.9bed713c95c56160d1ac809c5e48b4fcab3473e7: No, you can hold onto that for me.
textByHashes.e4d06079bef2e94323ab3ca1b493366f1af87d17: I can't afford any of those options.
textByHashes.f9a85f9f8a926f975ec8e53b707dc89c2a964684: Insure me to level 75 for 1,000,000 coins.
textByHashes.7548f99d77168d56448aac19395dd56eed2a7a28: Insure me to level 25 for 25,000 coins.
textByHashes.b85e3d358168281306d347c34ec03e9bc4bb72df: I can't afford either of those options.
textByHashes.6ab8544f51a588e5387c178a30a20b74cc65f009: Insure me to level 50 for 100,000 coins.
textByHashes.bbf1f3f287f797c51bd27ad0288cc5964683b733: Why do you sell life insurance in a graveyard?
textByHashes.3b07cbca46f50018b946a31f19d2e572de435e5c: Can I ever get a refund on this insurance?
textByHashes.e458ce40f0e11fb806e964f7f1acec583d6612a3: I don't know. I don't think she was making any progress when she spoke to you before.
textByHashes.cdcd62367f67d42802d1602eca31a3750b9ee779: I don't think Zanik is likely to say any of that.
textByHashes.cb8b4554a06f00c95f75a33135a90c099e13d654: I'm surprised you're still here. Are you not going back to Ardougne?
textByHashes.de3f4e9a767e4b1dfd2041d854ed65e2e5ab5eb5: Good to hear. Anyway, I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.4ab4e236f832e5eb89f4c1b6b641d0f76e1b065b: What is all this paper for?
textByHashes.7da7d6dbf6e487076b7b0cfb23d395a7ad6c30e9: No need to shout. I guess I'm not wanted here.
textByHashes.53bea95fbb5f02c7a0be92d0704e2c064828d402: Hmph, you need to work on your people skills.
textByHashes.b6089847e5c4048f1d5eee699145b79be2eb7069: What can you tell me about the people here?
textByHashes.ce369ab18f5e934867dc97c7f160cd0615410c86: You haven't told me about yourself yet.
textByHashes.c42a2fa0cca208fbb0c2a96ade546a0651b3193f: What is there for me to do here?
textByHashes.ea8e50a5d17b79c7d89de63111532eac43f912a1: Yes, have a look at my charts...
textByHashes.7d0522e8b0fe443a22c0f434ee1088e78b26723f: Oh, let me go and fetch my captain's log.
textByHashes.317b3c3e56dc3e5e6aae59178cb79efe5a45ca0e: ... What am I meant to do with these?
textByHashes.a4a27f39ac991f338f4075a4a16b9d47df87b3bb: Do you have any spare trinkets?
textByHashes.0483c3b1eb6c19475f843a4b105068fc86677a3e: Let's see what you've got then.
textByHashes.ff045e09a123d3bec729a48f3c9f7a25e00fac55: Do you have any more kittens?
textByHashes.913261bf22df46f4f4ab01e04c630a83307b5103: No thanks, I've paid that boy enough already.
textByHashes.55c197dde3ca0997014ad216edcac8b440bcc12c: I'm quite fussy over cats - can I pick my own?
textByHashes.061843ddb7fed22d4c6c3f6769cdca2832b3320b: Oops, looks like I'm a bit short. I'll have to come back later.
textByHashes.c15b6089087418a9b48b53957989f6b04446c014: That's very kind of you - I'll come back again when I've got more space.
textByHashes.504926eecbb9a8de0a30e62feecafb78d399de09: Yes, I got this amulet from a Sphinx.
textByHashes.e713ded4a5b82e55e298c5771ef0059601f83c88: They're cute little creatures, aren't they?
textByHashes.adc0e5f34dc5d8b8340b0bcb13981e200bbebd6b: Well seeing as I've had to go off and fetch you for Gertrude already...
textByHashes.6470baf0d9eca62a8a37fbc6fc9ef395f5d1b15c: Ummm, ok. I'll leave you to it then.
textByHashes.848b9270066d2a3108972522b288ea2cb3e724bd: Well it's good to see you happy.
textByHashes.cddbcfd3ef1b4db9497ccf74d5850214ed1cfbbf: Go on, let me in, you know you want to. I could... make it worth your while...
textByHashes.c38424ec0eddcf88186aeb1cc6f4fdaa813e3bf9: I'm here to talk about Combat Achievements.
textByHashes.7993492cae8b7b68fd5c360b8f93e57df22cf11b: Could you explain what they are?
textByHashes.23fb2cf724e486aed060b7455a62a4292cac9b7b: Yes, tell me about Combat Achievements.
textByHashes.3230251fd738f9504976d5fe6e26a7b4f7620520: Thanks a lot, I'll get going.
textByHashes.041e6bd306dc582a1ae8c4ac400c44f5d3e513b6: I think I've completed a combat tier!
textByHashes.94ee901f47926897f8b70069a6ff79a3107813c7: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!
textByHashes.6349fd428e8fa1db8ccf484f9cf7e47937b0e424: I've completed all the Combat Achievement tasks!
textByHashes.31c02e8bb6921e0bfe519d88e57307851096ca74: Yes! It took quite a long time. Some of those tasks were extremely challenging, but I persevered and finished them all!
textByHashes.02509eff1aa7508b87a788dee6ff62e9f92bac35: Can you take me back to Phasmatys, now?
textByHashes.b4c76fd7e3e0a530705e6be7aa1381e510f51ab5: There isn't much on this island, is there?
textByHashes.02bf70714f3d3a2a2cc66dc47494d70d41051c9a: But it cost me a lot of ectotokens to get here!
textByHashes.f6d0323258301a0da60121d5c05caf5026c6cab5: Why would people waste their time helping you out?
textByHashes.ceb82436f6e494d9ab385ed77cd64e373963218b: Where do I get ectoplasm from?
textByHashes.7c4fc6559cb701787aa6b75052859772be39d25d: How do I generate units of power?
textByHashes.bb2fe1707648307f013d05ad128dfb639e8e9e9b: Can I have another bonecrusher, please?
textByHashes.03c708fea47d55d878b4636121707aaf8d3cc689: Can I have the tokens I have earned?
textByHashes.272a4d1fee20f637cad4c983bc040c34e076126e: I would like to enter Port Phasmatys - here's 2 Ectotokens.
textByHashes.0089adc39aa81b03e62ddf6f5cf120296312e64c: I'm not paying you Ectotokens just to go through a gate.
textByHashes.6bd21687283d3350c68070031bfc677b78cc5536: No one. It was all empty.
textByHashes.1f7e7ce6cb675998153c9c3995d18794a7279ab5: I'm not lying. It's what I saw.
textByHashes.4165568598f4433f8762198b2f386a25fe31953b: How can I get the bones? When I defeated them before, the high priests just spoke to me and then went back into the ground.
textByHashes.fe13444cff2fad5199436658ead5398a90fc7648: It was everything you hope for.
textByHashes.67233ecb342ca4c81d14561366f9342590a34181: Tell me about the Big High War God.
textByHashes.8d6508ff9f25b7245a8b9bfc449e1f509de1ec67: Tell me more about the Chosen Commander.
textByHashes.5b9af2718078c7a04375f9d5792d9e72a470a84e: If you could that would be great.
textByHashes.1f8c80dca19792ffa23266cc84426ae556a1159a: Yeah... I still have no idea what you're on about.
textByHashes.7f9b8d0f47d346c06a4eea9303d7e53f2d82538a: I don't think I'm who you believe I am.
textByHashes.52333456dd2421b5f1b1965b05bf66308373ede8: Right... And err, how's the fight going so far?
textByHashes.f3cf9a3eccf42ea777366a4ea232776dbf7e9ce6: Oh my... That doesn't sound good...
textByHashes.e5d4fb53215ce152cff3aeb2b1bc6faa25519cdd: Hmm. Well I hope it all works out.
textByHashes.52e4f689a2b22182b327d744365b0363f7a4f921: Hi there. Why do you still bother having ships here? I mean - you're dead, what use are they to you?
textByHashes.51a02cd0ec8b951000ded0b239e7829c16b92d31: So, without traders to worship in the Temple you're history, right?
textByHashes.7a773d01c99cde6f30bb6aa3bd476a26eb66ec55: I fought a really big ghost dog in here - is he gone now?
textByHashes.6b3ac9171196560d9135f529fa5011451a1886a3: But I lost my shadow sword and I don't know how to get it back.
textByHashes.554643deaa69707c36fb5da251b49547d0dba524: Who are you anyway...or were you...?
textByHashes.36dab0341081f66757c63e4a3b7b9de5d68fdb39: What's the difference between an easy and a hard job?
textByHashes.2ff88faf054b3fb9e33dd86d2b412350874df0d7: What are these free delivery tokens?
textByHashes.3646379387b471acb2c819a0ef94b5576c576c63: Will this help me with my cooking?
textByHashes.b2171af6647b03a9e4d4d088c9e456f627dd9045: I'm ready to take an order now...
textByHashes.e9a10055b2b933d63ee8c85beebc2e12c0f23fcf: I could do with a reminder of how this game works.
textByHashes.b832e39486d0f0ed133d1276de5c067febb52579: So that's Aluft Gianne snr. for cooking training, and Blurberry for Cocktail training?
textByHashes.3ce90eb2db70c4c293b94533165e40751d07b7b5: I think I'll warm up with an easy one.
textByHashes.fcbba2fdda1289639455099cd2f7b7f0fec6179c: I don't think I can complete this one.
textByHashes.6a3865ce394d0d3da7dfe7fb969fe12789af6bc5: The edge of the world is no limit for Aluft Aloft Food Deliveries!
textByHashes.899d919bc590789138cc55b54b82b6d01b74a310: I won't be able to do this order.
textByHashes.dae4d30a392b0f16f913ee98c1927fef8a59d22c: I've played in the past, but not recently.
textByHashes.c4b6eb6ba73ff0dc0c39a54ed91cc28ffc5f2f36: I am brand new! This is my first time here.
textByHashes.cca7cd4cbb9b3ecb99fead340646dbb36607107a: Dull and grey? How did it become so colourful?
textByHashes.bac147508f858cab9b49ed86ca708d9bd17954d2: Oh, I'd have liked to have seen that spell. It sounds impressive!
textByHashes.cfec853c22ad2067b47df45d6f440da56b2155a1: That's really cool. What do you do with all the flowers?
textByHashes.b3c3792ae585f403f761ff2a1cdf40d2666107d3: Thank you. I might do just that!
textByHashes.3d24b9e8c85a62f9713e346e9a461f9e92509777: That's amazing! And all because we wanted a little splash of colour.
textByHashes.7483e3b1f3fc082722fcfde6eea28b302a2974bd: It was super crowded. I was the one in the colourful outfit.
textByHashes.d363e795e1b04bff4f0695b5c9b6affff9af4fe3: Ah, yes, like everybody else. I forgot, we were all in colourful outfits!
textByHashes.d681b34db0f214121677ffe6e7479fc96eba7d4b: I did thank you. It was really nice to see so many adventurers coming together to bring a splash of colour to Gielinor.
textByHashes.c2a1a0065ccc76a4b8980c06c4c459e73b1a2d4c: Really? That's cool! What made it colourful?
textByHashes.9011ffc6d02323954b04a62550ca05bb83995cf8: Sounds like a nice problem to have! Will you be making more for the next parade they do?
textByHashes.b1d17ef5c62b027385e57393e8af5a80fbc174dc: Yes, I'm sure they'll do another one. If so many people turned up, it must have been a great success. Why wouldn't they want to do it again?
textByHashes.5bbf441502ed342bbd9e6741d4a9f71647e7a2c1: Maybe it'll become a yearly thing. A chance to show off some colour, and of course your fancy flower crowns, to all of Gielinor!
textByHashes.d55c0e167aa76b5f015512876aaa9ff22b9f0020: Do you have any rainbow items I can claim?
textByHashes.fcb440bd22ca4b745ba5864a1371c719f59752ea: Do you have any buckets of milk spare?
textByHashes.4b2cd5584956fd4d0a120ed9ca8a7cdd555eee30: So how do you get milk from a cow then?
textByHashes.f0f8e91cfe6b631176b3ba8d60bbc707987dfdb6: How do I find a dairy cow?
textByHashes.a28caca9186735e579b8f710f700ece10f958236: Erm... No. How could you tell?
textByHashes.3d425745928773b722799ff67e43ff53c982ad6b: Ah yes, I really should have guessed that one, shouldn't I?
textByHashes.0484750b772d5535b5c2592dde46c7837556b8c1: Have you won the Hemenster Fishing Competition?
textByHashes.52cd1739dbca0b7800411140d805cbc1c9e6a5d4: Can you turn my Angler outfit into the Spirit Angler outfit?
textByHashes.17e99d133aa0488b4fcf6752965121bd9222f5d0: Actually, I don't have any Angler kit on me at the moment, sorry.
textByHashes.947558e9269c67d1a243f2ca18c76a7b35d8fc51: Can you turn my Spirit Angler outfit back into the regular Angler outfit?
textByHashes.a7d59a37f8dd39ab9d4c20811ad73ffd8d67439b: Actually, I don't have any Spirit Angler kit on me at the moment, sorry.
textByHashes.ff9c745b153b8785f8091d995cfdd621fb92c77f: I don't think I need anything from you.
textByHashes.6c841a5d6e0f319213c43db12533b473985ff09a: I heard all the grunting and metal clanging. I wanted to see what was going on.
textByHashes.a1bf4f794003b9d401758bdb0c39cf5ebe5e85b0: You lot sure look busy down here.
textByHashes.9a34993f953a34b8baaa41ca64bb2398f7dc94b1: May the odds be ever in your favour.
textByHashes.f570baa1d752c65c00a4265913a68d6d1f944133: You're not tired of doing that all day?
textByHashes.5db80ed12457adc1acbdc4431e4a546000627151: You seemed to have that weapon mastered.
textByHashes.881877322c5626fab9afabcdc128ece1045c9977: That's impressive. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.0ec12537d4e308d5e2b801e320e8ebe8a3c25656: Of course... Enjoy your floor pushing.
textByHashes.dba6b5be97420b13a13fa2c28ed2a4e4671ba28e: I'm a friend of the Easter Bunny, I've been looking for him.
textByHashes.01af7b0633f7799fc2f1173179f0dbbde7eca5ea: I see, that was good of you.
textByHashes.4ac6d2a3c49bcd815f78e8d993c2f553d7b5136e: It always comes down to eggs!
textByHashes.98114a6f805850bb7e13559711311395148effec: I'd like to make some Easter Buns, I don't suppose you have any raisins?
textByHashes.cdf29f7b225948563f5f632d0d910469ec78676a: I'm not sure, I don't actually know what raisins are to be honest.
textByHashes.c8b487df3ab6fa143104792760741df785094681: Oh, well do you have any of those?
textByHashes.f02e46a1dd6335f7e70b477b0fdc923ffaf2ea5f: How convenient, dare I ask why?
textByHashes.d905bef0a73dfba0837091308365e44190a2913f: I don't remember this rock being here before.
textByHashes.84f34a224ed5e546236eb01ad5e3a74077606703: I'm almost certain this is new.
textByHashes.dda0bf68b81736d4ec442d46b86d23648672441b: Well no, it's just a rock.
textByHashes.720820abb6a762ef250afef57b028620ec3955d4: Oh I see, um, curse those grapes! Suffer you foolish berries! Ha!
textByHashes.c446a1717dcd5f15aa5e09122542e63e4250a61b: Insufferable fruits! Rank orbs of low repute!
textByHashes.58403ed8b6efb3ffc422c5849bec1164046b5ea0: Great! let's get back to the Rabbit Hole then.
textByHashes.9a066b5504f77dc9683160a58a945232892834a2: Can I have some raisins please?
textByHashes.3bb434f222bd038bb004413a91fb14bc8788bf6d: Thanks for taking me to make raisins.
textByHashes.d85d95c0fce86262bf250491acf25cca0659dffc: I used those raisins to make some Easter Buns, and the Easter Bunny really enjoyed them!
textByHashes.c0bb0baca0a7027fda83c806fb92440698c72119: Oh, I uh, suppose I do.
textByHashes.00356d0a34aaea156265a041a6f6cda2798e40f5: Alright gents, what's going on here then?
textByHashes.c3861cea9cd0e7ea03beef4740b57545bdce5c17: Does it have anything to do with long walks in the desert again?
textByHashes.8e601325471ffc8e074886c591bd6987a0c9cf74: And give it to me for my outstanding contributions to the preservation of Easter?
textByHashes.0177a069b185fe72d87e728322f7918df242ed75: And then I get to have it all?
textByHashes.3cd4ff69907e69bdb8079768139d119a697097ce: But I can get some for free?
textByHashes.d8a94a0083e11006ed7ee4aba1bda2ba8f55f5d3: Well, I'm not interested if I have to pay.
textByHashes.7af173f1f6003610b72da1377fa5ab62b1c279d4: I think I'll go see if the Easter Bunny has some more eggs for me...
textByHashes.0faf95731e662e73c19a801ae39886c5d0cd9a7d: Well I'm still fairly new here.
textByHashes.fdf4d61851e6c5aab7e9c49c81cd4ae228d7d028: You too. I'm . What are you doing hanging round the Colosseum?
textByHashes.7c90ad84a486e42e95ff52d13911905aaafd5fdd: Sounds good to me. Have you earned any Glory yourself?
textByHashes.d4225f20b602ca4224410a36321a6e4d43c6b472: Tell me more about these rewards.
textByHashes.40a5fc64558db595abe9459d1ab5d9b234fa0e3a: How do I improve my status?
textByHashes.0b9d26ac642219cde3ce6a84b79e95e208ccab61: Do you know how much Glory I need for each status?
textByHashes.e388a6fb5cdd6fdcd90a9d9d8760331519198fcc: Do you know my Glory status?
textByHashes.a5c55a5e2478f0acd92d53ed4c372f7b52079e1e: I have indeed, and I will become a champion!
textByHashes.09aca0e9e9826446884f676bc11110e822d7e02e: I was wondering if we could talk about Glory?
textByHashes.4f2c18cee248b861037f9a128cc26c8c89195730: Can you change my respawn point?
textByHashes.861e2c4cef8bf74b6bf1cc16389bdd81717d6d5a: Do you think you could change my respawn point to Civitas illa Fortis?
textByHashes.16f3f341635d11e4397e9e705c36db5f36adbc4c: On second thoughts, I'll leave it for now.
textByHashes.6ed3074b056ba90797823221928c42bdecdc354f: I was wondering if I could respawn back in Lumbridge instead of the city?
textByHashes.82f011cffc5723b36caf034a732ae377ab7bf86d: Okay then, I'll have a go.
textByHashes.fd676d4ef3d2558dcd7c8b02913793023afd7175: No, I don't want to play.
textByHashes.043352d7bd78ce75990e70c603b129bf12e1fa4e: Hey I know that. Where's it from?
textByHashes.07cd4a1db926bd492d3cefdf760e10373d7625ae: Um... I've always been this height.
textByHashes.35db2346e3c3e406d0fa2fb26919f24910eeaf6a: I take it you're a coach?
textByHashes.b025f541f161968519be7e54ba679b97d14b94d0: What's the history of Gnome ball?
textByHashes.b1c503371c04d55db3753069866658c364992483: What is the ball made from?
textByHashes.01c9027989061bc6d4ca79a45f6b716ae699fc6a: So that's why you don't see many Gnomes with long hair?
textByHashes.a8448ddb5c24b573c391b895735b5db8e6e4e772: The world makes sense at last.
textByHashes.2f4efbbc185f870baaf49af3ed1bad8a9a1d5df2: Block for team mates. Got it.
textByHashes.595028e6a479e68d250258582726bf077d14340c: I meant in regards to scoring more goals!
textByHashes.77a616a4f620835de3e892685ec4f63049fe7545: I suppose I should go away and work on those skills.
textByHashes.df12010af4b85cf5a292ff6d8b47ca247a871796: So how does this game work?
textByHashes.db11736e53d2714aaf103dcefba78bc21e0d218a: I think I want to have a look around first.
textByHashes.150ac41bde0a8a3aa03878d75ecafaba14c4effd: A Human! Ha, I've got it.
textByHashes.43a37e4f1665529d99416a4446dc7624a6be31e5: I'm pine thanks, I still have crumbs in places I didn't know I had.
textByHashes.8b8f7fa06a2938d39a1827cce4f833519e1ca169: Then you ended up in Santa's Nutcracker Pub?
textByHashes.dca0ee19aefae1c3bef54a552c5e30cdea60428f: No problem. Why are you still here anyway?
textByHashes.31f359627880aa4bfd59f2d764bdcd2c2af5d2fa: Hello there! What're you doing in the city?
textByHashes.1eed9c6ab6be8d7813fc2002e43f97ef901715eb: I was just wondering, I thought this was a dwarven city, not a gnome city.
textByHashes.41fb4d2d635fc34f5a2c268c5c85748154c91a96: What kind of special supplies do the dwarves have that you need then?
textByHashes.c9e7e44f26cf5b43b09146da8e5b1ea2d4f8cb34: Oh, sorry about that... So what are you doing in fair Keldagrim?
textByHashes.03f92eea25abd82e548f08a8796b02779fb99439: Oh yes, where are you from?
textByHashes.064ec70aa26cd367f49870650ab62c6e5d120920: Actually I'd like to sell some dishes.
textByHashes.ace5ea546a0a91b85643d48c2b8610c72e00c024: I've never seen so many gnomes!
textByHashes.7d27d78b760429e33a170a147bc37ee2a4a379cd: Maybe you should have a lie down.
textByHashes.0be0694b73707826d67cb956a0485494a5f0cf87: Maybe you should give her less to moan about.
textByHashes.4c987481be7204d11813beadf1395d60cf673139: Not bad, not bad at all.
textByHashes.736611a69b565e382afbcc4f31ac88201343d161: Can I take a flight in the glider?
textByHashes.eeeded63ee7a5c1f024db6ced63a8874bfee47ea: I didn't know the Varrock Museum was familiar with this continent. What research are you conducting?
textByHashes.74be49b27ba5cca6c308190f96219a013f00c65a: What are the Chambers of Xeric?
textByHashes.7d0c4f460d0e288c89b15316837c4fdfa026435d: What do you think Xeric used this area for?
textByHashes.7bd040f7d903d8dac24f2fb55b42e41865a1e6e3: Why are you called Goat Poo?
textByHashes.4fb639bf513a250d4b91debd90c2a8ef4228345b: So the first thing you ate was goat poo?
textByHashes.36c0d57b636534a12c1228ed17420281042dc303: Okay, I won't ask why you're called Goat Poo.
textByHashes.7db7c9e3433966cfe89b8116bfea4c8b1413dc75: Ever tried goutweed? I know trolls who love it. In fact My Arm is an expert on growing the stuff.
textByHashes.6d2098a2260e09b0f10f26c0fdd3f76c43094d1a: I'm here to kill all you goblins!
textByHashes.1291be39f8d0f0af98c8ea64df0c3eed1d1955ee: Who is the Big High War God?
textByHashes.c6ad47003004e3cd41092f113fa370538a3b75fb: Umm... you're clearly not the most powerful race in Gielinor.
textByHashes.d0eba4eeb16a36bbb53328903c1a89af1e1d6752: Where is the Plain of Mud?
textByHashes.430df191b2f09225ae7b1f438b7413300222809e: But you're still wearing green armour!
textByHashes.12d1102a33cd82b5c024bb2054ee6a7ea0b0645d: But you're still wearing red armour!
textByHashes.09c4d2cc77815137954b0cb7e425ff26d7e88d54: It's just called the Big High War God.
textByHashes.1e8a2620a2955c7f3c485763aa3d6dcbdb3597df: It was for the gods' own entertainment.
textByHashes.3115268eeebf2d6eb881223334ea8f3ce90a599a: Guthix wanted to preserve balance so he made the other gods fight.
textByHashes.37c82527322d35e994cb427777c54d0868a6ba49: It stands for Humans Against Monsters.
textByHashes.e19afc96cf9b19df8e1aedb87964e93e6a77d274: Can you tell me about the history of the city?
textByHashes.7878ff0b9e66b8e045fe56d1364d69f6b445dece: Can you tell me about the founding of Dorgesh-Kaan?
textByHashes.ce73107dfcb5fc9132ae1d1d70fcf00479a241a0: Can you tell me about the Dorgeshuun civil war?
textByHashes.d1e959877dfca2d311e2994ddb1fb3bbb8f026fd: Can you tell me about recent years?
textByHashes.c889cb1033619270f2b2ee4b821dd68f4dbf07fb: Can you tell me where I am?
textByHashes.0fba91c58f4c9d90913f0226f9e50ac36207575a: Of course, you honk. I don't know what I was expecting.
textByHashes.84000bfaeef403f212bd4c49b6a022c23755a627: That is one large, loud chicken.
textByHashes.53607cb1b51198bf1c904b0896551b3998474cf7: I take it that stealth is not your speciality.
textByHashes.07b9a75a50be145456f38e77382eaa12c5fb7da3: Ha, HONK right back at you.
textByHashes.43e0492c15dda859d3b283bcd27e6d6ed1fd7395: What would a goose want with a pub?
textByHashes.bd07e7d8624f7e2118fafc7843dccd0e80341bc4: You're actually pretty cute with that little hat.
textByHashes.fe0f74637ed3f3c156b2b3f8768271e4bdbbae52: I wonder where you came from?
textByHashes.6953b8b54efd0a838987e6f6a0b692c1d6eee082: No thanks I'm just watching the world go by.
textByHashes.2060721b8f508f2642689ea4a16ad452999740b2: Do you not use it yourself?
textByHashes.0933a22b0e108663974121c83a94d1164fd51974: How do you know all that? It only just happened, and you weren't there!
textByHashes.836a73714c005296f8eb6d5e84acafb2cffc6f5e: What kinds of food do you like?
textByHashes.d14524a4326e38a2b1025f1d5de6699b3c208c5e: I don't know. What can you do for me?
textByHashes.c5e8ae984cfb6e8430277e379d8d21bdcd66dfe2: Can I see what you're selling?
textByHashes.164260cb3608f76e981183912cd8aad33fe3160b: Can I see how many laps I've completed?
textByHashes.1c5da8e25cd82fed5db6f97ede9cde1ffb3f28fe: Can I toggle my lap counter?
textByHashes.ed9a4e04ea37da22de52a15021a461ec39030f7f: How do I use the Grand Exchange?
textByHashes.24fc2e865d9b758ce8c04a15757ee16c75537a15: I'd like to set up trade offers please.
textByHashes.933bd74d44fe52d9d08842fbe5fa8adacda690d4: Can you help me with item sets?
textByHashes.e0443054f8c46f1afc6d1a4f1ce1c703b0e10b2a: I'd like Exchange collection reminders on login, please.
textByHashes.19f560377168a23d3596ff16668f45c3b560973b: I don't want Exchange collection reminders on login.
textByHashes.5f794e6d9cb19f00add777eb9c187e84bba18eba: I don't have enough money for that, I'll go get some and come back.
textByHashes.4695cec5c24e26a4e01b6d49844e01d67af2c8b8: Very fair, I'll buy that rod!
textByHashes.fc186f69abc8f5cf2e7c73deda0849397c19a436: Only problem is, I don't have any space to carry one right now. Let me get back to you on that.
textByHashes.d5705c048a734171f89b99454f65154ac047bfaa: That's too rich for me, I'll go to Catherby.
textByHashes.ba71c3a46c960a66604f2f2c281dfb19ccb2000a: Mmmm, should I be writing this down?
textByHashes.334f04073a4115dcb5d945bfcf950786d0258b02: Maybe you should try looking on the bright side of...
textByHashes.a299bc967004a727b05b301fcbdbebd1213af9f0: Are you the grave digger this entry mentions?
textByHashes.307c5fe7ddf1f6ce4f26aa337bef2afb533b16bb: That's odd. Did you forget a lot when you...
textByHashes.f2b099e5156f7c4d3e1d57488bd88839151b926e: I'll let you know if I figure anything out. What's your name?
textByHashes.6b6e42e637d727cb209f7e9d2ae42111be399eaf: Pleased to meet you Sander, I'll see you around.
textByHashes.2b81f804b6d3cd85872690c72a47f1ce6595dc37: Can you tell me where I can find Hooknosed Jack?
textByHashes.9012a1c725fb9af6884d9789f5f086957b4e4ae8: Can you tell me where I can find Smokin' Joe?
textByHashes.814889d4bc6c65d69ae5e6461beb2a92db412a2e: Can you tell me where I can find the Face?
textByHashes.69876cc64bf26655579488e9ed1c8920f8361c49: Can you tell me where I can find Felkrash?
textByHashes.e936fc01bb16c77db9d648bb546ff03b29d6ba47: Oh come on, stop the act. It's just not funny anymore.
textByHashes.1b0bcc27ec6564de029c4b7b2df60bb71374ceff: Can you tell me where I would find Jimmy Dazzler?
textByHashes.eea34e090e947f1c58c492b1ea178451b6b4120f: Can you tell me where I would find Hooknosed Jack?
textByHashes.eea952ea2277bdb067e10c55d91516854aaa35b6: Can you tell me where I would find Smokin' Joe?
textByHashes.d33eab64307ab827300c995950d3e1483dd56a44: Can you tell me where I would find the Face?
textByHashes.60b72622207ea79866dfecd9ad0ffbfec3ab8c40: Can you tell me where I would find Felkrash?
textByHashes.885cc6c72847819c12975640c3cbc4b4b3f903c1: Like me? Why? Who are you?
textByHashes.6989b7051212dcd6becb7fc1b1311e1a65345e86: I'm really not that tasty. I think I should be going now. Goodbye.
textByHashes.b46ebdf7038463a0a0874e0ee001104eebc0abc6: Uh...er...sorry! I didn't mean to disturb you. I'll just be going now.
textByHashes.0626f415887ea9df2c870bc7f7a45476ee1197bd: You make a very valid point.
textByHashes.5ae60dfd7bd048923bf322ee5d9346cf7d5f935e: What is a Group Iron Man?
textByHashes.7de595187650c3452d7f7a462b0507e3eccf480d: What is a Hardcore Group Iron Man?
textByHashes.f7e2cb0c80299585bd63e2a32dbb634e99d4b14a: I'd like to manage my group status.
textByHashes.c4eda3ada07f5e2d58e80798bca1e675b0ca4f16: I'd like to leave the group.
textByHashes.a04678e2ad11875af78dbc3dfe7dc46680f9c073: I'd like to change my group's name.
textByHashes.43d5b1cbe0b576694df3f6e8465e4442a579e0d1: How do I leave a group?
textByHashes.9eefd33f2c13d59afb9ad634b2d767b71b202607: Can I change my Group Iron mode?
textByHashes.dbdcfaa579715eccc2f6faa78b421d689ab565be: How do I use the group storage?
textByHashes.6167676b6ea192c16071122e2d67d5681f93bbda: Thanks. I'll look out for them.
textByHashes.d5d574700ea28aff0e57ace3e8f193af53962117: Oh... I was just going to check out the inside of this house.
textByHashes.516350bcabc6a0d236cbc716dc87a0c0ef51f531: Well now you've just made me curious. What's in there?
textByHashes.496fe05b33870b6bdd1e1e188a325a176e112134: Is it a really large anvil?
textByHashes.acfae1717dd1a4e1bc3bfa756fa8145817217098: Is it a dwarf with a really long beard?
textByHashes.b31a7611e4322861c9fdfcfee8ecdc6324b42797: I was just exploring. Is that okay?
textByHashes.623dab48d1f18594679c3ed934f0eab999ce3ac3: I'd say it's still pretty warm compared to some places I've been.
textByHashes.c11dbbb42754077be8b334f3a05ef461b7dfe748: Well, I wasn't actually planning on doing anything like that...
textByHashes.04badde4ea0e2df7cabee75f353312d0a2c24eea: Is there anything more I can do to help?
textByHashes.d4b88f53ad10fd5d73e402ae1914b25594aaa8d8: But... I thought I was allowed into the city!
textByHashes.f4eb0ed16d08462206fe1a75caf11826fa0ad075: I'm more of an adventurer really.
textByHashes.8e751e38122dc9bc9a991b000ee46a9c8dbb528a: You're a long way out from the city.
textByHashes.3f6ad74981bea5c7ffd9d25e96004a53473cb639: It sounds more exciting than standing around guarding banks and shops.
textByHashes.79dda4fb0288e5096456e29535cb803dd8c5f0e1: Honestly, people these days just don't know how to behave!
textByHashes.ebe4c1a470c349ee077862d8d6c89f26ba5a032d: What's going to attack a mine?
textByHashes.5da3d12d2d4673c114cbecc50bc9fca1023f2e05: Well, I've done my bit to help with that.
textByHashes.5c62eeb228abd502916b2826d7edb3ec4c393e39: Alright, I'll leave you alone now.
textByHashes.011e5a517b6b2f89986082121a900e196b7be193: Oh, I see. Can I go down there?
textByHashes.480c501ec6be665ebb84d7fae2c095a9b11af03a: I think I've left some of my loot in there. Can I get it quick?
textByHashes.f867240fd17cdefea891806b4bdc431d61b20a24: What if I share some of it with you?
textByHashes.e9c2d163f2ea8dc832891da1ea588d31df425c11: Aaagh! Enough! If either of you mention left or right in my presence I'll have to scream! Can I come through the gate?
textByHashes.4c3ba4fbba74f7f0d232270c9b099dffdf00589b: You said it! You said it! ARRRRRRRRGGH!
textByHashes.8a9d2f73feb9356139b0c0242d3c90c830600ddc: Your King is a strange person.
textByHashes.b1ef9450432d203a6232ec884858d3b7d3a5b017: Oh well, I'd better get going
textByHashes.ac4dd5a81d0a0bba752e397a24935aa82d065cd8: What would you do if I said 'yes'?
textByHashes.8a90c1d678198cdf37bd39dbe1c2c2124fc40560: Don't worry, I'm not an outerlander, I am , a Fremennik!
textByHashes.dbf76fa8e1d16b1db41b9366935f47e220306e44: Can you come and help me? The chieftain's daughter -
textByHashes.4b0ea1c0d8542dbd48bc2041aa00d7ce66d32671: Thanks... and try to lighten up a bit, alright?
textByHashes.8c88449c3f53491f5b7e09bb45cb8f90010c12fb: I'm surprised your Burgher approves of this sort of thing.
textByHashes.10335203b9914b51615f3c85084ef4e113f8a240: Can I watch? I like odd rituals.
textByHashes.95830688bf78d2f25387c579eb0a25f6e57a6a64: Don't worry, I'm not going to cause trouble.
textByHashes.3e4cba1a4b76d34d5e5c65309a963188bae63f0f: Well it sounds better than sitting on this rooftop all day looking at trees!
textByHashes.5d7fff63e114bb8146f6e75128a0bd7201428208: You mean people aren't meant to be able to shoot the prisoners in the cells?
textByHashes.0e1a355bf73908e7d3a0a7b98a41c92881b6646c: Okay, it's been nice talking to you.
textByHashes.eabf9ec4c72b89a771a513ba8d5f0423e33b5791: No, you're just imagining it. Perhaps you've been up here in the sun for too long?
textByHashes.924ddf98403de0e44cb7db34a430c7f2b1174dc5: Oh dear, you've started talking to yourself. That's a common sign that you're going mad!
textByHashes.91ba07985e566c240ef40abc9a21120763040743: Maybe I should let him sleep.
textByHashes.fad70948a9083ead9e22ec085096c663df9bf06c: Please, I won't cause any trouble.
textByHashes.b4361cc6996661923defba1e76a8bbfda9b31948: Fine, doesn't look very exciting anyway, it's just an empty field.
textByHashes.2b0cdd57d90fcf5d018e1029c0897b9b3a4a56f9: It's more luxury than they deserve.
textByHashes.ca6b8dc48ddc637fc9cf91549e7b3ac13e971c80: Good day. What are you up to?
textByHashes.bf3c5903a5452e1f6a6baaff2a9103ea7281e7a3: That's a shame, have you got anything else I could do while I'm here?
textByHashes.139259f82907bf94abfc89f21f8933ab9f5ffb99: How do I leave the game?
textByHashes.7e97f5056d6721d2b67713f6ba50ea4ac3bd7636: What about the chests and sarcophagi?
textByHashes.f469f71dfb1b52087dec155b063e850ee499861d: Tell me more about these artefacts.
textByHashes.6ddcfe3e644c7976eba0b8d6770e610e6a6a827c: What do I do with artefacts once I've collected them?
textByHashes.1ee24193e1e7a4753f06f6b0ef42548311f3edd0: What's this I've heard about a Golden Sceptre?
textByHashes.fc891592288e31f74c2e41c9dc3836ab666713ea: How do I get the artefacts?
textByHashes.4d18a4c38bfa9997b4b7f1a52956650dde8bfa04: What do I do with the artefacts I collect?
textByHashes.91946b86251479f09db62674c44750241341e819: I know what I'm doing - let's get on with it.
textByHashes.011cb223ccf27af6c6f17ad26f617e84528a29a6: I want to charge my sceptre.
textByHashes.7108b9e1039faa95c48cf38be7a62bac93dfd67b: Hmm... If I give you back some of the artefacts I've taken from the tomb, will you recharge the sceptre for me?
textByHashes.a6042fd62eecfbe3ff7eb042ac0010b4a7856ced: Can you remind me what I am supposed to do with these?
textByHashes.7f9741f9d7172318ce79b1e4da93b312bd6238a5: reporting for... nothing in particular, really.
textByHashes.8b7d128f4f950248398a483069feccca0d4b50a3: Hmm, I probably could've guessed that.
textByHashes.5503b6a89a22def07535f3dcb68124f777a7b3d6: What got you into hunting then?
textByHashes.52cf2263e86c8f03b962bf51c8f911206084a006: Just looking for something to do.
textByHashes.f2b6b541e80eca361c5cba8938692918faaebe79: Are you not a hunter by trade?
textByHashes.e4704860a7b7ab3ba333ca36ea2f52990e8039ff: What were you doing before this then?
textByHashes.2fe25c90c687e18f44af010e4640609ac2d9aba1: Thanks! It's nice and homely in here, isn't it?
textByHashes.00f4ac4fac6774dfd41cf1057a81ddc876b1abd9: How long have you been around here?
textByHashes.25860e5669ed586e828862a5ae6fe3e81fa62982: What were you up to before that?
textByHashes.69f89c7c9fe3efe03322f21d9eecc1ebfdd3b7d8: That's an odd thing for a hunter to do, no?
textByHashes.a923d5fa67ad015597c4a6c2ea091068659dd8e7: Yes! I happened to use a couple of them lately to help out Fox.
textByHashes.ca2c215eafa942a973fefc3713959e6cfc20dc11: Oh, he did most of it himself. I was just running errands, really!
textByHashes.95ac885687c5979c4d1ad9c2a069e3dc5eba34f9: Do you go out on any hunts with the others?
textByHashes.8b6c03610525180bd5c49e35dcb97e36e89ef383: How many rumours have I completed?
textByHashes.11bd565b7090e5a8e3fbbd5b69aac24ba359bece: I have this spare hunter gear, is there anything I can do with it?
textByHashes.de23929e3acd2a1c52693664896a744cb26466c3: It's good to be helping, guildmaster.
textByHashes.1bfc30fe69ddd668167bee2594474794ff13df31: Why here? Why not within the safety of Kourend?
textByHashes.6fd63ecd9541369f6b5bc7f33dc858bbb5f8d0bb: Fair enough, anything else I should know about the guild?
textByHashes.15e87dbc4448ad573782150699859abf0d21be99: Tell me about the beginner tier.
textByHashes.d1dc850cbf208e6d861a9e635389c077ead03f34: Tell me about the intermediate tier.
textByHashes.65e95db4803e3154da66b75a967f480e89eeec67: Tell me about the advanced tier.
textByHashes.460e4f88346385ae23745ea02f1b53f3611b5124: Do you have any jobs for me?
textByHashes.6cc1c7db046c3b81a0f43353c4e0775a32ddbb37: What would I need to do?
textByHashes.8703902507269325288a0d9fe3e895cae02d2b26: Could I have an easy contract please?
textByHashes.a90096f1f807df71ae7e96a58de0fd2dc0dc31a8: Could I have a medium contract please?
textByHashes.02bfdd5d8957b7a1a8bb9d2ac1dbc3ba6cb68c08: Could I have a hard contract please?
textByHashes.42f9f1c0063445dc48d67d667e6f48ec3cca0461: How many farming contracts have I completed?
textByHashes.27c702e11f0776fea5d8a0c039c3a6f34b8fbeb5: Can I trade in some spirit seeds?
textByHashes.cf5993212a9bc57ac0925bcd470f0a594527e903: What a pretty bird you are!
