textByHashes.05a572cf5f2d8e78bf3180004d47c1939a133153: So what exactly are you? I can't tell if you're a bird or some kind of cat... thing.
textByHashes.d4484f641078f37b9f7f969eea5249886c50b6a9: You remind me of a seagull, except much bigger and with claws.
textByHashes.ac0a8ef9db5fa0137ff04fcd61ec27bd06982316: Well, they say that comparison is the thief of joy, so how about we stop this line of thought.
textByHashes.01881b2fea9afdaadc0db5eb9d7f44fd3f4ca444: Wow, you can talk! Can all gryphons talk? Are you like parrots?
textByHashes.82dbc014530c3ba6d5c6a30dd63b9fb8634d2846: It was more of a rhetorical question.
textByHashes.87de3c97a6e5c1c45a8c02ca5ed27dae701c2e4d: Hello, what are you doing out here?
textByHashes.332f2ed06d8a60f770ec1f2971095379426cdfd1: It's not bad. What puts you in such a good mood?
textByHashes.e723491f3bce9492f0f953b04e91c5727e52bb37: Bracing? Hmmm. I think I might have chosen a different word.
textByHashes.1df519e9ab4d96af18523ab05834ca58cf9f0d00: I don't have the puzzle box with me.
textByHashes.e2fd589279b6b7ee12c3e5700255da226737dc74: Right, then... I'll get you item in the next minutes. I'm on it.
textByHashes.8a186e90010e04042347aae367bc7f08f0271c2a: Right, then... I'll get you item in the next minutes. I'm on it.
textByHashes.b7e82bfa0cf40473fc8b0a99ec4975f06489688b: I don't know and I don't care. I quit!
textByHashes.5afc78370955bd6900908ce73a436061363d39c8: Just give me a little bit more time.
textByHashes.8cc1eb9f50058dbe882d754f023ec3d757973bc4: Sorry, I just ran out of time.
textByHashes.3aeb7381b64a521f3c6c21a23e0915c5a0569926: Don't worry about it, I've got your item right here.
textByHashes.a7361f9a34996a4b994dc72ae82ffea66e347ee0: Am I still on time? I've got you item!
textByHashes.035bf058a07a02538e7d85a3eb39efabcb16d491: Another what? What are you two doing here?
textByHashes.4ce87d21604c89ce9d87cc99adffe0222ed69651: Boatsies? Jubblies? Skill test? What's going on here.
textByHashes.22758aa1a2e85a3178e039a3816eddcd83a1d930: An ogre is a trial master for the Barracudas? That's surprising.
textByHashes.c5f1c230daedd1e6aedcdb8e3a0c40c4162bb80b: I see. So what do I do here? What's the challenge?
textByHashes.ade7616fa46a41748bec5b459d76dd664e2b568c: Thanks for the advice. I'll bear that in mind.
textByHashes.f1cc368e54e577cf0001d67c1120fafdb7c6fa1c: I see. Do you have any tips or tricks for me?
textByHashes.53f86b9bef7dbac10d47fdecfe2d7535200c2dc2: I'd like to attempt the Jubbly Jive.
textByHashes.603f0618e90adc6d0d7b10784b91cb4fa0a9ca94: Can you help me transfer my crew away?
textByHashes.e74c980fe2a6b0a9490160a3bacfb1d5ac7b420e: Can you tell me about the Jubbly Jive?
textByHashes.933478ee1916d38734cf1d5805aa1b16e2dc9d27: So what do I need to do during the trial?
textByHashes.1eb05a102349172fc7072f9bdf0c42e76ed75e7c: Why stay out here in this awful smelling place? Aren't there better places to be at sea?
textByHashes.7a6b20ccc40df9d8b7c5367487e6a95330306e2d: I get what's in it for him, but what's in it for you, Ros?
textByHashes.0fba93cbd3f116af7da707d5ab84cf6bc2181220: Do you have any tips or tricks for me?
textByHashes.3d7c1702faf055bfe567ef44fb686f71c28f9c43: Do I have any rewards to claim?
textByHashes.8b1d21ea480fc503d41f97c2be8bd9b13c62c688: Hey there, Gus. I see you've got yourself a new job. Much nicer than working for a cultist, I bet.
textByHashes.f8f3868ca20caf670380a7a1b7a23c7a707ffe02: Oh yeah? What exactly do you need help with?
textByHashes.a071411ee35ad2ffd84fc5ddb39947dd20924bc4: I swear I didn't see that pub on my bar crawl card.
textByHashes.4d04533235ab08fd808892ccdef5e8ab0bd3952d: I've never seen this portal or heard of this pub before.
textByHashes.5a36c1e2c398d216ac0edd62b31f01d0beb06a68: Why don't you just walk in?
textByHashes.1fe4805d00b8fa5a3947bf84f4e09dfe73d442c4: So what exactly are the criteria for entry?
textByHashes.f0c0c81c9faf382878482ee265f3824b33011246: So you're familiar with these games?
textByHashes.46e9aece7f50568ab1b5d810f965090316a9a084: By 'rig the games' you mean I carry you through them?
textByHashes.04cc342a88747232a25af3d56e7d5ccefbef13a0: Sure, as long as you'll bring me some beer from the pub when you win.
textByHashes.37705c102f24a928bd58051ac3f8e08f257cf2fb: How do we enter these games then?
textByHashes.cb6d973b5a0b52ece402242478afd1d47ea037f7: Why do I need to be vague?
textByHashes.9584d566051e12145927c0d56fe8d172ac3bba27: Tell me a bit about yourself, Guss.
textByHashes.4c35d22322b2976d855a973c103a4656b442655d: So in a nutshell, you got thirsty and wanted to go to a pub?
textByHashes.9b2b121fa5e69d669f774d69ad32311c3ad55f33: You know there is a pub just south-west of here? In Falador?
textByHashes.ab7013bb16525ad4d5f799e275afd39e1352d33e: So you've done these games before Guss?
textByHashes.4c0553a754a155d7c11feb52d0da2d54a6c1016c: This will be easy then. You can just tell me how to win each game.
textByHashes.8aa13be149079d81df794566c22a150407c70475: What were the games like before? Were they hard?
textByHashes.095411aae3b42639555c1a92988f270bd99239f5: Right, I've got two times for us.
textByHashes.6e4126beaa098a5f91ff463115fb6dc7af2f1e58: No, but you may have to re-home a few kittens.
textByHashes.ca6bef9a2627249eba9ffa350c590ac3b6ecc382: But that's not important right now.
textByHashes.5312d38f70a291198edaa034b9b310f5b17807ed: Actually, there is a bit of a snag. Our times are different for entering the games.
textByHashes.1097ac44d5a5bed933676e780c46df154b295d0d: Well, by the sounds of it you said it's a tournament format right?
textByHashes.86a27e488d90a8719ad88ddf982a0c47a69b90ba: So maybe everyone gets pulled in for one big final?
textByHashes.a9750afecb8dd4e65727001c62d691b87671ef1e: How confident are you in getting to the final?
textByHashes.2f81a5232954157f875b69570674775becceec35: Looks like my time is first, so I'll hopefully see you in the final!
textByHashes.2e302652e24e348badb5c1d6c16b16417344d24d: How do you know so much about the final game, you haven't even played it yet?
textByHashes.75173c44009381acf49f7e200dcde0cd8cbab1ed: Ok, how does this game work then?
textByHashes.80fffc0a1875dac0c2a1c8a1608cf3d0fe31288d: We did, but you did knock me out.
textByHashes.cf29ac2028c1c8ee2c5930eb046d1c8f5a93e0c3: Are you okay Guss? We only finished moments ago.
textByHashes.5dc28c9a2ea01e2ce6b93fed406dd71af8a602c9: Yes, please. What are you selling?
textByHashes.46a77728dca70fa4875f5383aaf8c97132afdf5b: It's nice to meet you Gwerin, I'm .
textByHashes.bb4a2af546ae84607dd7cc73086f2f16a5f24cae: Wonderful! This sure is an impressive mill.
textByHashes.be1c57428d927dbdd1264b5b28310909366ccc6d: Nice to meet you too, Gwyna. My name is , Captain of the .
textByHashes.8adfff3d062b7706c40f04abe4564f65d8a481d3: Thank you. If you don't mind me asking, what were you doing earlier?
textByHashes.ed760d8dbcb4b677e6d64ae696693c9c78bb4620: Oh, I didn't realise that's what the crystals were.
textByHashes.afd6fe467505c7c364fb4cf6a8553f537adf2204: Ah, so this is a Barracuda Trial. What do I do if I want to get involved?
textByHashes.aeedacd3db05918ee677004834c7de79d29a3c5b: Can you tell me about the Gwenith Glide?
textByHashes.096ade580f42c4f904372598373c5755685f36a6: So what is it that I need to do within the trial?
textByHashes.447f32ff440f03778f4a5ed4be12f7c4708ff4d9: Do those goals ever conflict? I'm not sure how the sanctity of the course is upheld as sailors race around the place.
textByHashes.0914c6a5db3bed557b5ff0f97b04f17e32d2c001: Guess she can't hear me from over here.
textByHashes.7d41bfb5920079f98768efd5bd901e4c459f6f83: What are all you people doing here?
textByHashes.d66bc2fa94e0f283e4aeda310e9b7d437619e43e: Who are you and what do you do here?
textByHashes.e73a1a521f263475bbfaaeb96819617db9e2910b: What do you think you're going to achieve?
textByHashes.9032ee8bd09ef5e1a4384932e9c71c03a9904ff8: But there aren't that many ferocious beasts in the towns and cities.
textByHashes.9293475af0b39af9e575d8d097025e352f0f16e8: Where did all you people come from?
textByHashes.f991efc0ba07a70e69f72932c5376cf602df67ba: Any way that I can help?
textByHashes.1b3f241cd9342a55ad6d47c8c69599ffcbf0f814: I just came to ask you a question.
textByHashes.a7941c16bdd2141c197d8a59326bafb50f12c4e1: I ehm, just wanted some information.
textByHashes.7ee01e8e541346bbc0d2b5d45fa35f93e477ab15: I think this is my cue to leave...
textByHashes.4aa9681740e69b01c13961e5f5b8c133e5ed19f0: I just wanted to say hello. I didn't expect to find anyone here.
textByHashes.6640ef425d4cda388ab2b3e66ef0addb39c2c2a3: With who? There's no one else here...
textByHashes.00d643c1af4ae62fc332edea98cc33d46b99f5d5: Whoa, no need to be rude.
textByHashes.b8d9859ab17bb912562cdf16e0a5acfad58dadd7: One of them? What are you talking about?
textByHashes.c7cff2d84d555228639be57f5a57bf9f13ca6383: Last time I checked I was not an abyssal creature.
textByHashes.9d7735d5e11e9d38b154b6fae7363fff240df7b9: So will you tell me where we are?
textByHashes.2f57c5a5713a6c32007904be563ae0130f24ed18: I know that. Though I've never been to this part of it before.
textByHashes.a5f85341182e43b215829169364c24e6724c0543: Well yes, I just came through there-
textByHashes.9a2fe59baee3094c76c1cef5f4a435f3e4347346: What is that thing over there?
textByHashes.9fe645ab9cb6ce0f50708dd4c7eaa99a69d04f69: Ventriculus? That thing has a name?
textByHashes.15bfb5e13c9341eed4a56bbb87fd6cb427c1e7a3: I... I can't tell if you're joking or not.
textByHashes.e39fc343f51583a5fd46e4351fad5335b376a6e4: Right... So I mine tainted essence from amalgamations, then feed it to this Ventriculus.
textByHashes.d39fe30872a4a3dee25116fbc8ad355d51995b55: But why should I do that?
textByHashes.c86c450c607282d48596597135f84a287f2a1f8e: So you're saying it refines the essence?
textByHashes.9c619364989446eeef0477c9137c4a7bd880bea8: Make more runes? How exactly does that work?
textByHashes.240124a12400d98e019437c07af24892208515e7: That's neat! I can make so much money from selling these runes!
textByHashes.f609a02d5dc6b2828e7b544072f590b741d5197c: Ah... I suppose that makes sense.
textByHashes.69ba298ab0ee6d4c5b303afcf52f1ffe6b85759f: Can you explain the Ventriculus again?
textByHashes.04e6c2440f0551e4ef306303265f646c5ffbe9cd: And how do the extracts work?
textByHashes.c4faaf36211208a9bcd48d5e760641c9c126b173: The... Ventriculus? It's really your friend?
textByHashes.66097deb35d5f0f1457bcf5ad7d2a465922c725e: I guess you could just... not answer my question.
textByHashes.0e93975a1b9962a3612239df71c80e8a276a1a4c: You're not really talking to me at all, are you.
textByHashes.90d389a1bea1a93e22316cff3c1dea0b14fa8c24: Can you tell me more about yourself?
textByHashes.4476512cd42d7551f0dc6173632ab2754276cb7a: Yes... So you've said. Where are you from?
textByHashes.bb7b3230a623bd2dbb9b869da59971cc57595c0f: I don't mean to pry. I just thought I'd get to know you a little bit.
textByHashes.ab0c5a7279994cc039b6f1faa1044f9cc098fe34: How long have you been in here?
textByHashes.15a85e0eb6cbc1bea83900ebcf50209905295894: Wrath runes? There are several sources, really. You can-
textByHashes.e76b1b39b0931332ab1db88d6b4c6a33a55ff9ea: No, I think I'll keep it myself.
textByHashes.cea7bd44c7e31d9bc7c0df234fb62b25af7fddfd: Yes please, I'd like to go to Shilo Village.
textByHashes.87025f67589825fa6796290f26e90220ddc564b9: I'd like to look at what you have for sale.
textByHashes.f3c0580055dc46dd7f33f75b9fbda0236e85b0b6: Well I got the people of Nardah their statuette back.
textByHashes.a4e99cb22596224afe8239d73b044ee184bda416: Don't many other towns not follow Elidinis though? Why did you pick on Nardah specifically?
textByHashes.7412122d088c7ba5fc9ff42b62f0128a4e2be3c8: Excuse me, have you seen my helmet?
textByHashes.14958bd0f0561854ea0ed5e9f2ae46751cfe7efc: The one from the bear man thing person... you know!
textByHashes.2a51fe7e7574de6194b717f719d7a33c397772ca: That's all very interesting but I must be off again.
textByHashes.35867cb8fee7d1fe01a61fc12e7137a02aa2b6cc: What exactly happened to your daughter?
textByHashes.f0dba83c344e56f741b19def9f60151da63959ff: I thought you didn't believe in magic?
textByHashes.d4ae60c1e50f8e652325baba8fdd11a12cb9e411: Oh yeah, I ran into him.
textByHashes.05015f832c9c3a636c8f042e3db1312d450a971e: I think you're all mad. You, the guy in the bearsuit, Ragnar... you're all completely mad! I think the cold got to your brains!
textByHashes.434678e88e25528a3f1075ae4fc7b09038bbfec4: I mean, your daughter was missing for 14 years and you still thought she was just missing! And you ignored and walled in the bearman because you thought he was a god!
textByHashes.5e8da6c7855d205854d7e28a334b22e8ba634c13: College of Bards? Can't say I've heard of it.
textByHashes.42be4e4cc936ecba564d2dbf87f7fab78b4a1ca7: Oh really? Perhaps I should go there sometime.
textByHashes.3b6f9456b46c5ae95a1449f3a201f60b3b4396c1: Tell me more about the sanctuary.
textByHashes.836200cd7e70af281f18d6c806d22b3551363c6a: Interesting, I'll give it a read!
textByHashes.f68040d5ee62a2753c994390527d2060452336ee: What's a Monk doing in a place such as this?
textByHashes.cfeb355f5f9d1ba7abced144e3dbfbffa8027f9b: Which monastery do you come from?
textByHashes.5079977ab1810a146f906b25de11e3a7c800caf7: You're a long way from home?
textByHashes.9be7ad18af505a1a0f8bab153d97ce84df3cc79e: I guess I'm a little curious about your companion.
textByHashes.002fe7f39879a63c733c13f7b68aca7d8b741eb9: Do you know much about the Painted One in the town center?
textByHashes.05f71fcb3dadb60f8f07b2c37afa654a20d107ad: Do you care more for gold than you do your friend?
textByHashes.326f4c71ba4d86975f7ea0bc72805075103a9f04: I'm not giving you my money.
textByHashes.1e86e0cb7d86c7f3b3cae59fd23fc0119b07f6bd: I'm sorry, I didn't realise you were sleeping. I just wanted to say hello.
textByHashes.60d97ddb3f74a5c199cd7a2e01ed6cc8ec2cb4a4: No, that's it. You can go back to sleep, sorry to have disturbed you.
textByHashes.1e0b0bcc0cf793c587bb25444d1fd71bac811b2c: Nothing important. I'd like to ask you a question if that is okay?
textByHashes.b975bfcb1ff422a6b53a63ab56657b4e508b2be1: Why did you pick the kitchen as your spot to sleep? It must get quite noisy sometimes?
textByHashes.2d768faee7bb435a5809e203b4d2e0a279947ffd: Good point. Now it seems like the best spot in the house!
textByHashes.e9f129506da705b47179f6231388fd8ff9e86849: That was all I wanted to ask, thank you.
textByHashes.69438ccab261b19256ee8aa4d9cd0c20ef8352a1: A bark? Is there a dog here?
textByHashes.94c7ba4d25d39e89ae12875df2e1ecfc8b60407e: That is indeed strange. I'll keep an eye out for it.
textByHashes.d6a7c7890665b83df0a88d8cd0dc8e4b24bfd608: I'll have to keep an ear out.
textByHashes.69447bac16460c834dd9c3fffe1db2831332a87d: I have another question for you, if that is okay?
textByHashes.35d0cc8360d54e1cdb29f6de81c63fc1a7d92089: Do you ever leave the hall? I've only ever seen you in here.
textByHashes.96b32fdca09fec97ece3468738bc116671d15b0d: That's fair enough. The world can be a pretty scary place out there anyway.
textByHashes.e022fe5ef9361838575a400d75f0f56d58abbff1: That'll be me! Sorry, I'll let you get back to sleep.
textByHashes.6f1ce1230605b9ab44139973e1a168b7c3a21c97: I should give him some fish from my inventory!
textByHashes.1958e3a94575d5001ed6a992c3d4bb6d5669714c: That is a good point. I will see if I can find you something cooked.
textByHashes.4c7e290ce9791f564f69e7a0c79966eb2cecc9b7: You just ate the entire thing, and you're still hungry?
textByHashes.4fc96c7ad856211b5d43969348fda4b3ea31232d: I do often wake up hungry, maybe you're on to something.
textByHashes.5de737b9d143237cb8f97b81e43e552fbac8a073: I'll see if I can find you something else.
textByHashes.54bef4318e192e06422a85e3f495a2a6cb9759e1: I'm looking for whoever is in charge of this place.
textByHashes.d0b8c97fb2fdd1dd50015f45abcf1c4642f0e0b6: I have come to kill everyone in this castle!
textByHashes.0fec18025215acde51a36aaef6579d1bfd936e99: I don't know. I'm lost. Where am I?
textByHashes.82be262745c17665e3e168c93b1b4c9dcf7e4b80: Can you tell me how long I've been here?
textByHashes.a4bc5817be17e326c1caf7695129763044392b4f: I'm a brave knight! I am coming to kill anyone in the vicinity of Lumbridge Castle!
textByHashes.60ae1dbfeec02c56ff90fa0a81af2a1ebf356897: And what are you doing here Hari?
textByHashes.1caf9b6aed174b637a968428bf939eb80edebc25: Underground river? Where does it come out?
textByHashes.0342e86e4523beeed35dcb2aebf2ebd7d2277b1a: Can I take a dugout canoe to reach the Wilderness?
textByHashes.46b9b52b88fd641242934e9449137eb571b44ddd: ...And then I pulled the goblin mail from the corpse, but it didn't fit, so I dropped it.
textByHashes.f6e3917c1586adae94af59e0c333c42f73c3251c: ...And then I cut her head off, so as to make sure she was dead!
textByHashes.afa5ea6c34145f5c972ec9c431443ab67c1f3e8d: You own the land? Who did you buy it from?
textByHashes.df99b9ae69a1b7717dc5eca023353ac6d5cb2ce6: Oh, so do I pay a toll? 10 coins should do, right?
textByHashes.fc4f593ddd6a7bbe91bb2a7576f167934212a26f: Is the story behind your sword one of heroics?
textByHashes.b4f1f8d83a5d82aedf1db1bbf1cf905fe2ce3f41: That's a really kind gesture, but aren't you meant to be focusing on growing your own food?
textByHashes.d5cf6e4698be130c6340a437df4e35deffe384d7: Quite a place you've got here.
textByHashes.492278fcceac51c90e91b9cb214d59984372a538: Tell me about the strength training area.
textByHashes.bdb48197b09a79bf43f3bb915c3e5de97ee9cbcd: Tell me about the attack training area.
textByHashes.d711b2c92aa5f45f4f844630c8b38e3bf631736a: I'm no dummy, I just want to know what is there!
textByHashes.c90b2850566dca24cfb60159cd176f6d51416e24: Oh, ok, I'll have to try it out!
textByHashes.e734efda254ec98800ecf7e9b95056095f41152a: Tell me about the defence training area.
textByHashes.24eeb7ea584a4726f09877e266c7952402fdbd44: You're going to throw dwarves at me?
textByHashes.f655f6cbe4ed6c2a85b03fa19fd70e564903d582: Tell me about the combat training area.
textByHashes.6b4a4109073118c9f8949f747a24a102fc709e8e: That sounds dangerous. What if I'm wearing it at the time?
textByHashes.112e0158a3ca930616379a265a008f8363bd9df0: Fighting my own armour, that sounds... weird. I could be killed by it...
textByHashes.1664f7eba1415616965d54f3b4427a8c924a05d1: Ok ok... so how do I earn and claim these tokens?
textByHashes.965e9bb91d88887d802d836aeb81d2aee37e232e: You any good with a sword?
textByHashes.5b8f52fe120f2ddf2c05d7145555c6de357c5f48: Could you tell me more about the Guild?
textByHashes.528a14a3841ded778f87b7f2a80ae7d0a353ce00: Can I get a fish for this bowl?
textByHashes.967a48497f8da01f6fa1a3ecba4ab18fe85010e9: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.10dd3c58c2334259b06b2bf4f2180387b22a28e2: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!
textByHashes.4b9c63d65dc7e71983f58213d14deeb980a532dd: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!
textByHashes.6801a72717d848f482ff64a904c6be08ed5fe123: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!
textByHashes.955fe2f1474725afb97db317e075fe1eb18372bc: Well, that's probably as close to a compliment I'm ever likely to get from you, so thanks!
textByHashes.df86c2ec860def77e0944748da7342735d6c73ad: How did you.. ? Oh I forgot about this mind meld thing.
textByHashes.a0731b27d71a8dd4d76a401576122eeccac250f8: So how do I turn it into something useful?
textByHashes.f11f17049240be39081a939dc43c424d0637840a: Thanks, I'll have a look round Oaknock's old workshop. I can have a chat with Brimstail while I'm at it! Thanks!
textByHashes.6e98579b333b0f1a0ac6e65ded2f3a811df5b0a5: I'd say! Anyway, the saw looks like it could be pretty useful. Thanks.
textByHashes.4a2350256dc3aa7c78861575e7b96a883647faae: Can I buy a Skillcape of Cooking from you?
textByHashes.b81129b453e3bae5430ee366fc9f373ec413244c: Hello, can I ask you a question?
textByHashes.c41a0f67cd5b71b1d50ae363bb0b1bfc62d3fbf3: Errr... I don't know... A quest, maybe?
textByHashes.f7de96b011b2637acc134c783f2375ee9af40474: No no, I mean, do you have a task of some sort for me?
textByHashes.1c28b99dc999eb789b1b2a129f61570051ad4448: I think I hear someone calling my name in the distance...
textByHashes.1e93f3889fd45c6ec406c5c2738550566e7a26af: So do you sell anything good here?
textByHashes.d4aa8624ffac92c2e5953415b206b418a8ebbc6a: Oh. Well where is she then?
textByHashes.cbf67ff5919f3f07d976ecf19bf66e2e6009e823: Yes, those generally are the two options.
textByHashes.9573a273e3d7f2ef0c6c4b2efe32ff019af60195: Why don't you ever restock your shop?
textByHashes.7e9c36a7c34899096db8f70f934aae3e6bc33592: Still working on it. How's the Colony?
textByHashes.2ca07f050d5506cea582c2094663998b918dbfeb: Sorry I don't want to talk to you actually.
textByHashes.ec3e8578fd51e94dad66286c6fa0992faafb4e73: Not much of a quest, but I'll do it. Just item in minutes.
textByHashes.ef9214379c1955a3e32c22afd8ffad2ec171cf90: No, quests are dull and boring.
textByHashes.34a7793aa6eea8912256fd72368e2a60563dd5dd: I don't want to! I just want to kill things!
textByHashes.d1acdba5020a10aef5d2dfcf23c6a93309b176e7: Not anytime soon. Or at all. I've given up on looking for them.
textByHashes.1a3a324754e450945efb26345396fff7560e5947: Good news, I got you item!
textByHashes.49382cfd5a1d9be169096a26f7be54f6c46352c6: I'm practicing and slowly getting better.
textByHashes.3c5528af78763a22580c2c54f7e8ff970588bfb6: No, I prefer to bash things close up.
textByHashes.d4cc29e7ba96a1bcac3005c9b369cc039494e665: Can I kill the dragons in here?
textByHashes.ff2a4e9882a6802f6567eb2ec6a2778544f876fc: I've got a message for you from the Wise Old Man in Draynor Village.
textByHashes.1275d06670a2f6fa724d8008bd62b0aa1e9a41ae: To be honest, I'm not sure, but I think you should have it. It has more hope of hatching with you than with me.
textByHashes.598d64e9d51c99ab240519f351f806adb23543ce: Any sign of Menaphos opening up again?
textByHashes.5865dc838928297f3063d73fc52aafb3d05132e7: Well at least things are moving in the right direction.
textByHashes.af6ff597b0e4cf0c518f42023748f65a7608182d: Well I'm happy to have helped. Any news from Menaphos?
textByHashes.d0c30662a266a1f25db0d04390283829064fbbad: I thought this acne potion might clear up your spots.
textByHashes.a4c6507bb2ef262acb6b5989c0df7ff12d7ab911: Sorry, I was just trying to help.
textByHashes.431e60113c018f80dbfccf4dc5c21389d6a645ee: Hey there. I was wondering if you could do me a favour?
textByHashes.0d112234881046f1a41c80a8cfbe137b4d2e75e4: I know cremation isn't your way, but is there anything you could do with these ashes?
textByHashes.db5dbbc367dd0bfb0f642a863dfdc12db5fb514c: That's all I ask. Thank you.
textByHashes.3472b0d42de74a461ff2dcaf229d76ee3221da21: Have you any advice for surviving against Zulrah?
textByHashes.24518b617a4ebafecb7e9daf37e989b4d419b550: How do people get chosen as a sacrifice to Zulrah?
textByHashes.6cc250d66481d00f2b7bc8197e5222a8e382a386: I won't let you sacrifice him - take me instead!
textByHashes.6a9058b7282dc5c11179f15149c0c58f616d43ba: I've lost my enchanted Amulet of Catspeak.
textByHashes.56786c247be60ea6cdf6de93eb647ae9ff41f7f9: I don't have the five death runes on me.
textByHashes.b6c3053639a6901a7bc0bc3bac4fa00d5220bc8b: I have the runes but don't have the amulet on me.
textByHashes.0a47e86bbe0a9c258bb6e2eb4edd0c746fab764a: How do I make one for myself?
textByHashes.fe9c936db90f674f3e9b8c003c94ea53e0558d5b: Ok, so I have my stock and a pair of limbs... what now?
textByHashes.800c9160f21981fd68663109b897b5bdc5f2b2ab: Oh my poor bank, how will I store all those?!
textByHashes.740138b5d37a838025ace2293e22934af8bfcccf: Oh, I don't have that much on me.
textByHashes.7a9b80cd0418f9e6490fbfe21de2cb96f1c0f78d: Excuse me, can you tell me about Scurrius' spine?
textByHashes.600b3d43f927f38864cc667fb1b377b19f42eb24: Can you make a bone weapon for me please?
textByHashes.a1782eee750802fef4b6a48d3be0483e98b249d1: It's just an old mountain isn't it? What natural history are you hoping to find here?
textByHashes.bcf8c474a944f48cca6b5a195c64b8d5a546fc21: What have you learned so far?
textByHashes.9bde3ac6b111be4806bda36514b014be3159966e: Not all adventurers only care about fighting, you know... I was only offering to help.
textByHashes.2f963634e82c2d9e41e0a526a963e1733ab30940: Tell me about the new dig.
textByHashes.b36fe3f061a67b132e3454a3f6f889d4225579bf: Well, I recently defeated Delrith, a demon! I did it by using a sword called Silverlight, which is apparently the only sword that could do it. I can give you a description if you want?
textByHashes.c35a774ee1d807bf7c6b09dd8907de9237fc0905: Well, I infiltrated one of the gangs here in Varrock...
textByHashes.a8cfe7513667dc21c1fa9cd2021617e1d5987383: Erm, yes...anyway, I managed to get half the shield back.
textByHashes.ac6a55afef80b7ec1f38fe77fcacd266a4401237: Yes. The gangs had a bit of a tiff, you see. A friend helped me get the other half and I returned it here to get my reward.
textByHashes.fbd493f7e47f61c425ff8ffedd1731fb31b27cb3: I helped the Order of Wizards rediscover how to access the Rune Essence Mine.
textByHashes.6f5a260b8df552b0cb156bf35a2319772a382e03: Hmm. I can't tell you much, but I do know that this mine is hidden away. You can only get there by teleportation.
textByHashes.3fce419fc6f9066ffb77f9eb30ccc556fe1598df: I helped to rebuild the Observatory near Ardougne. I had to fight to do it, and learn how to use the telescope too. I can draw you a diagram of the Observatory if it would help.
textByHashes.23350d6e5bfd75e6a6b4a762f530744f9e2d9873: I helped to free the wizard, Merlin, by using Excalibur...
textByHashes.148b5396c8b17143e284d025d2227951ef9f64fb: No, it's a sword. King Arthur's sword.
textByHashes.93d45a0fc8d6db180b6934566bb948024f13e42f: It's not! That's what I've been trying to tell you. I found that King Arthur and his knights are really biding their time here in Gielinor until they are called back to their own world, when they are needed!
textByHashes.e3a91f2d88d77092f8d61fa22811993d699d100b: I helped to save the gnomes' Grand Tree!
textByHashes.7db84b10f5c793af5150f35dddcd686500d59717: Yes. I uncovered this nasty character called Glough and ended up being ambushed by a black demon...
textByHashes.eb53661117531bf07636e484db9178da2d99b71c: Oh, I was fine. After the demon it was downhill all the way, and King Narnode allowed me to use the mine under the Tree, and free passage on gnome gliders.
textByHashes.1830c6bd81dffc82004503d3cfc47d435dc3654e: Some disturbing and heroic news from Morytania, concerning the River Salve and the Temple Knights.
textByHashes.fa1041c782057d8c35e472e03f6f935963dd1a63: Yes, it seems that these seven knights drove back the nasty things coming out of Morytania, and Saradomin blessed the Salve to stop them getting back.
textByHashes.12302a237941dc7262468bb4f5d85ec8e032fe5b: Some disturbing and heroic news from Morytania concerning the River Salve and the seven priests.
textByHashes.6d1a115a74521301a5759516a96e1dda3a64b63b: Yes, it seems that these seven priests were also warriors and drove back the nasty things coming out of Morytania. Then Saradomin blessed the Salve to stop them getting back.
textByHashes.4efa073aa4b502227a025a8e8b34912896e67e9c: I found out a lot about his background...turns out he was once human and helped to defeat a dragonkin once!
textByHashes.646d5151cf8654324c9755b677bae8bb35c3a4cb: Well, you see, it started when Bob went missing...and involved a big sphinx in Sophanem, the City of the Dead, and me taking care of Unferth...
textByHashes.3add0b120e7112307962202da45a803fad2b135c: It must...you know Reldo, the Varrock librarian - he knows all about Robert the Strong.
textByHashes.18a8e0b75eafb5ac24b869f8b55b2686b8bf34ab: I found out more about King Lathas's ancestors.
textByHashes.ed0fd898daf65a954cc8228058ce556a213f5bd6: Indeed, it turns out that there was a big battle in the year 98 of the 5th Age. One of his ancestors became king because he survived it...
textByHashes.1ccffb20cc35605ef792d8c8367f37a8f6cfb944: Well, I was asked to retrieve the Staff of Armadyl, from the Temple of Ikov, by Lucien, but instead, I helped the guardians of the staff and banished Lucien from this plane of existence, so that he could never again return.
textByHashes.0904f93b5ac6df12d7ec0fc01296909eef2f1e19: I saw the staff and can describe it to you if you want?
textByHashes.5630313c44813bbe04fa0c020f130485959ac417: Well, I was asked to retrieve the Staff of Armadyl, from the Temple of Ikov, by Lucien. When I returned it he grew in power unimaginably. I held the staff and can describe it to you if you want?
textByHashes.52312e9fea9df23455a4c6c9ac92c36d4fb82a25: Well, I found out more about the Staff of Armadyl from a ghost. It seems that Zamorak was a mortal when he got hold of the staff, and he used it to, well...spear Zaros, and somehow ended up becoming a god. It was
textByHashes.21b0342764f0f0f34ff30fd45797b4fad3e849e1: I discovered the truth behind the Carnillean family fortune!
textByHashes.aa069bea82bc6aab2df41011a0fddea6e657ef0e: Yes. I got a bit involved in family business...
textByHashes.895d3e067201ca51fc783fa6f59cef2552cceddb: I found a secret cult in Ardougne and found that the Carnillean family started building the city of Ardougne from a house they'd captured from a Zamorkian lord.
textByHashes.3ef4c0240ea9aa49022c5b889feb9ce75d0ba02e: I discovered a tunnel and a cult of chaos mages here in Varrock!
textByHashes.50856ec9309f0e402d0ebe957475877c7c830c92: Calm down, I have arrested the ringleader.
textByHashes.3ad87e77c698fafbf4d5df743ae2120379c81a69: Well, I met Rat and he asked me to fill his folder, and I got mixed up with Surok....
textByHashes.7014ae986a09ec0e3add8ed36460362b4809db99: No, no, no - Rat Burgiss. But anyway, it turns out that this cult has been trying to get to the King, but I stopped them.
textByHashes.deb4eeb4f6334777f0cde303ea1fab070dc14671: Not with me, but there is a book I can get you from the library.
textByHashes.965e53cc4839db552ac9e879c936e2876b2b0b72: Actually, to save you some writing, I have this book here that has lots of information. You can have it if you want...
textByHashes.7422cc2c9892d4bcbf28aaccd2326c27a51882fe: On second thoughts, you seem to have everything I know covered here!
textByHashes.b9fc5a99343b6bbfc460fec8bdccee05db2790ab: Yes, I'll go do some quests or something...
textByHashes.81e36e0d5b7b56231cfcee1ec1f700b0b145ed96: Tell me about other sections of the Museum.
textByHashes.aeac4295263134fba823b6fc697fe84aa9a7de27: Tell me about the Natural History exhibit.
textByHashes.243bf64d065f4a62bc73b7353346a829754d38f5: So where does the 'history' bit come in?
textByHashes.378ca39cb73670107f0ebc80a6e15854800a90de: Tell me about the Dig Site exhibit.
textByHashes.7e86f67aebe804bf5b6a599e8e50b54fc523328f: Tell me about the Dig Site find cleaning area.
textByHashes.fb24bb20105533aaa9edda392f2791b32e6e987d: Oh, I'm already working towards those!
textByHashes.54cc4823e5de6d7503765a274b834a8c67c0ba60: Tell me about the Timeline exhibit.
textByHashes.b50bcab9ce0720e003e4cdc6dfd4150caeb65708: Wow, that's a lot of information. I'm sure in my travels and quests I'll pick up a few bits of information for you.
textByHashes.879f199d32cacb95312b5363ed1e62b33485b29b: Could you exchange my tokens for me?
textByHashes.bee313683085200612dfc333e5d1a0c4074699c7: Do you know what these nail beast nails are used for?
textByHashes.0763b498ac262f52b6690b68b665ca7af72a1c05: Ok, so perhaps Sanfew knows then?
textByHashes.ca20ebed4a9fc4ba5ba0505e2aec8b4de3832aa5: Do you know what these are? Or what they're used for?
textByHashes.b8d0fa63296d826649f3ad7b7a6ab6590de5d724: What sort of things are you selling?
textByHashes.d30f616e4615f87a26117de8cd909464f5cd86d8: It looks like you've come to the right place for that.
textByHashes.d2bc60d3c702ca172444f33ea0965802c48373e8: Yes, show me the prices of weapons and armour.
textByHashes.8efc8e0762f34f0d14c3fd17b3dbe3330f0a273e: Can you tell me about the bank's auto-charging services?
textByHashes.ce2d65a22f7b4dd2754bd46397c4b2dbff3ba438: How do they know how many charges to add?
textByHashes.a3917fef700421c94e1b85953ac1aacb0776e323: I don't think that's necessary, but thank you for offering.
textByHashes.6f2a82966b542bd8cb09472fe0a6078a323fdc91: Wait a second. Your friend Bob... does he happen to be a cat?
textByHashes.0c24ee9b92f385cbcef3ee31ad08da0020ebca58: I do! How is he doing?
textByHashes.f1dbc7029420322da5c94094e63e27303c8b030b: I miss him too. Could you tell him I said hi? And tell him I'm sorry he got killed. I wish I could have saved him.
textByHashes.f674b7f4ca3b4097066cd01b65f4cc2a7aac2a7d: What can you tell me about Eve?
textByHashes.a277cc05f2440ef2a8c4fccebc82cae8a53f88ac: How can she still be around after all these years?
textByHashes.9a41b41f2f7da5951be6152305e210702d90106d: I understand. That really makes you think, doesn't it.
textByHashes.3de1e7b3e6d95de337c72dc912b7fbb5cec49806: Hi there, you mentioned something about creating monsters...?
textByHashes.a41d165127944711aab13b477d37df8bc82a312c: Interesting. Tell me if I'm right. By the alchemists and builders creating you, you have inherited their combined knowledge in much the same way that a child might inherit the looks of their parents.
textByHashes.69b7ce51172985ef8faa8fc381b865a18f5f53e0: What was that bit about adding it to something?
textByHashes.5d630f785b6d0b4603be5fa3490448eed85c9661: I hear you are the man to talk to about maps.
textByHashes.4f0bb4f29c12f7da7afedcade1568fc5cda54f5b: I might have 5000 Pieces of Eight with your name on them if you have a map for me.
textByHashes.bdd06d8d8255bbfd230b653ef6aedc47313d238f: I have no idea what you are talking about.
textByHashes.b8f36298110521094b169c0b636ae55673dd9782: Yes, I am sort of a pirate after all.
textByHashes.2843db461e62e4427e852fb62603be3d81cc3978: It's . I'm using my magic to communicate to you. Don't worry.
textByHashes.473736b77e239dd48731422a03ec7b0628b551f0: How much time till the next game of Trouble Brewing starts?
textByHashes.89418b54b4471760c2ec2adecc47900b6de05f33: And how many people are there?
textByHashes.b0f92291243696a319ec5deec719434d2749e6f8: How many people are waiting for a game to start?
textByHashes.1996db3f2b388354365df53ee5b4d3d4580cd000: Good day! How are you doing?
textByHashes.99048610640be0b2cee9c2dc4bdc5f8b31645a00: No. I only use old, recycled jokes. It's better for the environment.
textByHashes.0b332c13e1bbe880b9a74cdc652787d159a6d8a1: I'm afraid not, I have other things to do.
textByHashes.51ecc8f5d71b1b13de1cc2d407a09073d233efd5: Right you are. I'll be careful.
textByHashes.e5a4e2b978ccec46d67d7946654002d0f66802d6: Thanks for the warning. I'll keep my eyes peeled.
textByHashes.0b57895e3d161c4d9f29dd64025b8086b5301fe4: Can you tell me where I could find Phingspet and Grimesquit?
textByHashes.2887faad343b2527e1e32b5d76fabc5d6646503a: Can you tell me where I could find Jimmy Dazzler?
textByHashes.169893dcbc4318b46ab53b1e1357dcfd7759920d: But where would I find him?
textByHashes.cdddb2e74eab3afae0b7678e60ab04f3be3c66fa: What's your problem with Jimmy, anyway?
textByHashes.f7c434ebf3196ddcbed745be104546d67a8e448c: Are you sure? He spoke very highly of you.
textByHashes.c125240f40fa1ce54e300340d184306f25f9a7f6: Can you tell me where I could find Smokin' Joe?
textByHashes.6e98ef08ffe4db9c09f4a91effd14b8bdc68ae0f: Can you tell me where I could find 'The Face'?
textByHashes.8ca91f27ceafd19834111b9c50e01c8e823fe269: Can you tell me where I could find Felkrash?
textByHashes.fd9fa041dc99fc271733470ede9dd6193738c8d8: Can you show me to the rat pits?
textByHashes.1815275ce021403d6283d8e49fe10ad605d1876a: You could call him that. But where would I find him?
textByHashes.05299fe02980ea21c7d503df4bd5f639f594e79c: So you two know each other?
textByHashes.91f30383545ccc58d818a141770f156604a455d0: Can you tell me where I could find Smokin Joe?
textByHashes.774ce67aeb25d0ca397ebf28d7c6b0805790b763: Can you tell me where I would find 'The Face'?
textByHashes.11beffaab54c7f37358d3320b2b13af08c294ac5: Wouldn't hopping yourself and preventing this entire conversation have been better for experience rates?
textByHashes.16d5a004be106141075e87c03f90ca4386781205: Well good luck in your search.
textByHashes.1d07c9ecb595c915433db2d4ce2e679181208679: No thanks. I'm just looking around.
textByHashes.8d34a7f783c48e9810382db8cf919e8427271761: Ummm... No, sorry. Looks like you've had enough anyway.
textByHashes.d551f66ddc90268ae72aa3351102d029b02aab1d: Why are you drinking so much? To forget?
textByHashes.a0c3d9c2dc6e1ff4ab5f8e304e901fdf0f5175db: Ah, the 'Horses'... How unfortunate, the wine has made you delirious. I've no idea what a Horse is my friend.
textByHashes.e7fb6d3910d1ff3ff71953ed3a39e2f12ff23551: No, sorry. Do you know of any caves around here?
textByHashes.9d3ddbb7f01faa871a6bc17cb482542fa2e81ece: That might be them. Thank you.
textByHashes.5c2e1c3389689770ff577a14ade799211b0dac29: Want to go on an adventure?
textByHashes.cb946c2f6e95f70056eda1c3f3954d3a28ca5d45: I was thinking the same thing!
textByHashes.086b314d1e8e8cdc2221b833ded55722bd244866: I don't know about that one.
textByHashes.404d79dc9e0d1f2c6e559f01e95155172c10b071: Would you care to tell me more?
textByHashes.17bae7594e3c0889b6becad7a3f087c0ecdda4cd: You look like a load of primitive savages.
textByHashes.59096526eff649d55a782e199714e652d8f7836e: I came to kill you all!
textByHashes.51c97efd1a4ef10e1f31ce69db5c638b77f585e8: What is this cave here for?
textByHashes.d988a29d48735e7281e95ace10996262509fddaf: Where would I find polar kebbits?
textByHashes.eaf24cd2b82f2abf64b22effab9893d2d264c527: How would I go about doing that, then?
textByHashes.a9f265c1509297fdd8a608cf12da302f17f3cf4c: Wow, that's quite a lot to remember.
textByHashes.ee87db4a12afeed036c73f6f9f9e5643397c0443: Do I need to place any bait on these traps?
textByHashes.fd1bb485c360e7c0fdf6015ffe68cb7f03af8e40: How can I improve my chances of capturing a creature?
textByHashes.1336cd95b82c9b0bf1bb86d7efa0dc52cb410ac6: And how do I do that?
textByHashes.ba3f4af7ac5d6c5af262eeb7f452b54c5991346b: How can I capture a sabre-toothed kebbit?
textByHashes.9df473cee3d6117ec88959d2ff5a0f7b24490432: Oooh, kyatts sounds interesting. I want to catch one of those.
textByHashes.04320ccb85cac91ff552aa384d0b2c3164db9e5f: What? I don't like the sound of that.
textByHashes.c965e516a7c28b9b0b8120ee295afe058bb69f44: That sounds a bit hit or miss, and kind of suicidal too!
textByHashes.d2c11c78f947f165b86c45e8bf2060325c0f62d5: Can you teach me how to hunt?
textByHashes.a79a2acc2dd9d45bb7d3d373fbdb39026a70d4bd: Where's the best place to start?
textByHashes.e58323fbfd9d89252000c4ab7ccb88f3d58043bf: So how do I track them down, then?
textByHashes.ae72d54134421cd5ac0d497677aee0969ff0d31c: What sort of creatures are there to hunt around here?
textByHashes.ba66caea6970787ab76fb9b0607bcd2f57449fd7: Sorry, I'm not that keen on hunting.
textByHashes.49dcb2dfaf63a09166a544793084d20d9244da06: Can you give me some hunting traps?
textByHashes.f7caf84996a45212d109e8cc7a6469ad04232ad7: Thanks! I will put this to good use.
textByHashes.294c200061e8642f3aa29a62fb4a9e76407ea7b2: Ok, where's a good place to start?
textByHashes.1ec00b458d7f18a9dd97c0da3006bd87f0e9e0bf: What sort of traps should I use?
textByHashes.7d8cd108bcbbda04ede8c898d361d6ceb151e331: What sort of things are there to catch around here?
textByHashes.46ea2f9bd2cff242d10fb1750364a6b6bd9805a3: How would I go about catching birds?
textByHashes.f8364c2d4d230a4a5493ae89a0649ae8753ecd0d: How do I get hold of a weasel?
textByHashes.61aa7fed88b0e892219a1c91bebb5b08ce4511b4: And how would I actually go about finding one?
textByHashes.b3238d1350ac3e13c6d26012094f3575a00ae85b: Well, seeing as you seem to like larupias so much...
textByHashes.0ae551f42d416d4903bc5edbba44ef59412c4c5e: Uh huh, big kittens that just want to rip your throat out!
textByHashes.2b7c5358571c6d8d21431b0c086309749a9c0e5c: Into what sort of trap should I lead it?
textByHashes.e32e9d493188e6a52fdb4c072f7b06b0f7bea502: So, how would I go about catching one them?
textByHashes.e239eae5c063e50c7c2073f4ea01274f6a503e64: What, you mean just pick up some boulders and start throwing them at kebbits? That doesn't sound simple.
textByHashes.64321fb1f6569834f933a83fbb699980103957cf: What on earth is a chinchompa?
textByHashes.1c3c4f47d88ae0ea09e76574a1062a1e8112f512: Somehow butterflies don't strike me as your sort of thing.
textByHashes.7878eb0b60d302c54164364675ba50585debff1b: Doesn't that make them harder to catch?
textByHashes.66bc8b26a72b118bd4d068ff54b51c61808c3a23: How can I improve my chances of making a capture?
textByHashes.35c577e4d344f7bc6e60bf94d080b7b6513af8cb: Why is it important how close I am to the trap?
textByHashes.910ba9e21e9133df245ae50c322cfd47585bb33b: Why would the creatures care about my appearance?
textByHashes.b536fe019aa656ae3b6715648528046f833fa133: Where can I get clothes and equipment like yours?
textByHashes.e37120ebbc25560a8cf377cf011f85a60c53b35a: I think I'll give it a miss right now, thanks.
textByHashes.9fd0f14ba0324366ef8fa1f31f185117ce1fc4ef: Well, they're certainly decorative...what about them?
textByHashes.0bb61a1fe1677cadfde04b8512d1d9c5b55968a6: What is that cool cape you're wearing?
textByHashes.467b65883627a39699f3d02ead1f4aa0eb8828a3: Ahh, leave me alone you crazy killing person.
textByHashes.885f0050d8dc01fb78725d977981b8fce99fb91a: Can I buy a Hunter's Skillcape from you?
textByHashes.ac07d132cb63a99887099f855d8bdf3cf219cf47: Certainly, I'm happy to pay that.
textByHashes.f99655dfa8f88b7fb9403f7b6a9401a149685060: But it seems that I don't have enough money with me.
textByHashes.96a20b5a86ebd8f32f7a806c38acd530d51a4c1c: What kinds of food and drink do you serve?
textByHashes.7e93134b2d7dfbbadb9b5bb3d95bfe8550d56bd6: Couldn't you just leave it on the ground for me?
textByHashes.38ecc19736499fbf50e4486be5e2231083b411e6: Oh, I can't afford one right now.
textByHashes.b5ca972a22bf19579e02019004c1448d70130749: Oh, I can't afford that right now.
textByHashes.1aeca152f1daa4693209f137d8fd67cae6dce93b: Do you have any new ones for me?
textByHashes.c3468902bd1b25c5c6505169dff713c54b439ace: Can you remind me which rumour I'm chasing right now?
textByHashes.ed39794f38c060dcb51d11d59cf078d22b5667b8: Hello, what's that you've got there?
textByHashes.d9e36f1031119c5eabf22cffff157b3ecf80e7e6: From the rolling pin and saucepan?
textByHashes.db99de84d08f441eb7e50f8d0d8ee1964bf71ecf: I don't know if it is that surprising. You were banging a metal saucepan on your head!
textByHashes.ba869ec110611861603fb82f1289c8cc5d6941a9: It was a good adventure wasn't it!
textByHashes.a272a432a3604df847c8806fdb533e07cb7f87c6: I couldn't have picked anyone else, you were the perfect accomplice!
textByHashes.c3a1b2b00390dd8aa84d83543c86db52c68da500: I am doing my best to adventure. There are just so many things to do!
textByHashes.8a90040da911a887a415c41b7f125db607bce01e: It was my pleasure, maybe we could do it again some day!
textByHashes.c41c7e4731c2bcd92046e25716a55f012984df88: It's lovely, very versatile. Even keeps me warm in the coldest of places!
textByHashes.34e4c7922816ef49138d8580c71d98d0958987e5: I like the orange version the best!
textByHashes.2ebdb5f59cf7d1527b3fe8749445f2c1c04f209f: I like the black version the best!
textByHashes.e89a4396307bc10ccac68038c3bb4a11ac8dd689: Okaaaay! Err, I'll be going now. Umm, get better soon.
textByHashes.c813867f8aad83ff641f625e5c707614fb742223: What is that cape you're wearing?
textByHashes.f0b6fc63ff0f00fc29f5023ed7c570bae8996a4a: Hmm, I'll be going now. Keep a sharp look out for those men with their white jackets!
textByHashes.2380d47b7f71026e77b3ada37d793caad9c78850: Can I buy a Skillcape of Firemaking?
textByHashes.3c02ed0b920ed00fd367db2e3bcf798fe648fcfd: Oh dear... We should probably do something about that.
textByHashes.bd0053d144bc34a70f655ffb9fa5b2481b56d873: Well that's just no good. Is there anything I can do to help?
textByHashes.4bff0f55380d5d96abf17f2252beef70629e2966: I'm just wandering, it's a lovely day for a walk in the woods.
textByHashes.3d6c4010567970fb99427bf0d2093bfe32009512: Well I shouldn't keep you, see you later.
textByHashes.294a03ba3f9f504bd1b2f2b3ae8b486570ab05d5: Do you remember Oaknock? He was a gnome inventor
textByHashes.b4b40df9d7bbc16b1d56543f70d6c083f89c2004: I think Oaknock died of old age some time ago. He must have visited you a few hundred years ago though...
textByHashes.a5cd0f21a9a7a43abae017cd1c458a3b75ad03cc: Not bad, I'm trying to help an elf named Islwyn consecrate his grandmother's resting place. Do you know of anything that could help me?
textByHashes.2d1782b440ccfda6195cf10fb024a430091c33af: Also, while I'm here, I have a question for you.
textByHashes.157ed4e1eaf70b8151cb2f3cdc5984cbcdca2577: It just happens I have a seed here, what can you do with it?
textByHashes.5a340c239475ae7a272216492e6b64bf2c506caa: Are you still offering to chant seeds?
textByHashes.6bfd32377498aee04be323561a6f0e3d754338c1: Siphon the ether into a Crystal bow please.
textByHashes.7c7e60cb49ae46f8194d60f38a35949f38d25738: Siphon the ether into a Crystal halberd please.
textByHashes.56251748a731873832488ff32fa320f216927600: Siphon the ether into a Crystal shield please.
textByHashes.4b81abdabcb4c6c99bd4aa2b424bf437bf186f56: None of them, I would like to purchase one with gold instead.
textByHashes.9b809dbe664af528e86d8db7d4edccbe11f83150: While I'm here, I have a question for you.
textByHashes.42ff9440f9c2efaff019657e9e05c8e88afbe0c1: Do you remember Oaknock? He was a gnome inventor.
textByHashes.46914fbe99bc804c2e0d7a80cf4e65aa630f5fad: Thanks, I'll read all about it.
textByHashes.cd006726e219aabf9dd3ba1e5f2e40b18ebd8a59: Days and decades? That's a bit confusing.
textByHashes.acac76e82b1b832b25a1fcffdc27259dc4fea03f: Tell me more about the Royal Accord of Twill.
textByHashes.347783a382cdbb348af6e1a8f494bfcf45605a9f: Is the Royal Accord of Twill honoured today?
textByHashes.a11dadb410a706919d61860762075a33e7be704c: Fascinating. What happened during that time?
textByHashes.fe93ebdf83fb9beb11e7c1f5a68e44bd95b66392: Can you tell me more about Xeric?
textByHashes.8c791b210d27dc95d3076e09fc8afb6341fecb9b: So that means the Accord was signed almost 1,410 years ago?
textByHashes.820357161f14d2339a402c90d031b0e7ee7a7f0b: What about the time before the Accord was signed?
textByHashes.0207de05f6224f3b1c9bed01799f286205d48664: Hello, what do you do here?
textByHashes.654628563e04c219c89e249047f1a30e6c224dc9: She's a hero from nearly two thousand years ago. I believe she travelled to Kourend during the Dragonkin Conflicts. I was hoping to learn more about her.
textByHashes.e00e08ec563f3448f53bf125c50648c90869cf46: Hello. So, what is this place?
textByHashes.dc86b93dd3b30d8ab0d4e032380599ddfb76d603: Stay out of my pockets! I don't have anything that you want.
textByHashes.4acf9f11874f97764023a1294802cbbf2003fc4f: So, you collect things that humans want? Interesting... So, what would happen if I caught an impling in a butterfly net?
textByHashes.2254b7a814a55ed2587a7fe9aa9a856f4a8c790d: So, some of these implings have things that I will really want? Hmm, maybe it would be worth my while trying to catch some.
textByHashes.5dad8047e0fe7667ed09f2c5df3cfa6f57f04af2: Yes, get me out of here!
textByHashes.21738f695d322919d03e74f38c1b2e66683475a5: Ah, no I'll hang around a bit longer.
textByHashes.5ec6385b7759e62cee10644a6f993078477bf019: So not back to where the crop circle is now?
textByHashes.85c482e0aaed3bed5bf848208b33513f30a39aeb: Where will I go if I leave?
textByHashes.970f6cdd84959252c6f38c2beaf02695927b592b: Hey imp, can you hear me?
textByHashes.0f373c79d210cbfb512e184344413ec22d824423: No, I'm going to keep you in there. I might keep you as a pet.
textByHashes.f7bae5fcf743c6cc92ae1eafdd0203cd7fab32fb: Fire risk? How does that work?
textByHashes.e6271f3aa9b68632b5300018b74cb0544968744b: It's not that bad. You've got four big windows, charming company...er...
textByHashes.8a70c58cbd08c714f23ff516525b7fb256293a95: Well, you're a magical creature aren't you? Surely I get some wishes for capturing you, or releasing you, or something?
textByHashes.919d4efe5e85d079e2cd340b78fbb88309ed8c0d: Surely it should be three items? Then it's one item per wish.
textByHashes.36d0c8f14a27bae9ee92f29724788b27c2e57e9d: I've got nothing I need banking right now.
textByHashes.a7938b4db764dc169d20af9d0cbda1f0e921da18: Hey imp, are you still there?
textByHashes.2a7ff9f315abe11e985f36ede0b459882a3ec312: No, I'm afraid you're going to have to wait a bit longer.
textByHashes.d779764a9abfd94e2ab3d1f2edf05ebb7049adfc: Yes, teach me something in those skills.
textByHashes.5ec410140de67ce6c9a74ac4a77a16645fae0a35: Could you tell me about the Dig Site exhibit please?
textByHashes.ff5b7f52be0fd8a48c6c838dacee447f34ffe327: Could you tell me about the Timeline exhibit please?
textByHashes.bbe9fc189f515f29844dc0ff8e5cb7d117c7e52f: Okay, thanks. One more question: why are the display numbers all out of sequence?
textByHashes.3806a0afee3f37c524fd3942d139ced04cfc3542: Could you tell me about the Natural History exhibit please?
textByHashes.03d07018dcd2af0def1f5a7760af89f54dddb326: But what's natural history got to do with existing animals?
textByHashes.31311acacf213f1f685e2a2433282b99f8a54669: Thank you, I'll look forward to it!
textByHashes.86d60269c2c6e5d83991f8f9d613409b0a307941: I think they're piddly because of how warm it is here...
textByHashes.df821a8b5abbbb89f3ac047afe1ac793ffc4c373: It's lovely. You have a fine collection of goats.
textByHashes.abb7397eff6c04ae901fc991a7dc556d0d855a35: Can I have some beer please?
textByHashes.44d6ac876d96636efd79ff36e53a3d5c7312e94e: What happened? Who was it? Are they ok?
textByHashes.feff9fab285e263e528e250af635086af3e683ba: Have you tried putting calcium in the pool?
textByHashes.c05210e39461fd570d16bc92b2a1e0235a2b3b00: I'd like to change my Ironwoman mode.
textByHashes.795a669cf1bc27383d189855c01f49ee54d360e6: I'd like to review my Ironman mode.
textByHashes.80fb2e63f763bbc15ae645bdec65de5ae089a197: I'd like to review my Ironwoman mode.
textByHashes.1bdda79e16b4ad71aa1b371f7ed88cde9570a8d2: Have you any armour for me, please?
textByHashes.56321fbe0b9c06de1488a689f6e83bc10a6bc08e: I'd like to change my Iron Man mode.
textByHashes.1bf19be002e3ddc6bc2f77d4410aa51c9b0ddc60: Yes, I'm not interested in Fresh Start Worlds.
textByHashes.36628b4619ba1471c13cbe86a0e232bff00b45b1: No, Fresh Start Worlds sound like my sort of thing!
textByHashes.8bcd6e0538692f8b08ca82290bd4c069a854ecb8: Hey, what do you do here?
textByHashes.2029075051a5ecc7d7bdda949824a40c7c348d5a: How do you mean, home help?
textByHashes.4cc8070b9e49a1214af4cbfe2d8312c52022d86b: Yes, yes, I know the sort...full of themselves aren't they.
textByHashes.91932d5f57e4377775ab448e16c56551d483345a: What, you graze your knees a lot?
textByHashes.17b5510e5f0c06b47837ebcc363388ed00e64b85: Not yet, but I suppose I probably should.
textByHashes.9ed303e8f9daa4789cfde876d8b7dd3eddb73168: Well, I do always like a gift. I was wondering though, do you know why these totems are so important to the ents?
textByHashes.23c3afb47ee73fe0edab73a2d639982577e1e809: And I'm sure nobody wants mummy and daddy to be grumpy!
textByHashes.917dc6d972d8ae72f5db691d6b05fc04fc3a0838: What brings a navigator up here?
textByHashes.eda6d33756ed7f5a82da757ac7afb51a88a0902f: What do you think of the Pyromancers?
textByHashes.0594b55c9e5988cd962528a55f78ee6dc9694b26: Hello, what do you do around here?
textByHashes.ecf498612ae4cfb7f9ff2e509b7d081bfa8595b3: Can I take a look at what you have in stock?
textByHashes.c8604e6a907423caedfe1e8bca5d99a46cd7a148: Why did you set up shop around here? It seems a little run down.
textByHashes.ad67ea8a5bc279c17f82cd5de03e3ae26f9a06fd: I'd like to buy a halberd.
textByHashes.7dbcda890c116f50d0885d4cefe6fd6906960ecd: What information do you have on Xeric?
textByHashes.7775669a8df148953145cb628586b5a27912a8c1: What can you tell me about the Wintertodt?
textByHashes.933cdc2bbcd246cbcb139740c35cc5fc80c948c3: What can you tell me about Mount Quidamortem?
textByHashes.a21db04c27a062194826ed93539fcede9e1f1c19: No not really. I have reason to believe that not everyone was killed on that expedition.
textByHashes.76ca4b4310496e2557565c874294ea79dda5da7a: Do you know anything about Camorra? She was a hero who lived around two thousand years ago.
textByHashes.e530fc263478875cc88b5093f47f5369f13be858: Are you sure? You know I'm here if you need anything.
textByHashes.6674a099b97e12e2e72cd81da1acfbf8af257b93: Just checking in. I'll leave you be.
textByHashes.42235c014b925b0918a682932714b802bdb57d83: Is he going to be okay?
textByHashes.a801702dead1217644e1773bcb5e3e70ae47592b: Okay... What are you going to do with him?
textByHashes.c8322eb223b9066cede5ffa24ace54e71587b1bd: I see. Well I hope he gets well soon.
textByHashes.796f9f565b7d27a063526d095f44a84056357505: What happens if he doesn't recover?
textByHashes.3018aea45a4b33e81992f5ff4881e3951c388607: Not really - just call it a gift.
textByHashes.e43dc740d96d9aca6c8e5ba7f225b19072f02189: Nope, I'm not magic, and I have no clue why the sea is blue.
textByHashes.69303d7263fab171355edcc311dcd9197ada488f: Have you got any quests I could do?
textByHashes.f9890f93a2008ec75969f4c3d73d9ccf89b7386e: I think I'll leave you two to sort it out.
textByHashes.33ee22fd1d8d093f2124bb60cc07b43136e54820: You got beaten up by a troll!
textByHashes.d856dbea8e4956cce22fda5fa7a640fd1a7e82e8: You didn't look so tough when the troll knocked you down.
textByHashes.3314076ff8e59e03fb4ba8db25aa33187f70c611: Hey guard, how much to let me out of this cell?
textByHashes.17c9e605b9e469ab71d6e719c4b70db0b266f805: Oh, I don't seem to have that much money with me.
textByHashes.566023a80d0f8544b98670c54718dd0d68fb066b: You must see some gruesome things?
textByHashes.6b913b139458885a84f25284191d32e5db6bf126: Why do they call you 'The Butcher'?
textByHashes.7fe40e553828924db6e6f7436dfcdc162e1a778c: Er...I'll give it a miss, thanks.
textByHashes.605569d92ebfe69267c24a0c3d27f09ead7b6486: From boatman to researcher? That's quite the change.
textByHashes.ab9314711243bdbea8411a24795e0389c0ff53ea: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Desert Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.f7812b29b21a98d4b0022ab320b602f6d4bec714: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Desert achievement diary!
textByHashes.25b72c59ba48b7824f5c3246180d9330597bffb6: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Desert achievement diary!
textByHashes.f5cb0f8031a4e42e855b7b24ea9409541a37f823: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Desert achievement diary!
textByHashes.405c85cba658ccdffcb1fc9d72fb897302a28845: Where is your chieftain? I find it highly discriminatory to refuse to talk to someone on the grounds that they are not part of your tribe.
textByHashes.ea0b31ed4ab99f39029e47c489662f838bb0aaf6: Oh, pleeeeease? I really LOVE killing stuff!
textByHashes.abf01d1955766acb9cef6be8fddf001575d20d53: What? That's outrageous, why charge me money? And, uh, how much does it cost me?
textByHashes.e120597ed41b383eaad141afccaf42bef590375a: No, actually I have some stuff to do here first.
textByHashes.5e41918d6615a16ef436be3a2938f36aadf3bb9b: Hey, I have to say, that's a fine looking hat you are wearing there.
textByHashes.a2d843751f0a05b5b2c36e592a2dd94296f82f01: Wow, you Fremenniks sure know how to party. Well, see ya around.
textByHashes.5029caee3220681a81c132afac1a9a96f07a7fbd: Actually, I don't think I have anything to speak to you about...
textByHashes.2a2aaadba259697ec194a5369b0dcd64b780ece7: I wish to return to Rellekka.
textByHashes.a031d7121c3ce4a44ba9c6d116639f51b0ea5daa: Changed? How do you mean, changed?
textByHashes.f31bd7992314ad6bc50ece025b519e50efeb262a: So you're scared they might attack Rellekka?
textByHashes.5fdbeddbca0f6993ec63a99e0c755f73eba76ead: I picked up this, I was wondering if you could tell me about it...
textByHashes.bcbf8310d3cde481c6e2f138659c4fee001ba2dc: If I did, do you think I'd tell you so that you could then swipe it?
textByHashes.da6cfff57f80998d6588a4abd7263962f70ddab4: So for now you're here alone? Does that make the work harder?
textByHashes.79f9c74a1f3185f2a430dc8b7a395ee8c0e3783b: Yes, I was actually there to witness it myself. It was horrible.
textByHashes.fcfd2b4eec30bd36b14fefa161978a2920b368d2: Yes, along with his egg, , but there's a bit of a problem! 's broken!
textByHashes.06117d2800f7d5259b5b6b66151b0806689a98d0: Why would you care if there's a guard watching you?
textByHashes.1cca9d584d02a9af355ad8e4af900013ffc15129: What kind of a name is Jelly?
textByHashes.830682e7141c44a1d9a80eaec0cceefe6785aefa: I don't need anything right now.
textByHashes.25f422512f0eac25b54051515058fcc4016be6e2: Yes, I know about them. Don't worry, I'll make sure they don't cause any more problems.
textByHashes.94dc9208594a987085829e817e435018f4cb6837: Nice to meet you. You must know this area very well then.
textByHashes.c54fe2d1326b359e188111386b3478c5c860191e: I see. Thanks for the warning.
textByHashes.381178df781f857649bf3dd8694a62eaa73837c8: Good to hear, all the best.
textByHashes.9b1c8a1d2c7f9810455bcd8e6501ad05d91c9e99: Could you tell me more about the lesser gods?
textByHashes.7f99c8c5e9beae8e1d18091fc1f97d2187a0b6d1: Could you tell me more about Apmeken?
textByHashes.afab754ba6e043aa3475cf0276b3537c7633821a: So I shouldn't trust you then?
textByHashes.6c7bc9bb164e4a1c9342ab9bbf175d5b59605ef7: I see. What does she look like?
textByHashes.69afe58b898f618ec2d3ae72c7482d96d08e3a74: Could you tell me more about Het?
textByHashes.0efc1c2c2ad5c678bab4b89604b96c48e94fb845: How did his followers react to the plagues here?
textByHashes.3b9a89c9cdfaf9a7dd8cb68372c58dff2f29d0d7: Could you tell me more about Crondis?
textByHashes.7e61f4788bee60196f0f5be065caf5deaf0093a0: That must be awkward when buying helmets.
textByHashes.6941ea6b4ad620a913a09b5b76de06801fcac8b1: So what is she the goddess of?
textByHashes.50ce317785bc480dcdf289d71d777121ab4d699f: But there's others with a different interpretation?
textByHashes.bb9bb9613cd349361bf7f459c22098d4ab7b6051: Could you tell me more about Scabaras?
textByHashes.cdb0126b8c0884a7745b8a2813b93911a45518f3: Well what are the absolute facts then?
textByHashes.8e61c5fb5838b24dc8e12d6c40ebe956a42fe84a: But there must be more. The High Priest told me that Scabaras tried to conquer these lands.
textByHashes.5ba2a333a60d0806dc4b5046373f60319bb5476d: Hang on... why would I do that?
textByHashes.6c1b1e7a4dac07c4820481e378d468bb6b52b2c9: I've already entered one dubious contract.
textByHashes.aac7476d9f698ffeb23dc4fbdfdb23e38d4f3677: I'm not sure I should be signing any others.
textByHashes.1e28a313ff1c36566685e6edbfc5a6a886901dcd: Wait, how do you know my name? Was this a trick?
textByHashes.e12a56674e380851b94bd1634d52b668e2cf5bb8: The rock looks like it's crumbling.
textByHashes.cc359a70216d746c62890f37752d84c887695828: That's good to know. What about the smithy?
textByHashes.49b587ec9b194f3f772d20a865ffc72de6108b43: I can see my sweat turning to vapour as soon as it appears.
textByHashes.b9675dce2ebad5a5b13149a5650c0f66ab16a5de: I see, thanks. I'll give that a try.
textByHashes.a1a140deda7b08e1da9bc74da8430922388de1ef: Why is there a smithy down here?
textByHashes.82c3e33dd560d701fe3f168d10da12703fc63157: Like the rocks on this isle?
textByHashes.beff85afdace18569418726a233956dfc81a026b: But if I were to get my hands on some, I could work them here?
textByHashes.1d61717eaffc89be5c534b9f67b70d53916c1992: I see. Maybe I can give that a go.
textByHashes.8062cdbd60c84bbf68a8d9d24c265242b23303b9: You're very friendly for a demon.
textByHashes.7674d28d28977918e0936b789f56a5c99bcdc346: Well, if there is anything I can do for you, let me know.
textByHashes.56562a4559c97a56731cac0fa2c8f127fb7f2ba8: My name is Dazaator, and I have a couple of questions for you.
textByHashes.f4dc68b5944dd4a476a446ac2ccd55b645c670cc: As if those clothes you're wearing wouldn't do that already.
textByHashes.dc2b168bb129f42a16b8d92d1220e7bf18d827b8: I can't see the bottom of the ladder. I think I'll leave it be, for now.
textByHashes.ac0b820102532709cca784aac721f3eef1351a6d: Can you tell me where I can find Phingspet and Grimesquit?
textByHashes.5b65929432565ef6f13e4a4f7602d2607b801222: Can you tell me where I might find 'The Face'?
textByHashes.b8e0e2f044bc6efc66e004b2920eaa47e00051c7: Can you tell me where I might find Felkrash?
textByHashes.8b0a5ab1904f0328d70e5f59bf60951522a1322b: How do you spell your name again?
textByHashes.5958535b5887451460f9f42e41a4fb666efbe0e6: Ever thought about putting a '1' in it?
textByHashes.594db1dd27f97786b5d55ac8d4ee6bedf5aab27a: Might add a bit of pizzazz, that's all.
textByHashes.8bf63c8d2e7801be287e3ad7944d1decad418877: My name is , and I have a couple of questions for you.
textByHashes.d4bf2a5a06312104decd0b37d94d3b8c71e1b1c3: What do you mean by no?
textByHashes.9fec82c6adc913715ca6e70470e9283a5f214fa2: As if those 'clothes' you're wearing wouldn't do that already.
textByHashes.38ea37ebd31648c8f9533101a9fef180c3f5a82e: Can you tell me where I could find Hooknosed Jack?
textByHashes.7b80e23b86dca44697b42f855c941c4cfefff7f6: Well if he's not here where would I find him?
textByHashes.32ac7f7674fa3c64fb336f63ee198cf659082d03: Will you please tell me where I could find her?
textByHashes.29d41a098f59550192b0f205ad3f6588e16c68b5: But you just nipped in to have a quick drink?
textByHashes.7727fe45395db0b5da18a7e33ca31e62cf83777a: Tell me how to balance kegs?
textByHashes.96bbec7e207f768eafd73decdf36003db6da4cf2: That sounds like a challenge, I'll show you!
textByHashes.fcb65fcf82fe6d3d48cd43ab5463988560d186db: No thanks, got things to do, people to see, tokens to earn...
textByHashes.cb5ac00ab709a941b951d21047d2814cd8acfbf6: One of them? What do you mean?
textByHashes.6f1943ed5de5ac66538f5ae7e9ad6ec570cdbe03: Right... Well, no, I'm not with them.
textByHashes.b6c2bcc8aceea0d9ebe5ec51fd9f731edad4a1cb: Yes, I can see why that might have upset them. Anyway, I think I'm going to head off now, but good luck with... everything.
textByHashes.21fc31ef1c09b40db6a053bf97b9332e761f08bd: Yes, I can see why that might have upset them. Perhaps it might be wise for you to put some distance between you and them.
textByHashes.fdcdfc28a47e0f14fb169fec72d01d7886f3d5f2: I'm afraid not. At some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with, but I'm not really ready for that yet.
textByHashes.d5dfef18f6640858ab462a4612daf6e1fc59d6c4: Well, I guess you could join my crew.
textByHashes.813d578e0400b522df3a315eeccb78ac2b799230: I see you're still here. Do you not think it would be best if you put some distance between yourself and this place?
textByHashes.ea76e7c26dcc2e3836024f821034766cc73bc396: Hello there. How are things going?
textByHashes.b8122916bfdf195ade299c2b447c1cb5460b85d1: It must be scary living in your own head...
textByHashes.1bd9575a01152d0f1f6f5b8c5f3b38fdd98215ea: Oh, in the meat business are you?
textByHashes.da2767727c2cd63e214cbf67d47a241bafab7bdf: Ah, I'm something of a farmer myself!
textByHashes.cb007463c827f7c4669f1d2f9f0e90c1b407edc3: Well, I have baked a loaf or two in my time as well.
textByHashes.dd013272b7895e96054d0ba95f0f93c93bc8b2ae: I'm just trying to work out what you do.
textByHashes.633e899f46746159ba2802807bef9190b58f2d3a: I'm sorry, but I have no idea what you're trying to say to me. I'm just going to leave you to it.
textByHashes.d43c8928b840bb636d3a7ab0c1f2732ce1287b37: Thanks for the offer, but I'm still pretty new to it all. I don't think I'm ready to be hiring a crew yet, but I'll let you know when I am.
textByHashes.1f5003754de12c0dc787ab7250c0df4421ee681e: Sounds good to me. Why don't you join my crew?
textByHashes.dda04e107dde61e0ecb10acc83fe49bda7062a0d: Thanks for the offer, but I'm good at the moment.
textByHashes.81e570ec39912b474361b2f8e30be592f04faccd: I find it odd that I have an easier time understanding ghosts than you, Jim.
textByHashes.ba92047454e4c525e08f0e2774d07ce24fea29ef: I wanted to know where you got that harpoon hand.
textByHashes.0643f5b2131bc59626454d12566e581c03d26aee: Sorry to interrupt, but I would just like to clear something up.
textByHashes.11310f04446a083acd542d1bc7f12ddd62d60d59: When I said 'I wanted to know where you got that harpoon hand', I meant where did you get it made, or buy it from?
textByHashes.370c4a595c6b72b4cb4b2990133e4ede7432ba4c: Why do you have so much wool in your store? I haven't seen any sheep anywhere.
textByHashes.dc9c636fef995bf5f6afab14f470a13327d25c33: What do you trade for it?
textByHashes.2a3699ba3186cf5f267a75e9dcf36dfc20f8b7eb: Where does all this rope go?
textByHashes.b81d1ce669ae30068d92c4eb4f6a06a5c453b885: What kind of organisation is this?
textByHashes.175f0589408fe453e10ca0fcafee098a0d769952: Hmm, how do you propose to do that? I mean, I see people everyday killing goblins around here!
textByHashes.df1110f436b4bb94bc6daebdfa04b45b46a25dc6: That sounds kind of strange, but hey it's your choice.
textByHashes.08761c6f40856d021bb39e25498f9c5f5e5e9882: Is that like fossils and stuff?
textByHashes.f42f8691d8feffa6c213c1835a538011282a0cf5: He's sleeping peacefully. Loudly, but peacefully.
textByHashes.f0057b58ee36f344157133c1fc3a83227dd8eb41: Could I have some more chaos gauntlets, please?
textByHashes.2e649d2f2049eeb5e784806bb25842165ee8615c: You seem to be in a good mood.
textByHashes.b7f5b42cc9478aaa911cf579303ea8afe8ea319e: That doesn't seem like a reason to be happy...
textByHashes.c882c11d66f3244dbc985eb19e91299251cbc3ae: I see. So what happened to your crew?
textByHashes.359d6751dcef216575cd9aa168862e1ef4e26e20: Hmm... Well, congratulations on having survived all that. All the best.
textByHashes.ddbf11aee9d4cc9b885b54fe9a7333a5342c0474: Hmm... Well, congratulations on having survived all that. What do you plan to do now?
textByHashes.539f1f38677f2586183e3e23a880355456ca6f97: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself, but I'm not really ready for that yet.
textByHashes.99f97181f06bfbaa0716fb083274ec5355ebe087: How about you join my crew?
textByHashes.c73187d01005e72fe5f3b7f84a7135ebe1d3cd29: That doesn't make much sense to me...
textByHashes.43cff43f3ef2f63a08ad8a23d0e712dc68dfcc94: Sorry... I'll try to do worse, I guess.
textByHashes.2aa17d3e2df27898d51eff352720bb5405e497f5: Same as every day really, the weather is very consistent around here.
textByHashes.97871caca96cbdaf408b65af23ee449dc5aa1ddb: Hello there, I have this master clue he...
textByHashes.ccfe0173808b5f75b406ee49259b9e2d89cb5bca: Hi Jorral, I have come to ask you to help with something.
textByHashes.ebeeaa3e7c105c97d55f9f3e4b0470f5dad2e08e: Hey Jorral, I have one of those clue scrolls again, do you have any advice?
textByHashes.f78459cb6f31ccb1dfbdf1d47fd67180611a24be: I see you managed to escape from those monsters intact!
textByHashes.6a5c15c7e0228856e572710ed636a8eaccd6c89f: I have it here. You said you might be able to tell me something about it...
textByHashes.a0e976d1cfbea3ec821b2e24d87e242c2be10b54: I wish it were one of the other gods. I'd prefer my reward to be aligned to a different god, not Saradomin, Zamorak or Guthix.
textByHashes.cf2e3a3546b548518cf7973a1e4e2b9b2f03c060: I never had any casket from that monster...?
textByHashes.a95ab0453ddaa30ed8847bef6a47a0dbc25471c2: Have you found any more prayerbooks?
textByHashes.122f27b2f1b654354f585dd2386d237c1da1c6c1: You alchemists sure wear a lot of safety gear.
textByHashes.b5cc310962c0be11fbf6330cf5e27014e50417d3: Yikes! I guess I'll not be trying anything then!
textByHashes.88cab773315a0eeb2ef05aa3a825314c6dd97322: Tell me about the Cave Goblins.
textByHashes.64a848d8653c3518183bac1e0e3b1a0d814582e1: I'd like to receive messages prompting me to return here.
textByHashes.13b543630d998ba22d38a53ab660a75d72c9e314: I don't want any messages reminding me to return here.
textByHashes.e4a626d6eebeb79cd54166cd894587d4d912948f: Can you do something with this icon?
textByHashes.f1d4b7384449b7b42f8d6eb41a85f1bcb9611776: Combine them. I understand it can't be undone.
textByHashes.4f302e1e51757e1cdf4ccc06633022d4f47354bf: My weapon is sort of like a Staff of the Dead, don't you think?
textByHashes.903454306e6722be152b0dae4eab70e235824f0a: I've got a weapon in my inventory that's sort of like a Staff of the Dead.
textByHashes.cb1eaf08dce327f9247c4b3aeda03a0b815d8ad2: A Staff of the Dead, you say? Okay, thanks.
textByHashes.88f2ff0ea982c2d8b82a99a722c88174610822b3: I want to get out now.
textByHashes.3d041df17e564a815de392aa1c7e43ec0813dbcb: I lost my Bullroarer, can I swap this delicious wrap for yours?
textByHashes.59ccc122c5c292d3150c8cb76dd9b828ab79f49a: On second thoughts, I might get hungry.
textByHashes.6c1faaa3b0bbd13d3d9adcca23d7a2d4be6fd08b: I'd like to buy a new boat.
textByHashes.cd80f8ee5111ec24a341cdb01465c1779754b747: I'd like to customise a boat.
textByHashes.77f6338ea59fea0c0df43b1b5014ff7657e4349b: I'd like to recover a boat.
textByHashes.0e8ce27828c90750bbc32a35b9f643d9f8c938b7: I'd like to destroy a boat.
textByHashes.7447d9ca6dede8b40d2c2ab8fe484c93f36ecca4: Could I have another captain's log?
textByHashes.a28a69d5cf014f1a93b71ee39fae99e90e2c9473: Do you have any tips on how I can become a better sailor?
textByHashes.168e750e5e4cf028c216d2eee6f7bd35719320c4: Can you tell me more about port tasks?
textByHashes.24897793f434e7f6c7d79a805a9eee0b389844f4: And is there anything I should keep in mind while doing these tasks?
textByHashes.f1ce36133baaad526132a5ff2bda039817f79144: Can you tell me more about sea charting?
textByHashes.97b32b0c46f777e658df276d130b9443b47180cf: I might just do that. Thanks, Jim.
textByHashes.b94dd6213e046ca05e548563cce2f84a5ca54ebb: Can you tell me more about shipwreck salvaging?
textByHashes.e4d1af423584ab60b30b395345d64f06033d5ff7: Can you tell me more about Barracuda Trials?
textByHashes.ee4096571797b02d179781103527efa57d045162: I'll be sure to keep that in mind. Thanks, Jim.
textByHashes.44b7806c68f97069268221806b58e234c6d2932a: Can you tell me more about deep sea trawling?
textByHashes.56b344a902c300517534b322c31921fbafe03c6c: Is there anything else I should keep in mind?
textByHashes.bed214592b839027781a408c84d5cb7bc187c7c0: I want to get back to land.
textByHashes.e2143902c4731b0ac8b9c51b5cc56461a60e4cfb: Vacation? Is life on the Pandemonium all that taxing?
textByHashes.bb32af6ab9b810d4df91530cc4f3535fa1a35f5f: Can't you make an exception for me? I'm an Ironman by the way.
textByHashes.246358233cbde8812d11148364249bf98cd6ed79: Oh, sorry about that. Do you want one of mine?
textByHashes.a4805da58869028310c4cb7129ea424496877c87: Oh, sorry about that. I'm afraid I don't have one for you.
textByHashes.1a13f7aa63a7ededa11d964a0d239ee7ad92a1ec: Oh, that's good to know, thanks for the tip! Out of curiosity, what outfit is that?
textByHashes.c70521fc3a3ff72245b6bf8b86fd7804f9f1d128: It looks cool. Does it also help here?
textByHashes.f97336c4c2a34c1f9a8955829c995767654772c5: Good point. Why are you wearing it though if it doesn't help you get more loot?
textByHashes.8bb4dd7fc81f71d24f248683a6b38fe7662d1cc7: Each to their own I suppose. I'll be off. Best of luck down here.
textByHashes.bca58c034fecac6d66f1cf7caf7196ad3a537624: Hmmm. Very well, I'll go and free this soul.
textByHashes.7d8487846f73632ac51401eb7baf7bc81cd1a6c2: Why do you serve this power?
textByHashes.e45973975214f61070169664d1c262f621336789: And you were given this purpose?
textByHashes.1944397d12f0b4162ec9308a157baa027145ad15: I'm still not sure I understand.
textByHashes.b71b66c60f75c2770e8673e63dafa36a20c065c7: Why did that soul need freeing?
textByHashes.1c193d11148b1aeb55249387800e217a8dddedb1: Is this something that often happens?
textByHashes.1208d87096ada9e93870705cd4e90cdce6bce439: You said you might have further use for me?
textByHashes.450ef0ef40330256ed94ce32ac14fe8ff6bd58ce: What did you mean by that?
textByHashes.af7022665ae55323c70097f1e1700b7500e6d776: You said it was an important task. Now you say it's a menial one. Which is it?
textByHashes.a92756d30979ad0420cf6a857981a22708c7a874: So why was it only a small task? Surely saving the Arceuus people was worth more than that.
textByHashes.0956dd74597600fefac752a43c32efe8cc28d938: But you said I had to do it to save them?
textByHashes.652d504baeb8984b81edffed96b6b129ecd75cc1: I feel a little bit used.
textByHashes.db03136adf274f10511a3422830f6e5e447aa798: So what is the further use you have for me?
textByHashes.0f5f9dd89d408afbaa7678065d8590f855f19e46: Why do you hate Lord Arceuus?
textByHashes.4fdd386c9576ca8a5e3509e020258f70812b4866: I can see we're not going to get anywhere here.
textByHashes.2237a8d62bc4d634fb09c9f767d5ebef6bd3dcd4: What do you know of Xeric?
textByHashes.8a238afe1491f5209222dfe7f1aa01e1aaa5c294: Right... sorry. What was it you called him? The great betrayer?
textByHashes.3bdcd853c806935fa2b251dbe087ce9e10c4be5b: But why? What did he do?
textByHashes.82c419e933b12cb727440a36d48b0f7792d6a555: Plenty of people threaten the balance. Why was he especially bad?
textByHashes.1ca9739cf986f7289e1b39303ba6367535a6b928: What are you hiding? You call him a betrayer... Did he betray you? Did you work with him?
textByHashes.8b3149cf3c30ea035715896f271107517ba4640b: Do you know anything about this rogue Pyromancer?
textByHashes.81a4b23021e01f48e93a517489ff98b396bbb5f6: So you know nothing of them?
textByHashes.0ad0a15a5bfd4ba8fcde1b11e908d61d37acde4c: They sound dangerous. What do you plan to do?
textByHashes.87533356e94e0d859ad1f11f12b08e0d1bff79b0: But whoever they are, they're working with Xamphur. Many lives could be at risk.
textByHashes.c180772d62d801e39bc89b1187ded9cd9c23ca82: Hmm, I suppose I've never had a chance to speak with most Lizardmen, they're generally quite aggressive.
textByHashes.a3e2e63ad6baf8a78f59b0d60ec7967da977e08e: How long ago since this master left you?
textByHashes.251d53807c814aaa1899569aaa84f660c8a0dc13: Thanks for the information, see you around.
textByHashes.eee5ea417f00c22637fd683b3ab16d29aef78f8b: Can you tell me a bit about this place?
textByHashes.5339fd299896acc3b6f142d557acca62a70510a2: Oh, that's surprising. I don't think I've seen many around here...
textByHashes.4bbfc56d699a5a0afacc349f389e79f07a2cf739: That was a really bad pun.
textByHashes.5e1a1ddc3be5629aa91f27db22d4f370248bfafd: Right, I'd better go play some games then!
textByHashes.f1fc9550c16b8760098c9bd30c19ac982b0ea630: Err... no, don't have it on me. I kind of... lost it.
textByHashes.7e0411855a1647f980ec0a80bcac3eca3de33514: I have a Bronze defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.f6b8ce1dd452d3aca90fc418bcfe4cb86a7a45c0: I have a Iron defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.62d71a214ebfe0a299a3b7a194f3e50ee4ec2b8b: I have a Steel defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.1862b1c2cfe437db5a6121260dc6d07983c7bfdc: I have a Black defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.4f8580da14ba7ddeb818b16c70c17227fc2f91ba: I have a Mithril defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.da72e91ba93895a178019bc4e5157c7b645edb40: I have an Adamant defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.2ffd57051800dbe9ac5878336a303e640c432dc9: I have a Rune defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.eb909511b34607f0ec0ee65169e9663ef5eada71: I have a Dragon defender, please let me in to kill some more Cyclopes!
textByHashes.28779f557bd93585d88505dde87df21e76ea952c: I need more practice at it...
textByHashes.0d83ac9ec18e08cb351fdf7223fd733167c8d0f7: Can you explain the fundamentals again?
textByHashes.e3822c51b0899223f725440e9918045f9a455c90: What must I do to wear a Herblore skillcape?
textByHashes.a8befc5ce83274672d35a04ae228bd6ce56f5608: May I buy a Herblore skillcape, please?
textByHashes.a4ea42ee5abc65a67ce77d8745f74b3187f61c5b: I'm afraid that's too much money for me.
textByHashes.f39c52d073f3a6276c24b7aca40e0495bf30d7c1: Can I get a hood for my skillcape, please?
textByHashes.ed3495ca9b36d541637b0852deafbdc57b4af54c: Oops, I forgot to bring any money with me.
textByHashes.602e8f342e017b79d4357a284ba38f2bbf478780: Well, first I came to this city just for the adventure and excitement, but then I knocked over this statue, you see. Well, I didn't really knock it over myself, I was on this boat.
textByHashes.311a2386072d0e355a25ae5097d6a4bfecef6906: Yes, well, this boatman was a bit rubbish, or there was something wrong with the ship, I don't know. And then I got arrested by the Black Guard.
textByHashes.5b999b4ee22012b99243526f39718b678de780bb: Yes, and they took me to this Veldaban person, who pretended to be really angry but actually he was really nice and he asked me for my help.
textByHashes.2388d1d69f65a9528f1ecd859a26c0ce67b8925f: So here I am, helping to rebuild the statue.
textByHashes.22f482cb4b53083ceb5cdeacbcdb662ad861d5e7: And after a whole lot of running around, I finally managed to get the statue to be rebuilt.
textByHashes.b543c7993eec55b0f8409991120d206c4b0acf36: Hello, you must be a traveller.
textByHashes.2b96af954f05872213d72d14f7ed44f25f7cf4c3: What do you think about this place?
textByHashes.175d27f40e0de4172be50923ff4dcb8d3b771dc2: Can you take me downstream in your boat?
textByHashes.25ebdb1119eb64c71d71392210b99be24a6e585e: Would it help if I gave you some money?
textByHashes.1125f7b6fd6b6c6f5c84c5e9038b471259a3e78f: I don't think I want anything, thanks.
textByHashes.6d3ef1dd8fe584fcc2f9458c527da598ba8fd9fe: Why don't you row right into the Colony? It'd make it much easier to get in there.
textByHashes.ac475dfebbebf15bc79036e70710d82150d37dd2: Can you show me the way to the water mill cellar?
textByHashes.91e0fb799704f5a37d7b43040af2e4e4b3fd87a2: How do you feel about all the more powerful monsters?
textByHashes.7263ff20e384badb0e9ecbd00f3aed284effd135: No you're not. The Kalphite Queen is more powerful than you!
textByHashes.1b7ae074f5d51db5904122e9795d5fb9b4d16961: She's a giant insect who lives in the desert.
textByHashes.fa3cc0d4cc6d6e2c2ec629db31e8124d9b71f8c9: No, she's way tougher than you!
textByHashes.5d67c8ece1648ecdf94dba6285fa3e9ef0c75930: But it's not just the Kalphite Queen. What about the TzTok-Jad?
textByHashes.059bbafa8a63c9f4962cc5bafa5fea755ddbf2d0: All right then, what about me?
textByHashes.624589fc6f42b91ed508b736dc40aadecac7b80f: I defeated you, didn't I? So I must be stronger than you!
textByHashes.d886285a408bf1ddbff357b04f3924a9809fba93: Now that you're a stuffed head? I don't think so!
textByHashes.37fb8f910d39472c47632c1b2bb5fbeda602911b: But you don't even know what I was going to say!
textByHashes.a0ceac1ed551f674f1ea7c40a248356edebbc2af: I've forgotten what I was going to ask now.
textByHashes.732fa5850cebb0e8e3c904ba9738c380080c162b: Hey, killed the King Black Dragon!
textByHashes.5283650aa19fd691b91ccd71c2d56de36906f56b: Well, actually I just sort of washed up here.
textByHashes.56446219741d6d589964e281ced0c1387ca70927: Do you want any help with that? I can loath you as well.
textByHashes.8bb6594b01ff943a39d6550a07049cbcab614c6f: You're pretty far out of the way here. How come?
textByHashes.ba128bf28136f4f4342ad8fdbb005a9eb9c8e40e: Aren't you worried about how close the lizardmen are though?
textByHashes.6b631ae44a524a919a4902758435b9612899d437: Fair enough. I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.2883c8e9fd48c9a0a25cad8beef46ea45dc12788: It must be beautiful, I've only seen the city walls.
textByHashes.1f7b91b0c7331cb55cae80e6a134fa1248826433: Hey there. How is it being the new Lady Ithell?
textByHashes.97ae8dc19ba780008b0a71bfdff426a380f3534b: Well don't worry, I'm sure you're doing great.
textByHashes.a8baacea60e2e749fcbbedf2429625ed708f65b1: Oh, what happened? If you don't mind me asking.
