textByHashes.429ad58c40c9f4dacefb8f9fecfb6e42196e317c: Oh, well that's certainly a shame.
textByHashes.0626ad505bcb08f37f8efc96e9310ce750adc6df: Hello there, Kennith. How are you today?
textByHashes.f15f0a8ab8d2f0f7aebd3798a1e5039518622885: It was my pleasure Kennith. You take care now.
textByHashes.a5d38a506e6db38be008e92afd6cf1c395d02f96: Oh, don't be silly, it was nothing really.
textByHashes.937268cdd6584e361a079413553442501b378037: I only did what anyone would have done in my position. I have to go now, take care.
textByHashes.3cb534ffc0d491ad06e52be6598a1f90f625d498: You're starting to scare me man...
textByHashes.5d628dd33a62aa43f5a1f73a7626e85ed7f8e107: What do you mean they changed you?
textByHashes.176ef26bae635a22642314bf890a07ab53c54c8d: Kourend? Oh yeah, I've been there.
textByHashes.1ae934bf714cb681230b6a248608b1d24e1ac3f3: Ouch! But, you still haven't said who changed you?
textByHashes.1a96994d690cd28e4ab1149bea79bfad2b15fefb: What monstrosity? What's behind those gates?
textByHashes.47f71a53f4ca4af4dcad94f5fe1e5f69acf12b05: Hey now, I'm no wimp. What's to stop me from just turning the winch to open the gate and going in?
textByHashes.77383c6366dc004a195b1aaf90d2a0e4090e7f38: I have been charged by the slayer masters to eliminate this type of threat.
textByHashes.3ce0e5816a83507cad34c71570dc74635c5a04a3: Aretha said you might be able to repair the soul bearer for me.
textByHashes.93daf30fca4ea14c282ef63e01a9824e6b03e994: Err, maybe I'll call back later.
textByHashes.9ef7df6ac71903ebb762e35462e18f9647035e94: Hello. So you must be Kharrim the messenger.
textByHashes.c7630e035bda77170405688776bb62c865be149a: Well now... I had a very interesting chat with Rennard the thief.
textByHashes.d84faaa956f980926e9f50f5668d1362622a2114: It seems you redirected his message regarding a certain god-weapon for your own ends.
textByHashes.198ea868fcc80085a9d6c87612c03b1315059e6a: It seems as though you might be responsible for this curse that has befallen you by not delivering Rennard's message to the correct person.
textByHashes.ae553f037029beced5499a188289fd255546972e: Please let me hear your side of the story then...
textByHashes.9b6c756b35cecb03e21be032d1f5840714a2adfa: So you knew what the staff was?
textByHashes.8f0dcec78bf9a0de0ccf06a5346520455dcfa97d: Wait, I don't understand, Rennard said that he had a buyer already in mind, and that you diverted his message to a General Zamorak instead?
textByHashes.60e954edcc974bdc7aff6e37bdcdd78638c879bc: So you thought you would offer it to General Zamorak?
textByHashes.5b3f9883b8a43033465ff7b934a3b5b82a7703f1: Really? Why do you say that?
textByHashes.8dd5902957e1ef03bc9ae444abc396600d48940d: But where can I find this Lennissa?
textByHashes.a1d251c9eb5fecfd31f1c7ceff11b5cb8b498c3f: Okay, well I'll try and find her for you then.
textByHashes.f4759693025c7c846414300594916154c71692d0: Can you remind me where to find Lennissa?
textByHashes.91e6967232459a3eddb91735dc72fc31d1c52811: Do you find that very fulfilling?
textByHashes.fbc1a0226c8e36a4bdc6696553218e4357eb2a57: The only thing you can help me with is finding the nearest place to get a drink, I think...
textByHashes.f078f2f6ceb0a4cf5ff7396c267c86082f479c1e: Oookay then, I'll just go explore then.
textByHashes.c355d902c09f6876dc2016a056bd25060c0fafc5: So what are you doing in Gielinor?
textByHashes.5e3463d3bdab9e8b26f93b3f27e7a6c817a259fa: That's good to hear. All the best.
textByHashes.38a04ddb792d5a39873367d2e226d16691a748f7: Have you any more Royal Seed Pods?
textByHashes.26705931aa3fa6fc66d2539cd5083d6e2f56acf3: Well, I'm on a treasure trail...
textByHashes.817eef61b6f6ac9a18cb34513e02f1a1467674e5: Very well, if a touch is all you need, I'll do it.
textByHashes.bb89ab12e8291780d976cc297f7d2412be1f4639: A touch? Yes, I'll do that.
textByHashes.ad464361b30fa6eef13f8170b0417556164e170b: No way, I'm not kissing you.
textByHashes.8570fbfbc0ffe9adc58b6a18347fef9f71d85892: It looks better to be a frog. Make me one!
textByHashes.fe9218f01de9dea5cb9d0060884f1e97aa1d313a: I'd rather become a frog too!
textByHashes.dcabe4cc7b4ae3cd7795e961b78568475f59dc67: What if I want to be a frog like you?
textByHashes.01cd5a26c309c33c4c6932d75b14569784b95384: I would prefer not to, sorry.
textByHashes.0c5a50797065fb017c30ec1d38648db2d6967659: I'm sorry, I'd prefer not to do that.
textByHashes.ed0d065af1cc8aa5f72c8b1b59c36d589d0ebc7c: Yes, I'd like to leave now.
textByHashes.88b18adfb573440b095e28cce912915d2ecec786: Sir Kit? That's a nice name!
textByHashes.a705b2367d4065db366ae65b043dad75ec455364: ... Thinking about it, I chose mine as well. I'm , by the way.
textByHashes.9f42d5ce4466e62218ab93c3bac456af0cf32840: How are you getting on as a White Knight?
textByHashes.17353f5b174a32827c94f135187fa384293e91e5: Gilbert's not working you too hard is he?
textByHashes.3c4505591f9a6a97485d731476430965f04c9df6: It's certainly more colourful, that's for sure.
textByHashes.935fc7b8ab995521451981e10d3a204f68131f99: I see... So how does such a... magniloquent individual... come to be out here?
textByHashes.a6a69c0fd41198059923498dc51e723baa644dc5: You came out here as a child?
textByHashes.9f624acd5d586a699fc92a0c722d3db2c02595a6: I'm not sure if that's quite...
textByHashes.3d5133e9cfceccb9f70aad7782679fa36c6f1c05: I've not had an opportunity to.
textByHashes.fa8e0ad4a50e12f19440a179ae1fec7a6d7379e8: Yes... Anyway, I think I need to get going now...
textByHashes.cd7eefbf52cd0d00de967a8913e1508ed37cb7f4: Sorry, I don't seem to have any money on me.
textByHashes.f44293d09188edc038a0b30012a78564243491be: I'm looking for a drunken dwarf.
textByHashes.77403ee8cb0d77afdefa264cce90e5b25d509960: No, a specific drunken dwarf, he keeps harassing me.
textByHashes.887c64efb61babf2ffa734cbd3b1a7d8c234bc13: I don't think that's who I mean.
textByHashes.02a73437e1b40fa825eab4f8c6bfa8e3b1bbdace: Do you think I'll have any chance of catching him here?
textByHashes.2d13f2b49b162d45a60754a7033e5aead742048b: It has Lady Lumbridge painted out and 'Klarense's Cruiser' painted over it!
textByHashes.67d1cb12d5c689da161bd0f5a3e245304fc206bc: Well will you at least take me to Crandor in it?
textByHashes.afab248b34d520df7262c1e3e711dcc4968f1a4c: Wait! I want to ask you a question...
textByHashes.0455d14db8697401676cb050301da165515fee0b: Yeah... I'm not really all that sorry about that. I was searching for Hallowed marks. Although I didn't actually intend to disturb you if that's any consolation.
textByHashes.c7e25e911eb9097198f56f1a899f3bcb95b30d21: The Justiciar of the Lion? I've never heard of them.
textByHashes.a474bc527ea00fca2f1fd63e419f062a8457126b: I see, she sounds like an inspirational figure indeed. Do you know where I can find her?
textByHashes.79a3fa44e189d45c060896a7a82754037451714b: Never mind, you don't want to know.
textByHashes.f0524d55f3c89e9e3b0e3c5365f9ab2db013f242: Yeah well, you are dead and I have your currency so you're going to have to... live with that!
textByHashes.44a5f94965a1be741519266f67177e094bf9b7b0: Who's this Justiciar of the Owl?
textByHashes.3cb308245446d9c1461e659a1cb6b9f99edbb2c7: Hmm. Hopefully I'll meet him one day.
textByHashes.ed546ea74eb856daa5c57a35dd5fae9034503382: Your helmet looks familiar. I defeated a knight who wore one with a similar design.
textByHashes.1471892deae91c224b0a4fda270d23d315e58bf0: Hmm, he didn't really die. He just sort of faded away and left behind a glowing magical hand.
textByHashes.a91c861d4a9f5b0a1fd6b5fa27079f0e1e5dcd9e: Yes, I saw some down there. They seemed incorporeal in some way, as if they were ghosts...
textByHashes.d184256ee34ced1b16074e77a7823ee80a9429bc: Hmm... Perhaps I should steal from graves more often?
textByHashes.ab9e34dd439e383192ce41bb983b197369cf276e: You don't look like a knight... Don't knights wear plate armour and wield swords and lances and stuff?
textByHashes.1d35a0abfaacd9752275fd828eee6bf0a0621772: I see. So does this place only contain the bodies of these 'knights' who followed Saradomin?
textByHashes.36c3e57f9744165ef1d8458573b40528e687c0f8: Interesting. So who is this Justiciar of the Unicorn you spoke of?
textByHashes.cf32234a116776e57191efd4aa4ca2a97bd7f160: Well I've certainly heard of the word justiciar, but nothing about the Justiciar of the Unicorn.
textByHashes.265114b61dfe1c7e4dc773de378489851c024a22: I found this place within the city of Darkmeyer and that mysterious stranger over there asked me to acquire some Hallowed marks which you and your bretheren were buried with.
textByHashes.ac0ac42368e215de6a4ecd1cebd17402434c5330: Erm, simply put, the land here is... under new management.
textByHashes.11f8822acb9fcafc9ca48e50dd6330dc0c09612d: Perhaps so. However, it's probably best that you can't leave this place. I'm not sure you'd like what you'd find.
textByHashes.cc1ab822c1a8360d7534ed3e73d873a6d08c28db: If it's any consolation, the enchantments you placed did prevent the 'invaders' from entering. It's only us human adventurers who enter the Sepulchre.
textByHashes.92f18e48475b63d15fecc1cc668a5509dec455f3: Although we have been stealing some of your stuff... Sorry about that.
textByHashes.a688f382deb68d3c14a7a280f163b437754bcac4: Who's this Justiciar of the Wolf?
textByHashes.defccdfabdacc4ceed69a98085fdb32823fbccb3: I take it you were close?
textByHashes.d72a070ee99412fd0e9c3b3b0f0a1dd28dbc2402: Hmm... Why do you think that was?
textByHashes.58c74b3eae988323804b125cfd42c53804540fba: Any great battles to speak of?
textByHashes.aa6408fd2fbd90eeb9a34456e39bb0800d54c4dc: Y'know? The ones with the wings and all the blood sucking?
textByHashes.ff329d85b0f29a6c2c2546b8aaeed06fe4c8e87d: Woah! How does one vanquish such a foe?
textByHashes.34298b89e20e65e9a24f117512a80b8ddb27d3be: Ah... A favorite method of mine.
textByHashes.c4fc883ea40999b6e9848ae12117caf927c8ec55: Ah... I prefer a carefully placed arrow myself. Each to their own though.
textByHashes.7755b91ff9e17e73bf67649b6c3680cd552154bb: Hmm, I can't say I've seen it...
textByHashes.94d5d2bf3450ac4d7435848cdb42c8061408fe4f: Well I can't say for certain, but you look pretty old.
textByHashes.1d032082ce54706a22741d401c1262395e653e9a: I found an ancient sun temple.
textByHashes.8024b74b82d51e1fe9504ba7838599ed72abcda9: In a place called the Forthos Ruin to the south east of here. I was exploring there and I discovered symbology for an entity called Ralos.
textByHashes.6b8404fb02757a222dab13897d642cda27b00bf9: No problem... Oh, I don't know your name.
textByHashes.baa55d0ef1b56d7a66b65ae0d791b151bb94367e: Oh... I guess it has seen better days.
textByHashes.4c339e0be7a1fe4ba46e059141c5c5128186e93c: I suppose it is quite spooky down here.
textByHashes.bb7ae8ef2da9bbd14161999a4071181f693fa104: Who are you? What are you doing here in the snow?
textByHashes.ca3140579711fbc01c80e82c9884820da524a2f8: A secret society of knights? What a surprise! Is there an old charter or decree that says if you're a knight you have to belong to a secret order?
textByHashes.f8dcc8de776c4cc5173f43473418aa4a67876280: A secret society of knights? You don't mean the Temple Knights, do you?
textByHashes.f4432bdbc35770f420003e9f7967f088493cc529: Why are you angry at the Skipper?
textByHashes.a18cb155652e2bdee20cfb60569fc897057ef11a: I've got time. I would love to hear it.
textByHashes.5918001927ed3603d7fd79cbcb689f559ca5ecae: Oh, how was I supposed to know?
textByHashes.cd9f569043ade6cc8e4b0f821ad287f0da5025ea: That's awful. He does not sound like a nice man.
textByHashes.275c6a24680b313fa767e6f6711361960d2e67df: Got any tips for fighting Tempoross?
textByHashes.b8cdb6b0b482cecd9ab1acf28c20434af01d9686: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?
textByHashes.c75a5a5ebca8b7ec74525ca8cdc2fa9c8334a03c: You know there's a crate of them you could just help yourself t'...
textByHashes.f263b7db8cb3ea9b9d46d04c7f1488aafa65b699: These traps don't get any easier. But I'm alright, thanks.
textByHashes.e38c7c2fed3da92818129ec8afa6bc54ee478703: I think I've had enough for now.
textByHashes.ee58a5423c652d713cb269fef4e0fa223b442446: How can I use my new spells outside of the arena?
textByHashes.37f827fabc562da26ed6d142a69864219f262219: Are there any more challenges available?
textByHashes.19aa0d67b12da6b598d964d6038f49f20781ee6e: What can I do with saltpetre?
textByHashes.707d1e9636dd32f6eaadd63f6c1ea1cde1c649a4: Have you got a spare spade?
textByHashes.7348c59fab69ca80c73b6827a369778f30d678ac: Sounds like I'd best not disturb you.
textByHashes.7c25b3db09050a15852a5fe1101a256c670ae4b0: I'm not sure what something does.
textByHashes.35682db4240c5c9445cac77a6df5dbe13503f138: How do I use the crucible?
textByHashes.82c28ff9af6eba09004818a2b2eb00af6252e8b7: What does the mould jig do?
textByHashes.2720acc3beffe4d6b6de4f7ef6a719d7eca0444d: How do I control the preform's temperature?
textByHashes.a10efeb32c93197d60194e1e9e3af52fb6c757c0: When should I use a tool?
textByHashes.4045192c7920db53852f330a9efe1bfd0cc51e38: Can I scrap my current commission?
textByHashes.ca6212499dcf59240bb8ecc8e6f82f98b1dce7ec: I don't think I'm really feeling it at the moment.
textByHashes.7f5b72400c156d88da4455616089bea34365592b: I don't have enough money for that, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.650ff73c3312aede9b8d0b3526150b778253a7bd: Actually, I don't think I'd be able to carry it.
textByHashes.b7a1c767104a62d59390615699636488b7ca0669: Hello. Could you help me with a quest, please?
textByHashes.7a804d4f36288418ff0fdb8e1612a33e8ecfce84: A magic potion?! Can I have some?
textByHashes.b315ee6681cbf20325afe89d0091b94d79787bf8: I can deal with them, I promise.
textByHashes.3bd841e250a501619b4f142fdc38f464f98dd033: No thanks, I don't want tasks from you.
textByHashes.7fe5d3b1029b5c8b13379a926d2df95dab18bc4f: What can you do apart from Slayer Master stuff?
textByHashes.a372d05c8e3f64f0cfbd1a5a78fb0daa2614ceb3: I'm not carrying that much money.
textByHashes.c7d562e57fd4f8003198d106cbfb0fc676ab7c1a: Okay, switch my spawn to Edgeville.
textByHashes.79f57d02599fb803614e6c9ca6254f8e0392845f: Please switch my respawn back to Edgeville.
textByHashes.871e1dbe66dae81a69c92764652124b9d7a0e713: Yes, switch my respawn to Edgeville.
textByHashes.bd363611fe21f426a8e7910554258dae84369b2c: No, I don't want to respawn in Edgeville.
textByHashes.04c5440be4ce61d03900c839d148227230e369e0: No, I'll keep the Edgeville respawn.
textByHashes.6c1d0967f20ceb2c0e4861ef2254f60b3f22068a: I love the hat! Where did you get it from?
textByHashes.2fa224f3722171c19cf02c01234aa69345e35832: Oh, I didn't know you enjoyed arts and crafts?
textByHashes.f2ad3e76adbef0617d7b65729c863d64516086c3: That's so sweet! I didn't realise Slayer Masters had so much spare time.
textByHashes.2ac65dea4d3e8d238db8c27a512959844264aef7: Have you thought about giving them to other people?
textByHashes.2257cb875b25eed8a02e4e52858f142447ecf310: Oh dear. Don't you have any less... dangerous crafts?
textByHashes.e3f37f52a3567e3946510b646cdc994cc50d914d: How are you going to do that? You're just a head on a wall!
textByHashes.299ace12e7ce3aa8843402001aa5cf80e4b67692: You seemed pretty angry before I killed you!
textByHashes.ef97adb66470647bf0c04eb5bb3b641d86e89fc9: Is there anything that doesn't make you angry?
textByHashes.2f437ae18d9fc755e673a18e651165dec5fdbd92: Yeah! I could kill you again in my sleep! I think I might go off and kill some other kurask!
textByHashes.cf24b0a2dc07a53234b73d41c29576e7aa8e072f: What are you going to do about it? Eh? I totally owned you!
textByHashes.33b46635e8c389961330af7af3b6e7f6515909b0: What do you think about up there?
textByHashes.629a2241b31600e1dcc751df0dda263b0999929f: You know, what goes through your tiny stuffed head?
textByHashes.e8e1874bc6416aa510b99f005bd101c8e20f4d2b: You have bugs living in you? Eww!
textByHashes.9df1654eed4d66a92bae7986bb5970f9f1b2bb16: What have the bugs done to you?
textByHashes.43cf1bbe52e23869db7d3e2efd20bfa8cfa95e5e: You can't, you've got no feet!
textByHashes.ac50cbc23e5e2f30182767a0d7c80e0cced5ada7: That makes no sense! You can't destroy the absence of something!
textByHashes.bb3671aade56f2914b8aad928537c46d236c51ac: You can't physically destroy an abstract concept! It's impossible!
textByHashes.faa0ceee3b2faef4c075479c808a448c86c15550: This is getting both surreal and repetitive.
textByHashes.3783a9eca626adc2367d3d7f9e31cf410272eb0e: That's okay. What seems to be the problem?
textByHashes.3c4f4596b072598dfc7b96156b0f5c9d8440330a: Well, maybe I could help out?
textByHashes.5be72251256a509e81eac85c3a0ba36b2147444b: Sounds fair. What can I do to show that I am worthy?
textByHashes.acd3e953ec926d3cd27c86899821f4f37065ac25: So, how about letting me out onto your fishing platform?
textByHashes.b04c0aea095904d3ae98ac8dc78967c72a94e93c: I might just do that, thanks.
textByHashes.a36aabd9b7ebca3e042a94044256e81e2524612e: It's definitely a sight to behold.
textByHashes.c86555cbee8971e45d305bf5960a369e5ef805e4: I'm very privileged to be able to see it.
textByHashes.3cea93a4171a171f43e7a4ad7b499a70a6cf1a17: I'm Vampyre. I was just looking around.
textByHashes.9c21a6f98de5c6bc514105e2cccbfcb94bc2cbd9: Well I hope it doesn't take too long.
textByHashes.4c9df8b74f82f29c78c32d516ab4037f9756cc87: Tell me about the Saviours of Kourend.
textByHashes.283af0b22f5417a925889bfe406f8f7d19c1ffdc: You must have seen a fair bit in your time.
textByHashes.72e8e7bb5e926c70dbc3f73222123000202d8e56: You must have plenty of stories to tell.
textByHashes.f72af720957c6e733dcb9a487fb2534dad1fecfc: I'll see about paying her a visit. See you later.
textByHashes.4be3c65ed30eaa37fd00e58672384e67b78f8261: I'm sorry for your loss. He was a great warrior.
textByHashes.7b0e9682f0d197e154d5f49b96da186d0860afb3: I'd like you to customize my Slayer helmet.
textByHashes.5279e20c7d9616aa10292e39c413dca45c8aebb1: Could you customise one of my Slayer Helmets?
textByHashes.662cdd3fa7f7f9f4937b7ff2e365cf5538374a8d: Can I please have some more golden wool?
textByHashes.919bcfdc71a168f9689ca149a81fac52de36a39e: How much for the golden wool?
textByHashes.f24ee63705fd718280554f91e09385ea04740ac9: Is that all? Here you go!
textByHashes.1d6d0ac783a7046cfb047e9f66c69e2b5e62b138: I don't have that much cash on me...
textByHashes.362ec93caa9cf1e88e6713765aa8f1c3ff5f6bb4: Just exploring the far reaches of this wonderful land.
textByHashes.463a82e0596755ba1d152db8187885c6c5ab72a4: I don't see any product around here...
textByHashes.8ffcc23cd3a0201ceb772825d3c6411eb0ba9058: I think I'll be leaving now.
textByHashes.4794db5b6e974af5a5dae8517f896fa23bfeef14: Really, how do I do that?
textByHashes.de99772825c4be5d739b8a545931064bcb3f9efe: Great! Oh, how do I win the game?
textByHashes.06ebf9ba8f16a995af3a2352bca1eaa637799ab0: Take a look at this dead chicken I've got.
textByHashes.49da91788d4aab477ce73cd1fe68d21fea0f759d: It's a special device, invented by a friend of mine. If I'm wearing it while ranging, it uses magnets to retrieve some of my ammunition.
textByHashes.c320a3a9c93af4c0f09bff9ffcf47239b92d3d6d: Can they be a bit more flexible, please?
textByHashes.7b845fe03fa1b4e5de8ddea712d17a1610dc07c5: Do you have a manual? I'd like to learn how to play!
textByHashes.044d321b6baa529d77d8d85e59a9122ac25921f1: Is there something I can do with these bracelets?
textByHashes.4add27ff6a59065651eb60f78c06ff7da11cd0e3: How many bracelet charges do I have stored?
textByHashes.42d200e79e491992647eb423d91459c369306bbd: Can I stop using my stored bracelet charges?
textByHashes.3fe0bc7cd0a4764c5171b5af8fa278651a4aa526: I'd like to use my stored bracelet charges again.
textByHashes.59245a18de5c8b3a69ff63ae12e9e265ef3e3137: Who are you and why are you here?
textByHashes.03434661346d22e17c0d8345dbfb2acd2b39af15: Don't worry about it, I was glad to help out.
textByHashes.c36ace0cf9cd93a6b61a05b1b2b6c324e21e64dd: What are we going to do about the penguins?
textByHashes.1b4416ee6d03885b18d69f9ef53216cf76835519: Thanks for helping My Arm earlier.
textByHashes.1b5ed0e49ae8e12e14de1436829c8699508990c0: I was given a challenge, what now?
textByHashes.ebd188290f8de555aad9b1fa85cd816591569a25: Have you any rewards for me?
textByHashes.0f51e38d4a013bab0f109350bf603c199f04c786: What the heck do you want with THAT?
textByHashes.45c87d62b106f3c60e1cbbf5af46bc54ec217127: I heard about your ship. Can you tell me what happened?
textByHashes.40ed271e88e2b72ef25eba110db18969823a3b75: What kind of debris? Was it ship debris?
textByHashes.812a70487999fe7daf05a4edb4ffc1be6a022c8f: Oh my, that's awful! You're very lucky you didn't get hit.
textByHashes.646710945f0cbd1b4dbe85c4c0333763765d1848: A pirate doing paperwork, that's new.
textByHashes.4891495c2531e7214d006d53ce218e2e53a09559: Is that not what pirates do?
textByHashes.82d334984194b11aef47285225e4aaea57e45a04: Glad you can still smile after what happened.
textByHashes.8c95f3109eb2fee2455b340fe2b068e78261355f: I'll take my eggs elsewhere then.
textByHashes.e794a270efe93e8e53729043cda3c5ae39e07425: No, madam, I'm a burglar. I burgle people.
textByHashes.f813dd25ecf9358a550309e0db73508181814f11: Can I have another set of Morytania legs?
textByHashes.52b9710429c78ec747f57751d655ee20b0719c4e: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Morytania Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.ac6262ddbd9564060a64cc58826a27db2a437000: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!
textByHashes.daf2f15fd66ec0a7e5c253a67bc383059a59f6e6: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!
textByHashes.db043fd66e565229c2b9071ea95faf332072f315: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Morytania achievement diary!
textByHashes.ec05e5264b310a8cc792528ef3417d7a984037ef: How do you know my name? Have we met before?
textByHashes.41a546e77448ce0c19783f4b23b29b89121dcdfd: I think I'll stay here for now.
textByHashes.60768d6080211ad8e59023672c8663529c1e7c42: A fresh start? Why would I want that?
textByHashes.fccd88f7ed7c5715afc1e07378d3a36569f7540d: And if glory and rewards don't interest me?
textByHashes.b3448fc0ab57bba701f453e88938644cac08caef: Is there currently a League running?
textByHashes.61f37c31f4c36c4bf965098f9edf6696792c2f5d: Interesting. Maybe I should take part!
textByHashes.0d350c8d425abcb6269b1031ac79d56264e21c71: Can I purchase some League rewards?
textByHashes.8f53a345fc004f60eb0ec8b94ef7ade5508413d3: Can we talk about League Trophies?
textByHashes.cce8dc6665bc5d5b4f70eb9a12d7bf0207448462: What are the League Point cut-offs for the League Trophies?
textByHashes.a547d5b333c8cad2350dbcfcedc4b11969366130: What changes have been made for this League?
textByHashes.95c3d681dd76227d2b76d12f5f57b0879e66302a: So how many tasks are there?
textByHashes.d354337b63860dc4220c2da685b88655e6719ebd: How does the area system work?
textByHashes.d55e82482e3df1f04bc981715326fdd36394564a: I see. That all sounds good to me.
textByHashes.eb48ab8be51a5161c913f58e1111c1a22c1c94f9: League Ranks? How do they work?
textByHashes.893389ba59b48a36cb87e7117bccf64baaaa713f: Can you tell me how pets work in Leagues?
textByHashes.3543b6244444cc70e558cad627d2e3be579ea9ee: And if glory and gold don't interest me?
textByHashes.9ebc09f5c4290598044c9564f4b8cec6408b1e78: I see. So how do I take part?
textByHashes.446bec7672a4ec7b0e2e8d8afc43d7f97e78d30c: Interesting. Maybe I should take part.
textByHashes.72886376f3de3221925ec35c4d1ea39e01007963: I'd like to claim some League Trophies.
textByHashes.4f3b77de87686e7cef74844b64cca2af3947b14e: Yes, this is my first League. Can you explain how they work?
textByHashes.0a842f54803ce429470272149646c29b8e7844ca: So it's a fresh start? Why would I want that?
textByHashes.73b47a9ce27bbfb5d644b3a51601cd0f08102399: What are the League point cut-offs for the Twisted League?
textByHashes.6173aa7956e9c4c69a95d4ad9284c924529defbf: Can I purchase my League rewards?
textByHashes.f0b8970878f5e711035b78af37cc38d707e0494f: I'd like to claim my League trophies.
textByHashes.a72523c29bc62f2e2ea501e72f005fed8f6eb620: Do you have anything to trade?
textByHashes.dbec47d144cdcb471f31a0a400d71f8ed2cc14a5: Nice to meet you Gura, my name is .
textByHashes.aefe9f89d3e081d569bb61d605a383e9b6827b72: I see... So is the plague contagious? Because I could be elsewhere, now you mention it.
textByHashes.0aa09bfa166238d00b8aa4c13a0b25d6ec94f96b: Keep my nose to myself, gotcha!
textByHashes.029e602386021e6d269472ae361dc550f04eebeb: It's no problem. So how come you're still out here?
textByHashes.8157b364b048226e79b5520db4b7bdce2131aacd: Well if you need help, you know where I am. Good luck.
textByHashes.87541bffaac0b85ebe48b8daf33cf1f997430d1d: Your land fishing is pretty much how we humans always fish.
textByHashes.5adfaf7d6f1ee9fa97f9ba0a11cff70d25e64a5d: You can do both, you know?
textByHashes.d4b3a78060b34556a21baf4863121b43e83566ef: Do you make a lot of money selling weapons?
textByHashes.caa7d51859d146258f5491e4f1d9cfaadda87ee6: So why don't you give out the weapons for free?
textByHashes.0503c09a9a32b921bdca1d41f4e350ffdf6f638c: So you use the money to pay us for things?
textByHashes.d45a4fabf0a02cc339eef8f1c2560295f9348557: Had any more minotaur problems recently?
textByHashes.181772bdf9d0db85d61e2edb5afddceb86e4fe52: I see. Well, hopefully I don't find myself coming up against any more rogue minotaurs.
textByHashes.5e6cc12cc47de8faf6e3ce65fe59378ec442d558: Hello. You would be Lennissa, I take it?
textByHashes.4091bb111a9f03ee174c34bf838e3a5eb65daeb5: Well, a ghost called Kharrim directed me towards you.
textByHashes.22bed4d48bb4f4e0a5046d9fc652f27159b2409c: I guess you didn't get along then?
textByHashes.6b008f9600b1a877e3d5dd66dc9ac62c0e2fd4ba: Well, I'm not sure I could if I tried, but that is not why I have come to you.
textByHashes.e46a9ef501df8c46a03dbcbbc3dd040f4ab63c56: Actually, I'm trying to work out why all of you invisible ghosts seem to have been cursed.
textByHashes.422a0799d1b9dc5032cd015b92d819cca971d4b3: I'm not sure how exactly, but the trail seems to have led me to you...
textByHashes.8b9d515d0452aaa8139be6639780650b7f13f076: Well, it seems as though that may have been the cause...
textByHashes.1545b11659e6e60116666fe81f32aecb9287cf72: As I understand it, it was something to do with the Staff of Armadyl, and your refusal to tell Saradomin that it had been stolen...
textByHashes.ec86d1c58be596509b52a76c7fad3393feef15ca: Then please, go ahead and tell me the events of that day in your own words...
textByHashes.6707ad9dd2c48faafd85a335eb395e11c69fede9: So he was stronger than Saradomin?
textByHashes.791387e41bb6063f07dbecb7cf97f9a45b368b6f: Okay... Well, that makes sense, but I don't understand what the Staff of Armadyl had to do with this...?
textByHashes.3458da1a5bb9808463a664ed7b0c382fb383e240: So you passed this information to Dhalak instead of taking it to Saradomin yourself?
textByHashes.ee023771720cd3019e4ad014da0b567e6379fad5: Well, it seems like he didn't, but I don't know why not...
textByHashes.725aafdf8280ed3954edb78149e748f3b665f461: Where would I be able to find this Dhalak then?
textByHashes.977d2a15da66a2b67573d74285c1a0a64c9b4516: Hello Lennissa. Can you remind me where to find Dhalak?
textByHashes.b2bc2e5c20665b457e27c5e05f776628aa3a75f2: What'd you take out of that pocket?
textByHashes.aa572bed9822ce2ef74e44d64f26fdbf208751bd: I know there ain't. You got it in your hand...
textByHashes.d44f4589ac7275f323e10797070fcf6bd67cf681: Why do you have all this meat?
textByHashes.da64ad011c90634bf906345ea63989fb757a814c: Where does it all come from?
textByHashes.4362b92cefb74be90063e0a6497825ac6de16a6d: You know what, I think I've heard enough.
textByHashes.629dc4c5e4ba46e7628d7b43c1fd9766483d35ac: Okay, I'll help with your graves.
textByHashes.fea94d4bb0de21b76be63cef63303ca7633e2191: All right, I'll give it another shot.
textByHashes.64303a5db2e5a9dd1bece70449b1743a0fd8cc69: Remind me what I'm supposed to do.
textByHashes.cbe8f2f2b7044da5d5316c639566d58829662483: What? But how am I still here?
textByHashes.389378bf0a1ff99def39df5fb7cf6726fd1b58c6: Can I buy some equipment from the shop then?
textByHashes.48d8ccf0edc5be40715486c734304127ebf30b02: Can you tell me about your crossbow?
textByHashes.64aea6f76a6d587aaf3077ae82b089712bddacfe: Tell me about the ammo for your crossbow.
textByHashes.c09c0fabe33f29c4936728452e68aec4aa2e2366: Can't I just make my own?
textByHashes.2f2d6814f560571da6b90739a100a8f37977ec97: Okay, can you make ammo for me?
textByHashes.7eac04d1e929d515ac2b6d333da5125ac29403af: I'll be off now, excuse me.
textByHashes.1f7a02381236dfb256f68a68e89a0ca53b98c4a0: I'd like to sell ecumenical keys.
textByHashes.e23440a16a66caebd15feada32a9d2543ff7cae4: About the noted lava dragon bones I receive...
textByHashes.b21358de64674b848afdd2a414b4fc2dc12f7f8b: I'd prefer proper bones rather than banknotes.
textByHashes.995fa0b969bc6cf2efff14fb6bd804c3cb5e3259: I'm happy getting the bones as banknotes.
textByHashes.f2515de606d6b2f39a19fbb6fc85d611d7d441fa: About the noted lava dragon bones I could receive...
textByHashes.406b74cba416f0e4575c5048460106879ec1099d: I'd like to receive noted lava dragon bones! Not big and bulky proper bones!
textByHashes.5b2b596785838be3a10ddd21fda1a0c1dcc919ca: I'm happy getting proper bones rather than banknotes.
textByHashes.4884a7d2c27e032c8476c408e40b06d0bcf05a8f: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.a7779484c561a0496d41ae77db2c3cd388fb193b: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.7a2cf58c17a552463ffb1b250b4827e7c223c7bf: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.613b8350ee6576b768f679fd50b752887457261d: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Wilderness achievement diary!
textByHashes.8d8d90a0ec325506b333c8b54740280c59fcb0e3: Can you tell me more about the library?
textByHashes.3fbb8b67b5075bf38dcaa39716aaafaa7e02c1fe: How do these eras correspond with the Ages of the world?
textByHashes.2aafe2767a2d84227b45a232534725ee5fe4bc3f: Are you in charge of this squad?
textByHashes.2284f877619474e250d216fbf4f1a9ba0095bcf4: Can I do anything to help?
textByHashes.44f95ccce31ae011c4731048fc131fbb838a6444: Understood. Well, if I see anything suspicious, I'll be sure to casually mention it.
textByHashes.c6aa9b0d383c9314dc9707ae7d7e54a0b6071e79: Do they usually have this problem?
textByHashes.61615139575e182e4406dc9cc5466e8a39432ae1: That does sound like a difficult situation to be in.
textByHashes.2e61c3a9a78feb68a74f0a4a161419b21c636bb1: There's only two tortoises here, that's hardly a regiment.
textByHashes.0b6786145f28e95db464f5c979faa02e26e52ba6: Oooookayy...... I'll leave you to it then....
textByHashes.b8ab915b325d13e6e9cbd00d0df6aefefee54215: Bit early to be drinking, isn't it?
textByHashes.50e9e57657e752b3f8194fbd713fa86255a008b2: I guess you could call this hiding. If you're some famous pirate, where's you ship?
textByHashes.8ef4774bdfdef5d443879c2544480bd66fd013b2: And why are you so drunk?
textByHashes.e9d89e068df3a64b9d65c1cda5de265a7548b74b: Sorry about that, so... Can I kill some Krakens?
textByHashes.6572d84921cc892a5c5205750c0f60b5eaeeb1db: I'll be, heh, leaving you now...
textByHashes.ce7398cc132d38a2c1a32881a2fac34b0153248e: No, I think I'll hold onto it myself.
textByHashes.0d90ffa4ed3fb9ad263bffd0a210361376f0fcbd: No, I think I'll hold onto them myself.
textByHashes.b79764be584484e9badfb04eedc909b8ebac1c4a: Hmm. I thought it was bigger.
textByHashes.e98bfb915df612af24229482cac585be58ae5ccc: Sounds great, I'll take a look.
textByHashes.8fbeabc3ac95f50cdeb0e61601d3cdbdc9d065dc: Hang on, did you just answer my question before I asked it?
textByHashes.f1ed6bfcafc11bbd3813eadc193a2a906ec3276e: I'd like to see what you have for sale.
textByHashes.7ac812d3aa518461e7efd85c29fe6d98b832afd7: Really? Is that why there's all this cloth and dye around?
textByHashes.c811268fbb9333c19c96e9d96279380f99263364: Eughr! Though I am curious. Can I try some?
textByHashes.4f1a5553c859de8db79fd1f66f5708a58efbec3e: So why don't you get ill as well?
textByHashes.51f90a3b31266a73bb5a15673464b7e5411774cf: I'm glad to see that puns are common everywhere in Gielinor; even here.
textByHashes.7a778a37a8bb04e715ee6db02c545ab9fe36c86c: I'm looking for a stronghold or something...
textByHashes.057c81b8aa841d3dfd8bc8aa6b57f99e6c1f60f7: Looks kind of... deep and dark.
textByHashes.7a0057488bfad0eb2c0287d84cd005127d051024: I'll certainly keep my eyes open.
textByHashes.f9496923531c7e3f765b0f97b9f46c3f532c7832: I travelled to the bottom of the stronghold, and I emerge victorious!
textByHashes.d958e337fa357b96488ee8157134174761fd3f80: Well, at least he died doing what he loved.
textByHashes.08f1a85b3c2997bf825781e0159380f9c6838995: As will I. See you around, Litara.
textByHashes.93d040f64548821e1c1da3381cc94f68604b5aef: Should I? Did I miss some glorious feat of yours?
textByHashes.6c06a63219d2bee40f13ab5ca28857ba8f22a1f0: You're a demon! Usually I'm kill-
textByHashes.c2e23c8e9eb565b79fcef2d59e1de87b25ebc1be: Nothing... You're right, wrong circles and all that.
textByHashes.ddf41eb89e63237b4bcb62651bb5d857c904ba2f: Not a fan of the slayer master?
textByHashes.d42461ed89788fece7fa6b2c4bdb4b2e9fb26f04: He didn't want to prove himself?
textByHashes.2a5611c7701a17c5cd8c6e4b02a4d3668b06cd8a: Summoning, aye? Sounds like a dangerous skill to practise.
textByHashes.89f257d3ff1adad292c309c0bc97c00ad637ae0a: I don't see how that's worse than being eaten, but thanks, I'll keep an eye out.
textByHashes.70d3fea92dab8f5ee0d70948d58228a0f526b7ec: It's nice to meet you Lleidr, I'm .
textByHashes.668cbaab3d898a3ab97fb18f7fc077a61eb1c97f: Tell me more about the Wintertodt.
textByHashes.7cd7471eff69285130ab10c6bd024413f5bdf6db: How did they stop the Wintertodt?
textByHashes.4d29c06d2efbb69def28d15471bd697f75f61fd0: Tell me more about the invasion.
textByHashes.dce506bd2fd1a47530630f151d0b1def1b8c1728: I'm going to stop looking for temple, sun and moon pages.
textByHashes.7760922bb9608442c0c64a99bb8b7efdb428ef7c: I'm going to start looking for temple, sun and moon pages.
textByHashes.2654fd24c6d0323c54dd1bf3b07209231dd654c0: Do you help people find books?
textByHashes.adf40f3ef6af978bb07acf7bcadd8e2db7cca88f: Do you do anything useful at all?
textByHashes.52a58c8a323390ecb12803aee9193dec38c349b9: What is the point in you being here?
textByHashes.ea5ce439831a3a68ed55de814a631656170ae2d6: How can I get a job like yours?
textByHashes.89dc8ce68dacb24932e926c1864e52a5ef230159: HOW ABOUT I SHOUT REALLY LOUD THEN?
textByHashes.b480be75dff46d7e9c42efc83ad8ff07a739895a: You can have this tome which I discovered aswell.
textByHashes.5f39711bb5d5bb00b125f4c036d395cebc17d456: You can have these tomes which I discovered aswell.
textByHashes.2552bea987465e734996386ef26087bd2fc2e0b5: Hi Lokar, can you take me back to your ship?
textByHashes.d7ed030da576a46158bd3ad1c4bf50f2291b7b8f: Why are you called Longbow Ben?
textByHashes.0a8641ea1dd350c8a66669916dd7f5d1816319e3: Hello, Longramble. How goes the hunt for the edge of the world?
textByHashes.22a496327bcbbbe5cab8cf3702bd3dc89376d4ee: Slightly being the key word there.
textByHashes.92a90d18b1d8629649c56755e013dc3aac0b48df: I appear to have misplaced the grappling equipment I need to cross the river.
textByHashes.5de9e316ad262015bed98e5545d7196f5f1e1705: Tell me about the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.26a174308577662cd5a4c3e36826afff260445c7: I don't know... What's the actual answer?
textByHashes.974569510b04d302b062658215b419bf3250078b: That's great to hear. What about you though?
textByHashes.1be0b3f07cc0d615cc0cb083cc0a9add57d0c0ba: Well I'm glad to hear things are going well.
textByHashes.a2b1d6a4d96a243347440ba66df851f9682958e4: You look a little beat up.
textByHashes.0a5263495aeb609107123cacbb52a873fd9b5424: Hey Iestin. So they made you the new Lord Iorwerth?
textByHashes.72522da5bfd1086604030fa4aeb6a0c6cf287ad1: Did Morvran not want the role?
textByHashes.a173e5e03a72d43c35f7d602a8b389710c39d0ec: How have things been since the city was reformed?
textByHashes.403c5ef5b4be70db0c956d8deb933368d2c91a4d: I see. I guess I've never been the type to reflect on that sort of thing.
textByHashes.787e469176eadb0dd4a6e3c8cc03a1b94bc66cee: I might just give it a shot. Thanks.
textByHashes.3fd72613a16676b4b3511b7ac56625375aa88b80: Do the other houses not get annoyed at how much land you have?
textByHashes.a77ab94a2d1c7deca1d0cce834c4d6de23701ec6: But what of the Royal Accord of Twill? You must have kept it for a reason.
textByHashes.6dbb2efdfdb625d50253a96409a8cba984982357: That's awfully specific, you sure this is a good place for it?
textByHashes.1fb7fd2bb79828ac5fd70796dcc345ee0940b349: I'm not sure there's enough land, to be honest.
textByHashes.cdb78e6264d2f3d50041225e921bddbd0db4fd17: You're feeding them corpses? No wonder they're becoming weak. That meat must have all sorts of problems.
textByHashes.37125398e84d4185d4a50e09132e0170b4cb81f2: Oh, I see. So it's your clan that looks after the plants of the city?
textByHashes.fb2c34431089ecbf57f2740e6f2977caa40202f6: How long have you held this position?
textByHashes.9ec661830d7535f81701c2b0b727dd40e6771f84: What are the current threats against Kourend?
textByHashes.4eacb4d3b088ba4a06f4205d7868cf65ea78d057: How do you tackle these issues?
textByHashes.53ed3730c7bb372fa3e595f732aabc451f239f6d: That's a long time. I guess you've seen quite a bit.
textByHashes.55882a32c5b059b72daaed3e6c9a1fc34bfbc9b4: Was the Dark Altar always here?
textByHashes.dce54f87192c8b82b9380e5e1db1ed933c6c0555: Tell me about the Ascent of Arceuus.
textByHashes.451c00a5c0cf57c8861084421f881f670761b23e: It wasn't you that discovered this secret though was it?
textByHashes.383cd67d06548a7386c650df74508e5e834bc3ff: The Tasakaal don't like you very much. They called you a liar and claimed you misused the knowledge.
textByHashes.bbd343b064a153517deb743a42643a6869b7c816: Well just let me know if you need my help.
textByHashes.a76a56cfab619559b4cd106c37404c2b60d9156c: So, you just let them fight each other and hope they get stronger?
textByHashes.01fa49c03389e4e84620f80d8c7bb40055fb0c00: I am a mighty adventurer! Can I fight them?
textByHashes.0cba039c1447552547371c8fce213fc0f30cae71: I have a Rune Defender here, please let me in!
textByHashes.817b0638027edacb62156b226de99dca603b21ae: No, no I said HOW ARE YOU?
textByHashes.cbd1d1d93922a3be43abb17c539edb8cceb11933: I suppose so, just as long as you're not planning to steal from me.
textByHashes.4f6ceba2343cda351f353827dc209712be971052: I'm sorry but I don't have enough money!
textByHashes.91b992cea07033900f08356da454dafb73b13eb4: Hey, I know you can talk!
textByHashes.8c74ba4ce99691ceca9ec0596d7023d94abdad77: I think I'll have some beef tonight.
textByHashes.95a549856e4281cb2e1a78156e1a7400a9396126: Thanks. I'll try not to lose it this time.
textByHashes.3dc263c0922afbee004e71c5f4fce6d3181c7a25: Where can I find a quest to go on?
textByHashes.178e3c9a1593ebda6981475386181f3cd0df5efc: How can I get a weapon?
textByHashes.717371555a00674ea2a5ed5dce9cc3a3f314a45d: Where can I find a weapon?
textByHashes.cae59e62fdfe7c9c9a29f60cf6bfd11be95c4921: I'd like to know about something else.
textByHashes.26972884594029bd219cca590e6650923e4db7ec: How do I make a weapon?
textByHashes.6051db9d97d3516ce217e9a21d0fcc24f7b180d6: Where can I buy a weapon?
textByHashes.17ace4c46b6db5685985b577f2852a1014365cd1: Could I get a staff like yours?
textByHashes.73b7cbf7209579e7bebcf097ec174c4675e6cb25: Yes, but what should I fight once I have got a weapon?
textByHashes.39501de7010ee4e1c1cf7a453da2a7d0c9847085: Where can I get food to heal myself?
textByHashes.82230444ccb8e9aa0cda7b0e9fe807624c3b39a8: Where could I find one of those?
textByHashes.da63d5cc6d492c7df91b0a6834092c4b09951544: Okay, thanks, I will go and kill things.
textByHashes.908eab821819387e6723c195a11b27141f50ecf2: Where can I find more information?
textByHashes.3eab7a4803b50be5b6b102acad1467d4e6e30029: I'd like to know more about security.
textByHashes.e0b376c8b4e1b2eb37e9cdb284fad8e6f0ecedd4: I'd like to know about password security.
textByHashes.6c9875cd1633bb4d6154833a641fd612bd6c1d97: Is there anything else to be aware of?
textByHashes.a151bb8ffab818ca55a6da5f110ad0dc917a18a9: I'd like to know more about avoiding item scamming.
textByHashes.b53e806e872e5c17170d9df291925d72237c0528: I'd like to know more about in-game moderation.
textByHashes.09044a5f4bc0d7099d3474223d6d24cc65e5e7ea: How do I become a player moderator?
textByHashes.d16b0ab5176cc52f6471bcabf40090dd13bbd4bd: I'd like to know about the Stronghold of Security.
textByHashes.f7bef09041d70b3810aa63dd8224148ecddd2384: Sounds painful, did he fall on his head?
textByHashes.e39cbe3ddb089be44c0933e617e0a588a8d72414: Wow, that sounds good. Where can I find the explorer to learn more?
textByHashes.a2cccc32eaff22c4c4083963760a0fa125c49146: Where can I find a bank?
textByHashes.5340a4f121e895bb6d52e425e10a50e31d9b7219: No, I can find things myself thank you.
textByHashes.82b3bd61fb4a356244f0e3542297ed272badfc47: This is the voice of your conscience! You've been a very naughty boy haven't you?
textByHashes.3271d61bb03b2ef71d242842493326ed3af478c6: You know what I'm talking about! Don't lie!
textByHashes.1a71ed965e33ff7a2527928f4411aeb0848e15cb: If you do it again, you'll be in deep trouble.
textByHashes.26ed701e4d7a6c2c6ee79b4e01699f5524634c3f: Does the name 'Philly' mean anything to you by chance?
textByHashes.9638a9cbdbbee7c36056d997ce95391dd48a6837: I found it in a magical rift. Does it belong to you?
textByHashes.b35716752211116f57e5355cc97f3787027cb57a: It's okay, I have time to listen.
textByHashes.fe85c89030b77470255562ff855ff33318f78771: I see... I'm not sure I like where this story is going. How come I found the locket in a magic rift then?
textByHashes.0d07cf26503ad2e4b417ed7c701bec2be386d2e6: Oh my... I'm so sorry for your loss.
textByHashes.c962d9a62abd6c97b4c5b6a183884ee1dcc331ee: I'm still curious to know how it ended up in some rift. Do you have any theories?
textByHashes.a47b6fd36890013f0113bf631baa25a37fb56664: In an ancient temple. Most things in the rift came from the Abyss.
textByHashes.d4ca1d7d9b724112f8ee956c3d5b5a4a280cc42a: They hadn't until recently, but the Z.M.I. found a way there.
textByHashes.d9d3a7b53f1023578b2b674c1ea611c451fc0757: It's called the Temple of the Eye. It was built by Saradominist wizards long ago to house a powerful artefact.
textByHashes.b07f3dfbffddbc0e9e4028d7fafd421050417c58: That looks just like the amulet that led us to the temple!
textByHashes.6c189b6a1be71ce66950fce241de4a3d7bcefd83: Of course you can have the locket.
textByHashes.8279701cff53675e2d41314f7cd9017066187873: Thanks, Phileas. I wish you luck also.
textByHashes.64306fe66de755e1a505c882b57d96f6dcf370a5: Never mind then. I have to go.
textByHashes.41545b4dee972181f94c3a38c8a955a86cbda1fd: It's nice to meet you, Lumiere.
textByHashes.cf7e0137459819693c81996241bc67d9f43e5dd2: Oh, I've always wondered who did that. It doesn't sound like much fun...
textByHashes.74973799c113f484657eb0f2a904fee99d5053f5: Good thing the sanctuary was unsealed. Plenty of adventurer folk you could grab some blo-
textByHashes.796cff6f8da1c85981c1e0e5138331b3cd77d569: What's that big old building above us?
textByHashes.346fbd565f1ae3ecd37d2673bbc9e4989dc5e41a: Alas, I have no cabbages either...
textByHashes.0eb7a3c34c0f8b463c2b4d3ef1ae37fea2673a8f: Yes, I'll sell you all my cabbages.
textByHashes.f8a8fab0c4fcc818d7039ac53ef13a6958697ed6: No, I will keep my cabbbages.
textByHashes.f82ef06804b3e4c380f12829fc74ebea79298ba7: Can you tell me how much you think this would sell for?
textByHashes.d724aa55aa995a2ea16199cbbb5ce5cd67e6dedf: What did I have to do again?
textByHashes.a0c90fe6ab9121d15ad8250e78f6b3cbabe718c6: No, the crate isn't full yet...
textByHashes.54a33bb80c7a0803fea4d35cd9073c7e51758687: Can't say I've heard of you before.
textByHashes.eb48524ff9de2cc85cfc138b0f5ca737fa8b4e7f: An adventurer mostly, but I've slain some dragons and I've conquered some nightmares.
textByHashes.7a40610ec7878527aa8ac9983d77379a5fa13693: So... where's this famous sword of yours?
textByHashes.d8837fdbe998adf457fa3fd849ea7ffdece6851e: I think you need to work on your bartering skills.
textByHashes.dde415cc09986a40784c89e3141286c415c544f8: And you defeated it? The Moonfly?
textByHashes.158704f7cf6c4b8dc76035097c640d78f93ff4b7: I'll be sure to keep an eye out.
textByHashes.a67595831cf67651d19a0c41df881e54e4e2ecf1: Hmm... the books are very interesting. I thought there would be more though...
textByHashes.03f1f58496d52e1b6697e9cc49221a5d22e57cba: Certainly sounds like you have a problem.
textByHashes.5fe87af5ce41cc7977660fa37c7e617887cab41c: Yeah it was alright. Some of these words are a bit odd though. Did you really cover your sword in sheep blood?
textByHashes.37e794f8038f20eeefb29f10aeab9ae504783adb: The poem does mention sheep though, at the end?
textByHashes.ceee20476e94c116dc95576274d5b10e00102868: What do you have in your sack?
textByHashes.40aebec308eeb0ae4f3347fcd3773c4fbde7062a: How rude! I was only being curious.
textByHashes.88eff8fad8ec3f1bc441644032fb3d924de99bb8: Can you tell me what they are?
textByHashes.24bc8ab87cabf9c56fae087458311cb975484646: I'm sure I could make it worth your while.
textByHashes.e236a4b4197ca90b57f3992dac1c398228cc4fac: Why do you keep it in a sack?
textByHashes.ad2cf26f4e57c346ea11272e29284912b4570e6b: I might have one, but I need it myself. Why do you need a grapple?
textByHashes.dac4efaafc5c844be11b2a07c15dcd29477cb57c: I mean that makes sense I suppose. How did you end up here?
textByHashes.4fb6d8394b0276f8031f8fa4f433f9c30d1086d8: No, I don't have a grapple on me.
textByHashes.2540918056f3fb348713c79bdb3ee85dd2d1f20b: Yes, I do have a spare grapple. I'm not sure you'd be able to use it to get across that gap though, what is your Ranged level?
textByHashes.b718aade08628436199bafe43dd96b5845c239fc: You need 62 Ranged to make it across that gap.
textByHashes.6dd82bfea0d81cea1145d0f5b5175c88d9c4ceb2: Yes, I do have a spare grapple, although I spent a lot of Hallowed marks to obtain it so you can't have it.
textByHashes.bfb5eab41b06bb24df087fb06791d670b8fc696a: Oh yeah? What's your agility level?
textByHashes.864e50c74cabb972ac4cbe43e6bbcb1717584b81: I was hoping to learn something about you, like what you were doing here...!
textByHashes.474acae50f757e2617ee08bc0b158bd9cb9fb0fa: So why not just get a tower?
textByHashes.345af7c0248f6e02a6d3859d2fea81e02e98784d: So instead you ended up in the basement of a tavern.
textByHashes.147d9a8911fcc743f6cf6defdc44739b1588b0b7: I have this part that looks like it's from a weapon...
textByHashes.dbccfcda8cd2a6535f22e607f08f8766eaea4847: Can I do anything with it?
textByHashes.6f63d5817e64dd3c50194c529a4e5f9d4d1fae03: Do you know where I could find the other parts?
textByHashes.f72da18bab51b96b42c1ee2086813dd3ba8ccec6: I have these parts of a weapon, do you think you could assemble it for me?
textByHashes.045c57ec0eb01d857e5aa9d98bea85b5c1062962: I don't have that much on me...
textByHashes.f1f0ef479bc5eafbeac7217c03ca2735fa212ca5: What are you doing with the money from combining the Voidwaker?
textByHashes.04653f0d6b78741c11a2a15e5721be519b01d5a3: So what exactly is this sword, anyway?
textByHashes.200557eaaa414184d6064ae276bd68f512472eb1: Are we still talking about the sword?
textByHashes.9465f18ca6e52f17e4dddb6b160e5cd9e19d2caf: Are any of these tales... true?
textByHashes.76929d367e363eda08bfabee4c357c903ee9ac9b: What about the name? You called it Voidwaker?
textByHashes.22b9149353cceaf042d5452807620b027fc44ada: I don't know... The sand? It's coarse and rough and irritating, and it gets everywhere.
textByHashes.fdcd9df80eaf648d1c951e65fe487e2e4067baf7: A spa business? Do you really think these Corsairs are the washing type?
textByHashes.7379c6df2fe5247a7e9bf518323ca31a66218a99: Surely you never expected this lot to be any different... They're either stealing, killing or both!
textByHashes.d6642a722d416d097c8eb5ee44351ca1734deb40: Interesting, I'm sure that'll be an entertaining turn of events.
textByHashes.46d501ad22c20531a67bb06c1708be559b80754b: I'm sorry to hear that. Maybe I could help try and find him?
textByHashes.1d7db3e34b1542a9e1099ce38aa54944e3da4a12: I'm sure he will be as well, and if they need more help, I'm always happy to get involved.
textByHashes.8516f339bcdeceab0383a6f2809181a2e609fb87: What's that ladder next to the altar for?
textByHashes.a28b3faae4e689717767aff336be7c9188352b49: Next to a Chaos Altar? That's a bit odd. Can I go down and have a look?
textByHashes.2aa51bfe17b1db620582e437cc631d21e93f50d9: How'd that work out for them?
textByHashes.bc00cd6ee3d4548ab17e27d5fda20fa12c5e2aec: What do you mean, 'sort of'? Altars either work or don't work.
textByHashes.0a6d1ae40a911ac5031a965d7828c677bec83e07: Sounds like a pretty good deal. Can I give it a go?
textByHashes.a589ea4e5f285afde27bb4fc8bf94d16360f2e61: Could you teleport me to the Abyss?
textByHashes.f5641ec9720a2a6932ef1a2406263605ad8a18b2: Can you tell me more about the Abyss?
textByHashes.f4c92b262f155106cda2df154367d22bfd4e5186: Right... And what does it have to do with runecrafting?
textByHashes.16880f034994efa94fe3523a202e502cd61649b3: Wait... So when I teleport, I'm actually travelling through the Abyss?
textByHashes.97928da7438eec546be8f6685d206143f986941d: So did you discover the Abyss?
textByHashes.dad0fe13f66cb80e4327cb5ba9953c8e3a463001: Can you tell me more about your group?
textByHashes.721b2e51e0f950f77fadcc629518c045208031f0: You don't seem to like the Order of Wizards very much.
textByHashes.78019c0416ce9c82206b655e9b91495d9718f377: And that's how the Z.M.I. was formed?
textByHashes.8b60310ae9d9e9a0360e8bbf35e0d3761cf443e4: Tell me about magic combat please.
textByHashes.7f2d52833e099a4366448d8d4bf44a371d42eeda: Let's discuss how my runes act when I pick them up.
textByHashes.69477755365a7b356017da2c18b24c2fde14904e: Can you teach me the basics please?
textByHashes.40d67a87f3abd8e945f334a40a11d4a403a3b1fd: Could you stop me receiving a starter pack after respawn?
textByHashes.83ff6a05b11daedbf31ce0cbdd8dcd30036156b3: Yes, I do want to become an Ironwoman.
textByHashes.4b3bceae5ea8f82354cde15be23a739fad470a40: Why don't you like my helmet?
textByHashes.970ce3f346d91cfdfac6cf6c8b3199eade8a2e7a: What shall I do with it?
textByHashes.392d9c29cbb251ecce974009c64563e2741683e8: Many? I don't see that many...
textByHashes.482ac9750be89738075323a953771cff9e6b6c30: That's kind of creepy. What do you actually do?
textByHashes.977ec89659488fb46a98a3817dce91dd8021c8ff: How do I breathe underwater without a helmet.
textByHashes.b271ebbe91368913f3b95c496eef6b2db31d0301: Is there anything I can do to help you?
textByHashes.41fd6c1174ab2bef7547a50dae30c06efbc7fd91: What? Tears? But, they're water, surely underwater they would...
textByHashes.8f5d2e6a3eb283fcc8b6703cecd6cf897e937cdd: Ok, keep your scales on. Where would I find these tears?
textByHashes.6da27ae7001af9ab98dadf9c3e39f1934e74bd1a: What do I get out of it?
textByHashes.dd16712f6d06d99866831ab36daa14298d8de017: What have you got to trade?
textByHashes.d95a3009dab2905f9e972f96c9899cf6e52601f9: It didn't go perfectly. Amascut still escaped, and she'd already gained a fair amount of power by that point.
textByHashes.31c38f7c9ac479de227acf70e341fdfc62c9dda2: Where do you think she'll have gone? Menaphos?
textByHashes.e815267eb8d0ebec10072176607f54ad98649235: Hopefully time for the city to reopen again. What will you do in the meantime?
textByHashes.fbc72d6970b6eb599b005f25d9dc02db28cf72c7: Then I guess this is goodbye for now.
textByHashes.ed799d6c036728c865aaf9d90d4f0b2441b89b36: Uh... that doesn't sound particularly safe to me...
textByHashes.0feb162605f128ab8dbed5cbf0a0334fb81c1a78: Cool amulet! Can I have one?
textByHashes.b12acfb786da64c5e2618e54fca1fb7d0f725939: Oh, I don't have enough money for that.
textByHashes.fdfdda9fce69fcd243a81b5c4ae889d0d39d80b9: No way! That's far too expensive.
textByHashes.4a27d88cba76626169d783c67c0bd3c696e040c3: I don't have room to hold it. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.448ed2542c2c23e597273e4c1710d213070beb96: Can I get another set of enchanted secateurs?
textByHashes.ec7d11cc63ca223aa7e644514a0582c4d7e52357: That's too expensive for me I'm afraid.
textByHashes.c11b9d241759ca59e92db143217771c9e071c4b4: Sorry, I didn't realise. I'll have to visit a bank.
textByHashes.2a852de2e272f2817793a0b072558f91a55e9b91: Could you spare me a brown apron?
textByHashes.e705e41b04189049deb6124aa16ae5bbf20d8662: Can I have some more bone seeds?
textByHashes.1bffe0a40f3079abd7d09cb5380538ce0acfe50a: Fortunately I do have another pot with a lid.
textByHashes.660c2fdd89af88fa9be411a2fb77df4f768324e1: Who are you and what are you doing here?
textByHashes.5d8e1dd3b5d413dcaa28299384ae31042545e280: Is this like Summoning? Can you teach me?
textByHashes.6fb5d0a879eeb404248548373c387757df8b2511: Even a mighty hero like me?
textByHashes.5adca71d16dbec6d4ecbbddaee1a5bc99701b282: Why do you keep making fungi appear?
textByHashes.3f8354d9e3db7abac04aedc551fa15bc8e0f2c3c: Can you teach me something about magic?
textByHashes.465d0a5435543ad947f3380dd14d4c9d318e24f9: About those skeletal magi in the Colony - why don't they disappear now the Colony's safe?
textByHashes.2dea0719d46719a5ef90087b6974f2b4a468375f: So when will they go away? They're in the dormitories, and that's a real nuisance for the colonists!
textByHashes.2b0c91e50e46ed065958fb5a7e91ca70a905c0ed: So you're not going to get rid of them?
textByHashes.c04a0c44d33b2245d0bcde57b7425ef633784c6a: Where can I get clothes like those?
textByHashes.21915d6841956f91465e2224124ee6c525f9167f: What happens if I kill you and take them?
textByHashes.e5983e8f3961b4037c1fd560eb3c3896563a9086: How about if you teach me enough about magic so I can wear those clothes too?
textByHashes.56038ba6bd296a650681fe29cbf27945810d412d: Actually, I don't want to talk to you.
textByHashes.8e0250f053772bbd9865111fdf2e2298a98baae6: What sort of drinks do you have?
textByHashes.e0706ec13534973ed1d03cda95d27d43609d9599: Errrr..yuck, roasted spiders, that sounds gross!
textByHashes.cdb63d198ae57d909984eedfec315f10aea1219c: Hmm, I guess it could be considered a delicacy, so yes please?
textByHashes.ce60652c46bb6d3089836c58382d14213d3d91dd: What sort of stick and where would I get one?
textByHashes.5d555d35cf44ab4f20b0748aca46751558e4b167: So how long will the road be blocked for?
textByHashes.84b48859168e05212b816f9a4b0892950133b02c: Umm, I'm not going to eat you. Are you ok?
textByHashes.80173f7178de5d731b5731a002a44f2001178c1d: Ummm... no... I'll just leave you to it.
textByHashes.f6fe70fc272f3e4a72ea1d9a36d7b31de697a3b2: Oh sorry, what did I do?
textByHashes.8849267bc4f072d7cbe6f4fc05f9d3713d34232c: Riiiight. Oh, man, you didn't wipe your hands?
textByHashes.881d608f2a1db831e5787f727e1bc9767bb0faad: I'm in search of enemies to kill.
textByHashes.42b0f7cd27ff52ef7c7f5f9652f340195eb08a47: Oh, I don't know, I just wandered in, saw you and thought it'd be fun to speak to you.
textByHashes.da63f3162fd6c4d179982454ffe35376d96a58c7: Well, what is there to do around here?
textByHashes.bc0eb80f4aa304a390754347e7db55fc83463ac0: Hello there. You don't seem too happy.
textByHashes.68999b6582f537627db16a4e2839f73d085e0028: I can't imagine they'd be happy to hear you say that.
textByHashes.ab18be1313b110bfe453d9cb9b357f157cf34ecd: Who are you and what is this place?
textByHashes.489e70a38abd5e26f3da32ee9326f27e6d66e886: And I can take whatever I want?
textByHashes.03e35fb8407a3e20e7061ecb4d9dade21c1dd63a: Will others be able to kill me inside?
textByHashes.d8af572488400ba09ecc58ef64b51c6751745938: Yep, could be looking all day!
textByHashes.04a7033195acdc6fdf61e2b5261180c7b662e5ff: Sounds fun, how did you do that?
textByHashes.9d2eb074b5b1abb1d7bc5e9e5999995c32dbe2de: That sounds really good. Perhaps I should do the same!
textByHashes.b80898524be771fe80291c02fa6793d13f3a50e1: I'll check it out. Got to get going now, nice talking to you.
textByHashes.f643a3867b3493437be6d974edeacb2d6389a2c2: Really? Tell me something I didn't know!
textByHashes.444318677331646759f01d97340dcda7b6097fe8: Okay, I'll let you get on then.
textByHashes.9e57a67f5ea1e61d7afd36499fd1cc59caea7c99: Yes, well, no need to ignore me.
textByHashes.3e81c3307fc5f7cde112dc8f79cebfa97e8bf6aa: Okay. Have you seen the Natural History exhibit in the basement?
textByHashes.2bb8bddbb66034ea454e6052b74554da6b08bbde: A bit like the crazy gnomes and their gliders. Have you seen the model they have upstairs?
textByHashes.67e41453b7f61a2736f87dd655eac03afad6e4ee: Who knows, the Museum just got really big and appears to have cash. They might entertain him with his very own floor - we'll see.
textByHashes.12ddcf4c0bdf1dcde5f9dc8f560a08ef7460a71c: Hi, have you seen the Dig Site displays?
textByHashes.7997ddca066895dafc8829e8c0a57c9eafbcde4d: Sounds fun, I should probably check it out.
textByHashes.3d1ef65acbfb1d5f85f4affab3dc65e86bca1cd1: Tell me about the islands' history.
textByHashes.aa34b97a427948dbfd41028dfe8d67ca70139fb1: What are you doing up here?
textByHashes.d184f7e0a578256415597dbb9eb8be96b67957cc: Uh, I suppose I am a bit thirsty...
textByHashes.f0117d24792a5d685c3bfc5b14e7d13132eebeb1: I have a request from the guard over there.
textByHashes.5595f60ccb1ac6475c6690d3ecc6066bf2de71c3: He wants to try sunlight antelope cooked with redberries.
textByHashes.0425a22e0e8956652744ec08c986a124f7fb7f31: I have all the ingredients here.
textByHashes.fce8dac0affe3271757862b5a63ca54d509838dc: Viero thought the redberry antelope was 'interesting and complex'.
textByHashes.29dfbe804fe5abe54799a29b67ef4ba676cbb427: I might just do that. Thanks!
textByHashes.e2a2edb21a1397e8c088603acd455ae8f1e3ae87: No thanks, not from you at least.
textByHashes.81afb516d1e2880bb4718358622bf9ad91a1a17e: Could that take me back to Lumbridge?
textByHashes.feb6d68b464540508b58388da67740a59ff2c8f3: Pleased to meet you. I'm . So, what's wrong with the Council?
textByHashes.713d675b339b74f38b695c4bf8cca624ac0abadc: Hello Martin. Now here's somewhere I wouldn't have expected to find you.
textByHashes.a90424532a01fcabcba608313b2fa8ae398769f1: So you're helping to advise the King?
textByHashes.c5287bb484e5c764e8687bf9daa54d32c6dce801: But in reality it was his father they expected to rule.
textByHashes.3e52faf5870a44956b232df1ad1b6b30bda744e8: I'm sure you're right. See you around Martin.
textByHashes.cb0ec26f203bb0655762bcccb67aac53e6fc1b6e: Can I buy a Skillcape of Farming from you?
textByHashes.86029e8b4ec3d0bcd3ce9571f168a4917ecea62d: Sure, not many people own one.
textByHashes.f4317f3b0990e66efffee85ac4b4f68c8d3c071a: Okay, this time I've really solved your problems! I've woken up the Fairy Queen!
textByHashes.638c8cbc3e7e61de47fe5bccdffe6e2ca4753c29: Of course. The problem was the Godfather, he wanted to take control of Zanaris himself, so he didn't give Fairy Nuff the Queen's secateurs!
textByHashes.eaba706e04f28ebd10afa327bffd5ba167e92465: It's nice to meet you Marwolaeth, I'm .
textByHashes.3759b7d8a54f6a3c0fb4c72865a4387d8fdb4600: Yes, tell me of my future...
textByHashes.20ead6fff2260b9ce22a0b3175d85ab383b7825b: That's really quite vague, do you just say this to everyone?
textByHashes.80789265ed1698b8e7368f253ac681e29ef54317: I'd prefer to stay ignorant... Who knows what that knowledge could do to a person...
textByHashes.9e2aa1f51fc10c73b77924ba244766e741e83a23: Can you tell me about this place?
textByHashes.3487699736c4cf72aa084a46c5298e3791bc7d22: That doesn't necessarily mean they died... They may have found the meaning that they desired and have gone elsewhere.
textByHashes.54f00eee2351ed70a22bd8daaf55fca501acc868: I can't hear anything? It might be?
textByHashes.7f2222ed3b39bcac2507691488ab67efcc7b3f3d: I ran into one of your bakers outside, he said you were in trouble.
textByHashes.018bbe49ba0b7df4379acdd608a0f724136a78d7: Where's the key? The door looks locked to me.
textByHashes.c73b026dd07827de180c21e66f3de91b3e78298f: Well I thought you had it, Paul.
textByHashes.8961d6d4cf01cd184b25268675531e1174506f1f: Don't you think I would have opened the door as well!
textByHashes.b1aff0c090cc2af9a966b0e9b4b33ab4873b68c8: Woah calm down! If it's not in there, it must be out here. Let me look for it.
textByHashes.2d60410d9ec3af8a33df12d66f4d6d8abf4233db: That's going to be a problem, it's in the cage with the Icelord.
textByHashes.65e370c9e52c60e3c325db88b946edfde41ad581: I've got no way to get it with the Icelord there.
textByHashes.45aa95643783987c96c9cd3fd131c3928550bcc0: I'm stumped, I can't find the key.
textByHashes.2f65ae5ea2b81a698ae04498ad18dfc0acfad1f8: Don't suppose you have an Anti-Icelord Shield lying around here then?
textByHashes.4fd4d09fce77e3d13c42d1ad23d73de9aec78820: How am I going to do that?
textByHashes.bdf3bf8e1736acaec5f7843185b6acd615fdf2a6: This is such a ridiculous idea, guess I have no choice....
textByHashes.b833fea1849c5b2db1a793c06d94f35523a239b8: There you go, unlocked without an issue.
textByHashes.da23dfd25096b4ba44ad95606353d7e706e42ed3: Ha ha, yeah, it was no problem.
textByHashes.d6f4fe4f8e2bfe3ff193a32c9280584582e01476: I can't believe that actually worked....
textByHashes.df59e6b746c0fd1f5e903d9c9e55ffb03706cfda: So you're telling me you weren't even sure it would!?
textByHashes.8eff3c535ecfe36e1c804e05db5b247e88cfd692: ...fine. I should go tell Santa the good news, the bakery is back in operation.
textByHashes.52df48e8656585a047273116bc7062900bc2af57: Hello there. Is this your home?
textByHashes.45632738e730122a70220a2a66c02c22a2f6eeb4: Well you have fun with it.
textByHashes.caa5e451ef8b04a7ac8c1680fc80bb30593e9946: Could you tan something for me?
textByHashes.f8067d982e1bd33f340f1c71e6d680f729430565: Happy to have helped. All the best.
textByHashes.85d0489bf0678db8ba1d6b3025785c5763db42c8: Hey, what is that cape you're wearing? I don't recognise it.
textByHashes.984aadc2147ea360458d8e7de61906867d3448ac: Are you the person I need to talk to about buying a Skillcape of Crafting?
textByHashes.0777e162467e0a2e01821dd16ecdd97f98be80b5: So... are you here to give crafting tips?
textByHashes.2d1e5f6139308359d8e57fcbd8a40b7781853413: Can you tell me about that skillcape you're wearing?
textByHashes.3a82e21df58c17e8a487eb47cd6a9ad89ec7a081: Thanks for the lesson, I'll go find the Quest Guide now.
textByHashes.ecd920ab51c2d3c559c172d6e80d3563bd809d69: Tell me about the world map again.
textByHashes.928b47bb2ae757c11f9b0bf3b38fceb6504c6e3b: Why do you have a meat cleaver?
textByHashes.080c6a8978d6bf9c74783ffef5a78b7ca45fa6a0: How can I train my smithing?
textByHashes.8c633a6f34f119282fa1e67b76923e553d1c9399: What kind of things can I smith?
textByHashes.209f5e748ebad7e1a5215f68bee1416621dc7df6: Do you have any quests I could do?
textByHashes.da5350ff36e8d9221fcddcc8a4eacc6837552f87: Er, yes, now you come to mention it.
textByHashes.054791003e9053049cc6e40509057d9aa034a6cd: That sounds like fun; could I have a go?
textByHashes.711335538b020b8e9f96ceb677e8a5244996da2d: I'm afraid I don't have that much with me.
textByHashes.d4591f8d8d6bb215de368f179cd6eb42410cba4b: That doesn't sound like my sort of thing.
textByHashes.a2a3e8efe6508b10ca92b025c8af728f15610c67: What's this falconry thing all about then?
textByHashes.f4fc806810251a2506e467736361fee4ce68ae2b: So it's like keeping a pet then?
textByHashes.30a8e52ccfcd6471ab9986e5a7cf18affcdb2c5f: Could I invest in your setup here?
textByHashes.4c11bfbce11a8bc21e5dcd52bd451a3b1ebf9897: Would I get any benefit from this?
textByHashes.7d254dfe28765d76e932e744148c0f0f3324146b: Ah, I don't have that much on me right now.
textByHashes.b73cd5e9b2996585f6bfb690bb3cc1f032aa63f0: Hmm, that seems a little steep. I'll think on it.
textByHashes.86d5c7134e01a11aab4b667d2d0680481f7cf600: It's certainly harder than it looks.
textByHashes.2292e6772b6d88a24303467b19f594f8235040b6: Actually, I'd like to keep trying a little longer.
textByHashes.449e145a3e34fa41b65b7ed376df662e5ea7fe7f: Ok then, just come talk to me when you're done.
textByHashes.8ce2ec5b0320d74dda3c93e45aaccaf754c1939b: I think I'll leave it for now.
textByHashes.12911be9435f1b10fd578d403789c5a9d4c5c11c: Yes, I know what a bird is.
textByHashes.efb5f97e46ea1d8f23a287b9f2878dff5a10d59d: But how could I attract them? Y'know, so I could observe them a little closer.
textByHashes.dbc0ac69a69a74229a85882e4b7fc7f39d0cf881: So those would be the best locations to place my traps...
textByHashes.7e29a1625dcf7de8e6737c037b83a1fc6d8aa547: Did I say traps? Oh, I meant, umm, feeding them! Yes! I could feed them.
textByHashes.a75b9cb527504a77f17cd7d6b1488c7bd42f535c: Yeah, there sure are a lot of birds... For now.
textByHashes.63e2f5cf6946a10015110c1c6c0d6c99c2f62a8c: Your father is a hunter? Does he know anything about hunting birds?
textByHashes.d07b56d66da723971b46d3ec2f7820711e669750: They look old enough to look after themselves.
textByHashes.5b3f2162b16a79737414ef80bb95999b28e66aeb: Only!?! How old does that make you?
textByHashes.8ac016f41075155e40efe234c22f3b5d0279ceae: Sorry, I wasn't thinking. Anyway... I'd better stop distracting you.
textByHashes.5aeb2209c1a121cb4c124dff417f89f5e356a3be: Do you have any thoughts on this matter?
textByHashes.3784d9fbaf56c5a424287cb652fc29eff202cbe4: An unusual aspiration for a troll.
textByHashes.846b00827b1de67e33380b7f76b6d45e98adfa27: Can I help you with collecting weather data?
textByHashes.5e203fa983036596d5323f08ba90c825005ef9bd: Troll scientists really do operate on a higher level don't they?
textByHashes.05829e1a44ecbb5383a21e277a2fef165b26d60f: I actually have something for that!
textByHashes.8101ea639dd9bd21c193e66e509b45e3df134853: It's nice to meet you Meddwl, I'm .
textByHashes.d93215ac9496a72956a5a89f9c49051ed3380baa: A lovely idea, how's it going?
textByHashes.72638113a6ed7d49b0fcfecd955a30f5d9100c23: It is! I feel almost lighter.
textByHashes.51ed35fd7cf428866e61438a4efa9cff074c989d: I'm sure they are cute, unless they are biting your arm off.
textByHashes.2e88a6b0a7406d8205d3d4beb6bc75f3b0540b4c: I'd better stay on your good side then!
textByHashes.4a1402397bfa0123e32e45de869684fc31bd8637: Nothing, I just need to ask a couple of questions.
textByHashes.de2f2b6e6d17166dfcca50d98f65b775fc23d604: Not too bad thanks, but I wanted to ask a question.
textByHashes.603725aceb64c39670b1ad72c2cceadf72c59025: Hello, I wonder if I could ask some questions.
textByHashes.d865c8e4e3d4da2f554a97e8ad5db8f1fb47f908: Sorry, didn't mean to scare you. I just wanted to ask a question.
textByHashes.ff4caf80a17f730a06702ed4f3df5cc4eba6591d: Do you have a spare pick?
textByHashes.9e6c8e80f9765ed52648c82061dbcc7b29513d88: How do you get out of here?
textByHashes.47ae158fbe8f7af68c70aee36d552c554b530a6b: What is it that you're mining?
textByHashes.4a0404ee743ef2d92b0c174e31b15c59f3fe6829: What? Have you seen this place?
textByHashes.2902bdab56c599e5fa4b24ae06a08f45f7514d2f: But I didn't ask anything yet.
textByHashes.cfc4ad41ea3d2a80c943a8b3b55fd827dd92be7d: Oh, of course. How do you manage to do that?
textByHashes.78d439c95db62694483baeacdbd48c5fd23b0a51: I see. I best be careful with what I think of then.
textByHashes.279b5731514c0b0dc005444ebd799f798a6efb4b: Interesting, what does each style do?
textByHashes.3974f637670b6a3e8c004a5090f1f7dcc50e5de9: What if I wanted to fight something a bit more... human.
textByHashes.e3a30efc39f0a240cd790cffc2f7fa6f67c0b5ab: Capture the flag, sounds like a lot of fun.
textByHashes.62811277f064dca5a1fec6c71f40ab453505518a: Tell me about different weapon types I can use
textByHashes.b6b37750c11280c549506471d8f1daba856098c8: I'd like a training sword and shield.
textByHashes.9ac04dbc2c354723cb4240ddeb156c741dff4bbd: May I buy a Skillcape of Defence, please?
textByHashes.c7ca896251b0b5a0e10a625b0d62165f3a4ea917: I think I have the money right here, actually.
textByHashes.f3141a117af38e0b61a4c05c47e9bcd8f22ed36a: I no longer need my Training shield, would you like it back?
textByHashes.8112f8c0d1fae6a525046ebcc51e6da11812cc13: I no longer need my Training sword, would you like it back?
textByHashes.a155e88b8b796361c17c9f527dc7538accb9fe0e: I'll not get through these gates; they're too heavily boarded up!
textByHashes.32d20a1224a6b0aadbc023ab756ee71040edab2c: ...And these walls don't look very climbable at all.
textByHashes.61bd838106a0374d7688357386abccda724f21a2: What can I say, you live an learn
textByHashes.7ebb32c436d9640df1c17d456e83a2825d89a7d4: Yes, I had to pay him to get access to this area.
textByHashes.2652929bed118d7540fe9933be855cdca888323e: How do I play board games?
textByHashes.0d7215d4ba5988f0dc2de2f78f8a197f85651e16: Can I buy a drink please?
textByHashes.3cd51be320dc0f69c4826c0929128bd52f62076a: Hi, Merlin. I was wondering, can I change my respawn point back to Camelot?
textByHashes.6f4adbfb019c1f15b93930949f9a93fb09946c4e: Actually, no thanks. I like my respawn point.
textByHashes.9427b8d2caffe43a40c8e8d96ab73aec616496d5: Hi, Merlin. I was wondering, can I change my respawn point back to Lumbridge?
textByHashes.0f8a8ec50bb09cb8686d1950a71b844f72ff2eb7: I don't think I should just do that with no reasoning... perhaps they are going to try something sneaky. Then I can kick to my heart's content.
textByHashes.84b56139c9cc97926e010fabe8d6ac94d2b64b52: I don't have an empty pot, or enough ectotokens I'm afraid.
textByHashes.fa56f0c69882376c1e1563983cabc677298fe062: So you're pretty far from home then?
textByHashes.600b4aa70d91e804a03918b45f5539b8f312a6ac: Sorry to hear that. At least the view is good!
textByHashes.929198bcf79d529a1ab62647aa08218d3c93bdd8: Do you have any tips for potion production?
textByHashes.f0375dd61e84714888338cacac286344ef7d0392: Oh, that is bad. I'm sorry to hear that.
textByHashes.9eb9ad6b1f05e35e90b69d3bbf29f62d419c33c8: I notice there is a dwarf up in the tower there. Why is he up there?
textByHashes.5f0c25b7c38e807678c4c2817fe85221ead31e94: Why does that shirt have a hole in it?
textByHashes.6b754ecac0805be8517eac284a9a04dd0124f26b: In the stomach? Isn't that an odd place for a neck hole?
textByHashes.be9071288547e776ae1296b2a68a6d9f27aea466: What were you cleaning it with, a blood-covered scimitar?
textByHashes.ed0b12a1f75c26c492032186a1ace0f9c5a157ae: Where do you get these clothes?
textByHashes.490147378824569dd36bb5f8ee458892406e0f71: You found a bunch of slashed up clothing, some of which has been shoddily cleaned and stitched together?
textByHashes.a20de06e8634ef45b1b59d773dcc3000b732c1c2: Where did that pillar come from?
textByHashes.98a96e0321a553d1b7f25855e64ae385a83d04f4: If it was could you sell it to me?
textByHashes.25b2ab06916dd53f40be555d9ae1adedabdc830f: Where did this pillar come from?
textByHashes.bd20a1d64d07bf752dca79bb9994f4c87a5fb1d7: It's a good business to be in. People will always need flour.
textByHashes.4022d991caccce855b93663a59eb01e20edc7595: Then I bring my wheat here?
textByHashes.85384486940aec60779bcacd160b4e2a3de53d7d: So where does the flour go then?
textByHashes.3f75d59cc8572248197bbeee1fb018edf7d16d27: Can you fill a lamp with oil please?
textByHashes.419f8ecc8e2a761ac8e67d262f69167e18a02c69: How do the lamps around the city work?
textByHashes.2f71a4f1b37413e8ff193d8a924a36c32e2ffb01: You could just leave the mine.
textByHashes.c452b145f67ebcd98262d719235b7c4bf9b6d2b3: No it doesn't, it stays perfectly still.
textByHashes.c9859d3b963ed0a44998cd210ded766f0c58d5d1: Why are you singing about farming implements at altitude?
textByHashes.7d37c5ce3d7ce4c2a4684e5f8edd6515105bf47b: Oh, I got it. That doesn't make it funny though.
textByHashes.d4f448694161ca5e8f97ddfaf16ccf0a31094e2c: Why would anyone stay here for so long?
textByHashes.95ab160b11923d6b70111cf28d301df3753506cf: Oh dear. Being underground for so long may have driven you mad.
textByHashes.f3d7e68d87736a7ccfe480be5d8253fed9c1a8d6: Could be worse, it could be the trolls killing you.
textByHashes.ac151adc7a290f6cbb4c1ca9471bbf4cd29e71a1: I imagine its quite the challenge then?
textByHashes.0c6dc87c99edd57548ee5897887015a09693c18d: Can you tell me about modifiers?
textByHashes.5de67c0fd4aee599eb198e0c1d21994e4dcd680e: So I'm guessing the higher the wave, the better the rewards?
textByHashes.cffa4e01d5489eddf9f623692908a1bfafd2f9d3: That does sound handy! Thanks for explaining all of that.
textByHashes.b2f0c304c2043f08979bc68d0120fac3a8027bf8: So are you not training like the rest of the gladiators?
textByHashes.785b381585e7a61bd3bc0626debce98fa860116a: Are you at a disadvantage because of your height?
textByHashes.b013570fb7419679e8a9407ee6c5378e99c85391: On second thoughts, I'd better stay.
textByHashes.bd051eb1e1b1921699d4b313fa2c1447700d5473: I have a spare Dizana's quiver (uncharged).
textByHashes.1edd481a4ba9093ad7eb7e60325dd735b71081fc: Take the hammer I gave you, or buy a new one from a general store, and proceed to a nearby anvil.
textByHashes.b9348d0a0ab34c1c97c24c86d3412d9c39030dc6: By using a metal bar on an anvil you will be presented with a screen showing the objects you are able to smith at your current level.
textByHashes.0d571aa3a8a087a748870d03da6f39442481a893: It's a pretty straightforward skill as I'm sure you discovered while making me that lovely bronze dagger.
textByHashes.8cfd6c668fd8ae8948f1dc350c628601fde981c7: The higher Smithing level you are, the better quality the metal you can work with. You start off on bronze and work your way up as your smithing skills increase.
textByHashes.ebc82fe89581933d3778fcd7d513598619c99cb5: Can you teach me the basics of mining please?
textByHashes.62b158b85959d69e199d57106cf3c158f95fe447: I already know about the basics of mining, got any tips?
textByHashes.cfa01e5b7f509d8a4026bbd4650740ea981b054a: Any advice for an advanced miner?
textByHashes.69d63ab42aaf01c03b4c938d63d42620b0fb82db: Can you show me where the mining guild is?
textByHashes.4946a239e219a366cd3c23f353bfafb0fb2cc44b: Can you show me where the coal mine is?
textByHashes.87510241535ce1331c111568bca25104ea2352ff: Tell me about different rocks and picks.
textByHashes.556e80e26c881ce6b487134791bac1003b54ff47: Alright, what do you need me to do?
textByHashes.d0d0dd5ef5849377076ae3582be149a77d728e20: Where do I need to go?
textByHashes.24aa9407191be9b833c561e6e79f36cc4343db17: Can I go for a ride now?
textByHashes.2f7c5ec551b5704765b9f6f1472666d2b4830f3a: Do I have to pay every time I use the carts?
textByHashes.0884b89d0276cf86ecf35b80235dfe7dbb757afd: Have you got any more scrolls?
textByHashes.1c0b06e8718f8e6298ca3390443d26019fc9f0fe: How do you seem to know what I'm going to say? ...Er...oh.
textByHashes.6220a5fe803ba20f1171be6f325719f64fa3ce63: What is...uh...aha! I'm not going to ask that. So you got it wrong!
textByHashes.979036b7e104d127645ff2bc3179cf8a3ce70d68: I mean...Argh! How do you do that?
textByHashes.52ccfe0f27aef2691124a77e61051a9441ddbaa2: Thanks. My name's , by the w...uh...okay, I think I need to lie down.
textByHashes.7f751ed421ca19003a771c9e6896707f73c680cb: Ok, tell me about the news.
textByHashes.69a3b9dedbda911abb489ad6c2d4b0977c01246a: Are we talking about the bank robbery?
textByHashes.64dd371e3fbf3c8c1b3b129315ade952d1e64153: So that's why you're telling people he was the bank robber?
textByHashes.7c1abd2d34da5245bbc1c6e0ed621b48904127c4: A sign saying 'Trespassers will be prosecuted'?
textByHashes.3780c9f8953b700e472d50f59246fed9888be57d: I've been around here for ages.
textByHashes.ac811e14c858924217dce15ebef758c0e3e170f2: I've had enough of talking to you.
textByHashes.e0cd65c8617fbaba66d3bdfcc724d9e55d1933d4: Okay, tell me about the news.
textByHashes.400be775f27bc61326752f51997ee90859bccde9: I really don't know what you're talking about.
textByHashes.868b84dc2b6a8a249da20bd5202cac4ccfcf18d1: At this rate I don't think I want to know...
textByHashes.e00cabb2dec8531f39f76e7003c2420f6c69a55d: I'm not talking to you, you horrible woman.
textByHashes.2387b43ec3230d48a40035877d398a430e7dd3fa: Can I sell you some ore?
textByHashes.ffcd7da1fec353834ae4394b6fc843e29b1917c3: Why do the Dorgeshuun live underground?
textByHashes.049da6c5912dcd26e78205c62c082b4089ff32a0: The war is over now, so you can return to the surface.
textByHashes.0ebf4fa19384fb18cdd9646c15684775f9730f7f: What was the name of your god?
textByHashes.9dfa6a8e8ebdbbedac808c96894dfa5600290135: No thanks, I like having a body. It's fun.
textByHashes.d5cedee22a24b29459c53dcc94e27bdc83397091: Have you got anything to trade?
textByHashes.6b8e090bf195d3d590a877d753ab671be81a135c: I've got this control scroll for you.
textByHashes.4f60dec5f6372fc74594afa7598803cf3e3bf016: Yes, I know, I've been here before.
textByHashes.deaaf028ad03afb150501416c42efeaa1e7fd022: Well what's all this got to do with me then?
textByHashes.96caf4db1f8998781564b8f99eb7e41507d0e74e: Yes please. I mean, it's always best to be prepared, right?
textByHashes.4659715c1ac17c194ff4d82d69e63cd10c5c7cbf: No, thanks. I should be able to work it out.
textByHashes.2b64d30cdfa6b9b5637fd05e2f3edb8298486f77: Err, sorry. I seem to have messed it up a little.
textByHashes.4f06ebed63ac7788237e72807a9024d4e8317a60: Well, I've managed to get her into the cage.
textByHashes.dd2a84e4d179263048a8ff107358082429045f9c: Thanks! Just stay indoors while those zombies are still prowling around.
textByHashes.df45afad71aa3cdf93c59330c8cfe9467c02225e: Tell him to save it for when I manage to defeat those zombies!
textByHashes.fc768888bbd8dde090a3fdbdb657424ac8c2c160: All in a day's work, brother.
textByHashes.6d9c9fa8b500a57d6ee5c82c9feac137c6cd0425: I'll remember that the next time I go drinking...
textByHashes.73bb77f22ab0e756cd5eff2a69d64fc448c89f9f: Yes, okay, I'm ready to go.
textByHashes.74a676dad94c5bc6962f159596e57ef52b86b9b6: I don't know. It could be anything.
textByHashes.766385393847a08f304c6b00653dd9a5f4a43a1e: What if I want guidance from another god?
textByHashes.20b685d4c9396ca2e55e2ba540b2bc1810a492a8: I happen to be proficient in many languages... anyway, what are you doing here in Varrock?
textByHashes.14001259b62521d2d3894ef129708e8fa0c5476a: Um... no... not really... I'll be right back...
textByHashes.b5a74277383c402b26316886094468b00341fa9d: Sorry monkey, I don't have any bananas.
textByHashes.fbf02e3c6e1f42bc591a9ec4c76a5f0ab193643d: Wow you're one nasty piece of work. Have you ever heard of gratitude?
textByHashes.a34d091c104b920a7abfe7ba85dd6dcddc6e56ce: Just because I'm not covered in fur doesn't make me bald, you cheeky monkey.
textByHashes.f5d6081ed99eff02be910a458f1ded418b57b2ab: Look I've had it with you, you little degenerate.
textByHashes.3c64078bd64ee2ddb7b25b286d85af59baf66d40: I'll not give you a banana until you learn manners.
textByHashes.c79c4011b6862f5dd3f0c50f475c881ed2acfd2a: Don't you think this is all a bit cruel?
textByHashes.4d67277e0fc9656dedf33b2e1d6bf72203017476: Keeping so many monkeys locked up in that crowded pen. I bet they dream of being back in the jungle...
textByHashes.c9b1580d3977fb155261621d27d6edb86cdc395e: And look at you now ... all grown up having achieved your dreams! Would you deny me my dreams? Would you deny a monkey its dreams?
textByHashes.864241e193334c09f5e167cee4228ea72a613cdf: I've just thought of a way to solve your little monkey problem...
textByHashes.3c2ed9fcdd0c1ed28f0af1435a70d1eda5f8cf7f: Well, you have too many monkeys, don't you?
textByHashes.391bc8c3a49dd6131cb101402d6e4dc1eeb3649a: Well, you could give away your monkeys to people who would look after them. You could even start with me!
textByHashes.aa8c2302abd40e91db1378613de198f0dcb1b012: I haven't seen Monkey Minders here before...
textByHashes.8a2929abfc6e2c77dc01c4dfbf7a94f011ad555a: But why do we need Monkey Minders?
textByHashes.9ac714519896d0a6e97a739c9400b3266aa371ee: Why have the monkeys been multiplying?
textByHashes.de105d621beb918f1e2d111111506ab4b804fc97: What are you going to do about the monkeys?
textByHashes.4e7c2b122cd1fb74b96dfc3e071702fc46f6b3c9: I have slain the foul creature!
textByHashes.d80e7390be4cc08558ee7a55748194b462e9ac1f: Oh, hey! The door was open...
