textByHashes.617215c2940661dd04cb04c4fbf7cf79b7a7871d: Oh? Are you from a family of famous knights?
textByHashes.8e1359a54740d7a662e161cc067863fe083f012b: Retirement? Then why still wear the armour? Especially with how hot it is here.
textByHashes.05842203679a9ccff6cda042f14e0f874b288a18: It's not a problem. What brings you here?
textByHashes.52f7ee38c13c1f421e3f10e7cc1fdedb2829c19e: I'll leave you in peace then.
textByHashes.66cc92a845cdbae397ac06db951dd8deea688a95: Oh yes. Got it all done with no problems at all.
textByHashes.fa7f0fc6ce844cc3ebc0edafc24cdf526b4c6b39: I don't have one of them.
textByHashes.1e8ba3e927824041d0a4c924409131689f6cee6b: What do I need that for?
textByHashes.9ade4510fedc163c6da9647f8e66da226720ebb1: Eughr! What are you going to do with it?
textByHashes.3395d5e4e5dd835595344764c585f585cde98f57: Why do I feel like you're being sarcastic?
textByHashes.d7b22f992e7c2297a2202dd3ea19ce49dd3b150a: Well you're no hero either. You blindly served Lord Iorwerth right to the very end. You're lucky the other elves pardoned you.
textByHashes.bee48f0320ed4a4fd5791fe3f448b357ada96a3a: You can make excuses, but Iestin served Lord Iorwerth and he switched sides.
textByHashes.2d54cf6f2fdeeff388ab08265e0d891d5590441c: Do you charge anything for the journey?
textByHashes.1e54bfb8440e0adf07a7bc9c724d3b7756e3a572: Hello. What you are doing here?
textByHashes.2bb99c923f49e406c64a625da0e5dc6701ba431c: Would you be able to guide me up and down the mountain?
textByHashes.5e1d46d62d36ed7193895d3532f33397728b83c4: No, I just wondered why you're wearing that outfit... Is it fancy dress?
textByHashes.07b0e57e9e8fdba0ae8160b7c06bae37670a2633: What brought the plague to Ardougne?
textByHashes.9ff40c8aecd9699bfd1acba28bc25beb9a02c09b: Does he know how bad the situation is now?
textByHashes.ed4784d113a637a78cceec4771e537ec41db1f15: What are the symptoms of the plague?
textByHashes.0ba82eef40420bbc8b86681b87ba35f131c42b4d: Where did this Arena come from?
textByHashes.771de2aef638a04ec855949b028a7acc1319b4f4: What would the Emir want to do with a bunch of fight pits?
textByHashes.c43dc0a364480e738797dc1c242bd8fbf2274f56: How do I get a fight?
textByHashes.c8bf2c65662f328bc5fcd3465b05f66c16892a70: What kind of fights are happening today?
textByHashes.9eb376083a435133521d631f0b4860b3a67f35b3: Do I get anything for doing this?
textByHashes.1db0798815aefa8367ba598e8d2ef404f37c84f9: Who do I get trading sticks from?
textByHashes.47819b1f4a93a0f66068b50e7491dadd41f3129c: Where can I get a machete from?
textByHashes.2eb102acd5d0a929818493b9fbd291300d6616a7: Where is the fence that needs to be repaired?
textByHashes.d7cdb78c8d654031eac2023f1dd29aaf02cfe4a1: Nah thanks, I'll give it a miss at the moment I think.
textByHashes.6d9cda6e6afc14ffe00f3431064b3371df5ada18: Don't you just want to sell it in a shop or trade it to someone specific?
textByHashes.ea1bb415800a596568c4dbd3f887771f450e672f: You pirates are nothing but trouble! Why, once I travelled to Lunar Isle with a bunch of your type, and spent days sailing around in circles!
textByHashes.fb1368f771c8cb128017f99137a95fb261a4fd09: Hmmm. Not so sure I remember him.
textByHashes.61afd1431729c5def8235278b025efab46692554: Tell me about the prices of runes.
textByHashes.0faa27dbb965918c52849f108601f97f774d480b: Combine the charges on my teleport jewellery, please.
textByHashes.47cd4316d551fe6adeca29de6e85fc98e66c75e0: I hear you deal in rings of forging?
textByHashes.08ca67bc2c8996c74bad66df4567d6bac3bade49: I got to go, erm, swab some decks! Yarr!
textByHashes.ebb6dc962ec59c98b762cbb702fdd9c2d51748c9: Your boat doesn't look too safe.
textByHashes.5066d204639efa12dc659a38964dd870dd6930c3: Oh, so I suppose you can't go out for a while?
textByHashes.19ac4daffca836f45e0d3f99d41833095e9eb2f1: You have got to be kidding me?
textByHashes.db254d94af414c5db043697605c49ac0862bec31: Actually, I think I'll leave it.
textByHashes.9b71c974c8bb729dbbb8d4a4bb46dd6aa989023f: How can you be here and on board the boat?!
textByHashes.9f8a723a26ca1b7a9d7ada423ccde54f68f82970: No thanks, I still feel ill from last time.
textByHashes.1c588abf23b1310c9c22925cf56e6a4879a32f37: We keep sinking! Can you give me some advice?
textByHashes.897d3ab527437d3f68db5127600a3c95be995ae7: I thought I'd heard it all!
textByHashes.1b8bb594b557f5c5a6813e299e54ed152aa923a9: Right so I need lots of swamp paste and plenty of rope, an axe and a hammer. Thanks Murphy!
textByHashes.d19663591cca57cea7e1fed053efd46b11462a5f: Ah yes, I think I've met him. I'll have to go and have another word with him about it.
textByHashes.eb0ede2f7fe2367f991ddbd8b9a822b665a26580: Interesting... I might have to sail over there and introduce myself.
textByHashes.dd0ed212b0d2eb0c05f0ff97a4c945b3fffd48dc: Yes, I do, why do you ask?
textByHashes.41ea202a10f09b2c5683f9151844c5908bb301f2: Right, I'll go put it in the bank.
textByHashes.cea0056e60c4cee08985684dc5e756d8caaaaf46: I still think I should get some cat-sized diving gear...
textByHashes.cebf3c782f1d66225bbcf8775b10b1b585753ec6: I've had enough, take me back.
textByHashes.66f221b0a16f6b66940f122b1d74030d6dc2859d: I insist Murphy, take me back.
textByHashes.cff9670aa59f1c7f8246eb1d4313319fd94fe837: Okay then Murphy, just keep us afloat.
textByHashes.cd94c81955e1b271b427e73d7cb7ee54a01a8a97: The professor said that I need to have a sextant. Do you know where I can get one?
textByHashes.b4c56f2ef7e7f3c262219f5b67168e998240cae9: Don't worry, Murphy. My name's and I'm using magic to contact you!
textByHashes.0ec87aadcaac07131b24cc9a87f2467ff9793a0c: I was just wondering if there is anyone down there helping you out on the trawler?
textByHashes.875c12ea945023c72049c7c0ada89545ac3872f7: Maybe I'll come have a look. I'll catch you later!
textByHashes.e23a79e45c6ff9ef3e745e9bb8b14c1a716c66cc: No thanks, I'll take a look around out here.
textByHashes.d7746f08fc92f14cdf007979b63780a0e103d227: Yes, how do I get in?
textByHashes.213f734fd1f48e95b9f000ad379be365771c4539: How is that? Do you know anything about this?
textByHashes.02b636f4c5f9a562c88a25bab8626da8eb611903: Companies have been forced out of the Consortium then?
textByHashes.75cd3f2f5ba99cb3b25dfbdd66a8fc35f4bf6815: How do you know my name?
textByHashes.28023d56770a5b8fe7d28d11afa1bf8e306e54b7: I'm not sure this one is going to return any time soon.
textByHashes.19d23db42b9b19f9a1d123c21989eefca61c8ada: Don't you get bored down here?
textByHashes.5373aae19cc50c55190b2522a7266f5abba04ccb: Seems I don't have enough coins...
textByHashes.91ca90d7406fd1bb9d93102ae2e0ff6c5398b353: Yeah, I'd love to do a mime show.
textByHashes.801fdeb2aae38a8d59db34d723fd216ec25837cd: Treasure? What treasure? And what do you mean by 'one like me'?
textByHashes.2e13c36d197d69c80bd4c8bd13e207aed078b924: Oh? I can't say I'm not interested. What do you propose?
textByHashes.657cc5866e80aea8024612808244a42bbcf6cdd6: Okay... So I presume you want me to get some of this treasure for you? How should I go about doing it?
textByHashes.549972083b7a2371a4fdfbaeee5198a18aa645c0: Do you have any information about what kind of traps I can expect?
textByHashes.6f7194d5bbfa87edbf4843dcd5a7643521cadf60: Sounds like the perfect challenge for me! Is there anything else I should know?
textByHashes.fcff8eb84d203ec5c3a69661df05efba652e11f9: Hang on a second... If the doors to the next floor close, then how will I escape?
textByHashes.312c5614065f64470ca12ef73b897278c92c5066: I see, but what if I'm in the middle of a floor and can't make it to an obelisk?
textByHashes.913eff998e2b2f6e1cd9494dd4793ffada7d5f8c: Thanks! I'll make sure to put them to good use.
textByHashes.c25242b4bd30e658eb6bfc4badeff6b89231b757: Thanks for the information. I'll keep an eye out for some of those Hallowed marks.
textByHashes.2b00f519fd9325103c80450f6532a6ca3465e747: You know, I helped out a very similar individual to yourself over at the Theatre of Blood. Any connection?
textByHashes.f99c2f24fc155de5531cade76ccbfcb1a169120c: How do I know that's something I even want?
textByHashes.997702175585c306c234adbc2c31cf275fed20a9: All right then, keep your secrets.
textByHashes.d858a8eab0e680e008e1fd4e6e45cc5f95704033: I'd like to trade in some Hallowed marks.
textByHashes.b684cce84d79d1ad45e131c0752f0559fec39024: I'd like to access your tool storage.
textByHashes.bc03438baa07932396108e86001283d3d0ad0143: Is there any way I could have private access to the Sepulchre? The other adventurers in there keep activating traps and messing up my timing.
textByHashes.d828d361752052250ed344db5cb819b31b46e18d: I don't have that many marks on me...
textByHashes.0267cceb8db6b7cf1b10fce99830fcce63d5fb78: Tell me more about this place.
textByHashes.7c585314a2c8cc59563ee246b8384f0cc6333979: Can I go back to looting with other people?
textByHashes.5a28031dc1d9c7c0603660d180511cd21be08007: Can I go back to looting on my own?
textByHashes.bb1016812700495153eda716567640f3874ac62d: Where are you going with this?
textByHashes.c67e23ce88bb2c1ea44c57d97a6446dcea052bc5: You want me to embarrass her? I guess that doesn't sound too bad.
textByHashes.bfd7eba955e47b7e1bb794973136f15818d7b988: Have you any advice to help me?
textByHashes.934606a5a20dd321d0ba1ed51b4c9e8ae00eb6a9: Can I have some of these crystals?
textByHashes.5835a2bc85297592a758f84726d546a77a95d539: Very well, I'll do my best.
textByHashes.5d3331b6dbd4462e2d156d0ae6fda784bfd95f20: Can I get those teleport crystals you mentioned?
textByHashes.c67467ca911d321877ece0602a6f3a395f83685e: What do you have for me?
textByHashes.20168ee4597cadf7030330c690bf1aa1d3bb87c4: Could you show me one of those memories again?
textByHashes.bfb413be80eee6ada41aacd5418cad4016de0b48: The memory of the Maiden of Sugadinti.
textByHashes.41549f9ff1780d7e02b6b300402dad63a3212fb6: The memory of the Pestilent Bloat.
textByHashes.5ff347c0e362052551717cdad7850a7d4b134b50: The memory of the Nylocas Vasilias.
textByHashes.094abccce5ea9393c2ae09a4a73370a6a63772df: The memory of the Nylocas Queen.
textByHashes.a4ef2c98f112a9671382e7e7deb4119f45e46e50: Where do you get your runes from?
textByHashes.9b47861e2333ab7640c451340bef10eaf1241eb7: Okay... But that's not the case anymore. With the kingdom open, they can just get their runes from the mainland.
textByHashes.a46779ec66e9435f32676e9cbed30420c7767dee: You can trust me. I won't tell anyone else.
textByHashes.46b7d4faa787bb499f45790c0060d49cf4c19604: Zanik showed me how to do it!
textByHashes.2afba7a0e9ec4fa36cf67dabd3911e2652609bc1: No, on the surface weapon-making is considered a noble profession.
textByHashes.801939dc46fd548e1fb48e1fc2b8b449bb85189d: That's a funny name you've got.
textByHashes.413b610a06df4779f45c63cd05eaf64c0c6f87c2: It seemed like a good idea at the time!
textByHashes.bb78bccbe043b513a06abab6e7c989f19b92e100: Do you have a quest for me?
textByHashes.bb47b575f72a5ff214e6a1339b292e6da6fcfe8f: A treasure hunt? That's exciting! Any tips to get me started?
textByHashes.b53094655a1ffff11bdee1b02b362909d27faf37: Oh... I guess I'll be on my way then.
textByHashes.4702a8330faa97c227d597297d92c9e46c9031c8: You're not a very nice man...
textByHashes.8026080f84e36c783fe17d0e9297d9d7d40b417f: Frank doesn't seem like a very fitting name for a bloodveld.
textByHashes.da1fa40d84a276defd8351d8a8eaa3e61edf198f: What were things like in Menaphos?
textByHashes.5528883c4db1e071a2d1df94ead0bf44ee48b411: So the guards wouldn't let you back?
textByHashes.5a3f404c3e9bc130f0a9d764995f0bc98c80ee17: I guess not everyone was as lucky?
textByHashes.91437bc403f5d388957e6a1d3f3e74d3a9018c51: I'm sorry you had go through all of that. Menaphos definitely took a hard stance on the plagues.
textByHashes.90b353dcd4d0f5d5648d0248a42ee0d71e1ac2e0: Hello. So what is it you do here?
textByHashes.8d625add597a333d38cf3c8809fb615ab31ff9bc: Nice. So then, I've got a few questions for you.
textByHashes.1f2398026d95a95bb5f9c019a365ba9ddb477d2b: I was hoping you could tell me about something.
textByHashes.17b51ff48592eb8b0394498e0f9c9b1847effa84: That's enough education for one day.
textByHashes.7e3b6a6b865a18c4550a4632a061c3643e126d11: Tell me about the sea slugs.
textByHashes.3b5f564cd87c48d73174f22bada9a8be7f4df302: Tell me about the Kalphite Queen.
textByHashes.72914180bd7740fcc1ef9ac3cb49b82975e7d73a: How do I get into the town?
textByHashes.1808a8b7df79b50f3e8f6294b3a5c2ab91dc3e24: Quiet, evil priest!! If you try anything I will command you again, but this time it will be throw yourself into the Endless Void for the rest of eternity.
textByHashes.5ee90be818762e5bb97a93afb93a2b9e8a438dae: What can you tell me about this place?
textByHashes.ab3058264b7ef21e4a3c058f0e09044cda5ff663: So what was here before Mistrock?
textByHashes.19d2d1230e6fcd2e0e096d071d118d2ff38aaf2f: So they were happy to give it up?
textByHashes.514665780e9b27580f9ba2216e1406f9b22cdab8: Does a winery have much need for metal?
textByHashes.7f7b3493beeacfc0e1eb54dd42a48bec17a5e5f4: How did you get back from Crandor?
textByHashes.fc4afe28f9efa25a8dd09cbf78c6677e6d727517: Can you take me back to Crandor again?
textByHashes.21fe17cd3467c7d8c9b9cc6b8aa6ff5a06673757: Yes, I would like some rope.
textByHashes.4fd9995ff432bc4776ebfe7d5606762c5722d331: I thought you needed hemp or jute.
textByHashes.cee02ae54ec4d5703019af51565a74beb3a2b686: Okay, please sell me some rope.
textByHashes.5cb1db37dad0df82e4a322437b44cfdeccd5d60b: Thanks. Hmmm, do you know something? This rope has a funny smell.
textByHashes.6be769b880e222fc0867432873d4d56b8184a928: Yes, It reminds me of...yaks. I was travelling in the Fremennik Isles recently and, do you know what? They made rope out of yak's hair.
textByHashes.37a22d710f7853616887e80736fc38c339532e15: There was a lady over there who sold wool, she said she traded rope for the wool.
textByHashes.9ab60a05608aff11a5056244215b4ba03ac0a131: I don't think you make rope at all. I think you trade balls of wool for rope.
textByHashes.575792a8047c0c0ac2dbaf294a38274f5022cb28: Yes, well, the wool is still pretty good, though yak hair makes fine rope. I don't suppose any harm will come of it.
textByHashes.25c785e8a018eb0ce1b27bf3cfb16e1740b92a5c: Well, it's always good to keep on the good side of a sailor. Your secret is safe with me.
textByHashes.70398d92eab69bcbeb58c5f37e36196997f29958: I have some balls of wool. Could you make me some rope?
textByHashes.96f05fba84b35e9f47e35f659ad02891be5cab3c: That's a little more than I want to pay.
textByHashes.a7f214bd11905148addaad1924fa0f25295e4678: I will go and get some wool.
textByHashes.d50d02731e8d315fc4ca7782fe112d7f681f47b1: No thanks Ned, I don't need any.
textByHashes.3a15ea4de3a37b63088e9bffb039060f31ed474a: Wouldn't your master have to take you?
textByHashes.6f0a8a3e701f9a850fe0b8fa1cb459b9286f81f0: How do I know you're not ill as well?
textByHashes.bdaa0beab1bfde99fb425fb0aa71a09f12633318: I don't really have space for a camel, sorry.
textByHashes.0ac985dd7f01260c62a9e3c66becb4d726dd8c2d: Well, my name is and I'm pleased to meet you. So, now that I'm not a stranger anymore, what's your name?
textByHashes.bdbd97dbee41f365ffe0ea4fa01d0150a72790c7: How come you're the only cat around here?
textByHashes.584b06cb6c4d5b534052e102e8296c53c5135ef8: Oh, I see. Romance is in the air, is it?
textByHashes.fc5eb15dff9b92a326eaf53135a93b584c8c505a: I see you're a cat of taste then.
textByHashes.7a9dd6b92b87c6bee5f2e2f4b8a0e02e64e24db0: What do you do with the frogs and locusts?
textByHashes.2722131edb136943009bf822a6ca2204d52e8978: Well, seeing as you're hunting them, I thought you'd eat them too.
textByHashes.144a90ed8995948426f36b98a1c73d11201ab18f: What isn't? You destroy and take away life. What good is there in that?
textByHashes.8314189066f62db1b2842c89c4bdbaa6929122d7: How do you compare killing frogs to a volcano? A volcano has no choice about whether it explodes or not, but you do have a choice.
textByHashes.8b8d16bd93bbdb8d6542d84530bb14f5b9a5872a: Don't they sometimes call the Devourer the goddess of destruction? You seem to have a lot in common with a goddess that your kind oppose.
textByHashes.2debf8e6872a4ed5e86bd533d2ff1cfaa29648a8: You mean you weren't always a cat?
textByHashes.5ec16d4b149701f676f582b81a54985330e2ad54: So you stopped serving her because of that change?
textByHashes.f03928bb5254149c13450e12cd574f0d1c301868: What curse did you cast upon her?
textByHashes.8d365639972c9030c798d06467ea55bf0919f8cb: So that's why she's scared of cats?
textByHashes.9baaed53341b0377fa3599d3207fee315a299ce7: Do you talk to the Sphinx much?
textByHashes.9c4ce36aec244d46306434c6af63766a8abafbf1: So you don't like her then?
textByHashes.7bb72659bc3bb846d982a7fcbb2d6ab64053fc10: That doesn't seem like much of a life.
textByHashes.5ede73e3cff43b217009466c115b8421b4c32ca1: Tell me about you and the Devourer.
textByHashes.fde57216f1223b2eecc87e9522309c092bb0cd44: So, why aren't you out there with him?
textByHashes.b33a40fafac46cf60990060997f624675d0621db: So, you and Bob haven't had an argument?
textByHashes.9f1595a57a31e8ab58f4fadba8f57a273ca8cb84: So kind of like a priest?
textByHashes.bed1b20690cc377ee181e8211ccb3f92ac490d7e: In that case, I'll leave you to it.
textByHashes.74db6c40c9f1626d64178a7165e851361f14177d: Okay... what is the purpose of said shrine?
textByHashes.7d679028849ae5a5ecbca72bb471b89c85689f6a: You know, you're making me worried, are you okay?
textByHashes.ee8422e7ac1a1025571d5cee3dc5b224eb956ded: I'm going to leave you alone now.
textByHashes.94c23d07b8ab445f38bec4faee6a3e91d6db9584: How do I deep sea trawl?
textByHashes.18170196d2012ce44faa7e7e03d22eb7fe7ad958: So that's when I need to lower my net?
textByHashes.8ab5acada3887cdec8683dd09b4d7b6533dbe3d2: Okay, so I get a good trawling net, find a shoal, wait for it to stop, and then lower the net to the same depth as the shoal. What else?
textByHashes.fd08947c86f91f63fd80ac8201bc89a0ae6863b5: And I'm guessing the fish in some types of shoals are only going to be interested in higher quality offcuts?
textByHashes.7851e147e8c05ef019b6634b2cfcec3b672ab2cd: So these offcuts... Do I just throw them into the water?
textByHashes.af11fcde316c97ae25c9b84f18c55ca74d3ef82f: I see. This is all very different to normal fishing.
textByHashes.789cedc221e17676d07601a15b438e669a919ee3: Where can I deep sea trawl?
textByHashes.59bff702d1f308a55025029f31c632b2e2f2e5ac: What kind of fish can I catch while trawling?
textByHashes.e93d252b171a5051b75a84f2dd89f4d7c25f1dcb: Do you have any other advice for me?
textByHashes.aa08ec39329f0d0502a16e1979f8c3866f73216b: That's awful! If I were you, I wouldn't let my dreams stay as dreams. You should go to Port Piscarilius and be the fisherman you always wanted to be!
textByHashes.e2d942fe7ebbc4ca16a304efa8248fe145332816: Besides, otherwise you're probably going to be waiting an awfully long time for that drill sergeant to be done...
textByHashes.059863b798de81541d104b4bc2b62dc0b62ae5aa: I'm going to have to tell the sergeant about this.
textByHashes.92ed8fe8350b4c3014238d92d094a6eff0f4804c: All the other soldiers are out there doing their best to train so that they're ready to protect and serve all of Great Kourend! Yet here you are, just wandering around.
textByHashes.baf3c84b9ad4e8f6b8e493b63c8c107a93d0a8e1: Ha! I was just kidding. You can keep your money and I'll keep your secret to myself. See you around.
textByHashes.c20908cbd99c8949603c2f87de99a65673d8c428: Can I take a look at your stocks?
textByHashes.06f02b1a6d2d82f44db029c6ab785a380218a213: Do you make any custom orders?
textByHashes.59dc3921997b9c47d350d27fb966792b80bcc877: Could you make something for me?
textByHashes.14a4a907ee21b2f11bc0d18fe9c4051db5e6f2fb: Thanks. I'll let you get back to work.
textByHashes.68869138d2f56091f8bba7b68956f3b9f5abe087: Could you grant me access to Deadman: Annihilation?
textByHashes.c4308b33b3c294fd433ce5c53cdd80ae7df5ac12: I have a question about Deadman mode.
textByHashes.be9f2d8b46a01a2b5bdf895047b8ca73cb95a30a: How do I play Deadman mode?
textByHashes.650c22f42f71f31c204561cd56aa239b428329af: So I don't need a new account to play Deadman mode?
textByHashes.566cb483974755e74b30bccae4ad3d2208013646: Do my stats and items transfer over to Deadman mode?
textByHashes.d250598ac160ec65670e853547138eae768ac452: What happens when I die in Deadman mode?
textByHashes.94b1e2bfa4decc6fff01c2746af895d5cf549c4f: What happens when I kill a player in Deadman mode?
textByHashes.c2727856d2fa072babe9c9a46237a3b515c9e3e5: How can I protect my items in Deadman mode?
textByHashes.9caa108e1554d23141ce38abf7bb6f9d3fcf6999: How can I protect my stats in Deadman mode?
textByHashes.692217e9be6e2d0bc54474c25fdc3a504bdcbd1e: What are safe zones in Deadman mode?
textByHashes.a27b1fa5765b52bf98b0767a89ddcf90310cd98b: Can I purchase some Deadman rewards?
textByHashes.585b111f8ecc1b9f4d53898c17cd24fed6db698b: Do you have any spare blueprints to recolour my exit portal in my player-owned house?
textByHashes.c1881a4b1f0559ffd2bc5267320acddf5656df98: Well strange are the ways of ancient beings such as them.
textByHashes.2af151f336bd55020f3056a38f6c412546991b07: You seem to like playing with danger, there.
textByHashes.1585e3a25be41c89c9986216a3b861d15c50cab3: Well, correct me if I'm wrong, but you seem to have all your fingers.
textByHashes.79b5959f06c6301d7ee7ea68d2aeb0c3ce39d0a3: That's not possible, how could you move them?
textByHashes.9c7a372109c707929d223ee6e259bade08d5104d: Yes, well I think I'd better be going now.
textByHashes.b9d7ad324fc9c4c71b4ae6e9fb4da1af7d549ec6: Excuse me, what is this place?
textByHashes.31a534d21877d921bd1829e3f3882bb327203b21: Really? Are souls easy to crush?
textByHashes.89a5544d5adfc29ca93d142db09a788a52f73797: I see. So how does it all work?
textByHashes.cb5e2496679c8ee29bd9603e72915f197f29b080: Can you tell me more about Soul Wars?
textByHashes.ce551e81012cb31d73abd51e2c19699e62a07555: Could you give me the demonstration again?
textByHashes.bcf59bd667a2ae5c3bfbaba90ac4e7194a375bf7: What kinds of rewards are there?
textByHashes.e77eb378127b8fdd7c9062085bda77861e0791cc: Not bad. But I was wondering if they could be improved any further?
textByHashes.8254cb0d0d71d6c8cdfbce0286a66a923d09efc6: No, not like that! You see, I helped create a device which returns my ammunition.
textByHashes.e5c50a1131606183f71fbc56135af0d146e2ee0b: I don't want to talk to you.
textByHashes.fc2506db129658b3c75d147f565b349edc2a87e3: So, what's this place all about?
textByHashes.9e0719078f6ff3a5355ad42934aa0f2f768fa50e: Are you crazy? Have you seen the size of it?
textByHashes.7d92bfe44b4186f229af96d7bf51b1d81253a8ac: But how am I supposed to take on one of those?
textByHashes.247ca5208cf1841c947be41d8e2dd21251fd2798: What am I going to do with souls?
textByHashes.fa2ec4af06c56ba5d98a7fc24745a5bdb6648084: So, where do I get these souls from?
textByHashes.093795cb62035deadec72473e8adcfee779284d2: You want me to kill him?
textByHashes.089e4f315265a3a2f41f7194ee9e9c72c1326ee8: I thought he was dead? Didn't we kill him earlier?
textByHashes.6570432fdfae9a190ef580395a7f1a5f9338f819: So, once I've charged the Obelisk, can I just kick back and wait for the end of the game?
textByHashes.1d74b10b7dc4f6eabd1bd00215b16172028668f0: Oh well. Say, do you think the enemy avatar minds us weakening it like this?
textByHashes.992fa449ef165c761875de1bded33b0caf242fa9: Is that the enemy avatar over there?
textByHashes.46739d603bd02981cd3c410cc8d7285931984ac2: What? You're the one that told me to weaken it!
textByHashes.6f7f386e4cf786481fed773979bc53519bc72829: Did you turn me into a ghost?
textByHashes.4cc1fe1aa4d4973bc6cadfadf3a2cfcb451a0b90: Are there any other painful things to learn about this place?
textByHashes.eed765e2d7810249a389dbff67b51166f1f561ca: That's all well and good, but what do I get out of all of this?
textByHashes.c7edef45d066d3a8209fffd5c35eafd75f4fa63c: I was wondering if you could maybe make your capes do something similar to what this does?
textByHashes.15e4f2e3b9bf011993a5d6a4559a09004e79fad5: That's right. I was wondering if you could maybe upgrade your capes again?
textByHashes.60d3f09ac21b1bb903c8b2fc3e78770a2cff76ec: Daeyalt essence? Is that connected to daeyalt ore?
textByHashes.c47cad30f9c0dfd755bb5e9e2e52e5de19ccb4dd: I see. What is the daeyalt used for?
textByHashes.6c8ae087c0f04656e0af0a6b48478bc5d6cdd5a6: I see. I'll bear that in mind.
textByHashes.58d11ecdc92d8c270c55262d5c95c4849eea0df4: Could you convert some shards for me?
textByHashes.00f54b5be3653323feac0e800d66912c3bbf00f7: And I'm allowed to mine it?
textByHashes.e65c0ec26dcef26324695eac939a82587a9323cf: I didn't see any THING out there, just a couple of guards. What did it look like?
textByHashes.06ce9528e13a61d2a617ac7b8d10ed6e5e4304e7: Um... would you care to be more specific?
textByHashes.12876bc3016e5fedbabfab1a23770cfaa413ac8d: You only saw this THING in the dark?
textByHashes.9c3b108837f92ff35350a7444f891f5e6d9abe8d: There's no THING outside. Just come out and get some fresh air before you go funny in the head.
textByHashes.0087496883fa65c78d91dd15b40aaf75b3a3fb0b: I think you might just have dreamed about the THING.
textByHashes.5e418ab16efb0f70c5d4a6d9c209635a84712b9c: I'm not trying to trick you!
textByHashes.3b01c75a71ceb0acfa13ca0bbb2ebe17a149a625: How can you afford to give such good deals?
textByHashes.cacbbb9ade21fb436033f1863b32178290b6aa14: I was hoping you might sell me a cannon.
textByHashes.ce9ec12b2bb461bfed061bc439f61582401ee656: Okay, I'll take a cannon please.
textByHashes.5aa08f9879295fc620969702c3dde5cb5121becc: Oops, I don't have enough money.
textByHashes.b3ce408ae9307a650544910285265e8942bdfd24: Can I look at the separate parts please?
textByHashes.778e0a548b3ef261fa2c995a135738d694415463: Sorry, that's too much for me.
textByHashes.c149e6d8da1c0c4a45aa021b6e0698d7ceeb5f62: Have you any ammo or instructions to sell?
textByHashes.b2883f114e21261cbda0fb993968e4c18570bb3c: Well, take care of yourself then.
textByHashes.27472006537724e8696baecc131ae3ef2b2aec33: I want to know more about the cannon.
textByHashes.99c6cf70950a023d70043707461f900c0879d99b: Nung, I have your mudskipper hides.
textByHashes.23953c70a2836e717e5e1fed0c91caa9b043b5c5: Are your pickaxes better than other pickaxes, then?
textByHashes.065caee78772920e40832b978d39ba2eebde8e03: Hi Nurmof, I found this earlier...
textByHashes.69563571446f8beb85c552116b1e20cf3f00a016: Can you fix it for me? I was told you're the dwarf to see!
textByHashes.c054fd84f0726dc8003d574fe74e4c8af9568c00: Why were there so many broken pickaxes back then?
textByHashes.f2bae02d83a72aa8802424d73e824d4d5be4cc98: Will you still be able to fix mine for me?
textByHashes.098f4ae2d1439fe8e649b59513bcdba8c02a9851: Thank you very much. I'll take good care of it.
textByHashes.4c6276e7b76e22ee54a72c17e061ac2372cf29cf: Oh, I actually don't have enough coins on me! I'll come back with more.
textByHashes.0d53fa0d17bdedfb68ffc166285f008cc3640791: Sure, what do you need me to do?
textByHashes.2fb4a498ffeb302bd29219a12ce6d1904d3df861: Thank you, I will get right to it.
textByHashes.57b8d5639ea7249ae545180f961ec6cbdefaac79: No, I'm sorry but I've got better things to be doing.
textByHashes.4ae6005d69f047626a8eb690eb3b2bfbe8f55287: Okay... I never mentioned werewolves though...
textByHashes.7c0048d284ad2e353caac73aae9292092c6c3b10: Well, I suppose it's not much of a bustling port. Still, I hope you find a crew soon.
textByHashes.5022e981028b017f092c33f9b0e58f389fcf8593: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. I don't think I'm ready for that kind of thing yet though.
textByHashes.3b7ec8bf5d971ff83949eba9aed70a1c3f97f9d3: Maybe you'd like to join my crew?
textByHashes.e1560fc5e0a1f7c30c4cf2d7649a5f43cddef06d: Well, I hope you find a new crew soon.
textByHashes.75555ab03677c6021dfd15e0722a122391166e7b: Hey there. How are you doing?
textByHashes.dc8d0a78a9a86002b81024cf075831e4ceacf3ae: You sure you're not feeling any stronger than that?
textByHashes.86f2761b582c116649108dc2efbc8ca1f67714d3: So what's this oath that you're all so proud of breaking?
textByHashes.2751f93981635deb835345fca15c3fe4aab5a151: What caused your faith in Saradomin to wane?
textByHashes.644e4715c9e90f9f8cf618c36fa71685f3cc3a48: I have. I suspect you're quite bothered about the sudden influx of visitors?
textByHashes.485bb0e40772e4feddfad345387934af15149ac6: Okay... Does this creature have treasure? That's kind of a sticking point for me.
textByHashes.469d24ebde5fdad8df6de0643a4d8ffb6350b0c8: Oh yes, the iron price. My specialty.
textByHashes.f77f0c1bc973fcb13460db2e1d89b6fe1acafc7a: Your friends are a quiet bunch.
textByHashes.e8e945d5223f8f40192c25221b6cae1880222a21: No disagreements, that must be nice.
textByHashes.508a68f21e145a8ee570b47134eb210d2faad6a9: I was wondering what you do here.
textByHashes.2afa02e25349834173eb3248a716dfb9fe4f768d: I see. And how do people find them?
textByHashes.786f9df49bbb0b493e700af3bb7c2049faa30f9f: Awesome. I might just give it a go.
textByHashes.2c319a177e87d4171c6ced53227601f4b061881a: Oh yes. I've seen one of those before.
textByHashes.8cf3e45f7edce9fe1ff1aeed8f130be8a7d78309: Can I have a look through that telescope?
textByHashes.452d6f9cb496bcbc9475b7ad000abc1111510696: Wait a minute, what's your real name?
textByHashes.d188b2fe06d5df76e98f59e787b1629a1de74221: I only know you as the professor's assistant. What's your actual name?
textByHashes.4fc51608fe21e9e74df716fb1990cc25cd1c5ddb: Oh, sorry, I can't carry anything else.
textByHashes.61e5357eb0a02f2bd6cd49e488d61649221b3aa2: That was good stuff, ! Wheresh the professher?
textByHashes.fdfe93db87b5bc4c156159484400ce55043ce3e8: That was good stuff! Where's the professor?
textByHashes.eb60cd955a737daccebb23b1b375a6b45b3cf291: What do you think of this?
textByHashes.247efe464bd7dc9e6150e81148ad877dfa4c4951: Can you teach me to solve treasure trail clues?
textByHashes.2d57e4d8fa9728b83ff5a6ff800e1c1eddb111b6: Riiight. So where do I get those items from?
textByHashes.22eeda9eeea394d8f70b7282e256ff351feccb86: Is it true your name is Mambo-duna-roona?
textByHashes.c3b09836db1e05c152c5a32d7d4844ea746c6d0b: I can see a constellation through the telescope. It looks like Scorpio.
textByHashes.d33af064b5f963f4302abf2fadcb98d7ef9db603: What do you think of this!
textByHashes.55a6b81663e435c026b41b1ac8ff256ae856de04: Hello. Do you need any help?
textByHashes.d428e32e95d6a8a72c26903d6bb24c7f8555a0d7: I can't stick around all day, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.31fb395bd40224d5bfa728314ea28cb61e8730ed: Can I have a replacement helm? I managed to lose the last one.
textByHashes.6af90e452faa5c7ddafb4564a9fe9126f1f0f4c3: Can I have a replacement bonesack? I managed to lose the last one.
textByHashes.455bf49c1386713b4ba7d10218dadb9603dc56eb: Can I exchange this helm for the bonesack?
textByHashes.fb5b66f8c47d206cc2b44a8027e51a68dc628a77: Could I have a bonesack as well?
textByHashes.952941adb79e06456bc6735222f12170815cba2b: Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?
textByHashes.137734ced08bbdbb5db232ad44175f70391ce208: Can I exchange this bonesack for the helm?
textByHashes.32f6255fddb7e8fab5cd9b12d75be8e719bd5706: Could I have a helm as well?
textByHashes.8ac56853c0a2b4f9607a882619840cc49a6d896b: I found this amulet. Do you know what it is?
textByHashes.6990fee374034e02e46a47f5c75b856526ca8e21: For free? I've helped the museum enough, do you have anything I could exchange it for?
textByHashes.3e2b085928d8dbe5c0253ea94c094a0af75806f8: No thank you. maybe another time.
textByHashes.b4c984fee860d5a1a73e0fe7a72cbbc2fb65c24b: Can I go looking for the odd stone?
textByHashes.37c97bf9b1a82ad6de6a9d7875102b7331b10fa6: You should buy some new clothes. You can't go around town wearing what you're wearing.
textByHashes.56cf2501e42abe2745aaed13ed78d35d732b61d7: You should get yourself a big mighty warhammer.
textByHashes.73ab7ac0653f3a2937f86a21a7a27691ad98efa5: You don't like the Red Axe?
textByHashes.b6ac6daf0af438ef423453f6f0272be6b16e9f94: But I thought they left the city?
textByHashes.e4a3c8f0dabe39551172b23f8af60aa1df2eacda: Get yourself a long piece of rope.
textByHashes.c8f278cba1c5aa4f87f284751e5c250e1bb0ab93: I don't know. I generally find a rope useful while adventuring.
textByHashes.8f16742b7439641113597064426b0ba9f3a77019: An oversized hat. In a ridiculous colour.
textByHashes.8b791bad4180796f9e01dacf2964ded2763e521d: Nothing. You should buy absolutely nothing.
textByHashes.05dc6c63081e5e682ea48b430445b5e95e0fa5e5: I thought so! Now why don't you give me some of the money I saved you?
textByHashes.ce010bbd8ad66b50a866e5776dcb7a0370bccda9: So I can access my bank account simply by talking to you?
textByHashes.2fbd2ee5aff54baf5beb4f7874b33242ba317ad7: I don't have the money. Can I get it from my bank?
textByHashes.23c393f6cc71b3f53fdd77e2a59c50677a63097c: That's preposterous! I'm not paying to withdraw my own money!
textByHashes.3f5ec994be4f392639b5b37793f4304fee0b2ac6: Here's 100 coins. Let me access my account now.
textByHashes.580e3282fa35919d395a2bb8c92010681a9e506a: Here's 100 coins. Let me collect my items now.
textByHashes.0e4848915a43ac6dcfba6bed7382ac05568656c0: Don't worry, I know how to take care of myself.
textByHashes.156e4448edec764f74aa987c838abed18c6743b2: What are these coffins doing here?
textByHashes.30c8cf15751360aacc0bf23d936f74e9bb93fd70: I am a friend to ogres.
textByHashes.e84ceedf25f006cef318d4031ea8c7ad85135917: Can I see what you are selling?
textByHashes.05b9b21d220d015ee2da4b32363724fdc18ed4f5: Where does the blood come from?
textByHashes.95011d46180f538629f95c615532d17f76a76ffb: I'll leave you to enjoy the view.
textByHashes.1c37042917f26f3621ff00353b96ec5add3902f4: Hello there. So you're a bard?
textByHashes.5d42506c3c0324ebe4162088d206ab10a45b9068: I believe you are the person to talk to if I want to get a Music Cape?
textByHashes.ea97edb3739646300a7d2ea3dfe4c7c7af7dc7e7: I don't have that much at the moment.
textByHashes.53105f98fee41c3729d31010b09d4ebb8d598102: Do you know any great stories about Basilisk Jaws?
textByHashes.b3826db714ab610ddafdea23d9cd5ea0f1ee81a6: I see. I have a nice helmet that Neitiznot's Burgher gave to me. I bet it would work well with that.
textByHashes.e2441571f4943e3705dce0634a9ca0312ad0c447: Err... I think I'll pass. Thanks for the help though.
textByHashes.cc05fe6e80d2289ffe31854a3283a910288280ac: I was wondering... Can I learn to play my lyre again?
textByHashes.febe7aea54e88ab9b5cd1b2c6f12399daffa5d9b: I don't want it, I have something better.
textByHashes.2f277c79b9fbae6fbaf74655b8d3ec7fa30f7bea: No. I don't have five dragonstones.
textByHashes.3e7772aa2566b85ce26c7a13ce8e7b81852c3a08: Yes. I have five dragonstones, tell you what, I'll trade you them for that coin you found.
textByHashes.e7302feb59102e8ec1a9fe7579e1c747769171aa: I am standing right here, you know? You really are crazy. Yes, I'll give you five! Do we have a deal or not?
textByHashes.9b19702af469a43893615c8d900263ce3c5cd44a: Since it's valuable, I think I'll just just kill you for it.
textByHashes.186b37d5ba9ad061cf3ad1dba752d9aa8853b968: Hello there, just dropping in to thank you again. It all went perfectly. Alice and her husband can communicate again.
textByHashes.cf4b87a303508acd8e082239fac559db9523e3e2: Please don't tell me you were attacked by the wind.
textByHashes.dcb8714a16ed609ee40b39e2773b64206a80713c: Well, you seem to have got away in one piece!
textByHashes.a1697616ce37b5a1b30682e8cc09a53fad4ac175: Sorry... You didn't leave anything behind did you? I'm a brave adventurer! I'm sure I can pry whatever it is from their malicious mitts.
textByHashes.092b099e04c8418ad54e2f5ebe6bbcc9723336ae: Sorry to hear you've had some bad luck of late, did you lose much?
textByHashes.efd3cf3b9f285c1f1fd6d93ac885460f5ae2d75e: That's alright, I need no help.
textByHashes.8331616b69a42cf6c6db7b6bf5a3b55d6c154321: Are you the tinker this entry mentions?
textByHashes.86ee487353e4557ded86653962ee136b904499ee: Was it me what? I just found this journal... I didn't write it.
textByHashes.66dcc5969fc199a3887544d648dcb099916ae0f6: Well, it's all in the past now. I don't think there's any reason to worry about it.
textByHashes.2dddbcde9f8b88577063e67c6901c665a3d34ea3: Well if I find out anything useful, I'll come let you know, alright?
textByHashes.6c2a4cb784e7ad84b58e29b62405e1352ae90808: No, I didn't mean for you to keep it.
textByHashes.7242e4362a75e77a0cea5b8a2ada98ed8065a2e4: Well, you've helped me before! You said something about symbols? To find the Myreque!
textByHashes.4777db8715cacf8c356ebddd5f8a7b2317bed50d: Oh, and where would that be then?
textByHashes.5068d65f9c934039328e139d3a6b8eee7f0d02e3: But they live right under your house?
textByHashes.432b11f5c90edc814040fd80890b416c7ad8cb1d: Well, you've helped me before! You helped me find the Myreque!
textByHashes.86226aa87070e3689f423061c97aa19d73f7eb9e: That's good to hear. Goodbye now.
textByHashes.ea37bec81405e31b4b49e61bde1759b7ec60b398: Tell me about more things I can do with Construction.
textByHashes.da14aba4dfab6a0e2e93b919da647af11530bcb1: What are you doing on this shipwreck?
textByHashes.afd3be65f62ec1a0452f21684293c2d431a1b67a: Don't be silly - half the ship's missing!
textByHashes.a36d815c4d5395909dcf2d376c98383b676d0ee3: You mean this skeleton sitting here in this chair?
textByHashes.64e2fc1cc087f9c63ab2abddc98a1ce87f72b641: I'll have to go and get some then.
textByHashes.8ded78c59d4ba07342e80ae6b7390cdaa97aa12f: I have the right materials here!
textByHashes.6063a9766af484c10e9d34d35c20c852d7cce9e9: I have law runes and pieces of molten glass here!
textByHashes.11a82a9c871c84f89c0fd25ba07383c5ae390116: Where do I get rarer seeds from?
textByHashes.417ce5e98c479bca312ebe47790b1ba226fab021: Sounds like his fear of combat really is a problem of the past!
textByHashes.4f42aa804783f5ff5eb73963bd243270f0a325c7: Could you sell me some dragon javelins?
textByHashes.27d5638c78a0b33969e0d3fad50c89217d1bedfc: Have you any ore for me?
textByHashes.4494313c5854d2aae3c3553f181e0ef5b0f44f7f: How do I mine in this place?
textByHashes.80acedf45ad78e41f05c7509f7914aa49508f22f: Can you impart your wise knowledge to me, O Oracle?
textByHashes.62620c9f6bc8a59925035b6aaba5f8091c87c3c4: I've got a message for you from the Wise Old Man who lives in Draynor Village.
textByHashes.68404500d9c8e3253e6834a3669058138f64474e: You look a bit shady, if I do say so myself.
textByHashes.e8f87b59875470e0c52d114b6832e26d849e85dd: Right... Well I'm . What is it you do around here?
textByHashes.09c858e0fb521ab898652a1b0af171a44327e9d0: Do you know what these keys are for?
textByHashes.27ef785be7dd226517885150cdadc0e4689fcdd8: Oh, so I can just waltz right in?
textByHashes.b521cf85f2802570d8b5160e8e446ff1083e6f9c: Can you tell me more about these rich folk?
textByHashes.4bbf970a0db686092cf82fd7aac6c793f9fd80f7: Are you serious? It's that easy?
textByHashes.2158cd05d67982640513dd08cc0e9311d4d64afa: So how do you steal them?
textByHashes.0b68ac60d143dcaf097fbde8bef9a26145d24724: So... steal keys, use keys on the houses that are ready to be robbed, make buckets of cash and don't be caught?
textByHashes.6ec37d700a67e692bf243d8fc40574ce91bf3228: Surely it's not so easy though?
textByHashes.3b8b9a237b91037da0aafe5867062c7a1fa942b5: Sounds like you might have some tips?
textByHashes.191cb156621fcf6d01c76e8031295c4b9fbdd38e: They do it just out of the goodness of their heart?
textByHashes.3c420089162c8eab95516bb5bff5ebf7c65fd34c: Seen them? Not sure I have.
textByHashes.e8e4af5cac76416beccf3600ecdf09a11337c2a6: Can they help me in anyway?
textByHashes.247a85d9fffb9be04514b04e06cad85d6bf22ab0: I'm sure there are better places for you and your crew to find refuge outside of the city. Even outside of Varlamore.
textByHashes.91cd1813ce624d49f2b253397f4bfb809275cd1f: So you really want to make a difference?
textByHashes.ca083b8c1b8d3fe7b20897cf7dcb3886b6db59b5: I have actually! I've found these valuables from some of the houses.
textByHashes.e8911058e9c75d51f8bd5588134e7386b872db3d: One measly coin? That hardly seems worth it.
textByHashes.ddf53dab83e4082bc780be53a6efcc90c9aad434: I suppose that's better than nothing.
textByHashes.7ea72398cffe206c5299a94916eaafd2bf848fbb: Uh, you guys aren't fairies - what are you doing here?
textByHashes.1c10f2975854132ada732591f9d43bacc916e30d: Good day. Are you alright? You look a little lost.
textByHashes.c61d50b0e56ca5a94c38703ec1da59c28df7a696: I haven't had the chance to take a look yet.
textByHashes.69ac93dbbc8c2d1e18b1d389db05f329b50d6ce2: I'm getting there. I still have a few left to do.
textByHashes.ea11278638ab695ec3b7cb4e3403f21de356e548: Righty ho! I'll get back and finish the rest.
textByHashes.8c413b4d8decdb3785df88dc68f5222ca798a488: All done. I've corrected the mistakes.
textByHashes.620c5073d8c4923bb4b9d2076f5372d9603e8e75: Hello! You're not one of the hunters too, are you?
textByHashes.8238deb2378e7a984501197752562f6f1d12b37d: I'd imagine this is the place to be for materials too. These hunters seem to find everything!
textByHashes.dcb79990dfceb6be74b6ec482fb25192b34dcc8b: I have some sq'irk juice for you.
textByHashes.bdba6b8cdce85ee8157410af3fa7a0f17500fa92: I will. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.
textByHashes.95067233389fa08134e4f0d357d1dd13b01ee729: I'd like to talk about sq'irks.
textByHashes.700664f8df9aab5f3fca28d8bd99c0ca3a51c6d3: Where am I meant to find sq'irks?
textByHashes.3e65f3b7108df5b1f9519db0a7a6a82f9ed8fca4: So all I have to do is ask her for some fruit for you?
textByHashes.210b06217f1a0b9285ff2d45bf52a5c93d43c7a5: Oh come on, it should be easy enough to find.
textByHashes.915b0724bfc3386a8db46c6b1cfcbe0d93b7c393: This should be an interesting task. How many sq'irks do you want?
textByHashes.f190af287180e12f312a4ee520d3a6bd7a848bd8: Why can't you get the sq'irks yourself?
textByHashes.3eda4b3e50c3d53fb2ffd2d943623d6749b41da8: How should I squeeze the fruit?
textByHashes.8faf737997f153d11c5d959cca232f3724202d5e: Is there a reward for getting these sq'irks?
textByHashes.24e0104761465bb24e1f5b84faa15b94d1019aac: How much training will you give?
textByHashes.da2c05442044c2ae15f882bd3ba7092dad9f2bf9: What's so good about sq'irk juice then?
textByHashes.72017b39a0bd0f7fe15c5b8bf6d626c84a053409: It wouldn't have addictive properties, would it?
textByHashes.37c061ee87816added83d39ac2315fa1fa2e3ed6: You don't seem very tough. Who are you?
textByHashes.184bcb43c7f1eb4b9b94addf88cbc54ad627eabe: Do you have any more of those daggers?
textByHashes.ff7112f78b4ffc4f579b8e961940e9437377246f: Actually, I don't seem to have enough money on me.
textByHashes.28cf128c2ac24997da9117f1a4230ef39a4bd774: Actually, I don't seem to have enough room to carry it.
textByHashes.5c8465470b805184f465980d043cd8c80bb3b1f6: What are your plans for Menaphos now?
textByHashes.b34d99e47a587e7a86ea6e5687193319a25bc8bb: I'm not allowed to know, am I?
textByHashes.88e46a24aafcc8b7a772566bdf9a8ed1c6654b93: I'd like to recolour my graceful clothing.
textByHashes.a113560cbdcc97646b90034d89dc8482fa1d6247: Actually, I just wanted to buy some clothes.
textByHashes.8a10a93e3dd1e4d3cb9ca8ead388ea48f6ff1e38: I want the colours you're wearing.
textByHashes.9e706fc30de96a7ceabcbe8c4ee4d3e38341ce39: I'd like to remove the colours.
textByHashes.bc996d4cfd7ce5fbde3925cbfdd912a5d592264c: I'd like to represent a different city.
textByHashes.ba868bff7510b788f7d3b53361668f5615e53777: Could you show me what you have for sale?
textByHashes.f7cb9e2af488b8880f6db9529b6614ae4b0a553b: No thank you, I don't need food just now.
textByHashes.45a6140fe628d0313e5f9cdb38c6cd6bfc812dae: I'd like to order a drink, please.
textByHashes.377eed8e3bab1147c32c3aa0903f7a24854a54f8: Isn't it the only pub in the city?
textByHashes.a81f5619650d9b5bd8e6d3f26e69c3fb12542a3b: Actually, I think I need to be going.
textByHashes.22b6cc7e265a04f08940a1b797708f845bef0d93: Do you have anything for me?
textByHashes.1ef66124f046d88d87afccf4eecec82e259abcac: What kind of information are you thinking of?
textByHashes.626fdbbe5aaa4cf61021e53ea629721813fe754c: Can you help me with hastae?
textByHashes.9b7f5ffbebebdba8b0fe0c8886668b578aa6ab3d: Can you forge anything from this broken-looking hasta?
textByHashes.0579949df7c6274f771453897fd4f16656c6ebf9: Can you convert Zamorakian spears into hastae?
textByHashes.3580f0fe810427005c5dd32be0edba4c89d1c4b4: I can't afford that. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.ab5c3e37b32b5f8e0a6760ce4787dfdf70f95532: Can you convert Zamorakian hastae into spears?
textByHashes.d0c52bd179affa909caf41802eff3c05794c80e0: I'd like to smash my pots when planting trees again.
textByHashes.f49afe5bd0fc74f20457fa880e8787ebf4579619: I'd like to be calmer and not smash my pots.
textByHashes.615284c6564293c007dc651399ba56397feee44a: Could you tell me more of these spirits you continually refer to?
textByHashes.6a3b8e1dfc440f2f7dcd72cc5099d2418368dabb: So those are the spirits who give us guidance. What of the other sorts?
textByHashes.8b4374c5c8c3a5674ef0384da02d322e89d2196f: I can see the pyres serve this purpose. The final category is also restless?
textByHashes.9e94bbf9fabdceb567e314526ff4560923fdbad7: Thank you Otto. It makes a bit more sense now.
textByHashes.9764317230fc0b9cd3436847e72a7dda3f9b190a: I'll let you get back to your work.
textByHashes.c6e9e8113fabe10983c77bd3e0892b74c26aec6f: Am I not allowed to be here?
textByHashes.2f9dea57d5119e67a61bd21468bf92d8ffc8e4fa: Is there anything that I can do to change that?
textByHashes.2fac5625f546ae6fc224da117872d84b0111b95c: Is there anything that I can do to change that? I've already been quite helpful over in Cam Torum.
textByHashes.7ee5a3b4273ab8bf413883856e6ce1a4d3e59c2e: Subjugation? That seems like a bit of an over-exaggeration.
textByHashes.f443a9fb56d099a831428e680e81df67aec2b593: I've seen Cam Torum. You don't seem to be doing too badly.
textByHashes.b2f6dee9b857155687725776dca4f5fdcfc49772: Not all humans are the same though. It's not just Cam Torum. I've actually worked with your kind a few times.
textByHashes.4c200455249c8ce2dcb0d2e44fe98a70863d2a2a: Well there was this one time when I helped the dwarves of Keldagrim with a bit of a statue issue. Another time I worked with one of the last surviving Imcando dwarves to create a blurite sword.
textByHashes.07317996cc8e9309949e5e83d473cd51a2062860: Well if liking is out of the question, how about tolerate?
textByHashes.e7395f093c77290953142819d0bcbf98e65290ed: And you do that from the pub?
textByHashes.d1e424a8aea9d192ac17064890d20dd3cdec4919: You said the Imcando were your ancestors?
textByHashes.ef44b6b523d963fdc938887a0d84fa3d35b18a8e: Is there anything that I can do to change your opinion on me?
textByHashes.f647b4ff60074159a5f66a4dec0c940451fc0ccb: You do know that there are some rats running loose?
textByHashes.02df5e74426af2b14d1017455dab8fa36a4dbce9: Yes, it's a very nice day.
textByHashes.27231abb65a15aa3fe786936fedf5c8fe8820824: Can I buy a rune platebody now please?
textByHashes.39e2dd3e09baa865d4cdf830e7aeba763adc0e4c: Can I have another key to Melzar's Maze?
textByHashes.2bdabc554c0aecafb5a14cc7373d82194ea3114a: What's your idea about anti-dragon shields?
textByHashes.7ca588b47a30450da6f335a1e71a5514cadccdc4: I will look for this draconic visage!
textByHashes.180ee88804b7e7b0893c0b43df66175180fe0206: No, I don't have level 90 Smithing.
textByHashes.2f88c7cb854c57dad0b782b8a17b0184f47f5680: Actually, I have got level 90 Smithing.
textByHashes.caab2d4afaef116beca7f3edb32b99190ccc0d99: Where is the temple of Marimbo?
textByHashes.47bc2856521631f36d34f2ad5d119ba93e269d8a: Actually, I'm not. I'm a visitor from foreign lands.
textByHashes.43e3eaaf0d1501311f0fb291dd48616052006ed3: Ah yes. How stupid of me not to see the likeness.
textByHashes.59da3b5f98952d077e59d7254a7238c7f1b061b5: Magical traps? What does that have to do with the Historical Archive?
textByHashes.c31d0646af4ac463b92590c1071aec7a7c6fa627: What exactly is the Tower of Magic?
textByHashes.48ce3b8d1929fa2f25ec4b9f959f35cd404799b5: Tell me about the history of the Tower.
textByHashes.9df4f31c70b9131fbb658990b9a947f13263f510: This room is part of the Tower?
textByHashes.2059f4762dc214bf3c9a12e2aebb60ba5330b110: I guess I'd better be careful then.
textByHashes.fc647e8d555b8f2c1dab29e97723e88d77080d8f: Well it's either this or buying rubbish at the Grand Exchange, fire away.
textByHashes.ef22b1f4cdc7e99c74251cef9c6b7d2d735517ac: Well it's either this or running around telling everyone I'm an Ironman.
textByHashes.53de69cf15076eee4d64989448e6068e56abb296: Speaking would certainly help your case.
textByHashes.48b963f4dab7788d39bf1ec9cca3b92c8835036a: What are these farming patches for?
textByHashes.99b36510f5f084ada11b0b76636beb93c906e33c: Which I'm guessing makes you the new Lord Hosidius? How's that going?
textByHashes.70962c5bc85899a65bc8e06b3cc5a163108f9858: You still seem to be enjoying the wine just fine.
textByHashes.7f5c427ff4ab97702adb1ad31b3e016f4472eaa0: It must be very hard for you.
textByHashes.fc53632ebcbe1a4910e39b64d6c35de851652819: Why do you need to go fast?
textByHashes.94394db65218fbd96cf3a711b2d81fe9da35a7fd: You might go a little faster if you put down that giant clock.
textByHashes.281c027c1cb442898c34042921172259bbcd2e9e: I don't think you'll be going anywhere at this rate. That goose hasn't moved an inch.
textByHashes.a66b344b0c9ad436787cfa72ecddcf1a4db3b2a8: I'll leave you to it then! Good luck!
textByHashes.2edd99031b5d7d2b998d12376f8aee140d6495db: I see. It really feels like that's going to go horribly wrong for you at some point.
textByHashes.57b46a5698fac7146371532035ac39117987c461: How do you have a party in Gielinor?
textByHashes.a876c8e96461fd046b8ead9f070d470ab97c2b69: What's the big lever over there for?
textByHashes.51451f9e0e56eaeb026b7e89500321bcc2a61183: Cool! Sounds like a fun way to do a drop party!
textByHashes.e5c8d83e1478df2055739c677482b7f891cdf935: Have you always been here in Falador?
textByHashes.dfd9690ce5949bf5d409a13dfd2b7dcd01e8b73e: Why does it cost more to get them separated again?
textByHashes.002e36408ff192881e52f0f9b24f1c7f9f2ee4a4: Let me see what you can do.
textByHashes.26ae45a6385b59bca8c5861dd8d1699dadb955a3: Ok, why does it cost more to get them separated than put together?
textByHashes.0536c46c9753839f97d7d30925ec4b4a133c0080: I'm sure I can find someone to fix it!
textByHashes.91780bef003641b1afee6dd93f427d1cf77928e0: Do you think he can fix it?
textByHashes.5370816b5e5265e0b899f83c8ff8c3b6db34de61: I'm afraid I can't help you right now.
textByHashes.f997bdf456ed116ecc1a728e8a44bfa8994881ee: What ingredients did I need again?
textByHashes.805619b6a57fef95a1c5cb8aa8cc1d088f07c78d: Great thanks, I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.46e9a397d95e277e066c22a0f1362b77a45e31d7: So I made the shield, now what?
textByHashes.13295493e5ad74d8e249a05080d735e543d7689c: Just quickly, Santa said you shouldn't use the Icelord to ice your gnomes.
textByHashes.29a644ec7404ef22634fca13e8ed707717e8d441: Something about Icelord saliva not being safe to eat.
textByHashes.260463b9b5c6b38c2152b26f1d6be5d4f7d44841: Hello there. I have some wallasalki bone fragments, and I understand you may be able to use them to make some armour for me...?
textByHashes.1b8e7047d0b4ac8703e96dc53589a349371b653f: I was wondering if you could give me a reading on my future...?
textByHashes.6aa57836a7f857b724985c1f53c280540ad1c98e: Nothing really, I just stopped by to say hello.
textByHashes.f3d85090adcb360c4947afd1904fb1524e4b96bd: Could you help me with combining some items?
textByHashes.ad47dc5c946ff87112d9f2a76ceaeb876a449119: I have this icon from a ring. I was hoping to make something new with it.
textByHashes.534b6b97949b86da71778fe88cab57f23b8ff5c0: Well I thought maybe you'd be able to help, given these are magic rings. The good magic that is... not the... whatever magic it is you don't like.
textByHashes.27fd54ce9f1fd17aa3f6f77005f69f58f73d52e2: When you say above board, where would making new rings by combining the icons with ancient vestiges from a long forgotten empire sit?
textByHashes.d49d985e634bd25092bd7fa00a624544c45a70bd: Er... Definitely not one known for using dark and forbidden magic.
textByHashes.3b426de606c3bcfd59b64e7f97cb941bb39901d2: I'm here to work with the guild.
textByHashes.e73c0d584f4bf7229c005c4edfc6b0afcfb7b9b3: That depends on how much I manage to catch.
textByHashes.051de6b81c85abc0a04790e6a15c247e68bc91c1: Can you do much with animal furs?
textByHashes.4590b852ba0c870857db63bf7a48adfcb95ee2b1: Can you make some armour for me?
textByHashes.711dd0b10d581a22df645ff6d3cd126fec32165e: And where do you get the right kind of seed?
textByHashes.b74b9ad9a5a81cd1498238c11d9d9ea1b2a7e29b: Actually... I don't think I've got any crystal seeds to trade, right now.
textByHashes.15a26268dc6eec583175507b97a5955e2128721a: Can I trade you for some crystal acorns?
textByHashes.1620ca1f59ef5346e654c4afae028685984fe72d: You're not tracking down huge beasts to kill - you look equipped for it.
textByHashes.f571ed0c5784f76978ad38fd90e056428481c132: How would you get it home, then?
textByHashes.7d72415b0b3e81c8d4ab9ebd4b8c30cf0c83fb38: Have you found anything else interesting around here?
textByHashes.f93c40a94c9a76aa5dfaf5ef073a64ceacc20922: Why do you charge for returning lost items?
textByHashes.66e24afc4aabd9a6b8bcd93baeb7475f421061cb: What can I do around here?
textByHashes.dfd557d37d45412e7ab028e596f0f64de627c794: Can I talk to you for a moment about the fossils I find on this island?
textByHashes.76e0af0db50c340453627a789a4f5c5d009e12ae: Let's talk about rare fossils, if that's okay.
textByHashes.cc0c90e5098194b8060099ba83a1e5a40a42df1b: Not quite... I'd like you to stop rare fossils showing up on the island.
textByHashes.f641884e0a840752ba25ecc97906b0aa9b4da33e: Actually, I've changed my mind, I'll keep collecting them.
textByHashes.def0d53594ce7f4636099ef238b29e5c34bae4e0: Yes I know, can you just do it for me.
textByHashes.604e214277cf35fb0a416ca581109daa70558741: Let's talk about normal fossils, if that's okay.
textByHashes.e18230b1f6dc25d1b6a16d1caa8fd575981234c4: Is it possible that you could stop normal fossils being given to me on the island.
textByHashes.6ce9bf2e3170e29533b29fcb8e507c764de1ec59: I've found every fossil I want and well, I'm just not interested in them anymore.
textByHashes.3d7c2bfbf72bb3c463f18683fd7d861931201a11: Yes, well, I need you to let them drop again.
textByHashes.a9b9c45b23c2467072c9c0dd541eb14d96e5d6be: Okay okay, calm down! Why are you guarding it? What is the purpose of this cavern?
textByHashes.b9a22e556bd302bfcab12a65a8e10d106827e8a2: I'm not quite up to scratch then...
textByHashes.7052da9ab7cbc956d5b0211d1133221a529c4c76: Well sounds like I am capable then!
textByHashes.8ffa32c7379a5b3447c53ee1c346bb1c5ea34d02: How do I traverse the mine? Isn't it full of lava?
textByHashes.0cd704d1a957a14875018848803aac2bad569864: How do I keep the mine stable?
textByHashes.b0384d7af83f1fac0f906d72c969bfb77340eaf5: Presumably, a western chamber, central chamber and eastern chamber?
textByHashes.c403e72af2b09daff6bfdcbabccbd98ef96c6932: Okay, so how do I prepare?
textByHashes.4170928bc071c644a29711f474e81af68a9864f0: Thanks, I'll keep that in mind.
textByHashes.30c075dfb080cde081ce22cf02b6389f55de8dcb: I don't have 30 Numulites with me unfortunately.
textByHashes.04fc8e1d3b5d292bd9ac9657d6ef841f832bba5b: Have you picked up anything I left in the mine?
textByHashes.223ee99fa525848a06a1cfa4557914678e877e11: Hi Pete, I found this in one of my ore packs...
textByHashes.a882c83282bbd480f572feb2d59c4af89f376156: It's... a pickaxe, a broken one.
textByHashes.b660a1f48aa455d945ab6a1a8f488e57e48241df: Wow, didn't expect to find a scientist out here.
textByHashes.36d89a8702f10d5b6a40f3be994a7015bdd748bc: Research? What could you possibly want with a giant spider's venom?
textByHashes.0cd3e4102c1940adba20d0cb9ccbaddfd21d842a: Woah sorry, didn't mean to touch a nerve. Fighting a giant spider sounds like a great idea.
textByHashes.d5ff9ae3b27e9e9fe1b09b9f7d5c6139d0702456: Then what are you waiting around here for? Go out there and fight her.
textByHashes.a2682fd7e491fb76fe7c6d40e8925de7bdcbf9ab: Are you sure you're equipped to take it down? I've had the displeasure of dealing with Venenatis, she will not go down easily.
textByHashes.51d68155e6a1960ee4da0a9449019abace0b2ee9: I didn't know she had a lair. I thought she just roamed the Wilderness.
textByHashes.9e4643e613bf9902da3b003a3bf71c1bf42c8ebb: So that explains why you're waiting here.
textByHashes.28e6992366140c10844919bc58ce777f91b08c04: I'm sure you'll be alright, it's just a gigantic spider!
textByHashes.98ef1b7c36591d1dd4cc22b26825430e5cf907fa: Could you tell me what's so fascinating?
textByHashes.ec3ec8f07ce323d3c29cf090944143ab2d6959eb: Romeo? Where would I find him then?
textByHashes.4a2a2124dfbb57a3b052eb7d6d5f19da68bf4c8b: Do you get many customers out here?
textByHashes.48fe3046082c7829df0c214c3502ce465adb3ac7: Why is this wyvern area private?
textByHashes.976d3dd135dc40bde588bbd70522716d97234f79: So are you a Slayer Master?
textByHashes.9ec4311d2f962133d59e62b26733cff0a723a441: Hello there! Where are you heading to?
textByHashes.8c6fbaa5089c467b03dbb0ebedcded97eed80fb4: I see. Well good luck with your journey.
textByHashes.ff4d280f2b6954cebdba495051c382666c1c7806: Hello again! How are things going?
textByHashes.60625462f6d4bbcb45116f3d95c95045384f0358: I wondered if you might have some time to help...?
textByHashes.d33f3a512c0be8c91b649e449eb68ea04dc2cd92: What did you do before you came here?
textByHashes.5f1823a4f353265d5acfdffe43a5bd27a0bac642: I don't know, you said something about treasure.
textByHashes.9e34fe625a94b3ad3d436313b2d39925e206dbc7: I'd like to trade in my tickets, please.
textByHashes.549bcedaf2a31f80f4a64b792028377ae8e3661e: I've done all the easy tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.b4f364185fb4ae35dddcd27120212d4f747dfe3b: I've done all the medium tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.6f31f454e38f16855b057445e02788761c9c8cdb: I've done all the hard tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.474066148fbb370838959bbe77aabc22ce18f816: I've done all the elite tasks in my Karamja Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.bf5b0337c0735b2e79149b8a56ccc88c81c9fba1: Can I have another set of Karamja gloves?
textByHashes.961194dd2a20a92bbf17da7f96fcf30690c56bc8: Can I change the metal dragons' bar drops?
textByHashes.0750768eb74a388e0357d303d2940e194976fdd4: What potions do these new herbs make?
textByHashes.449b61ef79e53936fd65ba212ed7a0c2f8e321fd: Helping Cap'n Teach shoot his way through a little blockade.
textByHashes.0cc3d72afe067e1e624168a518bb84720c7d658e: Why is this place walled off?
textByHashes.ab8bafbdd5ea8484439dff8dcb0990301fdf0f7e: And I accept your apology. Good day.
textByHashes.9117b59b3c70c6cf0e0115e224ba0136cd02c72f: I was just striking up a conversation.
textByHashes.b5089eed98d04aa4ff96be46d6c5dbe2cb8b52ec: First off, it's lad, and second, other than busy being drunk I can't see what you are talking about.
textByHashes.a058668f4027ec6adfaeb71268534d821592e7dc: First off, it's lass, and second, other than busy being drunk I can't see what you are talking about.
textByHashes.d83d3ea03df54ee460e590381c12276bc53e31fb: Wait...I recognise that smell. You've been drinking 'rum' haven't you?
textByHashes.fa473e69c719632dd8446730dd645ff7208ac09e: I think that can be filed as a 'yes'.
textByHashes.3fd44cbea3a05a6aff48534ab3c9ad97b9b3002a: I'm not sure I follow you.
textByHashes.a6a574e596023a23b4382833326bb7a62b256dc0: I kill so many things on a daily basis that it all tends to blur together.
textByHashes.034144b26dacaaeef41c390ff9df7ee71eb0a0b1: Tell me, did they have any unusual features that would help me to recall them?
textByHashes.9cce2a6a69dd18c0fb817aa21a4bfbdbd6a3960b: I don't know, if I did I wouldn't have lost count!
textByHashes.3d27fe3015ed1f639eb9ebd735586ce450e49402: It's rather quiet around here for a pirate haven isn't it?
textByHashes.544e0c1ea6ba7b78ab90e2a04ceba26de5fbd1af: I was wondering who you are.
textByHashes.20e8bbc4c4066e30c9714aace551b187d6e2d265: So how do you decide who becomes a member of the militia?
textByHashes.07af4499e7cd6d7e1a4af5ec00a822153c44d887: No, no, I'm a pirate, honest. I have the book and everything.
textByHashes.41b35dad7044f1dca6f5ff8e30ad040f89567439: Just looking around. What is there to do here?
textByHashes.34387c357d96ebb77f7faf1866e49aeb88201fd8: I'm sorry, but you don't sound much like a pirate, how did you come to be here?
textByHashes.ce8f62d34b54f21e342c8b05fd98f411f0f9771e: Wasn't that a bit of a big jump in careers?
textByHashes.fa0aef17b89ddbeec5554548b0021f3fad3afca0: And very rudely too I might add.
textByHashes.4ebf6e8c36dd3ae38da537432a396a4ed6f132c1: Well, I think you'll have a hard time explaining your slurred speech, odd behaviour, bitter, nostril dissolving stench and rolling, bloodshot eyes if your not drunk.
textByHashes.9bca025c73a942ddf7051e2bc3f13ce8efcec80c: No. I would most certainly not.
textByHashes.6dd321b31f295384a121451a9e2f6b613cb50703: I'm just helping out a friend.
textByHashes.dd13b3cee7fcd1caf361bb0e0fa256925603cf0b: I've decided to help you for free! I will dispose of this evil half-brother of yours and leave you what little money is left to feed your family.
textByHashes.6b2d63c3c4fd910acec08a98a23c8df80df5b69d: Well, possibly, but could I go to Mos Le'Harmless instead?
textByHashes.fe9cf6ecbfcaf328048a9de8a0fdc4b75f9d0ee1: Oh no! Get it out, get it out!
textByHashes.384e4d2b5f6d0f81c753052449c6df40d5ce313d: Wow... I'm lucky I wasn't seriously hurt!
textByHashes.b2720bae3ee1b24643e1bf22bfc030150ec70d36: I'm getting an awful headache talking to you. Any idea why?
textByHashes.7a3d65df2a640b66cadf51357f3c57f84a2ff6bf: Why do I get a headache every time I see you?
textByHashes.81807e3a1725ee3d814398e7ed5381b31d1f8f17: Are you any relation to Party Pete?
textByHashes.bce218f9f8ec6d275a00e99176e625abe99ca26f: Well, you don't sound too happy about it. What happened?
textByHashes.30538b7ba5b394ef7281c1f582b9d60949681126: I'm sure it wasn't that bad.
textByHashes.78fc2444e700917de5e4ecd7e4638741219750af: Erm, excuse me Mr Progress Hat?
textByHashes.bf46a3d916a04cb718623c92fdaa737471bdf16f: But you're just a hat? Can you tell me my Pizazz Point totals?
textByHashes.194dc59c51e99cf6d726fd15b954902215d6ccf4: Do you think you could tell me my Pizazz Points?
textByHashes.0aacb81ab8c0ab9f7cf51d44e1617f75f22a6421: Sorry, but do you think you could tell me my Pizazz Points?
textByHashes.fb1d48bd0dae1417e349c79d6f2f3198c1051c28: Awww, look at the poor sick cow. We'd never make a burger out of you.
textByHashes.b26ed368a1b354d7e0204b2b5576a210ece21ba0: Don't worry cow, I'm sure somebody will find a cure for this plague soon.
textByHashes.8c4a23e1691ea8c923e75598ceecd8f5f14f1b6e: Thanks. Speaking of Veliaf, where is he?
textByHashes.0a19dca6c877ab42056248de46d03d8c33d9956e: Ask me the questions, bridgemaster. I am not afraid.
textByHashes.315cb95d377d3b288fcd27f317cd712b6abda68b: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.
textByHashes.f8184e2f5d6ff9cc5c81433a4636327e14b6c181: Oh, ummm... I thought I was going to die.
textByHashes.acb9a4a504b80532e243ade2e1ad0106d8e63c49: I don't know. So can I go by?
textByHashes.01259df0269acc26561a0b6d42913fb99f0a40f6: How can a single kingdom have multiple kings?
textByHashes.2598ba919b1a1c68eee8040dd129c814851dd842: What do you mean? A Feldip chompy or one from Karamja?
textByHashes.0e1fa77883d596329322be1ae489c393df73189a: Ooookay then, perhaps I should go past.
textByHashes.6ff085222a4ed459be996221e81b24362a067786: 11 meters per second, or 24 miles an hour.
textByHashes.5b7b351ce07da58c02b7138439cbebfe2ba98d6a: Hey there, is this where you live?
textByHashes.eaf08fa08788d2b18557cf36253fe5281edfe554: Sorry, I am just curious. Why is life so difficult here?
textByHashes.3f83c9d2d4d5ae598ca54454c311cff168128cb7: Okay okay! I'll be off now.
textByHashes.52b2d86ce5748ac0bc6c93535dc32edb704cf50f: I've heard about those gangs! The Shayzien soldiers do a lot of work to put an end to it.
textByHashes.3ec55a5d0af8fd31dd054cfe2bff107111e44891: I'd like to claim my port task rewards.
textByHashes.5059ce75cda47d08979fbab426e825c420523d79: I'd like to cancel a port task.
textByHashes.e84f9284311cc591967d6b09a0f9526c4ea1b84a: So could you tell me how I could get my own vessel?
textByHashes.5fcb22054009b90ce7624d89fa7787ac109d11ea: Sounds like quite a challenging job. I'd best not distract you.
textByHashes.3aa91dd14fc6c1e601851f0b5fb6ed81dae78c44: Lady Piscarilius is out at sea?
textByHashes.b1017f5e4fd10e203ea8b48b6fd795844c233fcb: Is she expected to return soon?
textByHashes.a986592c61528db6cea098d83a61db1e6391a94d: HEY PETE, WHAT ARE YOU DOING HERE?
textByHashes.5c6d4e0ca293d21b458d682e2ae1ef8ec088d22e: Pete, what are you doing out here in the deep wilderness?
textByHashes.d36d522f607612c363dc4340443d402b910da17c: Hey Postie. Hows tricks? Who are you interviewing here?
textByHashes.41ce4f9cb50acd0e2474a63e31332b46e2e64530: I see. Can I join you?
textByHashes.3db5132624e06319ac26b09d82515d34328225d7: You've been here a while, haven't you?
textByHashes.fd2cc65af8c9149954d9da84c0cb4c8a3c5d9377: Yes... I can see that. Bye Pete!
textByHashes.662136240ac5193f894baeb05e84d79004b6d787: Hey Pete what you doing here?
textByHashes.e55d1049970a81ed28869408c3740bb080b6f85b: You're a bit mad really aren't you?
textByHashes.ecdcf1989fb1936833e5c1fb323f0f0d6426f1c4: And so what did the other one say?
textByHashes.277079efb6b5d81f9f4aa4543511a56751adbbed: I see. So... what did the other one say?
textByHashes.bad51e6950ad917d5461c57a9976596d14202894: Fish, right. So, what was the reply?
textByHashes.4e7ea8aba35b66ac051a5af4720feec355c56191: No, still lost. Is one of them a penguin?
textByHashes.3fd1e0c7caf341b38d5e346941c930a8d91ef88a: Hey Pete, what you doing here?
textByHashes.f167db20c37462ddf610419c15c68d065bdb57ee: Doesn't sound too tough. What's the pay like?
textByHashes.0e5b61a35c817c7997b7889da81aa26978e44d9d: Groan. Don't give up the day job Pete.
textByHashes.ee17bc826de09293003f28ba9acd6a49cda35a03: I have a strange feeling of Deja Vu. I must go now.
textByHashes.d455eef1fe08e852414754aaaaaab5eab96d8259: Hey Postie! What you doing all the way up here?
textByHashes.16002c8f2626a280b0a7faddf483b632dc711966: Yes, I thought as much. What did she have to say?
textByHashes.8932ddd60194d9531e4456bdc727e3d02c6f13b4: Cripes! What do you think it means?
textByHashes.6f22557f946070d1c778d4abe4b0b38c824287a4: No problem, I hope you get better soon.
textByHashes.d55c5be383ee243c29f96dc1fec4ba9b1113b854: How can I train my prayer?
textByHashes.1862a20256b5f9664bbd9a43617bb7ad20f00632: It's nice to meet you Preswylwyr, I'm .
textByHashes.9364462323554d308aefaba3d8d31ee09334c16f: You bake? So that's what the wonderful smell is.
textByHashes.5392ad6f9551c666d63ca703f82f2c5831339e30: Really? That's very nice of you, thanks!
textByHashes.9e9c08bb0041599096a64904626db19e1d50a2ff: What's that place to the south?
textByHashes.d99234d763fccf000cb89945d003f26d0cbaa0fe: Interesting... I bet the place is a hotspot for grave robbers.
textByHashes.d012aed6d436c3971beb877976ff0bdaa20c4daa: You sound like you don't believe them.
textByHashes.bd194293aae608f922fe3bf52c047318a5d53b36: Remind me how this ritual works.
textByHashes.c2ec3c10b76805c92218319903fc17405b75a544: But I really want to ride the boat!
textByHashes.87ac190cefbbfcc97c441a375d3fac23d4ba09a2: The High Priestess said I could offer myself as a sacrifice to Zulrah.
textByHashes.ab92771f985cace6d6fa55e69ed71cc864e62992: I've been there, but I left.
textByHashes.c853ed073bd370e1f9867817e1506bf0f0a1a99b: In that case, I'll make sure to keep checking in.
textByHashes.22522f3d7a6b8880dc8490cda7536fd17d289c7e: How are you doing in there?
textByHashes.5070b8d4c1b2f41fea315e56884abf4a7164bd3d: So you don't want to escape?
textByHashes.de495a3432ef88e11818c5e8894088a321c6f80a: You seem like a jolly chap.
textByHashes.34a50dd57d4cf8dfb2979c2716bbf1a9fc0e1b6b: Hello. So you're just a private?
textByHashes.729915691af13670df333edbf22c68a321f7cb56: I beg to differ. I'm in perfect shape!
textByHashes.82642bb01b0d503214410cd2fbef55bfb4ddf440: Can you tell me about pets and pet insurance?
textByHashes.257d4b58a7908e1e58ff13b78a56e32888db340f: I've lost a pet. Have you got it?
textByHashes.e786a4535916e1526ad6423b2f71b3ea8223e6ff: I have a pet that I'd like to insure.
textByHashes.cc7688168b8ff9fe4934982b9b699909825cc97a: My pet is still lost. Could you look again?
textByHashes.5919ec85d0cf2fa5b117a08b2f82c51756bcdc73: Sure, what book do you want?
textByHashes.0a6ca86653420398c8b593619a1f5a3a0368c8df: I didn't realise gnomes were interested in magic.
textByHashes.d903cc18ee531d5afba99f166a11edba943a29cb: Hey! Some of my best friends are cats!
textByHashes.d2df76e7ea1bfd526d241be7fe2762ede0f99e17: Hello, what's a gnome like you doing in a place like this?
textByHashes.70cc00786a5583a6b5145c63f948890f1eaaa206: What does the portal machine do?
textByHashes.52214c08b8f51c1c7005de3e31d5f1a394d26655: Where can I get insulated armour from?
textByHashes.181c6f391d536980dd919dcb83991931b3750d61: I don't want to run around after Slayer Masters, I'm going through.
textByHashes.adc9ceb3076d384b4ae08d04af3c856fb6db5228: Thanks, I think I'll stay here for a while then.
textByHashes.2bfabc167f5ff575c9c2c8dde2f0cac34794fa32: Thanks for the warning, but I'm not scared of any monster.
textByHashes.a8c32453fbd28fb813bb6945f756f557078e297b: Yes I still want to go in.
textByHashes.70553635b4f526bba06d1da8bb075666cef9416d: Yes I want to go in and don't show me this message again.
textByHashes.25dd5543e22cb293ad6940103748de22402dcd4f: No, I dont want to go in.
textByHashes.033e15c2c64b3d2d389d92cad8352edc104904dd: I'll try and make time for it. Sounds like a nice place.
textByHashes.df8056cc99180da4f696d19b1a60aaeb54c181a6: Excuse me, but what language are you speaking?
textByHashes.1a35794fd92d5d2f38097530234088916c77f841: Is there anything else I can unlock here?
textByHashes.1b47dc30ce023af756ee2d13d3671ee093fb03f9: I'd like to buy access to the restricted mine, please.
textByHashes.8a85730619eac0e432b4df3686dc46449880c254: I'd like to get the bigger sack, please.
textByHashes.e2eb3cbd337e4d501ca1bce6869b72c9e7d94f86: Hello fellow bunny, how's it hanging?
textByHashes.894d5555abea29bc0563974081c74c3f7493f06e: You seem to be having an eggsistential crisis.
textByHashes.6736804d5b1b91a0ef4fcd2e613db0d5986b0e0b: No, I don't think he did?
textByHashes.310b5590884a360574a78ccf77b138ffc0bba34d: Not exactly. I just had an odd feeling you might be needing these ingredients. If I see a rabbit cook, I presume there's food of some kind! Lucky guess I suppose.
textByHashes.23185b2ec9aa8cf73ebbae87b68fcf6d600b4ad4: So do I get to go to the Descendance Day dinner?
textByHashes.f9f0764087b9c21fa642dc3df76b43684c545dfa: Sounds lame anyway, I didn't want to be invited.
textByHashes.4f81aad8dfa3501e40d655d723a21b366e5cd062: Won't they be annoyed I'm nicking their carrots?
textByHashes.c3789607acb16286c86fdda6c6dd9ae28e1a3a73: There are rabbit farmers too!? How cute.
textByHashes.0892e8dc5105457913af0e7461fc208680a5cf67: Lots of theft in the rabbit realm...
textByHashes.d28d07dd2e212ec9c663eec54f045d40a4372c61: No, I don't feel like it, maybe later.
textByHashes.0ebd2158602c45cfa31731c5b6b75828e2ed3316: Well maybe you need to take a drink...
textByHashes.df84f0eb71d961b54c1d8df501499395b84323fe: Hmm, why not something that doesn't taste of cabbage?
textByHashes.df30a743bf0a44f0e188cc54a065f62304ae7421: Still, suits you. I didn't know rabbits could wear trousers either.
textByHashes.fb9ea363ccf8ad88c0c36851e9c8abf10602d087: The whole hat, rabbit trousers ensemble - it works. It makes you look like a real rabbit cook.
textByHashes.23251c957513a4d200f1ac556cb9bce04d90023a: I haven't got all of items yet, I'm still looking.
textByHashes.94b0b3d7408863aa4f03c3a2d4e89bd39208329d: Here's a fresh cabbage my hare.
textByHashes.50a5d8afd85ddb06c5b77b044e96677897229b2e: Have you got anything for me?
textByHashes.05cda17e7046ef3ec69b6b4d76e8860c92d4ebdf: Why do you work in a fishing colony?
textByHashes.10bb029ddbab11cc6e06a9fee40a26f00742e1e6: It seems like rather hard work - can't you just get a beach house on Karamja?
textByHashes.5cb108bd685bc97f8ef3dbbc8f9dac2aa03a4eb0: So, tell me about this proposal of yours.
textByHashes.3dd1690e7eba0698cbcbc153f37a99842b8d6a0d: So I find barronite in the ruins and bring it to you? Doesn't sound too difficult. Where should I start?
textByHashes.c1a69c5721fae2d2fc5d1fcbc71ec7b6cdac0144: I'm sorry Ramarno. I will do my best to help ensure the legacy of your kin lives on.
textByHashes.87e497876f37e3150814961d65e978913458c946: Tell me more about the golem workshop.
textByHashes.c7700d75b22a835cd6d837b3fa0ce8a905915a91: Tell me more about the barronite mine.
textByHashes.d4d7cd300be9f93091dbbbba5338b6d258164d98: Tell me more about the offering altar.
textByHashes.9faa145341b99c4cf79088ef353703f900bcdd0f: I have something I'd like you to examine.
textByHashes.6b6e9398931fdb1209ddb58f25123e27decfdb08: While adventuring, I met another Imcando Dwarf called Thurgo.
textByHashes.60fbaa864f6f936970834326e8128f5743138b89: Yes. He looks to be doing quite well for himself. In fact, he seems to be a master of Smithing.
textByHashes.5e4a1ebbb1cc64662896b012554f8fe895dd4349: Well he's certainly an interesting dwarf.
textByHashes.55f2bb9b26a3774c5a127a3351f31be3151304f6: What will powering the city do?
textByHashes.2a59e48743fa304c6c7d5bfd6c125dc8f2acabcb: How much barronite do you need to power it?
textByHashes.834af544374b74268aa3f49ba29d81c6ae2dfbce: Never mind, I have no questions for now.
textByHashes.d944f6b1efa15c1ae1033b53d766f5458f827d65: Can you make me a knight's sword?
textByHashes.a8e99521a350395f33aaa2aa6a83b056f904dd34: I was told to find a Imacando dwarf to make a sword for me.
textByHashes.e97dacf55a241b9834637c18352f4ee18a21e886: Right, I'll see if I can find someone else to make one for me then.
textByHashes.47eb8c794aac11d7304c15bc512455f5c86b47d3: I found this encased within some barronite.
textByHashes.c0dc3d2003526ca64c11ea4a55a38448c4d388ea: I found one of these deposits while mining.
textByHashes.748c6b80c5febc318df003fdab8dc87a8250c8ac: What can I use the power from the Forge for?
textByHashes.464fc072ada078d7a099beabeec3cfa235bcfa2b: I found this bit of barronite.
textByHashes.be87ba9a7e665ab84d0f948f5bd3185039b39a1c: No thanks I'll hold onto them.
textByHashes.d97a2bd04a4f9505702f20d97cbb5a50a0fba71b: No thank you, I'll hold onto it.
textByHashes.fe7b0913811f84668f1e4304139576fa18e485d0: I'll hold onto it for now.
textByHashes.0124203c10046f75ce4d7d1b24e3fcfd4080503c: No thanks I'll hold onto it.
textByHashes.11ae6a18d182fcebce0fdaf0952a67a8012f709d: I found this broken hammer within a barronite deposit.
textByHashes.e79bd76e04f41f0eadbd4fdcbda8408ac65246ce: I've brought you a redberry pie.
textByHashes.71211940cbf47ca130264106ae4084c3fd0c9584: Imcando dwarves love redberry pies. I thought you'd like one too.
textByHashes.6f5ac223f6bb33b16d57e2fd1f6ec8a1bd71b562: Oh, well why don't you try it?
textByHashes.c0ecf537f3b1fd3cbf8696feb947c4eb58753bdc: Why don't you do some work yourself?
textByHashes.39e44a98123be1ba934df389166e3569cd9d8f11: No thank you, that's not my scene.
textByHashes.ae960568877f407cc943870a53f3aee067ff2763: How can I train my Ranged?
textByHashes.91e23924d185a0ae9f60d2e3e40d1e4ac4779e42: Brilliant. If I forget anything I'll come talk to you again.
textByHashes.c7950df7d3b29828c009c11dca4c98e3e7b26cc7: I no longer need my Training arrows, would you like it back?
textByHashes.26cda02632ce6370a485bd4ee27691a8471478fa: I no longer need my Training bow, would you like it back?
textByHashes.7ab22e5b77e9bea27f916060cf465720618a6ca0: Hey, I hear you're giving away free hats!
textByHashes.ff33d4639daa3d1221db30a4f8c31d69dfb218b6: How do I get a hat?
textByHashes.e4288d545e4e14b4d923b82990ded8f1c08a05a2: How many Chompies do I have to stick?
textByHashes.0ea79c1e61e825afdf64a136b1cdad201982dfa8: Can I have a hat please?
textByHashes.01436c99dda1a8952557ef263474d780289b0d79: Sorry Rantz, I don't have the bow.
textByHashes.cf04f894b2358fbe7ebe0f4f7e94f71f54a7f55f: Really? I don't recall hiring you.
textByHashes.198a8a658c5f8c52dbb9dc6f838a02c9acc0bab3: I'd like to buy some beer.
textByHashes.72e9781883ca9441807512c8b50cee79c0f6828b: I have to go. Good bye.
textByHashes.03751fe342e3e8c57c61649f83093dd17fa27394: I lost that ring you gave me...
textByHashes.37be8e81f0e1b509aa3cdc33324358a22d98d9ca: Can I have a beer, please?
textByHashes.6e15c7818588b236623791cff0ebc0af41c4f1d6: What's with the furniture in this place?
textByHashes.e506388899e3eb965b1d6fbf1915dcac6bb3470a: Hmm, I wonder if there's something I could use to communicate with him.
textByHashes.5dcf2b49fda12934b08c1e0c44c2704f746a68eb: Hey, keep it down! I've come to slay the monsters down here.
textByHashes.fcfae4d2b07d01cc4853fd9d3da2f5c10f0b74cd: You should hear it upstairs! Those Aberrant Spectres are just the worst.
textByHashes.90eb5c462c176e0233ca914a5dc8e05b8b6a6ba5: Hopefully! I should be going now, speak to you later.
textByHashes.bf925ecde0c503e7355cb82096b907d5afb7174d: Just wondering what you're up to?
textByHashes.421234b5e13a1d9371c5863a7f6ba300e9a4fa2c: Tell me about the Shot Put area.
textByHashes.ef8dd8d6d04547f31e7a51e85c2979e7d1c0917e: Oh! You mean the spinny round thing or the chuck it straight?
textByHashes.ee8b6756e0d352e3a6dd51bddb9610ae47cccc4f: Yes, like how can I do better than everyone else.
textByHashes.2f5971c98ff0ca36ef718febd867bf62eb62d633: You mean if I grind something up and put dust on my hands I'll chuck the ball further?
textByHashes.440761d70d5378a0ca7ad38c9f228f756ab3a2fc: I'm just going to stop you right there...
textByHashes.b7055369e31d7171db73ecff51959b012ba11bb2: You mentioned he'd be sending some people to meet with me?
textByHashes.d2c89f0d4ee9fc5eff45fa7719b2c9057d035e00: There's something I need to do first.
textByHashes.14f0e372e8a71e6232d87803ad0358dd3252a402: Nothing in particular. Got any sightseeing tips?
textByHashes.f18e95f42b81ea5593e6eb2ae1825fc15870fe71: This doesn't look like a factory.
textByHashes.7cad37eaac6c638982c6cc5c98fa434e9ffb550d: Hello there. You're a long way from home.
textByHashes.250df8c71232e7d6b8ca7c471e81a763f1209f35: Hmm... I might have to check it out.
textByHashes.491081dfe965b1c569dae0e07f80d06bc4a2a127: The Wise Old Man of Draynor Village sent you this message.
textByHashes.04b39b0af956179871dfb1b2ac186face54d32ac: How much do you want for that then?
textByHashes.eab497fbb5bf4d0033fa8ab0e11958d245e2d858: Ah. That's why you're in the library then.
textByHashes.3bc35a3067f5f5c87a17b39bd12c8c6cbe29c2c9: Hmmm. It might still be worth a look. Where can I find this information?
textByHashes.f3e9140f7bc64a8f91b83278168c243a7cd2fccc: I found it but then I lost it.
textByHashes.0cae579be7e03297be758358af8b30d5891539d1: I'm sorry. I'm a terrible person.
textByHashes.f11d6ad3bfce5316f83a77c21db2e9dc9074480b: Hi Reldo, I have come to ask you to help with something.
textByHashes.90156826040f40b71931941d892e654c74882d04: Hey Reldo, I have one of those clue scrolls again, do you have any advice?
textByHashes.6df75dc87b715895efead19b94b92c866608b835: You look like you've travelled a fair distance.
textByHashes.7f953a7b0608b8bc9e0700808688d60d33e3671f: I don't mean to be rude, but the clothing and hair, for starters.
textByHashes.6a0d884f96548f6e850b525140e315b9e192794c: Then tell me, why are you so far from home?
textByHashes.9916a900413b5b4535bf64db97ed97d124382447: Okay, show me the prices of logs.
textByHashes.00d0ceff73d72513c7fefb5f52b0abf8c696e5e8: Sorry, I need to be making tracks.
textByHashes.73effdeb0b69957a831ab8e3850978187015aea2: Well, apart from the fact I ain't scared of no ghost, I am here because I have spoken to Valdez.
