textByHashes.030884a5583ae9742e46c1b21ea18757409be247: No, he was a ghost I met near Glarial's tomb.
textByHashes.e2693e8a0061febd366abe58075077c9a6e08669: He seems convinced that the artefact you stole from him is responsible for him becoming cursed to be an invisible ghost.
textByHashes.2f3dc5c2d680df8b3741cf71c4a45b5cff6ee46d: Seems like he might be onto something too, given the state of you.
textByHashes.40bf7fb05e5c08d48fcd935ddcdc62734a75a3d9: Why don't you tell me what happened? I might be able to help...
textByHashes.f2f75eeefb107ed8342cb4b9611456531a941f7b: Hey, that's no way to talk about dwarves! Some of my best friends are short!
textByHashes.834e3a846d8dead5c1af15ffb0bc0d6de78ac5f4: Oh. Well I guess that's okay then. Please continue.
textByHashes.29e297240f06c1365c58518ff8ffbe3d2c1bd6e3: So what did you do then?
textByHashes.768dda7dd17b8380fc25591660a3ce717f781ee7: So you sold the staff to this god you can't remember?
textByHashes.9dd2c99fdf004c008a50dfde7c6a8ea0c2624a1e: So what was this General's name?
textByHashes.152b8061b37e52f808041e7c46cd20cb1e495397: So you suspect the messenger might have taken the message to the wrong person? So you think it was an accident or deliberate?
textByHashes.bbceca34be25b7a6f47db9097494e87db75b1d41: Where can I find this Kharrim then?
textByHashes.3b404b19d21bde12a0a367eca265c1f755292c08: Can you tell me where I can find Kharrim again?
textByHashes.f212e8f5e6b3198010e6d248f229c430655b0726: Alright, alright, calm down, calm down. All I said was 'hello'!
textByHashes.f45a597163515cb47c7988479e7122c4a60fce73: What can I say? I'm a professional.
textByHashes.a3c2c8c4fed2d11e780c20b0859a9f0c4e763206: So what's a nice ghost like you doing in a place like this?
textByHashes.e02ceb82c75b9c4ea794d0ae8b6a2a4cb034a912: Soooo.... Is it fun being a ghost?
textByHashes.a59273bc4220c0105666e14c9555b6f585bcc218: Sheesh, what a grouch. You'd think you'd have more of a sense of humour being dead and all.
textByHashes.d9fa759d0daa87332ae476f66f575eed66bae4c0: Huh? You mean someone did this to you?
textByHashes.3d4f2be2120ecc3f2a666b1c2e9edeab2e6c0350: So who did it to you? And why?
textByHashes.2a3c5ee496fa9b59bfb75e27acb84f83005e7ef7: So.... Invisible ghost haunting the same place for thousands of years, huh?
textByHashes.4db42a40a3149974fdaa59ec090c2802be025d08: Well, bad luck and all that. See ya around!
textByHashes.074fb778a1d2136c4d0d75a60fda65a7e97bebc3: In which case I only have one thing to say to you:
textByHashes.c3595371e4bf398120a6f0c308e4ef1698ba759c: Guess you don't have the amulet of humanspeak, huh?
textByHashes.f1f62c7d97216c7230eb3ccf38eba4815798d5da: Yeah, that's right. WOO! WOOOWOOO WOO WOOOOWOO! Got no comeback for that, have you?
textByHashes.933020fc86d94367fc19dbbd7ef0bab1bbdf625d: Just looking around at the moment.
textByHashes.f3c5e1d3ff586b7c4e58a3186a797420c00db05a: That sounds lovely, what tune is that?
textByHashes.226a44c95fe1d0dd818d3470588a716952a31224: Well, that's certainly a dark and tortured backstory. Say, have you slain any dragons? Wooed a beautiful princess? Sought revenge on the fiend who killed your family?
textByHashes.c340d6923a79d6e53a69f6536f5957536717812a: I can't understand a word you are saying. Maybe Father Aereck will be able to help.
textByHashes.91a7917f7d7f4479070d4b168f2705089ad528b1: Aww, poor goat, I don't think it meant to scare me.
textByHashes.d9332b99e686329e87e33604e00492e309ea4c4a: If only I had a goat speak amulet...
textByHashes.9cc4bd4a83897e31c70bef15d288e629c363dc70: Hmm, one of your horns is missing...
textByHashes.658675f5b1a41d8d870164faac4e5b5dccabeed5: It seems like it wants me to help recover its lost horn...
textByHashes.1b5d09f3f130ca61b2b1cb788970a62c4443b7a1: Hmm, how am I going to find this goat's horn?
textByHashes.77382a741fde479b733e7a22e26b800137198141: Alright then, I'll go have a look...that way...
textByHashes.1fd883a14cc3e38feabea01d39fa004e48834fc7: Hey goat, where did you baa where your horn was?
textByHashes.119c0d2048359afa4cb990f94ab418d05d1ad5cd: Hello my goat friend, I have brought you a gift.
textByHashes.29b17c8862396ddc55a42a05ddc581915d88b9b0: I think this might be the right one.
textByHashes.cbd1f7fa35cde0fe1c0463dfcee84d1709ef1f81: What kind of trade can you offer?
textByHashes.8e1f35ee759dfdd306e06db7ac55e674fb652222: Can I trade my Pizazz Points please?
textByHashes.f2fd46110d1db9809c63a33626152fc61d8bfde8: Got anything else I can buy?
textByHashes.82b3847b3ba0b9e21d9e0e4a2a7218a3ffeb4156: Sorry, I don't have enough money.
textByHashes.a146e9305dff49dbdc91d2a221cc4fe612da5d24: I don't want some dusty old book.
textByHashes.b6da9a2a4cff6f596b6b1f82555c12326c76a456: No thanks, I already have one.
textByHashes.5279bc5bc8f4100a04d312ae4b8e480f4b7bf9b6: A curse? That doesn't sound good.
textByHashes.23028b283e4cee06dab8855a145a19931c5565c6: I see. So why is she here?
textByHashes.e6ed7ed0db2d390a3199ff0549495b49cf630e8a: When she's vulnerable? How do I make her vulnerable?
textByHashes.db59be3a3efd2b3a557001fc095efe6ee8bc116b: What do I get for helping out here?
textByHashes.014df022c44969aa82b8ed4dcbc78821afe81895: Not bad, what if I didn't want these resource? Is there anything you can give me instead?
textByHashes.573825681d380e79d7cf317e8d4fd7b3c04c8d67: It's nice to meet you Rhoddwr, I'm .
textByHashes.b6f12b4765d3c4a59a86b7041a0eef9ee8f7eba6: A nice sentiment, but we can't all live off the land.
textByHashes.bead461dfb97cf3f2d4ac512f039c515520ce266: Hopefully nature understands the necessity of it all.
textByHashes.8185a0be725977a481b9e92314d299149b847675: Which is why we should learn from the past and avoid making such mistakes.
textByHashes.6604921dc5021c13dc84d7f757bb11102dc4efa6: Could you tell me about Barnacle Barnaby?
textByHashes.33f61dd20729f59b1cd61151751b37de2fd0826a: Well, on that note, I'd best be getting off. Until next time, Ribs.
textByHashes.2419d8725ce7531b9c14eab826bbeffa4d46e22c: You're very welcome. It was a night to remember, that's for sure.
textByHashes.76a720f442a417e52ec62d58a83abc5586c0357d: Yes it does. I've been told it looks terrifying - especially when I eat or drink.
textByHashes.6531e16ddffd073c1543023fe352941beda873ae: Do you have anything to sell?
textByHashes.5d9df9e9a3256608aaadf59bfa45c0bc714ca76e: You're not a very good salesman, are you? Just tell me what you're selling!
textByHashes.7b6202ced258c2370e4d9cc4bd692e3eb19fcc5f: Sure - I'd like to buy a crystal.
textByHashes.d5502cf630fb783bc1226d8b54a1a34722afa4ff: Which places can the Escape crystal teleport me out of?
textByHashes.120b14fdf62c308be540dc5ad58f08d64abcfeb4: What are you up to now that your head is back where it belongs?
textByHashes.8d3a1da58fd191da5b89cab7398d0c5aceaaa2fe: I think that would suit you very well!
textByHashes.f55db5583a4dda54c7d611ef4ce2b9eed00b8bf7: Why don't you like it anymore?
textByHashes.9e85da89edc6281339844255ba2d54b4e3854718: What kinds of magical fields are we talking about?
textByHashes.90e37b8002e50200c1904fe5ac3d0fdbb76b07d8: Can I buy an Escape crystal?
textByHashes.044aa72d56fc9d6f6af171cb1c1c32b3fb2ba329: Can I buy an Members object?
textByHashes.3a82a620f0d4d3c9aa17565ea3ac9ecc4f2b9ef5: Which places can the Members object teleport me out of?
textByHashes.b1c3407cfc6b095d26ae6a2acba3fd1b490d96b1: What kind of magical fields are we talking about?
textByHashes.5cbf96a9a4dbe0d96f548bd1530520bc07b97710: Hello there, what are you doing here?
textByHashes.5cb04a0dbe315d90bdb173a18ff5949f89cb563f: His associate? What does that mean?
textByHashes.506e80980b4bbd119ec6d265707049180c88aa87: Are you going to say anything meaningful at all?
textByHashes.e90cb0c31542aaace94e11ed002156545368635b: It's a very interesting island you have here.
textByHashes.0dc599ead445d37bc9fe5f812f2c82f8e12071d8: Everything seems to have a magical feel to it.
textByHashes.e165777f0076a1d56e5e6780952aeff2c5deb7e2: What sort of things do you use your magic for?
textByHashes.0206926b1a3f7192c20f50b9a521fcd1efe592b1: What has kept you so secluded on this island?
textByHashes.f514d245577002d3dd20563be7e5a1831132157d: I think I will just have to take your word on that.
textByHashes.93b748dfe4d08599f4621a6e1a7bd396c592dfc3: I can imagine. Where do you get all your food from? Or even the soil for this garden?
textByHashes.3e14cd06eec3da44395e4f2a2b45fbcd6161cb18: Not at all! Please, go on!
textByHashes.787a7677da756295fe898381898137369dcb0b64: Why did you dwarves stay so deep under ground, then? Why not simply go above ground?
textByHashes.94695202f53302dd321906d4022fa47df0544dae: A little, yes. I don't really know what all this has to do with anything.
textByHashes.a5814829c42084ca38faecf1fcdc46fcef022632: Do you know what raisins are?
textByHashes.4355bba8791b3906557556b37a61522c623ef0a8: Thanks for helping with the raisins.
textByHashes.0fa4173ca3b5cc21b2e0e2e94bf64b3ca28b260e: What are trading sticks and how do I get some?
textByHashes.6aba0758f991f547fcd6301980b68a89bb942fd9: Can I send a parcel please?
textByHashes.da76149607e6edc8e0f97178daec6f2a61b5f00a: I don't have the money on me right now though... can I start a tab?
textByHashes.e8731065f17c9dc34a347e7fd7521eabe8c75f5f: The one that says; 'Please Do Not Ask For Credit As Being Attacked By A Large Angry Werewolf Inn Keeper Often Offends'?
textByHashes.01feac9f37b165ee2a31f331b12e6cb5eac02cbf: So... everyone here is a werewolf?
textByHashes.739e7ecca10a547f0485c3871a4ac1ae84e37ad8: Tell me about the land of Morytania.
textByHashes.fa505015fcd5d4fc0972a849f2e9e75b1c4b91c8: You mean you kill someone you know in order to meet the tithe???
textByHashes.5f0394ca44d8a58a7a594e148ebce49ebddfe054: Tell me about the shopkeepers here.
textByHashes.1a11159558c6de751d78894a2db8adc5afbe1680: Tell me what you know about Sbott the Tanner.
textByHashes.fd7488f7ac9a2057c9a8ae354186419e0e68140b: Know anything interesting about Rufus the food seller?
textByHashes.a40d835b8fb134577476802c9f00c1fd29ae9008: Got anything to share about Barker the clothes seller?
textByHashes.84b2077d7601a54b7877d551e67a8d83d510693c: I bet you have some juicy gossip about Fidelio the general store owner.
textByHashes.a44fd39fafa150403f0e5288e0110c1e59b5176f: Exotic items? From Misthalin? Like what?
textByHashes.8028deaed604eab3c7f85e6d8a5a9445753541fb: Tell me about the temple to the west.
textByHashes.bef0f12e58ce106b0e0bcbf550a1a0c9ec08a357: Um... yeah. It was great. Really.
textByHashes.5c50b571cfa164d2bbfb520c8e94af1951a7a724: It's nice to see another human face around here.
textByHashes.f5d54e8ed5d2ea08ffab58a0d3d0165ffa4aa81b: I'm sorry, I haven't had the privilege.
textByHashes.ef5abacf9ac25f080d66378267c983331d3c790a: Oh, Robin, Master Bowman, I see.
textByHashes.3de1da8476bb5565a782bb3e35bee9c8dfe5292b: Anything for a famous person such as yourself.
textByHashes.199180fc5db539f1b64702b1d353804807ec74a9: Can I have these bones converted into bonemeal with the promised amount of slime, please?
textByHashes.296fe9a6c5d7579a1e0360adabd0207e0b0fd582: How's your son getting on, now that I've rescued him from the time bubble and the culinaromancer?
textByHashes.28a9da49dad224cf6fb49b865521741e7656cef8: How do you stop your icy snacks melting? The middle of the desert is the last place I'd expect to see ice.
textByHashes.22936cbf7fd54e5cb702586193bb776458370e2e: How's business, now that the curse has gone?
textByHashes.104e4888670c426d97aa76a43051bf8ac618fb76: Ehm... well... my name is , if that rings any bell?
textByHashes.ca66b406897abd3569d6daa78fc52d32d8a686bd: OK then, let's have a look.
textByHashes.e45969d16114b0bc5ec63b51fed2fbdd6e182753: I've got those pies you wanted.
textByHashes.ba51da7a4a0965726b7dc85d725ce84451c3c20b: Is that all you have to say about yourself?
textByHashes.eaa3afd5a10d8076604513868dae228c361f726b: Oh well, I suppose that's enough for some people.
textByHashes.42f785b8af39bf90be1db08d901c7801e3399e48: What can I do for you then?
textByHashes.fd2637f9d3df740e7892c1bcd7eec573f3f12320: No, and I can't be bothered anymore.
textByHashes.12a6ce6cd46b02d44e1d1c5e0ce6b0313b39cae5: But look, I've got what you asked for right here!
textByHashes.2dee0d2eadb033c3e421e7f7f1b7bef714aa92eb: Look, I've got what you asked me to get!
textByHashes.0660426745efdc3c9b25f234b9536b1919b97ef4: You wanted me to get item, remember? Well, here you go!
textByHashes.06a8fe470a6a1b7afc619e559af2cc0d4138210c: Is that Roy over there then?
textByHashes.49df62cd4b49b747753e60100be1395461c2794b: Oh really? Where are you heading?
textByHashes.ffa5d17d41a837dbdcce2ad35d0ad9563a5a39a7: I've heard it's dangerous over there...
textByHashes.7dd753a44a345168ab9cec14da2ae2bb3a048418: I hope you find him, young one. I best be off.
textByHashes.820a31112bad436d0fe7d8cb92392c64e4eff0db: Nope, seems pretty much the same to me.
textByHashes.1689e345679fbbf29b6166b3641356271f9d6dd2: Hello there! What are you doing out here?
textByHashes.c3741eed64f9205abae6ce367de8c44074388bbd: Right... And where is this crab?
textByHashes.137989960e340179b3a091adbf137e55427442dc: Do you happen to know where that large crab is?
textByHashes.21275a437bd5bed858d441b94bb5cc89abf20977: A scientific dig... Where have I heard of that before?
textByHashes.72257ce4f70cb04e77007082d6f1a1a194638a68: I found a ruby in the ground.
textByHashes.c1e4b794cb4ffc34155a62160c7fdd9f25a34e84: Anything I can help you out with?
textByHashes.021f8cb3839c47e43fe63e61fab9695261abfbf1: Will I get anything for helping?
textByHashes.4b47df6e6e3ded546ae37a0b044c52ab752e7bab: Would you like me to deal with them?
textByHashes.7d52d21c5cc1e64015ea2c1d0e07516f5734e95a: What should I do with the bandits?
textByHashes.907cef52bd7f0051a721e2b9025a453f9f3be302: I found an emerald in the earth.
textByHashes.f8341077f1c8475d00bed1dc025122ae7fa3faa7: Why do you only sell meats?
textByHashes.6fa459d736c66b58e2e924185e5d51ccc428c927: I want to travel to Uzer.
textByHashes.c27c7103a3d978918251cca358f55644f4a4b815: I want to travel to the Bedabin Camp.
textByHashes.8d67693e25829899ebdaf9854a43a291992a58c5: I want to travel to Pollnivneach.
textByHashes.58d00e00d384c4c95b1c526ae414b47eb0e0c14c: I don't want to travel to any of those places.
textByHashes.b00f7b1d9f7c81e163f66558ffff04a32796c977: I don't want to travel there.
textByHashes.9ba09f85c2c7753472cd7eda34bd5f3405d1625e: Take me to the Pass then.
textByHashes.4a05d622e279c6372417c029b8a82b82c9f04d84: I want to travel to Nardah.
textByHashes.74d76c23fa7f3f7a7be4ad940627d2d761fe3254: I want to travel to Menaphos.
textByHashes.2be9c0a07f3e0e0f96327c5fc0d0b5566fd27019: I want to travel to Sophanem.
textByHashes.a0024bed033ad29191f6db75c85ef4e10b70418c: I can't say that I have, but he must be the ambitious type to try and set up his own airline.
textByHashes.5b8b19cdcfb318a16854ba12c2a895b8a5fce7e8: Hah? I think you've gone and lost me now.
textByHashes.f51df2c5f1819f86dd8b72a1e6808adab9c0b760: Ya... gnomes, I'm with you that far.
textByHashes.d496903e90a42d15828cd7d7e97644a894d2121d: Ah yes I remember him now, I went on a wild goose chase looking for his nephew.
textByHashes.67eb6eddb754df6ff705ac417459eb52c6945e1b: I had a bit of fun though, The whole job was quite diverting.
textByHashes.8676bc64c9c8924029da2c73da30e34bf1df1a4e: Tell me about this Magic Carpet fleet.
textByHashes.50225e1d1df90679b8f8f547b4e9296e5dde0ba2: Tell me about how the carpet works.
textByHashes.c0cc88c682e059a5ca216bec6e2a8e1fcbbc56a3: Well perhaps if I offered the right price?
textByHashes.5599018c824b44f035f036fe444e11e73a009f44: I suppose getting stuck in a carpet jam could get a bit tiresome.
textByHashes.f57a4f6d80c7a61c2dbee1a3ea0f0e5b428b322c: Tell me about the enterprise then.
textByHashes.0ebf5847d916b32f3f4b6edd0ce60b0043948f34: So why has he limited the service to just the desert?
textByHashes.2f7a11639099d9db3b4c3a78251d79c24d791e8d: You're right I guess. How's the business going then?
textByHashes.9f090e3e83e31e8e5548a672a7b1f2dda1828bc2: Who would want to come here?
textByHashes.fd1201566c912544c9b0fb9260315f24380b19a3: So I suppose you're called Ali then.
textByHashes.468936aa2381616d753429125b5d9d242fa6a6b2: So have you come up with any good ideas then?
textByHashes.2f5b7affe1ccb36b0d6228e7984f2d032847f9a8: Is that your pet monkey nearby?
textByHashes.f536fecb194b41302f7833ffa59c677c75686e46: I detect a degree of hostility being directed towards the monkey.
textByHashes.36f6da0cf31530b0a7581e70119183f8d5842187: I'm confused. I thought you didn't like monkeys.
textByHashes.ff735b578b597bf33d42d34ac7218e3b07fefac9: Hang on a minute, I think I have an amulet of monkeyspeak stored somewhere. Perhaps I could get it and see what it has to say for itself.
textByHashes.b088a267bf815e7dc71e4aa1b3f769568c24d126: Hang on a second, I have an amulet of monkeyspeak in my bag, perhaps I could have a word with him.
textByHashes.1acd99f41521999382d6e9c33a5ef475107a327f: Where did you get that hat?
textByHashes.8bc9c9dbaaa29b239de166f7bb771f26313fd8e6: Welcome? This place doesn't look very welcoming to me.
textByHashes.dfe1e8524233aca3cc1eddc26750adb21ab847a9: Yeah, it's contending with that storm that worries me.
textByHashes.f20d9f8d9df3df574ccd3a18fd3ab808757c55a0: But why? Could you not just take the safer route around the storm?
textByHashes.7dd4b6ff585e957c8c23677496f65aa97934a308: I see. That does make sense, but what's in it for you guys?
textByHashes.64bb402dacc04bb922cea2916790e2c12fa3f7aa: Sailing as a sport? How does that work? What are the rules?
textByHashes.d3a63d67afbb4dc13be761699504b713ea82a2ba: Thanks for the advice, I'll bear that in mind.
textByHashes.b8d1daf7c98d2757306be4d418289d29aa6cd300: I'd like to attempt the Tempor Tantrum.
textByHashes.161ce63f9172bba988c158d459f9d57e3530dd82: Can you tell me about the Tempor Tantrum?
textByHashes.000214d655827075440dfe4834f5ed4516afe1c1: And what do I need to do during the trial?
textByHashes.f405d1c8a9c18c92ac0914655af4112302ba0d5e: Are there any benefits to being a trial master?
textByHashes.de2e9a999642e22aba755128d475c14f9dfa481f: Thanks! I wasn't sure I was going to make it in time.
textByHashes.e5d82845e306e8890d0af3756b33c4fe91ab9e69: Thanks! Do I have any more rewards to claim?
textByHashes.77a0457a1546eb85d6a4b766f46591f84d18e9c3: You've still got a nice house, don't you?
textByHashes.a130aabe984a7b8dd9c6de684bbbd490aa409b9b: Have you another helmet like the one you gave me?
textByHashes.d6a17eba303c3c3c8bda654193c957495258126a: What would you do if I said I had loads of expensive items with me?
textByHashes.8a4a09997e1b0dc6fc07653a06d04d99d763b2cd: Well, I'll say I'm not carrying anything valuable at all.
textByHashes.cb96fc8d98e4a14a1529a3da66228cbc0fada655: They will be gone soon! The Imperial Guard will use a secret way that starts from the back of the Sherpa's hut to destroy the troll camp!
textByHashes.b5ed272af72a1c235c2043c1a0d72437b5250954: I'm afraid there's been some trouble...
textByHashes.be3fe65ec83484dde4ae8faa61212b7ee36e2db7: I'm sure the Imperial Guard will deal with them in due course.
textByHashes.e64eebb020c1228c40df9dedcd86b843a4716a2d: Don't you understand that I've saved your life?
textByHashes.b7e6cca7b908e271e401e20e99ee9987e8304581: Don't you care that you're going to die?
textByHashes.df57be40cfa34fcf99e043918341d337bd64d7c4: Can I go and confront Zulrah myself?
textByHashes.609548bb00776a39bc15de116a7dd44fe66dbc36: Yes, I'd like to get a machete.
textByHashes.310e83f722d7ccc59d1e804795f9f166c41eed11: I don't have enough trading sticks, sorry.
textByHashes.14109b808e2ecfe4e9309c5bf5df8322ceea144c: Why do you need a gout plant tuber?
textByHashes.212de0fb60acb3305bd2c7f2a7fe1be7358ff6c3: No thanks, I have to go.
textByHashes.d93b396e35090512c8413343bd87a93480ac33c3: You're not from around here are you?
textByHashes.0ac8116fa84d00fe4a5894a1acb6327906a8dc1c: Well your accent for one sounds a little funny, and you seem to have a little more colour than most dwarves.
textByHashes.0ad0184cedbc07d59cb21f11f4f23bcc10560f52: Well, at least sailing still lets you enjoy the sea when you're not surfing.
textByHashes.3ad08838aec3ad759a02fc238610f4e1f7b448c9: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. Maybe you'd be interested in joining me once I'm ready for that sort of thing?
textByHashes.7a20191a2e56ac132f98bfc801eed4b6b98a61ec: If you're a sailor, would you be interested in joining my crew?
textByHashes.ef94472119ac6b0740de4aba2673075cd874837d: I'll give it a miss, thanks.
textByHashes.ae154436740e35825b9959a4f0d0bb3b527ba07c: Why can't I help out while wearing this?
textByHashes.725569e9cddd9b624aa31b62d4977682665b15ac: Oh yeah, Saradomin forbid that the 'rum' made from whatever is lying around gets a bit of hair in it.
textByHashes.4aceea7525e78886c87cc51bd5cc265ba6d91245: Can you ferry me to that island?
textByHashes.7025a05978a5cc87af3f6316605aba629f17ea55: I don't have that sort of money!
textByHashes.c311fea5d427860df6a030d4e00539d874b3ec81: Ok, here's the ridiculous sum of money...
textByHashes.ea787dfe78e95137bbd054c171d1cf1ccfea67e7: Why so much? You'd get more business if you charged less.
textByHashes.855c0855d1ddb5d434f45503b59ce06c75abf551: How come you're charging so much?
textByHashes.cb021e9aa67ab460ff41c9217a73d1050047a929: Uh huh, that's a mighty fine gold necklace you have.
textByHashes.d94d2c5d0994ab9056314a062bb2523fa736dce7: That's a nice boat! Would be a shame if something were to happen to it.
textByHashes.9de42a4fa55ebd368724b68ea48250272973df23: Actually, I've not quite finished yet, I'll stay.
textByHashes.cb9af0200a480a45d77b2d9814a3f0d3a11d71b6: So... I've heard you druids might be able to teach me herblore...
textByHashes.938218ddd5e7a273eb0a62524a198c806f2274d5: Hey there, can you tell me something about this Sanfew Serum, like how do I make it, and what does it do?
textByHashes.e9466e9523726754e4f2e1462a39ecea59eb87e2: Ok, I'm sold... How do you make it?
textByHashes.dfd89a8fc2d1a2cee103b242376e88b240db94b4: How do you mean, deep into the Mort Myre swamp?
textByHashes.eb22169b84f6f11728aa7823b5aae869188c7326: Ok, that's very helpful. Many thanks for your assistance.
textByHashes.7320437e8e8ff7f7548b53473565a226506131ce: Did you say you needed more goutweed?
textByHashes.4b448ad439144dbcce4139a30a05f121b6272c00: Can I go through that door please?
textByHashes.e25eae8e9b0c4716125f3fcea1b748e39747a47f: I haven't got that much money with me.
textByHashes.95e0c460b1f5d13d1d33c648ebf0f87084438e11: Why is it worth the entry cost?
textByHashes.406b50b75f3011b018e882b8768cdd3b1d32f181: Can I pay you for permanent access?
textByHashes.88dded2cb91d6ec02b8cc1ee6c8c456c6d186d68: I haven't got 1,000,000 coins with me.
textByHashes.23399e8d253e7959badc7fae92c0f254933d0bd9: Where does this strange entrance lead?
textByHashes.046486beba7d05ef2c05284836881144cab35313: I'm impressed, that tree is growing on that shed.
textByHashes.6b050e7d2961f5884016cbd54b59e744f47d8b06: If that's what it takes to get into that pub, absolutely.
textByHashes.2df6d0a740f89888b3d6bc0c819907633471e164: I think I want to take a look around first.
textByHashes.1a2b1b244cb157b0884045f86a63db80495777ab: Do you enjoy being a host in these games?
textByHashes.2cdd400087908876cc611c073b37e1a972ecc63b: Do you get anything for being a host?
textByHashes.83960d4558bf18966978abb4f89f5236b4ff31a1: So what's your story? How did you end up here?
textByHashes.9ab85d5bf1bb5698b11b69f163626286f8368f8c: But you don't look particularly ghostly, or zombie-like?
textByHashes.3d932a8194594df0093e3e317e4eb699dbe4581e: Amazing, but also kind of scary at the same time.
textByHashes.4a8b0af19d0f8fc8257a5de85e0b1307ce51b236: Do you happen to know if I'm on the Naughty List or Nice List?
textByHashes.7ae4e277d313bfd0992ef0d543e308b31d15d7a0: Yes, I'm looking for some weapons.
textByHashes.591908705d5d1018dbd1970de2d78e4974d59ccd: Sure, got it. That's 3 item in the next 15 minutes, I'll get right on it.
textByHashes.ddcae88991c2f2bc496410f499bb462724229f6e: Sure, got it. That's 4 item in the next 15 minutes, I'll get right on it.

textByHashes.59159281f2e073fa86fa2b707090dfb818ca3ddf: Oh great, what is it this time?

textByHashes.fa10f90ae114de0ff6f93439713fd017f654251c: Yes, I'm looking for some armour.
textByHashes.124fbe3a524d7736e33ac81145359cb62619d10a: Right, I'll get you 3 item in the next 15 minutes. I can do that, yes.

textByHashes.9327eb171b2baafc2d56e6715307439d931599e2: I don't want to look for them anymore.
textByHashes.30dc03ef8db47479ea93238fead5519367e86db8: What's with the bucket on your head?
textByHashes.42756d9cc730498fb7a2a01b9da46adccba0b26c: I hope you can flex your way to victory.
textByHashes.0cdd4f1048aa7c4697359cee39ee8048206bbab6: I think I heard Santa saying we aren't allowed things on your back in the games, by the way.
textByHashes.73c3998f8181cb83f20b4d35e1057ac3325c2448: Yes, please make me some planks.
textByHashes.7a5e91277c8bab6d6e1ff5ae1b14b6a78cfa8b42: Can I buy some housing supplies?
textByHashes.de2135f78d05a70307675c823f7896a133bc809a: Why are you so expensive? The tanner in Al-Kharid is almost half the price!
textByHashes.5dfabd39f4e982949f3b34d3bc964178b323c6f5: No thanks, I haven't any hides.
textByHashes.f1b529770073a79185f6963206017420e210af26: Why do you sell most rune armour but not platebodies?
textByHashes.03cf28eb27afd7e8058c26ad824178483d7dc715: I'm sorry. Sledding is dangerous business.
textByHashes.8bd22b571a28de2defb664c4dc9a754557f9bb1c: Thanks. Will you make it out by yourself?
textByHashes.578f27a242f889256d27ed616ea68d2ed89634ab: I guess you won't be able to get the green ones now.
textByHashes.5faafcb61c6cff39c22ae26cb1ab84e617f25127: Seems like you can't win with those generals. What if you got them both green and red?
textByHashes.64ecb0c0743a17c879eb788480dae14348676c0f: I'd like to go to Port Sarim.
textByHashes.5d86535a6fa49719a572586df444ac946d9d4cff: Do you know where the ship to Kourend is?
textByHashes.9d3cb57d27d2ff96aa75f39bd6a4673b9b992f46: Could you not ask for them back?
textByHashes.99bca612d6302568e938ea17f72d658fbf872146: What are you doing up here? It doesn't seem very safe.
textByHashes.c328e8fd2c506e4d6185685f405cc9fcb050c619: Divine capabilities? You mean praying to the gods?
textByHashes.77956e3c2881169d5579eff8b555cb8db1aa4b15: Interesting. So we need to work together to subdue this creature?
textByHashes.8056a824046648a845b40f993c1694eefbfc8177: Could I trade some tomes in?
textByHashes.dcbb38d91d5ce82fc6d5125e388acc7941498281: You're not Osman. Who are you?
textByHashes.3cc85a3fedded1829fc1b10cce98b2d1b4848da5: Okay... But where is he really?
textByHashes.42ad53ef18027cc5a23c529710d246d57cb99bd8: But who should I take my sq'irk juice to now?
textByHashes.e5ecb6bfe1ca57430184f1389e921e6df31e9f5c: I see. And why can't you do this yourself?
textByHashes.9f903d370f2dbfa374f955daa251d4902e9ad5f9: Okay. This should be an interesting task.
textByHashes.069652837471484531c60d4cbd9c0094939f7c4e: What's so good about sq'irk juice?
textByHashes.f7a1ec2bf37f75831183748738bfe745ddad98cf: Could you sell me another Keris?
textByHashes.859ea7fcf790143b45b1528410305eb924c2a823: That's a big chasm you're standing by.
textByHashes.25dfac9ccd8d23f6c25f6b26dd643a2f86a24a17: What did you think of the coronation?
textByHashes.55450270414265c2aab7219e4cb45c19add69a5e: That's a nice looking axe. Is it heavy?
textByHashes.6628daa12b36fcbcb3348ca1f19eb455f1f2e50e: I have vital information pertaining to the cult of Yama.
textByHashes.824a06dc4129053dc241b3ce2ccaca15c39660a1: Why don't you want to talk to me!
textByHashes.be97e8e5cf02efb1781467798fb2c201645e8e34: I've been trying to make conversation with you and I feel like I'm getting nowhere.
textByHashes.e304e717cf693508d3162b15a07186773f90e7ea: Thank you. What do you mean?
textByHashes.a57f0f15257a52c4f4893a4dd443ec15d0ecc770: That's a fair point. Thank you for explaining it in that way.
textByHashes.7edf38a9e754f5907f28dec9c87dcafe9cd547d7: There's not many of you though.
textByHashes.9a56c2aa7a53453f035b08c3a08bc71515dae85b: I see. Well I'd better let you get on then.
textByHashes.e205e151b2f9624479d2b749281ab6518985ea21: A phantom? So it's not actually real?
textByHashes.e45e65891181f8bb0549d2f3ed0eb2f736122f8f: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.c9d824519bdeb93b250156b6c46c2343fb3ebd51: So the Shayzien Army has no weaknesses at all?
textByHashes.54dcea9b239540ec5b2f8f785867406d9375dc78: Right... But apart from magic, the Shayzien Army has no weaknesses?
textByHashes.e7f5a52ce33f9d8d337b7468ac5a745d7faa19eb: If you say so. See you later.
textByHashes.a96433c06f572e81d617426330d04eb684b6f56d: Hi there; what is this room?
textByHashes.79386b5c32e3c05d6edbef244b0a7e4f7e5c3018: I see. So I just have to wait around for a game?
textByHashes.c338a9d326b4381632de96850bf7668015f66d57: I need help, I've been kidnapped by an evil cat!
textByHashes.09d79701cc54e8660439d5a0f806292243ec4bd7: Now you listen to me! He's just a little cat! There must be something I can do!
textByHashes.b8907970e849876f8377e8011839c5f8fdb9219c: Evil Bob has fallen asleep, come quickly!
textByHashes.a98020a67dd90984885fe9f5562bcbd373bd7df0: Away from this place! To Gielinor!
textByHashes.abb29e0a22ca316458cba2825ea6d11c42fda2db: Oh, alright then, I'll be off! See you around!
textByHashes.6abc5b92c5f38b0489377d20ad9091799309f0dd: I just want to talk to you, that's all.
textByHashes.887b8c55b218c012d959f7fe5bb6a2aaf7578b62: Evil Bob is sleeping! You can escape!
textByHashes.3f627c09d1a5ef5888566fda47b60e8363465727: Yeah Yeah, world domination, that's great and all but do you see that altar you cursed? Could you undo that? I'd like to use it for training down here.
textByHashes.fa1667bbe6a67b83427da9a2aac449d378cf5597: So I use a full set of plate armour on the centre plate of the machines and it will animate it? Then I have to kill my own armour... how bizarre!
textByHashes.6caa41b3dc539e07c762a463d755bbb435873a2b: You're not from around here are you...?
textByHashes.330015be73265c9ff79e33d00c8998dbae4edd14: So will I lose my armour?
textByHashes.60f73f547fc772328e650663728d86991093b9e9: So, occasionally I might lose a bit because it's being bashed about and I'll obviously lose it if I die... that it?
textByHashes.4b4110fe6acb7abaf9bb5f05d2077399d81ca630: Where do the machines come from?
textByHashes.d53e9406791d6adc767722c06557dc3ffb3247a9: I see, so you made the magical machines and Harrallak saw how they could be used in the guild to train warrior's combat... interesting. Harrallak certainly is an intelligent guy.
textByHashes.99dc6679ee5045364caf17b436ed1ad45cdaf21b: Right, I need space in my pack for them. I'll be back!
textByHashes.ce55152bf9872b0cfe5a1785432c42993a1ee281: Okay, I'll go see what I can find to do around here to earn some tokens.
textByHashes.238b2ca79d449c913cfdb9faec0b7d8a6118c2c1: Excellent, may I have it so I can try the machine again?
textByHashes.e02e364b4b762ef55a18677e6340c3863caa6f1a: Okay, I'll go make some room in my inventory and come back.
textByHashes.485273f1863c3c35bfef19dcb7bc82d121a5a3ab: Okay, so I can only use plain full plate armour of appropriate materials, no trimmed armour or unusual kit?
textByHashes.73f100b9eb3a7e0d31963ad66babe3a049165f9c: Why is there a Shantay Pass here?
textByHashes.4d87c0fecbbbd35f165d6d1ccf7434a6eead3025: Shantay once told me that he's not interested in profit!
textByHashes.4753e6571f81e35d580ff3bb58456477befa6863: Can I see what you have to sell please?
textByHashes.22c6be72ce94169424783f456f83ebbca963452e: I want to buy a Shantay pass for 5 gold coins.
textByHashes.0847407cb7b464575400a228edc201e3ab72e114: I'd like to go into the desert please.
textByHashes.1c7d99b5f98ab54293e808082257405e89603abf: I am definitely an outlaw, prepare to die!
textByHashes.5ef93d9ac94978990774fc56d3a74380821fae11: No thanks, you're not having my money.
textByHashes.f39c8d901d0e9411b8267c2f98e67afd1ab936b5: Why do I have to pay to go into the desert?
textByHashes.0839700a4fd1dbf357027bc10dedca0cf8a11eea: Ok, tell me about jungle slashing!
textByHashes.73ed2f775c12802f1349f9db4098c4b1a571d500: Right Ok, good advice... 'poison on spears....' Anything else I should know about?
textByHashes.4d81d046c9a5f62de7c9a6634ba37da5946bb629: Erk! Well that sounds pretty scary!
textByHashes.90eac937fe55c2c63008ce71da281179f9db33f3: I have to say, that's quite a lot of information...thanks very much!
textByHashes.b3cfd0f918c27b59fd8ede844a536a65181a08b1: You don't seem to be hiding very well.
textByHashes.ed8eb04764afed95ad25135b527fb0d358b7faad: Do you know how many lizardmen I've killed?
textByHashes.6d66c7b3b66506dd7705e05f35cae52b9cd81e60: Riiiight, anyways, can I attack these lizardmen shaman?
textByHashes.af2212891b5f1f19e038d5a47077a676d9d54eeb: That's a sheep...I think. I can't talk to sheep.
textByHashes.ad3cd5ba8c079f1aa452af70f79ead3f8a95e6ec: Very sensible! Did you make these yourself?
textByHashes.347e8fd32bfdc7095f20571b2bf4878171ce9dcf: Where can I find out more information about the resources needed?
textByHashes.5e316d24e2726bb53a0d7c5babb2755d1d46eff2: May I have a resource flyer?
textByHashes.79c9082d06229e6bd0255736aa9c069ad8c99818: Who's better than you on the other side of the mountain?
textByHashes.9de5397f63730395c7bb030959e812fbb8e0c871: Oh... How did you come across that crossbow then?
textByHashes.66e2ca4544069427c2658fdd3a58529763289360: It was nice meeting you William.
textByHashes.4a4128bd9a7e7fbf1156373cd0c3538670326aef: Hey who you calling old?! And strange?!
textByHashes.1e86ee35019444ef86ca7c8562b58f25165bb281: Hello there. What do you do around here?
textByHashes.91412dfefd9fcc6db1befbe567f326424f8f0cbf: Interesting... Would I be able to buy one?
textByHashes.23535756c898649f0db89cf8ac89eab34af1c473: I'd like to retrieve a boat.
textByHashes.17de6597376e839487915964f7ed477f6394b7f6: Sorry, but I'm not paying that.
textByHashes.90025cd8911129c39ae2f968c9da82c911614d77: Can you tell me more about this place?
textByHashes.f71964a34afbcb96fde9c5a6bc914a1e3e30c906: How many others even are there in Gielinor?
textByHashes.85766b77a57bd4f530f77bee1b2725284aef81e0: But what if I don't have the right skillsets?
textByHashes.20f3af97a93f43cfdafc8a9ff6c3f36a6bc52f23: That's very kind of them. What's the catch?
textByHashes.9f95bc6753546478988ae454caaa434cd8a49bc2: And if I'm not skilled enough to take the lead?
textByHashes.34e6ace80a6576e293a832d6859b8ad5f910e536: Could you help me repair my boat?
textByHashes.9b51e31b6c12e079dd7428768f3908aae6ac6461: Where can I get materials for my boat?
textByHashes.18d8a512f9a88621c7d0600eb61db257132b1017: I might need help building things on my boat.
textByHashes.32ca0b05460713029d8763f0b9b02211c8a11f8e: And what sort of price should I expect?
textByHashes.4d008e1572540ccb755f12761fd3d9dd4b029c0a: So you're telling me you won't be able to spare your best shipwrights?
textByHashes.a6b37822d6a57aafd1f9e18e56337eb9ac088a16: I see. So once things start to get complicated, I'm going to have to do it myself?
textByHashes.24478ec88d2de1218a651c0b5971529d67db2e5b: Yours don't look very regulation to me.
textByHashes.8fe119b4b88be12d1bb7637d35a2741f034b3f9a: Oh, well thanks! But you're not...
textByHashes.eac8fb1ab4c409e9cb4e814c829bab377598cb08: Doesn't that mean that you should be, too?
textByHashes.6e2abff42f18f00d29361f72fc9bb4fef83f4fa9: Safety first, and all that. But where's your...
textByHashes.9b4522406b790fdab7e41b6e73724d7f0466f5f3: What will you do about it?
textByHashes.d473a52e3a383f84d9c53a5858696a4ab9204e80: No, I'm okay for swords right now.
textByHashes.ee9fbcc0ec616344a103de5c5e44d63f44a4e072: Do you know where the Sleeper Plague came from?
textByHashes.bff87e799aee494213fc06633bc66fff75c0100f: So why were you the only one to come here?
textByHashes.557801df0dd8d87747153085a08790b48fd6c788: She doesn't look too dangerous at the moment.
textByHashes.71be309cd6bc275ba776ed6471923ba096c23553: But if it's a dream, how can it be dangerous?
textByHashes.4a36630c2bc2d54235674ae552fdf1e11fee8d7b: Sounds lovely. So how can we stop her?
textByHashes.5927454ec44df6f13f4b3fb68b2f207e708f66b8: How do I keep her at bay?
textByHashes.8bba36359d9cd23a47ff8e4bea1c7990626c6ea9: And what's in it for me if I do survive?
textByHashes.78957bb82f9f9ab83e424816c6591f144a6211c3: Works for me. I'd better get started then.
textByHashes.5f2d2418148ab515334c593d43f38591640bec9d: Wow, are you this friendly to everyone?
textByHashes.9bf89d02aaa7e8639cd4b5d846b080e4856236c4: A mutual friend of ours, Ali Morrisane, wants you to supply his stall in Al Kharid with your garments.
textByHashes.60ab7054e1522d6e16093f0caadecbe8a8b7d535: Well for one, you'd probably sell more clothes and once the people of Al Kharid see your amazing works of tailoring, I'm sure they'd spread the word of your clothes far and wide.
textByHashes.9614d7b16c2e6242dbfb1b00d92c9d5d5132e8c6: Well then what do you need?
textByHashes.8c59c2cff444b2ae6d052a1d54f40f5a2a138f0a: What do you mean by animal pelt?
textByHashes.9452fc8f21e91e59053fa2e28b25c9354ada4e33: Ok, I'll get you the materials.
textByHashes.2d1ff880f1807426f864ace62f4940e853286e01: Yup, I've got what you want with me.
textByHashes.7a65985d04d82890e4980d8a3e1ed0873485d927: Think nothing of it. I'm looking forward to seeing what you've produced for the Al Kharid market.
textByHashes.a3d50c3a1668fe1566921657fec6f4904ac1cc8c: A hello would have been nice.
textByHashes.803130fbadb8fff04b9c8260d204883c7c1d058d: Umm... What do you need again?
textByHashes.c9b60fe9f61e725dbb2f5bd958f35f9eb1d967b6: Not yet, I have a few things to do first.
textByHashes.d787e845fa0c9dcfda1413967b7dd2fc1f2461fa: Don't worry, I'll get to it.
textByHashes.58d3d079ba46f079560b9d532e96a8763b7d9b32: Not too bad, Ali was well impressed by the reaction and demand they had initially but he's a little concerned about how the sales have dropped off of recent.
textByHashes.2bfede5a8fff7616b6c3c246d3f6c6a7f83c547c: I thought this acne potion might help ease your itching.
textByHashes.376774220dcfe1d1dca87d5870b068e6116f5650: Fear not, I am very strong
textByHashes.393ee8afe531a83c9a32aeccc7e05b9c43454857: I was just curious as to what you do around here.
textByHashes.05bc67ff1b5d0d65d35510a6d434d3df41b45916: Human? Can't say I've seen many human shaped monsters in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.953e6fbcddcf540cfbb354321746856b62bcf486: Uhm... alright then, I'll leave you to your duties.
textByHashes.b8a548457e6d07ef27fd08adeee53f808b7fa34a: Hello there. I have some spined dagannoth hides, and believe you might be able to make an armour of them for me...?
textByHashes.73e2e75b3b824b685c89f0974e12067e1561c315: The hunt? I've already done your task! That's why I'm a Fremennik now!
textByHashes.17da1b7b18f14b8ea88a79544f9e1637ec30196c: Okay, I might just do that.
textByHashes.25d0f7b6efac8f663f48e5fda2fc4c3d0033450d: Can you give me any advice then?
textByHashes.d5382bf32018c9388ffb9c5bc6a1285582985b5f: Why do they call you the Great and Brainy?
textByHashes.c679b7eec2535d85c5a54a176c97bb1823ba3f7a: So you invented the 'Log Canoe' by falling into a river hugging a tree?
textByHashes.3a9c6d05f247f46a730998a1a44beeb63697e891: Oh. Sorry, you don't look very busy.
textByHashes.c72d0b9397c4e6a46471ccdccae45c410af9ece7: Yes! Do you want to know what my quest is?
textByHashes.7e995cf5c31630705a162714b37d5dfdabb50458: Sorry about that. I'll leave you alone, then.
textByHashes.bed78e32d3c08c3c36fdd0fdc9032b8ad94641b5: I'm the leader of the Dagon'hai. Bow before me!
textByHashes.5c2faf60611f15958ba7b2aae09f3f382fcac513: Yes! Be afraid! Be very afraid! Ha ha ha!
textByHashes.ec14a72b1b36d5f4ba3219b8e5824613f11506d2: Hah! Yes. I told you so! Now, I have work to be done.
textByHashes.f38cb6b10f2b18c39444f163303fa585d95bb3a2: No, you're right. I'm not a mage.
textByHashes.759aff2957d63b429310269c8c8aba9045debc71: No. That's too much for me.
textByHashes.fa8982779a02d4ca4354b8afc21ac67e95716600: Oh dear. I don't have enough money.
textByHashes.bfa7eb7f5586ca4ea8827490ceb26a0caa381605: No, really. I don't want it.
textByHashes.ee71ffb68c0695ddc46b9660b9477d2db99f4ee1: I'm sure it's been a valuable find.
textByHashes.f21115e749c11219b79589b7185cac0e36b36178: What I came to ask was: I lost that key you gave me.
textByHashes.3f3933c47825342b26788bd45896edf6f222d82a: Oh, You know that key you gave me?
textByHashes.cb675af03998795c82fd899b8e4b3de227dfc1f3: I'm . What are you doing all the way out here?
textByHashes.63184b85d7c78fae4d77d6e92380d9151db66878: So, why are you down here and not up there then?
textByHashes.4254d3a3e6322c61a5e6cf006137c4e42fafcc34: How on earth did you get down the cliff face, then?
textByHashes.3f606ebcf9cef374cecea6f52f35bf2f77da0e8a: Glad I was able to help... but who is your boss? I thought you worked for the museum?
textByHashes.3a05c511ba85f9d094245b56466d5dfe61124deb: I have one, but I want to keep it for now.
textByHashes.030667c2eee136bf1b873a524d48991a05831a50: Thanks for the advice, but I'll hang onto it for now.
textByHashes.14e764b2989a77b57adc6a8b8fb14f52e6538c3f: I have some, but I want to keep them for now.
textByHashes.921c3773c84093e683133d404ab3d180547fd276: I have some interesting artefacts I'd like you to look at.
textByHashes.cad8831409291f6733ff79f8a777f12d4cfa54ca: What! This is a genuine pharaoh's sceptre - made out of solid gold and finely jewelled with precious gems by the finest craftsmen in the area.
textByHashes.41ef0a6dee35b2736097cbf83f0aa6814f642d47: I don't think so! I'll find someone who'll give me what it's worth.
textByHashes.f02d65acfad43c997b9126e0d56760ba8b88a046: Yes, as long as I get a decent price for them.
textByHashes.5bdb0b6683999cbee8b4bba0169561f99ba2cf1a: No, let me think about it.
textByHashes.201a85475aa462e5cd4e570bad130db23c2bd190: No, I think I'll keep it.
textByHashes.7d420580720eed27ae5b591c5d48b50f62a84437: I'm looking for the Sin Seer.
textByHashes.abdfecac146a8d635775b88a4d8bd56727d320f8: Uh, no actually, I'm trying to join a really evil guy's team.
textByHashes.ec3be7259253333aa9572bc13516a3621ace3ec5: Uh, I want to prove to General Khazard I'm trustworthy.
textByHashes.ba2cfadc585c997560bd5a33265662b673a18236: What if I pay you for the trouble - would you then? I can't imagine you make much money, seeing people's sins and all.
textByHashes.51caf3b4231a8732989b7ea805b0ca1045ed54a0: Fine, you don't actually have to see my sins, just pronounce me to be trustworthy. I'll pay you and be on my way.
textByHashes.237f30048b19411f3a15ce5f8e5441f11dc35916: PLEASE! I want to know what he's up to.
textByHashes.29e4c4a0cbfe15e9f8a4b808cc5b3164f0fd1bcd: I'm really just looking for a quest...
textByHashes.80f646c959cce3d75223b66d349a250bfb5f6249: If we break out of this cell, do you reckon you can take on the Black Knights in the keep?
textByHashes.2213a5036d2b1303566099b9139f20bb9136052f: Give me an R. Give me an O. Give me a U..
textByHashes.0bc3938365aa83c99e4babfe94de5a54bbeea01d: Morning. Know where an adventurer has to go to find a quest around here?
textByHashes.3746686c445587f290e24f25c546fbdc4fdc3df4: You're a little full of yourself aren't you?
textByHashes.258ea4089954d28bbcdfd61fe08410cb659eea95: Gee, it was nothing saving you all from the clutches of Morgan Le Faye and freeing your King.
textByHashes.253af98e663f57ef9c0b622a4cfe11b207040851: I think you should stick to being a knight.
textByHashes.8cc511eb94f74239c8977867146be990b24b572a: I'd like some advice on finding a quest.
textByHashes.7d7a02161a44a7cf0e5367956db4566a190d7373: Makes you wonder how they kidnapped you in the first place.
textByHashes.3110a2c9dcf136a4a23637053bdba93f9aa75056: Can you tell me about this museum?
textByHashes.364d3c2e584b46d866198963d897bfe831925865: I'd like to contribute towards the museum.
textByHashes.e8333e43c8b21393c5553dd592a1602a3d489314: Could you tell me the current progress towards finishing the museum?
textByHashes.2a2fc8e64d88cfa72a42036abd45f3eabc6a6f4d: I'd be happy to help. I'll keep an eye out for any useful materials.
textByHashes.aad1e3f4dd9c002b8524bf0dcc056217fce0feb5: I'll pass, I don't have time to help.
textByHashes.aac241280df23f5c97b7f69bb8781ff675690f8e: Hello. I'm looking for a quest. Who should I talk to?
textByHashes.e5921d1864d37fb4be1ec6f902cb1d67ceb183fc: Aren't you supposed to be at the Grail Castle?
textByHashes.043790db25ddec1a4e73d97cd5d50d8d943289e9: Yes, although I'm afraid I've lost Silverlight.
textByHashes.21b63ad867ebf0d879b1fae3ab69a8508d89df8d: Is there any chance of me borrowing it again?
textByHashes.8fe65a626ffb946a3281622fed91a70d8d84298e: No way, it's not worth that much.
textByHashes.4d1d1ccbb378f1979e83fd8f41c4f0ab0b7dd5ff: But I don't have that much money.
textByHashes.f5726039687cfdae71322cf7603cbab0d0094266: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Falador Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.775293e18bef04080c5ffd3fc25e30074fec2f32: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Falador achievement diary!
textByHashes.ba8e3a982f47166444a62e634671be4eda4a9c7d: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Falador achievement diary!
textByHashes.0f9da61b7282028217201eb54d7c218df1670ab7: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Falador achievement diary!
textByHashes.7222ce61ce4a14a92b69b0ed7530b55ccfb2888a: Can you see if I have a family crest?
textByHashes.aa8bfc1ab20e54fd8d015505e4d5b097b94e9660: I'll have to go get some.
textByHashes.55a3034f5d806d0818d1cad86c6f49deecf04402: But I'll have to go and fetch the money.
textByHashes.c628803fe425a6f9b6746da7cb04e71e1491ce8d: Well did you also know he was a Mahjarrat?
textByHashes.539cdb955df743f892a8ed6990206d968922fa18: While you're there, it might be worth looking up something called the Elder Horn. It's an artefact that Sliske has now claimed. One that has the ability to control minds.
textByHashes.facadaa77980e03573f72bf12c63a2a184b978a4: I don't really understand this 'Gaze of Saradomin' thing... Do you think you could explain what it does for me?
textByHashes.be7083f3d5648abc34750fbb27fa4caf9510da03: Yeah, what kind of person would want to spawn there... Certainly not me, and I never have! Honest!
textByHashes.defb751758ec4ecbd9130ccf713d8a6814d1c963: Yes, I want to respawn in Falador.
textByHashes.2710a33a7b54e9d2f7ce8cfdb5a0e73449206c67: Yes, I want to respawn in Lumbridge.
textByHashes.24cd8410ddf74448355e92e67696fa0276406a73: Sir Tiffy! I got this scroll from a knight near Trollheim. He said I should deliver it to you urgently.
textByHashes.f7d30267a680350bad21b1273c9bba25101c7abc: Surely, one of the groups would have gained the upper hand by now? After all, it's been thousands of years since that battle.
textByHashes.9ba3db70d12ee9a5640931a17aea9c76b1d128b0: Is that it, then? Aren't we going to do something?
textByHashes.a9d426d4c5692d9291457bdae88124d3218c7016: Err, yes. It was that way when I got it.
textByHashes.d895e4f751861d0278d8cb1771c51728ec074bb3: Is that it then? Aren't we going to do something?
textByHashes.b3222edfc50ba487ac1470f8ca4a02015e439b7d: I'm looking for adventure! More specifically, some sort of quest.
textByHashes.5c2646788d632d3f6bac23e3a585daeefc45c7d2: I thought you just had a weird way of saying hello is all.
textByHashes.a9e083fdc7053bc25e9c4dd5738e2977cc90c2b9: Why are there so many knights in this city?
textByHashes.c053ad779f0c1e08cda5904e0ac12fa2cfb77d98: Can I just talk to you very slowly for a few minutes, while I distract you, so that my friend over there can do something while you're busy being distracted by me?
textByHashes.4c06eeba9d734edd6f0f30415e1d034b97cd8aeb: Nope. I'm just trying to distract you.
textByHashes.bfb67b4afa7256b09709cd8382d69cebfa673dc7: So can I distract you some more?
textByHashes.17d2a8f3969d8c2677136ee77ef621c5443efbb3: Ok. My work here is done. 'Bye!
textByHashes.1fc4f361fa2c8a7cddd2fcbfebecc83ef80d60c7: I'm sorry your day hasn't been going well.
textByHashes.dd1b2e54389b7c9f0fad78b823763874914d6b43: They seem to be carrying dangerous weapons.
textByHashes.9eba7bf0905e673198e5a6ce24c4dbe588036a72: Yes I have. In fact, I've managed to beat the Nightmare myself.
textByHashes.428a256543c062d05680ec0aaeffdd15c419d333: Anyway, as you've heard of the orbs I assume you've also heard of the even stronger Bashyhammer of Ashihama?
textByHashes.fa8c057d1f63a32e56728a9bdff49dd5bb145df6: ...Trashyhammer of Ashihama. Yes, I know what I said.
textByHashes.f5b5d158aa9eb3a6420f6d8f1439b673c803159a: That sounds handy. Can I have one?
textByHashes.1c2c8637dbae976bb72bdff7f35efde77bcc9397: Tell me more about the Sisterhood.
textByHashes.df675b475b554d469e49a93360208681edd0a77e: What happened to those that refused to turn away from Saradomin?
textByHashes.76488f9b7ec8be941dd8490f24f22ed6d51d8d7f: Isn't it just! Found anything interesting?
textByHashes.4338fa5f70d15c73b065b67273dfa4174a5964ee: How do you even know where to begin?
textByHashes.dc36b907054a32193862f97ad24318bc01d201e0: Huh, I've always wondered why so many people do that.
textByHashes.2bd544d3b875beba30c2dfec791de52ba66d1175: I see... So where is she?
textByHashes.b5bbec595dfca842f49aa9483a390c8792f3f54e: Right. The coffin looks pretty secure to me. Why do you need to keep an eye on her.
textByHashes.0eb78de21ba61530ca5e5ca0c8701c3a556c30f4: Needs help does she? Maybe I could be of assistance?
textByHashes.8d069733b3e520ec9451c6acfa55a57a1ec22b62: Fair enough. If that changes, I'm more than willing to help.
textByHashes.14cf52352913b756f0537a42e95a5b79b72aabc2: Fair enough. I'll be back once I have more experience.
textByHashes.f84f336b735343e8226419594586889c8feac65e: I see. I'll have to be careful then.
textByHashes.bbfd3c95454b7414ac3796077ad9b6a84cb2e9c1: What's wrong with that old man?
textByHashes.cb16a2b0cfcd04e267fc2ee66a472148613b2665: Do you any theories on why it's come back?
textByHashes.4d82096d43bd637bc83991273fcbbdc7c7dc0da5: Hmm, so how long has the old man been asleep?
textByHashes.328b4b8bb2c7d9b5b64db082d265b2a181782202: How are things with the Sleeper Plague?
textByHashes.4968eb0e349c8dd67558515318d7bdcc5eab35b9: I see... And what of those still ill?
textByHashes.5ecb2d03bf937748504c1185b64b88fd1bca6c7c: Where's the Lord? Surely he should be down here with his wife?
textByHashes.9d40c84e61401ce86bd80492e30c37dc2befb703: That doesn't make him guilty though.
textByHashes.4f844f2b7fcaf5fd5c930ff37dc49d5e2ca613c8: What happened to the tattooed man?
textByHashes.a18323d132f35da63c64ed3baea8750d314af393: Nope, I've just come to ask you a couple of questions.
textByHashes.9ccd68fe940795d865255785f9096f320738abb6: Just tell me again or else I'll turn you back into an ogre!
textByHashes.ceeee663dd93b21fbcc1bc92802f34daf4576886: Are you all right? You seem a little...incoherent.
textByHashes.7a0288e33fd10f1cfd1ce93f617762806b2b9add: I'm sure I would as well.
textByHashes.7c3c55bb221972106378b89805a8fe3aed1a54ed: I'm going over here to talk to non-crazy people now.
textByHashes.6642445bb9fe0e6dadb306db1eaf84521b1401cb: And what do THEY look like?
textByHashes.1504ed82d4c7ec88755d8794f3274fac1cd7e2a3: These would be the mudskippers, right?
textByHashes.130d35d9b166db885410b1f1bf4c549083aa8ed9: This is fascinating, but I have to be...
textByHashes.d74d93f6474ab9118df6fdef6b14b6e0e0f79e38: Fires of hell...right. I believe you.
textByHashes.ecc7cacab1151936ff5c665233a104c5e5cb5f5a: Giant mudskipper bites! Where did you get those?
textByHashes.3ae5f08e55232ef38aa75fdf8348b6212b3df5b2: Hmmm...I suppose if I sober you up you may well start to recall.
textByHashes.b0daa9db5de70ca87f520168dbd1dd927350a8bb: 'Captain Braindeath's Extra Strength Rum/Drain Cleaner. Now 50% more debilitating'?
textByHashes.b8e4369b5eadb253743e0e247d704492da477f10: Stay here and I'll be right back. Try not to move. Or go near any open flames.
textByHashes.eb5cfb4570d629296bff604925d3206ab8ed964f: You know, I could shock him out of it if I could find some cold water...
textByHashes.9ac105151e74d81ee5953c59bc0161505ad06c6c: How do I annoy the Mogres again?
textByHashes.ca0b0bd936d0e23df724cb37e2d4cf261a9a4c60: Thanks! So, what are you going to do now?
textByHashes.2cde4e170e6530873e9b55cb43bed38ef51dc33b: I was planning on wandering up and down the landscape, bugging people to see if they had mindblowingly dangerous quests for me to undertake.
textByHashes.4616102839b78ac72bfccaffc4d74fa795228683: I think he's sober enough. And I don't want to use another bucket of water.
textByHashes.658e3885bfc474c9042e18be68e3e2b142a2967d: Send me to the mainland now.
textByHashes.de9c86825b927419e44b2b10d2c73098e84391bb: I'll stay here for the Tutorial.
textByHashes.b9104e4f067723c048aa984aa414ce8bfcba6745: I think I'll give the Skullball Course a go.
textByHashes.97f6ed839f84ada2646b8f1087a08ab6a08a5347: What are the instructions for using the skullball course?
textByHashes.5c6602bc6cb58640f2470de0430d0b4796a302de: I seem to have lost my ball - can I have another one?
textByHashes.dc717e4e59fdeec93e3bfe2a43effe9b2e236e37: I give up, I can't do it - take my ball away.
textByHashes.49b074922e6218118a05986740a38d7626f4dc2c: Actually, I've never killed anyone else.
textByHashes.d52f1e029e1d87bdc345c3de9784803848544155: So the loot is safe in this other dimension?
textByHashes.90b438331b5d06a240000fd4327d39b8c6bb2964: So if I kill someone and take their keys, I can use them myself?
textByHashes.16afec47e184ce9f2c098c9ad85111267a1faeac: Can I have access to the chest?
textByHashes.75502a9bc0bbfb8542a8eaab1118e9e3800121de: Why do you charge so much?!
textByHashes.bdee84fedf4cadba4ea49812591424233f6f8cde: Why is the beer so cheap if it's so expensive to get deliveries out here?
textByHashes.1e8abecdd098b78cdb920435c2da78297ae558bb: Can I change how these loot keys work?
textByHashes.928e326956c97a34a42be75fa2129e6670073b2a: How much loot have I claimed?
textByHashes.858bb711fb12867a74e2bc4a9e318739f73424bc: So how'd you end up like... this?
textByHashes.02f58f96facde5e38f28402b59e97fb36f05154f: But why come back to the Wilderness?
textByHashes.0319d0a518cf88ae30689b4653803a0d6772b79e: What kind of name is Sleve McDichael?
textByHashes.f040e69e72ef62c946c1a0809de35b6a477a230a: Could I not just rename it myself?
textByHashes.9e7fac27e4643182c823de083f9902c443cae6ae: I'd like to rename my boat.
textByHashes.22d31330ae5261d5f8c0a5d1630baf1e8b1855e5: Oh, I don't have any cider.
textByHashes.14e33c6a0fd90f23247477cf29911864f9f89d48: How did you end up here?
textByHashes.f6d60e45769f973e10b326a0c28f8873de552ed1: I have a Slayer assignment to kill those, yes.
textByHashes.31495d0cac2f481ea9acc4f177f339f92950e36f: Why are you here asking about that?
textByHashes.9868d4d62aae55dc3f6d112cf41cd40aa6e08c3a: Excuse me, I've got to go.
textByHashes.237ecdac5237eae88bdff3e7040d65773a4349f1: Can you tell me a bit about skillcapes?
textByHashes.902d792df848e360536177289cd0e6baeaa45fb8: I'll remember that. What should I use?
textByHashes.ad1fbbd251af77529c13f21e5f0c39f61642f162: But you don't look that strong!
textByHashes.a7922be1e92727165ed75aa626a37d17393b5fbe: I sense a moral in there somewhere.
textByHashes.545e85f292be08df67a4cb28fb95b3510a60b64e: May I buy a Skillcape of Strength, please?
textByHashes.69effaf45bbdddca1662ad9c5537a04e30bb92f5: Sorry, that's just too much to pay.
textByHashes.c7d93090384f201cfc0002dabd8ac3ab714be775: I have no idea what you're going on about.
textByHashes.f7f95d905ce63c896b7e337fb70f61538952cd9a: Probably, let's see what you have.
textByHashes.c407585d83101c07583f0117c2e1cf7a419e4a9b: That depends on if you have any cutlasses.
textByHashes.e5da0eca7119d13f4f4e2bc24b1146006b80e20a: Look, I don't want to hear any more. Why would I want to buy his cutlass?
textByHashes.06696b1467e5e6360db46817029e749c876bd067: I have this anchor, can you fix it?
textByHashes.6543f53c66045a4841987bfa7fc3df900a72d36a: You wouldn't believe me if I told you.
textByHashes.ae299e109f9947e0437870b5323462030f2c75ed: That's too much for me at the moment.
textByHashes.c9677344c998537614bfb1c2ef5d1435cca9aa73: Can you teach me the basics of smelting please?
textByHashes.1260690609d320fe59a6cee81af0369987fd9f48: I already know about the basics of smelting, got any tips?
textByHashes.048c8770c3f5e37652cdff3991a64715af05077b: Have you got a spare tinderbox?
textByHashes.f6f78d324ec4d0f73568ba505230fbe78253755c: Do you remember where to find him, too?
textByHashes.4bbbe979e30df04d4d6d8e3dfe60870946736a9f: Can you tell me where I can find the rat pits in Keldagrim?
textByHashes.53d5e8c1687d8bef323cf4ad858471963ac8d0af: Do you know where I would find him or not?
textByHashes.bc12b82c57e44bb9d948a2794983677518099d03: Can you tell me where I could find the rat pits in Keldagrim?
textByHashes.2fd369a9996ce7f780a7c4e7ac50b4ed9d7f0b69: I better see how Guss is getting on.
textByHashes.f5e8e3cfd5d4e6c90d8f641c9ba893fed66c4efc: I'm alright, but I'm rather chilly round this part of the pub.
textByHashes.ccff13374e4c6bc327c12bfcef6b2510d11c74bc: Do you enjoy doing all this?
textByHashes.47034c63ffd331c7c8cb101fa9375cfd9d7127be: You don't really like it then?
textByHashes.2ae254e445df2fcf4d0cc53d1dfb8c131336076f: I hope you didn't sell the golden snowballs.
textByHashes.83d6d1c12ce6347c3430dd773f194a77c376b5af: Also... You did WHAT to stray dogs?!
textByHashes.87dd644b03d5553a7082a565b327f348f7c9535f: Sorry.. I didn't mean to snap. You are on your journey to redeem yourself.
textByHashes.cdfd62b5061c7878bbcb475bf09351863be824e4: Some might say there was snow stopping you.
textByHashes.ee828cfa32d3bf6f84a6ff6ef79bbb282533c037: Wow, so now you're on your journey to be a better person?
textByHashes.eb3a5d365e16a69ff7468bb9d1130e46659d5fc6: Can I have another copy of that book?
textByHashes.3fd3e7f81088953154c640fb3c45c8bfe5fa3548: Can you note my basalt for me?
textByHashes.825b4bd02b8010a6d1f7319dde031c1bfd052e4c: Can you teach me about the birds?
textByHashes.9ea9f3e58de6c399d33fc747110e9f7fb51b377d: Could I get my hands on one of those whistles?
textByHashes.e4fc0dcee6e1b8e03ade6aeb54765b7d48fbfa1b: So how do you motivate the birds?
textByHashes.e38b01fd71e5a2771f089ee03e29d508542a440b: Well, they're certainly big enough to try.
textByHashes.0660b3630a2407a589a53c632274ef09b171d033: How do I get my hands on more whistles?
textByHashes.d4395266c3b84f938a561ca6bf8484ae9db0064e: Can I get a whistle with unlimited charges?
textByHashes.39672f73ac8bd6dc203b1cb15638e5ba06b29351: How much is this going to set me back.
textByHashes.891390e793572681da8925b78a6867c5e83cd0dc: That sounds good to me, I have some food for the birds right here.
textByHashes.a5b3a7c8d54600fde3506fa83ff5fd30ef14a9d1: I have some more food for the birds.
textByHashes.03a632a4e3d950019ee2d997f10f67af3b7a473c: Can I get another Perfected quetzal whistle with unlimited charges?
textByHashes.3d135ff239e41c79229079410a28aab83a6c3c35: Ah, I can't afford one right now. I'll pop back later.
textByHashes.768750de6fb265d5c932965ecede9c5b5bab189b: Are you insulting me in Latin?
textByHashes.0776ff15c7faed9fa1bab3e0262051b524a82a34: How long are you posted here?
textByHashes.fdda5b9ec5f95506ab75b3ce4172920f2b672f46: About the cultists... What sort of things do they ask you to agree to?
textByHashes.af91b8da51c8d0f7cde8e4df55bab6ce4f378ab0: Aren't you worried about the demons?
textByHashes.80889211471e7b4d73e60c9a29cf0cb541fa1b4b: I take it the rest of your squad aren't as keen.
textByHashes.a68b4a9e916a12ffc6e18acdbfe9f50062720121: You think the demons would overrun you?
textByHashes.be0204a2e3e7eb679da59d054867224f915d5baf: You seem to know a lot about them.
textByHashes.2611e97ef78f82b38ac38863d2776b706d46748d: Somehow I don't think negotiating with demons will end well.
textByHashes.d3d2eb10710fbe1d1e13194b01db21961eab0140: Aren't you a bit too calm about this?
textByHashes.7f8941060794176e43bcae61e9e94d516f79f9d5: I've met Lord Shayzien. He doesn't seem like the type to compromise.
textByHashes.64db5b3e8e538a2466ab9a6446b43b519a0c396a: Yes, I've met the leaders of all of the houses. Even King Artur Hosidius himself.
textByHashes.284c1a484bc5fa5f96e36eaf601b8a969e977532: I imagine he's quite busy at the moment.
textByHashes.bacc02c328e92f37a9346806c8205ec7ce08d5a4: Why are you up here instead of fighting?
textByHashes.5d4b62307569242c79cb991ba5caec903c8d173e: Do you know how many I've killed already?
textByHashes.acc2007ecf5ddad7b4390dde4ea747a32238cba4: Not often you see a couple of soldiers out for a drink.
textByHashes.19e0753bb9ea6553eb4520ae890d209471f1b57b: Sounds like you earned it. Enjoy!
textByHashes.c8535e413b4da057604549496a678b957c0b8c1a: Okay, I reckon I can take you. Did you just say you wanted to practice melee combat in particular?
textByHashes.04394bc27fa8e2a1842b27fb3a2f608cab17a0d4: Let's forget about fighting for now.
textByHashes.bfc20a5ef3452ca66cb8049256d6b0cc63ae0e07: Let's fight again - I don't mind duplicates.
textByHashes.29cd8a385b2fcc0be9191594b4f07c55a4f2db00: Okay, I guess I needn't fight you again.
textByHashes.bacb21016d7716ece5acb343b18b19d646a2d6b9: Of course! I'm wearing an amulet of ghostspeak.
textByHashes.b8ce667c3c370a0d05d18befa671df8eb090da21: ...I can, but I'm not wearing an amulet of ghostspeak... A-am I dead?
textByHashes.57b50251e0aa3ce22eaf69c3c5853e68a5f142df: Oh, that's... interesting. Also rather disturbing...
textByHashes.3a977ba89a1b1ecddf512b8428225d366d1c4ffe: Oh, that sounds like a great idea, I'll go do that.
textByHashes.9e9ba047c29f1479d4da2cd2bfb0c699fe46f1b4: So could you imbue my sceptre?
textByHashes.9e4663a5c7f8b4be0a84e62268959fe05ec812d6: Thank you very much! How many charges does each piece give?
textByHashes.3c79b16aa3ee42c9bcc9e2f1a75b0f08f4a3b93c: Fantastic! It's best I keep my authenticator activated then. Good bye Solztun!
textByHashes.8cb7c97483cc128ed240bc071a7d85780b109591: It's very nice to meet you, Solztun! I'm .
textByHashes.649ff87e0c66d0dc10797d6c3da86a4590454b96: ... so, you were exploring this place?
textByHashes.f170982fb64f5534e2082a4d038e5467fe23d2a9: Oh! Your sister is Litara, the woman out on the surface? How come she was correct?
textByHashes.6891e93b85231cb6a4754fa31fb0d5aa5e43b3c2: Were you not a fan of the barbarian life style?
textByHashes.16113bd8f0a62218a4b9f3f6ee566a0d666639e5: Oh right, you were looking for what's in that cradle?
textByHashes.1b9632db59c5de8e98481f24b61cbe8db9ebaa94: I guess I could show you... for a price.
textByHashes.3dd8180e71d51b20122da1c51ff5071757632aa7: Stronger you say... In what way?
textByHashes.6a066c038e982ebabbd24b8d0352dada7ce05e83: You, my dead friend, have a deal!
textByHashes.b678fc2c3cb4c1eb8d0a93c1acbad4f0a4f1dc88: But I didn't show you anything.
textByHashes.8629c5e1bda30e0e558f5c71f322896681e4b1cc: That's okay; I've one with me anyway.
textByHashes.1c029845233948e57ad544a551d8fb31a05ba15a: Yeah... Sorry about that. This is what happens when you make poor life choices though.
textByHashes.166732ea099d82e3381da4baffa2d3c3e7a37917: Well that just sounds great. See you later.
textByHashes.40c480761af7a6f3f4f672fe509fca18c1cc6dc5: I go where I like and do what I like.
textByHashes.e0f55fb0d651cbd76f5374c11f4be32cf0ae08c1: Can I have some sq'irks please?
textByHashes.c2768925e28bd6e4b5c5032579660515cd37f9de: Someone asked me to bring them some.
textByHashes.90c1793eee89d453fba8497ca318210aafda965f: Why don't you get a new job?
textByHashes.a9b336dcea98d23634c7b98d682d21f80b1f3149: That's a shame. I'd better let you get on with your work.
textByHashes.deedd2d0e0cd806628ea8b733ae051c71853e394: Aren't you going to wish me a nice day?
textByHashes.627b7d86de8109f0a7207f0c1f1a0333c8b0fe96: Can you tell me about the gods of the Menaphites?
textByHashes.74b3824a0684d4a49af792b975cb0eab553c976c: People don't seem to talk about him much. I'd have thought being the leading god would make him more popular.
textByHashes.b44971e35b3782cd93201238fd79e1f149013620: Okay... And what kind of god is he? The desert is a harsh place, so does that make him harsh as well?
textByHashes.76682e2c49beef6bce83f8665c95fe91d140801d: So he's harsh, but for good reasons?
textByHashes.65e6a3d530aa59ad6586906369fd7e26a4fde765: That's an interesting take. I guess being a bringer of life makes her quite popular?
textByHashes.71b257ff136c1ea3f7f5b6acb84e7ed3a478301e: So are you a follower of Icthlarin?
textByHashes.7c0feb12e0ebdf46e07dc1c9e39429b2e8085174: I'm interested in hearing your take.
textByHashes.854ef00b73cc3b9eed984ccdbb93750222210ae1: Isn't that also an oversimplification? Amascut is doing far more than just destroying. She's a murderer!
textByHashes.273ceb5dfe5ee47236622b764b0094c3c80e1870: Icthlarin doesn't actually kill people though. He just looks after those that have died.
textByHashes.b5cc6f679b60b25f89213436c812e5e79d9e93db: How does that make Amascut good though?
textByHashes.3d213a0f9ae54d036dcce63db00699f57f58d47f: Do you have a spare amulet of catspeak?
textByHashes.c42ff7201c632275de80ffcceaae0425b33179b8: Paw-don me, I have something to show mew.
textByHashes.f570878e37151db5ed79564afbc8ad6d90f13fd9: Come on, don't be such a sour puss.
textByHashes.2a0bae22105d3e185fafc510b8ab2cac35baf8b8: Why do they call you Spike?
textByHashes.edc890e1c63862a77b65c78d8526169fe5a1ee56: I'll keep an eye out, thank you!
textByHashes.a6aeedf1819e286f5087b4b91a4d342a98afefd8: Do you have a spare fishing net I could have?
textByHashes.e60c008d7107d68226a5dddc8fd9add583238788: I was wondering if you could answer a few questions?
textByHashes.d068903562209d231cdfc8b6c21991f6b4de4583: I have come to seek a blessing.
textByHashes.8f0966262ef087b89424e6347e860b4cdf4047f8: I need another mould for the unholy symbol.
textByHashes.e00d7f261818686ec0345d9c7171e32d858a4a44: I have come to kill you.
textByHashes.032ca2cf9f8a9d214dd4a5bce6dde6c3570fa2a4: Err... I thought I'd turn you around a bit.
textByHashes.c39f6ed911bed1297a7afb5be9ccb15d5c342d7a: Err... Yes, well, I need to in order to-
textByHashes.40cd0fde537dd23dca20d0fadfdbfc8439a58871: I thought you might look nicer facing the other way.
textByHashes.23f22893e89978afa353157b298484de6cd80d72: All done. See, that wasn't so bad.
textByHashes.9fddfd13ca93837b4352398ed89c5ed286814ba9: And what are you on the lookout for at the moment?
textByHashes.6b8134790892e2c3238a16560a16026cf22d1d74: Makes sense. Well, I hope one finds you soon.
textByHashes.2cc69e18df2e490162d19736f9ddb963010bcdde: Well, at some point I plan to hire a crew of my own. I'm not ready for that sort of thing yet, but when I am, maybe you'd be interested?
textByHashes.4c62b22fb9c54a5e570366a5d06881f289390d9b: Ah, hello again. How are things going?
textByHashes.5bc717ca199c30bbcb7b7282aa1158dea87e1d1b: Maybe I could help? How about you join my crew?
textByHashes.8ef3a3cbb50eb6cfbb8327ac6fde8ebec6b0f9b8: Well, I hope one finds you soon.
textByHashes.4ebfe345e40be37598ca5dc0284ddb30e1bb479a: Well, let me know if you spot anything worth looking into.
textByHashes.36c5be0593fd9a9a29742df2a439eba26fb9491b: Could you tell me about the Pandemonium's one rule?
textByHashes.5f6d5cc9d55763a2c0ffe7b55de448360ef6d5db: Thank you. Can I go back inside?
textByHashes.86f2cbc9478fd5dfdd733bf279449186d3e14e9c: What's with the glowing portal thing?
textByHashes.2f24cda65065fe922694c2697400230210110fff: You don't seem to be cleaning much.
textByHashes.708bc77ec5a9edc688e0419e9a38f5c3078cc22c: What's your master doing in Burthorpe?
textByHashes.5085666b1c49a886b610629236077e25c9b45ea9: I'd like to go to your outpost.
textByHashes.2600ab5add0d30e8e2c6cc94dad43c62082598ab: I'd like to go back to Port Sarim please.
textByHashes.b61eb30965d4299ed823220550d8aec30734a50f: I'd better get back to it then.
textByHashes.77341aaa3902d146c5312c8990939b107da43d26: I'm glad the new sword worked out alright.
textByHashes.286df8900567a6941d3be16baa2fd1390e992309: I see you're the new Slayer Master here.
textByHashes.2706300402cfc8e58cfddc3d0eeee8d151a1860b: I'm not sure. Do you have anything for sale?
textByHashes.ca01b594d30d057ce49fe68ed1c4997203d32ad9: Oh, that's a shame. Never mind then.
textByHashes.ae374e0edef43b2b17f1b89d908876f01adc7c65: : Are you one of the returned citizens?
textByHashes.08e969a82cb11a57ec1a6ec51c98bffcecfc5714: : That would be me. Now, can you help me?
textByHashes.880ee548dc14a781b5d6842209c443e0cc90c799: : You know what would be brilliant?
textByHashes.8f649af19ff1d487dac3dd80521bd013f611208c: : Could you make some granite armour or alter granite armour to better fit me?
textByHashes.01a8fa879554e46ccc8f2a5bdc84992a3e0fee78: : Should I come back soon, then?
textByHashes.1e0cde882ad0b135b6c10e579dd9599d305d4636: What kind of stone do you sell?
textByHashes.d8da2bb3ddc920ed16b8b17723d8a4f9988b06fa: Yes, I'd like to get Mimic challenges.
textByHashes.143fcb641bbb089cea4bb0b81fd06b9e3b36fe80: No, I don't think I want that.
textByHashes.afae61f3a5091cfcdd572d081103f056937bd713: I don't think I want that.
textByHashes.3d7f228cec2a24e076ddb9b9ab4a7e8b3fdfd139: I don't want Mimic challenges anymore.
textByHashes.720bbe8a02764aca2dc6c777144215a9d049832b: No, I want to keep getting mimic challenges.
textByHashes.4a4d21a29573462f112c16a4b3886a359deb1763: Strange Old Man, I was wondering if I could ask a favour of you.
textByHashes.4ceb6dab19f763338ad67368f2320f3941274f36: Currently when I'm trying to go plundering the catacombs here, my mind is plagued by several inconvenient warnings about the dangers below.
textByHashes.a285d1006d740962c1b098dd10bf91299a6b38e3: I was wondering, do you know of a way to condense these warnings into a single condensed one?
textByHashes.ed46ff6d3a98e511f81bc43d7e60690453508548: Wow, you'll have that arranged for me? Thanks a lot, Strange Old Man!
textByHashes.1230e3beb96cf807e9aba037bf049573adaa8576: Strange Old Man, thanks for having those mental warnings I was having condensed into a single one, but I miss having them seperated.
textByHashes.c25e0ce0a0a279b52128bc59d510ae69ec140554: Is there any chance you'd be willing to change it back for me?
textByHashes.de7343ede5a4daa87d91ce3f20837fdbba85a815: I'll leave you to it then...
textByHashes.bbdfc12aaa65f9eee6e0eeb4fc752832c601048c: What do you mean? What purpose?
textByHashes.e1ab2b272b5362edd71c4ba3840a0182717f504b: You want me to bring you something?
textByHashes.d2de495b4907ecbbd4dfb083070c671044d165a7: Right... So you want me to go and kill the six brothers and bring you back an icon?
textByHashes.660d39fe1b2fc13c315fd55285df3e4b5880ed6c: Can you tell me more about the brothers?
textByHashes.1f79889b5de12e0ea3e5b84e9a9cc469d6451ad4: I wanted to ask you about warnings.
textByHashes.1321710d3e387748d6be1e40803d6a05e405b967: I was wondering, do you know of a way to condense these warnings into a single one?
textByHashes.0f07bdaa4b8bee8fa0dfc9d8fbaf269cd81e06bf: Thanks for having those mental warnings I was having condensed into a single one, but I miss having them seperated.
textByHashes.b9dd52744025503a7515024b511d0ebfe3234ecf: I'm guessing that was a yes? In that case, thanks.
textByHashes.ea6c63ee373cf0815b745c3321646ef3deb896f8: What? But why? I thought you needed it!
textByHashes.56966bf365e1f1ac8d59dd56bfb9f9417c87121c: Easy there, I didn't mean to offend.
textByHashes.b3d9d69d2a9102f7014fffdd0bf1031ba071ba84: You sound awfully afraid for a werewolf...
textByHashes.c0238632c00bf4f0051823275254a4faa1e35a57: Couldn't you turn into a wolf if you're scared?
textByHashes.e5580a3b83538aad690cd732b84d3f3a0a468006: Huh, I wasn't aware werewolves had a conscience.
textByHashes.92474b29a2bfc0b7230e76b4ba9bb55e458a36bd: Oh, don't worry, I'm a massive hypocrite.
textByHashes.f4c7b254d2db44f23122ee55b8ae20bb4e70a154: Not the demon woman back yonder? I suppose she looks pretty vicious, but she seems alright.
textByHashes.aaae619ca96908a8d569d5214b30ab749b16d21f: Well, I'm sure she's harmless. If you go back that way you should see a group of men in red cloaks. Head past them and you're back in the cave that will lead you to the surface.
textByHashes.cb6baa9091066cb5749de20c7ceec2f126c926b6: What potions do I need to make?
textByHashes.705ba5b66e0a90952aa7dfdf890736ad703bffd6: But how do I know what the combinations are?
textByHashes.e006e1a82fb6f1b32b2342aa33e48f12ee4495f5: What if I get an order wrong, or am unable to fulfil any of the orders?
textByHashes.68e96e5bb547f03ac7213a62adf7885b8f2e3a00: Got it! So, refine herbs, deposit into the hopper, mix some products, process them, and then throw them on the conveyor. Seems easy enough!
textByHashes.8228c1a04cb6625b974a46bc9473e1f2669fc225: I'm sure I can work it out.
textByHashes.2037a381dc71d2028b4a238fec93365dd4beefbe: Can you explain how to make potions?
textByHashes.0610c57ce8fe6cab4319ccaaea629e87301a51a4: Can you tell me more about the Alchemical Society?
textByHashes.aeb7613bd5d6bbd5f3f0361b267579d08d582b3c: Makes sense. So how did the society first get established?
textByHashes.f2d511d64a39dbaafd822989f72f8c9aa727254f: Why were they so interested in your work?
textByHashes.cbfc39eb7953357ccdfc2768f63199d0bb13a3b2: I see. I suppose that makes sense.
textByHashes.9bf0caf8aeed3e6a8a9484b38fc811b7fbf63480: How did you know about that?
textByHashes.6db90d790d7e86771f5787675e26e3113183c4a2: I thought Veldaban was in command?
textByHashes.36110fd08d331446b7211ed14cf031c4c0fc9b8d: Oh yes, I helped Commander Lawgof once, in his fight against the goblins.
textByHashes.25b550ba8d7b6f4dc5a3f2b1213c664fd1cd82b4: Can I buy a Skillcape of Hitpoints from you?
textByHashes.1ec31642b5e8f80493656200066bc9f85dae4442: Sure, that's not too expensive for such a magnificent cape.
textByHashes.5832dc43fbcfcef365ddec25272dece655f344b3: What? No! At least, I don't think so. What sort of spells do you have?
textByHashes.06f90a72fd6cc6ef376b9f70360d4396fe723950: That spell sounds very interesting, but I didn't mean to disturb you!
textByHashes.8a8a1a2081cff21f2ae62b8dd9c732217627a960: Do you have any jobs or quests that I could do for you?
textByHashes.b632f545082943710238d11f427eea8859768bdb: Right... Well, have a nice day.
textByHashes.465dc603e29e168148b1cdd14c7a081a3bdeafe2: It just seemed as if you were walking in circles.
textByHashes.1a3eaf5ded909c75ef46b1ee5e415f2b8a3c2ab8: Why are you still wandering around here?
textByHashes.bbb827bafc3fccb85e5d602a446cdd4c420af11c: How come you live with the lizardmen?
textByHashes.953c9f0a9106c5478d186706bba591abcf6f08e2: What did they save you from? Is it to do with your eye?
textByHashes.f68fbf13d73d4a601060cf0770a33c80cf7f46e4: Would the lizardmen let you leave?
textByHashes.07d5689bb9d4c3bfd076cdeaefd01ff124191672: What would a priest be doing in this gross swamp?
textByHashes.5793fd978f195c357a1c452ea174b9e34d6c544e: What is the symbol on the shrine?
textByHashes.28410b92722180d17d164fc519ad8c0c57f1112f: Are you the 'Rey' this entry mentions?
textByHashes.4e03a50c07e598a2f441f90446dc396359be4b50: So you've not seen her recently?
textByHashes.3c76efad57ad51e061b19f61f34ddfe63b7af3d6: I am fine thanks Swensen. How are you doing?
textByHashes.79271f2a5633c6cd2973aac6d8edf6a34007c1fb: How is the collection going now?
textByHashes.a388c7f651385c6c1cb133b2f0678674e75f5343: I think I've lost Rupert's helmet.
textByHashes.08e4c047f56e088a725563a6f0d802063fb02f4c: I'm just happy that I could help. Goodbye!
textByHashes.abb26c50d7c9dc340927455858832748da79c4ac: Hello! Are you the leader of this expedition?
textByHashes.4db25eaa681759d26948ce17140ce3e909d8c7a7: Do you know where it came from?
textByHashes.58b3686aea83cdfba58cbd877234bab87a9618aa: I suppose not. I guess I just want to get a better understanding of what this thing is.
textByHashes.1464192c5c5e3ff3a5643b53a816fb092e733c3f: And given that you're here, I assume it poses some sort of threat?
textByHashes.bcaf0e9a0ed8aeef800987fcfd5cec7c325546e0: Do you have any tips for surviving?
textByHashes.5411e0531f395bbfd9f24a9ccb8df4a3035e35a1: Move the body, then attack the head while keeping prayers balanced. Got it!
textByHashes.de2b88c04ae804daa2354f3da79f287a62496285: Remind me, what's going on here?
textByHashes.33fd868536c83c3ee8ab83137b080bceb8cf32cb: Are there any rewards for helping?
textByHashes.2c69064c80858a806af1762351531f5d57f08af2: Hi, my name is . What's wi...
textByHashes.cc24460198559c854eefe6aa55f2a0a207addd4c: Sounds like a normal day of fishing to me.
textByHashes.92fc5f9d979eb98bca90344157d7f9bd32480e5a: That sounds like a bad idea. What would have happened if your net got too full or your ship started drifting and the net got caught on some rocks?
textByHashes.11681dc2b3557ef0e2f8151aefa5562fed07983a: That must have been awful. At least you and the crew survived.
textByHashes.afdfbc26d0c93048e71989dba1559e61a1a309d8: It was a good tale. Is it true?
textByHashes.a1638a8bb5fc7806d4b88e87a99dbfeca6e22996: Do you have any jobs then?
textByHashes.b503900f7479918cf549a8a101c37dc05e023cc9: If you're sure. Who are you?
textByHashes.9670dab71d044c901f60629c6eb55a1a8bcd425a: That hat you're wearing doesn't look like it comes from around here?
textByHashes.65767f5fba951e202c1c3f6cd33d25b1b1c28690: I see. So what have you been up to?
textByHashes.b61c32f7867bd1326a1d60575c0be47f6d16db09: Interesting... What can you tell me about this pyramid?
textByHashes.25b0c5a9462d7e8f8dc6973296607061da58e2d3: What's this thing guarding one of them.
textByHashes.3171486cf2c578217e26685740ce6e7a0ac16dd6: Well I'm not afraid of a little danger.
textByHashes.38003756b46a1521e7a020aa876f766adad440c5: It all sounds like fun to me. So, is there anything valuable in there?
textByHashes.55dde74dbe383cd385feefff6d27d0267e868e2b: Is there anything else of value in there?
textByHashes.90d681d33229601933c51baca6a8d94d105b9868: Ah, now you've piqued my interest. What do you know about this sceptre?
textByHashes.02c8c261e47740fd62e95db20afb0ba39b0b4a96: Magical powers? This sounds good. What are they?
textByHashes.504c7e0cb3097447c9a2d3e35668aedc80059ebb: Not if I find it first!
textByHashes.97cc0395403d0bccd4dd669c76378913ef5b452e: Yes, it's an odd place, isn't it?
textByHashes.2b3e909aab2a135a8e338f3e97e9091c771db454: Right... I'll be sure to let you know if I come across anything good...
textByHashes.2c854d80437fd452f6b2cfc40cf2be2dd4dee0ce: Ah, yes... I'll bring it round later.
textByHashes.199fc286eff68f8c096792df0bfa23c0598f1b91: Hey, look at this sceptre I found!
textByHashes.234927e1a2c5820212146bbf7681587eed86c1c3: Well given the work I had to go through to get it, I think I earned it all by myself.
textByHashes.420c526755997b2366b18f4f6ef86a645734deb5: The world is a harsh place. Live and learn.
textByHashes.a666b94c48262aeabf16a7ce4b64548d48082991: Why would I have heard of you Mr. Marjoribanks?
textByHashes.dcca64ac18d6f59cfd4fd835f3369c4130e8eba7: Are you related to King Roald?
textByHashes.120581bd53543860de8a72ee560460cc6c9ab37f: Er... Okay. What are you doing here then?
textByHashes.0dd730f48ce2838c56d3859146ffd60b4e500c7f: Pfft! I doubt he even knows the King!
textByHashes.9439298fda1da86caf7feb129dd80c9c1f81a395: What do you mean when you say 'limited means'?
textByHashes.27e243a13ed8c77c64839990335dfae769a8012a: Uhm... I'm just looking for some pickaxes! Do you have any?
textByHashes.bb1e3599d50b17497bab7da4ce7d441d030e8d98: Then perhaps I can help in some way?
textByHashes.1ffdda0114ebaeb5e94d7beb7aefb3ce73f78b3f: Hmm, item in minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.c1c8615f95454b237a8b071cb9f9b772140f5322: I don't work for rude people.
textByHashes.9e79daf6dd2ecc2bebb35b4282ab7de2d998a463: I've had enough of this wild goose chase.
textByHashes.43eace9e63e2233556e8dfae3cd5c1d9407ecffb: Ha, who are you calling little here?
textByHashes.c3b797a71d409ad1fbd1b3b75c96eff46c5ed423: I'm still trying to collect them.
textByHashes.d3b2b406aeaaefce54a452fe3523e960181d11b5: Hmm, 3 iron pickaxes in 15 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.a3b5415d1561455239f61223bf1fe1cd008c3856: Hmm, 4 iron pickaxes in 15 minutes, that sounds about alright.
