textByHashes.c5c328f3766dafddbc85b93f33cb76bf56db9290: Hmm, 5 iron pickaxes in 15 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.82ac864a2aa5a5b83cd0b33a03231462eb623712: Hmm, 3 iron pickaxes in 20 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.26a6bb1e3aa7b7ce6733846f92e6adaedf5b6363: Hmm, 4 iron pickaxes in 20 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.868f8a532c2029af90a968dbeb0bae950a344e65: Hmm, 5 iron pickaxes in 20 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.23c1a8c7718f213fde52b4c4d2851bb6989494e3: Hmm, 3 iron pickaxes in 25 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.24d0b29501b48e4a13ff5a51b134efcb58b211db: Hmm, 4 iron pickaxes in 25 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.61e7aeb797fee0c081429d76d030a862c03b5324: Hmm, 5 iron pickaxes in 25 minutes, that sounds about alright.
textByHashes.67a99dbd8635e27909da4e16a70c8a5ef2aa8746: I've collected all item for you!
textByHashes.c12a5ed8691067cd441cf10c897a45227b932711: You should have seen the one that got away!
textByHashes.5614a4e53c86586de9d6bfc0f8e94c4f15ba759b: I wasn't explicitly here for that, though I'm sure I could stop for a moment.
textByHashes.1870fac097ad759eb1ebdca860d73b5ce29fd595: I lost the ancient goblin mace.
textByHashes.ffefca6cba0b5753e9c8206f81247305a41afb27: But I'll have to go and get the money.
textByHashes.d604310e4a54451a07f145c1719b80ab49dc81ba: But I should free up some inventory space first.
textByHashes.64252a1c1fce66fa22a8e953cfb1371d7b174676: Old stockpiles? What do you mean?
textByHashes.868ae9a537280723b4179da90300c84e2cfa85e2: Can I buy some Climbing boots?
textByHashes.19a4ef431894cb98eb91d85197ddc01cf0ca7dbd: How did you find out about the secret way?
textByHashes.ae9c164a03af74c45177c963b886feceecddfa48: Now that the Imperial Guard know about the secret way they will be able to destroy the trolls!
textByHashes.32b156b9b20210189fb58f4f381c5356e143d51d: I have something I need checking out.
textByHashes.7e9fae531ea159a091854a0669c8b0093844b9e2: Can you tell me anything about the digsite?
textByHashes.532bae80ede0e7edd69aae2693a07d5575dceef7: I found out that he was banished, and that the people's hero was trapped in a pyramid and...
textByHashes.26906f0f3fa46825d0335dc50715efb194b410da: Can you tell me any more about this?
textByHashes.b9bfc677da616e61db0bf26c01f0e7eaebc53215: See what I have done with the compound now.
textByHashes.d86ccf6cabdfc461ef81212e2afc62b9606ddb11: I'll find a use for it!
textByHashes.cdb3398f08adbc49c53eba8b21dd076693c053f8: What do you think about this?
textByHashes.6aa596d4211fefd7d91ea305a65d2d95ed1e0b4f: Have a look at this glass.
textByHashes.0549f21c854b2bb430d661ea9000128a00ad6830: Have a look at this arrow.
textByHashes.c0c842cb8d99033cd7e41001eec7f0a3a80c0b87: Have a look at these bones.
textByHashes.1778f1c985bb293c8effa6bd9beb3094a82b885c: Have a look at this staff.
textByHashes.70a465cdbf147320d989b54e91409b2be41241f7: You mean they were good at using potions?
textByHashes.ca3c9bf96cf3289a988774646d66c1eb03fac074: Have a look at this unusual item...
textByHashes.3650785c20fe28ea50eaa0d08f1a069cdc2c0306: Hello, The Beast! Why do they call you that?
textByHashes.ae8eaf3ed8ada850f020166410ba85ca6fc83f9c: I think I had better stay away from the stairs for now.
textByHashes.ba85cfcde0bf315414283c4c697195395457fa51: I guess it is, you're right.
textByHashes.325ad6d60d49e8f719f4543decf44c559f27677a: No thanks. I think I'll pass.
textByHashes.07332f42d74d2102ad51f39cffd744010a17d02e: Oh... I'll come back when I'm carrying a little less.
textByHashes.7c7e475c9418287dd5b8099595d16d2044067caf: Could you count how many uniques I've obtained in my collection?
textByHashes.a33cdc2fb2421954e44dd5e57b2b96c52076154c: Oh yes, I've got this wonderful collection of tokens!
textByHashes.c6382890bed9c6077b3bbb5f562d59292087f41e: Woah! What's going on here? There are so many bunnies!
textByHashes.9bb9fbb590c38f747ffd2ba822c06bdf20504a8c: This certainly seems like a hare-y situation, where did you get them all?
textByHashes.100aec71b325d5e97544be4ecf2a2b34c36ae5fb: What do you mean? Are you a wizard?
textByHashes.8ed9940919dc35b4b30baf276376bd6d13f710e9: Don't tell me, you were trying to pull a rabbit out of your hat and you accidentally pulled out hundreds?
textByHashes.a2e28c6a661e27c43c57ea3772e984dc1e8efb5c: You do know these are rune stones, they're used in actual magic.
textByHashes.d18947e139145cd4137685a42977115c23c91f21: Then how did all these rabbits appear?
textByHashes.e56925aa7ee884e3803f436483fdc5d43d927ce7: Mind if I take a look at your hat? I think there's more to this than meets the eye.
textByHashes.c5fe847b694578439c3bd2ea28fdd4104853ff4b: Well Gelt, I don't know how you've done it, but it looks like you've opened a portal.
textByHashes.83b107d58cd66f5480cfeb806fcc2dab61943ddc: Ah, I mean, I'm pretty busy... but I suppose I can find the time to help you.
textByHashes.cf722db19fa1d095bc7a57a2fed3a66e88d29f32: Hello Gelt, I need to go back.
textByHashes.504e2a09a17c8ac1675f55113be3d28c701d1fd7: I'll be honest with you Gelt, it got a bit weird.
textByHashes.0b14fb9ca81368fd767f784632c839487a94a3e2: Somehow, you opened a portal to a dimension, very similar to ours, but run by rabbits instead of humans.
textByHashes.134a62b883d8bced912f67da054ae5ed1af0de1b: That's not even the weird bit! They live in a cult worshipping an egg, they ask it a question and whatever it says, they do.
textByHashes.24f3b3744f5dc5bc604f4de32d8d51faa78f08e0: That's why they all started coming through, the Duke Rabbacio asked the egg if they should jump through and it said yes.
textByHashes.dfb63659ce1a8852b8cdfc47156e61843a37f5b5: It's a lot to take in, but I've managed to stop them jumping through for now, however I couldn't close the portal.
textByHashes.ff29f6260a8b38e07b84df7266637eef841a3b4e: No, you're not Gelt, you've used magic that's existed for millennia.
textByHashes.ad1dbca6ee235014ba53b33a3a5ec18e5e849108: What will you do with all these rabbits?
textByHashes.cbb605ca0898761515463983791dcabafe88eb0e: Would you mind letting me return to Bunbridge? I feel I have some unfinished business.
textByHashes.e8796094e8295901478c51e3321bb056487cdee0: No thanks, I've had enough of rabbits for now.
textByHashes.6bb9f821aff9dac2a3383ad1e0832c6de19976dc: Ok, where would I find her?
textByHashes.d4b814f0142d44a14c22e1c09e865acb37706b40: I wonder what her problem is?
textByHashes.28021a3c35795cd3ebf265fad5594f644e8c0aad: I love that story. My favourite part is how she managed to get rid of all the rats. Would you tell it to me?
textByHashes.62b3e73e4ed4b364994d15d4fec6d73a1acb5ccf: I'll get the story out of her, a little sweet talking should do the trick.
textByHashes.4b6f74a68979b231532c998310454e189edbab78: Oh please tell me, I'm sure you'd tell the story wonderfully, you have such a pretty ...
textByHashes.196af2fcd85d3dfc96aa9208e315b128e9ea636a: Perhaps I should pay this snake charmer a visit.
textByHashes.3e1f24571f62f20cb925bfa2b51b13544daa8aa4: I promise I won't tell her you helped me.
textByHashes.8541325fe4fb4b326d1c2b9e517b3b602d32bd00: Thank you, and don't worry, I won't tell Felkrash that you helped me.
textByHashes.39a5a6b7394ee3f843cc34bd32c929f7343cd141: What would happen if I were to say...
textByHashes.f80cf9f24ad1c2fe7e05135b0d64727fcd774b2a: I don't have that kind of money...
textByHashes.63373329eb03d612c8620a15d5031d0a22c2e19e: Which me is that? You or the other one?
textByHashes.26bc40583141510756c0b02dfbce1d53bd5d6e24: This is too confusing, I'll see you later.
textByHashes.f7b98bbe0736172fa26a815548fe1c8f11e99d72: Hello, I'm looking for a special egg, I don't suppose you could give me one?
textByHashes.39ed2901b303c287a3c1c41a163af006eb4ae65b: Yes I know that, but I need a particularly special egg.
textByHashes.b8f2cfdd3a1651aef020c4756d22688ec631aef3: Do you have one of those?
textByHashes.e00e1e742abcce71cadb473bf0ffa30c9d6418c5: But you're a... Rooster? And... A lady?
textByHashes.017b4c53e8d717e00349a6093b488dfeea868803: Unfortunately I don't have space to carry around your questionable egg at the moment.
textByHashes.449fb8c9240e8ac38ffb84d51a027562ad238a2e: Oh and uh, hello your mouthiness.
textByHashes.f5f26717fab01cd45fdd7c6cc288b12e5e2d80dc: Oh, well I don't actually need any more, so that's fine.
textByHashes.1e9c79d042a9489baa8a792218aedb81a8d50bcd: Tell me about the Abyssal Sires.
textByHashes.4660839b1a91655b7b7c8009f8062c5382c1fbad: Yuck! This is disgusting. What use is this? It's unwieldly!
textByHashes.26773d5770b43862f6e16b19d9031f49a3350d42: Perhaps I shall use it to slay you, demon.
textByHashes.691d52736411ba15adce7f907024327c278f9c6d: Can you tell me about Combat Masteries?
textByHashes.fccb7ac49ce6d5a01a9b42b19569ce68ab4b67a9: Can I claim some combat achievement rewards?
textByHashes.ddb97bb43ef835362ea6ef1ef88ecbfefb69043b: Do I have any League items to collect?
textByHashes.8cef55c0a9fe7877928ebcffafa26af1d9dbc024: Can you help me smash vials?
textByHashes.222a8a6d24aad1acf54a9bb084cfce836fcf7409: Who are you? What is your name?
textByHashes.18b4475fd8ed3866daf1cc9dfe76bb854f1932a6: Uhhh, ok... Sage. Where did you bring us?
textByHashes.5e1c02dd60713b2029e2767ee09e27195e019a25: Layers? River-Between? What does any of this mean?
textByHashes.3e3ddb01b3424228e78711250a60973101bcd45b: Entertaining? What are you talking about? Who am I entertaining? Stop talking in riddles!
textByHashes.328dbb80b8f1077c46954d82e4bc148bed1fe381: Well, that doesn't really answer anything...
textByHashes.670b970f5242e5161b01977714131b9d99033e13: You mentioned other Leagues - how does this differ from those?
textByHashes.65e1bab547bd953782dc596f55632ae0c66bf5ce: Yes, I remember you shattering them on the boat ride.
textByHashes.22150eb4dfd64b47fdfd09d3da6eba27f74cff7c: So I have Fragments to collect... got it. Are there any OTHER weird rules I should know about?
textByHashes.86db070df94f54c212d0b786f313bf59a10d8328: Oh great... there's always a catch.
textByHashes.43f4815a43a22c5d9770050b84bbc0f0c9755912: Why are you doing all of this? Surely I'd be more 'entertaining' if I could have all the power at once?
textByHashes.6c8eea70ad8cf8b16bc38289c4ac311afabd6535: Any tips you can give me on being 'entertaining'?
textByHashes.c47fc6378cc3b5db8b2b54cace57834465f934e7: What do I use these 'points' on?
textByHashes.544a86053b75ef33b02be4e4e1a93585804f187e: Ok... I think I understand what I should do now.
textByHashes.3790acc56e7d39594b74802b95d2beb1cd292307: How do I find these Fragments?
textByHashes.37f730de6afd13007d0ece28003ca8dba9c87590: What happens if I try to put the Fragments back together?
textByHashes.465de23d1e0f1c80ba8dfcb365829b6cd3b0979f: How does the content unlock system work?
textByHashes.e0d6fd432f384cf5089dde9904a219f452cb52a4: How did I get here again?
textByHashes.bf59f8b5fcc824b022cfa08e43dd8d7769e1fd44: Will I be rewarded for participating in this event?
textByHashes.d6a7af6714bd40c425ad239af367870cde967c15: Are there any other rewards I can earn from this event?
textByHashes.d93155c12812ef5363bb4e23c46c34fc1bdb3dc8: Do I have any items to collect?
textByHashes.32c6c408d41d9dd3a87622596a4246f478ba74dd: Can I claim any league trophies I may of earned from this league?
textByHashes.74c70b1ef1bca2ad6537728d4c2dca4be15f4f1a: So... what do I do here, in Grid Master?
textByHashes.02bb699a0aedfcef1ec6d82e7e2815320925a735: Can I have some more headgear?
textByHashes.eafbe06b7d9b06d4bdc7a38556555e0170baaf16: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Kandarin Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.b9930f0ff090efd08af66fdf33c18e1282ad38c0: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!
textByHashes.70ee5ce589efed085c100874c8be4b249dac7ec2: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!
textByHashes.7b52de28d52bcd46e8db60912f2e9dab5b8aade3: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!
textByHashes.466d232f4b75750c0fc9d1f6c1c3eb612286f022: Tell me more about this makeover.
textByHashes.29d19c6e46e1d579d5a7be1a28cd74a4c763ce8d: I'll take the reward lamp, thanks.
textByHashes.cf31f20b5f4f8d14d5ebe4a84133e29378bad98d: Can I have my scythe back?
textByHashes.fb556706b45e8b43739d3214c9567c770aaefc7e: Can I have my bunny ears back?
textByHashes.f03055ed3f5e0b6f13e9df10e9fce35e11fcf935: Are you able to offer any other services?
textByHashes.7da58b29143d32049d0761bf166468c50d899a80: I'm looking for some new shoes.
textByHashes.31b4b5c0d8204dc57f717673df24bf044997f803: Are you able to give me a haircut?
textByHashes.6b505876c3ead94b8393ce26d81397f9d6ef95a0: I'm interested in changing my gender.
textByHashes.4e9b8bcbbdeaff2963bc5b88103431300a21a117: I'd like to buy some dynamite.
textByHashes.eae2f8156bf31a5839ca4ea282d3db70856138e2: What stories do you bring from afar?
textByHashes.02bb6c1178c07282c9c5bd388e0f436f21da8a9e: No, I guess not. Thanks anyway.
textByHashes.e79865cd9c0700ee4dc409e037e79cad957f926c: Scam? Oh... You mean his promise not to come in here anymore?
textByHashes.2f291854e5619d9f1a2b09cc00e00ad9fe5c74c6: Nope, I don't have a Disk of Returning.
textByHashes.caca84f34b688a81c1cf2adfa921e9f661553eb0: It depends, what do I get out of it again?
textByHashes.77161de7cd9bb1fd22475d826753996ad87c5c36: Ok sure thing, what do you need?
textByHashes.beaefa63e160c17bfa5d36fe77e3557e1615a3d2: Hmm no thanks, I'm not interested.
textByHashes.6ac822a36e775ea776350c5ee99686125c03f240: I think I'll keep hold of it for now.
textByHashes.4b41b5e2abfad837a09a10935e31f4ac2c0850db: Do you have another copy of the list?
textByHashes.c0d7dc2f44e93a4fd47132ae84ed710e2b1e7a44: What do you need all this stuff for?
textByHashes.86ac41ccb0661133235eaf7bb37edc6061a9ace4: So why didn't you ask for the prizes then?
textByHashes.724b6f003dadcc7019f104f4c7113be536aef8d0: So why do you want the ?
textByHashes.37290ee3ee316e4fa9840c604c0602b8a970bea3: Current events? But it's... Oh nevermind.
textByHashes.21c80c4c2d149c23d08d9ee71f7f55f0d11ab2b6: Right, why do I get the feeling I shouldn't?
textByHashes.00d42d7e61e285e533166a12392292d0447e0dc9: Yeah, right, all those are just 'supplies'.
textByHashes.b6dd0a36432835dee2de56f0cb1b549515109e5f: No, I'd better get looking for them.
textByHashes.e18b0e1efbe17cafff8eb536bf12a0623950d000: Okay sure thing, what do you need?
textByHashes.6e9dc72a8082a98231b1607564059ceb6b8cd99f: Good luck with dealing with the King. You'll need it!
textByHashes.dd203497786866c304c46dd7344a7885fd0e9b45: You said you'd enchant my battlestaff for me.
textByHashes.ba6aaf0f8d85c7919af15878269f5616b0c6d5b7: Can I have some more boots?
textByHashes.f6bd510899de1ee54c489002d28b700b7ee2c884: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Fremennik Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.0cd62c62ccde775ac192deae8336df2cb1e07f67: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!
textByHashes.1b5f7e5679d96381fe36f75e16b08fd2faa59c04: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!
textByHashes.f5cc31623e82f13d32719794857a0d4734f9fe1e: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!
textByHashes.283f8bfec300590e7042af26d400dcdc5a11cbdf: Can you make me another of Sir Vyvin's swords?
textByHashes.2db39554b8e3ef5aaea318b32a4592ece4a8d20e: Okay, I'll go and find that.
textByHashes.c307373f86176eccbda4f93c9bb7b9454707b180: Now that I am so skilled at Smithing, can I buy a Skillcape of Smithing from you?
textByHashes.aae870e351e112c52771694dfd8a9fb132fd7f01: No it's true. I was accidentally helping some grave robbers unearth some treasure below Ice Mountain. Long story short, it turned out to be the ruins of Camdozaal.
textByHashes.c0ac111abc47c05c8f3c256c04f164d0e45f19de: Well there's not much left there really. It's just a ruin.
textByHashes.9926f3668a34e825105b427cbbeacb8da07228b1: But there's a lone Imcando dwarf keeping it alive. His name is Ramarno.
textByHashes.a7f06480ab548192adcfc80e9f913b2506b8cf9f: He's managed to keep the city going all these years, even with his lack of vision.
textByHashes.98f9960debf571a5e15b450c24043c6f0bc981b3: What do you make of this, Thurgo?
textByHashes.fe21f0ff95064930af4306880d36e36bd1830dfe: So you believe it could possibly lead to the ancient ruins of your race?
textByHashes.9f7b81a506f905fcb135f30eb996da5b355ddba9: Alright, Thurgo. I'll see you later.
textByHashes.0a7e4110b6f4671506ecb7eb97dbd9b8bb4fbbdc: The Wise Old Man says he's got the information you wanted. Here's his message.
textByHashes.7444df132eff54cf608178bbfb3a0e5b31291959: Hi. What are you doing out here?
textByHashes.b9e6c1b6f251484bedeee749353043ce36e828be: How was your last fishing trip?
textByHashes.f6d1b02eb262d60d3d0cc21bcfa882d8868e61f4: That sounds great. If you ever do make it again, tell me the recipe so I can make it myself please.
textByHashes.61a55089bf59e3490cc7a6df7645e06d2e6f4c8f: You really like cooking. Can you share any recipes with me?
textByHashes.4de53462312cbd0d9c27bfa5e7a3c699b168defb: Aw, please tell me! I've always wanted to try sailor food.
textByHashes.be6013349d40c159d9ad9fdf70f3fa425938b866: Wow. You really like eggs, don't you?
textByHashes.997ea568bec312675101705022ec7f20c7fb18d6: Cook and eat it, of course.
textByHashes.6f0add0d9a1f532afe4b0e3f1b9e46397eaa7c0c: Fine, I'll take my salmon elsewhere then.
textByHashes.fed127f0b10334529b3220590fc7adb185330222: Would you like a freshly cooked salmon?
textByHashes.edc41079bc5b74e8f48d94f95ff23a58f0aa96eb: What do you make of this egg?
textByHashes.687f4d49870bfa184bfa4254185d04c10206ce22: Just looks like an egg to me...
textByHashes.85016a68df45b6b3d41eedb9bc0c47de6bbbb88e: Surely an egg doesn't have a soul-
textByHashes.e27123bf542303c872fba35eeefe02f44c47ebcd: Look, I was just given this egg as a trick while Trick- or-Treating. It's just a joke!
textByHashes.1deac84b6880bb9f4e4ecf8dff857fe314fa8e7c: I was just wondering what you were up to.
textByHashes.d263221c62835aeb2f5da2f0629593fc2264bb5f: So do you have any spare jobs then?
textByHashes.e0b1df29f74368aee48a7df2fd5a140cfbd65d2e: What do I get from this?
textByHashes.12c2dbbfb1e3bcb3b6a7fe98bf3d80ba212b971a: Ok, I'll give it a go!
textByHashes.830645a9a0880b723e3ed5245364de50484318d9: Can I have another Varrock platebody?
textByHashes.36e16af6c30aaea9fe8dc162593f0d0dc190db73: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Varrock Achievement Diary!
textByHashes.41e78001eb9b19990fd206804900e305219087e0: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!
textByHashes.f8140fb85b391863a9c22befee4bcc644b024f6d: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!
textByHashes.3ab3ae09d053d46b96c9a9f7e548e932151a2bd6: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!
textByHashes.09200ec3b3eb81f93f01ee3ca7d580abb0783104: Hello again. Can you tell me about this training area?
textByHashes.cbf497a07d3c9625e501e4b2302335ee9097b587: OK, I didn't have too many problems beating them before.
textByHashes.6fd8ff06b80bd0b51563a4fb5c676cdd3aece304: I see. So what are you investigating?
textByHashes.ac3b29e6531aa01e9ebe0fceedacc195fa9074fb: You were very close to the Council. You should be glad you got to keep your job at all.
textByHashes.924336a63f0ec17e0d6691c799a31270f9055c10: Come now Tomas, it can't be all bad. Show a little enthusiasm.
textByHashes.c3f3391e3066ed0b230823f99194abe1406b3c87: Say, aren't you a bit tall for a dwarf?
textByHashes.1ee259fb055b5dbf893eb0a3c6ca5143e7bd50ee: No, I just like talking to strangers.
textByHashes.0727212c61bb9c1913ff38cb9f96b1d7e6d7de97: Why are you sunbathing up a mountain?
textByHashes.ebd46ee15fd1baab8b3d061ad057050aacb92dc7: Yes, very nice, but why are you sunbathing up a mountain? Surely a beach would be more appropriate?
textByHashes.9b05554c72223b865d4ba919bf821e74607d0857: No thanks, I'll keep hold of my stuff.
textByHashes.440353aff1bb6713cad1dbf46126b91fb9cb7721: Are you going to move that other deckchair?
textByHashes.ca0392d4370edf265b13d43f9d150f53af5a0d51: Why are you here in Weiss?
textByHashes.907d9c8b4f7710e05f475ecb5345e7130fae996f: What do you do with the tools you're storing? They can't possibly all fit in your pockets!
textByHashes.f8be92c40fb23e55ee38cc9de8d23a592b612ada: I shall have to try that sometime.
textByHashes.0fa85ff53c7ff07be9dc746ea7ec8e9371f7785d: Hi, what ales are you serving?
textByHashes.d3f5c4bef25c5578f625a95abfa83a67c6440fa7: Yes, and the black cat dances in the sink.
textByHashes.d7cbfc0cd67a6442d7a683c0bb00cbfb8421c297: Hello there, what do you do here?
textByHashes.d6ddc5a95377405574d462005cd509548474f9f0: What can Player Moderators not do?
textByHashes.6f389d47401111ee278fb9f1ecdd7cad05a3ac35: Tell me about the Rules of Conduct.
textByHashes.2c343a319d8276bbca07987813cb25a7f4f28996: Can you give me a handy tip please?
textByHashes.aaef85c3aa860f611e44c396d0300b63aad73524: Can you show me the Guidelines please?
textByHashes.2a0438a302263630d85be7bf3292903c8a2a8fc7: Do you have a copy of the Code of Conduct?
textByHashes.23ccf74c5e82401211665be2b29e59e8a9b0d6a5: Can you give me a moderating tip please?
textByHashes.3f0176ec526b65e99c8c0535a1624249785230ac: You're very helpful to us Player Moderators, but what help do you give to non Player Moderators?
textByHashes.e502e44a42380bec6c002fe79d92a5229d840e55: So, where exactly can I go with your ships?
textByHashes.32617fdf47d7577d56bf6bc3436cba79286c330a: Wow, that's a lot of ports. I take it you have some exotic stuff to trade?
textByHashes.4ba8a0d15813cde60d62bc900c87d84fb5c64d16: Yes, let's see what you're trading.
textByHashes.5e4421b139309ef3d155870be8b06bd1721e81b2: Isn't it tricky to sail about in those clothes?
textByHashes.3a759b42fd2120a956d1cb84c463c6a5c4acd918: Would you let me bring it if I told you it was a security blanket?
textByHashes.ac0b8e13611331aedc9e1c9c7207c64ca0df56f4: I can say in all honesty that it is not.
textByHashes.1a754464a5801ae07ef47e55b4b713bcac3d3485: Do you have any paints for sale?
textByHashes.628dfc7df67f8487190229f21474269781e9794d: I don't have 5 tradeable paints on me right now.
textByHashes.169252f0b2ab95068cafba47ff277082fb1fcde6: Yes, I'll take a look at your wares.
textByHashes.03770bf670595aea310adcfb80072b12ed984578: What sort of stuff have you got?
textByHashes.2a19df8f833ecc9628206ebd42471898ea7be0a9: You shout at them and beat them with sticks?
textByHashes.aa6b4906ee0b1542204108b5052fcdd4b26e8556: You sit on their backs and prod them with sharp pointy things.
textByHashes.7f7d6c5d1432a584bc74407ab46daba0ce2c7ecc: Doesn't seem very fair on the tortoises.
textByHashes.8236c089e8462aa0e9d4fc6df6e199f981275df4: Where do these tortoises come from?
textByHashes.d303a226f84dea933e87ba52fabe7de2fa370f64: Yes, I can spare a little money.
textByHashes.27d0f5a5da85a35d965dc285263c6f97ca0b69df: Sorry, you'll have to earn it yourself, just like I did.
textByHashes.965d79b70bfc39c5f20bb1be7f465ac339479666: Well, it's not every day you see a man up a tree.
textByHashes.abac8385343184882ee39b41d3f1bd07865febe5: This is about the bank robbery, right?
textByHashes.72aaf083bb107fa85813d046989880f11cf0dbd5: Can't you just... I dunno... arrest him?
textByHashes.6f444d6e3987ff7ffe55d3ae6afaa84a4b24f8ae: You're not being very subtle up there.
textByHashes.2f0e571669001558042fb71f132b1cc50d9485c8: But your legs are hanging down!
textByHashes.d951511c1d93839b60a0a16a500acb679ff9e7c4: You want a bowl of stew?
textByHashes.765f3aedb66fcd2978e3bcf37ee37899cccc0ccf: No, I want to keep this stew!
textByHashes.29257ee99dd126fa1b5e8623a5ca29dc4614ff6a: I think I should leave him in peace to finish his stew!
textByHashes.1423a5680037b35b2031f9890ca331d9324d42f0: Sorry, I thought you'd like it.
textByHashes.a42e4fc0779f84e74eb989221aa50acda8d9b425: About this circle of dead mushrooms...
textByHashes.60afad78bf900e7d19ce4ec37f35243e9ddbbff1: Why is it outside the city?
textByHashes.0cef5da6067624407ebd5b03bef1ff199643d274: Why are there cables all over the cavern?
textByHashes.73fa8dc47c9f8deb7bfea7df599bced65cc21752: I got there and back by swinging across the cavern with a crossbow.
textByHashes.0ef2bd7e37e66893603cd6c3f42d8a75b3875331: I got there and back by balancing on cables and things.
textByHashes.439a0f67b0ab0934ca1c8d585ac7cf1b152efaf8: Do you need any more help?
textByHashes.c4aa7fb058ad5b5148ba46d264e246d8fc4a44fc: That's a nice cape - please tell me about it.
textByHashes.f8549f9f18d3ea8cbe0c1fcc52be74f65a7d2be2: Can I get a cape like yours?
textByHashes.75ed6b86cf37ca62a95d94d5bba8bd1b6d44be0d: I want another set. Here's 99,000 coins.
textByHashes.982b844d96fe7ce62ddbac332418e4f80a928c6a: I've lost the hood from my cape.
textByHashes.59e3b2171c7909290402f84496b4810af2b9caee: Why do they call you Two pints?
textByHashes.62d63ac28e368f1d47252b2cd433b798caf1a596: Maybe you lost a game of Runelink and had to change your name as a forfeit?
textByHashes.e81373f1d48e5dd3d0c4b9ecf95897bcffb81348: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!
textByHashes.f6e271ba06132878bc88f938eb6672699e1437d6: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!
textByHashes.c8da28f0410ca44397ce1a3f054995431ae4e4f1: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!
textByHashes.4e9ce4d32f84f58014dccc1203bad3631e8bb5e9: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!
textByHashes.7d64c543920c8f01ea33fe699e0c21078fb4eb23: Let's see what you've got for sale.
textByHashes.1ae459461f214c0d19aba553fc23aa965f4732fa: Do you know what's south of here?
textByHashes.42106d4bf7554212f5b424603c70351afca61608: Can I try the magicks myself?
textByHashes.8271c01c6c565be2008b4f54f89a77fe00bc249b: I'd like to stop using your spellbook now.
textByHashes.3c10cfadfe6a4c8d08c05493242e2686452d4f61: Can I have an ash sanctifier, please?
textByHashes.62d9cb202d655c660c65375e60edb5358e9b8caa: Can I sacrifice my trophy heads on the altar?
textByHashes.934a34eba99f7067039f8259d20d667ec340587c: Well yes I suppose I am...
textByHashes.f21c44319d4bd9f87f05ebe796ca61d086688ad6: I like to think I'm pretty trustworthy. If you tell me, maybe I can help in some way.
textByHashes.56a37e2aee75f629620c7434daa36923da38fa8e: Okay, I'd like to sacrifice my fire cape.
textByHashes.a7fc9c109ab8be7c2d41bdc69974234b34952e50: Sorry, I want to keep it for now.
textByHashes.1f8110f663ec4b87ce87d289075447493707eccf: What should I do down there?
textByHashes.09a5a939332479470a528a1dc288b5aa6e742229: Well I definitely think I can help with that.
textByHashes.293dba8513e4a60396d2adf19b95cafeeafb4efe: I'll need to take it off first.
textByHashes.f7eaed9b95451ab24aaf6c9a8e0f28685f0b2c47: I don't have a fire cape on me unfortunately.
textByHashes.ce2f4f118840e6c668a8ee64895fe65b2ff645de: Can I help here in some way?
textByHashes.a124320f0fee5d5219318f0907ed202455d1822c: I have conquered the most difficult challenges across Gielinor. But I wish to challenge myself further.
textByHashes.069acf674d07b3bcaa96e09255fafe70cd8f3d0f: I wish to challenge the Inferno on my own terms, without the endorsement of a slayer master.
textByHashes.3c32a4e47ab05fdfa1c6acc62d92039561a34508: Thank you TzHaar-Ket-Keh. You won't regret it.
textByHashes.96cd4f740d2406f25777876c1d26f73a80d113e8: Wow what has happened here? That doesn't look good!
textByHashes.37d178e15956f88deb64abad9ffa7c2a222f23e2: Something doesn't seem right... There's a large opening.
textByHashes.5a7903af19190055935d1995bd71423d740af11c: Please help me to understand then.
textByHashes.143996ccba408a5c7cad59592f11df3d3dee4a6d: That sounds fantastic though, uncovering the past to determine where your species originated?
textByHashes.9a88b94d47403e5aca12a15f27c32888b3f4af00: Do you know what he's planning? What are you doing?
textByHashes.521016f837c10e6efe33fffe2a13799917e665a7: Is there no way to take him out?
textByHashes.18aaf287ad2d66d0c2beb95421d1e2a67e19ce33: Let me just take it off first.
textByHashes.edbfddc61418695b3a1ee0b16d9849b40b6108fd: I have a spare infernal cape, perhaps I could offer it back to you for a littlun to take with me?
textByHashes.53d128f3dc5905fad5f1767f51890ae841b3a6d8: Why can't I go past here?
textByHashes.de1d4d5048fa45ef864276bf2bc7993d56f05495: What if I could prove that I am capable?
textByHashes.a8b14dd96da43124d724cf01b403ac5d585d067a: How about a large stack of coins.
textByHashes.0f7063e0180aa81bdebd24548344b92a90cdc828: I managed to defeat TzTok-Jad and obtain this firecape.
textByHashes.7c32451a71acec812b97aa75f5f2489f3fac206b: Surely this proves I am capable? Can I pleeease come through now?
textByHashes.8395eca9e24dfeb61591844092282db023a82fd4: Sorry, I don't think I am capable.
textByHashes.effc3cf2f24a98e04e9db1eb33320cc3d1142cd9: I'm a hardened adventurer, nothing can stop me!
textByHashes.0ee0e355a542ab4b38879954849b38774b752187: maybe it helps you to understand what I'm saying. See you around.
textByHashes.8ee93f5a59ff5540285e18385d164a33f9f724a3: Not unless you can help me in the Inferno.
textByHashes.ab2506a92f1c547e375da64df618d86dad5fc669: Oh... Worth a try I suppose.
textByHashes.e0e4871eabbeca83df057c20db0a6b7c9f3af2f7: I have a fire cape here.
textByHashes.0c3fff6cafe24ca6277e9194eb0f801a30b503c8: I wonder if I might take on a TzHaar apprentice instead?
textByHashes.c053a0c8fdbf4dc8e570b2a32f0bb5a5331785c0: Don't I get the cape back?
textByHashes.39c917a4a81b8d778e0b90a024a2631cfc2ec56a: I think I'll keep my cape.
textByHashes.90ffa09e9a8792d8100bdc8f93d7c81ee60d04b0: Hello there. What brings you here?
textByHashes.585506e476e20c3f9a56aab88d1dd2873373530b: Hang on... The Colosseum is run by a priest?
textByHashes.56f7b28dbac5075b0515c98fd51a284b845c73bc: Yes, but we cleared up the whole situation.
textByHashes.a081c61681b84e44223a91acca3c31f019d0505a: Can I go through the gate please?
textByHashes.6477c5483355f7fc0e4ae76b215cd1121410f7db: But I'm doing a quest for Drezel!
textByHashes.e7692d7f5fe1fdabb5e6c3575c87cf261756feb8: Hi Unferth. How are you doing?
textByHashes.eea63ffd20ce5b811b16b4c7b03c128150aa38a4: Give it time. Things will get better, I promise.
textByHashes.0c2f3e6097aecb7917059b903e7c52b64fbde9ee: I think the guards are fine as they are.
textByHashes.0f1065ef914b41279bdafe3d083fd668f737c9b2: I think I've been here before...
textByHashes.28bdcc53ca92df516f504c6e8d1ef95e2c832910: This is a lot like a conversation I had with some goblins on the surface.
textByHashes.11e53deb0a679b129549a2e066c51c42c074ef4c: They ended up with the same armour colour that they started with!
textByHashes.d7ef6b5be5355d0c61cb3b52b476068214d8996a: Why are you scared of the gods?
textByHashes.70c205b4a3527171e697e6d63aa726e0c4b82336: The God Wars are over! The gods don't intervene directly in the affairs of mortals any more.
textByHashes.f5fe21e0de2220845eb0862d16fdb43e7b25d6d0: Don't you want to worship the god of the goblins?
textByHashes.d81d79b1d17bdf8a02ca3cf51fe6d0728b4a7014: May I have permission to sell food in the market?
textByHashes.be6a4bcccf9edf32d88dc626f1c52b747204a724: I'd rather help you in return for better prices.
textByHashes.76122f70ba1bdd767d48fb9fca2c98f34a995697: Yes that is correct. The spirits of the Elid cursed the town for throwing away a statue to Elidinis. I got it back
textByHashes.07f673a4b3e0e872b4eab8735f43ca04e481bb3e: But you're not even mining at the moment.
textByHashes.2928fe2397ad312a74c6215d7a9c1d3eaa7a16a1: Oh okay. What are they though?
textByHashes.3802e37320d4d41e4819dcca469fd70f54c85d2d: What can I use it for?
textByHashes.622598c6e267fddaffc041e98653423bcced8ca3: Awesome! Does that mean I can use it in my house?
textByHashes.f9843bb7063a2146e4d8af834d03b8398433d9ae: Hello. Shouldn't you be on guard duty?
textByHashes.8cc2e35bc56be90562b70d1aae099e9bfc682c60: Sure can. So why are you hanging around here?
textByHashes.d57ee9e9f45ae4ebd4b08a4a0ad5fdc875f17806: Well, actually I would like to know what happened to you to turn you into an invisible ghost.
textByHashes.3902fbbabb2e0e59f6d52a06d55d859474fb055a: If only so I can make sure it doesn't happen to me...
textByHashes.add29746d06644a5e9b3e67e982ecd3bcc6c3986: What, you mean you gave it to Saradomin and in return he cursed you???
textByHashes.17e8ea300fd90809f33f5ff868cadcac3d597f00: Seems kind of ungrateful if you ask me...
textByHashes.651c3b3ecb0b549eb562d95c912d31fd2106fc3a: Eh, I won't make any promises, but if it's nothing too annoying I guess I can help you out.
textByHashes.f1da3adba6ad154a29f6d1f8312f783d44e26cac: Where can I find this Rennard then?
textByHashes.281b8cb681a02e0a1e8f0de7d22eb822b4666710: Can you remind me where to find the thief Rennard who caused this curse to befall you again?
textByHashes.a0fe78cac46a26b73f8a1c90aeaed064c0fd63ca: Hey! How do I get out of here?
textByHashes.6aeffdc710d2ef5abc75b6f9b3a762d7eaeb10dd: But I've filled the mine cart.
textByHashes.267886e46f081e29ed02d2af3000e4714f0d86cd: Does it not bother you having lower class vampyres up here?
textByHashes.4a29f3e99e9a7630cfd44bb085a50bd6bc6f7d42: So... do you know anywhere good to explore?
textByHashes.56ea7cc89be60abf530a442b1f28e0ad1e649d79: No, it's too dangerous for me too.
textByHashes.8c2d19feefea83a36476ed2bc2359add31df673f: Do I get a reward? For freeing you and all...
textByHashes.645effa9b6d04c0ceb841981cbdf7f4e831cf798: Tell me more about Great Kourend.
textByHashes.0b150ddb383e8d9acd09689686c623b226a24116: That's great, can you take me there please?
textByHashes.7bfa7dc9d88aeae2a40ff29c8944728335c38e2e: Can you tell me about the other parts of Kourend?
textByHashes.a86d2c535805917e44754d82aa404ec445f318e3: Could you tell me more about Kourend?
textByHashes.094608e81574f2389c7a6b4647ba8649a6fbb554: Yes you did. You gave me a reward for helping your client.
textByHashes.875915dd22451d70cf585db80d6ae33bda6ca36e: What's this old book you gave me?
textByHashes.aeda4ab56daa5de8f0282e8ff59ad0c2464b9317: Why did you give it to me?
textByHashes.aed3e3c5579d31e423aa936131891c7a231cef85: Would you feel comfortable sharing your story?
textByHashes.a7430760138a3e11838f4ee6b2c39b4336842f5e: 19 years old? That's an incredible amount of time for a wolf to live!
textByHashes.559a1f9ecd37a972883196d9c2eb4cab64516538: I can help! I'll search for Copper's collar. I'm sure I can find the fox that has it...
textByHashes.3085f3c04d85a8a6e6eb40a703ec1f0c2a8a89cf: I'll return when I have found Copper's collar. Take care!
textByHashes.83d8b0e8bde7dfe2ed0cc58399dfdf047265f841: I haven't had any luck finding it yet, Veos. Where would you recommend searching?
textByHashes.26afec74b2f3b56f07d7130c68f892dd0f47329f: Thanks, Veos. I'll return when I have the collar!
textByHashes.e59ca5323c998cea377660bf008c0318b100ec85: You're more than welcome Veos, and don't worry about a reward. Losing your best friend is always hard. Hopefully that item will bring you some comfort. Take care!
textByHashes.ecd1bb4f29f0bba9580f1e22c5486016ebc3f91d: Who're you? I've never seen you around these parts before.
textByHashes.3ccc61fbee5512669b136d7d92df2f548a8bf400: Who? Where? Why have you suddenly docked here?
textByHashes.c28c98c708aa599ba2c482fc99942df02b7007b3: Yes, what clothes do you have in stock?
textByHashes.e3813efc9a66616bffc5da6cb204ca430bdffb42: Well, show me what you do have then.
textByHashes.c5429aa232cd09c5c385ad1484708cd8e1ba8075: Interesting... It might be good to add some data about the depth of the sea to my charts.
textByHashes.b70b960538b35a9dee394e2d5c1b9c55c99a0ce8: Can I dive to the sea floor with you?
textByHashes.8a0a1c8bc8af38abe354fec8b246b2fd4686c8d6: What about the giant monster up there?
textByHashes.b22112d533e3a62361d5eb6a93e5ad4f2f781642: I suppose I can help out.
textByHashes.f7a83669887942ae739c607a357240f7062f8f54: Sorry, I'm a bit busy right now.
textByHashes.8183b6708ede70326cf31dcdec3aca1810ea4d26: What did you want me to get you?
textByHashes.609e9dff038a3c86d47073906e992d6d028e28c5: Uh, usually there's a reward for doing this sort of thing.
textByHashes.1891ea699c60925ab72e4391c73bcee84239e22d: I... uh... of course. Enjoy your meal.
textByHashes.a0b433bc0fff85364699b423b472c5058a19949a: Interesting and complex is a good way to describe it...
textByHashes.79f08a1e7584bcb6e7a7eff8e64746752a29dcec: Would you like any more redberry antelope?
textByHashes.6da49af0410fce6d949c527d9a3ae8577b548488: I really liked your little story. Can you tell me another one?
textByHashes.512dc408db71d7005f2c1970fd7c3ade850f53d2: Preferably something with a big fight and lots of explosions!
textByHashes.7620a801b73d9cf6a6b3a9fad2ab640b7cb64d3b: Didn't all this belong to the Red Axe? And weren't you a member?
textByHashes.f621db8e11fa1c06d4928b5f6dda78d37f933e64: Yes please, I'd like to go to Brimhaven.
textByHashes.23a668b48f70dd7798e37ef19f5d23f052dcd2e1: Ohhh kaaay... I'll leave you to it then.
textByHashes.d6b7f1320c63accb0f821329d9291819f1319bce: There are a lot of them around here...
textByHashes.190f81b4ff327dae9371371aa2eb8408d31a4083: Do you need any help in the vineyards?
textByHashes.b77099679d8cdc08c215300a1bad121c1af640c9: Got it! One barrel full of grapes coming right up.
textByHashes.406fb49f90b6831a34f16b62b015df8473fa0cf7: Doesn't it get hot standing out here all day?
textByHashes.0ad69f4f8510767a1c4f23510d4b26847bc3f1de: I'm good. I'll be going now.
textByHashes.0e6a4fc8469745797f96245fd38d5dee39775af4: One barrel o' grapes here for you, boss!
textByHashes.39e7b11e7642cd554160ba5ec77e76fb76c1d8c8: Can I have some gold instead?
textByHashes.b4bedc60578c725cc9ca2bb37478ccca09c81169: I see. And what happens if I drink the blessed wine?
textByHashes.037ff2bac0f83238751940b955e6b48dec8eb5e6: Why can't Yama speak for themself?
textByHashes.090328a6c241ac34a6cb745c70d2b84b9db377ba: Upset that I disrupted your plans?
textByHashes.f293fa6c7a31a948c84ff9a24175c6ea0123bafc: Yama wants to speak with me? How do you know that? You shouldn't even be able to talk to him.
textByHashes.cd6f037f54cdb0541d57dcb8cef2233a0f37acb1: I planted the device! Your connection should be severed!
textByHashes.2a054948d15aa1a32dec56365de3b081008d5a9a: I think I'd rather stay here.
textByHashes.21ea5f5e3b98f137dd6648fd63bac33df12b1828: Yes I am. You have a lovely yurt.
textByHashes.5f41dec5a80321db4d7b7b3b98d8822c7a93a3fd: Hey! I'm Vampyre. What's your name?
textByHashes.981268a8d65a0305795b747bd8c97d03e4d54e9c: Your name is Von van Von?
textByHashes.6396fb2171702b692e03824ea9991346c9544917: Sorry, just to clarify. Von van Von? That's your name?
textByHashes.d45537ff01d277f3c01c97fd3ae6b017e0d1d6ab: What's there to do around here?
textByHashes.9e95519ad9dcf6f1e9bd8c3588d6419348c97857: Sounds great! I'll be sure to try those things.
textByHashes.79bbff4962bb79bee0f32a6f9db8c7d1b1fb6c82: Many would say the same about drinking blood. What do they know though?
textByHashes.18ec9ed3e917e014c667e23de6837e2f555f64b9: I hear it's all the rage.
textByHashes.c206d099f8cc2aa857cd2f80a6c4b18833c5086d: I've been a few times. Always worth another trip though. See you around.
textByHashes.6160668d45e5db04cbfa08c3b98ce6f0a0a96323: Hey. Anything interesting going on around here?
textByHashes.5a0aacdf4baf75160fca0cd86d2f01e38cabd5c3: That sounds... great. Although, I have heard of another Tithe Farm very far from here.
textByHashes.9e6faaf92bb76fa26f77efb3ad66695f86f383fd: Could you send me to the mines?
textByHashes.0be35973ef22b3f57e2a979ee85623b1be8f3a75: Could you escort me to the mines?
textByHashes.8a71402ab37bd3da9ac5f1054c0eb0b62d5a54a5: I didn't know gates had relations.
textByHashes.af4faa72c8f9b216c90b679133feb000ba9cb89c: So where is the, errr, fidgety sister at the moment?
textByHashes.63e2006fce42e0d724a9165bc4dbb0a053a30171: I don't think so. What are they in for?
textByHashes.928871f3d8322c3ef0327e25847096a25c3d86ff: Ah, nice. Bit brutal though, right?
textByHashes.48f3965becbe6b8cafb32d485d3d33aa543abedc: Hey, thanks for all the information. It REALLY helped me out in finding the lost city of Zanaris and all.
textByHashes.3e6fa9f62c3585723b938c7ce273167a2abb5eae: You know.... I think I'll keep that to myself.
textByHashes.bc89b407af5e7edbf013328ed083e6a395cb2e10: Interesting. Do you get many treasure hunters here in Kourend?
textByHashes.bed637ae879f748d4f13b88ff02205eb00965faf: Ah! I am just the adventurer you are looking for. If you hand me a clue, I'll be on my way.
textByHashes.fbde2ac7f918d052dcbd13c50c9f90a6a5160040: He also claims to be the master of all clue scrolls.
textByHashes.cf384d0f5c6c9b361149db69b7c27f7fe08fe429: Something tells me you're lying! I bet you're just his underling aren't you.
textByHashes.55281448151097423de5059f676e971001c0adfe: So what are master clue scrolls anyway?
textByHashes.5b87f8032a3a681e47542df27398ae99d54afa8f: I assume there is treasure to be found?
textByHashes.d6f0e24fff2fde281a754c9ef0a26967d78dc30b: Oh that seems really useful! It's a bit of a shame I need to come here everytime to check though.
textByHashes.d816ecd4122689acc908a08ac7e2e4101f5a59bb: I suppose you're right, I don't suppose you have a spare one I could buy off you to save me the hassle?
textByHashes.464b18ff9c82cb1a26a5399431a64dba5ccadcbc: Can you tell me about scroll boxes?
textByHashes.278181e1267271bd2ceee5252cd2d8dbd4009483: So how many scrolls can I carry right now?
textByHashes.3f759190ef0cd818b34dd6d1aaec99fa6de434f0: You said you didn't know Sherlock!
textByHashes.2a9ab3aa7b7959ccb32681e654d19c1b7786f470: Hi Waymottin, what are you up to?
textByHashes.f80387ca0edf90ad8be89a42b049a72d2b2578a8: I found this Jar, I think it's full of venom.
textByHashes.7be1cfbf7c31420129cd5f498de538cb7d0d846a: Did you want to see the Jar again?
textByHashes.a78215d5f8d51dba269fafeca2261a8306696d2f: Hello! What're you doing up here?
textByHashes.f8b8723cb8505bb4219be2e721a6ef3976b68e41: I'm not sure what you're up to, but if it's got anything to do with that villa, then I think someone might've beaten you to it...
textByHashes.044143d431503fdda81b65bba21ddc589f999aed: No, not really... what kind of shop is this anyway?
textByHashes.928bdc4d954887aa0e1ae704327e0b349b1f8c7d: Thanks, but I don't think your services are required.
textByHashes.2e75d3a9fa62d4058af48a3a68329357cb5d04cf: Why even come here if there's nothing for you to drink?
textByHashes.aea1b92f05512f483a5b17cc7e5296a9d87fcbea: Why? Where would they even go if they escaped?
textByHashes.cc38e7aaab8e8365b8fd840be2d428ab75d92eb6: Okay, I'd like you to crush something.
textByHashes.9df71ad52e16f96cc5cc4c3975a2d3f4e79fcea7: What sort of things do you crush?
textByHashes.47f25f4a9eb7a6371d106ab82093ddaf70c7f970: Forget it - I'll do it myself.
textByHashes.6ecd3f680dbc6aaa59adf0371e31182e9283da33: Hello, what's a little boy like you doing down here?
textByHashes.dd0247ed46a4f0c9d58565f377d6c49e226912ad: I'm a bit busy at the moment, maybe later.
textByHashes.f7a5b4068bd37a76667489a9f009b06527fb42c9: Not right now, thank you. I was wondering if you might be able to help me with something else.
textByHashes.3d305e7320805e0eb52e86b14f8fc685c9a3019b: Do you know the Easter Bunny?
textByHashes.5d8374e97fc3aef71c5051a4e244f6ef15e2d8a8: Does he seem unhappy to you?
textByHashes.cb232af0b38602fdbf73982647c898b6d5a3f067: Indeed, I've never seen him like this.
textByHashes.583e4b8831c3580c9fc406ab5baac1d70e08c302: Interesting, could I try the carrot juice please?
textByHashes.0d2cbdc05830a14e4d8706de1fdbfc3bc9a6e9d9: It's definitely an experience, how do you make it?
textByHashes.b0a291d1d714cc324e1827c54128602c9302c42b: Do you have any particularly nice carrots we could use to make some special juice just for the Easter Bunny?
textByHashes.a468d418fef8ea8c20623d5a95d3521b41de495a: I think he would perhaps appreciate something different.
textByHashes.0b400fad47be2d0a15b3c6d6c8c3429208765641: I'm not scared, I just haven't gotten round to it yet.
textByHashes.a96eebf074eec0a726571a4fc2eb0d28fa52ea52: Let's call it a quality control incident.
textByHashes.a515f55054e40fe6e5c58870ee96f892f5e9ed11: Isn't this just a beer glass?
textByHashes.183c6ddae37d53b3f37ad3b26efa2160de0fb725: Sorry, can I have another glass please?
textByHashes.1b837d26a3107fa1cc8a2b063760a98a74adf767: Good question, I'll go and make some juice.
textByHashes.cd545f21566cafd288e68a128dee14b3d405f828: Oh it's good stuff, I should know.
textByHashes.c86d666e028fd1ac759dd02bd048cd1f667abc8b: I'll go and give it to him now, bye!
textByHashes.6d6711c6ff47268cb56acc28e0a8e88b39ca6535: I think that fancy carrot juice has cheered the Easter Bunny up a bit, he really seemed to like it!
textByHashes.d0120e29bddbd4488ce2225b09f4e3e61547de52: I'm making some Easter Buns for the Easter Bunny, and I need some Easter Spices.
textByHashes.400df934ab93c5434184c845480c95e29382a68a: Do you have any I could use?
textByHashes.803aa070381dacf46adb4e62b0835f7f8f0ab0a7: Judging by the smell, I'd say so. Powerful stuff.
textByHashes.882b28b94e84ada64842244758747ec7fc64f4e4: Thanks for both juice and spices, EB really liked the buns!
textByHashes.db36dfdb3ddceb4571611913aa5297badec26fcc: So, what you up to out here?
textByHashes.278be8eb4759d81d04609a311e6882f76d343c58: It's a bit hot and dry round here for a gnome isn't it? I thought you gnomes liked your home comforts.
textByHashes.c26f4321c390e92ff9fb71cdd3fcb09935ca67b6: Why are you in that cage?
textByHashes.8c83e1341014973ae857eaa90a357ec63c76ca07: That's awful! Why did she do that?
textByHashes.34cf0b24395a898239e02eb459f16e9a50aa3c95: Your ogleroots? I don't think I understand. What secret is that?
textByHashes.5def3e324363e80d6363fc0c8286629633a1483c: That's amazing! But how do you move the ogleroot around if it's so big?
textByHashes.e63ef07929d075d44f64485b9952c6cb6b1e0a4e: That's amazing! So how does the witch fit in to all this?
textByHashes.b546c7ebdab7ec534b77ed5fbcf8b11ee576e6a6: So she hasn't found out the spell yet?
textByHashes.7352642b659ba5942a92c3c66e4755ccd5b1e8d4: I see. Can I get you out of there somehow?
textByHashes.7d9fb64ee43c800caa54096775a32c72751ec17b: Thanks! So you can help me?
textByHashes.81d4c324d44a3fca656518b68fd8cae68deb67e9: Could I have some free stuff, please?
textByHashes.e93a63fa95b44cb9535f16c4d08323637ba1182e: Ok, what do you want me to do?
textByHashes.427b9ee5d44638a5de1b2d9181d2b5da32349fbb: Is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.178af36c025791d37a69ddae3b209274055edcb9: Could you check my items for junk, please?
textByHashes.ba2ab74129b2d048e04d00e957e66ee57f844e51: Can I get another hood for my Quest Point Cape?
textByHashes.ec4bcfc3e2a19227cc2fc6bfc6bc44ec005fb5d1: Can I buy a Quest Point Cape, please?
textByHashes.4631c5f4cfb4af0c6a44355b93d3a01bb68ac194: I'll have to come back another time.
textByHashes.ef5f08db438ab84334afad079b24235662b295cb: Could you tell me about the Wilderness, please?
textByHashes.f502e6c4b75a2e8407c8adf746363ddc6fee16fa: What can you tell me about jungles?
textByHashes.c921f9906034e42917de362281ad8cba2db76938: I've dealt with them, although there are a few still knocking about.
textByHashes.5b791e755c2fb6754e173634afe37291ca54ee14: What mystical realms can I visit?
textByHashes.fc5344a0a32ceb6e1545c5fa9c87e42e1d4d2f0d: I've been through a portal into the lair of some ancient demon. It was in the city of Uzer.
textByHashes.7f7074d6c48d67a38bce58962f705133d6ca5df1: Yeah, there isn't much left there.
textByHashes.4265079763d3ffb5b0abad474f7dfc489ace8c2f: What's the biggest monster in the world?
textByHashes.2f4aa97460c40cd27cca9e0da87310f014fc98a6: Actually, that one's dead. I've been helping a barmy hunter who'd sworn to kill it.
textByHashes.1cdcebb555d264a054fa94084fcd6b7390fcf6c9: What are these strange monsters that keep appearing out of nowhere and attacking me when I'm training?
textByHashes.5e29d3ccff867d4893531b79590c4a19d666f2f3: Where did humans learn to use magic?
textByHashes.179b9df291d43581e8bc72d905a0d0a259e36c3b: I suppose you'd know about the history of today's cities?
textByHashes.2e2a4dd1bbcef58ddf2770908987572b27cd9bef: Yes, I've met them. They're all mad.
textByHashes.53d418df76c57a9dfc50a109d0c337a794b77eb1: He'll be back, just you wait!
textByHashes.e26835c7b4aca88fa0c4e398a3794a7a681e0b30: I've foiled a dastardly Zamorakian plot to have Hazeel resurrected.
textByHashes.e3c4a99c9f364cb6c819f6ba707bca3a54613d89: Tell me about yourself, old man.
textByHashes.d1c1f059b9994b7200c42585c60842f897468f0a: That feline statue you've got on your bookshelf there - I'm sure I saw something like that when I was in Sophanem.
textByHashes.19130d70717cdabfeb4c21678699b8d8b2ff2ec2: So you've spoken to the Sphinx, then?
textByHashes.ceb89cac87169db9f4a66b6b3ad6cc985bc11a9c: I heard that Gielinor has three gods.
textByHashes.cfa4dbfb3d6eee318a002c9bb0ae1e2b9c495e2c: I discovered a buried altar to a god called Zaros.
textByHashes.a307b5f1bc4d964151578f9f0edd5d7acf303caf: Does that mean I shouldn't ask you about the ancient magicks I learnt in that pyramid north of Sophanem?
textByHashes.16394f5c0deac2ab3ff65523b8a7b64924900408: I've heard of another god, called Armadyl.
textByHashes.f30f63adccd10de41f9c5b963062e86f9218034a: A strange man asked me to go into the Temple of Ikov and steal the Staff of Armadyl.
textByHashes.965701d0bc348e074f39e03b7f84b1f33c88b3f6: Well, there were servants of Armadyl living down in the depths of the temple. They'd been there for generations, guarding the staff.
textByHashes.48530b5fa783ec8a437c3b497431db88f814169d: Oh well, the servants rewarded me very kindly for defeating Lucien for them.
textByHashes.6e315a2eec6504c9c32c2eca37ff9e07e257ba74: It's lucky there's no Armadyl! I've pinched his staff and given it to Lucien.
textByHashes.43460638845810e288919cb327fcd93ed0519b49: How about Tumeken, Elindis, Icthlarin and the Devourer?
textByHashes.fc8945c9b50acc8236e8778e3d8ea113b4290f92: Down in Sophanem, they've got a chief god named Tumeken, plus a fertility goddess named Elindis. Icthlarin is their god of the dead and the Devourer...
textByHashes.7a4240c3d1ee71ad1db05ec67d470bb3f8fdba6e: But I've met Icthlarin! He'd got a jackal's head!
textByHashes.78fd5b5620e5f66dbf1924c54a312457d3755c0c: Well, now you mention it, I'd just been hypnotised by a weird woman I met in the desert.
textByHashes.c928e4eaa511c7ef44274b54f1d20a4c6b119dbc: But you've been all around that area, haven't you? When you were travelling?
textByHashes.eddcd48cbfd5ed64c568d4f729d6ef2c46fc4540: So you'd know all about their gods?
textByHashes.55716b02de6cd4b8f4fa2148905b706d6ffff0b7: I wanna know about the wars of the gods!
textByHashes.1661a6fe6bba638107ab2122decbb3673c45a212: Hazeel will rise again, you'll see!
textByHashes.09039f3efd176ef430413e97735f51dba2d2a51b: I've met Lucien. He paid me very nicely for bringing him a staff he wanted.
textByHashes.f586b763f5e6c601a7cc3bf6f9030bbce3d1e01b: Azzanadra taught me some ancient magical powers after I unlocked the pyramid where he had been trapped.
textByHashes.6d8b99da0b1784d8cfb3efe248614b57c5d70419: Can I wield the power of Saradomin myself?
textByHashes.4a05fbd9edbd8064f350fb6bd343012296503aad: I want to ask you about your hat.
textByHashes.b16c959b8fe610c7589dd7a65a73d6f7180e9245: Did you steal it from the bank?
textByHashes.d73ced8901ae1f1c63e3885f4012b6c11c5d3f4f: There's been a break-in at Draynor Bank, and I bet you did it.
textByHashes.27c56c9310aa5865e29c765c85e09b44696f082b: Well, you've been sitting here looking at the bank ever since you moved into this house. Now someone's robbed the bank, and suddenly your house is full of expensive stuff!
textByHashes.d99e78add4e0071fb94d8f8ac7555b2430d6c16d: So you didn't rob the bank?
textByHashes.b30aca47802cb73c4c2b605da402ec41141e63eb: Hmmm... But I'll be keeping an eye on you.
textByHashes.92d668bd4f75ab28a8388a7e4cbf23b365c57260: You stole it off that woman in the bank! You stole all this valuable stuff too!
textByHashes.ba1694c8c63d4649570ff96c8bdd0a8920fd488a: I saw you robbing the bank! You killed all those people!
textByHashes.e9daa99207ec46028a0da5db93fc1d5e50ff40b3: I've seen a security recording that shows you robbing the bank. The bank's guard showed it to me.
textByHashes.8ecd0fd1c21ac0ce6fb53aa80a6f77e8b7f55335: So you're just going to get away with it?
textByHashes.d6d7c95f3947dc3da3925d6ccfc375582fb381d9: Maybe someone SHOULD talk to you about right and wrong...
textByHashes.3e1c612f45ece880a55dfb5fdfb60b7b52cfa0f5: How can I get a hat like that?
textByHashes.d7d105d0a3d8bff596562da9695f3f37b524f9b4: You should give it back, you know.
textByHashes.9d03c4dfe48940c3ca228d9808942417689ff0c2: That was quite an exciting quest we did together!
textByHashes.6b4cf7513d456e471ac3b25f672143602a406df9: Are you tempted to go on another quest in the future?
textByHashes.b8de6d5560b9fe6879144da19b6ad79e7e4c1a53: I'll certainly see what I can do!
textByHashes.b07f480ff40b4887ff52aa490e7ccfb33597c4a7: When we finished fighting those sea trolls, you said you'd finished with adventuring, didn't you?
textByHashes.6eb89b7e88cd4da1ac4ade3ee71133ace3fba81c: Does this mean you're not going to do any more big robberies?
textByHashes.b6436944ffd20ac738af292c8b40061973db087c: Your shopping trip killed 3 bank staff and several innocent bystanders, not to mention the watchman!
textByHashes.2dd98356d9adbed397470126993de19d5dd16940: So all those quests in the past, when you saved people from monsters and stuff like that... You only helped them because you wanted a reward?
textByHashes.6cd56ee4869c1a0414ca70ce301611caed330a7f: And now you're planning to do another robbery? Didn't you get enough from the bank?
textByHashes.9fd9c6166edbd7312caec521051849be43e7cc5c: Do you think I need to keep this?
textByHashes.e955216d32ca694ed482abf870304ec5f96c86e6: I see you've got your telescope pointing at the Wizards' Tower.
textByHashes.199e5f936a6aff84f7282389883cfa508db4be01: It just seems a bit odd.
textByHashes.436b38f249c21fd04c4ba55a700b95d2880ecaba: So you're not planning to attack the Tower?
textByHashes.7a4efe80d01ede954fe43ae74d8faaded83fa57f: Well, you robbed a bank, and I bet you're now planning something to do with that Tower!
textByHashes.2a4f7374c903d387c4beb963cd014c252aa63adb: I've killed a creature that was under your bed.
textByHashes.af8c2319e73ed2915f6d5c41d3d5d587ed2e06b7: I've got some of the stuff you wanted.
textByHashes.ddd66418be434e1416981f6553c49ca1d739aeb5: I'll come back when I've got the rest.
textByHashes.3192554b7b553179e0095a4e97fcae5d8f4280f5: I've got all the stuff you asked me to fetch.
textByHashes.1422bf2d0e309703b17c16be9d254bc589438639: Here, I've got the items you wanted.
textByHashes.a4daa9a5d69c04296e8fffff93e0cc3fe05639f7: You look very familiar but I can't remember chatting to you before.
textByHashes.e19dae336e48b80085f01086f40bc7c6d038ee73: I wondered whether you had anything interesting to say.
textByHashes.ad38383e1f3a9085915d016d811ebb111d20ed3e: Okay, I guess I've caught you at a bad time. Goodbye.
textByHashes.0356437a560084cc80672cc2953162acb8e7af2c: Are you okay? You seem a bit preoccupied.
textByHashes.abef201d6679a1f1d8ec5a5eacddd95e5a6d08ee: What do you need it for?
textByHashes.42e10523e83e0c9710f7d000c63b8d36f2c27e6b: Why don't you just fish for some food?
textByHashes.80ab4cd69ae0dfca234c762d0e851a8567d63211: You're not fooling anyone you know.
textByHashes.a49b7559cd79fb5116c52a44e8f02af75bb1c59c: It was an accide... Killed who?
textByHashes.df5fa9a16e1a7ac38f989accbdadf2c356d16fcd: If you think you will get to me...
textByHashes.4404b14186f094c826368e6fe707f40daf0ac3da: Two jobs? That's got to be tough.
textByHashes.a2c734913580f8c52f1ec5cf03060de10ed7ac1e: Well, I shall leave you to your inventing.
textByHashes.66b095f85652917b6c895a009f5ec8d503318af1: I spoke to the necromancer like you suggested...
textByHashes.f775680f51921bffa95f21b253787f5af7e919b4: Is the cat supposed to help you get runes too?
textByHashes.967ac0057e127d46e2768b02d72be81abd953c3d: If you're a wizard, are you doing anything magical?
textByHashes.09fde8f44b8018231c02a2378dd0e09943041262: What are you going to do now?
textByHashes.53f141bce8e1ee7f48aec03f7ae0c3b1ba1742db: Can you open the portal to the Realm again?
textByHashes.b9ec270020594cd641bd57fb1c8076933b149a69: You were nicer to me when you had that little gnome wandering around here before.
textByHashes.4100760c9678f9303c36d01445f2ac51d7bb552a: You seemed like a completely different person when you were complimenting Gary on his ritual that opened the Realm of Memories.
textByHashes.de2f990653b0443f3eba90a55c5dac775d5d11bc: Okay, guess I'll go looking then!
textByHashes.5b49d839b1b0285d8a04fb844abea3edaf69e6dc: Okay, how much do I need?
textByHashes.fcce1df8465c896000004dc0fafacbb5562e3927: Can you make me some armour please?
textByHashes.688047119e130d6873affe2e198e2a413de7b802: Do you know any interesting spells you could teach me?
textByHashes.588f2b2b49aff0bc76aec042fcb5b7747b9f4ded: Have you got another one of those fancy schmancy amulets?
textByHashes.39816ae0ce4e576c1e9799a16bdceb56ebfc7037: I have them with me! Here you go.
textByHashes.d1ddeb606f341e4bfb685a868878df83f3990263: What are you going to do with all of these extra beads, anyway?
textByHashes.c9e589da3d90082d3f6654f17b555393b733bfc4: I don't have them all on me at the moment. I'll come back when I have them!
textByHashes.e73b027cc1e1fe275e39b36789bd0ae411158f6e: Err you just called me thingummywut.
textByHashes.bdb71e43b942e795b21094343cf335e28a29cd54: Tell me what they look like and I'll mash 'em.
textByHashes.3610c6d9c8274bceac279e7ae52e2dd9b3ed6a1d: Teach me to be a mighty and powerful wizard.
textByHashes.5338f8ef4b29d325f42a5c772b381a8536d36413: Oh I'd better stop talking to you then.
textByHashes.e2f9b29ed4c34413da916a801df704b515703419: Snowflake gave me a book containing all the information she could find from Odd Mushroom's notes.
textByHashes.543248c525e9aa06468f078bc377ea273bff3fe3: Hopefully Snowflake will give me another one.
textByHashes.c5cd89880d3ecee7f25526a3193d0949b114450e: Now that My Arm has taught the Weiss trolls what he knows about farming, here's a book containing what the Weiss trolls know about firemaking.
textByHashes.815ba32ede06be6c9c89549573546af8596f81be: Don't give me more burnt meat. I've been here before, and you gave me a load of burnt meat.
textByHashes.e1e8996eb90c396653b0e1737073f493b0abdd94: Ever? You're never ever going to give me burnt meat again?
textByHashes.29b8a7c6bc60b5d96e842f0eb7c96279c760ed75: Hi, why do you have twigs growing out of you?
textByHashes.8e0f33d4c1b01a9733bfbab076396af394df8263: Can you teach me the basics of Woodcutting and Firemaking, please?
textByHashes.790edd903dee639d45ac35c490a0eb737a5d6e37: Tell me about different trees and axes.
textByHashes.e3224f6ccb820099c79069ab5352808287a38278: You seem rather happy for a busy labourer with a bad case of spots.
textByHashes.b7c060229f11eab6e63237e8126e4e0a0c57ed83: Cheer up! Work can't be that bad.
textByHashes.848d7f1b44e067b116fd09d8614a7cfd7c486842: I have this acne potion that I thought might clear up your spots?
textByHashes.795770a4916fb27e8433f00ba30584e5f02f8ad7: So that you don't suffer needlessly?
textByHashes.edbe1e0615daf50d23069b9c928d06c163c83826: Look, I'm sorry. I only wanted to help you.
textByHashes.37fc26e88fc4e610b400bfdd328648eff61c4be9: How are things going up here?
textByHashes.ceb839fdb1d04023195592412415e3fb61992447: What will you do with it all?
textByHashes.c5d9ac0e85b87eb8fa11bf8e7dc2a1de5b6c1216: Excuse me? Who's lost in the mountain?
textByHashes.ea44ed3931017823863224ab2035a6f2473136e2: Do you think he's still alive?
textByHashes.e0f11a485397daf7ac4f4396e7bd7065d997f62d: Well, if you're in need of help, I'm open to contributing.
textByHashes.b1bbae8513d216f20dd12413cd3d2174b3e67065: Well, I've actually been up there helping myself.
textByHashes.6386f815324ec48860289796d5c32cd5eebdc3e7: I'm beginning to see your role in all of this.
textByHashes.7096bf864cfdd2f2e73bb9644de46d01b7efec17: I see. So can I help your preservation efforts?
textByHashes.8f65e6983ffe9d9651ecc2d3072344aeb1d2c8f0: Remind me, what are you doing here?
textByHashes.53b014b60c7b7c783f5107b766485bd1100e7292: Maybe this has something to do with Santa in Varrock Square.
textByHashes.6e0ff15928771171c14bf75d88d9c2cdd14112b9: Could this have something to do with some missing Gingerbread Gnomes?
textByHashes.a4c12640b02b41f4fe39a758d6d33a055c04910e: Santa told me to sort it out for him, he said his son has taken over the Gingerbread Gnome production.
textByHashes.f51347cd8038bae104b5e6b37deaee3b2d5f12fe: How did you manage to escape?
textByHashes.21904a119b2a094bfeed99a33279b98f0cbc6c69: He brought in an Icelord!? I don't know how to deal with one of those.
textByHashes.8a7fe33a93dd923456adb91543d0eaa215507142: Well, I better tell Santa, since I can't get into the bakery from here....
textByHashes.211f652996ebe96c8e2b44c526132dcd0278c3a7: Not yet, I'm still working on it.
textByHashes.62552c8263f8d8fccce308000ac1205662a9a81c: Hmm, I think I'll try one.
textByHashes.d51f2d2a0e7a4f3d27d9100db62a4f06919e0a0c: I don't like the sound of that.
textByHashes.d2d2ec2a5b1738ee489b7d375ac07946621f7d09: Yes please, I need woad leaves.
textByHashes.14bedb6d50d73b8716465152a5bbd55679946bea: I don't have enough coins to buy the leaves. I'll come back later.
textByHashes.6e0e27083a539b8de7f07179d69d3e9e2ab4493a: How about ME helping YOU instead?
textByHashes.6f67cf29da54df088c8edf99dbadf285f5ef17e1: A mole? Surely you've dealt with moles in the past?
textByHashes.56f536a712569f7ca8cff240a5dfc3d4e48fc0f5: I see. What do you need me to do?
textByHashes.dc0c263285ebdcee15c5ee46af20a4aa09828b64: Is there anything in this for me?
textByHashes.5bae2f4e3a2dac7ddee3719ff22bb948b21c0d56: Right, I'll bear it in mind.
textByHashes.3dfb752562f477cb205bf1bc8b9bb64445b823b9: Okay, I will trade the mole parts.
textByHashes.5a40cf68775fcb863ca38a75918f8dc817da7bd0: Do you know much about these shoes?
textByHashes.ca7bab0efeeaa8911fe2f9383e559247749cf9f2: Do you think she might just be delayed?
textByHashes.6995a95c505bfc63e49fe530baef58511f252235: Could you be at the wrong special tree?
textByHashes.bb44693f728b2f5301046acd21b3446da0f1f8e2: Humour me for just a moment. What if, amongst this entire rainforest, there's a second very similar tree?
textByHashes.a092074fd751576a709925b4307c84dc94a45114: Or maybe it's you who is at the wrong one?
textByHashes.ac120ab3d3bd8d3972608a85c783a38d5ec9a6f2: Well, I'm sure the two of you will find each other soon. However, I do suspect that might happen sooner if you considered looking by some other trees...
textByHashes.4ef32683c8714910ee326f773ba5cf5c32d102c0: So in my language your name would be Xorrah the Mystic?
textByHashes.04e63a5eff17c1cc23fa27c3c153be647d826fbf: Okay... How are you still communicating with your followers?
textByHashes.6c3b9ec9dc5570f0b2336848082f8826832866bd: I take it you have answers.
textByHashes.fc204a005348b576472a9649ade610714ddb4fd8: Okay, how are you still communicating with your followers?
textByHashes.aada24b46d9e42448eeb3453463866f5d8a95866: Yes, a few of them actually. How are you still communicating with your followers?
textByHashes.e2804835b5e21a476e446de03ca27941817240e7: You know what I mean. How are you still communicating with your voice?
textByHashes.d7b648eab28010ebbfc308bedd4e480531e60084: But the dark nullifier... I thought it was supposed to sever your connection.
textByHashes.51e6751428d5dac635d435674d2799b5d88a01a5: You knew we would try to use it?
textByHashes.9b055607358eb1452cfe0b83e24153d399edc931: But... I remember planting it! The plan went off without a hitch!
textByHashes.dd22ef0a7bbb955954ade6f5b879042bb262a19b: You modified my memory?! That's only the second time someone has done that to me, and I wasn't very happy about it then either!
textByHashes.2be9ebb66f6a622fad2fc95060a8c64b6282b33c: You call that gloating generosity? If you didn't want something from me, I wouldn't still be down here. Get to the point.
textByHashes.668ec9278308feed7a2fd8b002c8976f5b7a36bf: Well you won't be getting it from me!
textByHashes.0b40eea466bda601d9a9d02f798674a0124707fc: How can I know you'll keep your word?
textByHashes.5700c2e18794d7ee7a53a686e3658e0b7444c21c: I'm not sure I want to...
textByHashes.084aee2585260a4d4518de3301f326728212adc4: There's something in our contract about additional contracts... Why would I want to sign any more of them?
textByHashes.ef2cb39218ce276857acae7ba42398d56cb67293: Okay, can I see the contracts?
textByHashes.88295be1c76d98bfdefcee64a52e23c8659d8d95: What kinds of contracts can I obtain?
textByHashes.6aa485b977e81cec1feb2b74eff11dbae50a4956: Do you keep any record of our fights?
textByHashes.42e97131ec0550eba631da0798719057751878a6: I've seen what you have to offer. It doesn't scare me.
textByHashes.2c79545f8ed2a6b9592753c4b4465ec6afdd74c0: Actually, I think I may have forgotten to feed my kitten...
textByHashes.abd6e164033943464387e691397f8d8c5999cfae: I know what I'm doing, sign the contract.
textByHashes.b7cbe043c5702d28c6ac9e9b9e839b455a34aa25: On second thought, I think I'll hold off.
textByHashes.0d38eb4e7877980205230ac757f5c4b5001f4c19: I want to know more about this contract.
textByHashes.82a98e2e80f0dc106d06262818b6568c56ad1369: No, I think I'd like to read over the terms again.
textByHashes.88aec028330f136e636c47c007beb2c529112732: Er... No, I thought you'd lost this.
textByHashes.92d5966c96467dc0edb4edcee13759119986df2a: No, I think it might have been somebody else that dropped it. I should really go and find them...
textByHashes.8aaf5902d5b5b12d6d27311e030c2c911d52c929: What do you mean?! You can't just take my pizza!
textByHashes.e0ea421a638c07c4542647f16c3c116ff61ad64b: That's outrageous! You can't hold me to this!
textByHashes.ffa05b90a0cbb426d8c99ec368d5b55463eee9c8: Is that your favourite kind of pizza?
textByHashes.cf3cb4a17377f8ea354d93e4c4f383fef6cbf363: I'm looking for a fight, show me how much these are worth to you.
textByHashes.f4e71e625035cdc0405afdf4be0e0b6b6e329f1b: Not at all, Yama. Here, take it.
textByHashes.78b9535f0dd1e9d2c6be7b332d53f4b69b2d29aa: I'm afraid I can't. As per our contract, once shown to you, a full pizza cannot be taken back.
textByHashes.af994a3becac84f4091e30bc5e1880041a846d22: Do whatever you like with it, but I cannot take it back.
textByHashes.ecca284dc2a253e98379d60d8c499afd9ce92992: What have I ever done to you?
textByHashes.6ddc296c0d4886cb517eba2af32714eef2d0f650: Why would I do that after all of that rudeness?
textByHashes.01daee2a7432401f4aa3fc36c5d7e2652912219b: Well if you're going to be rude, I'll find somebody else.
textByHashes.9755ae0206237c0c5b7b225f56fcc40bf3741c70: Nieve? I used to know a Nieve, but she died during horrible circumstances.
textByHashes.085bbb2a49a93bde47c2579b5419256f543331c3: Does she? I miss her. Steve is alright, but... he's not Nieve.
textByHashes.9ea800a1a1373f1fe182afad19bff14461ff98e1: Anyway, please send her my regards and let her know that I avenged her death.
textByHashes.ef7f96f68737fc2ea88ada68b53de4b10a3b0de5: Tell me about this antiques business.
textByHashes.7b8603fdb362d63b7405451f02dc9043bfd2e587: Do you have any interesting items for sale?
textByHashes.0ca4a4eabd6d283280b42ad0fd117f8aae21cd2b: Yes, I'll sell it for 5000 coins.
textByHashes.a2855dc4567275fd8605601b50ecdc8e6f0f05cb: No, I think I'll hold on it a while longer yet.
textByHashes.317db7be3a1840233ce93726f12c032032d37ccb: You don't look very well. Are you alright?
textByHashes.665d11cdc3be0c229771d37e0944f5a7d0fd6669: Dead as in... feeling a bit under the weather?
textByHashes.b5c6b1da08f04812f59478ed514e75b726cada19: That's awful! How are you still here? And how can you still talk?
textByHashes.7a242929d2cc72879749742ce95be53949de55d3: How could she bring you back from the afterlife?
textByHashes.b24275d3b1cf8c9b1da3c3d552df010d10c7892a: I didn't see her around last year. Are you sure she always comes here?
textByHashes.ba7d36d7443ef2b727b7b19fb0d0856b760eb13d: What more can you tell me about the afterlife?
textByHashes.482b690e026a7e05c90bd88df39ac1f38ee519ed: I don't feel quite ready for that yet.
textByHashes.c84239939865756798cb9d37669775e85c5d3529: Why do you choose to come back?
textByHashes.fec1e499c99faa73e5f90138e55086bde39094f0: So you just come here for fun? Like on holiday?
textByHashes.2e3ce173720c63bc4dec7942245b33973f32da2e: Well I'm glad you're not causing any harm by being here.
textByHashes.948b852cb3729bd7f7eb4e63df8725980af618f9: How did you get called Yellow Snow?
textByHashes.ea7c457995666824a26fa603448739d200491084: Do you mind being asked about that?
textByHashes.8859d133a79960d4cce6be938592443b887b1d2e: What's so important about this obelisk?
textByHashes.7af3083841242c470df621e13aecbc6737d4beaa: But what is it actually for?
textByHashes.3064b302a1999062d0605ee7c2d6e769f6945255: Not really I just wanted to chat.
textByHashes.15e97629818f8ab86e69a8ed4a8624b756674222: Have you been spying on me?
textByHashes.d096a555f2f440cdfaf6465a12bfa6772e07ae41: Huh, terrible pun! You just can't get the 'staff' these days!
textByHashes.0f922366b29f77d2bc6279d1c3af420e074fc3c0: Have you any extra stock of battlestaffs I can buy?
textByHashes.b696a7f4d8be6e025a35a0eec959398e0d98a467: Can you make me a staff?
textByHashes.ef0c57ba4dab97965ca98407a3f9aedd9addfc19: I found this magical essence when I was out on my adventures. I'd like to attach it to a battlestaff, but I'm not sure how to do that myself.
textByHashes.a46788f88ad2e6d3be1e36b60aa57b0d8827a6e9: Oh, I don't have enough coins. I'll come back later.
textByHashes.494a33f770a88b85da1ca80163145b6172c318e9: Why would I pay for you to clean herbs?
textByHashes.8e0206bde4496328ec3de096a8ebdbd449b3ffea: Who's that kid outside your shop?
textByHashes.604130110d9659316874e45218e939fcfaa236cc: What brings you all the way out into the Wilderness?
textByHashes.700a74ff239a51f1d5670ee5d2a0e41a9e318ece: Knowledge? Can't say I've seen much of that around here. In case you didn't notice, it's all ruins.
textByHashes.fe27b61e74e49525eae142e15c4dfc9c5852e43b: Isn't it a little dangerous to be looking for knowledge out here?
textByHashes.7074bdfa819b7060a913848c7d7cbabe84a8cd8e: You're a lot calmer than the other Zamorakian followers I've come across in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.536bc26220d07ad7a73e0cfbd208b7b0a756243c: Don't think you'll find much in these ruins.
textByHashes.f6386e8404202f7a6f6849fff37b6bf7066e4686: I take it you're with the others dressed in red.
textByHashes.b1acf45b59f23811ce86a522692dfb2d83006fa0: Hey there, what's with all the shouting.
textByHashes.fa63ecacc6bc2a3bf4fff76ec8e100500fdc74d3: I am big and strong, what does he need new champions for?
textByHashes.190016d8bb282712b2f1bddd3e4445ac619724d8: That sounds neat, I'll be a champion for Zamorak.
textByHashes.9af037d7d6c73d59febe6917bc756623142ec4b0: He can find a champion somewhere else, I'll pass.
textByHashes.20e61584d9b3f8cb1154a4f404ccf92661e39413: No, I think I'll stay for a bit.
textByHashes.6bb311caea9bc1912fe75f33b22241a6eaeeac15: Actually, I guess he already has!
textByHashes.5aae5b815c2394123f2470ea4e96d37492ba0aef: Hello, Zanik! What have you been up to?
textByHashes.50d721a0749a18ce13e2ef2eeab0f2ae8674818b: What is there to do in the Wizards' Guild?
textByHashes.5851273a0adbc44d5590ec4568004c82e65dcd43: What are the requirements to get in the Wizards' Guild?
textByHashes.27143a8f11fe82b706c7703ecd5785f5dd110aa7: What do you do in the Guild?
textByHashes.6b8334ee61c8621ad0ffa84fc7d4cdfb5011f4e5: I've done it, I've managed to recreate the salve amulet that you spoke of.
textByHashes.ee253c225aa0698b722c2cd7aa0ce47ed69633fc: I, er... found another way down.
textByHashes.616aaedc19e1c7ee72ed640823207f9960da9251: Correction, the key that was in your possession.
textByHashes.1b8b49e6309fe011d9ce980aaf6f4045c33b719f: Ok, I've finished with it now anyway.
textByHashes.8bd7cc43d1ea1cfda02f54bf4f23215c290782b0: Actually, maybe I'll just keep hold of it for now.
textByHashes.4dfab351f057a8c391fa31447572a6d1c8bfaee5: You still haven't forgiven me for borrowing your key have you?
textByHashes.d0261ca71752f127b5e3defea7d23103b3f7e4a9: Er, maybe I'd better be going now.
textByHashes.e2a4101c152b2377af5da2d05f2575ab34c9d538: What powers does the salve amulet have?
textByHashes.c4ec55ac472a3be81aeac480ea9ed77da9900d21: Could you sell me a dragon scimitar?
textByHashes.5b456482e7a7df61270c0c56cea3df5f20ff117c: Hmmm, funny you should say that...
textByHashes.4dbdfba3a41879dc7b0e96ba293886aa4a56dd07: What do you think about Ali Morrisane?
textByHashes.2a96a0035c75b812ba8f45d81222ff47d14653b4: What will you do about these threats?
textByHashes.052367a4def79f6285eace9dcb119d4df900071e: I don't have 7 coins right now.
textByHashes.ad8ee3f6a22f7c6ab8a7267ece6497cfc81ea707: What exactly is the Soul Obelisk?
textByHashes.291178d10ecbbcdc28166109f6644af766127bed: Wait a second... He built it?
textByHashes.46ff5029b01bbe52c99f3ad65d1019a20e31e0c6: So what is Nomad really up to?
textByHashes.e0ee3c07a5b0fd8a1046c01b6538847b07049613: He seems to know his way around some strange creatures too.
textByHashes.1fe39b0ab87e145bb3fe073a3fbcc3ff5f62eb16: Tell me how you got to be here.
textByHashes.22a8c68917521202a55d9430159632e44ab4f394: It sounds like Nomad is quite the hunter.
textByHashes.c5869cfc7dae1a36137c44198db57082f5513a0f: I read somewhere that skilled hunters can capture imps.
textByHashes.3205c1005b0fb6f00437fe21547cb3adf970807e: I'm quite the hunter myself, and some hunters like to capture imps.
textByHashes.0de2890a689319df2dce54d845e41a7a049438ae: No need to worry, I'll give you no hassle. I'm only here to chat.
textByHashes.f7d168bdbd1eda5e729d66b6559ab6d44921724d: I'm quite the hunter myself, and I love capturing imps.
textByHashes.bfdddcc8f4c3099c2bda75b3cd69f7c6cc6cdd10: Only joking! I couldn't resist. Now, where were we?
textByHashes.d16f510027ae75523c78aeec5d54ae05ea3c5664: Zombie, it has come to my attention that you are a fool, a nitwit if you will.
textByHashes.de44f08b31b446ba6684fc31011ea1b30090c06a: I propose that your head, instead of being filled with the brains you so crave, is instead filled with a mixture of crushed lemons and kelp!
textByHashes.a3217b785936753d923db1f2bb9f609ad1f2d247: You shouldn't get so cut up about it.
textByHashes.9789947016b45fe3e97ad3b053df85a9df2b87f9: Wow, you were quite the entertainer.
textByHashes.06c122dbbc661c5c38476626a66240bf2ab4a70a: I know what you can do!
textByHashes.7e7d27959d64119e618e318ce1d282e603fe4089: Would you like a new hat?
textByHashes.93b80f4b10f07d248ac0b7e70d0cfb5cb307b70d: Want to go scare some people?
textByHashes.e8f57290008132b177256520506d51f93fe8de6e: How did your ship end up here?
textByHashes.b85066170e2c42cef7b31647018f7c53e2a57ca8: Where's the rest of your crew?
textByHashes.f12100314fa4d33c9c242f93c3c2f310de6e913c: Will they return to the ship?
textByHashes.59b616710ec6bf9ab37a2734b9e5c19cea7156cd: Do you really want to go to the temple? I've heard the mages there have some really annoying spells.
textByHashes.ff9c461016d580c448770f73647ced0864fd65bc: How can a group of mindless zombies invent a counter to magic?
textByHashes.1bb5cfbbb8c6654bda813a81d4bdae64b18965c1: Wow, I'm actually impressed. Do you think your friends at the temple will lend me one?
textByHashes.39afe0d6290753dfe5c869fbb2c2cd5d3298f3f2: Can I take a scroll from a locker, then?
textByHashes.df55245678a1a6afff4219eb79f1faf0773bd212: Thanks. I'd say 'see you around', but I sort of hope I don't.
textByHashes.f5d1680a3875491b95b492ae8eecba2bcf00841d: Goodbye, I hope your crew comes back soon.
textByHashes.e3f58f377d0f473a17b33e94f3c28cf7f3b9ed49: Can you tell if I've used the Teleport anchoring scroll?
textByHashes.935e5a4fab5acefb511cefe80fcce2e9c33da43b: How many times have I opened your lockers?
textByHashes.a8f7524c713088a36d109a80e5a1554e5fd7bb24: I'll leave you to wait for your crew.
textByHashes.bdbd17c56b2023d7b6e4bc6519d7ca05a42ef84f: Errr...Arrr! I will in a sec, I've just go to, err, plunder some landlubbers...
textByHashes.18850067606542a9d5bb6bf9943f019c0dbdd626: I'd like a new monkey talisman...
textByHashes.51cc26dd754e28860b6a1c404e5ea7e5190ce104: I'd like a small ninja talisman, please.
textByHashes.2915e536c12ccf15a92cf07b870f5d9c9dce9610: I'd like a medium ninja talisman, please.
textByHashes.04a9f959e165a6483e808b977bfa0d4e7020bbd2: I'd like a large ninja talisman, please.
textByHashes.9029ba9c957f5e22281191c3188ca2d7a465d2ce: I'd like a small zombie talisman, please.
textByHashes.ed46109d67845e45d3aa1619d96c73e71e8bc14a: I'd like a large zombie talisman, please.
textByHashes.04214a4eb1ff38c796d2514bdfb94a0bfb6b25cd: I'd like a gorilla talisman, please.
textByHashes.6a864fa2daf37ff2a034a90ca2f451c10d1858ef: I'd like a bearded gorilla talisman, please.
textByHashes.0c3961b685ea5b219be88d079074dc247cf1edb9: I'd like a karamjan monkey talisman, please.
textByHashes.8549260f29a232d468aa485fb1690e88fa8fcfd3: How did you come to be here?
textByHashes.8caecf55f5ef4b7fa2877f9772104cf8c71e25e5: You're angry that I've saved your son's life?
textByHashes.6cd1eb1da1c5cafcd93558b4fcaddfb314ad0d41: How do you feel about that?
textByHashes.c6817099631f74477a7f9792f8820a7059e7bba9: Don't you mind that your son will die?
textByHashes.ecb652c8b2e85a31e7d7b30e54f4df54d96c63a3: You're angry that I've saved your brother's life?
textByHashes.252b94af54a9d3f004d8fdf1b0b32bdc91e09b87: Tell me about the sacred eels.
textByHashes.4524daf89f9b5916a96f676e6d3862d60b196f4a: Can you give me any eels?
textByHashes.a167cc15bc4dd11f55409c9582208c9d4f481d3e: Can I catch some eels myself?
textByHashes.6d757210cf16cc3532841235dcd8c35fe3fab748: Not too bad. I've got my barcrawl card stored somewhere for safe-keeping.
textByHashes.98ea050e14bc8dff8e72f212954ea7b35477e42f: I don't have 10 coins right now.
textByHashes.50d3dd6bcf8e579ad4b2d1b2f85dd0997fdfe446: Looks like you're planning on rebuilding it?
textByHashes.54a6fefe1862a9fc5741b0ecb821e17bc3e2248c: Sure. I assume that each city in Kourend will have an architect?
textByHashes.21d01e19e86eebddb71d53f19430efdd5ca3f361: How are we doing on the statue?
textByHashes.504f9dc506c5e3ce2c3aaf3bfae52ba1fea982ae: I guess I have to go find some more architects then!
textByHashes.8527cb96fa47e18884eacb2a7051bfb00ca11a5a: You are not favoured by the people of Arceuus. Now, if you don't mind, I have things to think about.
textByHashes.f3b0cf319671e7b92b77dbef68858f61166cf1da: I wondered if you might be able to lend a hand with rebuilding a statue.
textByHashes.12ab71cbd72813765fd2f521af96eec32290268c: That's ok, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!
textByHashes.d568fb69966eb84c1eb7aa3ea9a819856bd6efd1: Hi, I'm looking for an architect?
textByHashes.1d82d6ad122b3741fb3da0e22d6c0e769416709b: I wondered if you would be interested in helping to build a statue.
textByHashes.76b04bb3e9794e4f9be7a48b7c996d4bd9ab3ad8: An enormous statue of King Rada I in the centre of Kourend.
textByHashes.1868ae11650657f6c4be93b466dc657f5c96fbaa: He was your founding ruler! Surely you know your history?
textByHashes.8226a1e6956edad3d730c5e22ee981e4309fd8a0: Yes it is, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!
textByHashes.00d4b4dc388df0a8817ecfb7e500b0a0703d6221: Um, really? That was an awful long time ago.
textByHashes.bf0dec7d6a0de401c2f890478342614f124114fd: The statue... do you want to help?
textByHashes.8aef75f0d90c87a999b3eada254defbce9a0795c: It's huge, and in the centre of Kourend.
textByHashes.19dea8ff0077837a2053d6adeda866cb65a98811: Ok, I need to find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!
textByHashes.5c860e2ca4d219e4d27402d0cf008cd690a379db: Ah good, I wondered if you would be interested in helping to build a statue.
