textByHashes.e852e7840c007cf233ff586e14ed96ff25cc8074: It is indeed, I can find someone else to work on the other bits. See you at the site!
textByHashes.9a31529c3e278ba5dd9e56b12ba3d1fdd4eb282e: We're all here, let's get started on this statue!
textByHashes.634843756f05adbc875832fec1995403dc3e8e9d: Thank you all for agreeing to help me in this endeavour.
textByHashes.fa5013108a3bd0916e1e23cc35aa403c21e9e6ad: Oh yes! I love rewards, what have you got for me?
textByHashes.4cc9c3f95493fa13fbd0965477bad05a121c90d7: I seem to have lost that antique lamp you gave me, have you got another one?
textByHashes.451e013e33994fdfc1e184a9cbac3e455cce69dd: I meant... oh it doesn't matter...
textByHashes.bca068fce1992de52ac84efe209860c3a86de595: Utterly amazing! So much better than I imagined.
textByHashes.6cfd8c32310625d95c17674904272e193a43af84: Oh, that sounds interesting. What sort of skills would these be?
textByHashes.7fcb0e023690eae41220891565b934e580b29146: There are more advanced stages though, going by your description?
textByHashes.72b2e28005ce5a36561edaae37e5bba68189aa3d: Who are you and why do you live all the way out here?
textByHashes.2678956470aae8475ef811d57d49ad0fd9de6331: I really don't think I'm related to any barbarian.
textByHashes.84b1f9c393fc5e659fa6debced802aa96d6bcf3f: Sorry, I'm too busy to talk about genealogy today.
textByHashes.f3ff3ffcc6fe422ec2e5d68467c4e76b39684ab3: Please teach me of your cunning with harpoons.
textByHashes.e0e1d8d45e146fe181bda9896ca18dfac023e2e9: How do you expect me to do that?
textByHashes.aefe8477fdfab1841549a84e1b858398d3bc7cef: That sounds rather insanely dangerous. I'm glad you didn't mention shark too.
textByHashes.45b3550c9b29548a6f879d566fbdd896df29b4f1: ... and I thought fishing was a safe way to pass the time.
textByHashes.3a3ed3343903ced0d22693066a10da3b0da9efc4: I have no more questions at this time.
textByHashes.5fe210ec3fc7f645fd6bc3827d87f367fd58ab89: What can I learn about the use of a fishing rod?
textByHashes.1a19829eeb9a86c980f980a300b370b00a7802c3: So can you teach me of your methods?
textByHashes.7c585fabe4175d9e9da6cc9e7fdef31dac539b59: So I can obtain new foods from these fishing spots?
textByHashes.89ce7de7b015026e4bc9c7c0399aa5e4f6921bcb: I'm ready for your firemaking wisdom. Please instruct me.
textByHashes.80da3bab0e2cc4c72b925506808e34f05c5dc4f7: That sounds pretty useful. Tell me more.
textByHashes.5e3a4699da8cdae20522b11d05d7646c742302b3: How can I use my strength in the ways of agriculture?
textByHashes.7df42ff1e2946705922d45f3d358b06f255e7f6a: I can handle a little bit of muck. How does this work?
textByHashes.78446dfb8bd17019bc251c32d72720b183428eab: It's not the most safe-sounding task I have ever been given.
textByHashes.b77df4edfa391dd027ec4b75449674e6a688170b: Go and light some oak logs using a strung bow?
textByHashes.1d2f8ee8696451858b553eeadc73182206bb54b6: It's definitely one of the more delicate tasks you have provided me.
textByHashes.e2506eae99e9d03a9502b3a91cb2076658aaf7d6: Well it was interesting, can I move on to more sane hobbies now?
textByHashes.4889a361425e73d1d73fa89737913b90d5073f70: What is that supposed to mean?
textByHashes.2b126381386ae5ad0bf9f4434cd905c758d9b84e: I've fished with a barbarian rod!
textByHashes.b68a9af9640e1d455f5bcaf2bb6d156a64ebf373: So what do I do with these fish? They are all bloated and so nasty looking that even a starving vulture wouldn't eat one.
textByHashes.67cee58d85b712de463f006e291b991fc4652445: I've set fire to logs with a bow!
textByHashes.2765d7319b6e6639a5827f0a571e6161ef185002: I have completed firemaking with a bow. What follows this?
textByHashes.f669294aaa76406096223c99d5f9a0c616a9ec8e: Where do I obtain these bones?
textByHashes.dc075d1bc5f7cd77b75e68e16779b929c6dc97c1: So I make sure I am in the right place, then throw these bones on a ceremonial ship before I set light to it?
textByHashes.9d84a68f3becfb1644123ff014111f2ead52b623: Is there anything else I should know?
textByHashes.cc16c73f47fb322908aaef364016138bcca70c8e: How do I enter the caverns?
textByHashes.1da5fb4a6189a44271b431f2416c280aa64ffc58: Tell me more about the use of spears.
textByHashes.c51c0a6bdfb292444cb8201b6f574bfd7e361f74: Couldn't you just take a bribe or something? I am sure you could do with some cash.
textByHashes.cc54a84ad9175a6c9ab6b1297221c8f68e34d0fd: Can I just use some metal on an anvil, or is there something else involved?
textByHashes.4a460d2daf997121be77d8ba5cee8fe453b80e97: What of the one handed spears of which you spoke?
textByHashes.37e0e7ef2cb0222c04a0ea392111d31abf5714d7: Can't I just pick one up and use it in one hand?
textByHashes.dcbd585a4229d9d450f8093d26dcfcf90d8dbab5: So I must manufacture one? I see. This makes sense.
textByHashes.53e8897bf2c567f23edbc5df0f717ecf665c5506: If I may ask, readiness for what?
textByHashes.cdc9d0b5f8a8022740d98cf168b7f589c5429884: What was that secret knowledge of herblore we talked of?
textByHashes.74d0da776b536102283f05095a9cf2584389372d: What if I only have four dose potions?
textByHashes.654beeb63eb3ebd344dcb4386400b7121b824019: I guess you just want me to go away and make one of these potions?
textByHashes.1714abc2c4d02eee20ecd0f012acecfe1669f2eb: What was it you needed again?
textByHashes.d33528bbb2246fde92b12fba5f9e76228351f138: I feel I am missing some vital information about your need for this potion, though I often have this suspicion.
textByHashes.38d5905ab71b305a77b8c6b5924d988e8edc212d: I've planted seeds with my fists!
textByHashes.accd42264b9bcf10d25a68f909cb10b9d862e3fe: I hope you're not saying I'm weak?
textByHashes.75a26262ab6e180a7bcd1d8bd968e5cf31b87abd: Are there any other fist related farming activities I can learn?
textByHashes.a794e25429fcc0e6caf47f2b99ad5e4f416b6d24: Smashing pots? That doesn't sound overly difficult.
textByHashes.7e0a9fed527941c8d5100c3041f748088c024902: That makes sense. I wouldn't want to be littering shards of pot everywhere. What's the trick?
textByHashes.cc11607692f90c7178bbf75786b6b051e1641d71: I'm good at getting angry. I'll give it a try.
textByHashes.e8ef46c9cb8c72a5228e78f6efa6a6d810046cc6: I've been busy doing other stuff.
textByHashes.6321a6cd9861b982cb788a81bc176344492d799b: I've smashed a pot whilst farming!
textByHashes.d67e29184112a2356ec9b9959bf028e25bc54268: I planted a tree and got really angry. The pot was gone before I even realised.
textByHashes.5f0e5a695b22dba5583afc1d96e9330ae4a76d9b: About the soul bearer again... I've dug it up, but it's damaged.
textByHashes.4d4bb77683554e2ac06d85f7641a860a469fc841: Woooo! Woowooooowoo, wooo WOOOOOOOOOOO woowoo woowoowoo woo!
textByHashes.9929b1a1a4c9c0627e37625955fc3528fe8caba0: That's got to be a pretty rubbish way to spend your life. Er, death.
textByHashes.604159b9ec53594f4d561b0ecaea92fc6aea67bd: So... You must be the infamous Viggora.
textByHashes.a2dded747c3ac20671d375953f229474d56ea299: You want me to hold my tongue and tell you how I found you?
textByHashes.1d6a1b40a2d3812b1df6b908f64e014626e71e1e: Cease my chatter AND respond to your demand?
textByHashes.408e2f49d9bea53a115ba14f0722b2aa177f9cc8: Well, it's actually about that curse that I have come to speak to you.
textByHashes.7dec9e6ec2067c75449effb36e042d54a46d731b: Erm... I didn't actually mention anything about breaking the curse...
textByHashes.5dd4b8f12c38f2aaea0d223e1bf16f76baa2681b: Well, I heard of your name from a mage called Dhalak, and I'm trying to find out what exactly caused the curse to befall him, and you as well apparently.
textByHashes.e2d2bc78135727215aa6f6eb3c0f2636fc6258ed: Erm... Thanks, I think. So what exactly happened on that day you were all cursed?
textByHashes.f4e1451c311d360b863fa46cf8e592b2ced4edfe: I know that Valdez discovered the Staff of Armadyl, was robbed by Rennard, who then sent Kharrim to tell Zamorak of it.
textByHashes.f302ca90b044afc24e3c7dd8cbfedf372b114bda: Meanwhile Lennissa heard of the sale, and informed Dhalak who placed an enchantment upon it so that its power would be hidden.
textByHashes.96d9b798ea84d177ac822b854d22b3afad142c0d: I still don't know what happened with the staff to cause this curse, or what you had to do with it though...
textByHashes.94bc7605c4dc17637b1260cc539f2ab9d604ab65: Wow. Sounds like quite the dinner party anecdote.
textByHashes.1fd3ecbf857687694a9de80cbf4b9c4d59056889: Yes, who was your lord? Everyone has been very evasive about that...
textByHashes.80382c73e153eafb587b42f145eb096321326f87: So JUST WHO WAS this lord you speak of?
textByHashes.9f44410cc2fa364edbf93fc82533421614ad99d0: So your lord was the one that cursed you?
textByHashes.72b1546c0d183b64fcde5b0bef16d49a5cdcc538: And the next thing you know you were cursed?
textByHashes.750ed04aa3cf6bcc894a3b77e8f9dfcd10bbb698: But... I don't understand... If it was Zamorak who used the weapon, then why was it only you who were cursed?
textByHashes.c18d603fb00ab1aa1edd8d8c97c80c94f908d62d: And the other people who were cursed, why them? Why not the other Mahjarrat for example?
textByHashes.9c04f9c5ca826a1d0de50c044d261dfbe81971ad: And just who was this 'Empty Lord' you keep speaking of?
textByHashes.2520d9ca7e72e44d02357da3354a2baf13194b7d: So how can I break this curse?
textByHashes.081a9a1d1719e479a59710fece8d6ed430827488: But WHO was this 'Empty Lord'? WHAT was his NAME?
textByHashes.60286ff7d91515cf470edf3634203817959a579c: What does this Mahogany Homes company do?
textByHashes.6154731bba8be2d10a9bfb52d51d05ce2b3e7149: What kind of favour do you want me to do?
textByHashes.640db039918ea9757513920d239ada8d86e52462: Aren't you in a construction company yourself though?
textByHashes.d3f9b9fda7b2a546943536f93276111cdcafdf27: Why has he got such a bad house?
textByHashes.39b4a14e63b92be65d06ea501080743df940bcdb: Tell me more about the job.
textByHashes.c912245125f944c2c0bd48c95e4d5bf1b994c20d: Tell me where he lives, and I'll do the job.
textByHashes.0d14af832051ff47babe5957c9d60c64568f4cf6: Where did you say he lived?
textByHashes.059ae111f7546e4863b1b9c50b7a3a96baf97a65: Marlo sent me to fix your furniture.
textByHashes.3f1bec68e928c40419e69e47f91b3e2fa8d416a2: I've been removing the old furniture.
textByHashes.cb88946d7fa78735f28c2f179fa6dc66e25cccfb: I've finished removing all the old furniture.
textByHashes.be68bb3af4395b1191a233315249e0673b3fb478: Is this necessary? I've got a house of my own, in , and I've been learning about Construction for a while.
textByHashes.752c5bd14fdfa9354bd8e88ef0d0f849dd968a08: Where do I get planks, nails and cloth?
textByHashes.95e32e28e4da5bacb84ef72fb04380c24e2ac26e: Tell me about the waxwood for the bed.
textByHashes.ca27a288f238194480ccc7c3e6efc4630cde30b2: I need some waxwood planks for Old Man Yarlo.
textByHashes.ee18616c1d5494b0187aa049d1222918186c2180: But he said he knew the chap at the sawmill, and you'd make waxwood planks for him.
textByHashes.cab1e71058066f71903837bbc59754e7a0a53997: Okay, I'll head back to Marlo.
textByHashes.0d5f52db2f355b94e0e86d90e30c113b19eb0f80: Not yet. I'll get round to visiting him soon.
textByHashes.b181ec66b18a1715a9746bde09b69aef4c2c9e69: I've finished building the new furniture for your dad.
textByHashes.5490f04af3d381b92d30a0898f79dfedf64ec95d: Yeah, what have you got for me?
textByHashes.0d3016202d998c714d288f292a2c4b8010140450: Can I do some other kind of building work for you?
textByHashes.6e60d262a1b5f67aaae48a81f5fa7625ec44357d: Pretty please with sugar and cherries on top?
textByHashes.e545a85b344fb8741081e13d509476964ea178d2: Actually, that standing here annoying you thing sounds pretty good.
textByHashes.4f3326bf38d18a9449f77f91453466227af21f32: Where do you get your runes from? No offence, but people around here don't exactly like 'your type'.
textByHashes.73e1858d26ad9b298641e73f933863f3a6b94358: You know... Scary bearded men in dark clothing with unhealthy obsessions with destruction and stuff.
textByHashes.8590a87235e77ec459eb58d2f52de85a6452bb8d: So you can't be getting your runes anywhere around here...
textByHashes.431a2c057644664e106f2c98cc988ba3165c9b40: Oh, you mean the whole teleporting to the Rune Essence mine, mining some essence, then using the talismans to locate the Rune Temples, then binding runes there?
textByHashes.aed8eb8c721ac80b4a035ffb71c9c71e6f866353: Well, I helped deliver some research notes to Sedridor at the Wizards Tower, and he teleported me to a huge mine he said was hidden off to the North somewhere where I could mine essence.
textByHashes.ddd0633f84c504af437c8d3702a14e1000ed58b2: Yes, but I thought you said that you knew how to make runes? All this stuff is fairly basic knowledge I thought.
textByHashes.d9ad797136c1809f36e1956be469d70ffbec5a90: Okay, I'll help you. What can I do?
textByHashes.b3c9f6331814206a23132dff3c10188b74c58320: Oh. Erm.... I don't actually know that spell.
textByHashes.b9068e81337fd2fcfba22a5af26d3766a5ae4e86: Oh, well, people who do know the spell teleport me there directly. Apparently they wouldn't teach it to me to try and keep the location secret.
textByHashes.babfcfa42b0e89d7b8cdf7be3955a845023a384d: No, I don't want anything to do with you and trying to bribe me into helping isn't going to work on me.
textByHashes.9ca01d118104a176f110a705d0a2dd72724dea67: Uh... No.... I kind of lost that orb thingy that you gave me...
textByHashes.05b1a3405e1469bcc85838ca81350d1cf4424392: No... Actually, I had something I wanted to ask you...
textByHashes.959d40cb604acec0a4442cc5e48fab3fb78e284a: Please excuse me, I have a very bad short term memory. What exactly am I supposed to be doing again?
textByHashes.e320947828b355c91f895776bfb49d47a580ead4: So you want me to teleport to the rune essence mine while carrying the scrying ball?
textByHashes.f27f6b9e113434a263126bf502893a0c9ac319b7: And I need to teleport into the essence mine from three different locations?
textByHashes.f9bfce6b34b15bbf4bac447b3953b3c2d31cd2af: Okay... I think I understand that...
textByHashes.f84b22c0e79a76b9c3fc04f5676e989e5989c10f: I just want to know one thing: What's in this for me?
textByHashes.ec17ae71ec95060689ba64cf8009f50f7d1138be: If I help you with this... I'd just like to keep my conscience clear and know that you're not going to use whatever information I give to you in the pursuit of evil and badness and stuff.
textByHashes.c701178cedc8da40d88bf723cdcd57b00cc02756: You know... In a weird way it actually does...
textByHashes.a2bd096821b9baf4398cd1e0c89211e76aa641cc: This crystal ball thingy is kind of nifty. Can I have another one?
textByHashes.50ac724f7f50b8b7ac3fd1fef5e4caeceaab7751: Not really, I just like to fill up my bank with cool looking stuff.
textByHashes.736ac1906589a075961450c6d3c3613b5e14291d: Erm... But I lost the one you gave me... Can I have another one then?
textByHashes.0ad9c678f330f36b77b74aac9e4267d1be98d7fe: No, I think I have everything clear in my head now.
textByHashes.4bbb60c5ee8adbd6b37a46a4208c8b227fd059d4: Yes I have! I've got it right here!
textByHashes.2ae4865a67c84dc431706a1c1133aeaebe4946bd: So... that's my end of the deal upheld. What do I get in return?
textByHashes.8249a89b14b517c0a49a36064df3c18942593f2e: Uh... I really don't see how this talk about an 'abyss' relates to Runecrafting in the slightest...
textByHashes.51744333053b1b9ddcb8ed4fa11e36cfed364162: So... This 'abyss' place... Is it dangerous?
textByHashes.c60d8ee48bc852768c10b368eb4cfe22121bb992: And that's a bad thing somehow...?
textByHashes.c90bd9fbfcf5d4a44f0e7bb2a4a64e00e535044c: Well, I reckon I'm prepared to go there now. Beam me there, or whatever it is that you do!
textByHashes.ea5febd4756f67ddb0bbb4ee055ba4d4b77010fc: I trust you do not wish to have too lengthy a conversation in such a dangerous place.
textByHashes.fbd889ab3c43d047dbeffa58c99404d399bad234: Err... I didn't really want anything.
textByHashes.bceec8a6c84de8e22faa7a76784fe95d37928de2: I was just wondering why you sell runes in the Wilderness?
textByHashes.b8b21496c2ab5da67f59b67b7ccaebde173b8209: I can't imagine they like you crafting runes much. Do they not try and stop you?
textByHashes.d2814081a090f7d80def95f048ea801f99bea2d0: Maybe I could make it worth your while?
textByHashes.7dec4fa39eb3626cc807fdaf3fc5665e0271a966: Well what is it you want?
textByHashes.d3cd0e99e649f1a5170aba9be8130a35b11334a8: Ah, well I know all about that. I was actually the one to help them do it!
textByHashes.8c385be9f8709dff0a3c60f9e94a1be8da1c71ea: Yes, but I can still help you as well.
textByHashes.0813ead20be29dcf69ed566d5cf58a39cdd8579d: I did it so that I could then steal their secrets.
textByHashes.090a01e7dcf0bb03e187088b96b12df199511378: Err... I don't actually know the spell.
textByHashes.9dbbeaed31b10858f594fcfff2c896192afdc1cd: Oh, well the people who do know the spell just teleport me there directly.
textByHashes.5ac887f63ef38607706629c127873d072579ca72: I need to think about it.
textByHashes.0474143f4f3aac4314c4bd4d7e36f3f83d4e5cf7: Sorry, I just remembered that I have to take my pet rat for a walk.
textByHashes.ec72784b5ab38e22210c8e074f5763796fa0d14e: But I'm a loyal servant of Zamorak as well!
textByHashes.8ed959793837dc2e017e0b33e71b1c7791a5e176: Okay, fine. I don't really serve Zamorak.
textByHashes.2c7398d855c2eb9538a2e1425e998bfddc6a4776: Because I can still help you.
textByHashes.06c2f8bc7ce43c52124d9237396412e0c6b8ffb9: Alright, I'll leave. Just don't go teleporting me anywhere.
textByHashes.4f8d7bb55a6b19625bd8bfc6298c4728d9979194: You're right. I'm a faithful follower of Saradomin.
textByHashes.ceca6f98a5a49b830e7483a773f72b0966426072: Yes, but it's in my bank.
textByHashes.98276f5f39489fd12c5fcde87ea742a4b1418e24: So can I use the Abyss?
textByHashes.2d096aeede5fa39eaac085402da75ca4d8272ef1: Hello there Avan, I've had a bit of spare time lately, and I was wondering whether you had anything I could help you out with, like a quest or something?
textByHashes.f26a33ce8a9276cdc78f12a98e5c13ee85bd9d08: You know, I really have a LOT of spare time right now. Anything, I will help out with anything.
textByHashes.694d3c2bba1467ac658229b0b4c94e62f7bbf7d8: I do one quest for you all and it solves all of your problems? Amazing... I'll go and tell your father how happy you all are!
textByHashes.a9976955b544554b796051eaec4b48eb1c11a519: Are you absolutely sure there is nothing I can help you out with?
textByHashes.80918dc349dc345b82a8d2af0cc1808adad84b63: I killed demons, I cured your poison and restored your family's honour! What can I help you with next Johnathon?
textByHashes.7e520a7ca405cb64adfdc6c9788a806bb4c92849: This is sounding like a great opportunity to be heroic, shall I go get her for you?
textByHashes.ea9f5e5f97f883db56fbc1c9164a0ad78dee99d1: Very funny Johnathon, I can't help but laugh...
textByHashes.2b0bb5270989aefe94341a0b0d793c247ecd00e8: So do you actually have any problems I can help you with?
textByHashes.aa66895c15ad5952dc9daa44acbd1a3e0dd8759f: Are you sure there's nothing I can do, perhaps even teach you about Death Rune magicks, where your skills do not live up to mine.
textByHashes.b5681d27c13c1bd690bf912274ba94418d8b5f31: I have been and spoken to Avan, Caleb and Johnathon and none of them need anything from me!
textByHashes.2abf9177c6ab397d380a805da7f875a46b2db3f2: You just want coins?! Aren't you wealthy! Why do you need coins from me?
textByHashes.c7302c9b301f3d6adefe5089a30cfc959b187106: Wait, so all of this was for nothing? You just lied to me!
textByHashes.85c8316fa19d8bef0b2e3ce0c05f9eb04dbc9255: I don't have enough coins on me.
textByHashes.7b216247de1532a0a08337ed00c861411af0200b: Well this didn't feel very heroic...
textByHashes.f6e408d5ec3c4043bb923c2e8e907f9cf11a2876: You don't need 500,000 coins from me! I don't believe you! You can keep your rewards.
textByHashes.c37b92693072cda71fe771d9ea6cc8cf74c20667: Anyway, I was wondering if I could get more of those gauntlets?
textByHashes.fd8916522f5302efdf62511431ef9df88b6577d0: Yes, I do want a pair of steel gauntlets please.
textByHashes.1f7c5c104d2e628eb657f67c9e11a7ecddedc6d5: I thought these gauntlets were a family heirloom, how come you have several of them?
textByHashes.d880acce37118cefe46db353773506d31cca33e1: Why did you destroy the icon? I though you needed it!
textByHashes.3da2f56f5460f6668f5285b1b7420d76a6ef4ffd: I came as soon as I could. What are we dealing with?
textByHashes.91ad6a42670359ec864ed33af26c8dde71e192ee: Well then I guess that's where we're going as well.
textByHashes.b24e23899c98e536eecb43b4c650bab130e2b9c8: Hmm... fair point. Alright, you keep an eye on things up here while I go after Amascut.
textByHashes.6dbb774a5d6715be496592b6a2b5a6ac5fe754c7: I might just do that. Anything else I should know?
textByHashes.420bdedada323c3c54108e7f9d5f43d473ada61e: Alright, I'd better not waste any more time. Amascut may well have already found the two weapons. If so, she'll already be draining the lesser gods of their power.
textByHashes.142416caf22b00b791e7a4df0bf6a1771db7c188: Which means she'll already be draining the lesser gods of their power.
textByHashes.ac4abd7a1e794a6bc7c3492399e0629233fcddde: Do you have that journal from earlier?
textByHashes.2fd0fb3528918431e712105317221ff4df7963d1: Ah, so I do. Never mind.
textByHashes.39e0118eb150ae62996996a99c904b0f3bda031d: Hi there. How are you doing?
textByHashes.2d618e44f3c9adc2e54e8410087d628a8f6661b2: You seem quite jolly about it all.
textByHashes.28677a880f6ca959656f4cd966e4ca7919e680ec: I'm glad to have helped, but it's not over yet.
textByHashes.13820f6b878ae9a9af0b5917a10bb17cc60c09d4: It's over, Amascut! Your plan has failed.
textByHashes.7d443ed50ccae4172667f205adf41096c98fc13f: Maybe, but it doesn't matter. I've stopped every one of your schemes so far, and I'll stop the next one as well.
textByHashes.5b890d8e449a2338b29b9406eeeeb952c0927beb: Well I couldn't have done it alone. Speaking of which, where's Scabaras?
textByHashes.865521643974f5cdd2942e195b487c0ca0062a30: I have a question for Apmeken.
textByHashes.50d04d7e55683124f54979d2d0a0bf549bf3c7b4: What's your role in the Menaphite Pantheon?
textByHashes.0be94da091b9eeccde6f1e511fa7600c6546d5d3: Why aren't there more monkeys or apes in the desert?
textByHashes.ac874378876f4915d6a9e41021df1f251d44ddde: I have a question for Crondis.
textByHashes.5125352817224155e4162131ac5e9c41e88d8bef: Guessing you're not a fan of Menaphos then?
textByHashes.a89b451a73b8f60f78ea65dc07d551fb95713295: Well they always try to eat me when I go near them.
textByHashes.b7ca430d09e328412dcaddabb52977551be482fb: You mean Roger! I guess he was quite friendly.
textByHashes.e1434ba235b998da561359b6877d1ab453629a1c: I have a question for Het.
textByHashes.8bde8e09702eef937c8bcfcfbbaae079566e78d5: You talk about strength and fighting a lot. Surely fighting isn't good for someone's health.
textByHashes.9ae4c7441199c928ea864e8191589e148b3390fd: I guess, but what about those who aren't strong?
textByHashes.2a14d4a7bf84c5774a36885daa3c2bedd2610481: So they can become strong and healthy themselves?
textByHashes.3143fb22b892356942331df84d4c836191c5228d: Considering you have a human appearance, I wondered if that might resonate more with people.
textByHashes.a67a80bd9319fac4e9e6a271eb500e566fa3a144: I have a question for all of you.
textByHashes.4c8c5370bb92421498b211a201e085ce7137c3d2: Do you really think she'd change her ways at this point?
textByHashes.4d4e690e9c91be079f60c5db6e56708000a779ff: He doesn't seem to have been doing much to help so far.
textByHashes.7a41bac6d8344348cc0459628e5f8ec41c507f38: Hang on... I think I might have met this Fabia.
textByHashes.a7905a3a4c3babd4fbd9bda282df36cc12e79c69: South of here, by some magic trees.
textByHashes.fc4ce40588d3ddde31258d180a06c04689686481: You don't need to worry about that.
textByHashes.d639c49321fc4ce1dc8cce080252657492e37e32: Great, I've been waiting for an improvement!
textByHashes.4e283d09588c149549433cb6ce0778a6652b3875: Where am I supposed to find these beings?
textByHashes.e0497eec50cc7ed0d37e8ed654070e8619b0c853: Where can I find these beings?
textByHashes.68bae38de537082e1251773c5b2c4f7380e1b69c: Any advice on fighting the beings?
textByHashes.22c985ed63ab37693d6f6f187454a0f5e5aaf52f: Tell me more about these beings.
textByHashes.d4ce30b42c6cd72f1f1b7617c1302147498108ed: I've got the remains of the Saradominist justiciar.
textByHashes.3278854d3efa70557060637d3f00d615c7c8a3ac: I've got the remains of the Guthixian Ent.
textByHashes.c5d8102d7bd507068e730aa9791e0d1594894cf1: I've got the remains of the Zamorakian Demon.
textByHashes.387266369e780fb500a28171e7b0a5fc994d42e7: Wow, that sounds great, how about your stall?
textByHashes.db8a68b73e3936d5f9675499a4f4974a2721a797: Oh come on! You're just being paranoid now.
textByHashes.f0f9915b4542cdfa0721d7303a3ec0519c75e97f: Maybe I could help you then?
textByHashes.27fa1a19a005ce096a550c30fb3a42cb63395d03: Is there anyone else you want me to talk to on your behalf?
textByHashes.8b12d6c0a94d2cd1595ae5ea8dacc32d08e15e51: Of course, but everyone seems to be benefiting here but me.
textByHashes.227252225564293b5b20bc7da8df311458399c81: Well the trader gets their product sold, you get your cut, but what do I get?
textByHashes.9e000846c825ff076cdae8d170be6381a1a98982: I don't have one I guess.
textByHashes.69b9ec068e70c60fb7bb3890596fca5902ce5b7e: Ok I'll get on to it.
textByHashes.bb3d52da6fe40f3ad8358ba8bff3a8bcf72f5b3e: Umm..... Images of cats and priests come to mind. Ah yes! There we go, it's the city of the dead South of Pollnivneach isn't it?
textByHashes.31b4782c072c4e8efbae3d5907cf5b9863affb6a: Hang on, I know somebody called Aubury, decent fella. I helped him out a while back. Perhaps I could approach him about the idea.
textByHashes.838d762ba102a1d52cb2aa29cca2886f25351620: Ah ha I think I know where this is going. So because you're located far enough away from him you will take up someone else's share in the market and Aubury will make more money as a result.
textByHashes.d0ef70323b831ba143f13ee2586e09ca44a80b49: Ok I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.12f758c6cf2ad508917514cfd9ea5fb02b6dfc2c: Is there anything I could do to help?
textByHashes.ca9d2ea9b2b5174d84c819075af0c4f9e1bf194b: Maybe I could give it a look.
textByHashes.93247544197cfa60b48cb0e9043ffecd94b5c606: Who did you want me to talk to again?
textByHashes.67d8e48ecc44085da760c0475aeb112388cae526: Right, so I'll go see Siamun of Sophanem.
textByHashes.f113ec6e1583dc68c28f6734e45ab000f6c95d0e: Hmm, that could work out quite well. Varrock is always quite busy, so I might try to get a couple of other things done while I'm there.
textByHashes.3c47a2d4ac0be0d83bc6da10cfbed59ec16a4e00: Any ideas how I should go about that?
textByHashes.ceef4f9a8feb39b287131090d81601c61397cc59: Ya, I'll get to it soon.
textByHashes.2888a94b65d94569392e1158c785b91caa1b2825: Actually, I'm here with a business proposal from Ali Morrisane.
textByHashes.3e8bddde763dd3262ca28281c673ead4288d9693: Ali Morrisane, a salesman of great repute based in Al Kharid.
textByHashes.135f917c9498decf7a4852fd6fe861059941020e: He wants to set up a rune-selling franchise in the markets of Al Kharid and he wants you to supply him with the stock.
textByHashes.4cb2a4689b01c79821d4f32dbe0d84fba1e4385d: His talents don't lie in that area. What he's good at is selling things, and lots of them.
textByHashes.feab979aab69fd02d17b9baf464582069f37c370: Nearly. He will charge a small commission on the runes.
textByHashes.a744ba75efea8e1e5032b10c6f978f066bfe2017: I wouldn't be surprised. Supply and demand are his rune essence and ore.
textByHashes.71168a34f413e908f208319659fe6e3a9b2f1cc0: Yes, I believe so. Trust is a key part of commerce and something, which I doubt he would neglect.
textByHashes.381cb09472b80f65c4284092c5b93af8f17f4b45: So you'll supply him with runes then?
textByHashes.b422f382a3a347cf59a856c8f3f13722e74a0bd2: Umm... not yet, I'll try to get around to doing that soon.
textByHashes.3defdaee4cc61d35c3cc4dc503eec26f8fe7fa40: No problem. I might have a look at it later.
textByHashes.b91747e43b515fd1f427eeefc20a298e8aef7ddf: Can I interest you in a proposal?
textByHashes.389f6186871b3973c2c3f58531c97c655a079e6f: No no nothing of the sort, a friend of mine Ali Morrisane, have you ever heard of him?
textByHashes.ba44a49913f6bfd95162eaa3e47a118f15371da0: ...yeah yeah, sand to the Bedabin. Hmpf!! I have heard that story more times that I care for.. Anyway he has a proposal for you...
textByHashes.17c628833112d445c18b9cda320ff781192ef872: No no nothing of the sort.
textByHashes.9d360d1abab55a9cb39cf153ed088840024659e0: He sees quite a bit of potential in your product.
textByHashes.9e4680a3f35ca59b8fe0dbe26fab45b3f5a15997: Yes, but Ali says if he were to stock your products he would need a larger variation of product.
textByHashes.7bf6476a8d98d1adbb30c11c68b4eb5541054a3f: Hmm.. Ali did voice some concerns about you. He said you were an over cautious individual and ...
textByHashes.3ece54349e282422e29d8f4851e2c3652b145fa7: Look will you create a larger variety of blackjacks or not?
textByHashes.32ed7c88ca455c2ef53aa01bf426e965be3bffb4: What do I have to do to convince you that you should make a larger variety?
textByHashes.e954c867e1228c5f57c5aab84c1b4794ac506e5c: Hmm... I'll have to think of a cunning plan.
textByHashes.2bd1092073ef9880fda2ae990713a3b2df50fa47: What was what? Oh I must have been thinking out loud again, sorry.
textByHashes.a3125145a72995f07e339ab47f03cb4e441067f1: I bet you couldn't knock me out with your blackjack.
textByHashes.49e9ba73eeb2e96082ce123554a5b3388e761eac: I'll tell you what, if you can't knock me out with one blow, you should make better blackjacks.
textByHashes.bedd476a4ae67bbd9a6d6d0165e58b87920528dc: Ok, ok, how about two blows to the head?
textByHashes.85f8e7e9856128f1e085490fe431ec233ef1cbcd: Umm... on second thoughts I might give it a skip. I just had my hair done, I wouldn't want to mess it up.
textByHashes.d5fbf8e353b873acdda4aa93409647a5dbcd9025: I'm sure. No pain no gain. Grrr!
textByHashes.9db6dba67f71969009339996f2ed8cf1046b0a1b: Ow! Ha! You didn't knock me down.
textByHashes.83e4fbfde4952de6949a1ae87d3a26899d3cd504: Pah, you didn't even draw blood.
textByHashes.0ac4bf49aa428c7bd9f44867cd6606f86f987bfb: Yeeeoouch that hurt! I'm still standing though You can't knock me down.
textByHashes.c16bc14aa451c3397e53ef70ea08865c0bea2647: Are you going to hit me again? I really want to get this over with.
textByHashes.54d87e11dac07dbf868479a630f989d4fb5b5690: Umm... definitely the blackjack. You just about fight off another bout of dizziness and nausea.
textByHashes.72bf4f26c8ea12b143b9a764ef11ae2ebac892c3: Great, so I take it you will be supplying Ali Morrisane with the new variety of blackjack then?
textByHashes.8cd657f11e79560e6d777bc4f03e3f16349f3e99: Ok, so what's it to you then?
textByHashes.fd6dbdec34fbf6ae6f0b0f18ec39807a6b968419: Aha so if you can rob the blackjack seller and get away with it, it should prove to him that his blackjack isn't up to the job?
textByHashes.364bf46c199fb506fa8903b9b1a919435641e3e5: Well maybe you should modify the blackjack to have better defensive qualities.
textByHashes.8250fd8e913a1ef529966bad3a418848dcb667ff: So I take it you will be supplying Ali Morrisane with the new variety of blackjack then?
textByHashes.d0f33fc925f871d5f98edf215f65e77f6716cd5f: Not yet, I have a few thing to do first.
textByHashes.72642a8b680634cd144722856d09f62024fa7590: You did well. I thought he hit you when swung his blackjack at you.
textByHashes.79c330aac18a65c581886a7632d0a855d53e2282: I might bear that in mind for next time.
textByHashes.9d2d8da75be5d4613717cc18bf3f8f344d5031a2: I should like to have a look at them, at some stage.
textByHashes.019d44f301d8329c387dd90bcd02b74cbef1c467: Well than what do you need?
textByHashes.0020dbbb8d1f87a5f1d06c450e0cc3bb5eac3121: Sure, why not. The Sultan himself might even buy some of the new range.
textByHashes.854b93628f708cfb53df9a1cfb6e1d823b9705e3: Really, Ali, there is no need.
textByHashes.1a5608481d0c2b558387c46d0f9bff2029a2c24c: Well, I could dump this bucket of water over him. That would sober him up a little...
textByHashes.4d76661beca965fc4215b0768e472d695963a9f3: Nope, just sober you up. Memory coming back yet?
textByHashes.38c2b98a5e1b7bfe1773cfd5dd847f05e3248cb8: What's your problem? You're all clean now.
textByHashes.04d779b21fde1f45d09c4fddb44ca9b7d6c6ce8a: Hey! I only did that once! Try not to be such a big baby!
textByHashes.58f74b62313e599be67f9f5536f89640f088f30a: No real reason. I just thought I would check up on you is all.
textByHashes.a5c809ff46d4ddd0ad1e4e31ca2a633ea66e7680: I've come to give you your tea.
textByHashes.c9430dde240e0c8c2e8f482a2fe5ff5fb00df82f: Great...Well, I doubt you can remember anything through a hangover. What a waste of nettle tea...
textByHashes.c52272451c7ff66dd960b6a1e2ed606a906fd387: Wait... is this cure a bucket of chocolate milk and snape grass?
textByHashes.dacd500bb095fae31a80b6ec15fb556fe6c62a28: Ahhh. Yes, I've made some of that stuff before. I should be able to get you some, no problem.
textByHashes.4e5dcab2e52b0409a97e649566e518d50571af03: So what is it you need?
textByHashes.23ec8beb3559a5bad338f4342e7682b58f2d3fc5: What? Run that past me again?
textByHashes.83d187cfdc7f5cc93d2a7b110f91071e4387ca6d: I just came back to ask you something.
textByHashes.9f80a98be1ecca8678cd91f67b4468d68ba7e471: How do I make that hangover cure again?
textByHashes.2c0f280b6d9c68616e0164f7644c26e12409abe2: Hey! I remember it now, ok! See you in a bit.
textByHashes.2f319595f9a3fc863be9358fcc5ae503a5b29859: Why do they call you Skippy?
textByHashes.30e67f9d2203d5de93aeedf4d57aa7c6d51b2279: Well Skippy, you will no doubt be glad to hear that I got you your hangover cure!
textByHashes.ef9988919d976e1efd52313e5e71fdea665fd209: Then tell me where the mudskippers are!
textByHashes.7b69a21912043f67d98acf0828d3d68edf617b9b: I take it the head injury is responsible for the staggering and yelling?
textByHashes.018c5a6808ce6f68cb51c9c60b99cd9b52e7ebc5: The mudskipper-eating monsters are to be found at Mudskipper point?
textByHashes.1369e24a7bfea6ac4039cff6c0ad064cee33b7ae: Oh, hello there! Yes, I can understand you!
textByHashes.af37fb34bc9f8150431951c7828f3aaf8b355d85: I could certainly try to help... what did you say your name was again?
textByHashes.decdddf9aa858f09a64ed16523d85d243e8a097e: It's lovely to meet you, Bernina. I'm . How can I help you?
textByHashes.4ed03bad252588e63ee10070c86ac76552403b41: Ah, that explains the incorporeality. What happened?
textByHashes.d336a36b85ce727827bb82ca310f169d139b1881: I make no promises, but I'll try to recover it.
textByHashes.0fb5d64ee86690a7fd359ab43888c23e9374d8b8: I'm an adventurer, and I'm looking for someone. Is your name Jasper?
textByHashes.dc03a54efa0afa69283c7775d66567653707b2aa: I'm looking for a lost item and I think you might be able to help me.
textByHashes.4cc40625f225fc43fbb39c277c5cf89f6be434fb: Have you come across a diamond necklace? One belonging to an unfortunate passenger involved in a nearby shipwreck?
textByHashes.c1d25df43871b28272c1eaf65208c82c7579979c: This person you sold it to... Any idea where I can find him?
textByHashes.4ab3246233f6e72a63e1bf3249c18435a68e1cf9: The person you sold it to... Any idea where I can find him?
textByHashes.3794173818c946db201c81459b994f76c93b9ab2: I have. I found the salvager that took it, but it was then sold on to a mountain climber.
textByHashes.3fe875025e02fb88fdc73d930699b2a7f80dac4d: Don't worry, I'm sure I can find this climber. I'll head up the Proudspire right away.
textByHashes.70799b6f681b1fdd60f0a5fc2ec45e6c6a0b2683: You got a necklace from the salvagers? Is it a diamond necklace?
textByHashes.3b6c893c9f821954665eea2fd978844c98007091: I've been looking for one like it. Bernard, was it?
textByHashes.76c1aff6009a8daaa2f090ae34225a11f0ea58fd: Of course! Forgive me, Bernard, but there's someone I need to go and have a word with...
textByHashes.88ad165405dc9586ddb124a972ce722c1e27aead: No. I'd better go and see them now...
textByHashes.7ff4432baf1ebfbe0c8a2b2f7b82c0eaf7f4c80d: I found the climber and your necklace!
textByHashes.a6dd516e4a8a376fdb0741264ecff013465b4e48: No, but I don't think I need to. Would you be okay with heading up the mountain yourself? There's someone up there you need to see.
textByHashes.bc0389de4f4bdbb37f961ce28c2437517a6c5308: No need to panic, Bernard. This isn't just some random ghost. This is your mother.
textByHashes.bb3ca15e55db3920538d25cf0631bc7dc7a0602d: You can't understand her, but she wants you to know she's proud of you, and that she's sorry she didn't come home.
textByHashes.cbab1238a5b5e95e785fcb2e271b6eb9cf84c4cb: She has to go now, but she will always be with you, Bernard.
textByHashes.b9c6a4f2bba61b10020d576f65e69f0648e38a04: Hello? Who are you? What is this place?
textByHashes.54c870d73fef725f3fc9f48881a78bbae8190821: Oh... Well I'm , and I'm here because I was told there was a great treasure to be found.
textByHashes.95d25cf356d6d25eb22b9076d2e0052c40c039a3: But the door was locked until I came along.
textByHashes.cdfa84e4d88d8929e5e2e48d1996b36dcb7342fa: And now I've opened it again.
textByHashes.1dbb5facc68de7344efe9bff104f1409b25fa55b: There must be something I can do to stop it.
textByHashes.d928eaf2efe57a91a0970adb2388ab819a23d1ec: Then that is what I will do.
textByHashes.4af673ac6be14d55c14b23fd8566bd07cb3039d3: Though, now that I think about it, I'm still not overly clear what this evil is.
textByHashes.a0ca2aa960dd386eac22908776d746f5f41d9d38: So how do I deal with her?
textByHashes.43f2c46d2db73c4eb69f922258122cda7ed4c9fb: Huh? What do you mean I am not of it?
textByHashes.678472850eb46ca271c42cf5bc648432516c5c8e: I'm a being of great power and experience. I can see and speak to ghosts. For my assistance they clothed me in their garb. Can I offer you assistance, General?
textByHashes.0e3650d81469406a9bc84b2dac2737b3dd349121: Uh, well, you don't really have eyes, so how can you tell?
textByHashes.ae611a7d8b12505c2d185ee5af8ea3d4d67e6efd: So who's word would you take?
textByHashes.98e27dc0d701cfc41fdd69ea56a714380c7235e4: Okay! That sounds reasonable. Sin Seer, huh? How do you know someone like her?
textByHashes.2ad1e95aa7bbdd0e14c238c01effa46d4abf7f68: I just have one of those faces.
textByHashes.d3b59aa2ef62d60f63db389071088325dd67dd33: Err, what was I supposed to do again?
textByHashes.55c369d86d6c5add8144486d87fa4ebffec0e7a0: I have been to the Sin Seer. She has made her verdict.
textByHashes.ba9b2e7eacb09cca2ada13db1c9379dc7df7d370: Err, and I seem to have misplaced the note she gave me.
textByHashes.b1c73b29c134381528a91d8f717dae37b3686f0f: She said to give you this note to prove I went to see her.
textByHashes.2a666f9f27283df10a126ebe6824b6295474f8cf: You can trust me to do it, sir!
textByHashes.6bb251f33bf8c7a568b4dc7dec5e59bdd0a5546d: I haven't found any. Where were they headed?
textByHashes.ec092b5416a88e9b87c33dcd0762faa156f521fc: I've found one, but they're kind of hard to find. Where were they headed again?
textByHashes.f9b9c57f3924681959369d8c934cb14c15240042: I've found two, but they're kind of hard to find. Where were they headed again?
textByHashes.2a73ad66952a36f9cbbd13198a68338e75437a83: I've found three, but they're kind of hard to find. Where were they headed again?
textByHashes.be3f95aae49ad92535e1be4abcf20adc8d20462e: I am not of it? What Shadow Realm? Hello? He's not listening.
textByHashes.6cddfb6e3b15ef6a2f220c04d46d4590a900e9a5: All you had to say was: 'Please, come back some other time.'
textByHashes.c5b37e2b6a07ae4ba0f705d66c11cb896d6806b9: General who? Hello? How rude, he's not listening.
textByHashes.eccfca730be44b7b2b366d3b4000b6a6eb58a9f0: Hello there! General Khazard sent me.
textByHashes.1b4334cb916110a5ae384a0a90fb73c8e3b40fe7: If you're not a ghost, why do I need an Amulet of Ghostspeak to talk to you?
textByHashes.b389d572238a7bd357422cf87ff593ba55076fac: Khazard says: 'The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.'
textByHashes.4e6268b69604cb5f6fc84881d6b819a53afc3a2e: Well, there's always something interesting going on here.
textByHashes.456884bd7e4cbc55d93efe031bac41812e9d00dd: Any idea where the other scouts are?
textByHashes.347f490c2fd31ee8c1c649b7936888eafdbea235: Hey, no need to be rude.
textByHashes.6581402adfb09d1df2529ad9cd45c378bf0d6aea: Oi! I am one of the filth, I mean, humans! Besides, we were here first.
textByHashes.d39f210bd8b508615842f34fd1b2b3c08116aba5: Discovered anything interesting on your travels?
textByHashes.71aecc44524278b525bbfb724039c103003ea4a3: I'm still looking for some of the other scouts. Any suggestions?
textByHashes.769cdcfa864290618bdbedd0d4df79cd0618440b: Err, it was something about planets.
textByHashes.619de680e7e4151848521656cb9ece59366e7f24: The other what? Who are you slaughtering?
textByHashes.9d290daee8792b6e2f1d71ad0ee903d7342d2a01: So how's your mission going. Enjoying the Draynor woods?
textByHashes.d91bec8d6abfeccf2e2a2dd3e8b9cf1e173c9004: Have you been in touch with any of the other scouts?
textByHashes.c154a0391f4c9a689139f4b8fc36fb87686acf31: You're pretty jumpy for a scout. I thought you'd be made of sterner stuff.
textByHashes.fbbd47876be1687de97dcafceaa7daf339f229fd: I bring a message from the General!
textByHashes.bd440181b333c0f931a412624fc2ae090c3e9565: Oh, did the General live here?
textByHashes.2c405fa68c9b4aba53a1662f5d45beb2ff4c8746: Khazard with a master? Hard to believe. Who was it?
textByHashes.62bf78da2a570b02225364842b67f9da47028c4b: So what have you discovered on your travels through the desert?
textByHashes.6fc2a22cbc5119b161da829dee86b9df3bf64082: The desert seems to be a hotbed of information. Do you want me to relay any of this to the General?
textByHashes.ce9f9bfd5ff0ef3bf4eb3c2486739855d86b4eac: Any idea where I can find the other scouts?
textByHashes.e0c0cc6588506f922e40225074c70418d9129343: Well, I've found all of you now.
textByHashes.209d22ba95bed2a30a6e3fba4247db53464383bc: The General sent me to find his four scouts, and now I've found all of you and delivered his message.
textByHashes.f0cec58b80d5cfcaee54a0a66607863f80c2d98a: He was surprised to see someone like me in the Shadow Realm and I offered to give him assistance if he needed it.
textByHashes.5e8f0863d511ae05828b35f52c5c14c726575f0c: Greatness? He's crazy. He kidnapped innocent people and butchered them in his arena. Not to mention sicking that dog on people. Killing it was the best thing I ever...heard about.
textByHashes.e6a932aaafbb089f3d1a28b36e000d7be954f8bc: Right, I'll remember that. Anything else?
textByHashes.36c956bfe2820f671854f4decdcf804b5ebd41c2: So, what was I supposed to do now?
textByHashes.42fd55c511c9665b21319049a9e16333bb2caa34: I did it, sir! I found all of the scouts and delivered your message. The last one said I should report back to you.
textByHashes.e49b6fd4c2b85a9c904ba82996df7f8db7b12e83: He said to tell you, 'We of the blood are still loyal. Pavlov is the messenger.'
textByHashes.cfc9faf30f0395df4443545799ebf82767d4a3e2: Right! Fish-men. Cave. Ghost. Thanks, General!
textByHashes.9934e49475a1b7a270a90ee807cbe6af6dcb98f3: Ugh, well, at least it's not another hand.
textByHashes.da49895544dd8ff1fbf76e5f37e5d0fd431334bd: Sorry, sir. Where was my reward again?
textByHashes.26b5188bc19a7f96ce007c5710e8efc61dcd3b39: I lost the key to my reward.
textByHashes.c957f8ab063f9c6a605ef3a178be282768f69c98: The General said I would find my reward near where the fish-men gather. I don't know what he means!
textByHashes.e75fb0d6eaca01ffc150cc2256e14dc1e5bbd262: What the...! It's Bouncer, Khazard's hell hound.
textByHashes.4214d2822bec8b1d3027176d3ea37fc6eedf1245: Khazard tricked me! This is no reward, he's trying to get me killed...AGAIN!
textByHashes.376eb45d57a4e356633308e24f2026617f0bcc58: Hmm, I'd better not go in without the leg, I mean key. Khazard said I wouldn't get my reward without it.
textByHashes.d8b1bf3a4c79e7b5ec315c56a552c13b135e843f: Interesting... It's like some sort of ritual.
textByHashes.584b667b30a54d8cf6cc9fd0aac996fff94530f9: Hmm... Well, why don't we take a closer look at this totem?
textByHashes.e2d9e10c51b3afa374db813ff38c04dfdb1fdd67: I'm not sure 'we' is the right word...
textByHashes.76bc74986d4318db01b31597f1dd9e7b5bdebbc0: So we need to fix the totem. How?
textByHashes.3a03084480088123e37af04cad6b856ace861a64: Or survive interference from... you know... us.
textByHashes.5858e4dc2bf3eea3833dbd0971fcb7b373612aa9: Well, I guess you can consult with Isadora on how to carve the totem. While you do that, I'll get to work on rebuilding the pole.
textByHashes.f29dc872a2ad23b74a4f7be09df614788a312788: Ah, sorry to have disturbed you then.
textByHashes.f871d991bb5d154cac244a0527403a3e699f5822: Hello again. If you don't mind me saying, you seem quite preoccupied.
textByHashes.d85572481bb113ba9b7a49d4ea94efe8a03e08a5: I supposed that makes sense. I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.8d1bc82a06e06b4dab44e75035a056d1e2e1fda4: Okay then. So wooden items? You mean things like bows and shields?
textByHashes.a739d2644c632f3c575f26e957f91ae2e0081366: Okay, I'll be back once I've done that.
textByHashes.014c41955f96a9e4a2c41bc3df6a8499d2b9c3da: There we go! I's say that's the totem finished!
